# Resonance Dream Sandbox ‚ÄĒ prototype index

This is the single page Karel opens each morning. It mirrors the live
index at `/dream/` (the Vercel preview URL). Click a route to play
with the prototype; click the design notes link to read the agent's
thinking.

Status legend: `skeleton` (route exists, not yet interactive) ¬∑
`wip` (partial) ¬∑ `demoable` (works, rough) ¬∑ `polished` (refined).

---

### [2136-communion](/dream/2136-communion) ¬∑ psychedelic / ecstatic mystical-union ¬∑ **an ecstatic mystical UNION you PLAY with your hands ‚ÄĒ each finger is a "voice of the self"; the more voices you hold together, the denser a web of sympathetic-resonance threads that BINDS every pair (hyperconnectivity), until the detuned voices lock onto a shared Bohlen‚ÄďPierce lattice and the many bloom into ONE over-bright radiant whole. The INVERSE of dissolution: union as a GAIN of connection, not the self draining away.** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 855), 1 of 3 parallel substrate-approaches to ONE ecstatic-union concept. **The deliberate anti-monotheme move:** the 2026-07-21 jury named the lab's four-straight *dissolution* ships (2080/2094/2100/2108 ‚ÄĒ the self peeling/draining/melting) and ordered #1 "make the next piece **PLAYED**, multi-parameter, not one autonomous knob" + #2 "kill the dissolution monotheme ‚ÄĒ build the **ECSTATIC / UNION** pole ‚Ä¶ `2122` already tried the binding inversion, **push that direction**." This pushes exactly there: ecstatic over-connection you drive live. Grounded in this-cycle research (RESEARCH ¬ß855): **"Dynamic Functional Hyperconnectivity After Psilocybin Intake Is Primarily Associated With Oceanic Boundlessness," _Biological Psychiatry: CNNI_** (live in 2026-06 coverage ‚ÄĒ EurekAlert/Elsevier 2026-06-15) ‚ÄĒ ecstatic union is a recurrent whole-brain **HYPER-connected** state tracking oceanic boundlessness + unity (NOT the DMN going quiet); paired with **"Oceanic states of consciousness ‚ÄĒ an existential-neuroscience perspective," _Frontiers in Human Neuroscience_ 19 (2025)** ‚ÄĒ the **PAG** as the pivot between embodiment and transcendence, so the union is **visceral / INTENSE**, not a calm fade; phenomenology anchor **ecstatic ("Dostoevsky") seizures** (Picard & Craig / Gschwind ‚ÄĒ anterior-insula hyperactivation ‚Üí "unity with everything," bliss). **Named refs:** Biol. Psychiatry CNNI hyperconnectivity‚ÜĒoceanic-boundlessness ¬∑ Frontiers Hum. Neurosci. 19 (2025) PAG ¬∑ ecstatic-seizure (Picard & Craig / Gschwind). **INPUT = multi-touch (Pointer Events, up to ~10 fingers, phone-native; mouse = one voice) ‚ÄĒ genuinely multi-parameter, PLAYED, NOT one master dial: the COUNT of held voices drives web density; each voice's X‚ÜíBohlen‚ÄďPierce pitch, Y‚Üíbrightness/timbre; pointer movement/velocity‚Üívibrato + thread shimmer. The communion coupling `K` is a slew-limited FOLLOWER of your sustained polyphony (climbs while ‚Č•2 voices held, faster with more, gently releases on lift) ‚ÄĒ NOT a self-running 0‚Üípeak‚Üí0 timeline (breaks the jury-banned single-scalar-morph). NOT autonomous (jury-banned play model). NOT keyboard/MIDI (2130 used those last cycle).** **OUTPUT = Canvas2D additive light-web (`globalCompositeOperation = "lighter"`) ‚ÄĒ jury-celebrated/healthy substrate; the additive compositing is the ONLY substrate in the fan that sums to a genuine over-bright radiant PEAK, which IS the thesis ("the many lock into one over-bright whole"). Explicitly NOT WebGL2-fullscreen-fragment-shader (jury-banned 4√ó, GPU 8/15 cooled), NOT three.js, NOT SVG-DOM.** **TECHNIQUE = played hyperconnectivity: nodes = voices, edges = sympathetic-resonance threads between EVERY pair (denser web with more voices); as `K` rises threads brighten/thicken with a shimmer bead traveling each, node positions are pulled toward one center (the many‚Üíone), a central communion bloom intensifies, and the harmonic LOCK resolves each voice's detune by `detune¬∑(1‚ąíK)` onto the nearest integer BP lattice step ‚Üí one over-bright consonant chord at peak.** **AUDIO = additive odd-harmonic (clarinet-like) `PeriodicWave` voices on the Bohlen‚ÄďPierce scale (13-ED of the tritave 3:1, step 3^(1/13); NOT pentatonic, NOT a JI major/minor stack ‚ÄĒ clears the harmonic regression the jury re-banned 2026-07-21) + a `K`-gated sympathetic shimmer + a union drone bus that swells with polyphony; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; gesture-gated `AudioContext`; full node teardown on unmount.** **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ a seeded (mulberry32 @ `0x2136`, never `Math.random`/`Date.now` in loops) autopilot eases ~3 voices in after ~4 s of silence and holds them so the union builds; yields instantly on first pointer input, so the page is never dead. ¬∑ cycle 855 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-21) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: ecstatic mystical union / oceanic boundlessness (over-connection) ¬∑ pole: intense / ecstatic (union BUILDS, not dissolution) ¬∑ input: multi-touch (played, multi-parameter) ¬∑ output: Canvas2D additive light-web ¬∑ technique: played hyperconnectivity coupling-web + harmonic lock onto BP lattice ¬∑ harmony: Bohlen‚ÄďPierce (non-octave, odd-harmonic) ¬∑ palette: radiant violet‚Üígold on dark (canvas art only) ¬∑ needs-a-human: multi-touch (autopilot self-demos) ¬∑ nearest-neighbor: 2130-entity-parliament is a played ENTITY encounter (a presence arrives); this is a played UNION (the many become one) ‚ÄĒ and 2122-last-coherence binds motes AUTONOMOUSLY, this is binding you PLAY`. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: multi-touch input engine + hyperconnectivity coupling/harmonic-lock sim + Canvas2D additive renderer + BP odd-harmonic synth + union drone bus = ‚Č•4) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (references RESEARCH ¬ß855 added THIS cycle ‚ÄĒ the winner *implements* the hyperconnectivity‚ÜĒoceanic-boundlessness finding as a played coupling term; visible research‚Üíbuild chain). #1 NOT claimed (coupling/graph-binding exists in-lab ‚ÄĒ 2122 binds motes, Kuramoto pieces phase-lock ‚ÄĒ the honest novelty is *hyperconnectivity as a PLAYED multi-touch instrument with harmonic lock*, not a virgin primitive). **diversity:** `banned` = jury-2026-07-21 [autonomous/no-live-input play model (~5√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-fullscreen-fragment-shader output (4√ó) ¬∑ single-scalar phenomenology-morph technique (~7√ó) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient DISSOLUTION content (4-straight) ¬∑ pentatonic/just-pentatonic harmony] + grooves [three.js 3√ó ¬∑ WebGL2 4√ó ¬∑ GPU 8/15]; `picked` = [multi-touch PLAYED input ¬∑ Canvas2D additive output ¬∑ hyperconnectivity coupling-web technique ¬∑ Bohlen‚ÄďPierce harmony ¬∑ INTENSE ecstatic-UNION vibe] ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban (Canvas2D is celebrated/not-banned; diversity from the last ship 2130 comes on input [keyboard/MIDI‚Üímulti-touch] + technique [gaze-steering‚Üícoupling-web] + content [entity‚Üíunion]). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 2136-communion(win) ¬∑ 2138-one-weave(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, SVG-DOM minority-substrate sibling) ¬∑ 2140-become-ocean(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, audio-only HRTF union). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ `K`/bloom are slew-limited and all luminance ‚Č™ 3 Hz; the only pulse is an opt-in, off-by-default `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` glow (‚Č§3 Hz, prefers-reduced-motion honored). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; ### [2122-last-coherence](/dream/2122-last-coherence) ¬∑ **the near-death experience rendered NOT as a tunnel-to-light you travel down, but as the dying brain's own memory igniting into a single COHERENCE SURGE ‚ÄĒ ~200k scattered "memory-motes" that suddenly SNAP into brilliant connected constellations (your whole life binding together at once), converge into one boundless light, then release and disperse; ~6 min, autonomous, looping** ¬∑ **what if a near-death vision weren't a place you go, but the brain's last internally-generated SIMULATION ‚ÄĒ built from its own memory-material, ignited by a gamma binding surge?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 853), 1 of 3 parallel substrate-approaches to ONE cosmic-ambient concept. **The deliberate anti-"too-similar" move:** `1041-nde-tunnel` already did the classic wormhole-to-a-being-of-light (even a "gamma clarity-snap"), so a straight tunnel is the trap ‚ÄĒ this builds the *un-built half*, the **life-review as a coherence PHASE-TRANSITION** (the visual INVERSE of ¬ß851's `2108-remap-field` de-coherence: here altered-state = a rare OVER-coherence *binding*). Grounded in real neuroscience: **Jimo Borjigin et al., "Surge of neurophysiological coupling and connectivity of gamma oscillations in the dying human brain," _PNAS_ 120 (2023)** ‚ÄĒ at death gamma power spikes up to **~300√ó baseline** in the temporo-parieto-occipital junction (the TPJ tied to out-of-body experience and conscious *binding*), with long-range coupling to prefrontal cortex of the kind that could *encode memories* ‚ÄĒ and the freshness anchor **"Near-death visions as a final internally-generated simulation," _Frontiers in Psychology_ (March 2026)** ‚ÄĒ the dying brain replays its OWN stores (memory, emotion, belief, imagery) as a last simulation, not an external realm; phenomenology anchor **Raymond Moody, _Life After Life_ (1975)** (the panoramic life review). Serves the **cosmic-ambient pole the jury 2026-07-20 named the lab's single biggest blind spot**, and executes its provocation #1 ("bring a fresh state ‚ÄĒ NDE tunnel-to-light") on the *unbuilt* mechanic. **Named refs:** Borjigin _PNAS_ 2023 ¬∑ _Frontiers_ March 2026 ¬∑ Moody 1975. **Input:** **audio-file (optional) / autonomous** ‚ÄĒ Karel's real Path piano *as the memory material* (the "brain's own stores" = his recorded music; drop a track ‚Üí local `decodeAudioData`, NO network, and its windowed grains become the surfacing memories); a **deterministic seeded generative-piano carrier** (mulberry32 @ `0x2122`, warm 3:1 FM, sparse‚Üídense‚Üísustained-chord‚Üíthinning) self-plays so it's always alive headless with zero input. **NOT pointer** (jury-banned 5√ó), **NOT mic** (over-used), **NOT device-tilt** (2√ó recent). **Output:** **WebGPU compute** ‚ÄĒ the jury 2026-07-20 **explicitly un-held lane (#4 substrate ping-pong: "pick the lane that's never the default and hold it")**, **0√ó across the recent 847‚Üí852 window** (three.js 2√ó at 847/850, WebGL2 2√ó at 851/852, Canvas2D 2√ó at 848/849). ~200k memory-motes as GPU compute particles in a storage buffer; a `@compute` shader integrates each mote each frame (dispersal force when coherence `C` is low ‚Üí attraction to its assigned constellation centroid + a cohesion binding term scaled by `C` as the surge rises ‚Üí all 24 centroids converge toward one radiant point at the Boundless peak ‚Üí release on RETURN); instanced additive render (void-violet ‚Üí warm-gold ‚Üí white-gold with `C`). **The robustness that makes a WebGPU ship safe headless:** all fallible setup (adapter/device/shader-module/pipeline) runs inside a `pushErrorScope("validation")` + try/catch and the canvas `webgpu` context is configured **only after every pipeline validates**, so any failure falls cleanly through to a **complete Tier-2 Canvas2D field** (~3,200 motes running the SAME FADING‚ÜíSURGE‚ÜíBOUNDLESS‚ÜíRETURN binding read ‚ÄĒ a genuine, hand-verifiable per-particle sim, not a stub), then a Tier-3 on-brand `text-destructive` notice; **audio plays on all tiers**. So Karel's morning review sees a real on-concept render whether or not his Chrome exposes WebGPU. **Audio (Web Audio):** the seeded/dropped piano fragments over a slow just-intonation drone (`_shared/psych/droneBank`) + a code-generated void reverb (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`), everything through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; **continuous/granular only ‚ÄĒ no struck-bell events**, and specifically NEVER the jury-banned inharmonic Chladni ratios `1, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93`. AudioContext gesture-gated (Begin); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, `device.destroy()`, audio stop, `AudioContext.close()`). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ `C` is a slow ~120 s luminance ramp, slew-limited (`stepToward`, ‚Č™ 3 Hz), and `prefersReducedMotion()` further calms motion. **Degrades:** no WebGPU ‚Üí Canvas2D; no Canvas2D ‚Üí notice; no Web Audio ‚Üí notice + visuals still run. `state: near-death / gamma-surge coherence-binding life-review (the "final internally-generated simulation") ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ¬∑ input: audio-file (Path piano, optional) + seeded carrier / autonomous ¬∑ output: WebGPU compute (Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ technique: coherence phase-transition ‚ÄĒ a memory-mote field BINDING into constellations (inverse of dissolution) ¬∑ harmony: seeded/granular piano + JI drone (no struck events, non-Chladni)`. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems: Path-piano/seeded carrier + analyser/grain engine + WebGPU-compute mote field + gamma-surge `C` state-engine + convergence camera-arc = ‚Č•4 ¬∑ #3 named refs Borjigin _PNAS_ 2023 / _Frontiers_ March 2026 / Moody 1975 ¬∑ #5 references RESEARCH ¬ß853 added THIS cycle ‚ÄĒ the winner *implements* its coherence-binding finding, visible research‚Üíbuild chain; **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ WebGPU-compute exists lab-wide [`130-tsl-particle-compute`] and NDE was done [`1041`], the honest novelty is the *life-review-as-binding-surge* mechanic + Path-piano-as-memory-material, not a virgin primitive). **Diversity ¬ß853:** `banned=[pointer(5√ó)¬∑SVG-DOM(4√ó)¬∑illusion-made-audible(4√ó)¬∑Chladni bell]` + recent grooves `[three.js 2√ó (847/850)¬∑WebGL2 2√ó (851/852)¬∑Canvas2D 2√ó (848/849)¬∑device-tilt 2√ó¬∑mic over-used]`; picked `input=audio-file/autonomous ¬∑ output=WebGPU-compute ¬∑ technique=coherence-binding ¬∑ pole=cosmic-ambient` ‚ÄĒ off every ban and every recent substrate groove (WebGPU-compute is the un-grooved lane). **NOT eye/ear-verified headless** (no GPU/display/speakers): the live WGSL compile/validate on a real driver, the 200k-mote additive-blend look + perf, the tier-1‚Üítier-2 fall-through itself, and the piano/drone balance are reasoned + tsc/eslint-clean + winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (EXIT 0, `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted) only ‚ÄĒ but the Canvas2D fallback is verified-by-design as the safe path. **The two DEEP non-winners banked to IDEAS ¬ß853:** ‚≠ź‚≠ź `2124-life-review` (three.js `THREE.Points` + visible binding threads ‚ÄĒ the most legible sibling; resurrect three.js-rested / GPU-verifiable) + ‚≠ź `2126-binding-surge` (WebGL2 GPGPU state-in-a-texture particle sim; resurrect WebGL2-rested). **demoable**

### [2114-hyperbolic-curvature](/dream/2114-hyperbolic-curvature) ¬∑ **a playable DMT-breakthrough instrument with ONE dial ‚ÄĒ spatial curvature őļ. Play the home row: each key strikes a jeweled FM pluck AND bends space. At őļ=0 a calm near-Euclidean tiling; crank őļ and the raymarched field folds toward a hyperbolic ({7,3}-style Poincar√©-disk) proliferation, iridescent, "more axes than reality allows" ‚ÄĒ structure BUILDS UP, it never dissolves** ¬∑ **what if a DMT breakthrough weren't "more shapes" but a change in the CURVATURE of space itself ‚ÄĒ and you could turn that dial?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 852), 1 of 3 parallel INTENSE-pole explorers. **The deliberate register-change:** the prior four ships (847 OBE ¬∑ 849 dissociation ¬∑ 850 cathedral-drift ¬∑ 851 ego-dissolution) were ALL cosmic-ambient *dissolution* (structure melting away) ‚ÄĒ this swings to the **INTENSE pole** the jury 2026-07-20 named starved, and answers its specific ask for "**a DMT breakthrough geometry that isn't log-polar**." Grounded in this-cycle research (RESEARCH ¬ß852): **Andr√©s G√≥mez Emilsson / QRI, *The Hyperbolic Geometry of DMT Experiences*** + the **DMTLand** atlas ‚ÄĒ the reframe that DMT space is *negatively-curved 3-space* with a **variable hyperbolicity parameter**, so intensity = rising curvature (a single buildable dial, like ¬ß846's oneirogen őĪ but spatial). **Named refs:** QRI hyperbolic-DMT (G√≥mez Emilsson) ¬∑ DMTLand. **Input:** **keyboard (home row `A S D F G H J K L ;`) + optional Web MIDI ‚ÄĒ a PLAYABLE live instrument** (Karel's #3 care: live-performance fitness); each note both strikes a voice and blooms őļ. **NOT pointer** (jury-banned 5√ó), **NOT mic** (over-used), **NOT audio-file** (2√ó recent). **Output:** **WebGL2 fragment-shader raymarch** on a full-screen triangle (jury-celebrated back-on; 1√ó at 2108, healthy; NOT three.js/Canvas2D/SVG). **The curvature engine:** a folded distance estimator (Mandelbox-family KIFS) whose affine `SCALE` interpolates from positive/open (Euclidean repeating cells) toward negative with a tighter sphere-fold inversion radius ‚Üí space crowds and folds toward a Poincar√©-disk-like boundary; an **N-fold kaleidoscope** whose symmetry count grows with őļ adds the extra axes. **Deliberately NOT the inverse-log-polar `exp()` form-constant warp** (that psychedelic groove is banned) ‚ÄĒ the saddle/Poincar√© folded SDF is the sanctioned target. **Shading:** thin-film **iridescence** (spectral interference phased by view-angle + surface thickness, neon electric-blue/green/magenta gamut) + a proliferation glow that brightens with őļ and strike-energy. **Sound (Web Audio):** 2-operator **FM** struck voices (carrier + integer-ratio modulator, decaying mod-index ‚Üí jeweled mallet/pluck) on a **just major-pentatonic** melodic scale (`1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3` stacked); feedback-delay shimmer + soft-clip limiter. **Explicitly NOT the inharmonic Chladni glass-plate strike `1:2.76:5.40:8.93`** (jury-banned). **Autopilot:** seeded `mulberry32` + accumulated frame-clock self-play (notes + slow őļ sweep) so it animates + sounds headless with zero input ‚ÄĒ no `Math.random`/`Date.now` in deterministic paths. **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ őļ/camera motion slow + continuous, optional breathing via shared `SafeFlicker` clamped ‚Č§3 Hz (running ~0.2 Hz). **Degrades:** no WebGL2 ‚Üí on-brand notice; no Web MIDI ‚Üí keyboard still fully plays. `state: DMT-breakthrough / hyperbolic-curvature ¬∑ pole: intense ¬∑ input: keyboard + optional MIDI (playable) ¬∑ output: WebGL2 raymarch ¬∑ technique: curvature-dial folded-SDF (Euclidean‚Üíhyperbolic) + kaleidoscope + thin-film iridescence ¬∑ harmony: FM plucks on just major-pentatonic (non-Chladni)`. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#3 named refs QRI/DMTLand ¬∑ #5 references RESEARCH ¬ß852 added THIS cycle ‚ÄĒ the winner *implements* the curvature reframe, visible research‚Üíbuild chain ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems: raymarch SDF + curvature/kaleidoscope engine + FM voice engine + keyboard/MIDI input = 4; **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 4D/hyperbolic geometry [1714/1770/1044] and raymarch exist in-lab, the honest novelty is *curvature-as-a-single-playable-dial*, not a virgin primitive). **Diversity ¬ß852:** `banned=[pointer(5√ó)¬∑SVG-DOM(4√ó)¬∑illusion-made-audible(4√ó)¬∑Chladni bell] + last-10 audit: cosmic-ambient DISSOLUTION vibe (‚Č•4√ó: 2080/2094/2100/2108) ¬∑ Canvas2D output (2√ó recent)`; picked `input=keyboard/MIDI ¬∑ output=WebGL2-raymarch ¬∑ technique=curvature-dial ¬∑ pole=INTENSE (not dissolution)` ‚ÄĒ off every ban and the recent groove. **NOT GPU-compiled headless** (no GL/display/speakers in CI): the live GLSL ES 3.00 compile/link on a real driver, raymarch perf (‚Č§96 steps √ó 8-iter DE + 6-tap normal, pixel-ratio capped at 2), and audio balance are reasoned + tsc/eslint-clean + winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (EXIT 0, `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted) only; degrades gracefully. **Two WIDE non-winners banked to IDEAS ¬ß852:** ‚≠ź‚≠ź `2116-chrysanthemum` (WebGPU-compute Gray‚ÄďScott reaction-diffusion bloom ‚ÄĒ holds the jury's un-held compute lane; TOP resurrect) + ‚≠ź `2118-tracer-lattice` (three.js feedback-trail LSD tracers, audio-file drop). **demoable**

### [2108-remap-field](/dream/2108-remap-field) ¬∑ **watch the map of your self lose its borders ‚ÄĒ ~40 distinct glowing territories, each its own voice, whose seams diffuse and melt into one boundless violet plasma, then re-crystallize into a DIFFERENT map (you come back re-organized, not restored)** ¬∑ **what if ego-dissolution were rendered not as geometry but as the DESYNCHRONIZATION that dissolves the distinctions between your inner networks?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 851), 1 of 3 parallel approaches to ONE cosmic-ambient concept. Grounded in real 2026 neuroscience: **Siegel, Nichols, Dosenbach et al., "Psilocybin desynchronizes the human brain," *Nature* 2024** ‚ÄĒ ego-dissolution = brain **desynchronization across spatial scales that dissolves network distinctions**, and the re-organization **persists for weeks** (you don't snap back to the same self). The grep-0√ó mechanic is **return-to-a-different-map**: every prior dissolve/return piece in the lab returns to *baseline*; this one re-crystallizes with new borders, hues, and voices. Serves the **cosmic-ambient pole the jury 2026-07-20 named the lab's single biggest blind spot**. **Named refs:** *Nature* 2024 (Siegel/Nichols) ¬∑ Refik Anadol data-territory "living architecture." **Input:** **keyboard depth-steer + autonomous arc** ‚ÄĒ ‚ÜĎ/`]` deeper, ‚Üď/`[` shallower, Space = let-go (hand control back to the arc); everything self-demos from load with zero input. **NOT pointer** (jury-banned 5√ó), **NOT mic** (over-used), **NOT device-tilt** (2√ó recent). **Output:** **WebGL2** ‚ÄĒ a `#version 300 es` fragment shader on a fullscreen triangle (from `gl_VertexID`, no vertex buffers, no textures; 40 seed positions+colors as uniforms). **The freshest substrate: WebGL2 is 0√ó in the recent 847‚Üí850 window** (three.js 2√ó at 847/850, Canvas2D 2√ó at 848/849) ‚ÄĒ the cleanest cash of the jury's substrate-ping-pong provocation. **The dissolution mechanism is ONE shader term:** a per-pixel **softmin over all seeds whose temperature rises as `coherence` falls** ‚ÄĒ tiny temp = hard nearest-seed Voronoi cells (the bounded self); large temp = every seed contributes equally ‚Üí one homogeneous plasma (network distinctions dissolved). Thin dark borders (where the nearest two territories are ~equidistant) fade out entirely as coherence‚Üí0; an animated 2-octave value-noise domain-warp breathes the field; a filmic tone-map keeps highlights from clipping to a flash. On the RETURN the seeds move + hues re-roll (deterministic `mulberry32` keyed on a cycle integer) ‚Üí a genuinely new parcellation. **Audio (Web Audio):** a 20-voice drone bank ‚ÄĒ each territory = 1‚Äď3 detuned oscillators ‚Üí per-voice lowpass ‚Üí `StereoPanner` (panned by seed-x), Lydian pitches on a slowly drifting root; as coherence drops EVERY voice glides toward a common center pitch and filters converge ‚Üí one boundless pad at the floor, then re-differentiates to a NEW pitch set on return. **Continuous drone only ‚ÄĒ no struck/plucked events** (trivially off the jury-banned Chladni bell). Master ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; AudioContext gesture-gated (Begin); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, oscillator stop, `WEBGL_lose_context`, `AudioContext.close()`). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ `coherence` is slew-limited upstream and the warp/breath run at fractions of a Hz; all luminance changes are slow drifts ‚Č™ 3 Hz. **Degrades:** no WebGL2 ‚Üí on-brand `text-destructive` notice; no Web Audio ‚Üí notice + visuals still render. `state: ego-dissolution via desync (the self's map losing + re-drawing its borders) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ¬∑ input: keyboard-steer + autonomous ¬∑ output: WebGL2 fragment-shader parcellation ¬∑ technique: softmin-temperature border-dissolution + re-map ¬∑ harmony: Lydian drone bank merging to one pad (no struck events, non-Chladni)`. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems: parcellation/softmin shader + 20-voice territory drone bank + 4-phase arc controller + keyboard-steer = 4 ¬∑ #3 named refs *Nature* 2024 + Anadol ¬∑ #5 references RESEARCH ¬ß851 added THIS cycle ‚ÄĒ the winner *implements* its desync-dissolves-distinctions finding; **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ Voronoi is used 8√ó in-lab, the honest novelty is the *borders-diffusing-as-desync* + *return-to-a-different-map* mechanics, not a virgin primitive). **Diversity ¬ß851:** `banned=[pointer(5√ó)¬∑SVG-DOM(4√ó)¬∑illusion-made-audible(4√ó)¬∑Chladni bell]` + recent grooves `[Canvas2D 2√ó (848/849)¬∑three.js 2√ó (847/850)¬∑device-tilt 2√ó¬∑mic over-used]`; picked `input=keyboard ¬∑ output=WebGL2 ¬∑ technique=parcellation-softmin-dissolve ¬∑ pole=cosmic-ambient` ‚ÄĒ off every ban and every recent groove (WebGL2 is the un-grooved substrate). **NOT eye/ear-verified headless** (no GPU/display/speakers): the live shader compile/link on a real driver, the plasma read at the floor, and the drone balance at real levels are reasoned + tsc/eslint/compile-verified only (winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` emitted `page.js`); degrades gracefully (autonomous arc self-demos, WebGL2/Web-Audio failures show on-brand notices). **The two DEEP non-winners banked to IDEAS ¬ß851:** ‚≠ź‚≠ź `2110-remap-mosaic` (Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ the lowest-risk, most hand-verifiable sibling; resurrect on a Canvas2D-wanting cycle) + ‚≠ź `2112-remap-shell` (three.js volumetric self-shell that melts to an orb; resurrect three.js-rested / GPU-verifiable). **demoable**

### [2100-veil-cathedral](/dream/2100-veil-cathedral) ¬∑ **drift through a vast breathing cathedral of light ‚ÄĒ ~44k luminous points formed into a toroidal nave of nested shells and vaulted ribs, the camera travelling endlessly *through* the volume as your music's spectrum sculpts it in real time** ¬∑ **what if your own piano recording became a cosmic-ambient space you inhabit rather than watch?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 850), 1 of 3 divergent altered-states explorers. Cashes two standing Karel directives at once ‚ÄĒ *use his real piano as the input* and *AI/Anadol volumetric-you-inhabit* ‚ÄĒ in the meditative-boundlessness pole the jury 2026-07-20 named under-served. **Named ref:** **Refik Anadol's DATALAND** (The Grand LA, opened June 2026 ‚ÄĒ volumetric data-architecture you move through); RESEARCH ¬ß850's current-2026 volumetric-GPU thread (ASTRODITHER three.js-WebGPU + DATALAND). **Input:** **`audio-file`** ‚ÄĒ drop your own track (ideally solo piano / ambient), decoded via `decodeAudioData` and routed through the SAME `AnalyserNode` so it drives the geometry; a **seeded `mulberry32` generative ambient-piano carrier** (soft-attack/long-release voices over a detuned minor-pentatonic drone ‚ÄĒ continuous/pad, never struck bells or inharmonic glass) self-plays by default so it's always alive headless with zero input ‚ÄĒ the jury-named **under-used clean input** (NOT pointer/mic/tilt, all off-limits). **Output:** **three.js** ‚ÄĒ ~44k `THREE.Points` (20k under `prefers-reduced-motion`) as a toroidal nave; a custom additive `RawShaderMaterial` breathes the points on the GPU; a slow deterministic camera travels around/through the ring (endless, no teleport). **NOT Canvas2D** (rested this cycle after 848/849's 2√ó), **NOT SVG-DOM** (jury-banned 4√ó). **What drives what:** FFT split into 3 musical bands ‚ÄĒ **bass** ‚Üí whole-field volume swell (vertex-shader breathing), **mid** ‚Üí nested-shell / vaulted-rib shimmer, **high** ‚Üí the outer sparkle aura; overall loudness ‚Üí a **slew-limited** global brightness (‚Č§~0.9/s, so a loud bass transient can't strobe). **Audio chain:** `carrier + file ‚Üí mix ‚Üí AnalyserNode ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor (limiter) ‚Üí master gain (exp fade-in ~1.5 s, peak ‚Č§ 0.85)`; a dropped file cross-ducks the carrier out; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, `renderer.dispose()`, audio stop, `AudioContext.close()`). **Safety:** no strobe (slew-limited brightness, all luminance oscillation ‚Č™ 3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the camera + thins the cloud. **Degrades:** no WebGL ‚Üí on-brand `text-destructive` notice (the substrate IS the piece); no Web Audio ‚Üí notice; gesture-gated Begin. `state: cosmic-ambient boundlessness (a light-cathedral you inhabit) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ¬∑ input: audio-file (+ seeded carrier) ¬∑ output: three.js volumetric point-field ¬∑ technique: FFT‚Üívolumetric-nave sculpting ¬∑ harmony: minor-pentatonic pad (no struck events, non-Chladni)`. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems: seeded generative carrier + file-drop/FFT analysis + volumetric three.js scene + drift-camera = 4 ¬∑ #3 named ref Anadol DATALAND 2026 ¬∑ #5 references RESEARCH ¬ß850's volumetric-GPU thread added this cycle; **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ volumetric point-fields exist in-lab, the honest novelty is the *inhabited-nave architecture + audio-file-as-carrier* framing, not a virgin primitive). **Diversity ¬ß850:** `banned=[pointer(5√ó)¬∑SVG-DOM(4√ó)¬∑illusion-made-audible(4√ó)¬∑Chladni bell]` + recent grooves `[Canvas2D 2√ó¬∑device-tilt 2√ó¬∑mic over-used]`; picked `input=audio-file ¬∑ output=three.js ¬∑ technique=FFT‚Üívolumetric ¬∑ pole=cosmic-ambient` ‚ÄĒ off every ban and every recent groove. **NOT eye/ear-verified headless** (no display/GPU/speakers): the volumetric read of the nave, the vertex-breath shader's look, and the FFT‚Üífield mapping at real levels are reasoned + tsc/eslint/compile-verified only; degrades gracefully (seeded carrier self-demos). **The two WIDE non-winners banked to IDEAS ¬ß850:** ‚≠ź‚≠ź `2098-drift-fathom` (audio-only HRTF flotation sound-bath ‚ÄĒ the jury's un-held audio-only lane, built to demoable) + ‚≠ź `2102-hollow-fold` (first-person inside-‚Ąć¬≥ hyperbolic raymarch ‚ÄĒ the freshest technique, resurrect GPU-verifiable). **demoable**

### [2094-unself](/dream/2094-unself) ¬∑ **watch your own self peel away from you ‚ÄĒ a 6¬Ĺ-min drug-free dissociation JOURNEY where a luminous point-cloud "you" mirrors your tilt, then a delayed ghost-self peels off (~0.4s‚Üí~3s behind) until you can't tell which is you, the world drains to unreal, you disperse into drifting motes at the peak, then re-coalesce and land** ¬∑ **what if a drug-free journey could stage the whole arc of dissociation ‚ÄĒ depersonalization ‚Üí derealization ‚Üí dissolution ‚Üí return ‚ÄĒ as one long-form piece that ends nowhere near where it began?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 849), 1 of 3 parallel renderers attacking ONE concept. **Cycle 2 of the ¬ß847 out-of-body line ([`2080-exo-vantage`](/dream/2080-exo-vantage))** ‚ÄĒ and the realization of the twice-queued ‚≠ź‚≠ź banked `2084-echo-self` doppelg√§nger mechanic, folded into a genuine multi-phase timeline. **The arc engine is the research payload** (RESEARCH ¬ß849): a single autonomous `D` (0‚Üípeak‚Üí0 over ~390 s, tilt modulates but never resets) drives the three coded consequences of **Bera, Looger, Proekt & Cichon, "Cortical Mechanisms Contributing to Ketamine-Induced Dissociation," _The Neuroscientist_ 2026** ‚ÄĒ (1) **audio-visual DESYNC**: a motion-energy ring buffer feeds the audio its own past, the lag opening toward ~600 ms so the two streams the brain binds come apart; (2) **time dilation**: a global `timeScale` (~1‚Üí~0.38) slows the animation clock AND stretches every DSP glide (`setTargetAtTime` constants scale `1/timeScale`), snapping back on RETURN; (3) palette drain / boundary melt / ghost-delay all scale with `D`. **Input:** device-tilt (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, first reading = baseline; iOS `requestPermission()` on Begin) ‚ÄĒ **NOT pointer** (jury-banned 5√ó), **NOT mic** (over-used); no sensor ‚Üí seeded `mulberry32(0x2094)` auto-drive self-demos the whole arc with zero input (`source: tilt/auto` chip). **Output:** **Canvas2D** (the safest, least-compile-risk substrate ‚ÄĒ point-cloud figure + ring-buffer ghost replay + mote dissolution, additive `"lighter"` glow + luminance trails that lengthen as time dilates) ‚ÄĒ **NOT SVG-DOM** (jury-banned 4√ó). **Audio:** drones only ‚ÄĒ no struck events (trivially off the banned Chladni bell), an irregular non-harmonic cluster; a warm present "you" crossfading to a ghost "you" (detuned ‚ąí30¬Ę, cotton-wool lowpass, mono, delay 0.4‚Üí3 s), a seeded convolution void opening at the peak with a lowpass that opens at the light moment; master 0.14 ‚Üí compressor, full teardown. **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow luminance drift only; `prefers-reduced-motion` softens the mote wander; instant Stop. **Degrades:** no Canvas2D ‚Üí on-brand `text-destructive` notice, audio still runs. `state: depersonalization‚Üíderealization‚Üídissolution (dissociation journey) ¬∑ pole: intense/dissociative ¬∑ input: device-tilt (non-pointer) ¬∑ output: Canvas2D ¬∑ technique: long-form stateful visual-vestibular DESYNC + time-dilation arc ¬∑ harmony: none (drones, non-Chladni)`. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems: tilt engine + phased `D`-journey controller + Canvas2D renderer + desync/time-dilation audio = 4 ¬∑ #3 named refs Bera 2026 / Video ergo sum 2007 / Blanke & Metzinger 2009 / Cento 2026 ¬∑ #4 **multi-cycle** ‚ÄĒ an explicit cycle-2 of the ¬ß847 line, the cash of the jury's 0√ó depth gap ¬∑ #5 references the same-date ¬ß849 RESEARCH dive). **NOT eye/ear-verified headless** (no display/motion-sensor/speakers): the point-cloud read at full mote-dissolve (spread constants may want tuning) and the audibility of the ~600 ms desync/ghost-delay at real levels are reasoned + tsc/eslint/compile-verified only; the audio graph + teardown follow the proven 2080 patterns. Cycle-3 deepening (folded from the 2 non-winners, IDEAS ¬ß849): fold in `2092-egress`'s three.js OBE-**camera** as an alternate "vantage" mode, and `2096-veil-drift`'s view-lags-your-own-head + interpersonal re-sync; also let accumulated tilt engagement actually advance/hold the arc so the pace is the rider's, not the clock's. **demoable**

### [2064-room-cairn](/dream/2064-room-cairn) ¬∑ **the ROOM plays the instrument ‚ÄĒ you build (and un-build) a phasing cairn of collisions hands-free, just by clapping, snapping and tapping into the air, then falling silent** ¬∑ **what if you performed music with your body and your room's acoustics ‚ÄĒ no screen taps at all ‚ÄĒ and could un-build it by going quiet?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 845), 1 of 3 parallel embodied re-inputs of the jury's #1 named standout **[`1990-impact-cairn`](/dream/1990-impact-cairn)** ("Extend this one"). **Cycle 2 of Impact Cairn**, re-inputted off the jury-banned pointer onto the room. **The engine is 1990 verbatim** (modal-impact synthesis ‚ÄĒ no scale, no pitch, deliberately inharmonic, **not the banned Chladni bell**; the consequential editable-memory "un-build" grammar) ‚ÄĒ the only change is the input layer. **The new subsystem is a real onset detector (`onset.ts`):** ambient mic ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 1024) on the engine's own `AudioContext`; per frame it computes **spectral flux** (sum of positive bin-to-bin energy increases), fires a strike on an **adaptive threshold** (rolling mean + margin¬∑std + floor, sensitivity-scaled) with a ~100 ms **refractory** so one clap = one strike; the onset frame's **spectral centroid** picks the MATERIAL (bright snap >3400 Hz ‚Üí droplet ¬∑ >2200 ‚Üí ceramic ¬∑ >1200 ‚Üí wood ¬∑ dark thud ‚Üí stone) and peak amplitude ‚Üí velocity. **The un-build grammar is intact but now hands-free:** after a ‚Č•2-onset burst falls silent ~1.4 s the figure **auto-lays** into a looping layer, so you build a phasing cairn (Reich) without touching the screen; knock-off (audible loss + tumble), material-transform, mute, clear stay reachable as chrome buttons (the ban is on pointer/touch as the *play* gesture, not on control chrome). Per-strike `navigator.vibrate` haptics. **Output:** dark field, DOM pebbles/stones, no strobe, `prefers-reduced-motion` aware ‚ÄĒ near-non-visual, audio-first (the embodied/audio-only lane jury 2026-07-20 #4 asked the lab to *hold*). **Degrades:** no mic/denied ‚Üí the deterministic seeded ghost keeps performing + on-brand `text-destructive` notice; audio blocked ‚Üí visuals + ghost timing still run. **Self-demo:** a `mulberry32` constant-seed ghost (all timing off the `AudioContext` clock ‚ÄĒ no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`performance.now` in any audio/state path) builds and un-builds forever with zero input, so it renders + demos headless; real onset takes over instantly, re-arms after ~15 s silence. Named refs: **J. P. Bello et al., "A Tutorial on Onset Detection in Music Signals" (2005)** (spectral flux) ¬∑ **Steve Reich, _Clapping Music_** (phasing) ¬∑ **Pauline Oliveros, _Deep Listening_** (eyes-closed listening); 1990's own anchor is Kato & Baba's SIGGRAPH 2026 droplet-impact interface (live this week). `state: embodied percussion / eyes-closed room-play ¬∑ input: mic-onset (non-pointer) ¬∑ output: audio-primary + minimal DOM ¬∑ technique: spectral-flux onset ‚Üí centroid material-classify ‚Üí modal-impact + editable-memory un-build grammar ¬∑ harmony: none (collisions, non-Chladni) ¬∑ pole: embodied/audio-first`. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems: onset detector + modal-impact engine + un-build memory + haptics = 4 ¬∑ #3 named refs Bello/Reich/Oliveros ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle ‚ÄĒ an explicit cycle-2 of 1990, cashing the jury's 0√ó depth gap). **NOT ear/mic-verified headless** (no room sound in CI) ‚ÄĒ the mic path (flux threshold, centroid bands, haptics) is validated by reading `onset.ts` + reasoning; only the ghost + synth + grammar are build-exercised, so real-room tuning needs a live device. Cycle-3 deepening (folded from the 2 non-winners): add **device-motion** (flick‚Üístrike, shake-to-shed) and **MIDI+keyboard + pulse-lock** as alternate input modes ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß845. **demoable**

### [2058-aura-fortress](/dream/2058-aura-fortress) ¬∑ **the migraine visual aura as a drug-free altered-perception journey ‚ÄĒ a shimmering zigzag "fortification" arc creeps across the field, scintillating, dragging a blind scotoma behind it, while a migrating spectral notch carves that blindness into the sound** ¬∑ **what if a screen + sound could induce a real, drug-free altered-perception state ‚ÄĒ the scintillating scotoma of a migraine aura ‚ÄĒ with no drug and no input?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 844), 1 of 3 divergent psychedelic explorers. **Autonomous ‚ÄĒ no pointer/touch/mic;** "Begin" only unlocks audio, then a ~5.5-min journey plays itself. **The visual is a CSD (cortical spreading depression) traveling reaction-front:** a wavefront radius `R(t)` expands from a fixation origin; at the front sits a bright **scintillating band** with procedurally-generated **fortification herringbone zigzags** (band-local `u`/`v` coords, diagonal flips per cell ‚ÄĒ the classic Vauban-rampart look, tangent to the arc); just behind it a desaturated **scotoma** band with faint static, then the field recovers, so the blind region *travels* rather than accumulating; the C-shape's angular half-width grows so the arc opens from a near-central spot into a wide peripheral sweep. Rendered in a **WebGL2 fragment shader** in retinal/screen space ‚ÄĒ **no log-polar/exp() warp (banned), no SVG-DOM (banned)**; degrades to audio-only + on-brand notice if WebGL2 is absent. **Audio is coupled by the SAME per-frame wave-state, not a soundtrack:** the scintillating edge ‚Üí a bandpass-tracked shimmer of drifting inharmonic partials (irrational ratios `1, 1.487, 2.113, ‚Ä¶`), the scotoma ‚Üí two cascaded `notch` biquads that sweep a soft drone so the "blind" region is an **audible traveling hole**; non-JI, non-pentatonic, **not the banned Chladni bell `1/2.76/5.40/8.93`**. Everything migrates over the journey so minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1. **SAFETY:** luminance is a **sinusoidal 2.6 Hz drift (‚Č§3 Hz), floored so it never hits black ‚ÄĒ no hard strobe anywhere;** the audio tremolo shares that same 2.6 Hz LFO; `text-xs` photosensitivity note + instant Stop. Named refs: **Karl Lashley (1941)** self-mapped his own aura, **Aristides Le√£o (1944)** discovered CSD, **McLeod et al. (2025, _Headache_)** ‚ÄĒ the first-ever direct intracranial recording of CSD in a human aura patient (this cycle's ¬ß844 research anchor). `state: migraine aura / scintillating scotoma (drug-free altered perception) ¬∑ input: none/autonomous ¬∑ output: WebGL2 shader ¬∑ technique: CSD traveling reaction-front + fortification zigzags (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ harmony: inharmonic shimmer + migrating notch (non-JI) ¬∑ pole: intense-slow`. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 grep-0√ó CSD/scintillating-scotoma technique + #3 named refs Lashley/Le√£o/McLeod-2025 + #5 ¬ß844 dive). **NOT eye/ear-verified headless** (no display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the CSD wave + notch coupling validated by reading the shader + audio graph; the felt experience is unconfirmed. 2 more explored this fire (‚≠ź `2062-flame-genome` fractal-flame CEV, ‚≠ź `2060-spin-dome` ambisonic spin) ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß844. **demoable**

### [2052-slow-radiance](/dream/2052-slow-radiance) ¬∑ **an autonomous harmonic engine drifts a cluster of spectral voices across a non-octave lattice for 6+ minutes, and a real diffusion-curve light-field re-voices to follow ‚ÄĒ you see the chord you hear** ¬∑ **what if a screen + sound, with no interaction at all, carried you into a boundless meditative state purely by evolving themselves?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 843), 1 of 3 parallel approaches to one concept (autonomous cosmic-ambient diffusion-curve nebula). **Rescues the lab's ‚≠ź‚≠ź banked `diffusion-field` after the jury 2026-07-20 banned pointer/touch input** by making the field autonomous. **Audio LEADS visual (the inversion):** a generative **Bohlen‚ÄďPierce** engine (tritave 3:1 split into 13 equal steps, note = 55¬∑3^(k/13); consonance clusters near the 3:5:7 chord) drives 6 sustained sine+detuned-partial voices that glide (portamento), fade in/out, and slowly reharmonise root+voicing so minute 6 ‚Č† minute 1 ‚ÄĒ genuinely non-octave, **not the banned JI partial-stack, not 12-TET/pentatonic, not the Chladni bell**. Each sounding voice is handed to the field as a **fixed Dirichlet colour cell** (pitch-class ‚Üí angle, register ‚Üí radius, role ‚Üí warm bone/gold/amber + one teal accent). **The field is a real Poisson/Laplace relaxation, not a blur:** WebGL2 ping-pong Jacobi, ~200√ó200 RGBA8, ~24 passes/frame on a persistent (trailing) buffer, painterly display (glow + Reinhard tone-map + vignette + grain); degrades to the same rule on a 100√ó100 Canvas2D CPU grid, then to audio-only with an on-brand notice. Autonomous ‚ÄĒ one "Begin" click only unlocks Web Audio; no pointer/mic input. Named ref: Diffusion Curves (Orzan, Bousseau, Winnem√∂ller, Barla, Thollot, Salesin ‚ÄĒ SIGGRAPH 2008; live-2026 thread arXiv:2408.09211); cosmic-ambient lineage Radigue/Eno/Basinski. `state: hypnagogic / meditative boundlessness ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. Multi-cycle #4: cycle-2 = weave in Karel's real Path piano (Paulstretch spectral-freeze) as the audio seed + a mic room-tone deepener. Full teardown. **Not verified on a real display/speakers headless** ‚ÄĒ the felt experience is unconfirmed. **demoable**

### [2046-orbit-transit](/dream/2046-orbit-transit) ¬∑ **the satellites and the ISS passing overhead right now, sung as an evolving Doppler-swept chord ‚ÄĒ music about real traffic in the sky** ¬∑ **what if the sky's orbital traffic became a chord that re-voices as passes rise and set?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 842), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. A seeded constellation of 14 satellites is propagated as circular orbits in a simplified ECI frame; a co-rotating 42¬įN observer converts each to topocentric **range, range-rate, elevation, azimuth** every frame (deterministic ‚ÄĒ mulberry32 seed `0x2046` ‚ÄĒ so the sky is identical on every load and self-drives with zero input). **Each visible pass is one sustained voice:** altitude ‚Üí base register (low orbit brighter/tenser, high orbit lower, log-continuous), **range-rate ‚Üí a continuous Doppler pitch-bend** (approaching rises, departing falls ‚ÄĒ portamento, never a stepped scale), elevation ‚Üí loudness/brightness (peak at zenith), azimuth ‚Üí a real `StereoPannerNode` pan; the current sky IS the current chord, re-voicing as passes begin and end. Voice pool capped 10 with elevation voice-stealing, 2 detuned osc ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí gain-env ‚Üí panner, synth convolution reverb, glue compressor + limiter, master 0.14. **Non-JI ‚ÄĒ no fixed scale, no ratio lattice, no pentatonic**, only continuous glide between physically-derived frequencies. Output is **audio-forward + minimal SVG-DOM** (a hemispherical sky dome built once and attribute-mutated via refs ‚ÄĒ off-GPU; no canvas/WebGL/WebGPU/three). The seeded sim ALWAYS plays offline; on mount one abortable best-effort fetch of a public ISS-position endpoint (3.5 s timeout, try/catch ‚Üí sim) folds one live altitude into the ISS voice and flips the chip to "live". **Opens the never-used orbital-data lane** ‚ÄĒ the strongest anti-"too similar" diversity move in the fan. Named refs: Andrea Polli (*Quiet Skies* / *Sky Score*), Voyager *Symphonies of the Planets*, parameter-mapping sonification, Doppler. `input: real orbital data ¬∑ output: audio-forward + SVG-DOM ¬∑ technique: Doppler sonification ¬∑ harmony: continuous glissando (non-JI) ¬∑ palette: graphite/starlight on near-black ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient-data`. Ambition honest 3/5 (#1 never-used data source + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems + #3 named refs). `status: demoable` ¬∑ [design notes](/dream/2046-orbit-transit) ¬∑ NOT ear/eye-verified headless (no display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the sky animates on mount, the Doppler chord evolves on Begin. 2 more explored this fire (‚≠ź‚≠ź diffusion-field, ‚≠ź tide-glass) ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß842.

### [2036-eternal-groove](/dream/2036-eternal-groove) ¬∑ **a Shepard tone for TEMPO ‚ÄĒ a percussion groove that accelerates (or decelerates) forever without ever actually getting faster, while the underlying pattern is static and loops seamlessly** ¬∑ **what if a groove could accelerate forever without ever actually getting faster ‚ÄĒ the rhythmic transposition of the Shepard/Risset endless-pitch illusion, which the lab has never built?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 841), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. Five percussive layers are stacked one **octave apart in tempo**; in log-tempo space layer *k* sits at `o_k = (phase + k) mod N` and fires at `tempo_k = baseBPM ¬∑ 2^(o_k ‚ąí N/2)`. A **fixed raised-cosine (Hann) window** over the log-tempo axis, `w(o)=0.5‚ąí0.5¬∑cos(2ŌÄ¬∑o/N)`, sets each layer's loudness ‚ÄĒ the window doesn't move, the **layers glide through it**; advancing `phase` slides every layer up (accelerando) or down (ritardando) the octave ladder at once. A layer that reaches the top **wraps to the bottom where the weight is ~0**, so the reset is inaudible and the loop is seamless; because the layers are spaced exactly one octave apart over exactly *N* octaves, the **Hann sum is constant (= N/2) for all phase**, so overall loudness never pulses as layers cross the band. Strike timing comes from `AudioContext.currentTime` via a **~25 ms-poll / ~100 ms-horizon look-ahead scheduler** (the "Tale of Two Clocks"); the `phase` control is integrated in rAF (60 fps) and read by the scheduler (timing off the audio clock, control off rAF). Each strike is a purely **percussive** voice ‚ÄĒ a pitch-swept sine "tom" + a bandpassed-noise transient, higher layers brighter/shorter, lower woodier/longer ‚ÄĒ **NO scale, melody, chord, or pitched drone** (the cleanest possible dodge of the jury-banned JI partial-stack). Opens a **grep-0√ó Risset-rhythm / tempo-illusion lane the lab lacked.** Anchored by the fresh **¬ß841 dive** (three foundational-but-grep-0√ó-in-lab, no-model-budget techniques ‚ÄĒ Risset rhythm, diffusion curves, recurrence plots). ¬∑ **INPUT = tap-tempo** (space / tap anywhere / button sets base BPM) + sweep drag/slider for direction ‚ÄĒ NOT mic (jury 7√ó), NOT tilt, NOT camera. ¬∑ **SUBSTRATE = CSS-compositor** (one DOM ring per tempo layer; rAF writes `transform`/`opacity`/`filter` only ‚ÄĒ **zero canvas / WebGL / WebGPU / SVG-drawn animation**; the coldest, still-flagged substrate lane, off the jury-banned WebGPU/Canvas2D). Full teardown on stop/unmount (cancel rAF, clear scheduler interval, fade + `ctx.close`, remove listeners). ¬∑ **HARMONIC MODEL = pure percussion, NO pitch lattice** (NOT the banned `[1,9/8,‚Ä¶,2]` JI stack ‚ÄĒ there is no scale at all). ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ a plain (non-hook) `RissetRhythmEngine` class owns the graph; AudioContext resumed inside "Begin"; master-gain ramps. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO / readout** ‚ÄĒ ~2 s scripted auto-demo sweeps accelerando‚Üíritardando‚Üíhold on a loop the instant you press Begin, before any input; any manual change hands control to the user. ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe (ring flashes are per-strike brightness bumps decayed in rAF, gated by tempo not a flicker engine); chrome on semantic tokens (warm ink-brass palette confined to the art layer). ¬∑ cycle 841 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: a Shepard tone for tempo ‚ÄĒ a groove that accelerates forever without ever getting faster ¬∑ palette: warm ink-on-paper / aged-brass on dark (NOT violet-cosmic) ¬∑ input: tap-tempo + sweep drag (self-demos with a 2s auto-drive) ¬∑ output: CSS-compositor (concentric DOM rings, transform/opacity only; off the jury-banned WebGPU/Canvas2D) ¬∑ harmony: pure percussion, NO pitch lattice (the cleanest anti-JI-stack dodge) ¬∑ technique: Risset RHYTHM / rhythmic Shepard illusion (grep-0√ó in the tempo domain) ¬∑ pole: perceptual-illusion / rhythmic-instrument (an auditory "altered perception without the drug") ¬∑ needs-a-human: tap the pulse + drag the sweep (auto-demos otherwise)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs **Jean-Claude Risset ‚ÄĒ the "endless accelerando" / rhythmic Shepard-tone illusion** ¬∑ Roger Shepard (endless-pitch original) / Kenneth Knowlton lineage. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #1 (novel technique ‚ÄĒ Risset RHYTHM is grep-0√ó in the tempo domain across ~800 protos; SIGGRAPH 2008] you draw ‚Üí 5-formant synth; the most substantial + beautiful, a cosmic-ambient rebalance) ¬∑ 2040-recurrence-loom(banked ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D Takens/Eckmann recurrence MATRIX of live audio ‚Üí comb-echo; grep-0√ó but more analytical than immersive). **Diversity:** `banned=[WebGPU-primary (jury 5√ó) ¬∑ JI `[1,9/8,‚Ä¶,2]` stack (jury ~7√ó) ¬∑ Kl√ľver/log-polar (jury 4√ó) ¬∑ violet-on-near-black cosmic (jury)] ¬∑ picked=[tap-tempo ¬∑ CSS-compositor ¬∑ Risset-rhythm ¬∑ pure-percussion/no-pitch-lattice ¬∑ ink-brass ¬∑ perceptual-illusion]` ‚ÄĒ all off every ban; the 3 explorers were disjoint on input/output/technique/harmony/palette. **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; banned-pattern + chrome scan clean; plain client route (no generateStaticParams/metadata/API). ### [2028-frost-lattice](/dream/2028-frost-lattice) ¬∑ **grow frost ‚ÄĒ nucleate a seed and watch a dendritic crystal branch outward by diffusion-limited aggregation, where every particle that freezes rings a glassy inharmonic tone, so the fern is literally its own evolving score** ¬∑ **what if a generative-design staple the lab has NEVER used ‚ÄĒ DLA / Brownian-tree growth, almost always shipped as a silent picture ‚ÄĒ were coupled to sound, so the crystal both draws itself and plays itself?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 840), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. Random walkers launch from a circle just outside the current frost, wander with a light inward bias, and **freeze the instant they touch the aggregate** (Witten & Sander 1981); each frozen particle records its parent, so its branch segment is appended to a **single accumulating SVG `<path>`** ‚ÄĒ one DOM node no matter how large the fern grows (a cell-keyed occupancy `Map` gives O(1) neighbour lookups; ~18 live walker `<circle>`s move imperatively). **Every freeze both draws a branch and rings a bell:** a glass-plate **inharmonic** additive tone (partials 1 / 2.76 / 5.40 / 8.93 ‚ÄĒ Chladni-style, NOT integer harmonics, NOT JI, NOT 12-TET/pentatonic) whose fundamental is set continuously by the frozen particle's **radius from the seed**, so outward growth is an ascending shimmer over a low ice-drone; a voice pool + minimum onset spacing make dense growth wash rather than machine-gun. **Tap the field to drop competing nucleation seeds** and watch rival dendrites race. Opens a **grep-0√ó DLA / grow-your-own-score lane the lab lacked.** Anchored by the fresh **¬ß840 dive** (DLA is a beloved generative-design technique the lab has literally never used, almost always shipped silent ‚ÄĒ coupling each freeze to sound makes the fractal its own score). ¬∑ **INPUT = pointer/touch** (tap to seed; self-grows from a centre seed with zero input) ‚ÄĒ NOT mic (jury 7√ó), NOT tilt, NOT camera. ¬∑ **SUBSTRATE = SVG-DOM** (single growing `<path>` + `feGaussianBlur` under-glow; NOT Canvas2D [jury-banned], NOT WebGPU [jury-banned], NOT raw-WebGL2-fragment, NOT three.js). Full teardown on unmount (cancel rAF, dispose audio, close ctx). ¬∑ **HARMONIC MODEL = glass-plate inharmonic partials (NOT the banned `[1,9/8,‚Ä¶,2]` JI stack):** radius‚Üícontinuous fundamental, inharmonic ratios, fast glassy decay. ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ a plain (non-hook) `FrostAudio` class owns the graph; AudioContext resumed inside "Begin"; master 0.16 ‚Üí compressor. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO / readout** ‚ÄĒ grows on its own the instant you press Begin (deterministic PRNG seeded `0x2028`, off the animation clock); a live "N frozen ¬∑ tap to seed" HUD. ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe (steady growth, blurred glow only); chrome on semantic tokens (ice-blue art hex confined to the SVG). ¬∑ **DETERMINISM** ‚ÄĒ mulberry32 seeded `0x2028` + integer frame counter; no `Math.random`/`Date.now` in any sim/audio/render path. ¬∑ cycle 840 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: a frost crystal that grows itself and plays itself ‚ÄĒ diffusion-limited aggregation as a generative score ¬∑ palette: pale ice-blue / frost-white on deep charcoal (NOT violet-cosmic) ¬∑ input: pointer/touch (tap to seed; self-grows) ¬∑ output: SVG-DOM (single accumulating <path>; off the jury-banned Canvas2D/WebGPU) ¬∑ harmony: glass-plate inharmonic bells, radius‚Üíregister (NOT the JI stack) ¬∑ technique: diffusion-limited aggregation (Witten‚ÄďSander 1981; grep-0√ó in-lab) ¬∑ pole: crystalline / meditative (NOT altered-states ‚ÄĒ a calm growth-and-stillness piece) ¬∑ needs-a-human: tap to seed competing dendrites (auto-grows otherwise)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs **T.A. Witten & L.M. Sander, "Diffusion-Limited Aggregation" (1981)** ¬∑ Chladni figures / glass-plate inharmonic partials ¬∑ Wilson Bentley snowflake morphology. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #1 (novel technique ‚ÄĒ DLA is grep-0√ó across ~800 protos) ¬∑ #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: DLA random-walk engine + SVG single-path renderer + inharmonic glass-bell synth + pointer nucleation = 4) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2028-frost-lattice(win) ¬∑ 2026-tide-glass(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź TOP resurrect ‚ÄĒ CSS-compositor tilt-luminous-liquid you HEAR, the coldest starving substrate; cashes jury #1) ¬∑ 2024-tritave-veil(banked ‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ audio-forward Bohlen‚ÄďPierce non-octave drone, cashes jury #2 by name). **Diversity:** `banned=[WebGPU-primary (jury 5√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D (jury 4√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-fragment-as-sole (¬ß785) ¬∑ JI `[1,9/8,‚Ä¶,2]` stack (jury ~7√ó) ¬∑ Kl√ľver/log-polar (jury 4√ó) ¬∑ violet-on-near-black cosmic (jury)] ¬∑ picked=[pointer ¬∑ SVG-DOM ¬∑ DLA ¬∑ inharmonic-glass ¬∑ ice-on-charcoal ¬∑ crystalline]` ‚ÄĒ all off every ban; the 3 explorers were disjoint on input/output/technique/harmony/palette. **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; banned-pattern scan clean; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (winner-only) EXIT 0, `.next/.../2028-frost-lattice/page.js` emitted, losers `2024`/`2026` absent + seeded to IDEAS ¬ß840 pre-build. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the fern reads as vividly on Karel's monitor and whether stacked freezes sound like an evolving shimmer vs busy (the builder flagged the on-lattice walk gives a mildly grid-biased shape, and only the frame's outermost freeze rings during dense bursts). Substrate note: SVG-DOM is warm (3√ó counting this) ‚ÄĒ accepted in exchange for the grep-0√ó technique + strongest ambition floor + best headless legibility; the CSS-compositor cold lane is banked as the TOP resurrect (tide-glass).

### [2020-magnet-basin](/dream/2020-magnet-basin) ¬∑ **play deterministic chaos: release a pendulum into a field of magnets, watch which one captures it trace out an infinitely-detailed fractal boundary, and hear each capture ring as an inharmonic bell** ¬∑ **what if the SAME mature GPU stack everyone points at audio-reactive shader-wallpaper were pointed instead at a real physics toy you can PLAY ‚ÄĒ where a dynamical system, not a fragment shader, generates both the image and the sound?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 839), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. A damped **magnetic pendulum** swings over 3 fixed magnets (copper / brass / verdigris); which magnet finally captures a given release point is a **fractal basin of attraction** ‚ÄĒ nearby starts land on different magnets and the boundary between basins is fractal filigree. The basin field is computed progressively (96¬≤ grid, 3 rows/frame, early-exit settle detection) into a `DataTexture` on a three.js plane, darkened by settle-time so the fractal boundaries glow. **You compose on it:** click/drag to release bobs (each spirals in real time as a bright trajectory `Line`), and every **capture rings the captor magnet's tone**; releasing near a basin boundary produces long wandering uncertain flights (the musically interesting zone). **Drag a magnet** and the whole basin recomputes and RE-TUNES live. Opens a **deterministic-chaos / playable-physics lane the lab lacked** and inverts the "audio-reactive GPU wallpaper" default those July-2026 showcase pieces exemplify (a played instrument, not autonomous wallpaper). Anchored by the fresh **¬ß839 dive** (three.js-2026 / ASTRODITHER = the saturated GPU-shader-wallpaper feed; basins-of-attraction = the grep-0√ó under-explored move). ¬∑ **INPUT = pointer** (click/drag release + magnet-drag reshape; a seeded auto-demo releases 6 bobs on mount so it self-demos; touch not jury-banned) ‚ÄĒ NOT mic (jury 7√ó), NOT keyboard, NOT camera/tilt. ¬∑ **SUBSTRATE = three.js** (`WebGLRenderer` + orthographic camera; textured basin plane + trajectory `Line`s; three.js was 0√ó in the last-10 = the coldest GPU family ‚ÄĒ NOT Canvas2D, NOT raw-WebGL2-fragment-as-sole, NOT WebGPU, NOT SVG-DOM). Full geometry/material/texture/renderer **disposal** on unmount; WebGL-absent ‚Üí readable `text-destructive` notice + an audio-only fallback loop so Begin still produces the evolving chord. ¬∑ **HARMONIC MODEL = geometry-derived 12-TET + inharmonic struck bells (NOT the banned `[1,9/8,‚Ä¶,2]` JI stack):** each magnet owns a pitch from its plane position (`geometryToFreq`, equal-tempered), the capture bell is inharmonic partials (1, 2.01, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93), and a sustained flight voice glides to an inverse-distance pitch blend with the filter opening on speed. ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ a plain (non-hook) audio engine owns the graph; AudioContext resumed inside "Release a bob"; reverb (deterministic IR) ‚Üí limiter ‚Üí ~0.14 master. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO / readout** ‚ÄĒ seeded bobs release on mount; a live HUD shows flying count + per-magnet capture tallies + last captor. ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe (only slow ‚Č§3 Hz halo breathing, disabled under `prefers-reduced-motion`); chrome on semantic tokens (warm-metal art hex confined to the three.js layer). ¬∑ **DETERMINISM** ‚ÄĒ mulberry32 seeded `0x2020` + integer frame counter + AudioContext clock; no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`performance.now` in any physics/audio/render path. ¬∑ cycle 839 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: a playable magnetic-pendulum fractal basin of attraction ‚ÄĒ deterministic chaos you compose on ¬∑ palette: warm-metal (copper/brass/verdigris) on charcoal (NOT violet-cosmic) ¬∑ input: pointer (release + magnet-drag; self-demos) ¬∑ output: three.js (coldest GPU family, 0√ó last-10 ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned Canvas2D/WebGPU/raw-WebGL2) ¬∑ harmony: geometry-derived 12-TET + inharmonic capture bells (NOT the JI stack) ¬∑ technique: magnetic-pendulum ODE + fractal basin-of-attraction map (grep-0√ó in-lab) ¬∑ pole: physics-instrument / deterministic-chaos, kinetic (NOT altered-states ‚ÄĒ a healthy non-psychedelic spread after 837 cosmic-ambient + 838 intense) ¬∑ needs-a-human: the composition is your releases (auto-demo seeds it otherwise)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs the magnetic-pendulum toy ¬∑ **basins of attraction** & sensitive dependence (Poincar√©) ¬∑ deterministic chaos. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #1 (novel technique ‚ÄĒ magnetic-pendulum / basin-of-attraction is grep-0√ó across the lab) ¬∑ #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: ODE integrator + progressive basin-map renderer + three.js scene + inharmonic strike-bell synth + sustained flight voice = 5) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2020-magnet-basin(win) ¬∑ 2018-orbit-transit(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź TOP resurrect ‚ÄĒ audio-forward orbital-traffic Doppler sonification, a real-world-data lane the lab has never used; **built demoable this fire**, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule) ¬∑ 2022-collatz-cairn(banked ‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ CSS-compositor Collatz hailstone-sequence sonification, grep-0√ó number-theory-as-music). **Diversity:** `banned=[WebGPU-primary (jury 5√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D (jury 4√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-fragment-as-sole (¬ß785) ¬∑ JI `[1,9/8,‚Ä¶,2]` stack (jury ~7√ó) ¬∑ Kl√ľver/log-polar (jury 4√ó) ¬∑ violet-on-near-black cosmic (jury)] ¬∑ picked=[pointer ¬∑ three.js ¬∑ magnetic-basin ¬∑ geometry-12-TET+inharmonic ¬∑ warm-metal-on-charcoal ¬∑ physics-instrument]` ‚ÄĒ all off every ban;
