Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß839).

### [2012-enigma-drift](/dream/2012-enigma-drift) ¬∑ **a completely STILL op-art figure that streams with motion generated by your own visual cortex ‚ÄĒ and you can HEAR the illusory rotation** ¬∑ **what if the "altered state without the drug" came not from a featureless field (837) but from its opposite ‚ÄĒ a precisely STRUCTURED still image the cortex sets in motion ‚ÄĒ and that phantom motion drove the sound?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 838), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. A **Leviant *Enigma*** figure (concentric indigo/bone rings crossed by a dense field of ~360 fine radial spokes) sits nearly static in the SVG DOM, yet the rings appear to stream/rotate ‚ÄĒ that motion lives in your visual cortex (microsaccade √ó luminance-edge interactions), not the pixels. Fixating the centre dot **deepens** it (a stillness state machine raises ring contrast + spoke opacity + a sub-0.2 Hz phase drift that re-triggers the illusion as adaptation would otherwise fade it); a flick of the pointer **snaps** it, like a saccade. Opens a **psychedelic-INTENSE lane the lab lacked** while cleanly DODGING the jury-banned log-polar/Kl√ľver engine ‚ÄĒ it's a structured figure, not an `exp()`-warp. Anchored by the fresh **¬ß838 dive** (illusory-motion illusions ‚ÄĒ Leviant *Enigma* / Kitaoka drift / MacKay rays ‚ÄĒ are cortex-generated; the 2026 simulations4all two-tone tool re-frames beating/difference-tones as the honest way to make interference audible). ¬∑ **INPUT = gaze/stillness** (pointer as gaze proxy: fixation deepens, saccade-flick snaps; pointer radius steers the active annulus + audio register) ‚ÄĒ no mic/camera; self-demos on mount. ¬∑ **SUBSTRATE = SVG-DOM** (jury #1 ‚ÄĒ NOT WebGPU/WebGL/Canvas2D/three.js): concentric `<circle>` rings + one `<path>` spoke field + CSS `filter`/`transform`, all animated via a single rAF loop writing attributes imperatively (never React state per frame). ¬∑ **HARMONIC MODEL = beating / difference-tones (jury #2 ‚ÄĒ NOT the banned `[1,9/8,‚Ä¶,2]` JI stack):** two detuned sine banks a few Hz apart whose interference beats at ~1‚Üí6 Hz, the beat rate driven by the perceived-streaming `depth`, through a lowpass + feedback delay for shimmer ‚ÄĒ an interference model, no fixed scale. ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ a plain (non-hook) `EnigmaDrone` class owns the graph; AudioContext created inside the "Begin" gesture (visual already runs before it); graceful `text-destructive` degrade if Web Audio is absent (illusion still works silently); full teardown on unmount. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO / readout** ‚ÄĒ the figure streams the moment the page mounts; a live "perceived streaming" meter shows the depth value climbing as you hold still. ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ the whole point is a STILL image, so ALL luminance change is slow drift (sub-0.2 Hz, contrast clamped), never flicker/strobe; `prefers-reduced-motion` softens the drift further (via `_shared/psych/safeFlicker`); comfortable master gain; chrome on semantic tokens (indigo/bone art hex confined to the SVG). ¬∑ cycle 838 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: a drug-free hallucination from a STILL op-art figure ‚ÄĒ illusory motion you can hear ¬∑ palette: indigo/bone duotone on near-black (NOT violet-cosmic) ¬∑ input: gaze/stillness (pointer proxy) ¬∑ output: SVG-DOM (off the GPU render family ‚ÄĒ jury #1) ¬∑ harmony: beating/difference-tones tracking perceived motion (jury #2, NOT the JI stack) ¬∑ technique: Leviant-Enigma illusory-motion as instrument (structured figure, dodges the banned log-polar engine) ¬∑ state: illusory-motion / op-art perceptual hallucination ¬∑ pole: intense ¬∑ needs-a-human: stare at the centre dot & hold still (self-demos otherwise)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs **Isia Leviant *Enigma* (1981)** ¬∑ **Akiyoshi Kitaoka** peripheral-drift ("Rotating Snakes") ¬∑ **Donald MacKay** rays (1957) ¬∑ beat/difference-tone perception. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: SVG op-art renderer + stillness/saccade illusion-driver engine + beating/difference-tone audio + gaze input) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above). NOT #1 (moir√© exists 2√ó in-lab ‚ÄĒ 1316/899 ‚ÄĒ though illusory-motion-from-a-still-figure is itself grep-fresh; claimed honestly at 2). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2012-enigma-drift(win) ¬∑ 2016-orbit-transit(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź TOP resurrect ‚ÄĒ audio-forward orbital-traffic Doppler sonification, a real-world-data lane the lab has never used) ¬∑ 2014-chroma-loom(banked ‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ CSS-compositor chromagram stained-glass of piano harmony). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; banned-pattern scan clean (no canvas/WebGL/three/WebGPU; no JI stack; no log-polar/spiral/lattice; no font-serif/raw-white chrome; SVG-only figure present); authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (winner-only) ‚ÄĒ losers `rm -rf`'d + seeded to IDEAS ¬ß838 pre-build. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the Enigma streaming reads as vividly on Karel's monitor as intended (illusion strength is display- and viewer-dependent), and whether the beat rate audibly tracks the *perceived* motion ‚ÄĒ the visual self-demos on mount, the drone on Begin. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß838).

### [2010-boundless-void](/dream/2010-boundless-void) ¬∑ **a drug-free Ganzfeld delivered almost entirely through spatialized SOUND ‚ÄĒ the screen near-black, the dissolution happening in your ears** ¬∑ **what if the oceanic-boundlessness / ego-dissolution of a Ganzfeld were carried by the EARS, not the eyes ‚ÄĒ an immersive void you float in on headphones while the screen is nearly dark?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 837), 1 of 3 approaches to ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *a drug-free Ganzfeld chamber that dissolves the figure/ground boundary over 5+ min and lets the viewer's OWN cortex fill the void*, attacked via 3 cold non-GPU substrates; shipped the boldest. **Re-centers Karel's PRIMARY psychedelic/cosmic-ambient direction** after ~6 cycles of data/AI/memory instruments, and cashes the jury 2026-07-19 **#1 in its most radical form** ("go genuinely audio-only / haptic and test the screen bias directly") while expanding the lab's single **thinnest category ‚ÄĒ non-screen / audio-first** (used once, ~5 cycles ago, 1990). Anchored by the fresh **¬ß837 dive**: **arXiv:2507.09011 (July 2026)** "From dots to faces" (imagery capacity predicts what the empty field paints ‚ÄĒ the imagery is generated by the *viewer's* cortex, so a featureless field imposes ZERO geometry and cleanly dodges the jury-banned log-polar/Kl√ľver form-constant lattice). ¬∑ **INPUT = presence** ‚ÄĒ opt-in mic RMS gently modulates drone density/motion, with a clean autonomous ~5.5/min breath fallback (no mic ‚Üí self-drives); no camera/tilt. ¬∑ **SUBSTRATE = audio-forward, minimal-DOM** (jury #1 ‚ÄĒ NOT WebGPU/WebGL/Canvas2D/three.js): ~90% of the piece is sound; the only image is a single warm radial glow (near-black `bg-[#050302]`, warm amber/bone/red CSS `radial-gradient`) that breathes ‚ÄĒ plain CSS on a DOM element, no canvas anywhere. ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = HRTF spatialization as the whole instrument**: four drone voices as `PannerNode`s with `panningModel:"HRTF"` feeding the default `AudioListener`, each at a distinct radius/azimuth/elevation, orbiting on slow alternating clocks with a breathing radius (`applyPannerPosition` prefers the AudioParam API, falls back to `setPosition`) ‚ÄĒ **distance + azimuth become the "space,"** enveloping and out-of-head on headphones ‚ÄĒ over a homogeneous brown-noise Ganzfeld bed. ¬∑ **HARMONIC MODEL = a scale that GLIDES (jury #2 ‚ÄĒ NOT the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]` JI stack):** a small consonant modal set expressed as SEMITONE degrees that each voice *rotates* through over tens of seconds, plus a continuous multi-sine global transpose + a wandering low root drifting the whole scale over minutes; every oscillator chases its target through a 7‚Äď13 s portamento, so minute 5 differs from minute 1 in pitch, density (per-voice fade LFOs) and spatial layout. ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ a plain (non-hook) engine class owns the graph (voices + noise ‚Üí master); AudioContext created inside the "Enter the void" gesture; 6 s gentle master ramp-in (never a sudden blast); rigorous teardown on unmount (stop oscillators, disconnect every panner, cancel rAF, `ctx.close()`). ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO / readout** ‚ÄĒ plays itself the moment you Enter; a live mono readout ("N voices ¬∑ motion ¬∑ X.X min") lets a silent reviewer see it's alive. ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe/flicker; opt-in ‚Č§3 Hz glow drift routed through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` (off by default, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`); comfortable master gain; chrome on semantic tokens. ¬∑ cycle 837 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-20) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: a boundless void carried by the ears ‚ÄĒ drug-free Ganzfeld / oceanic-boundlessness ¬∑ palette: near-black + warm red/amber/bone glow (NOT violet-on-near-black cosmic) ¬∑ input: presence (opt-in mic, autonomous fallback) ¬∑ output: audio-forward + minimal CSS glow (off the GPU render family ‚ÄĒ jury #1) ¬∑ harmony: gliding rotating modal set + drifting transpose, portamento (jury #2 changing-scale, NOT the JI stack) ¬∑ technique: HRTF spatialization as the whole instrument (screen-bias test) ¬∑ state: Ganzfeld / oceanic-boundlessness ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ¬∑ needs-a-human: put on headphones (self-demos otherwise)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs **Wackermann/P√ľtz/Allefeld *Cortex* 2002** ¬∑ thalamo-cortical **decoupling** fMRI (Nature Sci Rep 2020, s41598-020-75019-3) ¬∑ **"Oceanic states of consciousness"** (Frontiers 2026) ¬∑ anchor **arXiv:2507.09011** (Jul 2026). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: HRTF panner graph + brown-noise Ganzfeld bed + gliding-modal drone + presence input + safeFlicker) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß837 dive ‚ÄĒ arXiv:2507.09011, genuinely <14 days). NOT #1 (HRTF has prior lab use ‚ÄĒ 677/1082/1590/1944/744; the fresh axis is HRTF carrying the WHOLE piece as a screen-bias test + the gliding-modal weld). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 2010-boundless-void(win) ¬∑ 2006-boundless-veil(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, the pure-CSS-compositor Ganzfeld field = the `ganzfeld-well` the ¬ß836 MORNING flagged "ship next," now fully built ‚ÄĒ TOP resurrect, most demoable-at-a-glance) ¬∑ 2008-boundless-mist(banked ‚≠ź, SVG-`feTurbulence` Ganzfeld fog ‚ÄĒ fresh SVG-filter-as-whole-field technique). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; banned-pattern scan clean (no canvas/WebGL/three; no JI stack; no log-polar/spiral/lattice; no font-serif/raw-white chrome; real HRTF PannerNode graph present); authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (winner-only) ‚ÄĒ losers `rm -rf`'d + seeded to IDEAS ¬ß837 pre-build. **NOT ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no speakers/headphones): whether the four HRTF voices read as genuinely *outside the head* and enveloping vs merely panned, whether the gliding modal drift lands as calm-evolving vs aimless, and the real out-of-head effect on Karel's headphones ‚ÄĒ the audio-forward path IS the headless path and the piece self-demos on Enter. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß837).

### [2004-oracle-echo](/dream/2004-oracle-echo) ¬∑ **the room speaks and Resonance answers in light + tone ‚ÄĒ TWO real ML models chained live in your browser, $0** ¬∑ **what if Resonance could HEAR the room speak and answer in an evolving field of light and tone, running two chained machine-learning models entirely client-side for $0?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 836), 1 of 3 UNRELATED divergent explorers. **Cashes the loudest standing jury provocation ‚ÄĒ the AI-pipeline chain (‚Č•2 ML models in series) that sat 0√ó across ~20 verdicts** (jury 2026-07-19 #5: "STILL 0√ó ‚Ä¶ the last excuse just died ‚Ä¶ scope ONE cycle on it"). 1992-semantic-choir did audio‚Üíembedding‚Üívisual (2 models) but never a *speech/semantic* chain; this is the first that LISTENS to the room and answers. Cashes the **¬ß836 dive** (Transformers.js **v4**, 2026 ‚ÄĒ real-time multi-model ML in the browser; the webml-community shipped live Voxtral/LFM2.5/Nemotron demos, all $0, no `package.json` change). ¬∑ **INPUT = mic speech** ‚ÄĒ a ~4 s rolling PCM window, resampled to 16 kHz, transcribed every ~3.5 s. ¬∑ **THE CHAIN (two ML models in series, both Transformers.js v4, dynamic-imported from a CDN at runtime with `webpackIgnore`+`turbopackIgnore` + a variable specifier so nothing is bundled and `package.json` is untouched):** **Model 1 = ASR** (`Xenova/whisper-tiny.en`, ‚Üí `onnx-community/whisper-tiny.en` fallback) ‚Üí text; **Model 2 = sentiment** (`Xenova/distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english`) ‚Üí POSITIVE/NEGATIVE + confidence ‚Üí a musical **valence** (`0.5 ¬Ī score/2`); word-rate + live loudness ‚Üí **arousal**. A single WASM/WebGPU backend behind a `busy` guard so windows never overlap; Whisper silence-hallucinations ("thank you", "you", ‚Ä¶) filtered so the oracle stays quiet in a quiet room. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = WebGL2** (jury #1 ‚ÄĒ NOT WebGPU as the visual substrate; WebGPU only under the hood for inference): a CPU-advected 4000-mote particle/flow field, additive point-cloud with feedback trails (per-frame fade veil); **Canvas2D fallback** with the identical sim if WebGL2 is absent. ¬∑ **CROSS-MODAL MAPPING** ‚ÄĒ **valence ‚Üí colour + harmony** (field warms to amber / cools to slate; a plain tempered chord crossfades a **minor third against a major third** by valence ‚ÄĒ a smooth in-tune major‚ÜĒdark morph, deliberately NOT the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]` JI stack); **arousal ‚Üí motion/tempo/register** (quickens the flow, enlarges motes, opens the pad filter, lifts an octave shimmer, speeds a soft arpeggio ‚ÄĒ silent when calm); **level ‚Üí brightness pulse + gain swell**; each transcribed **word appears as luminous text** that drifts, fades, and dissolves into a burst of sentiment-coloured motes. ¬∑ **ROBUST FALLBACK (always sound + light, even headless / no mic / no net):** full path (mic + models) ‚Üí `listening ¬∑ whisper-tiny + distilbert loaded`; **spectral fallback** (mic, no models) ‚Üí Web-Audio FFT: spectral centroid ‚Üí brightness/valence, RMS ‚Üí arousal/tempo (`fallback: spectral features`); **demo mode** (no mic) ‚Üí gentle self-playing ambient drive (`demo mode`) ‚ÄĒ the field renders from mount, audio begins on the Start gesture. An honest on-brand status chip names the active path. ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ `OracleAudio` (valence-morphing tempered pad + arousal arpeggio/filter/register + level swell), `MicInput` (AnalyserNode centroid+RMS, lossless PCM ring buffer, 16 kHz resample); full teardown on unmount (rAF, timers, mic tracks, renderer dispose, `ctx.close()`). ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe/flicker; sentiment-driven luminance only; graceful across every permission/capability denial. ¬∑ cycle 836 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: the room's speech becomes a living score of light + tone ¬∑ palette: sentiment-driven (warm=positive, cool-slate=negative ‚ÄĒ NOT violet-on-near-black cosmic) ¬∑ input: mic speech ¬∑ output: WebGL2 particle/flow field (NOT WebGPU-visual ‚ÄĒ jury #1) ¬∑ harmony: tempered minor‚ÜĒmajor-third valence morph (NOT the JI stack ‚ÄĒ jury #2) ¬∑ technique: FIRST real 2-model in-browser AI chain (ASR‚Üísentiment)‚Üícross-modal AV ¬∑ pole: n/a (responsive instrument) ¬∑ needs-a-human: speak into the room (self-demos in demo mode)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs **Memo Akten *Learning to See*** ¬∑ **Transformers.js v4** (2026, in-browser multi-model ML). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ 3/5:** #1 (FIRST real 2-model in-browser audio-visual AI chain ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó / jury-flagged 0√ó across ~20 verdicts) ¬∑ #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: mic PCM ring + Whisper ASR + DistilBERT sentiment + WebGL2 field + Web-Audio harmony) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß836 dive ‚ÄĒ Transformers.js v4, 2026-current). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2004-oracle-echo(win) ¬∑ 2006-ganzfeld-well(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, drug-free Ganzfeld on a CSS-compositor field ‚ÄĒ TOP resurrect on the overdue cosmic-ambient/psychedelic re-center cycle) ¬∑ 2008-palimpsest(banked ‚≠ź, editable/erasable SVG-DOM looping score ‚ÄĒ jury #3 consequential memory). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0** with all 3 candidates present (so the winner's runtime CDN import compiles cleanly under Turbopack), 0 warnings/errors for any candidate, `/dream/2004-oracle-echo` `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted; losers `rm -rf`'d post-build (banked IDEAS ¬ß836). **NOT verified live** (headless ‚ÄĒ no mic/GPU/network): the real whisper‚Üídistilbert latency & quality, the exact Transformers.js v4 pipeline API surface, and Turbopack's handling of the ignored dynamic import are validated by types + reasoning only ‚ÄĒ all wrapped in try/catch that degrades to the spectral path, so the piece still sounds & shows regardless. Wants Karel's mic + a real browser. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß836).

### [1998-terra-tremor](/dream/1998-terra-tremor) ¬∑ **the living planet plays Resonance ‚ÄĒ every earthquake on Earth in the last day, pulled LIVE from USGS, struck as a low resonance inside a slow tectonic drone** ¬∑ **what if the Earth itself were the instrument ‚ÄĒ real, live seismic data as a rhythmic stream of struck tones over a drone that rises as the planet gets busier?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 835), 1 of 3 UNRELATED divergent explorers. Opens the **real-world-data sonification lane the ~1000-prototype lab had never opened** ‚ÄĒ every prior "seismic/tremor" piece (712-seismic-room, 898-tremor-score, 1070-deep-tremor) is SYNTHETIC; the only live-external-API piece is 699-world-forge (GitHub firehose). This is the first prototype driven by **live geophysical data**, and it satisfies exactly the ¬ß833 bank's condition ("resurrect seismic ONLY with a fresh data source"). Cashes the **¬ß835 dive** (live-planetary-data sonification is a real 2026 practice ‚ÄĒ Helioradar AV's live NOAA WebSocket ‚ÄĒ and the honest inversion of the worn synthetic-aurora lane). ¬∑ **INPUT = real-world data (USGS live)** ‚ÄĒ polls `earthquake.usgs.gov/.../all_day.geojson` (CORS-open, no key) every 60 s; on ANY fetch/parse error falls back to a **seeded synthetic Poisson generator** (Gutenberg‚ÄďRichter magnitudes, exponential depth tail) so it ALWAYS sounds; a LIVE-vs-SIMULATED badge shows which. No mic/camera/tilt. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = Canvas2D** (jury #1 ‚ÄĒ OFF the GPU render family; NOT WebGPU/WebGL/three.js): a dark equirectangular world (graticule + abstract soft-blob continents), each quake blooming as an expanding ring at its true lat/long (radius ‚ąĚ magnitude), plus a scrolling **seismogram strip**. Palette **graphite/ash with EMBER** warmth for the biggest events ‚ÄĒ NOT the jury-banned cosmic-violet, NOT aurora (all raw hex confined to canvas art; chrome on semantic tokens). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = geophysical sonification**: each quake = a struck low resonance (modal bell + noise transient) with **magnitude ‚Üí energy/register/loudness/decay**, **depth ‚Üí timbre brightness (low-pass)**, **longitude ‚Üí stereo pan**; the day's hundreds of events are **metered out in time-order** (WINDOW/queue-length pacing, 90 ms‚Äď2.2 s) as a rhythmic stream, not fired at once. ¬∑ **HARMONIC MODEL = a MODAL SCALE THAT DRIFTS (jury #2 ‚ÄĒ NOT the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]` JI stack):** 6 plain-semitone modes rotate every ~40 s; every struck tone snaps to the current mode; under it a 3-voice tectonic **drone** whose fundamental/thickness track the running **seismic-energy rate** (log-scaled, ~18 s half-life) ‚ÄĒ the planet getting busier literally raises the drone. ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ struck voices + drone ‚Üí master gain ‚Üí destination; AudioContext created inside the "Feel the Earth" gesture; full teardown on unmount (rAF, poll interval, dispatch timeout, oscillators, `ctx.close()`). ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ plays itself the instant you press Begin: live feed if reachable, synthetic Poisson Earth otherwise; pre-Begin overlay never blank. ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe/flicker; canvas has `role=img` + aria-label; mute + gain controls; rounded-full only on the status chips. ¬∑ cycle 835 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-19) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: the living planet as instrument ‚ÄĒ live seismic data ¬∑ palette: graphite/ash + ember (NOT cosmic-violet, NOT aurora) ¬∑ input: real-world data (live USGS, Poisson fallback) ¬∑ output: Canvas2D (off the GPU render family ‚ÄĒ jury #1) ¬∑ harmony: drifting semitone modes + energy-tracked drone (jury #2 changing-scale, NOT the JI stack) ¬∑ technique: geophysical real-world-data sonification (a lane the lab had never opened) ¬∑ pole: n/a (data instrument) ¬∑ needs-a-human: none (the Earth plays it; you set gain)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs **Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology*** ¬∑ **USGS/IRIS earthquake audification** ¬∑ **Andrea Polli** geophysical sonification ¬∑ anchor **Helioradar AV** (2026, live-NOAA sonification). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: live USGS poll + Poisson fallback + quake‚Üístruck-resonance mapping + drifting-mode energy-tracked drone + world-map/seismogram render) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß835 dive ‚ÄĒ live-data sonification is 2026-current). NOT #1 outright (seismic timbre & audification exist in-lab and in the field; the fresh axis is the never-opened LIVE real-world-data lane + drifting-mode-over-live-energy weld). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1998-terra-tremor(win) ¬∑ 2000-sand-reset(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, impermanence/reset Gray-Scott universe ‚ÄĒ TOP resurrect on a cosmic-ambient cycle) ¬∑ 2002-chroma-key(banked ‚≠ź, webcam colour‚Üíharmony cross-modal). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; tsc 0; folder-eslint 0; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1998-terra-tremor` `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted, losers `rm -rf`'d pre-build (absent). **NOT ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no speakers): whether the sub-40 Hz drone reproduces on laptop speakers, whether an M6 event reads as a distinct low toll vs mud against the drone, and whether the initial ~300-event live batch streams as pleasing rhythm ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's headphones. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß835).

### [1996-splice-cassette](/dream/1996-splice-cassette) ¬∑ **composing IS editing ‚ÄĒ a live looper you OVERWRITE / cut / FRACTURE, whose recorded past re-voices itself as a modal scale drifts underneath** ¬∑ **what if composing WAS editing ‚ÄĒ a looper where you overwrite, cut, re-time and fracture what you already played, and the past keeps re-voicing itself as the mode slowly drifts?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 834), 1 of 3 divergent explorers ‚ÄĒ each pairing a DISTINCT non-JI harmonic model with a DISTINCT cold non-GPU substrate, cashing the jury 2026-07-19 live provocations **#1 (off the GPU render family)** + **#2 (ban the JI partial-stack, force a different harmonic model)** at once; the winner ALSO cashes **#3 (make memory CONSEQUENTIAL ‚ÄĒ the true destructive OVERWRITE that 1990 lacked; ¬ß832 flagged #3 "not closed")**. Realizes the **¬ß832 ‚≠ź‚≠ź TOP-resurrect** `1986-splice-cassette` (renumbered up). The other two banked: an HRTF-spatial "invisible bells" room found by ear on the CSS compositor (`1994-invisible-bells`, ‚≠ź‚≠ź, SIGGRAPH 2026 "Light Architecture" ‚ÄĒ TOP resurrect, un-shipped across ¬ß833+¬ß834) and a live-NOAA solar-wind aurora sonification (`1998-solar-choir`, ‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ fresh space-weather source, worn data lane), both IDEAS ¬ß834. ¬∑ **INPUT = MIDI (Web MIDI API) + computer-keyboard fallback** ‚ÄĒ `a s d f g h j k` play scale degrees, edit gestures on buttons + keys (space=Record, `o`=Overwrite, `x`=Cut, `3`=Shift, `z`=Fracture, ‚óÄ/‚Ė∂ move the edit region or click the tape); connected MIDI notes quantise to the current mode. No mic/camera/tilt. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = SVG-DOM only** (jury #1 ‚ÄĒ off the GPU render family): the looper is drawn as magnetic **tape** ‚ÄĒ note events as SVG elements on a 6 s strip, a moving playhead (`requestAnimationFrame` reading the audio clock), splice marks where the tape was cut; **NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL/WebGPU, NO three.js.** ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = destructive/editable live-looper** (jury #3 ‚ÄĒ memory made CONSEQUENTIAL, not additive): all edit ops are **pure functions over immutable event arrays** (`looper.ts`) ‚ÄĒ **record**, **destructive overwrite** (arm Overwrite + play over a region ‚Üí existing events are *replaced*, not layered; live user-overwrite uses a punch that deletes neighbours as you play; audibly the same loop positions play different pitches next lap), **cut** (delete a slice, the loop loses it), **shift** (re-time a slice, wrapping), **fracture** (chop into N chunks and re-order ‚ÄĒ a phrase you know comes back tumbled). A **look-ahead scheduler** (~100 ms horizon polled every 25 ms off `AudioContext.currentTime`, NOT rAF) plays it sample-accurately. ¬∑ **HARMONIC MODEL = a MODAL SCALE THAT DRIFTS (jury #2 ‚ÄĒ NOT the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]` JI stack, NOT pentatonic):** notes are stored as scale **DEGREES (0‚Äď6)+octave, not frozen frequencies**; a modal scale rotates continuously (Dorian‚ÜíPhrygian‚ÜíLydian‚ÜíMixolydian‚ÜíAeolian‚ÜíLocrian‚ÜíIonian, one lap ‚Čą119 s, ~new mode every 17 s); `degree‚Üífrequency` is resolved *at schedule time* against the live mode, so a phrase recorded a minute ago **re-voices itself** ‚ÄĒ same fingering, different colour ‚ÄĒ and the SVG shows it (each note's y-position AND hue recomputed through the current mode, notes slide & re-colour as the mode steps). Deliberately **equal-tempered diatonic modes** ‚ÄĒ the point is the mapping *changes over time*. ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ warm FM pluck (sine carrier + decaying sine modulator, a hair of glide) ‚Üí master **0.14** ‚Üí tape-"wow" chorus ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination; AudioContext created inside the Begin gesture; full teardown on unmount (stop oscillators, disconnect, cancel rAF, clear timers, `ctx.close()`). ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ deterministic seeded **ghost performer** (mulberry32 const seed; all timing off the AudioContext clock ‚ÄĒ no `Math.random`/`Date.now`) records a phrase, loops it, **overwrites** part (~8.6 s: replaces the `[1.2,3.0)` slice), **cuts** a slice, **fractures**, then lets the mode drift so the phrase re-voices ‚ÄĒ the whole editable-memory grammar self-demonstrates headless; real MIDI/key input takes over instantly, re-arms ~15 s idle. Pre-Begin hero (never blank). ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe/flicker; no Web MIDI ‚Üí keyboard still works with a `text-destructive` notice; chrome on semantic tokens. ¬∑ cycle 834 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-19 jury) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: composing IS editing ‚ÄĒ overwrite/cut/fracture your past, and it re-voices itself as the mode drifts ¬∑ palette: magnetic-tape / ferric-amber / bone (warm-craft, art) ¬∑ input: MIDI + QWERTY (NON-mic/camera/tilt) ¬∑ output: SVG-DOM (off the GPU render family ‚ÄĒ jury #1) ¬∑ harmony: drifting diatonic modes, degrees-not-freqs (jury #2 changing-scale, NOT the JI stack) ¬∑ technique: destructive/editable live-looper ‚ÄĒ record/overwrite/cut/shift/fracture (jury #3 CONSEQUENTIAL memory, the OVERWRITE 1990 lacked) ¬∑ pole: non-psychedelic (compositional instrument) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref **NIME 2026 "Loop Fracture Loop"** (Chris Kiefer & Betty Accorsi, Jun 23‚Äď26 2026) ¬∑ **Living Looper** (Shafer/Magnusson). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: look-ahead scheduler + FM voice + drifting-mode harmony + immutable-looper edit-ops + MIDI/keyboard + SVG render + ghost) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (NIME 2026 <30 days + the ¬ß834 modal/spectral dive, same date). NOT #1 (loopers exist in-lab; the fresh axis is the drifting-mode-re-voices-the-past weld + true destructive overwrite). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1996-splice-cassette(win) ¬∑ 1994-invisible-bells(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, HRTF spatial-audio room found by ear, CSS compositor, SIGGRAPH "Light Architecture" ‚ÄĒ TOP resurrect) ¬∑ 1998-solar-choir(banked ‚≠ź, live-NOAA solar-wind aurora sonification, Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ fresh source, worn lane). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; SVG-only (no canvas/WebGL); no banned patterns (no log-polar/font-serif/raw-white chrome; rounded-full only on status chips); authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` EXIT 0, `/dream/1996-splice-cassette` in both manifests, losers absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/MIDI/speakers): whether destructive OVERWRITE reads as un-making vs a stacked layer, whether the drifting mode re-voicing the recorded past lands as musical, and whether the SVG splice/cut is legible ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's Chrome + headphones (keyboard + ghost self-drive headless; MIDI optional). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß834).

### [1992-semantic-choir](/dream/1992-semantic-choir) ¬∑ **sing a phrase and the MEANING of your words paints the room ‚ÄĒ the lab's first ‚Č•2-model in-browser AI chain** ¬∑ **what if singing WORDS painted the room with their MEANING ‚ÄĒ a real two-model AI pipeline, running $0 in the browser, turning what you sing into light and sound?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 833), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. Cashes the **AI-pipeline-chain (‚Č•2 models in series) criterion that has sat 0√ó across ~27 juries** (jury 2026-07-19 #5) AND answers Karel's own ¬ß832 MORNING question ("scope a cycle on the AI-pipeline chain?"). The other two banked: an HRTF-spatial-audio "invisible bells" room on the CSS compositor (`1994-invisible-bells`, ‚≠ź‚≠ź, SIGGRAPH 2026 "Light Architecture") and a live-USGS earthquake sonification (`1996-seismic-choir`, ‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ banked with a warning: seismic is a worn lab theme, resurrect only with a fresh data source), both IDEAS ¬ß833. ¬∑ **INPUT = voice** (sing/speak a short phrase, ~3.8 s mic capture) with a full **typed-text fallback** (mic-denied or impatient ‚Üí type a phrase, runs the embedder only; the whole semantic‚Üílight/sound mapping still works with no microphone). No mic/camera/tilt beyond the voice capture. ¬∑ **THE CHAIN (the whole point) = two real models in series, $0, entirely client-side, no `package.json` change:** (1) **`Xenova/whisper-tiny.en`** (automatic-speech-recognition) turns voice ‚Üí text; (2) **`Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2`** (feature-extraction, mean-pooled + normalized) turns text ‚Üí a **384-dim sentence embedding**. Both are dynamically imported from a CDN at runtime (`@huggingface/transformers@3.0.0`, `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ ‚Ä¶)` ‚ÄĒ the exact $0 pattern proven by `1960-depth-well`; Transformers.js auto-selects WebGPU/wasm). The embedding is reduced by **fixed random projections** into shared control params ‚Üí so the mapping is deterministic (same phrase ‚Üí same room) and **semantically similar phrases land near each other** in colour & timbre. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = raw WebGL2 fragment shader** (self-corrected substrate ‚ÄĒ NOT three.js, NOT WebGPU, NOT Canvas2D, all jury-hot/banned): a full-screen **domain-warped travelling-wave interference field** with a **cartesian mirror-fold** symmetry ‚ÄĒ **deliberately NOT a log-polar / concentric form-constant warp** (jury-banned 4√ó). Hue comes straight from the embedding, so the palette **spans the wheel** ("brass" ‚Üí gold, "snow" ‚Üí pale cyan, "red forest" ‚Üí deep red) rather than defaulting to the banned violet-on-near-black cosmic look. ¬∑ **HARMONIC MODEL = derived from the meaning, NOT a JI lattice** ‚ÄĒ six FM voices on an embedding-chosen fundamental + a **word-derived non-lattice partial set**; brightness tilts the gains/filter, semantic "inharmonicity" opens the FM depth. Explicitly avoids the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]`-over-a-low-root additive stack (jury #2). ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ FM voices ‚Üí master gain ‚Üí destination; AudioContext started inside the first user gesture; full teardown on unmount (nodes stopped, rAF cancelled, ctx closed, mic tracks stopped). ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ at first paint a **ghost cycle** of four hand-authored, deliberately-distinct fields ("ocean at midnight" / "a bright brass fanfare" / "quiet snow" / "deep red forest") auto-advances every 7 s (never blank/silent once audio unlocks), and **silently upgrades to the REAL reduced embeddings** of those same phrases once model 2 loads ‚ÄĒ so the semantic mapping demonstrates itself before the visitor acts. No-WebGL2 shows an on-brand notice; models load lazily AFTER first paint with a progress dock (never blocks first render on the ~40‚Äď80 MB download). ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe/flicker (slow luminance drift); chrome on semantic tokens; errors in `text-destructive`. ¬∑ cycle 833 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-19 jury) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: sing words and their MEANING paints the room ¬∑ palette: embedding-chosen, spans the wheel (NOT violet-cosmic) ¬∑ input: voice + typed-text fallback ¬∑ output: WebGL2 interference field (cartesian fold, NOT log-polar) ¬∑ harmony: embedding-derived FM partials (NOT the JI stack) ¬∑ technique: first ‚Č•2-model in-browser AI pipeline chain (Whisper-tiny ASR ‚Üí MiniLM sentence-embedding) as the compositional driver ¬∑ pole: n/a (semantic instrument) ¬∑ needs-a-human: partial (ghost self-demos; voice/typing is the player's act)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref **Memo Akten *Learning to See*** (latent-space perceptual mapping) ¬∑ **Refik Anadol** data-as-pigment; the fresh move is that the semantic embedding of *sung language* is the brush. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #1 (novel technique ‚ÄĒ first ‚Č•2-model AI pipeline chain in the lab; prior Transformers.js use is all depth-estimation) ¬∑ #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: ASR model + embedding model + FM audio engine + WebGL2 field) ¬∑ #5 (recent research ‚ÄĒ the $0 in-browser Transformers.js/WebGPU path, current). The two *discriminating* criteria (#1 novel + #5 recent) both real. **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1992-semantic-choir(win) ¬∑ 1994-invisible-bells(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, HRTF spatial-audio room on CSS compositor, SIGGRAPH 2026 "Light Architecture") ¬∑ 1996-seismic-choir(banked ‚≠ź, live-USGS earthquake sonification ‚ÄĒ worn theme, resurrect only with a fresh data source). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; no banned patterns (no log-polar/font-serif/raw-white chrome); authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1992-semantic-choir` `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted + route in BOTH manifests, losers absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/mic/WebGL here): whether Whisper-tiny reliably hears *sung* (vs spoken) fragments, whether the embedding‚Üíhue/timbre mapping reads as *meaningful* rather than arbitrary, and first-load time on the ~40‚Äď80 MB model download ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's desktop Chrome + a mic (typed-text path is the fast, mic-free demo). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß833).

### [1990-impact-cairn](/dream/1990-impact-cairn) ¬∑ **music from timed IMPACTS you play eyes-closed, felt in your hand ‚ÄĒ and can UN-build by knocking a stone off** ¬∑ **what if you built music by stacking timed physical impacts you can play eyes-closed, feel every hit in your hand, and un-make by knocking a stone off?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 832), 1 of 3 realizations of ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *composing IS editing: every past gesture is editable/overwritable/un-makeable, and un-making is a musical event* (jury 2026-07-19 provocation #3, the under-served one). The others a destructive/editable SVG-DOM live-looper whose past re-voices itself under a drifting scale (`1986-splice-cassette`, banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź) and a Bohlen‚ÄďPierce SVG-DOM melody you weave and **un-weave** (`1988-tritave-loom`, banked ‚≠ź), both IDEAS ¬ß832. Realizes the ¬ß831 ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1982-droplet-cairn` bank AND Karel's own ¬ß831 MORNING ask ("Ship droplet-cairn next?"). Deliberately expands the lab's **thinnest, most-starving category ‚ÄĒ non-screen / audio-first / HAPTIC (0√ó recent)** ‚ÄĒ dodging the most jury axes at once. ¬∑ **INPUT = tap / click / spacebar in RHYTHM** (timing, not pitch); each tap drops a stone that falls and **collides ‚Üí the collision IS the sound**; `PointerEvent.pressure` supplies real strike velocity where available (fixed fallback). **The Vibration API (`navigator.vibrate`) is a load-bearing second feedback channel** ‚ÄĒ a velocity/material-scaled haptic pulse on every strike + tactile confirmations on knock-off / material-change (feature-detected, silent no-op where absent). No mic/camera/tilt. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = audio-first, MINIMAL DOM/CSS** ‚ÄĒ a dark field of plain `<div>` stones (CSS-transform fall/settle); each laid layer is one settled stone that **pulses on every hit it sounds**; knocking one off scatters falling debris. **NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL/WebGPU, NO three.js, NO SVG art scene** ‚ÄĒ deliberately spare (the piece is meant for eyes closed; the screen is a quiet index, testing the lab's screen-first bias). Near-monochrome graphite/bone (art hex in the DOM only; chrome on semantic tokens). ¬∑ **HARMONIC MODEL = NONE, on purpose** ‚ÄĒ no scale, no tuning, no pitch lattice anywhere. Every sound is a struck object via **modal impact synthesis**: a broadband noise excitation low-passed to the material's colour ‚Üí a bank of 3‚Äď6 **inharmonic** band-pass modes with exponential decay + **¬Ī4% per-hit freq jitter so no stable pitch can ever crystallise**; four **materials** (droplet/ceramic/wood/stone) differ only in modal ratios, decay, excitation colour, resonator-Q cap. **Timbre + rhythm are the ENTIRE compositional material** ‚ÄĒ the literal cash of jury provocation #2 ("pure rhythm/timbre with no pitch lattice at all"), the furthest possible departure from the banned JI-partial-stack groove. ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = editable/consequential rhythmic memory** (NOT sim‚Üíscalar‚Üípitch, NOT a CA, NOT additive-deposit): (1) **lay** a tapped figure as a looping layer (look-ahead scheduler ~120 ms off the AudioContext clock, never rAF); (2) layers loop at slightly independent rates and **phase** against each other (Reich); (3) **knock a stone off** ‚ÄĒ delete a layer and the loop *audibly loses* it (+ a "tumble" so un-making is a sound, not a gap); (4) **change a laid stone's material** ‚ÄĒ a *transform* of existing memory (timbre swaps on the layer's next pass), not a new layer; (5) mute / clear. Layer count bound to 5 so the cairn stays legible. ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ modal-synth per hit ‚Üí master **0.16** (‚Č§0.18) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination; per-material Q cap so a hard strike can't blow up; AudioContext created inside the Begin/first-tap gesture; full teardown on unmount (nodes disconnected, timers cleared, `ctx.close()`). ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ deterministic seeded **ghost drummer** (mulberry32 from a constant seed; all timing from the audio clock ‚ÄĒ no `Math.random`/`Date.now`): taps a figure, loops it, adds a phasing layer, **knocks a stone off**, changes a material, cycling so the whole un-making grammar self-demonstrates headless with zero input; real tap takes over instantly, re-arms ~15 s. Pre-Begin hero (never blank). ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe/flicker; `prefers-reduced-motion` honoured; audio-blocked shows an on-brand `text-destructive` note and the visual keeps running; haptics degrade to a no-op. ¬∑ cycle 832 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-19 jury) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: build music from timed impacts you play eyes-closed and un-build by knocking a stone off ¬∑ palette: near-monochrome graphite/bone (art) ¬∑ input: tap/click/spacebar rhythm + PointerEvent.pressure + Vibration-API haptics (NON-touch-tap-as-pitch, NON-mic/camera/tilt) ¬∑ output: audio-first + minimal DOM/CSS (coldest substrate, 0√ó; tests screen bias) ¬∑ harmony: NONE ‚ÄĒ modal impact synth, inharmonic, no pitch lattice (jury #2's most radical answer) ¬∑ technique: editable/consequential rhythmic memory ‚ÄĒ lay/phase/knock-off/material-transform (NOT sim‚Üíscalar, NOT additive-deposit) ¬∑ pole: conceptual/tactile instrument (non-psychedelic) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos; haptics are the player's channel)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Kato & Baba (Tokyo Metropolitan U.) *A MIDI-Controlled Water-Droplet Interface for Generating Droplet Impact Sounds* ‚ÄĒ **SIGGRAPH 2026 Emerging Technologies, live July 19‚Äď23 2026** ¬∑ Steve Reich *Clapping Music* (phasing) ¬∑ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: modal-impact synth + 4 materials + look-ahead phasing scheduler + Vibration-API haptics + minimal reactive DOM + ghost) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (SIGGRAPH ET, live *today*, <7 days). NOT #1 (haptics/`navigator.vibrate` has prior lab use ‚ÄĒ 400-soundwalk-room, kids toys; the fresh axis is the no-pitch-lattice + editable-rhythmic-memory fusion, not the channel). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1990-impact-cairn(win) ¬∑ 1986-splice-cassette(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, SVG-DOM destructive looper, drifting-scale re-voices the past, overwrite/cut/re-time/fracture, NIME 2026 "Loop Fracture Loop") ¬∑ 1988-tritave-loom(banked ‚≠ź, SVG-DOM Bohlen‚ÄďPierce un-weave). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; scoped `eslint --max-warnings 0` = 0; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1990-impact-cairn` `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted + route in BOTH manifests, losers absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/haptics/touch): whether modal-impact synth reads as struck objects (not pitches), whether the knock-off "tumble" reads as *un-making*, whether the phasing evolves musically, and whether the haptic pulse lands on a real phone ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's browser + **headphones** (the visual is deliberately spare). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß832).

### [1974-threshold-loom](/dream/1974-threshold-loom) ¬∑ **typing as falling asleep** ‚ÄĒ the *rhythm* of your keystrokes (not the letters) paces a hypnagogic Ganzfeld field + phosphene blooms + a Shepard‚ÄďRisset glissando descending forever ¬∑ **what if falling asleep were an instrument ‚ÄĒ where the CADENCE of your typing dissolves you toward the threshold of sleep?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 830), 1 of 3 OFF-GPU cosmic-ambient explorers on the coldest non-GPU substrates (Canvas2D / SVG-DOM / CSS-compositor); the others an NDE tunnel-to-light in SVG-DOM (`1978-descent-choir`) and a jhńĀna clear-light dissolve in the CSS-compositor (`1980-boundless-field`), both banked (IDEAS ¬ß830). Realizes the ¬ß829 ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1974-threshold-loom` bank (the flagged TOP resurrect). Deliberately rebalances an **INTENSE-heavy** window (825/828/1972) back to the under-served **COSMIC-AMBIENT** pole, and rotates the OUTPUT off the GPU-render family (6/10 of the last 10 ships were WebGPU/three.js). ¬∑ **INPUT = keyboard-CADENCE** ‚ÄĒ inter-keystroke *timing/rhythm*, NOT letters (a poem and a password drive it identically): every keystroke's interval feeds a slow `depth` integrator (0 awake ‚Üí 1 threshold); long even intervals read drowsy and push depth up, short jittery bursts read frantic and pull it down; steadiness sinks faster than raggedness. **Grep-thin as a rhythm input** ‚ÄĒ non-touch, non-mic, non-tilt (off every recent/banned input; mic just used at 1972). Plus a **deterministic seeded phantom typist** (mulberry32) that types at a drowsy cadence after Begin ‚ÄĒ drives the whole field + sound for the headless 06:30 review, yields to a real key instantly, re-arms after ~16 s idle. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = Canvas2D and nothing else** ‚ÄĒ a full-viewport **Ganzfeld ground** (dim warm-dusk violet + soft vignette while awake ‚Üí brightening, de-vignetting toward boundless soft-white near the threshold) with **phosphene form-constant blooms** per keystroke (frantic ‚Üí tight speckle; drowsy ‚Üí soft drifting spots + organized hex lattices), swelling/fading on a gentle `sin()` envelope; near the threshold imagery loses contrast and dissolves into the uniform field (structure and language let go). **NO WebGL/WebGPU/three.js/SVG** ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D is a cold non-GPU substrate (~1‚Äď2√ó) and OFF the GPU-render over-camp (6/10). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = keystroke-rhythm state integrator ‚Üí Ganzfeld luminance field + phosphene blooms + descending Shepard‚ÄďRisset.** NOT sim‚Üíscalar‚Üípitch, NOT a memory-instrument, NOT a CA. ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ a **Shepard‚ÄďRisset glissando descending forever** (octave-spaced sine partials under a fixed Gaussian envelope glide down with no audible bottom ‚ÄĒ the auditory barber-pole carrying the ear toward sleep; deeper state ‚Üí faster/brighter descent) + a soft detuned cosmic pad that opens as you deepen + a quiet per-keystroke phosphene chime (drops an octave in the deep state); **master ‚Č§0.16 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination**, gesture-gated, full teardown (cancel rAF, remove keydown/resize listeners, stop every oscillator, close AudioContext). ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no strobe/flicker (every luminance change is slow sub-Hz drift; any theta feeling lives in *audio amplitude*, never light; blooms fade over seconds); `prefers-reduced-motion` (via shared `_shared/psych/safeFlicker`) freezes the field to a calm still state; audio quiet + gated. ¬∑ cycle 830 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-18 jury) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: typing rhythm as falling asleep ‚ÄĒ cadence dissolves you toward the threshold of sleep ¬∑ palette: dim warm-dusk violet ‚Üí boundless soft-white Ganzfeld (art) ¬∑ input: keyboard-CADENCE (rhythm not letters; grep-thin, NON-touch/NON-mic/NON-tilt) + seeded phantom typist ¬∑ output: PURE Canvas2D (cold non-GPU substrate; off the 6/10 GPU-render over-camp) ¬∑ technique: keystroke-rhythm integrator ‚Üí Ganzfeld + phosphene form-constants + Shepard‚ÄďRisset descent (NOT sim‚Üíscalar, NOT memory-instrument) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient / hypnagogia (rebalances the INTENSE-heavy window) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (phantom typist only self-demos)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Wackermann/P√ľtz/Allefeld *Cortex* 2002 (PMID 12433389 ‚ÄĒ phosphenes/form-constants ‚Čą86% of hypnagogic imagery) ¬∑ Ganzfeld thalamo-cortical decoupling (PMC7596232) ¬∑ Roger Shepard (1964) / Jean-Claude Risset ¬∑ the "Tetris effect." **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: keystroke-cadence integrator + Canvas2D Ganzfeld/phosphene field + Shepard‚ÄďRisset descent engine + cosmic pad + phantom typist) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above). NOT #1 (Ganzfeld/phosphenes/Shepard all exist in the lab individually; the fresh axis is keyboard-*cadence*-as-input welded to a hypnagogic descent). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1974-threshold-loom(win) ¬∑ 1978-descent-choir(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, SVG-DOM NDE tunnel-to-light, device-tilt, JI-resolves-to-consonance-on-approach) ¬∑ 1980-boundless-field(banked ‚≠ź, CSS-compositor jhńĀna clear-light, camera-stillness dissolve-to-white). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors in-folder; `next lint --dir` 0 warnings; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0**, route in both manifests, losers absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/keyboard): whether the cadence‚Üídepth mapping reads as "typing rhythm is falling asleep," whether the Ganzfeld dissolve + phosphene blooms land vs read subtle, and whether the Shepard‚ÄďRisset descent feels like sinking ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's browser. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß830).

### [1960-depth-well](/dream/1960-depth-well) ¬∑ a depth-camera room that **REMEMBERS where your body was** ‚ÄĒ dwell to deposit a durable, revisitable sounding presence ¬∑ **what if a room could remember where your body was, and every place you dwelled kept sounding a tuned tone you can walk back to?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 827), 1 of 3 realizations of ONE concept ("a room that remembers"); the others a no-ML Canvas2D pseudo-depth floor (`1962-dwell-room`) and a WebGPU-compute diffusing memory-*field* (`1964-presence-tide`), both banked (IDEAS ¬ß827). **The depth lineage's missing chapter:** `927-depth-room` (depth‚Üíproximity, pitch frozen) and `942-depth-harmonic-room` (depth‚ÜíTonnetz voice-leading) already read webcam monocular depth but are purely **reactive** ‚ÄĒ neither remembers; this adds compositional **MEMORY** (JURY 2026-07-18 #4). Deliberately **non-warm-paper** after that vibe hit ~4√ó in the last 10 (1932/1934/1938/1958). ¬∑ **INPUT = webcam monocular depth** (Depth-Anything-V2-small `onnx-community/depth-anything-v2-small` run in-browser via **Transformers.js/WebGPU**, loaded at runtime from a CDN `@huggingface/transformers@3` with the `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic-`import()` pattern proven in `1297-hand-loom` ‚ÄĒ nothing added to package.json; wasm fallback). NOT a lab-first input (927/942 exist) ‚ÄĒ floor cleared via subsystems + refs, not novelty. Off the jury-banned pointer/touch (6√ó). **Graceful ladder:** model+camera ‚Üí real depth cloud; camera only / model slow ‚Üí crude brightness+frame-diff pseudo-depth; no camera / no WebGPU ‚Üí Canvas2D projection. Plus a **mandatory seeded ghost** (a soft Gaussian "wandering presence" that drifts, dwells, deposits nodes on a loop) that drives the WHOLE pipeline from frame 1 with no camera/model ‚ÄĒ the phone-review self-demo. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = WebGPU instanced point cloud** (52√ó38 depth grid lifted to world space, slow auto-orbit reads as genuinely 3-D) with a **Canvas2D fallback** running the same projection. WebGPU is a jury *ask* (keep it warm), OFF the banned WebGL2 (7√ó). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = depth presence ‚Üí durable spatial memory-nodes (NOT sim‚Üíscalar‚Üípitch, NOT a CA).** Near-region depth centroid = the live **present** (one warm amber accent + tracking voice); dwell ~1.25 s inside a small sphere ‚Üí deposit a durable node there; each node's proximity to the live locus is smoothed into a `swell` driving glow + gain (walk back ‚Üí it blooms); re-dwelling re-sounds an existing node (no dup); a 13-node cap recycles the dimmest/oldest to keep the chord legible. ¬∑ **AUDIO = just intonation** (55 Hz root √ó {1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2}, two octaves, **NON-pentatonic**); depth‚Üípartial/register, horizontal position‚Üíreal `StereoPannerNode` pan (memories sit L‚ÜĒR where you left them); warm triangle+sine ‚Üí gentle lowpass, everything glides (no clicks); **master ‚Č§0.16 ‚Üí tanh soft-clip ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination**; AudioContext created inside the Start gesture; full teardown on unmount (stop MediaStream tracks, close model, disconnect audio, cancel rAF, close ctx). ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no flicker (slow orbit + glow only); sensor-denied shows a `text-destructive` note while the ghost keeps composing; never throws, never blanks. ¬∑ cycle 827 ¬∑ DEEP-winner ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: a room that remembers where your body was ¬∑ palette: cold deep-space (blue-black volume, cool white/pale-blue points, one warm amber present-locus) ‚ÄĒ NON-warm-paper, NON-violet ¬∑ input: webcam monocular depth (Depth-Anything-V2/Transformers.js/WebGPU) + seeded ghost ‚ÄĒ NON-touch ¬∑ output: WebGPU point cloud (Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ technique: depth ‚Üí durable spatial memory-nodes (NOT sim‚Üíscalar, NOT CA) ¬∑ harmony: just intonation (NON-pentatonic) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient/presence (non-psychedelic) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Myron Krueger *Videoplace* ¬∑ Daniel Rozin mechanical mirrors ¬∑ Rafael Lozano-Hemmer presence installations ¬∑ Depth-Anything-V2 ¬∑ Transformers.js/WebGPU ¬∑ extends in-lab 927/942. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5 (floor cleared):** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: camera ¬∑ depth-ML ¬∑ spatial-memory model ¬∑ WebGPU renderer+Canvas2D fallback ¬∑ spatial JI audio) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above). NOT #1 (depth input exists: 927/942) ‚ÄĒ fresh contribution is the memory stance. **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1960-depth-well(win) ¬∑ 1962-dwell-room(banked, no-ML Canvas2D floor) ¬∑ 1964-presence-tide(banked, WebGPU-compute diffusing memory-field). **BUILD NOTE:** tsc 0 project-wide + eslint clean in-folder + route compiles + first full build passed end-to-end; but full `npm run build` fails nondeterministically on **`EMFILE`** during 878-page static generation (sandbox 4096-fd hard cap, un-raisable even as root ‚ÄĒ absent on Vercel). Shipped on that evidence. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/camera/speakers): whether the depth model loads on Karel's machine, whether the cloud reads as 3-D, and whether dwell-to-deposit + walk-back-to-swell land as musical ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's browser.

### [1958-treatise-scroll](/dream/1958-treatise-scroll) ¬∑ scroll-performed self-writing **Cardew *Treatise* graphic score** in **SVG-DOM** ‚ÄĒ reading IS performing ¬∑ **what if reading a graphic score WAS performing it ‚ÄĒ where your scroll velocity is the tempo and expression, and the music exists only while you read?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 826), 1 of 3 parallel realizations of ONE concept ("reading a graphic score IS performing it") ‚ÄĒ the others a typographic sleep-onset dissolution and a spiral mensuration canon. Realizes the ¬ß825 ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1954-treatise-scroll` bank AND cashes tonight's ¬ß826 dive (the 9-day-old "Arrows & Operators" *Treatise* exhibition, opened 2026-07-10). Inverts the lab's graphic-score *visualizers* (319-hub-score, 1236-neume ‚ÄĒ machine plays, score illustrates): here the reader's own gesture is the performance. Deliberate NON-psychedelic alternation after a psychedelic-heavy window (825 intense / 824 cosmic / 823 intense). ¬∑ **INPUT = SCROLL VELOCITY** (wheel / trackpad / touch-drag, non-passive `preventDefault`) as a primary performance instrument ‚ÄĒ **grep-0√ó in the lab** (scroll had only ever been scrub/nav); scroll up rewinds; there is no play button driving the sound. Off every recent/banned input (MIDI 1952 ¬∑ webcam 1946 ¬∑ tilt 1930/1944 ¬∑ gamepad 1938 ¬∑ breath 1934 ¬∑ keyboard 1932 ¬∑ pointer/touch-tap 6√ó). Plus a **seeded deterministic ghost auto-reader** (mulberry32; after ~1.5 s idle it breathes the reading tempo ‚ÄĒ accelerating into dense passages, easing to near-stop to let sustains ring ‚ÄĒ so it self-demos on a phone; any scroll takes over instantly). ¬∑ **OUTPUT = SVG-DOM and nothing else** ‚ÄĒ `<line>/<circle>/<path>/<rect>/<text>` marks in one `<g>` translated via `translateY` past a fixed cinnabar playhead; the visible mark set is band-recycled around the playhead and active marks are highlighted imperatively (no per-frame React re-render). **NO canvas / WebGL / WebGPU / three.js.** SVG-DOM is COLD in the recent 6-ship window (last SVG ship ~1928; recent = Canvas2D/WebGPU/three.js/CSS) and OFF the jury-banned WebGL2 7√ó / Canvas2D-hot / WebGPU-hot / CSS-just-used. ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = graphic-score ‚Üí JI reading, reading-is-performing** ‚ÄĒ each seeded Cardew-like mark (line / circle / dot / cluster / arc / box / number-field) carries a real vertical *extent*; a mark sounds while the playhead sits inside it, so **stopping the scroll on a thick line or box SUSTAINS it as a held drone** and scrolling off releases it. Horizontal position ‚Üí pitch; thickness ‚Üí dynamics/gain; circles/boxes ‚Üí stacked-JI chords; dots/clusters ‚Üí plucks; arcs ‚Üí glides; number-fields ‚Üí soft bells; scroll speed ‚Üí tempo + brightness. NOT sim‚Üíscalar‚Üípitch, NOT a memory-instrument, NOT CA. ¬∑ **AUDIO = just intonation** (C3 130.81 Hz tonic, three octaves of 1/1 9/8 5/4 4/3 3/2 5/3 15/8 ‚ÄĒ NON-pentatonic), overlap-voiced triangle/sine ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí lowpassed feedback delay ‚Üí **master 0.15** ‚Üí tanh `WaveShaper` soft-clip limiter ‚Üí destination; bounded polyphony (‚Č§10) + a soft tonic spine drone; AudioContext created inside a gesture (iOS-safe, resumes on first scroll / "Begin reading"), full teardown (cancel rAF, disconnect, `close()`, remove listeners) on unmount. ¬∑ **SAFETY / a11y** ‚ÄĒ no flicker (only translate + a soft glow); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the ghost; audio-blocked shows a `text-destructive` note and the score still scrolls silently. ¬∑ cycle 826 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-18 jury) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: reading is performing ‚ÄĒ scroll a graphic score to play it ¬∑ palette: warm paper-and-ink (graphite marks, cinnabar playhead, warm page) ‚ÄĒ a rare warm register (art), NON-violet ¬∑ input: scroll-velocity (grep-0√ó as instrument, NON-touch-tap) + seeded ghost ¬∑ output: PURE SVG-DOM (cold in recent window) ¬∑ technique: graphic-score‚ÜíJI reading, stop-to-sustain (NOT sim‚Üíscalar, NOT memory-instrument) ¬∑ harmony: just intonation (NON-pentatonic) ¬∑ pole: conceptual/non-psychedelic (deliberate alternation) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Cornelius Cardew *Treatise* (1963‚Äď67) ¬∑ "Arrows & Operators: Visual Debates in Music" exhibition (opened 2026-07-10, live *Treatise* performances) ¬∑ "Interpreting Graphic Notation with MusicLDM" (arXiv:2412.08944). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** #1 *arguably* (scroll-velocity-as-instrument grep-0√ó; graphic-score-as-instrument vs the lab's score-visualizers) ¬∑ #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: scroll-velocity engine ¬∑ seeded mark generator w/ extents ¬∑ graphic‚ÜíJI reading engine ¬∑ Web Audio synth+drone+limiter ¬∑ ghost) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß826 exhibition dive). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1958-treatise-scroll(win) ¬∑ 1962-spiral-cantus(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, SVG spiral mensuration canon 1:2:3, Baude Cordier) ¬∑ 1960-hypnagogic-margin(banked ‚≠ź, typographic sleep-onset word-dissolution, Gysin/Burroughs). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/scroll device): whether scroll-velocity reads legibly as tempo and stop-as-sustain lands as a musical hold, whether the endless Cardew marks resolve into a legible score, and whether the graphic‚ÜíJI reading sounds intentional ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's browser. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß826).

### [1952-comma-veil](/dream/1952-comma-veil) ¬∑ Web MIDI / QWERTY-played DMT form-constant mandala rendered in **pure CSS compositor (zero canvas)** ¬∑ **what if a DMT-breakthrough form-constant mandala were rendered with ZERO canvas ‚ÄĒ purely in the CSS compositor ‚ÄĒ and PLAYED like an instrument, so the harmony you play warps the impossible geometry in real time?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 825), 1 of 3 parallel explorations across the three coldest substrates (CSS-compositor / SVG-DOM / three.js). Returns the lab to its PRIMARY psychedelic direction on the under-served **INTENSE** pole (recent ships skewed cosmic/memory/data). ¬∑ **INPUT = Web MIDI API** note-on/off (primary instrument) + **QWERTY fallback** (`a s d f g h j k l` = ascending JI degrees, `w e t y u o p` = in-between) + a **seeded deterministic ghost player** (mulberry32; after ~6 s idle it improvises a tension build‚Üípeak‚Üíresolve‚Üíbreathe arc so it's never a dead screen and self-demos on a phone with no MIDI). NON-touch, NON-tilt, NON-camera, NON-self-playing-as-sole; rotates off every jury-banned input. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = the CSS COMPOSITOR and nothing else** ‚ÄĒ six stacked `<div>`s of `repeating-conic-gradient` / `repeating-radial-gradient` / `radial-gradient` fused with `mix-blend-mode` (screen/overlay/soft-light), feathered by `mask-image`, kaleidoscope-mirrored via CSS `transform: scaleX(-1)`/`rotate`, every layer driven by CSS custom properties (`--hue`/`--warp`/`--axes`/`--spin`/`--tension`/`--scale`/`--bloom`) rewritten each frame. **NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL, NO WebGPU, NO three.js, NO SVG** ‚ÄĒ the freshest render substrate in the lab (CSS-compositor 1√ó, only 1778-gradient-lotus; and OFF the jury-banned WebGL2 7√ó / Canvas2D-hot 3√ó / WebGPU-hot 3√ó / three.js-just-used). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = harmony‚Üígeometry via one source of truth** ‚ÄĒ the sounding chord drives BOTH the synth and the mandala. A **Plomp‚ÄďLevelt / Sethares sensory-roughness** model over every sounding partial-pair yields a 0..1 tension scalar: consonance (octave/fifth/third) LOCKS a still, symmetric, warm-gold form-constant; dissonance (tritone/M7) SHEARS it, multiplies kaleidoscope axes ("more axes than physical space allows"), quickens the spin, slides the palette to cold oil-slick thin-film. NOT sim‚Üíscalar‚Üípitch, NOT a memory-instrument, NOT Flow-Lenia/CA. ¬∑ **AUDIO = just intonation** (~58 Hz drone; each note a JI ratio 1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2 + octaves ‚ÄĒ NON-pentatonic), per-note triangle+sine through a lowpass + shared drone bed + tanh `WaveShaperNode` limiter, master ‚Č§0.17, AudioContext closed + MIDI/key listeners removed on unmount. ¬∑ **SAFETY** ‚ÄĒ flicker-adjacent but never strobes: spin ‚Č§~0.13 Hz, the one tension-linked opacity eased over ~1 s (no sub-3 Hz alpha flashing), `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes spin+warp to a still mandala. ¬∑ rest (art) ¬∑ input: Web MIDI + QWERTY + seeded ghost (NON-touch) ¬∑ output: PURE CSS compositor (freshest substrate, 1√ó) ¬∑ technique: JI-harmony‚Üíform-constant geometry, one source of truth (NOT 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: MIDI+QWERTY+ghost input ¬∑ JI roughness/tension engine ¬∑ Web Audio synth+drone+limiter ¬∑ CSS-compositor renderer) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above) ¬∑ near-#1 (CSS-compositor as a ### [1946-somatic-echo](/dream/1946-somatic-echo) ¬∑ webcam optical-flow ‚Üí three.js body-aura mandala / somatic-meditation where STILLNESS is the reward ¬∑ **what if your MOVEMENT were the music and STILLNESS were the reward ‚ÄĒ a drug-free instrument that trains you, gently, toward bodily presence?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 824), 1 of 3 parallel realizations of ONE concept ("the self-aware body as a somatic-meditation transport") raced across three substrates (three.js / WebGPU-compute fluid / Canvas2D ink). Resurrects the queued ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1940-somatic-echo` concept (cycle 823's #1 resurrect) and cashes the 2026-07-18 jury's **#1** (a NON-touch input on a NON-WebGL2 substrate) on the thin/precious CAMERA input the jury ("get a body in the room") and Karel's loves both point to (`217-dance-avatar`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `101-camera-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `234-kids-hand-creature`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). ¬∑ **INPUT = webcam optical flow, NO ML / NO MediaPipe / NO CDN** (`getUserMedia` ‚Üí hidden 96√ó72 canvas ‚Üí 8√ó6 frame-difference ‚Üí `energy`, `centroidX/Y`, per-cell energy, and **`smoothness`** = an inverse-jerk measure that is the spine: slow/continuous/present motion ‚Üí 1, jerky/fast ‚Üí 0). NON-touch, NON-pointer; camera is thin (1√ó in the jury window) and rotates hard off the tilt input just used twice (1930/1944). ¬∑ **OUTPUT = three.js `THREE.Points`** ‚ÄĒ ~3,300 additive points forming a body-aura mandala; the FRESHEST substrate vs the last 6 ships (three.js 0√ó, while Canvas2D is 3√ó [1930/1932/1938] and WebGPU 2√ó [1934/1944]), and a reliable WebGL2 render Karel actually sees on his phone (no WebGPU gamble). Deep indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üíwarm gold on near-black. ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = movement-sonification biofeedback, STILLNESS-rewarded** (inverts the usual "more motion = more sound": agitation scatters the field + detunes the drone; stillness gathers the mandala + resolves the harmony ‚ÄĒ the piece trains presence, a somatic/interoceptive pole). ¬∑ **AUDIO = additive just-intonation drone** (~58 Hz + partials [1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2], NON-pentatonic): `smoothness` high ‚Üí partials lock to pure ratios (warm, consonant); low ‚Üí detune/beating + noise edge (anxious); `energy` ‚Üí density/brightness; `centroidY` ‚Üí filter/register; `centroidX` ‚Üí pan; sustained-calm ‚Üí a reward bloom (gain lifts, filter opens, partials brighten). Master ‚Č§0.18, gesture-gated, AudioContext closed + camera tracks stopped on unmount. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ no camera / denied ‚Üí a seeded Lissajous **ghost mover** agitates ~14 s then decelerates ~8 s to near-stillness, so the full agitation‚Üícalm‚Üíreward arc self-demos with zero camera; a real webcam takes over instantly (`text-destructive` fallback note). ¬∑ cycle 824 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-18 jury) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: move slowly and the world clarifies; go still and it rewards you ¬∑ palette: indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üíwarm gold on near-black (art) ¬∑ input: webcam optical-flow (NO ML), NON-touch/thin ¬∑ output: three.js Points (freshest substrate vs recent ships) ¬∑ technique: movement-sonification biofeedback, stillness-rewarded (inverts motion=sound) ¬∑ harmony: additive JI drone (NON-pentatonic) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient/meditative/somatic ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Kantan/Dahl/Spaich *The Self-Aware Body* (arXiv:2606.14664) ¬∑ *Gesture2Music* (arXiv:2511.00793) ¬∑ Anna Halprin ¬∑ √Čliane Radigue. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: optical-flow analyzer + JI additive audio + three.js aura field + ghost) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß824 dive: Gesture2Music / Sounding Bodies / conducting-gesture, chained to the ¬ß823 self-aware-body anchor). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1946-somatic-echo(win) ¬∑ 1948-somatic-veil(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, WebGPU-compute Stable-Fluids veil + Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ 1950-somatic-ink(banked ‚≠ź, Canvas2D suminagashi ink-in-water). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no camera/display/speakers): whether the scatter‚Üígather mandala reads as "stillness = reward," whether the smoothness heuristic tracks a real body vs webcam noise, and whether the reward bloom lands musically ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's camera. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß824).

Teal‚Üímagenta‚Üígold gradient along the up-axis (NON-violet). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = vestibular/proprioceptive gravity-dissolution** (grep-fresh ‚ÄĒ the felt "down" made meltable; K-hole depersonalisation / NDE weightlessness / ego-dissolution, PSYCHEDELIC.md Cluster 2). ¬∑ **AUDIO = spatial dissolution drone** ‚ÄĒ a centre-panned low anchor tone (fundamental + just fifth) LOUD when down is settled, THINNING as orientation is lost; high just-intonation spectral partials (3,4,5,6,7,9,11 √ó f0, NON-pentatonic) bloom + stereo-spread as down melts; master StereoPanner follows L/R tilt; all glided; AudioContext closed + listeners removed on unmount. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ the seeded ghost auto-drift makes the vector wander so the reorientation is visible AND audible with no sensor/input; a real tilt/key takes over instantly. ¬∑ cycle 823 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: tilt your phone and lose which way is down ¬∑ palette: cosmic teal‚Üímagenta‚Üígold (NON-violet) ¬∑ input: device-tilt + keys/ghost (NON-touch, NON-pointer) ¬∑ output: WebGPU raymarch + WebGL2/Canvas2D fallback (jury's most-wanted substrate) ¬∑ technique: vestibular gravity-vector dissolution (grep-fresh) ¬∑ pole: intense‚Üícosmic ¬∑ needs-a-human: tilt (ghost self-demos)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref ketamine K-hole/NDE ego-dissolution (PSYCHEDELIC.md) ¬∑ James Turrell Ganzfeld ¬∑ vestibular/otolith gravity perception. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #1 (WebGPU-render vestibular gravity-dissolution, both grep-fresh) ¬∑ #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: orientation engine + spatial-audio + 3-backend renderer) ¬∑ #3 (Turrell + K-hole/NDE) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß823 dive: arXiv:2606.14664, 6 days old). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1944-vestibular-dissolve(win) ¬∑ 1940-somatic-echo(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, camera-optical-flow/three.js/movement-sonification-meditation) ¬∑ 1942-void-descent(banked ‚≠ź, audio-only/near-black binaural NDE descent). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/motion-sensor/speakers): the WebGPU raymarch path is verified by compile/type only (no GPU in the container), so runtime rests on the WebGL2/Canvas2D fallbacks + Karel's browser; ### [1938-forking-garden](/dream/1938-forking-garden) ¬∑ gamepad ‚Üí Canvas2D branching composition-tree / non-linear compositional MODEL where ALL alternate futures sound at once ¬∑ **what if a composition were a garden where every branch you ever grew plays together ‚ÄĒ and you could always walk back into your past and grow a DIFFERENT future?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 822), 1 of 3 parallel realizations of one concept ("Forking Paths"). The lab's **first non-linear / branching compositional model** ‚ÄĒ the deepest cash yet of the 2026-07-18 jury's **#4** ("push compositional MEMORY, not reactivity; move the model OFF sim‚Üíscalar‚Üípitch ‚ÄĒ 11/15 of the lab is a sim deciding while you watch") and **#1** (a NON-touch input on a NON-WebGL2 substrate). ¬∑ **INPUT = Gamepad API** (`navigator.getGamepads()` polled per frame + `gamepadconnected`): left stick navigates the tree (parent/sibling/child), face buttons = D-Dorian scale degrees you tap to build a phrase, a trigger COMMITS (forks if the cursor isn't at a leaf); **full keyboard fallback** so it's usable without a pad. NON-touch, NON-pointer ‚ÄĒ gamepad-as-adult-instrument is grep-fresh (used only in 3 paused kids toys), rotating hard off the pointer-on-glass groove (jury 6√ó). ¬∑ **OUTPUT = Canvas2D** ‚ÄĒ the least-used renderer (the sharpest answer to the WebGL2 monoculture, 7√ó), a river-delta of branches spreading across the canvas, each sounding leaf glowing in time with its loop, the active channel bright. ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = a navigable/forkable version-TREE of musical decisions** (grep-0√ó in the lab ‚ÄĒ every prior "branch/tree" is a botanical/physics sim, never a git-for-melody): each node holds a short phrase; commit extends the current branch; navigate back to any ancestor and commit ‚Üí a FORK (new sibling future); **nothing is ever deleted**, so your whole decision-history is durable AND re-enterable. ¬∑ **PLAYBACK (the surprise) = ALL LEAVES sound simultaneously** ‚ÄĒ every leaf's root‚Üíleaf path is a looping voice, so the whole garden of alternate histories rings together (Borges: all outcomes happen at once); the root‚Üí**cursor** path is foregrounded (louder/brighter/wider filter) while the others sit quiet in a shared bed over a soft D drone. Bounded to the nearest ~7 leaves + the foreground path (‚Č§8 melodic voices + 1 drone) so it stays consonant and never turns to mud. ¬∑ **HARMONY = D Dorian** (7-note modal, D E F G A B C ‚ÄĒ deliberately NON-pentatonic; all voices share the mode + a common D root to stay consonant when sounding together). ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ per-leaf triangle+sine ‚Üí envelope ‚Üí per-voice lowpass ‚Üí per-voice gain ‚Üí master ‚Č§ **0.18** (gesture-ramped, `ctx.resume()` on gesture), phase-preserving voice reconciliation, Dynamicses bounded; `AudioContext.close()` + all listeners removed + `cancelAnimationFrame` on unmount. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ no gamepad + ~5 s idle ‚Üí a seeded deterministic **ghost gardener** builds phrases, extends branches, and ~42% of the time hops back and FORKS a new branch, so the delta visibly widens and the all-futures texture audibly thickens with zero input; any real pad/key hands control back. ¬∑ cycle 822 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: grow a branching tree of music and hear all your alternate futures at once ¬∑ palette: botanical ‚ÄĒ linen ground, sage/moss ink, gold active channel (NON-violet) ¬∑ input: gamepad + keyboard fallback (NON-touch, grep-fresh) ¬∑ output: Canvas2D (least-used renderer) ¬∑ technique: non-linear branching-tree compositional MODEL (NOT sim‚Üíscalar‚Üípitch) ¬∑ harmony: D Dorian (NON-pentatonic) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Jorge Luis Borges *The Garden of Forking Paths* (1941) + NIME 2026 "non-linear music" (parts authored once, order chosen at performance time). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** #1 (branching-tree compositional model + gamepad-instrument, both grep-fresh) ¬∑ #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems) ¬∑ #3 (Borges + NIME) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß822 dive). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1938-forking-garden(win) ¬∑ 1936-forking-paths(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, keyboard/single-path) ¬∑ 1940-forking-flight(banked ‚≠ź, tilt/three.js/3D). **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no gamepad/display/speakers): whether the all-futures texture reads as a legible garden vs mud, whether the foreground path is audibly distinct from the bed, and whether the ghost's grow-then-fork reads as a self-demo ‚ÄĒ want Karel's browser (+ a pad for the headline gesture). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß822).

### [1934-breath-fresco](/dream/1934-breath-fresco) ¬∑ breath-envelope ‚Üí WebGPU-compute spectral fresco / compositional MEMORY as spatial autobiography ¬∑ **what if your BREATH painted a permanent spatial timeline of a whole listening session ‚ÄĒ a fresco of your breathing you can read back like an autobiography?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 821), 1 of 3. Cashes the 2026-07-18 jury's TWO live provocations at once ‚ÄĒ **#1** (break the fresh pointer-input 6√ó / WebGL2 7√ó monocultures ‚Üí a NON-touch input on a NON-WebGL2 substrate) and **#4** (push compositional MEMORY, not reactivity) ‚ÄĒ with the single thinnest input √ó thinnest substrate available. ¬∑ **INPUT = breath ENVELOPE via mic** (`getUserMedia` ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` ‚Üí smoothed RMS ‚Üí a rise/hold/fall breath-stroke state machine). Loudness only, NEVER pitch ‚ÄĒ NON-touch, NON-pointer, and distinct from `1928-choralis`'s YIN pitch. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = WebGPU compute** (ping-ponged `rgba16float` storage textures, advect/fuse/deposit compute pass + tone-mapped render pass) with a **full Canvas2D fallback of identical logic** ‚ÄĒ the ONLY candidate on WebGPU-compute (jury flagged it 1√ó, the substrate escape the lab kept promising), and the fallback means it degrades rather than blanks on iOS Safari (the r171-fallback / 1834-livingwall lesson). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = additive JI partial-bank drone + GPU compute field.** ¬∑ **MEMORY (the point) = spatial autobiography:** the wall's horizontal axis IS session time; a trowel head advances L‚ÜíR (~5-min span), and each completed exhale deposits a PERMANENT glowing stratum (vertical position = a just-intonation partial from the breath's peak intensity) at the current time-column. Deposits are cumulative and never fade ‚ÄĒ passed columns freeze and oxidize toward sienna with age but never vanish (buon fresco: pigment fused into wet plaster is permanent). After minutes the wall is a readable record of the whole session ‚ÄĒ where you breathed hard, where you rested, the rhythm of it. **Explicitly NOT a "hold-a-tone-it-fades-in-30s" mechanic** ‚ÄĒ deliberately diverging from `1930`'s decaying crystallized chord (the ¬ß819 bank flagged that "too similar" risk and prescribed exactly this spatial-timeline fix). ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ each exhale opens one sustained additive JI partial over ~60 Hz (Radigue-style evolving drone, ‚Č§24 bounded voices, shimmer LFO) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.18, gesture-ramped, AudioContext closed + mic tracks stopped on unmount. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ mic denied/silent ‚Üí a seeded deterministic **ghost-breath** generator drives the exact same state machine so the wall fills and the drone thickens on its own (mic-denied labeled `text-destructive`); a real breath takes back over instantly. ¬∑ cycle 821 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: breathe near the mic, watch a whole session paint itself into permanent plaster ¬∑ palette: warm plaster/fresco ‚ÄĒ umber ground, sienna, ochre, chalk (NON-violet) ¬∑ input: breath-envelope mic (NON-touch, NON-pitch) ¬∑ output: WebGPU-compute + Canvas2D fallback (the 1√ó substrate) ¬∑ technique: spatial-timeline compositional memory (cumulative, never decays) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref √Čliane Radigue (long-form drone) ¬∑ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* ¬∑ buon fresco

### [1932-canon-loom](/dream/1932-canon-loom) ¬∑ MIDI/keyboard self-canon loom / compositional MEMORY on Canvas2D ¬∑ **what if the notes you play NEVER disappear ‚ÄĒ what if every note wove a permanent thread into a scrolling loom that plays your own past back as a canon beneath your live playing?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 819), 1 of 3. A head-on cash of the 2026-07-18 jury's TWO live provocations at once: **#1** (break the pointer+WebGL2 monoculture ‚Üí a NON-touch input on a NON-WebGL2 substrate) and **#4** (push compositional MEMORY, not reactivity ‚ÄĒ "11/15 are passive sim‚Üíscalar‚Üípitch where the sim decides and you watch"). ¬∑ **INPUT = Web MIDI (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess()`) with a computer-keyboard fallback** (QWERTY home row = a 2-octave C-major scale, upper row = accidentals; active input shown; no MIDI ‚Üí silent degrade to keyboard, never an error). NON-touch, NON-pointer, NON-mic ‚ÄĒ rotates the input axis off the pointer-on-glass groove the jury flagged (6√ó). ¬∑ **OUTPUT = Canvas2D** ‚ÄĒ the single LEAST-used substrate in the window (1√ó), the sharpest answer to the WebGL2 monoculture (7√ó). A Nancarrow punched-roll seen as a loom: time = warp (horizontal, scrolls past a fixed gold read-head), pitch = weft (vertical); each played note is a durable indigo thread at its loop-phase; over-dyeing the same spot deepens/thickens the weft so the fabric visibly densifies. **The thread IS both the woven mark and the scheduled note** ‚ÄĒ one object, the sound‚ÜĒimage identity the jury has repeatedly praised (1836/1922). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = compositional-memory self-canon** (grep-clean as a mechanic ‚ÄĒ NOT a physics-sim-scalar-to-pitch mapping): the roll is cyclic, so every recorded thread re-sounds each time it scrolls back under the read-head ‚Üí the accumulated phrase loops as counterpoint under the live performance. "The sound now is a function of everything you've already played" ‚ÄĒ memory made structural. Agency: loop-length (4/8/16 beats, re-scales the weave) + "Clear the loom". ¬∑ **AUDIO** ‚ÄĒ pure Web Audio, warm plucked/struck voice (triangle + soft octave, closing lowpass, fast attack/gentle decay) ‚Üí compressor, master 0.16, gesture-ramped, AudioContext fully closed on unmount. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ after ~6 s idle a **seeded deterministic ghost weaver** threads a fixed canon subject so the piece demonstrates itself headless (visuals run from mount, no MIDI/gesture needed); the instant a real note arrives the ghost yields and its threads remain as accompaniment. ¬∑ cycle 819 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: play a keyboard, watch/hear your notes weave into a permanent self-canon ¬∑ palette: indigo-dyed textile on natural linen (WARM, NON-violet) ¬∑ input: MIDI/keyboard (NON-touch) ¬∑ output: Canvas2D (the 1√ó substrate) ¬∑ technique: durable compositional memory (NOT reactive mapping) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos; the loom is YOUR performance)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Conlon Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* (a performance punched permanently into a scrolling roll) + the Jacquard loom (punch-card weave) + Bach's canons (a voice chasing itself)
