**Play; watch your notes weave a canon that plays itself back.** WIDE-winner of a 3-brief fan, each a different non-touch input √ó non-WebGL2 substrate, all cashing memory. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5 (a valid new build clears ‚Č•2):** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (MIDI + keyboard input engine ¬∑ cyclic loop-transport/scheduler ¬∑ persistent thread-memory model with over-dye ¬∑ Canvas2D loom renderer ¬∑ warm-pluck Web-Audio voice) + **#3** named refs (Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* ¬∑ Jacquard loom ¬∑ Bach canons). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-input(jury 6√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2(jury 7√ó) ¬∑ sim‚Üíscalar‚Üípitch(jury ~11√ó) ¬∑ continuous-CA/Lenia(jury 3√ó, one-from-ban) ¬∑ pentatonic(jury 6√ó) ¬∑ autonomous-self-playing(jury 6√ó)]`; `picked=[MIDI/keyboard input ¬∑ Canvas2D output(1√ó) ¬∑ compositional-memory self-canon ¬∑ C-major-diatonic-counterpoint(NON-pentatonic) ¬∑ indigo-textile palette(NON-violet) ¬∑ needs-a-human]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban on every axis. **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1932-canon-loom(win) ¬∑ 1934-gait-loop(banked ‚≠ź, IDEAS ¬ß819) ¬∑ 1936-breath-fresco(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, IDEAS ¬ß819). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** `npx eslint src/app/dream/1932-canon-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `/dream/1932-canon-loom` emitted (plain `npm run build` still EMFILEs at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~770 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no MIDI/display/speakers): whether the canon reads as YOUR past accompanying you (vs. mush as it densifies), whether the ~1-frame scheduler jitter is audible on the warm pluck, and whether the ghost weaver reads as a demo that then hands you the loom ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's keyboard. Two more explored this fire ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1936-breath-fresco`** (breath-envelope ‚Üí WebGPU-compute spectral fresco + Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ lost on conceptual overlap with last cycle's 1930 fading-JI mechanic) + **‚≠ź `1934-gait-loop`** (camera optical-flow ‚Üí three.js danced-loop sequencer ‚ÄĒ lost on a jury-banned pentatonic map + worst headless-demo) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß819 (both demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1932-canon-loom/README.md`

### [1930-harmonices](/dream/1930-harmonices) ¬∑ tilt-played orrery / orbital-resonance = just-intonation ¬∑ **what if orbital resonance were an instrument you play by TILTING your phone ‚ÄĒ and the music were the REAL just intonation the orbits give you, never a pentatonic fake? DEEP-mode winner (cycle 817), and the lab's FIRST declared 2‚Äď3 cycle commitment ‚ÄĒ a head-on answer to the 2026-07-17 jury's criterion #4 (multi-cycle extension = 0/15; "nobody extends anything"). Three substrates of ONE concept were built in parallel (this Canvas2D real N-body, a WebGL2 gravity-well membrane `1932-spheres`, a three.js 3D armillary `1934-armillary`); shipped the strongest, most phone-reviewable implementation.** ¬∑ **INPUT = DEVICE TILT ‚ÄĒ breaks the newest invisible monoculture MORNING flagged (pointer-on-glass, ~6/10 of the last 10): `DeviceOrientationEvent` beta/gamma become a uniform acceleration bias on the whole gravity field; iOS `requestPermission()` wired inside the "Tilt to play" gesture; no sensor within ~1s ‚Üí `pointer=tilt` desktop fallback with a live active-mode readout, so it is fully playable on a laptop AND on Karel's phone. Love-signal backing: `83-kids-tilt-rain` (tilt) is loved. NOT pointer-as-instrument, NOT self-playing ‚ÄĒ hold still and the orrery circularizes toward a lone drone (DEAD without a human tilting).** / **OUTPUT = Canvas2D brass-on-parchment orrery (engraved plate, ticks, glowing period-trails, deep-red LOCK ARCS with ratio labels, tilt compass, live lock chips). WARM palette ‚ÄĒ the freshest color break in the fan (both runners-up were cool-astronomical, nearer the lab's near-black; breaking the violet/near-black monoculture is a live jury ban). No WebGL/three.js/CDN = the one candidate guaranteed to run at a 06:30 phone glance.** ¬∑ **PHYSICS: a real symplectic velocity-Verlet (leapfrog) N-body integrator, softened gravity `1/(r¬≤+őĶ¬≤)`, a semi-major-axis cage + eccentricity clamp for bounded on-plate motion; osculating Keplerian period per planet from vis-viva (`a=-őľ/2őĶ`, `T=2ŌÄ‚ąö(a¬≥/őľ)`); a resonance-capture detector over small-integer ratios (2:1, 3:2, 4:3, 5:3, 5:4, 3:1, 5:2) with enter/exit hysteresis and a stylised restoring "capture nudge" that snaps + holds a locked pair at its exact ratio (honest in README: helped, not emergent ‚ÄĒ true mean-motion libration is too slow to feel in seconds); a `calm`-driven circularizer drains eccentricity toward the drone when the device is still. Builder de-risked with a standalone node harness (stable/bounded under adversarial tilt, resonances reachable ~87% of frames, calm reliably circularizes).** ¬∑ **HARMONY = JUST INTONATION from the actual period ratios ‚ÄĒ orbital resonance IS just intonation (a 3:2 period lock = a pure fifth, 2:1 = octave, 5:4 = pure major third): the star drones the root (C2), each planet is a voice gliding with its period, a captured pair snaps its two voices to the EXACT integer frequency ratio (deeper planet snapped to a just degree of the star lattice, the other set precisely p/q above). Nothing rounded to a scale. The whole thesis (research ¬ß817): the celebrated ESO sonifications of resonant systems ‚ÄĒ TOI-178 & TRAPPIST-1 ‚ÄĒ both de-risk the mapping down to a PENTATONIC (the exact crutch the jury banned), discarding the very physics being celebrated; here the resonance and the interval are the same number.** ¬∑ cycle 817 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: tilt an orrery, capture orbital resonances, hear their true just intonation ¬∑ palette: antique brass-on-parchment (WARM, NON-violet) ¬∑ harmony: just intonation from live period ratios (NOT pentatonic ‚ÄĒ the ESO-sonification crutch, refused) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (still device ‚Üí lone drone) ¬∑ commitment: cycle 1 of a declared 2‚Äď3 cycle multi-cycle build (jury #4)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Johannes Kepler *Harmonices Mundi* (1619) + the Antikythera / orrery tradition + ESO TOI-178 & TRAPPIST-1 sonifications (the pentatonic foil)
**Tilt to play; hear the spheres lock.** DEEP-winner of a 3-substrate fan on ONE massively-bigger concept, and the lab's first real multi-cycle commitment. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (symplectic N-body integrator + osculating-period/vis-viva analyzer + resonance-capture detector w/ hysteresis + JI voice engine + device-tilt input) + **#3** named refs (Kepler *Harmonices Mundi* ¬∑ Antikythera ¬∑ ESO TOI-178/TRAPPIST-1) + **#4** declared 2‚Äď3 cycle commitment (the FIRST ‚ÄĒ jury flagged this 0/15) + **#5** same-day ¬ß817 dive. #1 not claimed outright (tilt input & JI both exist somewhere in the 770-piece lab) ‚ÄĒ the win is orbital-resonance-capture ‚Üí true JI, aimed at the jury's live bans. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-input(MORNING ~6√ó) ¬∑ pentatonic-sonification(jury 6√ó) ¬∑ violet-on-near-black(jury ~12√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-as-crutch‚Ä¶ allowed 2√ó ¬∑ autonomous-self-playing(jury ~11√ó)]`; `picked=[DEVICE-TILT input ¬∑ just-intonation-from-period-ratios ¬∑ brass-on-parchment WARM palette ¬∑ dead-without-a-tilt]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban, and rotates the INPUT axis off the pointer-groove. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow trail-glow + lock-arc snaps, master ‚Č§0.17 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí compressor, 11-voice budget. **Validation:** normalizer = **0 rewrites** (on-brand); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `next lint ‚Ä¶ 1930-harmonices --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `/dream/1930-harmonices` `page.js` + client-reference-manifest emitted (plain `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~770 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no tilt sensor / display / speakers): whether the capture snap reads as a musical *arrival*, whether phone tilt-scaling feels right without per-device tuning, and whether the JI dyads sit in tune against the drone ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's phone. Two more explored this fire ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1932-spheres`** (WebGL2 gravity-well membrane, the prettiest render, real Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ lost on WebGL2 review-risk; ship on a WebGL cycle or graft as a cycle-2 skin) + **‚≠ź `1934-armillary`** (three.js 3D hand-turned orrery + conjunction transients, grows the thin three.js substrate ‚ÄĒ lost on parametric-not-N-body physics + phone-review weight) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß817 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1930-harmonices/README.md`

**‚Ü≥ CYCLE 2 ‚ÄĒ extended IN PLACE (cycle 818, 2026-07-18), the lab's FIRST genuine multi-cycle follow-through (jury #4, 0/15 ‚Üí now 1).** Now retitled **"Harmonices II."** Same URL, same physics/JI/tilt/palette ‚ÄĒ three new subsystems layered on: **(1) CHORD MEMORY / CRYSTALLIZATION (the headline)** ‚ÄĒ hold a resonance lock ‚Č•3.5 s and its exact just interval CRYSTALLIZES into a growing chord stack of persistent sustained sine dyads (‚Č§3 dyads/‚Č§6 tones, drop-oldest) that keep sounding after the two planets drift apart, so across a session you *compose a chord of pure ratios*; each crystal fades over ~32 s unless re-captured, so the composed chord honestly decays to the lone drone with no human (the piece stays dead-without-a-driver ‚ÄĒ jury #3); visualized as engraved brass ratio-rings that bloom as they "set" onto the plate + a HUD harmonic ledger with draining life-bars. **(2) CONJUNCTION BELLS** ‚ÄĒ a real inharmonic bell (fundamental + a 2.76√ó stretched partial) rings when two planets align on the star's sight-line (per-pair hysteresis, ‚Č§3 at once, sight-line flash), gated off once calm so it never self-plays a dead orrery. **(3) WARPED GRAVITY-WELL FIELD** ‚ÄĒ faint TRUE equipotential contours of the biased potential `ő¶=‚ąíőľ/‚ąö(r¬≤+őĶ¬≤)+tilt¬∑r` (Newton-solved per ray), so the whole field visibly leans when you tilt ‚ÄĒ the same biased potential the integrator uses, deepening the "one physics drives both sound and image" thesis ‚ÄĒ plus a **Seed-a-chain** button (pre-locked TRAPPIST-1-style Laplace chain) for an instant consonant payoff at a 06:30 phone glance that still decays without a tilt. Built via ORCHESTRATED DEEP-continue: 2 parallel builders each extended a copy; winner (this one, `1938`-briefed) ported in-place over 1930, loser (`1936`: chord-memory + **live add/remove-a-planet** + seed-chain) banked to IDEAS ¬ß818. **Ambition of the extension:** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (now +2 new) + #3 named refs + **#4 the DELIVERED multi-cycle extend (0/15 ‚Üí 1).** **Validation:** eslint 0 ¬∑ project-wide `tsc` 0 ¬∑ authoritative compile-mode `next build` EXIT 0, no `1936`/`1938` leak. **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless): whether crystallization reads as *arrival*, whether the composed JI chord beats/drifts as it grows (see RESEARCH ¬ß818 ‚ÄĒ the adaptive-JI cycle-3 seed), and whether bells+field feel alive want Karel's phone. cycle 818 ¬∑ DEEP-continue.

**‚Ü≥ CYCLE 3 ‚ÄĒ extended IN PLACE (cycle 820, 2026-07-18). Retitled "Harmonices III" ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST three-cycle piece (play it ‚Üí compose with it ‚Üí tune it), and the concept jury's explicitly-named cycle-3 thread (JURY 2026-07-18 provocation #3: "1930's crystallization ‚Üí the adaptive-JI drift toggle‚Ä¶ the deepest form of harmony that bites").** THE COMMA PUMP, MADE PLAYABLE. A JI lattice doesn't close: chaining pure intervals from a moving pivot (what capturing one resonance after another does) walks the chord's centre off the star's fixed pitch ‚ÄĒ two stacked pure 5:4 thirds land ~41¬Ę shy of the lattice; a I‚Äďvi‚Äďii‚ÄďV‚ÄďI sinks a whole syntonic comma (81/80 ‚Čą 21.5¬Ę) per turn. Cycle 3 exposes this as a live **STRICT ‚áĄ ADAPTIVE** toggle on the crystallized chord: **STRICT** keeps every captured ratio pure so the chord's centre drifts against the fixed star drone and you hear the beating grow (`drift +N¬Ę` readout + a drift-meter needle climb off centre); **ADAPTIVE** runs a per-frame relaxation that spreads the accumulated comma across every voice so the centre locks back to the star (drift ‚Üí ~0¬Ę, needle re-centres), the price shown honestly as `retuned ¬ĪN¬Ę`. Flip the toggle live and the whole chord GLIDES in/out of lock (each voice ramps ~0.2 s) ‚ÄĒ a 300-year-old theory problem made audible and performable in real time. New **`tuning.ts`** subsystem (JI-lattice math ¬∑ pure-chain placement ¬∑ the relaxation solver ¬∑ drift/temper metrics) + `audio.ts` `setCrystalFreqs` retune method + a HUD intonation panel. The browser cousin of Stange & Wick's live linear-least-squares JI scheme (arXiv:1706.04338) and Nemire's Pivotuner (arXiv:2306.03873). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (N-body + resonance-capture + JI voices + NEW least-squares tuning solver + drift analyzer) + #3 named refs (Stange‚ÄďWick ¬∑ Pivotuner ¬∑ Kepler ¬∑ the syntonic comma) + **#4 the DELIVERED cycle-3 / first three-cycle commitment** + #5 same-day ¬ß820 dive; #1 *arguably* (live adaptive-JI least-squares retuning is grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ 1408-wolf-ring is only STATIC meantone). **diversity:** tilt input (NOT touch/pointer, jury 6√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D (NOT WebGL2, jury 7√ó) ¬∑ brass-on-parchment (NOT violet) ‚ÄĒ clears both fresh monoculture bans by construction (an extend of a piece that already dodges them). **Solo-focused, not fanned out:** a surgical cycle-3 extend of intricate interdependent existing code (physics+audio) ‚ÄĒ parallel builders each modifying the same single folder would collide (violates folder isolation); per AGENT.md "if JURY says extend piece X, go DEEP on X." **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites ¬∑ project-wide `tsc --noEmit` 0 ¬∑ `next lint ‚Ä¶ 1930-harmonices --max-warnings 0` 0 ¬∑ authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` EXIT 0 with `/dream/1930-harmonices` emitted (plain `npm run build` still EMFILEs at page-data across ~770 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, Vercel has fd headroom) ¬∑ **tuning logic numerically de-risked** with a standalone harness (STRICT holds a ‚ąí13.7¬Ę drift at 0¬Ę retune; ADAPTIVE locks to ~0¬Ę at 41¬Ę retune; reversible). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no speakers): whether the drift audibly beats against the drone and whether the ~0.2 s lock-glide reads as "sliding into tune" want Karel's phone. cycle 820 ¬∑ DEEP-continue.

### [1928-choralis](/dream/1928-choralis) ¬∑ voice‚Üífour-part chorale / real-time SATB voice-leading ¬∑ **what if you SANG one bare line into Resonance and it wrote a full four-part chorale UNDER your voice ‚ÄĒ in real time, with genuine functional voice-leading, not a safe pentatonic pad? Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire. The last ~5 shipped had already answered the 2026-07-17 jury (non-pentatonic ¬∑ non-violet ¬∑ needs-a-human) ‚ÄĒ but every one did it as a POINTER/TOUCH-played instrument, a fresh interaction-model monoculture the theme-audit doesn't check. This fire keeps those wins and forces a NON-pointer input on each of three briefs: voice ¬∑ webcam-hands ¬∑ keyboard. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1934-two-hands` (conduct a V7‚ô≠9‚ÜíI cadence in the air between your two hands, MediaPipe) + ‚≠ź `1940-cadence-press` (type a sentence, punctuation = cadences, Constructivist kinetic type).** ¬∑ **INPUT = THE SINGING VOICE ‚ÄĒ silent and dark until a real person sings (NOT pointer/touch, the new ~5√ó groove; NOT self-playing, jury ~11√ó): a hand-rolled YIN estimator (difference fn ‚Üí CMND ‚Üí absolute threshold ‚Üí parabolic interpolation, bounded to singing range) runs on rAF against a 2048-sample analyser buffer, snaps the detected f‚āÄ to the current key = the SOPRANO. Mic-denied ‚Üí an Ode-to-Joy line drives the SAME engine so it self-demos headless. NOT camera, NOT keyboard, NOT autonomous** / **OUTPUT = animated SVG four-lane "breathing score" (off the jury-banned Canvas2D 4√ó): S/A/T/B ribbons scroll right-to-left, each note a gold blob, each lane brightening as its voice sounds, playhead + illuminated chord numeral, subtle CSS gold glow. Web Audio: three additive machine voices (the human is the soprano) ‚ÄĒ two detuned oscillators per voice ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí glide envelopes ‚Üí pan ‚Üí generated-impulse reverb; legato/detached articulation. THE HARMONY: on each new stable sung note, functional chords of the key that CONTAIN the note (I/ii/iii/IV/V/V7/vi/vii¬į + secondary dominants V/V, V7/V) are scored by a root-motion/cadence table under an 8-chord phrase clock, then an exhaustive voice-leading search places bass/tenor/alto to MINIMIZE total motion while penalizing parallel 5ths/8ves, wide spacing, overlap/crossing, incomplete chords, bad doubling, and unresolved tendency tones (leading tone must rise, V7 seventh must fall); at a strong authentic cadence the key can pivot by a fifth ‚ÄĒ so it genuinely modulates** ¬∑ cycle 816 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: sing one line, the machine writes the other three (a live SATB chorale under your voice) ¬∑ palette: illuminated-manuscript gold-leaf on deep vellum (warm, NON-violet) ¬∑ harmony: functional tonal SATB voice-leading (NOT pentatonic ‚ÄĒ a real four-part search) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (dark & silent until sung)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref *AI Harmonizer: Expanding Vocal Expression with a Generative Neurosymbolic Music AI System* (NIME 2025 / arXiv:2506.18143) + Walter Piston *Harmony* (1941, tendency-tone voice leading)
**Sing one line; hear four parts.** WIDE-winner of a 3-instrument fan briefed off a finer-grained diversity read: the 2026-07-17 jury's four bans (pentatonic ¬∑ violet ¬∑ Canvas2D ¬∑ self-playing) had all landed across the last ~5 shipped ‚ÄĒ but one notch finer they share a NEW over-represented tag no audit checks, **pointer/touch as the sole human input (~5√ó/last-6)**; the lab escaped the old grooves and set a fresh *interaction-model* monoculture. All three briefs kept the real-harmony + needs-a-human wins and forced a different non-pointer input; this one wins on being the richest harmonic statement (a genuine four-part voice-leading SEARCH, jury provocation #1) and the most Resonance-native concept (a composer's own voice generating the chorale beneath it). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (real-time YIN detection ‚Üí rule-based SATB functional voice-leading engine ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó in the lab; JI lattices and functional-chord grids exist, a live four-part voice-leading search does not) + **#3** named ref (AI-Harmonizer NIME 2025 + Piston) + **#5** this cycle's same-day ¬ß816 dive. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-input(new ~5√ó) ¬∑ pentatonic-sonification(jury 6√ó) ¬∑ violet-on-near-black(jury ~12√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary(jury 4√ó) ¬∑ autonomous-self-playing(jury ~11√ó)]`; `picked=[mic/voice INPUT ¬∑ functional-SATB voice-leading harmony ¬∑ SVG-score OUTPUT ¬∑ gold-leaf-on-vellum palette(NON-violet) ¬∑ dead-until-sung]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban on every axis. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the score is a slow right-to-left scroll + lane-glow, never a luminance flash; reverb-limited additive pad, three bounded voices. **Validation:** builder on-brand (hex confined to SVG art); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `npx eslint ‚Ä¶ 1928-choralis --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~770 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no mic/GPU/display/speakers): whether YIN tracks a real sung voice at usable latency (~90ms hold before a chord commits), whether the three machine voices *sound* like a chorale vs. a muddy pad (additive, not formant-vowel), and whether the breathing score reads ‚ÄĒ all want Karel's browser + voice. Two more explored this fire ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1934-two-hands`** (webcam MediaPipe Hands, spread/close = a live V7‚ô≠9‚ÜíI cadence with real tendency-tone voice leading, WebGL2 cold-aurora tension field ‚ÄĒ lost only on the CDN-MediaPipe headless-demo risk; the best "dead-without-a-human" camera piece, resurrect once the CDN is verified in the deploy env) + **‚≠ź `1940-cadence-press`** (type a sentence ‚Üí functional progression, punctuation = cadences, Constructivist red-ink SVG kinetic type on light paper) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß816 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec under a fresh number). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1928-choralis/README.md`

### [1922-chladni-plate](/dream/1922-chladni-plate) ¬∑ physical-model instrument / 2D modal synthesis ¬∑ **what if you could STRIKE and BOW a real metal plate ‚ÄĒ and the exact same physical model you HEAR is the Chladni sand-figure you SEE? Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (three physical-model instruments, each breaking a different one of the 2026-07-17 jury's three invisible monocultures ‚ÄĒ one scale/pentatonic, one color/violet, one habit/self-playing). The deepest answer to the pentatonic ban: you don't pick a scale, physics does ‚ÄĒ a plate's modes are INHARMONIC by construction (freq ‚ąĚ the SQUARE of the mode-index sum), so a pentatonic is literally impossible. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź `bowed-maqam` (pointer-bowed waveguide gliding real maqam quarter-tones) + ‚≠ź `tide-scrub` (pointer granular-scrub grain cloud).** ¬∑ **INPUT = STRUCK/BOWED BY A HAND ‚ÄĒ silent and dark until a pointer strikes (NOT self-playing, jury ~11√ó; no autoplay, energies start at 0): tap = strike, press-and-drag = bow. A strike at (x,y) excites every mode weighted by its mode-shape `sin(mŌÄx)¬∑sin(nŌÄy)` at that point ‚ÄĒ hit an antinode and that mode rings loud, hit a node and it stays silent ‚ÄĒ so WHERE you strike sets both the figure and the timbre. NOT mic (jury 7√ó), NOT camera, NOT autonomous** / **OUTPUT = WebGL2 fragment shader (off the jury-banned Canvas2D 4√ó): a full-screen quad sums the active modes into the standing-wave field `u = ő£ A‚āĖ¬∑sin(mŌÄx)¬∑sin(nŌÄy)`, rendering sand accumulating on the nodal lines (|u|‚Üí0 = bright brass/sand, antinodes dark) + a strike ripple; graceful on-brand `text-destructive` notice if WebGL2 absent. Web Audio: ~28 persistent bounded voices (one OscillatorNode per mode behind its own GainNode ‚ÄĒ never spun up/torn down, so polyphony can't run away), a signed modal-amplitude state `A[k]` integrated in JS each frame (per-mode exponential decay `ŌĄ`, continuous rough bow inflow while dragging), gains follow `|A[k]|`; master trim ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor safety chain. THE SAME `A[k]` drives both the audio gains and the shader field ‚ÄĒ sound and image are two views of ONE physical model** ¬∑ cycle 815 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: a struck/bowed physical plate (sound + image are two views of ONE modal model) ¬∑ palette: warm brass/graphite/sand (NON-violet) ¬∑ harmony: inharmonic plate modes (physics-dictated, NOT any scale, emphatically NOT pentatonic) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (dark & silent until struck)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref arXiv:2407.05516 *Differentiable Modal Synthesis for Physical Modeling of Planar String Sound and Motion Simulation* + Ernst Chladni's plate figures (visual/physical antecedent)
**Strike a plate; watch the sound settle into sand.** WIDE-winner of a 3-instrument fan briefed straight off the 2026-07-17 jury, which found the altered-states ban had worked but exposed three unaudited monocultures ‚ÄĒ **one color** (violet, ~12/15), **one scale** (pentatonic, 6/15), **one habit** (~11/15 play themselves) ‚ÄĒ and told Karel *change the color, the harmony, and make it need a human.* All three briefs broke all four live bans via different tags; this one wins by being the deepest fix on the harmony axis (physics, not a scale) AND the purest sound‚ÜĒimage unity. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (2D modal / physical-modeling plate synthesis ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó in the lab) + **#3** named ref (arXiv:2407.05516 + Chladni) + **#5** this cycle's same-day ¬ß815 dive. **diversity:** `banned=[pentatonic-sonification(jury 6√ó) ¬∑ violet-on-near-black palette(jury ~12√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT(jury 4√ó) ¬∑ autonomous self-playing model(jury ~11√ó)]`; `picked=[inharmonic modal spectrum(physics-dictated, NOT any scale) ¬∑ warm brass/graphite/sand palette(NON-violet) ¬∑ WebGL2 fragment-shader OUTPUT(off Canvas2D) ¬∑ pointer-struck INPUT(dead-without-a-human)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + raw WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the field is a slow modal-decay drift, never a luminance flash; master trim‚Üílowpass‚Üícompressor + bounded voices can't blow up. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `npx eslint ‚Ä¶ 1922-chladni-plate --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1922-chladni-plate` in BOTH route manifests (`page.js` 32.9 kB), no `1928`/`1934` leak. (Plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~770 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/display/speakers): whether the nodal figure reads as sand-on-nodes vs a smear, whether the where-you-strike‚Üítimbre coupling is legible, and whether the decay *feels* like struck metal want Karel's browser. Two more explored this fire ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `bowed-maqam`** (pointer-bowed digital-waveguide string gliding the quarter-tones of maqam Rast/Bayati, cold blueprint palette ‚ÄĒ lost only because a DelayNode-in-feedback render-quantum latency detunes its microtones, the one thing its concept can't afford; resurrect with an AudioWorklet waveguide) + **‚≠ź `tide-scrub`** (pointer granular-scrub of a dropped/synth recording ‚Üí three.js amber-teal grain cloud, freeze/time-stretch/reverse-scrub) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß815 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec under a fresh number). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1922-chladni-plate/README.md`

### [1900-tended-lenia](/dream/1900-tended-lenia) ¬∑ tended-ecology / multi-kernel-Flow-Lenia ¬∑ **what if a piece of music were a living GARDEN whose species you keep alive by shaping their environment ‚ÄĒ and the moment you stop tending, the music flatlines? DEEP-mode winner (cycle 1 of a declared 2‚Äď3 cycle commitment ‚ÄĒ the first time criterion #4 "multi-cycle build" has fired in the lab, 0/15 before this): the jury named `1836-flow-eden` as a piece worth a real second cycle and asked for "true multi-kernel Flow-Lenia / real speciation," so this cycle went DEEP on that concept via three parallel technical/interaction bets and shipped the strongest. It also cashes all THREE of the 2026-07-17 jury's Karel-facing provocations at once ‚ÄĒ change the color (a genuinely LIGHT herbarium palette, not violet-on-black), change the harmony (real 7-limit JUST INTONATION, not the 6√ó pentatonic crutch), make it NEED a human (untended, the conserved mass diffuses to a flat quiet hum in ~30s). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 1904-current-eden (conduct currents that herd species into collision-chords, modal-modulating) + ‚≠ź 1902-compute-eden (WebGPU-compute breeder, inharmonic-spectral).** ¬∑ **INPUT = human GARDENER, load-bearing by construction ‚ÄĒ pointer paints a persistent SOIL/resource texture (Tend), drops species (Seed), or erases mass (Cull); growth is amplified ONLY where a cell's genome MATCHES the local enriched soil and suppressed to a net-negative baseline elsewhere, and the soil diffuses+decays (~7s time-constant), so with no tending the affinity gradient collapses and diffusion smooths the field to near-silence within ~30s. Different soil grows a different dominant genome ‚Üí a different key ‚Üí a different piece. NOT autonomous (jury ~11√ó), NOT mic (jury 7√ó), NOT camera/keyboard** / **OUTPUT = WebGL2 RGBA16F multi-kernel Flow-Lenia (off the jury-banned Canvas2D 4√ó): one field texture (R=mass, the finite conserved resource; G=q=m¬∑s, mass-weighted genome) ping-pongs through E(soil diffuse/decay) ‚Üí A(MULTI-KERNEL perceive: 2 radial rings per genome, inner+outer, each its own Gaussian growth bump, blended per-genome, biased by soil) ‚Üí B(flow F=kA¬∑‚ąáA‚ąíkM¬∑‚ąám) ‚Üí C(reintegration-tracking transport, unit-box overlaps sum to 1 ‚Üí MASS CONSERVED EXACTLY, + genome mutation) ‚Üí D(48¬≤ readback for stats + MSPD-lite complexity). Light herbarium-wash fallback shader if float-RTT absent (never blank). Web Audio: 7-limit JUST INTONATION (1/1 9/8 6/5 5/4 4/3 3/2 5/3 7/4 15/8) ‚ÄĒ dominant species SETS the drone tonic, every other species sounds its own ratio against it so mixed zones beat and BITE; mass‚Üíamplitude, CoM‚Üípan/register, bloom/takeover/death‚Üíbells/chimes/plucks, MSPD-lite complexity‚Üífilter brightness; DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.18, silent until Start** ¬∑ cycle 811 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-17) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: a tended, speciating ecology (sound + image are two views of ONE mass-conserving sim) ¬∑ palette: herbarium ‚ÄĒ sepia ink & wash on warm rag paper (LIGHT, NON-violet) ¬∑ harmony: 7-limit just intonation (NOT pentatonic) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (dies untended in ~30s)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Bert Wang-Chak Chan *Lenia* (arXiv:1812.05433) + *Leniabreeder* (arXiv:2406.04235) for multi-kernel genomes ¬∑ Plantec et al. *Flow-Lenia* (mass conservation ‚Üí competition) ¬∑ MSPD (arXiv:2606.17091, Jun 2026, this cycle's ¬ß811 dive) for the live complexity meter
**A garden you must keep, or it dies.** DEEP-mode winner of a 3-approach fan at ONE ambitious concept ‚ÄĒ a **tended, speciating, multi-kernel Flow-Lenia ecology** ‚ÄĒ the mode AGENT.md prescribes when the jury says "extend the exceptional piece X" (here `1836-flow-eden` ‚Üí "true multi-kernel Flow-Lenia / real speciation") rather than "ban a combo." **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** **#4** multi-cycle commitment (explicitly cycle 1 of 2‚Äď3 ‚ÄĒ the criterion that was 0/15 across the whole lab; jury provocation #4) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (multi-kernel CA sim + human-painted soil-selection field + just-intonation sonification + MSPD-lite complexity meter) + **#3** named refs (Chan/Leniabreeder/Flow-Lenia/MSPD) + **#5** this cycle's same-day ¬ß811 dive (arXiv:2606.17091). (#1 not claimed ‚ÄĒ Flow-Lenia is lab-present via 1836; the *multi-kernel* extension is a documented deepening, not a lab-first technique.) **diversity:** `banned=[pentatonic(jury 6√ó) ¬∑ violet-on-near-black(jury ~12√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary(jury 4√ó) ¬∑ autonomous-self-playing(jury ~11√ó) ¬∑ mic(jury 7√ó)]`; `picked=[just-intonation harmony ¬∑ herbarium LIGHT palette ¬∑ WebGL2-float multi-kernel CA ¬∑ human-gardener load-bearing (dies untended)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Curator fixes before ship:** the app root forces `.dark`, so the builder correctly overrode light-theme token values inline on `<main>` (chrome stays dark-on-cream); and I removed one unused `rng`/`mulberry32` import in audio.ts that would have failed Vercel's `--max-warnings 0` (the one fix attempt). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow luminance drift only, peak capped at 0.96 (never pure white), reduced-motion drops the field to 128¬≤. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `next lint` on `1900-tended-lenia` = **0 warnings/errors** (after the import fix); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1900-tended-lenia` in the route manifest (`page.js` built). (Plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~760 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom, as every 800+ cycle confirms.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/display/speakers): whether the two-kernel species read distinct, whether it truly "dies" on the intended ~30s clock (the ~7s soil time-constant + 0.11 baseline suppression were reasoned, not stopwatch-tuned), and whether the JI beating lands, want Karel's browser. Two more explored this fire ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź 1904-current-eden** (conduct a painted current/wind field that herds 3 dye-species into ENCOUNTERS, each a chord + a modal modulation incl. a biting Hijaz; warm textile light palette; ship-next on a performance cycle) + **‚≠ź 1902-compute-eden** (the lab's first genuine WebGPU compute-shader CA w/ WebGL2 fallback; freeze‚ÜíCross two colonies‚Üírelease breeder; inharmonic-spectral timbre-as-harmony; biolum deep-sea ‚ÄĒ lost only because its non-violet palette is still DARK, the weakest answer to the color provocation) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß811 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1900-tended-lenia/README.md`

### [1882-lattice](/dream/1882-lattice) ¬∑ played-instrument / just-intonation ¬∑ **what if you could PLAY Resonance's harmony as a living just-intonation lattice ‚ÄĒ every note an EXACT small-integer frequency ratio, and consonance is something you can SEE as geometric closeness? Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire whose whole brief was the fresh 2026-07-17 jury's Karel-facing line: "change the color, the harmony, and make it need a human." This is the sharpest simultaneous cash of all three ‚ÄĒ the only piece in the lab that makes ZERO sound until a human plays it (jury #3, "build something DEAD without a human" ‚ÄĒ ~11/15 play themselves), on a LIGHT cream manuscript page (jury #2 ‚ÄĒ the hardest break from ~12/15 near-black; even the other escapes stay dark), in real 5-limit just intonation (jury #1 ‚ÄĒ leave the 6√ó pentatonic crutch). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 1888-conductor (conduct FUNCTIONAL, modulating harmony with body-motion) + ‚≠ź 1894-shape-note (sing ‚Üí cold-monochrome modal choir with earned dissonance).** ¬∑ **INPUT = PLAYED BY A HUMAN ‚ÄĒ silent until you play (NOT self-playing: the only sound-source is your keypresses; a visual-only ‚Čą0.036 Hz idle "attract" pulse walks one node at a time and self-cancels the instant you play, damped entirely under `prefers-reduced-motion`). Computer keyboard is a 2-D patch of the lattice (each physical row = the fifths axis, each row up = a major third); Web MIDI feature-detected + auto-wired if the browser allows (silently skipped otherwise); nodes are tappable (pointer). Ref-counted holds so keyboard+MIDI+touch overlap without stuck notes; blur releases all ‚ÄĒ NOT mic (jury 7√ó), NOT camera, NOT tilt, NOT autonomous** / **OUTPUT = SVG-DOM (minority substrate 3√ó/10 the jury wants grown ‚ÄĒ deliberately OFF the banned Canvas2D 4√ó AND off the over-served GPU-render pile 7√ó): the lattice `<svg>` is built ONCE and only per-node attributes (accent circle r/opacity, glow r/opacity, ratio-label opacity) are mutated by refs each frame, the tree never rebuilt; nodes carry live ratio labels (`1/1`, `3/2`, `5/4`, `9/8`‚Ä¶), solid links = pure perfect fifths (√ó3/2), dashed = pure major thirds (√ó5/4), the heavy-ringed node is the tonic. Web Audio: a pooled 16-voice polyphonic engine, each node = its EXACT frequency `base¬∑3^a¬∑5^b` folded to `[1,2)` kept as an integer fraction (no 12-TET rounding), 3 harmonic partials + soft ADSR + lowpass ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.18; a faint tonic+fifth drone so silence isn't dead; held pure 3/2 and 5/4 ring beat-free while wider lattice jumps thicken audibly** ¬∑ cycle 810 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: just-intonation Tonnetz as a played instrument (consonance = geometry) ¬∑ palette: paper-and-ink cream+terracotta (the light-background break, NON-violet, NON-near-black) ¬∑ needs-a-human: total (zero autonomous sound)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Leonhard Euler *Tonnetz* / Harry Partch *Tonality Diamond* / Erv Wilson pitch lattices; distinct from the 2026 web 15-limit tonality diamond (Zenodo 6772144) and tune.js JI library (catalogues/toolkits, not a keyboard-mapped Tonnetz you perform)
**Play consonance as geometry.** Winner of a **WIDE** fire briefed straight off the 2026-07-17 jury, which found the altered-states ban had worked but exposed three unaudited new monocultures ‚ÄĒ **one color** (violet-on-near-black, ~12/15), **one scale** (pentatonic, 6/15), **one habit** (~11/15 play themselves, need no human) ‚ÄĒ and told Karel: *change the color, the harmony, and make it need a human.* All three briefs had to break all three at once via different tags; this one wins by doing it most purely. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (a keyboard/MIDI-played just-intonation Tonnetz where lattice coordinates ARE the prime exponents so adjacency literally equals consonance ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó in the lab) + **#3** named refs (Euler / Partch / Wilson). **diversity:** `banned=[pentatonic-sonification(jury 6√ó) ¬∑ violet-on-near-black palette(jury ~12√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT(jury 4√ó) ¬∑ autonomous self-playing model(jury ~11√ó) ¬∑ mic INPUT(jury 7√ó)]`; `picked=[just-intonation harmony(exact ratios, NOT pentatonic) ¬∑ paper-and-ink cream palette(light background, NON-violet) ¬∑ SVG-DOM OUTPUT(minority 3√ó/10) ¬∑ human-played INPUT(keyboard+MIDI+touch, zero autonomous sound)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG; zero new npm deps). **Curator fix before ship:** the app root is forced `.dark` (near-white `--foreground`), so the builder's semantic chrome tokens would have rendered white-on-cream; re-asserted light-theme token values on the page container so the chrome stays dark-and-readable on paper. **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the idle pulse is a single-node triangular fade far under 0.1 Hz that stops on first play; peak stays on warm paper, never pure white; reduced-motion damps it entirely. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `next lint` on `1882-lattice` = **0 warnings/errors**. (Full-route `npm run build` `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~750 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom, as every prior cycle confirms.) **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no audio device): whether the beat-free 3/2 / 5/4 vs. thickening wide jumps read as clearly as intended, and whether the QWERTY‚Üílattice patch is ergonomic to play, want Karel's browser. Two more explored this fire ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź 1888-conductor** (conduct real FUNCTIONAL, modulating harmony from live camera frame-diff motion ‚ÄĒ vertical = diatonic function I‚Ä¶vii¬į, dwell in the top zone triggers a circle-of-fifths modulation landing on a V7‚ÜíI cadence; warm-daylight three.js world; honest labelled ghost-conductor self-demo when headless; ref *Rhythm in the Air* arXiv:2511.00793 + AIR Guitar ‚ÄĒ the strongest runner-up, ship-next) + **‚≠ź 1894-shape-note** (sing one line ‚Üí a dependency-free YIN pitch tracker drives a cold-monochrome Sacred-Harp modal choir under your voice with a 4-3 suspension engine that leans then resolves; WebGPU-field with CSS-compositor fallback; ref de Cheveign√© & Kawahara YIN 2002) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß810 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec under a fresh number). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1882-lattice/README.md`

### [1876-glasshouse](/dream/1876-glasshouse) ¬∑ machine-self-portrait / **what if your device sang its own inner life? The live telemetry of the very machine you're on ‚ÄĒ frame stutter, memory pressure, network weather, battery drain, the entropy of your own mouse ‚ÄĒ becomes a continuous, coherent piece of music AND a dithered field of signal-noise that TEARS as the device strains and settles when it's calm. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (three unrelated NON-altered-states cross-modal directions); banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź `glyphsong` (text‚ÜíSVG-composed music) + ‚≠ź `resonant-halo` (score-following JI halo on a dropped recording). The sharpest answer to the jury's #1 provocation ‚ÄĒ a genuinely new SUBJECT for the ~900-proto lab: the machine you're holding, looking at itself. NON-mic, NON-camera, NON-keyboard, off the inside of a head.** ¬∑ **INPUT = system-telemetry ONLY (`rAF` jank/variance ‚Üí fps + jitter ¬∑ `performance.memory` heap ratio ¬∑ `navigator.connection` rtt/downlink ¬∑ `getBattery()` level/charging ¬∑ pointer-movement entropy ¬∑ `hardwareConcurrency`/`visibilityState`); every source SSR-guarded and null-degrading (Firefox/Safari lose memory+connection ‚Üí the rest still plays); the field reads the machine on load, one "Let the machine sing" tap unlocks audio ‚ÄĒ NON-mic, NON-camera, NON-keyboard** / **OUTPUT = three.js `THREE.Points` (1√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ off the banned Canvas2D 4√ó + WebGL2-fragment 4√ó): a dense lattice through a custom ShaderMaterial with a Bayer 4√ó4 ordered dither + per-channel chromatic split + positional tearing that intensifies with jank/load and a bounded load‚Üí`setDrawRange` feedback loop (a straining machine spends more GPU on its own portrait, which the frame sensor then re-hears). Web Audio: a lookahead 16th-note scheduler reads fresh telemetry each step ‚ÄĒ jank‚Üírhythmic density + glitch/retrigger probability, memory‚Üísub-bass drone + ‚ô≠9 tension, rtt‚Üíecho time, downlink‚Üílowpass brightness, restlessness‚Üílead arp, battery-drain‚Üíslow global detune (the machine tiring), load‚Üítempo; A-minor pentatonic + slow root-drift keep it coherent + loop-free (different at minute 3 than second 3) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor limiter ‚Üí master, 1 s fade-in; live HUD shows every readout on semantic tokens; `text-destructive` notice if WebGL absent, audio keeps playing** ¬∑ cycle 809 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: machine self-portrait / monitoring-as-music (cross-modal, about the world not the inner head) ¬∑ vibe: system-telemetry (NON-altered, NON-cosmic, NON-arc-engine)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Alunno & Bientinesi *Real-time, EDM-Inspired Sonification of the activity of a Supercomputer* (arXiv:2605.21874, 2026) ‚ÄĒ monitoring-as-coherent-music, turned INWARD onto the visitor's own device / Robert Borghesi *ASTRODITHER* (three.js WebGPU/TSL, 2026) ‚ÄĒ the dithered signal-noise aesthetic
**What if your device sang its own inner life?** Winner of a **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ three unrelated non-altered-states cross-modal explorers, ship the strongest, bank the rest. **The research, built (¬ß809 chain visible):** the freshest find was *ASTRODITHER* (Robert Borghesi, 2026 three.js WebGPU/TSL) ‚ÄĒ a dithered signal-noise field the audio tears; the conceptual lineage is Alunno & Bientinesi's supercomputer-sonification (arXiv:2605.21874) ‚ÄĒ real-time MONITORING as coherent music. Nothing in the lab had pointed that microscope INWARD, at the very device the visitor holds. This piece turns the browser's own live self-telemetry into a continuous groove + a Borghesi-style dithered field that breaks when the machine strains ‚ÄĒ a self-portrait of the machine as it runs. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** **#1** never-used INPUT (system-telemetry as a music driver ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó: no prior jank/heap/rtt/battery sonification) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (telemetry sampler + lookahead generative-music scheduler + ordered-dither three.js field + closed load‚ÜĒrender‚ÜĒjank feedback loop) + **#3** named refs (ASTRODITHER ¬∑ arXiv:2605.21874) + **#5** this cycle's same-day ¬ß809 dive. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(4√ó/10) ¬∑ WebGL2 OUTPUT(4√ó/10) ¬∑ mic INPUT(jury 7√ó) ¬∑ keyboard INPUT(recent lean) ¬∑ camera-body INPUT(theme-watch, just did 1856) ¬∑ altered-states THEME(jury) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient VIBE(jury) ¬∑ arc-engine-scheduler THEME(3√ó, no 4th)]`; `picked=[system-telemetry INPUT(grep-0√ó, non-mic/camera/keyboard) ¬∑ three.js dithered-Points OUTPUT(1√ó/10, off the banned Canvas2D + WebGL2-fragment) ¬∑ telemetry‚Üícoherent-generative-music TECHNIQUE(non-arc-engine, non-form-constant) ¬∑ machine-self-portrait VIBE(off-the-inner-head, non-altered, non-cosmic)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + three.js; zero new npm deps, three@0.182 already present). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ dither/tear is per-frame texture drift, not luminance flashing; master limited + 1 s fade-in. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); `npx eslint ‚Ä¶ 1876-glasshouse --max-warnings 0` = **0**; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1876-glasshouse` in BOTH route manifests (`page.js` 38.7 kB), no `1882`/`1888` leak. (Plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~860 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/display/speakers): whether the dither field reads as "signal-noise" vs mush, whether the telemetry‚Üímusic mapping stays musical (not a theremin) as load swings, and whether the feedback loop is legible want Karel's browser; and on Firefox/Safari two of the richest signals (`performance.memory`, `navigator.connection`) are absent, so those machines get a jank+pointer+battery-driven portrait. Two more explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `glyphsong`** (drop/paste text ‚Üí its linguistic prosody ‚ÄĒ sentence cadence, vowel/consonant flow, punctuation as rests/bends/accents ‚ÄĒ becomes a generative score while the SVG-DOM typography illuminates word-by-word; the concrete-poetry / text-sonification lineage, SVG-only) + **‚≠ź `resonant-halo`** (drop any recording ‚Üí real-time score-following (spectral-flux onsets + Krumhansl chroma/key + IOI tempo) grows a live just-intonation harmonic HALO tuned to the music's own key over a WebGPU-compute particle field; the `130-tsl-particle-compute`-loved lineage ‚ÄĒ builder flagged the WebGPU path as higher runtime risk) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß809 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec under a fresh number). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1876-glasshouse/README.md`

### [1870-metastaseis](/dream/1870-metastaseis) ¬∑ architecture-as-score / **what if a Xenakis ruled-surface BUILDING is the musical score ‚ÄĒ you fly through the architecture and hear its geometry? Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire on ONE massively-bigger concept ("the building is the score: a performable Xenakis ruled surface"), banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź WebGPU-compute sculptable surface + ‚≠ź long-form glissando field. A fresh SUBJECT the ~900-proto lab has never touched (architecture-as-score / ruled-surface sonification, grep-0√ó) ‚ÄĒ off the inside of a head (jury #1), NON-mic, NON-altered, a clean pivot after 807's psychedelic return.** ¬∑ **AUTONOMOUS seeded self-demo (`mulberry32(0x1870)` deterministic camera flight + playhead; one "Begin" tap unlocks audio, then self-runs ‚ÄĒ never blank/silent at 06:30; NON-mic, NON-keyboard-played, NON-camera; pointer-drag orbits the camera, 2 labelled sliders sweep-speed + surface-warp)** / **three.js `LineSegments` (0√ó/10 output ‚ÄĒ off the banned Canvas2D 4√ó + WebGL2 4√ó): 3 reconstructed hyperbolic-paraboloid shells drawn as both families of straight RULING LINES (bilinear skew-quad), a seeded playhead sweeping each shell's `u` axis ‚ÄĒ every ruling line it crosses lights up (comet-trail luminance, no strobe) and SOUNDS its glissando (one osc gliding between the pitches mapped from the line's two endpoint heights, quantized pentatonic), steep/dense lines additionally firing pizzicato energy blocks. Web Audio: lowpassed sawtooth glissando voices (14-voice cap) + pizzicato ‚Üí bus ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.18, 1 s fade-in; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows sweep + thins voicing; `text-destructive` notice if WebGL absent, audio keeps playing** ¬∑ cycle 808 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-17) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: architecture-as-performable-score (the building IS the score) ¬∑ vibe: Xenakis / Philips-Pavilion (NON-altered, NON-cosmic, NON-arc-engine, off-the-inner-head)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Iannis Xenakis *Metastaseis* (1953‚Äď54) / Philips Pavilion & *Po√®me √©lectronique* (Expo 1958, w/ Le Corbusier) / *Extending Xenakis: From Architectural Geometry to Sonification of the Philips Pavilion* (arXiv:2607.06589, 2026-07-06)
**What if you could fly through a Xenakis building and hear its geometry as the score?** Winner of a **DEEP** fire on ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *"the building is the score: a performable Xenakis ruled surface"* ‚ÄĒ attacked via three technical approaches; shipped the literal fly-through architecture, banked the other two. **The research, built (¬ß808 chain visible):** *"Extending Xenakis"* (arXiv:2607.06589, **6 July 2026**, 11 days old) inverts Xenakis's music‚Üíarchitecture workflow: he composed *Metastaseis* as string **glissandi** then built that ruled geometry into the **Philips Pavilion** (nine hyperbolic-paraboloid shells); the paper runs it backwards ‚ÄĒ a ruled surface's straight **ruling lines ARE glissandi**, and point-density ‚Üí instrumental energy blocks. This piece reconstructs 3 hypar shells as their visible ruling lines and lets a seeded playhead sweep them, sounding each lit line's glissando (height‚Üípitch) with density‚Üípizzicato ‚ÄĒ the paper's inversion coded literally onto architecture you inhabit. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (ruled-surface + ruling-line generator + glissando-synthesis + density‚Üípizzicato scheduler + three.js render + seeded flight) + **#3** named refs (Xenakis / Philips Pavilion / arXiv:2607.06589) + **#5** same-day ¬ß808 dive. **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ glissandi/three.js/pentatonic all pre-exist (grep-checked); the honest novelty is *architecture-as-performable-score* (a fresh subject + the inversion mechanic), not a virgin API. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(4√ó/10) ¬∑ WebGL2 OUTPUT(4√ó/10) ¬∑ arc-engine-scheduler THEME(3√ó) ¬∑ keyboard/camera/mic INPUT]`; `picked=[autonomous+pointer-orbit INPUT ¬∑ three.js LineSegments OUTPUT(0√ó/10) ¬∑ inverse-Xenakis ruled-surface-sonification TECHNIQUE(grep-0√ó) ¬∑ architecture-as-score VIBE(off-the-inner-head, non-altered)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + three.js; zero new npm deps, three@0.182 already present). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ comet-trail luminance drift only; master ‚Č§0.18 + compressor + 1 s fade-in; reduced-motion honored; audio-trigger loop runs even with no WebGL. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); `npx eslint ‚Ä¶ 1870-metastaseis --max-warnings 0` = **0**; scoped `tsc --noEmit` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1870-metastaseis` in BOTH route manifests (`page.js` 30 kB), no `1876`/`1882` leak. (Plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at prerender on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~860 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/display/speakers): whether the 3 shells read as *architecture* vs a fainter net at low warp (default morph 1.0 looks best on load), whether the many-glissandi texture stays clean under fast sweep (mitigated by 14-voice cap + compressor), and whether the fly-through *feels* like inhabiting a building want Karel's browser; the seeded flight guarantees never-blank/silent. Two more explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1876-ruled-loom`** (a WebGPU-**compute** point cloud of a 4-corner hyperbolic paraboloid you SCULPT live ‚ÄĒ bend a corner, the glissandi retune instantly, CPU audio mirroring the GPU geometry with zero readback; WebGL2-points fallback; the freshest interaction + the lab's cleanest WebGPU-compute-as-surface-generator, still 0√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ top resurrect for a confirmable-WebGPU cycle) + **‚≠ź `1882-glissando-field`** (72 glissando lines morphing between saddle/conoid/hyperboloid over an ~11-movement seeded arc with migrating harmonic centre + incommensurate density waves ‚ÄĒ a real long-form generative piece, different at min 5 than min 1) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß808 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1870-metastaseis/README.md`

### [1862-strobe-atlas](/dream/1862-strobe-atlas) ¬∑ psychedelic / **the four "form constants" of hallucination (tunnels, spokes, spirals, honeycombs) are only PART of the map ‚ÄĒ a safe photic field morphs through the classic four AND the Cartesian/hyperbolic motifs a 2026 study found the classic taxonomy misses, with each form NAMED on-screen as `log-polar` (classic) or `newly-mapped`. A RETURN to the psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION after 8 non-altered cycles (altered-states was down to 2√ó/10; love-signal-backed), and the visible ¬ß807 research‚Üíbuild chain. The piece literally argues with the lab's own `_shared/psych/logpolar.ts`: families 4‚Äď6 are the three forms the exp() warp provably CANNOT render.** ¬∑ **AUTONOMOUS seeded self-running arc (zero permissions; a `mulberry32(0x1862)` playlist across 7 families, every quantity a pure function of an integer frame ‚Üí identical headless output) + an OPT-IN Photic-pulse mode gated through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker.ts` (‚Č§3 flashes/sec, epilepsy warning, instant Stop, `prefers-reduced-motion` honored, soft floor-limited sine ‚ÄĒ NOT a hard strobe); default is slow luminance drift, no flicker on load ‚ÄĒ NON-mic, NON-keyboard, NON-camera** / **raw WebGL2 fullscreen FRAGMENT shader (single quad, iOS-robust ‚ÄĒ off the recent Canvas2D 3√ó and WebGL2-RTT/points 3√ó lanes): all 7 planform families in one shader ‚ÄĒ 0‚Äď3 tunnels/spokes/spirals/honeycomb via `LOGPOLAR_GLSL`+`formConstant`+`honeycomb` imported verbatim (the retina‚ÜíV1 complex-log warp), 4 concentric squares (Chebyshev `max(|x|,|y|)` rings), 5 crosses (`sin(kx)+sin(ky)` Cartesian grid), 6 hyperbolic (saddle level-sets of `x¬≤‚ąíy¬≤`, `x¬∑y`); violet‚Üíindigo‚Üímagenta ramp (`_shared/palette` `PALETTE_GLSL`) + chromatic aberration + traveling-wave phase sweep + breathing zoom; `text-destructive` notice if WebGL2 absent. Web Audio: detuned JI drone via `_shared/psych/droneBank` + opt-in isochronic pulse LFO-locked to the safe photic rate (sound & flicker breathe together) ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.2 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination, 1 s fade-in** ¬∑ cycle 807 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: flicker-induced form constants / Ganzflicker ¬∑ pole: intense-geometric` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Kl√ľver 1926 form constants / Bressloff‚ÄďCowan log-polar cortical map / *Large-Scale Computer-Vision Mapping of Stroboscopically-Induced Visual Hallucinations* (bioRxiv 2026.02.18.705710, 10,598 drawings) / Gysin *Dreamachine* 1959
**What if the classic four form constants are only part of the hallucination map ‚ÄĒ and a piece could SHOW you the forms the standard cortical-warp model can't produce?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-brief fire (three unrelated altered states √ó substrates √ó techniques) that **returns to the psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION** after eight straight non-altered cycles (1810‚Üí1856): the 2026-07-16 jury's one-cycle altered-states ban is long served, altered-states had fallen to 2√ó/10, Karel's love signal leans altered/mandala/particle (1396/1482/1450/1392/1326), and there was a fresh same-day research anchor. **The research, built (¬ß807 chain visible):** *"A Large-Scale Computer-Vision Mapping of the Geometric Structures of Stroboscopically-Induced Visual Hallucinations"* (bioRxiv 2026.02.18.705710) analyzed **10,598 participant drawings** of flicker hallucinations and found, beyond Kl√ľver's classic four (lattice/cobweb/tunnel/spiral), recurrent **concentric squares, crosses, and hyperbolic planforms**. Those classic four are all products of the retina‚ÜíV1 complex-log (`exp()`) warp (Bressloff‚ÄďCowan) ‚ÄĒ which is purely radial and **cannot** make Cartesian or hyperbolic motifs ‚ÄĒ so this piece renders all seven in one shader and tags each `log-polar` vs `newly-mapped`, making the label carry the thesis. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#3** named refs (bioRxiv 2026.02.18.705710 ¬∑ Kl√ľver 1926 ¬∑ Bressloff‚ÄďCowan ¬∑ Gysin Dreamachine) + **#5** this cycle's same-day ¬ß807 dive + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (safe-photic engine + 7-family planform GLSL atlas + drone/isochronic-pulse audio). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ log-polar/flicker/form-constants all pre-exist in the lab (grep-0√ó conceded exhausted); the honest novelty is *the atlas-beyond-the-four that argues with the shared engine*, not a virgin technique. **diversity:** last-10 had nothing ‚Č•4√ó (no auto-ban), but the fan dodged the on-watch hot lanes anyway ‚ÄĒ `AVOID=[Canvas2D-primary(3√ó) ¬∑ keyboard-arc-engine-scheduler(3√ó) ¬∑ mic-breath]`; `picked=[autonomous+opt-in-photic INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 fullscreen-FRAGMENT OUTPUT (distinct from the recent RTT/points WebGL2 3√ó) ¬∑ planform-atlas-beyond-Kl√ľver TECHNIQUE ¬∑ intense-geometric psychedelic pole (fresh; altered-states only 2√ó/10)]`. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Safety (non-negotiable, correct):** default is slow luminance drift with `uFlicker`=1.0 (no flicker) on load; the Photic pulse is opt-in behind a visible photosensitive-epilepsy warning, capped ‚Č§3 Hz via `createSafeFlicker({maxHz:3})` with an instant Stop and `prefersReducedMotion()` honored (opt-in hidden, drift forced); never a full-screen hard strobe. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); `npx eslint src/app/dream/1862-strobe-atlas --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1862-strobe-atlas` in BOTH route manifests. (The plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at prerender on the container's standing 4096-fd ceiling across ~860 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; reproduces with the winner removed; Vercel has fd headroom and deployed the identical-size tree 2 h ago.) **NOT eye-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/display): whether the seven families read as distinct on real hardware and whether the crossfade transitions land want Karel's browser; the honest execution gap is that the morph is a field cross-dissolve, not a true metric homotopy, and families 4‚Äď6 are faithful renderings of the study's motif *descriptions* rather than validated reproductions of the drawings. Two more explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1864-khole`** (a ketamine k-hole **audio-visual DESYNC engine** ‚ÄĒ sound and motion ride two decoupled random-walking clocks so swells never coincide, the NMDA sensory-gating breakdown made felt; three.js receding void + convolution-void/Shepard-descent audio; the freshest *technique* of the fan, top resurrect for a dissociative cycle) + **‚≠ź `1866-clearlight`** (jhńĀna "clear light" **boundless-white dissolution** ‚ÄĒ a WebGPU-compute particle cloud melting figure/ground into light, Shepard‚ÄďRisset endless ascent; the most device-robust build via a WebGPU‚ÜíCanvas2D‚Üíaudio-only three-level degrade) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß807 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-807/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1862-strobe-atlas/README.md`

### [1856-murmuration](/dream/1856-murmuration) ¬∑ embodied-conducting / **a living murmuration of sound where every bird is a voice ‚ÄĒ you conduct it with your whole body via the camera, no mic, no keyboard, no downloaded model. A flock of ~260 boids (Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion) is herded by your motion; the flock's emergent structure IS the orchestra. The DEEP fire's winner of a 3-way "conduct a generative ensemble with your body" fan (banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź Karplus-Strong string loom + ‚≠ź sectioned spatial orchestra). Explicitly OFF the recent lanes: NON-mic (jury-banned 7√ó), NON-keyboard (recent 3√ó), NON-Canvas2D (banned 4√ó/10), NON-altered-states ‚ÄĒ a piece that is about the moving body, not the inside of a head.** ¬∑ **CAMERA optical-flow (model-free 64√ó48 mirrored frame-difference ‚Üí total motion energy + motion centroid + dominant direction; pure Canvas pixel ops, no MediaPipe/no download) drives a moving attractor the flock is herded toward; zero-permission deterministic Lissajous "ghost conductor" self-demo already alive + sounding on load; "Tap to begin" autoplay gate; on-brand `text-destructive` notice if camera denied ‚ÄĒ self-demo keeps running** / **WebGL2 additive round points on a violet ramp with per-frame fade trails (flowing murmuration ribbons). Web Audio: flock split into 4 x-position clusters = 4 voices ‚ÄĒ cluster height‚Üímajor-pentatonic pitch (always consonant), coherence‚Üílowpass cutoff, x‚Üístereo pan; HEADLINE mapping (the KTH research anchor) total motion energy‚Üítempo & density (still body = sparse/slow/quiet, big gestures = dense/bright/loud swell) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.16, 1 s fade-in** ¬∑ cycle 806 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-17) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: conduct a living ensemble with your body (embodied, about the world) ¬∑ vibe: murmuration/emergent-orchestra (NOT altered, NOT cosmic, NOT an arc-engine)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Craig Reynolds *Boids* 1987 / starling murmurations / Mermerci et al. *Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures* (arXiv 2604.27957, 2026-04-30, KTH dome)

### [1848-butterfly](/dream/1848-butterfly) ¬∑ deterministic-chaos / **a music box driven by a chaotic double pendulum ‚ÄĒ nudge the start by a hair and the whole song changes, yet it is fully deterministic and never repeats. A real two-rod pendulum (RK4) drops its tip across vertical pitch-bands to fire pentatonic notes; a faint TWIN launched 0.001 rad away overlaps for seconds then visibly peels apart (the butterfly effect, made audible + visible). Explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT mic, NOT a generative-music-arc-engine (the flagged 1812/1818/1824 cluster) ‚ÄĒ a piece that is *about* physics, not the inside of a head.** ¬∑ **POINTER/DRAG to set the initial angles + release (sensitive dependence is the headline gesture) + deterministic seeded self-demo on load ‚ÄĒ NON-mic (jury-banned 7√ó), NON-keyboard-played, NON-camera** / **raw WebGL2 long-exposure GLOW (ping-pong feedback texture: additive-blended tip-path line/point trails with a slow ~0.965/frame fade + soft-knee present pass = a glowing Lissajous orbit ‚ÄĒ line/point GEOMETRY with additive blend, NOT a fullscreen psychedelic fragment field, NOT three.js; Canvas2D `lighter`-composite fallback if WebGL2 absent). Web Audio: RK4 double-pendulum integrator (12 substeps/frame) ‚Üí tip crosses 1 of N vertical bands ‚Üí major-pentatonic marimba pluck (angular velocity‚Üígain, 2nd-bob x‚Üípan, y‚Üíbrightness), 45 ms rate-limit + 10-voice cap so dense chaos reads as fast runs not mush ‚Üí compressor + reverb/delay ‚Üí master 0.28** ¬∑ cycle 805 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: deterministic chaos as a never-repeating composition ¬∑ vibe: scientific/physical (NOT altered, NOT cosmic, NOT an arc-engine)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref double pendulum / Lorenz butterfly effect / Poincar√© on deterministic chaos
**What if a piece of music were the trajectory of a chaotic physical system ‚ÄĒ so a hair-thin change in the start yields a completely different song, yet it is fully deterministic and never repeats?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-brief fire (three unrelated non-altered-states subjects/substrates/inputs), chosen to cash the 2026-07-16 jury's deepest ask ‚ÄĒ *leave the inside of the head; be about literally any other subject* ‚ÄĒ with the biggest **surprise** (Karel care #2): deterministic chaos you can hear diverge. **The concept, built:** a genuine **double pendulum** (two coupled rods under gravity) integrated with 4th-order **Runge‚ÄďKutta**; the chaotic tip crossing vertical pitch-band gridlines fires a pentatonic sequence (so the song is genuinely different at minute 5 than second 5 ‚ÄĒ long-form with no script, no loop, no arc), while a faint **twin** launched 0.001 rad away overlaps for several seconds then peels apart within ~10‚Äď20 s (a live tip-distance readout that explodes from near-zero) ‚ÄĒ **sensitive dependence on initial conditions** made audible and visible. Named refs: the double pendulum as a canonical chaotic system, **Edward Lorenz's butterfly effect**, **Henri Poincar√©** on practically-unpredictable deterministic systems. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (RK4 physics integrator + band-crossing note sequencer + raw-WebGL2 additive trail renderer + Web-Audio synth = 4) + **#3** named refs (double pendulum ¬∑ Lorenz ¬∑ Poincar√©); **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ pendulums (164), strange-attractors (10) and chaos exist in the 1800-deep lab, so the honest novelty is *deterministic-chaos-as-a-never-repeating-piece with an audible/visible divergence twin*, not a virgin technique. **diversity:** `banned=[altered-states THEME(jury 15/15) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient(5√ó) ¬∑ mic INPUT(7√ó) ¬∑ WebGPU-compute + three.js/WebGL2-fragment OUTPUT(4√ó ea) ¬∑ psychedelic-geometry TECHNIQUE(4√ó)]`; `picked=[pointer/drag+seeded-self-demo INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 additive-geometry-trail OUTPUT (off the banned fullscreen-fragment lane) ¬∑ RK4-chaos‚Üísequencer TECHNIQUE ¬∑ scientific/physical VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** the additive glow does NOT strobe ‚ÄĒ smooth per-frame accumulation/fade, no full-frame flashing; `prefers-reduced-motion` shortens/dims the trail (audio keeps running); master 0.28 behind a compressor. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); `npx eslint src/app/dream/1848-butterfly --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1848-butterfly` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` (39.6 kB) emitted (the plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at prerender on the container's standing 4096-fd ceiling across ~857 routes ‚ÄĒ infra, not code, reproduces with the winner removed; Vercel has fd headroom). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers ‚ÄĒ only the Canvas2D fallback path could execute here): whether the chaos reads *musically* (not as random pings), whether the twin's divergence lands as a genuine "huh" moment, and the WebGL2 trail glow want Karel's browser; the seeded self-demo + deterministic integrator guarantee it's never blank/silent. Two more explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1842-cantus`** (a Web-MIDI-driven **no-lookahead counterpoint partner** ‚ÄĒ Fux species rules that answer you a note at a time with strict causality, cited to *LiveBand* arXiv 2606.03803 June 2026; a near-ship that directly cashes the jury's "Force MIDI" provocation ‚ÄĒ resurrect next cycle) + **‚≠ź `1854-typescore`** (typed **prose performed as a live melody** ‚ÄĒ letter‚Üíscale-degree, punctuation‚Üícadence, typing-speed‚Üítempo, on a Canvas2D scrolling staff; realizes the long-banked ¬ß802 `1826-keys` typing-as-instrument idea) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß805 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1848-butterfly/README.md`

### [1836-flow-eden](/dream/1836-flow-eden) ¬∑ emergent-ecology / **an evolving SONIC ECOLOGY ‚ÄĒ a long-form, stateful, EMERGENT piece where sound and image are two views of ONE simulation, and the music is genuinely different at minute 5 than at second 5 because the POPULATION has evolved, not because a script said so. A finite budget of "matter" lives on a WebGL2 grid under a mass-conserving Flow-Lenia rule; three species compete for that matter, spread, collide, and drift/speciate ‚ÄĒ no loop, no arc, no timeline. Explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT a generative-music-ARC engine (the flagged 1812/1818/1824 cluster), NOT Canvas2D (the banned 5√ó-in-10 output).** ¬∑ **AUTONOMOUS self-evolving (Start gesture for audio, then zero further input / zero permissions) + optional pointer-to-seed a species ‚ÄĒ NON-mic, NON-keyboard-played** / **WebGL2 render-to-texture ping-pong (RGBA16F, `EXT_color_buffer_float`): one field texture carries R=mass + G=mass-weighted genome embedded in the matter; one tick = 3 fragment passes (perceive: radial growth-kernel convolution ‚Üí potential+Gaussian growth per-cell-genome ¬∑ flow: `F=kA¬∑‚ąáU‚ąíkM¬∑‚ąám` clamped ¬∑ transport: reintegration tracking ‚Üí mass conserved EXACTLY ‚Üí finite resource ‚Üí competition); 48¬≤ downsample + `readPixels` ‚Üí per-species stats; plasma fallback if float-RTT absent. Web Audio: 3 species voices (low triangle / mid saw / high sine) pitch-quantized to D major-pentatonic ‚ÄĒ mass‚Üípresence, center-of-mass‚Üípan/pitch drift, motion‚Üínoise shimmer, bloom/takeover/near-extinction‚Üíbell onsets; all ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master 0.18** ¬∑ cycle 804 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-17) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: evolving sonic ecology / mass-conservative emergent life ¬∑ vibe: living-ecology (NOT altered, NOT cosmic, NOT an arc-engine)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Flow-Lenia arXiv:2506.08569
**What if a piece of music were a living thing you tend rather than a track you play ‚ÄĒ evolving because its population, not a script, is changing?** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *an evolving sonic ecology, sound & image as two views of one long-form emergent simulation* ‚ÄĒ attacked via mass-conservative Flow-Lenia / evolvable agents / drifting Gray-Scott biomes), chosen because DEEP was overdue (‚Ä¶802 W ¬∑ 803 W) and to cash Karel's *"massively bigger concepts"* mandate on the menu's thinnest lane: **long-form generative with real state/memory/evolution** (not a loop, not a scripted arc). **The research, built:** it implements **Flow-Lenia ‚ÄĒ "Emergent evolutionary dynamics in mass conservative continuous cellular automata"** (Plantec/Hamon/Etcheverry/Chan/Oudeyer/Moulin-Frier, arXiv:2506.08569, *Artificial Life* 2025), the mass-conservative extension of Bert Wang-Chak Chan's **Lenia** ‚ÄĒ whose load-bearing insight is that CONSERVATION OF A FINITE MASS (organisms advect existing matter instead of spawning it) plus rule-parameters embedded IN the moving matter turns a pretty pattern generator into an **ecology with scarcity, competition, and open-ended evolution/speciation**. Here that's literal: the genome is embedded in the conserved matter (`G = mass¬∑species`), mass is conserved exactly by **reintegration tracking**, so the three species genuinely compete for a finite resource and the population balance drifts over minutes ‚ÄĒ and the multi-voice pentatonic sonification tracks that turnover (a species blooming, taking over, or going near-extinct rings a bell), so the composition itself evolves. Also nods to the **Simulacra Naturae** generative-ecosystem installation (arXiv:2509.02924, 2025). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mass-conserving CA solver + embedded-genome channel + emergent-stats‚Üísonification + WebGL2 render = 4) + **#3** named refs (Chan Lenia ¬∑ Plantec Flow-Lenia ¬∑ Simulacra Naturae) + **#5** this cycle's ¬ß804 research. **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ Lenia (1086), particle-life (16/236), physarum (327), reaction-diffusion (many) all pre-exist (grepped per jury #5); the honest novelty is *mass-conservation ‚Üí competition ‚Üí evolution ‚Üí the composition evolves over minutes*, an ecology-as-long-form-piece, NOT a virgin API. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(5√ó/10) ¬∑ altered-states THEME(4√ó) ¬∑ generative-music-arc-engine CLUSTER(3√ó) ¬∑ mic INPUT(jury) ¬∑ WebGPU-compute/three.js-fragment(jury)]`; `picked=[autonomous+pointer-seed INPUT(non-mic/keyboard/external) ¬∑ WebGL2 RTT PDE OUTPUT(off the banned Canvas2D) ¬∑ mass-conservative continuous-CA + emergent‚Üígenerative-audio TECHNIQUE(non-arc-engine) ¬∑ living-ecology VIBE(non-altered/cosmic/arc)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the field drifts by slow luminance only, peak below white; `prefers-reduced-motion` shrinks the grid/motion (audio keeps running); master 0.18 behind a compressor. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **exit 0** (fixed ~40 `TS18047 'gl' possibly null` across two WebGL2 factory closures ‚ÄĒ re-bound a non-null `gl` after each `getContext` guard so nested closures capture a present context) + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1836-flow-eden --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1836-flow-eden` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` (32 kB) emitted, no `1838`/`1840` leaked. **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/audio device): whether the ecology stays alive (neither melts to white nor dies to black) over minutes on real hardware, and whether the pentatonic sonification tracks the population turnover musically, want Karel's device; the seeded self-demo exercises the identical sim‚Üístats‚Üísynth‚Üírender path and the plasma fallback guarantees it's never blank if `EXT_color_buffer_float` is absent. Two more explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1838-genome-drift`** (thousands of agents with evolvable 6-gene genomes competing for a finite diffusing food field ‚ÄĒ real mutation+selection; the MOST iOS-robust of the fan: CPU typed-array sim + WebGL2 points + R8 food texture, no float-RTT dependency; resurrect as a dedicated evolvable-agents ecology) + **‚≠ź `1840-biome-bloom`** (Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion with a drifting feed/kill map ‚Üí biomes born/collide/transform; the "evolution" is honestly parameter-drift, the weakest ecology claim, but visually lovely) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß804 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-804/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1836-flow-eden/README.md`

### [1832-choir-of-strangers](/dream/1832-choir-of-strangers) ¬∑ multi-user / **a pure just-intonation chord that no one can build alone ‚ÄĒ each open browser TAB holds one voice, and the beatless five-limit harmony physically cannot exist until several people join. The lab has repeatedly BANKED this multi-user Dream-House idea (1814-in-c cy800 ¬∑ 1828-dreamhouse cy802) as "resurrect for a multi-user cycle" but never shipped it; cycle 803 finally ships it ‚ÄĒ now anchored on FRESH ¬ß803 research and fixed with a phantom-voice self-demo so it's no longer demo-gated on multiple tabs. Explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT mic, NOT an arc-engine ‚ÄĒ it directly cashes the 2026-07-16 jury's #1 provocation ("build about something OTHER than the inside of a head") which named multi-user/WebRTC the glaring 0√ó-built lane.** ¬∑ **MULTI-TAB PRESENCE ‚ÄĒ each tab claims one scale degree over BroadcastChannel (non-mic; "Open another voice" button `window.open`s a new tab)** / **SVG-DOM harmonic lattice (6 voice nodes on a 5-limit fifths√óthirds lattice: present voices glow + breathe, absent voices show as dashed ghost outlines, interval edges brighten + are labelled with the ratio only when BOTH endpoints are present); Web Audio: each tab synthesizes ONLY its own JI voice (`ratio √ó 146.83 Hz` tonic) ‚ÄĒ sine stack ‚Üí soft lowpass ‚Üí shared convolver reverb ‚Üí compressor ‚Üí master 0.19; a shared-wall-clock breath LFO (~13 s) so all tabs pulse in lockstep** ¬∑ cycle 803 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: multi-user collaborative just-intonation choir ¬∑ vibe: communal / La-Monte-Young Dream House ¬∑ NOT altered-states` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref IEEE-2026 WAM collaborative-music (control-events-not-audio)
**What if a pure chord could only be completed by many people at once?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated non-altered, non-arc-engine, non-mic directions ‚ÄĒ this multi-tab choir / a webcam-color‚Üídrone `1830-roomtone` / a Houdini-Paint texture `1834-livingwall`), taking the standing **2026-07-16 jury's #1** provocation ("leave altered-states; build about something OTHER than the inside of a head" ‚ÄĒ which named **multi-user/WebRTC** the glaring 0√ó-built lane) and **#2** (break the mic monoculture) head-on. **The research, built:** it implements the mechanic from **"Real-Time Collaborative Music Creation on the Web: exploiting Web Audio Modules" (IEEE, 2026)** + **Sequencer.party**'s CRDT model ‚ÄĒ browser-collaborative music in 2026 does NOT stream audio; it transmits **only control/timing events (which voice, the shared tonic, an LFO phase) and each client synthesizes locally**. Here that's literal: tabs exchange only control state over a BroadcastChannel, every tab voices its own tone, and the whole choir breathes together because the amplitude LFO reads the shared wall clock ‚ÄĒ so the harmony *only exists in the aggregate*. **How it works:** six voices form a 5-limit JI lattice around tonic D (1/1, 3/2, 5/4, 15/8, 5/3, 9/8); the first lonely tab is the root and the chord fills outward; a tab claims the lowest free degree (ties broken by peerId ‚ÄĒ a small CRDT-style convergence). **Self-demo (the fix over the banked 1828):** alone, a deterministic seeded **phantom choir** fades in over ~15 s so a single reviewer hears the chord assemble and watches the lattice + interval edges brighten; open a real second tab and its live voice *replaces* a phantom in that slot (its node flips phantom‚Üílive and that tab produces the sound). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (BroadcastChannel presence/CRDT-claim sync + per-tab JI oscillator-bank synth + shared-clock breath LFO + SVG-DOM lattice viz = 4) + **#3** named refs (La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela *Dream House* ¬∑ IEEE-2026 WAM paper ¬∑ Sequencer.party CRDT) + **#5** this cycle's ¬ß803 research (IEEE 11325761, current-year, on-concept). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ BroadcastChannel multi-tab (grep-6√ó) and JI Dream-House drones (552/992) both pre-exist; the novelty is the *research-anchored control-events-not-audio mechanic made the point*, not a virgin API (grepped before claiming, per jury #5). **Honest limitation:** BroadcastChannel is **cross-tab/same-origin only** ‚ÄĒ real remote strangers still need a WebRTC/relay layer (the banked 1814/1828 note stands); what 1832 adds over those banks is the shipped commit + the research anchor + the phantom self-demo. **diversity:** `picked=[multi-user-tab-presence INPUT(jury's #1-named 0√ó-networked lane, non-mic) ¬∑ SVG-DOM OUTPUT(off the banned GPU family) ¬∑ control-events-not-audio + CRDT-voice-claim TECHNIQUE ¬∑ communal-JI VIBE(non-altered/cosmic)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban; and it is NOT a 4th generative-music-arc engine (the new over-served cluster: 1812/1818/1824). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + BroadcastChannel + SVG; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ nodes/edges glow + breathe on a ~13 s LFO, peak below white;
