`prefers-reduced-motion` shrinks the breath depth. **Validation:** normalizer = **0 rewrites**; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **exit 0** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1832-choir-of-strangers --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, `/dream/1832-choir-of-strangers` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` (34.7 kB) emitted, no `1830`/`1834` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd** container cap the ~760-route baseline shares ‚ÄĒ Vercel has the fd headroom ‚Üí deploys fine.) **NOT ear/multi-tab-verified for feel** (headless, single review process): whether the beatless JI chord and the phantom‚Üílive handoff land wants Karel's device + a second tab; the seeded phantom path guarantees it's never blank/silent solo. Two more explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1834-livingwall`** (audio-reactive texture on the **CSS Houdini Paint API** ‚ÄĒ `registerPaint` worklet from an inline Blob painting `background: paint(livingwall)`, Canvas2D fallback; a near-virgin render substrate extending the 1778-CSS / 1792-SVG substrate-courage lineage; resurrect by making the Canvas2D fallback primary so the wow shows on iOS) + **‚≠ź `1830-roomtone`** (webcam COLOR not motion ‚Üí a JI drone that re-tunes minor‚Üímajor as the room warms, inverting Scriabin's *clavier √† lumi√®res*; the most robust of the three, ship-ready) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß803 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-803/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1832-choir-of-strangers/README.md`

### [1824-reverie](/dream/1824-reverie) ¬∑ cinematic-narrative / **a generative "score to an unseen film" ‚ÄĒ a CINEMATIC-NARRATIVE journey engine that runs the classic dramatic arc (Freytag's pyramid: establishing ‚Üí inciting ‚Üí rising action ‚Üí climax ‚Üí falling action ‚Üí resolution), where the headline is the *transitions between acts*: a rule-based "director" renders a real generative musical BRIDGE at every act boundary (swell / suspended-sus-chord / ritardando / chromatic-pivot) instead of hard-cutting, and the bottom letterbox bar draws the Freytag structure + tension envelope + labelled bridge SEAMS + playhead live. One "Roll the reel" press ‚Üí a full ~2m40s arc plays itself. A third alternate-journey ARC (after psychedelic 6-phase + EDM build-drop 1818) ‚ÄĒ organised by NARRATIVE tension, not energy; explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT mic, NOT a drop.** ¬∑ **KEYBOARD/click ‚ÄĒ a mood seed (noir/wonder/dread/elegy shifts scale+orchestration+palette); NO mic** / **CANVAS2D letterboxed cinematic frame (abstract drifting field over a tension-lifting horizon + chapter title cards + slow non-strobe climax bloom) + structure/tension ribbon; Web Audio: synthesized orchestra ‚ÄĒ string-pad bed (tension‚Üícutoff), leitmotif melody voice (stated Act 1, returns transformed at climax + resolution), tension-subdividing low ostinato, climax timpani/cymbal; look-ahead scheduler over a 6-act timeline; `chooseBridge()` director renders 4 bridge types from the tension delta; bus ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master 0.16** ¬∑ cycle 802 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: cinematic-narrative journey arc ¬∑ vibe: cinematic ¬∑ NOT altered-states` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref JenBridge arXiv:2606.01703
**What if Resonance had a film-score journey engine whose hard problem was the seams?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated non-altered-states directions ‚ÄĒ this cinematic engine / a keystroke‚Üímusic instrument / a multi-user just-intonation drone) chosen to keep breaking the 2026-07-16 jury's flagged altered-states monoculture (still 6√ó in the last 10) WITHOUT a 5th straight external-data cycle (all three are a fresh third category: music-structure / cross-modal / collaborative). **The research, built:** it cashes **JenBridge ‚ÄĒ "Adaptive Long-Form Video Soundtracking across Scene Transitions", arXiv:2606.01703 (Yu/Yao/Chen/Wang, 1 June 2026)**, whose core is a *"novel adaptive transition mechanism"* + a "director" agent that intelligently selects how to bridge each narrative shift ‚ÄĒ reframing long-form generative scoring as a *transition* problem, not a note problem. Here the director is rule-based (tension-delta-driven, no LLM/API) and its bridges are audible AND rendered as labelled seams on the structure ribbon, so the research‚Üíbuild chain is literally on screen (the move that won 1818). Also grounded in **Freytag's pyramid** and the film-scoring **leitmotif** (fixed intervals, changing register/orchestration across the peaks). **Cashes Karel care #4** ‚ÄĒ "cinematic narrative" was on his explicit list of wanted alternate journey arcs. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (tension-curve state machine + generative orchestra + director/bridge generator + leitmotif memory + Canvas2D ribbon viz = 5) + **#3** named refs (JenBridge + Freytag + leitmotif) + **#5** this cycle's ¬ß802 research (arXiv:2606.01703, ~6 weeks old, on-concept). **diversity:** `banned=[altered-states THEME(6√ó/10) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient VIBE ¬∑ mic INPUT ¬∑ GPU-render family ¬∑ form-constant TECHNIQUE]`; `picked=[cinematic-narrative-journey-arc THEME(non-altered, distinct from 1818's build-drop axis) ¬∑ keyboard/mood-seed INPUT(non-mic) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT(off the GPU family) ¬∑ dramatic-arc-state-machine + generative-act-bridges TECHNIQUE ¬∑ cinematic VIBE]`. **Distinct from 1818-bigroom:** both are stateful multi-minute engines with a structure ribbon, but 1818's axis is *energy‚Üídrop* and its signature is the drop; this one's axis is *narrative tension* and its signature is the inter-act BRIDGE (a transition problem, per JenBridge). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow luminance only, climax bloom is a smooth rise; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored (fewer particles, arc stays fully audible); master 0.16 behind a compressor. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1824-reverie --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0** (fixed one unused-var); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` ‚Üí `/dream/1824-reverie` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted, no `1826-keys`/`1828-dreamhouse` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd** container cap the pristine baseline shares ‚ÄĒ Vercel has the fd headroom ‚Üí deploy fine.) **NOT ear-verified** (headless, no audio device): whether the orchestra + the four bridges land emotionally wants Karel's ears; the code path self-demos the full arc on one press. Two more explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1826-keys`** (your TYPING as an instrument ‚ÄĒ keystroke inter-key timing ‚Üí rhythm/dynamics, QWERTY geography ‚Üí pentatonic pitch/harmony, a musical-rhetoric mapping so it's music not beeps; instantly demoable solo + a hands-free sample-sentence player; the fresher INPUT, cross-modal lane) + **‚≠ź `1828-dreamhouse`** (a multi-user La-Monte-Young *Dream House* ‚ÄĒ each browser tab holds ONE sustained just-intonation voice over BroadcastChannel, the pure chord assembles only when several tabs are open; SVG-DOM rose-window; jury's 0√ó-networked multi-user lane, but demo-gated on multiple tabs) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß802 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-802/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1824-reverie/README.md`

### [1818-bigroom](/dream/1818-bigroom) ¬∑ EDM-journey / **a generative, long-form, STATEFUL EDM build-and-drop JOURNEY ENGINE ‚ÄĒ the alternate to Resonance's slow 6-phase psychedelic arc that Karel explicitly asked for (care #4). One Start press runs a full ~3m14s festival big-room arrangement `intro ‚Üí buildup ‚Üí drop ‚Üí breakdown ‚Üí build2 ‚Üí drop2 ‚Üí outro`; genuinely different at minute 4 than second 4. The headline: a live STRUCTURE RIBBON renders the EDMFormer section map (colored section blocks + moving playhead) with the energy-envelope curve plotted above it ‚ÄĒ the research is on screen, and you watch the classic build‚Üídrop coming (snare-roll accelerando + rising bandpass-noise sweep + pitch riser ‚Üí silent gap ‚Üí impact ‚Üí sidechain-pumping drop). Explicitly NOT altered-states (breaks the jury's 15/15 ‚Üí 7√ó-in-10 theme monoculture), NOT mic.** ¬∑ **KEYBOARD/computed ‚ÄĒ Start + optional live Intensity slider & "Drop now" (a taste of stage control, care #3); NO mic** / **CANVAS2D violet skyline that pumps with the sidechain + particle field that BLOOMS on the drop (smooth ‚Č§3 Hz luminance rise, no strobe) + live structure-ribbon; Web Audio: 6-osc supersaw lead (cutoff `260 + energy¬≤¬∑7200 Hz`), pluck hook, four-on-floor kick/sub/hats/clap, snare-roll + noise/pitch risers; single continuous energy curve drives cutoff + pump depth (`0.18+energy¬∑0.62`) + layer add/drop; 25 ms look-ahead scheduler @126 BPM; punchBus (kick/crash/riser, never ducked) + sidechained pumpBus ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.18** ¬∑ cycle 801 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: EDM build-and-drop journey engine ¬∑ pole: intense/euphoric ¬∑ NOT altered-states` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref EDMFormer arXiv:2603.08759

### [1812-sideman](/dream/1812-sideman) ¬∑ jazz / **a live-performance reactive jazz TRIO that reads you a beat ahead ‚ÄĒ you play a melody at the QWERTY keys (or a Web-MIDI keyboard) and a walking bass + rootless-comping piano + brush drums follow your inferred tempo & key, and ‚ÄĒ the headline ‚ÄĒ the canvas SHOWS you the chord it's about to play a beat before it lands (`Dm7 ‚Üí G7 in 1.0 beats`), so you play INTO the change instead of chasing it (live-performance / jazz-responsive ‚ÄĒ the alternate-journey-arc Karel asked for; explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT mic, NOT a GPU shader)** ¬∑ **KEYBOARD-PLAYED (QWERTY 2-octave, key-quantized) + optional Web MIDI ‚ÄĒ NO mic (breaks the jury's 7√ó mic monoculture)** / **CANVAS2D warm amber-on-black club palette + Web Audio: synthesized walking bass (chord-tones‚Üíchromatic approach into the *next* root), rootless 3rd/7th+9/13 comping on swung off-beats, swing-ride/brush-swish/feathered-kick drums; 25 ms/120 ms look-ahead scheduler ("Two Clocks"); tempo = median inter-onset interval (70‚Äď160 BPM, glided), key = decaying pitch-class histogram vs scale templates; bus‚ÜíDynamicsCompressor limiter‚Üímaster ‚Č§~0.2** ¬∑ cycle 800 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: live-performance reactive accompaniment ¬∑ vibe: jazz`
**What if your rhythm section could read your playing a beat ahead?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated directions to break the 2026-07-16 jury's flagged **15/15 altered-states monoculture** ‚ÄĒ this jazz trio / a multi-user *In C* room / a text‚Üímusic sound-poem), taking the jury's provocation **#1** ("build about something other than the inside of a head") and **#2** ("break the mic monoculture ‚ÄĒ force MIDI/keyboard/external input") head-on, and cashing **two explicit Karel directives**: care **#3** live-performance fitness (mic-free, low-latency, playable) + care **#4** a **jazz-responsive** alternate journey arc. **The research, built:** it implements the anticipation mechanic from **ReaLJam ‚ÄĒ "Real-Time Human-AI Music Jamming with RL-Tuned Transformers", arXiv:2502.21267 (Feb 2025)** (+ the Feb-2026 survey *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*, arXiv:2602.05064): the agent commits to and **displays its upcoming chords ahead of the beat** so the human plays *into* the change and the human‚ÜĒmachine latency mismatch disappears ‚ÄĒ here made visible as a scrolling chord-lane drifting toward a NOW line + a `current ‚Üí next` header with a "next change in N.N beats" progress bar. **How it works:** two QWERTY rows are a ~2-octave melody instrument quantized to the current inferred key (every note fits); Web MIDI is used if present, else silent QWERTY fallback. A look-ahead scheduler (`AudioContext.currentTime`, the "Tale of Two Clocks" pattern) runs an 8-bar ii‚ÄďV‚ÄďI turnaround family transposed into the inferred key; **tempo** is inferred from the median inter-onset interval (clamped, glided) and **key** from a decaying pitch-class histogram scored against major/minor templates (both **lockable** if inference feels jumpy). The trio is fully synthesized (no samples): walking bass steps chord-tones‚Üíchromatic approach into the *next* chord's root; rootless (Bill Evans / Bud Powell) left-hand voicings comp on swung off-beats; brush drums swing the ride with a noise-swish and feathered kick. **Self-demo:** on Start it grooves immediately in C @116 BPM and, if you stay idle, plays short melodic phrases over the changes ‚ÄĒ so a reviewer who just clicks Start hears *and* sees a jazz trio. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (input detect + tempo/key inference + 3-voice generative trio + anticipation viz) + **#3** named refs (ReaLJam anticipation ¬∑ Evans/Powell rootless voicings) + **#5** this cycle's ¬ß800 research chain. **diversity:** `banned=[altered-states THEME(15/15) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient VIBE(5√ó) ¬∑ mic INPUT(7√ó) ¬∑ WebGPU-compute + three.js/WebGL2-fragment OUTPUT(4√ó ea) ¬∑ form-constant TECHNIQUE(4√ó)]`; `picked=[jazz-live-performance THEME(0√ó in 15) ¬∑ keyboard-played+MIDI INPUT(non-mic) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT(off the banned GPU family) ¬∑ anticipatory-accompaniment TECHNIQUE(non-form-constant) ¬∑ warm-jazz-club VIBE(non-cosmic/altered)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban on all five axes. **Honest note:** ReaLJam is RL-tuned transformers; this engine is **rule-based, not ML** ‚ÄĒ hand-written theory for progression/bass/voicings/groove + statistical tempo/key inference. What's faithfully borrowed is the *anticipation display*. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe (chord-lane drifts, note marks bloom/decay). **Validation:** project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1812-sideman --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, route emitted, no `1814`/`1816` leaked. **NOT ear-verified** (headless, no audio device): musical feel + inference tuning want Karel's ears; the idle self-demo exercises the full scheduler‚Üísynth‚Üíviz path. Two more explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1814-in-c`** (multi-user Terry-Riley *In C* over BroadcastChannel ‚ÄĒ every tab a musician; boldest jury-untouched lane, resurrect as a networked/WebRTC room) + **‚≠ź `1816-ursonate`** (typed text ‚Üí Schwitters-*Ursonate* sound-poetry with kinetic type) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß800 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-800/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1812-sideman/README.md`

### [1810-bourse](/dream/1810-bourse) ¬∑ real-world-data / **the live crypto market as a Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics* COLD-DATA tape ‚ÄĒ every trade a precise sine/click on a scrolling monochrome Canvas2D data-matrix, the whole flow at once a legible monitor and a hypnotic minimal-techno piece (finance sonification, 0√ó EVER in the lab; explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT cosmic-ambient, NOT warm ‚ÄĒ cold signal, gridded, precise)** ¬∑ **LIVE MARKET WebSocket (best-effort Binance combined trade stream, folds in + swaps seamlessly) / deterministic seeded-GBM synthetic market (mulberry32 `0x1810`, regime shifts + Poisson arrivals, self-demos with ZERO network) ‚ÄĒ NO mic** / **CANVAS2D data-matrix + Web Audio: price‚Üísparse-scale pure tone (sine/triangle per asset), buy/sell‚Üítimbre+pan, size‚Üíclick+sub, volatility‚Üíminimal-techno kick grid (~108‚Üí~142 bpm) + high "tape tone"; bus ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master 0.16** ¬∑ cycle 799 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: real-world-data sonification (finance/market) ¬∑ NOT altered-states`
**What if the live market were a piece of music you could monitor by ear?** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-language race (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ the live market as an instrument ‚ÄĒ attacked via Ikeda cold-tape / warm chamber-ensemble / order-book resonator), the lab's **first finance sonification** (0√ó ever ‚ÄĒ the 2026-07-16 jury's boldest named-empty lane) and a deliberate **2nd consecutive outer/world-facing cycle** to break that jury's flagged **15/15 altered-states monoculture** (one outer cycle barely dents it). **The research, built:** it cashes **arXiv 2605.21874 (May 2026), "Real-time, EDM-inspired sonification of the activity of a supercomputer"** ‚ÄĒ whose thesis is that continuous real-time data becomes a good *monitor + long-listen* only when the musical language's temporal structure fits the data process; the bursty trade firehose gets Ikeda's pure-sine/click grammar over a minimal-techno pulse, the closest analog of the three legs. **How it works:** a fully deterministic **seeded-GBM market** (`mulberry32 0x1810` ‚ÄĒ geometric Brownian motion price paths for BTC/ETH/SOL/XRP + a weighted INDEX, a mean-reverting calm‚ÜĒturbulent regime scalar for volatility clustering, Poisson-ish exponential trade arrivals, heavy-tailed sizes) advances off a fixed 1/60 per-frame step (no wall clock, no `Math.random`/`Date.now` on the loop), so the 06:30 box shows a living tape with a real regime-arc and zero permissions. A best-effort **Binance combined trade WebSocket** folds real prices in and replaces synthetic trades seamlessly (try/catch throughout, closes on unmount, SIM/LIVE badge); events are rate-limited to ‚Č§~10/s (prioritising large prints) so audio never machine-guns. **Sound:** each trade's price is log-mapped into the asset's rolling [lo,hi] and snapped to a sparse 2-octave scale ‚Üí a pure tone (sine BTC/ETH/INDEX, triangle SOL/XRP, distinct registers); buy pans right+bright, sell left+dark; size adds a 1 ms click "print" + a sub thud on large prints; volatility drives a quiet high "tape tone" and the tempo of a minimal-techno kick grid; bus ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí master 0.16, fade-in on the Start gesture, clean `ctx.close()` teardown. **Visual:** a Canvas2D data-matrix ‚ÄĒ scrolling trade tape (asset¬∑price¬∑size¬∑side, mono numerals, buys violet / sells grey), per-asset price ladders with live markers + ŌÉ readouts, a hairline registration grid + crosshairs, a volatility-regime meter, decaying trade flashes; single rAF, DOM built once, refs for state. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#1** finance sonification as a primary AV piece = **lab-first, 0√ó ever** (grep-confirmed; claimed honestly per jury #5) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (6: seeded-GBM engine + live/sim WS failover + rate-limiter + Ikeda tone synth + volatility tape-tone/kick grid + Canvas2D matrix) + **#3** named refs (Ikeda *datamatics/data.tron/test-pattern* ¬∑ MARKETBUZZ (Janata & Childs, ICAD 2004)/PriceSquawk ¬∑ GBM) + this cycle's ¬ß799 arXiv research chain. **diversity:** `banned=[altered-states THEME(jury 15/15) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient VIBE(5√ó) ¬∑ mic INPUT(7√ó) ¬∑ WebGPU-compute + three.js/WebGL2-fragment OUTPUT(4√ó each) ¬∑ psych-geometry TECHNIQUE(4√ó)]`; `picked=[finance-sonification THEME(0√ó ever) ¬∑ live-market-WS / seeded-GBM-sim INPUT(non-mic) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT(off the whole banned GPU family, well-rested) ¬∑ Ikeda trade-tape TECHNIQUE(non-psych-geometry) ¬∑ cold-data VIBE(NON-cosmic-ambient, NON-altered-states)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live-jury hard ban on all five axes. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; the Binance WS is client-side direct; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe/flicker ‚ÄĒ flashes bloom/decay over ~26 frames, sub-white peak, all luminance/motion data-paced; `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the tape scroll (legible) + softens flashes. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1810-bourse --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, `/dream/1810-bourse` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `open-outcry`/`order-book` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** the pristine baseline shares ‚ÄĒ Vercel has the headroom ‚Üí deploy unaffected.) **NOT ear/feel-verified** (headless container, no audio device, offline): live Binance handover cadence + whether the trade-tape genuinely reads as a monitor want Karel's ears; the sim path exercises the identical GBM‚Üísynth‚Üíviz chain, and the kick grid uses a `setTimeout` scheduler (a sample-accurate lookahead is the obvious next polish). Two more languages explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1812-open-outcry`** (the market as a warm voice-led chamber ENSEMBLE, mode-by-trend ‚ÄĒ the CLEANEST build of the race, ship-ready; ideal as a Karel-Path-piano-vs-market duet) + **‚≠ź `1814-order-book`** (liquidity as a **Karplus‚ÄďStrong** resonator, bid-ask spread ‚Üí string tension ‚ÄĒ resurrect after a 1-line `Float32Array` cast fix at `audio.ts:111`) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß799 (both built to demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-799/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1810-bourse/README.md`

### [1798-vection-tide](/dream/1798-vection-tide) ¬∑ psychedelic / **headphones on, eyes closed, screen deliberately near-dark ‚ÄĒ a field of warm HRTF-spatialized tones ORBITS your head in true 3-D until the coherent sweep of the whole sound-world (not any beat) reads as YOUR OWN motion: auditory VECTION, a drug-free cosmic sound-bath (COSMIC-AMBIENT pole; NOT a screen-forward viz, NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU, NOT SVG-as-render ‚ÄĒ the SCREEN-BIAS-empty AUDIO-FORWARD lane the jury named empty for months)** ¬∑ **BREATH via mic (best-effort AnalyserNode RMS ‚Üí opens the tide wider/higher/faster) + deterministic self-driving ~0.05 Hz breath curve when no mic (zero permissions, self-demos headless); the visual is only a dim breathing SVG horizon** / **AUDIO-FORWARD ‚ÄĒ Web Audio `PannerNode` (`panningModel:"HRTF"`) is the PRIMARY medium: 4 warm pad partials + 1 filtered-noise wind each ride their own slow (0.035‚Äď0.13 Hz) elliptical/figure-8 3-D orbit around an `AudioListener`; TWO sources also carry a real 6 Hz / 40 Hz oscillator patched straight into `panner.positionY` (spatial position wobble, NOT amplitude ‚ÄĒ no strobe), the exact variable the research isolates; bus ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.16 ‚Üí destination; StereoPanner azimuth fallback** ¬∑ cycle 797 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: audio-forward spatial-vection sound-bath ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`
**What if sound alone could carry you bodily through space?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated directions ‚ÄĒ this audio-forward HRTF vection bath / a three.js Indra&apos;s-Net jewel lattice / a WebGL2 chromesthesia field), taking jury-2026-07-15 provocation **#3** on its emptiest reading: *"go the opposite way and finally test the screen-bias ‚ÄĒ an **audio-only / embedded** experiment; the menu has named it empty for months."* Audio-forward is the single most-empty substrate in the lab ‚ÄĒ off the banned Canvas2D (7√ó), off the rested WebGPU-compute, off the whole GPU-shader pile, off the just-used SVG. **The mechanism:** several warm pad partials plus a soft filtered-noise wind each ride their own slow 3-D orbit around your head via an HRTF `PannerNode`; the brain reads the coherent spatial sweep of the *whole* field as **self**-motion ‚ÄĒ auditory **vection** ‚ÄĒ with no beat frequency doing the work. **The research lever, built literally:** a real 6 Hz and 40 Hz oscillator is patched into two sources&apos; `positionY`, so the source POSITION oscillates at those rates (audio-rate, additive with the base height) ‚ÄĒ **not** its amplitude, so there is no strobe. That is the exact variable **PLOS One 2024, "A new perspective on binaural beats: Investigating the effects of spatially moving sounds on human mental states" (PMC11290623)** isolates: the EEG/relaxation effect comes from the SPATIAL MOTION of the sound, not the beating, and improves at both 6 Hz and 40 Hz spatial motion. **Input:** best-effort mic RMS reads your breath and opens the tide (deeper breath ‚Üí wider, higher, faster orbits); with no mic it self-drives from a deterministic ~0.05 Hz breathing curve, so the 06:30 box plays the whole arc (&quot;drifting ‚Üí lifting ‚Üí carried&quot;) with zero permission grants. The screen is intentionally a dim breathing SVG horizon (not a busy visualizer) ‚ÄĒ the point is to prove the screen-bias lane. **Audio chain:** every voice ‚Üí bus ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí modest master gain (‚Č§0.16) ‚Üí destination so layered orbits can never clip; `StereoPannerNode` azimuth fallback if `createPanner` is somehow absent; reduced-motion damps the orbits + softens the positional wobble. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique via **HRTF-spatialized orbiting sources as the PRIMARY medium to induce vection with the screen dark** (grep-fresh: `1752-dissolve` owns the audio-only substrate but is Shepard/pitch-based ego-dissolution; `1762-nde-void` uses HRTF but is screen-FORWARD ‚ÄĒ an audio-forward *spatial-motion* piece is a genuinely different axis, honestly scoped) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (HRTF orbit engine + spatial-trajectory sequencer + best-effort breath detector + minimal breathing-horizon viz = 4) + **#3** the named PLOS One 2024 reference + auditory-vection review + **#5-amended** research-cited to the ¬ß797 dive (today&apos;s spatial-moving-sound read ‚Üí tonight&apos;s build). **#5 strict <14-day NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the PLOS study is 2024, on-concept and current-standard (jury-retired <14-day bar; amended &quot;fresh, current-year/recent, on-concept&quot;). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(jury 7√ó) ¬∑ WebGPU-compute OUTPUT(used 1786, rested) ¬∑ SVG-as-render OUTPUT(just used 1792) ¬∑ physical-model-instrument + self-writing-score TECHNIQUE(jury) ¬∑ touch/keyboard INPUT(jury) ¬∑ camera INPUT(1784)]`; `picked=[AUDIO-FORWARD HRTF OUTPUT (the maximally-empty substrate ‚ÄĒ off Canvas2D/WebGPU/SVG/GPU-shader) ¬∑ orbiting-source auditory-vection + 6/40 Hz positional-wobble TECHNIQUE (first-in-lab) ¬∑ breath / autonomous INPUT (non-touch/keyboard/camera) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient VIBE (not over-represented; only 1786 recently)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live jury hard-ban on all four axes and serves the jury&apos;s named-empty screen-bias lane. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no amplitude strobe/flicker; the horizon changes by slow drift only (<0.3 Hz); `prefersReducedMotion` honored; modest gain through a compressor. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1798-vection-tide --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, `/dream/1798-vection-tide` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1800`/`1802` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** the pristine baseline shares ‚ÄĒ Vercel has the headroom ‚Üí deploy unaffected.) **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless container, no audio device): whether the orbiting field genuinely induces vection on headphones + the exact breath-RMS scaling want Karel&apos;s ears; the autonomous path exercises the identical orbit‚ÜíHRTF‚Üícompressor path. Two more explorers built ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1800-indra-net`** (three.js live-CubeCamera mutual-reflection **Indra&apos;s-Net** jewel lattice ‚ÄĒ ship-ready, resurrect on a GPU/three.js cycle after a live CubeCamera perf check) + **‚≠ź `1802-chromesthesia`** (WebGL2 **chromesthesia** color-field on Scriabin&apos;s pitch-class‚Üíhue table ‚ÄĒ resurrect after a 1-line `Float32Array` generic-cast fix at `audio.ts:217`) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß797 (both built to demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-797/`, then `rm -rf`&apos;d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1798-vection-tide/README.md`

### [1792-replay-svg](/dream/1792-replay-svg) ¬∑ psychedelic / **press Begin and a sharp "day" of seven warm luminous glyphs (plus a short melody) holds for ~14 s ‚ÄĒ then, with NO further input, the sensory gate closes over ~52 s: the veridical scene fades and a top-down pathway replays those EXACT forms, fragmented, drifting and condensing two-into-one, until the dream is made entirely out of its own memory, then gently wakes and loops (DREAM/hypnagogic pole; NOT an instrument, NOT touch, NOT mic, NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGL)** ¬∑ **NO INPUT ‚ÄĒ a deterministic self-running őĪ 0‚Üí1 Wake‚ÜíSleep auto-arc (optional soft modulators omitted; zero permissions, self-demos headless)** / **100% SVG-DOM VECTOR ART ‚ÄĒ the jury-endorsed empty substrate as the PRIMARY render (grep-near-0√ó): the 7 source glyphs are real `<g>/<path>/<polygon>/<circle>` elements; the dream is those SAME elements via `<use href="#gN">` duplication + transforms, recombined through an SVG filter graph (`feTurbulence‚ÜífeDisplacementMap` melt whose `scale` rides őĪ, `feColorMatrix` hue drift ~0.06 Hz, `feGaussianBlur` top-down softening); a SINGLE rAF loop MUTATES attributes/filter params off an integer frame counter, DOM built once ‚ÄĒ NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL, NO three.js anywhere** ¬∑ cycle 796 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: Wake-Sleep sleep-phase memory replay ¬∑ pole: dream`

**A dream isn&rsquo;t noise turned into geometry ‚ÄĒ it&rsquo;s your cortex closing the sensory gate and replaying the day&rsquo;s own forms, recombined.** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-substrate race (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ the őĪ Wake‚ÜíSleep replay dial ‚ÄĒ attacked via SVG-native vs three.js-feedback vs WebGL2-ring-buffer), executing jury-2026-07-15 provocation **#2** (return to the PRIMARY DIRECTION at scale on the OTHER pole ‚ÄĒ this is the lab&rsquo;s cleanest **DREAM/hypnagogic** anchor: sleep-phase replay *is* dreaming, the thinnest pole) + **#3** (off the banned Canvas2D, onto the one substrate the jury explicitly named empty ‚ÄĒ **SVG**) + **#1** (leave the instrument/theory workshop ‚ÄĒ no played instrument, no self-writing score). **The model:** a single őĪ‚ąą[0,1] is the control parameter of **Bredenberg et al., "Modeling the hallucinatory effects of classical psychedelics in terms of replay-dependent plasticity mechanisms," eLife 2026;14:RP105968** ‚ÄĒ it maps the **Wake-Sleep algorithm** (Hinton, Dayan, Frey & Neal, 1995) onto cortex: őĪ=0 is WAKE (basal dendrites, bottom-up sensory inference), őĪ=1 is SLEEP (apical dendrites, top-down generative **replay**); as the gate closes what you perceive is internally generated to match *learned memory*, not pure noise. Contrasted in the notes with **REBUS** (Carhart-Harris & Friston) ‚ÄĒ a prior-relaxation account rather than an active-replay one. **How it works:** `scene.ts` (fixed-seed mulberry32 `0x1792`) lays out 7 distinct warm glyphs (the veridical "day"), and builds `DREAM_INSTANCES` = 4 recombination fragments per glyph, each a slow drift + wrong rotation/scale + convergence toward a shared attractor (so two glyphs melt into one at the peak), fading in progressively as őĪ passes per-fragment thresholds (recombination DENSITY rises, never a flash). The dream layer is literally `<use href="#gN">` of the day&rsquo;s glyph ids, so it is **provably made of the day scene** ‚ÄĒ the clearest of the three race entries. `audio.ts` mirrors it cross-modally: a warm JI pad + a faithful 8-step WAKE motif that fades as őĪ rises while the SAME motif returns recombined (wrong-order, transposed ¬Īoctave/fifth, time-stretched, overlapping loops) through the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` reverb, whose wet opens with őĪ. Always-on **WAKE‚ÜĒSLEEP őĪ meter** + phase caption (basal‚Üídrifting‚Üíapical) makes cause‚Üíeffect explicit. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#1** never-used technique via **SVG-DOM as the PRIMARY render substrate** (grep-near-0√ó; a different axis than the pre-existing `1078-dream-replay`, which owns the memory-replay *concept* but on Canvas2D + touch + as a played instrument) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (procedural day-scene generator + `<use>` memory store + őĪ-driven SVG-filter dream-recombination engine + cross-modal audio granular-replay = 4) + **#3** the named refs + **#5-amended** research-cited to the ¬ß796 dive (today&rsquo;s Bredenberg eLife 2026 read ‚Üí tonight&rsquo;s build). **#1 concept-novelty NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 1078 pre-owns memory-replay; the honest advance is the off-Canvas2D, input-free, self-demoing, DREAM-pole re-approach on the empty SVG lane. **diversity:** `picked=[SVG-native OUTPUT (off Canvas2D & off the recent WebGPU-compute/three.js/WebGL2/CSS run; jury-endorsed empty lane) ¬∑ memory-capture‚Üítop-down-replay-recombination TECHNIQUE ¬∑ no-input self-running-arc INPUT (non-touch/keyboard/camera/mic) ¬∑ Wake-Sleep dream-replay VIBE (the thin DREAM pole, not a 3rd cosmic-ambient)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live jury hard-ban on all four axes, rests the just-used WebGPU-compute substrate, and re-injects the thin DREAM pole. **Safety:** all luminance change is slow drift (breathing < 0.15 Hz, hue ~0.06 Hz), no strobe / no alpha-band flicker; dream intensity via recombination density + blur, never flashing; `prefersReducedMotion` slows motion + damps the melt; peak brightness sub-white. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` SVG + Web Audio; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1792-replay-svg --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, `/dream/1792-replay-svg` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1794`/`1796` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** the pristine baseline shares ‚ÄĒ Vercel has the headroom ‚Üí deploy unaffected.) **NOT eye-verified for feel** (headless container): live SVG-filter render performance (a full-viewport `feDisplacementMap` can be GPU-heavy on some browsers) + whether the wake‚Üídream‚Üíwake reads as intended want Karel&rsquo;s browser; a `DynamicsCompressor` on the audio master is a trivial next-cycle polish. Two more substrates explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1794-replay-feedback`** (three.js feedback + frozen memory-texture replay ‚ÄĒ the lush GPU render, ship-ready, resurrect on a GPU cycle) + **‚≠ź `1796-replay-ringbuffer`** (WebGL2 6-frame episodic memory ring-buffer, check `uRing[6]` on picky drivers) ‚ÄĒ to IDEAS ¬ß796 (both built to demoable + eslint-clean this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-796/`, then `rm -rf`&apos;d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1792-replay-svg/README.md`

### [1786-dissolve-boundless](/dream/1786-dissolve-boundless) ¬∑ psychedelic / **slow your breath and a tight luminous sphere of ~524,000 GPU particles ‚ÄĒ "the ego" ‚ÄĒ unravels into a boundless, all-filling violet glow (drug-free ego-dissolution / meditative boundlessness); movement or loud sound snaps the boundary back and it re-coheres (COSMIC-AMBIENT pole; NOT an instrument, NOT a JI drone, NOT Canvas2D, NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT a raymarched SDF)** ¬∑ **MIC-BREATH / STILLNESS (RMS low-band ‚Üí cohesion driver 1‚Üí0 on held stillness, snaps back fast on movement; analyser ONLY, never to output) + deterministic ~46 s ghost-breath fallback when no mic** / **WebGPU COMPUTE ‚ÄĒ a WGSL `@compute` step over a ping-ponged pair of 524,288-particle f32 storage buffers (position+velocity vec4 each): a `cohesion`-scaled spring toward a shared sphere shell r0 vs a `(1‚ąícohesion)`-scaled curl-flow diffusion + outward drift with a toroidal box-wrap, drawn as instanced additive soft-disc billboards; shared Shepard drift + JI drone bank widen/detune as cohesion falls** ¬∑ cycle 795 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: ego-dissolution / meditative boundlessness ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`
**The boundary of "you" is a slider, and your breath moves it.** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-substrate fire (three unrelated off-Canvas2D directions on the thin cosmic-ambient pole ‚ÄĒ WebGPU-compute ego-dissolution / SVG-filter aurora / audio-forward HRTF sound-bath), executing jury-2026-07-15 provocation **#3** (force a **WebGPU-compute** piece, off the banned Canvas2D 7√ó monoculture ‚ÄĒ the substrate is still near-0√ó as the *primary* renderer) + **#2** (return to the psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION at scale on the OTHER pole ‚ÄĒ cosmic-ambient / meditative is thin, and the lab has visualized dissolution states only via raymarched SDF/void [1762-nde-void, 1041-nde-tunnel], **never as a live particle field**). **How it works ‚ÄĒ substrate:** a WGSL compute shader steps ~524k particles each frame, reading one pos/vel storage-buffer pair and writing the other (real ping-pong, not a texture animation). The one field each particle feels is a **cohesion‚ÜĒdiffusion blend**: `cohesion` (0..1) scales an elastic spring toward a shared sphere-shell radius r0 (at cohesion=1 the swarm is a tight, additive-bloomed, white-hot sphere ‚ÄĒ "the ego"), while `(1‚ąícohesion)` scales a cheap divergence-free **curl flow** plus a gentle outward drift (at cohesion=0 a toroidal box-wrap distributes the swarm into a vast, even, dim violet luminescence filling the frame ‚ÄĒ "boundless awareness"). Integration is in real per-second units with frame-rate-independent `v *= exp(‚ąídrag¬∑dt)` damping and a clamped dt, so it's stable across framerates. **Input:** a smoothed low-band mic RMS drives a single `cohesion` scalar ‚ÄĒ held stillness/quiet slowly lowers it (you dissolve), any movement/loud sound snaps it back fast (you re-form); the mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` **only** (never `.connect()`-ed onward ‚Üí feedback impossible by construction). **Render:** each particle is a 6-vert instanced billboard with a soft `smoothstep` disc; **additive** blending does the aesthetic work for free ‚ÄĒ dense overlap in the coherent sphere whitens toward the core, the dispersed field reads as even glow ‚ÄĒ points grow softer/larger as cohesion drops for a smoother boundless wash. Cool violet‚Üíwarm-white emission (palette lives inside the WGSL fragment string). **Audio:** the shared **Shepard** endless-drift + **just-intonation drone bank** summed to a master bus; `update(cohesion, dt)` couples sound to state ‚ÄĒ as cohesion falls the drone's drive rises (filter opens, detune widens) and the Shepard drift brightens (the felt "widening" of the boundary), pulling back on re-coherence. **Auto-demo:** no mic ‚Üí a deterministic ~46 s **ghost breath** (`0.5+0.5¬∑cos`) drives the same cohesion cycle so the headless 06:30 box dissolves + sounds on its own, never blank/silent; a `text-destructive` note surfaces the mic denial but never stops the piece. **Degrade:** no-WebGPU (`navigator.gpu` absent / no adapter / device lost) throws a typed `WebGPUUnsupportedError` the page catches ‚Üí an on-brand notice + a lightweight CSS/DOM glow-bloom fallback breathing on the same cohesion signal, audio still running. **Safety:** meditative by slow luminance drift only ‚ÄĒ **no alpha-band flicker**; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored; brightness/emission kept sub-white by the additive falloff. **Named refs (README):** **Nour, Evans, Nutt & Carhart-Harris, "Ego-Dissolution Inventory (EDI)"** (*Frontiers in Human Neuroscience*, 2016) ‚ÄĒ the dissolution of the felt self‚ÜĒworld boundary this literally stages ¬∑ **Milli√®re / Letheby** on drug-free ego-dissolution phenomenology. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic-breath/stillness detector + WebGPU-compute cohesion‚ÜĒdiffusion sim + instanced additive render + Shepard/drone audio bed coupled to state = 4) + **#3** the named refs + rare-technique (WebGPU-compute as the *primary* substrate, the jury's forced lane) + **#5-amended** research-cited to the ¬ß795 dive (the mature WebGPU-compute-agent-sim substrate aimed *inward* at ego-dissolution ‚Üí today's research ‚Üí tonight's build). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ WebGPU compute + particle fields are individually owned; the fresh axis is the never-built **combination** (ego-dissolution as a cohesion‚ÜĒdiffusion phase transition on a live 524k-particle GPU field ‚ÄĒ grep-fresh; the lab only did dissolution via raymarched SDF/void), per the ~1786-folder saturation posture. **#5 strict <14-day NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 31st straight dry (jury-retired-in-practice; amended "fresh, current-year, on-concept" standard followed). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(jury 7√ó) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2-as-sole OUTPUT(¬ß785) ¬∑ WebGPU-compute 3√ó back-to-back(1740/1758/1766, now rested since 1766) ¬∑ physical-model-instrument + self-writing-score TECHNIQUE(jury) ¬∑ touch/pointer-drag + keyboard-as-instrument INPUT(jury) ¬∑ camera INPUT(just used 1784) ¬∑ DMT-intense-ONLY VIBE(on-watch)]`; `picked=[WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (off-Canvas2D & off-raw-WebGL2, the jury's forced lane, rested 3 cycles) ¬∑ cohesion‚ÜĒdiffusion-particle-phase-transition TECHNIQUE (not instrument/theory/SDF, first-in-lab combination) ¬∑ mic-breath/stillness INPUT (not touch/keyboard/camera) ¬∑ ego-dissolution/meditative-boundless VIBE (the thin cosmic-ambient pole, not DMT-intense)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live jury hard-ban on all four axes and fills the thin cosmic-ambient pole. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGPU + Web Audio; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ WebGPU is native). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand ‚ÄĒ semantic-token chrome, violet sole accent, no `font-serif`/raw `text-white`/`rounded-2xl`; art colors live inside WGSL strings only); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1786-dissolve-boundless --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **completed**, `/dream/1786-dissolve-boundless` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1788`/`1790` leaked. (The plain `npm run build` still dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** ‚ÄĒ un-raisable, the pristine baseline shares it, Vercel has the headroom ‚Üí deploy unaffected.) **NOT eye/mic-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/GPU/mic): live WGSL compilation + whether the sphere‚Üíboundless dissolution reads as genuinely *breath-coupled* and awe-inducing (emission brightness + RMS thresholds were tuned by eye) wants Karel's Chrome + a real mic; the ghost breath guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical stillness‚Üícohesion‚Üísim‚Üírender‚Üíaudio path. Two more substrates explored ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1788-aurora-veil`** (animated **SVG-filter** aurora ‚ÄĒ feTurbulence‚ÜífeDisplacementMap‚ÜífeColorMatrix, the "try SVG instead of Canvas2D" the jury named, near-absent substrate) + **‚≠ź `1790-inner-bath`** (audio-forward HRTF eyes-closed **sound bath** testing the empty screen-bias lane) to IDEAS ¬ß795 (both built to demoable + eslint-clean this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-795/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect ‚Č•1792). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1786-dissolve-boundless/README.md`

### [1758-boundless-wave](/dream/1758-boundless-wave) ¬∑ psychedelic / **breathe toward your mic and a real GPU 2D wave-equation solver ‚ÄĒ the one every WebGPU water/cloth demo uses for REALISM ‚ÄĒ is pointed at its opposite: a boundless, edge-dissolving Chladni standing-wave field with no object, no center, no scale (formless-jhńĀna ńĀkńĀsńĀna√ĪcńĀyatana, drug-free) (COSMIC-AMBIENT/meditative pole; NOT an instrument, NOT a harmony engine, NOT a JI drone, NOT Canvas2D, NOT raw-WebGL2)** ¬∑ **MIC-BREATH (RMS low-band ‚Üí smoothed drive amplitude; analyser ONLY, never to output) + deterministic ~0.08 Hz ghost-breath fallback** / **WebGPU COMPUTE ‚ÄĒ a WGSL finite-difference PDE solver `u_next = 2u ‚ąí u_prev + c¬≤‚ąá¬≤u` over a 512¬≤ ping-ponged f32 storage-buffer grid (reflective Neumann edges, damping 0.9985, c¬≤=0.24), rendered `|u|`‚Üídim-violet ramp clamped ‚Č§0.7; inharmonic breath-swelled pad ‚Üí void reverb** ¬∑ cycle 789 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: formless-boundless / ńĀkńĀsńĀna√ĪcńĀyatana ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient/meditative`
**The GPU wave-solver, made anti-realist: not water, but boundless space.** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-substrate fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *ńÄKńÄSA / boundless space: every edge, center and scale dissolved into one continuous standing-wave medium* ‚ÄĒ attacked via WebGPU-compute wave-equation PDE / three.js volumetric raymarch / three.js analytic Chladni plate), cashing the ‚≠ź‚≠ź top-banked `1756-boundless` (¬ß788) on the **cosmic-ambient/meditative pole the jury named thin**, and executing jury-2026-07-15 provocation **#2** (return to psychedelic at scale on the OTHER pole, cash a banked altered-states piece) + **#3** (force a WebGPU-compute piece, off the banned Canvas2D). **How it works ‚ÄĒ substrate:** a WGSL **compute** shader integrates the discretized 2D wave equation over a 512√ó512 grid of f32 amplitudes, ping-ponging three GPU storage buffers (u_prev, u_curr ‚Üí u_next); the Laplacian is a 5-point stencil, light damping (√ó0.9985) bleeds energy so the field settles to a calm equilibrium instead of running away, and **reflective (Neumann) edges** via clamped neighbour indexing fold every ripple back ‚ÄĒ that interference is what makes the standing-wave **Chladli figure** form. c¬≤=0.24 keeps the Courant number well under the 0.5 stability wall (hardcoded, never derived from a clock); the step runs 2 sub-steps/frame for crisp propagation. **Input:** a smoothed low-band mic RMS envelope becomes the drive amplitude of a slow, wide radial Gaussian excitation injected at a few fixed off-centre sites (a separate FORCE compute pass); louder/steadier breath fills the field toward a shimmering equilibrium, silence lets it decay toward a faint breathing ground ‚ÄĒ never fully flat. The mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` ONLY (never `.connect()`-ed onward ‚Üí feedback impossible by construction). **Render:** a render pass maps `|u|` to a dim‚Üíbright violet ramp, antinodes peaking ~0.53 (comfortably under the ‚Č§0.7 clamp ‚ÄĒ no white-out), nodal lines reading as dark violet filaments, full-viewport and boundless (no frame). **Audio:** a soft pad of detuned + slightly **INHARMONIC** partial voices (ratios just off the harmonic series ‚Üí the sustained chord shimmers/beats instead of locking ‚ÄĒ **not** the consonant-JI drone the jury banned) brightens/swells as field-energy fills ‚Üí shared `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí gain 0.15. **Auto-demo:** with NO mic (headless 06:30 box, no display/speakers) a deterministic ~0.08 Hz **ghost breath** over the integer frame counter drives the same field, so the piece is alive + audible unattended; a mic denial surfaces a `text-destructive` note but never stops the piece. **Degrade:** no-WebGPU ‚Üí an on-brand notice + a DOM radial glow breathing on the same field-energy signal, audio still running. **Safety:** brightness hard-clamped ‚Č§0.7 in the shader, only a slow ~0.06 Hz luminance drift (well below any photosensitive band), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the stir + flattens the drift ‚ÄĒ **no strobe**. **Named refs (README):** *ńĀkńĀsńĀna√ĪcńĀyatana* ‚ÄĒ the formless jhńĀna "sphere of boundless/infinite space" (Buddhist Abhidhamma) ¬∑ **Ernst Chladni (1787)** ‚ÄĒ cymatics / nodal figures on a driven plate, which the reflective-boundary wave equation reproduces literally ¬∑ **d'Alembert** ‚ÄĒ the 2D wave equation being integrated. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** **#1** first real-time wave-equation **PDE solver** in the lab (grep-verified; 1740-breath-nebula was curl-noise *advection*, not a PDE grid solve ‚ÄĒ a genuinely new algorithm on the WebGPU-compute substrate) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic-analysis + WebGPU compute PDE + instanced render + inharmonic audio bed = 4) + **#3** the named refs + rare-technique (WebGPU-compute, jury's forced lane, still near-0√ó across ~744 protos); research-cited to the ¬ß789 dive (the anti-realist inversion of the now-mature GPU wave-solver ‚Üí today's research ‚Üí tonight's build). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ jury-retired-in-practice (4th jury). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(jury 7√ó) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT(¬ß785 4√ó) ¬∑ physical-model-instrument + self-writing-score TECHNIQUE(jury 4√ó+4√ó) ¬∑ touch/pointer-drag INPUT(jury 5√ó) ¬∑ keyboard-as-instrument INPUT(on-watch 5√ó) ¬∑ DMT-intense-only VIBE(on-watch)]`; `picked=[WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (off-Canvas2D & off-raw-WebGL2, the jury's forced lane) ¬∑ wave-equation-PDE-solver TECHNIQUE (not instrument/theory, first-in-lab) ¬∑ mic-breath-RMS-excite INPUT (not touch/keyboard) ¬∑ meditative-boundless/cosmic-ambient VIBE (the thin pole, not DMT-intense)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every jury hard-ban on all four axes and fills the thin cosmic-ambient/meditative pole. **Love-signal:** squarely inside Karel's loved gentle-boundless-field cluster (`84-wave-fluid`, `130-tsl-particle-compute`, `243-spectral-cloud`, `267-spectral-drift`, `107-ocean-presence` all ‚Ě§). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGPU + Web Audio; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; determinism grep clean (state path = integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32; only `ctx.currentTime` for scheduling); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1758-boundless-wave --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; the plain `npm run build` passes webpack-compile + TypeScript + ESLint then dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** (un-raisable; the pristine baseline shares it; Vercel has the headroom ‚Üí deploy unaffected). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/GPU): live WGSL shader compilation + whether the Chladni interference reads as genuinely boundless-and-breath-coupled wants Karel's Chrome + a real mic; the ghost breath guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical breath‚ÜíFORCE‚ÜíSTEP‚Üírender‚Üíaudio path. Two more substrates explored ‚ÄĒ banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1760-boundless-drift` (three.js volumetric raymarch, tilt-steered) + ‚≠ź`1762-boundless-plate` (three.js analytic Chladni plate under a log-polar exp-warp) to IDEAS ¬ß789 (resurrect ‚Č•1764). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1758-boundless-wave/README.md`

### [1722-breath-nimbus](/dream/1722-breath-nimbus) ¬∑ psychedelic / **breathe into your mic and a nimbus of 60,000 luminous motes GATHERS toward you on the inhale and DISPERSES to a boundless veil on the exhale ‚ÄĒ the lab's first breath-BIOFEEDBACK field, rewarding slow ~0.1 Hz coherent breathing (COSMIC-AMBIENT/meditative pole; NOT an instrument, NOT a harmony engine, NOT a JI drone, NOT cosmic-starfield, NOT three.js)** ¬∑ **MIC-BREATH (RMS ‚Üí adaptive-envelope ‚Üí breath-phase + period + coherence estimator; analyser ONLY, never to output) ‚ÄĒ under-rep non-keyboard input with real agency** / **raw WebGL2 additive point-sprite nimbus (60k motes on analytic curl-noise + breath radial force + coherence ring-spring; Canvas2D 4k fallback), inharmonic breath-swelled 4-osc pad** ¬∑ cycle 783 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: meditative Oceanic-Boundlessness / coherence ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`
**The screen breathes with your lungs ‚ÄĒ and rewards you for slowing down.** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *a breath-biofeedback boundless field* ‚ÄĒ attacked via WebGL2 radial-bloom mist / 60k-mote nimbus / Canvas2D caustic-mandala), the **COSMIC-AMBIENT counterweight** to the recent INTENSE run (1700 DMT-bloom + 1714 tesseract), cashing the ‚≠ź‚≠ź top-banked `1712-breath-void` (¬ß782) ‚ÄĒ jury-2026-07-14 provocation **#3** (cash the banked cycle-2) + criterion **#4** (multi-cycle follow-through). **How it works ‚ÄĒ input:** `getUserMedia({audio})` ‚Üí `MediaStreamSource.connect(analyser)` and **nothing else** (the analyser is read-only, never `.connect()`-ed onward, so the mic can never reach `ctx.destination` ‚ÄĒ feedback is impossible by construction). Each frame reads the analyser's time-domain RMS through a slow smoother + a self-calibrating adaptive envelope (rolling min/max) ‚Üí normalized breath-amplitude; a derivative estimates **phase** (inhale rising / exhale falling), peak-to-peak gives **period/bpm**, and a **coherence** score = Gaussian proximity of the period to ~10 s (0.1 Hz ‚Čą 6 breaths/min) √ó breath-to-breath steadiness. **Visual:** 60,000 motes (seeded once by a fixed-seed `mulberry32` ‚ÄĒ never `Math.random`) live on an analytic **curl-noise** (divergence-free) flow field; a breath-driven radial force pulls them toward center on inhale (condensation, a self drawing inward) and pushes them out on exhale (dispersal to boundlessness); peak inhale scatters them to a boundary-dissolving veil that fills the frame. High coherence tightens a **ring-spring** into a calm phase-locked cloud; erratic breathing keeps it turbulent and diffuse. Rendered as raw-WebGL2 `gl.POINTS` with additive blending + a soft Gaussian falloff, violet‚Üígold radial mote color (palette lives inside the point-sprite shader). **Audio:** a sparse, deliberately **INHARMONIC** 4-oscillator pad (non-integer ratios 1.0/1.503/2.017/2.711 ‚Üí gentle beating, **not** the consonant-JI drone the 2026-07-14 jury banned) whose amplitude swells on inhale / recedes on exhale following the **same** breath-phase driving the motes ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí master 0.12 ‚Üí shared `createVoidReverb`. **Auto-demo:** the rAF loop starts on mount driven by a deterministic synthetic breath `0.5+0.5¬∑sin(frame/60¬∑2ŌÄ¬∑0.1)` (a perfect ~6/min breath) so the headless 06:30 box **gathers/disperses + sounds on its own** ‚ÄĒ never blank/silent; a "Breathe for me (demo)" button runs the ghost with audio; no-WebGL2 degrades to a Canvas2D 4k-mote fallback. **Safety:** meditative by slow luminance drift only ‚ÄĒ **never flicker**; honors `prefers-reduced-motion`. **Named refs (README):** **"Breathing Space: Spatial Mapping of Breath & Cardiac Biofeedback for Coherence Training"** (Proc. 1st Intl. Conf. HCI in the Alps, 2026 ‚ÄĒ the coherence-via-~0.1 Hz-resonance-breathing + particle-breath finding this directly implements) ¬∑ **HeartMath** resonance-frequency-breathing coherence ¬∑ **Bridson et al. *Curl-Noise for Procedural Fluid Flow*** (SIGGRAPH 2007) ¬∑ **Refik Anadol** point-cloud data-mist. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic-breath input + breath-phase estimator + coherence tracker + curl-noise particle advection/render + inharmonic breath-swelled bed = 5) + **#3** the named refs; research-cited to the ¬ß783 coherence-training dive (path (a) implements this cycle's research hook + (b) cashes the ¬ß782 ‚≠ź‚≠ź bank). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ mic and particle fields are owned; the fresh axis is the **combination** (the lab's first closed breath-**biofeedback** loop ‚ÄĒ phase entrainment + coherence reward), per the saturation posture. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 25th straight <14-day dry (retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4√ó) ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only ¬∑ JI-consonant-drone BED ¬∑ orbital-gravity ¬∑ cosmic-STARFIELD palette ¬∑ (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT + instrument-DSP + harmony-engine TECHNIQUE(3√ó)]`; `picked=[mic-BREATH biofeedback INPUT (under-rep, non-keyboard, real agency) ¬∑ breath-phase+coherence+curl-noise-nimbus TECHNIQUE (NOT instrument DSP/harmony/JI drone) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 point-sprite OUTPUT (NOT three.js) ¬∑ warm-violet-gold luminous-boundless PALETTE (NOT starfield)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban + both instrument/harmony on-watch flags on all four axes AND re-balances the pole to COSMIC-AMBIENT. **Love-signal:** squarely inside Karel's most-loved boundless-particle-field cluster (`262-aurora-particle`, `321-spectral-flight`, `130-tsl-particle-compute`, `267-spectral-drift`, `1450-supershape-bloom` all ‚Ě§). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; determinism grep clean (state path = integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32; only `ctx.currentTime` for scheduling); mic verified analyser-only (no `analyser.connect` anywhere); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1722-breath-nimbus` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1720`/`1724` leaked. **NOT eye/mic-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display, no mic): whether the gather/disperse reads as genuinely *breath-coupled* vs a generic particle wash, and whether the coherence reward feels earned, wants Karel's Chrome + a real mic; the ghost guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical breath‚Üíforce‚Üírender‚Üíaudio path. **Honest knocks:** breath-phase from raw mic RMS is heuristic ‚ÄĒ it needs a few breaths to self-calibrate and a noisy room / shallow breathing can confuse the inhale/exhale derivative; and this is the **4th consecutive raw-GPU-render piece** (1700/1708/1714/1722) ‚ÄĒ three.js (the actual on-watch flag) is dodged but the raw-WebGL2 render lane is now a mild watch, which the ‚≠ź‚≠ź-banked Canvas2D `1724` is the deliberate correction for. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1724-breath-membrane`** (Canvas2D caustic-mandala breath-biofeedback whose N-fold radial symmetry *rises with coherence* ‚ÄĒ the render-diversity resurrect that breaks the raw-GPU streak; de-selected only because the 140¬≤-upscaled Canvas2D caustics read lower-fidelity headless than 60k GPU motes) + **‚≠ź `1720-breath-bloom`** (WebGL2 fbm radial-bloom Ganzfeld mist, the purest/gentlest boundless field + direct `1712` lineage; de-selected as the subtlest visual, hardest to read headless) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß783 (both fully built + determinism-clean this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-783/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect ‚Č•1726). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1722-breath-nimbus/README.md`

### [1714-tesseract-melt](/dream/1714-tesseract-melt) ¬∑ psychedelic / **tilt your phone to steer a real 4-dimensional tesseract melting through hyperspace ‚ÄĒ a DMT "more axes than physical reality allows" breakthrough (INTENSE pole; NOT an instrument, NOT a harmony engine, NOT a JI drone, NOT cosmic-starfield, NOT three.js)** ¬∑ **DEVICE-TILT `deviceorientation` (beta/gamma ‚Üí the XW/YW 4D rotation-*hyperplane* rates) + pointer-drag desktop fallback + iOS `requestPermission` + always-on deterministic ghost auto-rotation ‚ÄĒ fresh non-keyboard non-pointer non-camera input** / **raw WebGL2 4D-vertex/projection pipeline (16 verts/32 edges, six-plane 4D rotation, 4D‚Üí3D‚Üí2D double perspective divide), additive edge-glow frag with thin-film iridescence + chromatic aberration + N-fold kaleidoscope + Reinhard tone-map; 9-partial inharmonic bank coupled to the 4D rotation angle (no JI drone)** ¬∑ cycle 782 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT-breakthrough-hyperdimensional ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Tilt into a fourth dimension and watch the cube turn inside-out.** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated non-keyboard altered-states pieces spanning mic / tilt / audio-file inputs and both poles), chosen as the most **headless-verifiable** of the three ‚ÄĒ its jeweled 4D melt is self-evident on any display via pure deterministic ghost rotation, needing no sensor, no dropped file, no headphones (the ¬ß779/¬ß780 review-box lesson). The **INTENSE** counterweight to the recent cosmic-ambient run (1708 cathedral + banked voids). **How it works ‚ÄĒ visual:** genuine four-dimensional geometry, *not* a spinning 3D cube and *not* three.js. The 16 tesseract vertices `(¬Ī1,¬Ī1,¬Ī1,¬Ī1)` (32 edges ‚ÄĒ two verts share an edge iff they differ in exactly one coord) are rotated in 4D across six independent planes `xy,xz,xw,yz,yw,zw`; the three **w-planes** (rotations *into* the 4th axis, which have no 3-D counterpart) are the animated + steerable ones, so projected edges **balloon and turn inside-out** ("the melt") instead of rigidly orbiting. Vertices are projected 4D‚Üí3D by a perspective divide `k4=1/(distW‚ąíw)` then 3D‚Üí2D by `k3=1/(distZ‚ąíz)`; the rotated `w` also drives each edge's iridescent hue (hyper-depth ‚Üí color) and near/far `z` drives brightness. A fragment shader draws the 32 edges as an additive glow with **thin-film iridescence**, 3√ó **chromatic aberration** sampling, and a 6‚Äď8-fold **kaleidoscope** bloom (jeweled, ultra-saturated ‚ÄĒ palette lives inside the shader). **Input:** `deviceorientation` beta‚ÜíXW rate, gamma‚ÜíYW rate (tilt the *phone* to rotate through the 4th dimension); on desktop, pointer-drag maps to the same; with no input, a slow deterministic ghost auto-rotation always melts. **Audio:** a 9-partial **inharmonic** sine bank (stretched, seed-jittered ratios on a low root) whose per-partial **detune + gain track the summed w-rotation angle** ‚ÄĒ rotating through W audibly re-tunes the timbre; it beats/shimmers rather than resolving (deliberately **not** the consonant-JI drone the 2026-07-14 jury banned) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí master 0.12 ‚Üí shared `createVoidReverb`. **Auto-demo:** with zero input the six angles are a pure function of an integer frame counter, so the headless 06:30 box is **never blank or silent**; no-WebGL2 degrades to a Canvas2D wireframe of the same rotating tesseract. **Safety:** INTENSE by saturation/detail/slow drift ‚ÄĒ **never flicker**; the only periodic luminance change is one soft ~0.4 Hz breath (floor 0.78) gated through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` (‚Č§3 Hz, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`). **Named refs (README):** **H.S.M. Coxeter *Regular Polytopes*** (tesseract/8-cell projection lineage) ¬∑ **Kl√ľver** form constants ¬∑ **DMT** "more axes than physical reality allows" hyperdimensional-geometry phenomenology ¬∑ **thin-film iridescence**. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (device-tilt input + 4D rotation/projection math + raw-WebGL2 additive-glow polytope render + iridescence/kaleidoscope shader + 4D-angle-coupled inharmonic audio = 5) + **#3** the named refs; research-cited to the ¬ß782 audio-reactive-pipeline/saturation dive. **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 4D/tesseract is owned (1042-hyperspace-bloom / 1051-hand-hyperspace / 1196-fibration); the fresh axis is the **combination** (tilt-steered XW/YW-hyperplane melt + 4D-rotation-angle-coupled inharmonic audio + jeweled kaleidoscope), per the saturation finding. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 24th straight <14-day dry (retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4√ó) ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only ¬∑ JI-consonant-drone BED ¬∑ orbital-gravity ¬∑ cosmic-STARFIELD palette ¬∑ (on-watch) touch/pointer INPUT(3√ó) + three.js OUTPUT + instrument-DSP + harmony-engine TECHNIQUE(3√ó)]`; `picked=[device-tilt INPUT (fresh, non-keyboard non-pointer non-camera) ¬∑ 4D-polytope-projection + 4D-angle-coupled-inharmonic-audio TECHNIQUE ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (NOT three.js) ¬∑ jeweled-neon-iridescent PALETTE (NOT starfield)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND all four on-watch flags on all four axes AND re-balances the pole toward INTENSE. **Love-signal:** squarely inside Karel's most-loved geometric-psychedelia cluster (`1482-face-mandala`, `1396-apophenia-field`, `1450-supershape-bloom`, `130-tsl-particle-compute` all ‚Ě§). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint ‚Ä¶ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean (state path = integer frame counter + `Math.sin`/`cos`, fixed art randomness via hardcoded-seed mulberry32); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1714-tesseract-melt` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1712`/`1716` leaked. **NOT eye-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display): whether the edges read as genuinely hyperdimensional (ballooning/inside-out) vs a spinning 3D cage wants Karel's Chrome; the ghost rotation guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical 4D‚Üírender‚Üíaudio path. **Honest knocks:** a tesseract (32 edges) is more *legible* but less *overwhelmingly dense* than a 24-cell ‚ÄĒ intensity comes from kaleidoscope + saturation, not edge count; tilt integrates a *rate* so hard tilting winds up accumulated w-rotation and "home" isn't recoverable without releasing to ghost drift; **device-tilt only fires on mobile**, so on Karel's laptop the headline "tilt to steer 4D" is the pointer fallback + ghost (the phone is where it fully lands). Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1712-breath-void`** (mic-breath biofeedback boundless field ‚ÄĒ the field inhales/exhales *with you*, white-out boundary-dissolution at peak inhale; de-selected because the payoff isn't headless-verifiable ‚ÄĒ needs a mic-grant + slow breathing ‚ÄĒ and the meditative mist is the subtlest visual; verify with a real mic first) + **‚≠ź `1716-tracer-drift`** (LSD color-trails via WebGL2 ping-pong feedback on any dropped track + generative carrier; de-selected because the carrier's headless drive is smooth/less punchy and the real payoff needs a dropped file ‚ÄĒ and it's the natural home to finally wire Karel's real Path piano as carrier wave) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß782 (both fully built + determinism-clean this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-782/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect ‚Č•1718). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1714-tesseract-melt/README.md`

### [1708-lattice-cathedral](/dream/1708-lattice-cathedral) ¬∑ psychedelic / **fly first-person through an endless dark NDE/ketamine cathedral ‚ÄĒ a receding nave of luminous wireframe arches and rails built as REAL 3-D geometry (no three.js), where each landmark structure sings from its true 3-D position via HRTF spatial audio so sight and sound read one geometry** ¬∑ **POINTER-drag steers your gaze (yaw/pitch + inertia, auto re-center) over an always-on forward drift ‚ÄĒ non-keyboard, real first-person agency (escapes the persistent keyboard-PLAYED over-rep)** / **raw WebGL2 hand-built `perspective`√ó`lookAt` vertex pipeline, additive `gl.LINES` + point-glow bloom; 5 HRTF `PannerNode` beacons ‚Üí shared `createVoidReverb` cavern; sparse slightly-inharmonic pads (no JI drone)** ¬∑ cycle 781 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: ketamine/NDE-void ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`
**Fly forward, forever, through a vast dark cathedral of light.** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *"The Descent": a steerable first-person passage through an NDE/ketamine architectural VOID where every luminous structure pings from its true 3-D position via HRTF spatial audio* ‚ÄĒ resurrecting ¬ß780's ‚≠ź‚≠ź top-banked `1702-void-descent` as the whole cycle's concept, and the **COSMIC-AMBIENT** counterweight to ¬ß780's INTENSE DMT bloom (the mandate: cover the whole spectrum, don't camp on one pole). **How it works ‚ÄĒ visual:** genuine 3-D geometry, *not* a raymarched SDF and *not* three.js. Vertices for each structure are generated deterministically as `gl.LINES` pairs; a hand-built **`perspective`** matrix √ó a **`lookAt`** view matrix (camera position + a forward vector from yaw/pitch) multiply on the CPU into a view-projection that transforms every vertex in the vertex shader. An **endless nave** of semicircular portal arches plus continuous **floor / springer / ridge rails** is drawn at integer multiples of the bay spacing around the camera, so the corridor never ends and the rails converge on a vanishing point (the dominant depth cue). Five larger **landmark structures** are interspersed ‚ÄĒ a great double-arch, a ring-portal, a saddle-vault, a girder pylon, and a rose-gate. Additive blending blooms overlapping girders; a second `gl.POINTS` pass adds a soft joint glow (cheap fake bloom); edge color drifts violet‚Üícool-neutral with depth into `exp(-depth¬∑density)` black fog. **Audio (the research hook):** each of the 5 landmarks owns exactly one `PannerNode` (`panningModel="HRTF"`, `distanceModel="inverse"`) placed at its **true world coordinate every frame**, and the `AudioListener` position + orientation are set from the **same camera** the visuals use (feature-detecting `positionX`/`forwardX` AudioParams vs legacy `setPosition`/`setOrientation`). Because both the view matrix and the listener derive "right" from `cross(forward, up)`, **sight and sound read the identical geometry** ‚ÄĒ the arch you see on your right is heard on your right and a fly-through sweeps front‚Üíback. Beacons are soft, slightly-**inharmonic** sustained pads (fundamentals 58.3/77.8/92.5/116.5/138.6 Hz, each with a slow breathing LFO) ‚ÄĒ a resonant void, deliberately **not** a consonant JI drone (the reflex the 2026-07-14 jury banned) ‚Üí long `createVoidReverb` cavern tail ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí master 0.12. **Auto-demo:** an immediate frame-counter ghost flight (forward drift + deterministic `Math.sin`-of-frame yaw/pitch sweep) means the headless 06:30 box is **never blank or silent**; WebGL2-absent degrades to an on-brand `text-destructive` notice while audio still runs. **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the only luminance modulation is an opt-in ‚Č§2.4 Hz drift gated through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker.ts` (honors `prefers-reduced-motion`). **Named refs (README):** van Lommel **NDE tunnel** phenomenology ¬∑ **ketamine k-hole** / "the void" ¬∑ **Kl√ľver** tunnel/spiral form-constant ¬∑ gothic-nave / **Sol-LeWitt**-lattice architecture ¬∑ **Web Audio `PannerNode` HRTF** (KEMAR) ¬∑ the 2026 spatial-audio surge (arXiv **2605.30940** streaming synchronized spatial audio; **HRTFformer** arXiv 2510.01891). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (hand-built 3-D geometry + `perspective`/`lookAt` camera matrices + pointer-gaze steering + per-structure HRTF spatial audio + convolution-void reverb = 5) + **#3** the named refs above; research-cited to the ¬ß780/¬ß781 spatial-audio dives. **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ wireframe-3D / HRTF / raymarching are individually owned or stock; the fresh axis is the **combination** (a raw-WebGL2 3-D wireframe cathedral spatialized so sight+sound share one geometry ‚ÄĒ real 3-D *without* three.js), per the saturation finding. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 23rd straight <14-day dry (freshest = HRTFformer ~9 mo; foundational-technique exception; #5 retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4√ó) ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only ¬∑ JI-consonant-drone BED ¬∑ orbital-gravity ¬∑ cosmic-STARFIELD palette ¬∑ (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT + instrument-DSP + harmony-engine TECHNIQUE(3√ó)]`; `picked=[pointer-drag-STEER INPUT (non-keyboard, real agency) ¬∑ real-3D-wireframe-geometry + per-structure HRTF-spatial-audio TECHNIQUE ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (NOT three.js) ¬∑ cold violet-neutral ARCHITECTURAL-VOID PALETTE (NOT cosmic-starfield)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND all three on-watch flags on all four axes AND re-balances the psychedelic pole. **Love-signal:** `1326-voice-cathedral` ‚Ě§ (literally a cathedral) + the loved immersive-void cluster. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint ‚Ä¶ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean (state path = integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1708-lattice-cathedral` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1706`/`1710` leaked. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/headphones): whether the nave reads as a boundless NDE cathedral vs a generic wireframe corridor, and whether the HRTF spatialization lands on Karel's headphones, want his Chrome; the deterministic ghost flight guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical camera‚Üígeometry‚Üírender‚ÜíHRTF path. **Honest knock:** GL line width is ~1px so girder "heft" comes from additive overlap + the point-glow pass, not thick beams; beacon z-recycling can produce a faint audible swoop on the closest passes; generic KEMAR HRTF gives weak elevation cues (saddle-vault/rose-gate above you) so it leans on azimuth + distance + the visual (which keeps it legible on laptop stereo speakers). Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1706-void-descent`** (the raymarched-SDF approach ‚ÄĒ the original ¬ß780 top-bank, 6 beacons + descending Shepard; de-selected because the SDF glow-field reads more uniform/abstract + is more owned by the lab than a raw 3-D vertex pipeline; verify on headphones first) + **‚≠ź `1710-tunnel-warp`** (the log-polar form-constant approach ‚ÄĒ exercises the mandate's "single biggest lever," cleanest one-source-of-truth eye+ear; de-selected for lowest surprise (closest to the owned 1344/1524 tunnels) + a sight‚ÜĒsound steering mismatch to fix first) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß781 (both fully built + verified this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-781/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect ‚Č•1712). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1708-lattice-cathedral/README.md`

### [1700-bloom-field](/dream/1700-bloom-field) ¬∑ psychedelic / **your bodily presence in front of the webcam opens a DMT-threshold *chrysanthemum* ‚ÄĒ a real on-GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion field warped through the shared log-polar form-constant engine into an N-fold kaleidoscopic bloom; re-injects the psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION after the 770s instrument-lab drift (NOT an instrument, NOT a harmony engine, NOT a JI drone, NOT cosmic-starfield, NOT three.js)** ¬∑ **CAMERA presence = the exciter (downsampled 64√ó48 luminance frame-difference = motion energy = REBUS cortical-entropy; stillness lets the flower unfold slowly, movement blooms/reorganizes it faster) ‚ÄĒ real agency, non-keyboard (escapes the persistent keyboard-PLAYED over-rep)** / **raw WebGL2 ping-pong FBO ‚ÄĒ Gray-Scott RD ‚Üí inverse log-polar warp ‚Üí kaleidoscope, neon-jeweled palette + chromatic aberration; inharmonic additive audio (no JI drone)** ¬∑ cycle 780 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT-threshold chrysanthemum ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Move in front of your webcam and a fractal flower blooms and reorganizes with you ‚ÄĒ hold still and it settles into a slow unfold, the way a DMT threshold opens.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire that deliberately turned the lab back toward its stated **psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION** (2026-06-28) after a long instrument-lab run (pluck/bow/blow + harmony engines) left altered-states under-represented. **How it works:** a genuine **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** simulation runs entirely on the GPU ‚ÄĒ two half-float textures (8-bit fallback) ping-ponged through a fragment shader (Du 0.16, Dv 0.08, feed/kill pushed toward the coral/mitosis regime), deterministically seeded (a centered blob + fixed spots, **no `Math.random`**) ‚ÄĒ the "breathing fractal." A display shader samples that field, applies the shared **`LOGPOLAR_GLSL` inverse log-polar warp** (`screenToCortex`) so the pattern reads as a radial chrysanthemum, then an **N-fold kaleidoscope** (fold count animates 6‚Üí12 as it "blooms"), colored through a jeweled violet‚Üímagenta‚Üícyan‚Üígold ramp with radial **chromatic aberration** + thin-film iridescence ‚ÄĒ the Kl√ľver/Bressloff-Cowan form-constant recipe (cortical stripes/hex under an `exp()` warp) applied to a living RD field. **The input is your body:** `getUserMedia({video})` ‚Üí a small offscreen canvas ‚Üí per-frame mean absolute luminance **frame-difference** = `motionEnergy` (no MediaPipe, no face model ‚ÄĒ just presence), which raises the RD feed/kill toward pattern-formation + injects noise + speeds the fold animation ‚ÄĒ the **entropic-brain / REBUS** mapping (more input ‚Üí higher cortical entropy ‚Üí faster reorganization). **Audio:** 7 stretched/inharmonic partials whose detune and spread **grow with motion** so the sound grits up as the bloom reorganizes ‚ÄĒ deliberately **not** a consonant just-intonation drone (the reflex the 2026-07-14 jury banned) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master 0.12. **Auto-demo:** with no camera, a deterministic frame-counter `Math.sin` breathing swell drives `motionEnergy` so the headless 06:30 box is **never blank or silent**; camera-denied degrades to an on-brand `text-destructive` notice while the ghost bloom keeps running. **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow luminance drift only; an **opt-in** "shimmer flicker" gates through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker.ts` (‚Č§3 Hz). **Named refs (README):** **Heinrich Kl√ľver** form constants ¬∑ **Bressloff‚ÄďCowan (2001)** cortical pattern-formation / geometric hallucinations ¬∑ **Gray & Scott** reaction-diffusion ¬∑ **Carhart-Harris entropic-brain / REBUS**. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (camera capture + luminance frame-diff + Gray-Scott RD sim + inverse-log-polar warp + N-fold kaleidoscope + inharmonic additive audio = 6) + **#3** the named refs above. **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ RD + log-polar + kaleidoscope are all owned by the lab (the saturation finding); the fresh axis is the **combination** (camera-presence-as-REBUS-entropy driving RD‚Üíform-constant), not a new substrate. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 22nd straight <14-day dry (this cycle's ~2-mo spatial-audio dive, arXiv 2605.30940, was wired into the *banked* `1702` instead; foundational-technique exception; #5 retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4√ó) ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only ¬∑ JI-consonant-drone BED ¬∑ orbital-gravity ¬∑ cosmic-STARFIELD palette ¬∑ (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT + music-theory-engine TECHNIQUE(3√ó)]`; `picked=[camera-presence INPUT (non-keyboard, real agency) ¬∑ Gray-Scott-RD + inverse-log-polar-form-constant + kaleidoscope TECHNIQUE ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (NOT three.js) ¬∑ neon-jeweled PALETTE (NOT cosmic-starfield)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND corrects the instrument-lab drift back to the psychedelic mandate. **Love-signal:** picked partly because Karel's loved cluster is overwhelmingly geometric-bloom/mandala/spectral psychedelia (1482-face-mandala, 1450-supershape-bloom, 1396-apophenia-field, 262-aurora-particle, 267/321-spectral, 1354-glyph-canon, 1326-voice-cathedral) ‚ÄĒ 1700 is squarely inside it. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio + Canvas; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint ‚Ä¶ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean in the audio path; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1700-bloom-field` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` (35.4 kB) emitted, no `1702`/`1704` leaked. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/webcam): whether the bloom reads as a genuine DMT-threshold chrysanthemum vs. a generic RD-kaleidoscope, whether the jeweled palette lands, and whether motion‚Üíreorganization feels causal want Karel's Chrome + webcam; the deterministic ghost breathing swell guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical motion‚ÜíRD‚Üíwarp‚Üírender‚Üíaudio path. **Honest knock:** the audio "bloom intensity" is derived from motion + the breathing envelope rather than a true GPU readback of RD field energy, so sound tracks *presence* more than the exact on-screen pattern (a GPU-readback loudness bus is the obvious cycle-2); palette/aberration constants are hand-tuned by reasoning, not visual iteration.
