Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1702-void-descent`** (pointer-steered ketamine/NDE architectural void with **per-structure `PannerNode` HRTF spatial audio** ‚ÄĒ carries this cycle's spatial-audio research hook; de-selected only because its payoff needs headphones + is least headless-verifiable) + **‚≠ź `1704-drift-lattice`** (hypnagogic drift that gets **deeper the quieter/stiller your room is** ‚ÄĒ mic room-RMS drives depth *inversely*; the freshest interaction concept; de-selected as least visually ambitious) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß780 (both fully built + verified this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-780/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect ‚Č•1706). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1700-bloom-field/README.md`

### [1694-reed-column](/dream/1694-reed-column) ¬∑ adult / **breath-blown single-reed CLARINET physical model ‚ÄĒ a real self-oscillating 1-D digital-waveguide woodwind (McIntyre-Schumacher-Woodhouse 1983 reed law), completing the lab's physical-model triad pluck‚Üíbow[1692]‚ÜíBLOW; NOT a JI-drone bed, NOT a harmony engine, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic** ¬∑ **mic BREATH = the exciter (RMS envelope = blowing pressure, NOT the pitch ‚ÄĒ the bore loop self-oscillates; SILENT below threshold, no drone) + pointer-x = bore length; deterministic ghost-breath auto-demo ‚ÄĒ real agency, under-rep MIC input (NOT keyboard-played the banned over-rep, NOT pointer-drag, NOT camera)** / **Canvas2D live standing-pressure-wave in the bore + breath-pressure meter + register readout ‚ÄĒ Blob-URL AudioWorklet reed DSP, NO three.js/WebGL, off-GPU** ¬∑ cycle 779 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: breath-blown clarinet you play with your lungs ¬∑ pole: wind physical-model / live-performance (anti-JI-drone, silent-at-rest, off-GPU)`
**Blow into your laptop mic and it becomes a real clarinet ‚ÄĒ your actual breath is the exciter of a self-oscillating single-reed woodwind physical model, and it overblows to a *twelfth*, not an octave.** Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire (single-reed clarinet ¬∑ air-jet flute ¬∑ lip-reed brass) completing the physical-model instrument triad: **pluck ‚Üí bow (`1692-friction-loom`) ‚Üí BLOW (this)**. **How it works:** a genuine **1-D digital waveguide** running per-sample in a Blob-URL `AudioWorklet` ‚ÄĒ the bore is a delay line terminated by a **sign-inverting lossy one-pole bell reflection** (a cylinder closed at the reed ‚áí **odd harmonics** ‚áí the hollow clarinet timbre + the signature overblow to the **3rd harmonic, a twelfth**) and by the **reed nonlinearity** at the mouthpiece: each sample forms the pressure difference across the reed `őĒp = pBore ‚ąí pMouth`, looks it up in the STK/MSW **reed table** `r = clamp(offset + slope¬∑őĒp, ‚ąí1, 1)` (the reed *closes* as blowing pressure rises), and re-injects `pMouth + őĒp¬∑r` ‚ÄĒ the **pressure-controlled nonlinearity** that turns steady breath into a self-sustaining limit cycle. Pitch is the bore delay length, **not** the breath; below a pressure threshold the column is **silent** (no drone ‚ÄĒ jury #2 real agency); the overblow-to-a-twelfth is a hysteretic register-vent retune to 1/3 length. Bounded by construction (bell loss <1, clamped reed table, tanh-saturated output ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí master 0.12). **Numerically verified** in a Node harness before baking constants: silent below control-pressure ~0.35, self-oscillates ~202 Hz, overblows to ~604 Hz ‚ÄĒ a measured ratio **2.99, a true twelfth**. **Controller (non-keyboard):** PRIMARY = mic breath (`getUserMedia`‚Üí`AnalyserNode`‚Üíper-frame RMS envelope = `pMouth`; mic connects **only to the analyser, never to destination** ‚ÄĒ no howl); SECONDARY = pointer-x slides the bore length (quantized to a chalumeau pentatonic). **Auto-demo:** a deterministic **ghost breath** from a frame counter (`Math.sin`, never `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`performance.now` in the audio path) plays a tongued phrase ‚ÄĒ some notes pushed past the overblow threshold to sound the twelfth ‚ÄĒ so the headless 06:30 box is never blank/silent; live blow takes over, idle returns to the ghost; **mic-denied** degrades to an on-brand `text-destructive` notice while the ghost keeps playing. **The see=hear weld:** Canvas2D **live standing pressure wave in the bore** (antinode at reed, node at bell ‚ÄĒ the node count visibly *triples* on overblow, the real worklet buffer snapshot overlaid faintly), a breath-pressure meter with speak/blow thresholds marked, and a register readout (Chalumeau / Clarion¬∑12th) ‚ÄĒ warm amber-reed palette inside the canvas only, violet the sole chrome accent. **Named refs (README):** McIntyre-Schumacher-Woodhouse *"On the oscillations of musical instruments"* JASA 1983 ¬∑ Perry R. Cook STK `Clarinet` ¬∑ Julius O. Smith III digital waveguides (CCRMA) ¬∑ **arXiv 2604.12878 *Four Decades of Digital Waveguides*** (Smith/V√§lim√§ki/Reiss, 2026-04-14 ‚ÄĒ this cycle's research hook). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic capture + breath-envelope + reed nonlinearity + cylindrical-bore waveguide + standing-wave viz = 5) + **#3** named refs above + **plausible #1** (a breath-mic-driven self-oscillating reed waveguide is grep-thin ‚ÄĒ the lab's flutes are envelope toys, 827 is a 2-D mesh). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 21st straight <14-day dry (freshest = the April-2026 Smith retrospective at ~3 mo; digital waveguides are a 40-year foundation; #5 retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(5√ó, still) ¬∑ JI-consonant-drone BED ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only ¬∑ orbital-gravity ¬∑ cosmic palette ¬∑ (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT + music-theory-engine TECHNIQUE(3√ó)]`; `picked=[mic-BREATH INPUT (UNDER-rep, non-keyboard, real agency ‚ÄĒ you blow it) ¬∑ breath-driven self-oscillating wind-waveguide TECHNIQUE (NOT harmony engine, NOT JI drone, silent at rest) ¬∑ Canvas2D standing-wave OUTPUT (NOT three.js) ¬∑ amber-reed PALETTE (NOT cosmic)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban on all four axes; escapes the persistent keyboard over-rep via the under-rep mic. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand); `eslint ‚Ä¶ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean in the audio path; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1694-reed-column` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1696`/`1698` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no speakers): whether the reed genuinely *sings* a stable clarinet tone vs. squeaks, and whether the overblow reads as musical, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + verified numerics guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical breath‚Üíreed‚Üíbore‚Üírender path. **Honest knock:** the register vent is a *switched* retune approximation (the audible twelfth is faithful but doesn't emerge purely from bore acoustics), and the bore is integer-length (both registers ~1% sharp, intervals consistent). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1698-lip-buzz`** (lip-reed brass ‚ÄĒ the freshest interaction: breath=energy, pointer-y=lip-tension "lips up" harmonics 2‚Äď8 like a bugle; de-selected only as the least-verified) + **‚≠ź `1696-jet-flute`** (air-jet flute ‚ÄĒ most sophisticated worklet, breathy seeded-LCG chiff, octave overblow; de-selected as less surprising than the twelfth) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß779 (both fully built + verified this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-779/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1694-reed-column/README.md`

### [1692-friction-loom](/dream/1692-friction-loom) ¬∑ adult / **gestural bowed-string physical model ‚ÄĒ a real stick-slip friction (McIntyre-Schumacher-Woodhouse 1983) digital-waveguide bowed string, the scratch‚Üísing‚Üíover-pressure continuum a plucked/Karplus model can't give; grep-thin for the lab (NOT a JI-drone bed, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic)** ¬∑ **pointer-drag GESTURE = the bow (speed/force = bow velocity/pressure; sound exists only while dragging, silent at rest) + deterministic ghost-bow auto-demo ‚ÄĒ real agency, NOT keyboard-played (the banned over-rep), NOT tap-trigger, NOT mic** / **Canvas2D six-string loom with live Helmholtz-corner vibration + bow-force/speed readout ‚ÄĒ Blob-URL AudioWorklet friction DSP, NO three.js/WebGL, off-GPU** ¬∑ cycle 778 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: friction bowed-string you play with a gesture ¬∑ pole: gestural/live-performance, real stick-slip (not a pluck, not a drone)`

### [1676-tabla-loom](/dream/1676-tabla-loom) ¬∑ adult / **physically-modeled tabla + konnakol tala ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST non-Western rhythmic-cycle instrument (synthesized drum, NOT a sample; NOT a JI-consonant drone, NOT a pad, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic)** ¬∑ **keyboard/pad-PLAYED bols (home row A‚ÄďK + ‚Č•64px pads) over a live tala cycle you can jam over or solo ¬∑ deterministic ghost theka auto-demo ‚ÄĒ real agency, NOT zero-input/watch-only, NOT touch-drag, NOT mic** / **Canvas2D circular "tala wheel" rhythmic-necklace + synced konnakol theka strip (warm ochre/clay/ink, off-violet, off-cosmic) ‚ÄĒ NO three.js/WebGL/GPU** ¬∑ cycle 776 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: physical-model tabla / konnakol tala cycle ¬∑ pole: rhythm/percussion you play (anti-JI-drone, off-GPU, non-Western)`
**Play a synthesized Indian *tabla* through a spoken-rhythm *konnakol tala* cycle ‚ÄĒ the tala's structure (matras, sam, khali) visible as a turning necklace, the drum voices modeled not sampled.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer rhythm/tension fire (tabla ¬∑ ET-functional-harmony ¬∑ beatbox-groovebox), the **direct cash of the fresh 2026-07-14 jury's #1 note** ‚ÄĒ *"break the just-intonation consonance reflex (13 of 15 resolve to a pretty JI drone); force rhythm, grit, groove ‚ÄĒ a percussion/beat-driven piece."* Tabla is that piece, and it's **grep-0√ó across ~730 prototypes** (the lab's first tabla/first tala engine, first non-Western rhythmic structure). **How it works:** every *bol* is **modal/banded-waveguide percussion synthesis, no samples** ‚ÄĒ `modalStroke()` sums a bandpassed white-noise excitation burst (the membrane slap) with a bank of tuned decaying sine partials at per-bol inharmonic ratios (the resonant ring + pitch); roster `na`/`ta` (bright rim), `tin`/`tun` (open ringing), `ke` (dead slap), `ge` (the baya bass with the signature downward pitch-glide, `bendRatio 0.6`), and composites `dha = ge+na`, `dhin = ge+tin`. Master chain adds `tanh` soft-clip grit + high-shelf + compressor; a Sur slider retunes; the noise buffer is a seeded `mulberry32` (deterministic). **The tala engine** is a **lookahead scheduler** (25 ms `setInterval` pump placing bols on exact `AudioContext.currentTime` stamps ‚ÄĒ sample-accurate, not setInterval-timed audio) advancing a repeating cycle: ships **Teental (16, 4+4+4+4)**, **Keherwa (8)**, **Jhaptal (10)**, **Rupak (7)** with sam (emphatic beat 1) + khali (waved "empty") + vibhag accents. **PLAYED (jury #2 "no watch-only"):** home row A S D F G H J K + on-screen ‚Č•64px pads fire bols instantly on gesture; an **auto-theka toggle** lets you jam over the machine's groove or turn it off and drum solo; Lay (tempo) + Sur (tuning) + tala picker are all live. **The see=hear weld:** a Canvas2D **circular tala wheel** (Toussaint's rhythmic-necklace framing) with matra nodes labelled by theka syllable, sam ringed, khali hollow, a sweeping radial playhead, per-strike resonant ripples, warm ochre/clay/ink palette; a synced theka strip below highlights the current matra. **Auto-demo:** the transport runs from mount on `performance.now()` (deterministic theka, no RNG) so the wheel is never blank at a cold 06:30 glance; on the first allowed `resume()` it hands the clock to audio and becomes audible; a clear **Play** CTA guarantees sound on the first user gesture; graceful `AudioContext`-unavailable notice. **Named refs (README):** Perry R. Cook's *PhISM/PhOLIES* + Essl & Cook banded-waveguide percussion synthesis ¬∑ the Hindustani/Carnatic **konnakol** vocal-percussion tradition + the **tala** system (Teental, Keherwa) ¬∑ Godfried Toussaint's rhythmic-necklace geometry (the wheel). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#1** first tabla physical-model + first tala engine (grep-0√ó, the sole never-used-technique hit this cycle) + **#3** named refs above + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (modal-membrane synth + lookahead tala scheduler + konnakol theka/wheel render = 3). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 18th straight <14-day dry (physical-modeling percussion + Euclidean/necklace rhythm are decades-foundational; the widened net this cycle confirms the freshest on-brief work ‚ÄĒ Factor8 *Constellations* Euclidean sequencer, ~8 wks ‚ÄĒ is still not <14d; re-escalating the recommendation to amend/retire #5's <14-day bar). **diversity:** `banned=[JI-consonant-drone AUDIO-BED(jury,7√ó) ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only(4√ó) ¬∑ orbital/n-body ENGINE ¬∑ cosmic palette]`; `picked=[keyboard/pad-PLAYED INPUT (agency; NOT zero-input, NOT touch-drag, NOT mic, NOT cosmic) ¬∑ Canvas2D tala-wheel OUTPUT (NOT three.js) ¬∑ modal-tabla + tala ENGINE (rhythm/percussion ‚ÄĒ NOT JI-consonant, NOT gravity) ¬∑ warm-ochre PALETTE ¬∑ pole rhythmic/played/non-Western]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban and directly answers jury #1+#2. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand ‚ÄĒ semantic-token chrome, violet the only accent; the ochre/clay lives only inside the canvas art); `eslint src/app/dream/1676-tabla-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; full `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + linted cleanly (all warnings pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`) then hit the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling at page-data collection (4096-fd cap, absent on Vercel ‚ÄĒ same wall as cycles 762/767/768/771‚Äď775); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1676-tabla-loom` present in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1678`/`1680` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no speakers): whether the modal bols sound like genuinely resonant membrane percussion vs. thin blips, and whether the baya bend + `dha`/`dhin` composites land musically, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + wheel guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical synth‚Üírender path. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1678-tension-cell`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ a 12-TET functional-harmony instrument that *modulates and BITES*: play roman numerals + tension chords V7/vii¬į7/V/V/N6/It+6 + cadence/modulation gestures, voiced in four-part voice-leading, a Lerdahl-inspired tension scalar driving a circle-of-fifths "tension web" + scrolling curve + timbre; numerically verified to bite ‚ÄĒ tonic 0.12‚ÜíIt+6 1.00, V7‚ÜíI drops ~0.39; = the jury's "equal-tempered one that modulates and bites" verbatim, de-selected only vs tabla's higher ambition/surprise/palette-diversity) + **‚≠ź `1680-beat-forge`** (mic-beatbox groovebox ‚ÄĒ spectral-flux onset + centroid timbre-classify ‚Üí kick/snare/hat ‚Üí quantize to 16-step grid ‚Üí gritty synth-drum loop you layer/Euclid-fill; max agency but lowest ambition + mic-dependent payoff won't self-evidence headless) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß776 (both fully built + verified this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1676-tabla-loom/README.md`

### [1664-bytemill](/dream/1664-bytemill) ¬∑ adult / **bytebeat ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST algorithmic-glitch instrument (music synthesized from a single bitwise formula; NOT a consonant JI drone, NOT a scale-index, NOT psychedelic)** ¬∑ **keyboard-PLAYED ‚ÄĒ you switch formulas, bend the t-rate, and mutate a live constant (real agency ‚ÄĒ NOT watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic, NOT self-playing)** / **Canvas2D CRT oscilloscope + scrolling 8-bit bitfield (glowing green-on-black, off-violet) ‚ÄĒ NO three.js/WebGL/GPU** ¬∑ cycle 774 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: raw algorithmic grit ¬∑ pole: rhythm/dissonance you play (anti-JI, off-GPU)`
**Play raw 8-bit "bytebeat" ‚ÄĒ music computed directly from one bitwise formula of a running sample counter `t` ‚ÄĒ switching formulas and bending the math live while a CRT scope shows the waveform and a scrolling bitfield shows the actual bits that make the rhythm.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (rhythm/grit night: bytebeat-glitch ¬∑ acid-303 ¬∑ real-piano beat-rack), and the **direct cash of the fresh 2026-07-14 jury's #1 note** ‚ÄĒ *"13 of 15 pieces resolve to a pretty consonant just-intonation drone; ban the JI bed for a week and force rhythm, grit, groove, or real dissonance ‚ÄĒ a noise/glitch instrument."* Bytebeat is that instrument: **grep-0√ó across 729 prototypes** (first in the lab), and the literal opposite of a clean tone ‚ÄĒ harsh, aliased, glitchy, inherently rhythmic. **How it works:** an **AudioWorkletProcessor authored as an inline string and loaded via a Blob URL** (fully self-contained, nothing served from `/public`) evaluates an integer expression like `t*((t>>12|t>>8)&k&t>>4)` or `(t*(t>>5|t>>8))>>(t>>16&31)` per tick, masks to a byte (`&255`), and maps to `-1..1`. The worklet steps `t` at an **authentic lo-fi 2‚Äď16 kHz t-rate independent of the AudioContext sample rate** ‚ÄĒ a fractional accumulator holds the last byte between ticks, and that sample-and-hold aliasing IS the bytebeat character. **The visitor PLAYS it (real agency ‚ÄĒ the jury's #2 note: "don't relapse into watch-only"):** keys **1‚Äď8** switch among 8 curated named formulas (sierpinski, hard glitch, ‚Ä¶); **arrows / `[` `]`** bend the t-rate (tempo+pitch); **`‚ÜĎ‚Üď` / `‚ąí=`** live-substitute a single numeric constant `k` inside the current formula (the visitor *mutates the sound* ‚ÄĒ each formula ships a `kDefault`/`kMin`/`kMax` + an on-screen hint like "bit-mask density"); **space** play/pause; every control mirrored as a touch button. **Safety by construction:** formulas come from a **fixed curated library** and `k` is coerced to an integer ‚ÄĒ `new Function` compiles only library expressions, the visitor can never inject code. **Auto-demo:** a deterministic ghost performance (driven off `audioContext.currentTime`, no RNG) cycles formulas + bends params on load so a cold 06:30 glance is never silent; any real keypress instantly takes over. **The see=hear weld:** Canvas2D **CRT oscilloscope** of the live waveform over a **scrolling bitfield** (each column = the 8 bits of a sample, LSB at bottom) with scanlines + persistence fade ‚ÄĒ you literally see the bit patterns that make the rhythm. **Audio safety chain:** worklet ‚Üí soft-clip `WaveShaper` ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí low master gain **0.11** ‚Üí destination (bytebeat can be brutally loud; grit is tamed before the speakers); no >3 Hz full-screen luminance flash; `prefers-reduced-motion` degrades the animation; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, node disconnect, context close, **Blob URL revoked**, keydown listener removed). **Named refs:** bytebeat discovered & named by **Viznut (Ville-Matias Heikkil√§), 2011** (*"Discovering the beauty of new-school algorithmic music"*) ¬∑ modern browser composers **bytebeat.cloud** / **dadabots ByteBeats.art**; research-chained to this cycle's ¬ß774 dive (bytebeat + browser-acid, both anti-consonance). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#1** first bytebeat in the lab (grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ the only candidate this cycle hitting a never-used technique) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (Blob-URL AudioWorklet bytebeat synth + live formula/constant/t-rate steering state + deterministic ghost performer + Canvas2D scope+bitfield render = 4) + **#3** named refs above. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 17th straight <14-day dry (bytebeat is 2011-foundational; the *widened net* this cycle, done per the jury's own #5 instruction, confirms the freshest on-brief work is foundational technique being re-webified now ‚ÄĒ re-escalating the recommendation to formally amend/retire #5's <14-day bar). **diversity:** `banned=[JI-consonant-drone AUDIO-SPINE(13√ó) ¬∑ touch/pointer INPUT(6√ó) ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only(4√ó) ¬∑ orbital-gravity ENGINE ¬∑ cosmic palette ¬∑ three.js OUTPUT(on-watch)]`; `picked=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT (agency; NOT touch/pointer, NOT zero-input, NOT mic, NOT cosmic) ¬∑ Canvas2D CRT scope/bitfield OUTPUT (NOT three.js) ¬∑ bytebeat-bitwise ENGINE (rhythm/grit/dissonance ‚ÄĒ NOT JI-consonant, NOT gravity) ¬∑ CRT-green off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole rhythmic/gritty/played]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban and directly answers jury #1+#2. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand ‚ÄĒ semantic tokens, violet the only chrome accent; green is inside the canvas art only); `eslint src/app/dream/1664-bytemill --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean in executable code; full `npm run build` compiled + linted cleanly (all warnings pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`) then hit the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling at page-data collection (4096-fd cap, absent on Vercel ‚ÄĒ same wall as many recent cycles); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1664-bytemill` present in BOTH route manifests, no `1666`/`1668` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no speakers): whether the 8 formulas + `k`-bending give a genuinely *musical* range rather than uniform harshness, and whether the CRT scope/bitfield reads well, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + scope guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical synth‚Üírender path. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1666-acid-cell`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ a keyboard-played TB-303 acid groove sequencer: saw‚Üíresonant-lowpass squelch + accent/slide + soft-clip, driven by a generatively-mutating 16-step **12-TET** pattern that modulates its root key every 3rd mutation = the jury's "equal-tempered one that modulates and bites" verbatim; grooviest of the three, de-selected only vs bytebeat's higher surprise + sole #1-hit) + **‚≠ź `1668-breakrack`** (Karel's real Path piano onset-sliced into a played MPC beat-rack + 16-step sequencer + stutter-roll, with an OfflineAudioContext synthetic fallback; cashes the "use his music" directive + beat-cut/loop-station loves ‚ÄĒ de-selected because headless the real decode likely CORS-fails so the auto-demo shows the fallback not his piano, and MPC-chopping is the most-expected concept) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß774 (both fully built + verified, backed up to scratchpad). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1664-bytemill/README.md`

### [1660-fugue-loom](/dream/1660-fugue-loom) ¬∑ adult / **counterpoint ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST real music-theory engine (a machine that composes a fugue; NOT a scale-drone, NOT a Markov melody, NOT psychedelic)** ¬∑ **autonomous self-composition (~90 s, self-plays on load; "New subject" re-seeds) ‚ÄĒ NOT mic/voice, NOT touch/pointer-drag, NOT keyboard-steer** / **self-writing SVG scrolling piano-roll score (three warm per-voice hues on dark, off-violet) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D, NO three.js/WebGL, NO GPU render** ¬∑ cycle 773 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: a three-voice fugue composing itself ¬∑ pole: architecture-you-can-see-and-hear (off-violet, off-GPU)`
**Watch a three-voice fugue compose ITSELF ‚ÄĒ the subject enters voice by voice, is answered a fifth up, returns inverted and in new keys, tightens into a stretto, and resolves over a pedal point ‚ÄĒ and hear the whole architecture unfold.** Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *a machine that composes real counterpoint* ‚ÄĒ via strict species ¬∑ fugal architecture ¬∑ strict canon), and the lab's **first genuine music-theory engine** across ~725 prototypes: counterpoint/fugue/species-counterpoint were **header-core 0√ó** ‚ÄĒ the single most composerly idea for a pianist's lab had never been built, and it is the direct cash of the standing jury demand *"give the input a real musical idea; stop manufacturing the score."* **How it works:** from one integer seed, `composeFugue` builds a complete fugue in D minor as an **11-section form state machine** ‚ÄĒ Exposition (Voice I states the SUBJECT alone ‚Üí Voice II enters with a genuine **tonal ANSWER** at the fifth, its rising-fifth head *contracted to a fourth*, while Voice I plays the recurring **countersubject** ‚Üí Voice III enters with the subject in the bass) ‚Üí Episodes I‚ÄďIV (modulating **sequences** built only from the subject's head fragment) ‚Üí Counter-exposition (bass-first re-voicing) ‚Üí Middle entries (subject in **relative major**, then **melodic INVERSION** mirrored about the tonic, then the **dominant** region) ‚Üí two rounds of **Stretto** (a voice re-enters with the subject *before* the previous statement finishes, gap tightening) ‚Üí **Pedal-point close** (bass sustains dominant‚Üítonic under a final subject statement, resolving to a held D-minor triad). Work happens in **scale-degree space** so every transposition/answer/inversion stays in key by construction; `makeSubject`/`makeCountersubject` run once per seed and are **frozen**, so every later entry is literally that same shape transformed ‚ÄĒ the piece's **memory**, and why minute-3 is a development of minute-0 rather than a loop (the starved long-form-generative-with-state lane). A final voice-leading pass scans every voice pair for **parallel perfect fifths/octaves** and nudges the offending *free* note by a diatonic step (subject statements never altered). **The see=hear weld:** a self-writing **SVG scrolling piano-roll** ‚ÄĒ three warm per-voice hues, note blocks appearing exactly as they sound and scrolling under a "NOW" playhead, with **every SUBJECT entry outlined/labelled** so you watch the subject enter voice by voice, see the answer sit a fifth above, and see the stretto overlap; a live section label + timeline bar show where you are in the form. **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only, no mic): three independent detuned-oscillator voices with per-note ADSR + lowpass, look-ahead scheduling against `audioContext.currentTime`, master gain ‚Č§ **0.14** ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination + subtle delay; **autonomous self-play on load** (resume-on-gesture fallback for autoplay policy) so a cold 06:30 glance is never blank/silent; "New subject" advances the seed for a fresh fugue. **Deterministic:** seeded `mulberry32`; **no** `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date` in executable code (grep-clean; engine tests confirm identical output per seed, 19 subject statements across 11 sections, 6/6 stretto overlap, 6/6 distinct subjects across the seed chain). **Named refs:** J.S. Bach *Die Kunst der Fuge* (BWV 1080) & *Das Wohltemperierte Klavier* ¬∑ J.J. Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* (1725) ¬∑ G. Mazzola et al. three-voice counterpoint (arXiv 2606.01102, 2026); research-chained to this cycle's ¬ß773 dive (Mazzola/Fux first-species + FuxCP). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (fugal-form state machine + subject/answer/countersubject/inversion memory model + parallel-perfects voice-leading pass + polyphonic per-voice synth + self-writing SVG score = 5, coupled every frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** long-form stateful with real memory (a whole fugal arc, different at 0:30 vs 3:00) ‚ÄĒ **declared cycle-1 of a multi-cycle counterpoint line** (cycle-2: fold in the banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`fux-machine`'s independently-verified species-counterpoint rule engine so the voices become genuinely species-lawful, not just parallel-perfects-nudged; cycle-3: seed the subject from Karel's real Path piano). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the fresh weld is the *engine* (real fugal architecture), while individual pieces (canon, generative melody) have prior lab presence; still, counterpoint-as-core is grep-0√ó. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 15th straight <14-day dry (this cycle's Mazzola find is June 2026 ~1 month, the freshest on-concept find in many cycles but not <14d). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL GPU-render OUTPUT(7√ó) ¬∑ touch/pointer INPUT(4√ó) ¬∑ mic/voice INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-render ¬∑ voice‚ÜíJI‚Üíform-constant ENGINE ¬∑ cosmic-gravity ENGINE ¬∑ iridescent-violet+Kl√ľver PALETTE]`; `picked=[autonomous self-composition + "new subject" trigger INPUT (NOT touch-drag, NOT mic, NOT keyboard-steer) ¬∑ self-writing SVG piano-roll OUTPUT (off-GPU, off-Canvas2D) ¬∑ fugal-architecture counterpoint ENGINE (NOT gravity, NOT voice‚Üíform-constant, NOT Markov) ¬∑ ink/sepia per-voice off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole contemplative/composerly]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND breaks both the 7√ó GPU-render and 4√ó touch runs. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the only motion is the slow score scroll + a ~0.13 Hz glow pulse, well under 3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored; full teardown (scheduler stop + rAF cancel + `audioContext.close()`) on unmount. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG/DOM; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand ‚ÄĒ semantic tokens, violet the only accent); `eslint src/app/dream/1660-fugue-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; full `npm run build` compiled + linted cleanly (all warnings pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`) then hit the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling at page-data collection (4096-fd cap, absent on Vercel ‚ÄĒ same wall cycles 756/762/767/768/771/772); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1660-fugue-loom` present in BOTH route manifests, no `1658`/`1662` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the answer-at-the-fifth and the stretto overlap read as legibly *fugal* by ear, and whether the harmony (register-separation + parallel-perfects-nudge rather than full species verification ‚ÄĒ the builder's honest knock) sounds convincing vs merely correct-looking, want Karel's Chrome; autonomous playback + the highlighted score guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `fux-machine`** (the strict species-counterpoint machine ‚ÄĒ a Fux D-dorian cantus firmus with an added voice through 1st & 2nd species, every interval labelled and **illegal parallels vetoed in red on screen**, independently verified **0 violations / 264 verticals**; the rigor/legibility win + the ideal cycle-2 to fold into this fugue) + **‚≠ź `canon-weaver`** (a strict imitative canon engine ‚ÄĒ one line constrained to stay consonant against its own delayed transposed echo, verified, rendered as an SVG thread-weave = the tightest see=hear weld; de-selected for smaller musical scope ‚ÄĒ a 16-beat perpetual loop) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß773. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1660-fugue-loom/README.md`

### [1638-reel](/dream/1638-reel) ¬∑ adult / **cinematic narrative ‚ÄĒ an ALTERNATE journey-engine arc (NOT psychedelic, NOT cosmic-gravity, NOT embodied, NOT voice)** ¬∑ **autonomous long-form (~5.7 min self-playing film; Restart + per-act jump chips) ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT camera, NOT keyboard-steer** / **three.js WebGL fragment-shader cinematic atmosphere (letterboxed slate/teal-shadow + gold-highlight, off-violet) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D render** ¬∑ cycle 770 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: dramatic beat-sheet ‚Üí tension curve ‚Üí generative film score + graded image ¬∑ pole: cinematic (off-violet, off-cosmic, off-embodied)`
**Press Play and Resonance's journey engine tells a wordless CINEMATIC STORY instead of a psychedelic arc ‚ÄĒ a ~5.7-minute self-playing short film whose music and image both obey a classic dramatic beat sheet.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (markets ¬∑ cinematic-arc ¬∑ physics-collision), and the first real answer to the design director's standing **directive #4** ‚ÄĒ "EDM build-and-drop, ritual, jazz-responsive, **cinematic narrative** as alternate arcs" to the product's fixed 6-phase psychedelic engine (a lane essentially unbuilt for months). **How it works:** a **beat-sheet state machine** (Freytag's Pyramid / Snyder's *Save the Cat*) walks seven acts ‚ÄĒ Setup ‚Üí Inciting Incident ‚Üí Rising Action ‚Üí Midpoint ‚Üí Climax ‚Üí Falling Action ‚Üí Resolution ‚ÄĒ each with a target tension, key/mode, tempo/density, and color grade; a smooth curve eases the tension between acts and `stateAt(t)` interpolates one **shared tension signal** that drives BOTH sound and image so they never disagree. **The score** (4 detuned pads + sub drone + look-ahead-scheduled recurring **motif**) travels A lydian ‚Üí C phrygian climax ‚Üí home to **A major**; tension drives detune/dissonance (a semitone cluster appears above 0.72), filter brightness, register, and motif density. **The image** is a three.js WebGL fragment-shader widescreen atmosphere (fbm fog, horizon glow, particulate light, slow filmic push, non-strobing grain) whose glow/turbulence/warp/grade bend off the same curve. **Memory / state (the anti-loop):** the motif (scale degrees `0 4 3 5 7 4 2`) is the piece's memory ‚ÄĒ stated plainly in Setup, returns **inverted an octave up** at the Climax, and finally **resolves on the tonic** in the Resolution, returning to the opening's home key; minute five is genuinely a different place than minute one. **Self-demonstrating unattended:** on the Play gesture it rolls start-to-finish autonomously (the best 06:30 self-demo ‚ÄĒ no camera, no live feed, no input needed); Web Audio built only on gesture, mastered through a `DynamicsCompressor` at gain `Math.min(0.14, peak)`, full teardown (rAF cancel + audio disconnect + three.js dispose + `ctx.close()`) on unmount; `prefers-reduced-motion` calms the camera to a slow drift; no-WebGL shows an on-brand notice while the score still walks the whole arc. **Deterministic:** seeded `mulberry32` (`SEED=0x1638`) for every generative choice, all timing from `audioContext.currentTime` deltas + a frame counter ‚ÄĒ **no** `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date`, **no** Canvas2D (verified). **Named refs:** Gustav Freytag *Die Technik des Dramas* (1863) ¬∑ Blake Snyder *Save the Cat!* (2005); research-chained to this cycle's ¬ß770 dive (AffectMachine-Pop arxiv 2506.08200 + the 2026 "long-form narrative coherence remains unsolved" finding). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (beat-sheet state machine + shared tension-curve interpolator + generative score with returning/transformed motif + WebGL cinematic grade = 4, coupled every frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** cashes the design director's alternate-journey-arc directive (long-form stateful piece with real memory ‚ÄĒ the thinnest categorical lane). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ narrative/beat-sheet and generative film-score each have some prior lab mention; the fresh weld is the whole-arc one-curve audio+image cinematic engine, absent from the recent window. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 19th straight <14-day dry; re-affirms retiring #5. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬∑ voice‚ÜíJI-tone‚Üíform-constant ENGINE ¬∑ iridescent-violet+Kl√ľver PALETTE ¬∑ keyboard-steer WATCH ¬∑ cosmic-gravity/orbital ENGINE (recent 3√ó) ¬∑ embodied/pose INPUT (recent 2√ó)]`; `picked=[autonomous long-form INPUT ¬∑ three.js WebGL cinematic-shader OUTPUT ¬∑ dramatic-beat-sheet‚Üítension-curve ENGINE (NOT gravity, NOT voice‚Üíform-constant) ¬∑ cinematic slate/gold off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole cinematic (off-cosmic, off-embodied)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND both recent runs (cosmic-gravity, embodied). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow filmic camera + non-strobing grain, all luminance drift well under 3 Hz; reduced-motion honored. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; no server/route/secret; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ `three` already a dependency). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1638-reel --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative full `npm run build` = **EXIT 0** (clean production build this cycle ‚ÄĒ EMFILE ceiling did not bite), `/dream/1638-reel` present as a static route (9.19 kB); no `1636`/`1640` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the act-to-act grade + motif transformation reads cinematically and whether the shader-as-atmosphere carries the "story" want Karel's Chrome; autonomous playback guarantees it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1636-ledger-organ`** (real-world-data ‚ÄĒ live Coinbase `matches` WebSocket ‚Üí a self-playing "market organ", DOM/CSS ticker, deterministic replay-sim headless; now **4√ó banked** ‚ÄĒ de-selected AGAIN on brand-fit [a crypto terminal is furthest from Resonance's contemplative soul] but the data-sonification lane the jury flagged as 0√ó-shipped is now a standing "ship-it-or-retire" gap) + **‚≠ź `1640-marble-organ`** (physics ‚ÄĒ a 2D rigid-body collision organ √† la Wintergatan's *Marble Machine*: marbles fall through ~50 tuned pegs, each strike flashes the peg + rings its exact JI pitch = the tightest see=hear weld; SVG, seeded auto-drip; de-selected as the least conceptually novel [a known trope] + the discrete-event axis the lab has shipped many times recently) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß770. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1638-reel/README.md`

### [1630-string-loom](/dream/1630-string-loom) ¬∑ adult / **embodied ‚ÄĒ the WHOLE body as a string instrument, off the violet AND off the cosmic-gravity run (NOT psychedelic, NOT gravity, NOT voice)** ¬∑ **camera / MediaPipe PoseLandmarker full-body tracking (nose ¬∑ wrists ¬∑ elbows ¬∑ knees ¬∑ ankles cross the strings) + seeded ghost-skeleton auto-demo ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT touch, NOT keyboard** / **three.js WebGL 3D string field with standing-wave vertex shiver (warm bronze/amber/bone on warm charcoal) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D render, NO WebGPU** ¬∑ cycle 769 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: embodied full-body Karplus-Strong string instrument ¬∑ pole: embodied / warm-daylight (off-violet, off-cosmic)`
**Stand in front of your webcam and your whole body becomes the bridge of a giant harp ‚ÄĒ sweep a wrist, elbow, knee or ankle across a hanging string and it plucks a real physically-modeled note you watch shiver and hear decay.** Winner of a 3-approach embodied DEEP fire, and the head-on answer to the **2026-07-13 jury's #1 / oldest / still-unmet provocation** ‚ÄĒ "get a *body* in the room" (in that window: exactly 1 camera, 1 tilt, 0 pose/body-tracking). Chosen over two siblings ‚ÄĒ a precise two-hand ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1632-hand-lyre` + an ML-free optical-flow ‚≠ź`1634-flow-choir` (both banked ¬ß769) ‚ÄĒ because it puts the *whole body* in the room (not just hands) and keeps the lab's **proven discrete-causal see=hear weld** (a limb crossing a named string plucks + shivers that exact pitch) rather than an aggregate drone. **How it works:** CDN-loaded **MediaPipe PoseLandmarker** (33 landmarks, VIDEO mode, no npm dep) tracks ~8 joints into a field of **15 vertically-hanging strings** tuned to a **just-intonation pentatonic over 3 octaves** (spatial pitch ‚ÄĒ the column you cross is the note, never a centroid‚Üípitch reflex); a column-crossing with sufficient velocity plucks that string. Audio is **genuine Karplus-Strong** ‚ÄĒ per-string delay line of length `sampleRate/freq`, seeded noise-burst excitation, two-tap averaging lowpass feedback, one buffer pre-rendered per string and re-triggered through a brightness lowpass into a compressor + feedback-delay ring at master **0.13**. The **see=hear weld:** a single string index drives BOTH the 3D standing-wave vertex shiver (`sin(ŌÄu)¬∑exp(‚ąít/ŌĄ)`, higher strings shimmering faster) and the KS pluck of that same fixed frequency ‚ÄĒ the string you watch wobble is exactly the pitch you hear. **Never blank/silent, self-demonstrating unattended:** with no camera / permission denied / MediaPipe load failure it shows a `text-rose-300` notice AND auto-runs a **deterministic (`mulberry32`) ghost skeleton** ‚ÄĒ five joints sweeping the field on Lissajous paths through the *identical* crossing‚Üípluck code path, so it plays itself at a 06:30 glance with no webcam. Warm bronze‚Üíamber‚Üíbone strings on warm charcoal; full teardown (stream/AudioContext/RAF/three.js dispose); `prefers-reduced-motion` damps the shiver + demo. **Named refs:** Karplus & Strong (1983) plucked-string algorithm ¬∑ Michel Waisvisz *The Hands* (1984) ¬∑ the 2026 *Fluid Body* embodied-sonification research (Springer). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (MediaPipe pose-tracking + spatial crossing/velocity pluck-detection + Karplus-Strong string DSP + three.js 3D standing-wave render = 4, coupled each frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** declared cycle-1 of a multi-cycle embodied-instrument line (README declares a cycle-2: two-hand fingertip precision from 1632 + damping/harmonics; a cycle-3 spatial venue/pose-duet mode). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe body-tracking (1590-body-mirror) and Karplus-Strong both appear in lab history; the fresh weld is the full-body-joints-as-bridge spatial string instrument, absent from the recent window. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 18th straight <14-day dry; re-affirms retiring #5. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬∑ voice‚ÜíJI-tone‚Üíform-constant ENGINE ¬∑ iridescent-violet+Kl√ľver PALETTE ¬∑ keyboard-steer WATCH ¬∑ cosmic-gravity/orbital-resonance ENGINE (recent 3√ó)]`; `picked=[camera / full-body pose-tracking INPUT (only 1 camera in last window) ¬∑ three.js/WebGL 3D-render OUTPUT ¬∑ Karplus-Strong embodied-string ENGINE (NOT gravity, NOT voice‚Üíform-constant) ¬∑ warm bronze/amber/bone off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole embodied (off-cosmic)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND breaks the cosmic-gravity run. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ motion is smooth joint drift + string shiver (well under 3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio + a runtime CDN import of MediaPipe; no server/route/secret; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ `three` already a dependency; MediaPipe is a runtime browser CDN load, not a build dep). **Validation:** `eslint src/app/dream/1630-string-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = compiled (warnings only, in unrelated pre-existing `1085-lightning-organ`), past "Collecting page data" + "Finalizing page optimization", `page.js` (37.7 kB) emitted + `"/dream/1630-string-loom"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; plain `npm run build` lints+typechecks clean (0 error references to 1630); no `1632`/`1634` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/webcam): whether the joint-crossing threshold/velocity feels right against live PoseLandmarker jitter, and whether the string-shiver reads legibly, want Karel's Chrome; the seeded ghost skeleton guarantees it's never blank/silent and exercises the identical crossing‚Üípluck path. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach embodied fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *the body as a resonant string instrument* ‚ÄĒ via full-body-pose / two-hand-fingertip / ML-free-optical-flow); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1632-hand-lyre`** (TOP embodied ship-next ‚ÄĒ the precise two-hand ten-finger version: pinch-to-pluck at fingertip resolution, hand-height=register, spread=timbre; de-selected only for being hands-only vs the whole body the jury asked for) + **‚≠ź `1634-flow-choir`** (the ML-free **optical-flow ‚Üí modal-resonator-bank** choir ‚ÄĒ no CDN/ML dep, most portable + tightest structural weld [one `ring[24]` vector drives both shader glow and band gain]; de-selected on the aggregate "watch-a-field-hear-it-hum" weld the lab consistently banks vs discrete events + proximity to existing camera pieces) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß769. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1630-string-loom/README.md`

### [1628-chladni-choir](/dream/1628-chladni-choir) ¬∑ adult / **physical-acoustics ‚ÄĒ cymatics, off the violet AND off the cosmic-gravity run (NOT psychedelic, NOT gravity)** ¬∑ **touch / drag to sweep the driving frequency (horizontal = mode, vertical = excitation) + seeded idle auto-sweep ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT camera, NOT keyboard-steer** / **WebGL2 fragment-shader Chladni field + additive GL-points "sand" migrating to the nodal lines (sand-on-steel monochrome) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D, NO three.js scene-graph** ¬∑ cycle 768 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: Chladni modal plate / bidirectional pattern‚ÜĒinterval sonification ¬∑ pole: physical-acoustics (off-violet, off-cosmic)`
**Drag across a brushed-steel plate and WATCH the sand collect on the silent nodal lines ‚ÄĒ the standing-wave figure you see IS the chord you hear, in both directions.** Tonight's WIDE fire deliberately broke the recent cosmic-gravity 3√ó run (1600/1608/1622) with a completely different physical grammar, seeded by a fresh paper: **arxiv 2605.09846 *ChladniSonify* (May 2026)**, a bidirectional Chladni-pattern‚ÜĒfrequency mapping grounded in Kirchhoff‚ÄďLove plate theory. A WebGL2 fragment shader renders `|f|` of the square-plate Chladni field (`cos(mŌÄx)cos(nŌÄy) ‚ąí cos(nŌÄx)cos(mŌÄy)` ‚ÄĒ bright antinodes, dark nodes) over brushed steel; ~6,500 warm-white "sand" grains each take a clamped, damped **Newton step down the analytic gradient toward the nearest field zero** (`őĒp = ‚ąírelax¬∑f¬∑‚ąáf/|‚ąáf|¬≤`), so as the frequency sweeps the grains visibly **flow** from one nodal figure into the next rather than snapping ‚ÄĒ the money shot. **Bidirectional sonification:** the same Gaussian-weighted top modes drive both the field/sand AND an additive sine bank at `f = 55¬∑‚ąö(m¬≤+n¬≤)` Hz (plate modal scaling), and the ratio of the two loudest partials is octave-folded to the nearest just interval and named on screen ‚ÄĒ the figure and the chord are one object. Drag horizontally to pick the mode, vertically to widen excitation (ring neighboring modes into a real interval); leave it alone and a seeded slow sweep keeps the plate singing and the sand reorganizing, so it's never blank at a 06:30 glance. Master 0.14 ‚Üí compressor; full WebGL/audio teardown; `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the sweep. Named refs: Ernst Chladni 1787 ¬∑ Kirchhoff‚ÄďLove plate theory ¬∑ Hans Jenny (cymatics) ¬∑ arxiv 2605.09846. Honest 3/5 (#2 four subsystems: modal eigen-solver + particle sand-migration sim + additive modal synth + touch ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 recent research finding, honestly <60d not <14d). #1 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ cymatics exists in the lab (165-cymatics, 1554-wavefield-organ); the fresh weld is the research-cited bidirectional modal plate, absent from the recent 15-window. Honest caveat (builder-flagged): the symmetric `(m,n)` terms + `‚ąö(m¬≤+n¬≤)` scaling are the idealized-plate simplification (not a full Kirchhoff‚ÄďLove eigensolve), so a single dominant mode reads as "single mode" and only resolves to a named interval when excitation widens to ring neighbors. Not ear/eye-verified on Karel's hardware (headless container).

### [1622-tidal-canon](/dream/1622-tidal-canon) ¬∑ adult / **cosmic-ambient (the galaxy you can hear ‚ÄĒ NOT the violet form-constant)** ¬∑ **touch / pointer (drag to fling a conductor off-lock ¬∑ tap to drop a gravity well the swarm streams toward) + autonomous self-player ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT keyboard** / **three.js WebGL `Points`/`ShaderMaterial` procedural-glow point cloud (deep-space navy, warm gold/amber conductors) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D render surface, NO WebGPU dependency** ¬∑ cycle 767 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: large-N gravity / discrete orbital-resonance + aggregate tidal wash ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`
**A few massive bodies orbit under real gravity and sculpt a swarm of thousands of stars ‚ÄĒ hear the instant two of them lock into a pure just-intonation dyad, over the aggregate wash of the swarm being tidally stretched.** The declared **cycle-2 of `1608-orbital-consonance`** (¬ß765), taken DEEP: the large-N *galaxy* the lab kept banking. Winner of a 3-approach GPU fire ‚ÄĒ over two **aggregate-drone** siblings (a WebGPU-compute `1618-gravity-well` ‚≠ź‚≠ź + a pure-WebGL2 GPGPU `1620-spiral-choir` ‚≠ź, both banked ¬ß767) ‚ÄĒ precisely because it is the only one that **keeps 1608's discrete, causal see=hear event** (a system audibly *falling into* consonance, the lab's proven winning axis, which won 1608/1596/1576/1548) instead of a looser watched density-field. **How it works ‚ÄĒ the hybrid merge (few-body foreground over large-N backdrop):** 3‚Äď5 **conductor bodies** integrate under real mutual Newtonian gravity (velocity-Verlet, softened, momentum-zeroed), seeded near a Laplace-style 2:3:4 configuration so exact 3:2 / 4:3 / 2:1 period ratios lock from frame one; each pair's **orbital period** is read from its specific orbital energy (unbound-safe) and tested against small integers (2:1, 3:2, 4:3, 5:3) ‚ÄĒ inside tolerance the pair is a **resonance lock**. A large-N **one-way test-particle swarm** (9k stars) feels the conductors' gravity but does not act back (cheap, unconditionally stable, never blows up), so the conductors tidally stretch it into visible streaming tails; escapees recycle back into the disk to keep the cloud alive. **The two-layer weld:** the instant a pair locks, a clean **just-intonation dyad** rings (bell pair, snapped to the exact ratio, named live on screen ‚ÄĒ "3:2 ¬∑ perfect fifth") sitting high above a low A1 wash, so the discrete event cuts through; underneath, a soft JI pad tracks the **swarm's dispersion / how tidally sheared it is** (tightly bound = calm warm bed, violently sheared = brighter agitated wash), with a ~breathing LFO so it evolves over minutes (long-form, not a loop). **Never blank/silent, self-demonstrating unattended:** the seeded resonant opening rings a fifth/fourth within seconds of "Begin the canon" with the swarm already streaming, zero user input. Drag flings a conductor off-lock (it beats against neighbours, then re-settles); tap drops a gravity well. **Named refs (README):** Kepler *Harmonices Mundi* (1619) + third law ¬∑ the **Laplace resonance** (Io‚ÄďEuropa‚ÄďGanymede 4:2:1) ¬∑ Barnes & Hut (1986) ¬∑ just-intonation ratios ¬∑ tidal-tail galaxy dynamics. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#4** declared cycle-2 multi-cycle continuation of 1608 (README declares a cycle-3: conductor mergers, per-lock harmonic modulation, WebGPU large-N backdrop) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (conductor N-body sim + one-way large-N swarm + Kepler period-ratio lock detector + two-layer JI audio [discrete dyads + aggregate wash] + touch fling/drop = 5, coupled each frame) + **#3** named refs above. **#1 "narrow"** ‚ÄĒ the fresh part is welding *discrete measured resonance-lock events* to a *large-N aggregate wash*; N-body render + JI synth each have prior art, so NOT a hard grep-0√ó. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 16th straight <14-day dry; **re-affirms retiring #5** as structurally unreachable. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬∑ voice‚ÜíJI-tone‚Üíform-constant ENGINE ¬∑ iridescent-violet+Kl√ľver PALETTE ¬∑ keyboard-steer WATCH]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[touch-fling INPUT ¬∑ three.js/WebGL GPU-render OUTPUT (1√ó in last-10, not back-to-back ‚ÄĒ 766 was SVG) ¬∑ large-N-gravity/orbital-resonance ENGINE (NOT the banned voice‚ÜíJI‚Üíform-constant spine) ¬∑ deep-space gold-on-navy off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole cosmic-ambient]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ motion is smooth orbital drift + streaming particles + a single soft onset per lock (well under 3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ `three` already a dependency). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1622-tidal-canon --max-warnings 0` = **0** (one fix pass ‚ÄĒ `prefer-const` √ó4 auto-fixed + 2 unused destructured vars removed); authoritative `npm run build` compiles + lints + typechecks the winner clean (no error references 1622; every warning pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`), reaching page-data collection before the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (`ulimit -Hn`=4096, unraisable infra, absent on Vercel); confirmed no `1618`/`1620` leaked into the build. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the wobble‚Üísnapped-dyad reads as "a binary falling into consonance" against the wash, whether the tidal tails are legible at a 06:30 phone glance, and the discrete-vs-aggregate balance want Karel's Chrome; the seeded 2:3:4 opening guarantees it's never blank/silent and rings a lock within seconds. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach GPU fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *the galaxy you can hear* ‚ÄĒ via WebGPU-compute / GPGPU-texture / hybrid); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1618-gravity-well`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ the "massively bigger" **WebGPU-compute** 16k-star large-N galaxy, love-aligned with `130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ; de-selected on its aggregate-drone weld being looser than 1622's discrete events + WebGPU unverifiable headless) + **‚≠ź `1620-spiral-choir`** (the pure-WebGL2 **GPGPU texture-ping-pong** ~65k-star galaxy singing its angular-momentum spectrum; arguably the freshest technique, grep-0√ó GPGPU-texture-N-body; de-selected on also being an aggregate weld) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß767. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1622-tidal-canon/README.md`

### [1616-changing-lines](/dream/1616-changing-lines) ¬∑ adult / **non-Western musical structure ‚ÄĒ the I-Ching, off the violet (NOT psychedelic, NOT cosmic)** ¬∑ **touch (cast a reading) + autonomous self-player ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT keyboard** / **SVG ink-on-rice-paper hexagram (warm bone/charcoal/cinnabar) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D, NO WebGL** ¬∑ cycle 766 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: I-Ching changing-lines Markov canon ¬∑ pole: contemplative / ritual (off-violet)`
**A hexagram cast as a six-note guqin chord ‚ÄĒ its changing lines pull the music forward through the King Wen sequence as a slow, self-evolving canon.** WIDE-fire winner over two divergent siblings (a markets WebSocket "ledger organ" ‚≠ź‚≠ź + a MediaPipe hands "air-loom" ‚≠ź, both banked ¬ß766). Seeded from tonight's research (arxiv 2605.20386 *Music of Changing Lines*, May 2026 ‚ÄĒ the first honest #5 research-freshness land in 15 cycles). **How it works:** a deterministic yarrow-stalk cast (`mulberry32`+`performance.now()`, the classic old-yin 1/16 ¬∑ young-yang 5/16 ¬∑ young-yin 7/16 ¬∑ old-yang 3/16 probabilities) draws six lines, some **old/changing**; each line is a voice in a six-note **gong pentatonic** chord (ŚģęŚēÜŤßíŚĺĶÁĺĹ, bottom line lowest), yang lines bright & present, yin lines hollow with a slow amplitude gap. The changing lines carry the present hexagram to its **transformed** hexagram (flip the changing lines); over an 8‚Äď20 s glide the ink morphs (SVG center-bridge opening/closing) while the audio bends + re-plucks those voices, then the transformed hexagram becomes the new present and fresh changing lines are cast on it ‚ÄĒ so the piece **walks the 64 hexagrams forever** as a generative canon, never a hard loop. Fully deterministic, self-playing from Start (best unattended review fit ‚ÄĒ never blank, never silent, no camera/network). King Wen number + Chinese name + pinyin + English gloss + trigram pair shown; "Cast a reading" re-casts on demand. Master 0.14 ‚Üí compressor + deterministic temple-hall convolution reverb; `ctx.close()` teardown; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. Named refs: the I-Ching (Book of Changes) ¬∑ King Wen sequence ¬∑ guqin/gong-pentatonic tuning ¬∑ arxiv 2605.20386. Ambition honest 3/5 (#2 four subsystems: hexagram model + changing-lines Markov walk + 6-voice guqin synth + SVG morph render ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 recent research finding, honestly <60d). [design notes](/dream/1616-changing-lines) ¬∑ `src/app/dream/1616-changing-lines/`

### [1608-orbital-consonance](/dream/1608-orbital-consonance) ¬∑ adult / **cosmic-ambient (music of the spheres ‚ÄĒ NOT the violet form-constant)** ¬∑ **touch / pointer (fling a star into orbit ¬∑ tap to drop a body ¬∑ drag one onto another to merge ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT keyboard)** / **three.js WebGL point-cloud + orbit-bond overlay (deep-space navy/obsidian, warm gold/amber/white stars) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D render (2D used only to bake a glow sprite)** ¬∑ cycle 765 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: gravity-becomes-harmony / orbital-resonance sonification ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`
**Fling stars into orbit and hear two of them lock into a perfect fifth ‚ÄĒ gravity, made audible as consonance.** A DEEP return to the **GPU-render surface the lab had abandoned for 15 straight cycles** (the 2026-07-13 jury: "0 real GPU-render pieces in the last 15"), on ONE massively-bigger concept ‚ÄĒ *the music of the spheres, made real* ‚ÄĒ chosen over two sibling gravitational approaches. **How it works:** a dominant central star anchors a handful of lighter companions orbiting under **softened Newtonian gravity** (`r¬≤+őĶ¬≤`, velocity-Verlet at 1/120 s substeps; the companions also perturb each other so orbits precess and drift ‚ÄĒ lock configurations genuinely form, hold and dissolve over minutes, not a loop). Each body's **orbital period** is estimated every frame from its specific orbital energy (vis-viva ‚Üí semi-major axis ‚Üí **Kepler's third law** `T=2ŌÄ‚ąö(a¬≥/őľ)`); for every pair the ratio `longerT/shorterT` is tested against small integers **2:1, 3:2, 4:3, 5:3, 5:4, 6:5** and, inside ~2.4 % tolerance, the pair is **locked**. **The weld (the lab's proven winning axis ‚ÄĒ a discrete, unmistakable see=hear event):** pitch is tied to orbital frequency, so a 3:2 *period* ratio **is** a 3:2 *frequency* ratio ‚ÄĒ a real perfect fifth. Three always-on audio layers ‚ÄĒ a low bed drone (central tonic), one faint voice per body (the raw sound of gravity, audibly wobbling), and **lock dyads snapped to the exact just ratio** that bloom in on lock ‚ÄĒ mean the moment a binary falls into resonance you *hear the wobble resolve into a pure dyad* while a bright **resonance-bond line + a `text-base` "3:2 ¬∑ perfect fifth" label** mark it and the bodies brighten toward white. **Never blank/silent, self-demonstrating unattended:** the seeded opening (deterministic `mulberry32`) is a **Laplace-style 2:3:4 chain** (companion periods exactly 2:3:4, uniform eccentricity so ratios are preserved), so pressing Start rings a fifth, fourth and octave within seconds with zero user action. **Named refs (README):** Kepler *Harmonices Mundi* (1619) + the third law ¬∑ the **Laplace resonance** of Io‚ÄďEuropa‚ÄďGanymede (4:2:1) ¬∑ Barnes & Hut (1986) N-body context ¬∑ just-intonation integer ratios. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (velocity-Verlet gravity sim + period-ratio resonance detector + 3-layer JI audio engine + touch fling/drop/merge = 4, coupled each frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** multi-cycle / evolving (mutual perturbation drifts locks over minutes; README declares a cycle-2). **#1 "narrow but real"** ‚ÄĒ N-body toys and JI synths each have prior art; the fresh part is the tight weld of **measured orbital-period ratios driving live JI locks** with the raw voices audibly resolving (not claimed as a hard grep-0√ó). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 14th straight <14-day dry; **re-affirms retiring #5** as structurally unreachable. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬∑ voice‚ÜíJI-tone‚Üíform-constant ENGINE ¬∑ iridescent-violet+Kl√ľver PALETTE ¬∑ keyboard-steer WATCH]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[touch INPUT ¬∑ three.js/WebGL GPU-render OUTPUT (the surface absent 15√ó) ¬∑ N-body-gravity/orbital-resonance ENGINE (NOT the banned voice‚ÜíJI‚Üíform-constant spine) ¬∑ deep-space gold-on-navy off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole cosmic-ambient]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND re-injects the abandoned GPU surface. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ motion is smooth orbital drift + a single soft onset pulse per lock (well under 3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ `three` already a dependency). **Validation:** `eslint src/app/dream/1608-orbital-consonance --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `"/dream/1608-orbital-consonance"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` lints+typechecks clean ‚ÄĒ no error references 1608 ‚ÄĒ but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, absent on Vercel); no `1606`/`1610` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the wobble‚Üípure-dyad resolution reads as "a binary falling into consonance" and whether the fling/merge feels responsive want Karel's Chrome; the seeded 2:3:4 opening guarantees it's never blank/silent and rings a lock within seconds. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-builder fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *gravity becomes harmony* ‚ÄĒ via three gravitational approaches); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1606-gravity-well`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ the "massively bigger" **dual WebGPU-compute / WebGL** large-N point-cloud galaxy: ~16k stars, aggregate virial-mechanics drive a cosmic drone; love-aligned with `130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ; de-selected only because its *aggregate-drone* coupling is looser than 1608's discrete resonance events + its WebGPU path can't be verified headless) + **‚≠ź `1610-spheres-clockwork`** (the most robust ‚ÄĒ a **kinematic Laplace-canon orrery** that self-plays a JI canon and heals when you nudge a moon out of tune; de-selected because it is pre-locked by construction ‚ÄĒ you never hear a system *fall into* resonance ‚ÄĒ and sits on a single static root) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß765.
