### [1600-orbital-drift](/dream/1600-orbital-drift) ¬∑ adult / **OFF-THE-VIOLET (real-world data ‚ÄĒ NOT psychedelic)** ¬∑ **live ISS position feed (wheretheiss.at / open-notify, no auth) + tap-to-drop ground stations ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT keyboard-sole** / **pure SVG cartography (equirectangular world map, graticule, antimeridian-split ground track) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D, NO WebGL** ¬∑ cycle 764 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: real-world-data sonification / a machine orbiting overhead ¬∑ pole: contemplative-scientific (non-psychedelic)`
**Hear the ISS passing overhead right now ‚ÄĒ its live ground-track drawn across a world map, sonified as a serene just-intonation orbital drone.** The lab's answer to the fresh 2026-07-13 jury's **#5 (the last un-discharged) provocation** ‚ÄĒ *"break the psychedelic monotheme once; the real-world-data and conceptual/critical lanes are empty; one night off the violet."* After 15/15 psychedelic pieces this one is deliberately cool and cartographic (deep-space navy, cyan/teal grid, a single warm amber ISS marker ‚ÄĒ no mandala, no iridescence). **How it works:** a hand-rolled **equirectangular SVG world map** (hand-authored continent polygons, graticule) with the ISS marker + its forward/back ground-track animating immediately; a **live feed** polls `wheretheiss.at` every 4 s (dual-source fallback to `open-notify`), and a deterministic **Keplerian sub-satellite propagator** (51.6¬į inclination, 92.9 min period, Earth-rotation + nodal regression folded in so passes step ~23¬į west) runs from t=0 as a smoothing flywheel between polls ‚ÄĒ so it is **never blank or silent** with zero network / on CORS failure / headless. A `feed: LIVE | SIMULATED` badge reports the source. **Tap the map** to drop up to 6 ground stations; when the ISS passes within ~7.5¬į one flashes and rings a JI FM bell. **Audio** (Web Audio, master ‚Č§0.14 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`, ‚Č§11 voices): latitude ‚Üí lowpass cutoff (equator bright, poles veiled), ocean-vs-land (point-in-polygon) ‚Üí sawtooth-grain crossfade, orbital phase ‚Üí a slow Shepard-style amplitude glide; full teardown on unmount. **Named refs (README):** Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*, Semiconductor *Brilliant Noise* (2006, solar-data-as-AV), the equirectangular/plate-carr√©e projection. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#1** real live satellite-feed input = grep-0√ó (no prior orbital-data piece ‚ÄĒ the "orbital/keplerian" hits are unrelated procedural geometry; framed honestly as "diversity + likely-#1", nearest prior real-position feed is `1161-flight-choir` aircraft) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (dual-source ISS feed + Keplerian fallback/smoothing propagator + SVG cartographic renderer + JI orbital drone synth = 4) + **#3** named refs above. **#4 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ single-cycle (README cycle-2: terminator shading, a 2nd-satellite counter-voice, horizon-aware chimes). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 13th straight <14-day dry even fully off the psychedelic lane; **this cycle formally recommends retiring #5** as structurally unreachable. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬∑ voice‚ÜíJI-tone‚Üíform-constant ENGINE ¬∑ iridescent-violet+Kl√ľver PALETTE ¬∑ keyboard-steer WATCH]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[external-data(live ISS)+touch INPUT ¬∑ SVG-cartographic OUTPUT ¬∑ orbital-propagator/data-sonification ENGINE (NOT the banned voice‚ÜíJI‚Üíform-constant spine) ¬∑ deep-space navy/cyan/amber off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole non-psychedelic contemplative-scientific]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND breaks the 15/15 monotheme. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all motion is slow orbital drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the drift. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG + client-side read-only public GET; no server/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1600-orbital-drift --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` + `"/dream/1600-orbital-drift"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, absent on Vercel); no `1602`/`1604` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/network): whether the live fetch reaches wheretheiss.at from Karel's Chrome (CORS) vs. falling to SIMULATED, and whether the latitude/ocean-land coupling reads as *the orbit singing*, want his browser; the propagator guarantees it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-builder "off-the-violet" fire (3 divergent non-consciousness directions ‚ÄĒ space ¬∑ markets ¬∑ attention); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1602-ledger-organ`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ a self-playing "market organ" over a live **Coinbase WebSocket** ticker: each trade a JI voice, price‚Üípitch, tick‚Üítimbre, size‚Üíamp, spread‚Üídetune, seeded random-walk fallback; the near-#1 novel WebSocket input, the coldest cleanest break from the violet) + **‚≠ź `1604-the-vigil`** (the conceptual/critical lane ‚ÄĒ a piece that *only sounds while you sustain attention*: pointer-hold + Page Visibility gate, an accreting drone that dies the instant you release or look away; Cage *4‚Ä≤33‚Ä≥* / Tehching Hsieh / Alvin Lucier) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß764. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1600-orbital-drift/README.md`

### [1588-glossolalia](/dream/1588-glossolalia) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **keyboard / arrows / WASD steer + tap (NOT mic ‚ÄĒ mic 5√ó in the last 10; NOT the just-used camera/tilt) ‚ÄĒ you glide an aperture through a language-flood and play the words it touches** / **pure typographic DOM + the CSS Custom Highlight API (node-free light across arbitrary char-ranges; `<span>` fallback ‚Üí live-Playwright-verified, not just headless-compiled)** ¬∑ cycle 761 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT "everything is syntax" language-flood / syntactic-light ¬∑ pole: intense/kinetic`
**The whole field floods with language you can't quite read ‚ÄĒ then a pool of light glides across it and the words *resolve*, bright and legible, and ring.** Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE concept: *language that reads itself into being via the grep-0√ó **CSS Custom Highlight API***, finally cashing the banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź #1 (was `1582-scripture` ¬ß760) ‚ÄĒ and framed by this cycle's research dive, the **C√óG√óD computational-neurophenomenology** model (*Frontiers in Psychology*, 20 May 2026, doi 10.3389/fpsyg.2026.1819038): a hallucination is the brain's **Generator** replaying learned structure top-down ‚ÄĒ *meaning-shaped, not noise* ‚ÄĒ so an **asemic pseudo-language flood that reads as meaning without reference is a faithful model of the altered-state Generator**, and each aperture of light is the **Classifier** momentarily finding "effective causes" (legible words) in it. **The technique (the whole novelty):** the viewport fills edge-to-edge with 47 drifting rows of real seeded pseudo-language in ordinary `Text` nodes, painted near-invisible; **8 highlight buckets** (`lume0‚Ä¶lume7`, bright‚Üídim) are registered once via `CSS.highlights.set(...)` + styled through `::highlight(lumeN){ color; text-shadow; -webkit-text-stroke-color }`; every frame the moving aperture centers rebuild `Range` objects (`new Range(); r.setStart(node,i); r.setEnd(node,j)`) over nearby characters and **distribute them across the buckets by distance** (closest = brightest) ‚ÄĒ so pools of legibility glide over the language with **zero per-glyph DOM**, all motion from re-ranging (since `::highlight()` may only restyle color/shadow/stroke, never position). Complete progressive-enhancement fallback: `!("highlights" in CSS)` ‚Üí real `<span class="hl-fallback bkN">` wrapping (437 spans, byte-identical look) + a live `highlights: native|fallback` badge. **INPUT** keyboard/arrows/WASD steer the primary aperture, printable keys spawn notes, tap ignites a burst-aperture that blooms legibility + a JI chord ‚ÄĒ deliberately **NOT the mic** (5√ó in the last 10 ‚Üí banned this cycle) and **NOT Canvas2D** (4√ó ‚Üí banned). **AUDIO** words crossing an aperture ring a 7-limit-JI FM bell (pitch from field height), over a sustaining low JI pad drone + a quiet band-passed "language-wash," master ‚Č§0.16 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`, ‚Č§12 self-cleaning voices, full teardown. **Never blank/silent:** three seeded Lissajous apertures drift from mount resolving fragments with zero input/permissions; the pad lights on the first gesture. **SAFETY (a full-field piece, handled deliberately):** the flood stays dim near-black, only small apertures are bright and layered on top; no strobe, no full-frame flash, burst-apertures grow-then-collapse ‚Č™3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows drift, drops to one aperture, tames bursts. **Honest 3/5:** #1 CSS Custom Highlight API grep-0√ó (verified full lab; the jury-named wall to the first 5/5) + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (aperture-highlight engine + morpheme "Generator" + JI FM synth + per-frame distance-ranging driver = 4) + #3 named refs (Custom Highlight API/MDN ¬∑ C√óG√óD Frontiers 2026 ¬∑ Michaux asemic ¬∑ McKenna "syntactic light"/glossolalia ¬∑ Kl√ľver form constants). #4 declared multi-cycle (README folds `1586`'s reading-light-as-**score-follower-over-Karel's-Path-piano** as its 5/5 cycle-2, + `1584`'s radial mandala as an alternate aperture path). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ nothing <14-day this dive (the C√óG√óD anchor is ~54 days; **tenth cycle straight**, logged honest). **The only one of the 3 live-Playwright-verified** (route 200, native buckets w/ ~350‚Äď420 live ranges shifting on interaction, fallback 437 spans, dark-mode screenshot, 0 console errors after a fixed SSR-hydration mismatch) ‚ÄĒ directly answering the recurring "written-but-unrun" de-selector. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** on real hardware (no display/speakers here). Love-adjacent to **1396-apophenia-field‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (meaning-from-noise) + **1354-glyph-canon‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (generative text-as-form). **Banked from this fire:** ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1586-reading-light` (the self-descending reading-light codex, purpose-built to score-follow Karel's real piano ‚ÄĒ TOP ship-next / the 5/5 weld) + ‚≠ź`1584-scripture-mandala` (rotating japa-mandala). Two more explored ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß761. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1588-glossolalia/README.md`.

### [1578-dream-jump](/dream/1578-dream-jump) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **mic-voice PLAYED (sing a sustained phrase ‚Üí the whole reality teleports to a new hypnagogic room; pitch chooses the next scene's seed + palette; seeded idle scheduler auto-teleports every 5‚Äď7s ‚ÄĒ never blank/silent, no mic needed) ‚ÄĒ NOT the just-used tilt(¬ß756)/camera(¬ß754), not keyboard-rut** / **pure DOM/CSS + the lab's FIRST-EVER CSS View Transitions API (the *browser* morphs the entire viewport between scenes on the compositor ‚ÄĒ off-GPU, on the jury's starving DOM surface; complete direct-swap fallback ‚Üí headless-verifiable)** ¬∑ cycle 760 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: hypnagogic dream-room teleport ¬∑ pole: intense/ecstatic`

### [1576-flame-voice](/dream/1576-flame-voice) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **mic-voice PLAYED, two-way (sing ‚Üí pitch steers the variation focus + final rotation, energy blooms brightness; the flame then SINGS ITS OWN STRUCTURE back; deterministic seeded carrier idle self-demo ‚ÄĒ never blank/silent, no mic needed) ‚ÄĒ NOT the just-used tilt(¬ß756)/camera(¬ß754), not keyboard-rut** / **Canvas2D log-density accumulation buffer (off-GPU chaos game, headless-verifiable) ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST-EVER fractal flame** ¬∑ cycle 759 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: fractal-flame living organism ¬∑ pole: intense/ecstatic ‚ÜĒ cosmic-ambient`
**Sing INTO a living psychedelic organism and it sings BACK ‚ÄĒ the shape you SEE is exactly the chord you HEAR.** Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE concept: finally ship the lab's **first-ever fractal flame** ‚ÄĒ **Scott Draves & Erik Reckase's *Electric Sheep* algorithm** ("The Fractal Flame Algorithm," 2003), *the* canonical psychedelic-visual algorithm ‚ÄĒ which this 1500+-deep lab had **proposed twice and shelved twice** (`1287-fractal-flame` was a ¬ß701 WIDE non-winner, banked ‚≠ź, alongside `1286-strange-lace`), de-selected then only because ¬ß701's *then-live* ban on "full-frame density-fields you *stare at*" flagged it as watched-not-played. That ban is **superseded**: the 2026-07-12 jury blesses Canvas2D ("healthy, not a problem") and instead bans the **~10/15 GPU-render monoculture** (three.js + WebGL2) ‚ÄĒ and a fractal flame is a **CPU chaos game on an off-GPU Canvas2D accumulation buffer**, i.e. exactly the *off-GPU* surface provocation #1 demands, deterministic-from-audio so it's **headless-verifiable**. And the ¬ß701 shelving told us how to WIN it: make it genuinely **played**. **The technique, faithful to the paper:** an Iterated Function System drawn by the **chaos game** (4 affine xforms picked by weight; point wanders the biunit plane, warm-up ~20 iters), extended with **21 standard Draves nonlinear "variations"** (`linear`/`sinusoidal`/`spherical`/`swirl`/`horseshoe`/`polar`/`handkerchief`/`disc`/`spiral`/`hyperbolic`/`diamond`/`julia`/`waves`/`fisheye`/`eyefish`/`bent`/`power`/`rings`/`fan`/`cylinder`/`ex`), accumulated into two `Float32Array`s (density + palette-coordinate), decayed ~0.92/frame so the organism continuously refreshes and morphs, then rendered via Draves' signature **log-density tone-map** (`alpha = log(d+1)/log(max+1)` + ő≥‚Čą2.6) to `ImageData`‚Üí`putImageData` ‚ÄĒ ~74k points/frame (34k under reduced-motion), no WebGL/WebGPU/three.js. **THE SEE=HEAR WELD (the winning axis):** each frame the engine computes an 8-element **feature vector** = the *hit-weighted average of the exact per-xform variation gains that draw every plotted point* ‚ÄĒ not a side-channel analysis, the literal same numbers ‚ÄĒ and those 8 numbers set the amplitudes of **8 Just-Intonation partials** (ratios 1 ¬∑ 9/8 ¬∑ 5/4 ¬∑ 4/3 ¬∑ 3/2 ¬∑ 5/3 ¬∑ 15/8 ¬∑ 2, a stacked JI major scale to the octave, over 110 Hz + sub). When a variation swells on screen, its partial swells in your ears; the 8 on-screen dominance bars ARE the 8 audible partials. **Voice IN** (autocorrelation pitch on `getFloatTimeDomainData`, **NOT FFT**; RMS energy): pitch steers the variation focus + a final-xform rotation (reshaping the flame), energy blooms brightness ‚ÄĒ the reshaped flame then re-voices its own drone, closing a stable loop (the analyser is a dead-end never routed to destination, the drone is never routed into the analyser, heavy one-pole smoothing + noise floor ‚Üí it cannot howl). **Never blank/silent:** a deterministic seeded carrier slowly drives pitch/energy from mount so the flame is always morphing and the drone always singing its structure with no mic. **CRITICAL BAN-DODGE:** an IFS chaos-game with nonlinear variations ‚ÄĒ categorically NOT the jury-banned cortical-traveling-wave / log-polar `exp()` **synthetic breathing-field** (no cortical warp anywhere); a discrete morphing *organism*, played not watched. **Honest 4/5** (the mirror of 1490/1516, which hit #2+#3+#4+#5 and stalled on #1 ‚ÄĒ this one delivers #1 and abstains only on #5): **#1** first fractal flame / chaos-game / log-density in the shipped lab (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (chaos-game IFS engine + log-density Canvas2D renderer + autocorrelation voice-analysis + JI-partial sonification synth + played two-way mapping = 5) ¬∑ **#3** named ref (Draves & Reckase, "The Fractal Flame Algorithm," 2003; *Electric Sheep*) ¬∑ **#4** declared multi-cycle (cycle-1 flame+voice+weld; cycle-2 folds Karel's real Path piano in as the exciter + more partials + selectable genome species). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ nothing <14-day this dive (the best phenomenology finding, the C√óG√óD framework, is Frontiers 2026-05-20 = ~54 days; **eighth cycle straight** running the strict <14-day psychedelic-AV hunt dry, logged honest). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the accumulation-decay refresh is smooth, a decaying running-max keeps luminance drift ‚Č§3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` cuts point-count + damps motion. Audio gesture-gated (Start creates/resumes the ctx), master **‚Č§0.18** ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`, ‚Č§14 voices (8 partials + sub + carrier), full teardown (osc stop, `ctx.close()`, mic tracks stopped, rAF cancelled). `text-destructive` fallbacks for mic-denied / no-canvas. No API route ‚Üí no guard (pure `"use client"` Canvas2D + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** ESLint `--max-warnings 0` = EXIT 0; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1576-flame-voice/page.js` emitted (**31.8 kB**) + route in both `routes-manifest.json` & `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; forbidden-token grep clean (`Math.random`/`Date`/`new Date` = 0 incl. comments/strings); no non-winner leaked into the build (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no mic/speakers/display; `getUserMedia` absent and `getFloatTimeDomainData` returns zeros under `chrome-headless-shell`, so only the deterministic seeded-carrier path runs here): the felt voice‚Üíflame‚Üídrone weld tightness, flame legibility on a phone, and whether the two-way loop stays musical on a live mic want Karel's Chrome ‚ÄĒ the seeded carrier + off-mount idle demo + deterministic engine guarantee it's never blank/silent and the flame is correct by construction. Love-adjacent to **1396-apophenia-field‚Ě§ÔłŹ** + **1450-supershape-bloom‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (generative audio-reactive form) + the loved spectral field pieces **243-spectral-cloud‚Ě§ÔłŹ**/**267-spectral-drift‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (rich living fields; corroborating appetite, did not govern). **Banked from this fire:** ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1574-sheep-morph` (the Electric-Sheep **genome-crossfade** herd ‚ÄĒ voice conducts a continuous metamorphosis through 5 distinct alien species; the most "massively bigger" of the three, de-selected only for a one-way drive vs the winner's two-way weld ‚ÄĒ TOP fractal-flame ship-next / winner's cycle-2 seed) + ‚≠ź`1572-flame-choir` (the cleanest faithful baseline, 22 variations, most legible one-liner "sing the flame"). Two more explored ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß759. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1576-flame-voice/README.md`.

### [1568-worklet-mandala](/dream/1568-worklet-mandala) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **mic-voice PLAYED (sing/hum ‚Üí pitch=spin+hue, energy=bloom; seeded idle self-demo spins it with no mic) ‚ÄĒ NOT the just-used tilt(¬ß756)/camera(¬ß754), not keyboard-rut** / **DOM/CSS mandala spun by CSS Houdini AnimationWorklet on the COMPOSITOR (off-GPU, starving surface) + complete rAF fallback (headless-verifiable)** ¬∑ cycle 758 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: Kl√ľver kaleidoscopic mandala ¬∑ pole: intense/ecstatic`
**Sing or hum into a psychedelic mandala that breathes, spins, and blooms entirely as living HTML elements moved by the browser's compositor ‚ÄĒ not one pixel drawn to a canvas or a GPU shader.** Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire fanned across the 2026-07-12 jury's **three starving off-GPU surfaces** (DOM/CSS-3D ¬∑ audio-only/no-screen ¬∑ pure-SVG) with three distinct inputs ‚ÄĒ a direct answer to that jury's headline finding: three.js is the new mouse-drag (**GPU-render-primary ~10/15**), and its provocation #3, that the lab's first clean **5/5** is now **one criterion away ‚ÄĒ #1, a technique never used in the lab.** This delivers exactly that #1: **CSS Houdini `AnimationWorklet`** (`CSS.animationWorklet.addModule` ‚Üí `registerAnimator('mandala-spin')` ‚Üí `new WorkletAnimation(effect, document.timeline, {speed})`) spins a lattice of **8 concentric rings / 176 DOM petals** *off the main thread on the compositor* ‚ÄĒ **grep-0√ó across the entire 1500-deep lab** (`animationWorklet`/`registerAnimator`/`WorkletAnimation` = 0 files), and it lands on the jury's **starving DOM/CSS-3D surface** (only 1√ó = 1502), NOT the banned hand-authored GPU render. Like ¬ß755's Houdini Paint it ships as **progressive enhancement over a complete `requestAnimationFrame` fallback** that mutates the identical `rotate()` transforms + shared CSS custom props (`--hue`/`--bloom`/`--fit`), so the piece is **byte-identical and fully demoable everywhere including headless**, with a live label showing which path is hot ("compositor worklet" vs "rAF fallback"). **Voice-PLAYED** (jury-celebrated): autocorrelation pitch ‚Üí spin speed + hue, RMS energy ‚Üí bloom/scale, over a never-silent just-intonation drone bed (9 voices ‚Č§14, master 0.16 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`); a seeded idle self-demo spins it from mount with no mic. **CRITICAL BAN-DODGE:** a discrete, radially-symmetric spinning **mandala** driven by real voice ‚ÄĒ explicitly NOT the jury-banned cortical-traveling-wave / log-polar **synthetic breathing-field** (no `exp()`-warped self-running wave). **Honest 3/5:** #1 AnimationWorklet never-used (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (AnimationWorklet/rAF DOM-transform engine + autocorrelation mic pitch/energy + seeded radial-mandala geometry generator + JI Web Audio drone = 4) ¬∑ #3 named refs (Heinrich Kl√ľver's four form constants ¬∑ Bressloff‚ÄďCowan for the *symmetry* only, not the breathing-field mechanic ¬∑ CSS Houdini AnimationWorklet / web.dev). #5 not claimed (nothing <14-day ‚ÄĒ seventh cycle straight, logged honest). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ spin ~0.07 Hz, hue/bloom drift far under 3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` caps spin + damps pulsing. Full teardown (osc stop, `ctx.close()`, mic tracks stopped, rAF + worklet animations cancelled). No API route ‚Üí no guard (pure `"use client"` DOM/CSS + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** ESLint `--max-warnings 0` = EXIT 0; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1568-worklet-mandala/page.js` emitted (**27.5 kB**) + route in both `routes-manifest.json` & `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; forbidden-token grep clean (no `Math.random`/`Date` even inside the worklet string). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no mic/speakers/display, and no AnimationWorklet, so the rAF fallback is what ran): the felt voice‚Üíspin‚Üíbloom tightness, mandala legibility, and whether the compositor path is visibly smoother on Karel's Chrome want real hardware; the rAF fallback + seeded idle demo guarantee it's never blank/silent and renders identically anywhere. Love-adjacent to **1482-face-mandala‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (radial mandala) + **1326-voice-cathedral‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (sung-voice controller). **Banked from this fire:** ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1566-void-orbit` (audio-only/no-screen HRTF binaural void ‚ÄĒ sound-bodies orbit your head in the dark, breath-driven; de-selected only because ghost-spatial cues are subtle on phone speakers without headphones) + ‚≠ź`1570-glass-melt` (keyboard/tap-played SVG declarative-filter liquid-chrome melt ‚ÄĒ `feTurbulence`‚Üí`feDisplacementMap`‚Üí`feColorMatrix`). Two more explored ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß758. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1568-worklet-mandala/README.md`.

### [1562-constant-q-spiral](/dream/1562-constant-q-spiral) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **mic-voice PLAYED (sing/hum/whistle; deterministic seeded sawtooth-arpeggio idle self-demo ‚ÄĒ never blank/silent) ‚ÄĒ NOT keyboard, NOT the just-used tilt/camera** / **Canvas2D pitch-helix (off-GPU, headless-verifiable)** ¬∑ cycle 757 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: cymatic/harmonic vortex ¬∑ pole: intense/kinetic ‚ÜĒ cosmic-ambient (harmonic bloom that can boil)`
**Play your voice through a resonant constant-Q filterbank ‚ÄĒ one ringing bandpass per semitone ‚ÄĒ and watch the energy climb a glowing PITCH HELIX where every octave is one turn of a spiral and every partial is a bead of light in a vortex you can hear ring.** Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *the lab's first continuous-wavelet / scalogram analysis, warped into psychedelic form-constant geometry* ‚ÄĒ a direct shot at the criterion the 2026-07-12 jury named as the last wall to a clean 5/5: **#1, a technique never used in the lab.** The lab analyses sound with the **FFT everywhere** (`AnalyserNode`/`getByteFrequencyData` = 448 files); this is its **first Constant-Q Transform** AND its **first `IIRFilterNode`** ‚ÄĒ both grep-0√ó. 60 real RBJ-cookbook bandpass biquads (12/octave, C2‚Üí~C7, shared Q‚Čą14), each read by a per-band `AnalyserNode` used **only** for time-domain RMS (never its FFT), so no FFT touches the analysis. The **tightest see=hear weld** of the three approaches: the same 60 band-RMS numbers you *see* as helix beads ARE the same 60 band outputs summed (through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, master ‚Č§0.15) into the audible resonant ring ‚ÄĒ one array, one played instrument. Geometry = **octave-equivalence made visible** (angle = chroma, radius = octave, same-chroma beads threaded across octaves; violet‚Üímagenta‚Üícyan by octave/energy; alpha-fade glow trails) ‚ÄĒ a music-theoretic **Shepard/Drobisch pitch helix**, cleanly NOT the jury-banned log-polar breathing-field. Never blank: the spiral spine + a seeded carrier climb the bank within ~1s with or without a mic; `text-destructive` fallbacks for mic-denied / no-Web-Audio; no strobe, `prefers-reduced-motion` respected, full teardown. **Honest 4/5** (#1 CQT+IIR never-used ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems ¬∑ #3 refs: Brown CQT 1991 / Morlet-scalogram / Drobisch‚ÄďShepard helix / Bressloff‚ÄďCowan ¬∑ #4 declared multi-cycle). **Refs:** Judith Brown *Constant-Q* JASA 1991 ¬∑ Grossmann‚ÄďMorlet wavelet ¬∑ Arts & Roerdink fCWT *Nature Comp. Sci.* 2022 ¬∑ Shepard pitch helix ¬∑ Bressloff‚ÄďCowan form constants. **Banked from this fire:** ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1564-cortical-scalogram` (two-stage cochlea‚Üícortex 2D-Gabor honeycomb ‚ÄĒ the DEEP-DEEP resurrect) + ‚≠ź`1560-wavelet-well` (direct-Morlet CWT log-polar tunnel). ### [1554-wavefield-organ](/dream/1554-wavefield-organ) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **device tilt (`DeviceOrientationEvent` gamma/beta; `WASD`/arrows desktop fallback; seeded Lissajous idle auto-demo) ‚ÄĒ NOT pointer-sole, NOT keyboard-rut, NOT mic** / **WebGPU compute point-field (four WGSL passes) as the PRIMARY surface, with a first-class Canvas2D CPU fallback running the identical wave-PDE** ¬∑ cycle 756 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: cymatics / Chladni standing-waves ¬∑ pole: intense/kinetic (geometric, rests the void)`
**Tilt your phone to steer six real physical wave-sources across a vibrating plate ‚ÄĒ and watch a genuine 2D wave-equation field bloom into Chladni cymatic figures you can hear and play with your whole body.** Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire deliberately fanned across the jury's **three starving off-GPU-render surfaces** (WebGPU-compute / audio-only / pure-SVG) with **three non-keyboard/non-pointer inputs** (tilt / mic / camera) ‚ÄĒ a direct answer to the 2026-07-12 jury's "three.js is the new mouse-drag (GPU-render-primary ~10/15)" surface-monoculture finding AND the 3√ó-in-a-row keyboard-input rut. This piece finally **ships the starving WebGPU-compute surface (only 1√ó = 1506) render-robustly** ‚ÄĒ the recurring de-selector that banked four prior WebGPU explorers was headless-unverifiability, solved here by a **CPU "shadow field" that ALWAYS runs** (driving audio + source-glow on both backends) plus a genuine first-class **Canvas2D fallback that runs the identical wave-PDE**, so the piece is fully demoable everywhere while carrying a real 4-pass WGSL compute path (wave step + source forcing + 48k-particle advection + interference wash) that lights up on Karel's Chrome. **The physics (README):** a discretised **damped 2D wave equation** `d¬≤u/dt¬≤ = c¬≤‚ąá¬≤u` on a Dirichlet-clamped plate (5-point Laplacian leapfrog, `u_next = (2u‚ąíu_prev + c¬≤‚ąá¬≤u)¬∑damping`); continuous gaussian `A¬∑sin(2ŌÄft)` forcing at six sources builds true **standing waves** whose nodal lines are the cymatic figure; a point-field advects down `‚ąí‚ąá(u¬≤) = ‚ąí2u¬∑‚ąáu` so particles pool on the nodes **exactly as dry sand does on Ernst Chladni's plates** ‚ÄĒ the figure is physically emergent, nothing drawn or faked. Tilt DIRECTION walks the sources; tilt MAGNITUDE sets `c¬≤‚ąą[0.10,0.26]` (CFL-stable) ‚Üí faster waves, tighter figures, and opens the drone filter. **This is a true PDE, explicitly NOT the banned cortical-traveling-wave / log-polar `exp()` breathing-field** (README calls out the distinction). **See = hear weld:** one per-source energy scalar from the CPU shadow field drives BOTH that source's glow brightness AND its just-intonation organ-pipe loudness on both backends ‚ÄĒ the ripple you see is the amplitude envelope of the tone you hear; tilt‚Üí`c` opens the shared `startDroneBank` cutoff. **Named refs (README):** Ernst Chladni / cymatics, the 2D wave equation, and **TouchDesigner's POP (Point Operator) GPU point-based wavefield component libraries** (this cycle's ¬ß756 research ‚ÄĒ 17 wave equations √ó source shapes, audio-reactive, GPU points). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (tilt sensor + WebGPU/CPU wave-PDE solver + 48k-particle Chladni advection + JI-pipe/drone Web Audio = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above ¬∑ **#5-soft** (¬ß756 TD-POP-wavefield dive ‚ÄĒ this cycle's research‚Üíbuild chain, a conceptual trigger, NOT a <14-day paper; logged straight, 7th cycle running the psychedelic-AV <14-day hunt dry). **#1 NOT claimed** (WebGPU-compute 23√ó, tilt 74√ó, wave-equation lab-adjacent across the 1500-deep lab ‚ÄĒ the fresh axis is the surface√óinput√óphysical-PDE combination, honestly declared; grep-0√ó techniques are effectively exhausted). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primary(5√ó) ¬∑ GPU-render-primary(~10/15) ¬∑ cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field(1506‚Üí1516) ¬∑ pointer/touch-drag-SOLE(4√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-headline(4√ó warm) ¬∑ keyboard-input(3√ó-in-a-row 1516/1530/1536)] ¬∑ picked=[TILT INPUT (0√ó recent window, breaks the keyboard rut, not pointer-sole/not warm mic-camera) ¬∑ WebGPU-compute point-field OUTPUT (starving 1√ó, jury-blessed, NOT a hand-authored GPU RENDER but a compute sim; Canvas2D only the fallback) ¬∑ real-2D-wave-PDE/Chladni-cymatics TECHNIQUE (physically-emergent, explicitly NOT log-polar) ¬∑ geometric-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole INTENSE/KINETIC (a played standing-wave, rests the void)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live 2026-07-12 hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ source forcing <1 Hz, luminance drift ~0.35 Hz smooth, all under the 3-Hz ceiling; `prefersReducedMotion()` slows the sim + damps motion + halves dt. Audio gesture-gated (Start creates the ctx; iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission` gated behind Start with a `text-destructive` denial notice), master **‚Č§0.18** ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination, ‚Č§6 pipes + drone, full teardown (nodes stopped, `ctx.close()`, rAF cancelled, GPU resources destroyed, listeners removed). **Never blank/silent:** a seeded Lissajous idle auto-demo keeps the plate rippling from mount; keyboard + demo fully drive it with no tilt/motion permission. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGPU/Canvas2D + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; winner is clean across the full build (0 errors/0 warnings from 1554 ‚ÄĒ only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); plain `npm run build` compiled + linted + typechecked clean and died ONLY at "Collecting page data" on the container's standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative gate `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1554-wavefield-organ/page.js` emitted (**24.8 kB**) + `"/dream/1554-wavefield-organ"` in both `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no GPU/display/tilt/speakers): the real WebGPU path could only be checked by construction (the container has no `navigator.gpu`, so the Canvas2D fallback is what ran), and the felt tightness of the tilt‚Üífigure‚Üípipe weld, Chladni legibility, and loudness balance want Karel's phone; the CPU shadow + idle demo + deterministic PDE guarantee it's never blank/silent and renders coherently everywhere. Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1556-oto-room`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ audio-only Tartini/Amacher difference-tone room, "music generated inside your own ears"; the most *surprising* concept queued in weeks, de-selected only because the ghost tones are subtle without headphones at a phone-speaker glance) + **‚≠ź `1558-mirror-web`** (camera ‚Üí pure-SVG force-directed singing constellation √† la Rozin; de-selected because SVG + camera were both just used) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß756. ### [1542-flow-tracer](/dream/1542-flow-tracer) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **camera (hand-rolled dense optical-flow / normal-flow motion field, 64√ó36, no ML; seeded synthetic-field idle self-demo when camera denied)** / **Canvas2D (ping-pong dye-feedback)** ‚ÄĒ your body's motion smears the air into blooming LSD-tracers you can hear ¬∑ cycle 754 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: LSD-tracer / body-motion-smear ¬∑ pole: ecstatic/embodied/kinetic (a played bloom ‚ÄĒ rests the void)`
**What if your own body's motion, seen through the webcam, smeared the air into blooming LSD-style color tracers you can hear?** Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire on three DISTINCT inputs (camera / tilt / mic) chosen to **break the 3√ó-in-a-row keyboard rut** (1516/1530/1536). A dense **frame-difference / normal-flow motion field** is computed by hand from webcam pixels on a 64√ó36 grid (per-cell temporal brightness delta + spatial gradient ‚Üí `v = -I‚āú¬∑‚ąáI/|‚ąáI|¬≤`, the brightness-constancy constraint ‚ÄĒ no MediaPipe, no ML), and that field is the **sole controller**. It advects an iridescent-violet dye through a pure **Canvas2D ping-pong feedback trail** (previous frame re-drawn zoomed/rotated at <1 alpha = literal positive-afterimage tracer); wherever you move, color blooms and streaks along the motion vectors, with curl letting faint Kl√ľver spirals/lattices surface. **See = hear (tight, one event):** total motion energy ‚Üí grain density+brightness; horizontal motion centroid ‚Üí stereo pan; vertical centroid ‚Üí pitch (pentatonic-minor); a soft 3-osc drone bed means it's never silent. **Chosen over its two WIDE siblings** (all cleared the floor + dodged every hard ban): **most render-robust** ‚ÄĒ pure deterministic Canvas2D + a seeded synthetic drifting-field **idle self-demo means it runs fully even with NO camera** (the recurring "written-but-unrun" de-selector, vs sibling B's unrun WebGPU headline); **tightest see=hear**; **breaks the keyboard rut with a genuinely fresh axis** (raw optical-flow-as-a-played-*instrument*, not landmark tracking ‚ÄĒ the lab's other camera pieces are all MediaPipe pose/face/hands); **ecstatic/embodied** (jury-celebrated pole, and does NOT re-open the rested dissolution register). **Named refs (README):** LSD positive-afterimage "tracers"; Heinrich Kl√ľver's four form constants; Memo Akten optical-flow work; Bileam Tschepe (elekktronaut) feedback-trail aesthetic. **Ambition honest 2/5:** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (hand-rolled optical-flow estimator + Canvas2D ping-pong dye renderer + granular+drone Web Audio = 3) + #3 named refs above. #1 abstained (optical-flow lab-present ‚ÄĒ 10 files: 582/652/1160/545‚Ä¶; the fresh axis is the played-instrument interaction); #5 not claimed (¬ß754 dive found nothing <14-day, fourth cycle running ‚ÄĒ logged straight). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primary¬∑GPU-render-primary(~10/15)¬∑cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field-&-dissolution-void¬∑pointer-drag-SOLE¬∑keyboard-SOLE(3√ó-in-a-row)] ¬∑ picked=[CAMERA INPUT (breaks the keyboard rut; raw optical-flow not MediaPipe; not pointer-sole) ¬∑ Canvas2D dye-feedback OUTPUT (not banned ‚ÄĒ jury called Canvas2D healthy; distinct technique from recent Canvas2D winners 1536-datamosh/1516-Bayer-dither/1508-terrain) ¬∑ optical-flow-as-played-instrument TECHNIQUE ¬∑ iridescent-violet LSD-tracer PALETTE ¬∑ pole ECSTATIC/embodied (a played bloom, rests the void)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live hard ban. **Honest knocks:** **Canvas2D running warm** (4th Canvas2D winner in the last ~7 ‚ÄĒ a real diversity knock, offset by camera being the fresh cold-ish input + a distinct dye-feedback technique + Canvas2D not being banned); **aperture problem** ‚ÄĒ normal flow only recovers motion along the brightness gradient, so flat evenly-lit regions read still (reads gesture/edges well, not true dense Lucas-Kanade); **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no camera/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the felt tightness of the motion‚Üíbloom‚Üígrain weld and loudness balance want Karel's browser; idle self-demo + drone-from-Start guarantee never-blank/silent. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all luminance change is smooth trail decay well under 3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows drift + gentles the feedback. **Never blank/silent:** synthetic drifting motion field drives the same viz+audio under a `text-destructive` notice when the camera is denied. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Canvas2D + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint ‚Ä¶ --max-warnings 0` = 0 + `tsc --noEmit` = 0 in 1542; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1542-flow-tracer/page.js` emitted (**36 kB**) + `"/dream/1542-flow-tracer"` in `routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` dies only at "Collecting page data" on the container's ~700-route EMFILE fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, absent on Vercel). Winner of a WIDE fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1544-tilt-nebula`** (tilt‚ÜíWebGPU-compute 130k-grain curl-noise nebula + standalone Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ the WebGPU-ready bank is now 4 deep; ship on a verified-GPU night) + **‚≠ź `1546-om-tunnel`** (mic‚ÜíDOM/CSS-3D voice-propelled NDE tunnel; for a void-pole night) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß754. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1542-flow-tracer/README.md`.

### [1516-spiral-tide](/dream/1516-spiral-tide) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **keyboard attentional state/chirality flip (Space + ‚Üź/‚Üí; self-playing arc, NOT pointer-sole, NOT tilt)** / **Canvas2D (audio-reactive Bayer dither)** ‚ÄĒ a cortical traveling wave that morphs planar‚Üíconcentric‚Üíspiral, and you *hear the spiral spin* ¬∑ cycle 749 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: LSD breathing-field / spiral-wave vortex ¬∑ pole: intense/kinetic (rotating melt ‚ÄĒ rests the void)`
**Cycle 2 of `1506-theta-tide` ‚ÄĒ spin the breathing-field up into a real rotating spiral-wave vortex, and hear it turn.** A single **closed-form complex traveling wave** `Ōą(u,v,t)` in cortical (u,v) coords crossfades through the three propagation geometries that Das/Zabeh/Ermentrout/Jacobs (*Nature Communications 2026*) showed distinguish cognitive states in human cortex ‚ÄĒ **PLANAR** `exp(i(k(cosŌÜ¬∑u+sinŌÜ¬∑v)‚ąíŌČt))` ‚Üí **CONCENTRIC** `exp(i(k¬∑u‚ąíŌČt))` ‚Üí **SPIRAL** `exp(i(k¬∑u+m¬∑v‚ąíŌČt))` where integer **m** is a genuine **winding number** (sign = chirality; the `m¬∑v` term winds the phase around the origin ‚Üí a real log/Archimedean spiral under the `r=exp(u)` log-polar warp, **not** a texture spun by a matrix). Under the Bressloff‚ÄďCowan retino-cortical map each geometry reads out as a distinct **Kl√ľver form constant**. **The see==hear is exact/structural** ‚ÄĒ the *same* Ōą that lights each pixel is evaluated at fixed listening rings to fire inharmonic struck-bell clusters (`[1,2.13,3.71,5.94]`); in SPIRAL the bright point's angle `v*=‚ąí(k¬∑u+ŌČt)/m` **winds continuously**, so the bell pan sweeps L‚ÜĒR and you literally *hear the spiral spinning* ‚ÄĒ one Ōą, one `performance.now()` clock, one location, no GPU sim between eye and ear. **Render = pure Canvas2D** (jury-"fresh-again" 0√ó-primary; NOT three.js, NOT a fragment shader, NO GPU dependency ‚Üí renders anywhere with certainty): ~6.6k additive dots over a low-alpha clear (LSD colour-trails for free) quantized through an **audio-reactive Bayer 8√ó8 ordered dither** ‚ÄĒ the grain thickens with the sound (the render-technique anchor borrowed from **Robert Borghesi's ASTRODITHER**, webgpu.com **1 July 2026** ‚ÄĒ date-verified <14-day). **Attentional input:** Space/click advances the state; ‚Üź/‚Üí flip spiral chirality **and** wave direction (sign of m and ŌČ) with a matching `startShepard` glissando reversal; the ~6-min REBUS-drive arc self-plays (planar drift ‚Üí concentric breathing ‚Üí spiral melt ‚Üí settle; minute 6 ‚Č† minute 1). Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire (vs `1514-spiral-states`, the WebGPU-compute driven-Kuramoto-lattice sibling with 123k instanced quads + AnalyserNode-driven dither ‚Üí banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß749), chosen for the **exact structural see==hear** (the headline "hear the spiral turn" guaranteed by construction ‚ÄĒ the criterion that won 742/744/1492), the **lowest headless/production risk** (pure Canvas2D renders with certainty on Karel's phone/Safari, vs 1514's un-runnable-headless GPU look), and **Canvas2D diversity** (pairs the concept's cycle-2 on a different substrate than cycle-1's WebGPU). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ deliberate shot at the lab's first 5/5, honest 4/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (complex-wave field engine + state-morph/REBUS-arc machine + audio-reactive Bayer-dither Canvas2D renderer + spatialized inharmonic strike/drone/Shepard audio = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (Das/Zabeh/Ermentrout/Jacobs Nature Comms 2026 spiral/concentric/planar waves ¬∑ Bressloff‚ÄďCowan 2001 ¬∑ Kl√ľver form constants ¬∑ Borghesi ASTRODITHER) ¬∑ **#4** multi-cycle (literally the declared cycle-2 of 1506-theta-tide ‚ÄĒ genuine spiral + attentional flip) ¬∑ **#5** a **<14-day** finding (ASTRODITHER, verified 1 Jul, 11 days) cited alongside the rest ‚ÄĒ the exact **#4+#5-together** recipe the standing jury named as the whole gap between the 4-ceiling and a 5. **#1 abstained** (complex-wave / traveling-wave / dither are all lab-adjacent ‚ÄĒ traveling-wave in 1506/1121/1273, dither incidental in 1444/1478/1188) ‚ÄĒ the sole honest miss. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph(5√ó)¬∑WebGL2-frag/point-primary¬∑pointer-drag-SOLE¬∑ego-void-vibe¬∑Reich+JI¬∑device-tilt(rested)] ¬∑ picked=[KEYBOARD attentional-state-flip INPUT (not pointer-sole/not tilt) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT (fresh-again 0√ó-primary) ¬∑ complex-wave-morph + winding-number-spiral + audio-reactive-dither TECHNIQUE ¬∑ LSD-iridescent PALETTE ¬∑ pole INTENSE/KINETIC (builds a spiral, doesn't dissolve ‚ÄĒ jury #3 "rest the void")]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** effective rate ~0.7 Hz (well under the 3-Hz ceiling); spatial moving ring/spiral + slow hue drift (mean luminance ~constant, no strobe); dither animates <0.2 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` ‚Üí 0.4√ó + desaturate; gesture-gated AudioContext, master ‚Č§0.2 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`, ‚Č§14 voices, full teardown; never blank (idle drift before Begin) / never silent (drone from Begin). **Honest knocks:** the dither reads the field's smoothed gain *envelope*, not a post-mix AnalyserNode (genuinely audio-*coupled*, not an FFT of the bus ‚ÄĒ 1514 did the AnalyserNode version); a hard ‚Üź/‚Üí mash rebuilds the Shepard bed (can sound abrupt); **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no screen/speakers): the felt tightness of the sync, the spiral-spin pan, and the loudness balance across states want Karel's browser + headphones. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"`; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint ‚Ä¶ --max-warnings 0` = 0 + `tsc --noEmit` = 0 in 1516; plain `npm run build` linted + typechecked + compiled with 0 errors/0 warnings from 1516 (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), died only at "Collecting page data" on the container's ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative gate `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1516-spiral-tide/page.js` emitted (**26.6 kB**) + `"/dream/1516-spiral-tide"` in `routes-manifest.json`. Banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1514-spiral-states`** (the WebGPU-compute mechanism sibling ‚ÄĒ driven-Kuramoto lattice with a forced winding defect, 123k quads, real AnalyserNode-RMS dither; TOP ship-next for a WebGPU night, fix its 2 `dir` type-narrowings first) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß749. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1516-spiral-tide/README.md`.

### [1508-wolf-throat](/dream/1508-wolf-throat) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **microphone (voice fundamental, YIN; phantom self-singer fallback)** / **Canvas2D** ‚ÄĒ sing across a xenharmonic scale over a live sensory-dissonance terrain, and *hear* the wrongness you see ¬∑ cycle 748 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: microtonal/xenharmonic "wrongness" ¬∑ pole: ecstatic (warm)`
**Sing your way across a whole xenharmonic scale ‚ÄĒ and be gloriously *wrong* in it on purpose ‚ÄĒ while a live Plomp‚ÄďLevelt/Sethares roughness *terrain* ripples under your voice and the instrument sings the same consonance/dissonance back, so you HEAR exactly the wrongness you SEE.** This finally **cashes the standing 2026-07-11 JURY's provocation #6 verbatim** ‚ÄĒ "cash `1408-wolf-ring` into a full playable microtonal/xenharmonic instrument, a whole scale you can be *wrong* in, with the mic as controller" ‚ÄĒ and **revives the mic-as-controller lane** (jury flagged mic at 0√ó) on the **fresh-again Canvas2D-primary surface**. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (vs. a 524k-particle WebGPU curl-noise plasma-aurora and a zero-WebGL pure-CSS-3D form-constant kaleidoscope ‚Üí both banked to IDEAS ¬ß748), chosen for the **tightest see = hear unity** of the trio (the roughness you see is computed against the *same* reference spectrum the throat voice plays, so audible beating grows exactly where the on-screen ridge rises) + the **most conceptually distinct/surprising** direction + the **least headless-unverifiable** (it actually renders + deterministic audio, vs the other two's own explicitly-unverified GPU-look / CSS-aesthetic bets). **`pitch.ts` ‚ÄĒ hand-rolled YIN** fundamental tracker (difference function ‚Üí cumulative-mean-normalized difference ‚Üí threshold pick ‚Üí parabolic interpolation, no deps). **`tunings.ts` ‚ÄĒ 4 switchable tunings** (Bohlen‚ÄďPierce 13-ED-tritave, 19-EDO, sl√©ndro-flavoured, 5-limit just) + the **Plomp‚ÄďLevelt/Sethares sensory-dissonance model** implemented from scratch (`pairDissonance`/`complexRoughness`/`buildLandscape` ‚ÄĒ sum of pairwise partial-roughness of the sung complex tone against the held reference spectrum, folded to the tuning's period). **`audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ the instrument sings back:** a warm harmonic drone bed (the landscape's reference spectrum) + an additive gliding "throat" voice; master ramps from silence peaking **‚Č§0.22** ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; **mic ‚Üí AnalyserNode ONLY, never routed to `destination`** (no howl); full teardown (rAF cancel, audio stop, media-track stop, `AudioContext.close`, ResizeObserver disconnect). **`page.tsx`** owns a single rAF loop (pitch analysis + audio + Canvas2D terrain render): a warm ember-lit dissonance terrain with parallax echo layers, roughness-colored glowing ridges (gold‚Üíember‚Üíhot-magenta), pulsing degree landmarks, and a trailing cursor orb that blooms rings in consonance valleys and throws shards on roughness ridges. **Named refs (README):** William Sethares *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale*; Plomp & Levelt (1965) sensory-dissonance; Harry Partch *Genesis of a Music*; Bohlen‚ÄďPierce; and the explicit lineage from this lab's **1408-wolf-ring**. **Ambition 2‚Äď3/5 (honest ‚ÄĒ a WIDE explorer):** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (YIN pitch detection + xenharmonic tuning/roughness engine + additive throat+drone synth + Canvas2D terrain renderer = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above. **#1 abstained** (voice-pitch ‚Üí xenharmonic is lab-adjacent ‚ÄĒ the very-similar banked `1484-xeno-lattice` is a *tonnetz node lattice*; 1508 differs by being a *continuous roughness terrain you navigate* with the same-spectrum "hear the wrongness" payoff); **#5 NOT claimed** (¬ß748 dive anchor ‚ÄĒ the Dec-2025 WebGPU-critical-mass milestone ‚ÄĒ is ~7mo, not <14-day; logged straight, and it seeded the *banked* WebGPU explorer, not this winner). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph(5√ó last-10)¬∑WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary¬∑pointer/touch-drag-SOLE¬∑ego-dissolution/void-vibe¬∑Reich+consonant-JI-together¬∑device-tilt(~4√ó, rested)] ¬∑ picked=[MIC INPUT (revives the 0√ó sensor; NOT pointer-sole, NOT tilt) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT (fresh-again 0√ó-primary; NOT three.js, NOT a fragment shader) ¬∑ voice‚Üíxenharmonic-roughness-terrain TECHNIQUE ¬∑ warm-microtonal PALETTE ¬∑ pole ECSTATIC (a scale you can be *wrong* in ‚ÄĒ rests the void, jury #3)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the only global luminance change is a `SafeFlicker` breathe at ~0.08 Hz (floor 0.82); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows motion + damps it. **Never blank/silent:** the terrain self-animates on the splash before mic permission, and if the mic is denied a **phantom auto-singer** glides across the scale (driving the same synth) beneath a `text-destructive` notice, so it always sounds. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server, no network, no secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = **0 rewrites**; `eslint src/app/dream/1508-wolf-throat --max-warnings 0` = **0** + `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors in 1508; plain `npm run build` compiled + linted + typechecked with **0 errors/0 warnings from 1508** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings) and died ONLY at "Collecting page data" on the container's standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative gate completed via `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1508-wolf-throat/page.js` emitted (**28 kB**) + `"/dream/1508-wolf-throat"` in `routes-manifest.json`. **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless, no mic/headphones): YIN's octave-stability on a real sung vowel, glide-smoothing, and whether the beating "wrongness" reads as viscerally as intended want Karel's browser + headphones (speaker bleed can occasionally fool YIN ‚ÄĒ noted in README). Banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1510-plasma-wind`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ 524k-particle **WebGPU-compute** curl-noise ecstatic plasma-aurora + Canvas2D fallback; cashes the ¬ß748 WebGPU-ubiquity research + the jury's #1 substrate; "massively bigger") + **‚≠ź `1512-facet-fold`** (constraint-art ‚ÄĒ the lab's likely first *pure-DOM/CSS-3D, zero-WebGL* psychedelic piece; Kl√ľver form-constant kaleidoscope) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß748. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1508-wolf-throat/README.md`

### [1506-theta-tide](/dream/1506-theta-tide) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **self-playing ~7-min REBUS arc (pointer/keys nudge in cycle-2; NOT pointer-sole, NOT tilt)** / **WebGPU-compute oscillator lattice (+ CPU/Canvas2D fallback)** ‚ÄĒ psychedelic "breathing surfaces" rebuilt from their cortical mechanism ¬∑ cycle 747 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: LSD breathing-surfaces / traveling-wave ¬∑ pole: intense (breathing-melt, rests the void)`
**The LSD hallucination of *breathing surfaces*, rebuilt from its likely cortical mechanism instead of faked as a texture.** A ~5-Hz cortical **traveling wave** sweeps a lattice of **coupled phase oscillators** (a driven Kuramoto model) living in *cortical* (u,v) coordinates; the inverse **log-polar warp** (r = exp(u)) turns the cortical plane-wave into the classic expanding/contracting concentric "breathing tunnel" ‚ÄĒ and every wavefront that crosses a listening ring **rings an inharmonic struck-bell tone panned to its screen angle**, so *the visible wavefront IS the audible sweep*. A ~7-minute **REBUS / entropic-brain arc** raises coupling, noise and the number of interfering sources ‚ÄĒ one calm wave at the cosmic onset ‚Üí interfering wavefronts + spirals at the melt ‚Üí a gentle settle; minute 6 ‚Č† minute 1 (seeded, non-looping). **`sim.ts` ‚ÄĒ the driven-Kuramoto engine** (single source of truth for BOTH renderer and audio: `dőł/dt = K¬∑ő£sin(őł_neighbor‚ąíőł) + F¬∑ő£_s amp¬∑sin(őė_s‚ąíőł) + noise`, front-crossing `collectStrikes`). **Primary render = WebGPU compute** ‚ÄĒ a WGSL `@compute` ping-pong lattice drawn as ~123k instanced additive quads through the warp (jury provocation #1's wanted under-used substrate). **Mandatory fallback** runs the *same* lattice on CPU (92√ó62 ‚Čą 5.7k cells) via Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ never a full-screen fragment shader (banned this cycle), never blank, and audio is renderer-independent so it's never silent. **SAFETY:** 5 Hz is above the 3-Hz flicker ceiling, so the wave is a *spatial* moving ring + smooth local hue drift (mean luminance ~constant, no strobe), honestly slowed into the theta band (~1‚Äď1.8 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows + de-saturates. Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire (vs `1508-breathing-field`, a Canvas2D analytic-wavefield sibling ‚Üí banked), chosen for the more faithful mechanism (a real oscillator-lattice integration vs an analytic approximation) + cashing the WebGPU-compute substrate + being the bigger build. **Ambition honest 4/5:** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (driven-Kuramoto sim + WebGPU-compute lattice/Canvas2D fallback + REBUS arc state + wavefront‚Üíaudio engine) + #3 named refs (Comm.Biology 2026 5-Hz cortical-traveling-wave paper / Bressloff‚ÄďCowan 2001 / Kl√ľver form constants / Carhart-Harris REBUS / Kuramoto) + #4 multi-cycle commitment (declared cycles 1/2/3). #1 abstained (phase-oscillator/traveling-wave has lab adjacency ‚ÄĒ 1121, 1273); #5 NOT claimed (anchor ~6mo, not <14-day ‚ÄĒ logged straight). Honest knocks: see=hear tightest at onset, deliberately loosens into the melt (REBUS decoherence); NOT eye/ear-verified for feel (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/speakers); 5-Hz slowed to theta for safety. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1506-theta-tide/README.md`.
### [1502-sing-lattice](/dream/1502-sing-lattice) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **microphone (voice fundamental; click/keys fallback)** / **DOM/CSS-3D lattice** ‚ÄĒ sing into a Bohlen‚ÄďPierce xenharmonic scale that has no octave ¬∑ cycle 746 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: microtonal/xenharmonic disorientation ¬∑ pole: intense (warm)`
**Sing INTO a xenharmonic tuning lattice ‚ÄĒ instead of a piano's 12 tones, your voice wanders a strange, beautiful, deliberately-"wrong" scale where every node you land on lights up and rings the room sympathetically.** The lab's **first voice‚Üíxenharmonic-snap instrument** and the return of **mic input (0√ó for weeks ‚ÄĒ the jury's most-wanted under-used sensor)**. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (vs. a hand-tracking three.js aurora and a tilt/WebGPU particle torrent), chosen for **cashing the 2026-07-11 jury's named provocation #6 to the letter** ‚ÄĒ "cash 1408-wolf-ring into a full playable microtonal/xenharmonic instrument, a whole scale you can be *wrong* in, with the mic as controller" ‚ÄĒ on the most under-used INPUT (mic) and a jury-blessed under-used OUTPUT (DOM/CSS-3D), warm/intense (resting the 8√ó cosmic-void cluster). **`tuning.ts` ‚ÄĒ the xenharmonic engine:** the 13 just **"Lambda" Bohlen‚ÄďPierce** degrees (period = the **tritave 3:1 = 1901.955¬Ę**, NOT the octave; consonance is an *odd-harmonic* phenomenon, signature chord **3:5:7**, ratios factoring into powers of **3¬∑5¬∑7 only, no factor of 2**), each factored into primes and placed on a 2-D **Erv-Wilson harmonic lattice** (axis 5 horizontal, axis 7 depth) ‚ÄĒ verified numerically (all 13 ratios factor exactly to their `(a,b)` coords, cents ascending, 16 harmonic bonds), with tritave reduction + nearest-node snap (signed cents deviation) + register-matched play frequencies. **`audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ pitch detection + instrument:** real-time **autocorrelation via the McLeod NSDF** (`2¬∑ő£x[i]x[i+ŌĄ]/ő£(x[i]¬≤+x[i+ŌĄ]¬≤)` on `getFloatTimeDomainData`, first-strong-peak + parabolic interpolation + RMS/clarity gate ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT an FFT-bin peak, which octave-errors on a sung vowel); a glided **odd-harmonic** "snapped" voice (partials 1,3,5,7,9 ‚ÄĒ the native BP timbre); real **Karplus‚ÄďStrong** sympathetic strings (noise burst ‚Üí tuned delay loop w/ feedback lowpass) that also softly excite each struck node's **harmonic lattice neighbours** (the tarab strings answering ‚ÄĒ hold a few tones and the room blooms into a 3:5:7 chord); a generated **convolution-reverb room** ‚Üí limiter, master ‚Č§ 0.18; raw-mic `getUserMedia` (EC/NS/AGC off). **`page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ the DOM/CSS-3D lattice:** real `<button>`/`<div>` nodes in a `preserve-3d` perspective-tilted (50¬į) plane, popping in `translateZ` with an **amber‚Üíviolet** decaying per-node energy glow, transformed-div harmonic **bonds**, a live Hz/node-name/ratio/cents/clarity readout, and a small secondary canvas tracing your pitch against the lattice's cent-lines. **Named refs (README):** **Bohlen‚ÄďPierce** (Heinz Bohlen 1972 / John R. Pierce); **Erv Wilson's** tuning lattices; **Sevish's Scale Workshop** (browser xenharmonic tooling, active 2026); this lab's own **1408-wolf-ring** ‚ÄĒ extended from a single playable "wrong" fifth to an entire scale you sing *inside*. **Ambition 3/5 (honest ‚ÄĒ a WIDE explorer):** **#1** technique never used in the lab (voice‚Üíxenharmonic-snap onto a non-octave lattice; `bohlen`/`xenharmonic`/`tuning-lattice` grep-thin ‚ÄĒ prior tritave piece 276 was kids-tap, not voice-driven) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (NSDF pitch-detection + BP xenharmonic tuning engine + Karplus‚ÄďStrong sympathetic synth + DOM/CSS-3D render = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above. **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(9√ó)¬∑pointer/touch-drag-sole(10√ó)¬∑ego-dissolution/void-tunnel-vibe(4√ó)¬∑Reich-phasing+consonant-JI-together] ¬∑ picked=[MIC INPUT (0√ó for weeks ‚ÄĒ the rarest sensor; NOT pointer, NOT camera) ¬∑ DOM/CSS-3D OUTPUT (jury-blessed, under-used, NOT a fragment shader) ¬∑ voice‚Üíxenharmonic-snap TECHNIQUE (grep-fresh) ¬∑ warm amber‚Üíviolet PALETTE ¬∑ pole INTENSE/warm (a scale you can be *wrong* in, NOT dissolving-void)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** all node/room motion is smooth exponential decay (no strobe); `prefers-reduced-motion` shortens the energy tails; nothing flickers near the photosensitive band. **Never blank/silent:** if the mic is denied/unavailable a `text-destructive` notice shows AND click + keyboard (`1-9 0 q w e` ‚Üí steps 0‚Äď12) trigger the same lattice so it always sounds. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + React/CSS; no server, no network, no secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** plain `npm run build` compiled + linted + typechecked with **0 errors** from 1502 (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings) and died ONLY at "Collecting page data" on the container's standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (hard limit 4096, unraisable ‚ÄĒ infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative gate completed via `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = route built, `.next/server/app/dream/1502-sing-lattice/page.js` emitted (**34 kB**) + `"/dream/1502-sing-lattice"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1502-sing-lattice --max-warnings 0` = **0** (removed one unused disable-directive); normalizer = 1 rewrite; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`. **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless, no mic/headphones): the NSDF's octave-stability on a real sung vowel and whether the sympathetic 3:5:7 bloom is audibly gorgeous want Karel's browser + headphones (reverb leaks into the mic without them, by design). Banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1500-aurora-hands`** (TOP ship-next camera-slot ‚ÄĒ conduct a two-voice aurora with MediaPipe hand-tracking ‚Üí three.js ribbons + additive/FM; MiMu-gloves spirit) + **‚≠ź `1504-solar-wind`** (tilt-steered **WebGPU-compute** 200k-particle curl-noise torrent that sonifies its own flow; Bridson SIGGRAPH 2007) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß746. ### [1492-pulsar-clock](/dream/1492-pulsar-clock) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **key+tilt flight (arrow/WASD + device-orientation; self-drifting, NOT pointer-sole)** / **three.js scene-graph** ‚ÄĒ real neutron-star sky + HRTF-spatialised polyrhythm (readable WebGL notice fallback) ¬∑ cycle 745 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: cosmic vastness / deep-space listening ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (building)`
**The night sky as a clock you can HEAR ‚ÄĒ fifteen real neutron stars, each ticking at its true measured rotation period, spatialised where it actually hangs, forming a vast slowly-phasing polyrhythm.** The lab's **first pulsar sonification** (`pulsar` grep-**0√ó** as a dedicated prototype) and a piece in the under-used **external-real-data** lane. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, chosen for the biggest/most-surprising concept + the tightest **see = hear** unity (every visible beam sweep *is* its audible tick) + cashing the jury's #1 wanted surface (**three.js scene-graph**, off the banned fragment shader). **`catalog.ts`** embeds a real pulsar catalog whose sky positions are **decoded straight from each pulsar's designation** (PSR B1919+21 ‚Üí RA 19h19m / Dec +21¬į; the Crab B0531+21; Vela B0833‚ąí45 low in the south) + a `mulberry32`-seeded set of deterministic fill-ins (~15 total), and a `classify()` **period ‚Üí audio-behaviour** mapper. **`audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ sonified by the real period:** millisecond pulsars (B1937+21 1.558 ms ‚Üí ~642 Hz, B1957+20 ‚Üí ~622 Hz beating ~20 Hz against it, J0437‚ąí4715 ‚Üí ~174 Hz, Crab 33.5 ms ‚Üí ~30 Hz) fuse into a continuous **PITCHED beating chord**; second-scale pulsars (Vela ~11/s, Geminga, B0329+54, **Bell Burnell's B1919+21** at its real 1.337 s) fire discrete **woodblock clicks**; **J0901‚ąí4046 (75.9 s)** tolls once like a cathedral **bell** ‚ÄĒ each on its own **HRTF `PannerNode`** fixed at its sky position, over a JI perfect-fifth **drone bed** (shared `droneBank`) whose `drive` rises as more pulsars fall into earshot, blooming into the shared `convolutionVoid` reverb; a **lookahead scheduler** keeps the real periods phase-accurate; `AudioContext` born on the Start gesture, master **ramped 0‚Üí‚Č§0.22** through a `DynamicsCompressor`, concurrent voices capped ‚Č§14 (4 pitched + 4 drone + ‚Č§6 ticks). **`scene.ts` ‚ÄĒ genuine three.js scene-graph** (NOT a fragment shader): Milky-Way-biased starfield + per-pulsar core/halo/double **sweeping lighthouse beam** with clamped visual spin + smooth per-tick glow envelopes; deep indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üícold-white X-ray/radio-telescope palette. **`flight.ts`:** arrow/WASD + device-tilt camera with a self-drift baseline, clamped inside the sphere ‚ÄĒ **fully self-plays** (flying only changes what is near and loud). **Named refs (README):** **Jocelyn Bell Burnell's 1967 discovery** (the "scruff"/LGM-1 signal, PSR B1919+21) ¬∑ **NASA/Chandra "A Universe of Sound"** pulsar sonifications (Crab, Vela cross-mapping) ¬∑ **Ryoji Ikeda _supersymmetry_** (X-ray/data-scan aesthetic). **Ambition 2/5 (honest ‚ÄĒ a WIDE explorer, not a 5/5 shot):** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (embedded real-data catalog + period-mapper ¬∑ lookahead polyrhythmic Web-Audio scheduler w/ per-pulsar HRTF + JI drone ¬∑ three.js scene-graph sky w/ sweeping beams ¬∑ key/tilt flight camera) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above. **#5 abstained honestly** ‚ÄĒ the ¬ß745 dive's strict <14-day hunt came up short (see RESEARCH ¬ß745), so no <14-day citation is claimed. **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(6√ó last-10)¬∑pointer-drag-sole(‚Č•4√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[key+tilt-flight INPUT (breaks the pointer-drag rut; NOT sole-pointer) ¬∑ three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (the jury's wanted anti-fragment surface) ¬∑ real-pulsar-period polyrhythmic-sonification TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ X-ray indigo‚Üíviolet PALETTE ¬∑ pole cosmic-ambient BUILDING (structured/accreting, not dissolving-void)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the fastest pulsars' visual spin is clamped (evocative, not literal 642 rev/s), beam brightness is a smooth glow envelope on small local objects, `prefers-reduced-motion` softens drift + pulses. **Never blank/silent:** the sky drifts + beams sweep on load before any audio; Start begins the self-ticking cosmos; `text-destructive` WebGL notice if unavailable. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; no server, no secret, no network ‚ÄĒ catalog embedded, not fetched; `three` already a dep ‚ÄĒ zero new npm deps). **Validation:** plain `npm run build` **compiled + linted + typechecked with 0 errors** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + `1085-lightning-organ` warnings, none in 1492) and died ONLY at "Collecting page data" on the container's standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative gate completed via `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = route built, `.next/server/app/dream/1492-pulsar-clock/page.js` emitted (**35.5 kB**) + `"/dream/1492-pulsar-clock"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1492-pulsar-clock --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors in 1492; normalizer = 0 rewrites; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/headphones): HRTF spatialisation convincingness + whether the emergent phase-**alignment** moments are audibly striking want Karel's browser; the self-drifting sweeping sky guarantees never-blank/silent. Banked **‚≠ź `1496-escher-fall`** (TOP ship-next for an **INTENSE** night ‚ÄĒ fall forever into a real Poincar√©-disk **{6,4} hyperbolic tessellation** navigated by M√∂bius translation, married to a descending Shepard‚ÄďRisset glissando + ring-crossing Phrygian-dominant arpeggio, all **Canvas2D** vector; the jury-wanted non-void intensity on the fresh-again Canvas2D-primary surface) + **‚≠ź `1494-tarab-room`** (**mic** returns to the lab ‚ÄĒ find a room's hidden JI chord with your voice, waking **sympathetic strings** through their 2f/3f harmonics on a **DOM/CSS-3D** rack; Lucier/tarab/Helmholtz; ghost-singer self-play fallback) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß745.
