### [1490-slow-cathedral](/dream/1490-slow-cathedral) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **device-orientation / tilt (+ pointer / arrow-keys; full self-play)** / **three.js scene-graph** ‚ÄĒ incremental LineSegments/Points/Sprite growth (readable WebGL/tilt notices) ¬∑ cycle 744 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: meditative time-dilation / the eternal present ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (ascending/building, not dissolving)`
**A cathedral of light that builds itself, strut by strut, over ten minutes ‚ÄĒ a sparse sapling at minute one, a towering vault of thousands of struts by minute ten, and a topologically different structure at every moment in between.** The DEEP fire's concept was **"THE LONG NOW" ‚ÄĒ meditative time-dilation as a genuinely long-form, self-evolving cosmos that is measurably different at minute 10 than minute 1**, attacked via two generative mechanisms (this **space-colonization GROWTH** vs. an **ACCRETION** shell-cosmos); this won for the tightest **see = hear** unity + the most legible/photogenic min-1-vs-min-10 arc. **`growth.ts`** is a **space-colonization state machine with accumulating memory** (seeded `mulberry32`, uniform spatial-hash grid, wall-clock-paced `catchUp(progress)`, per-frame iteration cap): 9 roots climb toward a ~1,950-point gothic attractor cloud (flared base ¬∑ 8 ribbed pillars w/ angular-quantised mandala symmetry ¬∑ arched vault ¬∑ tapering spire), each reached attractor *consumed* and firing a growth event; the node list only ever **grows** ‚ÄĒ genuine memory, not a loop. **`scene.ts`** is a real **three.js scene-graph** (NOT a fragment shader, NOT Canvas2D): struts as one incremental `THREE.LineSegments` with additive vertex colours, junctions as `THREE.Points` glow, fresh tips blooming via pooled additive `THREE.Sprite` flares, appended into pre-allocated dynamic buffers as nodes accrete; palette **ascends with height** (deep-indigo foundations ‚Üí violet nave ‚Üí gold/white cathedral-glass spire) under a slowly orbiting/rising/dollying camera. **`audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ what you SEE growing is what you HEAR:** every growth event rings a soft **inharmonic bell** (fundamental + metallic partials) **pitched by the event's height** on a JI pentatonic ladder and **panned by its x** (low struts low, spire like high glass), beneath a JI **drone bed** (shared `droneBank`) whose lowpass opens as the structure fills; `AudioContext` born on the Start gesture, master **ramped 0‚Üí‚Č§0.2** through a `DynamicsCompressor`, ‚Č§14 bell voices, full teardown. **Idle preview vs real:** on load the cathedral is already growing at a 32√ó compressed timescale (regrows on a silent loop) so a 20-s glance sees it rise; **Begin** resets to the sapling and runs the full 600-s build with audio. **Input:** device-tilt steers the gaze (iOS `requestPermission` from Start, silent pointer fallback); pointer-move + arrow-keys on desktop; **fully self-plays** ‚ÄĒ tilt is only parallax. **Named refs (README):** **Runions, Lane & Prusinkiewicz, _"Modeling and visualization of leaf venation patterns"_ (2005)** space-colonization + **Lindenmayer L-systems (1968)** ¬∑ **Terry Riley _In C_** (slow structural accretion) ¬∑ **√Čliane Radigue** (hour-long ARP drones) ¬∑ **La Monte Young _Dream House_** ¬∑ the **Buddhist _kalpa_**. **Research anchor (¬ß744, <14-day):** **arXiv 2606.29427** *"Entropic Time, Psychophysics, and Deformed Neural Dynamics"* (2026-06-28) ‚ÄĒ subjective time tracks **entropy-production rate** (dŌĄ/dt), a thermodynamic basis for psychedelic time-dilation (REBUS); the piece implements this as a **design law** ‚ÄĒ its branch/voice cadence *accelerates* over the arc so the later minutes should feel *longer/timeless*. **Ambition 4/5 (the lab's first attempt assembling #4 AND #5 ‚ÄĒ the jury's named path to a first 5/5):** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (space-colonization growth w/ memory + incremental three.js scene-graph + event-driven bell/drone; + tilt/pointer/keys) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above ¬∑ **#4** declared **multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 2 = subtree-weighted tapered tubes + closed gothic vaults + voice-leading + bloom pass; cycle 3 = post-build "consecration" settle + bidirectional see‚ÜĒhear coupling) ¬∑ **#5** today's ¬ß744 dive (arXiv 2606.29427, <14-day, implemented as the accelerating-cadence design law). **#1 abstained** (growth/branching has lab adjacency ‚ÄĒ `1050-mycelial-grow`/`408`/`146`/`872`). **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(6√ó last-10)¬∑pointer-drag-sole(‚Č•4√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[device-tilt INPUT (breaks pointer-drag rut) ¬∑ three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (off the banned fragment shader) ¬∑ space-colonization generative-growth + long-form-stateful TECHNIQUE ¬∑ indigo‚Üígold cathedral-glass PALETTE ¬∑ pole cosmic-ambient ASCENDING/BUILDING (rests the jury-flagged void ‚ÄĒ only 2√ó / not a hard ban this window ‚ÄĒ by accreting, the opposite of dissolving)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live hard ban. **Honest knocks:** leans a **JI/consonant pitch spine** (bells + drone) ‚ÄĒ the lab's long-fought monoculture, though NOT paired with Reich phasing so it dodges the *hard* ban (cycle-2 should add the "sound wrong" dimension, jury #6); visuals are still a glowing graph, not yet load-bearing gothic stone (declared next-cycle). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the only global luminance change is a ‚Čą0.045 Hz swell; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows all motion + damps it. **Never blank/silent:** the idle regrowing preview + full self-play + `text-rose-300` WebGL/tilt notices. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; `three` already a dep ‚ÄĒ zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1490-slow-cathedral/page.js` emitted (**24.9 kB**) + `"/dream/1490-slow-cathedral"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1490-slow-cathedral --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors in 1490**; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic. (Plain `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at "Collecting page data" on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~700 routes ‚ÄĒ infra not code, absent on Vercel; the builder additionally ran a headless growth sim: deterministic to full height, 99.6% attractors consumed, no stalls.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers): the felt pacing of the real 1√ó 10-min arc vs the 32√ó preview, bell-mix warmth, and cathedral legibility want Karel's browser. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **‚≠ź `1488-the-long-now`** (the same time-dilation concept as an **ACCRETION cosmos** ‚ÄĒ richer arc state-machine w/ non-repeating JI modulation + 72-shell memory; **its cycle-2 plan wires Karel's real _Path_ piano as an onset-seeding carrier** ‚ÄĒ the cleanest resurrect for a night wanting his real music) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß744. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1490-slow-cathedral/README.md`

### [1482-face-mandala](/dream/1482-face-mandala) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **front camera + MediaPipe FaceLandmarker v2 blendshapes** / **three.js scene-graph** ‚ÄĒ 5 nested InstancedMesh petal tiers (LFO self-demo fallback) ¬∑ cycle 743 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: psilocybin affect-coupling ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Your own face conducts a living psychedelic mandala ‚ÄĒ open your jaw and it blooms, smile and it turns gold, raise your brows for another tier, tilt your head to spin it in 3D.** The lab's **first face-blendshape input** (grep-**0√ó**) ‚ÄĒ cashes the 2026-07-11 JURY's single most-emphasized *standing* provocation (**#2** ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe FaceLandmarker, "sat three days, nothing built it," the exact embodied ML sensor to break the **pointer-drag rut** (10/15)) and this cycle's research chain (¬ß704/¬ß743, <14-day). The front camera feeds **MediaPipe FaceLandmarker v2** (`face.ts`, loaded at runtime from a CDN via a non-static `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ ‚Ä¶)` ‚ÄĒ **not** an npm dep, typed `any`), which returns 52 ARKit-style **blendshape** coefficients + a `facialTransformationMatrixes` head-pose matrix every frame, entirely in the browser. Those coefficients bend **both geometry and an affect-coupled synth**: `jawOpen` ‚Üí mandala blooms outward + opens the drone lowpass/level ¬∑ `mouthSmile` ‚Üí warm gold saturation + upper partials ¬∑ `browInnerUp` ‚Üí an upper petal tier + a lifted partial ¬∑ `browDown` (frown) ‚Üí contracts + darkens ¬∑ `eyeBlink` ‚Üí throttled pulse + a **bell strike** ¬∑ `mouthPucker` ‚Üí tightens the kaleidoscope (fewer, sharper petals) ¬∑ head yaw/pitch/roll ‚Üí rotates/tilts the whole mandala in 3D. **OUTPUT = genuine three.js scene-graph** (`mandala.ts`, the jury's wanted anti-fragment surface ‚ÄĒ **not** a full-screen shader): five tiers of `InstancedMesh` diamond petals with **N-fold rotational symmetry**, additive glow over a violet void + a pulsing gold core; the N-fold petal rings are **Kl√ľver form-constant / Bressloff‚ÄďCowan cortical (log-polar) symmetry** made an instrument. **AUDIO** (`audio.ts`): an affect-coupled overtone drone (lowpass opened by jawOpen, partials lifted by smile/brow) + pooled FM bell strikes; master **0‚Üí0.2** into a `DynamicsCompressor`, ‚Č§14 voices (6 drone osc + ‚Č§12 pooled bells, stolen oldest-first), click-free envelopes, full teardown (osc stop + AudioContext close + `cancelAnimationFrame` + three.js `dispose()` + media-track stop). **When the face is neutral or absent, a slow autonomous breathing keeps the mandala alive and singing.** **Named refs (README):** MediaPipe FaceLandmarker v2 (Google, 2024‚Äď2025) ¬∑ Kl√ľver's four form constants + Bressloff‚ÄďCowan retino-cortical map ¬∑ psilocybin **affect-coupling** (Carhart-Harris entropic-brain / REBUS ‚ÄĒ imagery shifts with emotional state, here delivered literally by coupling live facial affect to the form). **Ambition 3/5:** **#1** face-blendshape input (grep-0√ó) driving a three.js instanced mandala ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (front camera + ML face-landmark inference + three.js `InstancedMesh` scene-graph + affect-coupled Web Audio) ¬∑ **#5** browser-native MediaPipe FaceLandmarker blendshapes as affect input (¬ß704 2026-07-08 / ¬ß743 <14-day). **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(jury 9√ó)¬∑pointer-drag-sole(jury 10√ó)¬∑ego-dissolution/void-vibe(jury 4√ó)¬∑Reich+JI-together] ¬∑ picked=[camera+FaceLandmarker INPUT (breaks the 10/15 pointer-drag rut with real ML tracking, not pixels) ¬∑ three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (off the banned 9√ó fragment shader) ¬∑ face-affect‚Üíform-constant-mandala TECHNIQUE ¬∑ neon-jeweled PALETTE ¬∑ pole INTENSE (rests the banned void)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the only luminance modulation is a soft opt-in `SafeFlicker` breathing drift ‚Č§3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` disables it + gentles every swing. **Never blank/silent:** every stage (`getUserMedia` / CDN import / landmarker create / detect / audio) is `try/catch`-wrapped ‚Üí any failure drops to a **`text-rose-300` notice + LFO self-demo** that drives the same blendshape values so the mandala always blooms + sings (this is what renders if the CDN/camera is blocked at review). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio + camera; `three` already a dep ‚ÄĒ zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1482-face-mandala/page.js` emitted (**32.9 kB**) + `"/dream/1482-face-mandala"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `eslint src/app/dream/1482-face-mandala --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`. (Plain `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at "Collecting page data" on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across 700 routes ‚ÄĒ infra not code, absent on Vercel; compile-mode runs the identical TS+ESLint+compile gates Vercel enforces.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no camera/GPU/display/speakers): the live MediaPipe blendshape path (CDN model load, head-pose decomposition, tracking quality) + the mandala bloom/warmth + bell mix want Karel's browser+camera; the LFO self-demo + drone-from-Start guarantee never-blank/silent. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (camera-face mandala vs mic-voice Bohlen‚ÄďPierce lattice vs NOAA-data aurora); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1484-xeno-lattice`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ sing through a **Bohlen‚ÄďPierce** non-octave harmonic lattice on Canvas2D, mic voice-pitch, unit-tested `pitch.ts`; cashes JURY #6 + returns the mic-0√ó input) + **‚≠ź `1486-solar-choir`** (live **NOAA space-weather** sonification ‚Üí three.js aurora choir; the lab's likely first real external-API sonification) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß743. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1482-face-mandala/README.md`

### [1478-sema-ascent](/dream/1478-sema-ascent) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **device-orientation / tilt (+ tap-surge; pointer+Space desktop fallback)** / **three.js scene-graph** ‚ÄĒ 9 nested InstancedMesh shells (readable WebGL notice fallback) ¬∑ cycle 742 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: ecstatic whirling trance / Sufi sema ¬∑ pole: intense (ascent, not dissolution)`
**Enter a drug-free whirling trance built as a six-minute climb ‚ÄĒ nested rings of light spin at locked polyrhythmic ratios, accelerate, phase-lock into a white-hot Fana peak, then set you gently down.** The DEEP fire's concept was **"SEMA / THE ASCENT" ‚ÄĒ ecstatic Sufi-whirling trance as a long-form, self-evolving polyrhythmic climb**, attacked via two approaches (this nested-ring *mechanism* vs. an emergent particle-vortex); this won for cashing the research most literally + a fresher visual form + tighter AV unity. **One shared `Conductor` (`arc.ts`) drives both the render and the audio** ‚ÄĒ 9 concentric shells rotate at a **2:3:4:5:6:7:8:9:11 polyrhythm**, and every gliding **inharmonic bell** (1:2.76 partials, panned per shell) is *fired by a shell's rotation crossing a phase gate* on that same conductor, so what you see spinning IS what you hear pulsing ‚ÄĒ the **rhythmic-entrainment** thesis made playable. **`evalArc` is a genuinely stateful ~6-min, non-repeating five-movement arc** (Invocation ‚Üí Gathering ‚Üí Acceleration ‚Üí Fana/the-lock ‚Üí Descent/embers) with a decaying **trance-energy memory** term (so each run diverges and minute 6 = sparse amber embers is unmistakably unlike minute 1 = one slow ring); on completion it loops gently back to Invocation (cycle counter in the HUD), never a dead screen. **three.js scene-graph** (`scene.ts`): 9 nested InstancedMesh shells of flame-shard petals + additive halos stacked/tilted like a gyroscope of light, a camera-facing white-hot core `Sprite`, **additive emissive glow (no post-processing)** for the bloom-like peak; tilt leans the whole whirl group. **Continuous inharmonic** drone + shimmer + gate-fired bells (`audio.ts`), master chain sources ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí gain **ramped from silence** (peak 0.2) ‚Üí out, ‚Č§14 voices, full teardown. **Input:** `DeviceOrientationEvent` tilt (iOS `requestPermission()` from the Begin gesture) leans the whirl axis; tap/click/Space = a trance surge; desktop falls back to pointer-lean + Space, and the arc **fully self-plays** with no input. **Named refs (README):** the **Mevlevi Order / whirling dervishes** and the *sema* ceremony (rotation toward *fana*) ¬∑ **Gilbert Rouget, _Music and Trance_ (1985)** ¬∑ **Aparicio-Terr√©s et al., _Annals NYAS_ (2025)** on rhythmic-sound-induced altered states ¬∑ current-activity anchor **ASTRODITHER (R. Borghesi, three.js WebGPU/TSL audio-reactive, 2026-07-01)**. **Ambition 4/5:** **#2** ‚Č•5 subsystems (tilt input + polyrhythmic phase-gate conductor + nested-shell three.js scene + long-form state machine w/ memory + inharmonic percussion/drone synthesis) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above ¬∑ **#4** declared **multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 1 = whirl + arc; next = literal petal-grid phase-lock snap + spatialised ambisonic bells + the Fana bloom pass) ¬∑ **#5** today's ¬ß742 research dive (rhythmic-trance/entrainment neuroscience + the ASTRODITHER three.js-scene-graph momentum) ‚Üí this build. **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(jury 9√ó)¬∑pointer-drag-sole(jury 10√ó)¬∑ego-dissolution/void-vibe(jury 4√ó)¬∑Reich+JI-together] ¬∑ picked=[device-tilt INPUT (breaks the pointer-drag rut) ¬∑ three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (the jury's wanted anti-fragment surface, not the 9√ó fragment shader) ¬∑ nested-polyrhythmic-whirl + long-form-stateful TECHNIQUE ¬∑ continuous inharmonic pitch (no JI scale-index, no Reich) ¬∑ devotional-gold‚Üíwhite-hot PALETTE ¬∑ pole INTENSE/ecstatic-ASCENT (rests the banned void)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** the white-hot Fana peak is a smooth gaussian swell-and-fade (not a strobe); `prefers-reduced-motion` damps rotation speeds + suppresses the flare. **Never blank/silent:** idle dim auto-preview whirl before Begin; self-playing arc after. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; `three` already a dep ‚ÄĒ zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1478-sema-ascent/page.js` emitted (**35.3 kB**) + `"/dream/1478-sema-ascent"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1478-sema-ascent --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/speakers): the peak's visual polish + the phase-lock legibility want Karel's browser (README flags this ‚ÄĒ the lock currently reads via shared velocity + color flare, not yet a literal petal-grid snap). Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **‚≠ź `1480-vortex-sama`** (the same sema-ascent concept as an emergent **26k-instance GPU particle vortex** ‚ÄĒ curl/swirl velocity field pulling additive shards into a rising white-hot column that sings from its own collective spin/lift/compactness; love-adjacent to the loved particle cluster; **resurrect knob:** move the per-frame CPU matrix/colour writes to a GPU velocity field / compute path, then ship on a night wanting particle spectacle) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß742. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1478-sema-ascent/README.md`

### [1476-dark-choir](/dream/1476-dark-choir) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **microphone (voice / hum / breath)** / **audio-first ¬∑ near-black breathing halo** (synthetic self-play fallback) ¬∑ cycle 741 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: meditative-boundless / ecstatic ascent (jhńĀna + Shepard endless-rise) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (ascending, not dissolving)`
**Sing or hum into the dark and the dark sings back ‚ÄĒ an endlessly, ecstatically rising choir of your own voice that never stops climbing.** The lab's deliberate **"test the screen bias"** piece ‚ÄĒ the jury's explicitly-flagged *best* unspent surface (audio-only / no-screen, grep-**0√ó** as a primary stance) crossed with the named **mic-0√ó input** (mic-as-controller had evaporated to 0√ó in the recent window). **Audio is the primary medium; the screen is intentionally near-black** ‚ÄĒ a single soft violet-warm halo (`halo.ts`) that breathes with your voice (size/brightness track the choir glow, ‚Č§0.08 Hz drift, no flicker, never fully dark), meant for headphones + eyes closed. **Voice = the controller** (`mic.ts`, a pure measurement tap ‚ÄĒ never routed to output, nothing recorded/sent): per frame it extracts **loudness** (auto-ranged RMS) + **fundamental pitch** (autocorrelation + parabolic interpolation, held across unvoiced gaps). **Core technique ‚ÄĒ a Shepard/Risset endless-glissando choir** (`audio.ts`): the shared `startShepard` bed (5 octave-spaced sine partials under a fixed Gaussian window) is always gliding upward with your loudness as its `drive`; each sung note **spawns an orbiting choir voice** pitched to your fundamental (folded into ~110‚Äď440 Hz) that glides up **~2.6 octaves** over an ~11 s life under a Gaussian amplitude window ‚ÄĒ the Shepard illusion applied *per voice*, so new voices bloom in below as old ones fade out above and the choir climbs **forever**, each spatialised on a slow **HRTF `PannerNode` orbit** circling the head; a shared `startDroneBank` (root + fifth) is the **firm ground** and everything sings into the shared `createVoidReverb` cathedral/cistern tail (~5.5 s). **Ascent, not dissolution** ‚ÄĒ the JI drone stays firm ground and voices keep *lifting* rather than thinning into a void, the deliberate opposite of the jury-banned ego-dissolution/void-tunnel vibe. **Named refs (README):** Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* ¬∑ La Monte Young *Dream House* ¬∑ Roger Shepard (1964) / Jean-Claude Risset endless glissando ¬∑ jhńĀna "oceanic boundlessness." **Ambition 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic loudness+pitch analysis + Shepard endless-rise bed + orbiting HRTF choir + JI drone ground + convolution void + breathing halo) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above ¬∑ **#5** today's ¬ß741 research dive (three.js/audio-reactive 2026 activity + the screen-bias "best surface" jury call) ‚Üí this build. **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(jury 9√ó)¬∑pointer-drag-sole(jury 10√ó)¬∑void/dissolution-vibe(jury 4√ó)¬∑Reich+JI-together¬∑Canvas2D¬∑SVG¬∑three.js¬∑DOM/CSS-3D¬∑JI-scale-index¬∑camera] ¬∑ picked=[microphone/voice INPUT (mic was 0√ó in the recent window ‚ÄĒ the jury's named fresh sensor) ¬∑ audio-first/near-black-halo OUTPUT (the jury's explicitly-"best" 0√ó surface ‚ÄĒ "test the screen bias") ¬∑ Shepard/Risset endless-glissando-choir TECHNIQUE ¬∑ continuous voice-tracked pitch (no melodic scale-index; JI only as a static drone ground) ¬∑ dark-luminous ascent PALETTE ¬∑ pole COSMIC-AMBIENT but engineered as buoyant ascent, NOT the banned void]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live surface/input/vibe ban (honest knock: cosmic-ambient pole is 8√ó over-represented, mitigated by the ascent framing + the audio-first stance making "pole look" moot). **SAFETY:** inherently low-stimulation ‚ÄĒ near-black field, ‚Č§3 Hz luminance drift, no flicker/strobe; `prefers-reduced-motion` disables positional drift (brightness breath remains). **Never blank/silent:** no mic ‚Üí readable `text-rose-300` line **+ synthetic self-play** (a slow pentatonic hum sings the choir to itself); the halo always breathes. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ Web Audio + shared psych infra only). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1476-dark-choir/page.js` emitted (**39.9 kB**) + `"/dream/1476-dark-choir"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1476-dark-choir --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 winner errors; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic; imports only from `../_shared/`. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no mic/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the HRTF orbit convincingness + pitch-tracking robustness on real voices want Karel's browser (README flags both); synthetic self-play + always-breathing halo guarantee never-blank/silent. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (audio-first mic-choir vs three.js tilt-mandala vs DOM/CSS-3D MIDI build-and-drop); banked **‚≠ź `1472-whirl-mandala`** (Sufi-whirl kinetic mandala ‚ÄĒ nested polyrhythmic phase-locked rotation on a **three.js scene-graph**, tilt+tap, INTENSE; TOP ship-next for an ecstatic/three.js night ‚ÄĒ strip its JI partials ‚Üí continuous inharmonic to clear the scale-index mark) + **‚≠ź `1474-rapture-organ`** (a rave/gospel **build-and-drop** cathedral on **DOM/CSS-3D**, MIDI/keyboard, INTENSE, equal-tempered ‚ÄĒ cleanest on the pitch bans; ship once a build-and-drop is diverse-again, i.e. not right after `1470`) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß741. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1476-dark-choir/README.md`

### [1470-the-drop](/dream/1470-the-drop) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **pointer-pour + seismic-shock (Space) + device-tilt** / **three.js instanced-column terrain** (rose-notice fallback) ¬∑ cycle 740 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: self-organized criticality / EDM build-and-drop ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Play self-organized criticality as an instrument: grains rain onto a molten landscape, slopes steepen invisibly to the critical angle, then TOPPLE in scale-free avalanches ‚ÄĒ and the avalanches ARE the music (mostly tiny ticks, the rare "big one" a full-spectrum DROP).** The lab's **first ecstatic build-and-drop piece** and first adult self-organized-criticality instrument (`sandpile`/`self-organized criticality` grep-**0√ó** for adults ‚ÄĒ only a paused-lane kids cascade `377` before). A real **abelian sandpile** (`sandpile.ts`, 80√ó80 integers, **Bak‚ÄďTang‚ÄďWiesenfeld**, *Self-Organized Criticality*, PRL 59, 1987; Per Bak, *How Nature Works*, 1996): the canonical **slow-drive** protocol (a grain rains only while the pile is quiescent, so cascades don't smear and the **power law survives**), cells with `h‚Č•4` topple `‚ąí4`/`+1`-to-4-neighbours, open boundary; relaxation is **budgeted (‚Č§3500 topples/frame) and carried forward** so a huge cascade unfolds over several frames as a visible **wave of light**. Builder **verified the physics headless** (~9000-frame sims: mean height pinned ~2.11, clean power-law avalanches ŌĄ‚Čą1.2, ~9‚Äď10 events/s mostly ticks, a punchy drop ~every 2 s, a mega-drop ~every 14 s). **Render = three.js scene-graph** (the jury's explicitly-wanted anti-fragment-shader surface): one `THREE.InstancedMesh` of 80√ó80 unit columns, **height = grain count** (`instanceMatrix`), **colour = ember ramp + a white-hot per-cell "heat" highlight** that spikes on topple and decays smoothly (`instanceColor`); unlit `MeshBasicMaterial` (nothing renders black from lighting), grazing camera drift, big-drop ember bloom. WebGL guarded 3 ways ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice with audio still playing. **Audio (build-and-drop, Web Audio):** the riser is driven by a **"reload" sawtooth** ‚ÄĒ grains-since-last-big-release ‚ÄĒ because pure SOC pins mean height at the critical point, so a criticality *measure* is flat and can't build; the reload cycle can, and stays honestly coupled to the real power-law drop timing (a genuine physical insight). Tension opens the shared `startDroneBank` filter + accelerates a pulse (~0.5‚Üí~6 Hz) + a live rumble tracks the topple rate; each settled avalanche's **size** picks the release ‚ÄĒ tick (`<40`) / airy swell (`<500`) / clean punchy drop (`<2600`) / the rare **full-spectrum DROP** (`‚Č•2600`: sub-bass thud + **inharmonic chord bloom** of stretched drum-membrane partials `[1,1.593,2.135,2.295,2.917,3.5]` + noise sweep + terrain flash). **Pitch continuous + inharmonic** (centroid/extent ‚Üí glide, **no JI/pentatonic/scale-index/12-TET**). Master ‚Č§0.2 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`, ‚Č§14 voices, full teardown. **Input:** pointer-pour (raycast to ground) + **Space = seismic shock** (nudges ~55% of the pile toward toppling ‚ÄĒ forces a big cascade) + device-tilt leans gravity (arrow-key desktop fallback); **self-plays with no input** (grains auto-rain, avalanches fire on their own ‚ÄĒ idle-demos on a phone). **Ambition 4/5:** **#2** ‚Č•5 subsystems (sandpile CA + budgeted/carried avalanche tracker + reload-tension riser + 4-tier avalanche‚Üídrop engine + three.js terrain render + pour/shock/tilt input) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (Bak-Tang-Wiesenfeld 1987 / Per Bak 1996 / Dhar & Ramaswamy directed-sandpile 1989) ¬∑ **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 1 = core SOC + build-and-drop; cycle 2 = richer musical arc + a forced "big one" build + tighter drop mix; cycle 3 = polish) ¬∑ **#5** today's ¬ß740 criticality research dive ‚Üí this build. (#1 abstained honestly ‚ÄĒ SOC has a thin paused-kids prior `377`.) **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary¬∑SVG-primary¬∑JI-scale-index¬∑dissonance-theme¬∑WebGL2-raw-fragment/point-shader-primary(jury 9√ó)¬∑pointer-drag-sole(jury 10√ó)¬∑void/dissolution-vibe(jury 4√ó)¬∑DOM/CSS-3D¬∑Reich¬∑mic-sole¬∑kbd-sole¬∑camera] ¬∑ picked=[pointer-pour+seismic-shock+tilt INPUT (not pointer-sole) ¬∑ three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (the jury's wanted anti-fragment surface) ¬∑ self-organized-criticality/sandpile TECHNIQUE (adult-0√ó) ¬∑ continuous inharmonic drop pitch ¬∑ molten-ember build-and-drop PALETTE ¬∑ pole INTENSE/ecstatic (BUILDS, doesn't dissolve ‚ÄĒ rests the jury-banned void)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ topple "flash" is emissive/luminance drift (heat decays over many frames, big-drop bloom ‚Č§3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes camera + slows decay. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ `three` was already a dependency + Web Audio). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1470-the-drop/page.js` emitted (**30.2 kB**) + `"/dream/1470-the-drop"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1470-the-drop --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic; imports only from `../_shared/`. **Physics verified headless; NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ camera framing/column-relief legibility + drop-mix loudness balance want Karel's browser; the idle auto-rain self-demo guarantees never-blank/silent. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (SOC via three.js-terrain vs WebGL2-GPGPU-points); banked **‚≠ź `1472-criticality`** (the same SOC concept as a larger-grid **WebGL2 GPGPU** 256¬≤ point-field ‚ÄĒ proves the substrate at scale; resurrect after swapping its mean-height riser for a reload-cycle + throttling the per-frame `readPixels`) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß740. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1470-the-drop/README.md`

### [1464-crystal-cortex](/dream/1464-crystal-cortex) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **multi-touch / multi-pointer (drag the cells)** / **WebGL2 GPU-Voronoi (Jump Flooding)** + log-polar warp (readable notice fallback) ¬∑ cycle 739 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT jewelled-honeycomb form-constant ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Reach into the DMT "jewelled honeycomb" and play it ‚ÄĒ a living Voronoi lattice of stained-glass cells, warped into an infinite tunnel, each cell a continuous voice.** The lab's **first GPU Voronoi / Jump-Flooding-Algorithm piece** (`voronoi`/`jump flood`/`JFA` grep-**0√ó** across the whole lab before this ‚ÄĒ only a stray `271` README mention). Per frame in `gl.ts`: a **seed pass** splats ~12 moving seeds into a 512¬≤ float (or 16-bit-packed RGBA8 fallback) target; **9 ping-pong JFA passes** (`k=256‚Ä¶1`, toroidal distance) flood each texel to its nearest seed ‚Üí the Voronoi cell ID + distance field (Rong & Tan, *Jump Flooding in GPU‚Ä¶*, I3D 2006); a **display pass** samples the field through an **inverse log-polar warp** so the honeycomb reads as a receding tunnel (the first of **Heinrich Kl√ľver's four form constants**; Bressloff & Cowan's cortical retino-V1 complex-log map), with `fwidth` cell-border "leading" for the stained-glass look and jewelled/iridescent per-seed hues. **Input = multi-touch:** each finger grabs and drags the nearest seed via a `pointerId` map (mouse-drag on desktop); when idle, seeds drift on deterministic Lissajous paths so it self-demos and is never static. **Audio (genuinely played):** each seed = one **continuous, inharmonic voice** (sawtooth‚Üíper-voice band-pass), pitch mapped **continuously** from tunnel-depth ‚Üí log-frequency 80‚Äď900 Hz (**never scale-snapped** ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned ~10√ó JI/pentatonic scale-index crutch), cell **area ‚Üí amplitude**, **neighbour count ‚Üí brightness/timbre**, over a 2-osc drone (14 voices total = the cap). Gesture-gated ctx ("Enter the lattice"), master ramps 0‚Üí0.85 through a **DynamicsCompressor** limiter, full teardown. **Named refs (README):** Kl√ľver form constants; Bressloff & Cowan cortical map; Rong & Tan JFA 2006. **Ambition 4/5:** **#1** first GPU-Voronoi/JFA (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•5 subsystems (multi-pointer input + JFA Voronoi compute + log-polar warp + Voronoi-cell continuous voices + drone) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above ¬∑ **#5** today's ¬ß739 research dive (JFA/GPU-Voronoi: arXiv 2509.07175 + Jan-2026 impls) ‚Üí this build. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary¬∑SVG-primary¬∑JI-scale-index¬∑dissonance-theme¬∑three.js¬∑DOM/CSS-3D¬∑Reich¬∑mic-sole¬∑kbd-sole¬∑camera] ¬∑ picked=[multi-touch INPUT (fresh vs the recent pointer-family/camera/flythrough run) ¬∑ WebGL2 JFA-Voronoi OUTPUT (0√ó) ¬∑ Voronoi/JFA TECHNIQUE (0√ó) ¬∑ continuous inharmonic cell-voices ¬∑ jewelled/stained-glass PALETTE ¬∑ pole INTENSE (off the recent cosmic-ambient run)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ only ‚Č§~0.15 Hz luminance drift; `prefersReducedMotion` calms motion/saturation. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ WebGL2 + Web Audio only). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1464-crystal-cortex/page.js` emitted (**32.8 kB**) + `"/dream/1464-crystal-cortex"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint` on all 3 candidate folders = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors; `text-white/30|40|50` grep = empty; `"use client"` line 1; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the cell-voice mix, JFA leading, and warp feel want Karel's browser; the idle seed-drift self-demo guarantees never-blank/silent. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1468-the-return`** (the NDE arc as one 7-min unrepeating WebGPU-compute point-cloud journey ‚ÄĒ long-form-stateful + 2nd WebGPU-compute, both jury-wanted; TOP ship-next) + **‚≠ź `1466-boltzmann-bloom`** (breathe into a real D2Q9 **Lattice-Boltzmann** fluid as LSD "breathing surfaces + tracers"; LBM grep-0√ó) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß739. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1464-crystal-cortex/README.md`

### [1458-room-of-you](/dream/1458-room-of-you) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **camera + body motion** / WebGL2 **standing-wave volume** + self-built **FDN reverb** ¬∑ cycle 737 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: body-as-resonant-space / sensory-boundary softening ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient` ‚ÄĒ *Your own body becomes the acoustic space.* Camera silhouette ‚Üí the shape of a resonant room: height/spread/fill re-tune a hand-built **Feedback-Delay-Network reverb** (delay lengths, decay, damping), motion re-strikes soft inharmonic bells through the you-shaped cathedral. ### [1450-supershape-bloom](/dream/1450-supershape-bloom) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **pointer-drag morph** / WebGL2 **3D supershape mesh** (live-recomputed) ¬∑ cycle 736 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: alien-organic morphogenesis ¬∑ pole: intense (blooming biology)` ‚ÄĒ Play the morphospace of the **Superformula** (Gielis 2003 / Bourke 3D supershape): drag to morph one 3D organism between starfish/urchin/diatom/chrysanthemum while its symmetry number `m` re-tunes an inharmonic drone (prime/fractional m beats "wrong" on purpose). Haeckel *Kunstformen der Natur* made playable. Lab's first superformula piece (grep-0√ó). Banked sibling ‚≠ź`1452-radiolaria-field` (cosmic-ambient 2D field) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß736.

## ‚≠ź Newest (Cycle 735 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ "The mind hallucinates the rest": 3 orthogonal drug-free perceptual-illusion explorers, ship the strongest. The lab has done *flicker* form-constants and apophenia but never staged the perceptual system's own quirks as interactive altered-states induction. **Winner = `1444-troxler-void`** ‚ÄĒ hold still and the screen dissolves into a uniform void (Troxler fading + the Ganzfeld effect: under steady fixation the low-contrast periphery adapts away ‚ÄĒ a real sensory-boundary dissolution, grep-**0√ó**); move and it re-forms, and the drone thins/re-blooms with the fade. Core technique = a **per-region adaptation buffer** (a 40√ó40 grid whose adaptation rises with stillness ‚ÄĒ faster in periphery than the fixated centre ‚ÄĒ resetting on pointer movement), driving a WebGL2 Ganzfeld fragment-shader (Canvas2D fallback) + a drone that loses partials as the void deepens. **The WIDE call:** most on-theme for the standing PRIMARY direction (drug-free ego/sensory dissolution via the visual system's *own* adaptation ‚ÄĒ the truest "psychedelic state without the drug" of the three); **self-demos on desktop** with no headphones/file/special hardware (idle drifting-gaze auto melt-and-reform) ‚ÄĒ the best fit for a 06:30 phone review, where `1446-ghost-choir` needs stereo headphones for its illusions to exist at all and `1448-resonant-hall` wants a dropped piano file + speakers; and the highest surprise ("hold still and the screen disappears"). Dodges every live ban (WebGL2 OFF Canvas2D+SVG; a drone not a JI/pentatonic scale-index; pointer-stillness not mic/kbd/camera-sole; not dissonance-theme, not three.js, not DOM/CSS-3D). **Ambition 2/5:** #1 never-used technique (Troxler/Ganzfeld per-region adaptation, grep-0√ó) + #3 named refs (**Ign√°c Troxler 1804** / **Wolfgang Metzger ‚ÄĒ Ganzfeld 1930**). **Research‚Üíbuild chain (RESEARCH ¬ß735):** dive on drug-free perceptual-illusion induction ‚Üí this fan-out. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1446-ghost-choir` (a melody & bass your brain invents from tones split between the ears ‚ÄĒ Diana Deutsch's octave/scale illusion 1974 + the missing fundamental; the whole illusion cluster, grep-0√ó; resurrect when a headphones-required piece fits) + ‚≠ź`1448-resonant-hall` (play Karel's real piano into impossible halls you sculpt ‚ÄĒ an 8-line **Feedback Delay Network** [Jot & Chaigne 1991] as a *played* resonator body, real-piano file-drop + felt-synth fallback) to IDEAS ¬ß735, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚úÖ **Validate:** authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree, only winner present) = **exit 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1444-troxler-void/page.js` (25.7 kB) emitted, `tsc --noEmit` (whole tree) = **0** errors, `eslint src/app/dream/1444-troxler-void --max-warnings 0` = **0** ‚ÄĒ full Vercel gate set green. Pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio (no server, no route, no secret). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the fade-rate + palette + drone-thinning mix want Karel's browser; the idle self-demo + drone-from-Begin guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: sensory/ego-boundary dissolution ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient meditative.` Details in STATE ¬ß735.)

## `/dream/1444-troxler-void` ‚ÄĒ *hold still and the screen dissolves. A soft central fixation glyph anchors your gaze; the low-contrast **Ganzfeld** field around it slowly adapts away under steady fixation (**Troxler fading**) until the periphery melts into a uniform void ‚ÄĒ a drug-free staging of sensory- and ego-boundary dissolution. Move the pointer and the field (and the drone) re-bloom where you disturbed it. The lab's first Troxler/Ganzfeld piece (grep-0√ó).* **How it works:** **Begin ‚ÄĒ sound on** gesture-gates the AudioContext. A **per-region adaptation buffer** (40√ó40 grid) raises each cell's adaptation the longer it goes without change ‚ÄĒ faster in the periphery than at the fixated centre ‚ÄĒ collapsing its contrast/saturation toward the mean field colour (`pow(1-adapt,1.6)`); pointer movement near a cell resets it, so motion re-forms the world. **Output = WebGL2** fragment-shader Ganzfeld (fbm colour-drift, adaptation uploaded as an `R8` texture, vignette + dither) with a Canvas2D per-pixel fallback. **Audio** (Web Audio): a detuned-oscillator **drone** ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí master ramp 0‚Üí0.18; as the void deepens the drone **thins** (partials drop, reverb send opens via shared `convolutionVoid`), and it re-blooms on movement ‚ÄĒ so sound and image dissolve together. **Idle self-demo:** with no pointer for a few seconds a drifting virtual gaze + a slow ~13 s global "breath" run the melt/re-form cycle on their own (never a dead screen). `prefersReducedMotion()` slows/freezes motion. **SAFETY:** the opposite of flicker ‚ÄĒ only sub-Hz luminance/contrast drift, no strobe, no full-screen flash. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 2/5:** #1 never-used technique (Troxler/Ganzfeld per-region adaptation buffer, grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #3 named refs **Ign√°c Troxler (1804)** / **Wolfgang Metzger ‚ÄĒ Ganzfeld (1930)**. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ SVG-primary ¬∑ JI/pentatonic-scale-index ¬∑ dissonance-theme(√ó4) ¬∑ three.js(√ó3) ¬∑ DOM/CSS-3D(√ó2) ¬∑ mic-sole ¬∑ kbd-sole ¬∑ camera] ¬∑ picked=[Troxler/Ganzfeld perceptual-dissolution TECHNIQUE(0√ó) ¬∑ pointer-stillness INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 Ganzfeld field OUTPUT ¬∑ thinning drone (not a scale-index) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient meditative VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; honest knocks (own README): the subjective fade only fully lands on a real display at rest (the on-screen sim approximates the retinal effect); palette/fade-rate want a hardware tuning pass. `state: sensory/ego-boundary dissolution ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient meditative`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1444-troxler-void/README.md`*

## Cycle 734 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "THE ONE THREAD": ONE massively-bigger concept ‚ÄĒ *the space-filling curve as the ego-dissolution **UNITY** phenomenon*, the drug-free staging of the DMN-dissolution "the field stops being separate objects and becomes ONE continuous thing" (Carhart-Harris entropic-brain / REBUS). A Hilbert curve is a single unbroken line that visits every cell of a plane while **preserving locality** ‚ÄĒ so it literally weaves a 2-D field into one 1-D thread. Grep-**0√ó** (`hilbert`/`space filling`/`peano`/`moore curve` = 0), a genuinely fresh technique + the lab's first **continuous-no-scale** pitch. Attacked via **2 approaches**: **`1440-thread-scan`** (**WebGL2** ‚ÄĒ paint a field, a Hilbert reading-head sonifies your marks into one locality-coherent gesture; pointer-paint+scrub) and `1442-unweave` (**WebGL2** ‚ÄĒ the recursion DEPTH is the played axis: deepen ‚Üí the line folds to fill the plane / boundaries dissolve; drag-depth). Alternation ‚Ä¶730 D ‚Üí 731 W ‚Üí 732 D ‚Üí 733 W ‚Üí **734 D** (DEEP due). **Mis-fire caught & logged:** the STATE cycle-headers had drifted (last full entry was 726/`1396`) ‚ÄĒ `git log` shows 727‚Äď733 already shipped `1398`‚Ä¶`1430` and **already cashed the entire 2026-07-10 jury** (dissonance √ó4 = 728/730/732/733, camera-revive 729, Anadol/real-data 731, "2nd WebGPU-compute" 730). My first WIDE fan-out (`1434`/`1436`/`1438`) chased that spent jury into now-saturated lanes, so I **pivoted to a proper DEEP on a grep-0√ó lane**. **Research-first (RESEARCH ¬ß734):** dive = the 2026 dissonance frontier (XenRoll 2026-06 / DDSP timbre-remap) ‚Üí grep showed the lab already saturated it ‚Üí pivot to the space-filling / unity lane (hyperbolic/Poincar√© also rejected pre-brief as `1044-hyperbolic-bloom` dup). **Curated WINNER = `1440-thread-scan`** ‚ÄĒ both cleared the ambition floor (4/5) + dodged every live ban (OFF Canvas2D+SVG; CONTINUOUS-pitch, not JI/pentatonic; not dissonance-theme; not DOM/CSS-3D; not camera/mic/tilt/keyboard-sole; PLAYED). The DEEP call: (1) **genuinely PLAYED, not watched** ‚ÄĒ you paint marks and the curve weaves *your* shape into one coherent gesture, so the visitor **co-creates** the unity; `1442` is closer to a single depth-dial + a default self-running "breathe" (the repeatedly-banned watched pattern); (2) **core mechanic is sound** ‚ÄĒ a real Hilbert `d2xy` curve + real instrument, where `1442`'s central morph is (its own README) "an interpolation artifact, not itself a Hilbert curve"; (3) locality-preservation is directly demonstrable by the visitor's own action. Banked ‚≠ź`1442-unweave` (the depth-as-dissolution axis ‚ÄĒ beautiful; resurrect with a true continuous-order construction + a real played layer) + the 3 WIDE explorers ‚≠ź`1436-tilt-nova` (WebGPU-compute tilt swarm), `1434-roughness-body` (camera roughness ‚ÄĒ dup of shipped `1418`), `1438-bohlen-lattice` (Bohlen‚ÄďPierce DOM/CSS-3D) to IDEAS ¬ß734, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚úÖ **Validate:** authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree, only winner present) = **exit 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1440-thread-scan/page.js` (30.7 kB) emitted, `tsc --noEmit` (whole tree) = 0 winner errors, `eslint src/app/dream/1440-thread-scan --max-warnings 0` = **0** ‚ÄĒ the full Vercel gate set green. Pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio (no server, no route, no secret, no GPU-compute). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the woven-thread legibility + continuous-glissando mix want Karel's browser; the pre-painted idle glyph + head-from-Begin guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: unity / ego-dissolution ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ‚ÜĒ intense.` Details in STATE ¬ß734.)

## `/dream/1440-thread-scan` ‚ÄĒ *one unbroken thread weaves a whole painted field into a single continuous line of light and pitch. You paint luminous marks into a dark field; a **Hilbert space-filling curve** threads every cell, and a bright reading-head travels the thread and **sounds whatever it passes** ‚ÄĒ so the field is heard as ONE connected line rather than separate notes. Because the Hilbert curve preserves locality, a shape you paint becomes a **coherent gesture in time**: the drug-free staging of the ego-dissolution UNITY phenomenon (DMN-dissolution ‚ÄĒ "the field becomes one continuous thing"). The lab's first space-filling-curve instrument and first continuous-no-scale pitch (grep-0√ó).* **How it works:** **Begin ‚ÄĒ sound on** gesture-gates the AudioContext (a pre-painted glyph is already weaving before you touch it, so never blank/silent). **Drag on the field** to paint glowing marks (colour follows the vertical axis, violet‚Üíamber, the same axis pitch maps to). **order (3‚Äď6)** zooms the weave (coarse calm ‚Üí fine dense); **speed** sets head travel; **let go** on = the head drifts itself, off = a **scrub** slider steers it by hand; **clear field** wipes. **Output = WebGL2:** the painted field is an RGBA texture drawn as a quad, the whole Hilbert curve is a faint additive `LINE_STRIP`, and the head + comet trail are additive glow sprites; WebGL2-absent ‚Üí a reduced Canvas2D fallback draws the same three layers and still plays. **Audio** (Web Audio): pitch is a **continuous glissando** from the head's vertical field position ‚ÄĒ *not* a scale, *not* pentatonic, *not* a JI index (deliberately stepping off the lab's ~10√ó/15 always-consonant crutch ‚ÄĒ the thread is a *continuum* of pitch, which is what makes the field read as one line); brightness‚Üíloudness, hue‚Üítimbre, local density‚Üíshimmer + longer grains. A single sustained thread voice is always the line; crossing into a bright mark plucks a soft panned grain (polyphonic, 12-voice cap). Master ramps 0‚Üí0.2 into a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; full teardown (rAF, AudioContext, GL) on unmount. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the only luminance pulse is a ~0.12 Hz breathing drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows head travel + shrinks the breath. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 4/5:** #1 first space-filling-curve instrument + first continuous-no-scale pitch (grep-0√ó; honestly declared ‚ÄĒ Hilbert *rendering* is common in generative art, the fresh axis is the space-filling curve as a PLAYED unity instrument) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (Hilbert curve generator + paint-field engine + locality‚Üícontinuous-pitch mapper + WebGL2 renderer + voice pool = 5) ¬∑ #3 named refs **David Hilbert (1891)** / Giuseppe Peano (1890) / **Carhart-Harris ‚ÄĒ entropic brain / REBUS** ¬∑ #5 today's ¬ß734 dive. **diversity:** `banned=[dissonance/inharmonic-tuning-theme(√ó4) ¬∑ DOM/CSS-3D(√ó2) ¬∑ three.js(√ó3) ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ SVG-primary ¬∑ pentatonic/JI-scale-index ¬∑ camera(729)] ¬∑ picked=[space-filling-curve UNITY TECHNIQUE(0√ó) ¬∑ pointer-paint/scrub INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 field+thread OUTPUT ¬∑ CONTINUOUS-pitch glissando (steps off the JI crutch entirely) ¬∑ unity/ego-dissolution VIBE ¬∑ PLAYED]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (pivot off a spent jury onto a grep-0√ó lane); honest knocks (own README): comet trail is glow sprites not a true bloom (fine weave can alias at order 6); audio reads only the cell under the head each frame (ultra-thin marks can be skipped at high speed); continuous pitch reads eerie/microtonal by design, not "tonal." `state: unity / ego-dissolution ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ‚ÜĒ intense`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1440-thread-scan/README.md`*

## (Cycle 732 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "THE DISSOLVE": ONE massively-bigger concept ‚ÄĒ a **long-form (~5 min), irreversible ego-dissolution / NDE-tunnel** where a single monotonic clock carries you one-way from a solid bounded room ‚Üí loosening lattice ‚Üí a tunnel opening toward a blooming light, and the tuning drifts *monotonically OUT of consonance* as it dissolves. The lab-thin **long-form / accumulating-state** category, and the direct cash of the 2026-07-10 jury's headline provocation **#2** (*"break the always-consonant spell ‚ÄĒ ship ONE piece where the wrong note is the point"*). The DEEP call: (1) **render-robust ‚ÄĒ zero GPU dependency** (pure CSS-3D transforms on real DOM), safest for an unattended push to live production + a phone 06:30 review; (2) **surface-contrasts with last night's three.js winner `1426`** ‚ÄĒ shipping `1432` (three.js) would be back-to-back three.js winners, the exact "too similar" pattern Karel flags; (3) it's the **‚≠ź‚≠ź flagged TOP ship-next** (highest-ambition non-winner of ¬ß731, 4/5) and the ¬ß731 resurrection condition is met (this slot is NOT DOM/CSS-3D- or dissonance-*adjacent* ‚ÄĒ last night was three.js/cosmic-data; the `1408` overlap is 4 nights back and the *concept* is genuinely distinct: a one-way long-form journey, not `1408`'s play-the-tension instrument). Banked ‚≠ź`1432-egress` (the three.js volumetric twin ‚ÄĒ additive-bloom tunnel-to-light; resurrect for a slot with distance from three.js) to IDEAS ¬ß732, folder `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; its best ideas folded into the winner's README as next-cycle deepening. ‚úÖ **Validate:** plain `npm run build` compiled + linted (`eslint --max-warnings 0` = 0) + typechecked (`tsc --noEmit` whole tree = 0) with ZERO dream-code errors and emitted `.next/server/app/dream/1428-dissolve-room/page.js` (30 kB), dying only at "Collecting page data" on the standing **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (absent on Vercel); the authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree, only winner present) = **exit 0** with `"/dream/1428-dissolve-room"` in `routes-manifest.json` + `page.js` emitted ‚ÄĒ the full Vercel gate set (TS + ESLint + compile) green. Winner is pure `"use client"` DOM/CSS + Web Audio (no server, no route, no secret, no GPU). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the ~5-min irreversible dissolve + the audibly-souring Railsback drift want Karel's browser; the live silent preview + drone-from-Begin + idle self-advance guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: ego-dissolution / a-room-that-dissolves-toward-light-over-minutes ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient dissociative/NDE.` Details in STATE ¬ß732.)

## `/dream/1428-dissolve-room` ‚ÄĒ *a room you cannot leave. A solid glowing **7√ó7√ó7 lattice** of 343 real `<div>` cells loosens over ~5 minutes, cells push radially out to open a central **tunnel**, detaching panels tumble and dim, and the whole room drifts toward a far **light** ‚ÄĒ tuned so it was never quite in tune, and **grinding further out of consonance** as it comes apart. It is not a loop: one monotonic clock only ever rises, so minute 5 (a near-empty tunnel-into-light) is genuinely unlike minute 1 (a solid lattice). You don't play notes; you play the arc ‚ÄĒ you resist the dissolve, you never reverse it. The lab-thin long-form/accumulating-state category, and the direct cash of jury #2 "break the always-consonant spell."* **How it works:** hit **Begin the descent** (gesture-gates the AudioContext, ramps audio from silence; before Begin a still, gently-alive silent "formed lattice" preview shows). On a phone, **tilt** to steer + lean in and **press-and-hold** anywhere to pull back toward a more-formed lattice; on desktop it falls back to **mouse-drag to steer + press-and-hold to resist** (the UI says so in readable `text-rose-300`). Resisting recovers only the *look and tuning* toward "more formed" ‚ÄĒ the underlying clock keeps marching. A **drift-speed slider (0.40√ó‚Äď2.20√ó)** fast-forwards/slows the arc for a morning review; a **forming ¬∑ loosening ¬∑ dissolving ¬∑ light** phase + mm:ss readout tracks it. Idle = the dissolution proceeds on its own, so it's never static. **Output = pure DOM/CSS 3-D:** a `transform-style: preserve-3d` stage under CSS `perspective`, 343 cell refs whose `translate3d`/opacity/colour are written straight to the DOM each frame in a single RAF (no per-frame React render), plus a far radial-gradient **light** and a screen-space **bloom** that grow as the tunnel opens ‚ÄĒ **no canvas, no WebGL, no SVG, zero GPU dependency** (phone-perfect, no black-frame risk). **Audio** (Web Audio, THE POINT): **Risset-style inharmonic bell partials** `[0.5, 1.0, 1.19, 1.56, 2.02, 2.55, 3.06] √ó 55 Hz` (none a small-integer ratio ‚Üí they beat faintly even at rest), raised to a **Railsback octave-stretch exponent that grows 1.00 ‚Üí ~1.06** as the room dissolves (dragging every partial progressively sharp of consonance), a **chorus detune widening ~3 ‚Üí 34 cents**, and a high inharmonic **light cluster** that shimmers in during the light phase ‚ÄĒ over an inharmonic drone bed (the shared `_shared/psych/droneBank` with its default consonant chord *overridden*), through the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` reverb, master ramped silence ‚Üí ‚Č§0.18 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; deterministic (no `Math.random` in the audio path). Full teardown cancels the RAF, stops every oscillator, removes the tilt/pointer listeners, and `close()`s the context. **Never blank/silent:** the visual arc runs even if the AudioContext fails; **SAFETY** ‚ÄĒ all motion sub-Hz/slow, no strobe, and `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the arc to a formed-but-gently-alive lattice (no accumulating dissolve, no brightness pulsing). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 4/5:** long-form irreversible accumulating-state (menu category the jury names lab-thin, ~0√ó) ¬∑ inharmonic Railsback-stretched tuning that BREAKS always-consonant (jury #2) ¬∑ ‚Č•3 subsystems (irreversible clock/state engine + DOM/CSS-3D dissolution renderer + inharmonic stretched-bell audio engine + tilt/pointer-hold input = 4) ¬∑ named refs **Susan Blackmore *Dying to Live* (1993)** / **Jean-Claude Risset** (inharmonic bells) / the **DMT-models-NDE** universal-scaffold study. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ SVG-primary ¬∑ JI/pentatonic-always-consonant ¬∑ Reich-phasing-as-TIME ¬∑ mic-sole ¬∑ home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] ¬∑ picked=[long-form-irreversible-accumulating-state + inharmonic-Railsback-stretch TECHNIQUE (the antidote to always-consonant) ¬∑ DOM/CSS-3D OUTPUT (thin, off Canvas2D+SVG) ¬∑ tilt+pointer-hold INPUT ¬∑ one-way-clock TIME (a fourth route off the drum grid, not phasing) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient dissociative/NDE VIBE ¬∑ PLAYED]` ‚ÄĒ clears every 2026-07-10 ban. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (cashed jury #2 head-on; render-robust + surface-contrasts last night's three.js winner); honest knock (own README): the ~5-min irreversible feel + the audibly-souring Railsback drift want Karel's browser + headphones ‚ÄĒ headless-unverifiable, but the silent live preview + drone-from-Begin + idle self-advance guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: ego-dissolution / a-room-that-dissolves-toward-light-over-minutes ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient dissociative/NDE`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1428-dissolve-room/README.md`*

## (Cycle 731 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal explorers on 3 fresh surfaces, sweeping up the two live jury asks the ¬ß730 DEEP couldn't also reach. Explorers: `1424-flow-mandala` (**WebGL2** ‚ÄĒ dance in front of the webcam and dense **optical flow** advects a kaleidoscopic **Kl√ľver form-constant** mandala; camera+pointer), **`1426-biome-field`** (**three.js** ‚ÄĒ the last ~24 h of **live USGS earthquakes** grown into a breathing shell of light around the Earth and sonified; external-data+pointer), `1428-dissolve-room` (**DOM/CSS-3D** ‚ÄĒ a long-form dissociative/NDE room that **dissolves toward a light over minutes**, tuned to **inharmonic bell partials**; tilt+pointer). Alternation ‚Ä¶728 D ‚Üí 729 W ‚Üí 730 D ‚Üí **731 W** (WIDE due). **Research-first (chain intact):** dive = **Refik Anadol's DATALAND opened June 20, 2026** (first "Museum of AI Arts," LA) ‚ÄĒ "Machine Dreams: Rainforest" is a *living data field* reshaped by presence + live ecological data, "never truly finished"; the jury's prov #5 flagged the earlier Anadol note as "built on by nothing" ‚Üí tonight's `1426` is the browser-scale echo (a living data-field driven by a live planetary dataset), and the first real-world live-data sonification since `1374-sky-strata`. **Curated WINNER = `1426-biome-field`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-10 ban (all OFF Canvas2D+SVG; none pentatonic-always-consonant; none Reich-phasing; input camera/external-data/tilt, none mic-sole or home-row-sole). The WIDE call (core = diversity + serving a live provocation): (1) **maximally different from every recent winner** ‚ÄĒ `1424`(camera‚ÜíWebGL2) overlaps ¬ß729's `1412`, `1428`(DOM/CSS-3D+dissonance) overlaps ¬ß728's `1408` on BOTH surface and theme, while `1426`(live-external-data/three.js/cosmic data-field) overlaps *none*; (2) **cashes jury prov #5 head-on** (the Anadol-Dataland finding built on by nothing) and is the clean **research‚Üíbuild chain** of today's dive; (3) lands in a **lab-thin lane** (real-world-data sonification, 1√ó); (4) renders robustly AND is **different every morning** as the quake data changes ‚ÄĒ a perfect 06:30-review property. Winner is pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio + a client-side read-only public GET (no server, no route, no secret). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the live-data field render + inharmonic drone-cluster mix want Karel's browser; the bundled snapshot + drone-from-Begin + idle auto-orbit guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: living-data-field / a-planet's-seismic-day-as-a-breathing-instrument ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient.` Details in STATE ¬ß731.)

## `/dream/1426-biome-field` ‚ÄĒ *a real, live planetary dataset as the composer: the last ~24 hours of global earthquakes, **fetched live from the USGS in your browser**, grown into a breathing shell of light around a dark slowly-turning Earth and sounded as a slow inharmonic drone. A **living field**, not a chart ‚ÄĒ the shell breathes, every point drifts, fresh quakes twinkle, and it re-fetches every ~2.5 min so it keeps changing with the planet; it is literally different at your 06:30 review than it was an hour before. The browser-scale echo of Refik Anadol's DATALAND (opened 2026-06-20), and the lab's first real-world live-data sonification since `1374-sky-strata`.* **How it works:** hit **Begin ¬∑ enter the field** (gesture-gates the AudioContext) ‚ÄĒ the field appears instantly on a **bundled ~30-quake snapshot**, then swaps in the live USGS `all_day.geojson` (client-side GET, no key, no side effects, no API route; 6 s timeout, re-fetch every ~150 s; amber "bundled snapshot" badge if the network fails). **Drag** orbits the planet; **hover** raycasts onto the globe to "listen in" on a region (a halo lights where you point, nearby points brighten, the granular shimmer is drawn toward the quakes there). **The mapping:** magnitude ‚Üí point size + brightness (and lower/larger drone voice); depth ‚Üí colour (shallow warm-gold ‚Üí mid teal ‚Üí deep violet) + radial height (a 3-D data-terrain floating off the surface) + a **stretched inharmonic upper partial** of that voice; recency ‚Üí shimmer rate + grain weighting. **Output = a genuine three.js living field** (custom-shader point shell + globe + orbit/hover-focus raycast). **Audio** (Web Audio): the pitch material is derived **entirely from the data** ‚ÄĒ a spectral inharmonic drone cluster + a continuous-pitch granular texture, **never a pentatonic / just-intonation scale-index** (the over-used lab crutch the jury bans) ‚ÄĒ through the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` reverb, master ramped silence‚Üí0.18 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; full teardown disposes three.js geometries/materials/renderer, stops grains, cancels RAF, closes the context after the tail. **Never blank/silent:** field + drone from Begin (on snapshot), slow auto-orbit after ~5 s idle; WebGL/three.js absent ‚Üí amber notice + a minimal audio-only fallback. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ per-point shimmer ‚Č§~0.75 Hz + slow drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client fetch; zero new npm deps; `three@0.182`). **Ambition 4/5:** real-world live-data sonification (menu category, 2nd since `1374`) ¬∑ ‚Č•3 subsystems (live USGS fetch + data‚Üífield mapping + three.js point-shell render + data-derived inharmonic drone/granular audio) ¬∑ named ref **Refik Anadol ‚ÄĒ DATALAND / "Machine Dreams: Rainforest"** (opened 2026-06-20, LA) + the seismic-sonification lineage ¬∑ #5 research-in-last-14-days (today's ¬ß731 dive). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ SVG-primary ¬∑ JI/pentatonic-always-consonant ¬∑ Reich-phasing-as-TIME ¬∑ mic-sole ¬∑ home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] ¬∑ picked=[real-world-live-data-sonification TECHNIQUE (data-derived inharmonic ‚ÄĒ antidote to always-consonant) ¬∑ three.js point-field OUTPUT (off Canvas2D+SVG) ¬∑ live external-data + pointer INPUT ¬∑ data-driven evolving TIME ¬∑ cosmic-ambient/planetary VIBE ¬∑ PLAYED]` ‚ÄĒ clears every 2026-07-10 ban. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (cashed jury prov #5 head-on ‚ÄĒ the Anadol Dataland finding built on by nothing); honest knock (own README): the live-fetch swap, the hover-raycast "listen-in" mix, and the 3-D data-terrain legibility want Karel's browser + headphones ‚ÄĒ headless-unverifiable, but the bundled snapshot + drone-from-Begin + idle auto-orbit guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: living-data-field / a-planet's-seismic-day-as-a-breathing-instrument ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1426-biome-field/README.md`*

## (Cycle 730 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "BEAT FIELD ‚ÄĒ compose in the beating itself": ONE massively-bigger concept ‚ÄĒ a **GPU-computed Plomp‚ÄďLevelt/Sethares roughness field you sculpt by detuning a stack of voices**, dissonance/beating as the PLAYED expressive medium ‚ÄĒ realized three ways to finally **SHIP the 2nd GPU-compute piece** the jury has demanded across four verdicts (**#1** *"prove `1348` wasn't a fluke"*) and that got banked TWICE (¬ß728 `1410`, ¬ß729 `1414`) on headless render-risk. Three explorers on one concept: `1418-beat-field` (**raw WGSL compute** over an `rgba16float` storage texture ‚Üí WebGL2‚ÜíCanvas2D fallback), `1420-beat-loom` (**three.js WebGPURenderer + a genuine TSL `compute()` pass** over a 40k-cell storage buffer ‚ÄĒ the loved `130-tsl-particle-compute` stack), `1422-beat-mesh` (**WebGL2 GPGPU** float-texture ping-pong ‚ÄĒ the universal-render floor). Alternation ‚Ä¶727 W ‚Üí 728 D ‚Üí 729 W ‚Üí **730 D** (DEEP due). **Love signal:** `130-tsl-particle-compute` (WebGPU/TSL compute) is loved + the whole GPU particle/spectral cluster ‚ÄĒ so jury #1 is backed by BOTH the jury and Karel's loves, the convergence ¬ß728/¬ß729 kept banking. **Research-first (chain intact):** dive = **`ASTRODITHER` by Robert Borghesi, 2026-07-01 (~10 days)** ‚ÄĒ an audio-reactive WebGPU experiment built with Three.js + WebGPU + **TSL compute** (fluid sim + bloom + dithering), plus `monoton-music/nibi` (TSL compute-shader particle MV) ‚Üí proves audio-reactive TSL-compute GPU fields are shipping July-2026 practice, retiring the "TSL-compute is exotic" hesitation ‚Üí tonight's `1418` (WGSL-compute) + banked `1420` (three.js-TSL-compute, ASTRODITHER's exact stack). **Near-duplicate discipline applied HARD:** the roughness/dissonance/tuning lane is the lab's most-mined ‚ÄĒ `947-overtone-loom` (visualizer) / `404-comma-pump` (drift) / `538-xenharmonic-lattice` (exotic-scales) / `496`¬∑`508` (minimize-to-consonance) / `1408-wolf-ring` (¬ß728, discrete temperament step) all grepped-and-differentiated ‚Üí the fresh axis is a *continuous GPU-computed roughness field you SCULPT* (a "distortion pedal for harmony"), none of the priors. **Curated WINNER = `1418-beat-field`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-10 ban (all GPU-compute, OFF Canvas2D+SVG; the concept IS the antidote to JI-always-consonant [jury #2]; TIME is gestural-agogic not phasing; input detune-drag+keys not mic-sole/home-row-sole). The DEEP call: (1) **most literal cash of headline jury #1** ‚ÄĒ the standout names "a *second* WGSL-compute piece" and `1348` was WGSL, so `1418` is the actual 2nd raw-WGSL piece (B is three.js-TSL, one abstraction off; C is WebGL2-GPGPU, not WebGPU); (2) **it IS the banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1414` anchor** the jury keeps asking to see *shipped* ‚ÄĒ this finally breaks the two-cycle GPU-de-selection rut; (3) **best render-robustness of the three actual-GPU options** (real three-tier synchronous WGSL‚ÜíWebGL2‚ÜíCanvas2D fallback vs B's WebGPURenderer-or-black) ‚Üí highest chance Karel sees a rendering field at 06:30; (4) lands on the **thinnest surface** (raw WebGPU-compute, only `1348`). Declining B is NOT verification-cowardice ‚ÄĒ the winner carries the same headless WGSL black-frame debt (honored the standing pre-commit that verifiability alone won't decide); choosing between two actual-WebGPU pieces on faithfulness + robustness + surface-thinness is legitimate, and the rut (de-selecting WebGPU *entirely* for a safe non-GPU piece) did NOT happen. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1420-beat-loom` (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ the **love-fit** TSL-compute cash on Karel's loved `130` stack, genuine `compute()` pass, ambition 4/5, one browser render-confirmation from shippable) + ‚≠ź`1422-beat-mesh` (universal WebGL2-GPGPU render floor, 4-rung `checkFramebufferStatus`-probed ladder) to IDEAS ¬ß730, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚úÖ **Validate:** authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1418) = **exit 0**, `∆í /dream/1418-beat-field` in the route table + `"page":"/dream/1418-beat-field"` in `routes-manifest.json`, `.next/server/app/dream/1418-beat-field/page.js` (42 kB) emitted, `tsc --noEmit` (whole tree) = **0**, `eslint src/app/dream/1418-beat-field --max-warnings 0` = **0** ‚ÄĒ the full Vercel gate set (TS + ESLint + compile) green; the plain `npm run build` compiled+linted+typechecked with zero dream-code errors and died only at "Collecting page data" on the standing **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (ulimit -n 4096, uncapped this box; absent on Vercel). Winner is a pure `"use client"` WebGPU + WebGL2 + Web Audio component (no server). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the WGSL render + the lock‚ÜĒhowl audible arc want Karel's browser; WebGL2/Canvas2D fallbacks + idle auto-sweep guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: beat-field / dissonance-as-a-sculpted-GPU-field ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (the lock) ‚ÜĒ intense (the howl).` Details in STATE ¬ß730.)

## `/dream/1418-beat-field` ‚ÄĒ *detune a stack of four voices and **play the beating itself**. A single **beat-rate** control splits each voice's partials `h¬∑f ¬Ī h¬∑bt/2` so upper partials roughen first, sweeping one continuous axis: pure **lock** (silence-of-beating, dark calm) ‚Üí ~1‚Äď3 Hz **shimmer** ‚Üí **AM tremolo** ‚Üí dense **roughness** (the howl). Dissonance is the sculpted expressive medium ‚ÄĒ not minimized (unlike `496`/`508`), not merely visualized (unlike `947`), not a discrete temperament step (unlike `1408`). The 2nd GPU-compute piece the jury demanded across four verdicts, finally shipped ‚ÄĒ and the direct cash of jury #2 ("break the always-consonant spell").* **How it works:** hit **Begin** (gesture-gates the AudioContext), then **drag anywhere** ‚ÄĒ horizontal = beat rate `bt` (left lock ‚Üí right howl, log 0.25‚Üí42 Hz), vertical = drive/brightness; **keys `1`‚Äď`5`** pick a chord preset (Unison lock / Octave / Just fifth / Major triad / Cluster), **`‚ÜĎ ‚Üď`** move the root, **`‚Üź ‚Üí`** nudge `bt`. **Output = a genuine WebGPU compute tier:** `gpu.ts` dispatches a **WGSL compute shader** over a 256√ó256 grid that Gaussian-splats the Plomp‚ÄďLevelt/Sethares roughness of each partial-pair blob (`s = 0.24/(0.021¬∑min(f1,f2)+19)`; `r = a1¬∑a2¬∑(e^{-3.5¬∑s¬∑df} ‚ąí e^{-5.75¬∑s¬∑df})`) into an `rgba16float` storage texture, blitted with a cosmic‚Üíhowl palette + additive glow. **Never-black fallback chain:** the canvas context is bound LAST so a WGSL init failure leaves it clean, then `gl.ts` (WebGL2 fragment computing the same field) ‚Üí `canvas2d.ts` (72√ó40 coarse grid) take over; a live **tier badge** (top-left: `WebGPU` emerald / `WebGL2` sky / `Canvas` amber) shows which is live, over a dark-violet floor. **Audio** (Web Audio, fully render-independent ‚ÄĒ sound survives total GPU failure): a 24-oscillator pool (4 voices √ó 6 partials) tuned straight to the split partials so the **beating is emergent from the detune, not a faked LFO**; master ramps from silence to ‚Č§0.20 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, over the shared `_shared/psych/droneBank` bed ‚Üí `createVoidReverb`; full teardown stops all oscillators, `close()`s the context, cancels the RAF, destroys GPU resources. **Never blank/silent:** after ~5 s idle the field auto-sweeps the whole arc (lock ‚Üí howl ‚Üí lock) so a cold 06:30 glance is alive. **SAFETY:** the *audio* beating goes fast, but *visual* luminance change is held ‚Č§3 Hz (no strobe); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows everything. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 3/5:** #1 a 2nd raw-WGSL-compute piece ("prove `1348` wasn't a fluke"; WGSL-compute was 1√ó before this) ¬∑ ‚Č•3 subsystems (WGSL roughness-field compute + 24-osc detunable synth + WebGL2/Canvas2D fallback renderers + pointer/keys detune input + drone bed = 5) ¬∑ named refs **William Sethares** (*Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale*) / **Plomp & Levelt 1965** / **XenRoll v0.4.3** (June 2026). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ SVG-primary ¬∑ JI/pentatonic-always-consonant ¬∑ Reich-phasing-as-TIME ¬∑ mic-sole ¬∑ home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] ¬∑ picked=[GPU-compute-roughness-field TECHNIQUE (antidote to always-consonant) ¬∑ raw-WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (thinnest surface, off Canvas2D+SVG) ¬∑ detune-drag+pointer+keys INPUT ¬∑ gestural-agogic TIME ¬∑ cosmic‚ÜĒintense VIBE ¬∑ PLAYED]` ‚ÄĒ clears every 2026-07-10 ban. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire (cashed jury #1 + #2, breaking the GPU-bank rut); honest knock (own README): the WGSL compile + the three tiers reading consistently + the `ROUGHNESS_GAIN`/`RADIUS_GAIN`/`MASTER_PEAK` feel (lock calm-dark, howl intense without clipping) want Karel's browser ‚ÄĒ headless-unverifiable, but the fallbacks + GPU-independent audio guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: beat-field / dissonance-as-a-sculpted-GPU-field ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (the lock) ‚ÜĒ intense (the howl)`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1418-beat-field/README.md`*

## (Cycle 729 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ camera revival + 2nd WebGPU-compute: three orthogonal explorers cashing the two loudest STILL-open 2026-07-10 jury asks at once ‚ÄĒ **#5** *"'perceive the hidden' is done ‚ÄĒ the camera/embodied lane collapsed to 1√ó, revive it"* and **#1** *"land on a thin surface ‚ÄĒ a 2nd WebGPU-compute piece, prove `1348` wasn't a fluke"* ‚ÄĒ both now ALSO love-backed. Explorers: `1412-time-smear` (**WebGL2** live-camera *slit-scan / chronophotography* ‚ÄĒ perform in front of the webcam and your motion smears into a singing time-ribbon; camera+pointer), `1414-beat-field` (**WebGPU-compute** Plomp‚ÄďLevelt roughness field you sculpt by detuning ‚ÄĒ dissonance as the played medium; drag+keys), `1416-nebula-thread` (**three.js** tilt-steered point-cloud nebula you thread to voice its hidden tones; tilt+pointer). The WIDE call (core = diversity + serving a live provocation): (1) **maximally different from 728's winner in every tag** ‚ÄĒ 728 shipped `1408-wolf-ring` (dissonance/DOM-CSS-3D), and B is *also dissonance*, so shipping B now = two consecutive dissonance winners, the exact "too similar in design and theme" pattern Karel flags; A is camera/WebGL2/slit-scan/uncanny-time ‚ÄĒ nothing like it recently; (2) **cashes jury #5** (camera lane, untouched by any recent winner) and is love-backed by a full cluster; (3) **freshest interaction model** (live-camera slit-scan, grep-0√ó); (4) **phone-perfect for the 06:30 review** (front-camera time-smear) and renders robustly on WebGL2. Declining B is NOT verification-cowardice ‚ÄĒ the winner is itself an unverifiable-headless camera+WebGL2 illusion; it's diversity, and B stays banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź ship-next for a non-dissonance cycle.
