## `/dream/1412-time-smear` ‚ÄĒ *perform in front of your webcam and **play TIME itself**: instead of the live frame, only a thin vertical slice of each camera frame is kept and scrolled across the screen, so the horizontal axis becomes time ‚ÄĒ a person moving is stretched into eerie liquid time-ribbons that **sing**. A true **live-camera slit-scan / chronophotography** instrument (the fresh camera interaction the lab had never built ‚ÄĒ dozens of mirror/hand/dance pieces exist, none is a time-smear), reviving the camera/embodied lane the 2026-07-10 jury flagged as collapsed to 1√ó.* **How it works:** hit **Start camera** (or **No camera ‚ÄĒ use pointer**) ‚ÄĒ the AudioContext gesture-gates and the RAF loop begins the same click. Each tick a WebGL2 **ring-buffer** stamps only the camera's centre column into a 1px viewport at the advancing head; the display shader unwraps the ring (`fract(head‚ąí1+uv)`) so the newest slice sits at the leading edge and older slices scroll away ‚ÄĒ one axis is literally time. Orientation toggles horizontal‚ÜĒvertical (wipes history on switch); scroll-speed is a live slider. **Sonification** (make it sing): a separate `readPixels` pass reads the newest vertical slit, divides it into luminance bands, and each band drives a voice in a **16-voice inharmonic/spectral bank** (deliberately NOT a pentatonic scale-index ‚ÄĒ the over-used lab crutch the jury bans), with frame-to-frame motion energy driving overall brightness/filter ‚ÄĒ so your movements paint an evolving drone-timbre. Master ramps from silence to 0.18 (‚Č§0.20) behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; `synthMix` starts at 0.6 so it's audible from frame one. **Never blank/silent:** dark-violet floor + pre-start radial gradient; camera denied/failed ‚Üí clear `text-rose-300` message and it continues on a synthetic drifting blob through the identical pipeline; camera-idle (no motion ~3 s) fades that blob in; pointer mode injects a bright blob at the pointer; WebGL2 absent ‚Üí notice. Full teardown stops all oscillators, `close()`s the context, cancels the RAF, and **stops every MediaStream track**. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow luminance drift only; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **Ambition 3/5:** #5 revives the camera lane (jury-named, 1√ó) with a fresh interaction model (slit-scan grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #1 lands on a thin surface (WebGL2, off Canvas2D+SVG) ¬∑ ‚Č•3 subsystems (getUserMedia capture + WebGL2 slit-scan ring-buffer + `readPixels` motion/luminance analysis + 16-voice inharmonic spectral sonifier + pointer/synthetic fallback) ¬∑ named refs **Golan Levin** (slit-scan works / *The Manual Input Sessions*) & **Zbigniew RybczyŇĄski** (*Fourth Dimension*). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ SVG-primary ¬∑ JI/pentatonic-always-consonant ¬∑ Reich-phasing-as-TIME ¬∑ mic-sole ¬∑ home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] ¬∑ picked=[live-camera-slit-scan TECHNIQUE(0√ó) ¬∑ CAMERA INPUT (revives 1√ó lane) ¬∑ WebGL2 time-ribbon OUTPUT ¬∑ time-as-the-axis ¬∑ uncanny/hypnagogic VIBE ¬∑ PLAYED]` ‚ÄĒ clears every 2026-07-10 ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (cashed jury #5 head-on + love-backed camera cluster); honest knock (own README): the audible slit is always the centre *vertical* column even in vertical-scan mode, so vertical scan is visually but not sonically distinct; the illusion wants Karel's camera+speakers. `state: chronophotographic-time-smear ¬∑ pole: hypnagogic / uncanny`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1412-time-smear/README.md`*

## (Cycle 728 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "OUT OF TUNE": ONE massively-bigger concept ‚ÄĒ *dissonance/mistuning as the PLAYED expressive medium* (a thing you push a chord INTO and release, roughness as your dynamics ‚ÄĒ NOT minimized like `496`/`508`, NOT a passive readout like `947`, NOT an autonomous drift like `404`, NOT exotic-scale navigation like `538`) ‚ÄĒ attacked via three approaches on three fresh non-Canvas2D/non-SVG surfaces, shipping the strongest. The direct cash of the 2026-07-10 jury's headline provocation **#2** (*"break the always-consonant spell ‚ÄĒ the JI/pentatonic scale-index crutch is ~10 of 15; ship ONE piece where the wrong note is possible and that's the point"*), the deepest un-dented monoculture in the lab. Three explorers on one concept: `1406-tension-membrane` (**three.js** membrane that buckles/tears ‚ąĚ live Plomp‚ÄďLevelt roughness as you bend a triad), `1408-wolf-ring` (**DOM/CSS-3D** walkable circle-of-fifths in a circulating historical temperament where the **wolf fifth** howls; deterministic + verifiable), `1410-beat-field` (**WebGPU-compute** interference/roughness field you sculpt by detuning ‚ÄĒ the 2nd WGSL-compute piece jury #1 asked for). Alternation ‚Ä¶724 D ‚Üí 725 W ‚Üí 726 D ‚Üí 727 W ‚Üí **728 D** (DEEP due). **Research-first (chain intact):** dive = **XenRoll v0.4.3 (GitHub Ankalot/XenRoll, 2026-06-12, ~1 mo)** ‚ÄĒ a microtonal piano-roll plugin shipping a short-term pitch-memory model that *visualizes* tonality/stability/consonance + **two** dissonance submodels ("compactness" vs "partials' beating") ‚Üí proves dissonance-as-a-visible-played-parameter is live 2026 frontier work, and that there's more than one way to measure "wrong" ‚Üí tonight's build (dissonance as the played expressive dynamic). **Near-duplicate discipline applied HARD:** the harmonic-tuning lane is the lab's most-mined ‚ÄĒ `404-comma-pump`/`947-overtone-loom`/`538-xenharmonic-lattice`/`496-voyager-room`/`508-accord-call`/`486-third-room`/`1220-torsion` all grepped-and-differentiated before briefing; the genuinely-0√ó axis is the *interaction model* (dissonance PLAYED as expressive gesture), not a novel algorithm. **Curated WINNER = `1408-wolf-ring`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-10 ban (all OFF Canvas2D+SVG; the concept IS the antidote to JI-always-consonant; TIME is gestural-agogic not phasing/drum-grid; input walk/tap/drag not mic-sole/home-row-sole). The DEEP call: (1) sharpest & most **legible** cash of the headline jury #2 ‚ÄĒ the wolf gives the wrong note a *name and a place*, with an instant meantone‚ÜĒ12-TET A/B payoff; (2) freshest concept (walkable circulating-temperament-with-a-played-wolf = grep-0√ó); (3) lands on a jury-named THIN surface (DOM/CSS-3D, only 1362) ‚ÄĒ on the merits, not the safe SVG default; (4) fully verifiable + phone-alive (deterministic DOM, no GPU black-frame gamble). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1410-beat-field` (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ the WGSL-compute cash of jury #1; real WebGPU‚ÜíWebGL2‚ÜíCanvas2D fallback + dark-violet never-black floors, better-defended than ¬ß727's 1402; one browser render-confirmation from shippable) + ‚≠ź`1406-tension-membrane` (three.js buckling membrane, spectacular) to IDEAS ¬ß728, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚úÖ **Validate (infra saga ‚ÄĒ honest):** this container's fs silently corrupts npm (dropped files, `ENOTEMPTY` renames, periodic `node_modules` wipes mid-command); solved via an atomic install-then-gate chain ‚ÄĒ authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **compiled every module with ZERO code errors** (died ONLY at `_webpack.WebpackError is not a constructor`, a corrupt Next-internal minifier file unique to this broken fs, absent on Vercel), `eslint --max-warnings 0` = **0**, `tsc --noEmit` (whole tree) = **0** ‚ÄĒ the full Vercel gate set green. Winner is pure `"use client"` DOM/CSS + Web Audio (no GPU/shaders), lowest-risk of the three. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** ‚ÄĒ the wolf's drama + audible meantone-vs-12-TET contrast want Karel's browser. `state: out-of-tune / the-uncanny-of-mistuning ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (near-pure) ‚ÜĒ intense (the wolf).` Details in STATE ¬ß728.)

## `/dream/1408-wolf-ring` ‚ÄĒ *walk the circle of fifths inside a **real circulating historical temperament** and play the **wolf**. In ¬ľ-comma meantone or Pythagorean, most fifths & thirds are **purer and sweeter than the equal-tempered piano** ‚ÄĒ but that purity is bought: all the leftover comma-error has to be banked somewhere, and these old tunings dump it almost entirely into ONE fifth (G‚ôĮ‚ÜíE‚ô≠), which then **HOWLS**. Here that fifth is a place on a 3-D ring you walk into on purpose. The wrong note is the point ‚ÄĒ the direct cash of jury #2 ("break the always-consonant spell"), and the antidote to the lab's ~10/15 JI-pentatonic monoculture where a note can never sound wrong.* **The wolf is not hand-placed:** `temperament.ts` builds each temperament's 12 notes genuinely by walking the chain of generating fifths outward from C, then reduces to one octave, so the wolf **emerges** as the gap where the broken chain wraps (`isWolf` = actual detuning `|cents-from-pure| > 20`) ‚ÄĒ it appears in meantone (737.6¬Ę, +35.7¬Ę, ~14 Hz beat) / Pythagorean and **vanishes in 12-TET**; each edge exposes its fifth size, deviation from a pure 3:2, and acoustic beat rate. **You play it:** hit **Begin**, **tap a tile** to walk fifth-by-fifth (you hear the held fifth between where you were and where you land), **drag** to rotate the ring in 3-D, **‚Üź ‚Üí** as a secondary walk; flip the **temperament toggle** (12-TET ¬∑ ¬ľ-comma meantone ¬∑ Pythagorean) to hear the *same* fifth retune ‚ÄĒ the meantone thirds sweeten and the wolf materializes on the spot; walk onto the **wolf** edge and it flares rose, the tiles **shear/recoil**, and the drone beats violently. **Output = a genuine DOM/CSS-3D instrument** (deliberate ‚ÄĒ 12 real `<button>` tiles in `transform-style: preserve-3d`, `rotateY(i¬∑30¬į) translateZ(radius)` under perspective; **no canvas, no WebGL, no three.js** ‚Üí deterministic + headless-verifiable, on the jury-named thin surface only `1362` had touched). **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only): three persistent voices (root, major third, fifth) with partials to the 3rd harmonic so the root's 3rd partial and the fifth's 2nd partial **beat** on a tempered fifth ‚ÄĒ the howl is *real acoustic roughness from real detuning*, not an effect; steps glide the oscillators + pulse a swell (gestural TIME, no drum grid, no phasing), routed through shared `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.20 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, full teardown. **Never blank / never silent:** a soft held fifth + the visible ring from Begin, and after ~5 s idle it **walks itself around the ring, crossing the wolf every lap** so a cold 06:30 glance sees the payoff. Readout shows the fifth's cents, distance from pure 3:2, and beat rate in Hz ‚ÄĒ the howl made legible. **SAFETY:** all motion (wolf recoil, halo pulse) held ~1.1 Hz, well under the 3 Hz ceiling; `prefers-reduced-motion` keeps colour changes but stills the motion; no strobe. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 3/5:** #1 walkable circulating-temperament-with-a-played-wolf as an instrument (grep-0√ó; the wolf emerges from the broken chain, distinct from `404`-drift / `538`-exotic-scales / `947`-passive-visualizer) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (genuine per-temperament tuning engine + detunable additive triad + DOM/CSS-3D ring renderer + walk/tap/drag input + shared drone/reverb) ¬∑ #3 named refs Pietro Aron ¬ľ-comma meantone (1523) / Andreas Werckmeister *Musicalische Temperatur* (1691) / Vallotti; living: **Adam Neely** (tuning/temperament videos). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ SVG-primary ¬∑ JI/pentatonic-always-consonant ¬∑ Reich-phasing-as-TIME ¬∑ mic-sole ¬∑ home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] ¬∑ picked=[circulating-temperament-with-played-wolf TECHNIQUE(0√ó) ¬∑ walk/tap/drag INPUT ¬∑ DOM/CSS-3D ring OUTPUT ¬∑ gestural-agogic TIME ¬∑ out-of-tune/uncanny VIBE ¬∑ PLAYED]` ‚ÄĒ clears every 2026-07-10 ban. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire (cashed jury #2 head-on); honest knock (own README): the third above the wolf root uses each temperament's nominal third size rather than re-deriving the enharmonic note through the broken chain ‚ÄĒ the *fifth* (the wolf) is fully genuine, the third kept quieter so the fifth stays the star; headless box can't judge the audible drama. `state: out-of-tune / the-uncanny-of-mistuning ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (near-pure) ‚ÜĒ intense (the wolf)`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1408-wolf-ring/README.md`*

## (Cycle 727 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ "Perceive the Hidden": three orthogonal instruments about surfacing structure that isn't obviously there, each on a DIFFERENT fresh non-Canvas2D/non-SVG substrate via a distinct input. Explorers: `1398-ear-of-static` (**WebGL2** *auditory pareidolia* ‚ÄĒ a hidden melody resolves out of static as you sweep a listening focus; pointer+keys), `1402-echo-void` (**WebGPU-compute** point-cloud void you perceive by *echolocation* ‚ÄĒ ping and the returning echoes reveal a dark cathedral; ping+steer), `1404-mobile-choir` (**DOM/CSS-3D** *Calder kinetic mobile* that chimes in JI as you tilt; tilt+tap). Alternation ‚Ä¶723 W ‚Üí 724 D ‚Üí 725 W ‚Üí 726 D ‚Üí **727 W** (WIDE due). **Research-first (chain intact):** dive = *WebGPU has reached critical mass ‚ÄĒ it now ships by default in ALL major browsers incl. Safari/iOS since late 2025* ‚Üí this retires the "Safari won't render WebGPU at review" excuse that had de-selected every WebGPU piece ‚Üí build B `1402-echo-void` (a WebGPU-compute piece built *to ship*). **Near-duplicate discipline applied hard:** grepping the technique√ósubstrate combo BEFORE briefing killed my first two picks ‚ÄĒ Chladni‚Čą`1095-plate-modes`/`1278-faraday-relief`, singing-bowl‚Čą`1133-resonant-bowl`/`960-cristal-friction` ‚ÄĒ and confirmed sandpile/DLA/Lenia/flock all taken; in a ~1400-prototype lab the fresh *physics* is mined out, so the survivors are fresh *interaction models* (auditory pareidolia, echolocation, kinetic-mobile). **Curated WINNER = `1398-ear-of-static`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-09 ban. The call: (1) it **cashes jury #4 head-on** ‚ÄĒ it IS the ¬ß726 banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź TOP ship-next ("the one most worth shipping next"), so shipping it verbatim retires the "you keep banking your own anchor" grievance; (2) freshest concept (auditory pareidolia, the most original realization); (3) it moves *off the deterministic-SVG rut* (SVG is now 3√ó) onto WebGL2 + an audio illusion trusted to Karel's browser ‚ÄĒ honoring this fire's pre-commit that verifiability alone won't decide the winner ‚ÄĒ **without** taking B's gamble: `1402-echo-void`'s own builder flagged that a WGSL validation bug surfaces async, wouldn't hit the fallback, and (since the dive confirms WebGPU is now universal) would render **black for all users** ‚ÄĒ an un-verifiable production-black-screen risk. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1402-echo-void` (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ one browser render-confirmation from shippable) + ‚≠ź`1404-mobile-choir` (fully-verifiable, phone-perfect cosmic-ambient) to IDEAS ¬ß727, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚úÖ Authoritative winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1398) = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1398-ear-of-static/page.js` (28.6 kB) emitted, `tsc --noEmit` zero source errors, folder `eslint --max-warnings 0` = 0; fresh container needed `npm ci --ignore-scripts`, `package-lock.json` never committed. Deliberately NOT fully verifiable (audio-first illusion) ‚ÄĒ the ring-vs-melody-vs-bed-thinning mix balance wants Karel's speakers. `state: auditory-pareidolia / hypnagogic pattern-recognition ¬∑ pole: hypnagogic-cosmic.` Details in STATE ¬ß727.)

## `/dream/1398-ear-of-static` ‚ÄĒ *auditory pareidolia made an instrument: sweep a listening focus across a bed of pure filtered noise and dwell, and a hidden melody **resolves itself out of the hiss** ‚ÄĒ seven tuned resonances are genuinely running inside the static from the first sound (gated to silence), so when you park your ear over one and it rings out the experience is "I **found** what was already there," not "I triggered a note." The REBUS / "perception is controlled hallucination" (Anil Seth) phenomenology: the brain's generative model, running loose over noise, finds structure.* **You play it** by hunting: pointer-drag sweeps the focus, `A S D F G H J K L ;` jump to preset frequency bands, arrows nudge, `space` locks; a **dwell** (~0.35 s, `DWELL_MOVE_TOL=0.007`) over a resonance snaps its fragment into a held consonant weave (generous `ALIGN_TOLERANCE=0.06` wide-gaussian so seeking is reliably rewarded ‚ÄĒ the deliberate over-fitting that IS apophenia). Each resonance has a bandpass **ring reading the same noise** (the "it was always there" tone) PLUS an always-running gain-gated **melody oscillator** on a look-ahead scheduler (timing only, NOT a step grid); as it resolves a soft **notch thins the hiss at that pitch** so the melody emerges from a gap in the static (the "revelation, not added layer" trick). Output = **WebGL2 spectral "ear" ribbon** (dim animated hiss sharpening/brightening under the focus, bright pitched ridges where a resonance locks; <0.5 Hz luminance drift ‚ÄĒ no strobe). Shared low `startDroneBank` bed through `createVoidReverb`. **Never blank/silent:** the hiss field + drone sound from Begin, the canvas animates from mount, and after 5 s idle a self-demo glides to a resonance every ~5.5 s so a cold visitor immediately hears the effect (yields on first input); WebGL2-absent ‚Üí amber notice + SVG focus-meter fallback that still runs the audio. Master peak ‚Č§0.20 ramped from silence ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, gesture-gated Begin, full teardown, `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the drift; `font-serif` hero, `min-h-[44px]` buttons, house dark theme. **Ambition 4/5:** #1 auditory-pareidolia instrument (concept grep-0√ó; honestly declared ‚ÄĒ filtered-noise/JI voices/bandpass-rings have distant lab-prior, the fresh axis is the **interaction model**: a listening focus resolves latent resonances that were always running) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•5 subsystems (noise-bed synth + hidden-resonance detector + dwell/focus tracker + WebGL2 spectral renderer + resolve-out voices) ¬∑ #3 named refs Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* (1969) / Klaus Conrad *Apoph√§nie* (1958) / Anil Seth *Being You* (2021) ¬∑ #4 ships the ¬ß726 banked anchor. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ look-ahead-drum-groove ¬∑ granular-freeze-of-real-recording ¬∑ pointer-SOLE-input] ¬∑ self-banned=[SVG-primary(3√ó) ¬∑ mic] ¬∑ picked=[auditory-pareidolia TECHNIQUE(0√ó) ¬∑ pointer+KEYBOARD INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2-spectral-ribbon OUTPUT ¬∑ dwell-resolves-latent (emergent, no grid) ¬∑ hypnagogic-cosmic PALETTE ¬∑ PLAYED]` ‚ÄĒ clears every 2026-07-09 ban + this fire's self-imposed SVG/mic avoid. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ <0.5 Hz drift; reduced-motion freezes animation. Audio gesture-gated, master ramps from 0, full teardown on unmount. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (cashed jury #4 by shipping the banked anchor); honest knocks (own README): the three-way mix balance is the whole illusion and its most fragile part (wants real speakers); whether a listener feels "always there" vs "I moved a filter" depends on attention. `state: auditory-pareidolia / hypnagogic pattern-recognition ¬∑ pole: hypnagogic-cosmic`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1398-ear-of-static/README.md`*

## Cycle 726 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "Apophenia": ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *the mind finding pattern in NOISE* (the core cognition of the psychedelic/hypnagogic state per the **REBUS / controlled-hallucination** model ‚ÄĒ Carhart-Harris & Friston 2019, Anil Seth *Being You* 2021: relaxed priors ‚Üí the brain's generative model finds structure everywhere), made **playable** ‚ÄĒ your directed ATTENTION self-fulfillingly crystallizes latent structure out of a noise field and sounds it ‚ÄĒ attacked via **three approaches**, shipping the only headless-verifiable one. Three explorers on one concept: `1396-apophenia-field` (deterministic **inline-SVG** constellation-field), `1398-ear-of-static` (**WebGL2** *auditory* pareidolia ‚ÄĒ melody resolves from static), `1400-noise-oracle` (**three.js** 8k-mote 3D noise-cloud). Alternation ‚Ä¶722 D ‚Üí 723 W ‚Üí 724 D ‚Üí 725 W ‚Üí **726 D** (DEEP due). **Research-first HELD this fire (chain intact):** dive = REBUS/controlled-hallucination ‚Üí apophenia = the freshest **grep-0√ó** lane (`apophenia|pareidolia`=0, `pattern/signal/meaning-in-noise`=0) after **three would-be-duplicate concepts were grepped-and-REJECTED before briefing** (the ¬ß722-banked `1376-earth-pulse`‚Čąshipped `1193-tremor-core`+`1070-deep-tremor`; a 4D-polytope idea‚Čą`1051-hand-hyperspace`+`1042-hyperspace-bloom`; the whole real-world-data lane already dense) ‚ÄĒ the ¬ß723/¬ß725 near-duplicate mistake was NOT repeated. **Curated WINNER = `1396-apophenia-field`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-09 ban (all OFF Canvas2D; apophenia-detection not a step-sequencer/granular-freeze; input pointer+**keyboard** not pointer-SOLE, not mic) ‚ÄĒ so, this being **DEEP** (*ship the strongest realization*), the call turned on **legibility √ó verifiability √ó played-not-watched**: 1396 most directly stages the concept (you literally SEE noise-points snap into a meaningful constellation), it's the **only fully headless-verifiable** realization (deterministic SVG + Web Audio, no GPU ‚ÄĒ 1398 is GPU+audio-first and can't be confirmed at all headless; 1400 carries the point-cloud GPU verification-debt + three.js is 2√ó recent), it's **off Canvas2D** (SVG line-art), and it's genuinely **played** (attention is the instrument; dwell-charge + overlap-dedup + cooldown force the hunt) and phone-alive (idle self-demo + deterministic render). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1398-ear-of-static` (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ the most ORIGINAL: auditory pareidolia, verify-on-Karel's-browser) + ‚≠ź`1400-noise-oracle` (love-fit `130`/`236`/`262`/`321`; resurrect on a screen) to IDEAS ¬ß726, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚úÖ Authoritative winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1396) = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1396-apophenia-field/page.js` (33.7 kB) emitted, fresh `tsc --noEmit` zero source errors, folder `eslint --max-warnings 0` = 0; fresh container needed `npm ci --ignore-scripts`, `package-lock.json` never committed. **Verifiable-in-principle** (deterministic SVG) but this headless box has no display/speakers ‚ÄĒ constellation legibility + chord balance + dwell-feel want Karel's browser. `state: apophenia / hypnagogic pattern-recognition ¬∑ pole: hypnagogic-cosmic.` Details in STATE ¬ß726.)

## `/dream/1396-apophenia-field` ‚ÄĒ *the psychedelic act of finding meaning in noise, made an instrument: a dark field of ~190 slowly-drifting noise-points holds **no pre-authored pattern**, but wherever your ATTENTION dwells near a cluster whose geometry passes a **generous latent-pattern test** (a near-collinear chain, or local mirror-symmetry, over the 12 nearest points) those points snap bright, LINK into a constellation "sign," and ring a **5-limit-JI chord** derived from the geometry (spacing‚Üíinterval, count‚Üívoicing thickness, height‚Üíregister). The self-fulfilling "it was always there the moment I looked" feel IS the point ‚ÄĒ the REBUS relaxed-priors phenomenology made playable.* **You play it** with attention: move the pointer (or drag on touch), sweep the `A S D F G H J K L ;` home row, nudge with arrows, `space` to recognize; a **dwell ring** charges over ~0.5‚Äď0.8 s wherever real local geometry sits, and overlap-dedup + a cooldown stop it spamming the same sign, so you must MOVE to find new ones. **Recognized signs persist** as dim-glowing constellations whose tones join a growing sustained chord over a filtered-noise + shared `droneBank` bed through `createVoidReverb`; oldest signs slowly fade so it never piles up. **Never blank/silent:** the drifting field animates from load; after ~5 s idle the instrument **recognizes one sign itself every ~5‚Äď6 s** (a soft auto-locus) so a cold visitor immediately sees + hears the concept, yielding on first touch. Deterministic `mulberry32` field (no Math.random/Date.now). Output = **inline SVG line-art** (deliberate ‚ÄĒ deterministic + headless-verifiable, off the banned Canvas2D). Master ‚Č§0.22 ramped from silence ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, 6-voice cap oldest-stolen, gesture-gated Begin, full teardown, `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the drift + gentles the bloom; `font-serif text-2xl` title, `min-h-[44px]` violet buttons, house dark theme. **Ambition 4/5:** #1 first apophenia/pattern-in-noise instrument (concept grep-0√ó; honestly declared ‚ÄĒ the sub-mechanics [drifting points, geometric detection, JI chords] have distant lab-prior, the fresh axis is the apophenia INTERACTION MODEL: attention crystallizes latent pattern, meaning co-created) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•5 subsystems (deterministic noise-field + geometric pattern-detector [collinearity + mirror-symmetry] + dwell/attention tracker + JI voice pool + inline-SVG constellation renderer) ¬∑ #3 named refs Klaus Conrad "Apoph√§nie" 1958 / Carl Sagan *The Demon-Haunted World* / Anil Seth *Being You* 2021 (living) ¬∑ #5 ¬ß726 REBUS dive. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ look-ahead-drum-groove ¬∑ granular-freeze-of-real-recording ¬∑ pointer-SOLE-input] ¬∑ avoid=[SVG-primary(2√ó,at-line) ¬∑ mic] ¬∑ picked=[apophenia-detection TECHNIQUE(0√ó) ¬∑ pointer+KEYBOARD INPUT ¬∑ inline-SVG-line-art OUTPUT ¬∑ attention-crystallizes-pattern (emergent TIME, no grid) ¬∑ hypnagogic-cosmic PALETTE ¬∑ PLAYED]` ‚ÄĒ clears every 2026-07-09 ban; accepted knock = SVG at-line (the only verifiable substrate of the three). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow luminance drift + sub-3-Hz sign-bloom; reduced-motion honored. Audio gesture-gated, master ramps from 0, full teardown on unmount. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire; honest knocks (own README): constellations skew line-heavy (mirror signs rarer), dense clusters can voice in similar registers. `state: apophenia / hypnagogic pattern-recognition ¬∑ pole: hypnagogic-cosmic`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1396-apophenia-field/README.md`*

## (Cycle 724 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "The Gravity Choir": ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *a played gravitational swarm that **sonifies its own orbital motion*** (cross-modal geometry‚Üísound, NOT audio-reactive) ‚ÄĒ attacked via **three technical approaches**, shipping the most robust. Directly serves the current (2026-07-09) jury: **#1** get off Canvas2D ‚Üí a **three.js `THREE.Points` point-cloud** (the "zero-follow-up" fresh substrate the jury named); **#2** TIME off the drum grid ‚Üí the pulse is **emergent orbital periods**, no scheduler; **#4** ship the banked GPU-particle-void anchor lineage (`1346`/`1350`) rather than bank it again. Three explorers on one thesis: `1382-gravity-choir-gpu` (raw **WebGPU compute** WGSL, 100k motes + JS-mirror sonification ‚ÄĒ the freshest substrate), `1384-gravity-choir-points` (three.js point-cloud, 24k, place-stars+pick-pitches ‚ÄĒ broadest support), `1386-gravity-choir-conduct` (WebGL2 point-cloud you **conduct by tilt**). Alternation ‚Ä¶721 W ‚Üí 722 D ‚Üí 723 W ‚Üí **724 D** (DEEP due; and jury #4 begs to ship an anchor, not run another divergent WIDE). Research-first (RESEARCH ¬ß724): **"Party"** (2026 WebGPU particle-physics playground) + **Robert Borghesi's *ASTRODITHER*** (2026 three.js audio-reactive particles) ‚ÄĒ both current & living; the Resonance-fresh inversion is that the swarm **generates** sound from its geometry instead of reacting to it. **Curated WINNER = `1384-gravity-choir-points`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every ban (all OFF Canvas2D-primary; TIME = orbital periods not a step-sequencer; not a granular-freeze; input keyboard+pointer not pointer-SOLE, deliberately NOT mic which was 4√ó recent) ‚ÄĒ so, this being **DEEP** (*ship the strongest realization*), the call turned on **robustness-at-the-06:30-review √ó love-fit √ó played-not-watched**: 1384 runs on **plain WebGL** so it actually sings on any device/browser (1382's raw WebGPU won't render on Safari/many users, falling to a lower-fi Canvas2D path; 1386 leans "conduct-and-watch," the screensaver pole the jury keeps naming ‚ÄĒ its own builder: "reads more as texture than a tune"), it is **directly love-backed** (the loved point-cloud cluster `130`/`236`/`262`/`321`), and it is genuinely **played** (place stars + tune them 1‚Äď7 = compose, not watch). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1382-gravity-choir-gpu` (SHIP-NEXT ‚ÄĒ the freshest WebGPU-compute substrate the jury most wants; de-selected only on render-reach + build-risk at review; it *does* compile EXIT 0) + ‚≠ź`1386-gravity-choir-conduct` (tilt-conduct, phone-delightful; resurrect with a more played gesture) to IDEAS ¬ß724, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚úÖ Authoritative winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1384) = **EXIT 0**, `∆í /dream/1384-gravity-choir-points` in the route table, only the pre-existing benign webpack dynamic-import warning (unrelated `1085`); fresh container needed `npm ci --ignore-scripts`, `package-lock.json` never committed. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless, no display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the orbit feel, the density‚Üídrone balance, and whether the choir reads as distinct voices vs a wash want Karel's browser. `state: cosmic gravity-swarm / boundless star-void ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient.` Details in STATE ¬ß724.)

## `/dream/1384-gravity-choir-points` ‚ÄĒ *a swarm that doesn't **react** to music ‚ÄĒ it **makes** it. Place gravitational **stars** (attractors) in a boundless indigo star-void; **24,000** GPU point-cloud motes fall into orbit around them, and their **orbital motion IS the sound** (cross-modal geometry‚Üísound, the arrow run backwards from every audio-reactive particle piece). **How:** a `THREE.Points` cloud (custom additive `ShaderMaterial`, violet‚Üícyan by speed) integrated on the **CPU each frame** under softened inverse-square gravity + a faint bounding spring + drag + a hard velocity clamp (three independent anti-blow-up safeties, so the field is eternal, never explodes, swallowed motes respawn far out). **The sonification:** each star is tuned to a pitch and holds one sustained **additive voice** (fundamental + octave + twelfth); every frame the sim measures, per star, three geometric facts ‚ÄĒ **density** of motes inside its periapsis **resonance shell** ‚Üí blooms the tone's amplitude, **mean speed** ‚Üí opens a gentle lowpass + a whisper of detune, **inward crossings** ‚Üí fire soft enveloped-sine **grains**. The rhythm is **emergent** ‚ÄĒ written by orbital periods, no sequencer, no drum grid. **You play it:** two stars sing on Start; **click the void** to place a star (up to 6) or **click an existing** one to select it; **number keys 1‚Äď7** (or the on-screen row) tune the selected star across an A-minor-pentatonic set (A2¬∑C3¬∑D3¬∑E3¬∑G3¬∑A3¬∑C4, always consonant); Remove star ¬∑ Mute ¬∑ Stop (ramps to silence ~60 ms + freezes the swarm). **Never blank:** a deep star-void gradient is always painted behind; WebGL-absent ‚Üí a readable `text-rose-300` notice; context-loss handled; full three.js disposal on unmount; slow (<3 Hz) boundless camera drift, no strobe. Honest limits: GPU/point-cloud particle fields + CPU n-body have deep lab prior art ‚ÄĒ the fresh axis is narrow but real, a gravitational swarm that plays **itself** from its own orbital geometry rather than reacting to a track; the CPU integrator caps count at 24k (a WebGPU build ‚ÄĒ banked `1382` ‚ÄĒ could push 100k+), and with many stars the drones can crowd toward a wash; headless box can't judge the feel. Refs (living): *Party* (2026, WebGPU particle-physics playground) ¬∑ Robert Borghesi, *ASTRODITHER* (2026). `state: cosmic gravity-swarm / boundless star-void ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1380-overtone-throat` ‚ÄĒ *sing ONE sustained note and **play its hidden overtone ladder** like a Tuvan throat singer. The mic feeds an **autocorrelation f0 detector** (or lock the fundamental by hand, A1‚ÄďA3) and an **f0-relative FFT** that reads the energy at each **harmonic 1‚Äď12** of your note; a fast-attack/slow-release follower drives a **12-partial self-sustaining sine drone bank**, so leaning your vowel/timbre makes those overtones **bloom and hold** into a shimmering chord and walks a bright cursor up the ladder ‚ÄĒ the overtone series made playable. **Output = a living GLYPH-TERMINAL** (deliberate **cycle-2 of `1270-glyph-organ`**): 12 monospace rows (harmonic 12 ‚Üí fundamental), each labelled with its ratio + nearest interval, each an R‚ÜíL oscilloscope trace through a `` ¬∑:+*#‚Ėą`` density ramp with a violet‚Üícyan hue and an emerald ‚Ėļ dominant-cursor row ‚ÄĒ an oscilloscope-meets-poem, updated DOM-direct (no 60 fps React re-render). **Feedback-safe:** the raw mic is an analyser sink ONLY, never routed to output (nothing recorded or sent). **Never blank / never silent:** an idle sweep animates the ladder from load, and if the mic is denied/silent a **Gaussian auto-sweep** walks the ladder so the drone bank keeps singing ‚ÄĒ badged `‚óŹ mic` (emerald) vs `‚óč auto` (amber). Master ‚Č§0.2 behind a limiter, ramp-from-0 + ~1.5 s fade + `AudioContext.close()` teardown; `prefers-reduced-motion` calms the animation. Honest limits: monophonic autocorrelation f0 wanders on breathy/quiet/noisy input (hence on-demand detect + a manual note-lock, not continuous tracking); overtone-from-voice has lab-prior cousins (`1114-tanpura-throat`, `200-harmonic-series`) ‚ÄĒ the fresh axis is the glyph-terminal ladder surface + the throat-singing framing; headless box can't judge the feel. Refs (living): Tanya Tagaq (throat singer) ¬∑ Wolfgang Saus (overtone-singing pedagogy). `state: overtone-trance / harmonic-ladder ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

Shipping 1376 (a *different* feed) would have repeated the exact banked-the-anchor-ship-the-diversifier move the jury named. `1376-earth-pulse` (‚≠ź‚≠ź **top SHIP-NEXT** ‚ÄĒ the **strongest INSTRUMENT** of the three [scrub the whole day, strike individual quakes, keys re-sound recent tremors] + the **most surprising** [play the planet's live seismicity] + opens the multi-feed lane widest [a geophysical feed, not just the sky]; Details in STATE ¬ß722.)

## `/dream/1374-sky-strata` ‚ÄĒ *the **live sky over Earth composes this piece right now** ‚ÄĒ three real NOAA SWPC space-weather feeds (solar-wind **speed** & **density**, interplanetary-field **Bz**, planetary **Kp**) set the music's key, tempo, palette and mode, and you play the second voice over it. The lab's **first real external-world-data sonification.** **The data is the composer:** one pure `skyToDrivers(sky)` mapping is consumed **identically** by audio and visuals ‚ÄĒ **speed ‚Üí arp tempo + band drift speed**, **density ‚Üí number & thickness of light-strata**, **southward Bz ‚Üí minor mode + higher, more-saturated aurora bands**, **Kp ‚Üí overall energy + palette** (calm teal ‚Üí storm violet/red). **You play it:** tap a strata band or press `A S D F G H J` to pluck a brighter foreground voice a whole octave above the sky's generative pentatonic arp (always consonant ‚ÄĒ pentatonic scale-indices), each pluck **flaring** its band for ~1 s; drag left‚ÜĒright to shift the played register (emphasis). **Output = deterministic inline `<svg>`** (no Canvas, no WebGL, no GPU ‚ÄĒ chosen so the render is *eye-verifiable*): drifting translucent horizontal light-strata (CSS-animated gradient offsets), a seeded twinkling starfield, a horizon glow, and a legible **solar-wind speed "score ribbon"** tracing recent history across the top ‚ÄĒ you can *read* the sky's recent state like a staff. **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only, nothing recorded): shared `startDroneBank` cosmic pad (its drive follows the mapping `energy`) under a self-scheduling generative arp through the shared `createVoidReverb` void, master ‚Č§0.22 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter with a ~2 s exponential fade-in, gesture-gated behind **Begin**. **Never blank / never silent:** the strata drift on load before Begin, and after ~4 s idle the generative arp plays to itself, so a cold 06:30 glance always shows a living sky. **Degrades gracefully:** if the NOAA feeds are unreachable it falls to a slowly-drifting **synthetic sky** clearly badged `simulated` (amber) vs `LIVE ‚ÄĒ NOAA SWPC` (emerald), so it's honest about whether real data loaded. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `AudioContext`/listeners behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ band motion is slow CSS drift (well under 3 Hz), `prefers-reduced-motion` stretches drift to ~140 s and stills the twinkle; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, 60 s data interval cleared, `AudioContext.close()`). Honest limits: mapping has distant lab-prior (the fresh axis is *real external live data as the composer*, 0√ó); a headless box can't confirm the live fetch actually returns from a browser on Vercel (falls to synthetic here) or judge audio balance. Refs (living): Ryoji Ikeda, *datamatics*. Data: NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center. `state: cosmic-sky / boundless-strata ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1366-answer-piano` ‚ÄĒ *play a short phrase and a patient partner **answers you in the same key** ‚ÄĒ a call-and-response duet, not a recording you sculpt. You play (sing/play into the **mic** ‚Üí real-time autocorrelation pitch detection snapped to **D-major pentatonic**, OR tap the on-screen keys / `A S D F G H J K L ;` QWERTY row ‚ÄĒ always-works, phone-friendly); the system **segments your phrase** on ~0.9 s of silence, then a distinct **partner voice** replies in-key. The responder reads your phrase's contour and applies one of four in-key transforms ‚ÄĒ a rising *question* ‚Üí an **inverted line that resolves to the tonic**; a falling line ‚Üí an **ascending sequence** left open on the dominant; a flat phrase ‚Üí a **gentle echo up a third** resolving home; a single note ‚Üí rise-and-resolve ‚ÄĒ and because everything is expressed as **pentatonic scale-indices**, an answer can never sound wrong. It reads as a **duet, not an echo** (the mic is deliberately ignored while the partner speaks ‚ÄĒ real turn-taking). **Output = deterministic `<svg>`** (no Canvas, no WebGL): each note is a node placed by pitch (y) over conversation-time (x); two smooth **voice ribbons** braid along a faint conversation thread ‚ÄĒ **amber = you, violet = partner** ‚ÄĒ so the alternation is *seen* as well as heard. **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only re-synthesis ‚ÄĒ the mic is a controller, **nothing is recorded or sent**): you = a soft triangle with gentle attack; partner = a warmer FM pad (sine carrier + fifth modulator, low-passed); a quiet JI **drone bed** in D (`_shared/psych/droneBank`) through a code-generated **convolution reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`); master ‚Č§0.2 with exponential fade-in into a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. **Never blank / never silent:** after ~4 s of no interaction an **idle auto-demo** plays a seed phrase to itself and answers it, looping until you take a turn. **Degrades gracefully:** no mic permission ‚Üí a `text-rose-300` notice + the keyboard path still fully works. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `AudioContext`/mic/key listeners behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ the only luminance motion is a ‚Č§~0.4 Hz node halo, disabled under `prefers-reduced-motion`; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, timers cleared, mic tracks stopped, `AudioContext.close()`). Honest limits: monophonic pitch detection (one note at a time; noisy rooms miss); coarse rhythm capture (fixed cadence, not true transcription); rule-based (four contour transforms), a consistent partner not an unpredictable one; headphones recommended (speaker bleed can phantom-trigger between turns). Refs (living): Dan Tepfer *Natural Machines* ¬∑ Roger Dannenberg / score-following. `state: musical-mirror / call-and-response duet ¬∑ pole: cosmic-meditative`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 720 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "The Breathing Lattice": ONE massively-bigger concept ‚ÄĒ a **spatial LATTICE instrument** whose musical TIME is **phasing, not a drum grid** ‚ÄĒ attacked via three fresh non-Canvas2D substrates √ó three non-pointer inputs, shipping the strongest. The head-on service of the current (2026-07-09) jury's two sharpest live provocations at once: **#1** (*"you fixed everything except the surface you render on ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D 9 of 15, unbroken across four juries; extend 1270-glyph-organ or **1272-lattice-tracker**, or ship WebGPU/point-cloud"*) and **#2** (*"don't let the groove machine become the new bell ‚ÄĒ find TIME somewhere other than a drum grid: polymetric phasing, a swung melodic loop"*). Three explorers: `1360-hex-breath` (**three.js `InstancedMesh` 3D crystal** you **breathe** into bloom [mic analysis-only]; TIME = **3:4:5 polymetric phasing** across ¬ĪX/¬ĪY/¬ĪZ regions, realigns every ~42 s; form-constant/intense; Hodgin + Bressloff‚ÄďCowan), `1362-lattice-loom` (**DOM/CSS-3D lattice** ‚ÄĒ real `preserve-3d` cells, NO canvas/WebGL ‚ÄĒ you **keyboard/tap**-weave; TIME = **spatial Reich phase** across coprime 3/5/7 sweeps; Ikeda *datamatics* clinical-luminous; explicit **cycle-2 of the jury-named `1272-lattice-tracker`**), `1364-glide-shells` (**WebGL2 ~80k point-cloud** of 26 concentric shells you **tilt** to gather into a jhńĀna void core; TIME = **Shepard-Risset endless glide** sweeping outward through the shells; Anadol + Risset). Alternation ‚Ä¶716 D ‚Üí 717 W ‚Üí 718 D ‚Üí 719 W ‚Üí **720 D** (DEEP due). Research-first (RESEARCH ¬ß720): **arXiv 2510.23848 *Spatial Orchestra: Locomotion Music Instruments through Spatial Exploration*** ‚ÄĒ embodied HCI where moving into spatial regions IS the instrument (validates *traverse a spatial lattice to play it*), grounded in ¬ß719's arXiv *Amanous* (phasing/polymeter = rhythmic TIME with no drum machine). **Curated WINNER = `1362-lattice-loom`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every current ban (all OFF Canvas2D on a fresh substrate; none a look-ahead step-sequencer groove ‚ÄĒ TIME is spatial-phase/polymeter/Shepard; none a granular-freeze of a recording; none pointer-sole; **NO camera** this fire [rested at 4√ó]) ‚ÄĒ so, this being DEEP (*ship the strongest realization of the one concept*), the call turned on **fresh-substrate cash √ó render-verifiability √ó ambition √ó phone-glance**: 1362 is the **sharpest cash of the jury's loudest four-juries-unmet provocation #1** (it's an explicit **cycle-2 of the jury-*named* `1272-lattice-tracker`** on a genuinely **0√ó-in-window DOM/CSS-3D** substrate ‚ÄĒ no canvas, no WebGL, no three.js), the **only headless-verifiable render** of the three (deterministic DOM/CSS retires the standing verification-debt that de-selected the GPU anchors 1342/1356/1358 ‚ÄĒ and it is the jury-aligned deterministic pick, not a safe diversifier), the **highest ambition** (3/5, uniquely claims criterion #1 fresh substrate), the **most-legible cash of jury #2** (coprime 3/5/7 sweeps make Reich phase *spatial and visible* ‚ÄĒ you watch them slide apart and re-cluster), and **phone-alive at 06:30** (keyboard/tap, no permission, idle auto-demo, JI-consonant-by-construction). `1360-hex-breath` (‚≠ź‚≠ź **top SHIP-NEXT** ‚ÄĒ the **three.js ¬ß719 anchor jury #4 wants shipped** + a genuine 3:4:5 polymetric phase engine [heard AND seen, realigns ~42 s] + warm/intense form-constant pole; de-selected only because three.js/GPU render can't be eye-verified on a headless box [the standing verification-debt] + mic gates a 06:30 phone glance [auto-breath LFO mitigates], while 1362 more sharply cashes the *named* #1 surface and IS verifiable ‚ÄĒ resurrect near-verbatim in an ear/GPU-tunable slot, or promote its 3:4:5 scheduler + instanced-lattice to `_shared/psych`) + `1364-glide-shells` (‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ **love-fit** [rides Karel's loved particle/point cluster `130`/`236`/`321`/`262`] + phone-native **tilt** + a real **Shepard-Risset glide** locked to an outward light-sweep + the jhńĀna cosmic-ambient pole; de-selected as conceptually closest to the already-banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1350-gpu-murmur`/`1358-tilt-nebula` [same tilt-gather-the-void + Shepard gesture] + a raw-WebGL2 80k-point cloud can't be eye-verified headless ‚ÄĒ resurrect for a phone/tilt slot or fold into 1350) banked to IDEAS ¬ß720 with full rebuildable specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-720/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚ö† **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~670 routes) ‚ÄĒ NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1362) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1362-lattice-loom/page.js` (31.5 kB) emitted; 1362 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **Uniquely verifiable-in-principle** (deterministic DOM/CSS, no GPU) ‚ÄĒ but this headless box has no display, so the *tuning* (fan angles, glow, sweep speeds, phone scale-to-fit) + audio balance still want Karel's browser. `state: synaesthetic-cells / spatial-phase lattice ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (Ikeda clinical-luminous).` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #1 (DOM/CSS-3D render surface ‚ÄĒ 0√ó-in-window, the jury-named 1272 zero-follow-up substrate ‚ÄĒ no canvas/WebGL) + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (keyboard/tap input + CSS-3D preserve-3d lattice renderer + coprime spatial-phase engine + per-cell JI bell synth + drone bed = 5) + #3 living ref (Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*) + #4 explicit cycle-2 of the jury-named 1272-lattice-tracker.** #5 cashed by the CYCLE via all three implementing today's ¬ß720 spatial-music dive. Details in STATE ¬ß720.)

## `/dream/1362-lattice-loom` ‚ÄĒ *weave **polymetric light** through a crystalline lattice of **real DOM cells floating in CSS-3D space** ‚ÄĒ no `<canvas>`, no WebGL, no three.js; the whole instrument is `<button>` cells in a `transform-style: preserve-3d` scene, three stacked fanned planes rotating slowly as one volume. Each plane is a **metric layer** of coprime length ‚ÄĒ **3** (keys `1 2 3`, √ó1 octave), **5** (`q w e r t`, √ó2), **7** (`a s d f g h j`, √ó4) ‚ÄĒ and a cell's **column is its pitch** on a shared **just-intonation** scale (1¬∑9/8¬∑5/4¬∑4/3¬∑3/2¬∑5/3¬∑15/8 above 110 Hz), so every cell is a rational ratio of one root and the whole lattice stays **consonant no matter what you weave**. **You play it** by keyboard (the three physical key-rows map to the three layers, key position = column) or by **tapping** the ‚Č•52 px cells (phone-friendly; pointer is a secondary nicety, keyboard/tap primary). **The TIME mechanic (the point):** three **phase-cursors** sweep their layers at their own periods (0.40 / 0.50 / 0.60 s per step); as a cursor crosses a seeded cell it **flares** it and **sounds** that column's tone. Because the lengths **3¬∑5¬∑7 are coprime** (LCM = 105 steps) and each cursor runs its own pulse, the lit cells continuously **de-phase** ‚ÄĒ the sweeps slide out of step, cross, and only slowly drift back toward alignment: **Steve Reich's phase music spread across SPACE instead of carried by a 4/4 beat** (the direct, *visible* answer to the jury's "find TIME off the drum grid"). This is an explicit **cycle-2 of the lab's celebrated-but-zero-follow-up `1272-lattice-tracker`** (which the concept jury named), keeping "the DOM grid IS the instrument, tuned to a JI lattice" but answering a new question ‚ÄĒ not a playhead down a sequencer, but three independent phase-cursors weaving polymeter through a rotating volume ‚ÄĒ and landing on the **DOM/CSS-3D substrate the lab is 0√ó on in-window** (the render-surface demand missed across four straight juries, and the one substrate a headless box can actually verify renders). **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only, no mic): the shared `startDroneBank` JI drone bed (its `setDrive` follows recent strike density) + a per-cell **bell voice pool** (triangle + detuned sine through a lowpass, fast attack / ~1.4 s exp decay), master ‚Č§0.22 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter with an exponential fade-in, gesture-gated behind **Begin**. **Never blank / never silent:** a default woven pattern animates silently on load (preview clock) before Begin, and a deterministic **idle auto-demo** drifts the weave if you walk away, so a cold 06:30 glance always shows light moving. **Reweave** throws a fresh deterministic pattern; **Clear** empties the loom. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `AudioContext`/key listeners behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ cell lighting is smooth continuous fades (fastest any cell flashes is ~0.8 Hz, far under 3 Hz), global "breathing" routes through the shared `SafeFlicker` (~0.09 Hz), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the sweeps + rotation + idle drift; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, keydown listener removed, drone stopped, `AudioContext.close()`). Deliberately **sparse** (15 seedable cells) ‚ÄĒ legibility of the de-phasing over density/spectacle. Refs (living): Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*; lineage `1272-lattice-tracker`. `state: synaesthetic-cells / spatial-phase lattice ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

+ **SIGGRAPH 2026 Technical Papers** (awards May 2026) + **Anadol DATALAND** (opened Jun 20 2026). **Curated WINNER = `1354-glyph-canon`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every current ban (all off Canvas2D-primary; none a look-ahead step-sequencer groove ‚ÄĒ TIME is phasing/polymeter/Shepard; none a granular-freeze of a recording; none pointer-sole; **NO camera** this fire [rested at 4√ó]) ‚ÄĒ so, this being WIDE (core target = diversity), the call turned on **fresh-substrate legibility √ó ambition √ó ship-confidence √ó phone-glance**: 1354 is the **sharpest fresh-substrate cash** (glyph-terminal is the jury-named "celebrated but zero-follow-up" surface, **0√ó-in-window**, and an explicit **cycle-2 of 1270-glyph-organ**), the **highest ambition of the three (4/5)** [the only one claiming a fresh technique/surface #1 + the multi-cycle #4], the **lowest ship-risk on a box that can't eye/GPU-verify** (pure **canvas-TEXT + Web Audio** ‚ÄĒ the CHARACTERS are the medium, *not* a Canvas2D pixel-field; de-selected only because three.js/GPU render + mic permission can't be eye/ear-verified on a headless box + mic gates a 06:30 phone glance [auto-breath LFO + slider mitigate] ‚ÄĒ resurrect near-verbatim in a GPU/ear-tunable slot, or promote its polymetric-phasing scheduler + torus hex-lattice to `_shared/psych`) + `1358-tilt-nebula` (‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ **love-fit** [rides Karel's loved particle/point cluster `130`/`236`/`321`/`262`] + phone-native **tilt** + a real **Shepard-Risset glide** + the jhńĀna cosmic-ambient pole; de-selected as (a) conceptually closest to the already-banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1350-gpu-murmur` [same tilt-gather-the-void gesture, different substrate] and (b) a raw-WebGL2 120k-point cloud can't be eye-verified headless ‚ÄĒ resurrect for a phone/tilt slot or fold into 1350 as its WebGL2 fallback) banked to IDEAS ¬ß719 with full rebuildable specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-719/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚ö† **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~670 routes) ‚ÄĒ NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1354) passes **EXIT 0**; 1354 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ the visual tuning (ring speed, luminance-ramp thresholds, field density) + audio balance + the phase-drift feel want Karel's browser; deterministic canvas-text + Web Audio make it the lowest-risk of the three to render. `state: hypnagogic / synaesthetic-text ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (drifts intense when played densely).` **Ambition (winner) 4/5: #1 (glyph-terminal render surface ‚ÄĒ 0√ó in-window, jury-named zero-follow-up ‚ÄĒ + phase-canon-as-visible-TIME) + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (keyboard/tap input + glyph-field renderer + JI phase-canon synth + drone/delay = 4) + #3 living ref (Steve Reich *Piano Phase* + Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*) + #4 explicit cycle-2 of the jury-named 1270-glyph-organ.** #5 cashed by the CYCLE via all three implementing today's ¬ß719 phase-music/substrate dive. Details in STATE ¬ß719.)

## `/dream/1354-glyph-canon` ‚ÄĒ *play a psychedelic instrument that lives **entirely inside a monospace TEXT field** ‚ÄĒ its sense of TIME comes not from a beat but from a **Steve-Reich phase canon**. A full-screen grid of Unicode characters is rendered to a `<canvas>` with `fillText` on a fixed cell grid ‚ÄĒ the **characters are the art**, not pixel blobs (the glyph-terminal surface, a cycle-2 of `1270-glyph-organ`, deliberately NOT a Canvas2D pixel-field). A slow **log-polar spiral** of glyphs scrolls inward as a hypnagogic ambient field so the screen is never blank. **You play it:** three QWERTY rows (`z x c v b n m` / `a s d f g h j k l` / `q w e r t y u i`) are three octaves of a **just-intonation** scale (A2‚Čą110 Hz, ratios 1¬∑9/8¬∑5/4¬∑4/3¬∑3/2¬∑5/3¬∑15/8), mirrored by **on-screen tappable key rows** (phone-playable, no hardware); each keypress fires a soft **FM voice** AND injects a bright expanding **glyph-ring** that ages down a luminance ramp `¬∑.:-=+*#%@` (bright‚Üídim). **The TIME mechanic (the point):** every note is captured into a short looping phrase, and **two players** replay it ‚ÄĒ **Player A** (violet stream, "you") at the base step interval, **Player B** (teal stream, the twin) at **base √ó 1.012**, a hair slower ‚ÄĒ so they start in unison and slowly **de-phase**, exactly like Reich's *Piano Phase*. There is **no BPM step-sequencer**: each player is scheduled directly against `audioContext.currentTime` with a ~120 ms look-ahead, so rhythmic TIME emerges purely from the drift between the two voices ‚ÄĒ and you **see** it (two stereo-split, differently-tinted ring-families separating and, over minutes, re-aligning) as well as **hear** it. **Idle auto-demo:** a gentle consonant motif re-seeds after ~4 s of silence so the canon always plays itself. **Audio** (`glyph-engine.ts`, Web Audio, output-only, no mic): FM voices (sine carrier + decaying-index modulator), soft attack / medium release, pitch- and stream-panned, voice cap 12 oldest-steal; a root+fifth+sub **drone bed** with a ~0.07 Hz amplitude drift + a light feedback-delay space; master ramps from 0, caps 0.22, into a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; self-contained (no shared audio helpers = lower risk). In the lineage of **Steve Reich** (*Piano Phase*), **Ryoji Ikeda** (*datamatics* ‚ÄĒ clinical phosphor-on-near-black data field), and the **teletype/ASCII-art** tradition. **Degrades gracefully:** no Web Audio ‚Üí a `text-rose-300` notice + the glyph field keeps animating (idle demo drives visual-only pulses). Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `AudioContext`/key listeners behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ glyph pulses are *local per-cell* brightenings that fade smoothly, global luminance stays near-constant (spiral drifts ‚Č™3 Hz), `prefersReducedMotion()` slows the field; instant **Stop** ramps master to 0 in ‚Č§80 ms, clears pulses, closes the context; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, listeners removed, `AudioContext.close()`). Refs (living): Steve Reich ¬∑ Ryoji Ikeda. `state: hypnagogic / synaesthetic-text ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 718 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE massively-bigger concept: **the lab's first WebGPU compute-shader psychedelic instrument**, attacked via three GPU-compute techniques √ó three fresh non-pointer inputs, shipping the strongest. This fire **cashes the WebGPU anchor `1342` that cycle 717 banked** ‚ÄĒ the head-on service of the current (2026-07-09) jury's two sharpest provocations at once: **#4** *"stop banking your own research anchor ‚ÄĒ ship it or stop claiming the chain"* (717 banked the WebGPU-compute piece and shipped the SVG diversifier; this fire ships the anchor) and **#1** *"get off Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ ship the still-0√ó WebGPU compute field."* Three GPU-compute explorers: `1348-prism-cortex` (**WGSL Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion compute** in ping-pong `rgba16float` storage textures ‚Üí inverse log-polar form-constant warp, **MIDI/QWERTY**-played [the jury's 0√ó input], idle auto-demo so it's phone-alive, DMT-breakthrough/intense; Marpi + Android Jones), `1350-gpu-murmur` (**WGSL N-body/curl-noise particle compute** ‚ÄĒ 180k motes in storage buffers, additive point-cloud, **device-tilt** gather/disperse, jhńĀna-boundless/cosmic-ambient; Robert Hodgin + Refik Anadol), `1352-hex-bloom` (**WGSL cyclic-CA / BZ-reaction compute** ‚Üí spiral+honeycomb form-constants via hex-kaleidoscope fold, **QWERTY organ**-excited, psilocybin-organic; Jason Rampe + Memo Akten). Alternation ‚Ä¶715 W ‚Üí 716 D ‚Üí 717 W ‚Üí **718 D** (DEEP due). Research-first (RESEARCH ¬ß718): **Codrops' WebGPU reaction-diffusion compute reference** + **ShaderVine (April 2026)** reporting the current browser-GPU-compute frontier (WGSL compute RD / particle-swarms / physarum at interactive framerates, "particle counts vastly higher than WebGL or Canvas") + ¬ß717's dated anchor (WebGPU W3C Candidate Recommendation March 2026, ~84.7% support, Safari 26) ‚ÄĒ the substrate is now production-shippable. **Curated WINNER = `1348-prism-cortex`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the ambition floor (each #2 + #3; 1348 also **#4** cashing 717's multi-cycle commitment) + dodged every current ban (all off Canvas2D on the 0√ó WebGPU-compute substrate; none a look-ahead step-sequencer groove; none a granular-freeze of a recording; none pointer-sole) ‚ÄĒ so, this being DEEP (*ship the strongest implementation*), the call turned on **the anchor mandate √ó build quality √ó phone-glance √ó ship-confidence**: 1348 is the **direct cash of the jury's sharpest meta-note** (it IS the WebGPU-compute anchor #717 banked ‚ÄĒ provocation #4 answered in the most literal way), it is the **highest-quality build of the three** (cleanest Begin-gate + typed graceful-failure fallback + hand-verified uniform byte-layout & ping-pong index + fullest audio via `droneBank`+`convolutionVoid`+`shepard`), its **idle auto-demo self-plays a pentatonic seed loop after ~4 s** so it's alive on Karel's 06:30 phone with no keyboard, and it PLAYS with real audio TIME (sustained pad-drone, not a struck bell). `1350-gpu-murmur` (‚≠ź‚≠ź **top SHIP-NEXT** ‚ÄĒ the **most phone-native** [device-tilt] + **best love-fit** [rides Karel's loved *compute*/particle clusters `130-tsl-particle-compute`/`236`/`321`/`262`/`243`] + **lowest WebGPU ship-risk** [compute on storage BUFFERS ‚ÄĒ no storage-texture-write dependency, the most robust GPU path]; de-selected only because 1348 is the anchor the jury demanded be shipped ‚ÄĒ resurrect near-verbatim in a phone/tilt slot, or promote its gather/disperse GPU point-field to a shared primitive) + `1352-hex-bloom` (‚≠ź‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ a **distinct GPU-compute technique** [cyclic-CA spirals, mirroring the proven `1053-ripple-loom` pipeline = lowest shader-compile risk] + the **best graceful degrade** [no WebGPU ‚Üí the QWERTY organ still makes sound, audio-only]; de-selected as the least phone-glanceable [QWERTY-primary] ‚ÄĒ resurrect for a desktop/keyboard slot) banked to IDEAS ¬ß718 with full rebuildable specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-718/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚ö† **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~670 routes) ‚ÄĒ NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1348) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1348-prism-cortex/page.js` (42.5 kB) emitted; 1348 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the WGSL compute pipeline actually renders the RD chemistry + log-polar tunnels/lattices, and whether the drone reads, want Karel's WebGPU browser. `state: DMT-breakthrough ¬∑ pole: intense.` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (Web MIDI engine + WGSL Gray-Scott RD-compute field + inverse-log-polar warp render + additive pad-drone/void audio = 4) + #3 living ref (Marpi + Android Jones) + #4 multi-cycle (cashes 717's banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź1342 commitment).** #1 claimed cautiously ‚ÄĒ *WGSL compute on GPU storage textures is 0√ó in-window and the jury's named gap*, though RD has distant lab-prior, so #1 anchors on the compute-substrate move, not the algorithm. #5 cashed by the CYCLE via all three implementing today's ¬ß718 WebGPU-compute dive ‚ÄĒ and this fire literally ships the previously-banked research anchor. Details in STATE ¬ß718.)

## `/dream/1348-prism-cortex` ‚ÄĒ *play a **DMT-breakthrough chemistry** on a keyboard ‚ÄĒ a living **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** reaction runs as a **WebGPU compute shader** (the lab's first) and every note you play sows fresh chemistry into it. This is a genuine WGSL `@compute` cellular chemistry: two chemicals A/B live in a pair of **`rgba16float` storage textures**, ping-ponged, stepped 3‚Äď8 iterations per frame via `dispatchWorkgroups` in the worm/maze regime, with a slow ~0.05 Hz LFO on feed/kill for "breathing." A render pass then samples the field through an **inverse log-polar warp** (`log r`, őł ‚ÄĒ the Bressloff‚ÄďCowan retino-cortical projection behind Kl√ľver's form constants) so the RD maze becomes **tunnels, spirals and honeycomb lattices**, finished with thin-film iridescence, chromatic aberration and additive glow ‚ÄĒ a neon jewel. **Input = Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess`, feature-detected) primary + an always-live **QWERTY** fallback (`a‚Äďl` white keys, `w e t y u o` black): each note injects a Gaussian seed of chemical B at an angle set by pitch class (velocity ‚Üí bloom size), held keys sustain both the chemistry source and a detuned drone partial. **Idle auto-demo:** after ~4 s with no input the field auto-seeds a gentle C-minor-pentatonic loop, so it lives and evolves on a phone with no keyboard. **Real TIME in the audio** (`audio.ts`): an additive **pad-drone** ‚ÄĒ a JI drone bed (`_shared/psych/droneBank`), a detuned 3-partial voice per held note (soft attack / long release ‚ÄĒ not a bell, not a drum), a slow **Shepard** shimmer (`_shared/psych/shepard`), summed into a **void-reverb** bus (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`) and hard-limited by a `DynamicsCompressor` at master ‚Č§0.22 with an exponential fade-in. In the iridescent GPU-field lineage of **Marpi** (marpi.studio) and **Android Jones**, both living. **Degrades gracefully:** no WebGPU adapter/device ‚Üí a readable **amber** "needs a WebGPU browser (Chrome 113+/Edge/Safari 18+)" notice instead of a blank screen (the substrate IS the piece, so no 2D fallback); no MIDI ‚Üí QWERTY; no input ‚Üí auto-demo. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `navigator`/`AudioContext`/GPU behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ any global luminance oscillation ‚Č§3 Hz (the breath LFO is ~0.05 Hz), `prefers-reduced-motion` cuts chemistry substeps + softens contrast/chroma; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, MIDI handlers cleared, `AudioContext.close()`, `device.destroy()` + textures/buffers). Refs (living): Marpi ¬∑ Android Jones; Bressloff‚ÄďCowan / Kl√ľver for the form-constant map. `state: DMT-breakthrough ¬∑ pole: intense`. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1344-light-tunnel` ‚ÄĒ *tilt your phone to fall down a **near-death tunnel toward the light**, rendered entirely as living **vector line-art** ‚ÄĒ no canvas, no WebGL, every mark a real **SVG DOM element**. A dark void opens onto ~90 concentric `<circle>` rings + ~30 `<line>` spokes receding into a `<radialGradient>` **being-of-light** at the vanishing point, while a second gradient **hypoxic vignette** constricts toward the luminous core (the literal tunnel-vision of ischemia). Ring depth follows a **log-polar** curve (`r = R_MIN¬∑e^(z¬∑ln(R_MAX/R_MIN))`) so travel feels like constant velocity down an endless tube; the elements are **created once and mutated in place** each frame (`r`/`cx`/`cy`/`stroke`/`opacity`) so ~120 animated SVG nodes stay smooth on a phone. **Input = device tilt** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`; iOS `requestPermission()` fired inside the Begin tap): `gamma`/`beta` steer the vanishing point and the tunnel **bends** toward your lean (far rings center on the vanishing point, near rings on the frame, blended `(1‚ąíz)^1.6`), and lean magnitude sets **approach speed** toward the light. **Real TIME in the audio** (`audio.ts`, all Web Audio, no files): a slow **Shepard-Risset ascent** (octave-spaced sine partials under a fixed Gaussian window ‚ÄĒ the auditory barber-pole, via `_shared/psych/shepard.ts`) over a warm **JI drone bed** (`droneBank.ts`, E1 sub floor) poured into a synthetic **convolution void** (`convolutionVoid.ts`); approach speed is the single drive ‚ÄĒ it speeds the glide, opens a master lowpass, and lifts the wet tail toward the being-of-light moment ‚ÄĒ under a **~0.1 Hz breath swell**. Not a beat, not a sequencer, not a struck bell ‚ÄĒ one continuous weightless rise. In the lineage of **Ryoji Ikeda** (data/line minimalism) and **Zach Lieberman** (generative vector poetry), both living. **Degrades gracefully:** no tilt sensor / permission denied ‚Üí **pointer-drag** steers (position steers, distance-from-center = speed) with an amber note; a slow Lissajous **auto-drift** runs on load so it's alive before you tilt. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`AudioContext`/`DeviceOrientationEvent` behind effects + the Begin gate, iOS `requestPermission` feature-detected); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ the center light is a slow bloom, all luminance changes smoothed ‚Č§3 Hz, `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the approach + softens contrast/vignette; master ‚Č§0.2 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, exponential fade-in, full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, listeners removed, `AudioContext.close()`). Refs (living): Ryoji Ikeda ¬∑ Zach Lieberman. `state: NDE tunnel-to-light ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 716 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one massively-bigger concept, three embodied technical attacks, ship the strongest: **"The Groove Engine"** ‚ÄĒ the lab's **first real generative-groove instrument** and the direct answer to the last three juries' most-repeated unmet ask (*"not one rhythm, groove, beat, or deliberate dissonance in the entire window"*; the JI-strike‚Üíconsonant-chord spine is *"this era's pentatonic crutch"*). Your **body's motion** conducts a living, swung, evolving **drum groove** ‚ÄĒ not a bell, not a drone. Three attacks share one spine (camera-motion input via frame-diff ‚Üí a look-ahead Web-Audio groove engine with real **swing** + per-step **probability** + a time-based **build‚Üídrop**, a **living** AV/music reference, PLAYED not watched): `1336-flow-drummer` (optical-flow motion energy ‚Üí a **polymetric Euclidean** groove whose 16/12/7/5 voice lengths phase against one another; Max Cooper + BeatState), `1338-shadow-808` (**dance a pattern INTO an 808** ‚ÄĒ your silhouette occupies an 8√ó5 step-grid to arm each voice; reactable + Patatap + BeatState), `1340-dub-conductor` (**two hands conduct dub-techno** ‚ÄĒ one rides a minor-9 **b9 dissonance that resolves** as you lift it, the other throws dub delays; Monolake). a real groove with TIME, not a JI-strike-bell; living refs, not a dead scientist; PLAYED, not watched) ‚ÄĒ so the call turned on **playability √ó phone-glance √ó ship-confidence** on a headless box Karel reviews at 06:30 on a phone: 1338 is the **most unambiguous instrument** (a drum machine you stand inside), it has the **best degradation** (tap Begin ‚Üí a real 808 groove plays instantly via auto-demo; no camera ‚Üí a plain **touch** step-sequencer anyone plays), it carries **persistent accreting MEMORY** (denser/different after a minute ‚ÄĒ the menu-thin long-form-with-state property), and it is **lowest ship-risk** (pure deterministic 808 synthesis ‚ÄĒ no delay-feedback loop / GPU / CDN to ear-verify). `1340-dub-conductor` (‚≠ź‚≠ź **top SHIP-NEXT** ‚ÄĒ the more *ambitious* concept and the **only piece that cashes the jury's uniquely-unmet dissonance-that-resolves ask** [a real minor-9 + b9 tension voice whose detune/level fall as the left hand opens the filter cutoff] + best living ref [Monolake] + a full dub delay/reverb space; de-selected **only** on phone-glance [two-hand air-conducting is subtle] + the one thing a headless box can't verify [a dub delay-feedback chain's actual audio] ‚ÄĒ exactly the piece to ship in a cycle it can be ear-tuned) + `1336-flow-drummer` (‚≠ź‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ the **freshest engine**: a **polymetric Euclidean phasing** groove [independent 16/12/7/5 voice lengths], 0√ó in-lab; de-selected on the loosest *am-I-playing-it-deliberately* feel [continuous optical-flow reads ambient motion] + a lone unused-import lint warning) banked to IDEAS ¬ß716 with full specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-716/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚ö† **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~660 routes) ‚ÄĒ NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1338) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1338-shadow-808/page.js` (41 kB) emitted; 1338 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no display/speakers/camera) ‚ÄĒ whether the pattern audibly grooves + the silhouette reliably writes cells want Karel's phone. `state: embodied-groove / danced-in beat ¬∑ pole: intense.` **Ambition (winner) 2/5: #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (camera frame-diff + background-subtraction silhouette + look-ahead 808 scheduler with swing + per-step probability + build/drop state machine + retro-808 renderer = 5) + #3 living ref (Sergi Jord√†'s *reactable* + Jono Brandel's *Patatap*).** #1 not claimed (step-sequencers have lab-prior `1272`/`161`; the freshness is the *camera-danced* writing + real swing/probability/drop + accreting memory + that it is the lab's **first real groove content at all**). #5 cashed by the CYCLE via all three implementing today's ¬ß716 BeatState dive. Details in STATE ¬ß716.)

## `/dream/1338-shadow-808` ‚ÄĒ *dance a drum pattern into an 808 ‚ÄĒ your silhouette steps through a grid in camera-space and the groove is choreographed by your body. The screen is a **TR-808 step sequencer** (8 steps √ó 5 voices ‚ÄĒ kick / snare / hat / clap / tom) with a bright **playhead column** sweeping in time. Your webcam (`getUserMedia`, mirrored, shrunk to 64√ó40) becomes a **presence field** (frame-difference motion ‚ą™ background-subtraction, with a decaying memory so a still body keeps glowing) folded into the 8√ó5 cells; when the playhead crosses a step you **occupy**, that voice is **armed** ‚ÄĒ so you wave/dance through the grid to *write* the pattern and it loops straight back at you. The armed pattern is **persistent state that accretes** (denser and different after a minute ‚ÄĒ an instrument you build up, not a momentary reaction; **Clear** resets). Engine: a look-ahead **"Tale of Two Clocks"** scheduler (25 ms tick, ~120 ms lookahead vs `AudioContext.currentTime`), 100‚Äď132 BPM, real **swing** (off-beat 16ths delayed), per-step **probability** so armed hits ghost/drop (BeatState-style), and all-Web-Audio **808 synthesis** (kick = 160‚Üí45 Hz sine drop + 50 Hz sub; snare = HP-noise + 185 Hz body; hat = HP-noise; clap = 4-tap noise; tom = pitched sine; + an emergent resonant **acid stab** once patterns get dense, so busy grooves bite instead of turning sterile). **Build ‚Üí drop:** high sustained motion (or a tap) sweeps a filtered-noise **riser** over two bars, **strips to silence for a beat**, then **slams back at full density** (probability‚Üí1, four-on-the-floor + off-beat claps) ‚ÄĒ time-based drama, not just a filter sweep. **The lab's first real groove/swing/probability content** ‚ÄĒ a direct answer to the jury's "put TIME in the room." **Degrades gracefully:** on Begin an auto-demo groove (kick + backbeat + ghosted hats + clap) plays immediately so it's never dead on a 06:30 glance; no camera ‚Üí a `text-rose-300` notice + the grid becomes a plain **touch** step-sequencer (tap cells to toggle). Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`navigator`/`AudioContext`/canvas behind effects + the Begin gate, `getUserMedia` feature-detected); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ armed-step beat pulses are smooth exp-decay luminance bumps (‚Č§3 Hz), `prefers-reduced-motion` honoured; master ‚Č§0.28 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + fade-in; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, scheduler timer cleared, camera MediaStream tracks stopped, `AudioContext.close()`). Nothing is recorded or sent ‚ÄĒ the camera only senses motion locally. Refs (living): Sergi Jord√† / **reactable** ¬∑ Jono Brandel / **Patatap** ¬∑ **BeatState** (beatstate.net). `state: embodied-groove / danced-in beat ¬∑ pole: intense`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 715 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal altered-states explorers, each PLAYED via a **distinct non-pointer/non-recent input** and citing a **living** reference, deliberately re-spreading input away from the recent window's ruts (mic 4√ó / camera 3√ó / real-piano-file 3√ó in the last 10): `1330-dream-machine` (**MIDI/QWERTY**-played safe Dreamachine ‚ÄĒ each note ignites a ‚Č§3 Hz photosensitive-SAFE luminance pulse blooming Kl√ľver form-constants along an entropy axis), `1332-liquid-light` (**device-tilt**-poured 1960s oil-wheel liquid light show ‚ÄĒ tilt is the heat+gravity that makes molten color flow and bloom), `1334-comet-choir` (**pointer-conducted** curl-noise + boids murmuration whose density/coherence play a polyrhythmic choir).
