Details in STATE ¬ß715.)

## `/dream/1332-liquid-light` ‚ÄĒ *tilt your phone to **pour a 1960s psychedelic liquid light show** ‚ÄĒ molten pools of colored oil that a projectionist once pushed across a hot plate by heat and gravity, here flowing and blooming as you **lean the plate**. You don't strike a note and wait; you **tilt** and the oil runs the way you tilt it, gathering, blooming, and separating. **Input = device tilt** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`; iOS `requestPermission()` fired inside the Begin tap): tilt **direction** (`gamma`/`beta`) sets the gravity vector the dye advects along + the audio stereo pan; tilt **magnitude** sets the "heat" ‚ÄĒ bigger/hotter blooms, a longer smear, the drone's lowpass opening 300‚Üí2100 Hz and the chord bending up ~22 cents. **Output = Canvas2D** (deliberately no WebGL ‚ÄĒ dependency-light + ship-safe): a coarse **dye-advection** on a small offscreen ping-pong buffer (`fluid.ts`) ‚ÄĒ each frame the previous buffer is redrawn translated slightly along the pour vector and multiplied by a decay < 1 (so pools *smear* downhill and churn), then a handful of magenta/cyan/amber/violet/green emitters drift with the flow and stamp translucent radial gradients under `globalCompositeOperation = 'lighter'` (additive glow ‚Üí pools bloom, merge, separate; a complementary outer stop gives the thin-film iridescent rim). **Real TIME in the audio** (`audio.ts`): a warm swirling just-chord drone (root A1, stacked pure ratios, detuned pairs for chorus) over a felt **~0.3 Hz LFO throb** ‚ÄĒ a breathing bed that lives in time, NOT a struck bell. A homage to the **Joshua Light Show** (Joshua White, Fillmore East, 1960s‚Äď, still reforming) and **Mark Boyle & Joan Hills' "Sensual Laboratory"** liquid projections ‚ÄĒ a real, nameable art form whose chemistry (heat + gravity + immiscible color) maps cleanly onto tilt. **Degrades gracefully:** no tilt sensor / permission denied ‚Üí **pointer-drag** pours (drag vector = pour vector) with a `text-rose-300` notice; a slow lissajous **auto-drift** always adds faint living churn so the plate is never dead before Begin, on release, or when held still. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`AudioContext`/canvas/`DeviceOrientationEvent` behind effects + the Begin gate, iOS `requestPermission` feature-detected); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ the bloom is smooth continuous luminance drift, peak brightness capped three ways (per-frame multiplicative decay bounds additive glow + a vignette darkens corners against a full-white blowout + the only global luminance oscillation is a shallow ‚Č§0.3 Hz "breath"), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows churn/throb + softens contrast; master ‚Č§0.26 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, 3 s fade-in, full teardown on unmount. Refs (living lineage): Joshua Light Show (Joshua White) ¬∑ Mark Boyle & Joan Hills / Sensual Laboratory. `state: liquid-light-show ego-melt ¬∑ pole: intense`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 714 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one massively-bigger concept, two embodied technical attacks, ship the strongest: **"Earn the Drop"** ‚ÄĒ an EDM build-and-drop where the tension scalar **T ‚ąą [0,1] is the player's body, not a self-running clock.** The lab already has a *watched* EDM arc (`387-drop-engine`, tension auto-ramps on a timer ‚ÄĒ the exact "screensaver not instrument" liability three juries have named); this fire puts the drop in your hands. A real **126-BPM look-ahead step-sequencer** gates its layers (kick ‚Üí hats ‚Üí riser + Shepard drive-up ‚Üí snare fill ‚Üí **THE DROP** = hard impact + full four-on-the-floor) on T, and T densifies a **log-polar Kl√ľver form-constant** WebGL2 field that **blooms** (luminance/saturation/scale, **never a strobe** ‚ÄĒ SafeFlicker ‚Č§3 Hz) on the drop. Direct answer to the 2026-07-08 jury's two loudest still-live notes: **#2** "*not one rhythm, groove, beat or drop in the entire window ‚ÄĒ put TIME in it*" and **#4** "*stop shipping watched pieces, make instruments*." Two attacks differing on embodied input: `1327-tilt-drop` (**device-tilt** charges T, a **shake** fires the drop ‚ÄĒ phone-native) and `1329-breath-drop` (**mic-as-real-input** ‚ÄĒ a sustained rising **hum** charges T, a sharp **exhale** onset fires the drop). Alternation ‚Ä¶711 W ‚Üí 712 D ‚Üí 713 W ‚Üí **714 D** (DEEP due). Research-first (RESEARCH ¬ß714): **arXiv 2604.27957 (2026) "Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures"** (recognized body-gesture ‚Üí live orchestral intensity) + the **Motion-to-Emotion** accelerometer finding that felt musical **tension = fast, large movements** ‚ÄĒ which is *why* a shake (a fast, large gesture) is what spends the charge and fires the drop ‚Üí seeds both attacks. **Curated WINNER = `1329-breath-drop`** ‚ÄĒ both cleared the ambition floor + dodged every banned tag (tilt/mic not pointer 11√ó; WebGL2 not Canvas2D 7√ó / three.js 5√ó) + put a real beat and a real DROP in the room; the call turned on **diversity-lane + surprise + reach + love-fit**: 1329 fills the jury's **most-emphatically-named empty lane ‚ÄĒ mic-as-real-input** (flagged "~1√ó, passive-gain only"; tilt is *not* 0√ó: `83-kids-tilt-rain` + last cycle's banked `1325`), it's the more **surprising** concept (you *breathe the drop into being*), it **works on any device** (mic is universal; motion sensors are absent on desktop, so tilt needs a phone), and it **rides Karel's clearest loved cluster** (hum/voice: `158-kids-hum-paint`, `172-loop-station`, `969-kids-hum-choir`, `101-camera-song`). `1327-tilt-drop` (‚≠ź‚≠ź SHIP-NEXT ‚ÄĒ the **phone-delight** pick, the most immediately graspable on a 06:30 phone glance [tilt-to-charge, shake-to-drop]; de-selected only because tilt isn't a jury-0√ó lane and it needs a phone to play; ship in a tilt slot or fold its grip-agnostic baseline-relative tilt mapping into a phone build) banked to IDEAS ¬ß714 with full spec, backed up to scratchpad `banked-714/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚ö† **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~660 routes) ‚ÄĒ NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1329) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1329-breath-drop/page.js` (46.7 kB) emitted; 1329 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no display/speakers/mic) ‚ÄĒ whether the hum audibly builds the riser + the drop lands + the mic-feedback guards hold want Karel's browser + a hum. `state: breath-trance club-peak ¬∑ pole: intense.` **Ambition (winner) 2/5: #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic RMS+spectral-centroid+spectral-flux-onset analysis + 126-BPM look-ahead step-sequencer beat engine + Shepard/drone audio bed + WebGL2 log-polar form-constant shader = 4) + #5 recent research (arXiv 2604.27957, 2026 embodied-gesture‚Üíintensity).** #1 not claimed (step-sequencers/EDM-arcs/log-polar all have lab-prior, esp. `387-drop-engine`); the freshness is making the drop **embodied-played** ‚ÄĒ T is your breath, not a clock ‚ÄĒ the direct jury #2+#4 answer, argued honestly. Details in STATE ¬ß714.)

the played Dreamachine along the 6D-VHQ entropy axis, MIDI-native for Karel-the-pianist; de-selected only because MIDI gates a 06:30 *phone* reviewer + the flicker is the one safety element a headless box can't verify ‚ÄĒ ship in a MIDI/keyboard slot or promote its `field.ts` entropy-axis controller to `_shared/psych`) + `1325-chrysanthemum` (‚≠ź‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ the best phone-native glance [tilt] + the intense-pole contrast; 1326 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no display/speakers/mic) ‚ÄĒ whether the voice audibly builds a boundless space + the grain/reverb balance want Karel's browser + a hum. `state: meditative oceanic-boundlessness / voice-built cathedral ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient.` **Ambition (winner) 2/5: #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic YIN-pitch/loudness analysis + granular capture engine + frozen-layer choir accumulator + convolution-reverb cathedral space + particle-dissolution Canvas2D cloud = 5) + #3 living ref (Julianna Barwick + Pauline Oliveros / Deep Listening).** #1 not claimed (granular-voice + convolution-void have distant lab-prior; ## `/dream/1329-breath-drop` ‚ÄĒ *hum a rising tone into your mic to **charge an EDM build**, then **exhale sharply to drop it** ‚ÄĒ you have to breathe the drop into being. The tension scalar **T ‚ąą [0,1] is your breath, not a timer** (the played, embodied counterpart to the lab's self-running `387-drop-engine`). **Your mic is a real controller, not a loudness bar** (`breath.ts`): a high-passed detection band feeds RMS **level**, a spectral-**centroid** pitch estimate, and a **spectral-flux onset** detector with an adaptive `mean+2.5ŌÉ` threshold + refractory ‚ÄĒ a sustained, steady tone charges T upward (louder/steadier = faster), silence lets it decay, rising pitch opens the filter and lifts the hue. A genuine **126-BPM look-ahead step-sequencer** (`audio.ts`, `setInterval` polling `ctx.currentTime`, scheduling ~16th-note events ahead) **gates its layers on T**: `T>0.05` kick ‚Üí `T>0.35` closed hats ‚Üí `T>0.55` **noise riser + filter open + Shepard‚ÄďRisset drive-up** ‚Üí `T‚Üí1` snare fill. **THE DROP** ‚ÄĒ a sharp loud exhale onset while T ‚Č• ~0.7 ‚ÄĒ fires a hard downbeat impact (kick + sub + noise burst), the riser is sucked out, the **full four-on-the-floor groove** ignites, and the visual **SLAMS**: a saturation/scale/brightness bloom of a **log-polar Kl√ľver form-constant** field (WebGL2 fragment shader splicing `_shared/psych/LOGPOLAR_GLSL`) that has been densifying with T. Afterward T decays = the **breakdown**; breathe again to rebuild ‚ÄĒ it loops, player-shaped, never identical. **Real TIME/rhythm** (the lab's thinnest axis ‚ÄĒ the direct answer to the jury's "not one beat in the window" note), a **real DROP**, an **instrument you play** not a watched arc. **Feedback-safe:** the detection band is high-passed, browser DSP disabled, the analyser is a **sink only** (never routed to `destination`), the onset threshold is adaptive, and a headphones prompt is shown. **Degrades gracefully:** no mic / denied ‚Üí keyboard fallback (**hold SPACE** to charge, **ENTER** to drop) + a `text-rose-300` notice; no signal within ~2.5 s ‚Üí an **auto-demo** runs the full charge‚Üídrop‚Üíbreakdown arc so it's alive/legible hands-free on a 06:30 glance, halting the instant real input arrives. **SAFETY:** the drop is a **bloom, not a strobe**; any repetitive luminance flicker routes through `_shared/psych/SafeFlicker` (opt-in, ‚Č§3 Hz soft sine, instant kill) and honors `prefersReducedMotion()` (pulls saturation/contrast/flow-speed down, never flickers). Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`navigator`/`AudioContext` behind the Begin gate + effects, `navigator.mediaDevices` SSR-guarded); master gain ‚Č§0.24 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination, bounded polyphony, full teardown on Stop + unmount (nodes stopped, mic MediaStream tracks stopped, context suspended/closed, listeners removed, rAF cancelled). Refs (living): **Imogen Heap** (*Mi.Mu* gloves / voice-driven live performance) ¬∑ **Holly Herndon** (voice-as-instrument AV) ¬∑ **Max Cooper** (club-AV). `state: breath-trance club-peak ¬∑ pole: intense`. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1326-voice-cathedral` ‚ÄĒ *hum or sing a sustained tone and your own held voice **builds a vast luminous meditative space** ‚ÄĒ the "oceanic boundlessness" of deep meditation, drug-free. Your **microphone is the instrument** (a real controller, never a loudness bar): a dependency-free **YIN-lite autocorrelation** detector (`pitch.ts`) estimates the sung fundamental (snapped to a **C-major pentatonic** so the seeded drone is always consonant) + RMS loudness. A rolling ~3 s buffer of your captured voice is **granulated** ‚ÄĒ short Hann-windowed grains scheduled continuously, read from the **live** buffer while you sing AND from **frozen snapshot layers** that keep ringing after you stop (a slowly-decaying granular freeze); holding a steady tone **commits a new frozen layer**, so successive held tones **accumulate into a choir** (up to 6 layers, each decaying over ~15‚Äď20 s). Grains are pitch-spread into octaves/fifths and fed through a long code-built **convolution reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`) over a low fixed **drone bed** (`_shared/psych/droneBank`, C2) + a pitch-following seed drone ‚ÄĒ a cathedral space that blooms wetter as it grows. **The boundlessness arc IS the payload:** the longer you sustain, a `boundless` value climbs and the luminous voice-cloud (Canvas2D, pale golds ‚Üí warm white) dissolves **edge ‚Üí centre ‚Üí white**, the dark ground lightening toward a boundless field of light (figure/ground / ego dissolution); **silence** lets it settle back into a dark spacious void. A breath-paced ~0.1 Hz macro swell underneath. **Feedback-safe:** the raw mic is an `AnalyserNode` **sink only** ‚ÄĒ never routed to `destination`, nothing is recorded or sent, so there is no howl and no privacy leak. Deliberately breaks the recent monoculture: **mic-as-real-input** (spreading input off the pointer/camera/real-piano ruts), a **granular voice-freeze** technique (not a mic-loudness FFT-bar visualizer, not a real-piano melt, not a JI-strike-bell), **PLAYED not watched** (a sustained hum is the whole gesture), cosmic-ambient meditative pole. **Degrades gracefully:** no mic / denied ‚Üí an audible synthesized **demo voice** (a sustained hum) drives the whole piece so it's alive without permission, plus a `text-rose-300` notice inviting mic access; before Begin a gentle bloom already drifts so a cold 06:30 glance is never dead. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`navigator`/`AudioContext` behind effects + the Begin gate, `navigator.mediaDevices` SSR-guarded); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ slow smooth luminance drift only, the dissolve to white **eased in** (smoothstep, capped alpha) so it's never a harsh blowout, `prefersReducedMotion()` slows all motion; master ‚Č§0.24 + 1.5 s fade-in + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + hard caps (40 grains / 6 layers / 320 motes); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, all grain sources / oscillators / drone stopped, **mic MediaStream tracks stopped**, `AudioContext.close()`, listeners removed). A single-performer echo of **Julianna Barwick**'s looped-voice cathedral and the **Pauline Oliveros / Deep Listening** lineage. Refs (living): Julianna Barwick ¬∑ Pauline Oliveros / Deep Listening ¬∑ √Čliane Radigue. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 712 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one massively-bigger concept: **"Unbinding" ‚ÄĒ a cosmic-ambient DISSOCIATIVE journey whose spine is a real audio-visual DESYNC engine: the sound you hear comes loose from the light you see.** Deliberate return to the **cosmic-ambient pole the whole recent window lacks** after last cycle's intense op-art (711) + five sensor/real-piano fires (705‚Äď709). Attacked via 3 techniques sharing one spine (a `desync.ts` ring buffer that reads the visual pulse-drive back **lagged + drifting** 0.3‚Üí1.2 s so ear un-binds from eye + a real **~3 Hz "dissociation pulse"** giving genuine rhythmic TIME + consequential **pointer-PLAYED** input + shared psych audio, **no JI-strike-bell**): `1320-khole-tunnel` (WebGL2 raymarched NDE/ketamine void ‚ÄĒ hold to be drawn toward a being of light as time dilates), `1321-ganzfeld-drift` (WebGL2 Turrell **Ganzfeld** boundless field that loses its edges over a ~3.5-min arc), `1322-echo-body` (Canvas2D **echo-body** where where-it-IS / where-you-SEE-it / where-you-HEAR-it become three unbound clocks). Living ref: **James Turrell** (Ganzfeld). **Curated WINNER = `1320-khole-tunnel`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the floor (3/5: #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems + #3 living ref + #5 current-2026 research) + dodged every ban + the three emerging sensor/real-piano sub-ruts, so the call turned on which best serves *this cycle's stated purpose*: 1320 **delivers the cosmic-ambient pole the window lacks** (1321/1322 share it, but 1320 is the most transporting ‚ÄĒ Karel's core "transport users to psychedelic states" directive), it is **maximally different from last cycle's intense op-art active-instrument (1316)** whereas 1322 would be a second consecutive pointer-timing instrument, it **resurrects + FIXES the top banked concept** (711's ‚≠ź‚≠ź SHIP-NEXT `1318-void-breath`, whose only de-selection reason was thin TIME ‚ÄĒ now carrying a real 2.7 Hz pulse that keeps ticking *through* the time-dilation), and it keeps **acceptable ship-risk** (a single raymarch fragment shader + deterministic Web Audio ‚ÄĒ no framebuffers/particle-upload/model/CDN, same precedent as 1316). `1322-echo-body` (‚≠ź‚≠ź SHIP-NEXT ‚ÄĒ the **most legible desync** [you literally SEE the present body, three visual echoes, and a rose ring for the heard position all drift apart] + the **most PLAYED** + the most rhythmic [a note fires on every ~2.8 Hz tick] + Canvas2D-diverse + lowest ship-risk; de-selected only because it's a second pointer-timing instrument after 1316 and doesn't deliver the cosmic-ambient pole) + `1321-ganzfeld-drift` (‚≠ź‚≠ź ‚ÄĒ the purest Turrell cosmic-ambient boundless field + edge-dissolution arc; de-selected as the highest screensaver-risk of the three) banked to IDEAS ¬ß712 with full specs, backed up to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. ‚ö† **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~660 routes) ‚ÄĒ NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1320) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1320-khole-tunnel/page.js` (36.5 kB) emitted; 1320 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the raymarched void renders + whether the heard throb visibly un-binds from the seen breath want Karel's browser. `state: ketamine k-hole / NDE / dissociative journey ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ‚Üí intense.` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (desync ring-buffer engine + steady-clock 3 Hz pulse transport + raymarched void + hold-to-dissociate state controller [time-dilation + hypoxic vignette + gamma-snap] + desynced Web Audio = 5) + #3 living ref (James Turrell Ganzfeld + Bera et al. 2026) + #5 current-2026 research.** #1 not claimed (desync/feedback-lag + Ganzfeld both have distant lab-prior `595`; ## `/dream/1320-khole-tunnel` ‚ÄĒ *a drug-free ketamine k-hole / near-death tunnel-to-light, where **the beat you hear comes loose from the flash you see** and the world un-binds the deeper you go. A **WebGL2 raymarched** dark void (single full-screen fragment shader ‚ÄĒ a distant warm being of light, a faint tunnel of soft rings, sparse volumetric wisps, a hypoxic vignette) that is **alive on a cold glance** (idle auto-drift renders before Begin; audio gesture-gated). **The signature ‚ÄĒ audio-visual DESYNC** (`desync.ts`, a self-contained ring buffer): a steady **~2.7 Hz "dissociation pulse"** drives a shallow (~14%) luminance breath you SEE; every frame that drive is pushed into the buffer, but the audio never reads it live ‚ÄĒ it reads **`readLagged()`**, the value from `lagSeconds` ago, where `lagSeconds` wanders on a slow ~0.05 Hz sine between **0.3 s and 1.2 s**, so the throb you HEAR trails the breath you see by a continuously **drifting** offset (a literal enactment of the sensory-uncoupling in Bera et al. 2026). **Played, not watched:** **hold anywhere** = you are drawn toward the light ‚ÄĒ the *scene* clock dilates toward **0.35√ó** (time distension), the vignette constricts, bloom warms, and a `dissociation` amount rises that **widens the lag range + speeds its drift** (the world un-binds MORE the deeper you go); **move** = steer the disembodied float; sustained arrival triggers a smooth **gamma clarity-swell** (`1‚ąíexp(‚ąíx)` ceiling, ‚Č§180 ms ‚ÄĒ NO strobe). **Real ~3 Hz TIME (kills the JI-drone spine):** the pulse rides its **own steady, undilated clock** so even as the scene dilates the beat never stops ‚ÄĒ the audio identity is the **desynced rhythmic throb** (warm sub + filtered mid tone whose amplitude/cutoff pulse on the *lagged* drive), with a thin JI drone bed + a downward **Shepard** undertow (`_shared/psych/shepard`) + a code-generated cavern reverb only as depth, never the subject. Deliberately breaks the recent monoculture: cosmic-ambient dissociation (NOT last cycle's intense op-art, NOT a physics-sim, NOT a real-piano melt, NOT a MediaPipe groove, NOT a JI-strike-bell). **Degrades gracefully:** no WebGL2 ‚Üí a readable `text-rose-300` notice. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/GL/AudioContext behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ full-field luminance change stays ‚Č§3 Hz + smooth + shallow, `prefersReducedMotion()` halves the pulse to 1.35 Hz + cuts contrast; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, oscillators + Shepard stop, `AudioContext.close()`, GL program/buffer deleted + `WEBGL_lose_context`, listeners removed). A single-performer echo of **James Turrell**'s Ganzfeld (light as an object you inhabit), grounded in **Bera et al. 2026**. Refs (living): James Turrell ¬∑ Bera, Looger, Proekt & Cichon, *Cortical Mechanisms Contributing to Ketamine-Induced Dissociation* (2026) ¬∑ Vesuna/Deisseroth retrosplenial ~3 Hz rhythm (2020). `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 711 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal altered-states explorers, a deliberate **subtraction / diversity re-injection** after five straight sensor/real-piano fires (705‚Äď709) + one long-form-memory DEEP (710): op-art moir√© interference ¬∑ particle strange-attractor flow ¬∑ dissociative void-with-desync. ## `/dream/1316-moire-drift` ‚ÄĒ *tune a psychedelic trance by hand: two (really three) fine op-art gratings are summed in a WebGL2 fragment shader in **cortical (log r, őł) space**; where two near-equal spatial frequencies add they **beat** out a slow low-frequency envelope ‚ÄĒ and that envelope IS a Kl√ľver form constant (concentric rings‚Üí**tunnels/funnels**, radial rays‚Üí**spokes/cobwebs**, cortical diagonals‚Üí**spirals**, a hex term waking near the peak‚Üí**honeycomb**). **The core surprise ‚ÄĒ one number, seen and heard:** the **detune** you set with vertical drag fixes a single `beatHz` that (1) advances the movable grating's temporal phase so the whole **visual moir√© envelope drifts at that rate**, and (2) sets the frequency gap of a **detuned oscillator pair** (138 Hz + beat) so the **audio amplitude-beats at the same rate** ‚ÄĒ tune the moir√© tighter and you watch the fringes settle AND hear the acoustic beats slow toward alignment; a live HUD prints the Hz. **Drag anywhere:** horizontal (‚Üź‚Üí) = **rotation offset őĒőł** between layers (blooms spokes/spirals), vertical (‚Üē) = **spatial-frequency detune őĒk** (top=aligned/slow, bottom=detuned/fast), **drag speed / hold** = entropy energy pushing the arc forward (more grating octaves, faster drift, looser symmetry ‚ÄĒ REBUS "priors relax"); release and it drifts on its own. **Entropy arc** (~3 min, onset‚Üícome-up‚Üípeak‚Üísettle) grows octaves/drift/symmetry-looseness and shifts the palette from stark near-black + bone-white with an electric-cyan accent toward **saturated neon/iridescent** at the peak ‚ÄĒ genuinely different at minute 3 than 0:20. **Audio has TIME:** the detuned-beat pair (+ a quiet octave pair for body) is the star, a soft **low pulse/transport** at 0.7‚Äď2 Hz tightens toward the peak (rhythm, not a flat pad), and a faint downward **Shepard** undertow (`_shared/psych/shepard`) sits underneath; master ‚Č§0.28 + 1.2 s exp fade-in + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, fixed small voice count. Deliberately breaks the lab's recent monoculture: a pointer-**PLAYED** interference instrument (NOT a sensor rerun, NOT a physics-sim, NOT a real-piano melt, NOT a JI-strike-bell), and it drives the form-constant engine by moir√© interference rather than the log-polar warp of `1300`. Technique: raw WebGL2, a single full-screen triangle (positions from `gl_VertexID`, no vertex buffer), one fragment shader summing the gratings with `smoothstep`+`fwidth()` op-art ink. **Degrades gracefully:** WebGL2 unavailable ‚Üí a `text-rose-300` notice; before Begin the field is already alive on a slow idle auto-drift so a cold 06:30 glance is never dead. Server-safe (`"use client"`, capability check + all GL/AudioContext behind the Begin gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ moir√© luminance beating is spatially incoherent (different radii at different phase ‚Üí never a full-field synchronized flash), contrast moderate, beat capped ~5.5 Hz smooth drift (below the 15‚Äď20 Hz risk band), `prefersReducedMotion()` halves the rate + greys the contrast; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, oscillators + Shepard stop, nodes disconnect, `ctx.close()`, GL program/VAO deleted, listeners removed). A single-performer echo of **Bridget Riley**'s Op-art, made audible. Refs (living): Bridget Riley (b. 1931) ¬∑ Bressloff‚ÄďCowan *Geometric visual hallucinations* (2001) ¬∑ Kl√ľver form constants ¬∑ Shepard‚ÄďRisset. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1314-motif-weave` ‚ÄĒ *a dream that REMEMBERS you ‚ÄĒ the memory made musical. A single-performer echo of **teamLab's *The World of Irreversible Change*** (2026): every phrase you play is permanently absorbed into the material the piece is made of. **Drag** anywhere (vertical position = pitch) to perform a phrase ‚ÄĒ you hear each note instantly; on release, if it's ‚Č•2 notes it's captured as a **motif** `{pitch, onset-in-beats, duration, velocity}` and pushed into a library that is **never cleared** during a run. A rAF-driven **beat clock** walks a generative score and on each beat may **recall an earlier motif, transformed** ‚ÄĒ `gentle` (diatonic pentatonic transpose), `harmonize` (a parallel third above), `canon` (a staggered transposed answer one beat later), `reverse` (contour backwards), or `stretch` (time-stretched long, as the dream dissolves). Recall is weighted toward rarely-recalled motifs so the whole library keeps circulating, and in the *deepens* / *lucid-bloom* phases it sometimes **forces the OLDEST phrase you played** to return; the library cap (72) sheds auto-seeds first so it **never drops your first performance** ‚ÄĒ so the phrase from minute one audibly comes back, changed, minutes later (the min-1‚Üímin-6 promise). Each stored motif is also a **persistent luminous thread** in a Canvas2D woven light-field (dusk-violet ‚Üí indigo ‚Üí dawn-gold), blooming while it sounds ‚ÄĒ the visual is the record too. **Long-form arc** (genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1 because the library has grown, NOT a loop): *drifting-off* 52 bpm (sparse, sows idle seed phrases) ‚Üí *the dream deepens* 63 bpm (recall rises, harmonies appear) ‚Üí *lucid bloom* 82 bpm (dense canon/reverse/harmony, brightest ‚ÄĒ the intense pole) ‚Üí *dissolution* 57 bpm (time-stretched, thinning) ‚Üí *waking* 50 bpm (settles; the grown weave persists). **Audio has TIME:** a soft sub root on alternate beats + off-beat pulses in busier phases (tempo + rhythmic movement that changes across the arc), each note a triangle + detuned sine through a per-note lowpass that opens with phase brightness, a **feedback delay** carrying the tails of recalls/canons (memory literally echoing), and a faint shared **Shepard** undertow (`_shared/psych/shepard`) whose drive rises with brightness + breath. **Mic breath** (optional) brightens the dream, lifts the undertow, and summons more remembered threads ‚ÄĒ the raw mic is an AnalyserNode **sink only** (never routed to destination ‚Üí no feedback howl). Deliberately **NOT** the recent monoculture: memory-as-instrument (not a physics-sim-poke, not a real-piano melt, not a MediaPipe groove, not a strike‚ÜíJI-chord bell), PLAYED not watched. **Degrades gracefully:** no mic ‚Üí pointer-only (breath stays 0, `text-rose-300` notice), and idle seed phrases self-drive the piece so it's alive/recall-demonstrable on a cold 06:30 glance within seconds of the single **Begin** tap. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all behind the Begin gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D smooth luminance drift only, optional flicker via `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` (‚Č§3 Hz, opt-in, instant kill), `prefersReducedMotion()` honoured; master ‚Č§0.28 + 1.2 s fade-in + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + hard 16-voice cap; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, Shepard stop, mic tracks stopped, `AudioContext.close()`). **Begin again** starts a fresh, empty run. Ref (living): teamLab *The World of Irreversible Change / Everything Exists in Infinite Continuity* (2026). `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1308-piano-freeze` ‚ÄĒ *reach into Karel's recorded piano with your bare **hand** and FREEZE a moment into an infinite shimmer. His real *Welcome Home* solo piano (fetched from `/api/audio/549fc519‚Ä¶`, with an OfflineAudioContext synthesized solo-piano fallback so it's alive headless) is fed to a **granular resynthesis engine** whose READ position (where grains are sampled from) moves **independently of grain playback** ‚ÄĒ so scrub and freeze fall straight out. A webcam **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (client-side, GPU‚ÜíCPU, loaded at runtime from the `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.14` CDN via a `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic import so no npm dep is added): **hand-X scrubs the pitch-independent playhead** through the whole recording; **raise the hand UP ‚Üí FREEZE** ‚ÄĒ the read-position chase scales by `(1 ‚ąí freeze)`, so at full freeze the overlapping ~135 ms Hann grains (~60% overlap, ~20 ms lookahead, 48-grain cap) re-read a single slice forever = a **Paulstretch-style infinite shimmering drone**; tiny per-grain read-jitter + detune keep it glistening not buzzing, and a **parallel DRY grain path** fades in with freeze so the frozen moment stays legible while it holds (the Sampleson *Aeronaut* 2026 freeze-against-a-parallel-looper idea, done granularly so it never clicks). **Pinch ‚ÜĒ spread** (thumb-tip to index-tip) drives a low-shelf / high-shelf **spectral tilt** (spread=brighter, pinch=darker). **Viz (Canvas2D):** a scrolling violet/indigo **spectral curtain** (AnalyserNode FFT) that **crystallizes** on freeze ‚ÄĒ the scroll halts, a slow (<3 Hz) cyan-white core bloom breathes as a pure luminance drift (never a strobe), an amber **playhead timeline** shows scrub position, and a small mirrored webcam thumbnail with amber landmark dots proves the tracking works. Deliberately breaks the lab's recent monoculture: a **real recording** as source (NOT a synth JI-drone/void-reverb/strike-chord bell), driven by the **camera-hand embodied lane** (the specifically-jury-named 0√ó-until-recently sensor), a freeze-drone *texture* distinct from the recent groove/cross-synth window. **Degrades gracefully:** no camera / getUserMedia denied / CDN fails ‚Üí a **mouse driver** (X scrubs, near-top = freeze, wheel = tilt) + a gentle **auto-drift** so a cold 06:30 glance is never dead or silent; audio fetch fails ‚Üí the synth carrier. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all behind the Start gate); `prefers-reduced-motion` gentles the shimmer; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, engine stop, `HandLandmarker.close()`, camera tracks stopped, ctx close, listeners removed); instant **Stop** ramps master to 0 in ~60 ms then closes the context. A single-performer echo of **Robert Henke / Monolake**'s granular time-stretching, **Paulstretch** (Nasca Octavian Paul), and **Sampleson *Aeronaut*** (2026). Refs: Sampleson *Aeronaut* (2026) ¬∑ Robert Henke / Monolake ¬∑ Paulstretch. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1310-piano-duet` ‚ÄĒ *sing **into** Karel's recorded piano ‚ÄĒ a duet with a recording. His real *Welcome Home* solo piano (fetched from `/api/audio/549fc519‚Ä¶`, with a synthesized looping solo-piano fallback so it's alive headless) **loops continuously as the harmonic carrier**; your **live microphone is the sculptor, not a gain meter.** The mic is FFT-analysed into a smoothed **20-band spectral envelope** (~130 Hz‚Äď6 kHz, log-spaced, normalized to a *shape* so a vowel's formant peaks stand out regardless of volume). A **channel-vocoder cross-synthesis**: a bank of **20 parallel bandpass BiquadFilters** splits his piano across those same 20 bands, and each band's gain is driven every frame by the matching band of your voice ‚ÄĒ so humming "ahh" vs "ooo" audibly **morphs his chord toward that vowel** (`bandGain_i ‚Üź mix √ó loudness √ó voiceEnv_i`, steered by `setTargetAtTime` ~50 ms so it's click-free, no zipper noise). A **dry path** keeps his piano clearly audible so it stays a **duet, not a gate**; an on-screen **intensity slider** (also mapped to mic loudness ‚ÄĒ sing louder, sculpt harder) rides the wet/dry. **Feedback-safe:** the raw mic is an `AnalyserNode` **sink only** ‚ÄĒ never routed to `destination`, so there is no mic‚Üíspeaker howl; only its *analysis* moves the filter gains. **Viz (Canvas):** three overlaid spectra on a shared log-frequency axis ‚ÄĒ **violet/indigo** his piano carrier, **amber/rose** your live voice envelope + the sculpt being applied, and a **bright ridge** for the resulting cross-synthesized output ‚ÄĒ plus a VU bar and a "singing detected" indicator, so the *your-voice-shapes-his-sound* story reads at a glance. Deliberately breaks the lab's recent monoculture: **mic-as-real-controller** (the jury-named 0√ó input, NOT passive gain), a **real recording** as carrier (NOT a synth JI-drone/void-reverb bell), PLAYED not watched. **Degrades gracefully:** no recording ‚Üí synth carrier; **no mic** ‚Üí a `text-rose-300` notice + the same filter bank driven by a synthetic voice envelope (slow auto-morph) **plus an XY pad** (drag to move the vowel formant across his spectrum) ‚ÄĒ the cross-synthesis still plays and Karel still hears his sound being sculpted; piano + auto-morph begin immediately on Start (never dead/silent). A single-performer browser echo of **Trevor Wishart** (cross-synthesis / *Vox* / spectral morphing) and **Robert Henke (Monolake)** live-spectral practice. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all behind the Start gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ canvas trails + gentle ramps hold luminance change well under 3 Hz, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`; instant **Stop** ramps master to 0 in ~60 ms then stops the source, disconnects the graph, stops mic tracks, and suspends/closes the `AudioContext`. Refs: Trevor Wishart *Vox* / cross-synthesis ¬∑ Robert Henke / Monolake. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1305-face-desk` ‚ÄĒ *your **face** is the mixing desk. A webcam **MediaPipe FaceLandmarker v2** (52 ARKit-style blendshapes + a head-pose matrix, entirely client-side, GPU-delegated) turns your expressions into the controller for a steady **124 BPM dub-techno groove** on a 16-step look-ahead transport (four-on-the-floor kick + rolling filtered dub bass + closed hats + a minor-9th chord stab into a feedback ping-pong delay, under a global low-pass ‚ÄĒ pure Web Audio through a limiter). The mapping teaches itself: **`jawOpen`** blooms the global low-pass open AND throws a dub echo off into the distance as your mouth opens; **brow-raise** (`browInnerUp`+`browOuterUp*`) **builds** the arrangement up and down (hats ‚Üí chord stab ‚Üí strip back to kick+bass ‚ÄĒ like conducting); **head-yaw** (from the transform matrix) **pans** the stab and raises the ping-pong feedback; a debounced **two-eye blink** fires a **grid-quantised beat-stutter**; **smile** opens a high shelf and the ninth. Every continuous control is one-pole smoothed; blink is edge-detected with a ~0.42 s cooldown so a natural blink doesn't machine-gun. A dark Canvas2D **mixing-console** viz shows a face-driven fader channel strip, VU meters pulsing with the groove, a pan needle for head-yaw, a step strip with a sweep head, and a small mirrored webcam thumbnail with landmark dots so you see the tracking works. Deliberately **NOT** the lab's recent monoculture: a real **pulse/groove** (not a strike‚ÜíJI-chord bell ‚ÄĒ no synth drone/void-reverb spine), driven by the **camera face lane** (grep-0√ó, the specifically-jury-named untouched sensor), palette a warm club-dark. MediaPipe loads at runtime from the `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.14` CDN via a `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic import so no npm dep is added and the build stays clean. **Degrades gracefully:** if getUserMedia is denied or the CDN fails, a `text-rose-300` notice appears and the groove keeps playing with the **mouse** standing in (Y=jaw/cutoff+throws, X=build, click=stutter) ‚ÄĒ never a dead page. A browser-native echo of **Zach Lieberman & Kyle McDonald's FaceOSC / ofxFaceTracker** and Lieberman's *M√°s Que la Cara*. Server-safe ("use client", all behind the Start gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ the blink flash is a soft wash honoring `prefers-reduced-motion` (imports the shared `_shared/psych/safeFlicker`); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, AudioContext close, MediaStream tracks stopped, `FaceLandmarker.close()`). Ref: Lieberman/McDonald FaceOSC ¬∑ *M√°s Que la Cara*. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1300-carrier-bloom` ‚ÄĒ *Karel's own recorded piano is the **carrier wave** for a drug-free psychedelic melt you push your hands into. His real *Welcome Home* solo piano (fetched from `/api/audio/549fc519‚Ä¶`, with a synthesized solo-piano fallback so it's alive headless) is **FFT'd every frame** and fed into the **Bressloff‚ÄďCowan log-polar form-constant engine** (imported from `_shared/psych/logpolar` ‚ÄĒ plane-wave stripes / a hex lattice generated in cortical space, warped back to the screen by `exp()`, so ONE WebGL2 shader breathes **tunnels ‚Üí spirals ‚Üí honeycombs**). FFT mapping: **bass ‚Üí global flow + warp amplitude, mid ‚Üí stripe frequency, high ‚Üí fine grain + saturation/chromatic-aberration, onset ‚Üí a center-out bloom ring.** An **entropy arc** (REBUS "priors relax") ramps over ~3.5 min ‚ÄĒ come-up ‚Üí peak ‚Üí settle ‚ÄĒ reorganizing the geometry and loosening symmetry at peak, so it's audibly/visibly different at minute 3 than at 0:20. **Perturbation makes it PLAYED, not watched:** pointer-drag (or DeviceOrientation tilt on mobile) pushes the warp center under your hand, faster drags deepen the entropy arc and lift a faint **Shepard‚ÄďRisset undertow**, vertical position biases tunnel‚ÜĒhoneycomb; let go and it drifts on its own. Deliberately breaks the lab's recent monoculture: the audio is **his real piano** (NOT a synth JI-drone/void-reverb/strike-chord bell), it leaves the physics museum (music-reactive *art*, no equation-as-instrument), and its palette is **DMT neon-iridescent** on near-black (NOT cosmic-glow, NOT warm-paper). A single-performer echo of **Refik Anadol's DATALAND** (2026). Degrades gracefully (WebGL2 unavailable ‚Üí labeled Canvas2D fallback computing the identical geometry; audio fetch fails ‚Üí synth carrier). Server-safe ("use client", no top-level browser globals, all behind the Begin gate); **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ smooth luminance drift + soft rolloff, and any flicker is opt-in through the shared **SafeFlicker** (‚Č§3 Hz, instant kill); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, Shepard stop, node stop/disconnect, `ctx.close()`, listeners removed). Refs: Refik Anadol *DATALAND / Machine Dreams* (2026) ¬∑ Bressloff‚ÄďCowan form constants ¬∑ Shepard‚ÄďRisset (1964). `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1297-hand-loom` ‚ÄĒ *play a groove **in the air**. A webcam **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** tracks up to two hands (21 landmarks each, entirely client-side) and turns them into the controller for a 16-step **look-ahead-scheduled** rhythm engine (110 BPM ‚ÄĒ kick four-on-the-floor + backbeat clap + offbeat hats + a rolling interlocked bass, pure Web Audio through a limiter, master ‚Č§0.3): hand **height** opens the filter (raise a hand ‚Üí brighter), hand **X** picks the lane, a **pinch** (thumb-to-index) quantises to the nearest step and latches a hit **ON the beat**, finger **spread** swings it, and the **gap between your two hands** adds ghost-hat density. Fingertip trails + a sweep line crossing the step-lane let you SEE the groove. Deliberately **NOT** the lab's recent monoculture: it has a real **pulse/groove** (not a strike‚ÜíJI-chord bell), it's driven by a **camera** (the specifically-jury-named 0√ó sensor lane ‚ÄĒ first MediaPipe in the lab), and its palette is a **UV black-light rave** (electric magenta/cyan/lime on near-black ‚ÄĒ not cosmic-glow, not warm-paper). MediaPipe is loaded at runtime from the `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.14` CDN via a `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic import so no npm dep is added and the build stays clean. **Degrades gracefully:** an autonomous demo groove + visuals run on mount before (and without) any camera ‚ÄĒ a separate "Enable camera" step requests the webcam, and denial/absence shows a `text-rose-300` notice while the demo keeps playing (never blank). A glove-free cousin of **Imogen Heap's MiMU gloves** (gestural music control via a camera instead of sensors). Server-safe ("use client", no top-level browser globals, all behind the Begin/Enable gates); no strobe (trails + sweep are smooth continuous motion; step-flash is a gradient bloom); `prefers-reduced-motion` cuts trail counts; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, osc stop, ctx close, `HandLandmarker.close()`, camera tracks stopped). Ref: Imogen Heap / MiMU gloves. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 704 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ deepened a winner across a full second cycle (JURY 2026-07-07 #3, the loudest unpaid note: *"deliberately deepen ONE winner across a full second cycle the way 1242 deepened 1218 ‚ÄĒ worth more than the next five floor-scrapers"*). ## `/dream/1294-indra-descent` ‚ÄĒ *fall through an infinite chord you can see: a coupled Apollonian circle-packing you play. The cycle-2 deepening of `1285-apollonian-gasket` + `1288-gasket-cathedral` ‚ÄĒ where those are packings you look at/walk, this one **rings itself back at you**. Circles are a signed curvature (bend b=¬Ī1/r) + a complex centre; each child is placed by the **Descartes Circle Theorem** (b‚āĄ=b‚āĀ+b‚āā+b‚āÉ¬Ī2‚ąö(b‚āĀb‚āā+b‚āāb‚āÉ+b‚āÉb‚āĀ)) + its complex companion, inscribed into a curvilinear-triangular gap so it is tangent to **exactly** the three circles that bounded the gap ‚ÄĒ the **tangency graph is therefore built exactly and incrementally**, no geometric search (a headless self-check confirms every child is tangent to its recorded neighbours to ~machine precision and the adjacency is symmetric). **Two never-before-in-the-lab subsystems:** (1) **tangency-graph resonance** ‚ÄĒ tap a circle and `bfsCascade` walks the graph breadth-first (hop‚Üídelay ~115 ms, amplitude √ó0.62/hop, capped 5 hops + a branch cap so it stays musical), so one tap unfolds a self-similar just-intonation arpeggio cascading down the packing while a **vermilion `#e0402f` wave races the tangent edges** ahead of the sound; (2) **M√∂bius "dive" transport** ‚ÄĒ hold to fall toward a boundary tangent cusp via a circle-preserving M√∂bius dilation `w=a¬∑z`; `packForView` streams fresh nesting into the gap you approach + `pruneOffscreen` recycles ballooned ancestors, so the descent never bottoms out (newborn circles glitter sonically as they pass). **Curvature ‚Üí pitch:** log‚āā(bend) quantised to a 5-limit JI scale [1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8] over a ~123 Hz root, so tangent neighbours are consonant and a cascade is a chord. Palette: **sumi-e ink-wash** ‚ÄĒ near-black graphite, circles as fine luminous ink strokes (`lighter` compositing on discrete arcs, never filled discs or a density field), exactly one accent (the vermilion resonance) ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT 1285's nacre, NOT cosmic-glow. Audio: 24-voice JI pool + drone bed ‚Üí void reverb ‚Üí limiter (master ‚Č§0.3, fade-in). Server-safe ("use client", no top-level browser globals, all behind the Begin gate); no strobe (newborns ease in ~0.7 s, the ripple is a smooth travelling highlight); `prefers-reduced-motion` coarsens the packing + slows the dive; full teardown on unmount. Refs: Descartes 1643 / Soddy "The Kiss Precise" (Nature 1936) / Mumford‚ÄďSeries‚ÄďWright *Indra's Pearls* (2002) / Kl√ľver form-constants. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1291-rijke-flame` ‚ÄĒ *play a **singing flame**. A **Rijke tube** is a real thermoacoustic instrument: a vertical open-ended pipe with a heat source inside; when the heat sits in the lower half ‚ÄĒ where **Rayleigh's criterion** is met (heat added where acoustic pressure is rising drives the standing wave) ‚ÄĒ the pipe spontaneously breaks into a loud fundamental, and moving the heat to the upper half silences it. Modeled as a genuine limit-cycle: a signed Rayleigh gain curve `sin(2ŌÄh)` (fundamental) + `sin(4ŌÄh)` (second mode) drives an onset-swell/decay integrator, so amplitude depends smoothly on heat position and the player finds the sweet spot (peak at h‚Čą¬ľ, a pure-octave pocket near h‚Čą0.62) by ear and hand. **Played:** drag the glowing gauze up/down for timbre + onset, drag the tube's top cap for pitch (just-intonation length‚Üípitch); a live HUD shows Hz / drive / zone; idle 3s and the flame drifts to the sweet spot and slowly sweeps length so it plays itself. Audio is pure Web Audio: fundamental + 2f/3f/4f harmonic stack + a breath-noise band (loud at onset, fades to pure) + sub/ember rumble through a drive-opening body lowpass. Visuals (Canvas2D): brushed-copper rails + open-end rings on charcoal, a pressure standing-wave glow whose lobes track the live amplitude, flame tongues flickering harder with drive, rising heat-shimmer ‚ÄĒ deliberately copper/ember, NOT cosmic-glow, NOT parchment. Server-renders cleanly (no top-level `window`/`AudioContext`), honours `prefers-reduced-motion`, all luminance modulation gated through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` at ‚Č§3 Hz (no strobe). Refs: P.L. Rijke, "singing tube" (1859); Lord Rayleigh's criterion (1878). `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 702 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one massively-bigger concept, the top-rung deepening of last cycle's just-shipped winner: take `1285-apollonian-gasket`'s flat 2D Descartes circle-packing and escalate it into a **first-person NAVIGABLE 3D Soddy sphere-packing "cathedral"** you walk *inside*, spatialised in HRTF. Three folder-isolated builders on the SAME 3D-packing concept via different technical approaches: `1288-gasket-cathedral` (three.js instanced real spheres, first-person WASD+pointer-lock+gyro walk-through, HRTF per strike), `1289-kleinian-descent` (WebGL2 raymarched sphere-inversion KIFS *descent*), `1290-soddy-conductor` (three.js orbit + `Raycaster` pick ‚ÄĒ conduct the packing). **Curated WINNER = `1288-gasket-cathedral`** ‚ÄĒ all three cleared the floor (#1+#3+#2) and share the concept, so the call turned on which best answers this DEEP cycle's thesis (jury #1's "a room you're inside, a spatial-audio field ‚Ä¶ not a single object"): **1288 IS literally that** ‚ÄĒ a first-person navigable cathedral whose HRTF `AudioListener` is tied to your moving head ‚ÄĒ and it's **0√ó in the last-10** (a navigable spatial-audio room, not a shader-field, not a single object). `1290` is superb but is a 3D object-you-orbit-and-strike (closer to the lab's existing 1226/1280 orbit-and-ring groove); `1289` self-flagged that it risks reading as the still-live-banned "full-screen shader-field you stare at." Both backed up to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. Winner's packing verified numerically: **479 bells, worst tangency residual ~1.8e-15, Soddy‚ÄďGosset seed residual ~1.8e-15, 5 levels deep.** ‚ö† **Build note:** `npm run build` fails locally on `EMFILE: too many open files` during Next's prerender step ‚ÄĒ an environmental fd-ceiling artifact (box cap 4096 vs ~650 routes), NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (full lint + typecheck + compile) passes **EXIT 0**, and 1288 is a guarded `"use client"` component, so Vercel's normal-limit builder deploys it fine (see STATE ¬ß702 / MORNING open questions). `state: fractal-regress / infinite-nesting cathedral ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (walking the nave).` **Ambition (winner) 4/5: #1 grep-0√ó 3D-Soddy-sphere-packing + navigable-room + #3 named refs (Soddy 1936 *The Kiss Precise* / Soddy‚ÄďGosset / Lagarias‚ÄďMallows‚ÄďWilks 2002 / Mumford‚ÄďSeries‚ÄďWright *Indra's Pearls*) + #2-of-floor ‚Č•3 subsystems + #4 multi-cycle Gasket-Cathedral thread** ‚ÄĒ details in STATE ¬ß702.)

### `/dream/1288-gasket-cathedral` ‚ÄĒ *walk **inside** the Apollonian gasket. The top-rung 3D deepening of `1285` ‚ÄĒ where 1285 is a flat tap-to-densify gasket you look at, this is a first-person room you move through. A **3D Soddy / Apollonian sphere packing** (seed = four unit spheres at a regular-tetrahedron's vertices, mutually tangent inside their bounding shell, satisfying the **Soddy‚ÄďGosset theorem** `(ő£bŠĶĘ)¬≤=3¬∑ő£bŠĶĘ¬≤` to ~1e-15) recurses by **reflection** (Lagarias‚ÄďMallows‚ÄďWilks: the second tangent sphere is the conjugate of the omitted one; `b'=ő£b‚ąíb_omit`, `c'=(ő£bc‚ąíb_omit¬∑c_omit)/b'`), filling every curvilinear-tetrahedron gap with an ever-smaller inscribed bell ‚ÄĒ ~480 bells, 5 levels, worst tangency residual ~1.8e-15 (console + HUD self-check). Rendered as real three.js instanced spheres. **Curvature ‚Üí pitch:** big nave-spanning shells (small bend) sound low, tiny deep bells (large bend) high, quantised to a 5-limit **just-intonation pentatonic** `[1,9/8,5/4,3/2,5/3]` so every strike harmonises; a low root+fifth `_shared/psych` drone bed keeps it resting on a chord. **Spatialised (the point):** each struck bell is a Web Audio **`PannerNode` (HRTF)** at its 3D world position, and the **`AudioListener`** is driven every frame by the first-person camera, so a bell above-left is heard above-left. **Played:** pointer-lock + WASD (+ Q/E/Space up/down, Shift sprint) to walk and click bells under the reticle; drag-to-look + tap fallback with no pointer-lock; **gyro** tilts your head + glides you forward on phones; passing *through* a bell rings it; idle ~2s and the camera auto-tours a Lissajous path through the nave, ringing bells by proximity so it plays itself. Palette: nacre / mother-of-pearl (thin-film `MeshPhysicalMaterial.iridescence` + clearcoat, pale near-white speculars) on deep slate ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT jewel-glow-on-black; the enclosing Soddy sphere is a dark inward-facing shell = the cathedral walls. WebGL-unavailable notice; full teardown on unmount. Refs: Soddy *The Kiss Precise* (Nature 1936) / Soddy‚ÄďGosset / Lagarias‚ÄďMallows‚ÄďWilks *Beyond the Descartes Circle Theorem* (2002) / Mumford‚ÄďSeries‚ÄďWright *Indra's Pearls* (2002). `status: demoable`*

### `/dream/1285-apollonian-gasket` ‚ÄĒ *the Apollonian gasket as a just-intonation instrument you compose by ear. Circles are stored as a signed curvature (bend b = ¬Ī1/r) + a complex centre; every child tangent circle is placed by the **Descartes Circle Theorem** (b‚āĄ = b‚āĀ+b‚āā+b‚āÉ ¬Ī 2‚ąö(b‚āĀb‚āā+b‚āāb‚āÉ+b‚āÉb‚āĀ)) and its complex companion for the centre ‚ÄĒ the larger-bend solution inscribes into each curvilinear triangular gap, splitting it into three, and the packing recurses toward the infinite-nesting limit (capped by a min radius + a ~3200 count ceiling; a console self-check confirms mutual tangency to ~1e-15 and termination). On mount a handful of levels are already packed so the image + a resting root chord read at a glance. **PLAYED:** tap anywhere ‚ÄĒ the circle under your finger sounds (curvature ‚Üí pitch, quantised to a 5-limit JI pentatonic so taps harmonise; bigger rings ring lower), and its neighbouring gaps grow their next generation of tangent children, each chiming higher/quieter (a tap = a small arpeggiated chord). Drag to pan, pinch/scroll to dive toward the self-similar limit. Rendered as luminous mother-of-pearl rings (iridescent hue drifting with depth, `lighter` compositing, slow luminance breath ‚ÄĒ NO fill, NO strobe) on deep ink `#05060a`; 16-voice JI pool (soft attack / size-scaled long release) + a root+fifth `_shared/psych` drone bed ‚Üí void reverb ‚Üí limiter (‚Č§0.3, fade-in). Canvas2D-unavailable notice; `prefersReducedMotion()` coarsens the packing + steadies the drift. Refs: Descartes 1643 / Apollonius of Perga *Tangencies* / Soddy "The Kiss Precise" (Nature 1936) / Mumford‚ÄďSeries‚ÄďWright *Indra's Pearls* 2002 / Kl√ľver form-constants. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 700 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one massive concept, a PLAYED **time-dependent-Schr√∂dinger quantum ripple tank** (the fresh-to-lab criterion-#1 reach banked from cycle 699), attacked via 3 different render/interaction surfaces so the curator could escape the still-live shader-field ban. Cashes **JURY 2026-07-07**'s single loudest STANDING complaint ‚ÄĒ *"criterion #1 (never-used technique) is again openly DECLINED ‚Ä¶ reach a top rung"* ‚ÄĒ by finally SHIPPING the grep-0√ó TDSE reach that was built-but-banked last fire (697 cashed #1 with the swarmalator, 698 with Faraday, 699 built-but-banked the #1 quantum reach; 700 lands it). 696 D ‚Üí 697 W ‚Üí 698 D ‚Üí 699 W ‚Üí **700 D** (DEEP due; the top-rung move). Three folder-isolated builders on the SAME split-step-Fourier TDSE engine (128¬≤ grid, hand-written zero-dep radix-2 FFT, raised-cosine absorbing border, unitary norm conservation) via three render surfaces: `1282-quantum-ripple` (a Canvas2D |Ōą|¬≤ brightness+phase-hue FIELD ‚ÄĒ the physics-reference sibling, closest to the shader-field ban), `1283-quantum-cloud` (a three.js orbitable 3D **probability point-cloud** whose height+size+phase-colour = |Ōą|¬≤), `1284-quantum-etch` (a Canvas2D marching-squares iso-**contour line-etching** + Re(Ōą)=0 nodal curves). **Curated WINNER = `1284-quantum-etch`** ‚ÄĒ of the two candidates that CLEAR the still-live shader-field ban (1282 IS that banned filled-field form, kept only as the physics reference), 1284 wins on (a) it is the **cleanest escape from BOTH live bans** ‚ÄĒ a copper-on-ink topographic *line-drawing*, neither a filled shader-field nor cosmic-glow-on-dark; (b) **one-glance legibility that self-evidences the payoff** ‚ÄĒ the double-slit fires on load and its interference fringes read as a clean fan of nodal contour lines ON SCREEN (a numerical probe found 9 far-side lobes), cutting the jury's standing build-green-but-*unfelt* liability more than 1283's glow-cloud (whose additive blend edges toward the cosmic-glow ban and whose 3D height-map of a 2D field is a less-legible abstraction, hardest to eye-verify headless); (c) a genuinely fresh OUTPUT form for the lab (iso-contour line-etching = 0√ó in the last-10). ### `/dream/1284-quantum-etch` ‚ÄĒ *quantum probability drawn as a living copper ETCHING. The 2D time-dependent Schr√∂dinger equation (ińß‚ąāŌą/‚ąāt = ‚ąí¬Ĺ‚ąá¬≤Ōą + VŌą, ńß=m=1) is integrated by the split-step Fourier method (Feit‚ÄďFleck‚ÄďSteiger 1982): half potential phase-kick ‚Üí forward FFT ‚Üí kinetic drift e^{‚ąíik¬≤dt/2} in Fourier space ‚Üí inverse FFT ‚Üí half kick ‚ÄĒ every factor a pure phase, so the scheme is UNITARY and conserves ‚ąĎ|Ōą|¬≤ (console self-check: ~0.005% drift over 300 steps, k=0 packet). Zero-dependency hand-written radix-2 Cooley‚ÄďTukey FFT (rows-then-columns 2D); a raised-cosine mask on an ~8-cell border ring absorbs whatever reaches the edge. Each frame, hand-written marching-squares extracts ~9 log-spaced iso-levels of |Ōą|¬≤ and STROKES them as nested copper‚Üíbone topographic rings on near-black ink (no fill, no bloom, no strobe); the nodal set Re(Ōą)=0 is stroked as a finer bright curve ‚ÄĒ those moving zero-crossing lines ARE the interference pattern, so the double-slit fringes read as a clean fan a glow-fill would smear. PLAYED: Inject/Wall/Well tools ‚ÄĒ tap to fire a momentum-aimed Gaussian packet, drag to paint the potential; 4 presets (double-slit, Bunimovich stadium ‚Üí Heller scars, well lattice, harmonic trap) + Clear. Audio: the wave's radial |k|-spectrum drives a ‚Č§5-voice just-intonation partial bank (a locked scar = a stable chord, a spreading packet = a wider cluster), a pooled mallet pings on wall strikes, over the shared drone bed + void reverb ‚Üí limiter (‚Č§0.3, 2 s fade). Canvas2D fallback notice if no context. Refs: Schr√∂dinger 1926 / Feit-Fleck-Steiger 1982 / Heller PRL 1984 (stadium scars). `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 699 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ three orthogonal PLAYED instruments, all cashing **JURY 2026-07-07 #4** (*"make the next altered-states piece hand-PLAYED, palette that isn't cosmic-glow"*).
