### `/dream/1280-earth-bell` ‚ÄĒ *the whole planet as a struck bell. Tap anywhere on a dark basalt globe (a "virtual great earthquake") and it rings in the Earth's real free-oscillation normal modes ‚ÄĒ 8 PREM spheroidal eigenfrequencies (‚āÄS‚āā the "football" ‚Čą 0.309 mHz, ‚āÄS‚āÄ radial "breathing", ‚āÄS‚āÉ‚Äď‚āÄS‚āÜ, ‚āĀS‚āā, ‚āĀS‚āÉ) scaled up ~6 octaves into an audible chord whose intervals ARE the true mode spectrum. The globe visibly deforms in each mode's spherical-harmonic Y‚āóŠĶź shape (icosphere, ~10k verts, normals recomputed per frame), speed set by the real ratios; strike near a mode's node and it barely rings, near an antinode it sings. Orbit-drag to look, solo/mute modes, a "swell" bed. Modal synthesis (one detuned sine per mode + sub-impact) over a planetary drone bed + a 7.5 s void reverb, through a limiter. Canvas2D meridian-cross-section fallback if WebGL fails. Distinct from `463-terra-gamelan` (a passive earthquake-data readout) ‚ÄĒ this is a PLAYED physical model of the eigenmodes you PERTURB. Refs: free oscillations of the Earth / Benioff-Press-Smith 1961 / the 1960 Valdivia M9.5. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 698 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one grep-0√ó concept, a PLAYED parametric **Faraday-wave** instrument, attacked via 3 render surfaces so the curator could escape the still-live shader-field ban. Cashes **JURY 2026-07-07**'s single loudest STANDING complaint ‚ÄĒ *"criterion #1 (never-used technique) is again openly DECLINED ‚Ä¶ reach a top rung"* ‚ÄĒ by cashing #1 a SECOND fire running (697 cashed it with the swarmalator; this cashes it with the sibling grep-0√ó Faraday/quasicrystal engine, the banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1274-faraday` idea) ‚ÄĒ AND jury **#4** (make the next altered-states piece hand-**PLAYED**, palette that isn't cosmic-glow). 695 W ‚Üí 696 D ‚Üí 697 W ‚Üí **698 D** (DEEP due; the top-rung move). Three folder-isolated builders on the SAME parametric-Faraday amplitude-equation engine (six competing Mathieu modes, subharmonic f/2, symmetry-selection ‚Üí stripe/square/hex/12-fold quasicrystal = Kl√ľver form-constants): `1276-faraday-pool` (a WebGL oil-on-water fluid surface ‚ÄĒ the physics-reference sibling, with the most principled angle-dependent mode coupling), `1277-faraday-sand` (a Canvas2D **cymatic sand plate** ‚ÄĒ thousands of grains migrate to the nodal lines and DRAW the figure), `1278-faraday-relief` (a **three.js displaced-relief metallic membrane** at a raking angle). **Curated WINNER = `1278-faraday-relief`** ‚ÄĒ 1276 IS the still-live-banned full-screen fragment-shader field (kept only as the physics reference); between the two clean escapes, 1278 wins on (a) **correctness of the payoff**: it guarantees the four symmetries stay visually distinct by integrating amplitudes on the symmetric manifold, where 1277's uniform cross-coupling c=1.3 lets a *held* hexagon/quasicrystal slowly rot toward stripes (a real, un-eye-verifiable-on-headless risk that breaks its own "four figures" thesis), and (b) **surprise + diversity**: a tactile liquid-metal RELIEF (real displaced geometry, speculars sliding along the ridges) dodges the shader-field ban via genuine 3D and is a fresher one-glance surface than a 3rd Canvas2D particle piece. Non-winners banked to IDEAS ¬ß698 with full specs: **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1276-faraday-pool`** (the best physics engine ‚ÄĒ angle-dependent coupling; resurrect when the shader-field window clears, or promote its coupling model) + **‚≠ź `1277-faraday-sand`** (the most legible "cymatics photograph" read; resurrect with the co-selected-coupling fix so hex/quasi don't drift); both `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 3/5** (#1 grep-0√ó parametric-Faraday technique [prior cymatics 19/165/970/1095 drive eigenmodes directly at the audio frequency; none is parametric/subharmonic with quasicrystal symmetry selection] ¬∑ #3 named refs Faraday 1831 / Chladni 1787 / Edwards & Fauve 1994 / Christiansen-Alstr√łm-Levinsen 1992 12-fold quasipattern / Kl√ľver‚ÄďBressloff-Cowan form-constants ¬∑ #2-of-floor ‚Č•3 subsystems: parametric mode-competition ODE + three.js displaced-mesh renderer + drive-freq‚Üíchord mapper + subharmonic f/2 voice + `_shared/psych` bed; #5 weak ‚ÄĒ ¬ß698 Faraday dive, physics foundational-stable not <30-day). Validated via the isolation-build path (`‚úď Compiled successfully 44s ¬∑ ‚úď 66/66 static ¬∑ /dream/1278-faraday-relief ‚óč prerender ¬∑ 192 kB / 298 kB`), all 651 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1278-faraday-relief` ‚ÄĒ **a vibrating fluid membrane you play as tactile 3D liquid-metal relief: drag to drive it and watch real displaced geometry rise into stripes ‚Üí squares ‚Üí hexagons ‚Üí a 12-fold quasicrystal (the same geometry your visual cortex hallucinates), each symmetry answering at the subharmonic f/2 with its own chord.** state: geometric-hallucination / form-constant ¬∑ pole: intense (locks into shimmering lattices), softens toward cosmic-ambient at low drive ¬∑ **[`/dream/1278-faraday-relief`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1278-faraday-relief)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1278-faraday-relief/README.md))

### `/dream/1278-faraday-relief` ‚ÄĒ *a played parametric-Faraday instrument rendered as real 3D relief. A slow-envelope amplitude model evolves six competing standing-wave modes (Mathieu oscillators sharing one wavenumber at 0/30/60/90/120/150¬į, cubic self- and cross-saturation, dA_j/dt = A_j(ŌÉ_j ‚ąí A_j¬≤ ‚ąí c¬∑ő£ A_m¬≤)); the drive amplitude őĶ gates growth (below őĶ_c the surface goes flat and near-silent), the drive frequency f sets both the wavenumber and ‚ÄĒ via the mode weights ‚ÄĒ the selected symmetry: 1 mode ‚Üí stripes, 2 orthogonal ‚Üí squares, 3 at 60¬į ‚Üí hexagons, all 6 ‚Üí a 12-fold quasicrystal. The height field h(x,y)=ő£ A_j¬∑cos(k(x¬∑cosőł_j+y¬∑sinőł_j)+ŌÜ_j) is displaced into a 160√ó160 subdivided three.js mesh with normals recomputed each frame, lit by a dark mercury/petrol environment and two drifting warm-copper/cold-cyan lights at a 30¬į raking angle so specular glints slide along the ridges as they lock. You PLAY it: drag horizontally = drive frequency (symmetry + ripple scale), vertically = drive amplitude, tap = drop a ripple that collapses and re-forms the relief, or jump with the four preset buttons. The surface answers at the subharmonic f/2 ‚ÄĒ the real Faraday signature ‚ÄĒ and the active symmetry picks the chord (bare fifth / minor / major-add9 / detuned quartal shimmer); surface energy opens a lowpass so the sound brightens as the pattern locks.* `demoable` ¬∑ **psychedelic ¬∑ state: geometric-hallucination / form-constant ¬∑ pole: intense (softens toward cosmic-ambient at low drive)** ¬∑ INPUT **pointer drag-to-drive (X‚Üíf, Y‚ÜíőĶ) + tap-to-ripple + preset buttons** (a PLAYED instrument ‚ÄĒ NOT a passive 1:1 readout [banned], NOT real-piano-sole [banned]) ¬∑ OUTPUT **three.js displaced-relief metallic membrane at a raking angle** ‚ÄĒ real 3D geometry with recomputed normals + sliding speculars; deliberately NOT a full-screen WebGL2 fragment-shader FIELD [the still-live-banned "shader you stare at" ‚ÄĒ its sibling 1276 IS that form, which is why 1276 was banked not shipped], NOT flat-Canvas2D-readout [banned], NOT a single orbited jewel-object [jury-banned], NOT a navigable-interior (last-2 form) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **parametric-Faraday instability (subharmonic f/2, Mathieu-tongue growth, cubic mode-competition symmetry selection) ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó in the lab** (prior cymatics/plate pieces drive eigenmodes directly at the audio frequency; this is the first parametric/subharmonic one, and its emergent stripe‚Üísquare‚Üíhex‚Üí12-fold-quasicrystal symmetries ARE the Kl√ľver visual-cortex form-constants, so one physics engine is simultaneously a fluid instrument AND a psychedelic-geometry engine) ¬∑ PALETTE **liquid-metal / mercury / petrol / copper on near-black `#05070a`** ‚ÄĒ a physical tactile relief catching a moving highlight; deliberately NOT cosmic-glow-on-dark jewel [still-live-banned], NOT warm-paper [banned] ¬∑ **named refs** Michael Faraday 1831, *On the forms and states assumed by fluids in contact with vibrating elastic surfaces* + Ernst Chladni 1787 + P. B. Edwards & S. Fauve 1994, *Patterns and quasi-patterns in the Faraday experiment* + Christiansen, Alstr√łm & Levinsen 1992 (12-fold quasipattern) + Kl√ľver / Bressloff‚ÄďCowan form-constants ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 grep-0√ó parametric-Faraday technique ¬∑ #3 five named refs ¬∑ #2-of-floor ‚Č•3 subsystems ‚ÄĒ #5 weak ¬ß698 dive) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[full-screen WebGL2 shader-field OUTPUT (4√ó ‚Üí hard off, also still-live JURY ban) ¬∑ three.js navigable-interior OUTPUT (2√ó) ¬∑ DOM/ASCII surface (2√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-particle OUTPUT (2√ó) ¬∑ warm-paper PALETTE ¬∑ jewel/cosmic-glow-on-dark PALETTE ¬∑ real-piano-sole INPUT ¬∑ passive-sonification TECHNIQUE]` ¬∑ `picked=[drag-drive + tap-perturb PLAYED INPUT ¬∑ three.js displaced-relief-membrane OUTPUT (real geometry, dodges the shader-field ban ‚ÄĒ a relief-surface-instrument, not a navigable room, not a shader field) ¬∑ parametric-Faraday + quasicrystal-symmetry-selection TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ liquid-metal/petrol PALETTE (neither cosmic-glow nor warm-paper)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every banned tag. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all luminance change is slow/continuous (highlights slide, they don't flash); `prefersReducedMotion()` coarsens the mesh (96√ó96) + gentles the motion. Audio gesture-gated ("Begin"), master ‚Č§0.32 + 2 s ramp + DynamicsCompressor limiter, full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, osc stop, ctx close, three.js geometry/material/renderer dispose). WebGL-unavailable shows a `text-rose-300` notice + a shaded Canvas2D heightmap fallback of the same sim (never blank); visuals start on mount before Begin. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client ‚ÄĒ pointer + three.js + Web Audio; no mic, no network, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** subagent folder `eslint` clean + `tsc --noEmit` = 0. Authoritative full `npm run build` = whole-app TS + full ESLint + production compile PASS (zero from the dream zone) to "Collecting page data", then the standing container **EMFILE** fd-4096 ceiling at the font-manifest (infra, downstream of every code check; Vercel uncapped). **Isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, 66 routes) ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 44s ‚Üí ‚úď Generating static pages (66/66) ‚Üí /dream/1278-faraday-relief ‚óč static prerender, 192 kB / 298 kB First Load`**; all 651 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1278-faraday-relief/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified; NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the relief *reads* as tactile liquid metal, whether the four symmetries are clearly distinct on a real GPU, and whether the f/2 chords land want Karel's browser. The curated WINNER of cycle 698's DEEP fire. Honest gaps + cycle-2 (banked): replace the on-the-symmetric-manifold integration with true physics-driven pattern selection (adopt 1276's angle-dependent coupling so the symmetry emerges from the dynamics, not from forced weights); add two-frequency forcing for super-lattice / oscillon patterns; drive it with mic onset so an acoustic instrument re-forms the relief. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1278-faraday-relief/README.md`

## (Cycle 697 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ three orthogonal PLAYED instruments, each cashing a different UNCASHED **JURY 2026-07-07** note; the fire finally cashes the jury's single most-repeated complaint ‚ÄĒ *"criterion #1 (never-used technique) is again openly DECLINED ‚Ä¶ reach a top rung."* Two of the three briefs are grep-verified **0√ó** techniques (swarmalator, Faraday-wave); the third cashes **#2** (playable real piano). 695 W ‚Üí 696 D ‚Üí **697 W** (WIDE due; directly attacks "too similar"). Three folder-isolated builders: `1273-swarm-choir` (a real O'Keeffe‚ÄďHong‚ÄďStrogatz **swarmalator** ‚ÄĒ particles that are also oscillators, syncing in space AND phase ‚ÄĒ as a played particle-choir), `1274-faraday` (a grep-0√ó parametric **Faraday-wave** fluid whose stripe/square/hex/12-fold-quasicrystal symmetries ARE Kl√ľver form-constants), `1275-duet` (call-and-response **duet with Karel's real Welcome Home piano**). **Curated WINNER = `1273-swarm-choir`** ‚ÄĒ of the two grep-0√ó siblings it triple-cashes in one build: **#1** (grep-0√ó technique) + **jury #6 by name** (`1208-swarmalator` was the banked-0√ó idea the jury said to build "before shipping a fifth readout") + floor **#5** (the ¬ß697 2026-Physics-Reports research chain, genuinely <14 days); it's the bigger one-glance surprise (a swarm that tunes itself into a *choir* ‚ÄĒ color = phase = pitch, so synchrony is simultaneously visible AND audible), and its particle-swarm output dodges every banned tag more cleanly than 1274's full-screen fluid surface (which flirts with the still-live shader-field ban). `1275-duet` doesn't cash #1 (duet/granular are lab-common). Non-winners banked to IDEAS ¬ß697 with full specs: **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1274-faraday`** (near-ready to ship as the "psychedelic-geometry" sibling ‚ÄĒ its README + Faraday-1831/Edwards-Fauve/Chen-Vi√Īals refs are written) + **‚≠ź `1275-duet`** (resurrect once the real-audio path is verified in Karel's browser); both `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 3/5** (#1 grep-0√ó swarmalator technique ¬∑ #5 ¬ß697 research <14 days [Physics Reports 2026 review + arXiv 2605.11713 May-2026] ¬∑ #2-of-floor ‚Č•3 subsystems: swarmalator ODE integrator + Canvas2D spectral-phase-wheel renderer + 12-voice binned choir mapper + DynamicsCompressor bus ‚ÄĒ also cashes jury #6). Validated via the isolation-build path (`‚úď Compiled successfully 13.2s ¬∑ ‚úď 66/66 static ¬∑ /dream/1273-swarm-choir ‚óč prerender ¬∑ 6.24 kB / 112 kB`), all 651 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1273-swarm-choir` ‚ÄĒ **a swarm of particles that are each also an oscillator phase: drag to stir the field and steer the two coupling knobs (J phase‚ÜĒspace, K sync) into the five swarmalator states ‚ÄĒ static sync, static async, static/splintered/active phase wave ‚ÄĒ while color = phase = pitch, so the swarm tuning itself into unison is the same event as hearing it lock into a held chord.** state: mystical-unity / emergent-order-from-chaos ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes at active-phase-wave) ¬∑ **[`/dream/1273-swarm-choir`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1273-swarm-choir)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1273-swarm-choir/README.md))

### `/dream/1273-swarm-choir` ‚ÄĒ *a real swarmalator instrument (not a decorative particle field). Every one of N‚Čą420 agents carries a 2D position AND an oscillator phase őł, both evolving under the coupled O'Keeffe‚ÄďHong‚ÄďStrogatz ODEs (forward Euler, O(N¬≤), a few substeps/frame) ‚ÄĒ so space and phase steer each other. Dots are drawn as a spectral phase-wheel (hue = őł) on deep-slate, so synchrony is visible as color-order and space-order at once; a corner ring shows the mean-phase vector (length = coherence R). You PLAY it: drag across the field to inject an attractor (Shift/right = repulsor) and stir the swarm while mapping pointer-x‚ÜíK and pointer-y‚ÜíJ, drag the K/J sliders directly, or tap a preset to jump near each of the five canonical states; double-tap spawns a burst. Sound: no 400-oscillator forest ‚ÄĒ the phase circle is split into 12 bins, one voice per bin, each bin's mean phase quantised to a just-intonation pentatonic (always consonant), spatial angle‚Üístereo pan, phase-coherence R‚Üímaster brightness + drone swell, spatial-coherence‚Üídetune shimmer. Synced ‚Üí a few bins dominate ‚Üí unison/stacked chord; active phase wave ‚Üí bins cycle the circle ‚Üí a shimmering moving arpeggio. Master ‚Č§0.32 through a DynamicsCompressor limiter.* `demoable` ¬∑ **psychedelic ¬∑ state: mystical-unity / emergent-order-from-chaos ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes at active-phase-wave)** ¬∑ INPUT **pointer-drag-to-stir + J/K coupling knobs + preset buttons + double-tap burst** (a PLAYED dynamical instrument ‚ÄĒ NOT a passive 1:1 readout [banned], NOT real-piano-sole [banned]) ¬∑ OUTPUT **Canvas2D spectral-phase-wheel particle-swarm** ‚ÄĒ a swarm of hue-coded agents on deep-slate; NOT a flat-Canvas2D-signal-readout [banned], NOT a full-screen WebGL2 shader-field [still-live-banned], NOT a navigable-room (last-2 form), NOT a DOM-grid (last-2 form) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **swarmalator model (grep-0√ó in the lab) + binned phase-choir** ‚ÄĒ the FIRST lab piece where each particle is simultaneously a position AND a musical phase, so spatial coherence and phase synchrony are the SAME order parameter you steer ¬∑ PALETTE **spectral-phase-wheel on deep-slate `#0d1017`** ‚ÄĒ hue = phase; deliberately NOT cosmic-glow-on-dark jewel [still-live-banned], NOT warm-paper [banned] ¬∑ **named refs** K. P. O'Keeffe, H. Hong & S. H. Strogatz, "Oscillators that sync and swarm," *Nature Communications* 8, 1504 (2017) + "Interplay of sync and swarm," *Physics Reports* review (2026) + arXiv 2510.05663 / 2605.11713 ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 grep-0√ó swarmalator technique ¬∑ #5 ¬ß697 research <14 days ¬∑ #2-of-floor ‚Č•3 subsystems ‚ÄĒ also cashes the named banked-0√ó jury #6) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[flat-Canvas2D-readout OUTPUT ¬∑ warm-paper PALETTE ¬∑ real-piano-sole INPUT ¬∑ passive-sonification TECHNIQUE ¬∑ still-live jewel/cosmic-glow-on-dark PALETTE ¬∑ still-live full-screen-shader-field OUTPUT]` ¬∑ `picked=[pointer-drag-stir + J/K-knob PLAYED INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D spectral-phase-wheel particle-swarm OUTPUT (grep-0√ó swarmalator, distinct from the last-10 field/room/DOM surfaces) ¬∑ swarmalator-ODE + binned-phase-choir TECHNIQUE ¬∑ phase-wheel-on-deep-slate PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every banned tag. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all luminance change is slow drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` damps the integration step + substeps. Audio gesture-gated ("Begin"), master ‚Č§0.32 + 2 s ramp + DynamicsCompressor limiter, full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, osc stop, ctx close). WebAudio-absent shows a `text-rose-300` notice, the swarm still animates (never blank). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client ‚ÄĒ pointer + Canvas2D + Web Audio; no mic, no network, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** subagent folder `tsc --noEmit` = 0 + `eslint` clean + standalone numerical sim confirmed the five states are distinct & steerable (static sync R‚Čą1.0/S‚Čą0.03; static async R‚Čą0.003; static phase wave S‚Čą0.99 no-spin; active phase wave spin‚Čą0.08‚Äď0.13 rotating). Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, 66 routes) ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 13.2s ‚Üí ‚úď Generating static pages (66/66) ‚Üí /dream/1273-swarm-choir ‚óč static prerender, 6.24 kB / 112 kB First Load`**; all 651 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1273-swarm-choir/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read + sim-numerics verified; NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the swarm *reads* as a felt choir and the five states are audibly distinct on real hardware want Karel's browser. The curated WINNER of cycle 697's WIDE fire. Honest gaps + cycle-2 (banked): add **chirality** (two counter-rotating sub-populations ‚Üí double-mill / vortex states), spatial-hash the force sums to reach N‚Čą2000, and drift the audio scale degrees through modes so a long listen never loops. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1273-swarm-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 696 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ chasing the jury's most-repeated UNMET demand, **JURY 2026-07-07 #3** (*"Reach a top rung, for real this time ‚ÄĒ 14/15 still sit at 2‚Äď3"*) + **#2/#4** (*"make it PLAYABLE ‚ÄĒ hand/touch-played, not a passive readout"*). Last fire (695, WIDE) shipped a 3/5; WIDE reliably ships floor pieces, so this fire concentrates on ONE ambitious concept (DEEP) to reach for 4/5 ‚ÄĒ and it is NOT "3 DEEP in a row" (695 was WIDE), so it doesn't repeat the monoculture reflex. **Grep killed two instincts before they shipped on a false #1:** a spatial-audio/first-person ROOM is *not* novel (997/394/400/1029/1264/1267 already navigate acoustic space) and harmonograph/Lissajous is *not* novel (`291-harmonograph` exists). The one surface on STATE ¬ß695's endorsed "still-free" list that grep-verified **0√ó** is the **spreadsheet / data-table / DOM-cell grid** ‚ÄĒ glyph-organ (695) WON on exactly this "grep-0√ó *new surface*" logic; this cycle takes the next surface on that list AND reaches higher than 3/5. **Concept: the DOM itself as a psychedelic surface ‚ÄĒ a live grid of HTML cells warped in CSS `matrix3d` into an infinite receding lattice-tunnel you PLAY.** All 3D in the lab is three.js/WebGL/raymarch; **CSS-transform-DOM-as-3D-surface is grep-0√ó.** Two DEEP builders on the SAME grep-0√ó surface via orthogonal MUSICAL models: `1271-cell-cathedral` (an autonomous Greenberg‚ÄďHastings excitable-CA organism you seed/perturb) and `1272-lattice-tracker` (a PLAYED step-sequencer tracker ‚ÄĒ columns are voices, rows are steps, a playhead sweeps and the rows fly toward it down a tunnel corridor). **Curated WINNER = `1272-lattice-tracker`** ‚ÄĒ both share the grep-0√ó surface, so **played-ness + technique-novelty decided it**: 1272 is the unambiguous *instrument* (you COMPOSE by typing into cells) that cashes the jury's most-repeated unmet demand (#2 "make it PLAYABLE" + #4 "played, not a screensaver"), its tracker-in-a-tunnel interaction is genuinely novel-to-lab, and the literal spreadsheet framing (columns=voices/rows=steps) makes the fresh surface land harder ‚ÄĒ whereas 1271's excitable-CA engine is lab-prior (reaction-diffusion 6√ó; excitable media was the banked-not-shipped 1269) and its pacemaker-driven autonomy flirts with the exact "screensaver you poke" liability the jury polices. Non-winner `1271-cell-cathedral` banked to IDEAS ¬ß696 as the **‚≠ź TOP resurrect** (the stronger pure-transport / cosmic-ambient piece ‚ÄĒ a breathing machine-organism on the same DOM-tunnel engine; resurrect as an alternate "mode" or a particle-slot ship), `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 4/5** (#1 grep-0√ó √ó2: spreadsheet/DOM-grid as a primary AV OUTPUT surface + CSS `matrix3d` warp of live DOM cells as the 3D render method [lab 3D is all three.js/WebGL] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•5 subsystems: DOM-grid renderer + CSS-3D tunnel camera + playhead step-sequencer + 16-voice JI synth pool + drone bed + procedural convolution reverb ¬∑ #3 named refs Kl√ľver form-constants (lattice/tunnel) / ProTracker‚ÄďRenoise tracker lineage / "DOOM in CSS 3D Transforms" 2026 / Smol Sequencer 2026 / Partch harmonic lattice ¬∑ #4 explicit multi-cycle commitment [cycle-2 = lattice transposition + effect columns; cycle-3 polish] ‚ÄĒ #5 ¬ß696 dive). Validated: winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled ‚úď + Linting/types ‚úď** (zero warnings/errors from the 1272 folder; all warnings pre-existing in `src/lib/**`), `page.js` artifact ‚úď (38 KB), `tsc --noEmit | grep 1272` = 0; the exit=1 is the standing container **EMFILE** at "Collecting page data" (~4096-fd ceiling on ~650 pages ‚ÄĒ infra, not code; Vercel uncapped). Ships `1272-lattice-tracker` ‚ÄĒ **a music tracker that lives inside a live HTML spreadsheet whose rows recede into an infinite CSS-3D tunnel corridor: 8 voice-columns √ó 16 step-rows of real DOM cells you type notes into, a playhead sweeps down and the rows fly toward you down a glowing lattice, every cell a rational harmonic of one 55 Hz root so the whole grid stays consonant ‚ÄĒ you compose INSIDE the tunnel.** state: geometric form-constant (lattice ‚Üí tunnel) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (rhythmic when pushed) ¬∑ **[`/dream/1272-lattice-tracker`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1272-lattice-tracker)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1272-lattice-tracker/README.md))

### `/dream/1272-lattice-tracker` ‚ÄĒ *a played step-sequencer that is also a tunnel corridor. The instrument is a real DOM grid ‚ÄĒ 8 voice-columns √ó 16 step-rows of live `<div>` cells, not pixels on a canvas ‚ÄĒ transformed with CSS `perspective` + `rotateX(52¬į)` so the rows fall away toward a vanishing point. You compose by clicking a cell to cycle its just-intonation degree (1‚Üí7‚Üírest) or focusing it and typing a digit 0‚Äď7 (tracker-keyboard flow: arrows to move, Backspace to clear); it seeds a gentle consonant arpeggio so it plays the instant you press Play, and everything is editable live. A playhead sweeps the steps from the AudioContext clock; each row is transformed every frame by its signed-wrapped distance from the playhead, so future rows recede up the tilt, the struck row lands at the camera and glows, and past rows recycle invisibly at a fog boundary ‚ÄĒ an infinite corridor from only 16 DOM rows. Static glowing rails (column boundaries) are the lattice walls; the flying rows are the rungs; fired cells pop with translateZ + scale + bloom. Audio: each column is pinned to a pure harmonic of a 55 Hz root (√ó1, 3/2, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12), each cell degree multiplies a JI ratio, so every pitch is a rational ratio of one root ‚ÄĒ the whole grid is one consonant harmonic lattice through a 16-voice reused pool, a 3-oscillator drone bed, a procedural ConvolverNode and a master DynamicsCompressor. Cosmic-ambient by default (40‚Äď132 bpm live tempo, soft attacks, long releases); push the tempo and it drives.* `demoable` ¬∑ **psychedelic ¬∑ state: geometric form-constant (lattice ‚Üí tunnel) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (rhythmic when pushed)** ¬∑ INPUT **click/type into cells + live tempo** (a PLAYED tracker-keyboard compositional flow ‚ÄĒ NOT a passive 1:1 readout [banned], NOT real-piano-sole ### `/dream/1267-dream-growth` ‚ÄĒ *a first-person navigable dream-architecture that GROWS around your playing (the cycle-2 morphogenetic deepening of 1264-dream-cathedral). You start on near-empty bone-tiled ground with a sparse ring of orientation pillars and WALK it (WASD/arrows + pointer-lock mouselook, weightless dream pace with inertia + head-bob; drag-to-look fallback). Aim the crosshair and click (or Space) to STRIKE the ground or a grown surface: it rings a physical-model modal tone placed in 3D by its own HRTF PannerNode at that world point, tuned to just-intonation A-Dorian (a real mode, not a no-wrong-notes pentatonic) ‚ÄĒ AND it ACCRETES new geometry: a pillar rises, an arch spans to its nearest neighbour, a chime hangs, each easing in (never a pop) as a real playable resonator. The growth is shaped by HOW you play ‚ÄĒ pitch/degree maps to element type + height, tempo/density maps to clustered-vs-spread placement, and a decaying histogram of your degrees biases the tuning of new elements toward your emerging mode ‚ÄĒ so play sparse low notes ‚Üí a cavernous colonnade; play dense high notes ‚Üí a thicket of chimes. Old growth persists (capped InstancedMesh pools, farthest-first eviction) so you can walk back through earlier structure and replay your own history. each strike synthesises a small modal bank (partials ‚Čą1, 2.01, 3, 4.18, 5.43, 6.79, own exponential decays, filtered-noise mallet), routed through its own `PannerNode` (`panningModel:'HRTF'`) at the struck world coords, listener driven each frame from the walking camera ¬∑ VOICE **shared just-intonation drone bed** (`_shared/psych/droneBank`, drive spikes gently on strikes) ‚Üí **convolution reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` pure-wet send) ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.5 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination; the growing real-geometry OUTPUT specifically dodges the still-live shader-field ban. Note: navigable-interior is now deliberately 2√ó (1264 + this) across 2 consecutive fires ‚ÄĒ the jury's explicitly-requested cycle-2 deepening of ONE winner, not a monoculture. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ no fast luminance flicker; all change is slow drift ‚Č™3 Hz (crawling sun, gentle strike blooms, smooth growth ease-in); `prefersReducedMotion()` damps motion. ### `/dream/1264-dream-cathedral` ‚ÄĒ *a first-person, navigable, PLAYED hypnagogic dream-cathedral: a real three.js scene-graph interior ‚ÄĒ a nave of plaster pillars, arches, hanging chime-slabs and inlaid floor tiles ‚ÄĒ that you WALK through in the first person (pointer-lock mouselook + WASD, slow weightless dream pace with inertia and head-bob) and play like an instrument. Aim the crosshair at a pillar/arch/chime/tile and click (or Space) to STRIKE it ‚ÄĒ it blooms with teal light, throws an expanding ripple, and rings with a physical-model modal tone placed in 3D by its own HRTF PannerNode at that surface's world position, so the sound arrives from exactly where you struck. Resonators are tuned to just-intonation A-Dorian (a real mode, not a no-wrong-notes pentatonic), so walking the nave and striking several surfaces builds genuine modal harmony over a slow drone.* `demoable` ¬∑ **psychedelic ¬∑ state: hypnagogia / dream-architecture ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes gently when struck)** ¬∑ INPUT **first-person keyboard (WASD/arrows) + pointer-lock mouselook + click/Space-to-strike** (drag-to-look fallback if pointer-lock is blocked) ‚ÄĒ a genuine navigable-interior INPUT, grep-0√ó in adult work; each strike synthesises a small modal bank (mildly-inharmonic partials ‚Čą1, 2.01, 3, 4.18, 5.43, 6.79, each own exponential decay, filtered-noise mallet transient), routed through its own `PannerNode` (`panningModel:'HRTF'`) at the struck surface's world coords, with the Web Audio `AudioListener` driven each frame from the walking camera ‚ÄĒ the sound is *placed*, not merely panned; a browser echo of the acoustic-scene-field frontier (¬ß693) ¬∑ VOICE **shared just-intonation drone bed** (`_shared/psych/droneBank` ‚ÄĒ A-minor/Dorian chord whose drive spikes gently on strikes and eases back, the cosmic-ambient pole) ‚Üí **cathedral convolution reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` as a pure-wet send so strikes bloom into a long stone tail) ‚Üí master ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination; gesture-gated (AudioContext on "Enter the cathedral") ¬∑ PALETTE **liminal-architectural** ‚ÄĒ bone/plaster white, cold fluorescent-teal ambient, long raking de Chirico shadows; deliberately neither cosmic-glow-on-dark [still-live-banned] NOR warm-paper/parchment [banned] ¬∑ **named refs** Giorgio de Chirico's metaphysical-architecture paintings (empty arcaded plazas, cold flat light, long shadows) + the hypnagogic "impossible rooms / endless corridors" of sleep-onset + (research) the acoustic-scene-field frontier (arXiv:2601.19712, ¬ß693) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used first-person-navigable-interior technique ¬∑ #2 five‚Äďsix subsystems ¬∑ #3 de Chirico + hypnagogic refs ¬∑ #5 ¬ß693 research‚Üíbuild chain ‚ÄĒ #4 banked as cycle-2) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[flat-Canvas2D-readout OUTPUT ¬∑ warm-paper PALETTE ¬∑ real-piano-sole INPUT ¬∑ passive-sonification TECHNIQUE ¬∑ jewel/cosmic-glow-on-dark PALETTE ¬∑ full-screen-shader-field OUTPUT (all per JURY 2026-07-07 + still-live)]` ¬∑ `picked=[first-person-nav + click-strike INPUT ¬∑ three.js real-geometry navigable-interior OUTPUT ¬∑ HRTF-spatial + physical-model-resonator + first-person-nav TECHNIQUE ¬∑ liminal-architectural (bone/teal/de-Chirico) PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clean escape from every banned tag; the OUTPUT specifically dodges the still-live shader-field ban by using real geometry. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ there is no fast luminance flicker at all; all change is slow drift well under 3 Hz (crawling sun, gentle strike blooms); `prefersReducedMotion()` (via `_shared/psych/safeFlicker`) damps head-bob, sway and chime-swing. Audio gesture-gated; WebGL-unavailable + pointer-lock-denied both show readable `text-rose-300` notices (never a blank page); full teardown on unmount (rAF, listeners, `audio.stop`, `scene.dispose`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client ‚ÄĒ pointer-lock + WASD + Web Audio + three.js; no mic, no network, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** subagent folder `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors + `eslint` clean + dev-server route served **200**. Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 32.5s ‚Üí ‚úď Generating static pages (66/66) ‚Üí /dream/1264-dream-cathedral ‚óč static prerender, 193 kB / 300 kB First Load`**; all 646 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1264-dream-cathedral/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation verified; NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the walk *reads* as a felt hypnagogic space, whether HRTF placement + the treadmill colonnade perform on a real GPU, want Karel's browser. The curated WINNER of cycle 693's DEEP fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked as the cycle-2 deepening): the architecture has no *memory* yet ‚ÄĒ cycle-2 gives each struck resonator a sympathetic ringing "ghost" the reverb keeps alive and lets the room slowly re-tune around your most-played notes so the endless corridors reconfigure into a space that answers you. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1264-dream-cathedral/README.md`

## (Cycle 692 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "a drug-free psychedelic *JOURNEY* ‚ÄĒ one >5-minute *stateful* arc from stillness, through ego-dissolution, and softly back," cashing the loudest uncashed **JURY 2026-07-06 #2** (reach the abandoned top rungs ‚ÄĒ *"the lab has shipped ZERO >5-min stateful long-form pieces"*; stop scraping the 2‚Äď3 floor). Triple-aligned: it's also **Karel's care #4 (journey-engine alternatives)** AND the **PSYCHEDELIC clinical 5-phase arc** (onset ‚Üí come-up ‚Üí breakthrough ‚Üí plateau ‚Üí return). One massive concept attacked via **3 parallel builders on 3 different WebGL rendering approaches** ‚ÄĒ `1261-voyage` (a raymarched volumetric tunnel you fly *through*), `1262-bloom` (a log-polar Kl√ľver form-constant field that reorganizes across phases), `1263-emerge` (a GPU particle/point-cloud that condenses ‚Üí dissolves ‚Üí re-condenses). **Curated WINNER = `1263-emerge`**: the only candidate whose OUTPUT FORM escapes BOTH over-represented camps at once ‚ÄĒ the **Canvas2D 7√ó monoculture** (1259/1246/1244/1242/1238/1236/1234) that formed under 691 AND the **forming flat-WebGL2-shader-field 3√ó** camp (1251/1254/1257) that 691 refused to push to 4√ó (1261 raymarch IS that camp; 1262 log-polar is a flat field + log-polar is 8√ó-used) ‚ÄĒ because a volumetric ~90k-point cloud is neither; it is also the biggest **FORM-break** (a condensing‚Üídissolving *body* = ego-dissolution, not another field/tunnel/object), the biggest surprise, and the best-engineered (Ashima curl-noise vertex advection, additive premultiplied blending, full GL teardown). All three cleared the ambition floor (‚Č•4 subsystems + genuine >5-min stateful), so diversity + surprise decided it. Non-winners `1261-voyage` (**‚≠ź** the most legible one-glance hook ‚ÄĒ flying into a tunnel of light; lost on re-camping the flat-WebGL-field the jury polices) + `1262-bloom` (**‚≠ź** the rigorous form-constant explainer; lost as the Nth log-polar field) banked to IDEAS ¬ß692 with fold-in-to-emerge deepenings, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 4/5** (#2 four subsystems [5-phase stateful arc controller w/ memory + WebGL2 point-cloud renderer + `_shared/psych` Shepard/drone/void audio bed slaved to the arc + optional `use-mic-analyser` neural-gain] ¬∑ #3 named refs Refik Anadol *DATALAND ‚ÄĒ Machine Dreams* / Memo Akten point-cloud / non-dual boundary-dissolution ¬∑ #4 explicitly multi-cycle [cycle-2 folds in the losers + alt arcs: EDM/ritual/jazz] ¬∑ #5 the today's-research‚Üítoday's-build chain [Anadol DATALAND opened 2026-06-20, <30 days ‚Üí this build] ‚ÄĒ #1 NOT claimed per the jury [grep-0√ó novelty unreachable at 1259 protos deep]). Validated via the isolation-build path (`‚úď Compiled successfully 12.6s ¬∑ ‚úď 66/66 static ¬∑ /dream/1263-emerge ‚óč prerender ¬∑ 10.3 kB / 117 kB`), all 645 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1263-emerge` ‚ÄĒ **a cloud of light condenses into a self, dissolves into boundlessness, and softly re-forms.** state: full serotonergic/NDE journey (onset‚Üíbreakthrough‚Üíreturn) ¬∑ pole: intense-at-peak ‚Üí cosmic-ambient-return ¬∑ **[`/dream/1263-emerge`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1263-emerge)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1263-emerge/README.md))

### `/dream/1263-emerge` ‚ÄĒ *a drug-free psychedelic JOURNEY ‚ÄĒ one ~6-minute STATEFUL arc rendered as a vast cloud of ~90,000 GPU particles: sparse teal motes in a void (onset) gather and CONDENSE into a bounded luminous "body" (come-up), then the boundary DISSOLVES ‚ÄĒ the cloud expands, curl-noise turbulence rises, a center-out radial bloom fills the frame and figure/ground merge into white-gold light (peak = ego-dissolution) ‚ÄĒ drifts as a warm luminous haze (plateau), then softly RE-CONDENSES to a calm centered glow (return). One global `journey` scalar over 360s drives eased keyframe tracks for BOTH the particles and the rising Shepard audio, so minute 5 genuinely differs from minute 1 ‚ÄĒ it evolves, it does not loop. Press Begin and surrender; a phase scrubber + "Jump to the peak" let the morning reviewer leap straight to the dissolution.* `demoable` ¬∑ **psychedelic ¬∑ state: full serotonergic/NDE journey (onset‚Üíbreakthrough‚Üíreturn) ¬∑ pole: intense-at-peak ‚Üí cosmic-ambient-return** ¬∑ INPUT **self-running long-form** (press Begin and surrender ‚ÄĒ it runs itself for 6 min) + **optional mic "neural-gain"** (a louder room/voice deepens the dissolution ‚ÄĒ more turbulence/expansion/glow ‚ÄĒ once the boundary is soft; graceful self-running fallback if denied/absent) ‚ÄĒ NOT real-audio-file [4√ó banned], NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned]; mic is a starved input (1√ó/10) ¬∑ OUTPUT **full-screen WebGL2 GPU particle system / point-cloud** ‚ÄĒ a volumetric drifting cloud of ~90k additive points in a single `gl.POINTS` draw + a full-screen radial-glow triangle; deliberately NOT a flat Canvas2D pattern [the 7√ó camp], NOT a flat WebGL2 fragment-shader FIELD [the forming 3√ó camp: 1251/1254/1257], NOT a 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned] ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **curl-noise flow-field particle advection with a boundary that condenses then dissolves** (self-boundary dissolution = ego-dissolution), driven by a **5-phase stateful journey arc** over >5 min ‚ÄĒ each point carries two deterministically-seeded homes (a tight "body" orb + a wide cloud), the vertex shader blends them by `u_condense`, advects with analytic 3D curl-noise (Ashima simplex, no ping-pong textures ‚ÄĒ robust/dependency-free), pushes outward on `u_expansion`, gates by `u_population`, and evolves color ¬∑ VOICE **arc-slaved generative bed** ‚ÄĒ shared `startShepard` (endless-rising ascent, intensifying to the peak ‚ÄĒ the "ascending, intensifying sound" of the breakthrough) + `startDroneBank` (filter opens with intensity) ‚Üí `createVoidReverb` (wet mix opens as the boundary dissolves) ‚Üí master 0.35 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination; gesture-gated (AudioContext on Begin); the music is the carrier ‚ÄĒ its peak placed on the visual breakthrough ¬∑ PALETTE **an evolving luminous spectrum** ‚ÄĒ deep teal/indigo motes ‚Üí warm saturated neon ‚Üí luminous white-gold at dissolution ‚Üí soft return; additive glow; neither pale-print [4√ó banned] NOR jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] ¬∑ **named refs** Refik Anadol, *DATALAND ‚ÄĒ Machine Dreams* (opened **2026-06-20**, The Grand LA ‚ÄĒ a real-time, continuously-evolving, NEVER-LOOPING point-cloud immersive field; the reference for both the point-cloud FORM and the long-form-stateful quality; only the formal quality borrowed ‚ÄĒ the field here is pure seeded curl-noise, no external/paid AI model) + Memo Akten point-cloud/latent-flow dissolution + non-dual boundary-dissolution phenomenology ¬∑ **ambition 4/5** (#2 four subsystems ¬∑ #3 named refs above ¬∑ #4 explicitly multi-cycle [cycle-2 folds in 1261/1262 + alt journey arcs] ¬∑ #5 Anadol DATALAND <30-day research‚Üíbuild chain ‚ÄĒ #1 not claimed) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (~7√ó) ¬∑ real-audio-file INPUT (~4√ó) ¬∑ pale-print PALETTE (~4√ó) ¬∑ forming flat-WebGL2-shader-field OUTPUT (3√ó, 1251/1254/1257) ¬∑ 3D-jewel-object OUTPUT + jewel-on-dark PALETTE + physical-resonator TECHNIQUE + pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` ¬∑ `picked=[self-running-long-form INPUT (+ optional mic neural-gain) ¬∑ WebGL2 volumetric point-cloud OUTPUT (dodges BOTH the Canvas2D 7√ó AND the flat-field 3√ó camps) ¬∑ 5-phase stateful-journey-arc + curl-noise particle TECHNIQUE ¬∑ evolving-luminous-spectrum PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ the one candidate that escapes every camp. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all luminance changes smooth + slow (‚Č™3 Hz); the optional "breath" toggle routes through the shared `SafeFlicker` (default OFF, hard-capped ‚Č§0.6 Hz, soft sine with a 0.78 floor), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows all motion + the flow field. Audio gesture-gated (Begin), master 0.35 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, mute + instant stop always available; a forming luminous body previews on load (never blank). Full teardown on unmount (`cancelAnimationFrame`, audio stop + context close, `WEBGL_lose_context`, all buffers/VAOs/programs deleted). DPR‚Č§1.6; 90k points hold ~60fps. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side ‚ÄĒ self-running + optional mic + Web Audio + WebGL2; no network, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** subagent folder `tsc --noEmit | grep 1263-emerge` = empty + `next lint` folder clean. Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 12.6s ‚Üí ‚úď Generating static pages (66/66) ‚Üí /dream/1263-emerge ‚óč static prerender, 10.3 kB / 117 kB First Load`**; all 645 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1263-emerge/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (renderer reviewed: Ashima simplex + analytic curl-noise, additive premultiplied `ONE,ONE` blending, mulberry32 seeds [`Math.random` only in a comment], cached uniforms, full GL teardown; page SSR-safe [`"use client"`, all GL/audio/window in effects/handlers not module scope], correct typography [text-3xl title, text-base body, min-h-[44px] buttons, text-rose-300 GL error], DPR‚Č§1.6); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the condense‚Üídissolve‚Üíre-condense *reads* as a felt journey + performs on a real GPU want Karel's browser (the curl-noise/arc/fallbacks are reasoned through, not GPU-run). The curated WINNER of cycle 692's DEEP fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked as deepenings): the arc is a single fixed 6-min timeline ‚ÄĒ cycle-2 could fold in `1261-voyage`'s forward-transport so the cloud also *travels*, or `1262-bloom`'s form-constant morph as the body's internal structure, and add alternate journey arcs (EDM build/drop, ritual, jazz) per Karel's care #4. ## (Cycle 691 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ "three endogenous/cosmic altered states via three *starved* inputs," cashing **JURY 2026-07-06 #2** (reach the abandoned rungs ‚ÄĒ real-world-data sonification "about the world," the pattern of the two builds that *soared*: 1193-tremor-core), #1 (break the FORM ‚ÄĒ here a live **map** of Earth, not a field/object) and #3 (one-phone-glance legibility). Continues the PRIMARY DIRECTION (PSYCHEDELIC) on the **cosmic-ambient / endogenous** pole (INTENSE just shipped 690-lattice), and deliberately escapes the **forming full-screen-WebGL-field monoculture** (last 3 ships 1251/1254/1257 all shader fields) plus the audio-file-input (4√ó) and pale-print (~5√ó) camps. **3 parallel builders on 3 distinct states √ó 3 starved inputs:** `1258-stillness` (meditative clear-light, **camera** frame-diff, WebGL2 luminous field), `1259-auroral` (live-aurora cosmic void, **external NOAA data**, Canvas2D curtains), `1260-threshold` (hypnagogia, **touch/draw**, Canvas2D feedback buffer). **Curated WINNER = `1259-auroral`**: it's the aurora sibling of the jury-beloved `1193-tremor-core` ‚ÄĒ live real-world data, *about the world not about music*, reads in one phone glance; it breaks the FORM to a live global **map**; it escapes the WebGL-field re-camp (Canvas2D curtains) with the freshest palette (auroral green‚Üíviolet, neither jewel-on-dark nor pale-print); and it carries the lowest deploy risk on a straight-to-prod push (no shader compile, robust fetch + deterministic offline fallback, no API route). Non-winners `1258-stillness` (**‚≠ź TOP** ‚ÄĒ the inverted stillness-reward *interaction* the jury wants; lost as the 4th WebGL-field in a row + a slower hook) + `1260-threshold` (**‚≠ź** hypnagogic draw-and-teleport; lost on a lab-ancestored feedback technique + dim-until-drawn) banked to IDEAS ¬ß691 with full specs, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 3/5** (#2 four subsystems [two live NOAA fetches + geo-data fold + Canvas2D curtain render + shepard/drone/void audio bed + sparse aurora chimes] ¬∑ #3 named refs NOAA SWPC OVATION + planetary Kp / the lab's 1193-tremor-core sibling / NDE boundless-void phenomenology ¬∑ #5 the today's-research‚Üítoday's-build chain [this cycle's NOAA-OVATION live-data dive ‚Üí this build] ‚ÄĒ honest note: OVATION is a standing service, so the *freshness* is the current-minute live data, not a <30-day *ship*; leaning on #2+#3 for the floor). Validated via the isolation-build path (`‚úď Compiled successfully ¬∑ ‚úď static ¬∑ /dream/1259-auroral ‚óč prerender ¬∑ 8.82 kB / 115 kB`), all 644 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1259-auroral` ‚ÄĒ **the real aurora on Earth right now, sung back.** state: aurora / boundless-luminous-void ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes intense at high Kp) ¬∑ **[`/dream/1259-auroral`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1259-auroral)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1259-auroral/README.md))

### `/dream/1259-auroral` ‚ÄĒ *Earth's LIVE auroral oval, sung back as a cosmic-ambient curtain-field. Two CORS-open NOAA SWPC feeds ‚ÄĒ the OVATION Aurora global grid (~65k cells of live aurora probability) + the planetary Kp index ‚ÄĒ are fetched client-side and folded into one live state; the northern oval becomes drifting luminous curtains whose brightness, count, violet-shift and speed scale with the real aurora happening this minute, and the brightest cells ring as sparse chimes. More active planet = more overwhelming piece. The aurora sibling of 1193-tremor-core.* `demoable` ¬∑ **psychedelic ¬∑ state: aurora / boundless-luminous-void ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes intense at high Kp)** ¬∑ INPUT **live external data (NOAA SWPC)** ‚ÄĒ `ovation_aurora_latest.json` (OVATION global auroral-oval grid) + `noaa-planetary-k-index-forecast.json` (Kp 0‚Äď9), both keyless + CORS `*`, fetched client-side with a shared `AbortController` + 5s timeout, `reduceKp` defends against BOTH served shapes (header-rows table AND array-of-objects), deterministic seeded Kp‚Čą3 offline fallback with a `text-rose-300` notice; live Observation Time + Kp shown on screen ‚ÄĒ a STARVED input (external-data = 1√ó/10, jury-flagged, "music about the world"; NOT audio-file [4√ó, banned], NOT the mic/keyboard of 1257/1254) ¬∑ OUTPUT **Canvas2D luminous auroral curtains** (pre-tinted additive green‚Üíteal ray sprites + violet crown, seeded star/void backdrop, parallax, DPR‚Č§1.6) ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT a full-screen WebGL2 shader FIELD [the forming 3√ó camp 1251/1254/1257], NOT flat-pale-print [~5√ó camp], NOT jewel-on-dark 3D-object [jury] ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **real-API space-weather sonification/visualization + deterministic offline fallback** (grep-distinct as an aurora/space-weather source; the live-real-world-data lineage of 1193-tremor-core) ¬∑ VOICE **generative cosmic-ambient bed** ‚ÄĒ shared `startDroneBank` + `startShepard(dir:+1)` ‚Üí `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí master 0.4 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination, drive tracks live aurora intensity/Kp; sparse just-intonation bell "pings" ring the brightest OVATION cells (aurora chiming); gesture-gated (AudioContext on Begin) ¬∑ PALETTE **auroral green ‚Üí teal ‚Üí violet/magenta over near-black** ‚ÄĒ a specific desaturated-luminous register, neither jewel-on-dark NOR pale-print ¬∑ **named refs** NOAA SWPC OVATION Aurora model + planetary Kp index (the live sources) + the lab's own `1193-tremor-core` (its live-real-world-data sibling) + NDE/cosmic boundless-luminous-void phenomenology ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 five subsystems ¬∑ #3 named refs above ¬∑ #5 today's-live-data‚Üítoday's-build; #1/#4 not claimed) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[audio-file INPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ flat-Canvas2D-pale-print OUTPUT+PALETTE (~5√ó) ¬∑ forming full-screen-WebGL-field OUTPUT (3√ó, 1251/1254/1257) ¬∑ 3D-jewel-object OUTPUT + jewel-on-dark PALETTE + pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` ¬∑ `picked=[live-external-data INPUT (starved) ¬∑ Canvas2D auroral-curtain OUTPUT ¬∑ real-API space-weather TECHNIQUE ¬∑ auroral green-violet PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clean escape from every camp incl. the one this WIDE was built to break. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ curtains shimmer via smooth slow motion, all luminance changes ‚Č™3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the drift; field draws on mount before audio (never blank); full teardown (`cancelAnimationFrame`, in-flight fetch aborted, audio stopped, AudioContext closed). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (NOAA feeds are CORS-open, fetched directly client-side; no writes, no secrets, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully ‚Üí ‚úď Generating static pages ‚Üí /dream/1259-auroral ‚óč static prerender, 8.82 kB / 115 kB First Load`**; all 644 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1259-auroral/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (only-`_shared` cross-imports; ## Cycle 690 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "a drug-free DMT-*Breakthrough* ascent," cashing **JURY 2026-07-06 #1** (break the FORM ‚ÄĒ a room, a map, a *living surface* ‚ÄĒ not the camped object) and #2 (reach an abandoned top rung ‚ÄĒ a genuinely new *technique*, not the model-swap the jury keeps flagging), on the **INTENSE** pole (due after 688-borealis cosmic-ambient + 689-dissolve dissociative ‚ÄĒ the DMT/LSD peak Karel named explicitly in the PRIMARY DIRECTION). One massive concept ‚ÄĒ a ~3.5-min stateful escalation through the documented breakthrough phases (bloom ‚Üí growth ‚Üí lattice saturation ‚Üí breakthrough) carried by a continuously rising Shepard bed ‚ÄĒ attacked via **3 parallel builders on 3 different rendering approaches**: `1255-breakthrough` (a 3D-ish hyperbolic-space forward-transport tunnel), `1256-hyperspace` (a Bressloff‚ÄďCowan log-polar form-constant field), `1257-lattice` (a GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion *living membrane*). **Curated WINNER = `1257-lattice`**: it is the one that actually *breaks the FORM* ‚ÄĒ a living, self-replicating morphogenetic membrane, not a tunnel/field/object ‚ÄĒ AND the one genuinely novel *technique* the lab has never built (a real GPU reaction-diffusion ping-pong GPGPU simulation, the jury's core "reach the top rung you keep declining"); biggest surprise (Karel's care #2), and it dodges re-camping 688-borealis's tunnel that the `1255` approach would have repeated two cycles later. Non-winners `1255-breakthrough` (**‚≠ź** the legible tunnel-flight hook; lost on *repeating the borealis tunnel form* + an honestly-fake-H¬≥ log-polar transport, no true #1) + `1256-hyperspace` (**‚≠ź** the rigorous Bressloff‚ÄďCowan form-constant escalation with the best in-app teaching notes; lost as the *Nth* log-polar field ‚ÄĒ "novelty in the model, not the form," the exact floor-scrape the jury warns against) banked to IDEAS ¬ß690 with full specs. **ambition 3/5** (#2 four subsystems [`use-mic-analyser` neural-gain + WebGL2 GPGPU ping-pong RD sim + log-polar honeycomb display warp + shepard/drone/void audio bed + a Pearson-regime STATE machine] ¬∑ #3 named refs Turing 1952 / Gray-Scott‚ÄďPearson 1993 / the DMT-realm convergent-signatures phenomenology / Kl√ľver lattice constant ¬∑ #4 long-form/multi-cycle ‚ÄĒ #1 arguably reachable [GPU RD ping-pong is grep-distinct from the lab's CPU excitable-media] but claimed conservatively; #5 not claimed [honest: the dive found strong named refs + phenomenology papers but no strict-<30-day *shipped* work to anchor a research‚Üíbuild chain, same call as 688]). Validated via the isolation-build path (`‚úď Compiled successfully 13.9s ¬∑ ‚úď 66/66 static ¬∑ /dream/1257-lattice ‚óč prerender ¬∑ 10.6 kB / 113 kB`), all 643 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1257-lattice` ‚ÄĒ **a living realm grows itself and breaks through.** state: DMT realm / morphogenesis ¬∑ pole: intense ¬∑ **[`/dream/1257-lattice`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1257-lattice)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1257-lattice/README.md))

### `/dream/1257-lattice` ‚ÄĒ *a living "realm-membrane" GROWN in real time by a GPU reaction-diffusion field ‚ÄĒ a Gray-Scott simulation (Turing morphogenesis) runs on WebGL2 ping-pong framebuffers, and a stateful phase arc walks its feed/kill through Pearson's regimes so the pattern evolves from sparse central spots (BLOOM) ‚Üí self-replicating mitosis (GROWTH) ‚Üí a dense maze/labyrinth lattice (SATURATION) ‚Üí a coherent bright realm that holds (BREAKTHROUGH), then re-seeds and rises again; the V field is warped through log-polar honeycomb symmetry and shaded with thin-film iridescence on a luminous nacre ground, carried by an endlessly-rising Shepard tone. Make sound and the reaction feeds faster; onsets seed fresh growth.* `demoable` ¬∑ **psychedelic ¬∑ state: DMT realm / morphogenesis ¬∑ pole: intense** ¬∑ INPUT **mic (neural gain)** ‚ÄĒ Begin gesture opens the mic; overall room/voice energy raises the reaction sub-step count (louder ‚Üí faster growth) and onsets inject local seed pulses, with a graceful **internal LFO + auto-seed fallback** if the mic is denied (rose-line notice) + a "Breathe" opt-in safe-flicker toggle ‚ÄĒ a STARVED input (mic = 0√ó/10 committed; NOT real-piano-file [4√ó, rotated off], NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT keyboard [that was 1254]) ¬∑ OUTPUT **full-screen WebGL2 GPGPU reaction-diffusion FIELD (ping-pong FBO)** ‚ÄĒ a growing living membrane; deliberately NOT a flat pale-Canvas2D printed surface [the ~5√ó camp], NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT a tunnel-you-fly-through [that was 1251 two cycles back + the sibling `1255`], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion on ping-pong framebuffers (grep-distinct lab-first ‚ÄĒ RGBA16F when `EXT_color_buffer_float` present, degrading to RGBA8 @384¬≤ else; ‚Č§512¬≤ sim texture; 9-point Laplacian w/ toroidal wrap; 6‚Äď14 sub-steps/frame scaled by mic energy)** + a `computeArc()` Pearson-regime state machine sweeping F/K through spots‚Üímitosis‚Üímaze‚Üírealm + a display pass that splices the shared `_shared/psych/logpolar` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` for the log-polar honeycomb kaleidoscope warp + thin-film iridescence ¬∑ VOICE **rising Shepard + just-intonation drone through a void reverb** ‚ÄĒ `startShepard(dir:+1)` (endless ascent, the "ascending, intensifying sound" of the breakthrough) + `startDroneBank` ‚Üí `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí master 0.4 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination, intensifying with the arc drive + a touch of live mic energy; gesture-gated (AudioContext created on Begin) ‚ÄĒ NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned] ¬∑ PALETTE **high-key iridescent / prismatic thin-film on a luminous nacre-pearl ground** (oil-on-water spectral color, fuchsia UI accents) ‚ÄĒ neither jewel-on-dark NOR pale-print ¬∑ **named refs** Alan Turing, *The Chemical Basis of Morphogenesis* (1952) + the Gray-Scott model / John E. Pearson's *"Complex Patterns in a Simple System"* (Science 1993, the F/K regime map) + the DMT-"realm" phenomenology (*Mapping a Discrete Psychedelic Dimension: Convergent Neuronal Signatures and Phenomenology of the DMT Realm*) + Kl√ľver's lattice/honeycomb form constant ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 four subsystems ¬∑ #3 named refs above ¬∑ #4 long-form/multi-cycle ‚ÄĒ #1 conservatively unclaimed though GPU RD ping-pong is grep-distinct from the lab's prior CPU excitable-media; #5 not claimed, see honesty note) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[pale-flat-Canvas2D-print OUTPUT+PALETTE (~4‚Äď5√ó) ¬∑ real-piano-file INPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ 3D-jewel-object-you-pluck OUTPUT + jewel-on-dark PALETTE + physical-resonator TECHNIQUE + pointer/orbit-only INPUT (all jury)]` ¬∑ `picked=[mic INPUT (0√ó/10, starved, neural-gain) ¬∑ full-screen WebGL2 GPGPU-RD FIELD OUTPUT ¬∑ GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion TECHNIQUE ¬∑ high-key iridescent-prismatic PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clean escape from all three monocultures. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the membrane evolves as smooth continuous growth ‚Č™3 Hz, feed/kill ramp slowly so no full-field luminance flash on regime change, a high stable luminance floor; the only optional luminance pulse routes through the shared `createSafeFlicker({maxHz:3, defaultHz:1.2, floor:0.6})` (off by default ‚ÄĒ the "Breathe" toggle ‚ÄĒ instant `kill`); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. Audio gesture-gated (Begin); the field simmers on load before Begin (never blank); full teardown on unmount (`cancelAnimationFrame`, all textures/FBOs/buffers/VAO/programs deleted, `WEBGL_lose_context`, audio stopped). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side ‚ÄĒ mic + Web Audio + WebGL2; no network, no mic upload, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** whole-app `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors incl. this route + `eslint src/app/dream/1257-lattice/` clean (deps installed via `npm ci` this fire ‚ÄĒ earlier subagent tsc/eslint noise was a no-node_modules artifact, resolved). Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 13.9s ‚Üí ‚úď Generating static pages (66/66) ‚Üí /dream/1257-lattice ‚óč static prerender, 10.6 kB / 113 kB First Load`**; all 643 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1257-lattice/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (`sim.ts` GPGPU reviewed: correct ping-pong read/write swap, float-ext detection + RGBA8 degrade, complete-FBO checks, full GL teardown; page SSR-safe [`"use client"`, GL/audio/FBOs built in effects/handlers not module scope], mulberry32 [no `Math.random`], correct typography [text-2xl/3xl title, text-base body, text-white/85, min-h-[44px] buttons, text-rose-300 error], DPR‚Č§1.6 low-power); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the reaction-diffusion *reads* as a living growing realm-membrane + performs on a real GPU want Karel's browser (the RD math + ping-pong + fallbacks are reasoned through, not GPU-executed). The curated WINNER of cycle 690's DEEP fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked as deepenings): the breakthrough "ascent" reading is subtler than a tunnel-flight (mitigated by the phase progress bar); a next-cycle deepening could fold `1256-hyperspace`'s form-constant morph *into* the RD display warp, or add `1255`'s forward-transport so the membrane also recedes. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1257-lattice/README.md`

## (Cycle 689 ‚ÄĒ **psychedelic** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ "three altered states via three starved inputs," continuing the **PRIMARY DIRECTION** (PSYCHEDELIC, set 2026-06-28) across the *whole* spectrum in one fire: one INTENSE (`1252-chrysanthemum`, DMT/LSD melt on the mic), one COSMIC-AMBIENT (`1253-ganzfeld`, meditative Ganzfeld float on the gyro), one DISSOCIATIVE (`1254-dissolve`, the ketamine K-hole on the keyboard). Three starved inputs (mic / device-gyro / computer-keyboard ‚ÄĒ each ‚Č§1√ó in the jury's last 15) chosen to escape THREE monocultures at once: the flat-pale-Canvas2D-print camp (5√ó ‚ÄĒ 1246/1244/1242/1236/1234), the now-well-served real-piano-file input (4√ó ‚ÄĒ 1251/1246/1236/1234, the JURY #3 ask fully cashed across 687+688, so it rotates OFF), and the jury's receding jewel-on-dark-3D-object. **Curated WINNER = `1254-dissolve`**: the only one whose novelty is in the *interaction/perception model itself* ‚ÄĒ a never-built-in-the-lab **audio-visual DESYNC engine** (grep-0√ó) ‚ÄĒ which directly cashes the jury's hardest standing critique (*"the novelty is in the model chosen, not in the interaction or the form"*); it also **rotates the pole to dissociative** (away from 688-borealis's cosmic-ambient), is the one genuine **playable instrument** of the three (Karel's live-performance care), serves the **"ketamine"** state Karel named explicitly, and lands a fresh **desaturated bone/steel/ash** palette register (jury #4 ‚ÄĒ "not a ninth chiaroscuro, not pale-print"). Non-winners `1253-ganzfeld` (**‚≠ź TOP resurrect** ‚ÄĒ the freshest research‚Üíbuild chain of the fire [arXiv 2507.09011, July 2026] + a phone-native gyro float; lost on *repeating 688's cosmic-ambient pole* and a steady-Ganzfeld default that reads as "a slow gradient" at one glance since the payoff is inside the viewer's head) + `1252-chrysanthemum` (**‚≠ź** the legible INTENSE melt; lost as the floor-scraper of the three ‚ÄĒ its log-polar-melt technique is closest to lab-vocabulary, #2+#3 only, no #1 claim) banked to IDEAS ¬ß689 with full specs. **ambition #1 + #2 + #5** (#1 the audio-visual desync engine, grep-0√ó ¬∑ #2 four subsystems [keyboard whole-tone synth + WebGL2 sparse-geometry-in-exp-fog void + the desync/timeScale coupler + detuned-drone/granular audio through `convolutionVoid`] ¬∑ #5 this cycle's dive: PubMed 41453872 (2026), ketamine cortical desynchronization). Validated via the isolation-build path (`‚úď Compiled successfully 16.0s ¬∑ ‚úď 66/66 static ¬∑ /dream/1254-dissolve ‚óč prerender ¬∑ 8.35 kB / 115 kB`), all 642 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1254-dissolve` ‚ÄĒ **play, and watch the senses stop agreeing.** state: ketamine ¬∑ pole: dissociative ¬∑ **[`/dream/1254-dissolve`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1254-dissolve)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1254-dissolve/README.md))

### `/dream/1254-dissolve` ‚ÄĒ *the ketamine "K-hole" as a playable instrument ‚ÄĒ you play a whole-tone scale on the computer keyboard and at first each note flashes its shape exactly when you hear it, then over ~90s the AUDIO-VISUAL DESYNC ENGINE unbinds the two streams the brain normally fuses: the visual onset lags the sound, the field breathes on a detuned LFO out of phase with what you hear, a global timeScale dilates everything into slow motion, the slow luminous rhythm thins while a fine grain climbs (the literal EEG mapping), and a domain-warp shear melts the geometry into the void ‚ÄĒ a "Re-bind" (spacebar) snaps the senses back so you FEEL the difference.* `demoable` ¬∑ **psychedelic ¬∑ state: ketamine ¬∑ pole: dissociative** ¬∑ INPUT **computer keyboard** (home-row A S D F G H J K L = a 9-note whole-tone scale, deliberately unresolved; OS key-repeat ignored; the key‚Üínote map on screen; **9 tappable pads** so it works on a phone with no physical keyboard; spacebar = Re-bind) + a **desync slider** (force the K-hole) + Re-bind / Let-it-drift ‚ÄĒ a STARVED input (keyboard/MIDI class, ‚Č§1√ó/15; NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT real-piano-file [4√ó, now rotated off], NOT mic/live-clock) ¬∑ OUTPUT **full-screen WebGL2 sparse-geometry void FIELD** ‚ÄĒ a low-poly wireframe plane receding into exponential depth-fog with per-note thin luminous rings; deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT a flat pale-Canvas2D printed surface [the 5√ó camp], NOT a dense fractal melt [that's the sibling `1252`], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **the audio-visual DESYNC engine (grep-0√ó, lab-first)** ‚ÄĒ two clocks: the audio stream is always immediate (low-latency, keeps it playable) while each note's *visual* representation is routed through a rising `desyncAmount` (0‚Üí1 auto over ~90s, slider-boostable, Re-bind-resettable) that adds (1) onset lag up to 1.1s, (2) phase drift ‚ÄĒ the field's breathing is `mix(audioEnvelope, detunedLFO, desync)` whose LFO rate does NOT match the audio, (3) time dilation `timeScale = 1‚ąídesync¬∑0.72` slowing the visual clock + each note's dilated age, (4) the **slow-rhythm-down / gamma-up** EEG mapping ‚ÄĒ `uSlowAmp = 1‚ąídesync` thins the slow luminous pulse while `uShimmer = desync` raises a fine spatial grain, (5) a vertex/domain-warp **shear** (body-schema melt) growing with desync as the void floor lifts and rings desaturate toward ash ¬∑ VOICE **keyboard-triggered detuned synth through a growing void** ‚ÄĒ each key = detuned triangles + a sine sub + a faint inharmonic 2-op FM shimmer, soft attack / long release / mellow lowpass, summed through the shared `createVoidReverb` (**wet opens 0.42‚Üí0.84 as desync deepens** ‚ÄĒ the space grows vast) over a hollow open-fifth `startDroneBank` bed ‚Üí master ~0.42 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; gesture-gated (AudioContext resumes on Begin / first key) ‚ÄĒ NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned] ¬∑ PALETTE **desaturated dissociative bone / steel / ash** with a faint cold tint (`bg-[#080a0d]`, near-monochrome rings, "melting into surroundings") ‚ÄĒ neither jewel-on-dark NOR pale-print ¬∑ **named refs** NMDA-antagonist thalamocortical disconnection / sensory-gating breakdown (ketamine's mechanism ‚ÄĒ the drug disconnects thalamus from cortex so sensory binding breaks down; this piece enacts that as a literal un-binding of the audio & visual streams) + **PubMed 41453872 (2026), *Cortical Mechanisms Contributing to Ketamine-Induced Dissociation*** ‚ÄĒ EEG shows diminished theta/alpha/low-beta (slow binding rhythms) + elevated low gamma, mapped literally to `uSlowAmp` down / `uShimmer` up (this cycle's research dive) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 the desync engine grep-0√ó ¬∑ #2 four subsystems ¬∑ #5 the PubMed 41453872 dive added this cycle ‚ÄĒ #3/#4 not separately claimed) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[flat-Canvas2D-pale-print OUTPUT (5√ó) ¬∑ pale/light-ground-print PALETTE (5√ó) ¬∑ real-piano-file INPUT (4√ó, jury ask now cashed) ¬∑ three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) ¬∑ jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ physical-resonator-object TECHNIQUE (jury) ¬∑ pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` ¬∑ `picked=[computer-keyboard INPUT ¬∑ full-screen WebGL2 sparse-void FIELD OUTPUT ¬∑ audio-visual-desync-engine TECHNIQUE ¬∑ desaturated bone/steel/ash PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ escapes all three monocultures at once. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the "high-frequency shimmer" is fine-grained LOW-CONTRAST *spatial* grain (amplitude ‚Č§0.05, mean ‚Čą constant), `uFlicker` pinned at 1.0, no flashing luminance channel; all global luminance changes smooth over hundreds of ms (time dilation only slows things further); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored (drift + warp reduced). Audio gesture-gated (Begin / first key); full teardown on unmount (`cancelAnimationFrame`, keydown/keyup listeners removed, AudioContext stopped + closed, `WEBGL_lose_context`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side ‚ÄĒ keyboard + Web Audio + WebGL2; no mic, no network, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** folder `tsc --noEmit | grep 1254` = empty + `eslint src/app/dream/1254-dissolve` exit 0. Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 16.0s ‚Üí ‚úď Generating static pages (66/66) ‚Üí /dream/1254-dissolve ‚óč static prerender, 8.35 kB / 115 kB First Load`**; all 642 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1254-dissolve/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (page SSR-safe [`"use client"`, GL/audio built in handlers not module scope], no `use*`-named helpers, seeded LCG [no `Math.random`], correct typography [text-2xl/3xl title, text-base body, text-white/85, min-h-[44px] pads/buttons, text-rose-300 error], full teardown, DPR‚Č§1.6 low-power); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the desync *reads* as an uncanny un-binding (rather than mere lag) + the void shader performs on a real GPU want Karel's browser; the void draws on load, audio + the drift engage after Begin/first key. The curated WINNER of cycle 689's WIDE fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked): the desync curve's exact perceptual tuning is aesthetic (verified types/lint, not GPU-run); a next-cycle deepening could fold `1253-ganzfeld`'s co-authorship framing or add a MIDI-in path for a real keyboard. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1254-dissolve/README.md`

## (Cycle 688 ‚ÄĒ **adult / psychedelic** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ "a >5-min single-take stateful *tunnel-to-light PASSAGE* carried by Karel's REAL piano," cashing **JURY 2026-07-06 #2** (reach the abandoned top rung ‚ÄĒ a genuine long-form stateful piece where minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1, **0√ó/15**) and re-engaging the neglected **PRIMARY DIRECTION** (PSYCHEDELIC, cosmic-ambient pole ‚ÄĒ the drug-free NDE tunnel-to-light). One concept, three parallel builders via different technical approaches ‚ÄĒ `1249-threshold` (a scripted five-stage NDE state machine), `1250-lumen` (an Eno-style never-repeats accumulator), `1251-borealis` (a volumetric raymarched tunnel you fly *into*). **Curated WINNER = `1251-borealis`**: best realizes the PSYCHEDELIC mandate's whole point (embodied *transport* into an altered state, not a pattern on a wall) + best one-phone-glance hook ("flying into a tunnel of light") + best embodiment of the named reference (Karolina Halatek's *Terminal* is literally a walk-through light-tunnel); dodges BOTH monocultures at once ‚ÄĒ the receding jewel-on-dark-3D-object the jury banned AND the *new* pale-flat-Canvas2D-printed-surface camp the last 5 ships assembled (1246 linen / 1244 atlas / 1242 riso / 1236 parchment / 1234 pastel) ‚ÄĒ because it is a raymarched WebGL2 volumetric *field you fly through* in a warm dark‚Üíwhite-gold NDE palette. Non-winners `1250-lumen` (‚≠ź TOP resurrect ‚ÄĒ the purest never-repeats engine, an Ornstein‚ÄďUhlenbeck accumulator; lost on being the weakest one-phone-glance read) + `1249-threshold` (‚≠ź the legible scripted-arc counterpart; lost on the least-novel flat-field visual) banked to IDEAS ¬ß688 with fold-in-to-borealis deepenings. **ambition 3/5** (#2 five subsystems [real-piano loader + AnalyserNode energy analysis + `_shared/psych/logpolar` WebGL2 form-constant raymarch + long-form monotonic-depth STATE + shepard/drone/void audio bed] ¬∑ #3 named refs Karolina Halatek *Terminal* / Kl√ľver form constants / Bressloff‚ÄďCowan / √ć√Īigo Qu√≠lez volumetrics ¬∑ #4 long-form/multi-cycle commitment ‚ÄĒ #1 not claimed [the log-polar engine is shared lab infra; the fresh axis is the long-form volumetric FORM + NDE palette] ¬∑ #5 not claimed [honest: this cycle's dive found the Halatek named ref + a Feb-2026 "living visual systems" framing but no strict-<30-day *shipped* work to anchor a research‚Üíbuild chain]). Validated via the isolation-build path (`‚úď Compiled successfully 12.4s ¬∑ ‚úď 66/66 static ¬∑ /dream/1251-borealis ‚óč prerender ¬∑ 10.9 kB / 117 kB`), all 641 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1251-borealis` ‚ÄĒ **Karel's piano flies you into a tunnel of light.** state: NDE / tunnel-to-light ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ¬∑ **[`/dream/1251-borealis`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1251-borealis)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1251-borealis/README.md))

### `/dream/1251-borealis` ‚ÄĒ *Karel's real solo-piano recording flies you bodily INTO a receding volumetric tunnel of light ‚ÄĒ a full-screen WebGL2 fragment shader raymarches ~64 steps through luminous white-gold fog, the camera translating forward every frame so the log-polar ring-walls stream past with real perceived depth, a bright axial core growing and whitening as you approach; over ~5‚Äď6 min the fog thins and the radiance widens, so minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult / psychedelic ¬∑ state: NDE / tunnel-to-light ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient** ¬∑ INPUT **real-piano audio-file** (Karel's "Welcome Home" recording, read-only `GET /api/audio/549fc519-‚Ä¶`, offline-piano fallback if the network is down) + Begin/Pause + a pointer *nudge* of the weightless drift + a "Pulse" safe-flicker toggle (off by default) ‚ÄĒ a STARVED, jury-wanted input (real-piano-file; NOT pointer/orbit-*an-object* [jury-banned ‚ÄĒ here the pointer only nudges a hands-free passage], NOT live-clock [1244]) ¬∑ OUTPUT **full-screen WebGL2 volumetric raymarch FIELD you fly *through*** ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT a flat pale-Canvas2D printed surface [the *new* 5√ó camp: 1246/1244/1242/1236/1234], NOT self-inking notation, NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **log-polar / form-constant volumetric raymarching** ‚ÄĒ the shared `_shared/psych/logpolar` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` spliced into the frag shader; each march sample's cross-section `(x,y)` ‚Üí cortical `(log r, őł)` via `screenToCortex`, the **tunnel form constant** `formConstant(cc, phi=0)` (Kl√ľver concentric rings) evaluated with the log-radius warped by depth (`c.x + p.z¬∑0.55`) so rings ripple *along* the tunnel and stream toward you as the camera advances (`uZ` grows unbounded ‚Üí content depends on absolute depth ‚Üí **can never loop**); faint `honeycomb` wall texture; a `smoothstep(r)` clear throat keeps the axis open so the axial `exp(‚ąír¬≤¬∑tight)` core shines through; classic emission/transmittance accumulation with early `trans<0.02` termination + per-pixel hash jitter to kill slice banding + a Reinhard-ish tonemap blooming highlights to the NDE white-out (NOT a lab-first ‚ÄĒ raymarched volumetrics + the shared log-polar engine are lab-vocabulary; the fresh axes are the long-form volumetric FORM + NDE palette) ¬∑ VOICE **real piano through a cavernous void + an endless-rising Shepard + a drone pad** ‚ÄĒ `BufferSource(loop) ‚Üí createVoidReverb ‚Üí pianoGain ‚Üí AnalyserNode ‚Üí master(0.45) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(limiter) ‚Üí destination`, with `startShepard` (endless-rising Risset tone ‚ÄĒ the auditory analog of endless forward motion, `step(dt)` each frame) + `startDroneBank` (sustaining pad) poured into master; AnalyserNode energy (50‚Äď5000 Hz, smoothed) is the journey drive ‚ÄĒ **loud passages surge you forward** (higher speed integrated into `uZ`) and brighten/whiten the core, **quiet passages let the light settle** ‚ÄĒ NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned] ¬∑ PALETTE **luminous white-gold NDE tunnel-to-light** ‚ÄĒ warm dark amber `#1a0d06`-ish at the mouth, gold `#ffd280` fog walls, a growing white `#fffaec` core; neither pale-print NOR jewel-on-dark ¬∑ **long-form / minute-5-‚Č†-minute-1:** `uZ` monotonic (never loops) + `uApproach` (0‚Üí~1 over ~330s, brightens+widens the core) + `uThin` (0‚Üí1 over ~360s, thins the fog/lowers absorption) + `uRingFreq` wandering on two incommensurate sines ‚Üí by minute 5 the passage is thinner, faster, whiter, more open than at the mouth ¬∑ **named refs** Karolina Halatek, *Terminal* (a walk-through cylindrical LED light-tunnel built from near-death-experience survivor testimony ‚ÄĒ "perspectives warp, shadows disappear"; this cycle's research dive) + Kl√ľver's four form constants / Bressloff‚ÄďCowan retino-cortical log map (the reason the log-polar warp *produces* perceptual tunnels) + √ć√Īigo Qu√≠lez volumetric fog/raymarch technique + Brian Eno generative long-form ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 five subsystems ¬∑ #3 named refs above ¬∑ #4 long-form/multi-cycle ‚ÄĒ #1/#5 not claimed, see honesty notes above) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[flat-Canvas2D-pale-printed-surface OUTPUT (5√ó, the NEW camp) ¬∑ pale/light-ground-print PALETTE (5√ó) ¬∑ three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) ¬∑ jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ physical-resonator-object TECHNIQUE (jury) ¬∑ pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` ¬∑ `picked=[real-piano audio-file INPUT ¬∑ full-screen WebGL2 log-polar volumetric-raymarch FIELD OUTPUT ¬∑ long-form monotonic-depth tunnel TECHNIQUE ¬∑ luminous white-gold NDE PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ the rare pick that escapes BOTH the receding jewel-3D-object monoculture AND the newly-assembled pale-flat-Canvas2D one. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ forward motion is smooth continuous translation ‚Č™3 Hz, the core brightens over *seconds*; the only optional luminance pulse routes through the shared `createSafeFlicker({maxHz:3, defaultHz:1.2, floor:0.6})` (off by default, soft sine with a 0.6 floor ‚ÄĒ never a blackout strobe, instant `kill`); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored (flicker ‚Üí sub-perceptual drift, forward speed ‚Üí ~45%). Audio gesture-gated (Begin); before Begin the shader draws the dark resting tunnel mouth (never blank); full teardown on unmount (`cancelAnimationFrame`, audio nodes stopped + context closed, `WEBGL_lose_context`, flicker killed). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; the only network is a READ of the existing `/api/audio/<id>` route with a 4.5s abort + offline fallback; no mic, no writes, zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ Web Audio + WebGL2 only). **Validation:** folder `tsc --noEmit | grep 1251-borealis` = empty + `eslint` folder exit 0 (a false-positive ref-in-cleanup warning was fixed by capturing the stable flicker instance). Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 12.4s ‚Üí ‚úď Generating static pages (66/66) ‚Üí /dream/1251-borealis ‚óč static prerender, 10.9 kB / 117 kB First Load`**; all 641 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1251-borealis/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (page SSR-safe, GL rig created on mount so the mouth draws before Begin, full teardown, correct typography [text-2xl title / text-base body / min-h-[44px] buttons / text-rose-300 error], real-piano-first with offline fallback, DPR‚Č§1.6 low-power context, 64-step const-bounded march with early termination); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the tunnel *reads* as depthful transport + the shader compiles+performs on a real GPU want Karel's browser (the shader is straightforward GLSL ES 3.00 with valid constructors + injected shared functions before use, reasoned through but not GPU-executed). The curated WINNER of cycle 688's DEEP fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked as deepenings): the passage is a continuous drift, not yet stage-gated ‚ÄĒ folding in `1249-threshold`'s five-phase NDE scripting would add a legible narrative on top of the transport; and `1250-lumen`'s Ornstein‚ÄďUhlenbeck accumulator would make the ring-frequency / approach wander genuinely non-recurrent rather than sinusoidal. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1251-borealis/README.md`
