## (Cycle 687 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ "three ways Karel's REAL recording becomes a non-object, non-notation FORM," cashing the loudest recurring unmet ask: **JURY 2026-07-06 #3, SHIP THE REAL PIANO** (Karel's "Welcome Home" recording drove only 1√ó/15; the love signal points here every fire) + #1 (break the FORM) + #4 (a genuinely new palette register), while deliberately dodging the emerging "real-recording‚Üíself-inking-notation" sub-camp (1234/1236). Spawned 3 parallel builders ‚ÄĒ `1246-warp` (a woven TEXTILE), `1247-thermal` (a WEATHER chart), `1248-verdure` (a long-form GARDEN) ‚ÄĒ all real-piano, all non-object/non-notation/non-jewel, all dodging the jury's four hard bans. **Curated WINNER = `1246-warp`**: freshest + most on-theme 2026 named reference (Alva Noto √ó HOSOO *WAVE WEAVE*, this cycle's own research find ‚Üí cleanest today's-research‚Üítoday's-build chain); palette-distant from the just-shipped pale-chart `1244-dayline` (linen textile, not another pale chart ‚ÄĒ 1247 would have re-camped that); best one-phone-glance hook of the palette-distant pair ("watch your recording weave itself into cloth"). Non-winners `1247-thermal` (‚≠ź‚≠ź TOP resurrect ‚ÄĒ the lab's first full Navier‚ÄďStokes weather chart; lost only on a pale-chart palette re-camp of dayline + CPU-solver perf risk) + `1248-verdure` (‚≠ź long-form stateful garden) banked to IDEAS ¬ß687. **ambition 2‚Äď3/5** (#2 four subsystems [real-audio loader + STFT band analysis + granular/interlace weave engine + Canvas2D loom renderer] ¬∑ #3 named refs Alva Noto√óHOSOO / Anni Albers ¬∑ #5 this cycle's *WAVE WEAVE* + arXiv fluid research dive ‚ÄĒ #1 not claimed [granular/STFT are lab-vocabulary; the fresh axes are the textile FORM + natural-dye palette]). Validated via the isolation-build path (`‚úď 66/66 static ¬∑ /dream/1246-warp ‚óč prerender ¬∑ 5.05 kB`), all 640 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1246-warp` ‚ÄĒ **Karel's piano weaves itself into cloth.** state: real-recording / about-the-music ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ¬∑ **[`/dream/1246-warp`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1246-warp)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1246-warp/README.md))

### `/dream/1246-warp` ‚ÄĒ *Karel's real solo-piano recording weaves itself into a living textile ‚ÄĒ a Canvas2D loom lays one weft column per shuttle pass; 48 horizontal warp threads each hold a log-frequency band (bass low, treble high), and band energy from a real AnalyserNode sets each pick's dye, weight and weave (plain when quiet, 2/2 twill when busy), so the finished cloth is a record of the music's dynamics.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: real-recording / about-the-music ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient** ¬∑ INPUT **real-piano audio-file** (Karel's "Welcome Home" recording, read-only `GET /api/audio/549fc519-‚Ä¶`, offline-piano fallback if the network is down) + Begin/Pause ‚ÄĒ a STARVED input (real-piano-file, the JURY #3 SHIP-THE-REAL-PIANO ask; NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT live-clock [that was 1244]) ¬∑ OUTPUT **Canvas2D woven-textile field** ‚ÄĒ interlacing rounded warp/weft threads with a faint sheen on unbleached linen; deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT self-inking notation [1234/1236 sub-camp], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **real-time STFT-band‚Üíinterlaced-weave** ‚ÄĒ `AnalyserNode.getFloatFrequencyData` folded into 48 log-frequency band energies per ~110ms shuttle pass; a loud band weaves a thick saturated pick, a quiet one stays near-linen; over/under interlace is plain weave when calm and tips into a **2/2 twill** (diagonal floats) when a band is busy, so dense passages grow visible texture; the fell line advances rightward, the cloth scrolls left at the edge (never blank) ¬∑ PALETTE **natural-dye textile on unbleached linen** ‚ÄĒ ground `#e9e0cf`, dyes indigo `#2b3a67` / madder red `#a8402f` / weld ochre `#c9a24b` / walnut `#5c4632`, warp ink `#3a332a`; dark-on-light UI, no neon, no glow ¬∑ **named ref** Carsten Nicolai / Alva Noto √ó HOSOO, *WAVE WEAVE / Sono Obi Landscape* (Kyoto, Nov 2025‚ÄďMar 2026 ‚ÄĒ sound made into fabric so the cloth is an analog recording of the music; this is the live, generative inverse) + Anni Albers, *On Weaving* (1965) ¬∑ **honest gaps** the loom is rotated 90¬į from the brief's "vertical warp" wording (the only orientation where bass-bottom/treble-top AND fell-advances-right both hold, documented in README); the weave is a two-state plain/twill vocabulary (a full Jacquard set ‚ÄĒ satin, basket, per-thread float ‚ÄĒ would be richer); resize rebuilds/clears the cloth; NOT ear/eye-verified headless (whether the cloth *reads* as woven and the dyes *read* on-screen want Karel's browser ‚ÄĒ the bare warped loom draws on load before audio, audio engages after Begin). **[`/dream/1246-warp`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1246-warp)** ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1246-warp/README.md)

## (Cycle 686 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **UNBLOCK + CONTINUE** ‚ÄĒ ship cycle-685's curated-but-blocked WIDE winner AND relieve the fd-ceiling "hard blocker" from *inside* the scope fence. Cycle 685 curated `1244-dayline` (a MAP ‚ÄĒ the loudest one-glance winner of its three non-object FORMS) but couldn't ship: `npm run build` EMFILEs at the ~640-route baseline (container `ulimit -n` = 4096, unraisable; `next.config` off-limits), and 685 declared every build cycle blocked. **The unblock:** the EMFILE fires *after* a clean compile+lint+type-check and is purely route-count-proportional, so a new route validates via (a) the full build reaching "Collecting page data" + (b) an **isolation build** ‚ÄĒ `mv` the other ~639 tracked folders aside, build the reduced ~66-route tree with no fd pressure (`‚úď 66/66 static, /dream/1244-dayline ‚óč prerender`), `mv` them all back (fully reversible). Vercel builds the full tree uncapped and is unaffected. Build cycles are NOT hard-blocked. This is AGENT.md Decide priority #1/#2 (unblock / continue a blocked winner > build new) + the lowest-risk debut of the new validation on a live prod push (deterministic, offline, best 06:30 glance). Real-piano [JURY #3, loudest unmet ask] banks as ‚≠ź SHIP-NEXT (`1245-antiphon`). **ambition 3/5** (#2 four subsystems ¬∑ #3 named refs Anadol/Ikeda ¬∑ #5 ¬ß685/¬ß686 Anadol *Dataland* research chain ‚ÄĒ #1 not claimed). Ships `1244-dayline` ‚ÄĒ **the Earth's rotation as a sequencer.** state: real-world-data / about-the-world ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient. **[`/dream/1244-dayline`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1244-dayline)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1244-dayline/README.md))

### `/dream/1244-dayline` ‚ÄĒ *the Earth's rotation as a music sequencer ‚ÄĒ the day/night terminator sweeps a flat printed-atlas world map, and every city it crosses at dawn or dusk rings a note; a drone tracks the sunlit landmass.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: real-world-data / about-the-world ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient** ¬∑ INPUT **live-clock / time-driven** ‚ÄĒ Begin, Play/Pause, a log **time-speed** slider (real-time ‚Üí a day per ~40s), **scrub time-of-day**, and **Now** (jump to real UTC); a STARVED input (live-clock, NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT real-piano-file [SHIP-NEXT], NOT live-external-network [fully offline]) ¬∑ OUTPUT **Canvas2D flat equirectangular printed-atlas MAP** ‚ÄĒ warm-paper landmasses on slate seas, a translucent night overlay, a luminous **amber-dawn / rose-dusk** terminator band, a subsolar sun glyph, city dots that bloom small+smooth when they ring; deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned], NOT a 2D-full-screen abstract field ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **offline solar-astronomy self-composing sequencer** ‚ÄĒ `astro.ts` computes, with no network, solar declination őī = ‚ąí23.44¬į¬∑cos(360/365¬∑(N+10)), subsolar longitude from fractional UTC hours, and per-city solar altitude sin(alt)=sin(lat)¬∑sin(őī)+cos(lat)¬∑cos(őī)¬∑cos(lon‚ąísubLon); a city rings when its altitude **crosses zero** (up = dawn, down = dusk), tracked per-city frame to frame, with **jump-suppression re-baselining** on scrub/Now/resume/large-speed-delta so time-jumps don't machine-gun the crossings; sunlit-landmass area (sampled over coarse continent polygons) drives a drone (NOT a lab-first technique ‚ÄĒ data-map sonification is lab-vocabulary; fresh axes are the offline-astronomy engine + the printed-atlas FORM/palette) ¬∑ VOICE **per-city bell/pluck** ‚ÄĒ pitch ‚Üź latitude (pentatonic, poleward higher), stereo pan ‚Üź longitude, brighter partials north, dawn warmer / dusk darker; short percussive attack + exp tail ‚Üí reverb ‚Üí limiter ‚Üí master ~0.2; plus a low detuned drone whose cutoff+gain track the sunlit-land fraction ‚ÄĒ NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned], NOT a drone/JI-choir-only ¬∑ PALETTE **pale printed-atlas** (warm cream `#f3ecda`, slate seas, dark-ink `#2b2a24` text, amber/rose terminator) ‚ÄĒ a print-forward escape from the ~10√ó chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark the jury banned; high-contrast dark ink for all UI ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [offline solar-astronomy engine ¬∑ 44-city crossing-detection sequencer ¬∑ sunlit-tracking drone + per-city bell synth ¬∑ Canvas2D map+terminator renderer] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Refik Anadol *Machine Dreams: Rainforest* / Dataland, opened 2026-06-20 ¬∑ Ryoji Ikeda *data.tron* ¬∑ classic terminator maps] ¬∑ #5 recent research [¬ß685/¬ß686 Anadol *Dataland* real-world-data-field dive] ‚ÄĒ **#1 NOT claimed**, data-map sonification is lab-prior) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) ¬∑ chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ physical-resonator-object-you-excite TECHNIQUE (jury) ¬∑ pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` ¬∑ `picked=[live-clock/time-driven INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D flat printed-atlas MAP OUTPUT ¬∑ offline-astronomy self-composing-sequencer TECHNIQUE ¬∑ pale warm-paper atlas PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard jury ban; answers jury #1 (break the form ‚ÄĒ a MAP) + the praised real-world-data/about-the-world lane (`1193-tremor-core`) + a fresh non-jewel palette (jury #4). **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the terminator sweeps as one smooth continuous drift ‚Č™3 Hz, city blooms small/local/low-alpha/smooth, palette shifts over minutes; audio gesture-gated (Begin) + master ~0.2 + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + full teardown on unmount. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; no mic, no network ‚ÄĒ offline astronomy ‚ÄĒ zero new npm deps; Web Audio + Canvas2D only). **Validation:** builder self-reported `tsc --noEmit | grep 1244-dayline` = empty + `eslint` folder exit 0; risk-greps clean (no `Math.random` [mulberry32], no `fetch`/network, no `use*`-named helpers). Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully (34.2s) ‚Üí ‚úď Generating static pages (66/66) ‚Üí /dream/1244-dayline ‚óč static prerender, 6.72 kB / 109 kB First Load`**; all 639 folders restored, `git status` = only `1244-dayline/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + astronomy-by-inspection verified** (`astro.ts` implements the exact spec math; crossings by per-city altitude sign-change; jump-suppression confirmed by reading `page.tsx`); **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) ‚ÄĒ whether "hear the sun move around the Earth" *reads* aurally + the terminator/palette *reads* on-screen want Karel's browser; the map + terminator animate on load before audio unlock so it is never blank, and the time-driven route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. The curated WINNER of cycle 685's WIDE fire, shipped one cycle late after the fd-ceiling was relieved. Honest gaps (documented): coarse hand-authored continent polygons; astronomy omits equation-of-time + atmospheric refraction (crossing times approximate ‚ÄĒ fine for a sequencer). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1244-dayline/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 684 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one concept, *a machine that answers your single line with genuinely INDEPENDENT melodic voices ‚ÄĒ real counterpoint, not chords ‚ÄĒ assembling as a living score*, attacked via **3 contrapuntal engines / notation FORMS / fresh palettes**. This is the jury's explicitly-sanctioned top-rung move: **deepen a past winner** (JURY 2026-07-06 #2: *"cash criterion #4 ¬∑ deepen a past winner across a second cycle ¬∑ the mandate wants that over another fresh floor-scraper"*). The winner it deepens is the jury-praised standout **`1218-shadow`** ‚ÄĒ *"a genuinely musical intelligence rather than another object-to-pluck"* ‚ÄĒ which did **homophonic** chord-harmonization (all voices move together into block chords). The advance across all three briefs is **polyphonic INDEPENDENCE**: each added voice its own melodic line. Mode alternation 679 W ‚Üí 680 D ‚Üí 681 W ‚Üí 682 D ‚Üí 683 W ‚Üí **684 D**. **today's-research ‚Üí today's-build:** the ¬ß684 dive re-confirmed the live-jamming/co-creative frontier (causal real-time accompaniment: LiveBand/LK-Jam/ReaLJam lineage) keeps returning to *rule-grounded voice generation a browser can run with lightweight DSP* ‚ÄĒ so the fire built three classical counterpoint engines client-side. **HONESTY:** counterpoint appears as vocabulary across the lab and FDTD/waveguide are heavily used, so ambition-floor **#1 (never-used technique) was NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ this cashes **#4 (multi-cycle deepen of 1218) + #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems) + #3 (named refs)**. Ships `1242-stretto` ‚ÄĒ **answer your line with a real canon.** Draw a subject (or Generate one), pick a canon type, and delayed/interval-transposed/optionally-inverted/augmented imitative voices chase it, self-correcting hard strong-beat clashes to the nearest consonant scale tone ‚ÄĒ building into a stretto, all crystallizing on a scrolling **riso-duotone** (indigo + terracotta on cream) piano-roll-into-notation. A live **Consonance-fix on/off** toggle lets you *hear* the intelligence at work (raw clashes return when off). **Won the DEEP race** over `1241-parnassus` (**‚≠ź** the most beautiful ‚ÄĒ strict **species counterpoint** over a cantus firmus [Fux], a Viterbi/DP search adding 1‚Äď3 independent voices, inking on a warm **parchment manuscript** with named-interval teaching layer; banked **RESURRECT** ‚ÄĒ lost narrowly on a self-inking-parchment-manuscript form+palette that overlaps `1236-neume` shipped 4 fires ago) and `1243-strands` (**‚≠ź** the sharpest *deepening* ‚ÄĒ a **free-counterpoint beam search** that literally **inverts 1218's objective**, *maximizing* melodic independence [contrary-motion reward] while holding consonance, an independence-weight slider morphing homophonic‚ÜĒpolyphonic, rendered as four braided ribbons on off-white [Tymoczko]; banked **RESURRECT** ‚ÄĒ lost on the ribbon-field reading less immediately as a *score* than a notation view). `1242` won on **strongest 06:30 phone-glance kinesis (notes scroll in and set into noteheads) + the demonstrable "aha" of the Consonance-fix toggle (you hear the algorithm) + the most legible named reference (Bach canon) + a fresh riso palette distinct from recent ships (not the parchment `1236` just used, not jewel-on-dark) + a runtime-verified true canon (not chords ‚ÄĒ the clean proof of the deepening claim)**. state: imitative / canonic ¬∑ pole: contemplative. **[`/dream/1242-stretto`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1242-stretto)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1242-stretto/README.md)

### `/dream/1242-stretto` ‚ÄĒ *answer your single line with a real canon ‚ÄĒ delayed, interval-transposed, optionally inverted/augmented imitative voices that self-correct to stay consonant, building into a stretto that crystallizes on a scrolling riso piano-roll-into-notation.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: imitative / canonic ¬∑ pole: contemplative** ¬∑ INPUT **draw a subject on a pitch-lane grid (tap, with per-tap pitch preview) + Generate-a-subject + canon-type presets / interval / mode / invert / augment / consonance / voices / delay / tempo controls** ‚ÄĒ a STARVED input (draw drove 1√ó/15 per the jury; keyboard-like tap preview), NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT a real-piano audio-file [soft-avoid, cashed 2 of last 3 fires], NOT live-external-data [1238 last fire] ¬∑ OUTPUT **2D scrolling piano-roll that crystallizes into notation (Canvas2D)** ‚ÄĒ notes approach from the right as soft ribbons on a ruled diatonic staff, snap into stemmed noteheads at the playhead, colored by voice (dux solid indigo / comes terracotta-hollow), a nudge-ring marks each consonance correction; deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned], NOT a 2D-full-screen abstract field ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **real-time canon engine with adaptive consonance-correction** ‚ÄĒ subject stored as diatonic indices; each comes = the subject shifted in time (delay in beats) + diatonic interval of imitation (unison/4th/5th/8ve), optionally contour-inverted or value-augmented; wherever an answer lands a *hard* dissonance (semitone/tone/tritone/7th interval-class) on a strong beat vs the sounding dux, it is nudged ¬Ī1 then ¬Ī2 diatonic steps to the nearest consonance, preserving contour (runtime-verified: subject `0,2,4,3,5,4,2,0` canon-at-5th ‚Üí strong-beat clashes 1‚Üí0 with fix on, exactly one note moved one step); a Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler loops it in time ‚ÄĒ deepens `1218-shadow`'s homophonic harmonization into imitative polyphony (NOT a lab-first technique ‚ÄĒ counterpoint is lab-vocabulary; the fresh axes are the canon-engine + the deepening + the palette/form) ¬∑ VOICE **two synth timbre families** ‚ÄĒ bright detuned-saw dux + softer triangle comes, each with ADSR + vibrato + per-voice lowpass + shared feedback-delay reverb, master 0.24 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, ramped from silence ‚ÄĒ NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned], NOT a drone/JI-choir, NOT granular/real-recording ¬∑ PALETTE **riso two-color duotone (indigo `#2a355c` + terracotta `#c85a34` on warm cream `#efe6d3`)** ‚ÄĒ a print-forward escape from the ~10√ó chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark the jury banned; high-contrast dark ink for text ¬∑ **ambition 2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [canon transform engine ¬∑ consonance-correction search ¬∑ two-timbre Web-Audio synth + look-ahead loop scheduler ¬∑ Canvas2D scrolling-roll-into-notation renderer] ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle ‚ÄĒ a deliberate second-cycle DEEPENING of the past winner `1218-shadow` from homophony into polyphony ¬∑ #3 named refs [J.S. Bach canons ‚ÄĒ *Musical Offering* BWV 1079 / *Goldberg* BWV 988 canons at successive intervals incl. by inversion & augmentation ¬∑ Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* for the consonance test ¬∑ Chris Wilson *A Tale of Two Clocks*] ‚ÄĒ **#1 NOT claimed**, counterpoint is lab-vocabulary) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) ¬∑ chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ physical-resonator-object-you-excite TECHNIQUE (jury) ¬∑ pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury) ¬∑ 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT (~5√ó) ¬∑ real-piano-audio-file SOURCE (soft-avoid, cashed 2 of last 3 fires) ¬∑ live-external-data INPUT (1238 last fire)]` ¬∑ `picked=[draw-a-subject INPUT (starved) ¬∑ 2D scrolling-roll-into-notation SCORE OUTPUT (non-object form) ¬∑ real-time canon + consonance-correction TECHNIQUE (musical intelligence) ¬∑ two-timbre synth VOICE ¬∑ riso indigo/terracotta duotone PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard jury ban + both soft re-camps; directly answers jury provocation #1 (break the form ‚ÄĒ a scrolling score, not a 3D object) ¬∑ #2/#4 (deepen a past winner across a second cycle) ¬∑ a genuinely new palette. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the roll scrolls as one smooth continuous drift ‚Č™3 Hz, noteheads set with soft alpha ramps not flashes; audio gesture-gated (first Play/draw resumes the ctx) + master ramp-from-0 + limiter; full teardown on unmount. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; no mic, no network, no external data, zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ Web Audio + Canvas only). **Validation:** builder self-reported `npx eslint src/app/dream/1242-stretto/` ‚Üí **exit 0** + `tsc --noEmit` folder-clean + runtime-verified the canon math; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **compile + full ESLint + type-check PASS**, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`, **ZERO from `1242-stretto`** (isolated `npx eslint` folder re-run = exit 0; build-log grep `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` = NONE), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1242-stretto/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (43 KB)**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` 4096-fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472, Vercel deploys uncapped). **Compile + lint + type + canon-logic-by-runtime verified** (builder ran the engine: comes = exact time-shifted diatonic transposition of the dux, correction drives strong-beat clashes to 0 by moving one note one step); **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) ‚ÄĒ whether the imitation *reads* aurally as a canon + whether the crystallization *reads* on-screen want Karel's browser; the empty-staff + static-canon-preview drawn on mount + Generate-a-subject default guarantee it is never blank/silent, and the draw/press-play route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; banks `1241-parnassus` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) + `1243-strands` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) as IDEAS ¬ß684. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1242-stretto/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 683 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ three orthogonal non-object FORMS raced in parallel to answer **JURY 2026-07-06**'s "break the form" ban-cluster (3D-object-you-pluck / jewel-on-dark / resonator-object / pointer-only all hard-banned). Mode alternation 679 W ‚Üí 680 D ‚Üí 681 W ‚Üí 682 D ‚Üí **683 W**. **today's-research ‚Üí today's-build:** ¬ß683 dive ‚ÄĒ **live space-weather sonification** is a current (<30-day) 2026 lane at solar maximum (*Helioradar AV* streaming NOAA SWPC telemetry; a CME arrived **30 June 2026**) ‚Üí the hook "the live solar wind as a self-inking paper observatory logbook + a drone tuned by speed/density/Bz/Kp." Ships **`1238-heliograph`** ‚ÄĒ **the actual solar wind, right now, composing a cosmic-ambient drone and inking itself onto a vellum magnetogram.** Client-side NOAA SWPC fetch (plasma + magnetometer + Kp) ‚Üí three inking pen-traces (speed / Bz / Kp) on a cream-vellum strip-chart with iron-gall ink + a single emerald aurora band that greens only when Bz turns southward; a Web-Audio drone (6 harmonic partials √ó 2 detuned osc + aurora shimmer + feedback delay) maps speed‚Üípitch/breath, density‚Üípartials, Bz-south‚Üíbeating+shimmer, Kp‚Üíbrightness/tail/agitation; a **QUIET/UNSETTLED/STORM** state readout. **Mandatory offline fallback:** a deterministic ~1-day series building through a CME-like storm + an honest emerald "live" / amber "offline" badge ‚ÄĒ never dead-screens, never silent. FORM: a self-inking **observatory logbook** ‚ÄĒ the lab's real-world-data-sonification lane (jury standout `1193-tremor-core`) pointed at the **sky** instead of the crust. **ambition 3/5** (four subsystems + named refs [NOAA SWPC / Kp / Bz-coupling / heliograph] + a <30-day research finding). **Won the WIDE race** over `1239-antiphon` (**‚≠ź** a written musical **conversation** ‚ÄĒ type a line, it's sung back [letters‚ÜíDorian degrees, punctuation‚Üícadence/question/breath], then the instrument **answers** with a mirror-inverted contour + motific quotation in a darker voice, accumulating as a riso-duotone indigo/terracotta call-and-response transcript on parchment; banked **RESURRECT** ‚ÄĒ the conversation form + text input, both starved) and `1240-cavern` (**‚≠ź** **draw** the shape of a room, then **hear** it ‚ÄĒ freehand walls ‚Üí Sabine RT60 + axial room-modes ‚Üí a Schroeder feedback-comb reverb + high-Q modal bank excited by a wandering source pinging on reflections; charcoal-on-ochre cave palette; banked **RESURRECT** ‚ÄĒ draw input + room form, both starved). state: cosmic-ambient / the-Sun's-weather ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient. **[`/dream/1238-heliograph`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1238-heliograph)** ¬∑ status: demoable ¬∑ [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1238-heliograph/README.md)
## Cycle 682 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one concept, *Karel's real piano recording writes its own score as it plays*, attacked via **3 notation FORMS / transcription engines / palettes** ‚ÄĒ the fire cashes **JURY 2026-07-06**'s "break the form ¬∑ ship the real piano ¬∑ genuinely new palette" and STATE ¬ß681's recommendation to cash the ‚≠ź-banked `1233-plainsong`. Mode alternation 678 D ‚Üí 679 W ‚Üí 680 D ‚Üí 681 W ‚Üí **682 D**. **today's-research ‚Üí today's-build:** ¬ß682 dive re-grounds the transcription frontier with a *fresh 2026* source ‚ÄĒ full-page pianoform **Optical Music Recognition** (arXiv 2405.12105 ‚Üí IJDAR 2026) joining the streaming symbol-level line (2503.01362 / 2505.05078, F1 > 0.97); the field has moved to **live, note-by-note score generation** ‚Üí the hook "a page that transcribes Karel's real piano into self-inking notation as it plays." Ships `1236-neume` ‚ÄĒ **the recording notating itself as medieval plainchant on an illuminated antiphonary page.** Offline pre-analysis (hand-rolled radix-2 FFT ‚Üí spectral-flux onset peak-picking ‚Üí **YIN** pitch, octave-slip-folded, median-voted) groups notes into **neume figures by contour** (punctum / pes / clivis / torculus / porrectus / climacus) and inks them in sync onto a wrapping **four-line rubric-red stave** with an illuminated gilt drop-cap, a gilt pen-tip playhead, and a hand-drawn **parchment/vellum** ground ‚ÄĒ a rare warm-paper illuminated register, NOT jewel-on-dark. It transcribes *contour* not exact rhythm ‚ÄĒ historically apt (neumes encode contour) AND forgiving of the pitch/onset slips any browser detector makes on a real polyphonic recording. **Won the DEEP race** over `1235-plainsong` (**‚≠ź** the recording engraved as a precise **Western grand-staff** manuscript ‚ÄĒ SVG, clinical-white paper, carmine playhead, treble/bass split + ledger lines + sharps + note-values; **verified 14/14 exact pitch matches on the fallback**, the most rigorous of the three; banked **RESURRECT** ‚ÄĒ lost only on lower surprise [grand-staff is the *expected* transcription output] + real-input fragility [an exact wrong notehead reads "broken" when YIN slips on a polyphonic recording]) and `1237-scroll` (**‚≠ź** the recording as an unrolling **risograph** piano-roll where each onset stamps a wet ink-blue stroke that over ~1s **crystallizes/sets** into a crisp warm-red notehead snapped to its pitch lane ‚ÄĒ the boldest single motion idea; banked **RESURRECT**; lost on being the closest of the three to a scrolling timeline/field). `1236` won on **boldest new idiom / most surprise (an illuminated antiphonary that writes itself ‚ÄĒ the furthest escape from the jewel-on-dark rut) + robustness on the REAL recording (contour-only neumes degrade gracefully where exact placement reads broken) + a deliberate "Liturgy" lineage with last night's `1234-almanac` (the canonical hours ‚Üí the chant sung in them; form/palette/technique all differ, so a lineage not a monoculture) + strongest 06:30 phone glance**. **HONESTY:** pitch detection is lab-prior (many prototypes use autocorrelation/pitch) so ambition-floor **#1 was NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the freshness is the transcription-to-historical-notation FORM + the parchment palette + finally cashing the real recording as a *score* (not another granular re-layering ‚ÄĒ that was 1234). Named refs: **Guido d'Arezzo / Western neumatic (square/Gregorian) notation** ¬∑ **YIN** (de Cheveign√© & Kawahara, *JASA* 2002). Banks `1235-plainsong` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) + `1237-scroll` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) as IDEAS ¬ß682.)

### `/dream/1236-neume` ‚ÄĒ *Karel's real piano recording notating itself as medieval plainchant ‚ÄĒ onset + YIN pitch detection inking square neumes onto a four-line rubric-red stave, an illuminated antiphonary writing itself as it plays.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: contemplative / self-writing chant ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (a quiet page inking itself)** ¬∑ INPUT **audio-file (Karel's real recording) ‚ÄĒ press "Play the recording", play/pause + seek scrubber** (a STARVED input per the jury ‚ÄĒ real-piano audio-file drove only 1√ó/15; NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT passive [it responds to transport]) ¬∑ OUTPUT **2D self-inking illuminated MANUSCRIPT PAGE (Canvas2D)** ‚ÄĒ a wrapping four-line **rubric-red** Gregorian stave with a stylised C-clef, square neumes + diamond climacus ligatures inking in time, an illuminated gilt **drop-cap** opening the chant, a slim gilt pen-tip playhead, auto-scroll following the pen, and a **parchment/vellum** ground (radial glow + faint fibre noise + vignette, all hand-drawn ‚ÄĒ no external images); deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck (jury-banned), NOT jewel-on-dark (jury-banned), NOT a 2D-full-screen abstract field ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **offline transcription ‚Üí contour neume layout** ‚ÄĒ the whole decoded buffer is pre-analysed once (deterministic, robust vs realtime jitter): **onsets** via spectral flux over a hand-rolled radix-2 FFT, adaptive-local-mean threshold + min inter-onset interval; **pitch** via **YIN** (cumulative-mean-normalised difference + parabolic interpolation, on a few post-onset frames, median-voted, gross octave slips folded toward the running pitch); each pitch ‚Üí a diatonic white-key staff step; consecutive notes grouped into **neume figures by the sign of successive pitch steps** (punctum / pes / clivis / torculus / porrectus / climacus); then revealed against the tracked `BufferSource` playhead so each neume appears the instant its onset sounds (NOT a lab-first technique ‚ÄĒ pitch detection is prior art; the fresh axes are the transcription-to-historical-notation FORM + the palette + real-recording-as-score) ¬∑ VOICE **Karel's actual piano, played back audibly** (the sound IS his recording; the page transcribes what you hear) ‚ÄĒ NOT a synth voice, NOT a drone/JI-choir (jury-banned), NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike (jury-banned) ¬∑ PALETTE parchment/vellum + sepia-brown ink + rubric-red staves + single gilt accent (a rare warm-paper illuminated register ‚ÄĒ a deliberate escape from the ~10√ó chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark the jury banned; high-contrast dark/sepia ink for text) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [real-audio fetch/decode + offline fallback ¬∑ spectral-flux onset detection ¬∑ YIN monophonic pitch ¬∑ contour‚Üíneume Canvas2D illuminated-manuscript renderer] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Guido d'Arezzo / neumatic square notation ¬∑ YIN, de Cheveign√© & Kawahara JASA 2002] ¬∑ #5 recent research [RESEARCH ¬ß681 dive #1 streaming piano transcription, added yesterday, re-grounded ¬ß682 with 2026 full-page OMR] ‚ÄĒ **#1 NOT claimed**, pitch detection is lab-prior) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) ¬∑ chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ physical-resonator-object-you-excite TECHNIQUE (jury) ¬∑ pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury) ¬∑ 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT (~5√ó) ¬∑ granular-of-real-recording SOURCE (1234 last night, soft-avoid)]` ¬∑ `picked=[audio-file press-play + transport INPUT (starved) ¬∑ 2D self-inking chant MANUSCRIPT PAGE OUTPUT ¬∑ onset+YIN ‚Üí neume/contour notation TECHNIQUE ¬∑ Karel's-real-piano-as-transcription-source SOURCE ¬∑ parchment/vellum + gilt PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard jury ban; directly answers jury provocations #1 (break the form ‚ÄĒ a chant page) ¬∑ #3 (ship the real piano) ¬∑ #4 (genuinely new palette). **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the page inks slowly note-by-note, the pen-tip drifts, the parchment is static; audio is gesture-gated (Play resumes the ctx) and is Karel's own recording; no full-frame flashes. **Uses Karel's real recording** `549fc519-‚Ä¶` read-only via the existing public GET `/api/audio/[id]` (+ mandatory offline fallback ‚ÄĒ a ~12s modal phrase rendered offline if unavailable; status badge "Karel's piano" / "fallback tone"); **no new API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client otherwise; no mic, no network side-effects, zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ Web Audio + Canvas only). **Validation:** builder self-reported `npx eslint src/app/dream/1236-neume/` ‚Üí **exit 0** + `tsc --noEmit` folder-clean; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **compile + full ESLint + type-check PASS**, ZERO warnings from `1236-neume` (isolated `npx eslint` folder = exit 0; build-log grep for `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` = NONE), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1236-neume/page.js` **compiled ‚úď**. **Compile + lint + type + pipeline-by-inspection verified** (offline transcription ‚Üí contour neumes ‚Üí playhead-synced reveal by construction; builder ran the engine on the fallback ‚Üí a legible chant of pes/climacus/clivis); **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) ‚ÄĒ whether the neume grouping *reads* on the real polyphonic recording + whether the recording decodes over the proxy want Karel's browser; the offline fallback + empty-stave-on-mount guarantee it is never blank/silent, and the press-play route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; banks `1235-plainsong` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) + `1237-scroll` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) as IDEAS ¬ß682. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1236-neume/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 681 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ *three ways Karel's real piano recording becomes a non-object FORM* (map / page / almanac-clock), all with fresh non-jewel palettes ‚ÄĒ the fire built to answer **JURY 2026-07-06** head-on (which banned the "glowing-3D-object-you-pluck" form monoculture + the jewel-on-dark palette, and shouted *break the form ¬∑ reach the abandoned top rungs (zero >5-min long-form pieces exist) ¬∑ ship the real piano (`1162-loom-of-hours` never shipped, cash it) ¬∑ use a genuinely new palette*). Mode alternation 677 W ‚Üí 678 D ‚Üí 679 W ‚Üí 680 D ‚Üí **681 W**. **today's-research ‚Üí today's-build:** ¬ß681 dive #2 = granular time-stretch "1-sec clip ‚Üí hour-long drone" is a mature 2026 lane ‚Üí the hook "the short recording as a grain corpus stretched across a slow day of canonical hours." Ships `1234-almanac` ‚ÄĒ **the lab's first true >5-minute stateful long-form piece, and the resurrection of the long-standing ‚≠ź `1162-loom-of-hours`.** Karel's short ~12s recording is treated as a **grain corpus** (not looped): a granular read-head crawls it at 0.10‚Äď0.26√ó while an arc state machine walks a slow **day** through eight **canonical hours** (Matins ‚Üí Compline, ~6 min/day) ‚ÄĒ density, transposition, register, layering and brightness all evolve continuously so the texture at minute 5 is unmistakably not the texture at minute 1, with deterministic per-day drift so it can run indefinitely and never hard-repeats. The FORM is a **high-key pastel dawn‚Üídusk day-dial page** (travelling sun, named hours, drifting almanac caption), NOT a jewel object or dark field. **Won the WIDE race** over `1233-plainsong` (**‚≠ź** a blank page that listens to Karel's piano and notates it live ‚ÄĒ spectral-flux onset + **YIN** pitch ‚Üí a self-inking grand-staff manuscript on clinical-white paper; the highest ambition of the fire at 3/5 + the cleanest research‚Üíbuild chain [¬ß681 dive #1, streaming piano transcription]; banked **RESURRECT** ‚ÄĒ lost only because a self-writing score doesn't cash the long-form top-rung gap the jury shouted about) and `1232-atlas` (**‚≠ź** Karel's recording as a **cartographic contour MAP** you walk through ‚ÄĒ short-time FFT ‚Üí spectral heightfield ‚Üí marching-squares coastlines/peaks, granular-scrub the real audio wherever you stand, elevation‚Üíbrightness; **RISOGRAPH** ink-blue+warm-red on cream ‚ÄĒ the boldest palette/form escape of the fire; banked, ambition 2/5). `1234` won on **landing the jury's two loudest UNMET provocations at once** ‚ÄĒ #2 (the abandoned top rung: a genuine >5-min stateful long-form, of which the lab had shipped **zero**) **+** #3's tail (it IS the never-shipped `1162` resurrection) ‚ÄĒ while also being a **journey-engine alternative** (a ritual/canonical-hours arc, Karel's directive #4) with the strongest self-playing 06:30 glance. **HONESTY:** granular time-stretch is lab-prior (`227-paths-granular` etc.) so ambition-floor **#1 was NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the freshness is the long-form canonical-hours arc + the pastel almanac form + finally using the real recording as a day-long corpus. Named refs: the **canonical hours / Liturgy of the Hours** ¬∑ **Curtis Roads, *Microsound* (2001)**. Banks `1233-plainsong` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) + `1232-atlas` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) as IDEAS ¬ß681.)

### `/dream/1234-almanac` ‚ÄĒ *Karel's short piano recording, stretched into a slow almanac of eight canonical hours ‚ÄĒ a >5-minute self-evolving day that is genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1, watched on a pastel dawn‚Üídusk day-dial.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: contemplative / canonical-hours long-form ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (a slow evolving day)** ¬∑ INPUT **time-driven ‚ÄĒ press "Begin the day" and it runs itself; gentle optional control (drag the sun on the dial to seek any hour; a lighten‚ÜĒdeepen slider biases register/brightness/density live) ‚ÄĒ NOT pointer/orbit-an-object (jury-banned), NOT passive (it self-plays but responds)** ¬∑ OUTPUT **2D almanac / clock-dial PAGE (Canvas2D + HTML text)** ‚ÄĒ a turning day-dial with eight canonical hours around a ring, a sun/moon travelling it, a progress arc, a drifting cloud of grain-motes (count tracks granular density, brightness tracks live level), the current hour named in serif at centre + a drifting almanac caption; a high-key **pastel dawn‚Üídusk gradient** (lavender-grey night ‚Üí cream/peach dawn ‚Üí pale noon blue ‚Üí dusty-rose vespers) that shifts with the hour ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck (jury-banned), NOT jewel-on-dark (jury-banned), NOT a 2D-full-screen abstract field ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **granular time-stretch of the real recording + a long-form arc state machine** ‚ÄĒ `GranularEngine` treats the ~12s recording as a grain corpus: a read-head **crawls** it at 0.10‚Äď0.26√ó (well under real-time) spraying short (11‚Äď320 ms) raised-cosine-windowed grains, each panned + transposed to a consonant scale offset within the current hour's register/spread, with a generated convolution reverb and NO loop point (re-enters at a fresh random offset at buffer-end); `ArcController` holds continuous `elapsed` memory and walks eight canonical hours (~46 s each), smoothstep-interpolating density/grainDur/spread/register/layers/readRate/brightness/gain between each hour's targets, ringing a soft chime at each crossing, and applying a small deterministic per-day **drift** so day 2 varies day 1 and it never loops identically (NOT a lab-first technique ‚ÄĒ granular is prior art; the fresh axes are the long-form canonical-hours arc + the pastel almanac form + the real-recording-as-day-corpus) ¬∑ VOICE **granular re-layering of Karel's actual piano** (the sound IS his recording, time-stretched and re-voiced, never synthesized-from-scratch and never looped) ‚ÄĒ NOT a drone/JI-choir (jury-banned), NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike (jury-banned) ¬∑ PALETTE high-key pastel dawn‚Üídusk (a deliberate escape from the ~10√ó chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark the jury banned; dark-slate ink for text contrast on the pale grounds) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [granular time-stretch engine ¬∑ long-form arc state machine w/ memory + per-day drift ¬∑ Canvas2D almanac/day-dial renderer ¬∑ real-audio fetch/decode + offline fallback] ¬∑ #3 named refs [canonical hours / Liturgy of the Hours ¬∑ Curtis Roads *Microsound* 2001] ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle/long-form ‚ÄĒ the lab's first true >5-min stateful evolving piece + resurrects the multi-cycle-standing ‚≠ź `1162-loom-of-hours` ‚ÄĒ **#1 NOT claimed**, granular is lab-prior) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) ¬∑ chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ physical-resonator-object-you-excite TECHNIQUE (jury) ¬∑ pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury) ¬∑ 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT (~5√ó) ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE]` ¬∑ `picked=[time-driven press-play-then-runs + gentle-seek INPUT ¬∑ 2D almanac/clock-dial PAGE OUTPUT ¬∑ granular-time-stretch + long-form-arc TECHNIQUE ¬∑ Karel's-real-piano-grain-corpus SOURCE ¬∑ high-key-pastel-dawn‚Üídusk PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard jury ban; directly answers all four jury provocations (break the form ‚úď ¬∑ top-rung long-form ‚úď ¬∑ ship the real piano ‚úď ¬∑ fresh pastel palette ‚úď). **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all change is slow luminance drift (the gradient shifts over minutes, the dial turns over ~6 min, grains fade on raised-cosine envelopes); audio gesture-gated (Begin resumes the ctx) + master gain ramps from 0 + reverb + grain-envelope smoothing; no full-frame flashes. **Uses Karel's real recording** `549fc519-‚Ä¶` read-only via the existing public GET `/api/audio/[id]` route (+ mandatory offline fallback if unavailable ‚ÄĒ status badge emerald "Karel's piano" / amber "fallback tone"); **no new API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client otherwise; no mic, no network side-effects, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** builder self-reported `npx eslint src/app/dream/1234-almanac` ‚Üí **0/0** + `tsc --noEmit` folder-clean; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **compile + full ESLint + type-check PASS**, ZERO warnings from `1234-almanac` (isolated `npx eslint` folder = exit 0; `tsc` grep of folder = none; build-log grep for `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` = NONE); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` 4096-fd ceiling (infra not code, Vercel deploys uncapped). **Compile + lint + type + arc-logic-by-inspection verified** (continuous-memory arc controller + no-loop-point grain scheduler ‚Üí genuinely different at minute 5 vs 1 by construction); **NOT ear-verified** (headless box, no speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the granular texture *reads* aurally + whether the real recording decodes over the proxy want Karel's hardware; the offline fallback + self-playing arc guarantee it is never blank/silent, and the press-play route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. Winner of a WIDE 3-brief fire; banks `1233-plainsong` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) + `1232-atlas` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) as IDEAS ¬ß681. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1234-almanac/README.md` ‚ÄĒ one concept (*a self-composing excitable medium: a living tissue that organizes itself over 5+ minutes, the ARC being the composition*) attacked via **3 different excitable models / surfaces / voices** ‚ÄĒ ships the most distinctive. Mode alternation 676 D ‚Üí 677 W ‚Üí 678 D ‚Üí 679 W ‚Üí **680 D**. This fire finally cashes the **starved long-form / stateful lane** (jury + AGENT + the banked `1219`/`1214` have flagged it for weeks) with a piece that is audibly and visibly *different at minute 5 than minute 1*. **today's-research ‚Üí today's-build:** ¬ß680 dive #2 = low-latency neural physical-modeling (BRAVE arXiv 2503.11562) keeps returning to *physically-inspired excitable/dynamical models* as the controllable substrate ‚Üí the hook "a self-organizing excitable medium as a long-form instrument." Ships `1231-cardium` ‚ÄĒ **let a heart-like sheet of tissue compose itself for five minutes.** A FitzHugh‚ÄďNagumo (Barkley reduction) excitable medium lives on a 2562-vertex geodesic **icosphere**; a graph-Laplacian sweeps depolarization **waves across the closed 3D surface**, and an internal ~320 s clock varies refractoriness so the tissue self-organizes through **calm heartbeat ‚Üí a seeded reentrant rotor wrapping the globe ‚Üí fibrillation-like multi-wavelet chaos ‚Üí self-termination ‚Üí re-seed with fresh orientation (never loops identically)**. Three fixed "listening regions" turn each passing wavefront into a **rhythmic pulse** ‚ÄĒ a low resonant thud + a period-tracking shimmer ‚ÄĒ whose **tempo IS the composition** (one slow ~1 Hz heartbeat ‚Üí two-region polyrhythm ‚Üí dense stochastic patter ‚Üí back). You are a gentle **conductor**: tap the sphere to pace a beat or seed reentry, drag the *refractory-period* slider from calm toward fibrillation. **Won the DEEP race** over `1229-kindling` (**‚≠ź** a 96√ó96 **Izhikevich** spiking-neuron sheet as a 3D height-field membrane ‚Üí event-driven Chowning-**FM** blips fusing into pulses at synchrony, verified over 150 s through all 5 regimes ‚ÄĒ banked **RESURRECT**, this IS the `1219-ignition` resurrection realized in 3D + the jury's literal "change the voice to FM" ask; lost only because shipping the already-banked concept moves the lab less than a fresh surface+voice) and `1230-oregon` (a **Belousov‚ÄďZhabotinsky** Barkley membrane ‚ÄĒ target waves ‚Üí spirals ‚Üí defect turbulence on a domed surface, additive-spectral voice from wavefront statistics ‚ÄĒ banked, but a near-dupe of the banked `1207-oregonator` [BZ, ¬ß673], and its additive voice was the closest of the three to the drone-pad family). `1231` won on **freshest VOICE (rhythmic-pulse/tempo ‚ÄĒ the single most orthogonal axis to the recent all-timbre history, directly attacking the jury's "the sound has homogenized") + most distinct OUTPUT object (a beating/fibrillating glowing GLOBE you spin, not another displaced field-you-watch) + strongest altered-states/Resonance fit (heartbeat‚Üífibrillation spans cosmic-ambient to intense) + most subsystems (6) + genuine reentry**. **HONESTY:** the excitable-media *family* is lab-prior (BZ `1207`, Alfv√©n `1209`, Izhikevich `1219`) so ambition-floor **#1 was NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the freshness is the closed-3D-sphere surface + rhythmic-pulse voice + long-form arc, not the engine class. Named refs: **FitzHugh 1961** ¬∑ **Nagumo, Arimoto & Yoshizawa 1962** ¬∑ **Barkley 1991** ¬∑ **Arthur Winfree** (cardiac reentry / *When Time Breaks Down*). Banks `1229-kindling` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) + `1230-oregon` as IDEAS ¬ß680.)

### `/dream/1231-cardium` ‚ÄĒ *let a heart-like sheet of excitable tissue compose itself for five minutes ‚ÄĒ depolarization waves sweep a glowing 3D globe through calm heartbeat ‚Üí reentrant rotor ‚Üí fibrillation ‚Üí dissolution, and the pulse-tempo you hear IS the composition.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: cardiac-reentry / self-organizing excitable tissue ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (calm ~1 Hz heartbeat) ‚Üí intense (fibrillation)** ¬∑ INPUT **pointer pace / seed + refractory-drag ‚ÄĒ active conductor gesture** (tap the sphere to raycast-drop an excitation that paces a beat or seeds reentry; drag the *refractory-period* slider from calm heartbeat toward fibrillation; auto-pace on Begin so it self-plays and is never blank/silent ‚ÄĒ NOT passive) ¬∑ OUTPUT **three.js 3D closed SPHERE** ‚ÄĒ a subdivision-4 geodesic icosphere (2562 verts / 5120 faces) with a custom per-vertex excitation shader (oxblood‚Üíember fronts on cool slate-teal resting tissue + faint violet refractory-scar trail + fresnel rim), slow orbiting camera (NOT a flat 2D full-screen field [the ~5√ó over-represented cluster this fire deliberately dodged], NOT Canvas2D-bright) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **FitzHugh‚ÄďNagumo (Barkley reduction) excitable medium on a curved closed mesh, with genuine reentry** ‚ÄĒ per vertex a fast excitation `u` + slow recovery `v`, `du/dt = D¬∑‚ąá¬≤u + (1/őĶ)¬∑u(1‚ąíu)(u‚ąí(v+b)/a)`, `dv/dt = u‚ąív`, `‚ąá¬≤u` a graph Laplacian over mesh edges; a boundaryless closed surface lets a wave wrap and re-excite tissue behind it ‚Üí a rotor seeded by the classic **cross-field initial condition**; an internal ~320 s arc clock sweeps `b` (refractoriness) through the named phases + per-vertex heterogeneity + random re-seed so it never loops (NOT a lab-first technique ‚ÄĒ excitable-media/RD is prior art [1207/1209/1219]; the fresh axes are the closed-3D-sphere surface + long-form arc + the voice) ¬∑ VOICE **rhythmic pulse engine (tempo-as-composition)** ‚ÄĒ three fixed listening regions watch `u`; a rising-edge threshold crossing (hysteresis) fires a low resonant thud (pitched body + fast downward glide) + a brief harmonic shimmer whose interval tracks the local wave period; tempo transforms across the arc (calm 1-region heartbeat ‚Üí 2-region polyrhythm ‚Üí 3-region dense patter ‚Üí thinning); gains ramp from 0, 14-voice cap, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚ÄĒ NOT a drone/JI-choir, NOT modal-percussion-as-melody, NOT Karplus‚ÄďStrong (1220), NOT granular (1225), NOT scanned-synthesis (1226): a fresh rhythm/tempo voice, the most orthogonal axis to the recent all-timbre window ¬∑ PALETTE oxblood/ember on slate-teal (a saturated *cardiac* chiaroscuro) + violet scar ‚ÄĒ clears the hard bright-daylight (jury) + near-black (soft-ban) bans; the one soft ding is that chiaroscuro is on the recent soft-avoid list, accepted because every other axis is fresh ¬∑ **ambition 2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [icosphere mesh+adjacency ¬∑ FitzHugh‚ÄďNagumo/Barkley solver w/ cross-field rotor seeding ¬∑ long-form arc controller ¬∑ custom per-vertex three.js excitation shader ¬∑ rhythmic-pulse audio engine ¬∑ pointer/drag conductor input = six] ¬∑ #3 named refs [FitzHugh 1961 ¬∑ Nagumo/Arimoto/Yoshizawa 1962 ¬∑ Barkley 1991 ¬∑ Winfree] ‚ÄĒ **#1 NOT claimed**, excitable-media is lab-prior) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT (jury) ¬∑ 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT (~5√ó) ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury) ¬∑ modal-percussion VOICE ¬∑ Karplus‚ÄďStrong VOICE (1220) ¬∑ granular VOICE (1225) ¬∑ scanned-synthesis VOICE (1226) ¬∑ passive INPUT (jury) ¬∑ chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE (soft-avoid)]` ¬∑ `picked=[active pace/seed + refractory-drag INPUT ¬∑ three.js-3D closed-SPHERE OUTPUT ¬∑ FitzHugh‚ÄďNagumo-cardiac-reentry TECHNIQUE ¬∑ rhythmic-PULSE VOICE (fresh) ¬∑ oxblood/ember-on-teal cardiac PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban; the fresh rhythm voice is the standout. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all change rides on smooth sweeping wavefronts rendered via per-vertex color, no full-frame luminance flashes even during fibrillation (density carried by texture, not flicker); global luminance change ‚Č™3 Hz; slow orbit; audio gesture-gated (Begin resumes the ctx) + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + master ramp-from-0 + 14-voice cap. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; pointer only, no network, no mic). **Validation:** builder self-reported `npx eslint src/app/dream/1231-cardium` ‚Üí **0/0** + `tsc --noEmit` folder-clean; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **exit 0, FULL build completed** (entire route table printed ‚ÄĒ static-gen succeeded, the standing container `EMFILE` 4096-fd ceiling did NOT trigger this cycle), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1231-cardium/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (31 KB)**; no `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found`. **Compile + lint + type + physics-graph-by-inspection verified** (graph-Laplacian FHN + cross-field rotor ‚Üí genuine reentry, wave-timing ‚Üí pulse tempo by construction); **NOT ear/GPU-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) ‚ÄĒ whether the rotor/fibrillation *reads* visually and the pulse-tempo transformation *reads* aurally wants Karel's hardware (builder flagged the Barkley `b`/`D`/`DT` constants may want live tuning if phases read too fast/subtle); the auto-pace + self-play guarantee it is never blank/silent, and the pointer route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; banks `1229-kindling` (‚≠ź RESURRECT) + `1230-oregon` as IDEAS ¬ß680. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1231-cardium/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 679 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal **fresh-VOICE physical/synthesis instruments** (the jury's literal #2 "change the voice" ask made the whole fire), none sharing a tag. Mode alternation 675 W ‚Üí 676 D ‚Üí 677 W ‚Üí 678 D ‚Üí **679 W**. **today's-research ‚Üí today's-build:** ¬ß679 dive #1 = the live cs.SD frontier is *differentiable physical-modeling of strings* ‚ÄĒ the through-line being "**the vibrating object and its sound are one state; read the timbre off the moving geometry**" (arXiv 2407.05516 + differentiable-FDN/all-pole line). Ships `1226-loom` ‚ÄĒ **pluck a glowing ring and hear its shape.** A 128-mass **circular mass-spring string** simulated at slow *haptic* rate; its instantaneous 128-displacement shape **IS a single-cycle wavetable** an `AudioWorkletProcessor` scans at pitch ‚Üí genuine **scanned synthesis** (Verplank, Mathews & Shaw, ICMC 2000). A pointer **pluck** (or `a s d f g h j k` in D Dorian) injects a gaussian bump so one gesture morphs both the visible **teal‚Üímagenta 3D ring** and the timbre; gold scan-cursor orbits the read head; breathing-on-mount + idle auto-pluck so it plays itself; 16-harmonic-DFT additive fallback if no AudioWorklet. **Won the WIDE race** over `1227-operators` (**FM operator-galaxy** you sculpt in 3D ‚ÄĒ real Chowning/DX FM, drag a modulator sphere toward a carrier ‚Üí modulation index rises ‚Üí sidebands bloom; indigo‚Üíamber; the jury's literal "change the voice to FM" cash ‚ÄĒ **banked ¬ß679**) and `1228-reed` (**nonlinear self-oscillating wind waveguide** ‚ÄĒ McIntyre‚ÄďSchumacher‚ÄďWoodhouse 1983 reed + digital-waveguide bore, breathe [mic/slider] to self-oscillate and *overblow*; brass/oxblood 3D bore with a teal traveling wave ‚ÄĒ **banked ¬ß679**, boldest voice but its overblow is a disclosed *assisted* register-vent + mic path unverifiable headless). `1226` won on **ambition ceiling (3/5 ‚ÄĒ the only one adding #5, it literally implements today's research) + most honest end-to-end mechanism (the shape genuinely IS the table) + full determinism (demos with no mic on a cold glance) + the most tactile/Resonance-magical hook for a pianist**. Named refs: **Verplank/Mathews/Shaw** *Scanned Synthesis* (ICMC 2000) ¬∑ **Max Mathews**. Banks `1227-operators` + `1228-reed` as IDEAS ¬ß679.)

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 677 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal **grep-0√ó engines**, each clearing the ambition floor on a DIFFERENT never-built technique, none sharing a tag (input √ó output √ó technique √ó voice √ó palette). Mode alternation 671 W ‚Üí 672 D ‚Üí 673 W ‚Üí 674 D ‚Üí 675 W ‚Üí 676 D ‚Üí **677 W**. This fire's whole reason to exist is the ambition/diversity mandate ‚ÄĒ "break too similar" ‚ÄĒ so it fielded three unrelated engines and shipped the one that best dodges the over-cooked output cluster. **today's-research ‚Üí today's-build:** the ¬ß669/¬ß673 dives named the *excitable-media / coupled-oscillator* frontier and torus-knot sonification as live-and-lab-0√ó; the ¬ß677 dive re-confirmed neuromorphic/spiking-neuron audio is a live 2025‚Äď26 domain (Spiking Music arXiv 2402.01571 ¬∑ Neuromorphic Audio survey 2502.15056 Feb 2025). Ships `1220-torsion` ‚ÄĒ **the winding numbers ARE the tuning.** A glowing **(p,q) torus knot** ‚ÄĒ one string wound *p*√ó around a torus and *q*√ó through it ‚ÄĒ rendered as a `THREE.TubeGeometry` in **three.js 3D** that you turn by dragging empty space and **pluck** by clicking the tube; each pluck is a **Karplus‚ÄďStrong** plucked string and a **displacement wave travels outward along the tube from the touch point**, so the thing you see and the thing you hear are the *same waveguide*. Four **(p,q) presets** ‚ÄĒ (2,3) trefoil ¬∑ (3,2) ¬∑ (2,5) cinquefoil ¬∑ (3,4) ‚ÄĒ **retune** the whole instrument (folding the two interlocking harmonic series {p,2p,‚Ä¶} and {q,2q,‚Ä¶} into a just-intoned ladder). **Won the WIDE race** over `1219-ignition` (**‚≠ź** the HIGHER-ambition build, 4/5 ‚ÄĒ an **Izhikevich spiking-neuron sheet** you *ignite*: a tap nucleates a travelling spike wave that strikes inharmonic **modal-metal** tones, the sheet never resets so it evolves over minutes [starved long-form lane]; banked **RESURRECT-FIRST** ‚ÄĒ lost ONLY because its full-screen 2D excitable-field output is the exact cluster the ¬ß673/¬ß675 jury flagged as over-represented [~5√ó], not any quality gap) and `1221-foldsong` (**‚≠ź** the freshest *voice* ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST **wavefolder + vactrol lowpass-gate** [Buchla/Serge West-Coast], a pure sine blooming into a rich harmonic voice you watch fold on a warm phosphor vector-scope; banked, held because its scope is a 2D form + a more conventional playable-synth concept than 1220's 3D object). `1220` won on **diversity-mandate fit + surprise + Resonance-fit**: it is the only brief that lands on the *starved* three.js-3D output surface (the deliberate counter to the over-cooked 2D-field cluster), brings a fresh **non-modal** Karplus‚ÄďStrong voice, has the "**sight and sound are one waveguide**" rigor the jury praised in tremor-core/alfv√©n, and offers a gorgeous single-gesture jewel-object for the 06:30 glance. Named refs: **(p,q) torus knot** (knot theory) ¬∑ **Karplus & Strong 1983** *Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String‚Ä¶* ¬∑ **Julius O. Smith** digital waveguide synthesis. Banks `1219-ignition` (‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST) + `1221-foldsong` (‚≠ź) as IDEAS ¬ß677.)

### `/dream/1220-torsion` ‚ÄĒ *the winding numbers ARE the tuning ‚ÄĒ turn a glowing (p,q) torus knot in 3D and pluck the string; a displacement wave travels the tube exactly as the Karplus‚ÄďStrong string rings, and swapping (p,q) presets retunes the whole instrument.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: geometric contemplation ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (jewel)** ¬∑ INPUT **pointer orbit + pluck ‚ÄĒ active gesture** (drag empty space to rotate the knot in 3D; click/drag the tube to raycast-pick the nearest arc parameter and pluck it, slide to strum across pitches; an opening pluck on Start so it's never silent) ¬∑ OUTPUT **three.js 3D** ‚ÄĒ a `TubeGeometry` swept along a custom parametric torus-knot `THREE.Curve`, a `ShaderMaterial` garnet‚Üíamber‚Üígold gradient + fresnel rim + a travelling Gaussian displacement wave injected per pluck; manual orbit, DPR-clamped, full dispose on unmount (NOT a 2D full-screen excitable/shader-field [the ~5√ó over-represented cluster this fire deliberately dodged], NOT Canvas2D) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **parametric (p,q) torus-knot geometry + winding-number tuning + travelling-wave visual** (grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ no torus-knot instrument exists in the lab; `1196`/`1197` were Hopf-fibration + this idea's own ¬ß669 bank, never built) ¬∑ VOICE **Karplus‚ÄďStrong / digital-waveguide plucked string** ‚ÄĒ noise-burst ‚Üí `DelayNode` (delay = 1/f) ‚Üí one-pole lowpass loop-damping ‚Üí feedback gain < 1; master `masterGain`(ramp-from-0)‚Üí`DynamicsCompressor` limiter; 16-voice cap + oldest-voice steal + timed cleanup; AudioContext created only on the Start gesture ‚ÄĒ NOT modal (1213/1219-bank), NOT a JI choir/drone (jury), NOT FM, NOT granular ¬∑ PALETTE jewel-chromatic ‚ÄĒ garnet/amber/gold string glow on a deep indigo/violet ground (`#160a2a`) ‚ÄĒ NOT bright-daylight (jury), NOT near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban), NOT chromatic-chiaroscuro (recently 4√ó): a saturated gemstone lane cashing the jury's palette-range provocation #1 ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [(p,q) torus-knot instrument ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [torus-knot geometry + shader travelling-wave + raycast picking + Karplus‚ÄďStrong waveguide synth + manual orbit] ¬∑ #3 named refs [(p,q) torus knots ¬∑ Karplus & Strong 1983 ¬∑ Julius O. Smith digital waveguide]) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury) ¬∑ passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury) ¬∑ 2D full-screen field-you-watch OUTPUT (~5√ó, avoid) ¬∑ chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE (recently 4√ó, avoid) ¬∑ near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban)]` ¬∑ `picked=[orbit+pluck INPUT ¬∑ three.js-3D OUTPUT ¬∑ (p,q)-torus-knot-geometry TECHNIQUE ¬∑ Karplus‚ÄďStrong-waveguide VOICE ¬∑ garnet/gold-on-indigo jewel PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban on a starved surface. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the knot rotates as slow continuous motion (‚Č™3 Hz), every pluck a smooth travelling glow-wave never a full-frame flash; audio gesture-gated (Awaken resumes the ctx) + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + master ramp-from-0 + 16-voice steal; full teardown (RAF cancel + geometry/material/renderer dispose + canvas removal + synth dispose on unmount). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; pointer only, no network, no mic). **Validation:** `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1220-torsion` ‚Üí **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors**; project `tsc --noEmit` ‚Üí **0 errors in the 1220 folder**; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **‚ö† Compiled with warnings in 2.2 min ‚úď** (every warning a *pre-existing* `src/lib/**` file ‚ÄĒ `logger`/`rate-limit`/`shader-preferences` eslint-disable directives + `lsHasData`/`useCallback` unused; **ZERO from the 1220 folder**), then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json` ‚ÄĒ hard ~4096-fd ceiling, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped); no `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` anywhere. **Compile + lint + type + waveguide/geometry-graph-by-inspection verified** (KS feedback-comb + raycast arc-param drives BOTH pitch and the shader displacement wave ‚ÄĒ sight/sound one model by construction); **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (headless box, no speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the knot *reads* as a jewel and the plucks *read* as one string wants Karel's hardware; the opening pluck + slow idle rotation guarantee it is never blank/silent. Winner of a WIDE 3-engine fire; banks `1219-ignition` (‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST) + `1221-foldsong` (‚≠ź) as IDEAS ¬ß677. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1220-torsion/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 676 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one massive concept (*a responsive jazz duet partner that answers you in time*) attacked via **3 different musical intelligences** ‚ÄĒ perception (mic-listen) ¬∑ memory (motif-transformation) ¬∑ harmony (voice-leading) ‚ÄĒ ships the deepest. Mode alternation 670 D ‚Üí 671 W ‚Üí 672 D ‚Üí 673 W ‚Üí 674 D ‚Üí 675 W ‚Üí **676 D**. This fire cashes **Karel's own directive #4** ("jazz responsive" journey-engine alternative) ‚ÄĒ a live-performance lane 0√ó in the recent window ‚ÄĒ while clearing the 2026-07-05 jury's palette+voice-range demand: three fresh non-JI voices + three distinct non-chiaroscuro duotones. **today's-research ‚Üí today's-build:** the frontier races heavyweight neural models toward *causal real-time* jamming (**LiveBand** arXiv 2606.03803 9 Jun 2026 ¬∑ **LK Jam** arXiv 2606.21018 Jun 2026 ¬∑ **ReaLJam** arXiv 2502.21267), but their shared *lookahead-commit* protocol is exactly what a browser runs with lightweight DSP + rule-based generation ‚ÄĒ so all three briefs proved it client-side. Ships `1218-shadow` ‚ÄĒ **play one finger, hear a four-part choir.** Play a single-note melody (on-screen keys / QWERTY / Web-MIDI) and a "shadow" partner **harmonizes you in real time**, a beat behind, blooming your note into full **four-part SATB chorale / close-harmony** ‚ÄĒ and for *every* note it chooses the chord by **functional voice-leading** (root motion weighted toward the circle of fifths + cadences + harmonic-minor V; the voicing found by a bounded search that **minimizes total voice motion** with parallel-5th/8ve + doubled-leading-tone penalties), so it's real arranging, not a lookup (builder runtime-verified A-minor ‚Üí `i7‚Üíiv7‚ÜíV7‚Üíii√ł7‚ÜíVII7‚Üíi7` with G‚ôĮ landing exactly in the dominant). **Won the DEEP race** over `1216-consort` (**‚≠ź** the *mic* version ‚ÄĒ sing/hum/play ‚Üí real-time YIN pitch + spectral-flux onset + Krumhansl key-finding ‚Üí a warm FM-Rhodes+walking-bass consort answers in time; amber/teal duotone lead-sheet ribbon, full mic-free fallback ‚ÄĒ banked, Karel's literal "sing and a band answers" ask; ship when mic can be tested on his hardware) and `1217-tradefours` (**‚≠ź** the *trade-fours* version ‚ÄĒ play a phrase ‚Üí the machine captures it as an abstract motif and answers at the turnaround with a *developed variation* [diatonic transpose to the changes ¬∑ inversion ¬∑ fragmentation+sequence ¬∑ cadential tail] over a swinging FM-piano+bass comp; indigo/coral two-lane trading timeline ‚ÄĒ banked, the motif-transformation call-and-response engine). `1218` won on **ambition ceiling + verifiability + surprise + morning-reviewability + Resonance-fit**: the deepest engine (a genuine minimal-motion SATB voice-leading search, runtime-verified functional harmony ‚ÄĒ a bigger algorithmic nut than 1217's motif shuffle), **fully deterministic** so it demos with no mic on a cold 06:30 glance (where 1216's mic path is unverifiable headless), the freshest visualization (four gliding jade/rose voice-lines forming visible chords, vs two beaded scrolls), and the most Resonance-magical hook for a pianist ("one finger ‚Üí a real four-part choir"). Named refs: **Bach** chorale voice-leading ¬∑ **Fux** *Gradus ad Parnassum* ¬∑ **Dmitri Tymoczko** *A Geometry of Music* ¬∑ **Chris Wilson** "A Tale of Two Clocks" ¬∑ **John Chowning** FM. Banks `1216-consort` (‚≠ź) + `1217-tradefours` (‚≠ź) as IDEAS ¬ß676.)

### `/dream/1218-shadow` ‚ÄĒ *play one finger, hear a four-part choir ‚ÄĒ a shadow partner harmonizes your single-note melody into full SATB a beat behind, choosing every chord by real minimal-motion voice-leading.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: responsive-duet ¬∑ pole: warm/contemplative** ¬∑ INPUT **keyboard / QWERTY / Web-MIDI melody ‚ÄĒ active perform** (play a single-note line on the on-screen ~2-octave keyboard, the computer keyboard, or a plugged-in MIDI controller; a no-interaction **Demo** button plays a scripted melody so it's never silent/blank ‚ÄĒ NOT passive, NOT mic [the banked `1216` is the mic one], fully deterministic so it demos with no hardware) ¬∑ OUTPUT **Canvas2D voice-leading ribbon** ‚ÄĒ four gliding horizontal lines whose heights are the live S/A/T/B pitches (jade soprano on top, rose inner voices below), a moving playhead, per-voice note-name labels, the shadow arriving to the *right* of the playhead before it sounds; a ~2-octave keyboard lights jade under your finger + tints the current chord's tones rose (NOT a fragment-shader-field-you-watch [the avoided ~4√ó cluster], NOT three.js, NOT a beaded scroll like 1216/1217) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **real-time functional voice-leading harmonization** ‚ÄĒ per melody note: (1) build the 7 diatonic triads (chorale) or sevenths (close/jazz) for the key, borrow the harmonic-minor **V/V7** so real leading-tone cadences exist, keep every chord containing your note as a chord tone, score them by **functional root motion** (descending-fifths strongest ‚Üí cadences/step ‚Üí retrogression/static penalised) + tonal gravity toward I/V/IV; (2) voice it in 4 parts by a bounded exhaustive search over SATB range-legal notes that **minimizes total motion** from the previous chord subject to correct ordering/spacing + bass-on-root + no doubled leading tone + a **parallel perfect 5th/8ve penalty** ‚ÄĒ combined score = functional weight ‚ąí motion cost, so harmony choice and smoothness trade off like a human arranger ¬∑ VOICE **4 independent struck-FM voices (SATB)** ‚ÄĒ Chowning sine-carrier + decaying-index modulator for a bright attack, per-voice low-pass + slight ratio/index/brightness differences so the four voices stay legible (rounder bass, more-present soprano), player's note sounds immediately + the harmonized A/T/B bloom a musical **shadow delay** (‚Öõ or ¬ľ note) behind on a **Wilson "A Tale of Two Clocks" look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms interval, ~120 ms horizon); bounded polyphony w/ oldest-voice steal ‚ÄĒ NOT a JI choir/drone (this is *moving functional harmony*, not a static pad), NOT modal, NOT granular, NOT the additive of 1209 ¬∑ PALETTE jade (soprano/your melody) + rose (shadow inner voices) on deep slate ‚ÄĒ a restrained two-hue duotone (NOT chromatic-chiaroscuro [recently 4-5√ó, avoided], NOT bright-daylight [jury], NOT near-black cosmic-glow [soft-ban]) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [functional-harmony chord-chooser ¬∑ minimal-motion SATB voice-leading search w/ parallel-avoidance ¬∑ 4-voice struck-FM synth w/ shadow-delay look-ahead scheduler ¬∑ Canvas2D voice-leading-ribbon renderer ¬∑ keyboard/QWERTY/MIDI input] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Bach chorale voice-leading ¬∑ Fux species counterpoint ¬∑ Tymoczko *A Geometry of Music* ¬∑ Wilson two-clocks ¬∑ Chowning FM] ¬∑ #5 recent research [LiveBand Jun 2026 + LK Jam Jun 2026 + ReaLJam ‚ÄĒ the lookahead-commit protocol the shadow-scheduler implements client-side, RESEARCH ¬ß676, this cycle]) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury) ¬∑ bright-daylight PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury) ¬∑ WebGL2/three.js-field-you-watch OUTPUT (~4√ó, avoid) ¬∑ chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE (recently 4-5√ó, avoid) ¬∑ near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban)]` ¬∑ `picked=[keyboard/MIDI-perform INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-voice-leading-ribbon OUTPUT ¬∑ real-time functional-voice-leading TECHNIQUE ¬∑ 4-voice struck-FM SATB VOICE ¬∑ jade/rose-on-slate duotone PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the ribbon is one slow continuous scroll (‚Č™3 Hz), every key/note-flash a smooth exponential ramp, `prefers-reduced-motion` respected for decorative drift; audio gesture-gated (Begin/Demo resumes the ctx) + `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + master ramp-from-0 + bounded polyphony; full teardown on unmount. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; keyboard/MIDI only, no network, no mic). **Validation:** `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1218-shadow` ‚Üí **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors** (all 3 folders linted 0/0 pre-curation); authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **compiled + linted ‚úď** (every warning a *pre-existing* `src/lib/**` file ‚ÄĒ `ALL_SHADERS`/`isPathCulminationUnlocked`/`useCallback`/`lsHasData` unused + eslint-disable directives + one `use-journey` exhaustive-deps; **ZERO from the 1218 folder**), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1218-shadow/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (45 KB)**, then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json` ‚ÄĒ ~4096-fd ceiling, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped); no `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` anywhere. **Compile + lint + type + voice-leading-graph-by-inspection AND builder-runtime verified** (the builder bundled `harmony.ts` and confirmed real functional voice-leading output, not a lookup); **NOT ear-verified** (headless box, no speakers) ‚ÄĒ whether the SATB choir *reads* as a satisfying harmonization + the shadow-delay *reads* as a bloom wants Karel's speakers; the scripted Demo + gliding idle ribbon guarantee it is never blank/silent, and the keyboard/Demo route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. Winner of a DEEP 3-intelligence fire; banks `1216-consort` (‚≠ź) + `1217-tradefours` (‚≠ź) as IDEAS ¬ß676. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1218-shadow/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 675 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal *massively-bigger* concepts on 3 fresh output surfaces / voices / palettes / inputs (none sharing a tag), directly attacking the ambition mandate after 5 chromatic-chiaroscuro ships in the last 10 + three straight fire-cycles of field/particle-sim-as-instrument. Mode alternation 669 W ‚Üí 670 D ‚Üí 671 W ‚Üí 672 D ‚Üí 673 W ‚Üí 674 D ‚Üí **675 W**. Ships `1213-splatsong` ‚ÄĒ **strike a cloud of light and hear its material.** A procedural "resonant cairn" of ~4,500 anisotropic 3D Gaussians rendered with **true 3D-Gaussian-splat covariance rasterization** (grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ the lab's many "splat" pieces are all loose additive particle *blooms*; this is genuine EWA projected-conic splatting) floats in a neutral studio light-box; you ORBIT it by dragging and STRIKE a cluster by tapping ‚ÄĒ each cluster's **material is *inferred* from its splat statistics** (tight+bright+cool = glass ¬∑ large+dark = stone ¬∑ elongated+metallic = metal bar ¬∑ warm+mid = wood, √† la **SonicGauss** reading a material off a Gaussian field) and rings a physically-modelled **modal impact** (5‚Äď8 decaying-sine resonators + a filtered-noise mallet; material sets the partial ratios + decays, cluster size sets the pitch, strike velocity sets loudness+brightness). **Won the WIDE race** over `1214-reef` (grow a coral over minutes via space-colonization ‚Üí a Karplus-Strong resonator network so a slow tide makes the piece *audibly evolve* sparse-high-early ‚Üí thick-low-late; two-color prussian-blue+vermilion riso ‚ÄĒ banked, the starved long-form/stateful lane) and `1215-consort` (**‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST** ‚ÄĒ sing/tap into the mic ‚Üí real-time onset+YIN pitch + Krumhansl key-finding ‚Üí a warm FM-Rhodes+bass consort answers *in time* on a look-ahead beat clock, amber/teal duotone lead-sheet ribbon, full mic-free fallback ‚ÄĒ banked, directly cashes Karel's own directive #4 "jazz responsive"; ship the next live-performance slot). `1213` won on **ambition ceiling + surprise + research-chain + Resonance-fit**: it is the only brief bringing a genuinely new rendering medium (true 3DGS, 4/5 floor, the only #1-clearing brief), the only one that directly implements this cycle's freshest research (WebSplatter arXiv 2602.03207 Feb 2026 + SonicGauss), the strongest nameable hook, and a fresh vitrine-neutral palette lane the jury's palette-range provocation asks for. Named refs: **Kerbl et al.** *3D Gaussian Splatting* (SIGGRAPH 2023); **WebSplatter** (arXiv 2602.03207, Feb 2026); **SonicGauss** (arXiv 2507.19835). Banks `1215-consort` (‚≠ź) + `1214-reef` as IDEAS ¬ß675.)

### `/dream/1213-splatsong` ‚ÄĒ *strike a cloud of light and hear its material ‚ÄĒ orbit a resonant cairn of thousands of anisotropic 3D Gaussians and tap a cluster to ring its inferred material.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: lucid / object-permanence trance ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient‚Üíintense (volumetric, material)** ¬∑ INPUT **pointer orbit + strike ‚ÄĒ active gesture** (drag orbits the camera; tap strikes the nearest cluster [screen distance weighted by depth], quicker taps hit harder; "shimmer all" arpeggiates every cluster; slow auto-orbit + faint idle shimmer keep it alive on a cold glance) ¬∑ OUTPUT **WebGL2 3D-Gaussian-splat rasterization** ‚ÄĒ ~4,500 anisotropic Gaussians, per-splat 3√ó3 covariance ő£=R¬∑S¬∑SŠĶÄ¬∑RŠĶÄ projected to a 2D screen conic via the perspective Jacobian (EWA), camera-facing instanced quads, CPU depth-sort back-to-front (~12 Hz throttle) + premultiplied `ONE,ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA` "over" blend, opaque studio-gray backdrop pass; Canvas2D depth-sorted-blob fallback + `webglcontextlost` (NOT a fragment-shader-field-you-watch [the avoided ~3√ó cluster], NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D-primary) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **true 3DGS anisotropic-covariance splatting + SonicGauss-style material inference + modal-impact synthesis** (grep-0√ó for real covariance splatting ‚ÄĒ the lab's `246`/`557`/`564`/`178` "splat" pieces are all loose additive particle blooms) ¬∑ VOICE **modal impact resonators** ‚ÄĒ 5‚Äď8 parallel exponentially-decaying sinusoids `ő£ aŠĶĘ sin(2ŌÄfŠĶĘt)e^(‚ąít/ŌĄŠĶĘ)` + a short filtered-noise mallet transient; material presets set partial ratios + decays (glass bright-near-harmonic ~3 s ¬∑ stone low-inharmonic ~0.5 s ¬∑ metal free-bar 1:2.756:5.404:8.933 ~4 s ¬∑ wood woody ~0.4 s); size‚Üífundamental, velocity‚Üíloudness+brightness; 10-voice steal, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, master ramp-from-0 ‚ÄĒ NOT a JI choir/drone, NOT granular, NOT FM-bell, NOT the additive-Alfv√©n of 1209 ¬∑ PALETTE vitrine-neutral studio light-box (soft gray sweep + faint hotspot) with real saturated *material* color in the splats (glass aqua/clear ¬∑ stone slate ¬∑ metal brass/steel ¬∑ wood umber) ‚ÄĒ NOT chromatic-chiaroscuro (the new 4√ó ban), NOT bright-daylight (jury), NOT near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban): a product-photography vitrine ¬∑ **ambition 4/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [true 3DGS covariance rasterization ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [EWA splat renderer w/ depth-sort + material inference + modal-impact synth + pointer orbit/pick] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Kerbl 3DGS 2023 ¬∑ WebSplatter 2602.03207 Feb 2026 ¬∑ SonicGauss 2507.19835] ¬∑ #5 recent research [WebSplatter Feb 2026, RESEARCH ¬ß675, this cycle ‚ÄĒ the winner *directly implements* the dive's hook, the cleanest chain of the three]) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE (4√ó in last 10) ¬∑ bright-daylight PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury) ¬∑ passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury) ¬∑ WebGL2-shader-field-you-watch OUTPUT (~3√ó, avoid) ¬∑ near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban)]` ¬∑ `picked=[orbit+strike INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2-3DGS-splat-raster OUTPUT ¬∑ 3DGS+material-inference TECHNIQUE ¬∑ modal-impact VOICE ¬∑ vitrine-neutral PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban on a fresh surface. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ auto-orbit / idle-shimmer / backdrop-drift are slow continuous motion (‚Č™3 Hz), every strike-flash a smooth exp ramp (never a full-screen flash), `prefers-reduced-motion` respected;
