## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 674 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one concept (*a playable strict-MONOCHROME Ryoji-Ikeda data-instrument, voiced in the clinical sine/noise/click register*) attacked via **3 technical routes** to "how does visible monochrome data become sound"; ships the strongest. Mode alternation 669 W ‚Üí 670 D ‚Üí 671 W ‚Üí 672 D ‚Üí 673 W ‚Üí **674 D**. This fire cashes a provocation the lab has **never shipped** (the 2026-07-05 jury's #1 example, "a two-color Ikeda/riso constraint" ‚ÄĒ proposed at ¬ß669 `1197` and ¬ß671 `1202`, banked both times) AND breaks the **new emerging monoculture** ‚ÄĒ the last 5 ships (1209/1206/1203/1200/1196) all went chromatic-chiaroscuro ‚Üí **5√ó in the last 10**, the exact "we banned one monoculture and manufactured its opposite" trap. A strict-monochrome Ikeda idiom clears BOTH the jury's bright-daylight ban AND the new chiaroscuro 5√ó, and brings a genuinely fresh **clinical VOICE** register (pure sine + noise + click ‚ÄĒ not JI-choir/modal/granular/FM/additive-warm/GENDYN). Ships `1210-datamatics` ‚ÄĒ **draw a sound as a picture.** Paint bright marks onto a scrolling monochrome spectrogram; a thin cyan playhead reads each column as a bank of **64 pure sine partials** (row ‚Üí log-frequency 55 Hz‚Äď7.5 kHz, brightness ‚Üí amplitude), so the image you draw *is* the additive spectrum you hear ‚ÄĒ hard edges fire a band-passed-noise onset tick. This is the ANS-synthesiser / Xenakis-*UPIC* / *Phosphor*(Feb 2026) / Tembrica(Mar 2026) image‚Üíadditive-resynthesis lineage made playable, in Ryoji Ikeda's stark black-and-white. **Won the DEEP race** over `1211-test-pattern` (the most literally-Ikeda ‚ÄĒ scrub a playhead across 4 near-coprime [61/43/26/17] barcode lanes ‚Üí an analytic look-ahead audio-clock scheduler fires 4 registers [sine pip ¬∑ gated sine ¬∑ noise tick ¬∑ sub pulse] in polyrhythm; banked **‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST** ‚ÄĒ the directest cash of the two-color-Ikeda provocation, held only because 1210 directly implements *this cycle's* research + is the more original instrument) and `1212-data-matrix` (a 32√ó24 datamatrix step-grid you toggle ‚Üí column-scan rings each lit cell as a pentatonic sine pip, with optional Conway's-Life self-evolution + binary rain; banked ‚ÄĒ the strongest "plays itself" morning property but conceptually closest to a conventional grid sequencer). `1210` won on **research-chain strength + originality + Resonance-fit**: it is the only one that directly implements this cycle's Phosphor/Tembrica/ANS/UPIC image‚Üíadditive research (uniquely landing ambition #5), and "draw a picture, hear it as a pure-sine spectrum" is the most original cross-modal draw‚Üísound coupling and the most Resonance-fit ("compose by drawing" for a pianist/composer). Named refs: **Ryoji Ikeda** *datamatics / test pattern / data-verse* (2026 *data.gram [n¬ļ11]*); the **ANS synthesiser**; **Iannis Xenakis** *UPIC*; ***Phosphor*** (Synthtopia Feb 2026); Tembrica Image-to-Sound (Mar 2026). Banks `1211-test-pattern` (‚≠ź) + `1212-data-matrix` as IDEAS ¬ß674.)

### `/dream/1210-datamatics` ‚ÄĒ *draw a sound as a picture ‚ÄĒ paint a monochrome spectrogram and hear each column resynthesised in real time as a bank of pure sine partials, in Ryoji Ikeda's stark black-and-white.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: clinical / precise-data-trance ¬∑ pole: intense (hard-edged, high-contrast)** ¬∑ INPUT **pointer/touch DRAW ‚ÄĒ active gesture** (drag paints energy into the spectrogram; brighter = louder partial; shift-drag or the erase tool clears; preset buttons sweep/chord/dots load a score in one tap; a seeded dot-field is the idle state so the screen is never a dead black rectangle) ¬∑ OUTPUT **crisp Canvas2D monochrome spectrogram-score** (white/near-white marks on TRUE BLACK + exactly one thin cyan playhead as the sole accent; nearest-neighbour hard-edged raster + a faint drifting grid + static octave guide-lines ‚ÄĒ NOT a full-screen fragment-shader field you passively watch [the avoided ~4√ó cluster], NOT three.js, NOT chiaroscuro, NOT a soft cosmic glow) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **image-as-score additive/spectral resynthesis** ‚ÄĒ 64 frequency rows on a clean log grid (55 Hz ‚Üí 7.5 kHz); every frame the column under the playhead is read and each partial's gain is glided toward that row's brightness so the timbre morphs continuously to match the drawing; dense columns are energy-normalised; hard column-energy edges fire a band-passed-noise onset tick ¬∑ VOICE **pure additive sine partials + filtered-noise clicks** ‚ÄĒ 64 `OscillatorNode`s (`type:"sine"`) + a band-passed white-noise tick; clinical Ikeda test-tone register, sub-bass to bright highs ‚ÄĒ NOT a JI choir/drone, NOT modal, NOT granular, NOT FM, NOT the warm additive-Alfv√©n of 1209 ¬∑ PALETTE strict monochrome ‚ÄĒ white on true black + one thin cyan scan-line (clears the jury's bright-daylight ban AND the new chromatic-chiaroscuro 5√ó monoculture AND the near-black-glow soft-ban: this is hard-edged high-contrast DATA, not soft glow) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [64-osc additive bank w/ per-partial glide + energy-normalise + limiter ¬∑ noise-tick onset engine ¬∑ Canvas2D spectrogram-score renderer w/ paint/erase ¬∑ pointer draw-input] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Ikeda 2026 data.gram; ANS synthesiser; Xenakis UPIC] ¬∑ #5 recent research [Phosphor Feb 2026 + Tembrica Mar 2026, RESEARCH ¬ß674, this cycle ‚ÄĒ the winner *directly implements* the dive's hook, the cleanest today's-research‚Üítoday's-build chain of the three]) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE (new, 5√ó in last 10) ¬∑ bright-daylight PALETTE (jury) ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury) ¬∑ passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury) ¬∑ WebGL2-shader-field OUTPUT (~4√ó, avoid) ¬∑ near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban)]` ¬∑ `picked=[active DRAW INPUT ¬∑ crisp Canvas2D monochrome raster OUTPUT ¬∑ image‚Üíadditive-resynthesis TECHNIQUE ¬∑ pure-sine+noise+click VOICE (fresh clinical register) ¬∑ strict-MONOCHROME PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban including the new chiaroscuro one. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the bars never flash; the only periodic motion is a single ~0.09 Hz playhead sweep + slow grid drift (‚Č™3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows both; audio gesture-gated ("Begin" resumes the ctx) + `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + master gain ramped from 0 + per-column energy-normalisation so a fully-painted column can never spike; full teardown on unmount (cancel RAF + stop/disconnect every osc/gain/filter + `ctx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; no network, no mic). **Validation:** `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1210-datamatics` ‚Üí **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors**; `tsc --noEmit` project-wide ‚Üí **0 errors**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build` ‚Üí **‚ö† Compiled with warnings in 2.3min** (every warning a *pre-existing* `src/lib/**` / prior `src/app/dream/**` file ‚ÄĒ RotateCcw / demoBands / `_` vars / eslint-disable directives / `<img>`; **ZERO from the 1210 folder**), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1210-datamatics/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (38 KB)**; no `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` anywhere. **Compile + lint + type + DSP/render-graph-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) ‚ÄĒ whether the drawn spectrogram *reads* as a musical additive morph and the monochrome score *reads* as Ikeda-crisp wants Karel's hardware; ## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 673 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal **grep-0√ó excitable-medium / coupled-oscillator engines**, each clearing the ambition floor on a DIFFERENT never-built technique with a DIFFERENT fresh non-JI voice + a DIFFERENT non-bright chromatic-chiaroscuro palette + active-gesture input ‚ÄĒ directly attacking the 2026-07-05 jury's monoculture headline (bright-daylight palette 10√ó ¬∑ JI-choir voice 6√ó) with *range*, not inversion. Mode alternation 669 W ‚Üí 670 D ‚Üí 671 W ‚Üí 672 D ‚Üí **673 W**. Ships `1209-alfven` ‚ÄĒ **pluck a magnetic field line like a string, and hear the plasma sing.** Magnetized plasma carries **Alfv√©n waves**: transverse vibrations that travel *along* magnetic field lines and ring in standing modes exactly like a string under tension ‚ÄĒ but the "tension" is the magnetic field and the "mass" is the plasma density. A 3D rack of glowing coronal-loop field-lines floats over a deep-indigo sky; grab one, pull it sideways, release ‚ÄĒ it **whips and rings**, its displacement the actual wave solution, and you hear a sum of its standing **Alfv√©n-wave harmonics**. Longer loops sing lower (`f‚āĀ = v_A/2L`, `v_A = B/‚ąö(őľ‚āÄŌĀ)`); a **Field-B** control turns up the whole magnetosphere at once, lifting every pitch and quickening every visible shimmer live. **The one honest move:** the *same* modal coefficients + per-mode decay rates drive BOTH the visible tube-whip AND the additive audio partials, so sight and sound are one physical object (the true partials sit at hundreds of Hz ‚ÄĒ invisible ‚ÄĒ so only the *visual* is time-dilated to a few Hz, preserving the exact spectrum/decays/ratios; audio rings at real `f‚āô`). **Won the WIDE race** over `1207-oregonator` (Belousov‚ÄďZhabotinsky **excitable medium** as a *mallet instrument* ‚ÄĒ tap to nucleate spiral chemical waves, wavefront collisions strike inharmonic modal-metal; the **most rigorous build** [verified-excitable regime + a 96√ó54 CPU shadow-model for cheap real-time event detection] ‚ÄĒ banked **‚≠ź TOP RESURRECT**, held only because its output genre is a full-screen WebGL2 shader-field, the over-represented last-10 output cluster ~5√ó) and `1208-swarmalator` (Strogatz **swarmalators** ‚ÄĒ particles that sync AND swarm, colour=phase, dragged through their 5 states with FM-bell voices ‚ÄĒ banked, held only because `1206-murmuration` shipped a particle-swarm the *immediately prior* cycle). `1209` won on **four axes at once**: a **starved output surface** (three.js 3D pluckable ‚ÄĒ 0√ó in the last 10), the most **surprising/nameable hook**, **sight+sound share one honest model** (the tremor-core rigor the jury praised), and the strongest **one-gesture 06:30 payoff** + Resonance-fit ("an instrument you *play*"). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß673 dive (WebGPU physarum/BZ/Turing compute libs shipping mid-June 2026) confirmed the *excitable-medium / coupled-oscillator* family is the live frontier; a grep sweep found its three lab-untouched members (Oregonator 0√ó ¬∑ swarmalators 0√ó ¬∑ magnetohydrodynamic/Alfv√©n 0√ó) ‚Üí one per builder. Named refs: **Hannes Alfv√©n** (predicted MHD/Alfv√©n waves 1942, Nobel 1970); **coronal-loop seismology** (transverse loop oscillations, Nakariakov et al.); **Chladni/Helmholtz** plucked-string lineage. Banks `1207-oregonator` (‚≠ź) + `1208-swarmalator` as IDEAS ¬ß673.)

### `/dream/1209-alfven` ‚ÄĒ *pluck a magnetic field line like a string and hear the plasma sing ‚ÄĒ a 3D rack of glowing coronal loops whose standing Alfv√©n-wave modes drive both the visible whip and an additive-resynthesis voice.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: cosmic / boundless-plasma ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (aurora, saturated)** ¬∑ INPUT **pointer/touch pluck ‚ÄĒ active gesture** (raycast-grab a 3D field-line, pull it transversely, release ‚Üí seeds a triangular-pluck modal spectrum that rings; drag the **Field-B** control to scale `v_A` and retune the whole rack live, already-ringing voices included; gentle idle micro-perturbations keep it faintly alive on load) ¬∑ OUTPUT **three.js 3D scene** ‚ÄĒ a rack of ~7 emissive coronal-loop tubes over a deep-indigo‚Üínear-black radial gradient with a slow auto-orbit; the plucked loop's tube vertices deform by `ő£ a‚āô(t)¬∑sin(nŌÄs/L)` bent out of plane (the real modal solution), a smooth hot-magenta pluck-flash (NOT a passive shader-field, NOT 2D Canvas ‚ÄĒ the starved output surface, three.js-3D 0√ó in last 10) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **magnetohydrodynamic / Alfv√©n-wave string** (grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ magnetohydrodynamic/alfven/alfv√©n all 0√ó as name AND technique) ‚ÄĒ `v_A = B/‚ąö(őľ‚āÄŌĀ)`, standing modes `f‚āô = n¬∑v_A/2L`, plucked-string modal coefficients `b‚āô = 2h/(ŌÄ¬≤n¬≤u‚āÄ(1‚ąíu‚āÄ))¬∑sin(nŌÄu‚āÄ)` (~1/n¬≤ spectrum), per-mode decay rising with n; loop lengths *tuned* so the 7 fundamentals land on a C-minor-pentatonic set (pitch honestly set by L & B, not an arbitrary scale) ¬∑ VOICE **additive / spectral resynthesis** ‚ÄĒ one `OscillatorNode` per standing harmonic at `n¬∑f‚āĀ`, per-partial exponential-decay envelopes (fundamental ~2.5 s, top partials ~0.4 s), a slight inharmonic "coronal" stretch for shimmer, a band-passed noise pluck-transient attack; master compressor + gain ramped from 0, 72-partial budget ‚ÄĒ NOT a JI choir/drone/pad, NOT granular, NOT a sampled pluck ¬∑ PALETTE aurora green‚ÜĒviolet on deep indigo‚Üínear-black chiaroscuro, hot-magenta pluck-flash (clears both the bright-daylight ban and the near-black-glow soft-ban) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [MHD/Alfv√©n-wave sonification ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [Alfv√©n/MHD string engine + three.js raycast-pluck renderer with live tube deformation + additive-resynthesis voice with live B-retune] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Alfv√©n 1942/Nobel 1970; coronal-loop seismology / Nakariakov et al.; Chladni/Helmholtz]) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight PALETTE (jury 10√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT (jury) ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury 6√ó) ¬∑ passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury 5√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-shader-you-watch OUTPUT (last-10 ~5√ó) ¬∑ flat near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban, lifts ~07-11)]` ¬∑ `picked=[pluck-a-3D-structure INPUT (active) ¬∑ three.js-3D-pluckable-rack OUTPUT (starved surface) ¬∑ Alfv√©n-wave-string TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ additive-spectral VOICE (fresh, non-JI) ¬∑ aurora-on-indigo chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE ¬∑ cosmic-ambient/boundless VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ tube motion is smooth, the pluck-flash is a pure envelope ramp (documented in `mhd-core.ts`: "no strobe ‚ÄĒ pure ramp"), all periodic brightness ‚Č™3 Hz; audio gesture-gated ("Energize the field" resumes the ctx) + compressor/limiter + master ramp-from-0; three.js resources disposed on unmount, graceful WebGL-unavailable `text-rose-300` notice. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; no network, no mic). **Validation:** `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1209-alfven` ‚Üí **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors**; `tsc --noEmit` project-wide ‚Üí **0 errors**; winner compiled fully in `npm run build` (reached post-compile "Collecting page data"), the full ~700-page static-gen only **FD-blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` 4096 ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json` ‚ÄĒ infra not code, hard ulimit unraiseable, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped). **Compile + lint + type + model-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/GPU-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) ‚ÄĒ whether the pluck *reads* as playable and the additive spectrum *reads* as musical wants Karel's hardware; the idle shimmer + auto-orbit guarantee it is never blank/silent. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banks `1207-oregonator` (‚≠ź) + `1208-swarmalator` as IDEAS ¬ß673. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1209-alfven/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 672 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ one massive concept (a many-hand **collaborative ensemble** ‚ÄĒ the jury's un-cashed provocation #5, *"a conducted shared ensemble is the single largest un-built category in the entire menu"*) attacked via **3 different topologies**, all sharing a research-backed distributed clock; ships the **least-derivative** one. Mode alternation 669 W ‚Üí 670 D ‚Üí 671 W ‚Üí **672 D**. Ships `1206-murmuration` ‚ÄĒ **a flock of 180 voice-birds that sings when it clusters, and every hand in the room is an attractor pulling the swarm.** Each participant (a browser tab / device on the same origin) is a glowing **attractor**; ~180 boids (**Craig Reynolds, *Flocks, Herds, and Schools*, 1987** ‚ÄĒ separation/alignment/cohesion) bend toward the **union of all attractors**, integrated *locally* from a fixed seed on every client so all tabs converge to the same shape without streaming 180 birds (only the handful of attractor positions cross the wire). When a grid-cell **knots** (‚Č•9 birds) it rings a **granular / bowed-glass ping** ‚ÄĒ pitch from the knot's vertical position on a minor-pentatonic set, brightness from flock speed ‚ÄĒ **quantised to a shared beat grid and committed one beat ahead** so every tab rings the same note *in phase*. Two drifting **ghost-attractors** keep it alive & breathing SOLO; real peers replace them as hands. **The distributed-timing spine is this cycle's research:** the **lookahead-commit** protocol ‚ÄĒ schedule events a fixed lookahead ahead of a shared clock, broadcast *planned intents* (not audio), play cached future events while waiting ‚ÄĒ from **StreamMUSE (arXiv 2606.11886, submitted 10 Jun 2026, 25 days old)** + **ReaLJam (arXiv 2502.21267, 2025)**. **Won the DEEP race** over `1204-baton-ensemble` (a *conductor* with a baton + FM-gamelan chairs ‚ÄĒ banked because it concept-shadows the existing `754-conducted-table`, the "same instrument twice" trap the jury flagged) and `1205-loom-in-c` (a *leaderless* multiplayer Terry-Riley *In C* braid + struck-bar marimba ‚ÄĒ banked because it concept-shadows the existing `1183-in-c-loom`) on being the single **least-derivative** candidate: its only overlap with prior art is the *visual* (boids exist in `1059`/`537`), while its **concept ‚ÄĒ a many-hand collaborative flock-instrument with a distributed lookahead-commit voice-clock ‚ÄĒ is genuinely un-built**; also the most spectacular on a cold solo glance and the freshest-feeling voice. **Honest fact-check:** the jury (and prior MORNING) called multi-user "0√ó" ‚ÄĒ a grep proved that wrong (`508`/`729`/`1077` are WebRTC/BroadcastChannel **duets**), so this does **NOT** claim "first multi-user"; the fresh contribution is *collaborative (>2 hands, symmetric) instrument + distributed clock*. Banks `1204-baton-ensemble` + `1205-loom-in-c` as IDEAS ¬ß672.)

### `/dream/1206-murmuration` ‚ÄĒ *a flock of 180 voice-birds that sings when it clusters ‚ÄĒ you are a glowing attractor pulling the swarm, and every tab is another hand sculpting one emergent piece together.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: collective / hypnagogic-flow ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient‚Üíintense (emergent, chromatic)** ¬∑ INPUT **pointer/touch attractor ‚ÄĒ active & COLLABORATIVE** (each same-origin tab/device is a live attractor whose position crosses a `BroadcastChannel`; N hands steer one shared flock; two drifting ghost-attractors keep it alive solo) ¬∑ OUTPUT **Canvas2D additive (`lighter`) luminous streaks + trails** on a deep-indigo motion-blur field (not bright-daylight, not flat near-black ‚ÄĒ the ban was *bright* Canvas2D; this is deep-chroma chiaroscuro), attractor radial glows, expanding cluster-bloom rings on each sung knot ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **collaborative flocking-swarm-as-instrument + lookahead-commit distributed clock** ‚ÄĒ 180-boid Reynolds sim steered by the union of all attractors + grid cluster-detection (‚Č•9 birds = a singing knot) + a 40 ms scheduler that quantises knots to the NEXT beat in a 1-beat lookahead window, schedules the grain at `audioCtx.currentTime + (beatTime-now)/1000`, and broadcasts `{col,row,beat,midi,brightness}` **intents** so all clients ring in phase (earliest-`t0`-wins shared origin); NOT a JI choir/drone ¬∑ VOICE **granular / bowed-glass pings** (triangle fundamental + detuned shimmering upper partials through a pitch-tracking band-pass + a high-passed noise pluck transient, fast bowed attack ‚Üí exp decay; bounded polyphony voice-steal cap 10; generated-IR reverb) ‚ÄĒ pitch ‚Üź knot vertical position (minor-pentatonic), brightness ‚Üź flock speed ¬∑ PALETTE deep-indigo/charcoal base, teal‚Üímagenta‚Üíamber chromatic-chiaroscuro by speed (clears the bright-daylight ban and the near-black-glow soft-ban) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [BroadcastChannel presence/transport + 180-boid Reynolds flock + granular/bowed synth + lookahead-commit shared-clock scheduler + Canvas2D additive renderer = 5] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Reynolds 1987; ReaLJam 2502.21267; StreamMUSE 2606.11886] ¬∑ #5 research ‚Č§14 days [StreamMUSE, 2026-06-10]) ‚ÄĒ **NOT claiming #1** (flocking + multi-peer transport both lab-prior; the *collaborative-instrument combination* is the fresh part) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight/high-key PALETTE (jury 10√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-*bright* OUTPUT (jury 4√ó) ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury 6√ó) ¬∑ passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury 5√ó)]` ¬∑ `picked=[multi-hand-attractor INPUT (active + collaborative) ¬∑ Canvas2D-additive-on-deep-indigo OUTPUT (chromatic chiaroscuro) ¬∑ collaborative-flock-instrument + lookahead-commit-clock TECHNIQUE ¬∑ granular/bowed-glass VOICE (non-JI) ¬∑ teal‚Üímagenta‚Üíamber chromatic PALETTE ¬∑ emergent/collaborative VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ flock motion is continuous, the background is a translucent motion-blur fill (smooth luminance drift), blooms are soft expanding rings, all periodic change ‚Č™3 Hz; audio gesture-gated ("Enter the flock" resumes the ctx) with bounded polyphony + limiter/reverb so a dense flock never spikes; graceful `BroadcastChannel`/`AudioContext` try-catch ‚Üí solo. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; no server, no mic; only same-origin BroadcastChannel). **Validation:** `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1206-murmuration` ‚Üí **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors**; `tsc --noEmit` project-wide ‚Üí **0 errors**; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **‚ö† Compiled with warnings in 2.2min** (every warning a *pre-existing* `src/app/dream/**` file ‚ÄĒ eslint-disable directives / `_` vars / `<img>` / `demoBands`; **ZERO from the 1206 folder**), `.next/server/app/dream/1206-murmuration/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (28.7 KB)**, then advanced into type-checking; the full ~700-page static-gen still carries the **standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (4096-fd cap, same since ~cycle 472 ‚ÄĒ infra not code; Vercel deploys uncapped); no `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` anywhere. **Compile + lint + type + graph-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/GPU-verified nor two-tab-runtime-verified** (headless box: no speakers/display, can't open two live tabs) ‚ÄĒ whether the murmuration *reads* as gorgeous and whether two tabs truly stay phase-locked wants Karel's hardware; the ghost-attractor solo path guarantees it is never blank/silent/crashing alone. Winner of a DEEP 3-topology fire; banks `1204-baton-ensemble` + `1205-loom-in-c` as IDEAS ¬ß672. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1206-murmuration/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 671 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal **fresh-VOICE** explorers, each a DIFFERENT non-JI synthesis engine, directly cashing the 2026-07-05 jury's two headline provocations (#1 kill the bright-daylight monoculture ‚Üí chromatic range; #2 ban the JI-choir/drone voice ‚Üí build on a fundamentally different synthesis). Ships `1203-gendy` ‚ÄĒ **hold a living waveform and tune it from a pure tone to a stochastic roar.** A hands-on realisation of **Iannis Xenakis's Dynamic Stochastic Synthesis (GENDYN)** ‚ÄĒ a synthesis voice this lab has NEVER built (Xenakis was only ever *referenced* re: cellular automata `622` / UPIC `704` / granular `1140`; true stochastic-waveform synthesis is grep-0√ó). The tone is not sampled or oscillated ‚ÄĒ it is **drawn**: one waveform cycle is 12 **breakpoints** (each a duration + amplitude), linearly interpolated; after every cycle each breakpoint's amp AND duration is nudged by a **Gaussian random walk** (a *second-order* stochastic process ‚ÄĒ the breakpoints walk, not the samples) and **reflects off elastic mirror barriers** so it stays bounded yet never settles. **A single drag = order‚ÜĒchaos:** up/right ‚Üí tight barriers + small steps ‚Üí a nearly periodic pitched tone; down/left ‚Üí loose barriers + big steps + pitch wobble ‚Üí a gritty living roar. Three voices (√ó0.5/√ó1/√ó2). Rendered as a **WebGL2 oscilloscope of the actual current waveform** ‚ÄĒ a glowing ribbon filament redrawn each frame as its corners drift, over a ping-pong feedback afterimage field so you *see* the random walk, in **electric-violet (calm) ‚Üí hot-amber (chaotic) chromatic chiaroscuro on deep-teal/near-charcoal** (neither the banned bright-daylight nor a flat near-black glow). **Won the WIDE race** over `1201-ignition` (Izhikevich spiking-neuron sheet you ignite with a touch ‚Üí inharmonic **modal percussion**; ‚≠ź banked **RESURRECT-FIRST**, strongest 4/5 floor) and `1202-torsion` ((p,q) torus-knot you drag to re-tie ‚Üí **Karplus‚ÄďStrong waveguide**, strict two-colour ink-blue+vermilion Ikeda ‚ÄĒ **now with a TRUE projected-crossing detector**, the exact fix the ¬ß669-banked `1197-torsion` lacked, so it supersedes that bank) on being the single **freshest VOICE** ‚ÄĒ a whole synthesis category the lab has never had, the most direct answer to the jury's headline that *the ear is bored* (six of fifteen a JI choir). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß671 grep audit killed spectral-resynthesis / scanned-synthesis / waveshaping / WebRTC as non-fresh (all lab-prior), confirmed Izhikevich + GENDYN grep-0√ó, and **GendyJS** (github.com/abbernie/gendy) proved GENDYN is `AudioWorklet`-buildable today. Named refs: **Iannis Xenakis** *GENDY3* (1991) / *Formalized Music*; **Peter Hoffmann** (GENDYN analysis); **Nick Collins** / **Andrew Brown** (realtime stochastic synthesis); GendyJS. Banks `1201-ignition` (‚≠ź) + `1202-torsion` as IDEAS ¬ß671.)

### `/dream/1203-gendy` ‚ÄĒ *hold a living waveform ‚ÄĒ a jagged polygon whose corners random-walk each cycle, dragged from a pure tone into a stochastic roar and back, sung by Xenakis's GENDYN.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: hypnagogic / order‚ÜĒchaos threshold ¬∑ pole: intense (gritty-organic)** ¬∑ INPUT **drag order‚ÜĒchaos (active gesture)** ‚ÄĒ one pointer axis sets step size + barrier width + per-cycle pitch jitter together and the pitch region live; releasing lets the field breathe on a slow sine so it never goes dead ¬∑ OUTPUT **raw-WebGL2 living-waveform oscilloscope** (the actual current breakpoint polygon drawn as a glowing ribbon filament, redrawn every frame as corners drift, over a ping-pong feedback afterimage field so the random walk is *visible*; dark chromatic Canvas2D fallback with shadow-blur glow + veil trails; `webglcontextlost` handling) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **GENDYN dynamic stochastic synthesis** (grep-0√ó for the lab) ‚ÄĒ 12-breakpoint drawn waveform, per-cycle Gaussian random-walk of every breakpoint's amp + duration with elastic-mirror reflection, durations renormalised to the target period so the fundamental tracks pitch while jitter warps the shape; 3 voices at √ó0.5/√ó1/√ó2; `AudioWorklet` (Blob-URL string, self-contained) with a `ScriptProcessorNode` fallback running the identical DSP so it always sounds; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + master gain ramped from 0 + per-sample `tanh` soft-clip + hard amplitude clamp ‚ÄĒ NOT a JI choir/drone, NOT modal, NOT FM ¬∑ PALETTE electric-violet‚Üíhot-amber chromatic-chiaroscuro on deep-teal/near-charcoal (clears BOTH the bright-daylight ban and the near-black-glow soft-ban) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [GENDYN stochastic-waveform synthesis ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [stochastic-breakpoint DSP engine (worklet + fallback) + order‚ÜĒchaos control mapping + WebGL2 feedback oscilloscope renderer + Canvas2D fallback = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Xenakis 1991; Hoffmann; Collins/Brown; GendyJS]) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight/high-key PALETTE (jury 10√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT (jury 4√ó) ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury 6√ó) ¬∑ passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury 5√ó)]` ¬∑ `picked=[drag order‚ÜĒchaos INPUT (active) ¬∑ WebGL2-feedback-oscilloscope OUTPUT ¬∑ GENDYN-stochastic-synthesis TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó, novel VOICE) ¬∑ violet‚Üíamber chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE ¬∑ gritty/organic intense VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; the fresh non-JI VOICE is the point. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the waveform motion is continuous, all brightness is slow luminance drift; audio gesture-gated (Begin) + limiter + ramped-from-0 master + `tanh` soft-clip + hard clamp; `prefers-reduced-motion` lowers the chaos ceiling + slows motion; full teardown (RAF cancel + worklet/script node + all nodes disconnected + `ctx.close()` + GL program/buffers/textures deleted + `webglcontextlost` + resize listener removed + object URL revoked). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; no network, no mic). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled ‚úď ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚úď** (every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`: rate-limit / logger / journeys / shader-preferences ‚ÄĒ **ZERO from the 1203 folder**), then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json` ‚ÄĒ ~4096-fd ceiling on ~700 pages, `ulimit -Hn`=4096 not raiseable, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped). `.next/server/app/dream/1203-gendy/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (51 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit` project-wide = 0 errors, 0 referencing 1203; `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1203-gendy` = ‚úĒ no warnings/errors. **Compile + lint + type + DSP-graph-by-inspection verified (the elastic-barrier reflection + Gaussian-walk in `gendy-core.ts`/`worklet-source.ts` are correct by construction); NOT GPU/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers in the headless box, so whether the grit *reads* as a musical order‚ÜĒchaos gradient and the oscilloscope *reads* as a living waveform wants Karel's hardware; the Canvas2D fallback + slow-breath idle guarantee it is never blank or silent. Honest edges (builder-disclosed): pitch is renormalised per cycle (grit reads stronger than pitch-instability vs Xenakis's fully-free durations ‚ÄĒ a deliberate trade for a *holdable* instrument); the scope shows only the lead mid-register voice; the ScriptProcessor fallback is deprecated and can glitch under load (exists only so it never goes silent). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banks `1201-ignition` (‚≠ź) + `1202-torsion` as IDEAS ¬ß671. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1203-gendy/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Prior (Cycle 669 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal **grep-0√ó engine** explorers, each clearing the ambition floor on a DIFFERENT never-built technique, chosen to break BOTH monocultures the 2026-07-05 jury named (bright-daylight palette ¬∑ JI-choir/drone voice). Ships `1196-fibration` ‚ÄĒ **float, drug-free, INSIDE the Hopf fibration.** The 3-sphere fibres into interlocked great circles: sample the base 2-sphere, lift each point to its fibre (quaternion parametrisation, `|q|=1`), stereographically project S¬≥‚ÜíR¬≥ so the fibres become nested, mutually-LINKED Villarceau/Clifford tori, then spin the whole bundle through 4D by a slow unit-quaternion rotation `qL¬∑q¬∑qR` (GPU-side, in the vertex shader) ‚ÄĒ the rings breathe and turn inside-out, a cosmic-ambient NDE/boundless space you float through (tilt ‚Üí drag ‚Üí auto-journey). **The geometry SINGS the topology:** a bank of 2-operator **FM bells** (NOT a JI choir/drone ‚ÄĒ cashes jury provocation #2) whose pitch tracks each lead fibre's base-latitude and whose FM index tracks its projected radius, breath-paced. Palette is **chromatic-chiaroscuro jewel-on-graphite** with a luminous violet tunnel-centre (neither the banned bright-daylight nor a flat near-black glow ‚ÄĒ cashes provocation #1) and fills the **cosmic-ambient pole** the jury's bright-monoculture audit shows is starved. **Won the WIDE race** over `1195-ignition` (Hodgkin‚ÄďHuxley/Izhikevich spiking-neuron sheet ‚Üí modal percussion ‚ÄĒ ‚≠ź banked top resurrect) and `1197-torsion` ((p,q) torus-knot ‚Üí Karplus‚ÄďStrong waveguide ‚ÄĒ banked) on being the most genuinely novel STRUCTURE (true fibre bundle ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó; the lab's `1042` was a 4D *polytope* wireframe, categorically different), the freshest VOICE vs recent ships (FM, where 1193's modal gong + 1195's modal percussion both use modal synthesis), and bulletproof for the 06:30 glance (auto-journey plays itself). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß669 dive found the *Parker Solar Probe ‚Üí Hopf fibration* audio-visual rendering (Zenodo 14796817, Feb 2025 ‚ÄĒ granular sonification over a stereographic Hopf projection) ‚ÄĒ confirms Hopf-fibration sonification is a live 2025 domain, still lab-0√ó; 1196 takes the **pure-topology + FM** route (data-free ‚ÄĒ honours jury provocation #3, "stop sonifying feeds"). Named refs: **Heinz Hopf (1931)**; **Niles Johnson**'s Hopf visualisation; Villarceau circles / the Clifford torus; La Monte Young / √Čliane Radigue drone lineage (realised in FM timbre). Banks `1195-ignition` (‚≠ź) + `1197-torsion` as IDEAS ¬ß669.)

### `/dream/1196-fibration` ‚ÄĒ *float, drug-free, inside the Hopf fibration ‚ÄĒ hundreds of glowing interlocked rings turning through 4D, each ringing a shimmering FM bell so the geometry sings the topology.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: near-death / deep-meditative boundlessness ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (chromatic, not black)** ¬∑ INPUT **device-tilt ‚Üí pointer-drag ‚Üí auto-journey** (iOS DeviceOrientation permission-gated in the Start tap; a ~90‚Äď150 s self-playing rotation when there's no sensor/interaction ‚ÄĒ alive on a cold glance) ¬∑ OUTPUT **raw-WebGL2 additive fibre lines** (the 4D rotation + stereographic projection run in the vertex shader; `LINE_LOOP` great circles over a full-screen chromatic-chiaroscuro void pass ‚ÄĒ graphite/indigo field ‚Üí luminous violet tunnel-centre, jewel latitude ramp, depth fog; Canvas2D fallback re-projects a reduced subset; `webglcontextlost` handling; a scene you WATCH/float through, NOT a draggable 3D model) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **genuine Hopf fibration S¬≥‚ÜíS¬≤ + stereographic projection + unit-quaternion 4D rotation, sonified by 2-op FM bells** (56 fibres = 7 latitude rings √ó 8 longitudes, 96 segments each; lead fibres drive FM voices ‚ÄĒ latitude‚Üípitch, projected-radius‚Üíindex, motion‚Üístrike; breath-paced LFO; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, gain ramped from 0 ‚ÄĒ NOT a JI choir/drone, NOT modal) ¬∑ PALETTE jewel-on-graphite chromatic-chiaroscuro (clears BOTH the bright-daylight ban and the near-black-glow soft-ban) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [true Hopf fibre bundle ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó; 1042 was a polytope] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [Hopf geometry engine + GPU 4D-rotation/projection renderer + FM synth + Canvas2D fallback = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Hopf 1931; Niles Johnson; Villarceau/Clifford]) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight/high-key PALETTE (jury 10√ó) ¬∑ bright-Canvas2D OUTPUT (jury 4√ó) ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury 6√ó) ¬∑ passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury 5√ó) ¬∑ flat near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban to ~07-11)]` ¬∑ `picked=[device-tilt INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2-fibre-lines OUTPUT ¬∑ Hopf-fibration + FM-bell TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ jewel-on-graphite chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE ¬∑ cosmic-ambient NDE/boundless VIBE (starved pole)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all brightness is slow luminance drift; Pause instantly freezes + silences; reduced-motion slows the 4D rotation. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; no network, no mic). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled ‚úď ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚úď** (every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; ## Prior (Cycle 668 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE concept, *hear the living Earth: the planet's real, live earthquakes each strike a resonant inharmonic bell-gong, tuned by magnitude + depth, played as a slow global bell-choir over a BRIGHT, NON-MAP rendering of the Earth's depth structure* ‚ÄĒ raced via two non-Canvas2D surfaces. Ships `1193-tremor-core` ‚ÄĒ **press "Listen to the Earth" and the planet's real, live seismicity rings a cut-open, glowing Earth.** USGS's public **past-24h earthquake feed** (keyless GeoJSON, verified live this cycle ‚ÄĒ 230 quakes/24h) drives an inharmonic **modal bell-gong**: bigger quake = **lower, longer** bell (magnitude ‚Üí a fundamental snapped to a just-intonation pentatonic grid so overlapping strikes stay consonant); **depth shapes the timbre** (deep = darker/muffled + more inharmonic detune, shallow = bright); and ‚ÄĒ the ¬ß668 research refinement ‚ÄĒ each strike opens with a short **stick-slip friction onset** (a bandpass-swept noise burst, from *"Echoes of the Land"* arXiv 2507.14947, which models quakes as stick-slip friction) so the gong feels *seismic*, not a clean mallet. The 24h are **time-compressed into a ~150 s chronological loop** (250 ms min inter-onset ‚Üí a slow bell-choir, not a machine-gun). The visual is a **WebGL2 fragment-shader Earth CROSS-SECTION** ‚ÄĒ a bright cream/bronze cutaway of inner-core ‚Üí outer-core ‚Üí mantle ‚Üí crust ‚ÄĒ where **each quake rings at its TRUE DEPTH** (radius from center = `surface¬∑(1 ‚ąí depth/700)`, azimuth from longitude), so the depth‚Üítimbre mapping is made *visible*: a bright additive flash + expanding concentric depth-rings, slow luminance decay (no strobe). **This is the ‚≠ź ¬ß667 top-resurrect `1191-tremor-gongs` shipped** ‚ÄĒ but deliberately rendered as depth-*structure*, NOT the bright-2D-world-map form it was banked on (which repeats `1173`/`1161`), cashing the still-open jury provocation #5 (real-world data, was 0√ó). **Won the DEEP race over `1194-tremor-strata`** (the same gong engine on a bright SVG depth-strata *column* ‚ÄĒ the legible/diagrammatic sibling) on being the more physically *transporting* rendering + WebGL2 being fresher in the last-10 window than SVG. It's a full-screen shader you **watch** (not a draggable 3D field ‚Üí clears the jury ban), bright (never near-black ‚Üí clears the glow ban), Canvas2D-primary is banned (6√ó in last 10) and WebGL2 dodges it. **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß668 dive ‚ÄĒ *"Echoes of the Land"* (arXiv 2507.14947, 2025, stick-slip granular seismic installation) + Alexandre Estrela *"RedSkyFalls"* (Venice Biennale 2026, live global seismic ‚Üí sound/image) ‚Üí sharpened the ‚≠ź seismic seed with a stick-slip attack + a fresh 2026 named ref. Named refs: **"Echoes of the Land"** (2025); **Estrela "RedSkyFalls"** (2026); **Florian Dombois** *Auditory Seismology*; **USGS/Zhigang Peng** "Listening to Earthquakes"; **Andrea Polli**. Banks `1194-tremor-strata` as IDEAS ¬ß668.)

### `/dream/1193-tremor-core` ‚ÄĒ *hear the living Earth right now ‚ÄĒ the planet's real, live earthquakes each strike a resonant bell-gong, ringing at their true depth inside a cut-open, glowing Earth.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ technique: live-USGS-seismic ‚Üí inharmonic modal bell-gong sonification (a lab first ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó) ¬∑ pole: n/a (bright rice-paper/bronze, about-the-world)** ¬∑ INPUT **live real-world data** (USGS `all_day.geojson`, keyless CORS GET, past 24h, guarded per-field parse + NaN clamps + mandatory embedded ~12-quake fallback + `‚óŹ live¬∑N` / `‚óč sample data` badge + 60s re-poll; no user gesture beyond Begin ‚ÄĒ NOT touch/drag) ¬∑ OUTPUT **raw-WebGL2 fragment-shader Earth cross-section** (full-screen-triangle shader you WATCH: layered inner-core/outer-core/mantle/crust bands on rice-paper + ink graticule; up to 24 live quake blooms passed as `uniform vec4[24]` placed by azimuth(lon) + radius(depth), each a flash + expanding concentric rings; Canvas2D fallback, `webglcontextlost` handling, DPR-cap 1.75, reduced-motion ‚ÄĒ NOT Canvas2D-primary, NOT a three.js-3D-field-you-drag, NOT dark) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **inharmonic modal bell-gong synthesis driven by live seismic data + stick-slip onset + time-compressed scheduler** ‚ÄĒ 7 inharmonic partials [0.5¬∑1¬∑1.19¬∑1.71¬∑2¬∑2.74¬∑3] with independent exponential decays ‚Üí per-voice lowpass ‚Üí shared procedural convolution reverb ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí ~0.2 ramped master; mag‚ÜíLOWER JI-pentatonic-snapped fundamental (660‚Üí55 Hz) + amp + ring length; depth‚Üílowpass cutoff + inharmonic detune; a 40‚Äď90 ms bandpass-swept friction noise burst per strike; 16-voice oldest-steal; 24h‚Üí~150 s chronological loop, 250 ms min inter-onset ¬∑ PALETTE bright rice-paper/bronze/amber/ink (clears the near-black-glow ban) ¬∑ **ambition 4/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [live seismic sonification ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [live fetch/parse/fallback + inharmonic modal gong synth w/ stick-slip + WebGL2 cross-section renderer + time-compressed scheduler = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Echoes of the Land 2025; Estrela 2026; Dombois; Peng; Polli] ¬∑ #5 recent research [RESEARCH ¬ß668, today]) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT (last-10 6√ó) ¬∑ three.js/WebGL-3D-field-you-drag OUTPUT (jury) ¬∑ physics-sim-as-drag-instrument TECHNIQUE (jury) ¬∑ touch/drag INPUT ¬∑ near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE (jury, glow-ban) ¬∑ audio-first (1165/1183/1190, 3√ó in window) ¬∑ live-data‚Üíbright-2D-MAP FORM (1173/1161)]` ¬∑ `picked=[live-real-world-data INPUT (fresh ‚ÄĒ no data ship since 1173, 5 back) ¬∑ WebGL2-shader-cross-section OUTPUT (non-Canvas2D, non-map, non-draggable) ¬∑ inharmonic-modal-gong-from-live-seismic TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ bright rice-paper/bronze PALETTE ¬∑ contemplative/about-the-world VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; live-data is starved and the depth-cross-section dodges both the Canvas2D-surface ban and the bright-2D-map form. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all brightness is slow luminance decay, the 250 ms min inter-onset caps flash frequency; audio gesture-gated ("Listen to the Earth") + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + ~0.2 ramped-from-0 master + full teardown (RAF cancel + all voices stopped/disconnected + `ctx.close()` + GL program/buffers deleted + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `webglcontextlost` handler). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; the USGS GeoJSON is fetched directly in the browser from a public keyless endpoint ‚ÄĒ no server route, no mic, no upload). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled ‚úď ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚úď** (every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; ZERO from the 1193 folder), then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json` ‚ÄĒ ~4096-fd ceiling on ~600 pages, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped). `.next/server/app/dream/1193-tremor-core/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (42 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit | grep 1193` = 0; `eslint src/app/dream/1193-tremor-core/` = exit 0. **Compile + lint + type + shader/gong-graph-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/eye-verified** ‚ÄĒ no speakers/display in the headless box, so whether the bell-choir *reads* as musical (vs. a machine-gun or too-sparse) and the cross-section *reads* as a ringing planet wants Karel's hardware; the live USGS feed IS reachable from the container (verified 230 quakes), and it degrades to identical-sounding sample data + a Canvas2D cross-section on any failure, so it never blank-screens or falls silent. Winner of a DEEP 2-approach race; banked `1194-tremor-strata` as IDEAS ¬ß668. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1193-tremor-core/README.md`

## Cycle 667 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing the ambition floor on a DIFFERENT fresh tag, none in the jury's banned combos (touch/drag ¬∑ three.js/WebGL 3D-field ¬∑ physics-sim-as-drag-instrument ¬∑ near-dark cosmic glow). Ships `1190-quietude` ‚ÄĒ **what if SILENCE were the instrument?** An inversion of every mic prototype: a just-intonation drone-choir (root 110 Hz ¬∑ partials 1¬∑9/8¬∑5/4¬∑3/2¬∑5/3¬∑15/8¬∑2) is *always* synthesizing, held at zero ‚ÄĒ the room's **quiet OPENS it** (slow attack) and any sound **DUCKS it** (fast release). An **adaptive noise floor** (running-min that falls fast / rises slow) self-calibrates to any room and rejects steady fan/speaker bleed, so there's no fixed threshold. Sustained stillness is rewarded: a **stillness timer** unlocks one more overtone voice every ~4 quiet seconds (up to all 7) so deep silence is audibly *richer*; a disturbance shatters a bright gold/ivory **SVG mandala** into drifting motes that reconverge as quiet returns. No mic? A **still-mode** fallback rewards leaving pointer + keyboard idle ‚ÄĒ the same instrument, a different silence-sensor. **Won the WIDE fire on being the diversity-correct AND furthest-from-the-fortnight pick:** its **SVG output dodges the Canvas2D-output saturation** (‚Č•5 of the last 10; both losers were Canvas2D), it's the ‚≠ź flagged top resurrect for the next audio-first/meditative slot (audio-first now stale ‚ÄĒ last at 1183, two ships back), and it cashes the still-open jury provocation #4 (screen bias ‚ÄĒ "one audio-first in fifteen"). Beat `1191-tremor-gongs` (live USGS earthquake‚Üímodal-bell sonification ‚ÄĒ a genuinely fresh *domain* but repeats the exact live-data-map FORM of `1173-solar-wind-choir` from 4 cycles back, the "bright data-map local minimum" the ¬ß661/¬ß662 notes warned of) and `1192-strange-song` (RK4 strange-attractor composer ‚ÄĒ beautiful but the most passive + Canvas2D). Named refs: **John Cage** *4‚Ä≤33‚Ä≥* (1952); **√Čliane Radigue** sustained-drone practice. Banks both losers as IDEAS ¬ß667.)

### `/dream/1190-quietude` ‚ÄĒ *what if silence were the instrument? ‚ÄĒ be quiet and a just-intonation drone-choir blooms; make any sound and it ducks; stay still and it grows richer.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ technique: silence-as-instrument ‚ÄĒ adaptive-noise-floor gating of a JI drone-choir (a lab first ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (bright/meditative, NOT dark)** ¬∑ INPUT **mic-as-silence-sensor (inverted gate)** ‚ÄĒ RMS ‚Üí adaptive noise floor (fast-fall / slow-rise running minimum) ‚Üí `openness = 1 ‚ąí smoothstep(floor, floor+margin, rms)`, asymmetric slow-attack/fast-release; **still-mode** pointer/keyboard-idle fallback when mic denied (NOT touch-as-instrument, NOT drag) ¬∑ OUTPUT **inline SVG mandala** (concentric `<circle>` rings + radial `<line>` rays whose count grows with unlocked voices + a 70-mote `<circle>` pool, all attribute-animated via refs in one RAF loop, no per-frame React re-render; radial-gradient glow + Gaussian-blur softening ‚ÄĒ NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js/WebGL-3D-field, NOT dark) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **JI drone-choir + adaptive-floor gating + stillness-timer voice-unlock** ‚ÄĒ 7 detuned-osc-pair voices with ‚Č§0.3 Hz shimmer LFO ‚Üí peaking formant + lowpass ‚Üí shared procedural convolution reverb ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí master peak ~0.18; a fractional unlocked-voice count rises in quiet and relaxes slowly (never yanks) on disturbance ¬∑ PALETTE bright gold/ivory on warm off-white `#faf6ec`, dark stone ink text (clears the near-black-glow ban) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [silence-as-gate / adaptive-noise-floor inversion ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [adaptive floor + JI choir synth + stillness-state machine + SVG mandala = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Cage; Radigue] ¬∑ #5 recent research [IDEAS ¬ß665 bank, research-derived]) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (last-10 ‚Č•5√ó) ¬∑ three.js/WebGL-3D-field OUTPUT ¬∑ physics-sim-as-instrument TECHNIQUE ¬∑ touch/drag INPUT ¬∑ near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE (jury) ¬∑ live-data-feed‚Üíbright-2D-map FORM (1173, 4 cycles back)]` ¬∑ `picked=[mic-as-silence INPUT (inverted ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó) ¬∑ SVG mandala OUTPUT (fresh surface, dodges Canvas2D saturation) ¬∑ adaptive-floor-gated JI-choir TECHNIQUE ¬∑ bright gold/ivory PALETTE ¬∑ audio-first/meditative/conceptual VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; SVG + audio-first are both starved in the window. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all motion is slow luminance/position drift (`prefers-reduced-motion` flattens the mote scatter, keeps a gentle breath); audio gesture-gated ("Enter the quiet") + limiter + ~0.18 ramped-from-0 master + full teardown (RAF cancel + mic tracks stopped + `ctx.close()` + choir stop + idle-listener removal). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; mic is analysed for level only ‚ÄĒ the analyser is never connected to any destination, nothing recorded or uploaded; no new route). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled ‚úď ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚úď** (every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; ZERO from the 1190 folder), then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json` ‚ÄĒ ~4096-fd ceiling on ~600 pages, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped). `.next/server/app/dream/1190-quietude/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (35 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit | grep 1190` = 0; `eslint src/app/dream/1190-quietude/` = exit 0. **Compile + lint + type + gate/choir-logic-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/room-verified** ‚ÄĒ no mic/speakers/display in the headless box, so whether the choir *blooms* legibly in a real quiet room, the 0.55/0.35 unlock thresholds, and the noise-floor margins want Karel's hardware; the mandala animates + the choir is ready on Begin (never blank/silent), and still-mode makes it fully reviewer-exercisable even in a noisy room. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked `1191-tremor-gongs` + `1192-strange-song` as IDEAS ¬ß667. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1190-quietude/README.md`

## Cycle 666 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE concept, *Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano gives itself a **time of day**, painting a bright daylit sky that evolves dawn ‚Üí midday ‚Üí golden dusk across the whole piece*, raced via two renderers of the same day-clock engine. Ships `1188-welcome-sky` ‚ÄĒ **press Begin and your own recording paints the sky it belongs under.** A bright, high-key **volumetric raymarched cloudscape** on raw WebGL2: a single day-clock `progress = currentTime/duration` sweeps the sun on a `sin(ŌÄp)` elevation arc with azimuth drift while the whole palette lerps **dawn-rose (low sun) ‚Üí midday-blue (high, white) ‚Üí dusk-amber (low, gold)** ‚ÄĒ so the sky at minute 5 is a genuinely different world than at minute 1 (**long-form stateful** ‚ÄĒ the categorical menu gap the jury keeps flagging). Live features bend the weather: **energy (RMS)** ‚Üí cloud coverage + thickness + sun bloom (loud = thick dramatic sun-lit clouds; quiet = clear open sky), **centroid** ‚Üí warm‚ÜĒcool light + wispy-high vs heavy-low clouds, **flux (onsets)** ‚Üí a soft light-shaft brightening near the sun (smoothed, never a strobe). Real audio in 3 tiers (Karel's Welcome Home recording via the existing read-only `/api/audio/<id>` ‚Üí file-drop ‚Üí offline-rendered piano-arpeggio fallback; emerald/violet/amber source chip). **This cashes two overdue mandates at once:** the 2026-07-04 jury's provocation #1 (*"ban the near-black glow ‚ÄĒ ship a bright, daylit, high-key palette"*) AND the long-standing real-piano mandate (jury praised `1155-crucible` for it; last fed cycle 656). A **skyscape driven by a real recording is grep-0√ó** across the whole lab (only `243-spectral-cloud`/`246-spectral-splat` mention "cloud", both spectral point-clouds ‚ÄĒ no sky/weather/dawn). Chosen over its DEEP sibling `1189-turner-sky` (a *painterly* Turner/Constable oil-sky ‚ÄĒ layered translucent brush-stroke cloud sprites + glazed light on three.js) on **being the more physically transporting bright sky** + a clean strict-null build (1189 had an outstanding `'g' is possibly null` fix in its Canvas2D fallback at curation). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß666 dive ‚ÄĒ real-time chromagram‚Üíchord accompaniment (arXiv 2503.06348) + Z-Tonnetz harmonic-space viz were the surprises, but a grep audit killed both as lab-prior (`28-chord-canvas`, `1019-echo-halls-tonnetz`) and redirected to the 0√ó daylit-sky register. Named refs: **J.M.W. Turner** & **John Constable** cloud studies; **Brian Eno** *77 Million Paintings* (2006); **Refik Anadol**. Banks `1189-turner-sky` as IDEAS ¬ß666.)

### `/dream/1188-welcome-sky` ‚ÄĒ *give your own recording a time of day ‚ÄĒ your "Welcome Home" piano paints a bright volumetric sky that evolves dawn ‚Üí midday ‚Üí dusk across the whole piece.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ technique: real-recording-driven volumetric daylit skyscape (a lab first ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó) ¬∑ pole: n/a (bright/high-key daylight)** ¬∑ INPUT **real audio file** (Karel's Welcome Home recording via existing read-only `GET /api/audio/549fc519‚Ä¶`, both response shapes, 8s abort ‚Üí file-drop ‚Üí offline-rendered ~16s piano-arpeggio fallback; emerald/violet/amber source chip; no drag-as-instrument) ¬∑ OUTPUT **raw-WebGL2 volumetric raymarch** (full-screen-triangle fragment shader: fbm cloud slab, 48 view steps + 5-step light march for self-shadowing, powder edge-darkening, Rayleigh sky gradient, sun disc + bloom, filmic tonemap + vignette; DPR-capped 1.75, jittered start; Canvas2D painterly-gradient fallback with drifting soft blobs + amber notice; NOT three.js-3D-drag-field, NOT Canvas2D-primary-passive, NOT dark) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **day-clock skyscape** ‚ÄĒ `progress = currentTime/duration` sweeps sun elevation (`sin(ŌÄp)`) + azimuth + a dawn‚Üímidday‚Üídusk palette lerp (the long-form state); RMS‚Üícoverage/thickness/exposure, centroid‚Üíwarm/cool + wisp, flux‚Üísoft onset bloom; all brightness changes JS-side-smoothed before reaching a uniform ¬∑ PALETTE bright daylight ‚ÄĒ dawn-rose / midday-blue-white / dusk-amber-gold (clears the near-black-glow ban) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [real-audio decode + RMS/flux/centroid analyser + WebGL2 volumetric raymarch renderer + reverb/limiter graph + Canvas2D fallback = 4‚Äď5] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Turner; Constable; Eno; Anadol] ¬∑ #5 recent research [RESEARCH ¬ß666, today] ¬∑ plus **long-form-stateful** = a categorical-menu gap) ¬∑ **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary-passive OUTPUT (last-10 4√ó) ¬∑ three.js/WebGL-3D-field-you-drag OUTPUT ¬∑ physics-sim-as-instrument TECHNIQUE ¬∑ touch/drag INPUT ¬∑ near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE (jury) ¬∑ audio-first (shipped 1165+1183)]` ¬∑ `picked=[real-audio-file INPUT (fresh ‚ÄĒ only 1155 in window) ¬∑ bright daylit volumetric-sky OUTPUT (WebGL raymarch, not passive-Canvas2D) ¬∑ audio-feature‚Üígenerative-skyscape TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ bright dawn-to-dusk PALETTE ¬∑ long-form-stateful FORM]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; the daylit-sky register + long-form day-arc are both starved. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ every brightness change is a slow lerp / `setTargetAtTime` ramp, flux decays slowly so onsets never flash; audio gesture-gated (Begin) + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + conservative ~0.2 ramped master + full teardown (RAF cancel + nodes stopped/disconnected + `ctx.close()` + GL context lost + `webglcontextlost` handler). `prefers-reduced-motion` calms the cloud drift. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; READ-only of the existing `/api/audio/<id>`, no mic, no new route). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Linting/type-check ‚úď + Collecting page data ‚úď (full, no EMFILE this cycle)**, exit 0; `/dream/1188-welcome-sky` listed at 8.13 kB. **Compile + lint + type + shader/day-arc-logic-by-inspection verified; NOT eye-verified** ‚ÄĒ whether the day *reads* as a convincing dawn‚Üídusk and the clouds feel like weather wants Karel's eyes on a real browser (no display in-container); a bright idle sky renders on mount regardless, and the full arc is best felt with the multi-minute recording (a short/looping source settles at dusk ‚ÄĒ noted). Winner of a DEEP 2-approach race; banked `1189-turner-sky` as IDEAS ¬ß666. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1188-welcome-sky/README.md`

## Cycle 665 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal sensor/embodied explorers, each clearing the ambition floor via a DIFFERENT input the recent window has starved, all bright/high-key; directly cashing the 2026-07-04 jury's **#1 headline gap** ‚ÄĒ *"zero embodied prototypes in fifteen cycles; camera/body-tracking/MIDI/tilt all 0√ó, touch 8√ó"*. Ships `1185-face-organ` ‚ÄĒ **sing a shimmering choir with your face ‚ÄĒ no hands, no keys.** MediaPipe **FaceLandmarker** (CDN-loaded, GPU‚ÜíCPU) reads your **52 facial blendshapes** live: open your mouth and the choir sings (jawOpen ‚Üí loudness + vowel openness), shape your lips to move through the vowels /u/‚Üí/o/‚Üí/a/‚Üí/e/‚Üí/i/ (pucker‚ÜĒsmile morphs the formant targets), raise your brows to climb the pentatonic scale, tilt your head to pan + bend, blink for a soft accent. The sound is a **real 3-formant vocal synth** (a sawtooth glottal source + breath through parallel F1/F2/F3 bandpass filters swept between the **Peterson & Barney (1952)** vowel table) so it reads as sung "aah/ooo/eee", not a buzzer ‚ÄĒ a small detuned unison stack gives the choral shimmer, pitch is pentatonic-quantised so it's always consonant. Rendered as a **bright ivory/gold/rose luminous face-mask** over the mirrored webcam that blooms with the voice (high-key ‚ÄĒ honors the still-active near-black-glow ban). **This is the direct cash of the jury's #1 embodied gap** ‚ÄĒ unlike `1160-body-choir`'s frame-differencing, this is genuine facial-**landmark** tracking, a true fresh input in the window ‚ÄĒ and it's **triple love-aligned** (Karel loves `101-camera-song` / `217-dance-avatar` / `234-kids-hand-creature`, all embodied camera pieces). No camera / MediaPipe fail ‚Üí an on-screen **vowel-pad + pitch-slider** fallback plays the identical engine. Chosen over two strong siblings on **the jury gap + 06:30 phone-reviewability + surprise**: `1187-quietude` (‚≠ź banked ‚ÄĒ a conceptual **inversion** where SILENCE is the instrument: an adaptive-noise-floor gates a just-intonation drone-choir that blooms only when the room goes quiet ‚ÄĒ the freshest *vibe*, but it needs a silent room + headphones + patience, a harder morning sell) and `1186-tilt-field` (a Tonnetz tilt-navigated organ ‚ÄĒ banked lower because tilt just shipped at `1170-tilt-pool`). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß665 dive ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe FaceLandmarker's LIVE_STREAM 52-blendshape pipeline (Google AI Edge, current) as a real-time facial *instrument* is an under-explored use (docs cover avatars/filters, not music). Named refs: **Peterson & Barney (1952)** vowel formants; **Zach Lieberman** / **Daito Manabe** facial-performance work.)

## Cycle 664 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE concept, *an audio-first generative minimalist ensemble that performs forever and is genuinely different at minute 6 than minute 1*, raced via two process-music philosophies (discrete cell-advancement vs. continuous-tempo phasing); ships the ‚≠ź TOP RESURRECT the last two cycles queued. Ships `1183-in-c-loom` ‚ÄĒ **a faithful Terry Riley *In C* that performs endlessly.** Twelve virtual players each move forward-only through **53 authored melodic cells** (C-major rise ‚Üí a B‚ô≠-shaded mixolydian middle ‚Üí a bright resolution back to a C octave), each repeating a cell a probabilistic number of times before advancing, all loosely held by a steady high-C eighth-note **pulse** and a warm low-C drone. A ‚Č§3-cell **herding rule** keeps the ensemble from scattering, so the players phase apart and re-converge into ever-shifting interlocking patterns; when a player finishes cell 53 it wraps to a new pass, so it never stops. **This directly cashes the jury's #4 gap** ‚ÄĒ "the screen bias is near-total: one audio-first piece in fifteen" ‚ÄĒ with a genuinely *audio-first, long-form-stateful* piece (a spare 53-tick ring with 12 gliding dots is the only visual). It stays **bright** (warm parchment/ivory-amber, dark stone ink ‚ÄĒ honors the still-active near-black-glow ban) and needs zero setup: press Begin and it plays. Chosen over its DEEP sibling `1184-phase-mill` (a rigorous **Steve Reich** continuous-tempo *phasing* engine ‚ÄĒ the same idea via players looping one cell at a hair-different tempi that drift out of unison and slowly re-gather) on **06:30 phone-reviewability**: In C delivers the interlocking-ensemble payoff within ~15 seconds and is anchored by its recognizable pulse, where the phasing engine's signature drift‚Üíre-convergence unfolds subtly over minutes. **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß664 dive ‚ÄĒ *Smol Sequencer* (Synthtopia, 2026-06-26) confirms browser generative-minimalism is a live 2026 lane; build consumes the banked ¬ß663 IDEAS entry. Named refs: **Terry Riley *In C*** (1964); **Steve Reich *Piano Phase*** (1967). Banks ‚≠ź `1184-phase-mill` (the continuous-phasing deepening ‚ÄĒ a "cell-advance ‚ÜĒ tempo-drift" mode toggle, and the fix for 1181's grid-quantized honest gap).)

tempo + density sliders + seed re-roll ‚ÄĒ no drag-as-instrument) ¬∑ OUTPUT **audio-first** (a spare secondary Canvas2D 53-tick ring with 12 gliding player dots; the SOUND is the piece) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **Terry Riley *In C* generative ensemble** (grep-0√ó): 12 independent player state-machines (cell / cursor / pass / probabilistic repeat) advancing forward-only through 53 authored cells under a ‚Č§3-cell herding rule + a steady eighth-note pulse; ## Cycle 663 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing the ambition floor via a DIFFERENT **grep-verified novel-to-lab technique** on a DIFFERENT output surface (directly attacking this fire's diversity finding: in the last 10 ships BOTH Canvas2D **and** three.js outputs, and BOTH bright **and** dark palettes, are saturated ‚ÄĒ so the real gap is a *new output modality*). Ships `1180-illuminated-word` ‚ÄĒ **type a word and hear it become an illuminated hymn.** Type (or paste) any name / line / poem and a bright, self-illuminating **SVG vellum page** writes and gilds itself letter-by-letter, locked in time with a cross-modal **TEXT‚ÜíMUSIC** engine: an oversized gold-leaf **drop-cap** opens, calligraphic words brighten as each is sung, vine/knotwork marginalia grow from the letters currently sounding. Letters ‚Üí **D-Dorian** scale degrees (arbitrary text stays consonant over a D drone); **vowels** ‚Üí sustained sung choir tones, **consonants** ‚Üí short plucked articulations; word-length ‚Üí phrase length; **punctuation** ‚Üí rests + a resolving cadence chord; each phrase traces a gentle sine harmonic arc. **All three of its headline tags are fresh-to-lab:** keyboard-**text** INPUT (0√ó recent), **SVG-typographic** OUTPUT (0√ó in the last 10), and **text-sonification** TECHNIQUE (grep-verified 0√ó across the whole lab) ‚ÄĒ the strongest possible answer to the 2026-07-04 jury's "does it look, sound, feel like anything else we've shipped this fortnight?", and it honors the still-active near-black-glow ban with a bright illuminated-manuscript palette. Chosen over two strong novel-technique siblings on **surprise + phone-reviewability**: it's the most personal ("watch your own name become a hymn") and the only one of the three that demos instantly on Karel's 06:30 phone (type a word ‚Üí song, zero setup). Banks `1181-in-c-loom` (a faithful **Terry Riley *In C*** generative ensemble ‚ÄĒ 12 virtual players phase through 53 cells, genuinely different at minute 6 than minute 1; the audio-first / long-form-stateful lane) + `1182-strange-song` (a bright **strange-attractor** instrument ‚ÄĒ RK4 Lorenz/R√∂ssler/Aizawa drawn as sumi-e ink diffusing on warm paper while it sings its own path). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß663 dive ‚ÄĒ WebGPU reached candidate-recommendation March 2026 (~85% support) and the current wave is audio-reactive compute art; that pushed me to hunt for a genuinely fresh output surface, and the diversity audit + grep landed on text-sonification/SVG-typography as the truly 0√ó lane. Named refs: the *Book of Kells* / *Lindisfarne Gospels* drop-cap + marginalia tradition; Apollinaire *Calligrammes* (concrete poetry); Kandinsky letter-colour synesthesia.)

## Cycle 662 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE concept (*hear the sun's live weather as a choir* ‚ÄĒ the ‚≠ź banked resurrect cycle 661 explicitly teed up) raced via 2 rendering philosophies (bright daylit readout vs. immersive dark magnetosphere field). Ships `1173-solar-wind-choir` ‚ÄĒ **hear the sun's weather hitting Earth right now.** Three live, keyless **NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center** feeds ‚ÄĒ solar-wind plasma (speed/density), interplanetary magnetic field (Bz/Bt), and the planetary K index ‚ÄĒ are fetched *client-side* every ~60s and sung by an **8-voice just-intonation choir** over a **bright, daylit** sun‚ÜíEarth Canvas2D scene: wind **speed** lifts the register + streak speed, **density** fills the chord + particle flow, **Bz** (southward = geomagnetic storm) cross-fades harmony consonant‚Üítense and tints the sky violet, **Bt** raises the shimmer, **Kp** lights an aurora ribbon + sparkle voices. An embedded snapshot keeps it singing if the feeds are unreachable (badge: emerald `‚óŹ live ¬∑ <UTC>` / amber `‚óč using sample data`). **The direct cash of the 2026-07-04 jury's provocation #5** ("build about the real world, not a Hamiltonian ‚ÄĒ sonify external data") on a data source the lab has **never** touched ‚ÄĒ it owns USGS-seismic + ADS-B air-traffic but never **space weather** ‚ÄĒ and it clears the jury's #1 FORM ban (bright/daylit, NOT the near-black cosmic glow). The form-sequencing block that banked this at 661 (its live-feed‚Üísonify shape echoed `1161-flight-choir`) has cleared: two non-data ships (1165 audio-first, 1170 tilt) have since broken the run. Chosen over the immersive sibling `1174-magnetosphere-song` **on the jury's decisive gate:** 1174 is the more *transporting* build but renders a violet field over a near-dark base (`bgL‚Čą12‚Äď17%`) ‚ÄĒ the exact "near-black glow" under the fortnight ban ‚ÄĒ so it's banked (IDEAS ¬ß662, ‚≠ź resurrect when the glow-ban lifts / a "readout‚ÜĒfield" toggle on 1173). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß661 dive (Helioradar AV 2026) ‚Üí ¬ß662 re-anchor (NASA **IMAP I-ALiRT** real-time solar-wind pipeline begins 2026, replacing ACE/DSCOVR; arXiv 2206.04279 ULF-audibility method). Named refs: Helioradar AV (2026); Andrea Polli *Atmospherics / Weather Works*.)

### `/dream/1173-solar-wind-choir` ‚ÄĒ *hear the sun's weather hitting Earth right now ‚ÄĒ three live NOAA space-weather feeds sung as a just-intonation choir over a bright daylit sun‚ÜíEarth scene.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: real-world-data sonification (live space weather ‚ÄĒ a lab first) ¬∑ pole: n/a (bright/high-key daylight)** ¬∑ INPUT **live-external-data (3 keyless NOAA SWPC JSON products: plasma-5-minute, mag-5-minute, planetary-k-index; client-side fetch, ~60s poll, embedded fallback snapshot)** ¬∑ OUTPUT **bright daylit Canvas2D scene** (daytime sky gradient + warm sun disc + bright-blue Earth w/ bow-shock + sun‚ÜíEarth wind streaks + Kp aurora ribbon; NOT three.js/WebGL, NOT a dark glow) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **multi-feed space-weather ‚Üí 8-voice just-intonation choir sonification** (speed‚Üíregister/vibrato + streak speed, density‚Üíactive-voice-count/chord richness [3‚Üí8 voices], Bz‚Üíconsonant‚ÜĒ7-limit-tense JI crossfade + violet palette, Bt‚Üíhigh-shelf shimmer, Kp‚Üíaurora/shimmer voices; sine+triangle per voice ‚Üí peaking formant filter ‚Üí shared vibrato LFO ‚Üí shimmer shelf ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor limiter ‚Üí 0.2 master; all `setTargetAtTime`-ramped) ¬∑ PALETTE bright daylight ‚ÄĒ warm sun (#fffef4‚Üí#ffb545) / pale-blue Earth (#eaf6ff‚Üí#5aa9e6) / daytime sky (breaks the banned near-black glow) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [live 3-feed keyless fetch+parse+per-feed-fallback + `computeTargets` mapping engine + 8-voice JI choir synth + bright Canvas2D sun‚ÜíEarth renderer = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Helioradar AV 2026; Andrea Polli *Weather Works*] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß661 Helioradar + ¬ß662 IMAP/ULF re-anchor). **diversity:** `banned=[touch/drag INPUT ¬∑ three.js/WebGL-3D-field OUTPUT ¬∑ physics-sim-as-instrument TECHNIQUE ¬∑ near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE ‚ÄĒ all JURY 2026-07-04; + (this fire) bias-check vs 1161's bright-data-map form (cleared: 2 non-data ships since)]` ¬∑ `picked=[live-external-data (space-weather) INPUT ¬∑ bright daylit Canvas2D sun‚ÜíEarth OUTPUT ¬∑ multi-feed‚ÜíJI-choir sonification TECHNIQUE ¬∑ bright daylight PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; the direct cash of the jury's "sonify the real world" lane on a lab-first data source (space weather). **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ brightness only *drifts* on a smooth ~0.35 Hz sub-audio oscillation; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows particles + freezes the drift; audio gesture-gated (Begin) + limiter + 0.2 master + full teardown (RAF cancel + oscillators/LFO stopped + poll interval cleared + `ctx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side; NOAA feeds are keyless public GETs fetched directly). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled ‚úď + Linting/type-check ‚úď** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other-prototype warnings; ZERO from the 1173 folder). `.next/server/app/dream/1173-solar-wind-choir/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (32 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit | grep 1173` = 0; folder eslint exit 0. **Compile + lint + type + feeds-parse/audio-graph/mapping-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/eye-verified, and the LIVE feed not exercised headless** (the honest gap ‚ÄĒ NOAA solar-wind product URLs 404 through this sandbox's curl proxy, so both builders demoed on the embedded fallback; the paths are standard SWPC products that resolve from a real browser, and the fallback is built to sound/render identically. Whether the space weather *reads* as a bright choir wants Karel's speakers + a live browser). Winner of a DEEP 2-approach race; banked ‚≠ź `1174-magnetosphere-song` as IDEAS ¬ß662. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1173-solar-wind-choir/README.md`

## Cycle 661 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal explorers (tilt-balance instrument / live-space-weather choir / Web-MIDI fresco), each clearing the ambition floor via a DIFFERENT jury-named 0√ó input and all dodging every 2026-07-04 jury ban. Ships `1170-tilt-pool` ‚ÄĒ **play chords by balancing.** Tilt your phone (or move the pointer, on desktop) and sound pools like water to the lowest corner: hold near *level* and several just-intonation pools coexist as a full chord; tilt *steeply* and everything drains into one deep low pool. **DeviceOrientation tilt is a jury-named 0√ó input**, and the fluid-pooling interaction/palette feel like nothing the lab shipped this fortnight ‚ÄĒ the direct answer to the jury's #1 gate (*form monotony*: "does it look, sound, feel like anything else this fortnight?"). Chosen over two strong siblings **specifically for diversity + phone-native review:** the runner-up `1171-solar-wind-choir` (freshest research ‚ÄĒ today's Helioradar-2026 dive) structurally *repeats* `1161-flight-choir`'s "live keyless feed ‚Üí sonify ‚Üí bright 2D readout" form from just two ships ago, so shipping it risked starting a NEW "bright data-map sonification" local minimum; and `1170` is the only one of the three whose headline gesture (physical tilt) works on the phone Karel reviews from at 06:30. Banks ‚≠ź `1171-solar-wind-choir` (hear the sun's weather hitting Earth *right now* ‚ÄĒ three live NOAA SWPC feeds as a JI choir; the ‚≠ź TOP resurrect for the next real-world/cosmos-data lane once it won't stack on 1161's form) + `1172-midi-fresco` (the lab's **first Web MIDI** ‚ÄĒ every note paints a living buon-fresco; resurrect for a MIDI/live-performance cycle Karel can plug a controller into). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß661 dive ‚ÄĒ the tilt/orientation-audio prong (spatial-audio + camera head-tracking is a live 2026 area) anchors the shipped tilt instrument; the space-weather prong (Helioradar AV, av.helioradar.com, 2026) anchors the banked 1171. Named ref: Toshio Iwai *Electroplankton* / physical balance-instrument lineage.)

### `/dream/1170-tilt-pool` ‚ÄĒ *play chords by balancing ‚ÄĒ tilt your device and sound pools like water to the lowest corner.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: embodied tilt-balance liquid-harmony instrument (bright, playful ‚ÄĒ not psychedelic) ¬∑ pole: n/a (bright/high-key aqueous)** ¬∑ INPUT **DeviceOrientation tilt** (beta/gamma; iOS `requestPermission()` gated on an "Enable tilt" gesture) with a **pointer-over-canvas desktop fallback** that runs immediately on Begin (jury-named 0√ó input) ¬∑ OUTPUT **bright daylit Canvas2D fluid** (translucent slumping blobs + foam + ripples + spirit-level bubble; NOT three.js/WebGL, NOT a dark glow) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **shallow-water pooling model** (six pools project their basin position onto the smoothed gravity vector ‚Üí downhill pools deepen/loud, uphill drain to silence) driving a **6-voice just-intonation drone bank** (sine + soft detuned triangle per pool over a JI major scale on F3, each gain driven by pool depth via throttled `setTargetAtTime`; shared-lowpass LFO + feedback tail = liquid shimmer) ¬∑ PALETTE bright aqueous dawn-blue/aqua/white-foam (breaks the banned near-black glow AND the nascent bright-data-map form) ¬∑ **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab **DeviceOrientation tilt input** [jury-named 0√ó; the lab's prior tilt work `1151-tilt-descent` was banked, never shipped] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [tilt/pointer gravity-vector input + shallow-water pooling model + 6-voice JI drone bank + Canvas2D fluid render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named ref [Toshio Iwai *Electroplankton*; physical balance/liquid-instrument lineage]). **diversity:** `banned=[touch/drag INPUT ¬∑ three.js/WebGL-3D-field OUTPUT ¬∑ physics-sim-as-instrument TECHNIQUE ¬∑ near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE ‚ÄĒ all JURY 2026-07-04;
