## Cycle 660 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE fresh audio-first concept, *the instrument is inside your own ear*, raced via 2 approaches (active phantom-**melody** vs immersive phantom-**field**). Ships `1165-third-ear` ‚ÄĒ **a melody you hear that no speaker plays.** Two loud, close pure tones (the "primaries", ~1.2‚Äď2.7 kHz) sound together and the nonlinear mechanics of your cochlea generate an audible **difference tone** at their gap `őĒ = f‚āā ‚ąí f‚āĀ` ‚ÄĒ a *third* tone ("Tartini tone", Maryanne Amacher's "ear tone") that is NOT in the signal. The composition lives entirely in őĒ: a seeded just-intonation pentatonic melody develops (statement‚Üívariation‚Üírest‚Üíreturn, drifting over minutes) while the two real primaries ride high and nearly still. A **carrier-height** sweep moves both primaries together so the played pitch climbs but the phantom melody holds ‚ÄĒ the proof it's in your head ‚ÄĒ and an **A/B toggle** mutes one primary so the phantom vanishes (proof it was never played). Eyes-closed, headphones, deliberately minimal instructional visual. **The direct answer to the 2026-07-04 jury's provocation #4** ("the screen bias is near-total ‚ÄĒ one audio-first piece in fifteen"), on a grep-0√ó technique (`otoacoustic`/`Tartini` = 0√ó; the lab's isochronic/binaural-beat entrainment is a *different* psychoacoustic family) ‚ÄĒ and NOT another entrainment/meditation piece (1138-theta-ear already owns that). Banks ‚≠ź `1166-ear-tone-field` (the SAME otoacoustic phenomenon as a sustained immersive Amacher *field* ‚ÄĒ 9 just-tuned pairs whose őĒ's stack into a harmonic phantom chord, a 14-stage ~10-min seeded evolution + binaural bed; the ‚≠ź TOP resurrect for the next immersive/cosmic-ambient-audio lane, once the near-black-glow ban lifts). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß660 dive ‚ÄĒ Sonorities 2026 (Belfast) symposium session on Amacher's "ear tones" confirms the technique is live current-year, not archival. Named refs: Maryanne Amacher *Sound Characters (Making the Third Ear)* 1999; Giuseppe Tartini *il terzo suono* 1714; Alvin Lucier.)

### `/dream/1165-third-ear` ‚ÄĒ *the instrument is inside your own ear ‚ÄĒ two high tones sound, and the melody you hear in the gap between them is one your cochlea makes, not the speakers.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: psychoacoustic difference-tone ("ear tone") instrument ‚ÄĒ audio-first, eyes-closed ¬∑ pole: intense-perceptual (alert wonder, NOT cosmic-ambient)** ¬∑ INPUT **audio-first / minimal-gesture** (Begin + a carrier-height sweep + an A/B proof toggle; 0√ó in lab) ¬∑ OUTPUT **audio-primary** with a deliberately-minimal instructional Canvas2D diagram (NOT a three.js/WebGL 3D-field, NOT a cosmic-ambient glow) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE **combination/difference-tone ("Tartini/Amacher ear tone") synthesis** ‚ÄĒ symmetric mapping `f‚āĀ = carrier ‚ąí őĒ/2`, `f‚āā = carrier + őĒ/2` so `f‚āā ‚ąí f‚āĀ = őĒ` carries ALL melodic content; a seeded (`mulberry32`) just-intonation-pentatonic state machine develops őĒ over minutes; a shared carrier LFO summed identically into both primaries keeps the effect vivid while preserving őĒ (grep-0√ó: `otoacoustic`=0, `Tartini`=0, `difference tone`=1 mention never as an engine) ¬∑ PALETTE near-black instructional (anti-visual by design ‚ÄĒ the piece is for the ear; NOT the banned cosmic-ambient art-field) ‚ÄĒ sky-cyan primaries, violet phantom marker ¬∑ **ambition 4/5** (#1 novel-to-lab: combination/difference-tone synthesis as a compositional engine, grep-0√ó ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [difference-tone primary-pair synth + seeded phantom-melody state machine + carrier-sweep proof mechanic + A/B phantom-mute + DynamicsCompressor safety chain + instructional diagram = 6] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Amacher 1999; Tartini 1714; Lucier] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß660 [Sonorities-2026 "ear tones" session, added this cycle]). **diversity:** `banned=[touch/drag INPUT ¬∑ three.js/WebGL-3D-field OUTPUT ¬∑ physics-sim-as-instrument TECHNIQUE ¬∑ near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE ‚ÄĒ all JURY 2026-07-04]` ¬∑ `picked=[audio-first / minimal-gesture INPUT (0√ó) ¬∑ audio-primary OUTPUT w/ minimal instructional visual (jury #4, 1√ó in 15) ¬∑ combination/difference-tone otoacoustic TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ alert-perceptual (NOT cosmic-ambient) VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; the direct cash of the jury's loudest still-open lane (audio-first) on a fresh psychoacoustic technique. **AUDIO SAFETY (the governing constraint here ‚ÄĒ sustained tones):** master path ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí conservative master gain (0.22, only ever ramped via `setTargetAtTime`); no hard onsets; primaries capped well under 4 kHz; visible "headphones + start low, raise gently" caption; instant Stop ramps down then full teardown. Photosensitivity N/A (minimal static visual). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled ‚úď + Linting/type-check ‚úď** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; ZERO from the 1165 folder), then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (~4096-fd ceiling on ~600 pages ‚ÄĒ infra not code; Vercel deploys uncapped). `.next/server/app/dream/1165-third-ear/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (36 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit | grep 1165` = 0; folder eslint exit 0. **Compile + lint + type + difference-tone-math-by-inspection verified** (the symmetric mapping is correct ‚ÄĒ melody is provably in őĒ only); **NOT ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ built headless with no headphones, so whether the ear-tone actually *rings* at these levels, and the ideal őĒ range / loudness, are designed-not-heard (which is exactly why the carrier sweep exists ‚ÄĒ the listener finds their own sweet spot). Winner of a DEEP 2-approach race; banked ‚≠ź `1166-ear-tone-field` as IDEAS ¬ß660. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1165-third-ear/README.md`

## Cycle 659 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal explorers answering the loud 2026-07-04 jury (bright / real-world / non-physics), none using a banned tag. Ships `1161-flight-choir` ‚ÄĒ **the whole sky above the planet, right now, as a bright choir.** Live global air-traffic (ADS-B) sonified over a **daylight cartographic world-map**: every airliner in flight becomes one sustained voice (altitude‚Üípitch on a just-intonation lydian lattice, ground-speed‚Üíbrightness, longitude‚Üístereo pan, vertical-rate‚Üívibrato, traffic-density‚Üía sub-drone bed) with a real fade-in/sustain/fade-out lifecycle. A wave of hobbyist ADS-B *visual* radars shipped in May‚ÄďJune 2026 (Adafruit's DeskRadar64; the viral Skylight ceiling projector) and **nobody sonified the feed** ‚ÄĒ this fills that exact gap. **The direct answer to the jury's provocation #5** ("build about the real world, not a Hamiltonian ‚ÄĒ sonify external data", a 0√ó lane in the 15-cycle window) on a **fresh** data source (aircraft/ADS-B = grep-0√ó; NOT the exhausted 7√ó seismic). Live keyless client-side fetch (airplanes.live / OpenSky) with a **deterministic 64-aircraft simulated-sky fallback** that runs the identical sonification, so it demos with zero network. Banks ‚≠ź `1162-loom-of-hours` (Karel's REAL Welcome-Home piano woven into a bright generative textile ‚ÄĒ the real-piano mandate the jury praised in 1155; IDEAS ¬ß659 TOP resurrect) + `1163-answer-song` (sing a phrase, a bright choir sings an *answer* back ‚ÄĒ NSDF pitch-detection + Continuator-style reply; the live-duet lane). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß659 dive ‚ÄĒ the May‚ÄďJune 2026 ADS-B-visual-radar wave that no one sonified. Named refs: Skylight / DeskRadar64; Andrea Polli airspace/atmospheric sonification.)

## Cycle 658 ‚ÄĒ **adult** **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal embodied/world explorers, all **bright/high-key Canvas2D** (deliberately NOT three.js/WebGL) answering the 2026-07-04 jury's demand to break the "dark cosmic physics-sim you drag" monoculture. Ships `1160-body-choir` ‚ÄĒ **conduct a luminous choir with your whole body, no controller.** A webcam + a self-contained *frame-differencing optical flow* (no MediaPipe, no CDN) turns your motion into a warm just-intonation choir over a sunlit ivory‚Üípeach Canvas2D composite: how much you move ‚Üí loudness, how high your hands rise ‚Üí which voice sings, left/right ‚Üí stereo shimmer, stillness ‚Üí a calm drone. **The jury's #1 gap was "zero embodied prototypes in fifteen cycles" ‚ÄĒ this is the direct cash**, and it's the one fire where the loves converge (Karel loves `101-camera-song`/`217-dance-avatar`/`234-kids-hand-creature`, all embodied). Camera analysed for motion only ‚ÄĒ never uploaded. No-camera ‚Üí a mouse fallback drives the identical mapping. Banks ‚≠ź `1161-seismic-song` (the last 24h of Earth's earthquakes, live USGS feed, sonified over a bright daylight world-map ‚ÄĒ the ‚≠ź TOP resurrect, answers the jury's "sonify the real world" lane) + `1162-key-garden` (the lab's first **Web MIDI** ‚ÄĒ a sunlit generative garden played by MIDI or your computer keys). **Research‚Üíbuild:** ¬ß658 dive ‚ÄĒ self-contained frame-diff optical flow needs no CDN model (headless-shippable, unlike MediaPipe); USGS `all_day.geojson` is live+CORS-open+keyless. Named ref: Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1975); Golan Levin / Camille Utterback lineage.)

### `/dream/1148-light-accretion` ‚ÄĒ *your real piano builds a cathedral of light you drift down, and it remembers.* `demoable` ¬∑ **adult ¬∑ state: NDE tunnel toward a being of light ‚ÄĒ a real recording accreting a long-form volumetric field with memory ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient.** Press Begin (audio is gesture-gated); the volume already animates on load from a gentle deterministic procedural drive ‚ÄĒ the never-blank path. **Three-tier real-audio loader:** a Path-recording id text field prefilled with Karel's Welcome-Home piano (`549fc519-‚Ä¶`, read-only `GET /api/audio/:id`) ¬∑ drop/choose your own file ¬∑ a deterministic offline-rendered synth demo so it's **never blank/silent** (amber note when it's the fallback). **The engine (3 files):** **(1)** `field.ts` ‚ÄĒ `AccretionField`, a **48¬≥ `Float32Array` density grid**. Each audio onset `deposit()`s a soft 3D **gaussian blob**; spectral **centroid ‚Üí height (y)**, a slowly-rotating **helix** places successive notes so the column spirals as it grows; louder/higher-flux onsets deposit brighter blobs; deposits **accumulate**. `decay()` multiplies the whole grid by `exp(‚ąídt¬∑ln2/75)` = a **~75-second half-life** ‚ÄĒ old light fades but persists, so the structure at minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1 and **never loops** (genuine long-form memory, a categorical-menu gap). `quantize()` ‚Üí auto-exposed R8. Deterministic (mulberry32; no `Math.random`/`Date` in hot paths). **(2)** `gl.ts` ‚ÄĒ `AccretionRenderer`, a **raw WebGL2 `sampler3D` volumetric raymarch**: the quantized grid uploads each frame via `texSubImage3D`; a full-screen fragment shader box-intersects and marches **front-to-back with emission/absorption** (96 steps, dithered), density ‚Üí **molten-gold `#ffb347` ‚Üí pearl `#fff4d6`** emissive ramp + a **core beacon** (exp-falloff pearl glow = the being of light) + distance fog + Reinhard tone-map + vignette. The **camera drifts perpetually inward** toward the brightening core (`camZ = 0.18 + 1.72¬∑exp(‚ąíelapsed/ŌĄ)`, asymptotic ‚ÄĒ the NDE tunnel, never arriving). `dispose()` deletes GL objects + `loseContext()`. Plus `AccretionFallback2D` ‚ÄĒ a rotating additive orthographic projection of the same field for no-WebGL2. **(3)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ `AudioEngine`: decoded buffer ‚Üí synthesized convolution reverb ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination, with a parallel `AnalyserNode` yielding per-frame **RMS energy / spectral flux / spectral centroid** that drive the deposits; ## Cycle 649 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE concept, *a psychedelic piece organised by the brain's own **TEMPORAL** rhythm (theta‚Äďgamma cross-frequency coupling), not by spatial geometry* ‚ÄĒ the whole lab's psychedelic corpus was spatial (form-constants / warps) until now. Ships `1136-theta-engine` (intense, 2D raw-WebGL2); banks ‚≠ź `1137-theta-cathedral` (immersive 3D three.js nebula) + `1138-theta-ear` (audio-first eyes-closed). **Research‚Üíbuild:** today's dive found the 2026 5-HT2A / 5-Hz-visual-cortex study.)

[/dream/1136-theta-engine](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1136-theta-engine) ‚ÄĒ **"Theta Engine": a drug-free psychedelic field organised by the visual cortex's own TEMPORAL rhythm ‚ÄĒ a ~5 Hz theta oscillation whose phase gates ~40 Hz gamma bursts (theta‚Äďgamma phase-amplitude coupling). You HEAR the real nested rhythm and SEE it re-bloom the field each cycle; drag to steer coupling depth √ó theta rate.** **Active pointer-drag INPUT ‚Üí raw-WebGL2 fragment-shader field OUTPUT.** Three files: **(1)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ `makeThetaAudio`: the REAL coupling lives here (5/40 Hz is a *visual*-flicker hazard, not an auditory one). A 55 Hz sub + detuned partials for body; a ~5 Hz theta sine amplitude-modulates a ~139 Hz mid carrier (the audible theta pulse); a 40 Hz gamma oscillator runs through a VCA whose gain is a `WaveShaper`-**sharpened function of the theta phase** (`max(0,sinőł)^p`) ‚Üí gamma fires in **bursts concentrated at each theta peak** = genuine phase-amplitude coupling. `coupling` scales both AM depth + burst depth; "deep" sharpens the gate. Sum ‚Üí master gain ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; click-free `setTargetAtTime` onset + full `close()` teardown; an `AnalyserNode` taps the master to draw a small on-screen **envelope meter you can literally watch the nested theta/gamma rhythm in**. **(2)** `field.ts` ‚ÄĒ `makeFieldRig`: a raw WebGL2 fullscreen fragment shader that imports the shared `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` form-constant warp (spiral + tunnel) as a *secondary* spatial layer which **reorganises each visual-theta cycle**, with a fine sparse **"gamma sparkle"** hash whose *amplitude* rides the theta-phase envelope √ó coupling ‚ÄĒ the coupling rendered visible. Palette: deep indigo ‚Üí electric violet ‚Üí cyan on near-black, filmic knee. **(3)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ `"use client"`: `text-2xl` title, one-line description, Start gate, full-screen drag surface (X‚Üícoupling, Y‚Üítheta 3‚Äď6.5 Hz) with live `font-mono` readouts, the envelope meter, a **deep-coupling opt-in** with an amber one-line warning, an always-on **Stop** (kills flicker same frame + tears down audio), `text-rose-300` no-WebGL2 / no-Web-Audio notices (degrades **both** ways ‚ÄĒ audio-fail keeps the field breathing, webgl-fail keeps the audio playing), idle ~4 s ‚Üí gentle auto-modulation (never blank/silent), Design-notes disclosure. **Palette:** cool / electric on near-black (breaks the warm-paper ban). **Pole: intense-hypnotic** ‚ÄĒ but SAFE (see below); ## Cycle 648 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE concept, *a piece of music with MEMORY that never loops*, attacked via 2 parallel **aesthetic** approaches (a cold Ikeda readout vs an immersive neural-field) to resolve the concept's known weakness ‚ÄĒ the ¬ß647-banked `slow-machine` read *cerebral/data-viz* rather than transporting. Ships `1135-deep-memory`; banks ‚≠ź `1134-slow-machine` (the cold-Ikeda sibling).

[/dream/1135-deep-memory](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1135-deep-memory) ‚ÄĒ **"Deep Memory": watch a mind dream. A piece of music that learns from every note it plays ‚ÄĒ its memory drifting, reinforcing, and re-firing ‚ÄĒ rendered as a slowly-breathing neural constellation you float inside and steer. Minute five is never minute one.** **Active seed+steer INPUT ‚Üí Canvas2D additive-glow neural-field OUTPUT.** Three files: **(1)** `engine.ts` ‚ÄĒ `SlowMachine`: a mulberry32-seeded **live Markov transition matrix** `M[i][j]` over 5‚Äď7 scale degrees (Dorian/Pentatonic/Phrygian). `step()` = tension-weighted sample of the next degree ‚Üí **Hebbian reinforcement** (bump the path taken = memory) ‚Üí **decay toward baseline + steered mutation** (forgetting + drift). Because reinforcement, forgetting, drift and live steering all feed back into the sampling distribution, the exact matrix state provably never recurs ‚ÄĒ a drifting attractor, not a loop. `snapshot()` exposes matrix + normalized Shannon entropy + running consonance + currentDegree + step + midi + `firedEdge`. **(2)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ `MemoryAudio`: a lush sine/triangle **pad bed** (register‚Üípitch, tension‚Üílowpass) + a soft **2-op FM bell** per note event + a feedback `DelayNode` tail for air ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; **25 ms look-ahead / ~120 ms schedule-ahead scheduler** (Chris Wilson) whose callback pulls the next note from the engine; gesture-gated; full `dispose()`. **(3)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ `"use client"`: seed stage (scale pick + tap-a-motif ‚Üí deterministic seed + Begin) and live stage ‚ÄĒ the hero is a **Canvas2D neural mind-space** (`globalCompositeOperation='lighter'` additive glow): degrees are luminous cells in an organically-jittered constellation (tonic tinted violet), reinforced transitions **ignite only once their weight climbs above the neutral baseline** so well-walked routes visibly brighten + thicken into permanent memory, the firing transition sends a smooth **light-pulse gliding along its thread**, and a **comet** eases toward the current note leaving a fading trail; the whole field **breathes + slowly rotates** (no strobe). Four steering dials (Density / Tension / Register / Mutation) + PERTURB + entropy/consonance meters + a design-notes panel; `text-rose-300` audio-fallback keeps a silent visual driver running. **Palette:** deep-ocean cool ‚ÄĒ indigo ‚Üí deep teal ‚Üí electric cyan on near-black `#03040c`, violet tonic (a jury-mandated cool palette; NOT warm-paper). **Pole: cosmic/cerebral made immersive** ‚ÄĒ "watch a mind dream," a long-form generative piece with **state + memory + evolution** (the categorical-menu's thin slot), explicitly NOT a perceptual illusion. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** ‚úď ‚ÄĒ every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; fresh-log grep `Failed to compile|Type error|1135-deep-memory` = **NONE** ‚Üí only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling on ~450 pages, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1135-deep-memory/page.js` **compiled ‚úď** (42 KB); scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1135-deep-memory` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1135-deep-memory/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT ear/eye-verified ‚ÄĒ no speakers/display in this headless box, so how the mind-field *reads* (additive-glow legibility of memory) and how the pad/bell *sounds* are code-verified/reasoned only; the field animates on load before Begin ‚ÄĒ the never-blank path.**) ¬∑ Cycle 648 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel aesthetic approaches to ONE "music with memory" concept: this **immersive neural-field** vs `1134-slow-machine` (the same Markov+Hebbian engine rendered as a cold Ryoji-Ikeda SVG memory-lattice + Canvas2D note-stream + sparklines; pure black/white/one-cyan) [banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß648]). **Won on:** (1) it best serves Karel's **PRIMARY psychedelic-immersion driver** ‚ÄĒ a transporting "watch a mind dream" field rather than a clinical data readout, which is the exact weakness that lost `slow-machine` the ¬ß647 tiebreaker (running DEEP to fix it was the point); (2) it keeps the memory **legible through the glow** ‚ÄĒ edges only ignite above baseline, so reinforcement is visibly permanent; (3) it lands the thin **long-form-generative-with-state/memory** categorical slot on a **jury-mandated deep-ocean-cool palette**. **Honest trade-off:** 1134 is the **most-literal cash of the jury's named Ikeda-monochrome palette** + the **cleanest "never loops" legibility** (explicit STEP counter + thickening lattice + sparklines) + the **lowest verification debt** (pure SVG/Canvas) ‚ÄĒ build-complete + builder-verified clean, banked ‚≠ź to IDEAS ¬ß648 (not committed); [/dream/1133-resonant-bowl](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1133-resonant-bowl) ‚ÄĒ **"Resonant Bowl": strike and rub a Tibetan singing bowl until the space around you rings into slow, breathing shells of light ‚ÄĒ a cosmic-ambient sound-bath you sink into.** **Active strike (tap) + rim-rub (drag) INPUT ‚Üí true-3D three.js standing-wave shells OUTPUT.** Three files: **(1)** `bowl-audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ additive **inharmonic overtone synthesis**: 7 sine partials at singing-bowl ratios `1, 2.76, 5.4, 8.93, 13.34, 18.64, 24.7` (√ó a ~196 Hz fundamental ‚ÄĒ they climb faster than the harmonic series; that inharmonicity is the metal), each with its own exponential decay (lows ring ~9 s, highs die ~2 s so the timbre evolves as it rings); the fundamental is split into two detuned oscillators so it slowly **beats** ‚ÄĒ the characteristic bowl wobble. Rim-rub swells a driven "sung" gain + opens a tone filter. A synthetic `ConvolverNode` impulse (decaying one-pole-filtered noise, ~4.5 s) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Idle > ~5.5 s ‚Üí soft self-strike (never silent). **(2)** `bowl-scene.ts` ‚ÄĒ true **three.js / WebGL**: a central lathe-form bowl + **7 nested icosphere point-shells**, shell _i_ driven by partial _i_'s amplitude; each point displaced along its radius by a **Chladni-like spherical-harmonic scalar** (rising nodal degree on inner shells) √ó a slow shimmer LFO; additive transparent blending + a central bloom sprite for cheap volumetric glow; camera drifts on its own slow multi-second orbit. Palette: near-black indigo space ‚Üí **electric teal ‚Üí soft violet** shells. **(3)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ `"use client"`: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line description, "Begin the sound-bath" gate, strike/rim-rub pointer handlers, `text-rose-300` WebGL-unavailable notice (audio still plays), Design-notes disclosure, full teardown (cancel rAF + `scene.dispose()` + `audio.dispose()`). NOT claiming novel-technique #1 ‚ÄĒ cymatics/Chladni has priors in the lab (`1095-plate-modes`, `165-cymatics`, `19-cymatics`); the fresh combination is the 3D nested spherical-harmonic point-shells + inharmonic-bowl synth + convolution space. **diversity:** `banned=[warm-paper/daylight palette (JURY 2026-07-03) ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT (JURY) ¬∑ perceptual-illusion-as-instrument concept (JURY) ¬∑ passive-fixate/listen INPUT (JURY)]` ¬∑ `picked=[active strike+rim-rub INPUT ¬∑ true-3D three.js OUTPUT ¬∑ inharmonic-overtone + spherical-harmonic-shells TECHNIQUE ¬∑ deep-indigo‚Üíelectric-teal/violet palette ¬∑ cosmic-ambient non-illusion pole]` ‚ÄĒ clears every jury ban on all four axes. **SAFETY:** no strobe / no flicker ‚ÄĒ shells breathe on multi-second envelopes; audio is band-limited + gesture-gated + limiter-terminated. **No API route** (fully client-side) ‚Üí no `guard` needed; three.js already a dependency, zero new npm deps. ## Cycle 646 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing every one of the 2026-07-03 jury's four bans (non-warm-paper palette √ó non-Canvas2D-primary output √ó active input √ó non-perceptual-illusion concept); ship the one that cashes the jury's #1 overdue mandate ‚ÄĒ **put Karel's REAL Welcome Home piano through the pipeline** (the entire 15-build window ignored it) ‚ÄĒ bank the other two. Ships `1130-spectral-scrub`.

[/dream/1130-spectral-scrub](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1130-spectral-scrub) ‚ÄĒ **"Spectral Scrub": you don't press play ‚ÄĒ you reach into Karel's real recorded piano and drag it through time. Drag left/right to scrub and time-stretch (slow it to a crawl, FREEZE it into a held shimmering chord, or run it backwards, pitch intact); drag up/down to sculpt the timbre. The whole screen is a live spectral field you paint in.** **Active drag-scrub + real-audio INPUT ‚Üí WebGL2 fragment-shader spectral-field OUTPUT.** Three files: **(1)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ `makeGranularEngine`: decodes the recording to an `AudioBuffer`, then a **look-ahead grain scheduler** fires ~110 ms Hann-windowed grains every ~28 ms from a moving read head `posSec`. Because each grain plays at its natural rate, the *speed the read head advances* ‚ÄĒ not grain pitch ‚ÄĒ controls time: **Play** 1√ó ¬∑ **Slow** ~0.28√ó (piano stretches, pitch unchanged) ¬∑ **Freeze** holds `posSec` (with ms-jitter to kill the metallic loop) ‚Üí a sustained shimmer ¬∑ **Reverse** walks it backward. This is the granular / overlap-add approximation of **phase-vocoder time-scale modification** (Flanagan & Golden 1966), time-domain for robustness + zero deps; a biquad low-pass on vertical drag wipes brightness in/out; plus an `<audio>`+`MediaElementSource` fallback engine for cross-origin tier-1 sources (scrub works via `currentTime`; freeze unavailable, UI says so). **(2)** `shader.ts` ‚ÄĒ a ring-buffer `R8` spectrogram texture (`bins √ó HISTORY`); each frame writes the newest `AnalyserNode` byte-spectrum into one row via `texSubImage2D`; the fragment shader samples it with `fract(uScroll - age)` for smooth time-scroll, warps coords with fbm value-noise, and blooms across bins ‚ÄĒ magnitude drives a **deep-ocean ‚Üí teal ‚Üí electric-cyan ‚Üí violet ‚Üí white-hot** ramp on near-black ("data as pigment," after **Refik Anadol**); + `hasWebGL2()` probe + a Canvas2D scrolling-spectrogram fallback. **(3)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ `"use client"`: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line description, **three audio tiers** (paste a Path recording id ‚Üí `GET /api/audio/:id` ‚Üí `{url}` ‚Üí `decodeAudioData` = Karel's real Welcome Home piano ¬∑ drop/choose your own audio file ¬∑ a short offline-rendered synth-piano demo so the field is never blank/silent, clearly labelled placeholder), Freeze/Slow/Play/Reverse transport, a precise waveform scrub strip, full-screen drag surface, `text-rose-300` no-WebGL2 / no-Web-Audio notices, full teardown (cancel rAF, stop grains, disconnect graph, remove fallback `<audio>`, close `AudioContext`, `loseContext()`). **Palette:** deep-ocean cool ‚Üí electric cyan/violet on near-black (deliberately NOT warm-paper ‚ÄĒ cashes the jury's palette mandate). **Pole: immersive / oceanic ‚ÄĒ not an illusion** (cashes the jury's "rest the perceptual-illusion move" + "answer a question that is not *what does your own cortex invent*"). `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** ‚úď (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**` + `1085`; fresh-log grep `Failed to compile|Type error` = **NONE**) ‚Üí only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1130-spectral-scrub/page.js` **compiled ‚úď** + client-reference-manifest emitted; scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1130-spectral-scrub` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1130-spectral-scrub/` = **exit 0**. The builder also ran a dev-server smoke test: route returns HTTP 200 with the real UI + no overlay. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified + route-200; NOT ear/eye-verified ‚ÄĒ no speakers/display in this headless box, so how the granular freeze *sounds* and how the shader field *reads* on a real panel are code-verified/reasoned only; the shader is visually alive on load with an idle synthetic spectrum before any gesture (browsers block autoplay audio), the never-blank path.**) ¬∑ Cycle 646 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this **real-piano spectral scrub** vs `1131-flock-organ` (GPGPU boids swarm you herd ‚Üí sonified order‚ÜĒchaos; electric neon; active pointer-drag) [banked IDEAS ¬ß646] vs `1132-slow-machine` (long-form generative Markov-memory that never loops ‚Üí cold Ikeda data-notation; active seed+steer) [banked IDEAS ¬ß646]). **Won on:** (1) it **cashes the jury's #1 overdue mandate** ‚ÄĒ the entire 15-build window synthesized every carrier and ignored Karel's real Welcome Home piano; 1130 puts his actual recording through the instrument (via `/api/audio/[id]` + file-drop), the biggest genuine surprise this cycle; (2) **most reliably demoable at 06:30** ‚ÄĒ file-drop works for anyone immediately and the synth demo is never blank; (3) breaks the **synthetic-source monoculture** the jury flagged, in one move. **Honest trade-off:** 1131 is the freshest OUTPUT (GPGPU float-texture flock, up to ~43k particles) + most visceral "conduct a living organism"; a shader-field, but of a REAL recording's live FFT ‚ÄĒ not a GPU cellular field-sim) ¬∑ **granular phase-vocoder time-scale-modification + spectral-freeze TECHNIQUE** ¬∑ deep-ocean-cool ‚Üí electric-cyan palette (breaks the warm-paper ban). **NAMED REFERENCES:** J. L. Flanagan & R. M. Golden, "Phase Vocoder," *Bell System Technical Journal* (1966) ‚ÄĒ time-scale modification by decoupling time from pitch; Refik Anadol ‚ÄĒ "data as pigment" spectral-field aesthetic. **Ambition (2/5, honest):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (three-tier real-audio loader + granular time-scale-modification engine + biquad sculpt + WebGL2 spectrogram-ring shader field + drag/scrub controller = 5) ¬∑ #3 named refs (Flanagan & Golden; Anadol). **diversity:** `banned=[warm-paper/daylight palette (JURY 2026-07-03) ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT (JURY) ¬∑ perceptual-illusion-as-instrument concept (JURY) ¬∑ passive-fixate/listen INPUT (JURY) ¬∑ GPU cellular-field-sim OUTPUT ¬∑ black-void-plus-glow palette ¬∑ tap-to-seed INPUT]` ¬∑ `picked=[active drag-scrub + real-audio INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 shader-field-of-real-FFT OUTPUT ¬∑ granular phase-vocoder TECHNIQUE ¬∑ deep-ocean‚Üíelectric-cyan palette ¬∑ immersive non-illusion pole]` ‚ÄĒ clears every jury ban on all four axes. **SAFETY:** no strobe / no flicker ‚ÄĒ the field flows with the audio's slow spectral drift; audio is band-limited + gesture-gated. **No API route created** (only a read-only GET to the existing `/api/audio/[id]`) ‚Üí no `guard` needed; no `getUserMedia`; zero new npm deps. ## Cycle 645 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE concept, *a solid your brain builds from flat moving dots, then flips*, attacked via 2 parallel technical approaches (a Johansson point-light **human figure** vs an abstract rotating **solid**); ship the stronger, bank the other. This resurrects + deepens ¬ß644's ‚≠ź TOP banked `1127-kinetic-depth` into the **true Johansson point-light dancer** the queued note named, and consumes today's fresh 2026 research (biological-motion + the noise-expectation finding). Ships `1129-kinetic-dancer`.

[/dream/1129-kinetic-dancer](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1129-kinetic-dancer) ‚ÄĒ **"Kinetic Dancer": fourteen flat, identical, un-shaded ivory dots ‚ÄĒ no shading, no perspective, no depth cue at all ‚ÄĒ yet your brain assembles a living person turning in place, and decides for itself which way she spins. Drag to tip the illusion; let go and watch her flip. The rotation is genuinely ambiguous ‚ÄĒ the Spinning Dancer, built from Johansson point-light joints.** **Drag-to-bias + audio-only-bias INPUT ‚Üí three.js orthographic point-cloud OUTPUT.** Four files: **(1)** `figure.ts` ‚ÄĒ `mulberry32` PRNG + a **14-joint point-light skeleton** (head/shoulders/elbows/hands/hips/knees/feet) in 3D local coords with a deterministic `applyPose(t, alive, out)` that breathes + sways the limbs over a slow turn; no `Math.random`/`Date.now`. **(2)** `scene.ts` ‚ÄĒ `KineticDancer`: three.js **`OrthographicCamera`** (throws away every perspective/size depth cue) + a single flat `THREE.Points` cloud (`PointsMaterial`, `sizeAttenuation:false`, equal-size round ivory discs from a generated circle sprite); nested tilt/spin groups so a signed `bias` adds a **real X-tilt** over the always-same Y-spin (the one cue that can break the tie); seeded autonomous drift so the bias wanders back across zero and she flips hands-off; an optional **decoy noise field**; `hasWebGL()` probe; full `dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`. **(3)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ `DancerAudio`: two **rivalrous stereo drones** ‚ÄĒ a *bright* voice panned RIGHT for clockwise vs a *dark/low* voice panned LEFT for counter-clockwise ‚ÄĒ crossfading over a centred just-intonation pad through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; slow 0.16 Hz shimmer LFO; gesture-gated resume, clean teardown. **(4)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ `"use client"`: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line description, **Begin** (44px, resumes `AudioContext`), drag-anywhere-to-bias on the canvas, a live **committed-reading + bias** readout, speed/bias/noise sliders + an **audio-only-bias** toggle (visual tilt off ‚ÄĒ only the stereo drone tips you, the queued deepening), collapsible design notes, a `text-rose-300` no-WebGL notice with a **static SVG point-light silhouette** fallback, `prefers-reduced-motion` handling, full teardown on unmount. **Deepening from today's research:** the noise slider buries the walker among randomly-moving decoy dots ‚ÄĒ at high noise she only "pops out" once your brain locks on, embodying the 2026 finding that **expectation drives detection of biological motion in noise** (PMC 2026). **Palette:** ivory dots on **deep slate-blue** (`#111a26`) ‚ÄĒ gallery-clean, deliberately NOT the lab's black-void-plus-glow. **Pole: uncanny / contemplative** ‚ÄĒ a figure that shouldn't be there but is. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** ‚úď (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; fresh-log grep `1129-kinetic-dancer|Type error|Failed to compile` = **NONE**) ‚Üí only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1129-kinetic-dancer/page.js` **compiled ‚úď** (38 KB) + client-reference-manifest emitted; scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1129-kinetic-dancer` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1129-kinetic-dancer/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT eye-verified ‚ÄĒ no display in this headless box, so whether the 14 dots convincingly *read as a body* and how strongly the bistable flip lands (the joint coords + 0.34-rad tilt are hand-tuned guesses a real eye should validate) are code-verified/reasoned only. The figure animates on load with no audio/hardware ‚ÄĒ the never-blank path; the illusion strength is per-viewer regardless.**) ¬∑ Cycle 645 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel approaches to ONE kinetic-depth concept: this **Johansson point-light figure** vs `1130-kinetic-solid` (abstract rotating solid ‚ÄĒ a Fibonacci-sphere / hourglass volume-of-revolution / double-helix point cloud, same orthographic SFM bistable flip, a richer form menu) [banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß645]). **Won on:** (1) it IS the explicitly-queued deepening ‚ÄĒ ¬ß644 named "deepen: **true Johansson point-light dancer**; audio-only bias" as the resurrect direction; (2) **bigger surprise** ‚ÄĒ a *person* assembled from 14 dots that spontaneously flips is the iconic, visceral "huh" (the Kayahara Spinning Dancer), vs the more cerebral abstract solid; (3) **cleanest today's-research chain** ‚ÄĒ it directly implements today's fresh 2026 noise-expectation finding as the noise slider. **Honest trade-off:** 1130 is the more *reliably* legible headless-unverified (an abstract solid doesn't depend on 14 dots reading as a body) and carries a richer 3-form menu ‚Üí banked ‚≠ź resurrect-next; Wallach & O'Connell, "The kinetic depth effect" (1953); Shimon Ullman, *The Interpretation of Visual Motion* (1979); Nobuyuki Kayahara, *Spinning Dancer* (2003); "I see moving people: Expectations drive detection of biological motion in noisy point-light displays" (PMC 2026) + bioRxiv 2026.01.05.697634 (controllable point-light displays) ‚ÄĒ RESEARCH ¬ß645. **Honest framing:** no clinical claim ‚ÄĒ the bistable flip and biological-motion pop-out are normal products of depth-ambiguous motion + expectation, and are per-viewer. **Ambition (3/5):** #1 never-used technique (biological-motion point-light + kinetic-depth structure-from-motion as an instrument; ## Cycle 643 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ ONE concept, *the word rewritten in you* (Warren's Verbal Transformation Effect), attacked via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, graft the other. DEEP and JURY **agree** here: the alternation put DEEP due, and the jury's core ask is "break the ossified output ‚ÄĒ audio-first is the genuinely under-served one" ‚Üí this fire attacks that under-served OUTPUT. The cycle-641 grep-lesson was applied **pre-spawn** to BOTH today's research finding (NCA/particle-automata ‚ÄĒ real + recent but a *banned* GPU-field family ‚Üí rejected) AND three build instincts (form-constants=6√ó crowded / tilt=~10√ó not-fresh / modal=used ‚Üí all rejected), leaving the one clean fresh lane (audio-first VTE). Ships `1125-verbal-oracle`.)

[/dream/1125-verbal-oracle](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1125-verbal-oracle) ‚ÄĒ **"The Verbal Oracle": loop one identical spoken word until your own brain rewrites it ‚ÄĒ put on headphones, press Begin, and a single synthesized word ("rest"/"life"/"say"/"flow") repeats byte-for-byte identical ~1.2‚Äď3√ó/s; after ~15‚Äď40 s most listeners begin to hear it morph into other words that were never spoken. A purely AUDITORY percept manufactured inside you.** **Zero-input passive headphone-listen INPUT ‚Üí audio-first OUTPUT (a sparse Canvas2D companion, not the artwork).** Three files: **(1)** `voice.ts` ‚ÄĒ `renderWord` builds the word **offline**: a sawtooth glottal buzz at f0‚Čą110‚Äď125 Hz through **three parallel band-pass "formant" filters** (F1/F2/F3) automated along a short **vowel script** (canonical Peterson & Barney 1952 values; diphthongs as glides) + band-passed **noise bursts** for fricatives, then **peak-normalized** and **cosine-faded to exact silence at both edges** so the loop seam is click-free; plus `VerbalOracleEngine`, a 25 ms **look-ahead scheduler** staying ~0.2 s ahead of `ctx.currentTime` that fires a *fresh* `AudioBufferSourceNode` playing the **same** buffer at `nextTime += period` (1.2‚Äď3 Hz) ‚Üí master gain ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` soft-limiter ‚Üí destination. **Every repetition is sample-identical ‚ÄĒ that invariance IS the illusion** (VTE's strict precondition; a seam click weakens or kills it). No `Math.random`/`Date.now` (a `mulberry32(seed)` PRNG only). **(2)** `words.ts` ‚ÄĒ four one-syllable recipes: **rest** (Warren's canonical stimulus), **life**, **say**, **flow**, each with formant scripts, consonant specs, and a curated `alternates` list of the illusory words listeners commonly report (used only as gentle placard hints). **(3)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ a paper-white (ink-on-cream) client component: gesture-gated **Begin** (resumes `AudioContext`) / Stop, the 4-word picker, a 1.2‚Äď3 Hz rate slider, a **perception log** (drop a timestamped mark the moment your percept slips, read against the shaded ~15‚Äď40 s onset band on an SVG timeline), a deterministic **seeded ghost-listener** dropping illustrative marks so a cold glance reads populated, and a **restrained Canvas2D companion** (the word breathing + a loop-pulse ring flashing each repetition + a thin waveform of the actual buffer with a playhead) ‚ÄĒ the restraint is the point; a busy canvas would pull attention out of the very listening the piece depends on. Full teardown on unmount; `text-rose-600` no-Web-Audio notice. **Palette:** warm cream/ink (paper-white ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT a dark theme). `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** ‚úď (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; fresh-log grep `1125|verbal-oracle|Type error|Failed to compile` = **NONE**) ‚Üí only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1125-verbal-oracle/page.js` **compiled ‚úď** (32 KB); scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1125-verbal-oracle` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1125-verbal-oracle/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT ear-verified ‚ÄĒ no headphones/speakers in this headless box, so formant *intelligibility* of each word and whether the transformation actually *lands* (+ felt onset timing) are code-verified/reasoned only. But the loop is *provably* identical (one buffer, sample-accurate scheduling) and click-faded (offline render + peak-normalize + cosine edges) ‚ÄĒ the VTE precondition is structurally guaranteed even though the percept is per-listener; the seeded ghost + the ready-before-Begin word are the never-blank/silent path. Wants Karel's headphones: press Begin, hold attention on "rest" for ~20‚Äď40 s ‚ÄĒ does it slip into stress / dress / a name / nonsense?**) ¬∑ Cycle 643 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel approaches to ONE VTE concept: this **synth-word oracle** vs `1126-own-word` (**loop your OWN recorded voice** ‚ÄĒ same VTE, mic-captured, undegraded, click-free; with a synth fallback + honest Lucier distinction) [banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß643]). **Won on:** (1) **purest fill of the jury's named under-served lane** ‚ÄĒ audio-first / headphones / eyes-closed is best expressed as a *zero-input passive listen* where the illusion is entirely internal (1126 adds a record step); (2) **most reliably demoable at 06:30 without hardware** ‚ÄĒ Begin plays the canonical Warren stimulus immediately (synth, no mic), where 1126's real payload needs a mic and its fallback is muddier; (3) **input diversity** ‚ÄĒ passive headphone-listen is 0√ó and rarer than another mic-capture piece. **Honest trade-off:** 1126 is the bigger, more visceral concept ("your OWN word dissolving in your own ears") + more embodied + technically richer (capture‚Üítrim‚Üínormalize‚Üífade pipeline) ‚Üí banked ‚≠ź resurrect-next; its own-voice pipeline + Lucier distinction fold into 1125's cycle-2 deepening. **For**: adult / **eerie-liminal** pole (breaks a 5-deep cosmic-ambient-warm camp) / `state: verbal transformation ‚ÄĒ the acoustic form re-parsed in you` ¬∑ **passive headphone-listen INPUT** (0√ó; not tap-to-seed) ¬∑ **audio-first OUTPUT** (the jury's most under-served; the Canvas2D companion is sparse & secondary, so it does NOT feed the Canvas2D-primary monoculture) ¬∑ **byte-identical looped-word + 3-formant source‚Äďfilter synth + seamless look-ahead scheduler TECHNIQUE** (not a field-sim, not a form-constant) ¬∑ paper-white ink-on-cream VIBE. **NAMED REFERENCES:** R.M. Warren, the **Verbal Transformation Effect** (1958; Warren & Gwynn 1961); Peterson & Barney, vowel formants (1952). **Honest framing:** no clinical claim ‚ÄĒ VTE is a normal product of prolonged identical repetition and is per-listener; the piece supplies the invariant stimulus, it does not guarantee a fixed percept. **Ambition (3/5):** #1 never-used technique (VTE-as-instrument; grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ distinct from Deutsch dichotic 1109 and semantic-satiation banked 1122) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (formant synth + seamless scheduler + 4 word recipes + perception log + companion = 5) ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 soft (path (c) ‚ÄĒ consumes the banked ¬ß642 entry from RESEARCH ¬ß642's dive). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT (~5‚Äď6√ó last-10 monoculture) ¬∑ tap-to-seed INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2/WebGPU field-sim ¬∑ Physarum/graph ¬∑ dissolve-the-void ¬∑ black-void-plus-glow palette ¬∑ intense-hypnotic pole (JURY 2026-07-02) ¬∑ NCA/particle-automata (today's dive = the banned GPU-field family) ¬∑ crowded threads form-constants(6√ó)/percept-in-you-VISUAL/ketamine-void(4√ó)]` ¬∑ `picked=[passive headphone-listen INPUT ¬∑ audio-first OUTPUT ¬∑ looped-word+formant+scheduler TECHNIQUE ¬∑ paper-white palette ¬∑ eerie-liminal pole]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban on all four axes. **SAFETY:** **no strobe / no flicker** ‚ÄĒ audio through a soft-cut limiter; visual is a slow-breathing companion; `text-rose-600` graceful notice with no Web Audio. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). Design notes (`src/app/dream/1125-verbal-oracle/README.md`)

## Cycle 642 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ 3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT √ó **NON-Canvas2D** OUTPUT √ó technique √ó palette; ship the research-anchored one, bank the rest. This fire caught a **diversity FLIP**: the last five ships all dodged the old GPU-shader monoculture by going Canvas2D, so Canvas2D was now itself over-represented ~5√ó in the last-10 ‚Üí banned, and all three explorers were built non-Canvas2D (three.js-volumetric / audio-first / raw-WebGL2). The cycle-641 grep lesson was applied **pre-spawn** ‚ÄĒ grepped `1043-dreamachine`/`1041-nde-tunnel`/`1038-form-constant` out of the brief set before spawning. Ships `1124-noise-veil`.

[/dream/1124-noise-veil](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1124-noise-veil) ‚ÄĒ **"Noise Veil": a drug-free Ganzfeld chamber the SOUND composes ‚ÄĒ rest your gaze in a soft uniform field and morph a spatialized noise bath white‚ÜĒpink‚ÜĒbrown; toward brown the bath deepens to a sub-heavy "water" rumble and the fog drifts to a slow deep-teal oceanic current, steering what imagery your own brain manufactures.** **Passive-gaze + noise-spectrum-morph INPUT ‚Üí three.js volumetric fog + spatialized Web Audio OUTPUT.** Five files: **(1)** `noise.ts` ‚ÄĒ a `mulberry32(seed)` PRNG builds three base buffers **once** (white; pink via Paul Kellet's economy filter; brown via a leaky integrator) + an **equal-power crossfade** that morphs the 1/f slope continuously (`0`=white flat / `0.5`=pink ‚ąí3 dB-oct / `1`=brown ‚ąí6 dB-oct, sub-heavy). No `Math.random` on any per-frame path. **(2)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ the mixed noise is decorrelated by short per-voice delays and spread across **five HRTF `PannerNode`s** that slowly orbit the listener ‚Üí soft-cut master; the noise **is** the instrument (no oscillators, no tonal drone). **(3)** `field.ts` ‚ÄĒ a bank of glacial seeded LFOs (0.02‚Äď0.09 Hz) produces the study's "**wave after wave**" swells as a **pure function of time + controls**, read by BOTH audio and visuals, so the image animates instantly on load (before any audio) and stays locked to the sound once it starts. **(4)** `scene.ts` ‚ÄĒ **three.js volumetric** fog: ~260 large very-soft billboard puffs scattered through a 3D box the camera sits *inside* (real parallax + `FogExp2` depth wash ‚ÄĒ **not** a flat 2D fragment field), heavy overlap ‚Üí a near-uniform luminous Ganzfeld; the slope drives palette + current (white‚Üíbright even / pink‚Üíwarm amber / brown‚Üí**deep teal slow oceanic drift**); mean luminance stays gentle and high (never a dark void); WebGL probe + CSS-gradient fallback. **(5)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ the client component: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line description, a gesture-gated **Begin** (resumes `AudioContext`), spectrum + intensity sliders + ‚Üź‚Üí/‚ÜĎ‚Üď keys, a live swell/slope readout, `text-rose-300` WebGL/audio degradation notices, a design-notes panel, full rAF/audio/three.js teardown on unmount. **No flicker at all** ‚ÄĒ only slow luminance/hue drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows everything further. **Palette:** warm‚Üíoceanic, shifts with the noise color. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** ‚úď (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; fresh-log grep `1124|noise-veil|Type error|Failed to compile` = **NONE**) ‚Üí only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1124-noise-veil/page.js` **compiled ‚úď** (35 KB) + client-reference-manifest emitted; scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1124-noise-veil` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1124-noise-veil/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT ear/eye-verified ‚ÄĒ no headphones/speakers or a real display in this headless box, so the audible white‚ÜĒbrown spectral morph, the HRTF spatialization, whether the fog reads as a *uniform* field (vs visible puffs) on a real panel, and whether imagery actually arises are code-verified/reasoned only; the seeded macro-swell + on-load fog animation is the fully-exercisable never-blank path. Wants Karel's headphones + a dim room: does moving the slope toward brown deepen the bath toward "water" and drift the fog oceanic ‚ÄĒ and, after a minute or two of resting gaze, does any imagery come?**) ¬∑ Cycle 642 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 parallel explorers: this **audio-led Ganzfeld** vs `1125-verbal-oracle` (**loop one identical word until your brain rewrites it** ‚ÄĒ the Verbal Transformation Effect; formant-synth word looped click-free; audio-first; paper-white; eerie-liminal) [banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß642] vs `1126-pulse-cave` (**your heartbeat is the metronome** ‚ÄĒ camera photoplethysmography reads your fingertip pulse ‚Üí a warm WebGL2 womb/cave breathes on the beat; camera-PPG INPUT; raw-WebGL2; ember) [banked IDEAS ¬ß642]). **Won on:** (1) **research-first chain** ‚ÄĒ the only candidate grounded in *today's* dive (the 2025 *i-Perception* Ganzfeld/brown-noise study), so the mandate's `today's-research ‚Üí today's-build` chain is clean; (2) **diversity** ‚ÄĒ three.js volumetric spatial fog is the freshest output vs the recent run and love-adjacent to the loved spatial/field seam; (3) **purest mandate embodiment** ‚ÄĒ "a drug-free hallucination the *sound* composes," a real named mechanism (spectrum steers imagery content) not a metaphor. **Honest trade-offs:** 1125 is the boldest OUTPUT break (audio-first, the jury's under-served output) + grep-fresh VTE on a fresh eerie-liminal pole ‚Üí banked ‚≠ź resurrect-next; not a flat fragment field; not a GPU field-sim) ¬∑ **spectrally-shaped 1/f noise ‚Üí HRTF panner field ‚Üí macro-swell ‚Üí volumetric fog TECHNIQUE** ¬∑ warm‚Üíoceanic VIBE. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Pistolas, Smets & Wagemans, "Wave after wave‚Ä¶," *i-Perception* 2025 (brown noise ‚Üí water-themed multisensory hallucination) ‚ÄĒ RESEARCH ¬ß642; ## Cycle 641 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ a DEEP fire on *the percept-made-in-you* (a Deutsch dichotic-illusion trio) was **scrapped mid-fire**: curation grepped and found `1109-inner-ear` already ships the whole Deutsch suite, so all three clean builders were `rm -rf`'d and none committed (the ambition-floor grep-rule caught a redundant concept ‚ÄĒ logged as a planning-gate lesson in STATE ¬ß641). **Pivoted to the explicitly-queued ‚≠ź TOP resurrect** and shipped `1123-conductor-veil`.

[/dream/1123-conductor-veil](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1123-conductor-veil) ‚ÄĒ **"Conductor Veil": conduct an unseen ensemble with a baton ‚ÄĒ move your hand and a warm just-intonation string-and-pad ensemble answers your tempo, register, and dynamics, aurora ribbons streaming from the baton.** **Conduct-gesture (pointer/touch baton) INPUT ‚Üí Canvas2D aurora-ribbon OUTPUT.** Four files: **(1)** `conductor.ts` ‚ÄĒ tracks baton position/velocity/curvature every frame from pointer/touch; detects the **downbeat as a vertical-velocity reversal** (the bottom of a downward stroke) ‚Üí **EMA-smoothed BPM** (clamped ~40‚Äď160, implausible intervals rejected); baton **height** ‚Üí register shift (up to ~+1.2 oct) + lowpass brightness; recent **speed/energy** ‚Üí level + vibrato/tremolo depth; a deterministic **`mulberry32` ghost conductor** (fixed seed `0x1120c04f`) traces a gentle down-up beat **through the same detector**, so it sounds AND animates on a cold glance and real pointer input takes over the instant you move (never-blank/never-silent). No `Math.random` in per-frame paths. **(2)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ 4 lightly-detuned saw+triangle "sections" over a sustaining pad drone (root + sub), a slowly-cycling I‚ÄďIV‚Äďvi‚ÄďV of **just-intonation chords** drawn from ONE just major scale `{1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2}` over ~A2 (**no wrong notes**), each downbeat advancing/re-voicing the sections; an **OfflineAudioContext-synthesized hall `ConvolverNode`** (decaying filtered noise IR ‚ÄĒ no file fetch) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí master (~0.13 peak); register glide + brightness lowpass + energy-driven vibrato/tremolo. **(3)** `render.ts` ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D **aurora ribbons** streaming from the baton, billowing wider/brighter with dynamics (peach/rose/gold/violet/amber over a **deep-plum‚Üíwarm-ember** vertical gradient ‚ÄĒ a warm sunset, NOT a black void), a luminous fading baton trail + one soft **~1 s slowly-decaying radial bloom per downbeat** (no strobe); own seeded PRNG; `prefers-reduced-motion` calms motion. **(4)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ the client component: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line instruction, a "Take the baton" gesture-gated Start (resumes `AudioContext`), a live **BPM / register / dynamics / source (‚óŹ you conducting ¬∑ ‚óŹ ghost conductor)** readout, a `text-rose-300` no-audio notice that keeps the visual, pointer+resize+rAF cleanup on unmount, a design-notes panel. **Palette:** warm plum‚Üíember sunset. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **`‚ö† Compiled with warnings in 46s`** (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; grep `1123|conductor-veil|Type error|Failed to compile` = **NONE**) ‚Üí **`Linting and checking validity of types`** ‚úď ‚Üí only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1123-conductor-veil/page.js` **compiled ‚úď** (35 KB); scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1123` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1123-conductor-veil/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT pointer/ear-verified ‚ÄĒ no pointer device or speakers in this headless box, so the downbeat heuristic (assumes roughly vertical strokes; erratic scribbling reads arrhythmic), tempo tracking, register glide, and the ensemble/reverb balance are code-verified/reasoned only; the seeded ghost conductor is the fully-exercisable never-blank/silent path. Wants Karel's pointer/touch + speakers: does an up-down stroke set a tempo the ensemble locks to, and does height lift the register?**) ¬∑ Cycle 641 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ the resurrect of ¬ß640's ‚≠ź TOP-banked `1120-conductor-veil`, rebuilt faithfully after the planned Deutsch-dichotic trio was scrapped as redundant with `1109-inner-ear`). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient (warm)** pole / `state: flow / embodied conducting-trance` ¬∑ **conduct-gesture pointer-baton INPUT** (downbeat-from-vertical-velocity-reversal ‚Üí EMA-tempo; non-camera, non-tap) ¬∑ **Canvas2D aurora-ribbon OUTPUT** (not GPU-shader/field-sim) ¬∑ **downbeat-from-gesture‚ÜíJI-ensemble TECHNIQUE** ¬∑ warm plum‚Üíember sunset VIBE. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Max Mathews, *Radio Baton* / *Conductor Program*; *Personal Orchestra* / *You're the Conductor* (Ars Electronica interactive-conducting installations); **arXiv:2604.27957 (2026) "Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures"** (phase-within-a-bar from gesture) ‚ÄĒ RESEARCH ¬ß640. **Honest framing:** the flow/immersion is what the *piece* creates ‚ÄĒ no health claim. **Ambition (3/5):** #1 never-used technique (continuous conduct-gesture ‚Üí downbeat‚ÜíEMA-tempo + register/dynamics; grep-fresh ‚ÄĒ prior "conduct" pieces are body-tracking dance-avatars, not a baton) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (baton tracker + downbeat/tempo estimator + JI ensemble synth + convolver hall + aurora-ribbon renderer = 5) ¬∑ #3 named refs (Radio Baton / Personal Orchestra / arXiv:2604.27957) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß640. **diversity:** `banned=[tap-to-seed INPUT ¬∑ GPU-shader OUTPUT (~5√ó last-10) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2/WebGPU field-sim ¬∑ Physarum/graph-sonification ¬∑ dissolve-the-void ¬∑ black-void-plus-glow palette ¬∑ intense-hypnotic pole (JURY 2026-07-02); ## Cycle 640 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT √ó OUTPUT √ó technique √ó palette; ship the most jury-aligned, bank the rest) ‚ÄĒ ships `1121-pulse-lock`, a **two-person instrument for one device**: hold a phone between two people, the left half is you and the right half is them, and each of you taps your own **pulse** ‚ÄĒ an embodied metronome. The two pulses are modeled as **coupled Kuramoto phase oscillators** (`dőłŠĶĘ/dt = ŌČŠĶĘ + K¬∑sin(őł‚Īľ‚ąíőłŠĶĘ)`), so as your tempos get close the coupling *pulls them into phase-lock* ‚ÄĒ and you hear it: two just-intoned lobes beat apart when you drift and, at lock, fuse into one bloom while a third "union" voice swells and its detune collapses from beating to a fused unison. Curated over `1120-conductor-veil` (‚≠ź, conduct-gesture ‚Üí aurora-ribbon ensemble) and `1122-mantra-melt` (typed word ‚Üí semantic-satiation melt) on **jury-alignment**: 1121 hits three standing provocations at once ‚ÄĒ the "two people" fresh input verb (0√ó in the lab as a real two-body mechanic), "extend a 4‚Äď5 standout" (it deepens the lab's only 5/5, `1082`'s solo Kuramoto "feel it lock," into a genuine two-body coupling), and the still-COLD multi-user lane (two-person-one-device is the buildable, in-container-demoable cousin of WebRTC, with a seeded ghost-partner never-blank path). A *real* named mechanism (order parameter `r=|cos(őĒ/2)|`), not a metaphor ‚ÄĒ grounded in today's interpersonal-synchrony research (RESEARCH ¬ß640); no neural/biometric/health claim (it couples two tapped tempos, not heartbeats). Dodges every 2026-07-02 standing ban on all four axes: two-touch INPUT (not tap-to-seed), Canvas2D two-lobe mandala OUTPUT (not GPU-shader, not a field-sim), Kuramoto-coupling TECHNIQUE (not Physarum/graph), warm rose/amber co-regulation PALETTE/pole (not black-void, not intense-hypnotic). `demoable` (build-checked + scoped tsc/eslint clean; NOT touch/ear-verified ‚ÄĒ no multi-touch/speakers in container; the deterministic mulberry32 ghost partner is the exercised never-blank path). Named refs: Kuramoto (1984); Strogatz *Sync*; interpersonal-entrainment (Sebanz/Bekkering/Knoblich; Richardson). 2 more explored (`1120-conductor-veil` ‚≠ź conduct-gesture ensemble ‚ÄĒ implements today's 2026 virtual-orchestra-conducting anchor; `1122-mantra-melt` semantic-satiation typed-mantra) ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß640.)

## Cycle 639 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *play a living garden with your breath alone, via a genuine breath-vs-voice discriminator* ‚ÄĒ built via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) ‚ÄĒ ships `1119-breath-bloom`, a **long-form breath-grown garden**: each slow **exhale** unfurls one more segment of a procedurally-growing vector plant *and* rings one more note of an inharmonic just-intonation chime, so a calm multi-minute session builds a whole blooming form and a whole accumulating chord out of nothing but your breathing ‚ÄĒ and because state accumulates and the register/palette drift, the garden and the chord are genuinely *different* at minute 5 than at minute 1 (long-form, memory, evolution ‚ÄĒ not a loop). The instrument answers **breath, not voice**: a **spectral-flatness discriminator** (geometric/arithmetic-mean of the power spectrum over ~200 Hz‚Äď8 kHz) passes a broadband exhale but heavily attenuates a hum/whistle/sung note at equal loudness. [/dream/1119-breath-bloom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1119-breath-bloom) ‚ÄĒ **"Breath Bloom": your breath grows a garden ‚ÄĒ each exhale unfurls a plant segment and rings a chime, accumulating a whole blooming form + a whole chord over a calm session.** **Breath INPUT ‚Üí Canvas2D procedural-botany OUTPUT.** Five files: **(1)** `breath.ts` ‚ÄĒ the spectral-flatness breath-vs-voice discriminator (geo/arith-mean power over ~200 Hz‚Äď8 kHz from an `AnalyserNode`, `fftSize 2048`; energy‚ÜídB‚Üínorm; `drive = energyNorm ¬∑ smoothstep(FLATNESS_FLOOR_LOW, FLATNESS_FLOOR_HIGH, flatness)`, EMA-smoothed) + a rising/falling-edge **exhale-event** detector (one completed exhale = one growth event) + `mulberry32` PRNG + a deterministic seeded **breeze** (raised-cosine pseudo-exhales) that feeds the *same* edge detector so growth fires through one code path with or without a mic. **(2)** `growth.ts` ‚ÄĒ the garden as persistent **state**: branches as chains of *relative* turns (so the whole plant bends coherently under sway) + blooms; each exhale extends the youngest branch (length ‚ąĚ exhale strength, gravitropic bias), seeded forks, a flower every few segments, and every 12 breaths bumps a **register** (transposes the octave, rotates the flower palette) ‚ÄĒ the long-form evolution. **(3)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ `BellEngine`: each growth event rings one **additive inharmonic bell** (partials 1/2.01/2.99/4.21/5.43, 6 ms attack, long exponential decays ‚ÄĒ a fŇęrin timbre) climbing an ascending **just-intonation pentatonic** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3) so overlapping decays accumulate into an evolving chord; soft breath-modulated drone + filtered-noise wind bed; all ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination. **The mic is analysis-only ‚ÄĒ never routed to the audio graph.** **(4)** `render.ts` ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D warm-dawn botanical: cream/sky gradient, breathing low sun wash, tapering bezier stems, almond leaves, soft glowing petal blooms; sway added at draw-time via the relative-angle walk (tip moves most); reduced-motion aware. **(5)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ the client component: serif `text-2xl` title, Start (mic + AudioContext-resume gesture) / Simulate breath / Stop / Reset garden, a live drive / flatness / breaths / segments / source (‚óŹ mic listening ¬∑ ‚óŹ simulated breeze) readout in dark pills over the bright canvas, `text-rose-300` mic error with auto-fallback to the breeze, a design-notes panel. **Never blank/silent:** with no mic the seeded breeze grows the garden on its own (the fully-exercisable path); ## Cycle 637 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *sing ‚Üí a temple of sympathetic resonance sings back the harmonics your voice awakens* ‚ÄĒ built via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) ‚ÄĒ ships `1114-tanpura-throat`, a **voice-driven physical-modeling drone**: sing a sustained tone and a bank of **12 Karplus-Strong sympathetic strings**, tuned to a just-intonation drone over ~110 Hz, **physically re-pluck themselves** in answer to the partials your voice emphasizes ‚ÄĒ over a self-plucking tanpura drone bed ‚ÄĒ while a warm Canvas2D "string mandala" shows each string bulging into a decaying standing wave as it's struck. [/dream/1114-tanpura-throat](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1114-tanpura-throat) ‚ÄĒ **"Tanpura Throat": sing into it and a bank of just-intonation sympathetic strings physically rings back ‚ÄĒ a drone that answers the harmonics of your voice.** **Voice INPUT ‚Üí physical-modeling synthesis**, analysis-only (the mic is measured, never played back or recorded, nothing leaves the device). Four files: **(1)** `pitch.ts` ‚ÄĒ time-domain **autocorrelation** pitch detection with parabolic interpolation + RMS/clarity gating, an FFT band-energy readout per partial, and a **mulberry32** seeded PRNG (no `Math.random` in the per-frame paths). **(2)** `strings.ts` ‚ÄĒ a **Karplus-Strong** waveguide string factory (`DelayNode` + feedback `GainNode` + an in-loop one-pole lowpass with a jvari-ish brightness, excited by a seeded noise burst) plus the just-intonation ratio set over the ~110 Hz drone root. **(3)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ master ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination; a **shared `AnalyserNode` fed by BOTH the mic AND the seeded vowel "cantor"**, the 12-string sympathetic bank, a 55 Hz sub-pad, and a **self-plucking tanpura drone bed** re-plucking a root/fifth/octave on a slow cycle. **(4)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ the per-frame analyse‚Üípluck‚Üírender loop: a voice partial's rising energy (`e>0.4 && rising>0.1`, 150 ms refractory) **re-plucks the matching string**; the detected fundamental directly rings its nearest JI string; the Canvas2D mandala draws each string as a ring bulging into a **decaying standing wave** (nodes = 2+i, higher strings tighter), warm **brass‚Üígold‚Üíindigo on umber-plum**, a breathing drone-root core, an orbiting pitch marker, `prefers-reduced-motion` freezing all motion. **Never blank/silent:** the seeded cantor drives the same analyser so with **no mic and no interaction** the strings still answer hands-free (badge ‚óŹ listening / ‚óŹ auto (sing to join)); on mic-deny it degrades to a readable rose notice, never a thrown error; audio + motion start within ~1s of the Start click. **Palette:** warm brass/amber/gold-on-plum ritual ‚ÄĒ non-black-void. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled`** ‚Üí **`Linting and checking validity of types`** ‚úď (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`/`src/components/**`; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1114-tanpura-throat/page.js` **compiled ‚úď** (36 KB) + client-reference-manifest emitted; scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1114-tanpura` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1114-tanpura-throat/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT ear-verified ‚ÄĒ no mic/speakers in this headless box, so the KS string tuning (the delay-line pitch sits slightly flat, per the builder's honest README note), loudness balance, real-voice robustness (octave-slip on breathy input), and whether the mandala visibly rings are code-verified/reasoned only; `prefers-reduced-motion` damps flicker + pulse. **(4)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ one-gesture Start (tap-anywhere too), render/audio RAF loop, LIVE/simulated HUD (Kp + wind), audio-failure notice (globe still runs), design-notes panel. **(5)** `readme.ts` ‚ÄĒ in-page notes. **Palette:** the deliberate warm break ‚ÄĒ a whole glowing world (the "Overview Effect" made small), amber-on-indigo, not a dark nebula. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled with warnings** ‚úď (112s; ## Cycle 635 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *the music that exists only in your head*, Diana Deutsch's dichotic illusions ‚ÄĒ built via 2 parallel approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) ‚ÄĒ ships `1109-inner-ear`, a **cabinet of auditory illusions**: put on headphones and each exhibit plays an objectively simple signal (two tones, a scale, a burst of noise) while what you *hear* is manufactured inside your own auditory system. This is the jury's (2026-07-02) explicitly-named **#1 remaining move** ‚ÄĒ *"cash the banked dichotic piece, an audio-first / headphones / zero-GPU ship that breaks the output and palette monotony at once"* ‚ÄĒ shipped as a fuller **five-exhibit suite** that goes past the banked spec: the three Deutsch dichotic illusions (**octave** 400/800 Hz swapping ears, **scale** ascending+descending split note-by-note, **tritone paradox** listener-dependent so it refuses to label direction) PLUS the **Zwicker tone** (a phantom pitch you hear in *silence* after notched pink noise ‚ÄĒ implementing THIS cycle's fresh RESEARCH ¬ß635 dive, the 2025 *Imaging Neuroscience* phantom-perception study) PLUS a **personal tritone calibration** (judge 12 pairs ‚Üí your own pitch-class circle fills in, turning the paradox into a measurement of *you*). Audio-first, **warm paper-white gallery placard** (no black background, no GPU field), strict per-ear `ChannelMerger(2)` routing. Dodges every 2026-07-02 standing ban (tap-to-seed ¬∑ raw-WebGL2/WebGPU field-sim ¬∑ Physarum/graph-sonification ¬∑ dissolve-the-void ¬∑ black-void-plus-glow ¬∑ intense-hypnotic pole) ‚ÄĒ it is the anti-monoculture ship on all four axes at once. 1 more explored (`1108-two-ears`, the tight single-screen 3-illusion variant) ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß635.)

[/dream/1109-inner-ear](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1109-inner-ear) ‚ÄĒ **"Inner Ear": a small museum of the sounds your brain invents ‚ÄĒ Deutsch's dichotic illusions, the Zwicker phantom-in-silence, and a calibration that measures your own tritone template.** **Audio-first** (headphones required), the sound is the exhibit and the paper-white diagram is the placard. Four files: **(1)** `audio.ts` ‚ÄĒ `InnerEarEngine`: one **`ChannelMerger(2)`** (leftBus‚Üíinput 0, rightBus‚Üíinput 1) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí master ‚Üí destination; dichotic tones (octave/scale) route to exactly one ear bus, diotic tones (tritone/Zwicker/calibration) to both; raised-cosine (cos¬≤) clickless envelopes; a deterministic ~0.2s-lookahead scheduler off `ctx.currentTime` (no `Math.random()` in the audio path ‚ÄĒ the Zwicker noise uses a seeded PRNG); a persistent notch-filtered pink-noise chain for Zwicker (cascaded biquad notches ~700‚Äď1150 Hz, gated on/off clicklessly). **(2)** `illusions.ts` ‚ÄĒ pure data + `shepardPartials` (octave-complex Gaussian log-frequency spectrum) + seeded pink noise. **(3)** `renderer.ts` ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D gallery placards: a three-lane scrolling score (blue left-ear / red right-ear / violet right-hander percept), a tritone pitch-class dial with a big "?", a Zwicker spectrum-strip + noise‚Üísilence timeline, and the calibration pitch-class circle filling in green(up)/orange(down). **(4)** `page.tsx` ‚ÄĒ gallery nav (5 exhibits), Start/Stop, Reveal Both/Left/Right + Swap ears (dichotic only, "Left only" ramps the right channel to 0 in ~150 ms ‚Üí the phantom collapses = the built-in *aha*), calibration Higher/Lower/Replay, ~14 s idle auto-advance so a phone glance always has sound+motion, amber headphones advisory, AudioContext graceful-degradation, design-notes panel. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile ‚úď + **Linting and checking validity of types** ‚úď ‚ÄĒ **0 warnings from `1109`**, all warnings pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; the ONLY failure is the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally); scoped grep = no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; the per-ear routing correctness and whether each phantom actually forms are code-verified only ‚ÄĒ no headphones/ears in-box, which the README + on-screen caveat both state. Wants Karel's ears on real headphones.**) ¬∑ Cycle 635 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel approaches to the Deutsch-dichotic concept: this fuller five-exhibit suite vs `1108-two-ears`, the tight single-screen 3-illusion always-visible-score variant [banked IDEAS ¬ß635]). **Won on:** (1) higher **ambition** (4/5 vs 3/5 ‚ÄĒ ‚Č•4 subsystems, and the Zwicker exhibit is the visible **research‚Üíbuild chain** from THIS cycle's ¬ß635 dive); (2) it covers a genuinely new illusion *type* (phantom-in-silence) and a new interaction (personal calibration = "measurement of you"), the mandate's "massively bigger" over an incremental variant. **For**: adult / **audio-first, headphones, eyes-open-diagram** / `state: auditory illusion ‚ÄĒ the music only in the mind ¬∑ pole: eerie-liminal/uncanny` ¬∑ **listen-only + tap-to-judge (calibration) INPUT** (no mic, no camera, no pointer-drag) ¬∑ **audio-first + Canvas2D paper-white placard OUTPUT** (the genuinely under-served output axis, only 3√ó in the last 15) ¬∑ **strict per-ear dichotic routing + Shepard tones + Zwicker notched-noise TECHNIQUE** (dichotic + Zwicker both grep-0√ó in the lab) ¬∑ **warm paper-white museum VIBE** (the mandated non-black palette). **NAMED REFERENCES:** Diana Deutsch ‚ÄĒ octave illusion (1974), scale illusion (1975), tritone paradox (1986), *Musical Illusions and Phantom Words* (Oxford 2019); [/dream/1107-chromatic-organ](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1107-chromatic-organ) ‚ÄĒ **"Chromatic Organ": a live chromesthesia color-organ a pianist plays ‚ÄĒ every pitch its own Scriabin colour, polyphony shimmering into moir√©, all in daylight.** A **played instrument** (not a tap-to-seed toy). Four subsystems: **(1) input** (`page.tsx`) ‚ÄĒ **Web MIDI** (`requestMIDIAccess`, note-on/off with velocity) OR an always-on **computer keyboard** (`A S D F G H J K` = C‚ÄďC white, `W E T Y U` = the black keys, `Z`/`X` octave, key-repeat guarded so held notes sustain), plus a deterministic **idle arpeggio** after ~4s (seeded by step index, no runtime RNG) so a phone glance is never blank/silent; **(2) chromesthesia mapping** (`chromesthesia.ts`) ‚ÄĒ a hard-coded 12-entry **Scriabin *Prometheus* / clavier √† lumi√®res** circle-of-fifths pitch‚Üíhue table (C=red, G=orange, D=yellow, A=green, E=sky-blue, ‚Ä¶ F=crimson), octave‚Üíbrightness, velocity‚Üísaturation; **(3) raw-WebGL2 render** (`renderer.ts`) ‚ÄĒ each sounding note contributes an aspect-corrected **plane wave** in its Scriabin hue; the shader **superimposes** every active note's wave so two-plus notes beat into **shimmering moir√© fringes** where pigment deposits; sustained notes leave a ping-pong feedback afterglow that **decays toward warm paper `#f4efe6`** (not black), so mean brightness stays high ‚ÄĒ **no strobe, by construction**; **(4) audio** (`audio.ts`) ‚ÄĒ the *same* note event drives a **2-operator FM voice** (carrier + 2:1 modulator + mod-index ADSR ‚Üí master ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚ąí6/12 limiter ‚Üí destination, 8-voice oldest-steal), so sight and sound can never diverge. **Palette:** the deliberate anti-void ‚ÄĒ Scriabin colours bloom like watercolour pigment on a bright paper ground (Anadol/Ikeda saturated-flat lineage, not a dark nebula), UI in dark translucent chips for contrast. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile ‚úď + **Linting and checking validity of types** ‚úď (all warnings pre-existing in `src/lib/**`/other app files; the live-MIDI + felt synesthetic experience is code-verified only (no MIDI device / GPU / speakers in-box) ‚ÄĒ the FM voicing, moir√© spatial-frequency, and afterglow constants are hand-tuned, not perceptually validated; the always-on computer-keyboard + idle arpeggio is the fully-exercisable never-blank/silent path.
