## Cycle 633 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *binocular depth manufactured from pure noise* ‚ÄĒ built via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) ‚ÄĒ ships `1105-hidden-eye`, a **real-time animated autostereogram (SIRDS)**: a field that looks like random static hides a living 3-D psychedelic surface ‚ÄĒ a breathing dome / receding tunnel / radial ripples / bumpy mandala ‚ÄĒ that has **zero monocular cues** and is manufactured entirely by binocular fusion in your own visual cortex, i.e. the depth exists *nowhere in the image, only in you*. This is the one classic instance of the lab's beloved "the percept is generated in YOU, not the signal" thread (stochastic resonance 1096, combination tones, Deutsch dichotic 1104, Caputo strange-face 1103) that it had **never built** ‚ÄĒ Julesz proved 3-D structure can be seen from random-dot noise with no monocular cue at all. Grep-0√ó technique (`stereogram|magic-eye|SIRDS|random-dot|autostereo` = 0 hits); a **default hands-free "reveal/wiggle" mode** (a lit, gently-swaying shaded heightfield ‚Üí motion parallax) makes the hidden surface legible at a phone glance even without free-fusing; and it dodges every 2026-07-01 standing ban (three.js ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag ¬∑ real-data ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only) while resting WebGPU-compute (3√ó recent) and camera-input (just used by 1103). 1 more explored ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß633.)

[/dream/1105-hidden-eye](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1105-hidden-eye) ‚ÄĒ **"Hidden Eye": a field of noise that hides a living 3-D surface visible only inside your own visual cortex.** A real-time animated **autostereogram (SIRDS ‚ÄĒ Single Image Random-Dot Stereogram)**. Four subsystems: **(1) a morphing hidden-depth field** (`sirds.ts` ¬∑ `computeDepth`) ‚ÄĒ `depth(x,y,t)` cross-fading over ~48s through a breathing **dome ‚Üí receding tunnel ‚Üí radial ripples ‚Üí mandala** of bumps; **(2) the SIRDS encoder** ‚ÄĒ per scanline, two dots that must share a colour sit `sep = round(E¬∑(1‚ąíőľ¬∑depth))` apart (nearer surface ‚áí shorter period ‚áí pops toward you); colours are hashed by the *root* of each equality-chain rather than a running PRNG, so the dot field is **stable frame-to-frame** (only the links shift as depth changes ‚ÄĒ this is what stops it strobing), encoded on a downscaled 512√ó320 buffer at ~18fps; **(3) raw-WebGL2 render** (`gl.ts`) ‚ÄĒ uploads the RGBA dot buffer + an R8 depth texture; the fragment shader does mode 0 (stereogram blit + vignette + mean-preserving grain + violet tint) and mode 1 (Lambert-shaded heightfield + horizontal parallax sway); **(4) audio** (`audio.ts`) ‚ÄĒ per-frame **relief** (mean horizontal depth gradient) drives a just-intonation drone (filter brightness ‚ąĚ relief), a chord that **retunes per form-state**, and a soft **FM bell "pop"** when a new form locks in, through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter (starts on gesture, always sounds whether or not you can fuse). **The reveal mode** (default) shades the hidden heightfield directly with a small parallax sway so the surface is unmistakable **hands-free**; a button/`R` switches to the pure random-dot **Stereogram** with two convergence-guide dots ("make the two dots become three"). `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile ‚úď + **Linting and checking validity of types** ‚úď (all warnings pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; **0 hits for `1105`/`hidden-eye`/`Type error`/`Failed to compile`**) ‚Üí reached **Collecting page data**, where only the standing container static-gen `EMFILE` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1105-hidden-eye/page.js` **compiled ‚úď**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1105-hidden-eye/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; the SIRDS math was confirmed by a node harness (flat depth ‚Üí strictly periodic at period E; a raised region shrinks the local period), but the *felt* fusion + comfort/morph timing constants are hand-tuned, not perceptually validated headless ‚ÄĒ the default reveal/wiggle mode is the fully-exercisable, never-blank/silent path. Wants Karel's eyes: does the surface pop, and can he free-fuse the stereogram?**) ¬∑ Cycle 633 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel builders attacking one concept via different encodings: this **random-dot SIRDS** vs `1106-wallpaper-deep` (a **repeating-pattern "wallpaper" autostereogram** ‚ÄĒ a tileable colour-palette psychedelic motif whose local horizontal period is depth-modulated via a per-row phase prefix-sum, plus a first-class parallax wiggle; easier to free-fuse, more overtly colourful) [banked IDEAS ¬ß633]). **Won on:** (1) **research fidelity + surprise** ‚ÄĒ random-dot is depth from *literally nothing but noise* (zero monocular cue), the purest, most iconic magic-eye "huh" and the cleanest embodiment of the cycle's Julesz "percept-in-you" thesis; (2) **safety elegance** ‚ÄĒ the equality-chain-root colour hash keeps the dot pattern stable (no strobe) by construction, not by damping; (3) **richer audio** ‚ÄĒ its own retuning JI chord vs the sibling's fixed shared-bank bed. **Fold-in (cycle-2, in README):** the sibling's wallpaper-texture mode (accessibility + colour) + its truer `x' = x ‚ąí sway¬∑(depth‚ąí0.5)` parallax + a single-source depth definition. **For**: adult / **intense-hypnotic emergence** pole / `state: geometric emergence / hidden-signal-in-noise` ¬∑ **keyboard + tilt + autonomous-morph INPUT** (no pointer-drag, no webcam, no tap-to-play; `1`‚Äď`4` sculpt forms, `A` auto, arrows steer, `[` `]` depth őľ, `,` `.` eye-sep E, `R` reveal‚ÜĒstereogram) / **raw-WebGL2 texture-blit + shaded-heightfield OUTPUT** / **SIRDS per-scanline constraint-encoding + parallax-reveal TECHNIQUE** / noise resolving into breathing depth. **NAMED REFERENCE:** B√©la Julesz, *Foundations of Cyclopean Perception* (1971, random-dot stereograms); Christopher W. Tyler & Maureen B. Clarke, "The autostereogram," *SPIE* 1256 (1990). **Ambition (4/5):** #1 (SIRDS/autostereogram grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (depth-field generator + SIRDS encoder + WebGL2 render + relief‚ÜíJI audio = 4) ¬∑ #3 named ref (Julesz / Tyler-Clarke) ¬∑ #5 soft (RESEARCH ¬ß633, today ‚ÄĒ foundational-dated technique; freshness in the 2026 HPPD dorsal-stream reframing that steered the pick). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag-primary ¬∑ real-data-sonification ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only ¬∑ WebGPU-compute (rested 3√ó) ¬∑ camera-input (rested, just used 1103) (JURY 2026-07-01)]` ¬∑ `picked=[keyboard/tilt/autonomous INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ SIRDS-constraint-encoding + parallax-reveal TECHNIQUE ¬∑ intense-hypnotic emergence VIBE]`. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ stable positional-hash dot field, mean luminance held constant, slow depth morph (well under a few Hz), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows morph + damps sway. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network; zero new npm deps). Design notes (in-page panel + `src/app/dream/1105-hidden-eye/README.md`)

## Cycle 632 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT √ó pole; ship the highest-ambition, most on-mandate one) ‚ÄĒ ships `1103-strange-face`, a **webcam mirror that dissolves your own face** via the **Caputo strange-face-in-the-mirror illusion**: hold still and gaze softly at your reflection and, over ~1 minute, the edges fade (Troxler fading), the image folds into kaleidoscopic symmetry and drifts into a stranger ‚ÄĒ *derealization/depersonalization on purpose, no drug*. The genuinely grep-0√ó move is the **Caputo/Troxler self-face-dissolution mechanism** (MIDI and face-tracking both already exist in the lab ‚ÄĒ neither is claimed as a first). Swings to a fresh **eerie-liminal/dissociative** pole (PSYCHEDELIC Cluster 2), is an **embodied camera-input piece that ships** (the jury's standing want), inverts the industry's face-tech-syncs-a-mask reflex into *un-binding*, and dodges every 2026-07-01 standing ban (three.js ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag ¬∑ real-data ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only). 2 more explored ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß632.)

[/dream/1103-strange-face](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1103-strange-face) ‚ÄĒ **"Strange Face": a dark mirror that dissolves your own reflection into a stranger the longer you hold still.** Your webcam feed is rendered through a WebGL2 **kaleidoscope with decaying optical feedback**. One scalar, `dissolve` (0=clear ‚Üí 1=gone), rises the longer your **facial motion** (measured by MediaPipe **FaceLandmarker**) stays low, and snaps back fast on any real movement. As it climbs the mirror does three things at once: **(1) Troxler fading** ‚ÄĒ the periphery is progressively blurred + desaturated while the centre stays sharp (a fixated visual field fades at its edges); **(2) radial mirror folding** ‚ÄĒ the image folds into N-fold symmetry (1‚Üí6-fold) so the face tiles into itself; **(3) optical feedback** ‚ÄĒ a slowly zooming/warping/hue-drifting ping-pong buffer smears each frame into the next until "someone else" congeals out of your own reflection. A soft inharmonic **shiver** fires at the strange-face threshold; a drone thins + detunes and a low slow beat deepens as the face dissolves (reuses `_shared/psych/droneBank`), through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. The pipeline is energy-preserving (feedback weights sum to 1 ‚Üí mean brightness ~constant, **no strobe**; reduced-motion damps spin/warp). If the camera is denied/unavailable or the CDN model fails, an **autonomous pseudo-face** fallback (a procedurally-drawn slowly-morphing face) runs the identical dissolution so it's never blank/silent. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Creating an optimized production build** ‚úď ‚Üí **Linting and checking validity of types** ‚úď (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`, **0 hits for `1103`/`strange-face`/`Type error`/`Failed to compile`**) ‚Üí reached **Collecting page data**, where only the standing container static-gen `EMFILE` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) stopped a full green; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1103-strange-face/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; the live-camera + FaceLandmarker path is code-verified only (no camera/GPU in this headless box ‚ÄĒ the CDN loader is mirrored from the working `1068-entity-lattice/pose.ts`), while the autonomous pseudo-face fallback is the fully-exercisable path; the *felt* dissolution + the stillness‚Üídissolve timing constants are hand-tuned, not perceptually validated ‚ÄĒ wants Karel dimming the room + gazing for ~1 min.**) ¬∑ Cycle 632 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 parallel builders across 3 fresh inputs: this **face-tracking** mirror vs `1102-chromatic-organ` (a **MIDI/keyboard-played chromesthesia color-organ** ‚ÄĒ each note drives a Kl√ľver form-constant through the log-polar cortical warp, polyphony interfering into moir√©; Scriabin *clavier √† lumi√®res*; raw-WebGL2; intense-hypnotic) [banked IDEAS ¬ß632] vs `1104-two-ears` (**Diana Deutsch's dichotic musical illusions** ‚ÄĒ octave/scale/tritone via strict per-ear `ChannelMergerNode` routing so the music is manufactured in the listener; audio-first + live diagram) [banked IDEAS ¬ß632]). **Won on:** (1) **ambition** ‚ÄĒ 4/5, the highest of the three; (2) **surprise + mandate fidelity** ‚ÄĒ self-face dissolution is the most viscerally "huh" and sits squarely in PSYCHEDELIC Cluster 2 (ketamine/NDE derealization) reachable with only a webcam + stillness; (3) **pole diversity** ‚ÄĒ eerie-liminal/dissociative breaks the recent cosmic/intense run; (4) **embodied-input-that-ships** ‚ÄĒ the jury's standing want. **Honest trade-offs:** `1102-chromatic-organ` serves Karel-the-pianist + live-performance but its note-driven log-polar warp sits close to the jury-flagged *decorative* form-constant warp (and 1098 just did form-constants), so it was the weakest on freshness; `1104-two-ears` is a lovely grep-0√ó audio-first idea but audio-first is 3√ó in the recent window and it's the lowest ambition (3/5). **For**: adult / **eerie-liminal/dissociative** pole / `state: mirror-gaze ego-dissolution / derealization` ¬∑ **webcam face-tracking INPUT** (+ autonomous pseudo-face fallback; no pointer-drag) / **raw-WebGL2 kaleidoscope + optical-feedback OUTPUT** / **stillness-driven Troxler edge-dissolution + radial symmetry folding + ping-pong feedback TECHNIQUE** / dark uncanny mirror, desaturating periphery. **Audio (Web Audio):** `_shared/psych/droneBank` bed + hand-built thinning/detuning partials + deepening sub-beat + threshold chime ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter (present in both live + fallback modes). **NAMED REFERENCE:** Giovanni B. Caputo, "Strange-Face-in-the-Mirror Illusion," *Perception* 39 (2010); Caputo et al. (2023) on strange-face illusions & derealization/depersonalization/dissociation; Troxler (1804), *Troxler fading*. **Ambition (4/5):** #1 (Caputo/Troxler self-face-dissolution mechanism grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ face-tracking itself is NOT claimed a first) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (FaceLandmarker motion input + WebGL2 kaleidoscope/feedback render + Troxler dissolution controller + reactive drone = 4) ¬∑ #3 named ref (Caputo/Troxler) ¬∑ #5 soft (RESEARCH ¬ß632, today ‚ÄĒ foundational-dated refs, freshness in the invert-the-industry framing + 2023 dissociation corroboration). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag-primary ¬∑ real-data-sonification ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only ¬∑ WebGPU-compute (rested 3√ó) (JURY 2026-07-01)]` ¬∑ `picked=[webcam-face INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 kaleidoscope+feedback OUTPUT ¬∑ Troxler-dissolution + symmetry-fold + optical-feedback TECHNIQUE ¬∑ eerie-liminal/dissociative VIBE]`. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ energy-preserving feedback (weights sum to 1, mean brightness ~constant), slow luminance drift, reduced-motion damps spin/warp. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; MediaPipe from CDN at runtime; zero new npm deps). Design notes (in-page panel + `src/app/dream/1103-strange-face/README.md`)

## Cycle 631 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (one concept ‚ÄĒ a dissociative audio-first "void" that dissolves your felt sense of *when* ‚ÄĒ built via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) ‚ÄĒ ships `1101-time-dissolve`, an **audio-first** temporal-dissolution instrument whose novel core is a deliberate **audio-visual desync + "Re-bind" A/B engine** (grep-0√ó in the lab): a Shepard‚ÄďRisset endless *descent* + just-intoned drone + a generative granular time-stretch smear poured into a swelling convolution void until onset and echo merge, one global `timeScale` dilating everything, across a stateful ~4-min arc with a hyper-lucid **clarity snap** (the gamma-surge translation) before a soft return. Inverts the live 2026 spatial-A/V-*sync* research frontier (SpatialV2A / ViSAudio) into deliberate *desync* to evoke derealization; fills the lab's thin **long-form-generative-with-state** category; swings the pole back to **cosmic-ambient** after an intense-heavy run; and dodges every 2026-07-01 standing ban (three.js ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag ¬∑ real-data ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only) while resting WebGPU-compute (3√ó in the prior window).)

[/dream/1101-time-dissolve](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1101-time-dissolve) ‚ÄĒ **"Time, Dissolving": an audio-first descent that dissolves your sense of *when* ‚ÄĒ and a light that quietly refuses to keep time with the sound.** A Shepard‚ÄďRisset endless **descent** (`startShepard`, `dir:-1`) over a just-intoned drone bed (`startDroneBank`) is smeared by a self-scheduled granular time-stretch (deterministic harmonic source resampled into overlapping Hann-windowed grains by a look-ahead scheduler) and poured into a swelling 7.5s convolution **void** (`createVoidReverb`) whose wet mix climbs until each onset and its own echo become indistinguishable ‚ÄĒ time collapses. A single global **`timeScale`** stretches the glide rate and the grain playhead together (time-dilation). The piece runs a stateful ~4-min arc: descent+deepening (0‚Äď2:30) ‚Üí deep plateau (~3:00) ‚Üí a brief hyper-lucid **clarity snap** (~3:15: low-pass blooms open, wet drops, grains sharpen, `timeScale` snaps to 1, visual re-aligns ‚ÄĒ the Borjigin gamma-surge translation) ‚Üí soft return (3:30‚Äď4:00), so minute 4 ‚Č† minute 1. **The desync is the instrument:** the true audio envelope is pushed into a 60Hz ring buffer; when *not* re-bound the visual bloom reads a **warping, deepening lag** (0.6‚Üí~5s, slowly oscillating) into the past, so eyes and ears quietly disagree ‚ÄĒ a stand-in for the sensory-binding breakdown underlying dissociation. The prominent **"Re-bind (sync)"** toggle collapses the lag to zero so you can A/B *feel* it snap on/off (the clarity snap always re-aligns briefly, bound or not). Tap the void / "Sink deeper" adds a decaying depth boost. Visual: a dark near-black void, one soft violet bloom + breathing ring + crisp core that resolves only at the snap, exponential fog/vignette, a whisper-faint arc-position indicator. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS ‚ÄĒ every ESLint warning is pre-existing in `src/lib/**`, **0 from `1101-time-dissolve/`**; whole-project `tsc --noEmit` = **exit 0**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1101-time-dissolve/` = **exit 0**; `.next/server/app/dream/1101-time-dissolve/page.js` compiled; only the standing container static-gen `EMFILE` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green. **Verification: compile+lint+type verified; audio graph + arc + desync are code-verified (kit signatures confirmed, grain scheduler + ring-buffer lag + arc-phase math reasoned through), NOT heard on hardware in this headless box ‚ÄĒ lag-warp + clarity-snap constants are hand-tuned, not perceptually validated; wants Karel's ears + a ~4-min listen.**) ¬∑ Cycle 631 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel approaches to one concept: this **temporal** dissolution vs `1100-sourceless` (**spatial** dissolution ‚ÄĒ 8 HRTF PannerNode sources on deterministic Lissajous orbits so the sound has no stable place, head-turn via drag/tilt, ~550ms visual lag + Re-bind) [banked IDEAS ¬ß631]). **Won on:** (1) **surprise + differentiation** ‚ÄĒ 1100's HRTF-ring+Shepard substrate overlaps shipped `1090-threshold-descent`, so shipping it would risk the exact substrate-duplication the jury flagged (1069=1084); 1101's granular time-stretch + clarity-snap arc is distinct; (2) **thin category** ‚ÄĒ long-form generative with real state/evolution; (3) **06:30-glance readability** ‚ÄĒ one luminous bloom + a clarity-snap beat lands without headphones, unlike 8 faint binaural motes; (4) richer desync (ring-buffer variable warping lag vs fixed LERP). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / `state: ketamine/NDE temporal dissolution & oceanic boundlessness` ¬∑ **passive + tap-to-deepen INPUT** (no pointer-drag-as-primary) / **AUDIO-FIRST + minimal desynced Canvas2D OUTPUT** / **granular time-stretch + Shepard‚ÄďRisset descent + convolution-void + audio-visual-desync TECHNIQUE** / dark violet-void ‚Üí soft-white at the clarity snap. **Audio (Web Audio):** shared `_shared/psych` kit (Shepard descent + JI drone + void reverb) + self-contained granular smear ‚Üí master gain ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. **NAMED REFERENCE:** Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*; ## Cycle 630 ‚ÄĒ (**adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers across 3 DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT targets ‚ÄĒ WebGPU-compute vs raw-WebGL2 vs audio-first ‚ÄĒ ship the highest-ambition, most on-mandate one) ‚ÄĒ ships `1098-cortical-bloom`, the lab's **SECOND WebGPU-compute piece** and its first **neural-field** simulation: the geometric hallucinations of a psychedelic state are not painted here ‚ÄĒ they are **grown**, self-organizing as Turing patterns in a simulated sheet of excitable neurons, then read out through the actual retino-cortical log-polar map so cortical stripes become **spirals & tunnels** and hexagons become an expanding **honeycomb** ‚ÄĒ the real Ermentrout‚ÄďCowan neuroscience of *why* hallucinations look the way they do. Directly discharges the 2026-07-01 jury's loudest provocation #1 (**"prove the render target can change ‚Üí WebGPU-compute, you have exactly ONE"**), lands the PSYCHEDELIC directive's single most load-bearing mechanism (the form-constant engine) as emergent cortical dynamics rather than a decorative exp-warp, and swings to an **intense-hypnotic** pole off the recent cosmic-ambient runs. Robust WebGPU‚ÜíCanvas2D degrade so it's never blank or silent at the 06:30 glance.)

[/dream/1098-cortical-bloom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1098-cortical-bloom) ‚ÄĒ **"Cortical Bloom": hallucination geometry, GROWN from a simulated sheet of excitable neurons ‚ÄĒ not painted.** A WebGPU compute shader simulates an excitatory/inhibitory neural field (a Gray-Scott activator‚Äďinhibitor, equivalent to a Wilson‚ÄďCowan / Amari system near its Turing instability) on a toroidal grid with two ping-ponged storage buffers. Tuned near instability, the field spontaneously self-organizes into stripes, spots and hexagons; because the retina‚ÜíV1 cortical map is approximately a **complex logarithm**, the render pass takes each screen pixel's `(log r, őł)` coordinate and samples the cortical field there ‚ÄĒ so cortical stripes read out as spirals & tunnels and cortical hexagons as an expanding honeycomb lattice, exactly the Ermentrout‚ÄďCowan explanation of Kl√ľver's four form constants. A slow feed/kill drift walks the field through the form-constant regimes over ~30s so it lives on its own; **tap** the field to seed a fresh excitation nucleus with an audible bloom; a slider or **arrow keys** nudge the excitation‚ÜĒinhibition balance toward the lattice or tunnel pole. An asynchronous read-back of field statistics (mean activity, energy, spatial-gradient density) drives a just-intonation drone ‚ÄĒ denser patterns brighten the timbre, the spiral regime gets a slow rotating pan, all through a soft `tanh` limiter. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1098`/`cortical-bloom` in errors = **0 hits**; full-project `tsc --noEmit` = **exit 0**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1098-cortical-bloom/` = **exit 0**; folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container static-gen `EMFILE` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green. **Verification: compile+lint+type verified; the WGSL compute + storage-buffer sim is a WebGPU-device-only path ‚ÄĒ code-verified (buffer alignments, ping-pong ordering, reduction barriers reasoned through), NOT run on a GPU in this headless box ‚ÄĒ but a complete, independent Canvas2D fallback (CPU value-noise cortical field warped through the same complex-log map, same stats‚Üíaudio feed, own render loop) guarantees it is never blank or silent even with no `navigator.gpu`.**) ¬∑ Cycle 630 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 parallel builders across 3 distinct outputs: this **WebGPU-compute** neural field vs `1097-resonant-drift` (the resurrected ¬ß628 **raw-WebGL2** raymarched corridor whose cavity geometry drives a dynamic-convolution reverb + modal tube-singer ‚ÄĒ the space IS the instrument; Sonic4D-grounded) [banked ‚≠źRESURRECT-FIRST, IDEAS ¬ß630] vs `1099-third-sound` (an **audio-first** combination-tone drone where the "third voice" is generated in the listener's own ear ‚ÄĒ Tartini/Helmholtz/Dream-House, with a reveal-A/B toggle) [banked IDEAS ¬ß630]). **Won on:** (1) **ambition + jury-alignment** ‚ÄĒ it's the highest-ambition of the three AND the direct answer to the jury's #1 standing provocation (WebGPU-compute was 1√ó in the lab; this makes 2, and proves the render target genuinely changed rather than sliding to three.js/Canvas2D); (2) **primary-mandate fidelity** ‚ÄĒ the PSYCHEDELIC.md "single most load-bearing finding" is the form-constant engine, and this implements it as the REAL cortical-Turing mechanism, not a decorative warp ‚ÄĒ the most "huh, I didn't know we could do that"; (3) **robustness** ‚ÄĒ the WebGPU‚ÜíCanvas2D degrade means it survives any-device glance; (4) **pole diversity** ‚ÄĒ intense-hypnotic breaks the recent cosmic-ambient run. **Honest trade-off:** `1097-resonant-drift` (also 4/5) is love-aligned (closest to the loved `148-spatial-palette`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / spatial cluster) and build-complete/ready-as-is ‚ÄĒ banked ‚≠ź as top resurrect. **Log-polar honesty note:** the 2026-07-01 jury banned the *decorative exp-warp* form-constant shader (collapsed to 1√ó); this returns log-polar only as the physiologically-correct retino-cortical *readout* of an emergent neural-field sim ‚ÄĒ a different, load-bearing use, not the banned standalone gimmick. **For**: adult / **intense-hypnotic** pole / `state: DMT/psilocybin geometric form-constant emergence` ¬∑ **tap-to-seed + balance-nudge INPUT** (no pointer-drag) / **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (Gray-Scott/Wilson‚ÄďCowan neural field, WGSL ping-pong storage buffers; Canvas2D fallback) / **neural-field Turing-instability sim + retino-cortical log-polar render map + async field-statistics readback + coupled JI audio TECHNIQUE** / dark cortical, violet/amber tints per regime. **Audio (Web Audio):** JI drone/pad driven by field mean/energy/density ‚Üí drive/body/brightness, rotating-pan shimmer, tap bloom, soft `tanh` limiter. **NAMED REFERENCE:** **Ermentrout & Cowan (1979)**, "A mathematical theory of visual hallucination patterns"; ## Cycle 629 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *stochastic resonance* ‚ÄĒ 2 parallel builders attack it via 2 modalities, ship the truer one) ‚ÄĒ ships `1096-noise-bloom`, the lab's **FIRST stochastic-resonance instrument**: a melody rendered *below the threshold of hearing* that you bring into being by dialing in the RIGHT amount of noise. Too little noise ‚Üí silence; too much ‚Üí it drowns; at the resonance sweet-spot the phantom melody blooms out of the static. Inverts everyone's intuition that noise destroys signal ‚ÄĒ for a musician, "noise is the thing that lets you hear the music." Swings to an **eerie-liminal / hypnagogic** pole off the recent cosmic-ambient runs, keeps the fresh **audio-first** output in play, and is zero-permission + auto-sweeping so it sounds + cohere-glances hands-free.)

[/dream/1096-noise-bloom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1096-noise-bloom) ‚ÄĒ **"Noise Bloom": a melody hidden below hearing ‚ÄĒ add noise to bring it into being.** A quiet D-Dorian phrase (`baseSignal 0.11`, soft triangle+octave voices, a look-ahead scheduler with per-cycle variation so minute 3 ‚Č† minute 0) sits at or below comfortable audibility. A band-shaped white-noise loop (bandpass ~720 Hz, around the melody's spectral region) is added on top, and you control its level with a big vertical dial. The heart is a genuine **stochastic-resonance curve**: `resonanceClarity(noise, center)` is a Gaussian inverted-U √ó a hard sub-threshold floor (`noise/0.1` ‚ÄĒ below ~0.1 noise the signal is genuinely inaudible), centred on a slowly-drifting sweet-spot so the threshold "breathes"; clarity gently boosts the melody's gain (0.16‚Üí1.36√ó) so the emergence is unmistakable while the real noise does the perceptual unmasking. A Canvas2D grain field lerps from brownian static ‚Üí luminous filaments + a central pulse-bloom as clarity rises, and dissolves back to chaos past the sweet-spot ‚ÄĒ so you SEE how close to resonance you are. Dial is drag- AND arrow/PageUp-Down-key controllable (`role="slider"`, ‚Č•44px), with a live clarity meter + a drifting sweet-spot marker; a **22s idle auto-sweep** eases the noise up through the sweet-spot and back so a hands-free phone glance HEARS the bloom and SEES the field cohere twice per cycle. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`/`Generating static pages`, 0 output from the 1096 folder; full-project `tsc --noEmit` = exit 0; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1096-noise-bloom/` = exit 0; folder grep-clean; only the standing container static-gen `EMFILE` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green. **Verification: compile+lint+type verified; the SR inverted-U is demonstrable by construction (clarity boosts the melody at the sweet-spot), but the *felt* psychoacoustic unmasking is ear-dependent ‚ÄĒ NOT ear-verified in this headless box.**) ¬∑ Cycle 629 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel builders: this **auditory** SR instrument vs `1097-veil-listen` (a **visual/Ganzfeld** twin ‚ÄĒ a faint mandala resolving out of animated noise at the SR sweet-spot, flicker-safe by mean-pinning) [banked ‚≠źRESURRECT-FIRST as the cycle-2 graft, IDEAS ¬ß629]). **Won on:** (1) **research fidelity** ‚ÄĒ SR is literally *the model of auditory perception* (Krauss et al.), so the auditory version IS the cited mechanism, where the visual twin is a cross-modal step removed; (2) **surprise for a musician** ‚ÄĒ "noise is the only thing that lets you hear the melody"; (3) **output diversity** ‚ÄĒ audio-first is fresher than the visual twin's Canvas2D-primary; (4) **replay life** ‚ÄĒ real melodic content with per-cycle variation. **For**: adult / **eerie-liminal** pole / `state: hypnagogia / sensory-deprivation threshold` ¬∑ **noise-dial INPUT** (drag OR arrow-key ‚ÄĒ not free-canvas pointer-drag) / **audio-first + Canvas2D-meter OUTPUT** / **stochastic-resonance TECHNIQUE** (sub-threshold signal + tunable band-shaped noise + inverted-U clarity curve w/ drifting sweet-spot) / dark liminal, violet accents. **Audio (Web Audio):** buried melody synth (triangle+octave voices, look-ahead scheduler) + band-passed white-noise loop + clarity-gated gain, through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. **NAMED REFERENCE:** the **Stochastic Resonance model of auditory perception** (Krauss et al., bioRxiv 2020 ‚ÄĒ unifies tinnitus, the Zwicker tone illusion, residual inhibition); predictive-coding+SR (arXiv:2204.03354); the Ganzfeld / sensory-deprivation lineage. **Ambition (honest 3/5, 4/5 arguable):** #1 (a stochastic-resonance perceptual engine is grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ the one `zwicker` hit in the lab is EWA *splatting*; `1043-dreamachine` is Ganz*flicker*, a different mechanism) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (buried-melody synth + noise engine + SR curve + Canvas2D coherence field = 4) ¬∑ #3 named ref (Krauss et al.) ¬∑ #5 soft (RESEARCH ¬ß629, foundational-dated). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag ¬∑ real-data-sonification ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` ¬∑ `picked=[noise-dial INPUT ¬∑ audio-first+Canvas2D-meter OUTPUT ¬∑ stochastic-resonance TECHNIQUE ¬∑ hypnagogic-liminal VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the grain field is high-spatial-frequency with slow luminance drift; no full-screen flashing. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network; zero new npm deps). ## Cycle 628 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers across 3 different altered-states √ó techniques, orchestrated; ship the highest-integrity one) ‚ÄĒ ships `1095-plate-modes`, a **physically-honest Chladni plate you play by touch**: a real 2D wave equation solved on the GPU (WebGL2 FDTD ping-pong float textures), where the glowing standing-wave nodal lines you SEE and the modal chord you HEAR are two readouts of the *same* vibrating field ‚ÄĒ not an FFT-of-a-song visualizer. Tap to strike; a slowly-swept driver rings up mode after mode so it lives with no input. Applies the jury's most-praised virtue ‚ÄĒ the **honest instrument** (it named `1065-skin-membrane` "the most honest instrument in the lab") ‚ÄĒ to a 2D plate, diversifies to an **intense-hypnotic** pole off the recent cosmic-ambient runs, and keeps the actively-wanted **raw-WebGL2** output in play.)

[/dream/1095-plate-modes](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1095-plate-modes) ‚ÄĒ **"Plate Modes": tap a vibrating plate and watch the exact Chladni standing-wave nodal patterns you are HEARING form in real time. A 2D wave equation is integrated on the GPU as a WebGL2 ping-pong between float textures (`u_next = 2¬∑u ‚ąí u_prev + c¬≤¬∑‚ąá¬≤u`, damped, reflective fixed edges so genuine square-plate modes `sin(mŌÄx)¬∑sin(nŌÄy)` form; `c¬≤=0.24` < the 2D CFL limit of 0.5, plus a non-finite guard so it never blows up to NaN). A per-texel envelope channel tracks the standing-wave amplitude ‚ÄĒ exactly what sand measures on a real Chladni plate ‚ÄĒ and the render pass lights the NODES (near-zero amplitude) incandescent cyan‚Üíwhite as luminous sand-lines, antinodes a faint amber. A slowly-swept off-centre sinusoidal driver rings up one mode after another so the figure continuously reorganizes with zero input; each tap injects a gaussian impulse at the touch point. The honest part: every frame the GPU field is read back and PROJECTED onto the plate's own spatial eigenmodes `sin(mŌÄx)¬∑sin(nŌÄy)`, and those per-mode amplitudes set the loudness of one resonant sine voice per mode (each fixed at the modal frequency `f = F‚āÄ¬∑‚ąö(m¬≤+n¬≤)`) ‚ÄĒ so you literally hear the modes whose nodal lines you see, and the chord shifts as the driver rings up new modes; a tap adds a bright band-passed noise strike that rings and decays with the plate's damping, everything summed through a `tanh` soft-clip bus. Sound + geometry are two read-outs of one vibrating system.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1095`/`plate-modes` in errors/`Type error`/`Failed to compile` = **0 hits**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1095-plate-modes/` = **exit 0**; folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container static-gen infra failure (`EMFILE` on `next-font-manifest.json`, the ~4096-fd ceiling blocking static-gen every cycle since ~472, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green. **Verification: compile+lint+type verified; the FDTD scheme is numerically stable by construction (CFL + NaN guard, builder-reasoned); the headline GPU float-texture sim + audio read-back are GPU-device-only ‚ÄĒ code-verified, not run in the box (no GPU / `EXT_color_buffer_float`), with a driver-derived audio fallback if a device refuses float read-back so it never goes silent.**) ¬∑ Cycle 628 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 parallel builders: this **GPU-FDTD Chladni plate** vs `1093-resonant-drift` (raw-WebGL2 raymarched corridor whose geometry drives a dynamic-convolution reverb ‚ÄĒ the space IS the instrument; Sonic4D-grounded) [banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß628] vs `1094-dither-veil` (raw-WebGL2 animated Bayer ordered-dither over domain-warped fbm ‚ÄĒ closed-eye hypnagogic grain) [banked IDEAS ¬ß628]). **Won on:** (1) **physical honesty** ‚ÄĒ sound and image are two readouts of ONE wave-equation solve, the jury's most-praised virtue (it called `1065-skin-membrane` "the most honest instrument in the lab"; this is that virtue on a 2D plate); (2) **ambition** ‚ÄĒ a real GPU PDE solver + eigenmode-projection read-back + modal audio bank + tap input = ‚Č•3 genuine subsystems, and a 2D-FDTD-wave-equation-driving-audio technique that is fresh vs the FFT-driven cymatics `19`/`165`; (3) **pole diversity** ‚ÄĒ intense-hypnotic cymatic trance breaks the recent cosmic-ambient run. Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (raw-WebGL2), **NOT Canvas2D-primary**, **NOT pointer-drag** (discrete tap-to-strike), **NOT real-world-data-sonification** (self-contained physics), **NOT Kuramoto**, **NOT cosmic-ambient-only** (intense-hypnotic pole). Love-bias: soft ‚ÄĒ the loved cluster leans GPU-field + cosmic + spatial (`130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `148-spatial-palette`‚Ě§ÔłŹ); none matched the plate directly (the banked `1093-resonant-drift` was the closest to the spatial loves), so the pick came from ambition + honesty + pole-diversity, not love. **For**: adult / **intense-hypnotic** pole / `state: geometric form-constant / cymatic trance` ¬∑ **discrete tap-to-strike INPUT** (no pointer-drag) / **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (ping-pong float-texture FDTD + Chladni render pass) / **2D wave-equation FDTD + spatial-eigenmode projection + modal-resonator audio TECHNIQUE** / electric monochrome (black plate, incandescent cyan/white nodes, amber antinodes). **Audio (Web Audio):** modal resonator bank (one sine voice per `(m,n)` mode at `F‚āÄ¬∑‚ąö(m¬≤+n¬≤)`) driven by the field-onto-eigenbasis projection + a band-passed noise strike transient, through a `tanh` soft-clip bus. **NAMED REFERENCE / framing:** the real Chladni plate (Ernst Chladni, 1787 ‚ÄĒ sand settles on the nodal lines of a vibrating plate); physical-honesty framing shared with `1065-skin-membrane`. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 (2D-FDTD-wave-equation-on-GPU-driving-audio is grep-0√ó; the FFT-driven cymatics `19`/`165` are a different substrate ‚ÄĒ grep-before-you-claim, jury #2) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (GPU FDTD sim + eigenmode-projection read-back + modal audio bank + tap input = 4) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß628 (the ordered-dither/Sonic4D dive that seeded this WIDE slate). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag ¬∑ real-data-sonification ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` ¬∑ `picked=[tap-to-strike INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ FDTD-wave-equation + eigenmode-projection + modal-audio TECHNIQUE ¬∑ cymatic-trance intense-hypnotic VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ mode transitions and all brightness changes are slow drifts; a tap is a single soft impulse, not repeating flicker. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network; zero new npm deps). ## Cycle 627 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** cycle-3 of the cosmic-web thread `1066`‚Üí`1089`‚Üí**1092** (2 parallel builders attacking ONE graph-MERGE via 2 DIFFERENT render targets ‚ÄĒ raw-WebGL2 vs WebGPU-compute ‚ÄĒ ship the fresher output). Where `1089` counted HOW MANY filaments touch each node (degree‚Üíchord), this hears WHICH nodes connect ‚ÄĒ the graph's actual **edges** as interval dyads ‚ÄĒ and how tightly-woven each neighbourhood is (the **local clustering coefficient**) as chord density, with the whole living slime-mold web running in **raw WebGL2** fragment shaders. Cashes the 2026-07-01 jury's provocation #5 ("do a cycle-3 ‚ÄĒ make the return a habit"; two returns in ~6 cycles now: 1082, 1089, and this) AND #1 (raw-WebGL2 is the actively-wanted output ‚ÄĒ dodges the WebGPU-compute monoculture 1089+1086 built back-to-back).

[/dream/1092-filament-lattice](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1092-filament-lattice) ‚ÄĒ **"Filament Lattice": a living two-species Physarum slime-mold cosmic web, rendered in raw WebGL2, where the graph itself is the instrument. Tap to seed cosmic nodes; luminous filaments grow between them (cyan species A / violet species B, panned L/R). Each node's DEGREE ‚ÄĒ how many filaments radiate from it (‚ąľ30 radial rays) ‚ÄĒ picks a just-intonation chord (root / +fifth / +third / +ninth / full stack), exactly as 1089 did. NEW this cycle-3: when a sustained filament BRIDGES two nodes (segment coverage ‚Č•60% above a ridge threshold) it becomes a graph EDGE ‚ÄĒ drawn as a glowing line (new ones flash ~1s) and voiced as the INTERVAL DYAD between its two endpoints' pitches, with a bright FM "connection formed" chime the instant it first links (rising-edge memory + hysteresis so a one-frame flicker can't spam it). And each node's LOCAL CLUSTERING COEFFICIENT ‚ÄĒ the fraction of its neighbours that are themselves connected (triangle density) ‚ÄĒ sets its chord's density/brightness: a node in a tightly-woven neighbourhood opens more partials + shimmer, an isolated bridge node stays a thin, lonely fundamental. Gravity slowly ACCRETES nodes into super-clusters over minutes (a bell per merge); as total connectivity peaks the master brightness, reverb and drone drive open into a swelling cosmic-AWE chord ‚ÄĒ minute-5 genuinely differs from minute-0. Pre-seeded + auto-accreting so it lives and sings within ~2s with zero input.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1092`/`filament-lattice` in errors/`Type error`/`Failed to compile` = **0 hits**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1092-filament-lattice/` = **exit 0**; folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container static-gen infra failure (`EMFILE` on `next-font-manifest.json`, the ~4096-fd ceiling blocking static-gen every cycle since ~472, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; and ‚ÄĒ unusually strong for this lab ‚ÄĒ the builder ran a real headless `tsx` harness against the live `physarum.ts`+`graph.ts` confirming the graph math numerically (a 3-node cluster ‚Üí 3 active edges, coverage 1.0, clustering 1.0). The CPU/Canvas2D fallback runs the identical model + identical graph extraction + identical audio, so the edge dyads, clustering sonification and edge overlay are all demoable headless; the headline 0.5M-agent raw-WebGL2 field is the GPU-device-only part** ‚ÄĒ the builder had no GPU/`EXT_color_buffer_float` in the box, so the WebGL2 field is code-verified, the CPU fallback carries the headless demo). ¬∑ Cycle 627 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel builders attacking ONE merge via 2 render targets: this **raw-WebGL2** take vs `1091-filament-bridge` the **WebGPU-compute** sibling [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß627]). **Won on:** (1) **output diversity ‚ÄĒ the whole point of the two-output DEEP fire** ‚ÄĒ raw-WebGL2 is jury #1's actively-wanted output and only 1√ó in the window (1085); shipping the WebGPU-compute sibling would be the 3rd WebGPU-compute in the last 4 fires (after 1086+1089), the exact monoculture the jury warns of; (2) **stronger headless verification** ‚ÄĒ the `tsx` harness numerically confirmed the edge/clustering math, where 1091 could only reason its thresholds. the pick itself came from the jury's cycle-3 want + today's research. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient ‚Üí cosmic-awe** pole / `state: cosmic-web accretion` ¬∑ **discrete tap-to-seed + autonomous accretion INPUT** (no pointer-drag) / **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (fragment-shader Physarum + 2D graph overlay; CPU/Canvas2D fallback) / **agent-based Physarum + adjacency-edge-graph extraction + clustering-coefficient sonification + gravitational accretion TECHNIQUE** / deep-space cyan/violet ‚Üí gold awe swell. **Audio (Web Audio):** shared `_shared/psych/droneBank` + `convolutionVoid` bed; ## Cycle 626 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers across 3 DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT targets ‚ÄĒ audio-first/SVG ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 ¬∑ WebGPU-compute ‚ÄĒ the directest attack on the jury's #1 output-monoculture complaint; ships the one whose OUTPUT is the lab's least-repeated) ‚ÄĒ the lab's **second-ever audio-first / no-screen piece** (after 1073) and the biggest felt break from the GPU-visual sameness of the recent window: an eyes-closed, headphone NDE "tunnel-to-light" where you **descend by slowing your own tapped pulse** and a luminous **difference-tone** blooms only when you go still. Cashes the 2026-07-01 jury's long-standing "audio-first/SVG ‚ÄĒ actively wanted since 1073" want; its provocation #2 (*grep the substrate before claiming a lab-first*) is what disqualified the two flashier GPU siblings this fire.)

[/dream/1090-threshold-descent](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1090-threshold-descent) ‚ÄĒ **"Threshold / Descent": an audio-first near-death dissolution you can do with your eyes closed. Press Begin and a dark spatial void opens ‚ÄĒ eight just-intonation voices ring around your head on HRTF PannerNodes over a Risset/Shepard endless-fall glissando and a cavernous void reverb. The only visual is austere: six concentric SVG rings that contract toward a central dot, no strobe, deliberately minimal so the sound carries everything. You control depth not by touching anything but by the PACE of a pulse you tap (spacebar / full-screen tap / a big button): fast agitated taps hold you near the surface; as you slow, and finally go still, `depth` glides toward 1.0 and you sink. The reward for letting go is the "light" ‚ÄĒ a warm missing-fundamental / difference-tone partial (a 550+660 Hz pair beating a 110 Hz phantom tone) that blooms ONLY above depth ‚Čą 0.8, so stillness is what turns it on. The HRTF ring contracts inward as you descend, the void gets wetter, the descent commits faster. If you never tap, a scripted auto-descent glides to stillness and holds at the light within ~2s, so it plays itself.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1090`/`threshold-descent` in errors/`Type error`/`Failed to compile` = **0 hits**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1090-threshold-descent/` = **exit 0**; folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container static-gen infra failure (`EMFILE` on `next-font-manifest.json`, the ~4096-fd ceiling blocking static-gen every cycle since ~472, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; the scripted auto-descent + always-on audio + non-strobing SVG are the headless-demoable paths; the actual spatial-audio *feel* (HRTF ring, difference-tone light) is audio-device-only** ‚ÄĒ the builder could not hear audio in the box, so the sound design is code-verified, not ear-verified; audio-first is the hardest category to verify headless, a tradeoff the jury explicitly accepts to finally get this category shipped). ¬∑ Cycle 626 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT: this **audio-first/SVG** take vs `1091-fourth-turn` the **raw-WebGL2** six-plane 4D polytope you *hear* rotate [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß626] vs `1092-liquid-melt` the **WebGPU-compute** Stam Navier‚ÄďStokes voice-melts-the-world fluid [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß626]). **Won on OUTPUT diversity, not raw ambition:** audio-first/SVG is the lab's single least-repeated output (1√ó prior, 1073) ‚Üí the most direct answer to Karel's "too similar in design and theme" and jury #1 ("prove the render target can CHANGE, not slide sideways"). The two GPU siblings were both stronger on paper but **grep (jury #2) killed their headline lab-first claims** ‚ÄĒ a true 4D polytope already ships twice (1042 raymarch, 1051 Canvas2D), a WebGPU fluid already ships (15, 3); and shipping 1092 would have been the 4th WebGPU-compute in the window / 3rd in a row (1086+1089), the exact monoculture the jury warns of. Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (SVG/Web-Audio only), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (no canvas), **NOT pointer-drag** (tap-pace + stillness), **NOT real-world-data-sonification** (self-contained synth), **NOT Kuramoto** (rested), **NOT cosmic-ambient-only** (descends cosmic-void ‚Üí luminous-intense as the light blooms). Cashes the jury's actively-wanted **audio-first/SVG output**. Love-bias: soft ‚ÄĒ no direct audio-first love; the pick was diversity + jury-want driven. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient ‚Üí luminous-intense** pole / `state: NDE tunnel-to-light / ketamine dissolution` ¬∑ **tap-pace + stillness INPUT** (tap a pulse; slowing and going still = descending; no pointer-drag, no mic) / **audio-first + minimal-SVG OUTPUT** (HRTF ring, no canvas/WebGL/GPU) / **HRTF spatial ring + Risset/Shepard endless-descent + reward-gated difference-tone** TECHNIQUE / dark spatial void ‚Üí single warm luminous tone. **Audio (Web Audio):** hand-rolled 8-voice HRTF PannerNode ring (contracts toward the head with depth) + shared `startShepard({dir:-1})` endless fall + `createVoidReverb` + `startDroneBank` bed + synthesized missing-fundamental "light" gated above depth‚Čą0.8; AudioContext gesture-gated, full teardown on unmount. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Jean-Claude Risset** (the endless-glissando / Risset rhythm auditory illusion of perpetual descent); **Roger Shepard** (Shepard tones); **Susan Blackmore, *Dying to Live*** (the tunnel-to-light NDE phenomenology). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (tap-pace‚Üídepth state machine + HRTF spatial ring + Shepard endless-descent + difference-tone light synthesis = 4) ¬∑ #3 named refs (above) ¬∑ (#1 borderline: the descend-by-slowing tap-pace mechanic + reward-gated difference-tone light is 0√ó, but the NDE/audio-first *substrate* is trodden ‚ÄĒ 1067/1073/1088 ‚ÄĒ so not billed as a clean lab-first). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag ¬∑ real-data-sonification ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` ¬∑ `picked=[tap-pace + stillness INPUT ¬∑ audio-first + minimal-SVG OUTPUT ¬∑ HRTF spatial + Risset/Shepard + difference-tone TECHNIQUE ¬∑ NDE void ‚Üí luminous VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban and is the single most output-diversifying ship available this fire. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe/flicker anywhere ‚ÄĒ slow luminance drift only; the light blooms as a smooth brightness ramp. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network at all; zero new npm deps). Design notes (in-page modal): `src/app/dream/1090-threshold-descent/README.md`

## Cycle 625 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (2 parallel graph-extraction approaches to ONE concept, orchestrated) ‚ÄĒ the lab's **first honored cycle-2 of `1066-cosmic-web`** and its **third WebGPU-compute instrument**: a living two-species slime-mold filament web where each node's **connectivity** ‚ÄĒ the number of filaments radiating from it ‚ÄĒ picks its chord, and gravity **accretes** nodes into super-clusters over minutes so the web thickens into a fuller chord and blooms; cashes the 2026-07-01 jury's provocation #5 ("do a cycle-3 ‚ÄĒ make the return a habit") + #1 (put the under-used WebGPU-compute path back to work), resting Kuramoto and three.js at once)

[/dream/1089-cosmic-connectome](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1089-cosmic-connectome) ‚ÄĒ **"Cosmic Connectome": the cycle-2 of `1066-cosmic-web`, where the *connectivity* ‚ÄĒ not the brightness ‚ÄĒ is the instrument. Tap the void to seed cosmic nodes; a real two-species Physarum (slime-mold) simulation grows luminous filaments between them, cyan/teal (tight sense-angle) vs violet/magenta (wide sense-angle), panned L/R. The new part: each node's connectivity is measured live ‚ÄĒ cast ~30 radial rays outward on the trail field, count how many *distinct* filament ridges they cross (adjacent hitting rays collapse to one filament) ‚Üí an integer **degree** ‚ÄĒ exactly the "number of filaments linked to a cosmic node" statistic a July-2026 Euclid paper measures. Degree selects a just-intonation chord: 0‚Äď1 ‚Üí root drone; 2 ‚Üí +just fifth (3:2); 3 ‚Üí pentatonic triad; 4 ‚Üí +ninth (9:8); 5+ ‚Üí a full luminous stack. So a lonely well hums one tone and a richly-linked super-cluster rings a chord. Then **gravitational accretion**: nodes carry persistent mass, drift under a softened inverse-square pull, and merge on contact into mass-weighted super-clusters (a bell at each coalescence) ‚ÄĒ so connectivity climbs and minute-5 sounds unlike minute-1, and as total connectivity peaks the master brightness + reverb open into an **awe swell**. It runs as WGSL compute on a 512¬≤ GPU field (atomic i32 ping-pong trail buffers, two species, diffuse+decay per channel, a render pass, a GPU reduce ‚Üí async 96¬≤ readback the connectivity is read from) and falls all the way back to the IDENTICAL model on a 256¬≤ grid in plain JS drawn to a 2D canvas ‚ÄĒ with an emerald `‚óŹ WebGPU compute` / amber `‚óŹ CPU fallback` badge and a live HUD reading node count + ő£ connectivity + peak degree so the concept is legible even headless. Loads playing itself: pre-seeded wells + autonomous drift/merge/re-seed keep the web alive and sounding within ~2s with zero input.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1089`/`cosmic-connectome` in errors/`Type error`/`Failed to compile` = **0 hits**; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` clean of 1089; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1089-cosmic-connectome/` = **exit 0**; folder grep-clean (`any` only in the local WebGPU type shim behind an eslint-disable; no `@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container static-gen infra failure (`Failed to collect page data` on unrelated pre-existing pages 402/404/39 ‚ÄĒ the same fd-ceiling class blocking static-gen every cycle since ~472, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; the CPU/Canvas2D fallback + pre-seeded autonomous accretion + always-on audio are the headless-demoable paths; the WGSL-compute 512¬≤ two-species path + the true filament look + the audio feel are GPU/audio-device-only** ‚ÄĒ the builder could not run WebGPU/audio in the box, so the GPU path is code-verified, not pixel-verified; the CPU fallback runs the identical model + identical connectivity extraction, so the piece is a complete instrument regardless of GPU). ¬∑ Cycle 625 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel graph-extraction approaches to ONE concept, *the cosmic web's connectivity as the instrument*: this **radial ray-count degree** take ‚ÄĒ measuring actual filaments radiating from each node, the truer Euclid statistic ‚ÄĒ vs `1090-web-weaver` the **adjacency-graph + edge-event** take (builds a real node-edge graph of which wells a filament bridges, draws the extracted edges over the slime so you SEE the graph, and rings a "connection formed" chime the instant a filament first links two nodes) [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß625 ‚ÄĒ the more *legible* graph visualization + a discrete musical link-event; it is literally this winner's own README next-step #2 "true edge graph", a natural cycle-3 merge; banked over shipped because its edge-threshold firing is un-tunable headless while the winner's continuous degree voicing always sings]). **Cashes the 2026-07-01 jury's provocation #5 ("Now do a cycle-3 ‚ÄĒ one return was a milestone; a second makes it a habit") ‚ÄĒ the jury named THIS piece: "`1066-cosmic-web`'s filament-graph connectivity sonification is its own README's named next-step ‚ÄĒ which would also put the under-used WebGPU path back to work."** Proves the return is becoming a discipline (after 1082's honored cycle-2 of 1063). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß625 dive** (the July-2026 Euclid Q1 DR XXXV cosmic-connectivity paper that makes "filaments-per-node" a live 2026 observable, grep-0√ó as a sonification). Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (WGSL compute + WebGL render), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (Canvas2D only as fallback), **NOT pointer-drag** (discrete tap-to-seed + autonomous), **NOT real-world-data-sonification** (a self-contained sim, not a live feed), **NOT Kuramoto** (rested), **NOT cosmic-ambient-only** (the accretion awe swell adds an intense-adjacent peak). Cashes the jury's actively-wanted **WebGPU-compute output** (3rd in the lab, after 1066 + 1086). Love-bias: sits in Karel's loved GPU-particle/field + cosmic cluster (`236-particle-life-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ emergent-life field, `130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient ‚Üí cosmic-awe** pole / `state: cosmic-web accretion` ¬∑ **discrete tap-to-seed + autonomous-accretion INPUT** (tap to place a nutrient well; gravity drifts+merges nodes; a new well condenses ~every 9s; no pointer-drag) / **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (two-species WGSL Physarum, atomic i32 ping-pong, GPU reduce+readback; true 256¬≤ JS/Canvas2D fallback; `‚óŹ WebGPU`/`‚óŹ CPU` badge) / Physarum-transport + **graph-degree connectivity extraction** + gravitational-accretion TECHNIQUE / deep-indigo void ‚Üí teal/violet filaments ‚Üí gold degree-heated node cores. **Audio (Web Audio):** self-contained JI drone bed + per-node degree‚Üíchord voices (root/fifth/third/ninth/stack by connectivity) + coalescence bells + a connectivity-driven awe swell (master brightness + reverb open as ő£-degree peaks) ‚Üí limiter; AudioContext gesture-gated, full teardown on unmount. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Jeff Jones, "Characteristics of pattern formation and evolution in approximations of Physarum transport networks" (2010)** (the agent model, GPU + CPU); **Euclid Quick Data Release (Q1) DR XXXV, "The role of cosmic connectivity in shaping galaxy clusters," _A&A_ 2026/07** (connectivity = filaments-per-node, the sonified statistic); **Elek / Burchett et al., "Monte Carlo Physarum Machine / Revealing the Dark Threads of the Cosmic Web" (UCSC, 2020)** (the slime-mold-reconstructs-the-cosmic-web conceptual core). **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 lab-first technique (graph-degree connectivity extraction from a Physarum field, grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (two-species WGSL Physarum solver + radial-ray connectivity extraction + gravitational accretion/merge + JI degree‚Üíchord voicing = 4) ¬∑ #3 named refs (above) ¬∑ #4 **multi-cycle commitment ‚ÄĒ the honored cycle-2 of 1066** ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß625 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag ¬∑ real-data-sonification ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` ¬∑ `picked=[discrete-tap-seed + autonomous-accretion INPUT ¬∑ WebGPU-compute OUTPUT ¬∑ Physarum + graph-degree-connectivity + accretion TECHNIQUE ¬∑ cosmic-web ‚Üí awe VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban (cycle-2 exemption covers the cosmic pole, and the awe swell adds range anyway) and cashes the jury's #1 WebGPU-compute demand + #5 cycle-2 demand at once. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** stable dark void, only filaments/cores bright, the awe swell is a slow luminance/reverb drift, no full-frame strobe; instant mute. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network at all; zero new npm deps; WebGPU via `navigator.gpu` with locally-declared minimal types). ## Cycle 624 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT target, orchestrated) ‚ÄĒ the lab's **FIRST continuous-cellular-automaton piece** and its **second-ever WebGPU-compute instrument**: tap to seed a blob of living matter and a real self-organizing artificial-life field (**Lenia**) grows alien "organisms" that *sing* as they live; the directest attack on the jury's #1 complaint ‚ÄĒ the render-target monoculture ‚ÄĒ with WebGPU-compute output the jury explicitly named as "the template the rest should have reached for")

[/dream/1086-lenia-organisms](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1086-lenia-organisms) ‚ÄĒ **"Lenia Organisms": tap the dark field and a blob of living matter takes root ‚ÄĒ then a real *continuous cellular automaton* grows it into an alien, gliding creature that you HEAR as it lives. Not a particle effect: a genuine Lenia CA (Bert Wang-Chak Chan, 2019) ‚ÄĒ a smooth ring-shaped convolution kernel `K` and a Gaussian growth function `G(u)=2¬∑exp(‚ąí(u‚ąíőľ)¬≤/2ŌÉ¬≤)‚ąí1`, iterated as `A ‚Üź clamp(A + dt¬∑G(K‚ąóA), 0, 1)` ‚ÄĒ the continuous generalization of Conway's Life that spontaneously produces self-propelling organisms (Orbium / Rotor / Colony regimes, switchable). It runs as WGSL compute on a 256¬≤ GPU field (ping-pong f32 buffers, seed/step/reduce/render passes, async ~15 Hz field-stats readback) and falls all the way back to the IDENTICAL model at 128¬≤ in plain JS drawn to a 2D canvas ‚ÄĒ with an emerald `‚óŹ GPU` / amber `‚óŹ CPU fallback` badge so you know which path you're on. The living field drives a just-intonation choir: total mass ‚Üí drone fullness, births/growth events ‚Üí plucked JI bells (pitched by the creature's centroid height), field motion ‚Üí shimmer ‚ÄĒ so a screen of artificial life becomes an instrument. Loads playing itself: an auto-demo seeds 2‚Äď3 creatures so the field is alive, drifting, and sounding within ~2s with zero input.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; only the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; the CPU/Canvas2D fallback + auto-demo + always-on audio are the headless-demoable paths; the WGSL-compute 256¬≤ path + the true creature look + the audio feel are GPU/audio-device-only** ‚ÄĒ the builder could not run WebGPU/audio in the box, so the GPU path is code+Node-sim-verified (the exact update mirrored in Node: all 3 regimes settle to living churn, mean‚Čą0.20‚Äď0.30 / max‚Čą1.0 / near-1 fraction<0.3 / ongoing motion ‚ÄĒ neither dies to 0 nor saturates, robust across seed radii 0.06‚Äď0.10 ‚ÄĒ genuinely alive, not a stub), not pixel-verified). ¬∑ Cycle 624 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT target: this **WebGPU-compute** Lenia vs `1087-fourth-turn` the **raw-WebGL2** 4D-polytope-you-hear-rotate vs `1088-threshold` the **audio-first/minimal-SVG** NDE tunnel [both de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß624]). **The directest attack on the 2026-07-01 jury's #1 structural complaint ‚ÄĒ the render-target monoculture** (three.js 6√ó + Canvas2D 5√ó = 11/15; WebGPU-compute appeared exactly 1√ó, and the jury named 1066-cosmic-web "the template the rest should have reached for"). 1086 IS that template's DNA: an alien scientific algorithm turned into a playable WebGPU-compute instrument. **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß624 dive** (Lenia + the mass-conservative Flow-Lenia extension reaching the ALIFE/MIT Press journal in 2025 + live WebGPU particle-Lenia implementations ‚Üí a GPU-native 2025-26 frontier, grep-0√ó). Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (WGSL compute + WebGL render), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (Canvas2D only as the fallback path), **NOT pointer-drag** (discrete tap-to-seed), **NOT real-world-data-sonification**, **NOT Kuramoto**, **NOT cosmic-ambient-only** (intense DMT-entity pole). Love-bias: closest to `236-particle-life-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (emergent-life particle field). **For**: adult / **intense** pole / `state: DMT entity-encounter / self-organizing alien life` ¬∑ **discrete tap-to-seed INPUT** (tap the field to drop a gaussian blob of living matter; Orbium/Rotor/Colony regime buttons; no pointer-drag; Reseed/Sound controls) / **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (WGSL Lenia solver, ping-pong f32 buffers, reduction readback; true 128¬≤ JS/Canvas2D fallback; `‚óŹ GPU`/`‚óŹ CPU` badge) / continuous-CA (**Lenia**) TECHNIQUE / luminous indigo-void with teal‚Üígold organisms. **Audio (Web Audio):** self-contained JI additive/FM choir (mass‚Üídrone, growth-events‚Üíplucked bells pitched by centroid height, motion‚Üíshimmer), 8-voice cap with voice-stealing ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`; tap rings a bell immediately for responsiveness. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Bert Wang-Chak Chan, _Lenia ‚ÄĒ Biology of Artificial Life_ (2019)** (the CA); **Plantec/Chan et al., _Flow-Lenia_, arXiv:2212.07906 (ALIFE/MIT Press journal 2025)** (mass-conservative multi-species extension); QRI / Andr√©s G√≥mez Emilsson, DMT entity-encounter phenomenology. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 lab-first technique (continuous CA / Lenia, grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (WGSL-compute Lenia solver + tap-seeding + field-stats reduction readback + JI additive/FM choir + drone = 5) ¬∑ #3 named refs (above) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß624 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ pointer-drag ¬∑ real-data-sonification ¬∑ Kuramoto ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` ¬∑ `picked=[discrete-tap-seed INPUT ¬∑ WebGPU-compute OUTPUT ¬∑ Lenia continuous-CA TECHNIQUE ¬∑ DMT-entity-encounter intense VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban and cashes the jury's #1 actively-wanted "WebGPU-compute output"; the whole WIDE slate used three distinct non-banned outputs (WebGPU-compute / raw-WebGL2 / audio-first-SVG), answering the render-monoculture complaint three ways. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** stable dark background, only organisms bright, no full-frame strobe; ## Cycle 623 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (2 parallel technical approaches to ONE concept, orchestrated) ‚ÄĒ the lab **finally SHIPS an embodied hand-tracked piece** ‚ÄĒ the jury's begged-for #3, un-cashed for four windows: your two hands are electrodes and a real **Dielectric-Breakdown / Laplacian-growth** discharge forks between them, every branch ringing a note; raw-WebGL2 output, electric-intense pole; a DEEP fire *committed* to shipping it, with a self-sufficient autonomous storm that dissolves the "zero-permission sibling always wins the glance" pattern)

[/dream/1085-lightning-organ](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1085-lightning-organ) ‚ÄĒ **"Lightning Organ": your two hands are electrodes, and every branch of lightning that cracks between them rings a note ‚ÄĒ but the discharge is not drawn, it is *simulated*. On a 128√ó72 potential grid the two terminals are held at ŌÜ=1 (Dirichlet sources) and the growing discharge at ŌÜ=0; each frame a handful of Gauss‚ÄďSeidel sweeps relax ‚ąá¬≤ŌÜ=0, then a frontier cell is chosen with probability ‚ąĚ |ŌÜ|^ő∑ (roulette) and joins the cluster ‚ÄĒ real Laplacian growth, the same model used to predict the fractal dimension of dielectric breakdown. An ő∑ slider (1‚Üí6) is the signature control: ő∑‚Čą1 gives bushy DLA-like growth, ő∑‚Čą3‚Äď6 gives sharp forked lightning. When a discharge bridges the terminals it flashes, fires a sub-boom, and re-seeds, so the storm is continuous. Each new branch rings an FM pluck (pitch ‚ąĚ height ‚Üí a downward strike sweeps a descending pentatonic arpeggio) with band-passed crackle. Grant the camera and your two palms BECOME the electrodes (MediaPipe HandLandmarker, 21 keypoints/hand via CDN ESM): palm centroids set the terminals, hand separation + finger openness set the field voltage. With NO camera it plays itself ‚ÄĒ two terminals orbit on Lissajous paths, the voltage breathes, lightning cracks continuously ‚ÄĒ a finished performance with zero permissions.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1085`/`lightning-organ` in errors = **0 hits**; scoped `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors referencing 1085, folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; the autonomous storm IS the headless demo (zero permissions ‚ÄĒ it forks, rings, flashes + reseeds on its own), robust for a 06:30 desktop glance; the DBM look + arc audio feel + the CDN/webcam hand path are the device-only part** ‚ÄĒ the builder could not run MediaPipe/GL live in the box, so the hand upgrade is code+fallback verified, not pixel-verified). ¬∑ Cycle 623 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel approaches to ONE concept, *the embodied electric lightning-organ*: this **physical Dielectric-Breakdown / Laplacian-growth** take vs `1086-tesla-hands` the **procedural recursive-midpoint-displacement fractal-bolt** take (forked bolts leap the gap; hand separation ‚Üí root pitch so you voice a chord by spreading your palms ‚ÄĒ Reed & Wyvill, SIGGRAPH 1994) [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß623 ‚ÄĒ the distinct gap‚Üíroot harmonic-sculpting mechanic + physical-vs-procedural contrast are worth a resurrection]). **Cashes the 2026-06-30/07-01 jury's loudest un-discharged provocation (#3): "SHIP the embodied piece ‚ÄĒ stop banking it."** Hand-tracking/optical-flow had been explored-and-banked four times (1075/1079/1080/1083); the fix was a DEEP fire *committed* to shipping, engineered so the autonomous fallback is itself finished ‚ÄĒ which removes the very tiebreaker that banked it every WIDE fire. **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß623 dive** (the June-2026 MediaPipe-hand‚ÜíGPU-VFX sub-35 ms/28‚Äď30 fps latency finding that removed the input-budget excuse). Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (raw WebGL2), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (WebGL2, Canvas2D only as fallback), **NOT pointer-drag** (hand-tracking + ő∑ slider + autonomous), **NOT real-world-data-sonification**, **NOT Kuramoto**, **NOT cosmic-ambient** (electric-terror intense pole). Hits the *electric* pole the lab had never shipped. Rev. Lett._ 52, 1033 (1984)** ‚ÄĒ the DBM/Laplacian-growth model (the engine); Google **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (Tasks-Vision, 21 3D keypoints/hand). **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 lab-first technique (real WebGL DBM/Laplacian-growth, grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (hand-tracking + DBM grid solver + WebGL2 accumulation renderer + FM/crackle synth + drone = 5) ¬∑ #3 named refs (above) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß623 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary OUTPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT ¬∑ pointer-drag INPUT ¬∑ real-world-data-sonification ¬∑ Kuramoto/order-parameter ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-only pole (JURY 2026-07-01)]` ¬∑ `picked=[hand-tracking INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ Dielectric-Breakdown/Laplacian-growth TECHNIQUE ¬∑ electric-terror intense VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban and cashes the "embodied/hand-tracked input that actually **ships**" the jury actively wanted. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** near-black stable background, only thin arcs bright, accumulation-FBO afterglow means it can never full-frame strobe; the optional luminance pulse is gated through `createSafeFlicker` (‚Č§3 Hz, respects `prefers-reduced-motion`) and is OFF by default. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + ResizeObserver + GL dispose + audio nodes + camera stream). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network beyond the public MediaPipe CDN model fetch, no secrets/AI-cost/side-effects; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe loads at runtime via CDN ESM, never bundled). ## Cycle 622 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, orchestrated) ‚ÄĒ the lab's **FIRST live space-weather instrument**: the actual solar wind hitting Earth *right now* (NOAA SWPC real-time-solar-wind JSON, DSCOVR/ACE + NASA's 2026 IMAP I-ALiRT) drives a folding three.js auroral-curtain particle sheet + matched sonification; real-world-data lane, storm-awe pole, live-fetch-verified with a bundled offline modeled-storm fallback; directly cashes THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß622 dive

[/dream/1084-magnetostorm](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1084-magnetostorm) ‚ÄĒ **"Magnetostorm": what does the solar wind actually hitting Earth right now sound and look like? The piece fetches NOAA SWPC's real-time-solar-wind feeds (plasma density/speed/temperature + the interplanetary magnetic field bx/by/bz + planetary Kp) ‚ÄĒ the live L1 stream from DSCOVR/ACE and, as of 2026, NASA's new IMAP I-ALiRT sentinel ‚ÄĒ and turns the same five physical drivers into BOTH a vast folding aurora and a matched sound. A field of ~42k additive GPU particles forms seven vertical auroral CURTAINS advected through a data-driven flow: solar-wind SPEED (~300‚Äď800 km/s) ‚Üí energy/advection velocity, DENSITY ‚Üí curtain thickness/particle count, |B| turbulence ‚Üí shimmer, planetary Kp ‚Üí global intensity, and ‚ÄĒ the dramatic variable, real physics ‚ÄĒ SOUTHWARD Bz (negative = the orientation that actually couples the wind into the magnetosphere) ‚Üí the storm ERUPTS: the curtains brighten and redden from quiet auroral green/teal to storm magenta/red, and the audio opens. A discrete substorm onset (Bz crossing strongly south) fires a sub-boom + shimmer. You orbit the camera and lightly perturb the sheet, but the DATA drives it. A live readout panel shows the current speed / density / Bz / Kp + timestamp and a live/offline badge, so you see the real space weather behind the piece; it re-polls every 60 s. When the fetch is blocked it swaps to a bundled ~60-sample modeled G2 substorm arc (speed 400‚Üí650, Bz turning strongly south, Kp 2‚Üí6) so the whole storm still builds offline.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí `‚úď Compiled successfully` + ESLint + full-project `tsc --noEmit` all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; **verification: compile+lint+type verified AND the live NOAA fetch was confirmed returning HTTP-200 well-formed data from the build environment this cycle** (mag `bz_gsm`, speed, Kp parsed correctly), with the bundled modeled-storm fallback running regardless ‚ÄĒ among the more verifiable ships in the lab: three.js + Web Audio, NO mic/camera/permissions, only a public GET to an open CORS endpoint; the GPU aurora look + storm-swell audio feel are the device-only part). ¬∑ Cycle 622 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this **live-space-weather three.js aurora** vs `1083-lightning-organ` the **hand-tracked Dielectric-Breakdown lightning-organ** (your two hands are electrodes; every fractal branch that cracks into being rings a note ‚ÄĒ NPW *PRL* 1984) [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß622 ‚ÄĒ the top resurrection candidate, an *electric* pole + embodied input; one webcam pass from demoable] vs `1085-veil-room` the **multi-user WebRTC shared psychedelic room** (several people, apart, whose tapped rhythms Kuramoto-lock a single coherent field) [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß622 ‚ÄĒ cashes the jury's named 0√ó multi-user-room category, but banked over shipped because it'd be the lab's THIRD Kuramoto piece in ~5 cycles]). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß622 dive** (the 2026 arrival of NASA IMAP I-ALiRT in NOAA's public RTSW JSON + real June-2026 G1‚ÄďG3 storms ‚ÄĒ the directest visible today's-research‚Üítoday's-build chain, path (a)). **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury:** dodges every diversity ban ‚ÄĒ **NOT pointer-drag** (live data + light orbit), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (three.js), **NOT log-polar warp**, **NOT center-out "bloom"** (a vast frame-filling sheet, not a radial bloom), **NOT cosmic-ambient calm** (auroral storm-awe, the eruption pole) ‚ÄĒ and it dents the jury's **#1 verification-debt** liability (zero-permission, live-fetch-verified + offline-safe). pointer orbit + perturb; amber offline / `text-rose-300` no-WebGL notices) / **three.js particle OUTPUT** (~42k additive GPU points in 7 advected auroral curtains, OrbitControls, starfield + fog, green/teal‚Üímagenta/red by Bz/Kp;
