## Cycle 621 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *making the re-binding of the un-glued senses the star* ‚ÄĒ 2 parallel builders attack it via different models, orchestrated) ‚ÄĒ the lab's **FIRST honored cycle-2 in the psych lane**: the real deepening of `1063-dissolve-void` the jury spelled out ("phase-locked re-coupling on the clarity snap"); Canvas2D-verifiable, breaks the back-to-back GPU-cosmic sameness

[/dream/1082-dissolve-return](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1082-dissolve-return) ‚ÄĒ **"Dissolve ¬∑ Return": the cycle-2 of `1063-dissolve-void`. 1063 built the lab's first audio-visual DESYNC engine (one control stream lagged by different, drifting delays into the image and the sound, so cause/effect come unglued ‚ÄĒ the ketamine K-hole) and hid its re-sync in a single scripted one-frame flash. 1082 makes the RE-BINDING the star: the three streams ‚ÄĒ your CONTROL, the VISUAL, the AUDIO ‚ÄĒ are three coupled phase oscillators (the Kuramoto model). Early the global coupling K‚Čą0 so they drift freely out of phase: a faint zero-lag "ghost" layer DOUBLES/moir√©s beneath the lagged image, and an audio partial BEATS against the drone (~6 Hz). You re-bind them by SETTLING ‚ÄĒ holding the phone still (or releasing the drag) raises K past the critical coupling; the three phase-dots in the corner ring converge, the ghost collapses into the lagged image so the doubling FUSES to one crisp picture, and the beat slows to ZERO-BEAT ‚ÄĒ a bright bloom as everything locks into one hyper-lucid instant (a ‚ú¶ bound badge). Move frantically and it stays scattered; settle and it comes home, then softly breathes apart. Interactive lock in ~3 s; a slow baseline-K floor also lifts across the arc so a hands-off glance resolves on its own (~3 min) ‚ÄĒ the piece drifts, beats, and blooms with zero input.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí `‚úď Compiled successfully` + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; scoped `next lint src/app/dream/1082-dissolve-return` = ‚úĒ 0/0, project `tsc --noEmit` = **exit 0 / 0 errors**, folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); only the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **among the MOST hand-verifiable ships in the lab** ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D + Web Audio, NO mic/camera/GPU/network/permissions; the un-bind‚Üíre-bind is fully headless (drift + beat from frame 1, resolve via the arc floor), and active stillness locks it in ~3 s; only the fine ear-feel of the zero-beat fuse is device-only). ¬∑ Cycle 621 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel models for ONE concept, *making the re-binding the star*: this **Kuramoto coupled-oscillator phase-lock** take vs `1083-coherence-tide` the **measured-cross-correlation + 0.1 Hz breath-entrainment** take (a real Pearson coherence C the user raises by breath-pacing their motion to a guided ring, shown on an honest tide-gauge) [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß621 ‚ÄĒ the legible/breath-paced sibling; its breath-as-coupling idea is already 1082's next-cycle #1]). **Honors the 2026-06-30 jury's loudest standing provocation (#4, un-cashed for 5+ juries): "build the actual cycle-2 of your best open concept" ‚ÄĒ the jury literally named 1063 and its exact deepening ("phase-locked re-coupling on the clarity snap"). Proves the lab can RETURN to a thing.** Also dents the jury's **#1 verification-debt** liability (Canvas2D, zero-permission, headless resolve) and breaks the migrating sameness the jury flagged ‚ÄĒ instead of a third back-to-back GPU-cosmic piece, it returns to a Canvas2D void and turns its scripted flash into a modelled, participatory, felt phase-lock. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient ‚Üí hyper-lucid intense** pole / `state: dissociation ‚Üí gamma re-binding` ¬∑ **tilt/drag + STILLNESS-as-coupling INPUT** (DeviceOrientation beta/gamma ‚Üí steer, iOS `requestPermission` inside the Enter-the-void gesture; pointer-drag fallback; velocity‚Üístillness‚Üícoupling K; a "Let it settle" boost button; `text-rose-300` audio-blocked note) / **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (a two-layer luminous void: a faint hue-shifted zero-lag ghost field beneath the phase-lagged field so out-of-phase reads as visible doubling/beating that fuses at lock, + receding rings/filaments + a bright central core that blooms on lock + a corner phase-ring reading the three oscillator phases and the coherence arc ‚ąĚ r) / cyan‚Üíviolet‚Üímagenta on near-black. **Audio (Web Audio):** 1063's generative drone bed (detuned sines ‚Üí slowly-opening low-pass ‚Üí synthetic convolution reverb) + 5 HRTF-spatialised sound motes orbiting the listener + a NEW beat partial whose beat frequency ‚ąĚ the AUDIO/CONTROL phase mismatch, collapsing to zero-beat unison with a filter-open bloom at lock ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; AudioContext gesture-gated, full teardown on unmount. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Kuramoto, Y. (1975/1984)** ‚ÄĒ the Kuramoto model of coupled phase oscillators, the order parameter r, onset of synchronization above a critical coupling K_c (the engine); **binding-by-synchrony** ‚ÄĒ Singer & Gray; Fries "communication through coherence" ‚ÄĒ gamma-band neural phase synchrony as the proposed solution to the "binding problem" (the lock models this binding instant); **Borjigin et al., PNAS 2013/2023** ‚ÄĒ the end-of-life gamma surge of hyper-lucid clarity (the bloom at full coherence); **Bera, Looger, Proekt & Cichon, _The Neuroscientist_ 2026** ‚ÄĒ dissociation as sensory-motor uncoupling (the un-bound K‚Čą0 state, inherited from 1063). **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (Kuramoto phase engine + two-layer Canvas2D ghost/lag renderer + drone bed + HRTF motes + phase-mismatch beat synth + stillness-coupling input = 5‚Äď6) ¬∑ #3 named refs (above) ¬∑ #4 **multi-cycle commitment ‚ÄĒ this IS the honored cycle-2** ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß621 added this cycle (gamma-coherence-as-binding). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-drag-as-primary INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT ¬∑ log-polar/form-constant warp ¬∑ center-out "bloom" ¬∑ cosmic-ambient pole (JURY 2026-06-30)]` ‚ÄĒ a cycle-2 is EXPLICITLY jury-exempt ("a genuine cycle-2 of an existing concept" = *actively wanted*), and it still adds a NON-pointer input axis (stillness-as-coupling), inherits the void's own aesthetic on purpose (the point of a return), and adds a hyper-lucid intense lock peak on top of the cosmic-ambient base. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the lock bloom is a slow luminance lift, doubling/beating are spatial not flashed, all well under 3 Hz. ## Cycle 619 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE massively-bigger concept ‚ÄĒ *an instrument with MEMORY that dreams your own playing back* ‚ÄĒ 3 parallel substrates, orchestrated) ‚ÄĒ the lab's **FIRST piece that records the user's own input and re-expresses it as the vision**; overturns the lab's founding bottom-up/entropy framing with the fresh **2026 eLife "oneirogen" generative-replay model**; forced off three.js-primary by the last-10 diversity audit (three.js 3√ó, at the ban line)

[/dream/1078-dream-replay](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1078-dream-replay) ‚ÄĒ **"Dream Replay": play a dark field and it records you ‚ÄĒ then at the peak it stops listening and DREAMS YOUR OWN PLAYING BACK, recombined and drifting, less and less faithful. WAKE (őĪ low): tap/drag anywhere; every onset plays a warm just-intonation bell (pitch = height) AND is written into a ring-buffer "engram," leaving a persistent hue-coded glyph, so the field fills with a constellation of your own notes ‚ÄĒ gesture makes sound + light directly. DREAM (őĪ high): live input fades and a top-down read-head autonomously walks the stored engrams in a RECOMBINED order ‚ÄĒ a stochastic walk over your recorded sequence-transitions whose sampling temperature IS őĪ (low-mid őĪ retraces your real phrases; high őĪ jumps freely and stitches fragments into sequences you never played), re-firing each note and re-blooming each glyph while positions drift, timing loosens, and glyphs smear into afterimage trails. You watch and hear your recent playing dreamed back, dissolving. A single őĪ: 0‚Üí1 arc (auto over ~50 s, or drive it with Close-your-eyes ‚Ėł / ‚óā Wake / Let-it-drift) is Bredenberg et al.'s oneirogen parameter ‚ÄĒ 0 = awake/bottom-up (basal), 1 = fully dreaming/top-down generative replay (apical). Zero permissions; a 2.5 s silent auto-demo taps a short motif then dreams it, so the whole arc sounds + moves on a glance with no input.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` all PASS ‚ÄĒ reached `Collecting page data`; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1078-dream-replay/` = 0/0, project `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors referencing 1078, folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper); only the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **among the MOST hand-verifiable ships in the lab** ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D + Web Audio, NO mic/camera/GPU/network/permissions, and the silent auto-demo runs the entire record‚Üídream‚Üídissolve arc, so a 06:30 phone glance sees AND hears it; only the fine ear-feel of the recombination at mid-őĪ is device-only). ¬∑ Cycle 619 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 parallel substrates for ONE concept, *the instrument that dreams you back*: this **Canvas2D engram-field, zero-permission** take vs `1079-dream-swarm` the **raw-WebGL2 additive-particle, intense-pole** take (onsets build a Markov transition model ‚Üí the dream erupts recombined phrases as a churning swarm, turbulence rising with őĪ) [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß619 ‚ÄĒ the intense sibling, resurrect with a GPU pass] vs `1080-dream-grain` the **mic ‚Üí granular self-choir, meditative, screen-minimal** take (your hummed motif recorded as feature-tagged grains ‚Üí an őĪ-temperature similarity walk re-sequences them into phrases you never sang; synthetic-voice fallback for zero-mic) [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß619 ‚ÄĒ the audio-first/non-screen sibling, resurrect with a mic + PSOLA pass]). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß619 dive** (Bredenberg et al., eLife 2026 oneirogen top-down-generative-replay model ‚Üí an instrument with memory that dreams your input back ‚ÄĒ the directest visible research‚Üíbuild chain). **Answers Karel's central directives + the standing jury:** delivers a **"massively bigger CONCEPT"** (the ambition mandate) ‚ÄĒ not a new visual but a new *relationship* (the instrument remembers you and re-authors you); *reduces* the **#1 verification-debt liability** (fully hand-verifiable, zero permissions, auto-demo) after a run of device-only-GPU ships; breaks "too similar" by being the lab's **first memory/replay instrument** ‚ÄĒ every prior psych piece renders a live field, none re-expresses your own recorded history; and it is a genuine **long-form/stateful** piece (minute-5 ‚Č† minute-1 because the memory grew) framed as a **multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 1 = record‚Üírecombine‚Üídream core; deepenings in the README). Dodges the diversity-banned **three.js-primary** (3√ó in the last 10, at the ban line ‚Üí Canvas2D), the standing **passive-mic** ban (input is discrete taps/drags ‚ÄĒ the mic take was deliberately banked), the **log-polar/form-constant warp** (none), and the **center-out "bloom"** monopole (blooms are distributed engram glyphs at your own note positions, not a radial field). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient ‚Üí dreamlike** pole / `state: hypnagogia / eyes-closed generative replay / dream-like` ¬∑ **discrete tapped/dragged-gesture INPUT recorded to memory** (pointer/touch onsets ‚Üí JI bell + persistent engram; Close-eyes/Wake/Let-it-drift őĪ controls; 2.5 s silent auto-demo; `text-rose-300` fallbacks for no-canvas / audio-blocked) / **Canvas2D engram-field OUTPUT** (persistent hue-coded glyphs + a travelling read-head + filament arcs + őĪ-deepening afterimage smear) / cool‚Üíwarm-on-near-black palette that warms as it dreams. **The audio composes the shared `_shared/psych/` engines** ‚ÄĒ a 10-voice self-cleaning JI pluck/bell synth (triangle‚Üísine as őĪ rises) over a `startDroneBank` bed + through `createVoidReverb` (both driven up by őĪ) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`; AudioContext gesture-gated, full teardown on unmount. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Bredenberg et al., "Modeling the hallucinatory effects of classical psychedelics in terms of replay-dependent plasticity mechanisms," eLife 2026;14:RP105968** (the oneirogen őĪ: 0‚Üí1 top-down-generative-replay model ‚ÄĒ apical/top-down replay overtaking basal/bottom-up sensory); **Carhart-Harris & Friston, "REBUS and the Anarchic Brain"** (2019 ‚ÄĒ the contrasted relaxation account); Friston active-inference / predictive processing. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (record the user's own onsets and re-express them as the hallucination via a temperature-walk over their recorded sequence-transitions ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó in the lab) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (engram ring-buffer recorder + Markov temperature-walk replay engine + őĪ-arc state machine + JI pluck synth + drone/void bed + Canvas2D engram renderer = 6) ¬∑ #3 named refs (above) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß619 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary OUTPUT (3√ó/10, ban line) ¬∑ passive-mic + pointer-drag-to-SCULPT INPUT ¬∑ log-polar/form-constant warp ¬∑ center-out "bloom" look ¬∑ back-to-back social/collective (self, 618)]` ¬∑ `picked=[discrete tapped-gesture-recorded-to-MEMORY INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D engram-field OUTPUT ¬∑ record-and-recombine-your-own-input (oneirogen temperature-walk) TECHNIQUE ¬∑ hypnagogic dream-replay VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all blooms/afterimage eased, luminance drifts slowly, well under 3 Hz; the "dream" deepens by lengthening trails, never by flashing. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + oscillator stop + AudioContext close after tails). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). Design notes (in-page toggle): `src/app/dream/1078-dream-replay/README.md`

## (Cycle 618 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *the shared / collective psychedelic state* ‚ÄĒ 2 parallel metaphors) ‚ÄĒ the lab's **FIRST social / collective-consciousness psychedelic piece**; every prior psych piece in the lane is a *solo* trip; discharges the twice-named JURY 2026-06-30 #2 gap ("a multi-user shared psychedelic room ‚ÄĒ the lab has never built one"); grounded in the fresh **Frontiers 2026 hyperscanning review** of interbrain synchrony; forced off three.js by the last-10 diversity audit (three.js-primary 4√ó))

[/dream/1077-two-minds](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1077-two-minds) ‚ÄĒ **"Two Minds": two people, apart, whose separately-tapped rhythms slowly ENTRAIN ‚ÄĒ the piece renders the invisible inter-brain synchrony between them as something you can both see and hear. Tap a pulse (Spacebar / tap anywhere); the piece estimates your tempo (median inter-onset interval) and phase, and couples it (Kuramoto phase-coupling) to a partner. Open a SECOND browser tab to BE the partner ‚ÄĒ the two tabs couple instantly over a `BroadcastChannel`, no server. With no partner, a synthetic "guide" starts at an OFF tempo and autonomously entrains toward yours over ~35 s, so the whole apart‚Üíapproaching‚Üímerged‚Üíheld arc plays on a single tab. Two distinct luminous presences (warm rose / cool violet) on opposite sides of a near-black field DRIFT toward each other as the synchrony index climbs; a woven Lissajous interference figure sharpens between them; at sustained lock they meet in a gold-white collective bloom and a held just-intonation added-sixth chord rings out. In audio: two shared-engine drones detuned apart AUDIBLY BEAT when you're out of sync and ramp toward unison as you lock ‚ÄĒ you hear the two minds stop beating against each other.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` ‚Üí `‚úď Compiled successfully in 49s` + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` all clean, **0 issues from the 1077 folder** ‚ÄĒ a fresh build-log grep of `1077`/`two-minds` = 0 hits; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **among the MOST hand-verifiable ships in the lab** ‚ÄĒ the synthetic-guide path runs the entire entrainment arc with zero permissions/mic/camera/network on a single tab, AND two tabs couple over BroadcastChannel with no server, so the synchrony story fully demonstrates on a 06:30 phone glance; only the fine ear-feel of the beating‚Üíunison + whether the lock reads as *ecstatic* are device-only). ¬∑ Cycle 618 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 orthogonal metaphors for ONE concept, the shared/collective state: this **RELATIONAL two-beings-that-drift-together** vs `1078-shared-veil` the **EMERGENT-FIELD** metaphor where both pour into ONE shared coupled-oscillator lattice that self-orders turbulent‚Üícoherent via the literal **Kuramoto order parameter `r`** [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß618 ‚ÄĒ the MORE surprising sibling (order-from-medium), one fire away; resurrect with an ear pass]). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß618 dive** (Frontiers 2026 interbrain-synchrony hyperscanning review + Kuramoto/Strogatz order parameter ‚Üí a *shared* psychedelic room). **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury + Karel's central notes:** discharges **JURY #2** (a multi-user shared psychedelic room ‚ÄĒ named a categorical gap TWICE, 0√ó the whole window); *reduces* the **#1 verification-debt liability** (fully hand-verifiable via single-tab guide + two-tab BroadcastChannel, no hardware) after a run of device-only-GPU ships; breaks the "too similar" complaint by opening the lane's first **social/collective** vibe (all 592‚Üí617 were solo trips) and deliberately NOT shipping a 3rd consecutive attractor piece; dodges the diversity-banned **three.js-primary** (4√ó in the last 10 ‚Üí Canvas2D), the banned **passive-mic** + **pointer-drag-to-sculpt** (input is discrete tapped onsets), the banned **log-polar warp**, and the **center-out "bloom"** monopole (the "bloom" here is the *meeting of two* at lock, not a lean-back radial field). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient ‚Üí collective-ecstatic** pole / `state: collective trance / dyadic entrainment` ¬∑ **multi-presence tapped-rhythm INPUT** (Spacebar/tap onsets ‚Üí tempo/phase; BroadcastChannel partner OR synthetic guide; emerald `‚óŹ partner connected` / amber `‚óŹ guide (no partner yet)` badge) / **Canvas2D two-presence entrainment OUTPUT** (two luminous orbs drifting to center + a sharpening Lissajous weave + gold-white lock bloom; graceful `text-rose-300` fallbacks for no-canvas / audio-blocked) / warm-rose + cool-violet ‚Üí gold-white palette on near-black. **The audio composes the shared `_shared/psych/` engines** ‚ÄĒ two `startDroneBank` voices (panned L/R) + a detuned pair that **beats ‚Üí unison** as synchrony rises + panned 2-op FM tap-bells + a held collective added-sixth chord at lock ‚Üí shared `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` (poly-cap ‚Č§10, self-cleaning nodes). **NAMED REFERENCES:** Y. Kuramoto, "Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators" (1975) ‚ÄĒ the coupled-phase-oscillator model + order parameter; Steven Strogatz, *Sync* (2003); the Frontiers in Cognition (2026) narrative review of interbrain synchrony in mindfulness/meditation hyperscanning (theta-band frontotemporal inter-brain synchrony as the signature of shared trance). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 **categorical lab-first** (the first SOCIAL / collective-consciousness psychedelic piece ‚ÄĒ every prior is solitary; WebRTC/BroadcastChannel/Kuramoto are each *primitive*-prior at 508/729/954, so the honest first is the *category*) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (multi-presence transport + Kuramoto synchrony estimator + coupled dual-drone/FM audio + entrainment renderer = 4) ¬∑ #3 named refs (above) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß618 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary OUTPUT (4√ó/10) ¬∑ passive-mic + pointer-drag-to-sculpt INPUT ¬∑ log-polar/form-constant warp ¬∑ center-out "bloom" look ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-as-only-pole ¬∑ (self) back-to-back attractor]` ¬∑ `picked=[multi-presence tapped-rhythm INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D two-presence entrainment OUTPUT ¬∑ Kuramoto interbrain-synchrony TECHNIQUE ¬∑ collective-trance social VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all pulses/blooms eased (fast rise, slow luminous decay), luminance smooth and well under 3 Hz. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + BroadcastChannel close + bye + oscillator stop + AudioContext close after tails). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network beyond same-origin BroadcastChannel; no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). ## (Cycle 617 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept, 2 parallel approaches) ‚ÄĒ a chaotic strange attractor as the COMPOSER; cashes the banked ‚≠ź RESURRECT (IDEAS ¬ß616); lands the JURY-owed **intense / non-membrane / non-bloom** pole; forced onto raw WebGL2 because the last-10 diversity audit banned three.js-primary (4√ó))

[/dream/1076-strange-canon](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1076-strange-canon) ‚ÄĒ **"Strange Canon": a chaotic dynamical system is the composer. Ren√© Thomas' cyclically-symmetric attractor traces one deterministic line that never exactly repeats ‚ÄĒ and that single trajectory is BOTH the score and the light. THE SIGNATURE: four voices read the same trajectory history buffer at staggered delays (0 / 1.5 / 3.0 / 4.5 s), each transposed to a just interval ‚ÄĒ a strict canon over an aperiodic melody. Per voice x‚ÜíJI pitch, z‚Üícutoff, y‚Üípan; notes fire on a zero-crossing of x (musically spaced, not per-frame). It plays and moves entirely on its own; tilt (or the pointer) nudges the chaos constant `b` within its safe band ‚ÄĒ a bifurcation nudge, never drag-to-sculpt ‚ÄĒ and you hear the canon tighten toward periodicity. Rendered as a raw-WebGL2 additive auto-rotating 3D ribbon of the orbit, colored by instantaneous speed (cyan/violet‚Üígold), with a soft read-head marker at each voice's position on the line.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` ‚Üí `‚úď Compiled successfully in 49s` + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` all clean, **0 issues from the 1076 folder**; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **fully headless-demonstrable** ‚ÄĒ the attractor steps on a `setInterval` sim clock independent of rAF, so the canon composes + the drone/reverb swell + the ribbon draws with **zero input**; only the *musicality* of the canon and the WebGL2 ribbon on real hardware are ear/GPU-only). ¬∑ Cycle 617 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 parallel approaches to attractor-as-composer: this **visible-orbit ribbon canon** vs `1077-hidden-canon` the SYTHM deepening where an **Aizawa attractor is a HIDDEN conductor** whose never-drawn baton births a neon particle swarm + a 3-shadow canon, so you infer its shape from where light is born [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß617 ‚ÄĒ the MORE surprising sibling, one fire away; resurrect with a GPU/ear pass]). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß617 dive** (SYTHM's "attractor is the hidden conductor," Jun 2026 + the newly-cited Bidlack "Musical Attractors" CMJ) AND cashes the banked ¬ß616 seed ‚ÄĒ a visible research‚Üíbuild chain + an *actual return to a named/banked gap*. **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury:** discharges **#3** (owe an INTENSE piece that is NOT a membrane and kills the "bloom" look ‚ÄĒ this is intense/kinetic-geometric, a 3D orbiting ribbon, no center-out bloom); *reduces* the **#1 verification-debt liability** (fully autonomous headless sim); and it is the "**actually return and ship the named gap**" discipline the jury says the lab lacks (attractor-as-generative-engine is mentioned all over the idea lists, never shipped until now). Dodges the diversity-banned **three.js-primary** (4√ó in the last 10 ‚Üí raw WebGL2), the banned **pointer-drag-to-sculpt** (input only perturbs a constant; runs autonomously), and the **cosmic-ambient/warm** poles (this is intense). **For**: adult / **intense** pole / `state: deterministic-chaos / geometric-organism` ¬∑ **tilt-or-pointer-as-bifurcation-perturbation INPUT** (optional ‚ÄĒ nudges `b‚ąą[0.12,0.21]`; fully autonomous with none) / **raw-WebGL2 additive `LINE_STRIP` OUTPUT** (auto-rotating perspective camera, speed‚Üícolor ramp, comet-head sprites + per-voice read-head markers, `SRC_ALPHA‚ÜíONE`; Canvas2D ribbon + audio-only fallbacks) / neon cyan/violet‚Üígold on near-black. **The audio composes the shared `_shared/psych/` engines** ‚ÄĒ 4 canon voices (2-op FM plucks, poly cap 8 + cleanup) ‚Üí shared `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`, over a trajectory-speed-driven `startDroneBank` bed. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Ren√© Thomas, "Deterministic chaos seen in terms of feedback circuits" (1999); E.N. Lorenz, "Deterministic Nonperiodic Flow" (1963); R. Bidlack, "Musical Attractors: A New Method for Audio Synthesis" (Computer Music Journal); SYTHM / "Sound, Given a Body" (Symphoenix, Medium, Jun 2026 ‚ÄĒ the attractor as hidden conductor). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 never-used (attractor-as-generative-engine, grep-0√ó as a shipped piece; the delayed-reader canon over an aperiodic line is a fresh musical structure) ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß617 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary OUTPUT (4√ó/10) ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT (3√ó, near) ¬∑ passive-mic + pointer-drag INPUT ¬∑ cosmic-ambient/warm POLE ¬∑ membrane / center-out-bloom LOOK]` ¬∑ `picked=[tilt/pointer-perturbation (autonomous) INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 LINE_STRIP OUTPUT ¬∑ strange-attractor-sonification + delayed-reader-canon TECHNIQUE ¬∑ intense neon kinetic-geometric VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** additive glow drifts slowly, no strobe, luminance changes smooth. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + `setInterval` clear + oscillator stop + `gl` buffer/program deletes + AudioContext closed after tails). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). Design notes (in-page toggle): `src/app/dream/1076-strange-canon/README.md`

## (Cycle 616 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers) ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST shipped **score-follower / reactive accompaniment**; discharges the thrice-banked JURY #5 (score-following, 0√ó shipped) + Karel's live-performance-fitness value; forced onto raw WebGL2 because the last-10 diversity audit banned BOTH Canvas2D-primary (4√ó) AND three.js-primary (4√ó))

[/dream/1074-pulse-mirror](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1074-pulse-mirror) ‚ÄĒ **"Pulse Mirror": play a rhythm ‚ÄĒ clap, tap, sing, or knock ‚ÄĒ and a duet partner tracks your tempo and answers ON the beat, *anticipating* it. It listens (spectral-flux onset detection), finds your pulse (median-IOI tempo/beat tracker), and commits a warm just-intonation call-and-response to your *predicted* next beat on the Web Audio clock, so the answer lands in time rather than late. Runs live on the mic, or entirely headless via a self-clocking demo performer that shares the identical interface. Raw WebGL2 additive sprites: an amber caller (your side, left) blooms on each onset, a violet/rose answer (the instrument, right) blooms ‚ÄĒ with a faint anticipation pre-glow ‚ÄĒ on each scheduled note, over an expanding beat ring and a sub-3 Hz breath.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` ‚Üí `‚úď Compiled successfully in 48s` + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` (exit 0) all clean, **0 issues from the 1074 folder** ‚ÄĒ build-log grep of `1074`/`pulse-mirror` = 0 hits; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **among the MOST hand-verifiable ships in weeks** ‚ÄĒ the demo-performer path runs the entire onset‚Üítempo‚Üíanticipation‚Üíanswer loop with zero permissions/mic/camera/network, so the tracking + anticipatory-reply arc fully demonstrates on a 06:30 phone glance; only real-mic onset sensitivity + the ear-feel of the duet are device-only). ¬∑ Cycle 616 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this warm score-duet vs `1076-strange-canon` an attractor-AS-composer piece ‚ÄĒ Ren√© Thomas' chaotic ODE is the score and 4 delayed voices read the same aperiodic line as a strict canon [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß616 ‚ÄĒ the MOST surprising, anchored on the Jun-2026 SYTHM find, owed intense/kinetic pole; one fire away] vs `1075-flux-veil` the lab's first **optical-flow** piece ‚ÄĒ webcam dense motion advects a WebGL2 dye field [de-selected a 2nd consecutive fire, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß616 ‚ÄĒ highest ambition 4/5 + the TD-port, but device-only-GPU verifiability; resurrect with a GPU pass]). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß616 dive** (the score-following delayed-decision/anticipation lineage confirmed current; the SYTHM "attractor-as-conductor" find seeded the banked `1076`). **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury + Karel's central notes:** discharges **JURY #5** (score-following / reactive accompaniment ‚ÄĒ named actively-wanted + 0√ó shipped, banked-and-deferred THREE times: ¬ß613, ¬ß615, now shipped ‚ÄĒ the "actually return and ship the named gap" discipline the jury says the lab lacks); lands **Karel's review priority #3** (live-performance fitness ‚ÄĒ low-latency mic instrument you play on stage); *reduces* the **#1 verification-debt liability** (fully-headless demo-performer path after a run of device-only-GPU ships); dodges the diversity-banned **Canvas2D-primary** AND **three.js-primary** (both 4√ó in the last 10 ‚Üí raw WebGL2), the banned **pointer-drag** (input is active mic / demo onsets), and the banned **cosmic-ambient** pole (this is warm jazz call-and-response). **For**: adult / **warm** pole / `state: jazz / call-and-response` ¬∑ **active-mic INPUT** (you play INTO it ‚ÄĒ clap/tap/sing/knock; emerald `‚óŹ listening (mic)` / amber `‚óŹ demo performer` badge; a self-clocking demo performer runs the whole loop with no mic) / **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (additive point sprites, `#version 300 es`, `ONE,ONE` blending, soft radial falloff; Canvas2D + audio-only graceful fallbacks) / warm amber-caller/violet-answer palette on near-black. **The audio is composed, not reimplemented** ‚ÄĒ shared `_shared/psych/` engines under a live-scheduled duet: spectral-flux onset (1024-FFT, 120 Hz highpass, adaptive mean+1.6ŌÉ, ~90 ms refractory) ‚Üí median-IOI tempo tracker (octave-fold to ~60‚Äď200 BPM, confidence from IOI spread, `nextBeatAfter()`) ‚Üí anticipatory lookahead scheduler (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms ahead) commits JI-ladder notes (1¬∑9/8¬∑5/4¬∑4/3¬∑3/2¬∑5/3¬∑15/8¬∑2 over ~220 Hz, triangle + sine sub through a soft lowpass) to the predicted beat; soft JI pad (`startDroneBank`) + code-generated `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Roger B. Dannenberg, "An On-Line Algorithm for Real-Time Accompaniment" (ICMC 1984) ‚ÄĒ match + predict ahead so accompaniment doesn't lag; Daniel P.W. Ellis, "Beat Tracking by Dynamic Programming" (2007) ‚ÄĒ beat = period + phase from an onset-strength signal. **Ambition (honest 2/5):** #1 never-used (the lab's FIRST shipped score-follower / reactive accompaniment ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó as a shipped category) ¬∑ #3 named refs (Dannenberg 1984 / Ellis 2007). The value here is *discharging a concretely-named, thrice-deferred jury liability* + live-performance fitness, not criteria-count. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary-output (4√ó/10) ¬∑ three.js-as-primary-output (4√ó/10) ¬∑ pointer-drag-as-primary-input ¬∑ cosmic-ambient pole ¬∑ log-polar warp ¬∑ center-out bloom]` ¬∑ `picked=[active-mic INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ score-following (spectral-flux + median-IOI + anticipatory scheduler) TECHNIQUE ¬∑ warm jazz call-and-response VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** all blooms eased (fast rise, slow luminous decay), nothing strobes faster than ~3 Hz. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + scheduler stop + audio faded then AudioContext closed after tails). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). ## (Cycle 615 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers) ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST **conceptual/critical** piece + FIRST **audio-first/non-screen** output; forced onto fresh modalities because the last-10 diversity audit banned BOTH Canvas2D-primary (4√ó) AND three.js-primary (4√ó))

[/dream/1073-last-breath](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1073-last-breath) ‚ÄĒ **"Last Breath": a sound that lives only while you HOLD it ‚ÄĒ and erodes a little every second you listen, never heard the same way twice. A finite pool of just-intonation partials with private "integrity" that crumbles *irreversibly* with held listening: the brightest partials disintegrate first, the chord detunes out of true, the void tail opens wetter as brightness leaves, and the whole material trends toward silence over a couple of minutes. Release and it vanishes; the only way back is a deliberate, destructive reset that erases the version you made. An instrument about impermanence and surrender ‚ÄĒ the psychedelic ego-dissolution "letting go," done as concept, not spectacle.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` ‚Üí exit 0, Compiled + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` (exit 0) all clean, **0 issues from the 1073 folder** ‚ÄĒ build-log grep of `1073`/`last-breath` = 0 hits; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **among the MOST hand-verifiable ships in the lab** ‚ÄĒ pure Web Audio + SVG/DOM + a self-holding "witness" path, zero permissions/GPU/sensor/network, so the living‚Üíeroding‚Üívanishing arc fully demonstrates on a 06:30 phone glance; only the *ear-feel* of the erosion is device-only). ¬∑ Cycle 615 (adult, **WIDE** ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this conceptual-vanishing piece vs `1071-pulse-mirror` a live-mic ACTIVE **score-follower** that answers your rhythm on the predicted beat [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß615 ‚ÄĒ JURY #5, 0√ó, fully demo-verifiable; resurrect for the warm live-performance pole] vs `1072-flux-veil` the lab's first **optical-flow** piece ‚ÄĒ webcam dense motion advects a WebGL2 dye field [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß615 ‚ÄĒ the TD-port research mandate, highest ambition 4/5, but device-only-GPU verifiability; resurrect with a GPU pass]). **Directly implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß615 dive** (the conceptual/critical menu slot the lab has 0√ó, anchored on Basinski's *Disintegration Loops*; the dive's optical-flow + score-following threads seeded the two banked siblings). **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury + Karel's central note:** the **"too similar" complaint** head-on (this is the most orthogonal output the lab has shipped ‚ÄĒ audio-first, non-screen, a category named-but-never-built); the **#1 verification-debt liability** (it *reduces* it ‚ÄĒ fully perceivable without hardware, after a run of device-only GPU ships); dodges the diversity-banned **Canvas2D-primary** AND **three.js-primary** (both 4√ó in the last 10), the banned **pointer-drag** (input is a sustained hold), and the **real-data-sonification** streak (1069/1070 back-to-back). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient-dark / meditative-surrender** pole / `state: ego-dissolution / impermanence / NDE letting-go` ¬∑ **sustained-hold INPUT** (press-and-hold pointer/touch OR Space/Enter; a ~4.5 s **witness** self-hold demonstrates the arc with zero input) / **audio-first + minimal SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (a thinning ring + per-partial integrity bars + a % "material" readout + dimming violet luminance ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT a GPU spectacle, testing the lab's screen bias) / austere dark palette. **The audio is composed, not reimplemented** ‚ÄĒ shared `_shared/psych/` engines on a finite eroding material: 9 JI partials (root 110 Hz, ratios 1¬∑3/2¬∑2¬∑5/2¬∑3¬∑4¬∑9/2¬∑5¬∑6) ‚Üí shared `createVoidReverb` (~6 s, wet opens as brightness leaves) over a quiet sub `startDroneBank` ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`; integrity erodes `ERODE_PER_SEC √ó crumbleWeight(i)` per held second (top partials ~3.2√ó faster), detune drifts as integrity falls, re-engaging costs `ERODE_PER_HOLD` ‚ÄĒ so you can never listen "for free," and the only restoration is a destructive `reset()`. **NAMED REFERENCES:** William Basinski, *The Disintegration Loops* (2002) ‚ÄĒ tape that crumbled as it played, the music documenting its own decay; the Buddhist *anicca* (impermanence) / ego-dissolution "letting go" phenomenology (not a medical claim). **Ambition (honest 2/5):** #1 never-used (the lab's FIRST conceptual/critical piece AND first audio-first/non-screen output AND first irreversible-stateful-memory instrument ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó as a category) ¬∑ #3 named ref (Basinski / *anicca*). The ambition here is *categorical/conceptual* ‚ÄĒ a "massively bigger CONCEPT," not a bigger render ‚ÄĒ and the WIDE fire banked the higher-criteria explorers (1072 = 4/5) as seeds. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary-output (4√ó/10) ¬∑ three.js-as-primary-output (4√ó/10) ¬∑ pointer-drag-as-primary-input ¬∑ real-data-sonification (2√ó back-to-back) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient-as-the-only-pole]` ¬∑ `picked=[sustained-hold INPUT ¬∑ audio-first + minimal SVG/DOM OUTPUT (0√ó) ¬∑ irreversible-stateful-erosion TECHNIQUE ¬∑ meditative-impermanence VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; the most orthogonal output the lab has shipped. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** trivially safe ‚ÄĒ only slow fades, no strobe, no GPU flicker. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + witness timers cleared + audio faded then AudioContext closed after tails). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). ## (Cycle 614 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (2 competing interaction-model explorers of one concept) ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST HRTF-spatialized *planetary* instrument, lands the owed **dark NDE-void** pole + the JURY 2026-06-30 #2 actively-wanted **spatial** category (0√ó))

[/dream/1070-deep-tremor](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1070-deep-tremor) ‚ÄĒ **"Deep Tremor": every real earthquake happening on Earth *right now* becomes one depth-timbred gong-strike, HRTF-spatialized to its true compass bearing around you, decaying into a cavernous void ‚ÄĒ over a dark, very-low just-intonation drone, on a slowly-rotating dark globe where each quake rings out as an expanding circle at its true latitude/longitude. One Begin gesture fetches the live USGS feed, replays the planet's last hour over ~36 s, then polls every 60 s for new events. Runs on synthetic Ring-of-Fire data offline so it always sounds + moves.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` ‚Üí `‚úď Compiled successfully in 56s` + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` (exit 0) all clean, **0 issues from the 1070 folder** ‚ÄĒ build-log grep of `1070`/`deep-tremor` = 0 hits; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **NOT GPU/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ no GPU/audio in the box, but the synthetic-fallback path + autonomous 60 s polling + the rotating globe + rings-at-true-location ARE the headless paths: zero permissions, zero device, so it sounds and the planet visibly pulses on a 06:30 phone glance ‚ÄĒ among the easiest pieces in weeks to hand-verify). ¬∑ Cycle 614 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 competing *interaction-model* explorers of one concept: this EXOCENTRIC dark-globe approach vs `1071-tremor-core` an EGOCENTRIC "you are suspended at Earth's core in a black void and quakes arrive as HRTF strikes out of the dark" [de-selected, banked ‚≠ź IDEAS ¬ß614 ‚ÄĒ the purest NDE-void framing + the more surprising sibling, but its near-black visual + headphone-dependent bearing is the *least* headless-legible; resurrect with head-tracking]). **Directly implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß614 dive** ("Echoes of the Land," arXiv:2507.14947, 2025; the ambisonic "make the Earth audible" seismic-sonification tradition; the live no-key USGS GeoJSON feeds). **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury:** #2 ‚ÄĒ **spatial input/output was named actively-wanted + 0√ó** (this is the lab's first HRTF-spatialized *planetary* instrument); #3 ‚ÄĒ the **owed dark/intense pole that isn't a membrane and isn't a bloom** (a dark NDE-void with rings at true locations, not a center-out glow); dodges the banned **pointer-drag-as-primary-input** (input is the live data stream + one Begin gesture), the banned **Canvas2D-as-primary-output** (three.js globe + rings), **log-polar/form-constant warp** (none), and the **center-out "bloom" look** (rings appear all over the planet at real epicentres). **For**: adult / **dark NDE-void** pole (the owed swing ‚ÄĒ STATE 613 queued it RESURRECT-FIRST) / `state: NDE void / dark planetary presence` ¬∑ **live-earthquake-data INPUT** (USGS `all_hour`‚Üí`all_day` GeoJSON, client-side fetch with 5 s `AbortController` + mandatory synthetic Ring-of-Fire fallback, emerald `live ¬∑ USGS` / amber `synthetic` badge) / **three.js dark-globe + HRTF-spatialized-audio OUTPUT** (slowly-rotating point/wireframe Earth in a starfield, expanding rings + radial glows tangent to the surface at each quake's true lat/lon, `hasWebGL()` probe ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice; each strike through a `PannerNode(panningModel:"HRTF")` placed on the unit sphere from (lon,lat), depth‚Üíradial distance) / dark cavernous palette. **The audio is composed, not reimplemented** ‚ÄĒ the extracted `_shared/psych/` engines on live data: per-quake gong synthesis (mag‚Üíinverse-pitch + loudness + decay; depth‚Üítimbre: shallow = bright/sharp, deep = dark/sub/long) ‚Üí HRTF panner ‚Üí shared `createVoidReverb` (~8 s cistern) over a dark `startDroneBank` (root ~41, low) routed into the same void; clustering quakes swell the drone via a decaying activity envelope; a 120 ms strike-spacing queue + 48-deep backlog cap so a burst never clips ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. **Mapping (honest physics):** a deep-focus quake sits *below and far + quiet*, a shallow one *near + bright + sharp*; a big quake is a low massive boom, a small one a high tap. **NAMED REFERENCES:** "Echoes of the Land: An Interactive Installation Based on Physical Model of Earthquake" (arXiv:2507.14947, 2025); the ambisonic / spatial seismic-sonification tradition ("make the Earth audible"); near-death-experience / void phenomenology. **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (live-data fetch/parse + three.js globe/rings + HRTF PannerNode spatialization + per-quake modal/noise synthesis + convolution void + drone = 6) ¬∑ #3 named refs (above) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß614 added THIS cycle (<14 days). #1 NOT cleanly claimed ‚ÄĒ HRTF/PannerNode is lab-prior (53/258/677/1063) + real-data-sonification shipped last fire (1069); the honest fresh axis is *live planetary seismic data ‚Üí HRTF-placed dark void instrument*, grep-0√ó as a combination. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-drag-as-primary-input ¬∑ Canvas2D-as-primary-output ¬∑ log-polar/form-constant warp ¬∑ center-out "bloom" look ¬∑ cosmic-ambient pole (JURY 2026-06-30; rebalanced ‚ÄĒ dark pole now owed after 1069's cosmic-ambient swing)]` ¬∑ `picked=[live-earthquake-data INPUT ¬∑ three.js dark-globe + HRTF-spatial OUTPUT ¬∑ real-API-sonification + HRTF-spatialization TECHNIQUE ¬∑ dark NDE-void VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Love-signal tailwind:** Karel's loved *spatial-presence* cluster (`148-spatial-palette`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `107-ocean-presence`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) + the luminous-field loves; a dark spatial planetary instrument sits near the spatial-presence zone. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow ring expansions + smooth luminance only, well under 3 Hz. Full teardown on unmount (rAF + scene dispose + audio stop + poll/replay timers cleared + AudioContext close after tails). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; fetches only public no-key USGS GeoJSON GETs ‚ÄĒ no side effects, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ `three` already a project dep). **Cycle 612 deepening (2026-06-30, in place ‚ÄĒ same route `/dream/1068-entity-lattice`):** 1068 now has an **arc with memory**, not just instantaneous reactivity. **(1) Per-joint velocity colouring** ‚ÄĒ every particle is coloured by its joint's *true* per-frame speed (`uJointSpeed[12]`), so a fast limb paints its copies hot gold-white while a still torso stays deep indigo. **(2) A breakthrough STATE MACHINE** ‚ÄĒ sustaining high drive charges a HUD meter; cross it and the lattice **latches a held hyper-symmetric mandala** (fold snaps to max, the kaleidoscope spin freezes, everything floods gold, and a high just-intonation **shimmer chord** blooms) for a bounded dwell, then a refractory cool-down. The synthetic **demo body self-drives a vigorous passage every ~40 s**, so the whole machine ‚ÄĒ colouring, latch, meter, shimmer ‚ÄĒ demonstrates with **zero hardware** (this *reduces* 1068's verification debt vs cycle 1, not compounds it). Grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß612 (path (b)): DMT breakthrough is *stabilization-by-symmetry* ‚ÄĒ "scenes too irregular are impossible to stabilize" (QRI) ‚ÄĒ which is exactly the held-mandala latch. drive ALSO raises the lattice fold-density + brightness so eyes + ears get the same rising cue. **Directly implements RESEARCH ¬ß611** (the embodied-installation frontier ‚ÄĒ "Waves of Connection," Osaka Expo 2025: three.js+WebGPU ~1M particles + Kinect body tracking, after Safari 26 / Sept-2025 made WebGPU universal ‚ÄĒ fused with DMT-breakthrough phenomenology: "more directions in space than there should be" + accelerating geometry + ascending sound). **NAMED REFERENCES:** "Waves of Connection" (Osaka Expo 2025); Graham St John, *The Breakthrough Experience: DMT Hyperspace and its Liminal Aesthetics* (Anthropology of Consciousness, 2018); Heinrich Kl√ľver (form constants); Roger Shepard / Jean-Claude Risset (endless glissando). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (MediaPipe pose + GPU point-field render + Shepard + JI drone + convolution reverb + bell = 6) ¬∑ #3 named refs (above) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß611 added THIS cycle (<14 days). #1 NOT cleanly claimed (body-pose input exists at 677/710/724/1057/1051; three.js Points exist) ‚ÄĒ the honest fresh axis is *full-body pose ‚Üí kaleidoscopic self-replication into an intense DMT entity-lattice*, grep-0√ó as a combination. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-drag-as-primary-input (8√ó/15) ¬∑ Canvas2D-as-primary-output (8√ó/15) ¬∑ log-polar/form-constant warp ¬∑ center-out "bloom" look ¬∑ cosmic-ambient pole (6√ó/15 ‚ÄĒ owe an intense non-membrane)]` (JURY 2026-06-30) ¬∑ `picked=[full-body-camera-pose INPUT ¬∑ three.js GPU point-field OUTPUT ¬∑ kaleidoscopic self-replication + Shepard-ascent TECHNIQUE ¬∑ intense DMT-hyperspace VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Love-signal tailwind:** Karel's loved cluster is luminous particle *fields* (`130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `321-spectral-flight`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `243-spectral-cloud`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `267-spectral-drift`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) ‚ÄĒ a 200k-point lattice of selves sits squarely there (a curate factor over the discrete-polyhedra sibling). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ kaleidoscope spin + brightness swells + saturation stay well under 3 Hz; intensity comes from fast motion, not flashing. Full teardown on unmount (rAF + scene dispose + audio stop + camera stop + AudioContext close). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ `three` + MediaPipe-via-CDN; no AI/cost/network surface beyond the public MediaPipe CDN). ## (Cycle 610 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept via 2 substrates ¬∑ breathe yourself into an endless rising ascent where a Shepard‚ÄďRisset glissando + a congruent visual-vection starfield make you feel you're physically moving through boundless space ¬∑ **cosmic-ambient** pole ¬∑ cashes the queued ‚≠źRESURRECT-FIRST + discharges JURY #1 "make one you can PLAY")

[/dream/1067-boundless-breath](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1067-boundless-breath) ‚ÄĒ **"Boundless Breath": breathe into the mic ‚ÄĒ inhale gathers a vast ~120k-star three.js field inward toward a luminous core and lifts a Shepard‚ÄďRisset endless-glissando upward; exhale releases the stars to boundless drift. You PLAY the rising, not watch it.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` reached compile ‚úď + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` all clean, **0 issues from the 1067 folder** ‚ÄĒ scoped `next lint` exit 0, build-log grep of `1067-boundless-breath` = 0 hits; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **not GPU/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ no mic/GPU in the box, so the breath auto-ranging + the felt vection are device-only, but the auto-paced ~5.5/min fallback IS the headless path and breathes + sounds with zero input). ¬∑ Cycle 610 (adult, **DEEP** ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 boundless-vection substrate explorers). **For**: adult / **active-breath-as-control** INPUT (mic-RMS envelope, slow attack/release so it reads as breathing; ~5.5/min sine auto-pace fallback when no mic ‚ÄĒ non-passive, the breath IS the control signal) / scarce **three.js** point-cloud OUTPUT (~120k additive `THREE.Points` in a deep spherical shell; inhale eases stars inward + speeds the radial rush past the camera = congruent optic-flow vection, exhale releases to drift; violet‚Üícyan‚Üígold ramp, points recycle at the far shell so the flow is endless) / cosmic-ambient meditative-boundless palette. **The honest novelty** (NOT "first Shepard" ‚ÄĒ `40/132/187-shepard-tone` predate it, and the ¬ß609 bank's "first Shepard engine" claim was *false*): the lab's first **breath-coupled, vection-paired, *played*** Shepard‚ÄďRisset ‚ÄĒ grounded in **RESEARCH ¬ß610** (the glissando induces measurable *auditory vection* / postural sway, comparable in strength to *visual* self-motion, so the streaming starfield reinforces the felt ascent ‚ÄĒ "transport without the drug"). **The technique:** a real Shepard‚ÄďRisset engine (`shepard.ts` ‚ÄĒ 9 octave-spaced sine partials, each gain-weighted by a fixed Gaussian window over log-frequency so partials fade in at the bottom / out at the top with no audible edge; a continuous octave-wrapping global transpose so the rise is genuinely endless; breath scales the ascent rate `0.018 + 0.16¬∑b` oct/s + opens timbral brightness) under a 7-limit JI drone bed (root + 3:2 fifth, detuned) + a **code-generated** noise-decay convolution reverb (no fetch) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. One drive loop reads the smoothed breath envelope each frame and feeds BOTH audio + scene, so eyes and ears get the same rising cue. **Brings three.js back** (Canvas2D was the diversity-audit-banned output last cycle, 5√ó in 10). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (three.js point-cloud + breath analyser + Shepard bank + JI drone + convolution reverb = 5) ¬∑ #3 named refs (Roger Shepard 1964; Jean-Claude Risset continuous glissando; auditory-vection / postural-sway research) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß610 added THIS cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary OUTPUT (5√ó last-10) ¬∑ full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at (standing JURY ‚ÄĒ and the de-selected sibling 1068 sat in exactly this form) ¬∑ passive-mic-as-primary-input ¬∑ lean-back-screensaver]` ¬∑ `picked=[active-breath INPUT ¬∑ three.js point-cloud OUTPUT ¬∑ Shepard-glissando + breath-vection TECHNIQUE ¬∑ cosmic-ambient boundless VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow smooth luminance drift only (well under 3 Hz). Full teardown on unmount (rAF + scene dispose + audio stop + mic stop + AudioContext close). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ `three` already a project dep; no AI/cost/network surface). Sibling **`1068-vection-well`** (WebGL2 raw-GLSL optical-flow tunnel, same breath‚ÜíShepard concept) de-selected ‚ÄĒ even though breath-played, its single full-screen fragment-shader *form* is the jury-banned one ‚ÄĒ banked IDEAS ¬ß610. ## Cycle 609 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal cosmic-ambient interactive instruments ¬∑ the lab's FIRST Physarum slime-mold WebGPU-compute agent simulation ¬∑ cosmic-web / meditative-boundless, **cosmic-ambient** pole ‚ÄĒ brings WebGPU compute back as the resonating body [JURY #4]

[/dream/1066-cosmic-web](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1066-cosmic-web) ‚ÄĒ **"The Cosmic Web": seed luminous nutrients into the void with your hand and a living network of dark-thread filaments grows between them ‚ÄĒ the same slime-mold algorithm astronomers use to map the universe's dark-matter cosmic web, turned into a playable cosmic-ambient instrument whose connectivity SINGS. The GPU agent field isn't decorated by the audio; the field IS the resonating body ‚ÄĒ a 24√ó24 readback of the live trail drives the drone's brightness, the bell density, and the stereo pan.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check all green, **0 issues from the 1066 folder** ‚ÄĒ scoped `eslint` exit 0, project `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors, build-log grep of `1066-cosmic-web` = 0 hits; full `npm run build` reached `‚úď Compiled successfully in 57s` + lint + types then blocked only by the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **the CPU-Physarum fallback + autonomous nutrient drift ARE the headless paths ‚ÄĒ a living, re-routing web renders with zero input/hardware** ‚ÄĒ only the WGSL compute pipeline + the readback‚Üíaudio coupling *feel* are device-only) ¬∑ Cycle 609 (adult, **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal cosmic-ambient instruments: this Physarum cosmic-web vs `1067-boundless-breath` a **three.js** 120k-star field you BREATHE in/out driving a Shepard‚ÄďRisset endless ascent [banked ‚≠źRESURRECT-FIRST, IDEAS ¬ß609] vs `1068-attractor-temple` a WebGPU strange-attractor whose secret constants you bend through bifurcations [banked, IDEAS ¬ß609]). **Directly implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß609 dive** (the slime-mold/Physarum cosmic-web model ‚ÄĒ Elek-Burchett 2020 ‚ÄĒ freshly back via May-2026's JWST sharpest-ever filament image + April-2026's ShaderVine WebGPU-Physarum tooling). **Brings WebGPU compute back as the resonating body (JURY 2026-06-29 #4, down to 2√ó)** while staying a genuinely *played* instrument (JURY #1 ‚ÄĒ you seed and grow the web, not watch it), and dodges the diversity-audit-banned **Canvas2D-as-primary output** (5√ó in the last 10: 1065/1064/1063/1060/1050) + the standing jury-banned full-screen-WebGL2-stare-shader + passive-mic. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / `state: cosmic-web / meditative boundlessness` ¬∑ **pointer/touch nutrient-SEED INPUT** (active, played, non-mic ‚ÄĒ click/drag plants nutrient wells; nearby clicks reinforce) / **WebGPU-compute-Physarum OUTPUT** (300k‚Äď1M agents, atomic i32 trail deposits, diffuse/decay, full-canvas cosmic tone-map: deep-indigo void ‚Üí violet ‚Üí cyan-white filaments ‚Üí gold nutrient cores) **with a genuine CPU-Physarum fallback** (256¬≤, 45k agents, same Jones model + same `FieldStats`, ImageData render) so it runs on any device, path-badged emerald/amber / luminous cosmic-web palette. **The technique:** Jeff Jones's 2010 agent model verbatim ‚ÄĒ each agent `{x,y,heading}` senses 3 points ahead (fwd / fwd-left / fwd-right at a sense angle+distance), rotates toward the strongest reading, steps at constant speed, wraps, and `atomicAdd`s a fixed deposit into an `i32` fixed-point trail buffer; a diffuse (3√ó3 box-blur) + decay pass re-routes the network; nutrient wells add an attractive Gaussian halo to the sensed value so filaments form between seeds. **The field IS the body:** every 4th frame a GPU-reduce compute shader downsamples the trail to 24√ó24 into a mappable buffer, read with `mapAsync` (one in flight, never blocking) ‚Üí CPU `FieldStats` (identical on both paths): **energy** (mean brightness) ‚Üí drone gain + lowpass cutoff + shimmer; **variance** (branchiness) ‚Üí sparse FM-bell density; **brightest-region-x** ‚Üí slow stereo pan. Audio: a 7-limit-JI detuned drone bank (65.4 Hz + 3:2 + octave + 9:2 shimmer, beating pairs) ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí panner ‚Üí **code-generated 4.2 s convolution reverb** (decaying-noise IR, no files) ‚Üí compressor ‚Üí master, with just/pentatonic FM bell pings. Pre-seeded wells + an autonomous seeder (adds/relocates/fades wells ~every 7 s) keep it alive + sounding + re-routing over minutes (minute-5 ‚Č† minute-1). **NAMED REFERENCES:** Jeff Jones, *Characteristics of pattern formation and evolution in approximations of Physarum transport networks* (2010 ‚ÄĒ the agent model); Sage Jenson's *"mold"* Physarum artworks (the trail-field-as-artwork aesthetic); Oskar Elek / Joseph Burchett et al., *Monte Carlo Physarum Machine* / *"Revealing the Dark Threads of the Cosmic Web"* (UC Santa Cruz, 2020 ‚ÄĒ slime-mold reconstructs dark-matter filaments; the conceptual core). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 never-used (the lab's FIRST Physarum agent-transport sim + first WebGPU-compute Physarum ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó; distinct from `1050-mycelial-grow`, which was Canvas2D space-colonization, a different algorithm) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (compute agent pass + atomic trail + diffuse/decay + GPU-reduce readback‚Üíaudio + JI drone/bell engine + render = 6) ¬∑ #3 named refs (Jones / Jenson / Elek-Burchett) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß609 added THIS cycle (<14 days ‚ÄĒ the May-2026 JWST filament image + April-2026 ShaderVine WebGPU-Physarum). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary-OUTPUT (5√ó last-10) ¬∑ full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at (standing JURY) ¬∑ passive-mic-as-primary-input (standing JURY) ¬∑ lean-back-screensaver relationship]` ¬∑ `picked=[pointer-nutrient-SEED INPUT ¬∑ WebGPU-compute-Physarum (+CPU fallback) OUTPUT ¬∑ slime-mold-transport‚ÜíGPU-readback‚Üíaudio TECHNIQUE ¬∑ cosmic-web meditative-boundless VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ continuous slow agent advection + additive luminous tone-map only; Stop/unmount tears down rAF + audio + AudioContext + GPU buffers/device. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio in the box ‚ÄĒ the CPU-Physarum fallback + autonomous drift ARE the headless paths and render a living web; unverified: the WGSL pipeline + readback‚Üíaudio *feel* on real hardware). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1067-boundless-breath`** ‚≠źRESURRECT-FIRST (the scarce **three.js** + **active-breath** + lab-first **Shepard‚ÄďRisset** meditative starfield) + **`1068-attractor-temple`** (the WebGPU strange-attractor played body ‚ÄĒ bend the secret constants through bifurcations). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1066-cosmic-web/README.md`

## (Cycle 608 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 Canvas2D membrane substrates of one concept ¬∑ the psych lane's FIRST played physical-material instrument [a mass-spring drumhead you press/pull/TEAR] ¬∑ salvia/DMT membrane-reality, **intense** pole ‚ÄĒ the owed swing)

[/dream/1065-skin-membrane](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1065-skin-membrane) ‚ÄĒ **"Skin Membrane": press, pull and TEAR a living skin of sound with your hands ‚ÄĒ and its physical tension IS the pitch. Bend the membrane and the tone glides; overstretch it and the springs snap into hot rupture rims that you can hear. A mass-spring drumhead is the instrument, not a synth decorated by it.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check all green, **0 issues from the 1065 folder** ‚ÄĒ scoped `next lint` ‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors, project `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors; full `npm run build` reached `Compiled successfully` + lint + types then blocked only by the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **this is among the most-verifiable ships in the lab ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D + the mass-spring solver + the modal synth are exactly what runs headlessly, runtime-stable by construction, zero permissions/hardware/network needed** ‚ÄĒ only the *ear-feel* of the tear transients is device-only) ¬∑ Cycle 608 (adult, **DEEP** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 Canvas2D substrates attacking ONE concept "press, pull and TEAR a living skin whose tension IS the pitch": this mass-spring drumhead vs `1066-membrane-veil` a 2D digital-waveguide-mesh / FDTD wave field you strike [de-selected, banked ‚≠źRESURRECT, IDEAS ¬ß608 ‚ÄĒ its "audio IS the literal surface" novelty collapsed when it fell back to a modal bank; resurrect with a true AudioWorklet path]). **Cashes the 4-cycle-deferred ‚≠źRESURRECT-FIRST** (queued since IDEAS ¬ß602/603/604/606/607) and **swings the pole back to intense** (last several ships were cosmic-ambient). Discharges **JURY 2026-06-29 #1** (an instrument you PLAY into the state, not a field you watch) and dodges the jury-banned **full-screen WebGL2 fragment-shader output** (Canvas2D only) + passive-mic input. **For**: adult / **intense** pole / `state: salvia / DMT membrane-reality` ¬∑ **pointer/touch press-pull-flick INPUT** (active, played, non-mic ‚ÄĒ a soft radial brush with flick momentum) / **Canvas2D mass-spring-mesh OUTPUT** (deliberately NOT a fragment shader, NOT WebGPU, NOT log-polar ‚ÄĒ an additive `lighter` wire-lattice shaded by local areal strain: indigo slack ‚Üí iridescent magenta‚Üígold taut, glowing tension lines, hot rupture rims, pinned boundary frame, breathing non-black trails) / intense salvia palette. **The technique:** a 52√ó52 grid of point masses with structural (4-neighbour) + shear (diagonal) + bend (2-away) springs and a pinned drumhead boundary, integrated with symplectic Euler √ó 2 substeps + velocity damping; per-spring strain tracking snaps overstretched springs past `TEAR_STRAIN` (capped so it can't fully disintegrate) into visible+audible ruptures; a faint autonomous breathing field keeps the skin alive-when-idle; flick on release sends a traveling wave. The solver's per-frame aggregate stats drive **physical modal synthesis**: **8 bandpass resonators on a circular drumhead's Bessel-zero modal ratios** (1.000, 1.593, 2.136, 2.296, 2.653, 2.918, 3.156, 3.501); **mean spring stretch (tension) ‚Üí fundamental via `setTargetAtTime` portamento** (pentatonic-quantized, ~70‚Äď520 Hz) so bending the skin audibly glides the pitch ‚ÄĒ the core coupling; brightness proxy ‚Üí a master lowpass that opens; pluck/tear energy injects noise-burst excitation; **a quiet continuous excitation keeps the modes singing so steady tension is audible in the sustained tone, not just on strikes**; feedback-delay reverb for body; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter so it never clips. Numerically hard-clamped (dt/velocity/position) + NaN-scrubbed ‚Üí bounded under 600+ frames of abuse. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Thomas Jakobsen, *Advanced Character Physics* (verlet / position-based dynamics, GDC 2001); circular-membrane Bessel-zero modal synthesis (physical modeling of a drumhead). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (mass-spring solver + strain/tear tracking + Bessel modal resonator bank + continuous-excitation engine + brightness lowpass + feedback reverb/limiter = ~6) ¬∑ #3 named refs (Jakobsen / Bessel-mode modal synthesis) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß608 added THIS cycle (<14 days ‚ÄĒ the Mar-2026 `nlm` non-linear-modal paper + the 2026 *Atoms* visible-mass-spring synth). #1 NOT cleanly claimed (mass-spring cloth exists in the lab's kids star-cloth pieces, modal synthesis in the anvil pieces) ‚ÄĒ the honest fresh axis is *a played physical membrane whose continuous tension IS the pitch, with audible tearing*, grep-0√ó in the psych lane. **diversity:** `banned=[full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT (standing JURY), passive-mic-as-primary-input (standing JURY), CataRT-granular-of-real-piano (3√ó in window: 1052/1059/1060), cosmic-ambient pole (over-run ‚ÄĒ intense owed)]` ¬∑ `picked=[pointer press-pull-tear INPUT, Canvas2D-mass-spring-mesh OUTPUT, mass-spring-membrane‚ÜíBessel-modal-synthesis TECHNIQUE, intense-salvia VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban + delivers the owed intense swing. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ continuous strain shading + additive glow only; Stop/unmount tears down rAF + audio + AudioContext. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; reads no Resonance prod API; zero new npm deps, no AI/cost surface). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in the box ‚ÄĒ the Canvas2D mesh + the mass-spring solver + the modal engine ARE the headless paths and are runtime-stable by construction; unverified: the tear/pluck transients + the tension‚Üípitch glide *by ear* on a device, and whether the continuous-excitation steady tone sits at a pleasant level). **Winner of an adult DEEP 2-substrate fire**; banked **`1066-membrane-veil`** ‚≠źRESURRECT (the FDTD digital-waveguide-mesh sibling ‚ÄĒ strike a wave field whose ripples you SEE cross and interfere; resurrect with a true AudioWorklet streaming path so the audio is the literal per-sample surface = a real lab-first). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1065-skin-membrane/README.md`

## (Cycle 607 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal interactive-instrument explorers ¬∑ the lab's FIRST psychedelic piece driven by Karel's REAL *Welcome Home* piano ¬∑ psilocybin/LSD warm-drift, cosmic-ambient‚Üíintense)

Pointer POSITION moves where the melt focuses; pointer SPEED raises the warp gain + saturation ‚ÄĒ a still hand gives calm cosmic drift, a fast frantic drag gives peak melt. PSYCHEDELIC.md names it and zero of the seven psychedelic builds did it"* ‚ÄĒ the single most-cited, longest-standing unclaimed lever, **0√ó across the entire psych lane until now**; also discharges **#1** (an instrument you *play into* the state) and dodges the jury-banned **full-screen WebGL2 fragment-shader output** (Canvas2D only). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient rising to intense** / `state: psilocybin / LSD warm-drift` ¬∑ **real-Path-piano audio-file + pointer/touch-SCULPT INPUT** (the active, played, non-mic instrument ‚ÄĒ position steers the melt focus, speed is the dominant warp-gain/saturation term) / **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (deliberately NOT a fragment shader ‚ÄĒ a ping-pong feedback-trail buffer resampled each frame on a grid displaced along the log-polar gradient around the pointer focus, mirrors `_shared/psych/logpolar.ts` math inline; iridescent hue-rotating wash + fresh form-constant ribbons stamped over decaying tracers) / warm-iridescent psilocybin palette. **The technique:** Karel's recording (`549fc519‚Ä¶`) fetched client-side via the read-only `/api/audio/<id>` route (the proven `630-piano-refract` loader ‚ÄĒ JSON-`{url}`-or-bytes, 4 s AbortController), decoded + looped ‚Üí gentle "underwater" lowpass ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` (`fftSize 2048`) ‚Üí compressor ‚Üí out; an `OfflineAudioContext` slow detuned-piano arpeggio drone is the fallback so it **always sounds** (active source surfaced: "Karel's piano" vs "fallback drone"). FFT bands map (mirrors the neural-gain finding): bass ‚Üí global flow speed + warp amplitude; mids ‚Üí trail decay / hue; highs ‚Üí fine ripple detail; loudness ‚Üí saturation/gain floor; **pointer speed is the dominant warp term** so the human is the reason the field comes alive. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Mendel Kaelen, *The hidden therapist* (Imperial, 2018) ‚ÄĒ in psychedelic therapy the *music* guides the journey (liking + resonance, not drug intensity, track outcome), so the soundtrack is the structural spine and the visual peak rides the music's peak; Bressloff‚ÄďCowan / Kl√ľver form-constants (the log-polar warp). **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 never-used (the lab's FIRST psychedelic-lane piece driven by Karel's real Path recording) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (real-audio loader/decode + FFT analyser + log-polar warp + ping-pong feedback trails + gesture control = 5) ¬∑ #3 named refs (Kaelen 2018 / Bressloff‚ÄďCowan) ¬∑ #5 cites RESEARCH ¬ß607 added THIS cycle (<14 days ‚ÄĒ the 2026-05 carrier-wave re-centering + the Feb-2026 arXiv "Glow with the Flow" music‚Üílightscape system). **diversity:** `banned=[full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT, passive-mic-as-primary-input, the lean-back screensaver relationship]` ¬∑ `picked=[real-Path-piano-audio-file + pointer-SCULPT INPUT, Canvas2D-feedback-trail+log-polar OUTPUT, FFT-of-real-piano‚Üílog-polar-warp TECHNIQUE, warm psilocybin VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow continuous warp + additive trails only; reduced-motion honored; Stop tears down rAF + audio + AudioContext. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; reads only the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` GET ‚ÄĒ no side effects, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). **NOT ear-verified with the real recording** (no audio device in the box; the FFT-driven Canvas2D warp + the autonomous fallback drone are the headless paths ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the real-piano fetch resolves on a review device and whether the melt reads as the music *driving* it vs decorative). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; Ōą from 2 octaves of dependency-free seeded Perlin noise + a slowly-drifting 3rd axis = alive-when-idle; toroidal wrap; a decaying pointer **vortex** term whose rotation sign follows your gesture). The flow's emergent stats ‚ÄĒ mean speed, directional **coherence**, near-cursor **vorticity**, **pool** density, energy centroid, a **confluence** flag ‚ÄĒ ARE the navigation policy over a **CataRT-style grain corpus** carved from the real piano (each ~220 ms grain tagged by autocorrelation pitch + RMS + ZCR brightness): coherent current ‚Üí focused 7-limit-JI grains; turbulence ‚Üí bright detuned shimmer cloud; forming pool ‚Üí a sustained pad; sudden stir ‚Üí onset burst; two merging vortices ‚Üí a deliberate harmonic **fifth**; idle ‚Üí sparse twinkle. Grains play through a raised-cosine env + stereo panner (panned to on-screen energy) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor limiter; an **audio-RMS‚Üíflow feedback loop** lets the river breathe with its own sound. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Robert Bridson et al. *Curl-Noise for Procedural Fluid Flow* (SIGGRAPH 2007); Diemo Schwarz CataRT / corpus-based concatenative synthesis, with "The Concatenator" (arXiv 2411.04366) + MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023) framing concatenative synthesis as *an agent navigating a corpus* ‚ÄĒ here the river's stats ARE that agent (RESEARCH ¬ß605). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (real-piano source + grain-corpus analysis + curl-noise flow sim + granular re-synth + stir input + compressor master = 6) ¬∑ #3 named references (Bridson / Schwarz¬∑CataRT / Concatenator / MACataRT) ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß605. #1 NOT claimed (curl-noise + granular both lab-prior; the fresh axis is *emergent-flow-stats AS the corpus-navigation agent over Karel's real piano on a fully-verifiable Canvas2D substrate*, grep-0√ó). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-OUTPUT, the log-polar-kaleidoscope groove]` ¬∑ `picked=[pointer-STIR INPUT, Canvas2D-curl-noise-particle-river OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch; not WebGPU), flow-stats‚ÜíCataRT-granular-of-real-piano TECHNIQUE, cosmic-ambient VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears all bans. ## (Cycle 595 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal altered-states explorers ¬∑ the lab's FIRST gated safe-flicker / Ganzfeld engine ¬∑ cosmic-ambient pole)

[/dream/1043-dreamachine](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1043-dreamachine) ‚ÄĒ **"Dreamachine": dim your lights, soft-focus the center, and let your OWN visual cortex bloom the spirals, tunnels, and honeycombs ‚ÄĒ the screen never draws the hallucination; it only supplies the uniform field + a safe slow pulse, the way Brion Gysin's 1959 Dreamachine and modern Ganzflicker do.** `demoable` (compile-mode `next build` = full TS + ESLint + production bundle, **fully green, 0 warnings/errors from the 1043 folder**; not GPU/ear-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 595 (adult, **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 altered-states explorers: this jhńĀna/hypnagogia Ganzfeld+safe-flicker vs `1044-hyperbolic-bloom` the DMT Poincar√©-disk hyperbolic tiling [intense] vs `1045-k-hole` the ketamine dissociative parallax-void [cosmic-ambient]). **The lab's FIRST gated safe-photic / Ganzfeld engine** ‚ÄĒ the core shared infra PSYCHEDELIC.md ¬ßCluster-3 names but no prior cycle built (grep-0√ó: `dreamachine`/`gysin`/`jhńĀna`). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / **self-clocked INPUT** (no pointer ‚ÄĒ the jury-banned reflex avoided; the field plays itself on a ~5.5-min arc) / **WebGL2 Ganzfeld fragment-shader OUTPUT** (uniform warm field, imperceptibly-slow value-noise color drift, soft vignette, blue-noise visual-snow, faint breathing form-constant scaffold) / soft-white-boundless meditative palette. **The technique (lab-first):** a uniform unstructured field (*Ganzfeld* ‚ÄĒ the brain amplifies its own neural noise into imagery) + a whole-field luminance **pulse** (*Ganzflicker*) that lets the viewer's visual cortex manufacture the Kl√ľver form constants on its own. **THE HEADLINE = the safety engine (`flicker.ts`):** flicker in 3‚Äď30 Hz can trigger photosensitive-epilepsy seizures (peak risk 15‚Äď20 Hz), so the engine is gated in code ‚ÄĒ `clampRate()` is a single hard gate at **`MAX_HZ=3.0`** that the UI slider's `max` reads from (the danger band is literally unreachable), modulation is a continuous **soft sine** (never a square strobe) with depth capped at **`MAX_DEPTH=0.45`** (eases ~55%‚ÜĒ100% brightness, never full black‚ÜĒwhite), the **default mode is non-flicker `drift`** (~0.18 Hz luminance sine), a **photosensitive-epilepsy warning + explicit opt-in gate** runs before anything, and an **always-visible instant Stop** eases to a calm steady field + hushes the drone. One shared clock (the `AudioContext` sample clock when audio's up, `performance.now()` fallback) phase-locks light and sound. **The ~5.5-min arc (`arc.ts`):** Onset (still, faint) ‚Üí Come-up (drift begins, pulse fades in) ‚Üí Plateau (gentle ‚Č§3 Hz pulse + drone swell) ‚Üí Return (pulse slows, settles to calm) ‚ÄĒ smoothstep-eased, never abrupt. **Always audio-visual:** a meditative **drone bank (`audio.ts`)** ‚ÄĒ detuned sustained sine partials (root/fifth/octave/twelfth + a faint filtered saw) with slow per-voice detune LFOs, a low-pass that **breathes** at ~0.092 Hz (‚Čą5.5/min breath pace), a feedback-delay "void" tail, and a master amplitude **phase-locked to the exact per-frame luminance** the shader uses, so light and sound rise and fall together. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Brion Gysin & Ian Sommerville's **Dreamachine** (1959); Collective Act's **Dreamachine** (London 2022); the **2026 Oxford *Neuroscience of Consciousness* Ganzflicker study** (`niag016`; RESEARCH ¬ß595); **Heinrich Kl√ľver** (the four form constants); **Bressloff & Cowan** (retina‚ÜíV1 complex-log map); **W. Grey Walter** (flicker/EEG). README evokes phenomenology only ‚ÄĒ no medical/entrainment claims, and notes we deliberately stay far below the 8‚Äď12 Hz alpha band for safety. **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (gated safe-flicker + Ganzfeld engine ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (Ganzfeld shader + safe-flicker engine + phase-locked drone bank + form-constant scaffold = 4) ¬∑ #3 named references (Gysin/Kl√ľver/Bressloff‚ÄďCowan) ¬∑ #5 **RESEARCH ¬ß595** (the 2026 Oxford Ganzflicker dive ‚Üí this build, dated this cycle). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-input (JURY 2026-06-28 7√ó), raymarch (lane 2√ó: 1041/1042)]` ¬∑ `picked=[self-clocked INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2-Ganzfeld OUTPUT, safe-flicker+Ganzfeld TECHNIQUE (lab-first), soft-white cosmic-ambient VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban and rebalances the lane's 2√ó intense toward the cosmic-ambient pole. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** this IS the safety build ‚ÄĒ see the engine above; ‚Č§3 Hz hard cap, soft sine, warning gate, instant kill. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Validation:** `npm ci --ignore-scripts` (sharp's libvips binary is blocked by the egress proxy; not needed to compile), then `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` ‚Üí **fully green** (TS + ESLint + production bundle), zero issues from the 1043 folder. Full `npm run build` is blocked by the **standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (4096 hard cap, unraiseable via ulimit/prlimit even as uid 0; the lab now has 1000+ routes) ‚ÄĒ **proven infra-not-code:** clean HEAD (cycle 594, currently live) fails with the identical EMFILE at the same `next-font-manifest.json` open; Vercel's high-fd environment deploys fine (every cycle since ~472). **NOT seen/heard on a real GPU** (no WebGL2/audio in the box ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the field *subjectively* evokes form constants on a real display in a dim room, the felt entrainment of the phase-locked drone, real-device framerate). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1044-hyperbolic-bloom`** ‚≠ź (the intense Poincar√©-disk hyperbolic {7,3} tiling ‚ÄĒ M√∂bius nav + fundamental-domain folding in a fragment shader + ping-pong feedback trails + jeweled iridescence; QRI "Hyperbolic Geometry of DMT" / Escher Circle Limit ‚ÄĒ resurrect on an intense-pole cycle, fix the exact Schwarz-triangle circle first) + **`1045-k-hole`** (the ketamine dissociative void ‚ÄĒ sparse luminous parallax point-field + exp fog + global `timeScale` time-dilation + convolution-reverb void + body-melt vertex warp + gyro untethered float; Frontiers 2017 ego-dissolution ‚ÄĒ resurrect when the lane is light on void pieces, or fold `timeScale`/convolution-void into shared infra).
