## (Cycle 594 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 untapped altered-states explorers ¬∑ the lab's FIRST 4D / hyperdimensional raymarch)

[/dream/1042-hyperspace-bloom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1042-hyperspace-bloom) ‚ÄĒ **"Hyperspace Bloom": fall, drug-free, toward the DMT "breakthrough" ‚ÄĒ a 4-dimensional polytope rotating through planes that don't exist in our space, its glowing neon-jeweled edges ballooning and turning inside-out the way the eye reads "more axes than reality allows."** `demoable` (tsc 0 errors project-wide + ESLint **1042 folder 0/0**; compile clean; not GPU-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 594 (adult, **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 altered-states explorers across the spectrum: this DMT-breakthrough 4D-raymarch vs `1043-clear-light` the jhńĀna soft-white boundless-dissolution vs `1044-mycelial-bloom` the psilocybin warm-organic voice-bloom). **The lab's FIRST 4D / hyperdimensional raymarch** (grep-0√ó: no prior `4D`/`tesseract`/`polytope`/`hyperbolic-tiling` anywhere in 593 cycles). **For**: adult / **intense** pole / **device-tilt + auto-journey INPUT** (the ~75s descent plays itself; optional gyro nudge, iOS-permission-gated in the start tap; **non-pointer** ‚ÄĒ the jury-banned reflex avoided) / **WebGL2 raymarched-SDF OUTPUT** (a glowing capsule-union over the projected edges, not a flat warp-plane like 1038 nor a wormhole bore like 1041) / neon-iridescent jeweled DMT palette. **The technique (lab-first):** a regular **24-cell** (24 vertices, 96 edges) is rotated on the CPU by **all six 4D rotation planes** each frame ‚ÄĒ the three **w-planes (`xw, yw, zw`)** are the "hyper" rotations that continuously change the 3D slice ‚ÄĒ then **stereographically projected** 4D‚Üí3D (near-pole edges balloon toward infinity, the classic hyperdimensional look); the 192 projected endpoints upload as a uniform array and the fragment shader **raymarches a smooth `smin` union of capsules** (88-step cap, early bail, thin-film iridescence via an IQ cosine palette, a volumetric neon halo so the structure glows off-surface, chromatic aberration toward the rim, soft filmic tone + vignette). A `timeline.ts` runs a ~75s breakthrough envelope (speed/glow/sat/bloom/peak rise to a peak then settle, then loops). **Always audio-visual:** a synthesized detuned-oscillator **breakthrough drone** (resonant filter sweep + shimmer bus, compressor/limiter master) **FFT-analyses its own output** and feeds bass‚Üírotation/flow, highs‚Üísaturation, loudness‚Üíneon gain (the neural-gain finding made visible). Degrades: no WebGL2 ‚Üí rose notice + a Canvas2D rotating-24-cell wireframe that still morphs + plays audio; no DeviceOrientation ‚Üí auto-journey drives everything. **NAMED REFERENCES:** the **"hyperbolic geometry of DMT"** thesis (QRI / Andr√©s G√≥mez-Emilsson); **Bressloff‚ÄďCowan** cortical form-constants; the classic **4D-rotation + stereographic-projection raymarch** lineage (Shadertoy/hypercube). README frames it as *phenomenology*, no medical claims. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (4D polytope rotation+projection raymarch ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (4D geometry engine + raymarch renderer + journey-envelope timeline + FFT-driven synth = 4) ¬∑ #3 named references (QRI/Bressloff‚ÄďCowan) ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß594 (the 4D-raymarch ecosystem dive ‚Üí this build, dated this cycle). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-adult-input (JURY 7√ó), "a-sim-IS-the-body" default (JURY 7√ó), Gray-Scott RD, cathedral/spatial-walk]` ¬∑ `picked=[device-tilt+auto-journey INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2-raymarched-SDF OUTPUT, 4D-rotation+stereographic-projection TECHNIQUE (lab-first), neon-iridescent intense VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban, and orthogonal to both prior psychedelic builds (1038 2D log-polar warp / 1041 3D wormhole bore ‚Üí this is true 4D). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing ‚ÄĒ continuous smooth 4D rotation + slow luminance drift only, no full-screen flash; Pause instantly freezes + silences. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Verification:** `npx tsc --noEmit` exit 0 (zero TS errors project-wide); `npx next lint` on the 1042 folder ‚Üí **0 warnings / 0 errors**; full `npm run build` compiled + linted clean, static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** fd-ceiling (infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT seen/heard on a real GPU** (no WebGL2/audio in the box ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the 4D morph *subjectively* reads as hyperdimensional, real-device framerate at 96 capsules√ó88 steps, the audio‚Üígeometry coupling strength). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1043-clear-light`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (the cosmic-ambient soft-white boundless-dissolution counterweight the lane still lacks ‚ÄĒ breath-paced ~0.1 Hz particle dissolution-to-white, drone bank + procedural cathedral-IR convolution; Lutz & Davidson PNAS 2004 / Oceanic Boundlessness / Young¬∑Oliveros¬∑Eno) + **`1044-mycelial-bloom`** (the warm-organic serotonergic pole ‚ÄĒ your voice [analysis-only] drives fBm two-level domain-warp + kaleidoscope blooms; entropic-brain/REBUS, Kl√ľver/Bressloff‚ÄďCowan). ## (Cycle 593 ‚ÄĒ **adult** psychedelic build ¬∑ ships the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole to balance 592's intense 1038)

[/dream/1041-nde-tunnel](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1041-nde-tunnel) ‚ÄĒ **"NDE Tunnel": drift, drug-free, down a wormhole toward a growing being of light ‚ÄĒ the near-death / ketamine void, with the audio deliberately lagging the visuals so the two senses come gently apart.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **1041 folder eslint 0/0**; not seen/heard on real GPU) ¬∑ Cycle 593 (adult, psychedelic). **The COSMIC-AMBIENT counterweight** to cycle 592's intense `1038-form-constant` ‚ÄĒ so the new altered-states direction now ships **both poles** the same morning (PSYCHEDELIC.md: "cover the whole spectrum, don't camp on one pole"). It is the documented ‚≠ź resurrect-first the 592 fire banked as `1039-light-tunnel` ("the natural next ship to balance 1038's intensity"), built this fire and shipped at a fresh number. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / **non-pointer auto-drift INPUT** (the ~2-min descent plays itself; optional subtle gyro/pointer camera nudge ‚ÄĒ zero permission friction) / **WebGL2 raymarched-wormhole-SDF OUTPUT** (a 3D bore you fall through, deliberately distinct from 1038's flat warp-plane) / dark-void-luminous palette (deep indigo/black ‚Üí gold/white light). **NAMED REFERENCE:** **Raymond Moody** *Life After Life* (the NDE tunnel / being-of-light arc); **Borjigin et al.** (PNAS 2013 rat / 2023 human, the end-of-life **gamma surge** ‚Üí the "hyper-lucid clarity snap"); the **hypoxic tunnel-vision** mechanism; **ketamine NMDA-antagonist** thalamocortical disconnection ‚Üí the **audio-visual desync**; **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening* (convolution-void vastness). **The mechanic:** a WebGL2 fragment shader **raymarches a curving cylindrical wormhole** ‚ÄĒ the ray's world position is bent by a sin/cos spine before a `length(p.xy)-radius` tunnel SDF (~72 steps, exponential depth fog, sparse drifting luminous structures for parallax) ‚ÄĒ flying endlessly toward a **center-out being-of-light bloom** (additive glow that swells on approach). Layered: an animated **hypoxic vignette** constricting the field toward the bright center at the peak; a one-time **gamma clarity-snap** (~2‚Äď3s of impossibly sharp high-contrast coherence before the return ‚ÄĒ a smooth ramp, **not** a strobe); iridescent wall sheen + slow chromatic aberration. A single **time-dilated clock** drives a ~120s arc: onset ‚Üí leaving-the-body ‚Üí the tunnel ‚Üí the light/clarity-snap ‚Üí return (never abrupt). Audio: a 4-voice detuned **drone bank** ‚Üí low-pass that **opens toward the light** + a synthetic `ConvolverNode` IR (~4.5s decaying filtered noise) for the void; the audio envelope is deliberately **lagged behind** the visual motion (the ketamine NMDA-antagonist **dissociation desync** ‚ÄĒ gently decoupling the two streams the brain normally binds); master ‚Čą0.15, smooth fades, full teardown. **Honesty (in README):** endogenous-tryptamine/DMT theories of NDE are speculative ‚ÄĒ this evokes the *phenomenology*, it claims no mechanism. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing ‚ÄĒ slow cosmic motion + a smoothly-ramped light bloom only, no full-screen flash; Stop instantly freezes motion + silences audio. **Ambition (honest 2‚Äď3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (raymarch wormhole + convolution-void drone + hypoxic-vignette/bloom + dissociation-desync engine = 4) ¬∑ #3 named references (Moody; Borjigin PNAS; ketamine NMDA desync; Oliveros) ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß593. **diversity:** `picked=[non-pointer auto-drift INPUT, raymarched-wormhole-SDF OUTPUT (3D bore, not a flat warp-plane), tunnel-to-light + audio-visual-desync TECHNIQUE, dark-void-luminous cosmic-ambient VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ the deliberate orthogonal complement to 1038 (intense/mic/WebGL2-warp/neon); clears every jury ban (no pointer-as-instrument, no read-back physics sim, no Gray-Scott, no cathedral-walk). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 41s`**; **1041 folder `npx eslint` exit 0**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT seen/heard on a real device** (no GPU/audio in the box ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the wormhole *subjectively* reads as a tunnel-toward-light on a real GPU, the desync's felt dissociation, the convolution-void depth). No headless unit test (a continuous shader/synth, not a discretizable pure core). **Context ‚ÄĒ a parallel-run collision resolved into a both-poles win:** this fire independently ran the same WIDE 3-explorer psychedelic plan as the 592 fire and reached the same form-constant winner; the 592 fire won the push, so rather than ship a duplicate intense engine, I deferred to it and shipped the banked cosmic-ambient counterweight (see STATE ¬ß593). Remaining banked from 592: **`1040-ganzfeld-bloom`** ‚≠ź (the meditative pole + the safe-flicker engine). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1041-nde-tunnel/README.md`

## (Cycle 592 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 altered-states explorers across the whole spectrum, shipped 1)

[/dream/1038-form-constant](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1038-form-constant) ‚ÄĒ **"Form Constant": play your music (or just speak) into the mic and watch your visual cortex's own hallucinated geometry bloom ‚ÄĒ tunnels, spirals, funnels, honeycomb ‚ÄĒ generated the way the brain actually makes them.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; not GPU/ear-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 592 (adult, **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 altered-states explorers spanning the spectrum: this intense DMT/LSD form-constant engine vs `1039-light-tunnel` the NDE wormhole-to-light vs `1040-ganzfeld-bloom` the meditative Ganzfeld+safe-flicker). **The lab's FIRST psychedelic / altered-states build** ‚ÄĒ the opening move of Karel's 2026-06-28 steer (`PSYCHEDELIC.md`), and it deliberately ships **the single most load-bearing finding** of that whole direction: the **log-polar / form-constant engine**. **For**: adult / **intense** pole / **mic INPUT** (non-pointer ‚ÄĒ FFT bands drive the geometry: bass‚Üíflow/warp, mids‚Üíform-constant morph & kaleidoscope fold, highs‚Üífine detail/grain, loudness‚Üísaturation/neural-gain) / **WebGL2 fullscreen fragment-shader OUTPUT** / neon-iridescent jeweled DMT palette. **The technique (grep-verified lab-first, 0√ó prior):** all psychedelic geometry is ONE periodic pattern seen through a **log-polar warp**, because the retina‚ÜíV1 cortical map is a complex logarithm (**Bressloff & Cowan**, building on **Kl√ľver's four form constants**). The shader takes screen UV, computes cortical coords `(lr=log r, őł=atan)`, synthesizes plane-wave stripes + a 3-wave hex lattice *in cortical space*, and the **orientation** of those waves selects the form constant: stripes along őł ‚Üí concentric rings/**tunnel**, diagonal ‚Üí **spiral**, stripes along lr ‚Üí radial spokes/**funnel**, hex ‚Üí **honeycomb** ‚ÄĒ with a `formMix` uniform sweeping continuously through all four, N-fold kaleidoscope folding to bloom a chrysanthemum, an IQ cosine palette, chromatic aberration, and blue-noise visual-snow grain. **The journey arc (minute-5 ‚Č† minute-1):** a JS `arc.ts` entropy controller runs a ~5-min Onset‚ÜíCome-up‚ÜíPeak/breakthrough‚ÜíPlateau‚ÜíReturn, smoothstep-blended, ramping noise octaves / flow / saturation and loosening symmetry at peak ‚ÄĒ the Carhart-Harris **entropic-brain / REBUS** parameterization made visible; everything lerped so transitions are never abrupt. **Always audio-visual:** mic is primary, but if denied it falls back to a self-playing **Shepard‚ÄďRisset drone** (octave-spaced detuned sines under a Gaussian window) routed through the same analyser, so the piece always sounds and reacts. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Kl√ľver's form constants; **Bressloff & Cowan** cortical model ("Uncoiling the spiral", plus.maths); **ENTHEA** (github.com/elder-plinius, 2026 ‚ÄĒ a recent open-source real-time GPU form-constant synthesizer using the same retina‚ÜíV1 transform, found in this cycle's RESEARCH ¬ß592 dive); Carhart-Harris entropic-brain/REBUS. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 never-used-here technique (log-polar/form-constant warp ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic FFT analyser + log-polar form-constant shader + entropy/journey-arc controller + Shepard-Risset fallback synth = 4) ¬∑ #3 named references (above) ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß592 (the ENTHEA find ‚Üí this build, dated this cycle). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-adult-input (JURY 2026-06-28 7√ó), the "a-sim-IS-the-instrument-body" default adult move (JURY 7√ó), Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion (JURY 2√ó-running), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes harmony]` ¬∑ `picked=[mic/audio-reactive INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT, log-polar form-constant warp TECHNIQUE, neon-iridescent intense-psychedelic VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban (no pointer, no read-back physics sim, no Gray-Scott). **SAFETY:** intense visuals but **no strobe** ‚ÄĒ the motion is continuous warp + slow luminance drift, not flicker; the gated photic-pulse engine lives in the banked `1040` sibling, not here. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **One fix during validation:** a `createMediaStreamAudioSource`‚Üí`createMediaStreamSource` typo in `audio.ts` (the single allowed fix; build then `‚úď Compiled successfully`). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 87s`** ‚Üí lint/type passed; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the four form constants read as convincingly *psychedelic* on a real GPU, the perceptual strength of the audio‚Üígeometry coupling, real-device framerate). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1039-light-tunnel`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (raymarched infinite NDE wormhole toward a growing being-of-light, hypoxic vignette + one-time gamma "clarity snap", convolution-void drone + `timeScale` time-dilation, gyro/scroll/autonomous ‚ÄĒ the cosmic-ambient pole; Moody/Borjigin) + **`1040-ganzfeld-bloom`** ‚≠ź (Canvas2D Ganzfeld field + breath-paced ~0.1 Hz mandala + particle dissolution-to-light + Shepard ascent, and **the safe-flicker engine** [`safeFlicker.ts`: opt-in, ‚Č§3 Hz hard-capped, depth ‚Č§0.22 soft-sine, instant-kill] the whole direction needs ‚ÄĒ meditative-boundless pole; Gysin Dreamachine/Ganzflicker). [/dream/1035-living-album](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1035-living-album) ‚ÄĒ **"Living Album": you are not a player but a *gardener* ‚ÄĒ drop a few seeds into a self-evolving piece of music that REMEMBERS, and the motifs alive at minute 6 are literal descendants of the ones you planted at minute 1.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **headless `evolve.test.ts` 13/13 PASS ‚ÄĒ machine-verified, incl. the memory claim itself**; not ear-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 591 (adult, **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal *relationship*-explorers: this gardener-of-an-evolving-system vs `1036-piano-mosaic` your-voice-becomes-his-piano vs `1037-presence-song` be-present-for-it). **This cycle's thesis = vary the human‚ÜĒsound RELATIONSHIP, not the algorithm (JURY 2026-06-28 #1).** At 591 cycles the ambition floor's "never-used technique" is nearly exhausted (grep falsified the jury's "0√ó COLD" WebRTC/seismic gaps ‚ÄĒ both built) ‚ÄĒ so the fresh axis is the *coupling*: the human is the long-term **perturbation** in a system that remembers, not a note-trigger. **For**: adult / ambient long-form / **sparse-perturbation INPUT** (tap = plant a seed whose genome is biased by *where* you tapped and which then breeds for minutes; climate buttons nudge the whole population's evolutionary pressure over ~a minute ‚ÄĒ **NOT** note-on-tap, **NOT** continuous pointer-as-instrument [the jury's banned 7√ó reflex]; zero permission friction) / **Canvas2D organic-lineage OUTPUT** (agent bodies + parent‚Üíchild threads + note blooms over an aurora field; NOT WebGL2-flat-raster) / living-garden ambient palette. **NAMED REFERENCE:** **Brian Eno's generative *Reflection*** (an infinite, never-repeating stream) + **arXiv:2506.05104** "Survey on the Evaluation of Generative Models in Music" (RESEARCH ¬ß591) + artificial-life heredity. **The mechanic:** a pure `evolve.ts` (no DOM/audio/canvas) holds a seeded RNG, a small **genome** per agent (register, rhythmic density, timbre brightness, a short interval-motif, a lifespan), **mutation + crossover** (a child inherits a bounded mutated *blend* of two parents), agent birth/aging/death, a **functional diatonic** progression over a climate-modulated tonic, and `pickPitch` voice-leading that always returns a chord-consonant diatonic pitch. `step(world)` advances one tick ‚Üí note events. Because reproduction always blends *currently-living* genomes, the pool drifts continuously and minute-6 motifs are gen>0 descendants of minute-1 founders ‚ÄĒ **that lineage is the audible memory** (drawn on screen as child‚Üíparent threads). **Long-form / minute-5‚Č†minute-1** by construction: the population never resets, no fixed loop. Always-sounding (auto-demo population on load; gesture-gated AudioContext; per-note filtered voices; full teardown). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (heredity engine + functional-harmony model + agent lifecycle + Canvas2D lineage render = 4) ¬∑ #3 named reference (Eno *Reflection*; arXiv:2506.05104) ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß591. #1 NOT over-claimed (generative music has priors ‚ÄĒ the fresh axis is the *gardener relationship* + genuinely stateful heredity). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-as-instrument-primary (JURY 7√ó), sim-as-body-as-default (JURY 7√ó), Gray-Scott-RD, WebGL2-flat-over-rep (~9√ó), cathedral/spatial-walk (on-the-clock ‚ÄĒ 1029 was the 4th)]` ¬∑ `picked=[sparse-perturbation/tap-to-seed INPUT, Canvas2D-organic-lineage OUTPUT, generative-agent-heredity+functional-harmony TECHNIQUE, living-garden-ambient VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban (tap-to-seed is consequential-over-time; the population *evolves*, it is not a read-back physics sim). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data`; **1035 folder: `npx eslint` exit 0 ‚ÄĒ 0 errors/0 warnings**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **HEADLESS-VERIFIED (the directest #4 payment in the set):** `evolve.test.ts` 13/13 PASS ‚ÄĒ heredity blend bounded, population stays [3,14] & never extinct over 8000 ticks, every emitted note diatonic over ~6000 ticks, `pickPitch` in-range/diatonic, **descendants present after ~6 simulated minutes** (it proves the *memory* claim, not just helper math), seed x‚Üíregister / y‚Üíbrightness, deterministic. **NOT ear-verified** (no audio in the box ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the heredity is *subjectively* salient over 6 real minutes; ## Cycle 588 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1027-kids-chaos-aurora](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1027-kids-chaos-aurora) ‚ÄĒ **"Chaos Aurora": a 4-year-old flicks a glowing double pendulum and it dances a never-the-same-twice aurora ribbon that sings a real chord progression that never exactly repeats.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **headless self-test 5/5 PASS ‚ÄĒ machine-verified**; not ear-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 588 (kids, **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal kids explorers: this double-pendulum-chaos vs `1026-kids-marble-bells` tilt-gravity-marbles√ómodal-bells vs `1028-kids-star-weaver` constellation-graph-traversal-sequencer). **The lab's FIRST use of chaotic double-pendulum dynamics** (grep-0√ó across all 587 prior prototypes' READMEs + INDEX ‚ÄĒ the lab already owns Lenia/sandpile/pendulum-harp/orbit/particle-life/RD, so this is the rare genuinely-new engine). **For**: kids (4+) / calm bedtime-aurora / **tap-flick INPUT** (every flick = visible energy + immediate chime <50ms; optional tilt bends gravity; **zero permission friction** ‚ÄĒ no mic/camera, ideal for a 06:30 phone glance) / **Canvas2D additive-glow OUTPUT** (two glowing rods + bobs + a long fading teal‚Üíviolet‚Üígold aurora trail; NOT a flat full-screen fragment raster, the jury's 9√ó over-represented output) / hypnotic dark-aurora palette. **NAMED REFERENCE:** the *double pendulum* / *deterministic chaos* ‚ÄĒ Lagrangian mechanics + sensitive dependence on initial conditions; a nod to artificial-life "open-ended novelty from simple deterministic rules" (RESEARCH ¬ß588: ALIFE/ALICE 2026). **The mechanic (jury's 1015 recipe, on the kids lane):** `physics.ts` integrates the two-segment double-pendulum **Lagrangian EOM** with a fixed-step **RK4** integrator + light damping (settles, then the auto-demo re-flicks). The chaotic lower-bob path is the generative engine ‚ÄĒ **the sim IS the resonating body** (jury-sanctioned for kids). A genuine diatonic **I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV** progression in C major advances every ~4s; the bob's height is **snapped to a chord-tone of the LIVE chord** (always consonant, never looping ‚ÄĒ explicitly **NOT pentatonic "no-wrong-notes"**: V really contains the leading-tone B, which the test asserts). New notes trigger on the bob's swing **zero-crossings** (clean musical onsets, not per-frame spam). Warm soft-mallet/glass chimes (sine + detuned partials, ‚Č•10ms attack) over an always-on drone pad so it is never silent. **Long-form / minute-5‚Č†minute-1** by construction: a chaotic trajectory literally never repeats. **Kids-safe chain (exact):** `masterGain(~0.26) ‚Üí lowpass(~6500Hz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí analyser ‚Üí destination` (analyser taps master only; nothing hits destination directly). ‚Č•72px Start gesture-gates AudioContext + iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` in the same tap; ~2s-idle auto-demo so a hands-free glance both sees + hears within ~1s; full teardown (rAF cancel + listener removal + `audioCtx.close()`). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (chaotic double-pendulum Lagrangian RK4 ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (chaotic physics + functional-harmony synth + additive-glow Canvas2D = 3) ¬∑ #3 named reference (double pendulum / deterministic chaos). #5 chains to RESEARCH ¬ß588 dated this fire. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-ADULT-input (JURY 7√ó ‚ÄĒ kids exempt), "a-sim-IS-the-body" as ADULT default (JURY ‚ÄĒ kids exempt, jury told kids to copy 1015's sim-as-body), Gray-Scott RD (JURY 2√ó running ‚ÄĒ NOT used here), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY BANNED ‚ÄĒ used REAL I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV instead), full-screen WebGL2-flat-raster (JURY ~9√ó ‚ÄĒ used Canvas2D)]` ¬∑ `picked=[tap-flick INPUT (zero-permission), Canvas2D-additive-glow OUTPUT, chaotic-double-pendulum TECHNIQUE (lab-first), bedtime-aurora VIBE, real-functional-harmony, long-form-never-repeats]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully in 48s`; lint/type ran with only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other-prototype warnings ‚ÄĒ **1027 folder grep-clean, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **HEADLESS-VERIFIED (the rare win):** `chaos.test.ts` 5/5 PASS (ran ad-hoc under vitest w/ a temp root config overriding the `src/lib/**`-scoped include + a postcss override) ‚ÄĒ RK4 bounded/finite over 7,200 damped steps, undamped energy conserved <2%, `snapToChord` always in the live chord's tone set across all 4 chords. **NOT ear-verified** (no audio in the box ‚ÄĒ unverified: chime balance, the aurora feel, iOS orientation flow; the always-on drone + auto-demo + always-in-key snapping are the always-sounding net). **Winner of a kids WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1026-kids-marble-bells`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (tilt-tray gravity marbles strike a ring of modal bells tuned to a live I‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV‚Äďvi clock; selfTest passes; lost only on being the *safe* jury-recipe entry vs 1027's genuinely-new technique) + **`1028-kids-star-weaver`** (tap stars + connect them; a comet-spark walks the constellation graph and sings the shape as a melody; 8/8 selfTest). Both built complete, removed un-committed per the non-winner rule; seeds ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß588. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1027-kids-chaos-aurora/README.md`

## Cycle 587 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal live-data explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1024-wiki-bells](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1024-wiki-bells) ‚ÄĒ **"Wiki Bells": every Wikipedia edit on Earth, right now, struck as a bell ‚ÄĒ the planet's collective thinking-out-loud heard as a slow, drifting carillon.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **not** ear-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 587 (adult, **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal **live-real-world-data** sonifications: this Wikimedia-edit-stream√óinharmonic-bells vs `1023-airspace-organ` OpenSky-aircraft√óadditive-glissando-radar vs `1025-isobar-winds` METAR-weather√ówind-organ-isobars). **The lab's 2nd genuine data-sonification** (after `1002-sun-organ`/NOAA ‚ÄĒ directly answers JURY 2026-06-28 #5: "build a second real-world-data piece"; the data-driven-composition category was wide open). **For**: adult / contemplative-observatory / **live-data INPUT** (Wikimedia **EventStreams** SSE ‚ÄĒ keyless, CORS-open, no server route, no pointer) / **Canvas2D bloom OUTPUT** (one expanding ring/glyph per event ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT a full-screen WebGL2 fragment raster, the jury's 9√ó over-represented output) / luminous gold-ivory bells + violet new-article chimes + mint new-user sparkles on near-black. **NAMED REFERENCE:** a Resonance-flavored, harmonically-richer descendant of **Hatnote's *"Listen to Wikipedia"*** (Stephen LaPorte & Mahmoud Hashemi, 2013), credited in README + in-app Design notes. **The mapping (legible):** each `recentchange` event ‚Üí an **inharmonic bell** (detuned partials at metallic ratios, exponential decay); signed **byte-delta ‚Üí pitch/weight** (big edits = low, weighty bells; small copyedits = high tinkles), **edit type ‚Üí timbre + color** (edit / new-article warm chime / new-user rising sparkle / bot = quieter+woodier, mutable), **wiki language ‚Üí stereo pan**. Pitches snap to a **drifting modal lattice** (pentatonic/Dorian family that re-seeds every ~30s) so the carillon is consonant but minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1 ‚ÄĒ a long-form, **self-evolving** texture, not a loop. **Varies the human‚ÜĒsound relationship (the jury's #1 ask):** a **non-pointer instrument** ‚ÄĒ the world's edit stream plays itself; the visitor only *shapes the listening* (language filter, bot mute, density), never aims or strikes. Voice-capped (~12) ‚Üí soft delay tail ‚Üí compressor so a busy day never clips or becomes noise; significant-event selection when flooded. **Degrades to always-sound:** if `EventSource` is missing / errors / sends nothing within 6s, a built-in **Poisson-ish synthetic edit generator** (exponential inter-arrivals, varied deltas, ~6% new-users / ~12% new-articles / ~45% bots) plays an **identical-sounding** stream with a `text-amber-300/95` "simulated edit stream ‚ÄĒ live feed unavailable" notice; AudioContext created + resumed on the first click ("Listen to the world edit"). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (SSE ingest/filter/throttle + inharmonic bell synth + drifting-modal-scale state + Canvas2D bloom viz = 4) ¬∑ #3 **named reference** (Hatnote) ¬∑ #1 varies-relationship via non-pointer world-as-instrument. (#1-never-used NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ EventStreams data + bell synth both exist elsewhere; #4 single-cycle; #5 paired to *this* fire's RESEARCH ¬ß587 dive, not a 14-day-old entry.) **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-adult-input (JURY 7√ó), "a-simulation-IS-the-instrument-body" as adult default (JURY 7√ó), Gray-Scott RD (JURY, used 2√ó running), full-screen WebGL2-flat-raster (JURY ~9√ó), ritual/cathedral spatial-walk (JURY on-the-clock)]` ¬∑ `picked=[**live-data-stream INPUT** (non-pointer; world-as-instrument), **Canvas2D-bloom OUTPUT** (under-represented, jury-collapsed to 1√ó), **inharmonic-bell-carillon TECHNIQUE**, **observatory-of-attention VIBE**, **drifting-modal long-form** (minute-5‚Č†minute-1)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; EventStreams is keyless + CORS-open; zero new npm deps; zero AI/cost surface). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: webpack compile + lint [only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings] + type-check PASS; **static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** ‚ÄĒ `next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio in the box ‚ÄĒ unverified: bell balance, the live SSE feel, flood-throttle on a busy day; the synthetic generator + gesture-resume are the always-sounding net). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`airspace-organ`** (OpenSky aircraft overhead ‚Üí just-intonation additive glissando chord on a phosphor ATC radar; lost on data-source CORS/auth fragility ‚Üí more often synthetic than `1024`'s reliably-live EventStreams) + **`isobar-winds`** (continental METAR weather ‚Üí filtered-noise wind-organ on a Canvas2D isobar field; lost on being the third just-intonation-drone of the set, least surprising). Both built complete, removed un-committed per the non-winner rule; seeds ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß587. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1024-wiki-bells/README.md`

## (Cycle 585 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to ONE concept, shipped 1)

[/dream/1019-echo-halls-tonnetz](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1019-echo-halls-tonnetz) ‚ÄĒ **"Echo Halls ‚ÄĒ Tonnetz": walk your body across the neo-Riemannian lattice of triads ‚ÄĒ every threshold you step over is a real P/L/R voice-leading move (C‚ÜíEm‚ÜíAm‚Ä¶) ‚ÄĒ while a GPU reaction-diffusion field blooms under the active chord and the whole spatialized ensemble re-pans around you in HRTF.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **not** ear/GPU-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 585 (adult, **DEEP** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 approaches to *Echo Halls*: this Tonnetz√óWebGPU-compute-RD vs `1018-echo-halls-walk` first-person-full-sphere-find-by-ear vs `1017-echo-halls-flock` top-down-WebGPU-compute-flock). **The DEEP extension of the jury's only 5/5, `977-echo-room-gpu`** (JURY 2026-06-27 #2: "extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument ‚ÄĒ a *room* you physically walk between harmonic zones"; #3: "make the sim the resonating body"). **For**: adult / gallery-installation / **body-pose INPUT** (MediaPipe Pose torso-centroid via CDN dynamic `import()`; pointer fallback; ~1.5s P‚ÄďL‚ÄďR auto-demo, zero permissions) / **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (Gray-Scott RD on ping-pong `array<vec2<f32>>` storage buffers, `@workgroup_size(8,8)`; ‚ÜíWebGL2 RGBA16F float-target‚ÜíCPU fallback) + Canvas2D Tonnetz overlay / luminous lattice. **The harmony model (the headline):** a real **triangular neo-Riemannian Tonnetz** ‚ÄĒ right axis +7 (fifths), up axis +4 (major thirds); each triangle a triad (up=major, down=minor); **every shared edge is a genuine P (parallel, flip 3rd), L (leading-tone, root‚Üď semitone), or R (relative, 5th‚ÜĎ tone) single-voice transform** ‚ÄĒ so crossing any threshold is one common-tone-rich voice-leading step, and the HUD prints the move (`L ‚Üí Em`). **Machine-verified** (the jury's #4 verification-debt template, √† la 983): a standalone pass confirmed all shared edges resolve to a real P/L/R move of the cell's actual triad ‚ÄĒ **P:16 / L:24 / R:18 directed edges, zero mismatches**. Live triad = 3 oscillators that **glide** (`setTargetAtTime`) so voice-leading is *audible*, not just labelled ‚ÄĒ **real harmony, not the banned pentatonic safety scale**. **The resonating body:** the GPU RD field is seeded (`splat`) by the live marker + every ghost where harmony is happening; ~10Hz it's read back (`copyBufferToBuffer`‚Üí`mapAsync`) to **coverage** (opens a shimmer partial + breathes the master lowpass) + **edge energy** (sweeps a bandpass) ‚ÄĒ **the sim IS the instrument's body, not a backdrop**. **HRTF + ghost loops (kept from 977):** listener = performer; live triad + each ghost own an HRTF `PannerNode` at its lattice position, re-panning around you; "Start a loop" records a 7s lattice path ‚Üí a permanent ghost re-walking + re-triggering its transforms forever (cap 6, oldest drops, "Clear all"); bus `~1/‚ąö(n+1)`‚Üílowpass‚Üícompressor. **Degrades to always-sound:** no WebGPU‚ÜíWebGL2 float RD‚ÜíCPU RD (HUD shows `sim webgpu-compute / webgl2 / cpu`); no camera‚Üípointer (`text-rose-300` notice); full teardown (rAF + AudioContext + GPU buffers/GL programs + MediaPipe + camera tracks + resize). **Ambition 5/5** ‚ÄĒ #1 NEVER-used (lab's first **neo-Riemannian Tonnetz** engine ‚ÄĒ grep-clean; + first WebGPU-**compute** RD as a resonating *body*, vs 977's GPU-render-only) ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (pose + WebGPU-compute RD + per-source HRTF + Tonnetz harmony state = 4) ¬∑ #3 named refs (**Euler/Riemann/Cohn** Tonnetz; **Spatial Orchestra** arXiv:2510.23848; **Cardiff, *Forty Part Motet***) ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle (cycle 1 of the Echo Halls thread) ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß585** (arXiv:2606.24367, 24 Jun 2026, full-sphere human localisation). **diversity:** `banned=[raw-WebGL2-as-primary-output (‚Č•5√ó/10), keyboard/MIDI-adult-input (JURY), Canvas2D+flat-fragment-only (JURY), explainable-inverse move (JURY), ink-on-parchment vibe (JURY)]` ¬∑ `picked=[**body-pose INPUT** (scarce 1√ó recent), **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (jury-encouraged, 6√ó‚Üí1√ó), **Tonnetz+Gray-Scott-RD-body TECHNIQUE**, **gallery/installation VIBE**, **HRTF walkable harmony**]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; MediaPipe is a runtime CDN `import()`, not a dep; zero new npm deps). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: webpack compile + lint + type-check PASS, grep-clean of `1019`/`echo-halls`, reached `Collecting page data`); **static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code ‚ÄĒ every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT ear/GPU-verified** (no audio/WebGPU/camera in the box ‚ÄĒ unverified: the compute RD bind-group/ping-pong + `mapAsync` cadence on real GPU, the HRTF re-pan feel, the MediaPipe load; the WebGL2/CPU-RD + pointer + auto-demo paths are the always-sounding net). **Winner of an adult DEEP 3-approach fire**; banked **`1018-echo-halls-walk` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** ‚ÄĒ first-person, full-sphere, find-the-chord-BY-EAR (rooms at varied azimuth+elevation; listener position AND orientation update so HRTF re-pans as you look; the directest take on ¬ß585's full-sphere localisation), lost ONLY on rendering WebGL2 (over-represented output tag) with no GPU-compute ‚Üí resurrect with a compute body. Plus **`1017-echo-halls-flock`** ‚ÄĒ top-down plan; **WebGPU-compute curl-noise flock** (~120k particles) pools in your room, **atomic-reduction `mapAsync` readback** drives filter/shimmer (cleanest "compute *drives* the sound" loop, curl-noise fresher than RD), lost on the top-down form being closest to 977. Both `cp`'d to scratchpad `dream-losers-585/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build (NOT committed); seeds ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß585. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1019-echo-halls-tonnetz/README.md`

## (Cycle 584 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1)

[/dream/1015-kids-ink-garden](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1015-kids-ink-garden) ‚ÄĒ **"Ink Garden": drop a fingertip of magic ink and watch living Turing-pattern spots GROW and spread across the screen by themselves ‚ÄĒ and the more the pattern blooms, the fuller the music gets.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean + **13 headless `sim.test.ts` tests pass**; not ear/GPU-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 584 (kids, **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this touch√óGPU-reaction-diffusion vs `1014-kids-breath-flute` mic-breath√ówaveguide-flute vs `1016-kids-scarf-choir` camera-optical-flow√óchoir). **For**: kids (4+) / bioluminescent inky / **touch** seeding input (tap+drag anywhere; 4 big color-orbs pick hue; ~2s-idle auto-demo seeds itself) / **GPU reaction-diffusion FIELD** output (WebGL2 ping-pong float-texture Gray-Scott fragment shader, 256√ó256, 14 steps/frame; Canvas2D CPU-RD fallback) / glowing cyan/violet/rose/lime ink on dark water. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3** ("WebGPU compute collapsed 6√ó‚Üí1√ó ‚Ä¶ force a real GPU-compute path; make the sim the resonating BODY, not a 2D plot you read a pitch off of") ‚ÄĒ the **simulation itself is the instrument**: a real GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion field grows, splits, and blooms, and its shape is the sound (echoing the lab's friction/plate physical-instrument lineage on the kids lane). **How it works:** two invisible "chemicals" update on the GPU each frame by the Gray-Scott rule (`A' = A + (Da‚ąá¬≤A ‚ąí A¬∑B¬≤ + f(1‚ąíA))¬∑dt`, `B' = B + (Db‚ąá¬≤B + A¬∑B¬≤ ‚ąí (k+f)B)¬∑dt`; 9-point Laplacian; tuning `dA=1.0/dB=0.5/f=0.0367/k=0.0649` in the "coral/mitosis" Pearson zone so seeded spots grow and split). A fingertip is a splat pass painting `B‚Čą0.9`. **Sonification (the field IS the instrument):** `readPixels` stalls the GPU, so ~10√ó/sec a GPU blit downsamples the 256√ó256 field to a tiny **32√ó32** float texture read once; pure `summarizeField()` turns 1024 values into coverage/activity/centroid/per-region-growth ‚Üí coverage drives chord-bed gain + voice-count (sparse=root+fifth, full bloom=4-note voicing), spread-rate brightens a lowpass (700‚Äď3900 Hz), centroid soft-pans, new-spot regions fire soft consonant bells (‚Č§2 at once). **The harmony is real, not pentatonic:** an always-on ambient pad + a moving functional **I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV loop in C** (each chord ~7.5s, crossfaded), bells from a C-major scale chosen to stay consonant over the loop. **Kids-safe chain:** `master 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6500Hz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; soft 20ms attacks; always-on pad so it's never silent; every touch = visible ink + soft blip <50ms. **Degrades to always-sound:** no `EXT_color_buffer_float` ‚Üí amber notice + Canvas2D CPU Gray-Scott on a 96√ó96 grid running the *same* `stepCell` rule (still grows real Turing patterns, still reads back, still sings); WebGL context-loss caught; full unmount teardown (rAF + readback timer + GL programs/textures/FBOs + `loseContext()` + AudioContext close). **Imperative ref-driven render loop** (no per-frame setState ‚ÄĒ avoids the 60-re-renders/sec antipattern; React state only for mode/started/error). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [touch-seeding + GPU RD sim + readback-sonification + audio synth + display shader = 5] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Alan Turing, *The Chemical Basis of Morphogenesis*, 1952**; **John Pearson**, Gray-Scott regime catalogue, 1993; **Karl Sims' Reaction-Diffusion Tutorial** ‚ÄĒ the 9-point Laplacian weights + A/B feed-kill formulation are his]; #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß584). #1 NOT claimed (RD appears 6√ó in the lab ‚ÄĒ though never as a sonified GPU-compute kids body); #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary-output (audit 6√ó/10), mic-pitch-detection (969/972 redundant per JURY), tilt-ball-physics (974/995), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (JURY kids-side), MediaPipe-hand-tracking+WebGPU-particle-cloud (1008 just shipped)]` ¬∑ `picked=[**touch-seeding INPUT** (common, but the technique+output carry the diversity), **GPU-reaction-diffusion-FIELD OUTPUT** (anti-Canvas2D, the scarce jury-encouraged compute surface), **Gray-Scott-RD-sonified-as-it-grows TECHNIQUE**, **bioluminescent-ink VIBE** (off garden/meadow/cosmic), **real I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV harmony** not pentatonic]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero network/AI/mic/camera/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 54s`** ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`; grep-clean ‚ÄĒ no `1015`/`ink-garden` warning or error); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Headless-VERIFIED** (the rare win): 13 `sim.test.ts` tests pass on the pure Gray-Scott + sonification math (`stepCell`, `summarizeField`, coverage/activity/centroid/bell mappings). **NOT ear/GPU-verified** (no audio/WebGL2 device in the box ‚ÄĒ unverified: audible bed/bell balance, the live float-texture RD bloom on a real GPU, `readPixels` float-readback on iPad Safari; the Canvas2D CPU-RD fallback + always-on pad + 2s-idle auto-demo are the always-sounding net). **Winner of a kids WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1014-kids-breath-flute` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST **jet-drive digital-waveguide flute** (Cook/Smith STK; grep ‚Čą0√ó wind/jet model): blow/hum into the mic (breath RMS envelope, NOT pitch-detection) to play a glowing aurora air-column, tap big recorder-holes for G-Mixolydian pitch, harder breath = brighter/overblow; shipped with a **passing headless `selfTest()`** (7 notes oscillate, bounded, ¬Ī57¬Ę, no octave errors) + AudioWorklet/ScriptProcessor/tap-puff/auto-demo fallbacks ‚ÄĒ lost only on mic-permission 06:30 friction. Plus **`1016-kids-scarf-choir`** ‚ÄĒ wave a scarf/hands in front of the camera and **optical-flow motion-energy** (Lucas-Kanade-style, NOT silhouette/landmarks) conducts an I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV choir on WebGL aurora ribbons (finger-wave pointer fallback + auto-demo; frames processed locally). Both `cp`'d to scratchpad `dream-losers-584/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed); seeds ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß584. ## Cycle 583 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent pure-timbre explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1011-fm-aurora](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1011-fm-aurora) ‚ÄĒ **"FM Aurora": tilt your phone through a 2-D timbre-space and sculpt a 6-operator FM synthesizer live ‚ÄĒ a soft D-Lydian arpeggio plays itself while a luminous chrome spectral ridge sprouts more and more sidebands as you move.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean + **11 headless `fm.ts` tests pass**; not ear/GPU-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 583 (adult, **WIDE** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal pure-timbre explorers: this FM√ótilt vs `1012-fold-tide` wavefolder√ómic vs `1013-mantra-glass` ring-mod√óhis-piano). **For**: adult / bright DX7-chrome / **device-orientation TILT** input (gamma‚Üímodulator:carrier ratio {0.5,1,1.5,2,3,3.5,7}, beta‚Üímodulation index 0‚Üí12; pointer-drag + ~2s-idle auto-demo fallbacks) / hand-written **WebGL2** spectral-ridge + orbiting-operator-graph (Canvas2D fallback) / cyan-magenta chrome aurora. **The lab's FIRST FM (frequency-modulation) synthesis engine** ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó as a core technique across 1000+ prototypes (only the ancient `10-strange` ever touched FM; Chowning never credited). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-27 #1** ("retire the explainable-inverse formula for a week ‚ÄĒ do *pure timbre*, noise, rhythm, or spatial presence; the 4‚Äď5/5 builds LEAD WITH A NOVEL TECHNIQUE") and **#4 / verification-debt** (the jury's #1 standing liability ‚ÄĒ this is the only candidate of the fire shipped with a passing headless test suite). **The engine:** `fm.ts` is pure, DOM/audio-free, unit-tested math ‚ÄĒ the tilt‚Üítimbre mapping, ratio snapping, the **analytic FM spectrum via Bessel functions `J_k(I)`** (sidebands at `fc ¬Ī k¬∑fm`), a spectral-centroid readout, the DX7-style algorithm table, and the arpeggio note set. **Three operator algorithms (DX7-style routings):** `2-OP` (`M‚ÜíC`), `3-STACK` (`M2‚ÜíM1‚ÜíC`, cascaded ‚Üí clangier), `PARALLEL` (three modulated carriers voiced as a chord). **Audio:** Web Audio FM voices (`OscillatorNode` modulator ‚Üí `GainNode(=index¬∑modFreq)` ‚Üí carrier `.frequency`), per-note ADSR, master ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; the arpeggio auto-plays so it always sounds. **Render:** a hand-written WebGL2 aurora wash + spectral ridge (`AnalyserNode.getFloatFrequencyData`, energy visibly spreads into higher partials as the index rises) + operator graph (carriers glow cyan-white, modulators magenta, links pulse with the index); Canvas2D fallback with a `text-rose-300` notice. **Degrades to always-sound:** no gyroscope / iOS permission denied ‚Üí pointer-drag over the canvas through the same 2-D space; do nothing ‚Üí a ~2s-idle LFO auto-sweep morphs the timbre on its own (a guaranteed sounding+morphing 06:30 phone glance). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [first FM-synthesis-as-core in the lab; make the sim the resonating BODY") rebuilt on the **kids** lane, and the freshest *input* of the window (camera-hands, off the 4√ó pointer/touch reflex). **How it works:** MediaPipe reads up to 2 hands √ó 21 3D landmarks over the webcam ‚Üí per hand we derive attractor points (wrist + 5 fingertips), an **openness** value (fingertip spread / palm width) and a **pinch** value (thumb-tip‚ÜĒindex-tip / palm width). **GPU path (the swing):** a real WGSL `@compute @workgroup_size(64)` kernel advects **120k particles** in a storage buffer ‚ÄĒ curl-noise flow + pull/swirl toward the nearest hand attractor (pinch ‚Üí a single strong gather point) ‚ÄĒ then an instanced additive render pipeline draws them; open palm raises pull+swirl (bloom), pinch raises swirl hard (gather‚Üístar). **Fallback (first-class):** no WebGPU ‚Üí a **~3.2k-particle CPU integrator with the same forces** drives an additive (`lighter`) Canvas2D trail; no camera / CDN model / permission ‚Üí **ghost-hand Lissajous auto-demo** (~2s) drifts invisible hands so the cloud always lives and sings; no audio ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, visuals still animate. **Audio (no wrong notes):** field features map to a **C-major-pentatonic** voice pool over a soft C2+G2 drone ‚ÄĒ cloud centroid height ‚Üí pitch, swirl-energy EMA ‚Üí brightness/density, a pinch rings a bright bell an octave up; ## Cycle 581 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 engine approaches [WebGPU-compute vs deterministic-modal], shipped 1

[/dream/1006-modal-anvil](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1006-modal-anvil) ‚ÄĒ **"Modal Anvil": strike a row of glowing metal plates in a dark forge ‚ÄĒ the sound you hear is the LITERAL motion of a GPU-simulated vibrating plate, read back at a pickup point; a hard strike blooms sharp then glides DOWN in pitch as it rings, the way real bronze does.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean; not GPU/ear-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 581 (adult, **DEEP** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 engine approaches: this genuine WebGPU-`@compute` finite-difference plate w/ GPU‚Üíaudio readback vs. `1007-modal-anvil-modal` the deterministic non-linear modal bank + Chladni viz). **For**: adult / dark industrial forge ritual / **pointer/touch STRIKE** input (velocity = strike force; ~2s-idle ghost-hammer auto-demo) / raw **WebGL2** lit-metal heightfield (Canvas2D fallback) / molten-metal charcoal‚Üíwhite-hot. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3** ("WebGPU compute collapsed 6√ó‚Üí1√ó ‚Ä¶ force a real GPU-compute path; make the sim the instrument's resonating BODY") and the praised **"sound IS physics" lane (960-cristal-friction / 970-tension-gong)** ‚ÄĒ and the **deepening ¬ß579's banked `1001-modal-anvil` explicitly promised** ("cycle-2 = close the GPU‚Üíaudio readback loop"). Deliberately retires the jury-banned adult formula (NOT a music-theory explainer, NOT keyboard input, NOT ink-on-parchment, NOT flat-Canvas2D-only). **The PDE:** a damped stiff Kirchhoff‚ÄďLove thin plate `u_tt = -őļ¬≤¬∑‚ąá‚Āīu ‚ąí 2ŌÉ‚āÄ¬∑u_t + ŌÉ‚āĀ¬∑‚ąá¬≤u_t + excitation` (biharmonic ‚ąá‚Āī = discrete Laplacian twice ‚Üí the inharmonic *metal* spectrum; ŌÉ‚āÄ overall ring, ŌÉ‚āĀ frequency-dependent so bright modes decay first). **The non-linear pitch-bloom (genuinely emergent, no scripted envelope):** the stiffness/tension coefficient is scaled by `(1 + ő≤¬∑E)` where E is the plate's running normalised vibrational energy ‚ÄĒ a hard strike ‚Üí high E ‚Üí higher effective őļ¬≤ ‚Üí sharper pitch at impact, gliding down as energy decays (von K√°rm√°n tension modulation); stability via `E`-clamp + a hard in-shader `k2 ‚Č§ 0.052` clamp. **GPU path (the swing):** a real WGSL `@compute` shader (9 GPU markers grep-verified ‚ÄĒ `@compute`/`@workgroup_size`/`createComputePipeline`/`requestAdapter`/`mapAsync`) runs the FD update over a 96√ó96 grid in **ping-ponged prev/curr/next storage buffers**, **800 substeps/frame** (~48k pickup samples/s ‚Čą audio rate), the shader appending one real per-substep pickup sample via an atomic slot counter; **the GPU‚Üíaudio loop:** each frame async-`mapAsync` reads that block of real simulated pickup samples (one frame behind, non-blocking), sums the 4 plates, and posts it to an **AudioWorklet** ring-buffer that resamples it to the hardware rate ‚ÄĒ so the speaker cone literally follows the simulated plate (honest compromise, documented: per-frame-block delivery, not per-sample round-trips). **Fallback (the verification-debt mitigant ‚ÄĒ first-class, not degraded):** no WebGPU ‚Üí a **full per-sample CPU finite-difference plate runs inside the AudioWorklet** (34√ó34 grid, same PDE + same non-linear tension term + same k2 clamp), so the audio is STILL real plate physics that self-oscillates + decays, driving the same render ‚ÄĒ selected automatically by feature detection; no WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D field; no Web Audio ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, visuals still animate. **Audio safety:** readback DC-blocked + soft-clipped in the worklet, `gain 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass ~7kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí12dB/16:1) ‚Üí destination`; silent at rest. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [a genuine WebGPU `@compute` FD acoustic plate as the resonating BODY with a GPU‚Üíaudio readback loop ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó in the lab; prior compute pieces 988/992 were particle sims, never an FD plate read back to audio] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [pointer-strike input + WebGPU-compute FD plate sim + GPU‚Üíaudio worklet readback + WebGL2 lit-metal render] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Stefan Bilbao, _Numerical Sound Synthesis_** (Wiley 2009, FD plate scheme); Kirchhoff‚ÄďLove / von K√°rm√°n non-linear plate; **arXiv:2603.10240** "nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis" Mar 2026; **arXiv:2505.05940** Diaz & Sandler, "Fast Differentiable Modal Simulation of Non-linear ‚Ä¶ Plates", DAFx 2025] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß581 citation). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship; multi-cycle deepening seeded). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH ¬ß581 (this week's cs.SD frontier is *entirely* neural ‚ÄĒ TTS/codecs/music-gen, zero physical wave-propagation synthesis ‚ÄĒ so a transparent GPU-physics plate is the contrarian on-mandate build) + the ¬ß579 nlm anchor ‚Üí JURY 2026-06-27 #3 (GPU-compute scarcity) ‚Üí this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input (JURY), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-ONLY ‚Üí force GPU-compute/3D (JURY), explainable-inverse-of-opaque-neural conceptual move (JURY), engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment adult vibe (JURY)]` ¬∑ `picked=[**pointer/touch-STRIKE INPUT** (not keyboard), **WebGPU-compute FD plate + GPU‚Üíaudio readback OUTPUT** (the scarce jury-encouraged compute surface, rebuilding the 6√ó‚Üí1√ó collapse ‚ÄĒ NOT flat-Canvas2D/fragment-only), **non-linear FD-plate physical-modeling TECHNIQUE** (pure timbre/percussion, NOT a music-theory explainer), **dark-industrial molten-forge VIBE** (NOT parchment/cosmic/meadow)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no network/AI/mic/camera/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2 + WebGPU only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.4min`** ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached **`Collecting page data`**; **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio device in the box ‚ÄĒ unverified: absolute loudness + pickup/summing gains, the exact *amount* of pitch-bloom + ring/decay times, whether 4 plates √ó 800 substeps √ó 96¬≤ holds 60fps on a real GPU [ring underruns gracefully to silence if not], and the resample ratio under non-48kHz hardware; its `modes.ts` math is unit-checked with real numbers (inharmonic 220/445/655/821/880 Hz; a force-1.0 centre strike droops the fundamental ~232.5‚Üí225.5 Hz over 3s) ‚ÄĒ the directest **verification-debt** payer (jury's #1 liability), ship on a cycle that prioritises a provable engine; ## (Cycle 579 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 explorers [touch / live-data / mic], shipped 1)

[/dream/1002-sun-organ](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1002-sun-organ) ‚ÄĒ **"Sun Organ": Resonance plays the Sun ‚ÄĒ an endless, non-looping ambient drone + aurora composed in real time from LIVE NOAA space-weather data, so the music is literally different every minute because it tracks the actual solar wind and Earth's magnetic field right now.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 579 (adult, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 explorers; chosen on the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt ‚ÄĒ the only build with a core claim verified in-box, and the cleanest 06:30 artifact: it auto-plays with zero permission and no GPU-compile risk). **For**: adult / **live external data** input (NOAA SWPC + synthetic fallback; no kbd / mic / camera / pointer) / **raw WebGL2 aurora curtain** (Canvas2D fallback) / luminous calm, grounded in real data. **Real-world-data sonification + long-form-with-memory ‚ÄĒ two thin lab categories at once, and the freshest concept in months (breaks the spatial-rooms + struck-string groove).** On Start (or ~2s idle auto-start) it fetches three CORS-open, key-less NOAA SWPC JSON feeds ‚ÄĒ solar-wind **plasma** (speed/density), **mag** (Bz), **planetary K-index** (Kp) ‚ÄĒ and polls every 60s (**live fetch verified end-to-end in-environment: 505.2 km/s, Bz +0.35 nT, Kp 2 on 2026-06-28**; defensive parsing handles both the array-of-arrays plasma/mag shape and the array-of-objects Kp shape). **Mapping** (calm, no wrong notes): solar-wind speed ‚Üí texture agitation + aurora brightness; **Bz southward ‚Üí tension** (low drone opens, detuned beating); density ‚Üí number of audible voices; Kp ‚Üí a rising high-shimmer swell + aurora height. **Long-form memory:** a wandering tonal centre that drifts slowly + a slow "breath" LFO mean the harmonic state keeps evolving even when the data is steady ‚ÄĒ it never loops, different at minute 5 than minute 1; voices are an open just-intoned Dorian-ish field (`1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 16/9, 2, 9/4`) over a feedback-delay smear. **Degrades** to a synthetic solar-wind generator (summed sines + bounded random walks) with an `text-amber-300/95` notice if the feed is unreachable ‚ÄĒ audio + visual run with zero network. Refs: Helioradar AV (live NOAA ‚Üí infinite ambient, 2026); NASA SVS "Helio Big Year" sonifications; DATASONICA (2026 Data Sonification Award). Research-chained to RESEARCH ¬ß579. Files: `page.tsx` (809 lines), `README.md`. **Two siblings explored + banked (IDEAS ¬ß579):** `1001-modal-anvil` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST adult (strike a GPU-compute non-linear-modal metal plate ‚ÄĒ real `@compute` WGSL finite-difference plate sim as the resonating body, partials bend pitch with strike force; the directest answer to jury #3) + `1003-voice-nebula` (sing ‚Üí your voice scattered into a 24k-particle granular nebula + self-harmonized choir).

## (Cycle 578 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 explorers [mic / camera / touch], shipped 1)

[/dream/1000-kids-bubble-harp](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1000-kids-bubble-harp) ‚ÄĒ **"Bubble Harp": a calm underwater aquarium of glowing bubbles, each a REAL plucked string ‚ÄĒ tap one and it rings + wobbles + blooms; drag across several to strum a glissando harp.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 578 (kids, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 explorers; chosen on verification debt ‚ÄĒ the only no-permission, instantly-verifiable one). **For**: kids (4+) / **touch tap + drag** input / **raw WebGL2** (Canvas2D fallback) / calm teal‚Üíamber aquarium. **The "sound is real physics" lane (960/970) ported to a 4-year-old:** every bubble is a genuine **Karplus-Strong** plucked string ‚ÄĒ an AudioWorklet (loaded self-contained via Blob URL) runs the real 1983 delay-line + averaging-filter feedback algorithm excited by a soft noise burst (an offline-buffer fallback uses the same loop when the worklet is unavailable), NOT a sampled or oscillator pluck. **Mapping:** 16 bubbles tuned to **D-major pentatonic** across 3 octaves (size ‚ÜĒ pitch, big = low/long, no wrong notes); tap ‚Üí pluck + soft-body squash-and-stretch wobble + glow bloom; drag ‚Üí per-bubble glissando strum (re-pluck lockout); light soft-body collisions (squash, never a violent pop), off-top respawn for infinite calm play; always-on drone + filtered-noise water pad so it's never silent. **Kids-safe:** `gain 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6500 ‚Üí comp(‚ąí10/20:1)`, ‚ąö-voice normalization so mashing taps stays safe, 72px Start gesture-gates the AudioContext + worklet synchronously (iOS). After ~1.8s idle a ghost-finger auto-demo taps + strums through the identical pipeline. Ref: Karplus & Strong, "Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String and Drum Timbres" (Computer Music Journal, 1983). Files: `page.tsx` (852 lines, inline KS worklet), `README.md`. **Two siblings explored + banked (IDEAS ¬ß578):** `998-kids-firefly-hum` ‚≠ź (hum ‚Üí WebGPU-compute firefly flock, the flock's coordination IS the chord ‚ÄĒ research-chained to arXiv:2606.24958) + `999-kids-shadow-zoo` (your camera shadow becomes a singing creature, dependency-free frame-diff silhouette).

## (Cycle 576 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 engine approaches, shipped 1)

[/dream/995-kids-moon-trampoline](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/995-kids-moon-trampoline) ‚ÄĒ **"Moon Trampoline": tilt a tablet like a tray and roll a glowing moon-ball across a springy TRAMPOLINE OF STARS ‚ÄĒ the stretching cloth itself rings like a soft drum, because the sheet's own simulated vibration modes ARE the sound.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 576 (kids, DEEP fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 engine approaches; resurrects the ¬ß574 ‚≠ź `989-kids-star-cloth` seed). **For**: kids (4+) / **device-tilt** input / **hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2** (the lab's FIRST true-3D scene-graph build ‚ÄĒ jury 2026-06-27: "true 3D scene-graph work is 0√ó") / calm indigo starry-night bedtime. **The most literal "the physical simulation IS the resonating body"** ‚ÄĒ the 960-cristal-friction "timbre is physics" standard ported to a 4-year-old toy. **Physics:** a 24√ó24 Provot mass-spring cloth (structural + shear + bend springs, Verlet + PBD relaxation passes + Provot's over-elongation cap, four corners pinned) on the CPU/main thread ‚ÄĒ **no WebGPU dependency, so it runs on any phone or laptop browser** (the verification-safe twin of the banked WebGPU sibling). A moon-ball rolls under tilt and dents the sheet (sphere-vs-cloth push-out). **Render:** own `perspective`/`lookAt` matrices (no three.js), a camera that gently orbits so the sheet visibly stretches toward/away in depth ‚ÄĒ reads as a real 3D scene, gold/white star-glints at the nodes over a deep-indigo starfield, a soft additive moon-ball. **Audio (Eb-major lullaby, no wrong notes):** membrane-mode synthesis ‚ÄĒ **dent depth bends the low fundamental DOWN** (real tension-modulation physics: partials shift at large membrane amplitude, per Avanzini & Marogna), **ripple energy** opens higher drum-skin modes (partials ‚Čą1/1.59/2.14/2.30/2.65), **settle** = a sustained warm chord, **bounce** = a soft bloom; always-on Eb+Bb drone (never silent), kids-safe `gain ‚Č§0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6500 ‚Üí comp(‚ąí10/20:1)`, ‚Č•30ms attacks, ~12-min goodnight fade. **Input chain:** `DeviceOrientationEvent` (iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap) ‚Üí pointer-drag ‚Üí arrow keys/space ‚Üí ~2s-idle auto-demo (moon drifts a slow circle so it's always moving + singing). Refs: Provot (1995) mass-spring cloth; Avanzini & Marogna membrane-percussion synthesis; arXiv:2507.11794 (WebGPU cloth feasibility). Files: `page.tsx`, `cloth.ts`, `renderer.ts`, `gl-math.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`.

## (Cycle 580 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 engine approaches [WebGPU vs CPU], shipped 1)

- **[/dream/1005-kids-singing-slinky](/dream/1005-kids-singing-slinky)** ‚ÄĒ Singing Slinky: **flick a glowing rainbow SLINKY in true 3D and watch a bright compression pulse race down the coil, bounce off the far end, and settle into a humming standing wave you both SEE (bunched/stretched bands) and HEAR (the spring's own resonant pitch).** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 580 (kids 4+ / **touch/pointer flick** + ~2s-idle auto-demo / **hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2** ‚ÄĒ own perspective/lookAt orbiting camera, glowing rainbow point-sprite beads on a 9-turn helix over a dark playground grid; Canvas2D fallback / **longitudinal mass-spring standing-wave ‚Üí modal/additive synthesis** / bright rainbow playground vibe). **The lab's FIRST longitudinal (compression) wave** ‚ÄĒ every prior wave piece (strings `140`/`105`, cloth `995`, membrane, fluid `988`) is transverse or a 2D surface; here each of 128 coils is a point-mass whose displacement runs ALONG the helix axis, so coils visibly bunch/stretch. CPU 1-D mass-spring chain integrated with the discrete wave equation `a_i = (k/m)¬∑(u_{i+1}‚ąí2u_i+u_{i‚ąí1}) ‚ąí damping¬∑v_i`, fixed‚Äďfixed boundaries ‚Üí clean integer harmonic series `f_n = n¬∑c/2L` (inherently consonant); a flick injects a Gaussian compression pulse that propagates, reflects off both pinned ends, and relaxes into stationary nodes/antinodes. **Audio = the physics:** the displacement field is projected onto the fixed‚Äďfixed mode shapes `sin(nŌÄi/N)` (n=1..8) driving an additive harmonic-series oscillator bank that swells when excited and decays as the wave damps ‚ÄĒ the fundamental literally IS the spring's resonance; grab-point snaps the fundamental to **D major pentatonic** (no wrong notes), always-on breathing drone (never silent), mandatory kids-safe chain `gain ‚Č§0.26 ‚Üí lowpass ~6500 Hz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1)`, soft attacks, per-voice normalization. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**longitudinal compression-wave standing modes** ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó as a lab technique; all prior waves transverse/2D-surface] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [touch-flick input + 1-D longitudinal spring sim + mode-projection additive synth + hand-written true-3D WebGL2 render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Stefan Bilbao, _Numerical Sound Synthesis_** (FDTD physical modeling); the Physics Classroom slinky longitudinal-vs-transverse demonstration; helical-spring longitudinal modes]; #5 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ no physical-modeling paper shipped in the last 7 days, said plainly in RESEARCH ¬ß580). `diversity: banned=[keyboard/MIDI-primary-input (JURY), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-ONLY ‚Üí force GPU-compute/3D (JURY), explainable-inverse-of-opaque-neural (JURY, adult, n/a), engraved-parchment vibe (JURY, adult, n/a), warm-meadow/storybook kids vibe (over-rep 7√ó), AND soft: continuum-SURFACE-physics-sim (cloth 995 / fluid 988, kids 2√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[**touch-flick INPUT**, **hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the jury-sanctioned 3D escape from the flat-2D monoculture ‚ÄĒ true-3D 1√ó recent), **longitudinal-standing-wave TECHNIQUE** (lab-first, 1-D coil NOT a 2D continuum surface, so it dodges the kids surface-sim soft-rut), **bright-rainbow-playground VIBE** (off warm-meadow/parchment/cosmic)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** RESEARCH ¬ß580's dive found this week's cs.SD frontier is entirely neural (TTS/codecs/music-gen) with ZERO physical wave-propagation synthesis ‚Üí a transparent "see-the-wave-that-makes-the-sound" instrument is the contrarian on-mandate build (the praised "sound IS physics" lane: 960/970/995). **Winner of a kids DEEP 2-approach fire**; CPU N=96 fallback driving the identical path) ‚ÄĒ the jury-encouraged scarce GPU-compute surface; de-selected ONLY on verification ease (1005 runs on any WebGL2 phone with no adapter/permission friction, so the 06:30 artifact IS what's designed; ## (Cycle 575 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 walk-the-room explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/992-dream-house](/dream/992-dream-house)** ‚ÄĒ Dream House: **walk your body through a field of sustained just-intoned sine drones ‚ÄĒ move even slightly and some overtones bloom while others fade, so the music is pure standing-wave timbre you sculpt with your position. No notes, no wrong notes.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 575 (adult / **body-pose + pointer INPUT** ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe Pose torso centroid, pointer/touch fallback / **WebGPU particle field** (WGSL, WebGL2‚ÜíCanvas2D fallback) / **just-intonation drone + spatial-well spectral sculpt + HRTF** TECH / **Marian Zazeela magenta/violet light** vibe). **A deliberate browser port of La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela's _Dream House_** (MELA Foundation, TriBeCa ‚ÄĒ on view through 2026-06-21) and the **DEEP extension of the lab's only 5/5, `977-echo-room-gpu`**, exactly as JURY 2026-06-27 asked ("extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument; retire the explainable-inverse formula; do pure timbre / spatial presence, not a music-theory explainer"). **Eight permanently-running sine `OscillatorNode`s** at small-integer just ratios (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 7/4, 2/1, 9/4) over a ~72.6 Hz body-felt fundamental ‚ÄĒ every interval beatless by construction, so any subset is consonant; the partials never stop (a drone you sculpt, not notes you trigger). **Position sculpts the spectrum:** each partial owns a spatial Gaussian "well"; your position sets per-partial gain by proximity (normalized, with a floor so it's never silent), so a small move re-balances which overtones dominate; faint position-dependent detuned twin oscillators (~0.06‚Äď1.4 Hz) produce the shifting standing-wave beats that are the installation's signature; all changes `setTargetAtTime`-smoothed (zero clicks). **HRTF:** one AudioContext, the performer is the AudioListener, each partial sits at a fixed 3D position via an HRTF `PannerNode` ‚ÄĒ as you move, the whole field re-pans around you (you walk *among* the sine sources). Bus ‚Üí 6 kHz lowpass ‚Üí compressor/limiter ‚Üí ~1.6 s fade-in master so the eight-voice cluster never clips. "Leave a resonance" freezes a spectral spot as a glowing marker you can walk back to. Renders as Zazeela-magenta calligraphic glow blooms tracking each partial's amplitude. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [pose/pointer input + 8-voice just-intonation drone engine + spatial-well spectral sculpt + HRTF spatialization + WebGPU particle render = 5] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela, _Dream House_**, MELA, through 2026-06-21; **Janet Cardiff, _The Forty Part Motet_**] ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle [the 977 spatial-instrument thread] ¬∑ #5 dated **RESEARCH ¬ß575** ‚ÄĒ today's dive). `diversity: banned=[computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input (JURY), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-only (JURY ‚ÄĒ force GPU-compute/3D), "explainable-inverse-of-an-opaque-neural-frontier" move (JURY 4√ó), engraved-manuscript/parchment adult vibe (JURY 3√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[**body-pose+pointer INPUT** (deepens the abandoned pose sensor ‚ÄĒ JURY #5), **WebGPU particle OUTPUT** (the scarce, JURY-ENCOURAGED surface ‚ÄĒ rebuilds compute from 1√ó), **just-intonation drone / pure-timbre spatial-presence TECH** (NOT a harmony/neural explainer ‚ÄĒ JURY #1), **Zazeela magenta-light VIBE** (not parchment, not cosmic, not storybook)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's ¬ß575 dive surfaced the real Dream House *currently on view* (MELA, through 2026-06-21) and this build IS it ‚ÄĒ the tightest possible today's-research ‚Üí today's-build chain. **Love-aware:** pulled by `148-spatial-palette`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `107-ocean-presence`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `243-spectral-cloud`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (spatial / presence / spectral). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client synthesis, no network/AI/cost); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Verification:** demoable on the Canvas2D path alone with a ~1.5 s auto-start drone + Lissajous auto-drift so an unattended 06:30 glance is sounding and moving; ## (Cycle 574 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 GPU-compute/3D explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/988-kids-jelly-pond](/dream/988-kids-jelly-pond)** ‚ÄĒ Sing the Pond: **a 4-year-old drags a finger across a glowing pond of thousands of REAL GPU-simulated water particles ‚ÄĒ stirring, pooling, splashing ‚ÄĒ and the water's own motion is the instrument.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 574 (kids 4+ / **touch/pointer-drag INPUT** / **WebGPU compute Position-Based-Fluids** ‚ÄĒ a real GPU fluid solver, NOT a Canvas2D loop and NOT a single flat fragment shader / **fluid-motion ‚Üí synth mapping** / sunlit amber-on-teal pond vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27's loudest structural finding** ‚ÄĒ "WebGPU compute collapsed 6√ó‚Üí1√ó, 14 of 15 builds render flat 2D; force a real GPU-compute or 3D path ‚ÄĒ a fluid / particle sim that is the instrument's resonating BODY, not a 2D plot you read a pitch off." Here the sim is the body: each frame runs **5 WGSL compute passes over ~4,096 particles** ‚ÄĒ `predict` (integrate the finger's radial push) ‚Üí `buildGrid` (atomic spatial-hash neighbour search) ‚Üí `computeDensity` (poly6 density + the PBF constraint scalar őĽ) ‚Üí `solve` (iterative position correction with an s_corr tensile term, several iterations) ‚Üí `finalize` (round-pond boundary, velocity from position-delta, XSPH damping, and **GPU-atomic accumulation of motion stats** ‚ÄĒ avg/peak speed, pooled density under the finger, splash flag ‚ÄĒ copied back in an 8-word buffer to drive audio). **The water plays the music:** stir-speed/local velocity ‚Üí a soft continuous shimmer voice in **F-Lydian / major-pentatonic** (faster water climbs, always in key ‚ÄĒ no wrong notes); a splash (fast drag) ‚Üí a gentle marimba sparkle arpeggio; pooled density under the finger ‚Üí a fuller/lower chord when calm, brighter/sparser when scattered; an always-on water-drone keeps it never-silent. Renders the simulated positions as warm additive metaball glints (sunlit amber on teal-green). **Kids-safe:** ‚Č•72px Play gate (gesture-inits AudioContext), instant response, no fail states, `masterGain 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6.5kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1)`, attacks ‚Č•30ms; **~2s-idle ghost-finger auto-demo** stirs the pond so an unattended glance both *sees* the water move and *hears* music within ~1s. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [touch input + WebGPU PBF compute solver + fluid-motion‚Üíchord/splash synth + GPU additive render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Macklin & M√ľller, "Position Based Fluids," SIGGRAPH 2013**; the 2026 GPU-physical-sim frontier **arXiv:2606.21753**, June 23 2026] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß574** ‚ÄĒ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (4√ó/10 last-10 ‚ÄĒ AT audit cap), flat-fragment-shader-only output (JURY ‚ÄĒ force GPU-compute/3D), WebGL2-as-primary (5√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ over soft cap), computer-keyboard/MIDI input (JURY adult-ban + audit), "explainable-inverse-of-opaque-neural-frontier" technique (JURY 4√ó), engraved-manuscript/parchment vibe (JURY ‚ÄĒ n/a kids), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes-as-the-whole-idea (JURY kids ban), shake input (just used 984)] ¬∑ picked=[**WebGPU-compute PBF fluid OUTPUT** (clears the 2D monoculture, answers JURY #3, rebuilds the scarce GPU-compute capability ‚ÄĒ 1√ó/10), **touch-drag INPUT** (0√ó in the last-10 window; the kid-natural sensor), **physical-simulation-as-the-resonating-body TECH** (NOT a harmony explainer, NOT a neural inversion), **sunlit-pond VIBE** (warm, not cosmic)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's ¬ß574 dive (the 2026 GPU frontier is heterogeneous physical-sim-as-instrument) drove all three briefs; visible chain *today's research ‚Üí today's build*. **Love-aware (a rare cycle where loves pull the pick):** Karel's loves of **`84-wave-fluid`‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (fluid), **`133-kids-ripple-pond`‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (pond/ripple) and **`130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (GPU particle compute) directly confirm the fluid + GPU-compute direction. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client, no network/AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGPU + WebGL2 fallback + Web Audio). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully in 51s` ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached **`Collecting page data`**;
