## (Cycle 573 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/986-empty-words](/dream/986-empty-words)** ‚ÄĒ Empty Words: **paste any text ‚ÄĒ a poem, an email, Thoreau ‚ÄĒ and a transparent engine *sets it to music* deterministically: vowels pick scale degrees of a real mode, stress lands downbeats, punctuation breathes and cadences, and every note shows you the letter that caused it.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 573 (adult composers / **text-paste INPUT** ‚ÄĒ a `<textarea>`, the lab's first text-as-score input, 0√ó ever / **raw-WebGL2 engraved-manuscript glyph field**, Canvas2D fallback / **deterministic rule-based text-setting** ‚ÄĒ a pure `compose(text, mode)` function, no model, fully offline / **engraved ink-on-charcoal manuscript** vibe, off cosmic-glow). **The explainable, deterministic INVERSE of the 2026 neural text‚Üímusic frontier** (Text2midi / MeloTrans / diffusion caption‚ÜíMIDI ‚ÄĒ all opaque black boxes): here the same text *always* yields the same piece and the engine names *why* each note sounds. **Six vowels (a e i o u y) map across the seven degrees of a chosen real mode** (D Dorian default ¬∑ A Aeolian ¬∑ C Ionian ¬∑ F Lydian ‚ÄĒ selectable), ordered by vowel openness for a singable contour; **stressed/long/capitalized syllables ‚Üí longer downbeat durations**, unstressed ‚Üí short passing tones; **punctuation ‚Üí rhythm & cadence** (comma = breath rest, period = phrase cadence resolving toward the tonic, `!`/`?` = leap/raised tension), newlines = new phrase, capitalization ‚Üí louder dynamics; an always-on diatonic **harmonic bed** keeps the sung melody consonant. A live **"now singing"** readout names the exact vowel/stress/mark cause of every note ‚ÄĒ explainability as a first-class feature, so a composer can interrogate the logic. **Determinism is real and tested:** no `Math.random()` touches which notes play or when (only a bounded ¬Ī4-cent cosmetic timbre detune); a Node dry-run over the default passage + edge cases (empty string, all-punctuation, a 400-word paragraph, unicode/accented text) never threw, always produced ‚Č•1 pitched note, and was **byte-identical across two runs in all four modes** ‚ÄĒ so the piece is reproducible AND fully **hand-verifiable by typing**, with zero hardware. **Four subsystems:** text tokenizer + syllable/stress heuristic ¬∑ the deterministic `text‚ÜíNoteEvent[]` composer (with per-note provenance) ¬∑ a Web Audio ~25ms look-ahead scheduler with the harmonic bed ¬∑ a raw GLSL ES 3.00 WebGL2 manuscript renderer (glyph-atlas texture + procedural parchment/staff-lines/grain + amber glow on the singing token), with a Canvas2D fallback of the same look. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**John Cage *Empty Words*** 1974 ‚ÄĒ his dissolution of Thoreau's *Journal* into graded sound-events; **Guidonian / solmization** rule-based text-setting] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß573** ‚ÄĒ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7√ó), **keyboard/MIDI INPUT (4√ó/10 last-10 ‚ÄĒ at audit cap)**, **Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (4√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ at audit cap)**, cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√ó), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4√ó), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (n/a adult)] ¬∑ picked=[**text-paste INPUT** (0√ó ever ‚ÄĒ the freshest possible, clears JURY #3 non-pointer, off the at-cap keyboard/MIDI), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (healthy 3√ó/10, NOT the at-cap Canvas2D), **deterministic text-setting TECH** (sound/composition-as-object ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #2; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell; lab-first technique), **engraved-manuscript VIBE** (off cosmic-glow ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #5)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's ¬ß573 dive (the 2026 text/prosody‚Üímusic frontier is uniformly opaque neural ‚ÄĒ prosodic-dynamics arXiv:2606.25369 Jun 25 / VoiceTTA 2606.26534 Jun 26 / Text2midi / MeloTrans / diffusion-symbolic 2603.00576 ‚ÄĒ motivating the explainable, authored text-setting inversion) drove the flagship brief; visible chain *today's research ‚Üí today's build*. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully in 42s` ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint` on the folder ‚Üí **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; folder grep-clean ‚ÄĒ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/three.js); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Verification: the strongest dent in a while** ‚ÄĒ the composition is **headless-proven deterministic** (byte-identical Node dry-run) AND fully **hand-verifiable by typing** with zero hardware (no mic/camera/accelerometer/GPU-required); the WebGL2 paint + live audio timbre + Canvas2D fallback are tsc/lint-clean and reasoned but not browser-run in the box; the syllable/stress logic is a clean heuristic, not a pronunciation dictionary (documented). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal non-banned inputs ‚ÄĒ text / live-data / tilt); banked **`985-quake-choir` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** (live USGS earthquake feed ‚Üí generative modal bell-choir over a drone, WebGL2 seismographic map ‚ÄĒ the builder fetched the **real feed end-to-end: 202/202 features parsed, HTTP 200, permissive CORS**, with a seeded GR-distributed offline fallback ‚ÄĒ IDEAS ¬ß573) + **`987-tilt-spectra`** (device-tilt ‚Üí additive spectral timbre-sculpting, WebGL2 CRT oscilloscope where the scope draws the literal output waveform ‚ÄĒ IDEAS ¬ß573). Both returned complete + builder tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-573/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). ## Cycle 572 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/984-kids-shake-bells](/dream/984-kids-shake-bells)** ‚ÄĒ Magic Bell Tray: **a 4-year-old SHAKES the tablet like a tray of magic handbells ‚ÄĒ and each shake rings real, physically-modeled bells that climb then descend a genuine G-Mixolydian ladder, harder shakes ringing a fuller sparkling arpeggio.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 572 (kids 4+ / **off-glass accelerometer SHAKE, the non-pointer input** ‚ÄĒ *not* tilt, *not* a finger on glass / **raw-WebGL2 additive point-sprite glow field**, Canvas2D fallback / **real modal bell synthesis (inharmonic partials) walking a G-Mixolydian ladder** / warm gold-on-blue-violet night vibe). **The rare recent build Karel can VERIFY by shaking his review phone at 06:30** ‚ÄĒ a direct dent in the jury's #1 standing liability (verification debt, 4+ juries). An always-on soft G2+D3 drone keeps it never-silent; successive shakes walk a ~2-octave **G Mixolydian (G A B C D E F‚ôģ)** ladder UP then turn around and DESCEND (a rising-then-falling shimmer, not a fixed loop); shake intensity (0..1) sets both *how many* bells ring (gentle = 1‚Äď2 soft tones, big = a 3‚Äď5 bell sparkling arpeggio) and strike brightness. **Real modal bell synthesis, not samples and not a single sine** ‚ÄĒ each bell is a small bank of inharmonic partials (~1, 2, 2.4, 3, 4.5) with independent exponential decays + slight per-partial detune so the bell *beats* and shimmers; polyphony ‚ąö-normalized so a big arpeggio never clips. **Deliberately NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes scale and NOT a I‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV / V‚ÜíI functional cadence** (the jury's hardest KIDS ban #1) ‚ÄĒ modal *color* via the lowered-7th F‚ôģ, a different musical idiom from the lab's recent cadence toys (957/974). **Shake-onset detection** (`motion.ts`): `accelerationIncludingGravity` low-passed to estimate gravity ‚Üí subtract ‚Üí linear-accel magnitude ‚Üí downward threshold crossing just past the peak with a ~150ms refractory ‚Üí intensity; iOS 13+ `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` fired synchronously in the Start tap; thresholds exported as top-level constants (`SHAKE_THRESHOLD`/`SHAKE_SENSITIVITY`/‚Ä¶) flagged for real-device tuning. Kids-safe `master gain ‚Č§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass ~6500Hz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`, attacks ‚Č•10ms, ~12-min goodnight lull within a ~15-min cap. **Degrades fully:** sensor denied/absent ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice but the ‚Č•176px round SHAKE! button + spacebar + ~3s-idle **ghost auto-shaker** all keep it sounding & blooming with zero hardware; no WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D glow fallback; neither ‚Üí notice, bells still ring; full teardown on unmount. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [shake-onset detector + modal bell synth + ladder walker + WebGL2 glow field = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Orff Schulwerk** handbell/body-percussion pedagogy ¬∑ modal-color-vs-functional-cadence ¬∑ the **2026 embodied-children-music** line incl. *Moving Mandala* 2025] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß572 ‚ÄĒ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√ó), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4√ó), **keyboard/MIDI INPUT (4√ó/10 last-10 ‚ÄĒ over audit cap)**, **Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (4√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ at audit cap)**] ¬∑ picked=[**off-glass accelerometer SHAKE INPUT** (0√ó recent ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #3; not the at-cap keyboard/MIDI, not camera/mic/tilt/tap), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (healthy 3√ó/10, NOT the at-cap Canvas2D), **modal-bell-ladder + G-Mixolydian TECH** (real mode ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic, NOT a cadence rhyme; pure synthesis, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell), **warm gold-handbell-night VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a)+(c):** today's ¬ß572 dive (the explainable, body-first, physically-modeled inversion of 2026's opaque neural streaming music generators ‚ÄĒ arXiv:2606.24307, June 26 2026) drove both briefs AND resurrects the ¬ß570 ‚≠ź banked `kids-shake-bells` seed. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/sensor-verified** (no audio or accelerometer device in the build box ‚ÄĒ bell timbre, polyphony normalization, and the shake thresholds are reasoned + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed; ## (Cycle 571 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/983-tension-journey](/dream/983-tension-journey)** ‚ÄĒ Tension Journey: **pick an emotional ARC shape (slow arch / build-and-drop / double wave / ritual rise / calm plateau) and a 4‚Äď5 minute piece composes ITSELF to follow that exact tension curve ‚ÄĒ every chord placed for a stated numeric reason, the whole composition explainable instead of opaque.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 571 (adult composers / **computer-keyboard + preset arc buttons, the non-pointer input** / **Canvas2D scrolling tension-ribbon timeline** ‚ÄĒ the legible, score-like renderer / **Elaine Chew Spiral-Array tonal-tension model used as a compositional SEARCH TARGET** / architectural ink-on-parchment vibe). **A journey-engine alternative AND the explainable, deterministic counterpart to 2026's opaque neural full-song generators** (RESEARCH ¬ß571 ‚ÄĒ the 2026 long-form-structure frontier, PhraseLDM/Depth-Structured-Recurrence/Live-Music-Diffusion, is all *learned and black-box*; this is the transparent inverse). The engine computes Chew's **three tension measures ‚ÄĒ cloud diameter (dissonance) ¬∑ cloud momentum (tonal movement) ¬∑ tensile strain (distance from home key)** ‚ÄĒ on a real 3D Spiral-Array helix `P(k)=(sin kŌÄ/2, cos kŌÄ/2, k¬∑0.4)`, blends them (`0.34¬∑diameter + 0.18¬∑momentum + 0.48¬∑strain`, strain dominant ‚ÄĒ distance-from-home is the strongest felt cue), and at each step runs a **beam search (width 3) over a real harmonic vocabulary** (diatonic triads/7ths + Neapolitan-6, German-aug-6, dim7, secondary dominants, tritone-sub, modal mixture) scoring each candidate `|tension‚ąítarget|¬∑1.0 + voiceLeading¬∑0.22 + repeatPenalty¬∑0.15` ‚ÄĒ so it picks the chord whose measured tension best moves the music toward the arc, then **shows the "why" tag near the playhead** (`tensile strain 0.61 ¬∑ tension +0.04`). **Long-form WITH memory (the lab's thin menu category):** stateful key/previous-CE/section tracking + seeded **mulberry32** PRNG (`DEFAULT_SEED=0x7e551042` ‚Üí a given arc+key reproduces exactly) + phrase-boundary fifth-pivot/mode-flip modulations, so **minute 5 is in a different key and character than minute 1** ‚ÄĒ not a loop. Honestly maps the arc's [0,1] shape into the vocabulary's reachable band `[0.22,0.70]` *before both scoring and drawing the guide*, so "the ribbon hugs the guide" is a like-for-like claim. Look-ahead Web-Audio scheduler (FM-ish ADSR voices + bass root + sparse melody; tension drives brightness/roughness so the arc is *audible*; `gain‚Üílowpass‚Üícompressor‚Üídestination`, voice cap). Canvas2D: dashed target guide + filled amber achieved-ribbon (turns rose on overshoot) + violet playhead + modulation ticks + three live meters. **Auto-starts ~1.2s with the "Slow Arch"** so a zero-setup 06:30 glance hears + sees the arc develop. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26 #2** ("make the SOUND the primary object ‚ÄĒ not a GPU sim you pulse a bell off of": the composition *is* the object) + **#4** (verification debt ‚ÄĒ see below) + Karel's standing priority #4 (journey-engine alternatives: EDM build-and-drop, ritual, cinematic arcs). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [keyboard/preset input + Spiral-Array tension engine + beam-search composer + tension-driven synth + Canvas2D ribbon = 5] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Elaine Chew, _The Spiral Array_ (2014)**; **Herremans & Chew, "Tension ribbons", TENOR 2016**; **Herremans & Chew, _MorpheuS_, IEEE TAC**] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß571 ‚ÄĒ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). The *tension model specifically* (cloud diameter/momentum/tensile strain as a generative target) is lab-first ‚ÄĒ `370-tonal-map` used only Chew's center-of-effect/tonal-focus for modulation *reading*, never the three tension measures nor as a *compositional* target (#1 plausible, claimed cautiously). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√ó), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4√ó), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (n/a adult)] ¬∑ picked=[**keyboard + preset-button INPUT** (non-pointer ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #3; the instrument is the autonomous engine, not a finger), **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (jury-blessed legitimate, "earns its place"; the legible score-like renderer, NOT the WebGPU pile), **Spiral-Array tension-as-search-target TECH** (sound/composition-as-object ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #2; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell), **architectural ink-on-parchment VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's ¬ß571 dive (the explainable-tension inversion of the opaque 2026 long-form frontier) drove both briefs. **Dents the jury's #1 standing liability (verification debt, 4+ juries):** uniquely among recent ships, the engine was **headless-VERIFIED** ‚ÄĒ run across all 5 arcs at 110 chords, **mean tension-vs-target error ‚Čą 0.026‚Äď0.033** (max ‚Čą 0.11‚Äď0.15 on the 0‚Äď1 scale) and **5 distinct keys per piece** ‚ÄĒ empirical evidence the composer tracks the arc and minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1 (the *audible* brightness/roughness with tension is reasoned from the audio code, not a listening test). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully` ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint` on the folder ‚Üí **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` ‚Üí **0 errors**; all build warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 983 folder); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept ‚ÄĒ "make tonal tension a live, visible, audible object" ‚ÄĒ √ó two interaction models); banked **`982-tension-ribbon` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** ‚ÄĒ the real-time *played* twin: play chords on the keyboard/**Web-MIDI** and a **raw-WebGL2 3D tension ribbon** swells/twists/reheats per the same three measures while the synth brightens and detune-roughens with tension; **its live 3D spiral-helix viz + MIDI-played perturbation is the precise cycle-2 graft** (watch 983 compose AND grab the keyboard to bend the live tension target by hand) + add **key-tracking** (982's own #1 wart: fixed-C strain anchor) to both. Returned complete + builder-verified tsc/eslint-clean (README written); `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-571/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬ß571). ## (Cycle 570 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-pointer/real-harmony explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/981-kids-happy-sad-tree](/dream/981-kids-happy-sad-tree)** ‚ÄĒ Happy / Sad Tree: **a 4-year-old taps glowing fruit on a singing tree, then flips ONE big ‚ėÄÔłŹ/ūüĆô switch ‚ÄĒ and the SAME song, SAME taps suddenly feel happy or tender as the whole world flips between real parallel C-major and C-minor.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 570 (kids 4+ / **discrete touch-TAP** ‚Č•68px fruit ‚ÄĒ *not* drag, dodges the JURY 7√ó pointer-drag ban / **raw-WebGL2 sky fragment-shader** gold‚ÜĒindigo mode crossfade, Canvas2D gradient fallback / **parallel major‚ÜĒminor mode-flip with voice-led chord re-voicing** / bright gold/indigo storybook vibe). **The single most literal "feel real harmony" kids toy in the lab ‚ÄĒ and the most ROBUST/verifiable one (zero permissions: no mic, no camera, no accelerometer, no GPU-required ‚Üí it plays instantly on any phone/laptop at 06:30).** An always-on warm pad holds a **I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV** progression (in minor **i‚ÄďVI‚Äďiv‚Äďv** ‚ÄĒ same roman functions, same bass roots; only the chord *quality* changes). The giant ‚ėÄÔłŹ/ūüĆô toggle flips the world **parallel C-major ‚ÜĒ C-natural-minor**: the held pad does NOT restart ‚ÄĒ each voice **glides to its nearest chord tone in the new mode over ~400ms** (true voice leading, the core technique) while the WebGL2 sky eases warm-gold‚ÜĒcool-indigo over ~600ms, so the world *melts* from happy to tender. **Real diatonic tonal harmony, explicitly NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes safety scale** (the jury's hardest KIDS ban, #1) ‚ÄĒ the seven fruit are scale degrees 1‚Äď7 and **taps quantize to the *current* mode's diatonic scale**, so the lowered 3rd/6th/7th (exactly where the feeling lives) are in play yet there are still no wrong notes. Idle ghost auto-player taps a phrase + breathes between modes every ~8s so a silent glance demos the whole idea; ~15-min gentle fade; kids-safe `gain ‚Č§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass ~6500Hz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor`. **Named ref: Kate Hevner's mode/affect experiments (1935‚Äď37)** (major=bright/happy, minor=tender, *independent of melody*). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [discrete-tap input + parallel-mode harmony engine w/ voice-led re-voicing + diatonic pluck synth + WebGL2 sky shader = 4] ¬∑ #3 named ref [Hevner 1935‚Äď37] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß570 ‚ÄĒ today's dive: MDPI *IJERPH* 2026 child mode-affect review + *Applied Sciences* 2026 key/mode‚Üíemotion-in-piano; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√ó), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4√ó), camera/body (kids 1√ó recent ‚ÄĒ 978), tilt (kids 2√ó ‚ÄĒ 974/964), mic-voice/pitch (kids 2√ó ‚ÄĒ 972/969)] ¬∑ picked=[**discrete touch-TAP INPUT** (NOT drag ‚ÄĒ dodges the 7√ó pointer-drag ban; a distinct discrete idiom), **raw-WebGL2 + Canvas2D-fallback OUTPUT** (not the over-rep adult-cosmic GPU look), **parallel major‚ÜĒminor voice-led mode-flip TECH** (real diatonic harmony ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell), **bright gold/indigo storybook VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Research-first path (c)+(a):** resurrects the ‚≠ź ¬ß568-banked recent-research IDEAS seed `kids-happy-sad-tree` (itself from the ¬ß568 dive), reinforced by today's ¬ß570 child-mode-affect papers. **Directly dents the jury's #1 standing liability (verification debt, 3+ juries):** unlike 978 (camera) / 980 (accelerometer) / the breath/shake siblings, this needs **zero hardware/permissions**, so it's the easiest recent kids build for Karel to actually *play and hear* on his morning phone ‚ÄĒ the ¬ß568 seed flagged it exactly as "easiest to hand-verify ‚Üí directly dents the jury's #1 liability." **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully` ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached **`Collecting page data`**; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` ‚Üí **0 errors**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 981 folder; folder grep-clean ‚ÄĒ no `any`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; the idle ghost auto-player guarantees a *sounding* glance with zero hardware). ## (Cycle 569 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 interaction models, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/979-cantus-engine](/dream/979-cantus-engine)** ‚ÄĒ The Cantus Engine: **seed a 3‚Äď6-note subject and watch Resonance compose a 5-minute, self-developing fugue in front of you ‚ÄĒ a deterministic, *explainable* counterpoint machine where every note is a named Bach/Fux operation you can see fire on the score.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 569 (adult composers / **Web-MIDI + computer-keyboard, the non-pointer input ‚ÄĒ revives the 1√ó MIDI sensor** / **raw-WebGL2 scrolling piano-roll/manuscript** with transform labels (Canvas2D fallback) / **deterministic long-form motivic-development counterpoint engine + Fux voice-leading scorer** / engraved-manuscript vibe). **The deliberate human-legible inverse of 2026's black-box neural Bach-imitators** (RESEARCH ¬ß569 / **arXiv:2606.13626**, June 11 2026 ‚ÄĒ three deep-net families all *imitating* Bach from data): here there are **no trained weights and no sampling** ‚ÄĒ every note is produced by a named contrapuntal operation (diatonic transposition ¬∑ real/tonal answer at the fifth ¬∑ **inversion** ¬∑ **retrograde** ¬∑ **augmentation/diminution** ¬∑ **stretto** ¬∑ **modulation**), and a **Fux voice-leading scorer** (rewards stepwise motion + consonance on strong beats + contrary motion; penalizes parallel 5ths/8ves + voice crossing + large leaps) decides each voice's exact pitch ‚ÄĒ pass a seed and it plays the same piece every time. **Long-form with memory (~310s/cycle), the lab's thin menu category:** Exposition ‚Üí Episode ‚Üí Modulation ‚Üí Stretto ‚Üí Coda, then it loops **with a perfect-fifth key drift + a mode flip each cycle** so **minute 5 is a different key and character than minute 1** ‚ÄĒ not a short loop; a stateful `EngineState` tracks key, voice queues, fired transforms, section, elapsed beats. 3 independent voices on FM-triangle ADSR tones, **Web-Audio look-ahead scheduler** (~25ms tick / ~100ms lookahead, NOT a pre-rendered buffer); master `gain 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 9kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`, 14-voice cap with stealing. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26 #2** ("make the SOUND the primary object ‚ÄĒ the simulation should be the instrument's resonating body, not a screensaver you pulse a bell off of": a counterpoint engine is **pure music, zero GPU sim**), **#3** ("build the adult MIDI/desk-controller piece ‚ÄĒ MIDI is 1√ó, only 947"), and **#5** (engraved-manuscript register, **off the over-used adult cosmic-glow**); squarely on Karel's "personal audio workspace for pianists/composers" line. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [MIDI/keyboard input + long-form development engine + Fux scorer + WebGL2 piano-roll render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Fux, _Gradus ad Parnassum_, 1725**; **J.S. ## (Cycle 568 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-pointer/real-harmony explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/978-kids-cloud-weather](/dream/978-kids-cloud-weather)** ‚ÄĒ Conduct the Sky: **a 4-year-old conducts a bright musical SKY with their whole BODY ‚ÄĒ and it's the *quality* of the movement (gentle vs. big, sudden vs. smooth, high vs. low) that shapes the music, never a finger on glass.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 568 (kids 4+ / **front-camera whole-body motion ‚ÄĒ frame-difference, NO ML model, the non-pointer/embodied input**, with a ghost auto-conductor fallback / **Canvas2D painterly daytime sky** / **Laban Effort movement-quality ‚Üí musical-expression mapping** / bright daydream-meadow vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's loudest standing structural ask (#3): "force a non-pointer input ‚ÄĒ drag-on-glass is back to 7√ó; embodied, not a finger"** ‚ÄĒ here nothing touches the glass; the child stands back and *moves*. Three **Laban Effort** qualities each drive a distinct musical dimension: **Space/height** (motion-weighted vertical centroid ‚Üí register, reach up = higher), **Weight/energy** (total frame-difference motion ‚Üí dynamics + how many flowers bloom, a big sweep = loud bright bloom), and **Time ‚ÄĒ sudden vs. sustained** (the time-derivative of energy ‚Üí articulation, a sudden burst = a staccato sparkle-pluck + shooting star, smooth motion = a legato sung tone). The harmony is a real **C-Lydian** mode (C D E F‚ôĮ G A B ‚ÄĒ the raised-4th "wonder/magic" color over a Cadd9‚ÜĒD/C lift pad) ‚ÄĒ **explicitly NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes safety scale** (the jury's hardest KIDS ban, #1). **Input technique = pure frame-difference, no ML:** each frame drawn to a 64√ó48 offscreen canvas, per-pixel luminance differenced vs. the previous frame, thresholded mask ‚Üí (energy, vertical centroid, suddenness), adaptive baseline self-calibrating to room light ‚ÄĒ no MediaPipe/TensorFlow/npm-ML deps. **Output = Canvas2D** (the jury blessed Canvas2D as "fresh-again, earns its place" ‚ÄĒ deliberately not the over-rep raw-GPU shader): glowing sun, parallax clouds, rolling meadow, flowers that bloom on notes, birds/sparkles on sudden bursts; warm saturated daylight palette, **deliberately OFF the (adult-side) cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster**. **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬ß568, research‚Üíbuild chain visible):** **BeSound** (embodied music education for children mapping whole-body movement qualities to rhythm/melody/harmony via **Rudolf Laban's Theory of Effort**, surfaced alongside the 2026 Sound Scene embodied-sound program + Antle "embodied metaphors help children learn"). Other named refs: **Rudolf Laban, Effort (1947)** ¬∑ **BeSound** ¬∑ the film-scoring Lydian-as-wonder convention. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [camera frame-diff capture + Laban-Effort movement-quality analyzer + Lydian harmony/voice engine + Web Audio synth/pad + Canvas2D sky render = 5] ¬∑ #3 named references ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß568 ‚ÄĒ today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√ó), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√ó), tilt (kids 2√ó recent ‚ÄĒ 974/964), mic-voice (kids 2√ó recent ‚ÄĒ 972/969)] ¬∑ picked=[**front-camera whole-body INPUT** (non-pointer/embodied ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #3; ## Cycle 567 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 3 sensor/render approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/977-echo-room-gpu](/dream/977-echo-room-gpu)** ‚ÄĒ Echo Room: **build polyphony from your own PAST SELVES in space ‚ÄĒ move your body through an invisible C-major harmonic field, your motion is recorded over a 7s bar, and it loops forever as an HRTF-spatialized "ghost body" (a living GPU particle cloud) that re-traces your path and re-sings its chord while you, the listener, walk among up to 6 of your past selves.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 567 (adult / **MediaPipe Pose ‚ÄĒ full-body torso/hip centroid, the non-pointer/embodied input**, with pointer + auto-demo fallback / **raw WebGPU/WGSL particle field ‚Üí WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D fallback chain** / per-ghost **Web Audio HRTF `PannerNode`** spatialization / warm gallery / candle-lit vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's loudest standing structural ask (#3): "push the depth-room into a multi-zone spatial instrument you physically walk through ‚ÄĒ embodied-spatial, not a finger."** It is a live-looper where each loop is *a body you used to be*: position ‚Üí harmony walks a voice-led diatonic C-major neighbourhood (x = I¬∑vi¬∑IV¬∑ii¬∑V¬∑iii, common-tone heavy so a 6-ghost stack stays consonant; y = voicing/inversion + register) ‚ÄĒ **real functional harmony, NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes safety net** (the jury's other ban). Arm a loop ‚Üí your path (x,y,freq,hue) samples at ~30Hz over a fixed 7s bar ‚Üí on close it becomes a permanent looping **ghost** that re-triggers its harmony spatialized at its moving position; recording auto-arms the next, caps at 6 (oldest drops), "Clear all" present. The live performer drives both their own current voice AND the `AudioListener`, so the ensemble **re-pans around you** as you move. Each ghost is a GPU-resident particle cloud tinted by its chord's warm hue (amber‚Üíterracotta‚Üíhoney‚Üírust‚Üígold‚Üíember). **Also clears JURY #2** (the *sound* you build IS the object ‚ÄĒ you accrete the music from your own motion, not read a pitch off a screensaver) and **#5** (warm gallery/candle-lit register, deliberately OFF the banned adult cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster). **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬ß567, research‚Üíbuild chain visible):** **DanXeReflect** (CHI 2026, Barcelona, honorable mention ‚ÄĒ re-materializing your *spatio-temporal past movements* as interactive avatars you perform with). Other named refs: **Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet*** (walk among fixed spatial voices) ¬∑ **Steve Reich phase-looping / the live-loop-pedal tradition** ¬∑ adjacent arXiv:2506.15759 *Sonic4D* (viewpoint-adaptive spatial audio). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**the temporal loop-of-self in a spatial HRTF harmony field** ‚ÄĒ record your body's path so it loops back as a spatialized ghost you layer against; grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ the lab has body-tracking, HRTF panners, and 942's depth-walk-into-harmony, but never the *self-as-looper-in-space*] ¬∑ #3 named references ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß567 ‚ÄĒ today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: Pose tracking + harmonic-field engine + loop/memory store + HRTF spatializer + WebGPU render = 5) also claimable. `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√ó), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (n/a adult, but avoided anyway), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√ó), Canvas2D-as-winner (audit 5√ó/10), three.js (JURY)] ¬∑ picked=[**MediaPipe-Pose body/camera INPUT** (non-pointer/embodied ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #3; camera/body is 0√ó in last-10 committed), **raw-WebGPU particle-field OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer ‚ÄĒ WebGPU 1√ó in last-10 vs Canvas2D 5√ó / WebGL2 4√ó; the jury's repeatedly-requested GPU-forward surface, explicitly NOT banned, with a WebGPU‚ÜíWebGL2‚ÜíCanvas2D safe fallback), **spatial-HRTF-loop-of-self TECH** (you build the music from your past bodies ‚ÄĒ NOT a harmony-progression engine read off a sim), **warm-gallery/candle-lit VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; scoped `next lint` on the folder ‚Üí **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other prototypes, zero from the 977 folder; folder grep-clean ‚ÄĒ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route); ## Cycle 566 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 interaction models, shipped 1

- **[/dream/974-kids-tilt-cadence](/dream/974-kids-tilt-cadence)** ‚ÄĒ Tilt Cadence Meadow: **a 4-year-old FEELS a real V7‚ÜíI authentic cadence in their hands ‚ÄĒ TILT the tablet to roll a glowing marble out of the orange "pull" (Dominant 7th) well and HOME into the gold (Tonic) well, and the leading tone resolves up while the seventh resolves down, sparks burst, flowers bloom.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 566 (kids 4+ / **device TILT ‚ÄĒ DeviceOrientation `beta`/`gamma` gravity vector, the non-pointer input** / **Canvas2D additive warm-meadow glow** / tilt marble-physics + Riemann T/S/D functional-harmony state machine / warm daytime-meadow vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's hardest KIDS provocation (#1): "pentatonic-no-wrong-notes is the new kids crutch ‚ÄĒ ban it; give them a real mode, a functional progression, or genuine tension/resolution."** Here there is no safety scale at all ‚ÄĒ the three wells literally ARE Hugo Riemann's harmonic functions: **gold Home = Tonic (I)**, **green Away = Subdominant (IV)**, **orange Pull = Dominant 7th (V7)** (containing the leading tone E + chordal 7th B‚ô≠ of C7, in F major). A damped point-mass marble rolls under a tilt-driven gravity vector across a height field of three Gaussian attractor basins (`physics.ts`); while it rests in a well that chord sounds softly over an always-on F2+C3 tonic drone, and **rolling V7‚ÜíI is detected explicitly** (`audio.ts` `HarmonyEngine`) and fires a real authentic cadence as scheduled frequency glides ‚ÄĒ leading tone **E‚ÜĎF**, chordal 7th **B‚ô≠‚ÜďA**, root C‚ÜíF, fifth G‚ÜíA ‚ÄĒ so the resolution is genuinely *heard*, not implied. **This also clears JURY #3 ("force a non-pointer input ‚ÄĒ drag-on-glass is back to 7√ó"):** the primary input is device tilt, off the banned finger-on-glass entirely; and it breaks the immediate kids rut ‚ÄĒ the last two kids ships (969-hum-choir, 972-sing-garden) are BOTH mic-voice‚Üíharmony, so tilt is a different body and a different sensor. **Output = Canvas2D** additive warm-meadow glow (sun wash, glowing color-coded basins, marble, sparks, blooming flowers) ‚ÄĒ bold saturated color is the kids language (gold/green/orange = I/IV/V7), and the warm daytime register is deliberately OFF the (adult-side) jury-flagged cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster. **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬ß566, research‚Üíbuild chain visible):** **CHI 2026 "From Movement to Sound and Back: A Workshop on Movement-Based and Sonification Design Approaches"** (Extended Abstracts, 2026 CHI; ACM DOI 10.1145/3772363.3778764) ‚ÄĒ the dive's reframing ("the movement‚Üísound mapping should carry a *quality* ‚ÄĒ effort, tension, settling ‚ÄĒ not just a trigger") is exactly what a tilt cadence does: tilting carries the felt *quality* of harmonic tension into the child's hands. Other named refs: **Hugo Riemann functional harmony** (the wells literally are T/S/D) ¬∑ **Toca Boca tilt-toys** ¬∑ **BeSound** (embodied music education for children). **Ambition floor 2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [tilt marble-physics + Riemann T/S/D functional-harmony engine + Web Audio synth/voice-leading + Canvas2D meadow render] ¬∑ #3 named references ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß566 ‚ÄĒ today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√ó), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√ó), mic-voice‚Üíharmony (hot ‚ÄĒ kids 969/972 just shipped)] ¬∑ picked=[**device-TILT INPUT** (non-pointer ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #3; the 3√ó tilt sensor, fresh not banned; different from the recent mic-voice rut), **Canvas2D warm-meadow OUTPUT** (jury-blessed fresh-again; not the over-rep raw-GPU shader), **tilt-physics + functional-harmony-cadence TECH** (real V7‚ÜíI tension/resolution ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic; the marble physics is the felt body, NOT a GPU-sim you pulse a bell off), **warm daytime-meadow VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; ## Cycle 565 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/973-wave-terrain](/dream/973-wave-terrain)** ‚ÄĒ Wave Terrain: **the glowing 3D landscape you SEE is literally the sound you HEAR ‚ÄĒ an orbit tracing a closed path over a height-terrain reads out the audio waveform sample-by-sample, so reshaping the land sculpts the timbre and spinning the orbit faster plays a higher note.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 565 (adult / **computer-keyboard + Web MIDI velocity (primary, non-pointer)** / **raw WebGL2 perspective heightfield + Canvas2D carved-waveform strip** / topographic bronze-relief vibe). **The lab's FIRST wave-terrain synthesizer** ‚ÄĒ grep-verified 0√ó (`wave terrain`/`wave-terrain` never appear in any prior prototype). Wave-terrain (a.k.a. terrain) synthesis defines a height surface `z=f(x,y)`; a **closed orbit** traced across it, sampled at audio rate over one full loop, *is* one period of a waveform ‚ÄĒ so the terrain's shape **is the timbre** and the orbit's traversal rate **is the pitch**. Implementation: `terrain.ts` walks the orbit at **1024 points**, reads the height, **DC-blocks** (subtracts the mean, since terrains carry an offset) + peak-normalizes ‚Üí one period; `audio.ts` turns that period into a `PeriodicWave` via a real DFT (`createPeriodicWave`), played by up to **6 `OscillatorNode` voices** sharing the current wave (pitch = note frequency; `1/‚ąön` normalization; `Gain ‚Üí lowpass 8 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor` limiter, peak < 0.3); on morph/orbit change the wave is rebuilt + re-applied to live voices. `gl.ts` is **hand-rolled WebGL2 (no three.js)** ‚ÄĒ a 96√ó96 perspective heightfield sampling an `R32F` height texture, warm topographic elevation palette, relief shading, contour bands, a luminous orbit ring on the surface + a glowing moving read-point; a carved-waveform strip below shows the exact period being played with a scrub marker, so you can *see* orbit-shape ‚Üí waveform ‚Üí sound. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26 #2** ("make the SOUND the primary object, the resonating body ‚ÄĒ not a GPU sim you pulse a bell off of"): here the visible terrain *is the oscillator itself*, not a screensaver read for a pitch. Also clears #3 (non-pointer: computer keyboard `A‚ÄďL`/`Q‚ÄďP` = D-Dorian ~2 octaves primary; `1‚Äď5` presets; `[ ]`/arrows = orbit radius/lobes; `M` = morph; Web MIDI velocity when present, never required) and #5 (register that isn't cosmic: topographic bronze-relief). **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬ß565, research‚Üíbuild chain visible):** the **2025‚Äď2026 wave-terrain revival** ‚ÄĒ **Scaler Music *Carbon Electra 2*** (announced **May 28, 2026**), engine "produces sound via a 2D trajectory that scans over a 3D surface or terrain", + **Conductive Labs *Terrain*** hardware synth (2025) ‚ÄĒ a commercial revival with *no* free browser-native counterpart; this is that. Other named refs: Mitsuhashi 1982 (JAES) ¬∑ Borgonovo & Haus 1986 (CMJ) ¬∑ Curtis Roads, *Microsound* (2001). **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [wave-terrain synthesis, grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [keyboard/MIDI input + terrain orbit-sampler/morph engine + DFT‚ÜíPeriodicWave synth + WebGL2 heightfield render] ¬∑ #3 named references ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß565 ‚ÄĒ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√ó), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (n/a ‚ÄĒ adult), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√ó), WebGPU-not-to-7√ó (audit), functional-harmony-voice-leading-engine (hot ‚ÄĒ 969/972 just shipped)] ¬∑ picked=[**computer-keyboard + Web-MIDI INPUT** (non-pointer ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #3; MIDI is the 1√ó sensor), **raw-WebGL2 + Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the terrain IS the oscillator ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #2; WebGL2 5√ó healthy, NOT WebGPU-pile), **wave-terrain-synthesis TECH** (lab-first; neither a harmony engine nor a classic single-body physical model ‚ÄĒ dodges both hot lanes), **topographic bronze-relief VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2 + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; scoped `next lint` on the folder ‚Üí **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 973 folder; folder grep-clean ‚ÄĒ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/pointer-primary); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in the build box ‚ÄĒ the DFT/`PeriodicWave` path, DC-block, and per-voice normalization are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean, but the relative brightness of the five presets and the morph speed are unconfirmed by ear; the always-on 3s idle auto-demo plays a slow D-Dorian arpeggio + morphs the terrain so a zero-interaction glance both *sees* the landscape carve a waveform and *hears* a tone). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one concept √ó two technical approaches); banked **`974-wave-terrain-map`** ‚ÄĒ the **maximally-legible Canvas2D twin**: a top-down contour/elevation heatmap with the orbit drawn over it AND a side-by-side **scope panel** plotting the heights sampled along the orbit (one period of the tone) + a live spectrum, so the "orbit-over-terrain = waveform = sound" identity is *provable* at a glance; bulletproof-everywhere render (the guaranteed-fallback / installation-context surface). Built complete + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean (README written); `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬ß565). Design notes: `src/app/dream/973-wave-terrain/README.md`

## Cycle 564 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-pointer/real-harmony explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/972-kids-sing-garden](/dream/972-kids-sing-garden)** ‚ÄĒ Sing Garden: **a child SINGS any note and a real harmonic garden grows a chord that genuinely SUPPORTS it ‚ÄĒ no wrong notes, but REAL functional harmony underneath, not a safe pentatonic.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 564 (kids 4+ / **microphone ‚ÄĒ live voice pitch (YIN/autocorrelation), the non-pointer input** / **Canvas2D watercolor-ink garden** / functional voice-leading accompaniment / ink-and-watercolor vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's hardest KIDS provocation (#1): "pentatonic-no-wrong-notes is the new kids crutch ‚ÄĒ ban it; give them a real mode, a functional progression, or genuine tension/resolution."** Here the child's voice is the melody (snapped to C-major scale degrees so it's always in tune = no wrong notes), but the harmony is genuinely functional: each sung scale-degree drives its real diatonic triad (1‚ÜíI, 2‚Üíii, 3‚Üíiii, 4‚ÜíIV, 5‚ÜíV, 6‚Üívi, 7‚Üívii¬į) and **three inner voices + a bass voice-lead** to the nearest chord tones by smallest-motion assignment (Aldwell & Schachter), so a drawn melody makes real chord changes emerge; landing on 5‚Üí1 or holding the leading-tone 7‚Üí1 fires a true **V‚ÜíI cadence** with an audible resolution + a warm gold "home" halo. **Input = mic** ‚ÄĒ the live analyser time-domain buffer is run through a YIN-style cumulative-mean-normalized-difference pitch detector with parabolic refinement + an RMS gate + a 90 ms held-degree debounce (clamped to a child-voice 150‚Äď700 Hz); the voice is **never recorded, stored, or transmitted** ‚ÄĒ pitch is detected in place and thrown away every frame. This dodges the jury-banned **pointer-drag-as-primary-input** (7√ó) and is NOT the jury-over-represented input (mic is uncommon; the tired "hum‚ÜíRMS-paint" is explicitly *not* what this is ‚ÄĒ it reads real pitch and builds real harmony). **Output = Canvas2D** watercolor/ink garden (the jury blessed Canvas2D as "fresh-again, earns its place" ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT WebGPU/three.js): singing higher grows a tall plant, lower a low spreading one (pitch‚Üíheight); each chord blooms a flower whose **color encodes harmonic function** (tonic gold = home, dominant orange = tension, subdominant green, predominant/minor cool blue & violet), louder voice = bolder stroke; the painting accumulates as a calm, building garden. **Vibe = ink-and-watercolor on warm paper** ‚ÄĒ explicitly OFF the (adult-side) cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster. Kids-safe throughout: `masterGain 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6.5 kHz ‚Üí compressor ‚ąí10 dB/20:1`; soft triangle/sine voices (‚Č•30 ms attacks); always-on tonic drone pad (never silent); singing louder never makes the synth harsh (accompaniment stays gentle/constant); ‚Č•72 px Start gesture-gates AudioContext + getUserMedia; full teardown (rAF cancel, osc stop, mic tracks stop, disconnect, AudioContext close). **Degrades fully (tested path):** no/denied mic ‚Üí visible `text-rose-300` notice + **seven ‚Č•64 px color-coded sing-pads** (one per scale degree, color = function) routing through the **identical** voice-leading pipeline, AND a hands-free **auto-demo** that sings a phrase ending `7‚Üí1` within ~1 s of Start so a zero-interaction glance both *sees* the garden grow and *hears* a cadence resolve. **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬ß564):** **arXiv:2602.06917 "Automatic Detection and Analysis of Singing Mistakes for Music Pedagogy" (Feb 6 2026)** ‚ÄĒ cited as the deliberate **inversion**: that framework flags a child's vocal *errors*; this piece refuses to ‚ÄĒ instead of marking a child wrong, the harmony BENDS to support whatever pitch they find (no-wrong-notes pedagogy, but with real functional harmony, not a safety scale). Other named refs: **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading*** (the voice-leading rules) ¬∑ **David Li / Google Arts & Culture *Blob Opera* (2020)** (child-singable harmony lineage). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [mic YIN pitch-detection + functional voice-leading SATB+bass engine + Canvas2D watercolor render = 3] ¬∑ #3 named references ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß564 ‚ÄĒ today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√ó), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[**mic / live-voice-pitch INPUT** (non-pointer ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #3; not the over-rep input), **Canvas2D watercolor OUTPUT** (jury-blessed fresh-again; not the over-rep raw-GPU shader), **functional-voice-leading-accompaniment TECH** (real harmony from a child's voice ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic), **ink-watercolor VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; mic is local-only; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 972 folder; folder grep-clean ‚ÄĒ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096, raise = "Operation not permitted"; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/mic-verified** (no audio input device in the build box ‚ÄĒ the YIN detector's robustness on a real breathy child voice in a noisy room, octave-error rate, and the harmony balance are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed by ear; the always-on drone + auto-demo + sing-pads guarantee a sounding, blooming, cadencing glance with zero hardware). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three a *non-pointer input into real functional harmony* (answering JURY #1+#3 three different ways); banked **`971-kids-tilt-cadence` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** ‚ÄĒ **feel a V7‚ÜíI cadence in your hands by TILTing the tablet** to roll a glowing marble from the orange "Tense" Dominant well home into the gold "Home" Tonic well (DeviceOrientation gravity-physics + Riemann T/S/D state machine; the resolution blooms) ‚ÄĒ and **`973-kids-step-parade`** ‚ÄĒ **whole-body DANCING (front-camera optical-flow motion-energy) drives the tempo & dynamics of a real I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV parade**, stand still ‚Üí it slows to a lullaby on home (BeSound / Krueger *Videoplace* / "Moving Mandala" 2025). ## Cycle 563 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal physical-modeling explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/970-tension-gong](/dream/970-tension-gong)** ‚ÄĒ Tension Gong: **strike a metal gong on your keyboard and it bends ‚ÄĒ a hard hit starts SHARP and glides DOWN in pitch as it rings out, because the synthesis itself is non-linear, the way real bronze blooms.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 563 (adult / **computer-keyboard + Web MIDI velocity (primary, non-pointer)** / **AudioWorklet non-linear modal synthesis + Canvas2D Chladni nodal plot**). **The lab's FIRST non-linear modal synthesis** ‚ÄĒ every prior modal/Karplus piece (960-friction's modal body, plucked strings, bell banks) used a *linear* fixed-frequency resonator bank; this is the first where the mode frequencies **change with vibration energy in real time**, which is what gives metal its life. Each of four bodies (bell-plate / gong / tam-tam / cymbal-disc) is a bank of 12‚Äď16 two-pole inharmonic resonators with three live non-linearities running per 128-sample control block in the worklet: (1) **tension modulation** ‚ÄĒ a running `energy = ő£ amp¬≤` resets every mode's instantaneous frequency `f_i = f0_i¬∑(1 + beta_i¬∑betaScale¬∑energy)`, so a loud strike rings sharp and **glides back down** to rest pitch as energy bleeds away (the gong "bloom" ‚ÄĒ produced by the resonators *changing frequency*, not by pitch automation/LFO); (2) **mode coupling** ‚ÄĒ while loud, a fraction of each mode's state transfers to its spectral neighbor (`coupleAmt¬∑energy`), so the spectrum shimmers up during the attack then **clarifies and settles** as the coupling term vanishes; (3) **strike-velocity dependence** ‚ÄĒ a hard hit (Shift) drives energy into the *high* modes (brighter) with a larger `betaScale` (bends more); a soft hit stays near the linear pitch on the low modes. **Directest answer to BOTH of JURY 2026-06-26's hardest adult provocations at once** ‚ÄĒ #2 (*kill the "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" reflex ‚ÄĒ make the SOUND the primary object, the resonating body, the way 960-friction and 965-oscilloscope did*) and #3 (*force a non-pointer input ‚ÄĒ drag-on-glass is back to 7√ó*). Here the sound IS the object (the non-linearity is the instrument, not a screensaver) and the playing surface is the **computer keyboard** (`A S D F G H J K` strike; **Shift** = hard pitch-bending hit; fast play + hold-duration shape velocity; `1‚Äď4` switch bodies) with **Web MIDI** note-on velocity when a controller is present (silent keyboard fallback otherwise ‚ÄĒ MIDI is the rare 1√ó sensor the jury asked to revive). **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬ß563, the research‚Üíbuild chain made visible):** **arXiv:2603.10240 "nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis in Max" (March 2026)** ‚ÄĒ which models exactly tension modulation, pitch glide, and mode coupling for real-time physical synthesis; this is a faithful simplified browser port. **Visual READS the audio, never drives it** (the inverse of the banned sim-pulse-bell move): Canvas2D **Chladni-style nodal field** ‚ÄĒ each live mode draws its `sin(mŌÄx)¬∑sin(nŌÄy)` nodal lines, brightening as it rings and fading as it decays, so you *see* which modes are alive and watch the spectrum settle after a strike; a per-mode strip below shows amplitude + a **pitch-glide tick** marking how far above rest frequency each mode currently sits. **Palette = clinical / metallurgical** (brushed-steel greys on near-black, hot-amber/steel-cyan accents) ‚ÄĒ deliberately OFF the banned adult cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (4√ó). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**non-linear modal synthesis** ‚ÄĒ energy-driven tension-modulation + mode-coupling; grep-0√ó as a lab technique, all prior modal banks are linear] ¬∑ #3 named reference [**arXiv:2603.10240 nlm, March 2026** + the modal-synthesis lineage] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß563** ‚ÄĒ today's dive, 28 straight cycles 535‚Äď563). #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems) borderline-claimable [worklet modal engine + non-linear coupler + keyboard/MIDI input + Chladni render]; #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√ó), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (n/a ‚ÄĒ adult), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[**computer-keyboard + Web-MIDI-velocity INPUT** (non-pointer ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #3; MIDI revives the 1√ó sensor), **AudioWorklet-DSP + Canvas2D OUTPUT** (sound IS the object ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #2; viz reads audio, doesn't drive a bell), **non-linear-modal-synthesis TECH** (lab-first; the resonating body is the instrument, NOT a GPU sim), **clinical-metallurgical VIBE** (off cosmic-glow adult cluster + off kids)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban, the directest double-provocation hit on the adult side. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Critically, the one recent build with NO hardware dependency** (no mic, no camera, no GPU compute ‚ÄĒ just keyboard + Web Audio), so it is the **directest dent in the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt** ‚ÄĒ Karel can actually *hear* this on any laptop keyboard, unlike the camera/mic/GPU builds piling up unrun. **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; scoped `next lint` on the folder ‚Üí **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; tsc-strict on both files ‚Üí zero errors; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in the build box ‚ÄĒ the non-linear modal engine, tension glide, and coupling are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean, but the *feel* of the pitch-bloom and the metallic timbre are unconfirmed by ear; an auto-struck idle body could be added next cycle for the silent glance). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three a *non-pointer input into a real physical-modeling instrument body* (answering provocations #2+#3 three different ways); banked **`971-air-column` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** ‚ÄĒ a contactless **blown digital-waveguide flute** played by **webcam optical-flow** (motion energy = breath pressure, motion centroid = pitch; self-oscillating jet model, overblows the octave; keyboard fallback) ‚ÄĒ the lab's first blown air column AND the camera-sensor revival the jury wanted ‚ÄĒ and **`972-resonant-bodies`** ‚ÄĒ the **microphone as EXCITER** (not pitch-detector): tap/breathe/hiss to ring tuned modal bodies (bell/glass/wood/ceramic), exciter‚Üíresonator modal synthesis, mic-as-exciter is a fresh cross-modal use. Both returned complete + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬ß563). Design notes: `src/app/dream/970-tension-gong/README.md`

## Cycle 562 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal embodied-harmony explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/969-kids-hum-choir](/dream/969-kids-hum-choir)** ‚ÄĒ Hum Choir: **hum ONE note and a choir of soft glowing creatures instantly joins you in REAL harmony ‚ÄĒ singing the diatonic chord that fits your note, leaning into tension and blooming home when you land on the note that pulls.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 562 (kids 4+ / **microphone voice-pitch (primary)** + tap-a-note fallback / **Canvas2D choir creatures**). **The lab's FIRST real-time pitch-detection instrument for kids, and the rarest input in the whole lab (the child's own VOICE).** The child hums; **NSDF (McLeod Pitch Method) autocorrelation** on the mic buffer returns `{hz, clarity, rms}`, clarity/RMS-gated and EMA+octave-smoothed so a wobbly 4-year-old hum reads as a stable note; that note snaps to a **C-major scale degree**, the real **diatonic triad** is built on it (I‚Äďvii¬į), and **three companion choir voices glide in via greedy nearest-tone voice-leading** ‚ÄĒ real functional harmony, NOT a can't-be-wrong pentatonic. **Felt tension/resolution:** landing on **V or the leading-tone (ti)** holds tension (brighter formant, the creatures lean/tighten, a home‚ÜĒtension meter fills); returning to a **tonic tone (C/E/G)** blooms and resolves ‚ÄĒ a genuine V‚ÜíI a child *causes with their voice*, no reading. **Directest answer to BOTH JURY 2026-06-26 kids provocations at once** ‚ÄĒ #1 (kill the pentatonic crutch; give kids real harmony with tension/resolution) and #3 (force a **non-pointer** input ‚ÄĒ drag-on-glass is back to 7√ó; voice is the most embodied, rarest channel). **Grounded in this cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬ß562):** the embodied tonal-harmony pedagogy line (**Song Walker**, **AREmbody**, "Learning Tonal Harmony Through Bodily Interactions") + arXiv:2604.07612 real-time human-AI co-performance (Apr 2026) ‚ÄĒ children have real harmonic sensitivity and learn tension/release through the body; here the body is the singing voice and the AI co-performer is a local non-ML voice-leading harmonizer. **Extends Karel's loved `158-kids-hum-paint`‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (the lab's prior hum-input kids piece) with real harmony. **Kids-safe + feedback-safe:** the mic is **analysis-only, never routed to the speakers** (no howl); choir is a warm source-filter "ahh" synth (detuned-saw ‚Üí formant bandpasses, shared vibrato, portamento, synth reverb), master `gain ‚Č§0.24 ‚Üí lowpass ~7kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor`, ‚ąö-voice normalized, no harsh transients. **Mic-free path fully works:** a row of big friendly C‚ÄďB note buttons drives the identical harmonizer, so a 06:30 glance with no mic permission still plays real chords; idle breathing + a soft held tonic so the creatures are alive and never fully silent + a "hum to me‚Ä¶" hint. AudioContext + `getUserMedia` both gated behind one Start tap. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [**real-time NSDF/McLeod-Pitch-Method pitch detection as a kids instrument**; grep-0√ó for kids voice-pitch-as-input] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [NSDF pitch detector + diatonic harmonizer/voice-leading engine + formant choir synth + Canvas2D creature render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Google *Blob Opera* / David Li** ¬∑ **McLeod Pitch Method (NSDF)** ¬∑ **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß562** ‚ÄĒ 27 straight cycles 535‚Äď562). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√ó), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√ó), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY), GPU-sim+pulse-a-bell pattern (JURY 4√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[**mic-voice-pitch INPUT** (rarest/most-embodied; non-pointer ‚ÄĒ clears JURY #3), **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (bulletproof phone render; healthy/non-banned), **NSDF-pitch-detect + functional-diatonic-voice-leading TECH** (real harmony with felt V‚ÜíI ‚ÄĒ clears the pentatonic ban; NOT a GPU sim), warm-choir-creatures VIBE (off cosmic-glow adult + off the kids pentatonic crutch)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban, the directest double-provocation hit. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; mic processed locally, nothing uploaded; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; ## Cycle 561 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/965-phosphor-draw](/dream/965-phosphor-draw)** ‚ÄĒ Phosphor Draw: **draw a shape on a glowing oscilloscope and you HEAR that exact shape ‚ÄĒ because the green figure on screen and the stereo signal in the speakers are literally the same signal.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 561 (adult / **draw + pointer** input / **WebGL2 RGBA16F phosphor-feedback** scope). **The lab's FIRST true oscilloscope vector-synthesizer.** In an XY ("vectorscope") oscilloscope the left audio channel drives the horizontal beam and the right drives the vertical ‚ÄĒ so a stereo signal *draws a shape*; this inverts it: any drawn closed loop is resampled to a constant-arc-length pen-path and **emitted AS the stereo signal** (`L[i]=x[i]`, `R[i]=y[i]`), looped at an audible rate, so **the shape you hear IS the shape you see** ‚ÄĒ sample-for-sample, one signal feeding both senses. **Geometry becomes timbre** (a circle ‚Čą near-sine, a square ‚Čą rich odd harmonics, a star ‚Čą bright buzz); the loop's **retrace rate is the pitch** (40‚Äď400 Hz slider), set via `playbackRate` so retuning *never rebuilds the buffer* ‚ÄĒ which is why the scope renders the played audio *continuously*, not in throttled steps. **Deliberately NON-sim and NON-harmony:** chosen *after* the research dive surfaced a fresh 2026 Neural-Cellular-Automata wave (arXiv 2601.16096 Jan 2026) AND a grep proved the lab has already mined the entire self-organizing-life family (Lenia `264`, physarum `327`, reaction-diffusion `9`, particle-life `8`, differential-growth `964`) ‚ÄĒ JURY 2026-06-25 flagged "ship a sim, pulse a bell off it" as the hardening adult move ‚ÄĒ so the pick pivoted OFF the sim it surfaced and ONTO its **mirror image**: an instrument where the signal IS the image, with no field/particles and no harmony engine (pitch is a byproduct of draw-speed, the *idea* is contour/timbre). It also breaks the **re-emerged harmony-engine monoculture** (7 of the last 10 committed reasoned about voice-leading: 954/952/950/947/942/941/957). **Phosphor render:** `phosphor-gl.ts` is a hand-written WebGL2 vectorscope ‚ÄĒ an `RGBA16F` ping-pong feedback texture fades the previous frame (CRT persistence), the new beam is drawn additively as a `LINE_STRIP` with **dwell-based brightness** (slow beam = brighter, exactly like a real scope), then a bloom + filmic-tonemap pass blooms hot spots to white-green; Canvas2D `shadowBlur`-trail fallback (`phosphor-2d.ts`) if WebGL2/float-render-targets are unavailable. **Controls:** 6 one-tap presets (figure-8, circle, square, star, lissajous, heart) so it sings instantly; draw-your-own (Pointer Events ‚Üí iPad-ready); pitch, spin (slowly rotates the figure ‚ÄĒ audible *and* visible), brightness, persistence. **Autoplay:** after the single Start tap (creates+resumes `AudioContext` inside the gesture for iOS), a slowly-spinning figure-8 already draws itself and sings, so a hands-free 06:30 glance immediately sees + hears the idea. **Extends Karel's strongest loved cluster ‚ÄĒ draw‚Üísound** (`223-fourier-paint`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `153-paint-compose`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `100`/`152`/`158`/`160`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) with a fresh technique (the drawn line and the sound are one thing). **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used-as-core [true oscilloscope/vector synth; grep-0√ó shipped core ‚ÄĒ `291-harmonograph` has only *decorative* idle Lissajous] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [arc-length path resampler + stereo-buffer synth w/ playbackRate pitch + WebGL2 phosphor-feedback render + draw/preset interaction = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Jerobeam Fenderson ‚ÄĒ *Oscilloscope Music*** ¬∑ **Hansi Raber ‚ÄĒ *OsciStudio* / osci-render** ¬∑ **Ryoji Ikeda ‚ÄĒ *data-cosm [n¬į1]*, 180 Studios, to 1 Feb 2026** ¬∑ **Lissajous 1857**] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß561** ‚ÄĒ 26 straight cycles 535‚Äď561). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√ó), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√ó), granular (JURY 4√ó), "pitch-held-dumb/drone" stance (JURY ~10√ó), harmony/voice-leading-engine TECH (audit ‚Č•4√ó/10), GPU-sim+pulse-bell ADULT house style (JURY-flagged), Canvas2D-OUTPUT (recently at cap)] ¬∑ picked=[draw/pointer INPUT (non-mic; loved draw‚Üísound lineage), **WebGL2-RGBA16F-phosphor OUTPUT** (under cap; non-three.js/WebGPU/plain-Canvas2D), **oscilloscope/vector-synthesis TECH** (signal-IS-image; non-harmony, non-sim, grep-0√ó as core), CRT/Ikeda signal-as-light VIBE (off cosmic-nebula adult + off kids)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.1min`** ‚Üí Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero warnings/errors attributable to 965/phosphor ‚ÄĒ all lint warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other prototypes); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (no WebGL2 device or audio in container ‚ÄĒ the resampler + stereo-buffer + phosphor shader are reasoned-correct + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean, but the CRT glow, geometry-as-timbre feel, and draw latency are unconfirmed by hand/eye/ear; autoplay figure-8 + presets cover the silent glance). **A small dent in the jury's verification debt:** because the scope reads the *exact* buffer that plays, "you see what you hear" is structurally provable, not asserted. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire (draw-a-2D-shape vs trace-a-rotating-3D-solid); banked **`966-osci-solids` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** ‚ÄĒ the "massively bigger" sibling where a rotating 3D wireframe solid (cube/torus/trefoil-knot/‚Ä¶) is projected + traced as one pen-path so you *hear it spinning* (hand-written 3D projection, no three.js). Returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬ß561). ## Cycle 560 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 render approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/964-kids-coral-garden](/dream/964-kids-coral-garden)** ‚ÄĒ Coral Garden: **tilt the tablet and a glowing bioluminescent reef GROWS ITSELF across the screen ‚ÄĒ and the coral *sings* the slow, warm melody its growing tip traces. A calm, never-silent, never-wrong bedtime toy.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 560 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt (primary)** + tap-to-seed / **pure Canvas2D bioluminescent glow**). **The lab's FIRST differential-growth piece** ‚ÄĒ a genuinely never-used (grep-0√ó) named generative-art technique, deliberately chosen *after a grep killed the obvious pick:* a squishy soft-body "jelly" toy would have been the lab's **6th** kids blob/jelly/Verlet piece (286/451/460/603/755) ‚ÄĒ the exact "too similar in design and theme" trap the JURY 2026-06-25 named. Instead the coral is a real **differential growth** simulation: each strand is a polyline whose nodes (1) attract toward connected neighbors, (2) **repel all nearby nodes via an O(n) uniform-grid spatial hash** (so the line refuses to self-intersect and wrinkles into organic brain-coral folds), (3) smooth curvature, (4) **insert new nodes as edges lengthen** (so the line *must* fold into the space ‚ÄĒ the algorithm's signature), and (5) occasionally **branch** a growing tip; ~2200-node cap ‚Üí slows to a shimmer. A fresh garden looks like a reef after ~30‚Äď60s and is denser/different after 3 min (**genuine long-form state + memory** ‚ÄĒ answers the menu's thin "long-form generative" lane), with a ~12-min "goodnight" fade. **Music without a harmony engine:** a calm ~380‚Äď520ms clock maps the most-active growing TIP's vertical position to a warm **C-major pentatonic** note (top = higher) on a soft sine/triangle bell, over an always-on low-C+G drone, with brighter octave-up bells on branch events ‚ÄĒ **the coral literally composes the slow melody it traces** (pitch/melodic-CONTOUR IS the idea ‚ÄĒ answers JURY #2 ‚ÄĒ but melodic, NOT the over-used vertical voice-leading the kids lane hardened into: 941 voice-leading, 950 role-harmony, 957 cadence). **Calm + bedtime** directly answers the jury's "kids builds are too bright/active, calm is under-served." **Input = device-tilt PRIMARY** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap ‚Üí a gravity/light vector the coral tips lean toward within ~0.5s; **tilt is 1√ó/10 in the kids audit ‚ÄĒ deliberately dodges the touch-drag monoculture, 5 of the last ~7 kids builds**); tap-to-seed is a secondary garnish; desktop pointer-drag + idle auto-demo so a hands-free 06:30 glance sees coral blooming + hears the melody within ~1s. **Output = pure Canvas2D** luminous glow (layered `shadowBlur` bloom/mid/core + radial-gradient seed/tip nodes + trailing-alpha persistence over an indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üíteal underwater gradient) ‚ÄĒ the **bulletproof everywhere-render with zero GPU-context risk on a phone**, and the **fresher/scarcer surface** per the latest jury (three.js BANNED 7√ó; WebGPU + raw-WebGL2 both recently hit the audit cap; Canvas2D collapsed to 3/15 ‚Üí fresh-again). **Kids-safe audio:** `masterGain (‚Č§0.26) ‚Üí lowpass ~6.5kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`, no wrong notes, loudness normalized 1/‚ąövoices (a busy garden never gets louder), no harsh/high transients. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [**differential growth**; grep-0√ó in INDEX/READMEs] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [differential-growth solver w/ spatial-hash repulsion + tilt/gravity input + melody/branch scheduler + Canvas2D glow render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Anders Hoff / *Inconvergent* "Differential Line"** ¬∑ **Entagma** differential-growth tutorials ¬∑ **arXiv:2504.18040 "Cabbage" (Apr 2025)**] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß560** ‚ÄĒ 25 straight cycles 535‚Äď560). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√ó), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√ó), granular (JURY 4√ó), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√ó), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit cap), raw-WebGL2-OUTPUT (audit cap), touch-drag-pitch INPUT (kids monoculture 5√ó), voice-leading/harmony-engine TECH (kids 941/950/957 + adult 7-of-10), soft-body/blob/Verlet THEME (5 prior kids jelly pieces)] ¬∑ picked=[device-tilt INPUT (1√ó/10, non-touch, embodied), **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (fresh-again, bulletproof, non-three.js/WebGPU/WebGL2), **differential-growth TECH** (0√ó; melodic-contour music, NOT a harmony engine, NOT soft-body), calm bioluminescent-underwater bedtime VIBE (off the bright-playful kids cluster + off cosmic-nebula adult cluster)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.4min`** ‚Üí Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero warnings/errors attributable to 964/coral ‚ÄĒ all lint warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other prototypes); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device/ear-verified** (no tilt sensor or audio in container; the differential-growth solver + contour‚Üípentatonic mapping are reasoned-correct + tsc/eslint-clean, but the glow feel, growth pacing, and tilt response are unconfirmed by hand/eye/ear ‚ÄĒ the always-on drone + auto-demo guarantee a sounding, blooming glance with zero interaction). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 2-render fire (Canvas2D vs WebGL2 of the same engine); banked **`963-kids-coral-bloom` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** ‚ÄĒ the IDENTICAL differential-growth coral on **raw WebGL2 additive-glow quads** (the richer-bloom twin; resurrect on a desktop/Tauri context where the GPU lands, or fold its glow into 964). ## Earlier (Cycle 558 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 "real melody/harmony IS the toy" explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/957-kids-come-home](/dream/957-kids-come-home)** ‚ÄĒ Come Home: **drag a glowing firefly up a hill and feel it want to fall *home* ‚ÄĒ near the top it trembles at the leading tone, pulled toward the tonic, and when you let go it swoops down and lands on a warm chord. A real V‚ÜíI cadence a 4-year-old plays with one finger.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 558 (kids 4+ / **touch-drag (release = resolve)** / **raw WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D fallback**). **The first KIDS piece in the lab where real tonal tension-and-resolution IS the toy ‚ÄĒ the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-25 #2** ("make music from PITCH again; pitch as expressive material, not the thing you apologize for omitting") on the kids axis, where *every* prior kids build held pitch deliberately dumb ("no wrong notes" + drone) ‚ÄĒ the exact crystallized formula the same jury flagged as a pruning candidate (935-kids-shake-critters). Here the music is the **felt pull of harmony**: the hill is a C-major diatonic ladder (do‚Äďre‚Äďmi‚Äďfa‚Äďsol‚Äďla‚Äď**ti**); dragging the firefly up raises the pitch and the *tension* (hotter color, faster shimmer, a detune wobble), near the top the **leading tone (ti)** visibly trembles wanting home, and releasing swoops it down to the **tonic** with a warm I-chord "ahh" bloom ‚ÄĒ a genuine **V‚ÜíI leading-tone cadence**. Under the melody an **auto-harmony crossfades I‚ÜĒV** by tension¬≤ so the child hears the cadence, not a lone note. **Grounded in 1-day-old research:** Fran√ßois Pachet's **arXiv:2606.24911** ("Attractive and Repulsive Pattern Control in Sequence Generation," Jun 2026) frames a target pattern as an *attractor* the sequence is drawn toward ‚ÄĒ the **tonic is the attractor**, the firefly is *pulled home*; the literal today's-research‚Üítoday's-build chain. **Hands-off auto-demo within ~0.9s** ‚ÄĒ a ghost firefly rises to the leading tone, trembles, releases, resolves home on a ~7.5s loop, so an untouched 06:30 glance is alive and sounding the cadence; real touch overrides, 4s idle resumes. **Renderer = raw WebGL2** (hand-written GLSL ES 3.00: dusk gradient that warms with tension, dark rolling hill, home glow, additive firefly bloom + trail, GPU tremble) ‚Üí **Canvas2D fallback** painting the identical scene (`text-rose-300` "(showing the simple view)" notice) ‚Üí context-loss handling + full teardown; **NOT three.js** (jury-banned 7√ó), **NOT WebGPU** (at the diversity edge ~4√ó/10 across 954/950/947/942 + unvalidated headless ‚ÄĒ the robust WebGL2/Canvas2D cascade is the bulletproof kids surface for the unattended glance). **Kids-safe audio** (`gain 0.24 ‚Üí lowpass 7000Hz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(-10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`): always-on soft pad, triangle+sine-octave melody voice with a tension detune-wobble LFO, `bloomHome()` warm C-E-G resolution; pitch quantized to 7 rungs so **no wrong note is possible**; AudioContext created/resumed in the Start gesture (iOS); ‚Č•64px Start, ‚Č•44px controls; dark-bg typography rules. **Single drag gesture, no permission flow, no mic, no granular, no network** ‚ÄĒ the most robust straight-to-prod path of the three. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**functional tonal tension ‚Üí V‚ÜíI cadence as the interaction itself**; grep-0√ó in INDEX/READMEs ‚ÄĒ the lab has scales, chords, JI, voice-leading, but never *the felt pull of resolution* as the toy, and never in the kids lane] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Pachet, arXiv:2606.24911, Jun 2026** ¬∑ "Sad syntax? tonal closure in children," arXiv:2008.01810 ¬∑ **Bernstein** on the appoggiatura] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß558** ‚ÄĒ 23 straight cycles 535‚Äď558). #2/#4 NOT claimed (single audio source+canvas = 2 subsystems; single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√ó), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√ó), granular (JURY 4√ó), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√ó), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit ~4√ó/10), voice-leading/chord-progression-engine (kids recipe 941/945/950)] ¬∑ picked=[touch-drag-release INPUT (non-mic/camera/tilt), **raw-WebGL2‚ÜíCanvas2D OUTPUT** (fresh, non-WebGPU/three.js, bulletproof), **functional-tension/V‚ÜíI-cadence TECH** (real harmonic *pull* IS the idea ‚ÄĒ the opposite of pitch-held-dumb; NOT granular, NOT a voice-leading lookup), warm-dusk tender VIBE (off both the cosmic-nebula adult cluster and the bright-playful kids cluster)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban and is the directest jury-#2 hit. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS;
