## Earlier (Cycle 557 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 harmony explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/954-sync-bloom](/dream/954-sync-bloom)** ‚ÄĒ Sync Bloom: **a field of 1024 coupled oscillators on the GPU ‚ÄĒ scribble coupling into them and watch sub-populations spontaneously phase-LOCK into glowing colour-bands, each locked cluster snapping to a just-intonation pitch, so the chord you hear is literally the field reaching consensus.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 557 (adult / **pointer-brush + autonomous K** / **raw-WebGPU `@compute` ‚Üí WebGL2/CPU fallback**). **The lab's first Kuramoto coupled-oscillator synchronization piece, and the single object that answers BOTH dominant jury provocations at once** ‚ÄĒ JURY 2026-06-25 **#1** (WebGPU compute is *still* the scarce 1√ó/15 surface ‚ÄĒ push GPU onto **raw WGSL `@compute`**, NOT three.js) **and #2** (kill the "pitch held deliberately dumb" boilerplate; make real **harmony** the idea). **The concept is the surprise:** instead of looking a chord up from a grammar, you *grow* it ‚ÄĒ harmony as **emergent synchronization consensus**. The mechanism is real physics: N=1024 oscillators step `dőł_i/dt = ŌČ_i + K_i¬∑r¬∑sin(Ōą‚ąíőł_i)` via the mean-field order parameter `r¬∑e^{iŌą}=(1/N)ő£e^{iőł_j}` (O(N), not O(N¬≤)); when coupling K beats the natural-frequency spread, sub-populations **phase-lock** ‚ÄĒ which is *physically what consonance is* (simple ratios phase-lock; dissonance beats). **On the GPU:** a WGSL `@compute` **reduce pass** (tree-reduction ‚Üí order parameter) + **advance pass** (each phase steps toward the mean field) + instanced glowing render (hue=phase, bloom=sync); async `mapAsync` reads phases back, a histogram detects locked **clusters**, each cluster's effective frequency snaps to the nearest **just-intonation partial** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2) of a drifting root ‚Üí the set of locked clusters = the current chord, voiced by warm **additive + FM** tones over a drone (NOT granular, NOT samples). **Interaction:** pointer brush drips coupling K into a soft region (scribble energy in ‚Üí that patch crystallizes into sync and its pitch locks); a global-K slider sweeps scattered/beating ‚ÜĒ locked/resolved; **autonomous K-breathing** on a slow sine so an idle glance self-organizes within ~1s. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [**Kuramoto coupled-oscillator synchronization ‚Üí emergent JI harmony**; grep-0√ó in INDEX/READMEs] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [WGSL `@compute` solver + GPU phase-readback/cluster-detector + JI-snap harmony synth + instanced render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Y. Kuramoto 1975** ¬∑ **Strogatz, *Sync* 2003** ¬∑ **KoPE, arXiv 2604.07904, 2026** ‚ÄĒ the days-old DL revival of Kuramoto sync that prompted reading synchronization as a generative primitive] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß557** ‚ÄĒ 22 straight cycles 535‚Äď557). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√ó), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√ó), granular-texture synth (JURY 4√ó), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[pointer-couple INPUT (non-mic), **raw-WebGPU `@compute` OUTPUT** (the scarce 1√ó surface ‚ÄĒ jury #1; WebGL2/CPU fallback, NOT three.js), **Kuramoto-sync‚Üíemergent-JI-harmony TECH** (real harmony IS the idea per jury #2 ‚ÄĒ NOT granular, NOT a drone, NOT a voice-leading lookup), luminous self-organizing sync-field VIBE (off the over-rep cosmic-nebula adult cluster)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban and is the *only* recent build on raw-WebGPU-compute. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU/WebGL2; the repo's existing `webgpu.d.ts`/`@webgpu/types` resolve the WGSL types). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; zero warnings/errors attributable to 954 ‚ÄĒ all lint warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU device or audio in container; the GPU readback timing + cluster‚ÜíJI mapping are reasoned-correct, static-only). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three answering jury #2 via a *different mechanism √ó surface*; banked **`955-cadence-river` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** ‚ÄĒ an autonomous long-form **functional-harmony chorale** (T‚ÜíPD‚ÜíD grammar + SATB voice-leading + circle-of-fifths modulation, raw-WebGL2 voice-ribbons) ‚ÄĒ and **`956-counterpoint-weave`** ‚ÄĒ draw a cantus firmus, a **species-counterpoint** engine (Fux) weaves 1‚Äď3 voices on Canvas2D. Both returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬ß557). ## Earlier (Cycle 556 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/953-kids-iron-garden](/dream/953-kids-iron-garden)** ‚ÄĒ Iron Garden: **drag glowing magnet-flowers around a dark field and watch thousands of iron filings snap into the invisible lines of force between them ‚ÄĒ then slide two flowers together and their notes bloom into a chord the instant their fields connect** ūüß≤ūüĆł‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 556 (kids 4+ / **multi-touch drag** / **Canvas2D particle field**). **Invisible-physics-made-visible applied to MAGNETISM, not the over-done cymatics.** This cycle's research dive found the 2026 cymatics-toy resurgence (CymaVis, Cymatica, Chladni Screen ‚ÄĒ all 2026), and the lab already did cymatics twice (`19-cymatics`, `165-cymatics`); so I applied the *same* "make the invisible field visible + audible" idea to a physics the lab has **never** touched ‚ÄĒ Faraday's magnetic **lines of force**. **The field is real:** each flower is a 2D dipole (a + pole and a ‚ąí pole offset along its axis); ~4,200 iron filings each frame sample the superposed field `B(P)=ő£ q¬∑(P‚ąípole)/|P‚ąípole|¬≥` (`field.ts`), orient as short streaks **along** the local field direction, slide along it to pile into the visible lines of force, and take their nearest flower's hue ‚ÄĒ drawn as additive (`globalCompositeOperation:"lighter"`) hue-bucketed strokes for glowing chains. **Harmony is emergent + physical, not a voice-leading engine:** 6 flowers on a pentatonic scale (C3 E3 G3 A3 C4 E4 ‚ÄĒ **no wrong notes**); when two flowers' fields bridge (proximity¬≤), a glowing connecting ribbon draws and their two notes ring together as a soft chord (gain ‚ąĚ proximity¬≤); grabbing one alone hums its single note scaled to motion. **Kid-safe audio chain:** two detuned triangle oscillators per voice ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí convolver plate-reverb bloom + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí master; a very quiet in-key pad so a cold load isn't silent. **Self-demo:** untouched ~4s, the flowers drift along smooth incommensurate-sine noise paths, attracting/separating on their own (a "tap to begin" gate satisfies autoplay; `text-rose-300` notice if Canvas2D/Web-Audio is missing). **Distinct from `192-kids-magnet-notes`** (point-attraction between orbs) ‚ÄĒ this renders the FIELD ITSELF, thousands of filings tracing the lines of force. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [real magnetic-dipole field + iron-filing alignment as the instrument; grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ 192 is point-attraction, the existing cymatics are *acoustic* Chladni] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [multi-touch magnet drag + dipole-superposition field solver + filing alignment/advection sim + pentatonic synth + field-bridge harmony detector + Canvas2D render = 5] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Michael Faraday's "lines of force"**; the classic iron-filings demonstration] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß556** ‚ÄĒ 21 straight cycles 535‚Äď556). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship; GPU-dense sibling banked). **Renderer choice = the jury read:** the jury flagged a **12-of-15 GPU monoculture**; my audit found WebGPU over the cap (950/947/942/941) and Canvas2D fresh (only 952 in the last-10), so a robust **Canvas2D** kids piece (runs on any iPad, no float-render-target dependency, no per-frame React churn) is the deliberate counter-swing. `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√ó), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√ó), granular (JURY 4√ó), "pitch-held-dumb" stance (JURY ~10√ó), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit ‚Č•4√ó/10), voice-leading/chord-progression-engine (kids recipe 941/945/950)] ¬∑ picked=[multi-touch-drag INPUT (non-mic/camera/tilt), Canvas2D OUTPUT (fresh, non-WebGPU/three.js), magnetic-dipole-field + iron-filing-alignment TECH with field-bridge EMERGENT harmony (non-voice-leading, non-granular), science-wonder/tactile VIBE (off the harmony-garden recipe)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 43s`** ‚Üí lint/type PASS, grep-confirmed zero "Failed to compile"/"Type error"; one type error caught + fixed in the one allowed attempt ‚ÄĒ TS resets `canvas` null-narrowing inside nested closures, aliased to a declared-non-null binding); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/touch-verified** (no audio device or multi-touch in container). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`954-kids-iron-garden-gl` ‚≠ź** (same concept, **raw-WebGL2** GPU-advected ~80k filings ‚ÄĒ denser/silkier; IDEAS ¬ß556). Design notes: `src/app/dream/953-kids-iron-garden/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 554 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 3 role/render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/950-kids-sky-conductor](/dream/950-kids-sky-conductor)** ‚ÄĒ Sky Conductor: **two 4-year-olds, two iPads, one tiny orchestra ‚ÄĒ one child CONDUCTS (sweeps the device to set the tempo and which warm chord the sky is on) and the other PLAYS notes that automatically fit the conductor's current chord, so they make real chords-and-melody together and nobody can play a wrong note** ūüéľūüĆąūü§Ě. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 554 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt conductor + tap player + serverless WebRTC multi-user** / **raw WebGPU ‚Üí raw-WebGL2 fallback**). **The deepening of the lab's WebRTC category-opener** (`918-kids-starlight-friend`, where two kids fling *identical* twinkles with no roles/structure) into **"a conducted two-player ensemble with roles"** ‚ÄĒ the *literal* phrasing of **JURY 2026-06-25 #4** ("develop the category-openers, don't open a fifth ‚Ä¶ the WebRTC room ‚Üí a conducted two-player ensemble with roles"). Also the directest kids answer to **#1** (push GPU onto **raw WebGPU**, the scarcest 1√ó/10 surface ‚ÄĒ NOT three.js) and **#2** (make music from real **pitch/harmony** again ‚ÄĒ here a warm **I‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV‚Äďvi** progression with the melody voiced into the live chord, the idea carried by the *role split* not a voice-leading engine, so it dodges the hardening 550/551/942 voice-leading template). **INPUT** device-tilt/sweep (conductor) + tap (player) + **serverless WebRTC** co-play (`harmony.ts` `voiceTap()` snaps every player tap to a chord tone of the conductor's current chord ‚Üí no wrong note); on-screen **drag fallback** when tilt is unavailable; **NOT mic** (jury-banned 4√ó). **OUTPUT** primary **raw WebGPU/WGSL** fragment sky (chord-colored gradient, tempo-pulsed shimmer, note-blooms) ‚Üí hand-written **raw-WebGL2** fallback painting the identical `SkyState` ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice if neither; **NOT three.js**. **Networking** reimplements 918's serverless handshake (host `createOffer()` ‚Üí ICE ‚Üí **gzip SDP via `CompressionStream` ‚Üí base64url `#join=` link** ‚Üí guest answer code ‚Üí host paste; data channel `ordered:false/maxRetransmits:0`; tiny `{role:'conductor',chord,bpm}` / `{role:'player',note}` events; both peers synth+render locally) ‚ÄĒ **no signaling server, no TURN, zero backend, no api route / no `guard`**. **Ghost-friend** auto-plays whichever role the local child isn't, within ~1s, driving a full chord-progression-with-melody demo on a cold untouched device, and bows out the instant a real data channel opens (networking purely additive) ‚ÄĒ guarantees a sounding, color-changing, two-player-looking glance with zero interaction. **Kids-safe chain** `gain(‚Č§0.24) ‚Üí lowpass 6.5kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(-10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on warm pad chord-bed that glides on chord changes; bell/triangle melody (‚Č•20ms attacks); ‚Č•64px tap targets; no reading; full teardown (rAF + oscillators + `ctx.close()` + deviceorientation/resize listeners + RTCPeerConnection/channel + ghost timer + GPU/GL resources). **Zero new npm deps** (WebGPU/WebGL2 + Web Audio + built-in WebRTC/CompressionStream + the already-present `@webgpu/types`). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [WebRTC role-networking + shared clock/progression engine + dual-role pad+melody synth + WebGPU/WebGL2 render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers**; **Orff Schulwerk** children's-ensemble pedagogy; the **Frontiers Psychology 2026** group-music-game study where the instrumental-*ensemble* phase itself drove cooperation] ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle [this IS cycle-2 of 918's stated commitment ‚ÄĒ cycle-1 shared sky, cycle-2 roles/structure, cycle-3 3+ players] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß554 ‚ÄĒ **19 cycles running** 535‚Äď554). #1 NOT claimed (WebRTC + WebGPU both have lab priors; the fresh axis is *role-complementarity as the deepening*, not a lab-first technique). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√ó), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√ó), granular (JURY 4√ó), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[device-tilt + WebRTC-multiuser INPUT (non-mic; deepens the 1√ó WebRTC opener per jury #4), raw-WebGPU‚ÜíWebGL2 OUTPUT (the scarce 1√ó GPU surface ‚ÄĒ jury #1; NOT three.js), role-split chord-context-+-voiced-melody harmony TECH (real I‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV‚Äďvi, pitch IS the idea, NOT granular, NOT a voice-leading engine), warm social kids-ensemble VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (1 concept √ó 3 role/render approaches ‚ÄĒ alternating after two WIDE nights 552/553, and jury #4 explicitly says "go DEEP on one" category-opener). **Love-aligned** ‚ÄĒ extends the loved loop/layering + kids-character cluster (`172-loop-station`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `111-kids-shape-loop`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `234-kids-hand-creature`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `317-kids-color-bells`‚Ě§ÔłŹ): "you and a friend make a song together" is the social form of that layered-build joy. **Siblings banked (IDEAS ¬ß554):** **`948-kids-duet-grove` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** ‚ÄĒ groove-keeper + melody-maker on ONE shared 8-step clock, **raw WebGL2** (the most viscerally legible "we made a song" + the bulletproof no-WebGPU twin; banked only because WebGL2 sits at the 4√ó/10 audit ban-edge where the winner lands the scarce WebGPU) + **`949-kids-echo-birds`** ‚ÄĒ call-and-response turn-taking bird-conversation, **Canvas2D** (the freshest renderer + most dialogic, but doesn't advance the GPU ask + harmonically thinnest). ## Cycle 553 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/947-overtone-loom](/dream/947-overtone-loom)** ‚ÄĒ Overtone Loom: **play a chord and SEE why it sounds sweet or sour.** Each note is a stack of harmonic partials; a **raw WebGPU compute shader** paints the live **sensory-dissonance field** (Plomp‚ÄďLevelt roughness) between every pair of sounding partials along a log-frequency axis ‚ÄĒ octaves & fifths **lock dark and smooth**, tritones & minor-2nds **churn bright** ‚ÄĒ and a **timbre knob** moves which intervals read as consonant, making tangible the 2026 finding that *consonance is a property of the spectrum, not abstract ratios* ūüü¶ūüéĻūüďą. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 553 (adult / **note-keyboard + MIDI** / **raw WebGPU compute**). **The lab's first dissonance-curve-as-instrument** and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #1** (push GPU onto **raw WebGPU compute** ‚ÄĒ the scarcest 1√ó/10 surface, NOT three.js) **and #2** (make music from real PITCH/harmony again ‚ÄĒ here the *psychoacoustic substrate of consonance itself* IS the idea, a fresh facet distinct from the 550/551 voice-leading cluster). **note-keyboard + Web-MIDI INPUT** (~1.75-octave on-screen chromatic keyboard, pointer/touch; optional `navigator.requestMIDIAccess` ‚ÄĒ **NOT mic**, jury-banned 4√ó). **raw-WebGPU/WGSL compute OUTPUT** ‚ÄĒ one compute invocation per frequency bin (512 bins dispatched) sums roughness against every sounding partial, rendered as a clinical cyan/white Ikeda interference field; degrades **WebGPU ‚Üí raw-WebGL2 fragment (same math) ‚Üí Canvas2D CPU** with a visible amber notice. **Additive synthesis** (banks of Web Audio oscillators per voice, 1/n harmonic rolloff ‚ÄĒ **NOT granular**, jury-banned 4√ó) + the canonical **Sethares/Plomp‚ÄďLevelt** model (`dissonance.ts`: `pairRoughness`, `totalDissonance`, `fieldAt` ‚ÄĒ the same math mirrored in WGSL + GLSL). A scalar **total-dissonance meter** rises/falls as you stack notes; the timbre/partial-count sliders prove the ¬ß553 paper's point by shifting the consonant intervals. Master chain `gain(‚Č§0.22) ‚Üí lowpass 7kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; adding notes busies the field, never spikes loudness. **~1.2s-idle auto-demo** cycles unison ‚Üí octave ‚Üí fifth ‚Üí triad ‚Üí tritone ‚Üí minor-2nd ‚Üí cluster so a hands-off glance *hears & sees* the consonance/dissonance contrast within ~1s; full teardown (oscillators + `ctx.close()` + rAF + GPU buffers + MIDI/resize listeners). **No API route / no `guard`** (all client-side, no network). **Zero new npm deps.** README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß553 (2026-06-25)** ‚ÄĒ "Elementary spectrum for the dissonance curve" (*Journal of Mathematics and Music* 2026, DOI 10.1080/17459737.2026.2628778), **Helmholtz, *On the Sensations of Tone* (1863)**, **Plomp & Levelt (1965)**, **Sethares, *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* (1998)** ‚ÄĒ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **18 cycles running** (535‚Äď553). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [dissonance-curve / sensory-roughness field as a playable instrument ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó in the lab] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Helmholtz ¬∑ Plomp‚ÄďLevelt ¬∑ Sethares ¬∑ the 2026 paper] ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH ¬ß553). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√ó), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√ó), granular (JURY 4√ó), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√ó), cosmic-ambient adult vibe (5√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[note-keyboard/MIDI INPUT (off banned mic), raw-WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (the scarcest 1√ó GPU surface ‚ÄĒ jury #1; degrades WebGL2‚ÜíCanvas2D), additive + Sethares-dissonance TECH (consonance IS the idea, non-granular), clinical Ikeda spectral-lab VIBE (off the cosmic-nebula cluster)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers; the 2026-06-25 jury is dominantly a spread/ban signal and its named DEEP targets were just-done [depth, by 551] or rotation-mismatched [AI-chain voice-ban, WebRTC is kids] ‚ÄĒ so three fresh-tag bets beat one more harmony concept). **Love-aligned** ‚ÄĒ sits exactly at the intersection of Karel's loved **spectral cluster** (`223-fourier-paint`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `243-spectral-cloud`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `267-spectral-drift`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `321-spectral-flight`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) and **GPU compute** (`130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). **Siblings banked (IDEAS ¬ß553):** **`948-cantus-engine` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** ‚ÄĒ a long-form (5+ min) self-developing **counterpoint** engine (seed a 4-note motif ‚Üí Fux/Bach inversion¬∑retrograde¬∑augmentation¬∑stretto¬∑modulation over a ~330s escalating arc; raw-WebGL2 scrolling score); the lab's long-form-stateful gap, lost only because WebGL2 is less scarce than WebGPU compute + the counterpoint lane was just mined (550/551/552). **`949-maqam-road`** ‚ÄĒ a microtonal Arabic **maqam** instrument (4 maqamat by exact cents, true quarter-tone portamento + ornaments, tonic+fifth drone; Canvas2D "road"); the non-Western-pitch surprise. Both returned complete + self-reported clean; `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-553/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 110s`** ‚Üí Linting/type-check PASS; one fix attempt landed = corrected a Web-MIDI ambient-type collision [`MIDIAccess` vs DOM `MidiAccess`] by adopting the DOM WebMIDI types like `902-harmonic-mirror`; 947 carries one **non-fatal** `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` warning [ref-in-cleanup ‚ÄĒ same class as the pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; warnings don't fail `next build`]; all other warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the WGSL compute shader compiles + the roughness field reads as intended on real hardware [robust WebGL2 + Canvas2D + auto-demo fallbacks cover every failure], and whether the additive timbre + dissonance contrast are audible on a real speaker; the auto-demo guarantees a sounding, evolving glance with zero interaction).

## Earlier (Cycle 552 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/946-kids-bird-round](/dream/946-kids-bird-round)** ‚ÄĒ Bird Round: a 4-year-old **drags a glowing bird up & down a tree to sing a little tune** (height = pitch, snapped to a friendly pentatonic so it's always musical); let go and the bird **remembers the melody and loops it**, then tap *add-a-bird* and a second bird sings the **same tune offset in time** ‚ÄĒ a real **canon / round** ("Row, Row, Row Your Boat") that blooms into layered counterpoint as the flock grows ūüź¶ūüé∂ūüĆÖ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 552 (kids / **touch-drag** / **raw WebGL2**). **The lab's first KIDS canon/counterpoint piece** (302-mirror-canon was adult-only) and the directest kids answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #2** (*make music from real PITCH/melody again* ‚ÄĒ melody IS the playable idea here, breaking the banned "pitch held deliberately dumb" stance). **touch-DRAG INPUT** ‚ÄĒ vertical finger position over time = a melody; live chirp under the finger (throttled), released drag ‚Üí `makeMelodyFromDrag` quantizes the samples to 8 steps over ~4 beats + snaps each to a C-pentatonic scale ‚Üí stored as the shared melody. **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (`gl.ts`, hand-written GLSL ‚ÄĒ **NOT three.js**, jury #1) ‚ÄĒ a soft dawn-gold treetop with additive glowing birds + light-trails that pulse when they sing; **Canvas2D fallback** renders the same scene if WebGL2 is unavailable. **Shared-clock CANON scheduler** (`audio.ts/makeScheduler`) ‚ÄĒ ONE look-ahead clock anchored to a fixed start; each bird is a voice with a constant time offset (1 beat per added voice), all voices read the same melody so adding a bird = a time-shifted copy = a genuine round; loop wraparound handled, `pulses[]` exported so the renderer bobs/glows the exact bird that just sang. **Bright chirp synth** (triangle+sine with a quick upward pitch-glide attack, light 6.5 Hz vibrato, short bell/pluck env ‚ÄĒ **NOT granular**, jury ban) + a quiet tonic+fifth **pad** bed. Master chain `gain(‚Č§0.26) ‚Üí lowpass 7kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; **more birds must NOT mean louder** ‚ÄĒ `applyFlockGain = MASTER_CEIL/‚ąövoices`. **Kids-safe & hands-off:** gesture-gated AudioContext, ‚Č•64‚Äď96px emoji controls (‚Ė∂ÔłŹ start / ūüź¶‚ěē add-bird / ūüĒĄ reset), no reading required, instant chirp/loop response; **~2s-idle auto-demo** sings a default tune and adds a 2nd bird so a hands-off glance hears a little round + sees two birds glowing within ~1‚Äď2s; full teardown (scheduler interval + pad + rAF + `ctx.close()`). **No API route / no `guard`** (no network, no AI gen ‚ÄĒ all client-side). **Zero new npm deps.** README cites the **round/canon** structure (Reich phasing as adult cousin), the **melodic-contour developmental finding**, and **Toshio Iwai's Electroplankton**. **Clears ambition floor 2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [drag-to-melody capture/quantizer + shared-clock canon scheduler + chirp synth + WebGL2 renderer = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [round/canon ¬∑ melodic-contour research ¬∑ Electroplankton]). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√ó), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√ó), granular (JURY 4√ó), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[touch-drag INPUT (touch scarce 1√ó), raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (‚ÜíCanvas2D fallback; off banned three.js), melody-capture + CANON/counterpoint TECH (melody IS the idea; non-granular chirp synth), warm dawn-treetop kids VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers; deliberate alternation after two DEEP cycles 550/551 + a direct attack on the jury's "house style" critique). **Love-aligned** ‚ÄĒ extends the loved loop/layering lineage (`172-loop-station`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `111-kids-shape-loop`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `160-kids-paint-loop`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). **Siblings banked (IDEAS ¬ß552):** **944-kids-melody-coaster** (draw a hilly track, a cart rolls + sings the contour as a diatonic melody; WebGL2) + **945-kids-harmony-garden** (tap to plant note-flowers; consonant pairs grow "friend-vines" + the chord nearest-tone voice-leads; Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ the directest harmony/voice-leading answer, deferred only because it overlaps 941's harmony territory). Both returned complete + self-reported eslint-0; `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.0min`** ‚Üí Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero "946"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the canon offsets read as a genuinely harmonious *round* on a real speaker [always-on pad + auto-demo guarantee a sounding, layered glance], and whether drag-to-pitch feels intuitive on a real iPad; robust Canvas2D + pointer fallbacks cover desktop review).

## Earlier (Cycle 551 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/942-depth-harmonic-room](/dream/942-depth-harmonic-room)** ‚ÄĒ Depth Harmonic Room: stand in front of the webcam and your **distance + lateral position in the room** place you inside a neo-Riemannian **Tonnetz** of harmony ‚ÄĒ walking through space glides you through smooth, **voice-led chord changes** (P / L / R), rendered as a candle-warm WebGPU lattice that blooms as you lean in ūüéĻūüēĮÔłŹūüü†. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 551 (adult / **webcam depth** / **raw WebGPU**). **THE DEEPENING OF 927-depth-room ‚ÄĒ and the directest possible multi-provocation answer to JURY 2026-06-25.** It hits **#4** (develop a 0√ó category-opener ‚ÄĒ depth-camera ‚ÄĒ *don't open a fifth*: this turns 927's "distance ‚Üí texture" into a multi-zone spatial *harmonic instrument you walk through*), **#2** (make music from real PITCH / voice-leading again ‚ÄĒ *harmony IS the idea here*, the literal opposite of 927's "pitch held deliberately dumb"), and **#1** (push GPU work onto **raw WebGPU**, the scarcest 1√ó/10 surface ‚ÄĒ NOT three.js). **webcam-DEPTH INPUT** ‚ÄĒ **Depth Anything V2 (small)** runs in-browser on WebGPU via **Transformers.js** (CDN at runtime, no npm dep), a 256√ó192 frame ‚Üí per-pixel depth (larger = nearer) ‚Üí 16√ó12 grid ‚Üí **nearEnergy** (proximity ‚Üí brightness + chord openness), **centroidX** (lateral ‚Üí Tonnetz column), **depthBand** (lean ‚Üí row), **motion** (‚Üí shimmer/attack). Depth is the *deepened* category-opener (1√ó in last-10, sanctioned by jury #4). **Raw WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** ‚ÄĒ a full-screen fragment shader paints a warm volumetric room (amber/rose/deep-teal) with a triangular Tonnetz of glowing pitch-nodes; the **sounding triad-triangle glows brightest and blooms** with proximity, a transient fires on each transform, a focal glow marks where you stand. Degrades **WebGPU ‚Üí raw WebGL2 (`webgl-fallback.ts`, same lattice) ‚Üí DOM chord-view** ‚ÄĒ a 3-tier render cascade. **Neo-Riemannian voice-leading ENGINE** (`harmony.ts`) ‚ÄĒ every cell is a major/minor triad; adjacent cells differ by a single parsimonious **P** (parallel, third moves ¬Ĺ), **L** (Leittonwechsel, root down ¬Ĺ) or **R** (relative, fifth up a tone), each holding **exactly 2 of 3 common tones** (builder unit-verified across all 24 triads ‚ÄĒ involutions + 2-common-tone retention + a real R/L progression C‚ÜíAm‚ÜíF‚ÜíDm‚ÜíB‚ô≠‚ÜíGm‚ÜíE‚ô≠). centroidX walks the R/L third-chain (related keys, one step at a time); lean in/out applies **P** (major-bright ‚ÜĒ minor-dark). **SATB nearest-tone voicing** (`voiceTriad`) ‚ÄĒ bass=root low; each upper voice takes the octave of a chord tone nearest where it already sits (all 6 assignments tried, min total semitone motion ‚ÄĒ Tymoczko's minimal voice-leading), so common tones literally don't move and the one changed tone slides shortest; warm pad voices (detuned sine+triangle ‚Üí soft lowpass + slow vibrato) over a root **drone bed**, each re-voice **glides (portamento ~120‚Äď300ms)** ‚ÄĒ smooth, never clicky. Master chain `gain(‚Č§0.28) ‚Üí lowpass 7kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; additive/subtractive synthesis (**NOT granular** ‚ÄĒ jury-banned). **Degrades fully:** no camera / model fails ‚Üí **synthetic Lissajous presence-blob** auto-walks the Tonnetz within ~1s of Start (a hands-off glance *hears evolving harmony + sees the lattice glow*); laptop with no camera ‚Üí **pointer** steers the lattice; on-device only (camera never recorded/uploaded); full teardown (rAF + listeners + webcam tracks + oscillators + `audioCtx.close()` + GPU destroy). **No API route / no `guard`** (no network, no AI image/voice gen ‚ÄĒ all client-side). **Zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU + the runtime CDN Transformers.js import). README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß551 (2026-06-25)** ‚ÄĒ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **17 cycles running** (535‚Äď551). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [webcam-depth ML pipeline + neo-Riemannian Tonnetz/voice-leading engine + SATB synthesis + WebGPU/WebGL2 lattice render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Cohn, *Audacious Euphony* 2012**; **Tymoczko, *A Geometry of Music* 2011**; **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***; **Depth Anything V2 / Transformers.js**] ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH ¬ß551). #1 NOT claimed (depth-camera has a lab prior ‚ÄĒ 927; the Tonnetz appears as a ¬ß533 seed `896-tonnetz-loom`; the lab-fresh axis is *depth-position ‚Üí Tonnetz navigation on WebGPU*, not a brand-new technique). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√ó), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√ó), granular (JURY 4√ó), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√ó), raw-WebGL2-as-primary (audit 4√ó/10 edge), cosmic-ambient adult vibe (5√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[webcam-depth INPUT (deepening the 1√ó category-opener per jury #4), raw-WebGPU OUTPUT (scarcest GPU surface 1√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ jury #1; degrades to WebGL2/DOM), neo-Riemannian voice-leading harmony TECH (harmony IS the idea ‚ÄĒ direct anti-"pitch-dumb" pivot, NOT granular), warm-inhabited-room VIBE (candle amber/rose ‚ÄĒ off the cosmic-nebula cluster)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (one massively-bigger concept √ó 2 render approaches; jury #4 explicitly said "go DEEP on one" category-opener, not WIDE). **Sibling banked (IDEAS ¬ß551):** **`943-depth-tonnetz-room` ‚≠ź** ‚ÄĒ the *same* depth‚ÜíTonnetz concept on **raw WebGL2** (warm depth-room + glowing constellation; same P/L/R engine + SATB voicing); the bulletproof no-WebGPU twin ‚ÄĒ resurrect if 942's WebGPU path disappoints on real hardware, or when WebGL2 is cold again (its builder honestly flagged a rectangular-grid limitation: a 2D grid can't make *both* axes globally parsimonious, so it keeps the lateral axis perfectly P/L/R and lets proximity use P/Slide). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 42s`** ‚Üí Linting/type-check PASS; the always-on drone + synthetic auto-walk guarantee a sounding, harmonising glance with zero interaction).

## ‚≠ź Earlier (Cycle 550 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/941-kids-choir-bloom](/dream/941-kids-choir-bloom)** ‚ÄĒ Choir Bloom: a 4-year-old conducts a choir by dragging singing blob-creatures up and down to PITCHES, and a voice-leading brain turns their little melody into real four-part harmony ‚ÄĒ glowing GPU metaballs that bloom brighter as the voices come into a chord ūüé∂ūüęßūüĆą. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 550 (kids 4+ / **touch pitch-drag** / **WebGPU metaballs**). **For**: kids (4+) / a warm, cozy, sing-together playspace / iPad-or-desktop. **THE LAB'S FIRST CONDUCT-A-CHOIR-BY-PITCH PIECE ‚ÄĒ and the deliberate breaking of the "pitch held dumb" template the jury just banned.** This is a piece where **melody and harmony ARE the idea** (the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 provocation #2** ‚ÄĒ "make music from real pitch / voice-leading / a harmonic arc again; it must BE the idea, not the thing you apologise for omitting"). **touch pitch-drag INPUT** ‚ÄĒ drag the rose **soprano** blob up/down to set its pitch, snapped to a C-major diatonic scale (always in tune, but the child genuinely *chooses each note and hears a melody*); the blob is the ‚Č•64px drag handle; inner voices are independently grabbable (gentle chord-tone re-snap on release). Touch is **0√ó in the last-10 audit** ‚ÄĒ the freshest input (off the jury-banned mic, off the recent tilt/camera/shake). **WebGPU/WGSL metaball OUTPUT** ‚ÄĒ `navigator.gpu` fragment pipeline evaluates a four-source metaball iso-field ‚Üí warm additive glow (soprano=rose, alto=amber, tenor=emerald, bass=violet) that **blooms brighter as the voices become consonant and close** (a `consonance()` measure drives it); WebGPU is **the scarcest GPU surface at 1√ó/10** ‚ÄĒ the directest answer to **jury provocation #1** ("ban three.js, push GPU work onto raw WebGPU compute"). **Voice-leading harmony ENGINE** (`voices.ts`) ‚ÄĒ the soprano's scale degree implies a diatonic triad (1‚ÜíI, 2‚Üíii, 3‚Üíiii, 4‚ÜíIV, 5‚ÜíV, 6‚Üívi) and the bass/tenor/alto each glide (`setTargetAtTime` ~90‚Äď140ms) to the **nearest chord tone within their range** (Aldwell & Schachter's smooth voice-leading), bass nudged toward the root, inner voices kept off unisons ‚ÄĒ so **drawing a melody with the lead blob makes real chord changes emerge underneath, a harmonic arc you can hear**. **Formant source-filter "ahh" singing SYNTH** (`audio.ts`, NOT samples / NOT granular / NOT AI) ‚ÄĒ each voice is two slightly detuned band-limited sawtooth glottal sources with ~5Hz vibrato ‚Üí a parallel bank of 3‚Äď4 bandpass formant filters (warm /a/ ‚Čą F1 700 / F2 1100 / F3 2600 Hz), brighter highs / darker bass per register, so the blobs read as a *singing* choir, not a synth. **Kids-safe chain:** sum ‚Üí `masterGain(0.26)` ‚Üí lowpass 6.5kHz ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1)` ‚Üí destination; a harder/faster drag NEVER gets louder or harsher ‚ÄĒ only pitch changes; always-on (never silent). **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU ‚Üí hand-written **raw WebGL2** fragment metaball render (`webgl-fallback.ts`, same field/bloom math, NOT three.js) ‚Üí if neither GPU path, a plain-DOM radial-gradient glow + `text-rose-300` notice keeps audio alive; ‚Č•72px **Start** gesture-gates the AudioContext + GPU init (iOS); ~2s-idle **auto-demo** drifts the soprano through a calm diatonic tune so a hands-free glance both *sees the metaballs bloom* and *hears the choir + harmony* within ~1s; full teardown (rAF + audio nodes + `device.destroy()` / `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route, no `guard` needed** (NO mic, NO network, NO AI model ‚ÄĒ fully offline + private, exactly right for a kids app); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU/WebGL2). README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß550 (2026-06-25)** ‚ÄĒ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **16 cycles running** (535‚Äď550). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [touch pitch-drag conductor + diatonic voice-leading SATB engine + 4-voice formant source-filter synthesis + WebGPU metaball render w/ WebGL2 fallback = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Blob Opera / David Li, Google Arts & Culture 2020**; **Cantor / Chorus Digitalis** formant gesture-singing, IRCAM/LIMSI; **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***] ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH ¬ß550). #1 NOT claimed (formant source-filter synthesis has lab priors ‚ÄĒ 287-mirror-choir, 413-kids-mouth-mirror, ~61 README hits; ## (Cycle 549 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/939-aurora-harp](/dream/939-aurora-harp)** ‚ÄĒ Aurora Harp: hear space weather *right now* ‚ÄĒ the live solar wind streaming past Earth raises a shimmering aurora curtain and plays the magnetosphere's resonances; calm wind = slow ULF drones, a gust or southward Bz = flares, beating and crimson sky ūüĆĆūüĆ†ūüüĘūüü£. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 549 (adult / **live external data (NOAA SWPC)** / **raw WebGL2**). **For**: adult / nocturnal-cosmic-contemplative / desktop-or-iPad. **THE LAB'S FIRST LIVE-PLANETARY-INSTRUMENT.** **live-external-data INPUT** ‚ÄĒ two NOAA **SWPC** real-time solar-wind products fetched browser-side and polled ~60s: `plasma-5-minute.json` (density, speed, temp) and `mag-5-minute.json` (Bx/By/**Bz_gsm**/Bt) from ACE/DSCOVR at the Sun‚ÄďEarth **L1** point (0√ó in the last-10 audit ‚ÄĒ the freshest possible input). **raw-WebGL2 fragment OUTPUT** (GPU, NOT the banned three.js/Canvas2D/SVG): a full-screen **aurora curtain** ‚ÄĒ fbm-folded vertical light sheets, green‚Üíviolet‚Üícrimson by activity, star field over a dark arctic horizon, folding faster with wind speed, reaching higher and shifting crimson-violet on southward Bz. **HARP-style space-weather sonification TECH** ‚ÄĒ after NASA **HARP (Heliophysics Audified: Resonances in Plasmas)**: a sustained drone bed on inharmonic resonance **bands**, each a **detuned oscillator pair** producing real *beating* whose rate tracks Bt/turbulence + southward Bz; density gates how many partials sing; gust swells retrigger faster as wind speed rises; a southward-Bz crossing (‚Čą ‚ąí7 nT) fires a flare ‚ÄĒ sub-rumble + ripple of beating tones synced to an aurora flash. **Pitch held deliberately non-melodic** (drone + resonance bands, NO chord, NO scale ‚ÄĒ the *Sun* is the composer; music from data/resonance, the directest JURY 2026-06-24 #3 answer) and it deliberately **drops the consonant-mode safety crutch the jury BANNED** for external-data sonification (it audifies the actual resonances/beating, never an in-tune-by-construction chord). **Master compressor/limiter** for safety; always-on drone (never silent). **Degrades fully:** Start seeds an immediate **synthetic solar wind** so sound + a moving sky appear within ~0.6s before the live feed returns; any fetch failure (offline / CORS / feed gap) ‚Üí the synthetic generator (with periodic southward-Bz "substorm" gusts) takes over behind a calm **amber notice**; no WebGL2 ‚Üí audio-only + amber notice. A live readout (speed km/s, density p/cm¬≥, Bz nT, Bt nT) + a "what am I hearing" panel explain the mapping; pointer to look around. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (all client-side fetch, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2 + Web Audio). NOAA SWPC ACE/DSCOVR; OVATION] ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH ¬ß549). #1 NOT claimed (external-data sonification has a lab prior ‚ÄĒ 836/877/898 ‚ÄĒ but those are the jury-banned consonant-crutch template; the fresh axis is *HARP-style live-resonance audification that drops the consonant guarantee*). `diversity: banned=[three.js (4√ó/10), Canvas2D, SVG, touch (JURY), interval/JI-harmony (JURY), tilt (2√ó consecutive + rejected-933 would 3-peat the concept)] ¬∑ picked=[live-external-data INPUT (0√ó), raw-WebGL2 aurora OUTPUT, HARP space-weather-resonance sonification TECH (data/resonance not pitch), nocturnal-aurora/cosmic VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, after 3 consecutive DEEP cycles + a ban-heavy jury verdict). **Siblings banked (IDEAS ¬ß549):** **`938-morphogenesis` ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST** (Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion on **WebGPU compute** ‚ÄĒ the scarcest GPU surface ‚ÄĒ ‚Üí granular texture) and **`937-cathedral-phase`** (Euclidean + Steve Reich phasing ‚Üí raymarched SDF cathedral, the cleanest rhythm-not-pitch build). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 54s`** ‚Üí Linting/type-check PASS, grep-confirmed zero "939"/"aurora-harp"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT data/GPU/ear-verified** (no live network / GPU / audio confirmation in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether services.swpc.noaa.gov CORS resolves from the deploy edge [fully covered by the synthetic-wind fallback + amber notice], the beating-rate‚Üíturbulence + Bz-flare mappings on a real speaker, whether real-day quiet wind reads as too calm [synthetic generator injects gust energy for the demo]; the always-on drone + synthetic fallback + immediate aurora guarantee a sounding/showing glance with zero network).

- **[/dream/935-kids-shake-critters](/dream/935-kids-shake-critters)** ‚ÄĒ Shake the Critters!: a 4-year-old shakes the iPad like a rattle and a little band of glowing jelly-creatures comes alive ‚ÄĒ the rhythm you shake is caught into a loop the critters keep grooving ūüę®ūüü°ūüĒĶūüü£ūüüĘ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 548 (kids 4+ / **devicemotion-shake** / **three.js GPU**). **For**: kids (4+) / a bright, playful, laugh-first playspace / iPad-or-desktop. **THE LAB'S FIRST SHAKE-DRIVEN STOCHASTIC-SHAKER INSTRUMENT** ‚ÄĒ the rattle is **PhISEM (Physically-Informed Stochastic Event Modeling, Perry Cook 1997)**: a shaker is modeled as N virtual beans in a gourd, a per-frame *collision probability rises with shake energy*, and each collision is a short white-noise grain through a resonant bandpass at the shell frequency (~1.7‚Äď6 kHz) with a few-ms exponential decay; summing many grains = the characteristic rattle. **Shake energy ‚Üí grain RATE + resonance BRIGHTNESS, NEVER loudness** (harder shake = more+brighter grains, kids-safe). **devicemotion-SHAKE INPUT** (`acceleration` magnitude + jerk; iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` gated in the Start tap ‚ÄĒ the one fresh 4yo-native channel left: camera was AUDIT-banned 4√ó/10, touch JURY-banned, mic 3√ó / tilt-orientation 2√ó recent; shake is distinct from the tilt-orientation 931/932 just used). **three.js GPU OUTPUT** (the *scarcer* GPU surface after 931+932 both shipped raw-WebGL2; NOT the banned Canvas2D/SVG): five blobby icosphere **critters** with a custom vertex-noise-displacement shader squash/stretch/jiggle on shake energy, collisions puff colored sparkle particles, a rim-glow/tonemap gives a bloom feel ‚ÄĒ bold primary critter colors on a warm bright daylight sky (the jury's "active joyful middle", not calm bedtime glow). **PhISEM-shaker + shake-rhythm-loop TECH** ‚ÄĒ three voices (soft maraca / woody cabasa / bright shaker) + a low stomp on hard onsets sound like a small band over an always-on warm drone; **pitch held deliberately dumb** (single drone, NO chimes, NO melody, NO notes to miss ‚ÄĒ music from **timbre + rhythm**, the directest kids answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3, and the deliberate inversion of `866-rainstick-sky`'s calm pentatonic). **The groove loop:** a rolling ~3.2s buffer samples the shake-energy envelope; pause ‚Üí the window freezes into a **loop** the critters keep re-triggering, so a warm groove accretes (up to 3 stacked, oldest drops; ūüßĻ clears). **Kids-safe chain:** master-gain ceiling ‚Üí lowpass ~6 kHz ‚Üí soft compressor/limiter; always-on drone (never silent); full teardown (rAF + listeners + three.js dispose + audio nodes). **Degrades fully:** no sensor/desktop/permission-denied ‚Üí pointer/touch **drag** = shake (plays fully by mouse-swipe) + 3s idle auto-demo gently auto-shakes so a hands-free glance sees jiggle+sparkle and hears the rattle within ~0.6s; no WebGL ‚Üí friendly amber notice, audio keeps playing. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (three@0.182 already present + Web Audio). README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß548 (2026-06-25)** ‚ÄĒ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **14 cycles running** (535‚Äď548). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [devicemotion-shake + three.js GPU critter render + PhISEM stochastic-shaker synth + shake-rhythm groove-loop engine = 4] ¬∑ #3 named ref [PhISEM / Perry Cook 1997] ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH ¬ß548). #1 NOT claimed (PhISM cited once before in `429-kids-texture-paint-tap`; the fresh axis is shake-driven shaker *instrument* + groove-loop). `diversity: banned=[camera (audit 4√ó/10), touch (JURY), Canvas2D/SVG (JURY), interval/JI-harmony (JURY), tilt-orientation (2√ó recent), mic (3√ó recent), raw-WebGL2 (931+932 consecutive)] ¬∑ picked=[devicemotion-SHAKE INPUT, three.js GPU OUTPUT (scarcer surface), PhISEM-stochastic-shaker + shake-rhythm-loop TECH (texture+rhythm not pitch), bright-playful daylight-critter-band VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (kids input palette too narrow for WIDE's distinct-input-per-brief rule ‚Üí 1 concept √ó 2 GPU approaches). **Sibling banked (IDEAS ¬ß548):** **`936-kids-rattle-bloom`** (the same shake‚ÜíPhISEM‚Üígroove concept as a raw-WebGL2 **metaball** fragment shader ‚ÄĒ gooey candy-bright blobs that merge with energy; the always-on drone + pointer-drag + 3s idle auto-demo guarantee a sounding/jiggling glance with zero hardware).

## Cycle 547 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/932-tilt-orrery](/dream/932-tilt-orrery)** ‚ÄĒ Tilt Orrery: tilt your device and a little cosmos tips like a bowl; every body that swings through perihelion rings, and the music is the emergent polyrhythm of orbits ūü™źūüĒĒ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 547 (adult / **device-tilt** / **raw WebGPU WGSL compute**). **For**: adult / cosmic-contemplative / iPad-or-desktop. **The whole N-body sim AND the perihelion detection run on the GPU** ‚ÄĒ an inline **WGSL compute shader** integrates 3000 bodies in double-buffered (ping-pong A/B) storage buffers (semi-implicit Euler, central inverse-square gravity + a tilt acceleration "tipped bowl"); perihelion is flagged on the GPU as a local max of 1/r and only a tiny per-frame flag buffer is read back **non-blocking** via `mapAsync` (last frame's flags, ‚Č§24/readback, 90ms per-body gate) to fire Web Audio bells. **device-tilt INPUT** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`; iOS `requestPermission()` gated in the Start tap; tilt 1√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ fresh, off the over-used touch/mic). **raw-WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (the scarcest GPU surface ‚ÄĒ 0√ó in last-10, the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #1 "swing to the scarce GPU surface"; NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D/SVG). **gravitational perihelion-polyrhythm TECH** ‚ÄĒ bell timbre from radius+speed (close+fast = bright bell, far+slow = soft thud), **stereo pan from `cos(angle)`** so you hear the cosmos rotate, tilt-steepness ‚Üí pulse density; **pitch held deliberately dumb** (fixed pentatonic over a sub-bass drone, NO harmony engine ‚ÄĒ music from rhythm/space, JURY #3). **The soul / research enrichment:** seven amber bodies are seeded in the **TRAPPIST-1 mean-motion resonance chain** (adjacent period ratios ‚Čą 8:5,5:3,3:2,3:2,4:3,3:2) on locked analytic orbits, so a steady hypnotic pulse **self-organizes inside** the chaotic violet field ‚ÄĒ Kepler's 1619 *Harmonices Mundi* "harmony of the spheres" made literal, after NASA / SYSTEM Sounds' 2017 TRAPPIST-1 sonification. **Render:** instanced additive glowing quads + a translucent indigo trail veil. **Audio chain:** master gain 0.26 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressorNode` limiter ‚Üí destination (dense bursts never clip). **Degrades fully:** `navigator.gpu` missing or any WebGPU init throw ‚Üí a 360-body **CPU N-body sim** runs identical physics + perihelion detection and renders additive glow on a 2D `<canvas>`, still sounding (calm amber notice, never a crash); no motion sensor ‚Üí auto-drift Lissajous + pointer-drag + tilt x/y sliders (sounding/moving glance within ~0.6s, zero hardware). **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGPU + Web Audio). TRAPPIST-1 / NASA SYSTEM Sounds 2017; Gillon et al. *Nature* 2017] ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH ¬ß547). #1 NOT claimed (raw WebGPU/WGSL compute has a lab prior ‚ÄĒ loved `130-tsl-particle-compute`; the fresh axis is *tilt-driven N-body gravitational-rhythm + resonance-chain-in-chaos*). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine (JURY 2026-06-24); + three.js as the more-represented GPU output in last-10] ¬∑ picked=[device-tilt INPUT (fresh, 1√ó), raw-WebGPU-WGSL-compute OUTPUT (scarcest GPU surface, 0√ó), gravitational-perihelion-polyrhythm + TRAPPIST-resonance-in-chaos TECH (rhythm/space, not pitch), cosmic/orrery VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (the ‚≠ź standing adult resurrect-first concept `928-tilt-orrery` √ó 2 approaches). **Sibling banked (IDEAS ¬ß547):** **`933-tilt-orrery`** ‚≠ź **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the same concept as a lush three.js `WebGLRenderer` galaxy + a dynamic-`import()` `WebGPURenderer`+TSL compute enhancement ‚ÄĒ the proven render path + a reusable build-safe way to use `three/webgpu` here). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 54s`** ‚Üí Linting/type-check PASS, grep-confirmed zero "932"/"tilt-orrery"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; ## Cycle 546 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/931-kids-tide-pool](/dream/931-kids-tide-pool)** ‚ÄĒ Moonlit Tide Pool: tilt the iPad at bedtime and a glowing sea of light flows downhill, pools in the low corner, and every pool rings a soft bell ūüĆäūüĒĒ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 546 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt** / **raw WebGL2 all-GPU shallow-water**). **For**: kids (4+) / a calm bedtime playspace / iPad. **THE LAB'S FIRST ALL-GPU SHALLOW-WATER SIM** ‚ÄĒ the *entire* physics state (water height + four per-cell pipe fluxes) lives in ping-pong **RGBA32F float textures** (256√ó256) and is advanced every frame by two fragment-shader passes, so a 4-year-old's tilt makes the light-water *genuinely* run downhill and **pool** (real conserved flux, not a faked damped membrane). **device-tilt INPUT** (`DeviceOrientationEvent` beta/gamma ‚Üí gravity uniform; iOS `requestPermission()` gated inside the Start tap; tilt 0‚Äď1√ó in last-10 kids ‚ÄĒ the freshest input, off the banned touch). **virtual-pipes shallow-water TECH** (Mei/Decaudin/Hu 2007): flux-update pass (neighbour height-diff + tilt-gravity, damped, outflow-scaled so depth never goes negative, closed no-flux walls) ‚Üí height-update pass (net inflow ‚ąí outflow + slow central trickle so it breathes). **Pooling rings the bells** ‚ÄĒ a handful of fixed "lily" probes read back cheaply (1√ó1 `gl.readPixels` from the sim FBO, throttled ~30ms) and on a depth rising-edge (0.22s cooldown) ring one warm pentatonic note {C4 D4 E4 G4 A4 C5 D5 E5} ‚ÄĒ **NO harmony/interval engine, pitch held deliberately dumb; the music lives in the RHYTHM of how the child tilts** (gentle rock = sparse drops, fast sway = a flurry). **raw-WebGL2 GPU OUTPUT** (the scarce surface JURY #1 wants ‚ÄĒ NOT three.js, NOT the banned Canvas2D/SVG): a shade pass renders the height field as a moonlit sea (deep = cool indigo, pooled = warm gold, additive glow + height-normal specular shimmer), lily nodes brighten the instant they ring so the rhythm reads sound-off. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #1** (swing all-in to GPU ‚ÄĒ the *whole sim* is GPU) **and #3** (music from rhythm/space, NOT pitch theory). **Kids-safe envelope:** `masterGain(0.24) ‚Üí lowpass 6kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`, a hard tilt makes MORE soft bells never louder; always-on C2+G2 drone (never silent); bells ‚Č•40ms attack, gentle decay. iOS gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (rAF + listeners + all GL textures/FBOs/programs/buffers/VAOs + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **Degrades fully:** no sensor/desktop/permission-denied ‚Üí pointer-drag tips the sea + idle auto-demo rocks the tide so a hands-free glance sees flow+pool and hears bells within ~0.6s; no WebGL2/float-texture ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, drone keeps playing. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2). README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß546 (2026-06-25)** ‚ÄĒ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **12 cycles running** (535‚Äď546). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [tilt sensor + GPU virtual-pipes solver + bell scheduler + WebGL2 render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named ref [virtual-pipes / Mei, Decaudin & Hu 2007; lisyarus/webgpu-shallow-water 2025] ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH ¬ß546). `diversity: banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine (JURY 2026-06-24); + three.js as the more-represented GPU output in last-10 kids] ¬∑ picked=[device-tilt INPUT (freshest, 0‚Äď1√ó), raw-WebGL2 all-GPU-solve OUTPUT (scarcer than three.js), virtual-pipes flow‚Üípooling-RHYTHM TECH (not pitch theory), serene moonlit tide-pool VIBE]`. **Mode = DEEP** (the ‚≠ź standing kids resurrect-first concept √ó 2 approaches; AGENT.md: develop/resurrect the bench). **Sibling banked (IDEAS ¬ß546):** **`930-kids-tilt-tide`** ‚≠ź **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the same concept solved on CPU [56√ó56] + rendered with three.js ‚ÄĒ the bulletproof no-float-texture render path). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 112s`** ‚Üí Linting/type-check PASS, zero warnings/refs in the 931 folder; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device/ear/GPU-verified** (no tilt sensor / GPU / audio in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: the iOS DeviceOrientation permission flow, the RGBA32F float-texture path + `gl.readPixels` readback timing on a real iPad, whether the pooling tilt-feel reads as "I poured the light," the audio balance on a real speaker; the always-on drone + pointer-drag + idle auto-demo guarantee a sounding/flowing/pooling glance with zero hardware).

- **[/dream/915-resonant-cinema](/dream/915-resonant-cinema)** ‚ÄĒ Resonant Cinema: your playing dreams a short FILM of itself ‚ÄĒ your music distilled to a still, bloomed into a living video, then kept moving by your own live sound ūüé¨‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 541 (adult / **mic + synth bed** / **three.js + AI-image + AI-video**). **For**: anyone with a voice/instrument / immersive listening / a stage projection ¬∑ **THE LAB'S FIRST TRUE MULTI-MODEL AI PIPELINE CHAIN** (JURY 2026-06-24 #4, 0√ó after being named every jury; Karel's #1 directive "AI image generation INSIDE audio-visual experiments"). **mic/synth INPUT** (a generative ambient pad bed over ONE fixed A2 drone ‚ÄĒ pitch deliberately dumb; optional live mic swaps the analysis source, never routed to destination [anti-feedback]; AnalyserNode FFT-2048 ‚Üí energy/centroid/flux/hue every frame). **2-model FAL chain TECH**: audio mood ‚Üí poetic prompt ‚Üí **`fal-ai/flux/schnell`** (still seed, 16:9, 4 steps) ‚Üí **`fal-ai/ltx-video/image-to-video`** (blooms the still into a 5s clip). **three.js + AI-VIDEO OUTPUT** (0√ó output surface): the returned clip is a `THREE.VideoTexture` on a fullscreen quad, and the **live FFT runs a fragment-shader pass over it every frame** ‚ÄĒ ripple/displacement‚ąĚenergy, bloom/exposure‚ąĚcentroid (brightness), chromatic-aberration/RGB-split‚ąĚflux. **The AI video is the SEED; the live audio is the ongoing ANIMATOR.** **What if you didn't prompt an AI to make a music video ‚ÄĒ what if you PLAYED, and the AI only dreamed the canvas your sound then keeps moving?** **Cinematic / Anadol latent-cinema VIBE.** **Cost-safe for public prod**: the paid chain (~$0.003 still + $0.02 video) fires **only on an explicit "Dream the film" click** (disabled in-flight, **zero timers**, never on load/idle); page-load / idle / "dreaming‚Ä¶" / error / no-FAL_KEY all run a **synthesized GPU nebula** (domain-warped FBM cloud, audio-driven) so a hands-off glance is **always a living, sounding scene**. `api/route.ts` is **guarded** (`guard(req)` first, FAL_KEY‚Üí501, try/catch‚Üí500). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #4** (AI-pipeline-chain, 0√ó) **and #1** ("swing back to GPU, full stop") **and #3** (music from NOT pitch theory ‚ÄĒ one drone, the idea lives in image/chain). **Named ref:** **Refik Anadol's latent cinema (*Machine Hallucinations*)** ‚ÄĒ the AI-dreamed image as living projection. README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß541 (2026-06-24)** ‚ÄĒ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **7 cycles running** (535‚Äď541). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#1 **never-used technique** ‚ÄĒ first true multi-model AI chain / first AI-video output [441 was a single audio‚Üíimage model; this adds the video model in series] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [synth+mic audio engine + feature/prompt extractor + 2-model FAL chain + three.js GPU compositor + synthesized fallback] ¬∑ #3 named ref ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH ‚ÄĒ honestly 4-of-5). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-data‚Üístructure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] ¬∑ picked=[mic/synth (non-touch), three.js + AI-image + AI-VIDEO output (all GPU/0√ó), audio‚Üíimage‚Üívideo 2-model chain (pitch held to ONE drone), cinematic/Anadol]`. **Mode = DEEP** (1 massively-bigger concept, 3 second-model approaches; AGENT.md maps "jury calls for massively bigger" ‚Üí DEEP). **2 sibling chains banked (IDEAS ¬ß541):** **`916-latent-loom`** ‚≠ź (flux ‚Üí **flux-redux** img2img re-dream loop, GPU crossfade morph, cost-bounded ‚Č§6 steps; **resurrect-first** on a desktop morph cycle) + **`917-the-telling`** (**any-llm** writes a prose-poem of the music ‚Üí flux paints it, kinetic typography, **text-not-voice**). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 36.3s`**, lint+type phase ran with **zero warnings/refs in the 915 folder**; ## (Cycle 540 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/911-kids-shadow-dance](/dream/911-kids-shadow-dance)** ‚ÄĒ shadow dance: a 4-year-old DANCES and their whole body becomes a cloud of light + rhythm ūüēļ‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 540 (kids 4+ / **camera whole-body pose** / **three.js GPU particles**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad/phone / immediate cause-and-effect / no-reading / the *moving body*, not notes ¬∑ **camera POSE INPUT** (front camera ‚Üí **MediaPipe Pose** 33 whole-body landmarks via runtime CDN import, `webpackIgnore`, never bundled; video analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded; **zero pitch detection** ‚ÄĒ per frame we compute the three children's-sonification *movement qualities*: **energy** = mean landmark speed, **impulsivity** = high-passed jerk, **fluidity** = inverse speed-jitter; non-touch, full-body ‚ÄĒ fresh for kids vs 862 *hands* / 869 adult; no-camera ‚Üí synthetic ghost-dancer auto-demo) ¬∑ **three.js `THREE.Points` GPU OUTPUT** (~5,000 additive-blended particles, custom `ShaderMaterial`, indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üíwarm-gold; energy‚Üídensity/brightness, impulsivity‚Üíoutward burst shockwave, fluidity‚Üíswirl-vs-scatter; the JURY-scarce GPU surface, **no Canvas2D/SVG**) ¬∑ **movement energy/fluidity/impulsivity ‚Üí granular-percussion TECHNIQUE** ¬∑ **luminous shadow-dance VIBE**. **What if a kid makes music by DANCING ‚ÄĒ their whole body's movement (not fingers, not voice, not any pitch) scatters a glowing cloud of light and grants rhythm + texture?** Energy ‚Üí warmth/brightness of an always-on granular texture bed; a sudden move (impulsivity) fires a soft *capped* percussive bloom + a particle burst ‚ÄĒ **the kid's sharp moves ARE the beat**; smooth motion (fluidity) brightens a shimmer pad and streams the particles. **Pitch is held deliberately dumb** ‚ÄĒ one warm always-on drone (C2+G2+C3) + a few fixed safe accent tones; no scale, no chord, no melody the kid "plays." Kids-safe master chain `masterGain(0.26) ‚Üí lowpass(‚Č§6.5 kHz) ‚Üí Compressor(‚ąí10, 20:1)`, attacks ‚Č•10ms, full teardown (rAF, mic tracks, `pose.close()`, three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss`, `audioCtx.close()`). **The clean answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3** ("make music from rhythm, timbre, texture or space ‚ÄĒ NOT pitch theory") **and #1** ("swing back to GPU"): the lab's kids canon is almost all pitch toys; this makes music from the *quality of a child's free movement*. **Named refs:** **Myron Krueger *Videoplace*** (full-body interactive, 1970s) ¬∑ the children's-movement-sonification model (energy/fluidity/impulsivity granular mapping, **Frontiers in Neuroscience, PMC5104747**) ¬∑ **"The Moving Mandala"** (2025 ‚ÄĒ rhythmic music + embodied movement ‚Üí child synchrony). README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß540 (2026-06-24)** ‚ÄĒ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **6 cycles running** (535‚Äď540). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [pose tracking + energy/fluidity/impulsivity extractor + granular/percussion synth w/ dumb-drone + three.js GPU field + ghost auto-demo] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH; #1 honestly NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ pose/granular/particle all have lab priors). `diversity: banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-data‚Üístructure-w/-consonant-crutch (last-10-kids + JURY 2026-06-24)] ¬∑ picked=[camera whole-body pose (non-touch), three.js GPU particles (scarce), motion‚Üígranular-percussion (pitch held to ONE drone), luminous shadow-dance]`. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers on one "body-not-pitch" theme; deliberate alternation after 539 DEEP). **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬ß540):** **`913-kids-spin-galaxy`** ‚≠ź (device **gyroscope** spin ¬∑ hand-written **WebGPU `@compute`** 40k-particle galaxy + WebGL2 fallback ¬∑ ring-crossing percussion ‚ÄĒ the purest JURY-#1 GPU answer; **resurrect-first** on a desktop/Tauri window) + **`912-kids-wind-garden`** (mic-**breath/blow** via spectral flatness ¬∑ **three.js** grass field ¬∑ wind force + dandelion-seed chimes ‚ÄĒ calm dawn-meadow). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 56s`**, lint phase ran with **zero warnings in the 911 folder**; the always-on drone + ~1s ghost-dancer auto-demo guarantee a sounding/blooming glance regardless).
