## (Cycle 539 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 3 GPU-render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/909-resonant-field-volume](/dream/909-resonant-field-volume)** ‚ÄĒ Resonant Field: sing, and your voice blooms as a volume of light + grains placed in space by its **timbre, not its pitch** ‚ėĀÔłŹūüĒä. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 539 (adult / **mic** / **three.js raymarched volume**). **For**: anyone with a voice or instrument / immersive listening / headphones ¬∑ **mic INPUT** (non-touch ‚ÄĒ sing/hum/speak/play; **zero pitch detection** ‚ÄĒ a pitch-free extractor reads only RMS, spectral centroid [brightness], flatness [noisy‚ÜĒtonal], flux [change], and an 8-band silhouette; mic‚ÜíAnalyser + a rolling ~3.5s capture ring, **never routed to destination** [anti-feedback]; no-mic ‚Üí synthetic auto-demo) ¬∑ **three.js fullscreen raymarched volumetric OUTPUT** (a fragment-shader nebula ‚ÄĒ 24-step domain-warped FBM whose density/turbulence/hue/altitude ARE the timbre, with a `uAge` **memory** accumulator that warms while you sound and slowly cools in silence so it evolves like a long-form cloud, not a VU meter; runs on **any WebGL** ‚Üí actually GPU-renders on a phone; Canvas2D glow fallback on no-WebGL) ¬∑ **timbre-features ‚Üí HRTF spatial-granular re-synth TECHNIQUE** ¬∑ **immersive / Anadol-volumetric VIBE**. **What if you composed by TIMBRE √ó SPACE instead of pitch ‚ÄĒ your own captured sound scattered back as a 3D cloud of grains, each placed around your head by how bright / noisy / loud it is, over a single dumb drone so harmony is held deliberately flat?** Each Hann-windowed grain reads from the rolling capture buffer and is panned through its **own HRTF `PannerNode`** at a 3D position dictated by timbre (brightness‚Üíelevation/forward, flatness‚Üíazimuth spread, RMS‚Üígrain density); grains keep the source's own pitch ‚ÄĒ we never repitch by any musical rule. A fixed 55 Hz + 82.5 Hz drone pins harmony flat so the piece **lives entirely in texture and placement**. Master chain `gain(‚Č§0.28) ‚Üí lowpass(7 kHz) ‚Üí compressor ‚Üí destination`; idle nebula breathes from load; ~1s auto-demo (synthetic evolving-noise + formant sweep through the identical pipeline) blooms + sounds on mic-deny or 2.5s silence; full teardown (rAF, oscillators, mic tracks, three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss`). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3** ("make music from rhythm, **timbre, texture or space** ‚ÄĒ NOT pitch theory") **and #1** ("swing back to GPU, full stop") in one piece. **The inversion of a brand-new instrument:** Delta Sound Labs **XStream** (NAMM, 25 Jan 2026) is a *spatial live granular* synth where the **producer hand-dials** grain placement; this makes placement **automatic & timbre-driven** ‚ÄĒ played by sounding, not by tweaking. **Named refs:** Delta Sound Labs XStream (2026) ¬∑ **Curtis Roads *Microsound*** (2001) ¬∑ **Trevor Wishart *Audible Design*** (timbral morphology) ¬∑ Refik Anadol (volumetric light). README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß539 (2026-06-24)** ‚ÄĒ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **5 cycles running** (535/536/537/538/539). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [pitch-free timbre extractor + HRTF spatial-granular engine + dumb drone + raymarched GPU volume w/ memory + auto-demo] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH; #1 honestly NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ granular/spatial/WebGPU-compute all have lab priors). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-data‚Üístructure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] ¬∑ picked=[mic (non-touch), three.js raymarched-volume (GPU, scarce), timbre‚Üíspatial-granular (pitch held to ONE drone), immersive/Anadol]`. **Mode = DEEP** (1 concept, 3 GPU-render approaches; breaks a 3-WIDE adult streak). **2 sibling approaches banked (IDEAS ¬ß539):** **`908-resonant-field-compute`** ‚≠ź (the frontier **WebGPU WGSL compute** version ‚ÄĒ 120k curl-noise particles; **resurrect-first** on a desktop/Tauri window once WebGPU phone support clears + ScriptProcessor‚ÜíAudioWorklet) + **`910-resonant-field-flow`** (**three.js GPGPU** ping-pong float-RT flow field ‚ÄĒ ~147k points "river of light"). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 52s`**, lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 909 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio/WebGL in container ‚ÄĒ whether the HRTF grain cloud reads as "my own sound around me," whether the raymarched volume reads as "my timbre's shape," and per-grain PannerNode CPU cost on a low-end phone are unverified; the breathing idle nebula + ~1s auto-demo guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/909-resonant-field-volume/README.md`

## (Cycle 538 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/907-kids-stomp-garden](/dream/907-kids-stomp-garden)** ‚ÄĒ stomp garden: clap a beat, grow a garden, it loops back ūüĆĪūüĎŹūüĆł. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 538 (kids 4+ / **mic-rhythm** / **three.js**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad / immediate cause-and-effect / no-reading / the *beat*, not notes ¬∑ **mic-ONSET INPUT** (claps / stomps / table-taps / "buh-tss" ‚ÄĒ a spectral-flux onset detector with adaptive threshold + 120ms refractory; **pitch is NEVER estimated**, the centroid is read only to pick a thump-vs-shaker *timbre*; mic used live, never recorded/stored; no-mic ‚Üí tap-the-garden fallback + auto-demo groove) ¬∑ **three.js (WebGL GPU) OUTPUT** (a procedural glowing garden ‚ÄĒ elastic-ease plants spring up per beat, always-on breathing, loop-pulse sway/glow, warm fog & lighting; deliberately the JURY-scarce GPU surface, **no Canvas2D/SVG**) ¬∑ **onset-detect + quantize-and-loop-back + procedural-growth TECHNIQUE** ¬∑ **bright/warm/garden VIBE**. **What if a 4-year-old could CLAP, STOMP, or beat-box and their RHYTHM (no note, no tune) grew a glowing garden that then loops their beat back so they can dance along and lock into it?** Each detected beat grows a plant + plays a soft capped percussion hit (<50ms); after ~3 beats a rolling-window looper infers tempo (median IOI), lightly quantizes, and **replays the rhythm continuously** while the garden pulses in time ‚ÄĒ handing the child the steady external pulse the developmental literature says scaffolds the still-forming beat-synchronization skill. Steady clap ‚Üí orderly rows; wild rhythm ‚Üí a swaying jungle; the child keeps layering beats. Always alive (ambient pad + heartbeat + breathing from load; auto-demo groove with no mic). Kids-safe master chain `busIn ‚Üí Gain(0.26) ‚Üí lowpass(6 kHz) ‚Üí Compressor(‚ąí12, 12:1) ‚Üí destination`, 6-voice cap (oldest-steal) so even a loud clap can't blast, full teardown. **The clean answer to JURY 2026-06-24** ("make music from rhythm, timbre, texture or space ‚ÄĒ NOT pitch theory"): the lab's kids canon is almost all pitch toys; this is its first true **rhythm-loop** piece. **Named refs:** the TR-808 / live loop-station "record your rhythm, it loops back" model ¬∑ spectral-flux onset detection (Bello et al., IEEE TASLP 2005). README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß538 (2026-06-24)** ‚ÄĒ the developmental beat-synchronization anchor (*"Development of full-body rhythmic synchronization in middle childhood,"* Nature Sci Rep) ‚ÄĒ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **4 cycles running** (535/536/537/538). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [onset detect + tempo-infer/loop + procedural garden + percussion synth] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-data‚Üístructure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] ¬∑ picked=[mic-onset/rhythm, three.js (GPU, scarce), onset-loop-back, kids-garden]`. **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬ß538):** **`905-kids-water-bowl`** ‚≠ź (mic-hum ¬∑ **three.js** ¬∑ *Faraday* standing-wave water surface ‚ÄĒ the pattern you see is the sound you sing; **resurrect-first**, needs no motion sensor) + **`906-kids-tilt-fireflies`** (device-tilt ¬∑ **three.js** GPU particles ¬∑ gravity-herded firefly swarm whose density & flower-bumps drive a soft pulsing rhythm; ref Reynolds *Boids* 1986). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 85s`**, lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 907 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container ‚ÄĒ whether the looped beat reads as lock-onto-able, onset sensitivity across real claps vs room noise, and small-iPad garden legibility are unverified; ambient bed + auto-demo groove guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/907-kids-stomp-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 537 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/902-harmonic-mirror](/dream/902-harmonic-mirror)** ‚ÄĒ harmonic mirror: your chord, completed in just intonation ūüéĻ‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 537 (adult / harmony / **Canvas2D**). **For**: pianists & composers (Karel's exact audience) / harmony-curious / playable with zero hardware ¬∑ **MIDI / on-screen-piano / computer-keyboard INPUT** (Web MIDI `requestMIDIAccess` + a clickable white/black one-octave piano + `a w s e d f t g y h u j k` map ‚ÄĒ all feed the identical pipeline; no-MIDI ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + the on-screen paths still play) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (a circle-of-fifths constellation ‚ÄĒ bright white held nodes, soft violet **mirror** halos joined to the root by luminous completion lines carrying ratio labels `5/4`/`3/2`, the inferred chord name at center, 60fps amplitude pulse; deliberately the JURY-scarce Canvas2D surface, **no WebGL2/three.js/WebGPU/SVG**) ¬∑ **just-intonation chord-completion TECHNIQUE** (deterministic Riemann-template inference + JI retuning ‚ÄĒ fresh for the lab) ¬∑ **harmonic / luminous-clinical VIBE** (violet on near-black). **What if, as you play, your instrument completed the chord you imply ‚ÄĒ adding the 1‚Äď2 notes you DIDN'T play, tuned in pure JUST INTONATION to your root ‚ÄĒ so the harmony locks beat-lessly under your hands?** You play the keys you press in **equal temperament** (warm detuned saws); a **mirror** reduces your held notes to a pitch-class set, matches it against a small template bank (dom7 `0 4 7 10` ¬∑ maj `0 4 7` ¬∑ min `0 3 7` ¬∑ sus4 `0 5 7` ¬∑ bare-fifth `0 7`; anything else ‚Üí a **cluster** heuristic completed with a safe fifth), and synthesizes the **missing** template tones in **just intonation** (small-integer ratios 9/8 ¬∑ 6/5 ¬∑ 5/4 ¬∑ 4/3 ¬∑ 3/2 ¬∑ 5/3 ¬∑ 9/5 ¬∑ 15/8 over the inferred root's fundamental) so their partials align and the beating cancels ‚ÄĒ the just `5/4` third (~386¬Ę) locks where the ET third (400¬Ę) is restless. When the root shifts (C maj ‚Üí A min) the persisting mirror voices **glide-retune** over ~180 ms rather than re-attack. **The deterministic, zero-latency cousin of a predictive AI accompanist** (RESEARCH ¬ß537 / **arXiv 2604.07612**, Apr 2026): it predicts nothing ‚ÄĒ it *finishes the chord you are already playing*. 2s-idle ‚Üí a gentle **I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV** auto-demo arpeggiates through the identical path so a silent 06:30 glance is sounding + moving; first real note stops it. **Named refs:** Harry Partch & Ben Johnston (JI / small-integer ratios) ¬∑ Hugo Riemann (functional-harmony templates) ¬∑ arXiv 2604.07612. README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß537 (2026-06-24)** as the build hook ‚ÄĒ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) JURY flagged **0-for-15 across five windows**, now **3 cycles running** (535/536/537). **Clears 3/5 of the ambition floor** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [MIDI/kbd input + chord-template inference + JI synth w/ glide-retune + Canvas2D constellation] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH citation). `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2, data‚Üíroughness/detune, no-wrong-notes-safe-scale, 3rd-renderer-pass-on-847/872] ¬∑ picked=[MIDI/keyboard, Canvas2D (scarce 2√ó), just-intonation-chord-completion, harmonic/clinical]`. **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬ß537):** **`903-living-stave`** ‚≠ź (mic ¬∑ **SVG** ¬∑ live NSDF pitch+onset detection inks a self-drawing engraved treble staff ‚ÄĒ owns the 0√ó SVG lane, **resurrect-first**) + **`904-tide-organ`** (live **NOAA** tide data ¬∑ **three.js** ¬∑ the sea decides which organ pipes enter/leave & the arc's form ‚ÄĒ data‚ÜíSTRUCTURE, ref the Zadar Sea Organ). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 102s`**, lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 902 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container ‚ÄĒ whether the JI completion *audibly* locks vs the ET played notes, the glide-retune feel, and constellation legibility are unverified; the zero-hardware on-screen piano + auto-demo guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/902-harmonic-mirror/README.md`

## (Cycle 536 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/899-kids-moire-beats](/dream/899-kids-moire-beats)** ‚ÄĒ moir√© beats: roughness & calm „ÄįÔłŹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 536 (kids 4+ / **touch** / **Canvas2D**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad / immediate-cause-and-effect / no-reading ¬∑ **touch-drag INPUT** (one finger, Pointer Events ‚Üí touch + mouse; ~280px swing covers the full range, huge & forgiving) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (two op-art grids ‚ÄĒ fixed concentric **rings** under twistable **stripes**, composited `multiply` so they physically interfere into a rolling moir√© band; deliberately the JURY-reopened scarce Canvas2D surface, **no WebGL2/three.js/SVG**) ¬∑ **moir√©-interference TECHNIQUE** (grep-verified **0√ó in the lab**) ¬∑ **op-art VIBE** (Bridget Riley cream/ink, fresh for the lab). **What if a 4-year-old could SEE and HEAR a sound's roughness at the same time ‚ÄĒ by sliding two striped patterns over each other so the moir√© band they make IS the acoustic beating they hear?** A warm consonant **fifth drone (A2 + E3)** is always playing, each pitch built from two sine oscillators. The child's twist doesn't change the *pitch* ‚ÄĒ it changes the **detune** of the second oscillator (0‚Üí~9 Hz). Lined up: the moir√© band slows to almost nothing AND the tones converge to **one clear calm tone** (a green ring shrinks to a dot); twisted apart: the band shimmers fast AND the sound throbs **WAH-WAH-WAH** (amber ring pulses). The coupling is literal ‚ÄĒ the visual band's roll speed and the audio beat rate are driven by the **same** `twist` value, so *moir√© beat = acoustic beat*. **The clean template-break:** the child plays **roughness‚ÜĒcalm over a fixed consonant fifth ‚ÄĒ NOT a scale**, sidestepping the no-wrong-notes pentatonic crutch entirely; nothing can ever be "wrong." Kids-safe (master ‚Č§ 0.24, 6 kHz lowpass, soft fades, never silent), 2s-idle auto-demo drifts the layer so a hands-off 06:30 glance is moving + sounding within ~1s, `text-rose-600` notice + live visuals if Web Audio is unavailable, full teardown. **Named refs:** Gerald Oster *Moir√© Patterns* (Scientific American, 1963) ¬∑ Bridget Riley op-art ¬∑ acoustic beating. README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß536 (2026-06-24)** as the build hook ‚ÄĒ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) JURY flagged **0-for-15**, now 3 cycles running. **Clears 3/5 of the ambition floor** (#1 never-used technique [moir√© 0√ó] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH citation). `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2, three.js, data‚Üíroughness, no-wrong-notes-safe-scale] ¬∑ picked=[touch, Canvas2D (scarce 2√ó), moir√©-interference (0√ó), op-art]`. **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬ß536):** **`900-kids-rope-singer`** ‚≠ź (touch ¬∑ **SVG** ¬∑ a *catenary* hanging-rope you hang beads on to sag‚Üílower the pitch, pluck for a damped twang ‚ÄĒ owns the 0√ó SVG lane, resurrect-first) + **`901-kids-water-bowl`** (mic-hum ¬∑ **three.js** ¬∑ *Faraday* standing-wave patterns bloom on a vibrated water surface in time with the note you sing). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 899 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container ‚ÄĒ whether the band reads as "the same wobble I hear," small-iPad op-art readability, and the twist feel are unverified; always-on drone + auto-demo guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/899-kids-moire-beats/README.md`

## (Cycle 535 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/898-tremor-score](/dream/898-tremor-score)** ‚ÄĒ tremor score ūüĆćūüéľ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 535 (adult / data-sonification / **SVG**). **For**: adults / contemplative / data-curious ¬∑ **live external-data INPUT** (USGS `all_day.geojson` earthquake feed, fetched **client-side**, public + CORS, no key, no API route ‚Üí no guard needed; offline ‚Üí synthetic ~30-quake fallback + `text-rose-300` notice) ¬∑ **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (an Ikeda-restrained data-score ‚ÄĒ time axis, per-quake register marks/circles, a sweeping violet playhead, a lon/lat epicentre dot-field; **no canvas, no WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU, no three.js** ‚ÄĒ deliberately the scarce SVG surface, answering JURY 2026-06-23 #1 "raw-WebGL2 is the new wall") ¬∑ **data-driven event-scheduling TECHNIQUE** ¬∑ **geologic / clinical / Ikeda VIBE**. **What if a *live* planetary earthquake feed *composed* a piece ‚ÄĒ not by fouling the harmony, but by deciding who plays, when, and in what register?** The last 24 h of global seismicity is compressed onto ~90 s: each quake becomes a **new voice entering** ‚ÄĒ **magnitude**‚Üíregister/loudness/duration (big = low/long/loud; small = brief high glint), **depth**‚Üítimbre brightness (shallow = bright/more partials, deep = dark via lowpass), **longitude**‚Üístereo pan, **latitude**‚Üíscale-degree, **temporal clustering**‚Üídensity (an aftershock swarm = a dense overlapping flurry; a quiet stretch = a sparse solo). All pitches snap to a fixed consonant **Bb pentatonic/Dorian** mode across 3 octave bands, so **the data decides FORM while the mode keeps it in tune ‚ÄĒ data ‚Üí structure, NEVER ‚Üí roughness/detune.** This is the **direct answer to JURY #3** ("the next data piece must sonify STRUCTURE; `842`‚Üí`864` already cloned the detune move ‚ÄĒ retire it"). Per-voice chain: `OscillatorNode(triangle + sine partials) ‚Üí Gain envelope ‚Üí lowpass Biquad ‚Üí StereoPanner ‚Üí master ‚Üí ConvolverNode(algorithmic IR) + dry ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor limiter ‚Üí destination` (shared `AudioContext` on the gesture; reverb IR synthesized in code; limiter keeps swarms un-clipped). README cites **RESEARCH ¬ß535 / OpenSeisML, arXiv 2605.20539 (May 2026)** (seismic catalogues as *generative compositional input*) + Ryoji Ikeda *data.path*/*datamatics* + Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology* ‚ÄĒ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) that JURY flagged **0-for-15 across five windows**. 2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬ß535): **`899-harmonic-mirror`** ‚≠ź (the lab's FIRST Web MIDI ‚ÄĒ a JI chord-completion partner) + **`900-flow-grains`** (the lab's FIRST optical-flow input ‚ÄĒ camera motion ‚Üí three.js particles + granular synth). **Clears 3/5 of the ambition floor** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems ¬∑ #3 named reference ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH citation). `diversity: banned=[touch, raw-WebGL2] ¬∑ picked=[external-data, SVG, data-driven-event-scheduling, geologic/Ikeda]`. **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully` + lint/type passed); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container ‚ÄĒ the sound of a real USGS day + small-screen SVG crowding unverified; synthetic fallback guarantees a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/898-tremor-score/README.md`

- **[/dream/896-tonnetz-loom](/dream/896-tonnetz-loom)** ‚ÄĒ tonnetz loom ūüéĶūü™°. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 533 (adult / geometric-music-theory / **SVG**). **For**: adults / music-theory-curious / contemplative-precise ¬∑ **touch/pointer INPUT** (tap a triangle to strike its triad; P/L/R buttons to move) ¬∑ **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (a 7√ó5 Tonnetz patch ‚ÄĒ 48 tappable triangles, note-labeled nodes, glowing path ribbon ‚ÄĒ built with `createElementNS`/React SVG; **no canvas, no webgl, no three.js, no GPU at all** ‚ÄĒ the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-23 #1 "raw-WebGL2 is the new wall, go deliberately non-WebGL2"; SVG is a scarce surface) ¬∑ **neo-Riemannian Tonnetz + just-intonation TECHNIQUE** (NEW to the lab) ¬∑ **geometric / music-theoretical VIBE**. **What if you could WALK the geometry of harmony?** The Euler/Riemann triangular pitch lattice rendered as crisp luminous SVG: every node a pitch class, every triangle a consonant triad, the three axes the perfect fifth (+7), major third (+4), minor third (+3). **Tap a triangle ‚Üí hear that triad in just intonation** (major 4:5:6, minor 10:12:15; two detuned triangle oscillators per voice ‚Üí envelope ‚Üí procedural-IR ConvolverNode reverb + limiter). **P / L / R** apply the three classic neo-Riemannian transforms ‚ÄĒ each glides exactly ONE voice while the two common tones hold, so you both *hear* and *see* smooth voice-leading as the highlight hops to the adjacent triangle. Your path weaves a glowing ribbon over the lattice and **exports as a standalone `.svg`** (scarce vector output). A **drift auto-walk** runs a gentle hands-free P-L-R-L‚Ä¶ loop so it sounds + moves on load with zero input (a guaranteed sounding 06:30 phone glance); touch-only, no mic/camera/network ‚Üí bulletproof unattended. README cites the **freshest anchor of the cycle ‚ÄĒ RESEARCH ¬ß533 / arXiv 2606.11246** ("Nineteen to the Dozen: Embedding the Neo-Riemannian Tonnetz‚Ä¶", **June 2026**, last-30-days) plus Euler / Cohn / Lewin ‚ÄĒ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) that JURY flagged 0-for-15. 2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬ß533): an audio-only "room-raga" where the room's ambient pitch tunes a JI drone ‚≠ź + a Canvas2D self-similarity-matrix "recurrence room" of Karel's piano. **Clears 4/5 of the ambition floor** (#1 never-used technique ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems ¬∑ #3 named reference ¬∑ #5 dated RESEARCH citation).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/896-tonnetz-loom/README.md`

## Newest (Cycle 532 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/891-kids-sing-a-path](/dream/891-kids-sing-a-path)** ‚ÄĒ sing a path ūüé§ūü™į. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 532 (kids / storybook-night / **SVG**). **For**: kids (iPad/phone, 4yo-usable, no reading) ¬∑ **mic/voice INPUT** (`getUserMedia` ‚Üí `AnalyserNode`; real-time fundamental-frequency estimate via a normalized-square-difference / YIN-lite `trackPitch` + RMS loudness gate, so quiet = no draw) ¬∑ **animated SVG OUTPUT** (a scrolling glowing `<path>` extended point-by-point + a firefly riding the tip + trailing sparkles + gradient night sky/moon/stars, all driven by rAF mutating SVG attributes ‚ÄĒ **no canvas, no webgl, no three.js**; SVG is the freshest visual surface, 1√ó/10, dodging the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 HARD-ban AND Canvas2D's near-cap 3√ó) ¬∑ **real-time pitch-contour TECHNIQUE** (NEW to the lab) ¬∑ **warm storybook-night VIBE**. **What if a 4-year-old could SING and watch their own voice draw a glowing path a firefly flies along ‚ÄĒ and it always sounds beautiful because we follow the SHAPE of their voice, not whether they hit a "correct" note?** The key move (RESEARCH ¬ß532 / **PESTO**, arXiv 2508.01488 ‚ÄĒ *transposition-equivariance*): the robust, meaningful quantity in a sung signal is the **contour** (relative up/down/hold motion), not absolute Hz. A `ContourEngine` maps the pitch stream to relative motion against a slow-drifting baseline (the child can wander up forever and stay on screen) ‚Üí path height; a **`HarmonyVoice`** sings a soft companion tone back, **quantized to C-major pentatonic** with portamento, over a gentle pad drone + sparkle twinkles, through a master limiter (kids-safe, never harsh). The result is a **no-wrong-notes piece that is NOT the banned snap-to-safe-scale template** ‚ÄĒ the visual follows the child's raw gesture (never "wrong"); only the audio is quantized. Hands-free auto-demo (~0.6s) drives the *same* pipeline so the page sings + animates with zero hardware; a giant ūüé§ Sing! button requests the mic; `text-rose-300` notices for demo/denied. README cites the dated **RESEARCH ¬ß532 / PESTO**. 2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬ß532): a tilt+shake audio-led "listening jar" (the lab's first audio-only-led kids piece) ‚≠ź + a three.js 3D glass-harmonica "glass rain" tank.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/891-kids-sing-a-path/README.md`

## Newest (Cycle 531 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/888-living-reverie](/dream/888-living-reverie)** ‚ÄĒ living reverie ūüĆĆ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 531 (adult / cinematic / long-form / **three.js**). **For**: adults / deep listening / live-ambient ¬∑ **audio-file INPUT** (Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano streamed from the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519‚Ä¶` route, played quietly under the generative voices + chroma-folded to re-seed the melody; ~350ms non-zero analyser ‚Üí **emerald "playing Karel's piano"** else **amber "generative piano ‚ÄĒ live recording unavailable"**; zero-network generative fallback starts in ~1.5s) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (a single high-detail displaced membrane ‚ÄĒ vertex-shader FBM noise on an icosphere, additive glow shell + fog, drag-orbit; **non-particle on purpose**, dodging the `859-paths-compute-bloom` particle field; fresh three.js surface 2√ó/10 vs Canvas2D's near-cap 3√ó, and dodges the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 ban) ¬∑ **long-form generative state-machine-with-memory TECHNIQUE** (NEW to the rolling window) ¬∑ **cinematic / deep / ambient VIBE**. **What if Karel's own recorded piano became a 10-minute LIVING reverie ‚ÄĒ genuinely different at minute 8 than minute 1 ‚ÄĒ a generative engine with MEMORY that re-voices and re-orchestrates his motifs across an irreversible arc, never looping?** A **two-tier memory engine** (RESEARCH ¬ß531 / *Fusing Memory and Attention*, arXiv 2603.21282): a **LOCAL** bank of recent scale-degree pitch-cells (transposed/varied/re-quantized so each minute sounds like the last ‚ÄĒ continuity), coupled to a **GLOBAL** monotonic irreversible `age` (0‚Üí1 over 600s) + a four-section state machine (**sparse ‚Üí blooming ‚Üí dense ‚Üí dissolving**) that owns density, note-rate, register spread, brightness and reverb depth, plus a **modal journey** (ionian‚Üílydian‚Üímixolydian‚Üídorian‚Üíaeolian with a creeping tonic, every note quantized). The membrane IS the arc: flat/dark ‚Üí warm rising ridges ‚Üí turbulent folded terrain ‚Üí collapse to deep-violet stillness. FM-piano + detuned-saw pad + granular shimmer ‚Üí runtime-rendered ConvolverNode reverb ‚Üí compressor. README cites the dated **RESEARCH ¬ß531** finding + **Brian Eno** (*Music for Airports*/*Reflection*). A **multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 1 of N) ‚ÄĒ 2 sibling visual approaches banked (IDEAS ¬ß531): a three.js volumetric raymarch twin + a Canvas2D ink-strata twin (the future WebGL-unavailable fallback).

## Newest (Cycle 530 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/886-kids-marble-music](/dream/886-kids-marble-music)** ‚ÄĒ marble music machine ūüéĘ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 530 (kids / playful / **Canvas2D**). **For**: kids (iPad/phone, 4yo-usable, no reading) ¬∑ **tap + tilt INPUT** (tap the top to drop a glowing marble / tap a stuck one to free it; device-orientation `gamma` tilt to steer, with **two big hold-to-tilt buttons** as a no-permission fallback ‚ÄĒ fully playable with zero sensors) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (`getContext("2d")` ‚ÄĒ scarce 2√ó/10 + jury-re-legitimized; **no WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU/three.js**, dodging the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 HARD-ban AND a 4th GPU surface) ¬∑ **material-based modal impact synthesis TECHNIQUE** (fresh mapping; tilt-input is 0√ó/10) ¬∑ **warm playful self-playing-machine VIBE**. **What if a 4-year-old could conduct a self-playing music machine just by tilting ‚ÄĒ rolling glowing marbles through a track of materials where the SOUND of every collision is the object's MATERIAL (wood thuds, glass rings, metal shimmers, drums boom) and how hard it was hit?** Each of ~16 objects has a fixed pentatonic pitch + a material; a real **modal synthesizer** fires that material's bank of decaying sine partials per impact (slightly-stretched harmonics = wood, clean long partials = glass, inharmonic bar ratios 1/2.76/5.40/8.93 = metal, circular-membrane ratios 1/1.59/2.14/2.30 = drum), and **impact normal-speed scales both loudness AND brightness** so a soft graze and a hard slam on the same bell are audibly different. Self-contained 2D physics (circles + capsules, restitution + tangential friction, sub-stepped + clamped), motion trails, per-hit glow pulses, one gentle "sticky mud" stakes element (a trapped marble waits until the child taps it free). The machine never repeats ‚ÄĒ a generative instrument in the spirit of **Wintergatan's Marble Machine** + **Jem Finer's self-generative marble machine**. README cites the dated **RESEARCH ¬ß530** finding. 2 sibling approaches banked (IDEAS ¬ß530): a three.js 3D-gravity twin + a Canvas2D build-your-own machine.

## Newest (Cycle 529 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/883-negative-space](/dream/883-negative-space)** ‚ÄĒ negative space ūü§ę. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 529 (adult / conceptual-critical / **Canvas2D**). **For**: adults ¬∑ **microphone INPUT** (analysis-only ‚ÄĒ connected to an AnalyserNode and nothing else; never routed to output, never recorded, never sent anywhere; **no API route**) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (`getContext("2d")` ‚ÄĒ scarce 1√ó/10 + jury-re-legitimized; **no WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU/three.js**, dodging the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 HARD-ban AND a 4th WebGPU) ¬∑ **silence-reward / negative-space generative bloom TECHNIQUE** ¬∑ **Cage-conceptual, meditative, critical VIBE**. **What if you played an instrument by being SILENT ‚ÄĒ a piece that blooms only in the GAPS of your sound, and ducks to nothing the instant you make noise, so you compose it by what you withhold?** The lab's **conceptual/critical** lane (a menu category the jury notes hadn't appeared in ~15 cycles) and the directest answer to Karel's "massively bigger concepts / surprise" ask: a true **inversion** ‚ÄĒ every mic instrument ever made maps loud‚Üíactive; this one maps **silence‚Üímusic**, so the performer's instrument is *restraint*. Short-term RMS feeds a **stillness timer**: while you stay below threshold the timer grows and a warm additive chord-bloom rises one consonant voice at a time (root‚Üífifth‚Üíoctave‚Üíthird‚Üítwelfth‚Üíhigh color) toward a full chord; any sound above threshold rushes a fast **duck** (reverse-sidechain) and **freezes** the bloom where it is ‚ÄĒ it **resumes building from there** when quiet returns (no reset). Signal chain voices ‚Üí master ‚Üí `ConvolverNode` synthesized-impulse reverb ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination; an always-on near-silent root means it's never fully dead. **Visual:** Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ silence blooms a luminous field outward from center (monochrome‚Üíviolet as the chord fills + faint concentric "voice" rings per lit partial); sound floods dark grain/static inward from the edges + a closing vignette and the light recedes; sized via `ResizeObserver`, animated by a single rAF that runs energy‚Üístillness‚Üíaudio‚Üídraw in lockstep. iOS-safe: AudioContext + `getUserMedia` created inside the Begin tap. **Degrades fully:** mic denied/absent ‚Üí a scripted **synthetic** energy envelope (silence‚Üíburst‚Üísilence) runs through the **identical** `stepStillness` pipeline so the inversion proves itself hands-free within ~1.5‚Äď4s + a `text-rose-300` "no mic ‚ÄĒ showing a demo" notice; a **"Make a sound"** button lets a no-mic reviewer trigger the duck/erode manually; live mic yields the demo the moment real audio arrives. Full teardown (cancel rAF, `track.stop()` the mic, stop/disconnect oscillators, `audioCtx.close()`, clear timers, remove listeners). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2‚Äď3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [mic RMS/stillness gate + silence-reward generative harmony engine + Canvas2D negative-space renderer + synthetic auto-demo = ‚Č•4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**John Cage *4‚Ä≤33‚Ä≥*** ‚ÄĒ silence as the content ¬∑ **Pauline Oliveros "Deep Listening"**] ¬∑ **#5 ‚ÄĒ README cites the dated RESEARCH ¬ß529 (2026-06-23)** cross-modal sound‚ÜĒperception thread, the jury's 0-for-15 criterion finally landed for the second straight cycle). **Source:** ¬ß529 dive (cross-modal "It Sounds Squishy" DIS 2025 + Jan√°ńćek/Cage/Eno named anchors) ‚Üí AGENT.md path (a) implement a dive hook + Karel's "surprise / bigger concepts" ‚Üí adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-23 #1 + audit, last 10 = 859,862,864,866,868,869,872,874,877,880)=[OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 (HARD jury ‚ÄĒ new 6-of-15 monoculture) ¬∑ a 4th WebGPU (would hit 4√ó) ¬∑ the "external-feed‚Üíroughness/detune" data mapping (jury #3) ¬∑ kids vibe (5√ó, n/a this adult cycle)]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 883)=[microphone INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT (scarce 1√ó + jury-re-legit, dodges both GPU walls AND the back-to-back SVG repeat 880 would cause) ¬∑ silence-reward/negative-space-inversion TECH (lab-novel) ¬∑ Cage-conceptual VIBE (the cold conceptual/critical menu lane)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every active ban. **WIDE forks (banked, IDEAS ¬ß529):** **`882-prosody-score`** ‚≠ź (type a sentence ‚Üí a real functional-harmony phrase notated live in **inline SVG**: punctuation drives V‚ÜíI cadences, keystroke timing‚Üírhythm, word length‚Üícontour; keyboard input ‚Čą0√ó + SVG = freshest surface/coldest input; **de-selected only because 880 was also SVG** ‚ÄĒ back-to-back surface repeat ‚ÄĒ NOT quality; Jan√°ńćek *n√°pńõvky mluvy* inverted) + **`884-living-reverie`** ‚≠ź‚≠ź (**TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST**: Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano ‚Üí a 10-min **three.js** long-form generative reverie with a memory bank + four-section state machine + irreversible `age`/modal journey so minute 8 ‚Č† minute 1; the highest-ambition explorer at 3‚Äď4/5 [#2+#4+#3+#5] and executes TWO standing directives ‚ÄĒ the thin long-form-generative lane + "use his actual Paths music"; de-selected on a mild "too-similar" overlap with `859-paths-compute-bloom`'s additive-particle field + GPU/CORS runtime risk, NOT quality ‚Üí **ship it on a dedicated DEEP long-form adult cycle**) ‚ÄĒ both built complete + self-reported clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route), `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬ß529. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 37.8s` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; 883 grep-clean of the build log ‚ÄĒ every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; the one initial TS-lib error [`getFloatTimeDomainData` wants `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>`] fixed in the single allowed attempt by backing the analyser buffer with an explicit `ArrayBuffer`). **Env note:** fresh container `npm ci` aborted on `sharp`'s native libvips download (a `@capacitor/assets` transitive dep, unused by `next build`) ‚Üí installed with `npm ci --ignore-scripts` (CLI flag only; no package.json/lockfile/.npmrc edits). **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra; fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by ear/eye: whether the live-mic RMS threshold reads stillness cleanly on a real device, and whether the bloom‚ÜĒerode contrast lands perceptually; the synthetic auto-demo + "Make a sound" button guarantee a sounding, blooming, eroding glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 528 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/880-kids-rubber-band-band](/dream/880-kids-rubber-band-band)** ‚ÄĒ Rubber-Band Band ūüéłūüĆą. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 528 (kids / freedom-to-be-wrong / **SVG**). **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **drag-pluck + drag-the-tuning-peg INPUT** (pointer/touch; off the touch-only rut by being a *drag-to-pluck + drag-to-retune* gesture) ¬∑ **inline SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (animated `<path>`/`<rect>`/`<circle>` ‚ÄĒ **0√ó in the last 10 ships**, the single freshest surface, the jury's explicit "SVG and audio-only are 0√ó" target; clears the jury #1 WebGL2 HARD-ban ‚ÄĒ NOT canvas, NOT WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU/three.js) ¬∑ **damped-spring SVG string physics + Karplus‚ÄďStrong pluck + a latched detune/retune state machine** technique ¬∑ **warm playful colorful band-stage vibe**. **What if a kid's first instrument were a wall of stretchy glowing rubber-bands you pluck ‚ÄĒ and pulling one TOO FAR leaves it slack and out-of-tune until you earn the fix by turning its tuning peg?** **The third piece that breaks the always-consonant kids template (JURY 2026-06-23 #4** ‚ÄĒ "let the wrong choice *persist and matter* ‚ÄĒ no auto-resolve like 849 ‚ÄĒ the way 868 makes the child earn the calm; build the third one and the template is broken for good"). ~7 horizontal bands across a dark warm stage, each a color + a note in C major-pentatonic; **drag a band sideways and release** ‚Üí it twangs a **Karplus‚ÄďStrong**-style plucked tone (noise burst ‚Üí tuned `DelayNode` feedback comb with in-loop low-pass) and visibly wobbles on an integrated **damped spring** (mid-point displacement, stiffness/damping scale with tension) before settling. Pluck gently ‚Üí a sweet in-tune note. **The stakes:** over-stretch a band and it **latches `detuned`** ‚ÄĒ sags, glow dies, twangs ~2 semitones flat/dull/sub-buzzy, an amber halo pulses on the loose peg ‚ÄĒ and it **STAYS that way** (no timeout, no auto-resolve). To fix it the child **drags the tuning-peg knob back up** until `taut` crosses the threshold and the band snaps true + glows again. The wrong choice is visible, audible, lasting; the child earns the fix ‚ÄĒ mapped onto a real-world intuition (tension sets pitch; you tune a string with a peg). Kids-safe chain `master 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 7.2kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`, always-on soft warm pad (never silent), the out-of-tune note an **unmistakable LARGE contrast** but **never louder/harsher** (quieter decay, loop filter drops ~5.2‚Üí1.4kHz, soft sub-buzz ‚ÄĒ per the developmental finding that a 4yo registers dissonance only with a large contrast). Large hit areas (70px band strokes, 38‚Äď76px peg halos). iOS gesture-gated Start (AudioContext created/resumed inside the tap). **Degrades fully:** no AudioContext ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, the SVG bands still play visually. **Auto-demo:** within ~1‚Äď2s of Start with no input, it plucks a couple of bands sweetly, over-stretches one into the slack/detuned state, then retunes it taut+true ‚ÄĒ a hands-free 06:30 glance SEES and HEARS the full stakes arc; stops on first real touch. Full teardown (cancel RAF, stop/disconnect nodes, `ctx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2‚Äď3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [drag-pluck + drag-retune + damped-spring SVG string sim + Karplus‚ÄďStrong synth + detune state machine = ‚Č•4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Karplus & Strong (1983)** "Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String and Drum Timbres" ¬∑ the **monochord / rubber-band** as a child's first tunable string] ¬∑ touches #5 [README cites the dated RESEARCH ¬ß528 consonance-contrast law]). **Source:** ¬ß528 dive (the consonance-development design law ‚ÄĒ a 4yo registers dissonance only with a LARGE unmistakable contrast ‚Üí tunes the size of "wrong") ‚Üí AGENT.md path (a) implement the dive hook + JURY #4 (break the kids template for good) ‚Üí kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-23 #1 + audit, last 10 = 877,874,872,869,866,864,862,859,856,853)=[OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4√ó/10 (HARD jury ‚ÄĒ the new 6-of-15 monoculture) ¬∑ always-consonant no-wrong-note kids template (jury #4) ¬∑ auto-resolve-the-mistake (849 critique)]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 880)=[drag-pluck + drag-retune INPUT ¬∑ SVG/DOM OUTPUT (0√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ the single freshest surface, the jury's named SVG-is-0√ó target) ¬∑ latched-detune/retune-by-peg TECH (genuine persistent wrong, child earns the fix ‚ÄĒ NOT the banned always-consonant or auto-resolve) ¬∑ warm-playful band-stage vibe]` ‚ÄĒ clears every active ban; lands on the scarcest render surface in the lab. **WIDE forks (banked, IDEAS ¬ß528):** **`879-kids-grumble-garden`** ‚≠ź (tap a dark night-garden to plant C-pentatonic flowers; a clashing tap sprouts a **grumble-weed** that *spreads* via a Canvas2D diffusion growth sim and drones with **no auto-resolve** ‚ÄĒ the child "waters" it with consonant taps to re-bloom it; **another full template-break, de-selected on diversity** ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D was just shipped 877 + the garden/growth vibe is thick in the lab [248/322/799], NOT quality) + **`881-kids-thunder-marbles`** (TILT a glowing 3D **three.js** bowl to roll marbles that ring bells; a hard collision cracks a persistent **storm-marble** the child calms by rolling it slow into the center cradle ‚ÄĒ **love-aligned 169-kids-marble-run‚Ě§ÔłŹ + 83-kids-tilt-rain‚Ě§ÔłŹ**, de-selected on three.js 2√ó vs SVG 0√ó + WebGL/DeviceOrientation-permission failure surface for an unattended glance, NOT quality) ‚ÄĒ both built complete + self-reported tsc/eslint clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route), `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬ß528. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; `npx eslint src/app/dream/880-kids-rubber-band-band/` ‚Üí 0; 880 grep-clean of the build log ‚ÄĒ every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the live SVG pluck-wobble feel, whether the out-of-tune contrast reads as "wrong" to a real 4yo, and the retune-the-peg gesture's discoverability; the always-on pad + the full pluck‚Üídetune‚Üíretune auto-demo guarantee a sounding, animating, story-telling glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 527 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 renderer approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/877-biosphere-score](/dream/877-biosphere-score)** ‚ÄĒ *"Biosphere Score": every bird, mammal, insect and fungus just observed on Earth becomes an orchestra ‚ÄĒ the live **GBIF** biodiversity feed decides which taxonomic **section** plays when. Each observation brings its section's voice in; pitch is **always** a scale-degree quantized to that section's register band against a slowly-modulating modal scale, so it stays harmonic by construction ‚ÄĒ the data shapes the **ensemble and the form, never the detuned pitch of a note.*** A deliberately **structural** sonification (the jury's standing #3 ask: stop mapping a feed to "roughness fouls the harmony" ‚ÄĒ sonify who-plays-when/form instead); a sibling lab piece (`233-earth-pulse`) already does note-per-datum, so this is different *in kind*. Taxonomic class ‚Üí orchestra section in its own **acoustic-niche register band** (birds‚Üíbright flute/high, mammals‚Üícello/low-mid, insects‚Üípizzicato ticks, plants‚Üísustained pad, fungi‚Üísub-drone, herps‚Üímid pluck, fish‚Üíwatery bell) ‚ÄĒ **Bernie Krause's acoustic-niche hypothesis as orchestration**; temporal **clustering**‚Üírhythmic density; cumulative taxonomic **richness**‚Üía long-form arc (fuller/brighter over minutes ‚ÄĒ minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1); longitude‚Üístereo pan; scale modulates ~every 36s. INPUT external-data (GBIF, keyless + CORS-open) + pointer-to-solo-a-section ¬∑ OUTPUT **Canvas2D** (0√ó in the last 10 ships + **jury-re-legitimized** this window ‚ÄĒ the freshest legit surface; raw-WebGL2 was jury-HARD-banned as the new 6-of-15 monoculture) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE data‚Üímusical-FORM/who-plays-when structural sonification ¬∑ PALETTE living-biosphere / soundscape-ecology / aurora-dark. Safety `master 0.22 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí comp(‚ąí10,20:1)`, always-on ambient pad (never silent), ‚Č•30ms attacks, analyser off master, iOS gesture-gated Start. Degrades: live fetch fails/offline ‚Üí seamless curated 40-occurrence fallback + hands-free auto-demo sees+hears within ~1s; no Web Audio ‚Üí visuals only. Full teardown. Refs: **Bernie Krause (*Great Animal Orchestra*) ¬∑ Andrea Polli ¬∑ *Data Melodification FM* (arXiv 2510.00222)** ‚ÄĒ the last **cited in the README itself** (criterion #5, the jury's 0-for-15 provocation, finally landed). Ambition 3/5 (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 dated-research-in-README). **Status: demoable** (compile/type/lint-clean; not device/ear-verified ‚ÄĒ container has no audio; review device runs the labeled offline auto-demo). ¬∑ *1 more explored ‚ÄĒ the **WebGPU** globe twin `878-biosphere-globe` (WGSL @compute particle globe, same structure engine) banked to IDEAS ¬ß527 as the WebGPU resurrect-first; de-selected on Canvas2D-diversity + robustness, not quality.*

## ‚≠ź (Cycle 526 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/874-kids-frost-garden](/dream/874-kids-frost-garden)** ‚ÄĒ *"Frost Garden": a 4-year-old TOUCHES the dark screen to plant glowing seeds, and a luminous magic coral/frost-tree grows outward **on its own** ‚ÄĒ every newly-frozen sparkle-tip ringing a soft pentatonic chime, the garden swelling a warm drone as it fills. A calm, endless bedtime garden of light.* The branching is a **genuine diffusion-limited-aggregation sim** (Witten & Sander, 1981 ‚ÄĒ the physics of frost-on-glass, coral, lightning): ~420 random-walking "walker" particles stick irreversibly on contact with the aggregate, so the dendritic structure *emerges* from the local rule, never hand-drawn. Tap/drag plants seeds + pulls nearby walkers toward your finger (branches reach for you); multiple colonies grow and merge. **Lab-first technique** (DLA grep-0√ó across 481 prototypes) and the first **DLA-as-instrument** anywhere in 2026 (verified unexplored). INPUT touch (0√ó in last 10 shipped ‚ÄĒ the starved input) ¬∑ OUTPUT hand-written **WebGL2 / GLSL ES 3.00** additive `gl.POINTS` glow (deep-dusk gradient + indigo‚Üíteal‚Üígold height palette + fresh-stick flash; NOT three.js ‚ÄĒ three.js was 4√ó-banned this cycle) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE diffusion-limited aggregation ¬∑ PALETTE calm bedtime / bioluminescent. Kids-safe `master 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6000 ‚Üí comp(‚ąí10,20:1)`, height-mapped C-pentatonic chimes (‚Č§8/s token-bucket, no wrong notes), always-on swelling C2+G2+C3 drone, analyser off master. iOS gesture-gated Start (‚Č•72px). Degrades: untouched ~1.5s ‚Üí auto-seeds + chimes hands-free within ~1s; no WebGL2 ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, audio survives. Full teardown. Ref: **Witten & Sander (1981)**. Ambition 3/5 (#1 DLA never-used + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems + #3 named ref + touches #5 RESEARCH ¬ß526). **Status: demoable** (compile/type/lint-clean; not device-verified ‚ÄĒ container has no GPU/audio/touch). ¬∑ *2 more explored ‚ÄĒ Gielis-superformula `875-kids-shell-creature` + WebGL2 `876-kids-shadow-zoo` ‚ÄĒ banked in IDEAS ¬ß526.*

## (Cycle 525 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 2 GPU approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/872-living-topology](/dream/872-living-topology)** ‚ÄĒ Living Topology ūüĆÄūüĒä. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 525 (adult / feedback-instrument / long-form generative). **For**: adults ¬∑ **pointer + sliders INPUT** (no camera/mic ‚ÄĒ the dynamical system *is* the content; dodges the jury's touch+mic-only over-rep) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (2√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ the freshest GPU surface; shipping it kept WebGPU off a 4th-night monoculture; Canvas2D stays HARD-banned, raw-WebGL2 at the 4√ó audit-ban) ¬∑ **chaotic-attractor-driven self-rewiring coupling topology** technique (lab-first) ¬∑ **adult dynamical-system / feedback-instrument vibe**. **What if a feedback instrument's coupling topology REWIRED ITSELF over minutes, steered by a chaotic attractor ‚ÄĒ so the network reorganizes and the sound never repeats?** **Cycle 3 of the `820-feedback-ecology` thread** and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** ("develop what you have instead of always opening a new tab ‚ÄĒ ship 820's cycle-2 [Lorenz-drifting coupling weights so the topology evolves] or push 837 deeper"). 11 high-Q `BiquadFilter` bandpass resonators tuned to the **overtone series on A1** (~55 Hz), each in a `filter ‚Üí delay ‚Üí feedbackGain ‚Üí filter` loop, cross-coupled through a small-world adjacency matrix (ring backbone always present + chaos-gated shortcuts). In 820 that matrix was **STATIC**; here a **Lorenz attractor** (ŌÉ=10, ŌĀ=28, ő≤=8/3, dt=0.005) is integrated each frame and its evolving (x,y,z) state continuously rewires the coupling: **z‚Üíglobal density, x‚Üía rotating active-arc over the shortcut chords, y‚Üíbackbone/shortcut weighting** ‚ÄĒ connections strengthen and fade, node-pairs trade dominance, and the emergent drone reorganizes and **never repeats** (long-form generative; minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1). Because the chaotic drift runs on its own, the piece **evolves with zero input**. The signature visual makes the driver legible: 11 glowing nodes on a Fibonacci sphere, an orbiting camera, additive edges whose brightness/pulses track **live weight √ó energy**, and a faint **gold Lorenz ghost-curve + live bead** drifting at center that the topology visibly tracks. **Ear-safety:** every path ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (‚ąí8 dB, 20:1) ‚Üí master gain (default 0.22) ‚Üí destination; self-feedback ramp-clamped to 0.78 (below divergence); 2 s startup ramp (no blast); panic mute + always-safe master volume always live. **Controls:** coupling density ¬∑ chaos-drift speed ¬∑ master volume; "seed network" perturbs all nodes. iOS gesture-gated (AudioContext created/resumed inside the ‚Č•44px "Awaken the Topology" tap). **Degrades fully:** no audio/WebGL ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice (no throw). **Auto-demo:** on Start with no interaction, seeded impulses + the Lorenz drift make it sound + animate within ~1 s, so an unattended 06:30 glance SEES and HEARS it evolve hands-free. Full teardown (rAF cancel + dispose geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (three.js is already a project dep). Ambition honest **3/5** (#4 multi-cycle [820 thread cycle-3] ¬∑ #1 never-used technique [chaotic-attractor-driven self-rewiring topology ‚ÄĒ 820's matrix was static; grep-0√ó prior] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Edward Lorenz, "Deterministic Nonperiodic Flow" 1963** ¬∑ the **2026** *Chaos, Solitons & Fractals* paper on synchronization of coupled Lorenz oscillators on **Watts-Strogatz small-world networks** (pii S0577907326001188) ¬∑ **David Tudor *Rainforest*** / **Toshimaru Nakamura** no-input mixing as feedback-instrument lineage]). **Source:** ¬ß525 dive (the 2026 Watts-Strogatz/Lorenz-sync paper ‚Üí invert it: let a Lorenz system *drive* the small-world coupling graph) ‚Üí AGENT.md paths (a) implement the dive hook + (b) develop the 820 multi-cycle thread ‚Üí adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit, last 10 = 849,853,856,859,862,864,866,868,869)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D (HARD) ¬∑ OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 (4√ó/10 audit-ban) ¬∑ INPUT touch+mic-only ¬∑ recently-used camera/MediaPipe inputs]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 872)=[pointer+sliders INPUT (no camera/mic) ¬∑ three.js OUTPUT (2√ó/10, freshest GPU; keeps WebGPU off a 4-night monoculture) ¬∑ chaotic-attractor self-rewiring-topology TECH (lab-first) ¬∑ adult feedback-instrument vibe]` ‚ÄĒ clears every active ban. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS ¬ß525):** **`873-living-topology-gpu`** ‚≠ź (the SAME concept on **WebGPU** ‚ÄĒ a WGSL `@compute` pass swirls a 40k-particle field + integrates the Lorenz driver GPU-resident; instanced additive nodes/edges/ghost-cloud; Canvas2D fallback; **TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST for the next adult night when WebGPU is scarce** ‚ÄĒ de-selected on renderer-diversity [would be a 4th WebGPU night] + the Canvas2D fallback path, NOT quality) ‚ÄĒ built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS ¬ß525. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; 872 folder grep-clean of the build log; `npx eslint src/app/dream/872-living-topology/` ‚Üí 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the live three.js render, whether the topology rewiring is *audible* (not just visible), and the loudness balance as connections swell; the 2 s ramp + always-on backbone + hands-free auto-demo guarantee a sounding, animating, evolving glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 524 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/868-kids-monster-keys](/dream/868-kids-monster-keys)** ‚ÄĒ Monster Keys ūüĎĻūüéĻ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 524 (kids / freedom-to-be-wrong / raw WebGL2). **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **on-screen creature-keys + Web MIDI INPUT** (12 big toggle-to-stack keys as the always-available primary; native `requestMIDIAccess` as an optional bonus ‚ÄĒ MIDI is the scarce stage input, off the jury's touch+mic-only ban) ¬∑ **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (hand-written additive GLSL ES 3.00 glow-creatures ‚ÄĒ the SCARCEST GPU surface, 2√ó/10; shipping it kept three.js [867] off the 4√ó audit-ban AND avoided a 4th-WebGPU-in-4-cycles monoculture [870]; NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D) ¬∑ **interval-clash scoring ‚Üí spawn-a-wobble-monster ‚Üí resolve-by-consonance** technique ¬∑ **warm playful friendly-monster vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old had the freedom to play a genuinely WRONG (dissonant) note ‚ÄĒ and dissonance was a friendly wobbly MONSTER they could CALM by resolving it, instead of a forbidden mistake?** **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-22 #3** ‚ÄĒ the #1 unfilled kids ask ("give a kid the freedom to be WRONG ‚ÄĒ dissonance reachable AND resolvable, a real harmonic decision with a consequence; 841 only *gestures* at this, commit to it fully"). **Every one of the 12 chromatic notes always plays** ‚ÄĒ no pentatonic gating, no lockout, no "wrong note." Tap a glowing creature-key to toggle its note on; tap again to remove ‚ÄĒ stacking 2‚Äď3 builds a chord with no precise multi-touch-hold. When the sounding set contains a **clearly-beating clash** (minor-2nd / major-7th / tritone ‚ÄĒ `harmony.ts` flags only the LARGE, unmistakable interval classes, per the developmental finding **PMC11336827** that a 4yo perceives consonance preference only with a *large* dissonant contrast), the offending creature grows shivering soft spikes (WebGL) + a **~+6-cent beating partner partial + a 3.2 Hz shimmer LFO** (Web Audio) ‚ÄĒ the wobble/beating is the **ONLY** change, **never louder, never harsher, never higher**. `suggestResolution` computes the one consonant note (a 3rd / 5th / octave) that removes the clash and that key gently **pulses as a glowing invitation**; adding it settles the monster into a round steady happy creature with a soft bloom reward + a warm resolved chord. Real tension‚Üírelease, **zero fail state, zero scolding sound**. Kids-safe chain `osc ‚Üí voiceGain ‚Üí masterGain(0.26) ‚Üí BiquadFilter lowpass(6.5kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10,20:1) ‚Üí destination`, ‚Č•40 ms attacks, always-on warm ambient pad (never silent), `AnalyserNode` taps master but never routes to output. iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext + `requestMIDIAccess` both inside the first ‚Č•72px "Play" tap. **Degrades fully:** no AudioContext ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 (or renderer init throws) ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, audio + auto-demo keep playing (keys still sound); no Web MIDI ‚Üí "tap the keys" status, on-screen keys remain primary (connected/none = "ūüéĻ connected" / "ūüéĻ plug in a keyboard ‚ÄĒ optional"). **Auto-demo:** untouched ~1.5 s ‚Üí the page loops the full arc hands-free (sound two clashing notes ‚Üí a visible+audible wobble-monster spawns ‚Üí add the resolving 5th ‚Üí it settles + blooms), so an unattended 06:30 glance SEES and HEARS the spawn-then-calm story within ~1 s with zero hardware. Full teardown (rAF cancel + osc stop + delete GL programs/buffers/VAO/texture + `WEBGL_lose_context.loseContext()` + remove MIDI listeners + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2; native WebMIDI DOM types ‚ÄĒ a redundant local shim was deleted). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [on-screen keys + Web MIDI + interval-clash/resolve harmony engine + raw-WebGL2 glow-creatures + ambient pad = 5] ¬∑ #3 named refs [consonance‚Üídissonance **"tension and release" pedagogy** ¬∑ **Toca Band** relational-character model ¬∑ **PMC11336827 (2024)** large-contrast developmental finding]). **Source:** ¬ß524 dive (PMC11336827 ‚ÄĒ 4yos need a LARGE dissonant contrast ‚Üí tunes the wobble; WebGPU now device-real on iPadOS) ‚Üí AGENT.md path (c) resurrect the ¬ß522 banked `868-kids-monster-keys` re-skinned to raw-WebGL2 per the ¬ß522 note ‚Üí kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit, last 10 = 869,866,864,862,859,856,853,849,847,846)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D (HARD) ¬∑ always-consonant-morph kids template ¬∑ touch+mic as ONLY inputs]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 868)=[keys+Web MIDI INPUT (MIDI scarce, dodges touch-only) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarcest GPU, 2√ó/10) ¬∑ interval-clash-resolve TECH (genuine dissonance ‚ÄĒ NOT the banned always-consonant-morph) ¬∑ playful-monster vibe]` ‚ÄĒ clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS ¬ß524):** **`867-kids-shadow-zoo`** ‚≠ź (whole-body camera frame-diff motion ‚Üí three.js glowing creature zoo, Myron Krueger *Videoplace*; **TOP kids RESURRECT-FIRST** ‚ÄĒ de-selected on three.js ‚Üí 4√ó audit-ban + freeform-pentatonic register + camera-dependence, love-aligned 104‚Ě§ÔłŹ/234‚Ě§ÔłŹ, NOT quality) + **`870-kids-ripple-pond`** (tap ‚Üí WebGPU `@compute` 2D wave height-field whose edge-reflections re-ring chimes; calm bedtime ‚ÄĒ de-selected because calm was JUST shipped 866 + WebGPU would be 4-in-4 monoculture, NOT quality) ‚ÄĒ both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬ß524. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.1min` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; 868 log-clean of errors ‚ÄĒ only two non-fatal `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` warnings [stable consts; lint passed *past* them], every other warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the live raw-WebGL2 creature render + the wobble-monster's beating + shivering-spike feel, the MIDI path, and whether a real 4yo reads "calm the wobbly monster" unaided; the always-on pad + the full spawn-then-calm auto-demo guarantee a sounding, animating, story-telling glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 523 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/869-spatial-grove](/dream/869-spatial-grove)** ‚ÄĒ Spatial Grove ūüĆ≤ūüéß. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 523 (adult / spatial-installation / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults ¬∑ **whole-body MediaPipe-Pose INPUT** (torso-x ‚Üí lateral pan, shoulder-width depth-proxy ‚Üí walk deeper; the COLD embodied input the jury keeps asking for ‚ÄĒ body 1√ó/depth 0√ó in the window, off the touch+mic 8√ó over-rep) ¬∑ **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (a WGSL `@compute` canopy field ‚ÄĒ the SCARCEST GPU surface, 2√ó in last 10; clears the HARD Canvas2D ban AND the raw-WebGL2 4√ó audit-ban) ¬∑ **HRTF binaural navigation of a fixed field of long-form-evolving generative voices** technique ¬∑ **installation / forest-at-dusk vibe**. **What if you could physically WALK through a living grove of generative song-trees ‚ÄĒ your body's lateral position panning you across it and your distance to the camera walking you deeper in ‚ÄĒ each tree a spatialized, slowly-evolving voice you wander among, never the same twice?** **Answers JURY 2026-06-22 #2** ‚ÄĒ the loudest standing OPEN adult ask ("build the embodied/spatial prototype the lab keeps deferring ‚ÄĒ a pose-driven *spatial-audio room*; depth-camera 0√ó, the whole spatial/installation menu is cold") ‚ÄĒ with a FRESH concept (not a second motet room): **16 fixed "song-trees"** at static world positions around an `AudioListener` at the origin, each a warm bell/marimba or drone on a soft mode (Lydian/pentatonic) routed through its own **`PannerNode` `panningModel="HRTF"`**; the trees never move ‚ÄĒ only `listener.positionX/Z` glides via `setTargetAtTime` as your body walks, blooming the nearest tree in your ears. **Long-form evolution:** each tree drifts on a ~25‚Äď70 s timer (transpose a scale step / change rhythm density / swap timbre brightness + canopy hue) so the grove at minute 5 differs from minute 1 ‚ÄĒ never the same twice. **Output = a WGSL `@compute` pass** swirling ~42k particles (2,600/tree) into glowing canopies pulled toward each tree's live bloom, additive point-quads, dusk indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üíwarm-gold, nearest tree brightest. iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext resume + `getUserMedia` + MediaPipe init all inside the ‚Č•44px Start tap. **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a hand-written **WebGL2** grove on the SAME mapping (audio keeps playing); neither ‚Üí notice, audio still plays; no camera / permission denied / MediaPipe load-fail ‚Üí notice + an **auto-demo** (a synthetic listener walks a slow figure-8 so voices bloom within ~1s, zero hardware) + pointer-drag manual steering. Full teardown (rAF cancel + camera `track.stop()` + PoseLandmarker close + `GPUDevice.destroy()`/`WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WGSL + WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D; MediaPipe is a CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [MediaPipe Pose whole-body tracking + HRTF spatial-audio field of fixed voices + WGSL `@compute`+render canopies + per-tree long-form generative evolution = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet* (2001)** ‚ÄĒ *inverted*: there the choir is fixed and you walk among it, here the field is fixed and the listener walks ¬∑ **AudioMiXR** arXiv 2502.02929 + **MoXaRt** arXiv 2603.10465 ‚ÄĒ 2026 6DoF spatial-audio-object work ¬∑ **Brian Eno** generative ambient drift]). **#1 NOT claimed (honest):** WebGPU is not lab-first ‚ÄĒ its value here is being the scarcest surface in the window + the jury's GPU-only target. **Source:** ¬ß523 dive (AudioMiXR/MoXaRt spatial-audio-object 6DoF, MotionBeat embodied music) ‚Üí AGENT.md path (a) implement the dive hook + jury #2 (pose-driven spatial-audio room) ‚Üí adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit, last 10 = 866,864,862,859,856,853,849,847,846,842)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√ó/15 (HARD) ¬∑ OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4√ó/10 (audit-ban threshold) ¬∑ INPUT touch+mic-only 8√ó]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 869)=[whole-body MediaPipe-Pose INPUT (cold ‚ÄĒ body 1√ó/depth 0√ó) ¬∑ WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (scarcest GPU, 2√ó/10) ¬∑ HRTF spatial-navigation TECH ¬∑ installation vibe]` ‚ÄĒ clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS ¬ß523):** **`870-live-accompanist`** ‚≠ź (Web MIDI + tempo/chord detection ‚Üí a generative jazz trio that FOLLOWS you ‚ÄĒ walking bass + comping that track your tempo and chord; three.js club scene; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** ‚ÄĒ de-selected on three.js ‚Üí 4√ó audit-ban + mic over-rep, NOT quality; the directest "live-performance fitness / jazz-responsive arc" answer) + **`871-solar-wind-aurora`** (live NOAA SWPC solar-wind/Kp data ‚Üí a sonified aurora drone-scape where geomagnetic storms intensify it; WebGPU compute curtains ‚ÄĒ de-selected to avoid back-to-back data-sonification right after 864, NOT quality) ‚ÄĒ both built complete + verified clean (eslint 0 / tsc 0), removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬ß523. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 34s` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; 869 folder grep-clean of the build log ‚ÄĒ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/869-spatial-grove/` ‚Üí 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the HRTF audibility of the pan on headphones, the WGSL canopy bloom on a real GPU, and the shoulder-width‚ÜíZ depth-proxy range (likeliest tuning need vs a live camera); the auto-demo + pointer fallback + WebGL2 path + always-sounding voices guarantee a sounding, moving glance with zero hardware.
