## (Cycle 522 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/866-kids-rainstick-sky](/dream/866-kids-rainstick-sky)** ‚ÄĒ Rainstick Sky ūüĆßÔłŹ‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 522 (kids / calm bedtime / WebGPU compute). **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **accelerometer-SHAKE INPUT** (DeviceMotion *jerk* = high-passed change-in-acceleration ‚Üí shake-energy, explicitly NOT device-orientation tilt ‚ÄĒ the coldest input in the window, off the jury's touch+mic 8√ó over-rep, off the recently-used hands/gamepad/tilt) ¬∑ **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (a WGSL `@compute` rain field ‚ÄĒ the SCARCEST GPU surface, 1√ó‚Üí2√ó in last 10, the jury's explicit "make next builds GPU-only, WebGPU 0√ó" target; clears the HARD Canvas2D ban AND the WebGL2 4√ó audit-ban threshold) ¬∑ **shake-bounded density-only granular rain scheduler (auditable safe-envelope)** technique ¬∑ **calm night-blue bedtime vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could make a calm rainstorm of music by gently SHAKING the tablet like a rainstick ‚ÄĒ and stillness settles it into a sleepy drone of glowing stars?** **Answers JURY 2026-06-22 #4** (the regressed ask: "bring back a CALM kids piece ‚ÄĒ 7 of 8 kids builds are bright/warm-active, only 805 is calm") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned ‚Üí a GPU surface, here the scarcest one). Shake-energy drives **only rain density** (`densityToRate` ~1.2‚Üí14 droplets/sec, hard-capped) + drift ‚ÄĒ **never loudness, never harshness**: a hard shake just makes *more soft drops*, which IS the "auditable safe envelope" (arXiv 2602.22813, Feb 2026). Warm C-pentatonic marimba/bell droplets (‚Č•40ms attacks, no wrong notes) over an always-on C2+G2+C3 drone, all through the fixed kids-safe chain `masterGain(0.26) ‚Üí BiquadFilter lowpass(6kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10,20:1) ‚Üí destination`; analyser tapped off master, never routed to output. Visual = a **WGSL `@compute` pass integrating 60k falling raindrop/star particles** (gravity + gentle curl wind + wrap-around) ‚Üí additive glowing point-quads, indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üíwarm-gold (stars brighter when calm). iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext + `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` both inside the ‚Č•72px Start-cloud tap. **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU ‚Üí a hand-written ~3k-particle **WebGL2** version on the SAME shake‚Üídensity mapping (audio keeps playing); no WebGL2 ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, audio still runs; no motion sensor / desktop ‚Üí pointer drag-to-"shake" + an **auto-demo** that rains + chimes + drifts on its own within ~1s (a hands-free 06:30 glance both SEES and HEARS it). Full teardown (rAF cancel + remove devicemotion listener + stop drones + `GPUDevice.destroy()`/`WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). No API route ‚Üí no guard; zero new npm deps (hand-written WGSL + GLSL, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). **Ambition 2/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: shake-detection + density chime scheduler + WGSL compute field + WebGL2 fallback = 4) + #3 (named refs: Exploratorium Chilean rainstick ¬∑ arXiv 2602.22813 I-E-O auditable safe-envelope ¬∑ Brian Eno generative ambient). **WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ 2 more explored, banked to IDEAS ¬ß522:** `867-kids-shadow-zoo` ‚≠ź (whole-body camera motion-energy ‚Üí three.js creatures, Myron Krueger *Videoplace*) + `868-kids-monster-keys` (MIDI/keys ‚Üí three.js; genuine freedom-to-be-wrong, jury #3).

## Cycle 521 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 GPU-surface approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/864-marine-gamelan](/dream/864-marine-gamelan)** ‚ÄĒ Marine Gamelan ūüĆäūüĒĒ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 521 (adult / live-data sonification / WebGL2). **For**: adults ¬∑ **live-external-API INPUT** (keyless Open-Meteo Marine wave data, 4 ocean presets ‚ÄĒ a starved input, only 842 in the last 10; clears the jury's touch+mic 8√ó over-rep) ¬∑ **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (a GPU surface ‚ÄĒ clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban; 3√ó/10, under the audit-ban threshold) ¬∑ **modal physical-modeling bronze gamelan + wave-data sonification with audible consequence** technique ¬∑ **oceanic/Ikeda data-sonification vibe**. **What if the real, live state of the world's oceans played a bronze gamelan ‚ÄĒ and rough seas audibly DETUNED the metal into a beating clang while calm seas stayed sparse and sweet?** **Resurrects the ‚≠ź TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST `860-marine-gamelan` (IDEAS ¬ß519)** ‚ÄĒ answering **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** (the loudest standing adult ask: "stop the banked build from ghosting / develop what you have, don't open a new tab") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned ‚Üí a GPU surface), and landing the **842-air-veil jury-standout register** (real-world data where rising severity *fouls* the harmony ‚ÄĒ here rough seas detune the bronze). A keyless, CORS-enabled **Open-Meteo Marine API** fetch (client-side, **no api route, no guard**) pulls live `wave_height/period/direction/swell` for four contrasting presets ‚ÄĒ **Oahu North Shore ¬∑ Bay of Biscay ¬∑ Drake Passage (big seas) ¬∑ Maldives (calm)** ‚ÄĒ re-polling every 5 min. One normalized `seaToDrive()` signal feeds BOTH a **modal physical-modeling bronze engine** (each key = a filtered noise exciter ‚Üí a bank of **high-Q BiquadFilter bandpass resonators** at inharmonic partial ratios `[1, 2.76, 5.4, 8.93]`, slendro/pel√∂g) AND a hand-written **WebGL2 GLSL-ES-3.00 caustic water-light shader** (domain-warped value-noise interference, ridged veins, foam crests, violet strike-bloom) ‚ÄĒ so sound and image never disagree. **The consequence is the point and it's audible:** a single `roughness` (clamp `wave_height/6`) simultaneously **(a)** densifies strike rate (~0.8‚Üí~7/s), **(b)** drops register, **(c)** collapses resonator **Q** (~38 *sings* ‚Üí ~6 *clangs*), and **(d)** detunes each bronze partial up to **¬Ī35¬Ę** ‚ÄĒ heavy seas beat into a detuned clang, calm seas stay sparse/high/sweet; `period`‚Üítempo+wave-speed, `direction`‚Üípan+shader-drift, `swell`‚Üídrone+undulation. **Deepening 1:** a **groove-quantize toggle** snaps strikes to a tempo grid derived from `wave_period` (the swell becomes a GROOVE; off = free Poisson-ish ocean pings). **Deepening 2:** a **dual-sea equal-power crossfade** + its own B-location picker ‚ÄĒ hear **Drake Passage's storm beating against the Maldives' calm**, each sea driving its own strike stream + roughness. **Ear-safety:** master compressor ‚Üí brick-wall limiter, 2s fade-in, panic mute, gesture-gated AudioContext in the Start tap (iOS), analyser taps the master for the bloom (never routes to output). **Degrades fully:** fetch fails/blocked ‚Üí a **synthetic evolving sea** per preset (Drake stays stormy, Maldives stay calm) keeps it sounding + animating within ~1s + a `text-rose-300` "(live feed unavailable ‚ÄĒ simulated sea)" badge; no WebGL2 ‚Üí notice, audio keeps playing; no Web Audio ‚Üí notice, visuals keep running. Full teardown (rAF cancel + abort both fetches + clear intervals + delete GL program/buffers/VAO + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `ctx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ the only `getContext` is `webgl2`, so the main viz is genuinely GPU). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [live fetch + preset state-machine + synthetic fallback ¬∑ modal bronze synth w/ groove-quantize scheduler ¬∑ dual-sea crossfade routing ¬∑ WebGL2 caustic shader = 4‚Äď5] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**gamelan slendro/pel√∂g tuning** ¬∑ **Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*** data-as-music stance ¬∑ **Bob Sturm ‚ÄĒ *Music from the Ocean*** wave-undulation‚Üímusic data-mappings]; #4 soft ‚ÄĒ cycle-2 of the 860 thread, the two README-queued deepenings). **Source:** ¬ß521 dive (Sturm *Music from the Ocean* / Plymouth wave-tank / WHOI-OOI ocean-sonification lineage) ‚Üí AGENT.md path (c) IDEAS ¬ß519's ‚≠ź 860 + path (b) continue the 860 thread ‚Üí adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√ó (HARD) ¬∑ INPUT touch+mic-only 8√ó ¬∑ kids vibe (N/A adult)]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 864)=[live-external-API INPUT (1√ó/10) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (3√ó/10, under threshold) ¬∑ wave-data sonification w/ consequence TECH ¬∑ oceanic/Ikeda vibe]` ‚ÄĒ clears every active ban. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS ¬ß521):** **`865-tide-gamelan`** ‚≠ź (the SAME concept as a **three.js** 3D scene ‚ÄĒ a CPU-displaced sum-of-sines ocean mesh with a floating emissive bronze gong-field that bobs/tilts/blooms, additive halos, drag-orbit; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** ‚ÄĒ de-selected on runtime risk [80√ó80 CPU vertex displacement may want a lower segment count / strike cap on weak mobile] + an approximate strike‚ÜĒgong mapping, NOT quality) ‚ÄĒ built complete + eslint/tsc-clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS ¬ß521. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 111s` ‚Üí Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; 864 folder grep-clean ‚ÄĒ zero warnings, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route, no `getContext("2d")`); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by ear: the mix balance + resonator decay tails + the `lvl > 0.32` bloom threshold, and whether the live Open-Meteo schema is identical across all four presets (Oahu's `current` fields verified against a real response; the rest use the identical query shape); the synthetic-sea fallback + always-on limiter + 2s fade guarantee a sounding + animating glance with zero hardware/network.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/864-marine-gamelan/README.md`

## (Cycle 520 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 rendering approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs](/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs)** ‚ÄĒ Sing With Your Hand ‚účūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 520 (kids 4+ / camera-hands / three.js / warm-wondrous). **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **MediaPipe-hands INPUT** (off-glass embodied ‚ÄĒ the jury's "do something a touchscreen can't"; 1√ó in the last 10, dodges the touch+mic 8√ó over-rep) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (the SCARCER GPU surface ‚ÄĒ 2√ó last 10 vs raw-WebGL2 4√ó; clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) ¬∑ **solf√®ge-hand-sign classification ‚Üí scale-degree choir + call-response** technique (never used in the lab) ¬∑ **warm-wondrous kids-choir vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could SING A MELODY with their bare hand ‚ÄĒ making the classic Curwen/Kod√°ly solf√®ge hand-signs in the air (‚úä fist = do, ‚úč flat hand = mi, ūüĎé thumb-down = fa, ‚ėĚÔłŹ point-up = ti ‚Ä¶) ‚ÄĒ and a choir of glowing creature-orbs sang the matching scale degree back?** Real, named music pedagogy (the hand-signs teachers use with children worldwide), made playable by a toddler. **Resurrects the ‚≠ź TOP kids RESURRECT-FIRST `855-kids-solfege-signs` (IDEAS ¬ß518)** ‚ÄĒ answering **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** ("stop the banked 4/5 from ghosting / ship a banked sibling") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned ‚Üí a GPU surface). A front-camera **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import, pinned `tasks-vision@0.10.14`, analysis-only, never bundled) ‚Üí a geometric **7-sign classifier** (`classify.ts`: per-finger extended/curled booleans + coarse hand orientation ‚Üí do/re/mi/fa/sol/la/ti) with a **~250 ms dwell** so only a HELD shape rings (flicker never triggers); **hand height** shifts octave + brightness; after **~2 s of stillness** the choir replays the last ~6 signed notes as a gentle tune (the **Kod√°ly echo** call-and-response game). **three.js (v0.182)** choir: 7 **additive-halo glow orbs** in a warm rising arc, color-coded by a consistent pitch‚Üíhue palette, the signed orb blooms + lifts with hand height, a faint starfield breathes; a tiny **Canvas2D HUD** draws the live hand skeleton so the child feels "seen" (the ONLY 2D surface). Kids-safe `voices ‚Üí masterGain(0.26) ‚Üí BiquadFilter lowpass(6.5kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10,20:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on soft **open-fifth drone (C+G)** so it's never silent; gentle ‚Č•40 ms attacks; analyser taps the master, never routes to output; **NO wrong notes possible**. **iOS:** AudioContext + getUserMedia both inside the ‚Č•72px Start tap. **Degrades fully:** no camera / permission denied / MediaPipe load-fail ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a **ghost-hand auto-demo** (cycles a do-re-mi-sol-mi phrase through the IDENTICAL classifier‚Üíchoir‚Üíscene pipeline, drawing a believable ghost skeleton in the HUD, so a hands-free 06:30 glance both SEES the orbs bloom and HEARS the tune within ~1 s) + a row of **‚Č•72px press-and-hold tap-sign buttons** (emoji + color, no reading) driving the same pipeline (fully playable, zero camera); no WebGL ‚Üí notice, choir keeps singing. Full teardown (rAF + camera tracks stop + landmarker close + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()` + osc stop + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (three present; MediaPipe is a CDN runtime import, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [MediaPipe hand-tracking + geometric 7-sign Curwen classifier + kids-safe choir synth w/ Kod√°ly-echo scheduler + three.js additive-glow choir scene = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**John Curwen 1870** Tonic Sol-fa hand-signs ¬∑ **Zolt√°n Kod√°ly** method + echo game ¬∑ **arXiv 2604.27957, April 2026** "Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures" ‚ÄĒ conducting as a musical sign-language recognized in real time]; soft lab-first ‚ÄĒ solf√®ge-sign *classification* is grep-0√ó though MediaPipe-hands as input exists [853/731/444]). **Source:** ¬ß520 dive (conducting-as-recognized-sign-language, museum-robust) ‚Üí AGENT.md path (c) IDEAS ¬ß518's ‚≠ź 855 + path (a) the dive hook ‚Üí kids **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√ó/15 (HARD) ¬∑ OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4√ó/10 (audit-ban threshold) ¬∑ INPUT touch+mic-only 8√ó ¬∑ kids always-consonant-morph 5√ó]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 862)=[MediaPipe-hands INPUT (1√ó/10, off-glass) ¬∑ three.js OUTPUT (scarcer GPU, 2√ó/10) ¬∑ solf√®ge-sign-classification TECH (never used) ¬∑ warm-wondrous kids vibe]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban AND dodges the raw-WebGL2 over-rep that decided the curation. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS ¬ß520):** **`863-kids-solfege-choir`** ‚≠ź (the SAME concept as a raw-WebGL2 GLSL **"ladder of light"** ‚ÄĒ 7 luminous rungs do‚Üíti bottom‚Üítop that renders **Kod√°ly's pitch-height innovation literally**; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** ‚ÄĒ de-selected purely because raw-WebGL2 is 4√ó/10, the audit-ban threshold, NOT quality) ‚ÄĒ built complete + clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS ¬ß520. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 118s` ‚Üí Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; 862 folder grep-clean ‚ÄĒ zero warnings, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route, the single `getContext("2d")` is the permitted skeleton HUD); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by hand/eye/ear: whether the 7-sign classifier reliably distinguishes the signs on a real child's hand across lighting/angles (`classify.ts` favours distinct shapes over clinical accuracy), and the choir balance + orb bloom feel; the always-on drone + ghost-hand auto-demo + press-and-hold tap fallback guarantee a sounding, blooming glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 519 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom](/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom)** ‚ÄĒ Compute Bloom ūüéĻ‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 519 (adult / GPU-compute / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults ¬∑ **audio-file INPUT** (drag-drop / file-picker your own piano recording ‚ÄĒ Karel's-music directive; built-in generative tape-piano default so it plays with zero interaction) ¬∑ **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST surface in the lab ‚ÄĒ **0√ó in the rolling 15-window**; clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban head-on) ¬∑ **FFT-band-driven 500k-particle curl-noise GPU-compute sim with memory** technique ¬∑ **cosmic/Anadol latent-flow vibe**. **What if a piano performance bloomed a living particle ecosystem computed entirely on the GPU ‚ÄĒ half a million points pushed by the music's spectral bands via a WGSL compute shader?** Directly answers **JURY 2026-06-22 #1** ‚ÄĒ the loudest standing directive ("Canvas2D back to 7-of-15; **WebGPU 0√ó**, WebGL2 1√ó, three.js 2√ó ‚ÄĒ make the next 3-4 builds GPU-only") ‚ÄĒ by landing the literal scarcest surface. An `AnalyserNode` 8-band FFT (sub-bass‚Üíair) packs a uniform read each frame by a WGSL **compute pass** that integrates **500,000** particles: sub-bass+bass swell the core outward, low-mid pulls a gentle gravity return (it breathes, not explodes), highs scatter sparkle at the rim, and every onset blooms the whole cloud then settles. **Memory:** velocity damping (`0.965 ‚ąí energy¬∑0.02`) keeps the cloud visibly expanded during a loud passage and settled inward during silence ‚ÄĒ different at minute 5 than minute 1. A WGSL **render pass** draws each particle as a 6-vertex additive glow quad, coloured deep-indigo ‚Üí violet ‚Üí magenta ‚Üí warm-gold by speed; drag to orbit, scroll to zoom, live 8-band meter. **iOS:** AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start tap. **Degrades:** no WebGPU ‚Üí `text-rose-300` "(WebGPU unavailable)" + a **WebGL2 ~6k-particle fallback** on the SAME band‚Üíforce mapping (audio keeps playing, never a dead screen); no WebGL2 either ‚Üí notice but audio plays. Full teardown (rAF cancel + buffer stop + `audioCtx.close()` + revoke object URL + destroy all GPUBuffers/GPUDevice or GL resources). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (built-in piece synthesised locally, user files via `decodeAudioData`, no external fetch); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WGSL + GLSL, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [audio decode/playback + drag-drop intake ¬∑ OfflineAudioContext tape-piano ¬∑ `AnalyserNode` 8-band FFT + onset ¬∑ WGSL compute sim ¬∑ WGSL additive render = **4‚Äď5**] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Refik Anadol** latent/particle-flow aesthetic *Machine Hallucinations* ¬∑ **Robert Bridson, *Curl-Noise for Procedural Fluid Flow*, SIGGRAPH 2007** ‚ÄĒ divergence-free curl-of-noise field in WGSL]). **#1 NOT claimed (honest):** WebGPU is not lab-first (60√ó historically) ‚ÄĒ its novelty here is being **0√ó in the rolling window** (the diversity axis that matters now). **Source:** ¬ß519 dive (**WebGPU just became iOS-deployable** ‚ÄĒ Safari 26 / three.js r171, Sep 2025; compute-particles are the live June-2026 register) ‚Üí jury #1 (WebGPU 0√ó / GPU-only) ‚Üí adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22, last 15)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√ó (HARD ban) ¬∑ INPUT touch+mic-only 8√ó ¬∑ kids always-consonant-morph 5√ó (N/A adult)]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 859)=[audio-file/his-piano INPUT (dropped) ¬∑ WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (scarcest, 0√ó) ¬∑ FFT‚Üícurl-noise GPU-particle TECH ¬∑ cosmic/Anadol VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS ¬ß519):** **`860-marine-gamelan`** ‚≠ź (live **Open-Meteo wave data** ‚Üí modal bronze-gamelan where rough seas audibly DETUNE the metal ¬Ī35¬Ę; WebGL2 caustics; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** ‚ÄĒ lowest runtime risk, the jury-praised real-world-data-with-consequence register) + **`861-flow-veil`** (**webcam optical-flow** ‚Üí advected dye veil + granular audio; WebGL2; needs a 1-line `OffscreenCanvas`‚Üí`ImageBitmap` texImage2D fix before resurrect) ‚ÄĒ both built complete, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬ß519. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully` ‚Üí Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; the one type error found ‚ÄĒ `webgl-fallback.ts:191` `gl` possibly-null in a closure ‚ÄĒ was the single permitted fix, bind to `const gl: WebGL2RenderingContext`); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye: whether the WebGPU device actually initialised (the builder verified the WebGL2-fallback path's shape only) and the render's perspective point-size tuning; the fallback guarantees a sounding + living visual on any GPU.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom/README.md`

## (Cycle 518 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/856-kids-rumble-band](/dream/856-kids-rumble-band)** ‚ÄĒ Feel the Beat ūüéģ‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 518 (kids 4+ / embodied off-screen input / cross-modal haptic / playful-calm). **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **GAMEPAD input** (the starved, off-camera, off-glass embodied input ‚ÄĒ `navigator.getGamepads()`, 0√ó in the last 10; a Bluetooth controller pairs with iPads and most homes have one; on-screen virtual-stick + drum-button touch *fallback* + auto-demo) ¬∑ **raw WebGL2 output** (the scarce GPU surface ‚ÄĒ clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) ¬∑ **dual-analog-stick conducting of two pentatonic creature-voices + beat-synced controller RUMBLE (haptic "felt beat")** technique ¬∑ **playful-but-calm warm/cool glow vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could play music with a GAME CONTROLLER they already hold ‚ÄĒ push the two thumbsticks to conduct two glowing creature-voices, mash the big colored buttons to drum ‚ÄĒ and the controller BUZZES in their hands on the beat, so they FEEL the music as well as hear it?** Directly serves **JURY 2026-06-22 #1** (force a GPU surface ‚ÄĒ raw WebGL2) + the standing **#-embodied/sensor** ask ("push embodied/sensor inputs‚Ä¶ do something a touchscreen can't" ‚ÄĒ a controller that rumbles is literally that) and fills the lab's **coldest menu category: cross-modal / embedded-haptic** ("haptic-only experiments ‚ÄĒ test the screen bias"). Left stick ‚Üí a warm melody creature (snapped C-major pentatonic, no wrong notes), right stick ‚Üí a cool harmony creature a consonant interval away; **A/B/X/Y** ‚Üí four warm tuned drums; bumpers/triggers ‚Üí a sparkle. **Haptics:** `gamepad.vibrationActuator.playEffect("dual-rumble", ‚Ä¶)` (feature-detected; minimal typed interface, no `any`) pulses gently on every beat, accents every 4th, and bumps on each drum ‚ÄĒ and the whole glow field visibly pulses on the beat so you SEE the felt beat even with no controller. Always-on soft groove + drone (never silent). **Kids-safety chain:** `voices ‚Üí masterGain(0.26) ‚Üí BiquadFilter lowpass(‚Č§6.5kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10, 20:1) ‚Üí destination`; soft ‚Č•40ms attacks; no harsh transients. **iOS:** AudioContext created/resumed inside the first ‚Č•72px Start tap. **Degrades:** no controller ‚Üí ‚Č•96px on-screen virtual sticks (drag) + ‚Č•76px colored drum buttons + a friendly `text-white/75` hint ("Connect a game controller, or play with the buttons below") + an auto-demo (Lissajous sticks + downbeat drums) that sounds + animates + visibly pulses within ~0.6s; no WebGL2 ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, audio keeps playing; no haptics ‚Üí honest "(no rumble on this pad)" label. Full teardown (rAF + gamepad poll cancel + haptic `reset()` + delete WebGL programs/buffers + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network/samples); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [Gamepad polling/edge-detect + dual-stick‚Üípentatonic harmony engine + beat-synced haptic scheduler + raw-WebGL2 additive glow render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Gamepad API + `GamepadHapticActuator.playEffect`** ¬∑ **√Čmile Jaques-Dalcroze eurhythmics** ‚ÄĒ rhythm learned through the body / the felt beat, here delivered as touch]). **Source:** ¬ß518 dive (embodied music pedagogy ‚ÄĒ Dalcroze/Orff/Curwen-Kod√°ly solf√®ge-hand-signs, CHI "Music Corner" + the June-2026 WebGPU audio-reactive wave) ‚Üí the jury's GPU-surface + embodied-input mandate + the cold cross-modal/haptic menu ‚Üí kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 853,849,847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 4√ó (HARD jury ban) ¬∑ INPUT touch+mic-only over-rep + recently-used MediaPipe-hands (853) and tilt (849)]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 856)=[GAMEPAD INPUT (starved, 0√ó last 10, off camera) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarce GPU) ¬∑ dual-stick-conduct + haptic-felt-beat TECH (cross-modal/haptic cold menu) ¬∑ playful-calm glow VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban and avoids the MediaPipe-hands streak (853 last cycle). **WIDE fork:** banked **`855-kids-solfege-signs`** ‚≠ź (make the Curwen/Kod√°ly **solf√®ge hand-signs** in the air ‚Üí a choir sings the matching scale degree ‚Üí build a melody by signing; MediaPipe HandLandmarker + three.js; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** ‚ÄĒ strong pedagogy, de-selected only to avoid a 4th MediaPipe-hands build right after 853) + **`857-kids-color-wand`** (wave any bright **colored toy/scarf** ‚Üí camera color-blob tracking ‚Üí a glowing comet that sings, hue=instrument/height=pitch; **WebGPU** compute particles + WebGL2 fallback ‚ÄĒ the freshest GPU surface) ‚ÄĒ both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬ß518. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: compile ‚Üí **Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; **856 folder grep-clean of the build log** ‚ÄĒ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/856-kids-rumble-band/` ‚Üí 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the actual `playEffect` rumble on a physical controller (feature-detected + labeled when absent), the mix balance + glow intensity on real audio/GPU; the auto-demo + touch fallback + visible on-beat pulse guarantee a sounding, animating, pulsing glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 517 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/853-motet-room-reach](/dream/853-motet-room-reach)** ‚ÄĒ The Motet Room (Reach) ūüéľūüĖźÔłŹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 517 (adult / spatial-installation / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults ¬∑ **two-hand bare-hand-tracking INPUT** (MediaPipe HandLandmarker ‚ÄĒ the starved embodied input the jury demanded; NOT touch, NOT mic; pointer + auto-demo fallback) ¬∑ **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST GPU surface, 1√ó in the last 15 ‚ÄĒ beats the over-represented three.js, clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) ¬∑ **HRTF binaural spatialization + two-hand gestural conducting of a FIXED voice field with persistent re-sculpting** technique ¬∑ **sacred-ambient installation vibe** (cool violet bed warming to conductor's gold). **What if you stood at the center of a fixed constellation of ~18 HRTF-spatialized choir voices and CONDUCTED it with your bare hands ‚ÄĒ reach toward a section to swell it, spread your arms to bloom the whole choir open, bring your hands together to collapse it to a tight resolved cluster, and pinch-and-fling a single voice across the room where it STAYS, permanently re-sculpting the field?** Answers **JURY 2026-06-22 #2** ("build the embodied/spatial prototype the lab keeps deferring ‚ÄĒ a pose-driven spatial-audio room"; body 1√ó/depth 0√ó, the coldest category) + **#1** (hard-ban Canvas2D, force a GPU surface). Each of ~18 voices = two detuned saws ‚Üí bandpass **formant** (vowel) ‚Üí lowpass brightness ‚Üí its own `PannerNode` (`panningModel="HRTF"`) on a shell around a listener fixed at origin (looking ‚ąíZ); hand "magnets" swell+lean the nearest voices, spread/together opens/collapses the whole field, **pinch** grabs the nearest voice and `setTargetAtTime`-glides it to its new home ‚ÄĒ you HEAR it fly around your head. Master: sum ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.28. Raw WebGL2 additive billboarded glow point-sprites (hand-rolled perspective) + glowing hand cursors; **auto-demo** (two virtual hands gesture/spread/pinch on their own) + mouse fallback so it's fully demoable with **no webcam**; `text-rose-300` notice on camera/WebGL2 failure; full teardown (rAF + camera tracks + `AudioContext.close()` + GL buffers/programs/textures). **Differs from `677-presence-field`** (which attaches a voice to each body JOINT ‚ÄĒ sources follow your limbs): here voices are PINNED and the hands sculpt the fixed field. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`; zero new npm deps** (MediaPipe via CDN `webpackIgnore`, never bundled/in package.json). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [camera hand-tracking + HRTF spatial-audio field + raw-WebGL2 render + gesture-sculpting engine = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [object-/scene-based spatial audio; **Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet* (2001)** ‚ÄĒ 40-channel Tallis *Spem in Alium* you walk among, inverted here to a still listener moving the voices]). **Source:** JURY #2 ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß517 (webcam-MediaPipe head/hand-tracked browser binaural ‚ÄĒ listener pose drives the WebAudio `AudioListener` over a fixed HRTF field) ‚Üí adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 849,847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (HARD jury ban) ¬∑ touch+mic-only INPUT ¬∑ always-consonant-morph kids template]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 853)=[bare-hand-tracking INPUT (body, starved) ¬∑ raw WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarcest GPU) ¬∑ HRTF spatial-sculpting TECH ¬∑ adult installation VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **DEEP siblings (banked, IDEAS ¬ß517):** `852-motet-room-walk` ‚≠ź (MediaPipe Pose ‚ÄĒ physically WALK the listener through the fixed oval; three.js; the literal Cardiff gallery walk; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST**) + `854-motet-room-lean` (MediaPipe FaceLandmarker head-tracking ‚ÄĒ turn your head, the field stays world-anchored; true head-tracked binaural; three.js) ‚ÄĒ both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬ß517. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 98s` ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; **853 folder grep-clean of the build log** ‚ÄĒ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the live MediaPipe hand path + CDN model load, the raw-WebGL2 render, and whether HRTF localization reads convincingly on headphones (it collapses to L/R + level on laptop speakers); auto-demo + mouse guarantee a sounding, moving glance regardless.

## Cycle 516 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/849-kids-star-bowl](/dream/849-kids-star-bowl)** ‚ÄĒ Star Bowl ‚ú®ūü•£. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 516 (kids 4+ / freedom-to-be-wrong / calm bedtime / long-form-ish generative). **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **device-orientation TILT input** (the starved embodied input the jury asked for ‚ÄĒ NOT touch, NOT mic; pointer-drag + auto-drift fallback) ¬∑ **three.js GPU output** (the scarce GPU surface ‚ÄĒ breaks the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) ¬∑ **tilt-gravity marble physics ‚Üí position-in-bowl ‚Üí consonance‚ÜĒdissonance harmony with audible glide-resolution** technique ¬∑ **calm night-blue bedtime vibe** (the regressed register ‚ÄĒ only 1 of the prior 8 kids builds was calm). **What if a 4-year-old could TILT a tablet like a bowl of glowing stars and discover that wandering out to the "spiky" rim makes a soft, safe dissonance they can then RESOLVE by tilting home ‚ÄĒ a real harmonic decision made with the body, not a steered always-consonant vibe?** This is the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-22 #3** ("give a kid the freedom to be WRONG ‚ÄĒ dissonance reachable AND resolvable, a real harmonic decision with a consequence, not a steer through a pre-vetted field") AND **#4** ("bring back a calm kids piece ‚ÄĒ 7 of 8 are bright/active"). ~48 glowing star-marbles roll inside a 3D bowl under simulated gravity driven by `DeviceOrientationEvent` (beta/gamma ‚Üí gravity vector). The cluster's mean radius (0 center ‚Üí 1 rim) drives the harmony: **center** = a warm fully-consonant chord over a low A2 drone (root+fifth+octave+tenth), stars round and gentle; **toward the rim** = two "tension voices" glide up toward a soft minor-2nd/tritone cluster with gentle beating partials + a slow shimmer-tremolo, and the star shader grows prickly shivering spikes (reads as "ooh, wobbly," never harsh); **tilt home** = the tension voices glide back to consonance via `setTargetAtTime`, shimmer fades, stars round out, and a soft consonant **bloom** rewards the return. Always-on Eno-style drone means it's never silent; auto-drift keeps an untouched device gently rolling + sounding within ~2s. **Kids-safety chain:** `sources ‚Üí masterGain(0.24) ‚Üí BiquadFilter lowpass(‚Č§6.4kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10, 20:1) ‚Üí destination`; soft ‚Č•40ms attacks; tension voices peak at gain ~0.16; no analyser wired to output. **iOS:** AudioContext + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` both inside the first ‚Č•72px Start tap. **Degrades:** no orientation (desktop / denied) ‚Üí pointer drag-to-tilt + auto-drift + `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, audio keeps running; no Web Audio ‚Üí visuals alive + notice. Full teardown (rAF + listeners + dispose three.js geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network/samples); **zero new npm deps** (`three` v0.182 already present; NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [device-orientation physics/permission + tilt-gravity marble sim + position‚Üíconsonance/dissonance harmony engine with glide-resolution + three.js additive-glow round‚ÜĒspiky shader render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [the dissonance‚Üíconsonance **"tension and release" pedagogy** ‚ÄĒ MasterClass 2026 *"Dissonance in Music"* + the *"Dissonance to Consonance"* family-learning lesson plan (mapflc.com): the resolve builds a child's confidence ¬∑ the love-aligned tilt lineage **`83-kids-tilt-rain`**‚Ě§ÔłŹ ¬∑ **Brian Eno**-style calm bedtime ambient drone]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-22 #3 + #4 ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß516 (tension‚Üírelease is the named musical-growth lever; the toys deny it) ‚Üí kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827,822)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 6√ó (HARD jury ban) ¬∑ INPUT touch+mic-only 8√ó over 15 ¬∑ the "drag-one-thing ‚Üí always-consonant-morph" kids template 5√ó]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 849)=[device-orientation TILT INPUT (starved, 1√ó) ¬∑ three.js GPU OUTPUT (scarce) ¬∑ tilt-gravity‚Üíreachable-resolvable-dissonance TECH (NOT always-consonant) ¬∑ calm night-blue VIBE (regressed register)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **WIDE fork:** banked **`851-kids-hand-choir`** ‚≠ź (bare-hand MediaPipe conducting ‚ÄĒ spread=tension/together=resolve; raw WebGL2; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST**, the embodied build the jury most wants) + **`850-kids-monster-keys`** (every chromatic note plays ‚ÄĒ dissonance is a friendly wobble-monster you calm; Web MIDI + raw WebGL2) ‚ÄĒ both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬ß516. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 35.9s` ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; **849 folder grep-clean of the build log** ‚ÄĒ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/849-kids-star-bowl/` ‚Üí 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the toddler "feel" of the tilt-gravity tuning on real hardware (`TILT_FORCE`/`WELL_PULL`/damping may want a hands-on nudge), and whether the rim dissonance reads as "safely wobbly" vs flat (the always-on drone + auto-drift + drag fallback guarantee a sounding, rolling glance regardless).

## (Cycle 515 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii](/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii)** ‚ÄĒ Feedback Ecology II ūüĆÄ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 515 (adult / dynamical-system emergent / long-form generative / live no-input). **For**: adults ¬∑ **no-input / self-oscillating input** (it runs itself ‚ÄĒ the starved input category the jury asked for; dodges the touch+mic over-rep, 8√ó across the last 15) ¬∑ **raw WebGL2 output** (the scarce GPU surface ‚ÄĒ 1√ó in the last 15; breaks the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban which had relapsed to 7-of-15) ¬∑ **coupled-resonator feedback network whose topology evolves itself ‚ÄĒ a Lorenz attractor drifting the coupling + Hebbian edges that strengthen-or-die ‚ÄĒ rendered with ping-pong FBO feedback trails** technique ¬∑ **dynamical-system / David-Tudor feedback-ecosystem vibe (active, not ambient)**. **What if the feedback-resonator network from `820` took its hands off the wheel ‚ÄĒ a chaotic attractor weathering the coupling through bifurcations while the graph rewires itself via Hebbian plasticity ‚ÄĒ so it's a long-form instrument that is genuinely different at minute 5 than at minute 0, and never loops?** This is **cycle-2 of [820 ¬∑ Feedback Ecology](/dream/820-feedback-ecology)**, building exactly the deepening 820's own README queued: *"add Lorenz-attractor coupling weights that drift over time."* It inherits **820's ear-safe Web Audio engine wholesale** (eight high-Q `BiquadFilter ‚Üí DelayNode ‚Üí feedback GainNode` resonators on a small-world coupling graph, root 55 Hz, every path ending in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter before a master gain ‚Č§0.3). On top: **(1) Lorenz drift** ‚ÄĒ a classic ŌÉ=10/ŌĀ=28/ő≤=8/3 system (dt=0.005, 6 Euler sub-steps/frame) integrated each frame; its normalized x‚Üíglobal coupling (sweeps isolated-pings ‚ÜĒ entrainment ‚ÜĒ drone on its own), y‚Üíself-feedback "edge of chaos," z‚Üíslow timbre (filter-Q + gentle ¬Īdetune), every target passed through 820's existing hard clamps (`MAX_COUPLING=0.35`, `MAX_FB_GAIN=0.88`). Because the Lorenz trajectory is aperiodic it never settles ‚ÄĒ the instrument *weathers*. **(2) Hebbian self-rewiring edges** ‚ÄĒ each edge carries a live weight: when both endpoints are energetic the edge potentiates ("fire together, wire together"); idle edges decay toward a non-zero floor (`[0.12, 1.0]` clamp) ‚ÄĒ *seldom-used links die, heavily-used links strengthen* ‚ÄĒ and the live weights both drive the coupling gains and set the edge brightness on screen, so you **watch** the graph rewire. **(3) Autonomous seeding** ‚ÄĒ every ~5.5s a gentle impulse is fired into the lowest-energy node so the ecology never dies (tapping a node still perturbs it, but it is not the primary input). **GPU render (raw WebGL2):** additive point-sprite node blobs (size/brightness ‚ąĚ energy, 820's per-node palette), GPU `LINES` edges whose alpha ‚ąĚ live Hebbian weight √ó signal flow, a **ping-pong FBO feedback-trail accumulation** (fade-and-feed-back each frame so energy leaves luminous decaying trails ‚ÄĒ the "David Tudor feedback ecosystem" look Canvas2D can't do cheaply, and thematically apt for a feedback instrument), plus a faint drifting Lorenz "weather" point-cloud + background tint so the autonomous drift is visible as well as audible. Shaders compiled/linked with error checks; on teardown all programs/buffers/VAOs/textures/framebuffers deleted + `WEBGL_lose_context`. **Ear-safety inherited from 820 unchanged** (limiter, hard-clamped gains, gentle 2s start ramp, always-visible **panic mute**, gesture-gated `AudioContext`). **Degrades:** `webgl2` null ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice but **audio keeps running** (sound is the point); no Web Audio ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples/network/recording); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **3/5** (#4 **multi-cycle commitment** ‚ÄĒ explicit cycle-2 of 820, the deepening 820's README itself queued ¬∑ #1 **first chaotic-attractor-driven self-rewiring network topology in the lab** ‚ÄĒ 820 had a *static* small-world graph + manual sliders; here the adjacency matrix is itself a dynamical system [Lorenz + Hebbian], and the ping-pong FBO feedback-trail is a GPU technique the lab is thin on ¬∑ #3 named refs [**E. N. Lorenz, "Deterministic Nonperiodic Flow," J. Atmos. Sci. 20 (1963)** ¬∑ adaptive/time-varying pulse-coupled oscillator networks (Hebbian plasticity) ¬∑ inherited **David Tudor ‚ÄĒ *Rainforest* (1968) / *Pulsers* (1976)** + **Toshimaru Nakamura** no-input lineage from 820]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-22 **#5** ("820-feedback-ecology is your only net-new high-ambition build ‚ÄĒ ship its cycle-2 [Lorenz-drifting coupling] instead of always opening a new tab; develop what you have") + **#1** (hard-ban Canvas2D ‚Üí force a GPU surface) ‚Üí AGENT.md path (b) "continue a multi-cycle ambitious build already underway" ‚Üí adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827,822,816)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√ó (HARD jury ban) ¬∑ INPUT touch 4√ó (+ touch/mic-only 8√ó over 15)]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 847)=[no-input/self-oscillating INPUT (starved, 2√ó) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarce GPU, 1√ó) ¬∑ Lorenz+Hebbian self-rewiring TECH ¬∑ dynamical-system feedback-ecosystem VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears both jury bans. **DEEP fork:** the parallel sibling **`848-feedback-ecology-ii`** (the SAME concept rendered as a luminous orbiting **three.js** 3D graph ‚ÄĒ emissive spheres + weight-colored `LineSegments` + a Lorenz `THREE.Line` weather-trail, additive-halo bloom fallback) was built complete + verified clean (tsc 0 / eslint --max-warnings=0) and **de-selected on diversity + ambition** ‚ÄĒ three.js is 2√ó in the last 15 (847's raw WebGL2 is the scarcer GPU surface) and 847's ping-pong FBO feedback-trail is the more substantive + thematically-apt GPU technique. 848 banked to IDEAS ¬ß515 (top adult RESURRECT-FIRST for a cycle where three.js isn't over-rep'd), saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-515/`, removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winner not committed). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 53s` ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`**; **847 folder grep-clean of the build log** ‚ÄĒ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii/` ‚Üí 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the Lorenz drift reads as a *coherent* hour-long weather rather than random wander, whether the Hebbian rewiring is visually legible as links brighten/die, and whether the bifurcation sweep stays musical across its whole range (the always-clamped limiter + gentle ramp + panic mute guarantee a safe, sounding, evolving glance regardless; honest caveat ‚ÄĒ GPU `lineWidth` is alpha-faked since most platforms clamp it to 1, so edge strength reads through brightness not thickness).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii/README.md`

## (Cycle 514 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/846-kids-sing-garden](/dream/846-kids-sing-garden)** ‚ÄĒ Sing the Garden ūüĆĽ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 514 (kids 4+ / warm-daylight living garden / long-form generative). **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **mic/voice input** (off the over-represented touch tag the audit banned this cycle) ¬∑ **three.js WebGL `THREE.Points` + custom `ShaderMaterial` output** (the cold renderer ‚ÄĒ 0√ó in the last 10 shipped; a GPU point-field of thousands of pollen/petal points) ¬∑ **voice-fed EMERGENT phyllotaxis (largest-gap + local inhibition on an expanding growth front) + long-form self-organizing/self-singing field** technique ¬∑ **calm warm-daylight living-garden vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old's voice didn't just *place* flowers but GREW an organic garden whose spiral arrangement emerges on its own ‚ÄĒ the way a real sunflower head self-organizes ‚ÄĒ and the garden keeps breathing and growing even when the room is quiet?** The child hums/sings; a hand-rolled autocorrelation (Chris Wilson ACF) pitch detector with an RMS noise-gate snaps each note to a **C-major pentatonic** (no wrong notes) and deposits a new growth site **in the largest angular gap on the current front**, with an inhibition rule that relaxes as the head fills ‚ÄĒ so the angular increment self-organizes toward the golden angle (~137.5¬į) **without hardcoding it**, a lightweight Keller-Segel-flavoured phyllotaxis (arXiv 2509.06498, Sept 2025). Pitch ‚Üí hue (low warm rose/gold ‚Üí high cool sky/violet) + which chord voice it feeds; loudness ‚Üí growth vigor + bloom brightness; a held note accelerates growth. **State + memory (long-form):** the field keeps seeding faint ambient sites and decaying bloom pulses during silence, and after ~2.5s quiet plays a soft generative bell arpeggio from already-grown sites ‚ÄĒ visibly and audibly richer at minute 5 than minute 1. Kid-safe `master gain 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1)`; always-on C2+G2 pad (never silent); analyser never wired to output; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext in the first tap; **mic-denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + ghost-hum auto-singer + tap-anywhere-to-grow** (fully demoable without a mic); WebGL-null ‚Üí friendly notice; full teardown (rAF + `audioCtx.close()` + three.js geometry/material/renderer dispose + mic tracks stopped). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (no samples/network/recording ‚ÄĒ mic used only for live pitch/RMS, never stored or transmitted); **zero new npm deps** (three.js v0.182 already installed; NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [mic ACF pitch-detect + emergent largest-gap growth field + shader point-render + generative self-singing bell arpeggio = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**arXiv 2509.06498 "Phyllotaxis in a Keller-Segel model" (2025)** ¬∑ **H. Vogel (1979)** sunflower golden-angle baseline ¬∑ **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia* (1976)** vibe ¬∑ **Chris Wilson** autocorrelation] ¬∑ #5 references RESEARCH ¬ß514, added this cycle <14 days). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #5 (ship a banked sibling ‚ÄĒ this is the ‚≠ź top kids RESURRECT-FIRST `800-kids-sing-meadow`, elevated) ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß514 (phyllotaxis is *emergent*, not just drawn) ‚Üí kids **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10)=[INPUT touch 4√ó ¬∑ OUTPUT Canvas2D 6√ó]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 846)=[mic/voice INPUT ¬∑ three.js shader point-field OUTPUT (cold) ¬∑ emergent-phyllotaxis TECH ¬∑ warm-daylight-living-garden VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears both bans. **DEEP fork:** the discrete/legible sibling **`845-kids-sing-meadow`** (one sung note ‚Üí exactly one flower on the literal Vogel spiral, three.js `InstancedMesh`, call-and-response replay ‚ÄĒ the *most 4yo-legible* take) was built complete + clean (tsc 0 / eslint 0) and **de-selected on ambition/research-fit** (846 realizes today's actual research finding and is long-form; 845 plots the static formula). 845 banked to IDEAS ¬ß514 (top kids RESURRECT-FIRST), saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-514/`, removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winner not committed). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`; **846 folder grep-clean of the build log** ‚ÄĒ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/846-kids-sing-garden/` ‚Üí 0; `tsc --noEmit` ‚Üí 0 in folder; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the emergent spiral reads as a recognizable sunflower head on a real GPU, whether a 4-year-old's hum reliably plants via ACF on a phone mic, and whether the abstract point-field reads as "I made that" the way discrete flowers (845) would (the ghost-hum + tap-to-grow fallback + always-on pad guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/846-kids-sing-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 511 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/837-quasicrystal](/dream/837-quasicrystal)** ‚ÄĒ Quasicrystal ūüĒ∑. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 511 (adult / generative / long-form / clinical-crystalline). **For**: adults ¬∑ **autonomous-generative input** (it plays itself; you tune tempo / ŌÜ-inflation / traversal / reseed ‚ÄĒ NOT a touch-performance, off the over-represented touch tag) ¬∑ **Canvas2D pentagrid-tiling output** (deep-near-black ground, cyan fat-rhomb + violet thin-rhomb glowing edges, Ikeda crystalline) ¬∑ **de Bruijn pentagrid ‚Üí Penrose P3 aperiodic tiling ‚Üí aperiodic-order music** technique (grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST aperiodic/quasicrystal composition) ¬∑ **geometric crystalline / Ryoji-Ikeda vibe**. **What if a piece of music had the structure of a quasicrystal ‚ÄĒ perfectly ordered, self-similar, yet NEVER exactly repeating ‚ÄĒ so it can play for an hour and stay coherent without ever looping?** A real **de Bruijn pentagrid** (5 line-families at 36¬į steps, offsets ő≥‚āÄ‚Ä¶ő≥‚āĄ) is dual-transformed into a true **Penrose P3 rhomb tiling** with exact 5-fold symmetry and provable aperiodicity ‚ÄĒ fat rhombs (|j‚ąík|=1,4) and thin rhombs (|j‚ąík|=2,3). A **traversal** (spiral / sweep / growth-front) visits each tile and sonifies it: the 7 Penrose **vertex configurations** (sun/star/ace/deuce/jack/king/queen) map to **just-intonation ratios** (sun‚Üí1/1, queen‚Üí3/2, king‚Üí4/3, jack‚Üí5/4, star‚Üí6/5, deuce‚Üí**7/4** harmonic seventh, ace‚Üí9/8), register rises with distance from center, fat rhombs use warm additive partials (1f¬∑2f¬∑3f) and thin rhombs bright partials + FM shimmer, over a slow drone that shifts as the traversal travels outward. Because the tiling is aperiodic but built from a finite local vocabulary, the line is **non-repeating yet self-similar** ‚ÄĒ motifs recur transposed and re-spaced but the exact sequence never returns, so it's genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1 (the lab is thin on true **long-form generative**). **ŌÜ-inflation** zooms the world by powers of ŌÜ=(1+‚ąö5)/2 ‚ÄĒ the same patterns reappear at larger scale, a slow harmonic-rhythm change. An in-app **Design Notes** overlay explains the tiling, the mapping, and why it never repeats. Voices glide with `setTargetAtTime`/ramps (no clicks); master `gain ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`, modest gain; gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (rAF + `audioCtx.dispose()`). **Degrades:** no Web Audio ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, the crystal still grows silently. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples/network/recording); **zero new npm deps** (Canvas2D, NOT three.js). Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **first aperiodic-order/quasicrystal music in the lab** ‚ÄĒ builder grep of penrose/aperiodic/quasicrystal/de-bruijn/pentagrid found only 3 *incidental* mentions, no prior aperiodic-music ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [de Bruijn pentagrid tiling generator + traversal‚Üísequencer + additive/FM synth voices + drone + Canvas2D render = 4+] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Roger Penrose** P3 (1974) ¬∑ **N.G. de Bruijn** pentagrid/"Algebraic theory of Penrose's non-periodic tilings", 1981 ¬∑ **Dan Shechtman** quasicrystals, Nobel 2011 ¬∑ **"Quasiperiodic Music"** arXiv 2009.04667; aesthetic kin Ryoji Ikeda]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #1 (rest his recording, end the answering-agent thread) ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß511 (Skylight made the sky *visible* but silent ‚Üí data/structure sonification; "Quasiperiodic Music" arXiv 2009.04667 ‚Üí aperiodic order as musical structure) ‚Üí this adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21 + audit)=[his-recording-as-source ¬∑ machine-listens-to-recording/answering-agent ¬∑ pentatonic-never-wrong ¬∑ UPIC pitch-painter ¬∑ adult-ambient-as-default ¬∑ touch-input (5√ó in last 10)]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 837)=[autonomous-generative INPUT (off touch) ¬∑ Canvas2D crystalline-tiling OUTPUT ¬∑ de-Bruijn-pentagrid/aperiodic-order TECH (grep-0√ó, NOT his-recording, NOT answer/follow, NOT pentatonic) ¬∑ geometric-crystalline-Ikeda VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **WIDE fan-out ‚ÄĒ 2 explored, banked to IDEAS ¬ß511:** `836-flightpaths` (sonify the live ADS-B sky as a clinical radar organ ‚ÄĒ each real aircraft a sustained spatial voice; the genuine real-world-data lab-first that answers JURY #3, de-selected because its live feed is often CORS-blocked ‚Üí most visitors see the simulated sky; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST**) + `838-hocket-loom` (play one live MIDI/keyboard line ‚Üí it shatters across an interlocking hocket/kotekan/phase ensemble; de-selected because canon/echo/interlock is the lab's most-trodden ground). Both built complete + build-verified (tsc 0 / eslint 0), saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-511/`, removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winners not committed). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 42s` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚Üí Collecting page data**; `npx eslint` on the folder ‚Üí 0/0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the aperiodic sequence reads as "coherent but never looping" to the ear and whether the vertex‚ÜíJI mapping sounds as intended on a real device (the always-on drone + autonomous traversal guarantee a sounding, crystallizing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/837-quasicrystal/README.md`

## (Cycle 510 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/834-kids-paint-mixer](/dream/834-kids-paint-mixer)** ‚ÄĒ Paint Mixer ūüé®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 510 (kids 4+ / bright painterly / color-as-language). **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **touch drag-paint input** (no reading) ¬∑ **raw WebGL2 output** (the lab's COLDEST renderer, 0√ó in the last 10 shipped) ¬∑ **physically-correct Kubelka-Munk subtractive pigment mixing ‚Üí GPU readPixels ‚Üí gliding chord** technique ¬∑ **bright cream finger-paint vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old finger-paints by MIXING REAL PAINT ‚ÄĒ and the color they mix IS the chord they hear?** Three big glowing pigment blobs (red/magenta, yellow, blue) drag around a cream paper canvas; where they overlap the paint mixes like REAL paint ‚ÄĒ **blue + yellow makes GREEN**, not the muddy gray that ordinary RGB mixing gives ‚ÄĒ because a GLSL ES 3.00 fragment shader runs full **36-sample Kubelka-Munk spectral mixing per pixel** (RGB‚ÜíK/S absorption+scattering, mix in spectral space, integrate over CIE XYZ color-matching functions, back to sRGB), with a domain-warp smear for a wet-paint feel. Each ~20 Hz frame, `readPixels` samples the actual mixed pixels under the blob centroid ‚Üí HSV ‚Üí drives a live, always-in-tune chord over a fixed C+G pad: **warm/gold ‚Üí bright major/add9 ¬∑ green/teal ‚Üí open sus ¬∑ blue/violet ‚Üí tender minor ¬∑ magenta ‚Üí dreamy maj7**, with saturation‚Üírichness and value‚Üíbrightness, all gliding click-free via `setTargetAtTime` (voices never retrigger). So the heard chord **exactly equals the seen mixed color** ‚ÄĒ the child paints harmony, never a wrong note (the fixed center holds it in tune; color shapes only quality + richness). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-21 #4** (kill the kids "pentatonic-never-wrong" crutch ‚ÄĒ let harmony be *shaped*) and **#5** (ship a banked sibling ‚ÄĒ this is the ¬ß508 ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST `829-kids-color-blend`, rebuilt and upgraded from approximate RGB blend to physically-correct pigment optics + real GPU pixel-readback). Kids-safe `masterGain 0.27 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§7 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1)`; always-on pad (never silent); ‚Č•64‚Äď72px tap targets; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext in the first tap; auto-drift after ~1.5s idle so an unattended phone keeps painting + singing; **WebGL2-null ‚Üí CSS `mix-blend-mode:multiply` fallback that still drives the same audio** + `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio ‚Üí visuals stay alive + notice; full teardown (program/buffer/VAO + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples/network/recording); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2, no three.js). Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **first Kubelka-Munk physical pigment mixing in the lab** ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó; every prior "pigment" is metaphorical Anadol data-as-pigment ‚ÄĒ and **first GPU `readPixels`‚Üíaudio coupling** ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [touch drag-physics + per-pixel Kubelka-Munk spectral mixing + readPixels color‚Üíchord-quality synth + WebGL2 render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Isaac Newton's 7-color‚ÜĒ7-note mapping** ¬∑ **Scriabin's *clavier √† lumi√®res*** ¬∑ **Mixbox / "Practical Pigment Mixing for Digital Painting," Sochorov√° & JamriŇ°ka, SIGGRAPH Asia 2021** + **Spectral.js** Kubelka-Munk]) ¬∑ soft #5 (RESEARCH ¬ß510 ‚ÄĒ Mixbox/Spectral.js GLSL + CoolerSpace 2026 color tooling). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #4 + #5 ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß510 (RGB additive mixing is physically WRONG ‚ÄĒ blue+yellow=gray; Kubelka-Munk gives blue+yellow=green like real finger-paint) ‚Üí kids **DEEP** fire (paint vs. light). **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[pentatonic-never-wrong (kids crutch) ¬∑ UPIC pitch-painter ¬∑ his-recording-as-source ¬∑ machine-listens-to-recording ¬∑ adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 834)=[touch drag-paint INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (cold, 0√ó last 10) ¬∑ Kubelka-Munk-pigment-mix‚Üíchord-quality TECH (harmony genuinely shaped, NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC) ¬∑ bright cream finger-paint VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **DEEP fork:** the physically-opposite sibling **`835-kids-light-mixer`** (additive LIGHT ‚ÄĒ red+green=yellow, all=white, on a near-black starfield) was built complete + clean and **de-selected on novelty** (additive RGB mixing is the *ordinary* mix the world already does ‚ÄĒ and the original 829 framing; the pigment approach is the lab-first + the fresher, more kid-native surprise). 835 banked to IDEAS ¬ß510, saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-510/`, removed before the authoritative build (non-winner not committed). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully in 80s` ‚Üí Linting + type-check PASS ‚Üí reached `Collecting page data`; **834 folder grep-clean of the build log** ‚ÄĒ zero references, zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether blue+yellow visibly reads as green on a real GPU and whether the heard chord tracks the mixed color tightly under a child's finger (the always-on pad + auto-drift + CSS fallback guarantee a sounding, painting glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/834-kids-paint-mixer/README.md`

## (Cycle 509 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/833-spectral-loom](/dream/833-spectral-loom)** ‚ÄĒ Spectral Loom ‚ĚĄÔłŹūüé®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 509 (adult / clinical-Ikeda / live-performance). **For**: adults ¬∑ **live-mic input** (rests his recording ‚ÄĒ the material is the *visitor's* own sound; the visitor, not a stored file) ¬∑ **Canvas2D spectrogram output** (cool monochrome‚Üícyan/violet magnitude ramp, crisp grid, bright scrub-head) ¬∑ **freeze-the-live-STFT ‚Üí editable spectral-image buffer ‚Üí additive resynth** technique ¬∑ **clinical / data-instrument / Ryoji-Ikeda vibe ‚ÄĒ active not ambient**. **What if you could FREEZE your own live sound as a spectrogram *image* and then PAINT that frozen picture ‚ÄĒ smear energy sideways, brush it in and out, stretch it ‚ÄĒ and hear the picture you painted?** A live STFT (`AnalyserNode` fftSize 1024, dB‚Üí0..1, folded onto a perceptual log-frequency row grid) scrolls a rolling spectrogram; **‚ĚĄ Freeze** copies the window into an editable magnitude matrix `buffer[TIME][FREQ]` ‚ÄĒ a held image. **Editing the picture edits the sound:** a soft-falloff Gaussian brush **raises/lowers** magnitude, **smear** drags spectral energy sideways in time (freeze-stretch), a **freeze-stretch slider** runs a per-frame IIR time-blur that melts transients into drones, and a **scrub head** sweeps the frozen frame with a **Loop** toggle for rhythmic re-triggering (active, never a static drone). Resynthesis = a capped **96-oscillator additive bank** reading the magnitude column under the scrub head each frame, the loudest rows mapped to oscillator freq+gain with `setTargetAtTime` smoothing (no zipper). Master `gain ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§13.5 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`. **Crucial mic-free path:** mic denied/absent ‚Üí a visible `text-rose-300` notice **and** a "Use demo sound" button that routes an internally-generated evolving chord/whistle/noise through the **identical** capture‚Üífreeze‚Üíscrub pipeline, so the whole mechanic is fully demoable with no mic; the canvas animates a demo spectrogram on load (never blank, never silent). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no network, no recording stored); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [live STFT capture + frozen editable spectral buffer + 96-osc additive resynth + spectrogram renderer = 4] ¬∑ #3 named ref [**Jean-Fran√ßois Charles, "A Tutorial on Spectral Sound Processing Using Max/MSP and Jitter," Computer Music Journal 32:3 (2008)** ‚ÄĒ spectrogram-as-editable-image-buffer, the GRM/IRCAM spectral-freeze lineage; aesthetic kin **Ryoji Ikeda**]). **#1 NOT claimed (honesty):** spectral processing has lab ancestors (`34-spectral-morph`, `321-spectral-flight`) ‚ÄĒ but **none let you PAINT the frozen image and resynth it**, which is 833's genuine differentiator + high surprise ("the picture *is* the sound"). **Resurrects the ¬ß507-banked `826-spectral-loom`**, satisfying **JURY 2026-06-21 #5** ("stop banking DEEP losers ‚ÄĒ ship a banked sibling, clear the bank"). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #1 (rest his recording, end the answering-agent thread) + #3 (real-world-data / non-music) + #5 (ship a banked sibling) ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß509 (space-weather sonification is fresh-in-2026 but a grep proved it's owned by the lab ‚ÄĒ `314`/`471`; EDM-drop owned by `387`/`631` ‚ÄĒ so two of three briefs were re-treads, redirecting to the one un-owned framing) ‚Üí this adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source ¬∑ machine-listens-to-recording ¬∑ pentatonic-never-wrong ¬∑ UPIC pitch-painter ¬∑ adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 833)=[live-mic INPUT (rests his recording) ¬∑ Canvas2D spectrogram OUTPUT (‚Č§3√ó, not banned) ¬∑ spectral-freeze-and-PAINT TECH (NOT his-recording, NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC, NOT machine-listens-to-HIS-recording) ¬∑ clinical-Ikeda active VIBE (deliberately NOT ambient)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. The 3 explorers spread inputs (mic / external-API / transport-touch) and techniques (spectral-paint / space-weather-sonification / EDM-arrangement); the two non-winners (`831-solar-wind-organ` ‚Čą existing `314`/`471`; `832-drop-engine` ‚Čą existing `387`/`631`) were caught redundant at the curate grep and **NOT committed or re-seeded as fresh** (logged honestly to STATE/IDEAS as a research-grep lesson; saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-509/`). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack compile PASS, reached `Collecting page data`; **833 folder grep-clean** ‚ÄĒ zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint` on the folder ‚Üí 0/0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether painting the frozen spectrogram audibly reworks the resynth and whether the additive-bank level is balanced on a real device (the demo-sound path + on-load animation guarantee a sounding, animated glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/833-spectral-loom/README.md`

## (Cycle 508 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/828-kids-feelings-sun](/dream/828-kids-feelings-sun)** ‚ÄĒ Feelings Sun ūüĆěūüíõ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 508 (kids, 4+). **For**: a 4-year-old on iPad/mobile ¬∑ **touch-DRAG input** (one big draggable sun; mouse too) ¬∑ **animated SVG/DOM output** (glowing sun with `feGaussianBlur`, CSS-animated sky gradient + drifting motes ‚ÄĒ NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js, NOT WebGL) ¬∑ **2-D affect-field ‚Üí bilinear chord-quality morph** technique (grep-thin ‚ÄĒ the kids lane's first *continuous emotional* harmony-shaper) ¬∑ **warm emotional kids-sky vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could SHAPE the FEELING of a chord ‚ÄĒ drag one friendly sun across a feelings-sky and the harmony morphs happy‚ÜĒcozy‚ÜĒfloaty‚ÜĒdreamy ‚ÄĒ instead of tapping a pre-approved pentatonic scale?** The sun's (x,y) **bilinearly blends four chord qualities** at the corners: up-left bright **major** (happy), down-left **minor** (cozy/wistful), down-right **sus** (floaty), up-right **add9/maj7** (dreamy). A fixed Web Audio pad always holds ONE tonal center (**root drone + perfect-fifth ALWAYS sounding**, so it is always "in tune"); two **color voices glide continuously** ‚ÄĒ the harmonic third morphs maj3‚ÜĒmin3‚ÜĒP4, plus a high added-tone voice that fades in toward the dreamy corner ‚ÄĒ ALL via `setTargetAtTime`/ramps so the harmony morphs **click-free** (voices never re-triggered). Every position is consonant, but the child genuinely controls bright-vs-dark / open-vs-rich / plain-vs-dreamy. The sky gradient, the sun's **expressive face** (smile + sleepy-dreamy eyes), its glow color, and floating motes all shift with the current feeling; a soft bell sparkle trails the sun. **This is the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21 #4** (kill "pentatonic-never-wrong"; let harmony be *shaped*) on the **emotion axis** ‚ÄĒ completing the kids harmony-shaping set: `816` shaped harmony by **interval-stacking**, `822` shaped **rhythm** by spinning polygons, `828` shapes the **feeling/quality** continuously. It also satisfies **JURY #5** ("stop banking DEEP losers ‚ÄĒ ship a banked sibling"): 828 is the cycle-506 ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST banked `823-kids-feelings-chords`, built and shipped. **Interaction (no reading):** drag the ‚Č•200px sun anywhere; untouched for ~1.5s it gently auto-drifts on a slow Lissajous path so an unattended phone is always morphing + singing. Kids-safe `master gain ‚Čą0.28 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Čą7000 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; soft ~0.6s attacks; always-on pad (never silent); iOS gesture-gated AudioContext in the first tap; full rAF + `audioCtx.close()` teardown. **Degrades:** no Web Audio ‚Üí friendly `text-rose-300` notice, visuals stay alive. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no network, no data collection); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [touch affect-field mapping + bilinear chord-quality morph engine + always-on pad/color-voice synth + animated SVG render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Russell's circumplex model of affect** (valence√óarousal) ¬∑ **Hevner's affective tone/mode associations** ¬∑ current touchstone **Synesthesia "Color to Sound" 2026 AURA mode** color‚Üí4-voice chord]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #4 (kill pentatonic; shape harmony) + #5 (ship a banked sibling ‚ÄĒ resurrects the ¬ß506 ‚≠ź `823`) ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß508 (color/feeling‚Üíchord; Synesthesia AURA 2026 + Sound Color Project/Plutchik) ‚Üí this kids **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`829-kids-color-blend`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (mix two glowing colored lights ‚Üí the color you make IS the chord; **raw WebGL2** ‚ÄĒ the lab's COLDEST renderer, 0√ó in the last 10; color-as-language, love-aligned `82`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`317`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) + **`830-kids-feelings-choir`** (tap to gather singing creatures into a circle ‚Üí assemble a chord; Canvas2D, Toca-Band orchestration) as **IDEAS ¬ß508**. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source ¬∑ machine-listens-to-recording ¬∑ pentatonic-never-wrong ¬∑ UPIC pitch-painter ¬∑ adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 828)=[touch-DRAG INPUT ¬∑ SVG/DOM OUTPUT (‚Č§3√ó, not banned ‚ÄĒ jury said surfaces are spread, don't reflexively flee) ¬∑ continuous-affect-field chord-quality-morph TECH (NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC, NOT his-recording) ¬∑ warm-emotional kids VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; the 3 explorers spread renderers SVG-DOM / WebGL2 / Canvas2D and shaping-mechanisms feeling-position / color-mix / gather-orchestration. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack compile PASS, reached `Collecting page data`; **828 folder grep-clean** ‚ÄĒ zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old reads "drag up-left = happy, down-left = cozy" without instruction and whether the third audibly morphs major‚ÜĒminor smoothly on a real device (the always-on pad + fifth + idle auto-drift guarantee a sounding, morphing glance regardless).
