## (Cycle 507 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/827-waveguide-mesh](/dream/827-waveguide-mesh)** ‚ÄĒ Waveguide Mesh ūü™ėūüĆä. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 507 (adult / live-performance / installation). **For**: adults / stage ¬∑ **Web MIDI + on-screen-pad + direct-membrane + keyboard input** (the most stage-playable in the window; MIDI is **0√ó in the last 10 shipped** ‚ÄĒ the starved input) ¬∑ **Canvas2D displacement-field output** (coppery-violet heatmap that paints the *exact* field the audio reads) ¬∑ **2-D digital-waveguide-mesh / FDTD wave-equation membrane run at AUDIO sample rate in an AudioWorklet** technique ¬∑ **percussive, metallic, live-performance vibe ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT ambient**. **What if a chord weren't synthesized but physically *travelled*?** You strike a point on a 2-D vibrating drumhead; a Gaussian energy bump spreads, reflects off the rigid rim, interferes with itself, and rings as a real plate/drum tone via the standard FDTD update `u_next = (2u ‚ąí u_prev + C¬≤‚ąá¬≤u)¬∑damping` (fixed boundaries, C inside the 2-D CFL bound ‚Č§1/‚ąö2). The mesh runs **at the sample rate inside a Blob-URL `AudioWorklet`** (`worklet-source.ts`); the **audio signal IS the displacement read at fixed pickup nodes** (DC-blocked + softly saturated), and the worklet posts a downsampled field ~45√ó/s so **the wavefronts you see are the waveform you hear**. If `AudioWorklet` is unavailable it degrades to a matched **bank of modal resonators** (circular-membrane eigenratios 1.00¬∑1.59¬∑2.14¬∑2.30¬∑2.65‚Ä¶) excited per strike + a control-rate FDTD mesh for the same visual ‚ÄĒ audio/visual stay coupled either way. **Play it** via a MIDI keyboard (note-on velocity = strike force, pitch = membrane tension = wave speed = strike position), two rows of on-screen pads (toms/plates ‚ÄĒ tap several for a chord), direct taps on the head, or the A‚ÄďL computer-keyboard row; status line shows "MIDI connected ‚úď" or an amber "no MIDI ‚ÄĒ use the pads." Pitch is the **full chromatic scale** (NOT pentatonic); higher notes tighten the head (faster waves, shorter ring) for articulation; chords = multiple strikes summed into one membrane. Master `gain ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§12 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; audio gesture-gated (iOS unlock); idle auto-strikes so the canvas is never dead. **No samples, no recordings, no network, no API route ‚Üí no `guard`; zero new npm deps.** Ambition honest **2/5** (**#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems [FDTD mesh DSP + Web MIDI + AudioWorklet audio-rate engine w/ modal fallback + Canvas2D renderer = 4] ¬∑ **#3** named refs [**Van Duyne & Smith, "Physical Modeling with the 2-D Digital Waveguide Mesh," ICMC 1993**; Perry Cook STK modal synthesis for the fallback]). **#1 NOT claimed (honesty):** FDTD-wave-field-as-sound already exists as kids `478-kids-wave-pond` + `489-kids-pond-pair`; 827's genuine differentiators are the **adult MIDI live-performance register** of that family and the **audio-rate-in-AudioWorklet** mesh (vs. their control-rate visual + pickup). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 (rest his recording, end the answering-agent thread, stop defaulting to adult-ambient, chase a starved frontier) ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß507 (GPU-compute-field‚Üísound is *saturated* in the lab ‚ÄĒ `327`/`520`/`579`/`55` + ShaderVine 2026 ‚ÄĒ so redirect off it toward the starved live-performance/MIDI physical-model axis) ‚Üí this adult **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`825-gravity-sequencer`** (pointer ¬∑ symplectic N-body orbital integration as a *percussion sequencer* ‚ÄĒ perihelion crossings strike tuned bells, stable orbits lock a groove, chaos drifts it; Otomata + Kepler) + **`826-spectral-loom`** (live-mic STFT freeze ‚Üí editable spectral-image buffer ‚Üí additive resynth; smear/scrub/brush the frozen spectrum like wet paint, edit-the-picture-edits-the-sound, demoable mic-free; Jean-Fran√ßois Charles CMJ 2008) as **IDEAS ¬ß507**. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source ¬∑ machine-listens-to-recording ¬∑ pentatonic-never-wrong ¬∑ UPIC pitch-painter ¬∑ adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 827)=[Web-MIDI/pad INPUT (starved 0√ó in window) ¬∑ Canvas2D displacement-field OUTPUT (‚Č§3√ó, not banned) ¬∑ 2-D-FDTD-waveguide-mesh-audio TECH (not in last 10) ¬∑ percussive live-performance VIBE (NOT ambient)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; the 3 explorers spread inputs MIDI/pointer/mic and techniques waveguide-mesh/orbital-sequencer/spectral-paint. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 42s` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚Üí Collecting page data**; **827 folder grep-clean** ‚ÄĒ zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint` on the folder ‚Üí 0/0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (fails identically on pristine `main`; ceiling cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the audio-rate worklet mesh stays stable + musical across a real device and whether the visible field reads as tightly synced to the sound (idle auto-strikes guarantee a sounding, rippling glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/827-waveguide-mesh/README.md`

## Cycle 506 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/822-kids-shape-drums](/dream/822-kids-shape-drums)** ‚ÄĒ Shape Drums ūüĒļūü•Ā. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 506 (kids, 4+). **For**: a 4-year-old on iPad/mobile ¬∑ **touch input** (tap to add/cycle shapes, big turtle/rabbit speed buttons) ¬∑ **Canvas2D output** (full-bleed `requestAnimationFrame` rotating polygons ‚ÄĒ off the recent three.js 799/803/805 streak; jury says Canvas2D no longer banned at 3√ó and the concept reads cleanly in 2D) ¬∑ **polyrhythm-as-rotating-polygons / vertex-crossing scheduler** technique (grep-thin ‚ÄĒ the kids lane's FIRST shapeable-rhythm piece) ¬∑ **playful, bold-saturated-on-near-black, geometric, calm-but-lively vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could BUILD a polyrhythm by spinning shapes ‚ÄĒ choosing how many sides each shape has and how fast it spins ‚ÄĒ instead of tapping a pre-approved pentatonic scale?** 1‚Äď5 big rotating polygons sit on a dark canvas, each a bold color with glowing vertex dots; a faint trigger line crosses the top of each shape, and every time a vertex sweeps past it the shape PINGS a warm note + flashes a ripple. A triangle pings **3√ó/rotation**, a hexagon **6√ó** ‚ÄĒ so the **number of sides the child chooses IS the rhythmic subdivision**, and the **spin speed IS the tempo**. Two shapes of different side-counts spinning at related speeds (√ó0.5/√ó1/√ó1.5/√ó2 of a base tempo, snapped so they stay clean) drift in and out of phase ‚ÄĒ the child has literally *built* a 3-against-2 or 4-against-3 polyrhythm. **This is the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21 #4** ‚ÄĒ which banned the kids lane's "pentatonic-never-wrong" crutch (6√ó) and asked for a piece where **harmony OR rhythm can be *shaped***. Cycle 504 answered the *harmony* half (`816-kids-tone-tower`, JI chord-stacking); 822 answers the **rhythm** half (the grep-thin register), completing the pair. Pitch is NOT the child's variable ‚ÄĒ each shape is locked to one tone of a single warm **Dadd9 stack** (D3/A3/D4/F#4/B4) so *every* combination is consonant ‚ÄĒ the child shapes the **rhythmic interplay**, never a "wrong note." **Interaction (no reading):** big round **+** (80px) adds a shape (cycles triangle‚Üísquare‚Üípentagon‚Üíhexagon, cap 5); **tap a shape** cycles its sides 3‚Üí8; **tap its center** removes it (never empty); one **giant 64px speed button per shape** (turtle/rabbit, no words) cycles the musically-related ratios. Pings fire via a per-frame **vertex-crossing edge detector** in the rAF loop; soft marimba/bell synthesis (3 detuned partials, click-free `linearRamp`-attack/`setTargetAtTime`-decay, lowpass tail, light feedback delay) + a quiet sustained pad so it's never silent ‚ÄĒ levels low, safe for a sleeping toddler. **Audio gesture-gated** ("tap to start" overlay, iOS unlock), rAF cancelled + AudioContext closed on unmount. **Degrades:** no Web Audio ‚Üí visuals stay alive + a small "sound is off" notice (no throw). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no network, no data collection); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2‚Äď3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [touch shape-builder + rotating-geometry vertex-crossing scheduler + chord-voiced marimba synth + Canvas2D render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**"Polyrhythms in shapes"** / thekidshouldseethis ¬∑ **Musical Toys "Polyrhythm"** ¬∑ **Steve Reich phasing / Harvard pendulum-wave** lineage] ¬∑ soft #5 RESEARCH ¬ß506 today). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #4 (kill pentatonic; shape rhythm) + #5 (ship a banked sibling ‚ÄĒ this resurrects/de-pentatones the ¬ß504-banked `818-kids-pendulum-choir` as a rotating-polygon variant) ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß506 (polyrhythm-as-rotating-polygons) ‚Üí this kids **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`823-kids-feelings-chords`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (drag a sun across a feelings-sky ‚Üí SHAPE the chord's emotion major‚ÜĒminor‚ÜĒsus‚ÜĒadd9, SVG/DOM ‚ÄĒ the renderer-diverse harmony pick) + **`824-kids-clap-loop`** (clap a rhythm ‚Üí a glowing WebGL2 band loops it back, resurrects ¬ß504-banked 817) as **IDEAS ¬ß506**. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source ¬∑ machine-listens-to-recording ¬∑ pentatonic-never-wrong ¬∑ UPIC pitch-painter ¬∑ adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 822)=[touch INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT (off the three.js streak) ¬∑ polyrhythm-rotating-polygon shapeable-RHYTHM TECH (NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC) ¬∑ playful-geometric kids VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban; the 3 explorers spread renderers Canvas2D/SVG-DOM/WebGL2 (the "spread, don't flip" answer). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: all code gates PASS ‚ÄĒ TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack compile, reached `Collecting page data`; **822 folder grep-clean** ‚ÄĒ zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container **~4096-fd `EMFILE`** at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen. *Nuance THIS cycle:* pristine `main` built **fully** (just under the fd ceiling), and adding 822 (one more of ~500 routes) tips static-gen over it ‚ÄĒ a **page-count fd-exhaustion at the global font manifest, not 822's code** (it has no fonts/imports beyond React and reached `Collecting page data` clean); the ceiling is **unraisable even as root** (cgroup-locked: `prlimit`/`ulimit` ‚Üí "Operation not permitted"). Vercel's higher fd ceiling builds + deploys it, as every prior cycle. Unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old reads "more sides = more pings, faster spin = faster" without instruction, and whether the polyrhythm reads as mesmerizing vs. busy on a real device (the seeded shapes + always-on pad guarantee a sounding, spinning glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/822-kids-shape-drums/README.md`

## (Cycle 505 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, one concept √ó 3 feedback-synthesis approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/820-feedback-ecology](/dream/820-feedback-ecology)** ‚ÄĒ Feedback Ecology ūüĆÄ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 505 (adult / live-performance / installation). **For**: adults ¬∑ **touch/gesture input** (tap nodes to perturb; sliders for coupling + self-resonance) ¬∑ **Canvas2D node-graph / phase-space output** (NOT a plain oscilloscope ‚ÄĒ the *system* is drawn) ¬∑ **coupled-resonator dynamical-system / self-oscillating feedback technique** (grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST feedback instrument) ¬∑ **energetic, emergent, organic-but-electric vibe (deliberately NOT ambient)**. **What if an instrument were a *living dynamical system* ‚ÄĒ a network of resonators that feed each other, self-organize into emergent drones and rhythmic instabilities, and that you play by *perturbing the ecology* rather than triggering notes?** Eight high-Q `BiquadFilter` resonators each sit inside a tight feedback loop (`filter ‚Üí delay ‚Üí feedbackGain ‚Üí filter`), wired into a **small-world coupling graph** (ring backbone weight 0.7 + cross-link shortcuts 0.4). Above a coupling threshold the network **bifurcates**: low coupling = isolated pings; mid = nodes entrain and beat into polyrhythmic textures; high = a roaring emergent drone with energy visibly circulating the ring. It is genuinely **non-stationary ‚ÄĒ minute 2 differs from minute 0** because the coupled resonators exchange energy asymmetrically and drift across operating points over time (the long-form-stateful register the lab is thin on, and the exact thing JURY 2026-06-21 flagged missing from pruning-candidate `805`: "no state that makes minute 5 differ from minute 1"). **Interaction:** Awaken ‚Üí tap a node to inject an excitation impulse (watch energy propagate), tap empty space to seed all nodes, **coupling slider** = the bifurcation control, **self-resonance slider** = the edge-of-chaos control, three tuning presets (overtone JI on A1 55 Hz / subharmonic utonal / tight cluster). **Visualizer** makes the dynamical system legible: node size+glow = live RMS energy, **edge flow-particles** = coupling √ó signal transfer (energy moving around the ring), a **phase-space Lissajous trace inside each node** = its limit cycle/attractor, a bottom energy strip = per-node activity over time. **Ear-safety** (this is a self-oscillating instrument ‚ÄĒ it *will* try to get loud): all eight paths converge into one brick-wall `DynamicsCompressorNode` (‚ąí8 dB, ratio 20, 1 ms attack) ‚Üí master gain (default 0.25); per-node self-feedback hard-clamped at 0.88 (above this it diverges to digital noise, not music), cross-coupling clamped at 0.35/edge; **no auto-start** (AudioContext resumes only on the "Awaken the Ecology" tap, iOS unlock), a 2 s gentle ramp-up on start, an always-visible **Panic/Mute** that ramps to silence in 10 ms. **Degrades:** three.js/WebGL not needed (Canvas2D); no Web Audio ‚Üí readable notice. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no recordings, no external API ‚ÄĒ the sound is *only* feedback); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **lab-first self-oscillating feedback instrument AND first coupled-dynamical-system piece** ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó for no-input/Larsen/feedback-as-sound-source ¬∑ #3 named refs [**"Musicking with dynamical systems"** ACM dl.acm.org/10.1145/3678299.3678302 ¬∑ **David Tudor** *Rainforest*/*Pulsers* feedback ecosystems ¬∑ **Toshimaru Nakamura** no-input mixing board ¬∑ **Body Synths Laboratory**, Superbooth 2026, Berlin May 7‚Äď9] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß505 today). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 (rest his recording + end the answering-agent thread + stop defaulting to adult-ambient) ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß505 (no-input/self-oscillation revival; Superbooth 2026) ‚Üí this adult **DEEP** fire. Winner of a 3-approach fire; banked **`819-no-input-mixer`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (faithful no-input mixer, XY-pad, WebGL2 oscilloscope ‚ÄĒ the more directly *playable* one, on the scarcest renderer) + **`821-larsen-field`** (live acoustic Larsen + virtual fallback, notch/peak carving) as **IDEAS ¬ß505**. **Diversity:** `banned=[his-recording-source ¬∑ machine-listens-to-recording ¬∑ pentatonic-never-wrong ¬∑ UPIC pitch-painter ¬∑ adult-ambient-as-default-register]` ¬∑ `picked=[touch/gesture INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D node-graph/phase-space OUTPUT (off the cooled three.js 799/803/805 streak; Canvas2D no longer banned at 3√ó, and the concept NEEDS a graph ‚ÄĒ jury "pick the renderer the concept needs") ¬∑ audio-self-oscillation/coupled-dynamical-system TECH ¬∑ energetic-emergent VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 38.9s` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚Üí Collecting page data**; **820 folder grep-clean** of the log ‚ÄĒ zero warnings/errors, only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**proven infra THIS cycle: moved 820 out, rebuilt pristine `main` ‚Üí identical `‚úď Compiled successfully` then identical EMFILE**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear/eye: whether the network audibly self-organizes/evolves as intended on a real device and whether the energy-flow + phase-space traces read at a glance (the seeded impulses + 2 s ramp guarantee a sounding, evolving glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/820-feedback-ecology/README.md`

## (Cycle 504 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/816-kids-tone-tower](/dream/816-kids-tone-tower)** ‚ÄĒ Tone Tower ūüßĪūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 504 (kids, 4+). **For**: a 4-year-old on iPad/mobile ¬∑ **touch input** (tap/drag to stack) ¬∑ **animated SVG/DOM output** (glowing blocks, gaussian-glow filters, CSS topple ‚ÄĒ NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js) ¬∑ **vertical interval-stacking ‚Üí just-intonation chord construction** technique (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ **warm cream nursery, bold saturated, calm-playful vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could build a CHORD by stacking blocks ‚ÄĒ genuinely SHAPING the harmony, not just triggering pre-approved notes?** A glowing tower sits on a cream play area; the bottom block is a soft ~F3 root, and each block the child stacks sits a musical **interval** above the one below. The size of the vertical gap the child drags **chooses the interval** ‚ÄĒ normalized to 0..1200 cents and **snapped to the nearest entry in a just-intonation consonance lattice** (`harmony.ts`: unison 1/1 ¬∑ maj2 9/8 ¬∑ min3 6/5 ¬∑ maj3 5/4 ¬∑ P4 4/3 ¬∑ P5 3/2 ¬∑ maj6 5/3 ¬∑ octave 2/1). Because every entry is a small-whole-number ratio, **any** stack is consonant and never harsh ‚ÄĒ but the child genuinely controls open-vs-close, simple-vs-rich, bright-vs-dark. **This is the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21's kids verdict** ‚ÄĒ which BANNED "pentatonic-never-wrong as the kids harmonic crutch" (6√ó) and the "UPIC pitch-painter" (3√ó) and demanded "a kids piece where harmony or rhythm can be *shaped*, not one where every note is pre-approved." Tone Tower is harmony *shaped* by the child's gesture, off both banned tags. **Interaction:** drag-up to drop a block (a dotted reach-line + ghost block preview the placement live); a plain tap drops a friendly warm third; **‚Ė∂** strums the tower bottom‚Üítop; **ūüí•** topples it with a downward gliss + sparkle, then re-seeds ‚ÄĒ no fail states, no reading, color is the only language (unison gold ‚Üí octave magenta-rose), voices cap at 8. **Audio** (`audio.ts`): kids-safe chain `gain 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor`, warm triangle+sine voices with ~50ms attacks, an always-on soft ambient pad, a looping arpeggio so a hands-off glance is sounding on load; AudioContext resumed inside the first tap (iOS), full teardown on unmount. **Degrades:** no Web Audio ‚Üí visible rose-700 notice, visuals stay fully alive. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **vertical interval-stacking chord-construction** ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó, harmony-shaping is a thin kids register ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [touch-stack interaction + JI lattice gap‚Üícents‚Üíratio engine + arpeggiator/strum synth + animated SVG render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Friedrich Froebel's "Gifts"** ‚ÄĒ the original kindergarten building blocks ¬∑ **uCue**, Interaction Design and Children 2025/ACM ‚ÄĒ a children's musical interface with harmony layers of "common and unusual harmonizations" ¬∑ **Harry Partch tonality-diamond just-intonation lattice**]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 kids verdict (ban pentatonic-crutch + UPIC; "let harmony be shaped") ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß504 (uCue children's-harmony-shaping anchor) ‚Üí this kids **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`817-kids-clap-back-band`** (mic clap-onset ‚Üí WebGL2; the child's own clapped rhythm becomes the band's groove ‚ÄĒ Orff echo-clapping; de-selected for rhyming with the recent `773-parade-caller` rhythm-capture) + **`818-kids-pendulum-choir`** (touch-release pendulum-wave polyrhythm on audio-forward SVG ‚ÄĒ Harvard pendulum wave / OSZILOT / Ligeti *Po√®me Symphonique*; de-selected for leaning on a D-pentatonic chime palette, the jury-banned crutch) as **IDEAS ¬ß504**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 42s` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚úď ‚Üí Collecting page data**; **816 folder grep-clean** of the build log ‚ÄĒ zero warnings/errors; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; the builder also verified `tsc --strict --noUnusedLocals --noUnusedParameters` clean on its files); **NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, fails identically on pristine main, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old reads "drag higher = a wider, brighter chord" without instruction, and whether the JI stacks sound as warm on a real device as intended (the looping arpeggio + seeded triad guarantee a sounding, glowing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/816-kids-tone-tower/README.md`

## (Cycle 503 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 2 memory-engine approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/814-remembering-room](/dream/814-remembering-room)** ‚ÄĒ Remembering Room ūüéĻūüß†. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 503. **For**: adults / live performance / intimate ¬∑ **his-recording-as-soloist input** (JURY 2026-06-20 #2 explicitly licensed this ‚ÄĒ the return-and-extend of 770) ¬∑ **audio-forward DOM/CSS + small `<canvas>` output** (deliberately off the jury's **Canvas2D 10√ó/15 monoculture** and off a fullscreen shader ‚ÄĒ the restraint is the point) ¬∑ **symbolic motif memory / Adaptive Phrase Bank** technique (grep-0√ó ‚ÄĒ the lab's first agent with long-form symbolic memory) ¬∑ **warm / hearth-lit / meditative-duet vibe**. **What if Karel's real recorded "Welcome Home" piano plays as the SOLOIST, a machine live-music agent accompanies it AND answers in his gaps ‚ÄĒ but now the agent REMEMBERS: it keeps a growing bank of motifs (its own best answers + salient contours lifted from his playing) and over minutes develops them ‚ÄĒ transpose-into-key / augment / diminish / fragment / invert / sequence ‚ÄĒ so minute 5 is a reworking of minute 1, not fresh improvisation?** This is the lab's **first true cycle-2 of `770-answering-room`** (whose agent had **zero** long-form memory ‚ÄĒ every answer improvised fresh and forgotten), the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-20 #2** ("the depth ceiling collapsed 4‚Üí1; RETURN AND EXTEND 770 to a real 4/5 ‚ÄĒ let the agent accrete a motif over minutes so minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1"). **Listener** (`listener.ts`): FFT‚Üí12-bin chroma ‚Üí 24-template major/minor triad fit + tension, energy/spectral-flux, a phrase-gap state machine; **new for cycle-2** ‚ÄĒ it samples his dominant pitch-class ~9√ó/s and freezes a **key-independent degree-step contour** at each phrase end so the agent can *lift his gesture*. **Agent + memory engine** (`agent.ts`): a warm retuning pad under his chord + a sparse FM-bell answer that fires **only in his gaps**, PLUS the **Adaptive Phrase Bank** ‚ÄĒ motifs stored **symbolically** as `{degrees, durs}` (scale-degree steps + relative durations, key-independent so replayable in any later key), entering the bank two ways (the agent banks its own good answers; it lifts his contours); a global **memory pressure** rises over minutes (~150s constant, scaled by a slider) so early gaps get short fresh inventions and later gaps increasingly **recall** a banked motif and apply a classical development (transpose/augment/diminish/fragment/invert/sequence); a weighted pick favours under-used motifs; bank caps at 10. **Visual** (`page.tsx`): a restrained warm DOM/CSS hearth (two facing glows ‚ÄĒ *him* breathing with his energy, *the answer* lit only while answering ‚ÄĒ a faint duet thread, the detected chord name shown large) PLUS a small `<canvas>` **memory shelf** ‚ÄĒ each banked motif a glowing contour **sparkline** (amber = his lifted gestures, rose = the agent's own answers) that **flares on recall** with reuse-count dots beneath, so the long-form accretion is *legible*. Two sliders: **company** (shy‚ÜĒtalkative) + **memory** (invent‚ÜĒrecall). **Graceful degradation:** no recording fetch ‚Üí an offline `OfflineAudioContext` ~16s warm lyrical fallback plays with an honest emerald "synthesized fallback" badge ‚ÄĒ the room is never silent and runs fully offline. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (read-only GET to the existing `/api/audio/[id]`, nothing recorded/sent); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **4/5** (#1 **first long-form symbolic motif-memory agent** ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó, lab-thin long-form-stateful register ¬∑ #4 **multi-cycle** ‚ÄĒ explicit cycle-2 of 770 with a cycle-3 plan in the README ¬∑ #3 named refs [**CHI 2026 "A Design Space for Live Music Agents"** arXiv 2602.05064 ‚ÄĒ its "Adaptation" axis names sustained motif development as an *uncoded gap*; its **Adaptive Phrase Bank** is the seed ¬∑ **MusicWeaver** arXiv 2509.21714 ‚ÄĒ **Motif Memory Retrieval (MMR)** ¬∑ **Yin-Yang** arXiv 2501.17759 ‚ÄĒ corruption-refinement motif variation ¬∑ **Christopher Raphael, *Music Plus One*** ¬∑ 770 lineage] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß503 today). The directest answer to the jury's #1 headline (the depth ceiling that collapsed 4‚Üí1) ‚ÄĒ the window's first new ceiling build. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`815-accreting-room`** (the textural-memory sibling ‚ÄĒ every agent phrase leaves a sustained ghost-layer residue that thickens the room into an Eno tapestry over minutes; de-selected for sitting close to last cycle's 808 sustain-accretion) as **IDEAS ¬ß503**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.1min` ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types ‚úď ‚Üí Collecting page data ‚Üí all code gates passed**; **814 folder grep-clean** of the log ‚ÄĒ zero warnings/errors; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; the 814 builder independently got a **full exit-0 build, 541/541 static pages**); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, fails identically on pristine main, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether the agent's recalls audibly read as "it's quoting and varying its own earlier phrase" vs. generic answering, and whether the memory shelf reads at a glance (the always-on pad + synthesized fallback guarantee a sounding glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/814-remembering-room/README.md`

## Cycle 502 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/811-kids-body-ribbons](/dream/811-kids-body-ribbons)** ‚ÄĒ Body Ribbons ūüéÄūüēļ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 502. **For**: kids (4+) / whole-body play ¬∑ **body-tracking input** (MediaPipe Pose ‚ÄĒ the JURY's most-starved INPUT register, body/camera went **4√ó‚Üí0√ó**; off the banned touch) ¬∑ **SVG/DOM output** (the jury's starved 1√ó surface ‚ÄĒ deliberately off **both** the banned Canvas2D **and** the **three.js 3√ó-in-a-row monoculture** 799‚Üí803‚Üí805) ¬∑ **full-body UPIC gesture‚Üípitch-score** technique (rests his recording) ¬∑ **calm-playful warm-glow vibe** (not bright-active). **What if a 4-year-old's whole BODY is a continuous musical score ‚ÄĒ they wave their arms and dance, and their moving hands draw glowing ribbons across the screen that sing as they move, the way Xenakis's UPIC turned a child's drawing into music?** **MediaPipe Pose** (33 landmarks, lite model, runtime CDN import via `webpackIgnore` ‚ÄĒ never bundled) tracks the body; the two **wrists** are the instruments. **Wrist height ‚Üí pitch** (C-major-pentatonic, 2 octaves, snapped so there are **no wrong notes**); **speed of movement ‚Üí loudness + ribbon brightness** (hold still and the note softly sustains, then fades); **horizontal position ‚Üí timbre** (vibrato depth); **nose ‚Üí a soft shimmer voice**; **both arms raised high ‚Üí a gentle gold sparkle chord**. Each wrist continuously emits a **glowing SVG ribbon trail** in its own warm color (left = amber/gold, right = rose/violet) ‚ÄĒ Catmull-Rom-smoothed cubic paths, a 2-pass gaussian-glow + bright-core render, age-faded over ~7s so the screen accretes and breathes (never a hard loop). The lab's **first full-body UPIC instrument**; the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body input 4√ó‚Üí0√ó, the single most-starved register) and **#5** (the jury named "the full-body version of 781's UPIC idea is sitting unbuilt in your own research log"). **Kid-safe audio:** `master ‚Č§0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on C2+G2 sine drone pad; triangle voices with vibrato LFO, 80ms portamento, soft attacks / 1‚Äď3s releases; pentatonic so nothing is "wrong". **Privacy + safety:** camera frames are analysis-only ‚ÄĒ **never recorded, uploaded, or sent**; iOS gesture-gated `AudioContext` + `getUserMedia({video})` both inside the first Start tap (‚Č•72px). **Graceful degradation:** MediaPipe loads in the background while a **ghost-body auto-demo** (`makeGhostBody`) dances + sounds hands-free within ~2s; **camera-denied ‚Üí the ghost keeps playing** + a `text-rose-300` notice ‚ÄĒ a sounding, drawing screen with no permissions. Full teardown (rAF + **stop camera tracks** + `landmarker.close()` + node disconnect + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [MediaPipe Pose tracking + UPIC y‚Üípentatonic mapping + dual-wrist polyphonic synth w/ vibrato/drone/shimmer + speed‚Üíloudness + multi-pass SVG glow-ribbon render] + #3 named refs [**Iannis Xenakis ‚ÄĒ UPIC** 1977 ¬∑ **¬°Otro!** IAIA Digital Dome premiere Apr-2026 (Tavarez/Trujillo, real-time movement‚Üísonification) ¬∑ **Frid et al.** *Interactive Sonification of Spontaneous Movement of Children* Frontiers 2016] + soft-#5 RESEARCH ¬ß502 today). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`812-kids-breath-bubbles`** (raw WebGL2 ¬∑ blow‚Üíaccreting glow-bubble cloud that pops in pentatonic chimes/chords) + **`813-kids-sky-lullaby`** (SVG/DOM ¬∑ live Open-Meteo sky ‚Üí Eno-style moon-aware dusk lullaby, tilt-stirred) as **IDEAS ¬ß502**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 101s` ‚Üí Collecting page data ‚Üí all code gates passed**; **811 folder grep-clean** after trimming one unused eslint-disable directive; `npx next lint` on the folder ‚Üí "No ESLint warnings or errors"; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT camera/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by eye/ear: whether the ribbon visibly tracks a child's arm height and reads as "I raised my arm and it sang higher" (the always-on pad + ghost-body fallback guarantee a sounding, drawing glance regardless). Builder-flagged: per-frame Pose inference may jank on old iPads (lite model + ghost fallback mitigate).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/811-kids-body-ribbons/README.md`

## Cycle 501 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 resonator engines, shipped 1

- **[/dream/808-sympathetic-strings](/dream/808-sympathetic-strings)** ‚ÄĒ Sympathetic Strings ūüéĽūüéĻ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 501. **For**: adults / live performance / intimate ¬∑ **mic / live-audio input** (off the jury-banned touch) ¬∑ **SVG/DOM output** (the jury's starved 1√ó surface ‚ÄĒ deliberately off the **three.js 3√ó-in-a-row monoculture** 799‚Üí803‚Üí805 AND the banned Canvas2D) ¬∑ **Karplus-Strong tuned-delay-line sympathetic resonator bank** technique (rests his recording; distinct from `803`'s modal-bandpass banks) ¬∑ **dark / warm / nocturnal vibe** (not bright-active kids). **What if you play or sing into your mic and exactly the right strings ring back ‚ÄĒ your sound waking an illusory bank of tuned strings that vibrate sympathetically, the way a grand piano's strings hum when you hold the sustain pedal?** 48 tuned strings, each a **real Karplus-Strong tuned delay line** (`L = sampleRate / freq`, one-pole lowpass loop filter, feedback just under 1) running in an **AudioWorklet loaded from a Blob URL** (no `/public` file). The live mic feeds all 48 delay lines; an `AnalyserNode` FFT scales each string's excitation gain by how much spectral energy sits at its pitch ‚ÄĒ so strings tuned to what you play ring, the rest stay quiet (continuous sympathetic excitation, not discrete strikes). A **mode selector** (homage to the **Electronic Audio Experiments *Prismatic Wall*** sympathetic-string pedal) retunes the bank live across **Chromatic / Stacked Fifths / Overtone Series**. **Sustain-pedal physics:** spacebar or on-screen hold drives feedback **0.92 (fast damp) ‚ÜĒ 0.997 (near-lossless)**, so with the pedal held the bank **accretes a shimmering bed audibly fuller at minute 3 than second 10** (real delay-line state ‚ÄĒ the jury's depth-ceiling ask). **SVG visualization:** 48 vertical strings, each string's glow/stroke-width/wobble driven imperatively in `requestAnimationFrame` from the worklet's ~15 fps per-string RMS level reports (`port.postMessage`), `feGaussianBlur` glow, low‚Üíhigh amber‚Üíviolet‚Üíblue hue map. The lab's **first mic-excited sympathetic-string instrument** and **first Karplus-Strong-as-shipped** (the banked `802-body-aviary` KS forest never shipped). **Audio safety:** mic source **never** routed to `destination` (no howl), worklet feedback hard-clamped ‚Č§0.999, `DynamicsCompressor` (20:1, ‚ąí18 dB) as limiter. **Graceful degradation:** mic-deny ‚Üí an autonomous **ghost exciter** plucks quasi-chord groups so it rings + sounds within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; click/tap any string to pluck it directly; no-WebAudio ‚Üí friendly rose notice. Full teardown (rAF + worklet + mic tracks + AnalyserNode + intervals + `AudioContext.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, mic stays on-device, nothing recorded/sent); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [mic FFT analysis + KS tuned-delay-line worklet resonator bank + per-string spectral excitation gating + sustain-pedal feedback accretion + SVG string-field render] + #3 named refs [**EAE *Prismatic Wall*** sympathetic string resonator 2026 ¬∑ **Karplus-Strong / Jaffe‚ÄďSmith** CMJ 1983 ¬∑ sitar *tarab* / viola d'amore ¬∑ Henry Cowell string-piano] + soft-#1 mic-excited KS sympathetic bank is grep-0√ó + soft-#5 RESEARCH ¬ß501). Piano-native + live-performance-fit (Karel priority #3 ‚ÄĒ point a mic at his real piano and the strings answer). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-resonator-engine fire; banked **`809-sympathetic-modes`** (FFT-gated high-Q bandpass bank ‚ÄĒ lost for rhyming with `803`'s modal banks) + **`810-sympathetic-comb`** (native feedback-comb bank ‚ÄĒ most robust, least KS-faithful; its per-comb AnalyserNode level tap worth folding into 808) as **IDEAS ¬ß501**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 102s` ‚Üí Collecting page data ‚Üí all code gates passed**; 808 folder fully grep-clean of the log ‚ÄĒ **zero warnings/errors** after fixing one TS 5.7 `Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer>` typing + trimming one unused var/dep; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether sung/played pitches visibly + audibly wake their matching strings vs. a diffuse wash, and whether the pedal-held bed accretes musically rather than muddying (the always-seeded strings + ghost exciter + compressor guarantee a sounding, glowing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/808-sympathetic-strings/README.md`

## Cycle 500 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/805-kids-snow-piano](/dream/805-kids-snow-piano)** ‚ÄĒ Snow Piano / Snow-Globe Music Box ‚ĚĄÔłŹūüéĻ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 500. **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **device-tilt / orientation input** (off the banned touch-primary; love-aligned `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) ¬∑ **three.js WebGL output** (off the 10√ó-banned Canvas2D; the snow globe genuinely needs 3D ‚ÄĒ jury "pick the renderer the concept needs") ¬∑ **his-REAL-piano-as-physics-triggered-music-box technique** (off the banned conductor/follower/analyzer-of-his-recording; NOT a grain cloud) ¬∑ **calm wintery night-blue vibe** (not bright-active, not dark-void). **What if a 4-year-old tilts the tablet like a snow globe ‚ÄĒ and Karel's REAL recorded "Welcome Home" piano pours out as glowing snow that chimes when it lands?** A 3D glass globe holds ~220 additive glowing motes (`THREE.Points`); **device-orientation tilt** is gravity (gamma‚Üíx, beta‚Üídownward bias), so the motes slide and fall, and when one settles on one of **5 glowing chime rails** it plays a fresh random **0.25‚Äď0.5s Hann-windowed slice of his real piano** (`AudioBufferSourceNode` + `playbackRate` ‚Üí the rail's C-major-pentatonic tone) before dissolving to sparkles and respawning up top ‚ÄĒ infinite calm play, no score/fail/timer. This is the lab's **2nd-ever kids piece on Karel's real recording** (only `743` before it) and the direct answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #3** ("his recording on the kids side is 1√ó ‚ÄĒ use it a genuinely-NEW way, or rest it"): a physics-driven **music box**, not the banned conductor/analyzer, not a continuous grain cloud. Born from this cycle's **RESEARCH ¬ß500** dive ‚ÄĒ **LEGO SMART Play (2026)**, the screen-free brick that turns "motion through the air" into sound + light, validating motion‚Üísound+light as the live very-young-child register. Triple love-aligned (`83`‚Ě§ÔłŹ tilt ¬∑ `227-paths-granular`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`163-paths-visualizer`‚Ě§ÔłŹ his piano ¬∑ `166-kids-lantern`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`130`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`262`‚Ě§ÔłŹ glow); tied to Karel's published **"Snowflake"** journey. Kid-safe `master gain 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 6800 ‚Üí comp(‚ąí10/20:1)`, per-chime peak 0.22 / 20ms soft attack / 12ms rate-limit (a flurry can't stack loud), always-on C2+G2 pad, pentatonic (nothing "wrong"), ‚Č•64px Start, iOS gesture-gated AudioContext + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` both in the first tap. **Graceful degradation:** `fetchPianoBuffer` null (guaranteed in the no-network sandbox) ‚Üí synthesized celesta/bell buffer so it always sounds + `text-rose-300` notice; no device-orientation ‚Üí drag-to-tilt + always-on auto-drift lands/chimes hands-free within ~2s; no WebGL ‚Üí friendly notice. Full teardown (rAF + listeners + dispose geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()`/`forceContextLoss()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (reads only the public GET `/api/audio/:id`); **zero new npm deps** (`three` already present). Ambition honest **2‚Äď3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [device-orientation physics + real-recording windowed slice-player + three.js particle-globe render + chime-rail collision scheduler] + #3 named refs [music-box/snow-globe lineage ¬∑ Karel's *Snowflake* journey ¬∑ loved `227`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`163`‚Ě§ÔłŹ his-piano lineage] + soft-#5 RESEARCH ¬ß500 LEGO SMART Play 2026). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`806-kids-sky-lullaby`** ‚≠ź (SVG/DOM ¬∑ live Open-Meteo sky ‚Üí Eno-style dusk lullaby, moon-aware, tilt-stirred ‚ÄĒ **RESURRECT FIRST**, the renderer-diverse pick) + **`807-kids-breath-bubbles`** (raw WebGL2 ¬∑ blow‚Üíaccreting glow-bubble cloud that pops in pentatonic chimes) as **IDEAS ¬ß500**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí all code gates passed, reached "Collecting page data"; 805 folder grep-clean ‚ÄĒ zero `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helpers/api-route; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); **NOT prerender/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code: pristine `main` with 805 moved aside fails identically this cycle; Vercel deploys normally**); unverified by ear/eye: whether real-device tilt lands motes at a satisfying chime rate and whether windowed slices of his recording read as warm bell chimes vs ragged fragments (the always-on pad + auto-drift + fallback bell guarantee a sounding, drifting glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/805-kids-snow-piano/README.md`

## Cycle 499 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 synthesis methods, shipped 1

- **[/dream/803-body-chimes](/dream/803-body-chimes)** ‚ÄĒ Body Chimes / Struck Room ūüĒĒūüēļ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 499. **For**: adults / installation ¬∑ **body/camera input** (MediaPipe Pose ‚ÄĒ the jury's single most-starved input, went **4√ó‚Üí0√ó** last window; off the banned touch) ¬∑ **three.js WebGL output** (warm-metallic volumetric room; off the 10√ó-banned Canvas2D-primary) ¬∑ **MODAL physical-modeling synthesis** technique (banks of high-Q bandpass resonators = damped-sine modes with inharmonic partials, excited by 3D spatial collision; rests his recording) ¬∑ **adult / installation / meditative warm-metallic vibe** (not bright-active kids, not his-recording-conductor). **What if your whole moving body played an invisible, room-sized instrument of STRUCK RESONANT BODIES ‚ÄĒ bars, bowls and bells suspended in 3D ‚ÄĒ each limb striking the ones it sweeps through, which ring with real modal synthesis and slowly accrete into a shimmering cloud?** The front camera projects five limb "strikers" (wrists, head, ankles) into a dark volumetric room of ~24 glowing metal bodies on a double-ring shell; sweep a limb through one (3D proximity + speed gate + per-body refractory) and it **rings for real** ‚ÄĒ each body is a parallel bank of 4‚Äď8 high-Q `BiquadFilter` bandpass resonators at **inharmonic partial ratios** characteristic of its type (bell `1, 2.0, 2.4, 3.0, 4.5, 5.33` ¬∑ bar `1, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93, 13.34` ¬∑ bowl `1, 2.01, 2.83, 4.22, 5.0`), velocity-scaled, higher modes decaying faster ‚ÄĒ genuine modal synthesis. Fundamentals are a **just-intonation** field over ~110 Hz so any combination is consonant; strikes bloom through a synthesised convolution reverb. **Long-form accretion (the ceiling feature):** a sympathetic mode-bed (always-on Q‚Čą90 resonators that each strike *charges*, bleeding down over ~25 s) + a `bedMaster` that grows over ~4 min + **struck-body memory** (frequently-struck bodies pull their sympathetic resonator sharper, so the cloud's timbre reflects *how you've been playing*) + a ¬Ī0.35% root-drift breath ‚ÄĒ so **minute 5 is fuller, warmer and subtly detuned vs minute 1** (the directest hit on the jury's depth-ceiling-collapse alarm, 4‚Üí1), and the central light/haze brightens with `cloudLevel()` so accretion is visible. The lab's **first body-EXCITES-a-physical-modeling-instrument** piece: prior MediaPipe-Pose pieces (`788-kids-body-glow` UPIC, `724-presence-drift`, `419-body-band` drums, `287`/`302` harmony-mirrors) all map the body to a *note or grain* ‚ÄĒ none strikes a real resonator network. Graceful: camera-deny/MediaPipe-fail ‚Üí a **ghost body** on Lissajous orbits plays it hands-free within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; WebGL-fail friendly notice; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext+getUserMedia; full three.js/rAF/mic/AudioContext teardown (`renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side); **zero new npm deps** (`three` already present). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [pose tracking + 3D spatial-collision excitation + modal resonator synthesis + multi-minute accreting mode-bed] + #3 named refs [**Vrengt** NIME/arXiv:2010.03779 body-machine instrument ¬∑ **modal synthesis / Cadoz-ACROE CORDIS-ANIMA** ¬∑ **Bernhard Leitner** sound-sculpture] + #5 RESEARCH ¬ß499 [CHI-2026 movement‚ÜĒsound + MediaPipe-gesture framework]). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-synthesis-method fire; banked **`802-body-aviary`** ‚≠ź (Karplus-Strong plucked-string forest via real AudioWorklet ‚ÄĒ **RESURRECT FIRST adult**) + **`804-body-veil`** (sympathetic high-Q resonator veil) as **IDEAS ¬ß499**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 95s` ‚Üí Collecting page data**; 803 folder grep-clean of the log [zero `use*` helpers / `any` / api route; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings]); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether limb sweeps read cleanly as strikes and the modal rings sound bell-like on real hardware (single-camera pose `z` is coarse, so collision leans on x/y sweep; the ghost body + always-blooming reverb guarantee a sounding, glowing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/803-body-chimes/README.md`

## Cycle 498 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 growth grammars, shipped 1

- **[/dream/799-kids-sing-garden](/dream/799-kids-sing-garden)** ‚ÄĒ Singing Garden ūüĆĪūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 498. **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **mic/voice input** (off the banned touch; serves KIDS.md's vocalization goal) ¬∑ **three.js WebGL output** (off the 10√ó-banned Canvas2D-primary monoculture; the renderer the concept needs) ¬∑ **voice‚ÜíL-system (Lindenmayer) growth + melody-memory call-response** technique (rests his recording entirely) ¬∑ **calm warm daylight garden vibe** (the jury's reintroduced-calm "middle", not bright-active, not dark-glow). **What if a 4-year-old could SING a 3D garden into being ‚ÄĒ and the garden then sang their melody back?** The child sings and a branching plant GROWS in real time as a **true L-system grammar** (an `LSystem` class with `iterate()` + 3D turtle-graphics, the grammar generated per phrase from the sung pitch + loudness): **pitch** (octave-collapsed ‚Üí C-major-pentatonic, never wrong) drives branch angle/reach, **loudness (RMS)** drives thickness + growth speed + glow, and a **held note** keeps a branch extending and blooms small glowing flower-spheres at its tips. Go quiet for ~1s and the garden **sings the contour of what you just sang back** on soft inharmonic bell voices while every plant pulses in warm light (Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* call-and-response). New plants accrete along a **golden-angle spiral** so the garden is **long-form stateful ‚ÄĒ fuller at minute 5 than minute 1** (the directest hit on the jury's kids-depth-ceiling-collapse alarm, 4‚Üí1). The lab's **first voice‚Üíprocedural-grammar plant** and **first three.js kids piece**: prior kids voice pieces (`158-kids-hum-paint`‚Ě§ÔłŹ brush, `244-kids-sing-creature` loopback, `100`‚Ě§ÔłŹ splat) are 2D per-stroke/splat/loopback ‚ÄĒ **none grows a persistent 3D structure from the voice via a generative grammar** (grep-0√ó / web-0√ó). It **inverts Mort Garson's *Mother Earth's Plantasia* (1976, "music FOR plants")** ‚ÄĒ here the child's voice MAKES the plants. Kid-safe `master ‚Č§0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí comp(‚ąí10/20:1)`, always-on C2+G2 pad (never silent), autocorrelation pitch (Chris Wilson ACF, analyser **never** wired to output ‚ÄĒ no feedback, never recorded/sent), iOS gesture-gated AudioContext+getUserMedia (AGC/NS/echo off for clean onsets), **ghost-hum hands-free fallback** on mic-deny (auto-grows + answers within ~2s + `text-rose-600` notice), no-WebGL friendly notice, full three.js/rAF/mic/AudioContext teardown (`renderer.forceContextLoss()`), 12-min soft goodnight fade, dark-on-light daylight typography. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network); **zero new npm deps** (`three` already present). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [autocorrelation pitch/RMS analysis + L-system grammar/turtle-graphics three.js growth + melody-memory call-response sequencer] + #3 named refs [**L-systems ‚ÄĒ Lindenmayer / Prusinkiewicz *The Algorithmic Beauty of Plants*** ¬∑ **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia*** ¬∑ Chris Wilson autocorrelation ¬∑ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*] + soft-#1 voice‚Üíprocedural-grammar plant is grep-0√ó + soft-#5 ¬ß498 negative-result gap). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-growth-grammar fire; banked **`800-kids-sing-meadow`** ‚≠ź (phyllotaxis golden-angle bloom-spiral ‚ÄĒ clearest one-flower-per-note cause-effect; **RESURRECT FIRST**) + **`801-kids-sing-grove`** (InstancedMesh reed-field with continuous wind-sway ‚ÄĒ the "never static" motion idea) as **IDEAS ¬ß498**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 103s` ‚Üí Collecting page data ‚Üí all code gates passed**; 799 folder grep-clean of the log [self-reported ESLint 0/0]; `npx tsc --noEmit` exit 0 project-wide; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code: pristine `main` with 799 moved aside fails identically this cycle**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether the L-system growth visibly tracks a child's sung pitch and the bell reply reads as "the garden sang MY melody" (the always-on pad + ghost-hum fallback guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/799-kids-sing-garden/README.md`

## Cycle 497 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/797-tonnetz-walk](/dream/797-tonnetz-walk)** ‚ÄĒ Tonnetz Walk ūüéľūüß≠. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 497. **For**: adults / listening ¬∑ **autonomous input** (light click-to-steer; off the banned touch) ¬∑ **SVG/DOM output** (the jury's starved 1√ó surface ‚ÄĒ the literal #1 "spread, don't flip onto a new monoculture", off the 10√ó-banned Canvas2D) ¬∑ **Neo-Riemannian P/L/R harmony-walk** technique (rests his recording ‚ÄĒ breaks the answering-room thread) ¬∑ **clinical-elegant / meditative vibe**. **What if you could WATCH harmony take a walk ‚ÄĒ a chord gliding forever through the Tonnetz lattice by smooth voice-leading, never the same path twice?** A single triad walks the **Neo-Riemannian** lattice on its own, choosing **P** (parallel) / **L** (leading-tone) / **R** (relative) transforms over time; each holds two common tones and steps the one remaining voice, so a warm 3-voice pad (portamento on the moving voice) + sub-bass + feedback-delay reverb **glides** from chord to chord rather than jumping. The luminous **path through the lattice IS the form** ‚ÄĒ a weighted, anti-backtracking, home-biased stochastic chooser means **minute 5 never resembles minute 1** (the directest standing answer to the jury's depth-ceiling-collapse alarm). Visual is **pure inline SVG**: 24 triad-triangles (major up, minor down) on the fifth/major-third axes, current node glowing, a fading trail of recent triads, the active P/L/R edge color-lit, lit pitch-class dots, mono chord labels + a live readout (chord ¬∑ last transform ¬∑ steps ¬∑ mm:ss). Controls: **wander‚ÜĒhome** bias, **step** tempo, **arpeggio** toggle, and **click any triad** to steer there (BFS over the 24-triad graph) then resume wandering. Pure-synthesis ‚ÄĒ no network, no sensors, no assets. Distinct from `37-ratio-lab` (a *static* just-intonation Tonnetz you click to hear): this is an **autonomous generative walker**, motion-through-the-lattice not click-to-sound. Refs: **Euler's Tonnetz (1739)** ¬∑ **Neo-Riemannian theory ‚ÄĒ Riemann / David Lewin / Richard Cohn *Audacious Euphony* 2012**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ Compile + lint + type-check verified clean (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `‚úď Compiled` ‚Üí Linting + types PASS; 797 folder grep-clean of the log); NOT prerender/ear-verified ‚ÄĒ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` blocks static-gen (pristine main fails identically; Vercel deploys normally). 2 more explored this fire (`798-sympathetic-strings` ‚≠ź, `796-aeolian-sky`) ‚ÄĒ banked to IDEAS ¬ß497.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/797-tonnetz-walk/README.md`

## Cycle 496 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/795-kids-sound-hunt](/dream/795-kids-sound-hunt)** ‚ÄĒ Sound Hunt ūüĒ¶ūüźĺ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 496. **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **device-orientation / compass input** (no touch, no mic, no camera) ¬∑ **audio-forward / eyes-closed HRTF spatial output** (a minimal calm SVG compass ‚ÄĒ the *sound* carries it; NOT a Canvas2D-primary spectacle, off the 10√ó-banned monoculture) ¬∑ **spatial 360¬į sound-hunt** technique ¬∑ **calm bedtime "lantern" vibe** (the reintroduced calm). **What if a 4-year-old closed their eyes, held the tablet like a lantern, and turned their body to HUNT for gentle animal sounds hidden floating around them in 3D space?** Eight gentle voices ‚ÄĒ each a **C-major-pentatonic chord tone** so any subset is consonant ‚ÄĒ sit at fixed azimuths around a **360¬į ring** placed via Web Audio **`PannerNode` (HRTF)**; the child's **device-orientation/compass heading** rotates the `AudioListener` so turning their body sweeps a "listening beam." Angular proximity of the beam to a voice drives its gain via a **cosine lobe** (it swells as you near it), and crossing an inner threshold **latches a soft once-only chime + a dot-glow**; collecting all eight blooms a calm rising chord, then the piece **loops forever** ‚ÄĒ no score, no fail, no timer. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #1** (Canvas2D is **10 of 15** ‚ÄĒ rotate onto the scarcest surface; **audio-only is the literal "spread, don't flip"**) + the verdict's structural alarm that **the kids side fled calm entirely** (only `743`/`747` left) ‚ÄĒ a deliberately calm, eyes-closed bedtime register. The lab's **first kids spatialized-listening piece**: the kids set is almost entirely **screen-bound** (instrument on-glass or in front of the camera) and the rare audio-first kids pieces (`346`/`417`) are entrainment toys; **none places sound *around* you to find by moving** (spatial sound-hunt grep-0√ó). Off **every** JURY ban at once: **device-orientation INPUT** (not touch) ¬∑ **audio-only / HRTF OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D-primary; the scarcest surface) ¬∑ **spatial sound-hunt TECH** (rests his recording ‚ÄĒ not a conductor/follower/analyzer) ¬∑ **calm bedtime VIBE** (off bright-active ‚ÄĒ the reintroduced calm). **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (HRTF spatial-audio graph w/ per-voice proximity-swell + latched once-only reveal ¬∑ device-orientation/compass input w/ functional auto-tour + drag fallback ¬∑ synchronized SVG compass/ring + chord-completion logic + always-on drone bed) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (**PlugSonic** ‚ÄĒ web/mobile binaural sonic narratives, Geronazzo et al. ¬∑ **Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*** ¬∑ Web Audio **`PannerNode` HRTF**) ¬∑ **#5** (RESEARCH ¬ß496 today ‚ÄĒ web-binaural / spatial-audio-2026). **#1 not claimed** (PannerNode/HRTF exists in the lab's adult spatial pieces; the *kids* spatial-listening-hunt mapping is the fresh move). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on gentle sub-drone bed so it never feels broken; soft attacks/long decays; pentatonic so nothing is ever "wrong." **Graceful degradation ‚ÄĒ genuinely functional, not a notice:** no motion sensor (e.g. desktop/laptop) ‚Üí a slow **auto-tour** sweeps the beam and reveals every voice hands-free within ~2s, **plus** a **drag-to-turn** control on the ring, **plus** a `text-rose-300` notice ‚ÄĒ fully playable + audible with no sensor; `PannerNode`/`AudioListener` position+orientation setters **feature-detected** for both modern (`positionX.value`) and legacy (`setPosition`/`setOrientation`) APIs; iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` + `AudioContext` both created inside the Start tap; full teardown (rAF cancel + node stop/disconnect + `audioCtx.close()` + listener removal). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + SVG; package.json/lock untouched); headphones recommended for the 3D effect. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" ‚Üí all code gates passed; **zero `795`/`sound-hunt` mentions in the log** ‚ÄĒ folder grep-clean; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT prerender/device/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ container's ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`, the standing environmental failure (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: iOS compass-heading axis feel + HRTF placement on a real iPad (the auto-tour + drag fallback + always-on drone guarantee a sounding, sweeping glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`794-kids-sing-garden`** ‚≠ź (three.js ¬∑ sing‚Üígrow a 3D **L-system** garden w/ melody **call-and-response**, long-form stateful ‚ÄĒ the depth pick; **RESURRECT FIRST (kids)**) + **`793-kids-shadow-puppet`** (pure SVG ¬∑ body‚Üía singing cut-paper *wayang kulit* moth ‚ÄĒ overlaps `788`; resurrect with a swappable bestiary + formant voice) as **IDEAS ¬ß496**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/795-kids-sound-hunt/README.md`

## (Cycle 495 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 3 memory mechanisms, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/792-answering-swarm](/dream/792-answering-swarm)** ‚ÄĒ Answering Swarm ūüźĚūüéĻ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 495. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / **his real recording as input** (no mic, no camera, no touch) ¬∑ **audio-forward output** (a small warm canvas dot-field readout ‚ÄĒ the *sound* carries it; NOT a Canvas2D-primary spectacle, off the 10√ó-banned monoculture, the register the jury itself tagged `770` in) ¬∑ **stigmergic swarm-intelligence motif-memory** technique (lab-first) ¬∑ warm-hearth adult-meditative vibe. **Cycle-2 of `770-answering-room`. What if the duet partner were a SWARM of his own motifs that self-organizes ‚ÄĒ so minute 5 has settled themes minute 1 didn't?** His "Welcome Home" piano plays **whole** as the soloist (the verbatim 770 loader ‚ÄĒ never granulated). The listener folds the FFT into a 12-bin chroma to fit the **triad under his hands** + spectral-flux onsets + a phrase-gap machine, and on each gap **harvests** the run of pitch-events he just played (his PAST only ‚ÄĒ no lookahead, per LiveBand's causal constraint) as a **motif fragment**. Each fragment becomes a tiny agent in a **decentralized stigmergic swarm** (cap 12): every frame each agent measures how well its pitch-classes sit on the current chord/scale (`motifFit`) and **deposits pheromone** scaled by his energy if it fits, while a global **evaporation** fades the rest; a fresh fragment replaces the **weakest** agent when full. There is no central composer ‚ÄĒ over minutes the colony **consolidates** its pheromone onto a few emergent **"bridging motifs"** (a `consolidation` 0‚Äď100% readout makes minute-5‚Č†minute-1 *audible-in-numbers*), and 770's soft **FM bell** answers in his gaps by sounding the **strongest** agent's motif, snapped onto the current key and resolved on a chord tone; the warm **pad** still voices the chord under him. `company` slider (shy‚ÜĒtalkative) + a **trading-fours** toggle (a longer doubled turn from the consolidated theme during quiet stretches). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #2** (the depth ceiling collapsed **4‚Üí1** ‚ÄĒ "RETURN AND EXTEND a gem to a real 4/5; `770` is the obvious target ‚ÄĒ let the agent ACCRETE a motif over minutes") + **#1** (off the 10√ó Canvas2D-primary monoculture ‚ÄĒ audio-forward, "spread don't flip") + **#3** (his recording is still the whole soloist but used a *genuinely-new way* ‚ÄĒ a self-organizing motif memory, NOT a conductor/follower/analyzer). **Ambition honest 4/5** (the restored ceiling): **#1** first swarm-intelligence / stigmergy audio piece in the lab (grep-checked ‚ÄĒ no prior swarm/pheromone prototype) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (**Markus J. Buehler, *MusicSwarm*, Advanced Intelligent Systems Apr-2026, arXiv 2509.11973**; **George Lewis *Voyager***) ¬∑ **#4** explicit cycle-2 of `770` (multi-cycle thread; next-cycle deepenings banked) ¬∑ **#5** RESEARCH ¬ß495 today (**LiveBand**, arXiv 2606.03803, **June 2026, <30d** ‚ÄĒ causal past-only accompaniment; + MusicSwarm Apr-2026). **Bulletproof glance:** his recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~16s `OfflineAudioContext` synthesized warm phrase (honest emerald fallback badge) so the room **always sounds**; no API route ‚Üí **no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + Canvas; package.json/lock untouched); no WebGL needed; AudioContext resumed inside the Begin tap; full teardown (rAF / source.stop+disconnect / agent.dispose / analyser.disconnect / ctx.close). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" ‚Üí all code gates passed; **zero `792`/`answering-swarm` mentions in the log** ‚ÄĒ folder grep-clean; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT prerender/device/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ container's ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`, the standing environmental failure (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether the swarm consolidates onto themes that read as coherent and whether the answers land against his pedal-heavy passages (the always-sound synth fallback + consolidation readout guarantee a sounding, self-organizing glance). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-mechanism fire; banked **`790-answering-memory`** ‚≠ź (symbolic motif bank + six classical-development transforms + SVG motif-shelf ‚ÄĒ the most *musically legible* quote-and-develop; **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)**) + **`791-answering-markov`** (variable-order Markov style model + live SVG transition-ring ‚ÄĒ lower priority, overlaps `778-markov-mirror`) as **IDEAS ¬ß495**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/792-answering-swarm/README.md`

## (Cycle 494 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 3 renderers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/788-kids-body-glow](/dream/788-kids-body-glow)** ‚ÄĒ Body Glow ūüēļ‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 494. **For**: kids (4+) ¬∑ **body/camera (MediaPipe Pose) input** (no touch, no mic) ¬∑ **raw WebGL2 GLSL feedback field** (Canvas2D only as fallback ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned Canvas2D-primary) ¬∑ the whole body read as a **continuous UPIC pitch-field** ¬∑ warm-daylight painterly "middle" vibe. **What if a 4-year-old's whole moving body PAINTED a glowing UPIC score in the air ‚ÄĒ the higher a limb, the higher the note it sings, and the dance leaves luminous trails that keep singing and fill the sky?** The literal full-body version of **Xenakis's UPIC** (1977: "music becomes a game for children ‚ÄĒ they draw, they hear"): front camera ‚Üí MediaPipe Pose (33 landmarks, mirrored); each tracked part (wrists/head/ankles/elbows, 7 voices) drives **ONE continuous sung voice** (triangle + vibrato + per-voice lowpass) whose **vertical position = pitch**, glided with `setTargetAtTime` (portamento, never retriggered) across a **C-major-pentatonic** ladder C3‚ÄďA5 so **nothing is ever wrong**. Output is a hand-written **raw WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00) 3-pass ping-pong feedback field**: fade (√ó0.965 decay ‚Üí trails persist) ‚Üí ~6300 additive `gl_PointSize` glow points/frame seeded at the limbs ‚Üí present over a slow warm **daylight‚Üídusk** gradient + bloom + tonemap ‚ÄĒ **long-form stateful: minute 5 is visibly fuller than minute 1**, then self-limits. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body/camera went **4√ó‚Üí0√ó**, the single most-starved input, off every over-represented tag) + **#5** (the full-body UPIC the verdict named "sitting unbuilt in your own research log") + **#1** (off Canvas2D-primary onto a genuinely-demanded scarce shader ‚ÄĒ "spread, don't flip"). **NOT 419-kids-body-band** (body‚Üídrums) nor the `287`/`302`/`234` harmony-mirror ‚ÄĒ a fresh *continuous-sung* mapping of the tracker. Off every JURY ban: **body/camera INPUT** (not touch) ¬∑ **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D-primary; scarce shader the concept demands) ¬∑ **continuous-body-UPIC TECH** (rests his recording ‚ÄĒ jury #3's clean option) ¬∑ **warm-daylight VIBE** (off BOTH bright-active AND dark-glow ‚ÄĒ the literal "land one in the middle"). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#2** ‚Č•5 subsystems (camera+Pose ¬∑ 7-voice continuous portamento choir ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 3-pass feedback field ¬∑ always-on pad ¬∑ Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (Xenakis **UPIC** 1977 ¬∑ MediaPipe Pose ¬∑ **CHI 2026 "Designing Interactive Movement Sonification for Hip-Hop Dance"** ¬∑ Refik Anadol) ¬∑ **#5** (RESEARCH ¬ß494 today ‚ÄĒ CHI 2026 + ¬°Otro! IAIA Digital Dome Apr-2026). **#1 honestly NOT claimed** (MediaPipe Pose/body-input exist ‚ÄĒ `419`/`287`/`302`/`724`; the fresh move is the mapping). **Bulletproof glance:** camera denied OR MediaPipe fails ‚Üí `makeGhostBody(t)` keeps the body painting + the choir singing **hands-free within ~2s** + a `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 ‚Üí inline Canvas2D glow field, same mapping; no 2D either ‚Üí audio-only loop still sings; kid-safe `master ‚Č§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass 7500 ‚Üí comp(‚ąí10/20:1)` + always-on C2+G2 pad; iOS AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the tap; full teardown (rAF / camera tracks / `landmarker.close()` / GL programs+buffers+textures+FBO + `loseContext()` / osc stop / `audioCtx.close()`). Camera **analysis-only** ‚ÄĒ never recorded/stored/sent; **no API route ‚Üí no guard** (only network is the MediaPipe CDN + model GET); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2, no three.js; package.json/lock untouched). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" ‚Üí all code gates passed; lone `788` warning fixed ‚Üí folder grep-clean of the log); **NOT prerender/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ container's ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`, the standing environmental failure (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device-verified** (no camera/WebGL2/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: MediaPipe reading a real toddler's whole body across lighting, the feedback-trail look on a real iPad, whether the continuous choir reads as "my body is singing"; the ghost-body + Canvas2D + audio-only fallbacks guarantee a sounding, moving glance). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; banked **`789-kids-body-ribbons`** ‚≠ź (SVG/DOM ¬∑ the scarcest, most iPad-bulletproof renderer ‚ÄĒ glowing bounded ribbons + cut-paper daylight; **RESURRECT FIRST (kids)**) + **`787-kids-body-aura`** (three.js ¬∑ 3D choir-of-light + skeleton + accumulating chord-cloud ‚ÄĒ repalette to daylight off the dark-glow) as **IDEAS ¬ß494**. ## (Cycle 491 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/777-song-architecture](/dream/777-song-architecture)** ‚ÄĒ Song Architecture ūüéĻūüĒ¨. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 491. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / **his real recording as input** (no mic, no camera) / **bright analytical Canvas2D heatmap** (no GPU shader) / a chroma **Self-Similarity Matrix** of his own piece / **the architecture of his music made visible AND audible**. **What is the hidden ARCHITECTURE of Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano ‚ÄĒ where do its phrases repeat, where does the form turn?** His recording plays **whole** (never granulated) while the browser computes ‚ÄĒ in real time, from the decoded buffer ‚ÄĒ a **chroma-feature Self-Similarity Matrix (SSM)**: ~1s frames ‚Üí Hann-windowed FFT ‚Üí 12-bin pitch-class chroma ‚Üí an N√óN cosine-similarity grid. Rendered as a luminous violet‚Üímagenta‚Üíamber‚Üíwhite-hot Canvas2D heatmap, the hot diagonal is "now = now" and the **bright off-diagonal stripes are where a passage RECURS** ‚ÄĒ it literally draws the song's form. A **playhead crosshair** sweeps the matrix in sync as he plays; **click any bright off-diagonal cell** and the two similar moments play back-to-back (frame *i*'s ~2s then frame *j*'s ~2s, resynthesized via `AudioBufferSourceNode` offsets) so you HEAR why the machine drew them as a repeat. A thin emerald **novelty curve** (Foote's checkerboard-kernel) marks likely section boundaries. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a NEW way ‚ÄĒ not grains; let its STRUCTURE be read") AND **#2** ("rotate off GPU-shader fields entirely; build one piece with NO shader and prove the idea carries it ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D is scarce again at 3√ó"). Off every JURY ban: **his-recording INPUT** (not mic-hum/camera) ¬∑ **Canvas2D heatmap OUTPUT** (not the 9√ó-banned GPU-shader field) ¬∑ **structural-analysis TECH** (his recording plays whole ‚ÄĒ NOT a grain cloud) ¬∑ **bright analytical VIBE** (off the 9√ó near-dark luminous-glow). **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (his-recording playback + click-to-resynthesize ¬∑ chroma feature extraction ¬∑ N√óN SSM compute ¬∑ Foote novelty curve ¬∑ Canvas2D heatmap render + interaction = six) ¬∑ **#3** named ref (**Jonathan Foote, *Visualizing Music and Audio using Self-Similarity*, ACM MM 1999/2000**; novelty score from Foote 2000; recent revival nodded: SSM-Net, *Generating Music with Structure Using Self-Similarity as Attention* arXiv 2024) ¬∑ arguably **#1** (first SSM-of-his-recording ‚ÄĒ `545-motion-loom` uses only 1-D autocorrelation for tempo, `370-tonal-map` reads harmony as a comet; none ever drew the full 2-D structure map) ¬∑ **#5** (RESEARCH ¬ß491 today ‚ÄĒ Foote SSM, 2024‚Äď2026 ML revival). **Bulletproof glance:** his recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~36s `OfflineAudioContext` synthesized **A¬∑B¬∑A** piano stand-in (honest amber notice) so the SSM still shows real recurrence stripes and the piece **always sounds**; no API route ‚Üí **no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + Canvas; package.json/lock untouched). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" (so compile + TypeScript + ESLint all **passed**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, zero from the 777 folder), then the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) ‚ÄĒ the standing environmental failure every fire hits (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys it normally). **NOT auditioned** (no real `/api/audio` fetch or audio output in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear: chroma-SSM stripe legibility on his actual pedal-heavy passages and the click-to-hear-the-repeat segment timing; the synth A¬∑B¬∑A fallback + always-sound design guarantee a sounding, stripe-showing glance regardless. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`778-markov-mirror`** ‚≠ź (SVG ¬∑ teach a small keyboard your melodic style ‚Üí a live variable-order Markov chain improvises back in it on a glowing transition graph; ref Cope *EMI* / Hiller *Illiac Suite* ‚ÄĒ **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)** when SVG/DOM is cold) + **`779-ink-score`** (SVG ¬∑ a machine draws an abstract Cardew-*Treatise* graphic score and plays the marks it inks, long-form motif memory so minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1; ref Cardew/Brown) as **IDEAS ¬ß491**. ## (Cycle 489 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 1 concept √ó 3 approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/770-answering-room](/dream/770-answering-room)** ‚ÄĒ Answering Room ūüéĻūüēĮÔłŹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 489. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / **his real recording as input** (no mic, no camera) / **audio-forward / "eyes-closed" register** with a minimal warm hearth-lit Canvas duet visual (no GPU shader) / real-time chroma+onset score-following ‚Üí a generative harmonizing ensemble / **warm, intimate companionship ‚ÄĒ a duet, not a solitary dark meditation**. **What if Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano kept playing as the SOLOIST, and a machine "live music agent" listened to it and answered in the gaps ‚ÄĒ like a duet partner who arrived to play along?** His recording plays **whole** (never chopped into grains, never resynthesized ‚ÄĒ it *is* the human in the room); a second, synthesized voice **listens** in real time (a 12-bin chroma vector folded from the FFT picks the triad under his hands; spectral flux + energy find the silences between his phrases) and **accompanies**: a warm lowpassed pad voices the detected chord *underneath* him, and a soft FM-bell **answers only in his phrase-gaps**, loosely inverting his last gesture and resolving on a chord tone. A "company" slider tunes it from shy to talkative; it mostly **rests** and supports, never fights. The literal answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a way the lab has never used it ‚ÄĒ let its structure conduct a generative system; remix his phrasing, NOT his grains") AND **#2** ("build one piece with NO GPU shader at all and prove the idea carries the piece, not the renderer" ‚ÄĒ the lab's thin audio-forward / eyes-closed register). Off every JURY ban: **his-recording INPUT** (not mic/camera) ¬∑ **audio-forward + minimal-Canvas OUTPUT** (not the banned GPU-shader-field ‚ÄĒ and the cleanest renderer-diversity pick, dodging the warming SVG-3√ó / Canvas2D-3√ó audit entirely) ¬∑ **score-following + generative ensemble TECH** (his recording plays whole ‚ÄĒ NOT a grain cloud) ¬∑ **warm hearth VIBE** (off the 9√ó near-dark luminous-glow). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (his-recording soloist playback + real-time chroma+onset listener/score-follower + two-layer generative agent [chord pad + gap-answering bell] + reactive Canvas visual = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (**CHI 2026 *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*** ¬∑ **Christopher Raphael *Music Plus One*** score-following ¬∑ **George Lewis *Voyager***) ¬∑ **#5** (RESEARCH ¬ß489 today ‚ÄĒ the 2026 "live music agents" register); arguably **#1** (first real-time score-following of his actual recording ‚ÄĒ prior lab listen-pieces [`138`, `414`, `496`, `718`] all track *live mic* or are ensembles you conduct; none accompanies HIS recording as a live soloist). **Bulletproof glance:** his recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~16s OfflineAudioContext synthesized warm lyrical stand-in (honest emerald badge) so it **always sounds**; the analyser taps the solo path only, so the agent never analyzes its own output; `master 0.9` with the pad held gently under his line; full teardown (rAF cancel + source stop/disconnect + agent dispose + analyser disconnect + AudioContext close). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route; nothing sent/stored ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + Canvas; package.json/lock untouched). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT browser/ear-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" (so compile + TypeScript + ESLint all **passed**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other-folder warnings, **zero mentions of the 770 folder**, grep-confirmed), then the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) ‚ÄĒ the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT auditioned** (no real `/api/audio` fetch or audio output in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear: chord-detection accuracy on his actual dense/pedal-heavy passages and the pad-under-solo / answer-frequency balance (the gap thresholds were tuned blind); the synth-fallback path + always-sound design guarantee a sounding glance regardless.
