## (Cycle 488 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent bright/joyful explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/767-kids-kite-flyer](/dream/767-kids-kite-flyer)** ‚ÄĒ Kite Flyer ūü™Ā‚ėÄÔłŹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 488. **For**: kids (4+) / **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientation`: gamma = L/R, beta = climb/dive) + pointer-drag / ghost-breeze fallback / **three.js real 3D scene** (gradient sky, smiling sun, fluffy clouds, green hills, glossy diamond kite + bow tail on a visible string) / tilt‚Üíspring kite-physics ‚Üí altitude/wind pentatonic sonification + string-tension Aeolian drone / **bright sunny daylight, bold primaries, exuberant**. **What if a 4-year-old could TILT the tablet to fly a glowing kite across a sunny sky ‚ÄĒ and the flight PLAYED music?** The kite's **altitude is a melody** (snapped to a C-major pentatonic, so every height is a "right" note ‚ÄĒ higher is higher), **wind gusts are a rhythm** (soft sparkle chimes + particle bursts), and the **taut string hums a soft Aeolian-harp drone** that swells and brightens as the string tightens ‚ÄĒ the body's whole-tablet motion IS the instrument. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #4** (the un-built **bright/joyful/active-middle** kids register ‚ÄĒ exuberant without silly, bright without the 9√ó dark-glow), on the **only safe renderer** (three.js, off the banned GPU-shader-field AND dodging the warming SVG-3√ó / Canvas2D-3√ó audit watch), off the **mic/camera bans** (tilt input), off the **grain-cloud ban** (synth bells, no his-piano grains). **tilt INPUT** (scarce vs the worn touch default) ¬∑ **three.js 3D-geometry OUTPUT** (the lab's only non-warming, non-banned renderer this window) ¬∑ **tilt‚Üíkite-physics + altitude/wind pentatonic + string-tension Aeolian-sawtooth-drone TECH** ¬∑ **bright sunny daylight VIBE**. **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (device-tilt input w/ drag+auto-breeze fallback + three.js 3D spring kite-physics + altitude‚Üípentatonic melody + string-tension‚ÜíAeolian sawtooth drone = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (the **Aeolian harp** [wind plays a taut string ‚ÄĒ the string drone] ¬∑ **LocoRoco** [tilt the whole world to play] ¬∑ kite-flying as embodied/whole-body play); arguably soft **#5** (RESEARCH ¬ß488 today ‚ÄĒ Frid et al. kids-movement-sonification, foundational). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master ‚Č§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§7500 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on warm pentatonic pad so it never feels broken; voice cap ~6 + refractory timing; **functional fallback, not a notice** ‚ÄĒ iOS `requestPermission()` requested inside the "Fly!" tap, and if tilt is absent/denied you steer by pointer-drag, with a ~2s-idle **ghost breeze** that keeps the kite swooping and singing hands-free (an unattended glance is always alive + sounding); WebGL-unavailable ‚Üí friendly notice. AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (rAF cancel + listeners removed + AudioContext close + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()`). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (`three` already in the repo; package.json/lock untouched). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" (so compile + TypeScript + ESLint all **passed** ‚ÄĒ Next halts there only after the code gates; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **zero issues / zero mentions of the 767 folder**, grep-confirmed), then the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) ‚ÄĒ the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no tilt/WebGL/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by hand/ear: real-iOS `gamma`/`beta`‚Üíflight feel, three.js render on the review device, and audio balance; the pointer-drag + ghost-breeze fallback guarantees a sounding, flying glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`768-kids-balloon-band`** (three.js ¬∑ press-and-hold to inflate balloons whose pitch glides up with size, released to accrete a poppable consonant pentatonic sky-chord ‚ÄĒ **now built WITH the real Canvas2D fallback** it was missing in ¬ß486; resurrect-ready) + **`769-kids-flower-duet`** ‚≠ź (Canvas2D ¬∑ multi-touch: two kids plant a sunny flower meadow together, every flower sings, any two always harmonize ‚ÄĒ fills the KIDS.md **social-bonding / two-player** gap, the most robust of the three [pure Canvas2D, no sensor/permission/WebGL]; **RESURRECT FIRST** when Canvas2D ages out) as **IDEAS ¬ß488**. - **[/dream/766-sky-orrery](/dream/766-sky-orrery)** ‚ÄĒ Sky Orrery ūüĆĆūüéĻ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 487. **For**: adult / **live wall-clock + optional geolocation** (auto-evolving, zero required interaction; no mic, no camera) / **three.js 3D celestial dome** (Canvas2D fallback) / local astronomy ‚Üí per-body phrase scheduler of his real recording / diurnal cosmic-but-warm, daylight-into-night. **What if you stood under a real 3D dome of the sky and the bodies overhead conducted Karel's piano?** The sun, the moon (correct current phase), and eight genuinely bright bodies (Sirius, Vega, Arcturus, Betelgeuse, Rigel, Altair, Jupiter, Venus) are placed at their **real computed altitude/azimuth** for the local time & place; the dome turns slowly with sidereal time; and **whichever bodies ride highest conduct a long-form, never-repeating arrangement of whole PHRASES of Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano** ‚ÄĒ Cage's *Atlas Eclipticalis* made literal: **sky position becomes score position.** Each above-horizon body owns a phrase-voice ‚ÄĒ its **altitude ‚Üí gain & brightness**, its **azimuth ‚Üí stereo pan** ‚ÄĒ so the audible arrangement is literally the sky overhead; scrub noon‚Üímidnight to hear it flip (sun-led major air at noon ‚Üí a low star cluster at night). His recording is played as **whole continuous regions** (`bufferSource.start(when, offset, duration)` + equal-power crossfades), **not** a grain cloud ‚ÄĒ the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a way the lab has never used it ‚ÄĒ let its structure conduct a generative system; remix phrasing, not grains"), and a **return-and-deepen of `347-the-place`** (which scored the sky into *synthesized* sound ‚ÄĒ `766` is the first to let the real sky conduct his **real recorded piano**), so it also serves JURY **#3** (depth). **live-clock + optional-geolocation INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera) ¬∑ **three.js 3D-geometry dome OUTPUT** (off the banned WebGPU/WebGL2 *shader-field*, and the only renderer in this fire's trio that dodges the warming SVG-3√ó / Canvas2D-3√ó audit watch) ¬∑ **local-astronomy ‚Üí whole-phrase scheduler TECH** (off banned grain-cloud) ¬∑ **diurnal daylight-into-night VIBE** (off the 9√ó dark-glow). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** (first celestial-position conducting of his **real recorded** piano ‚ÄĒ `347` did sky‚Üí*synthesis*, never his recording; grep-confirmed) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•4 subsystems (sun/moon/8-body local ephemeris + per-body phrase-voice scheduler w/ region playback + three.js dome render + Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (**John Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis*** ¬∑ **Jem Finer *Longplayer*** ¬∑ the planetarium/orrery ¬∑ **John Luther Adams *The Place Where You Go to Listen*** ‚ÄĒ and the lab's own `347` predecessor) ¬∑ **#5** (RESEARCH ¬ß487 today + ¬ß485 yesterday ‚ÄĒ the celestial / data-sonification register; Trayford "Unseen Astronomy" arXiv 2026). **Bulletproof glance:** Karel's real recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~16s OfflineAudioContext synthesized stand-in (honestly labeled) so it **always sounds**; voices primed at start so audio begins promptly; master chain `‚Üí master 0.3 ‚Üí analyser ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination` with a night-deepening reverb send; **working non-WebGL fallback** ‚ÄĒ `createCanvas2D` draws the same day/night sky + pulsing bodies (never a notice-only dead state), audio path unchanged; nothing sent/stored ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (`three` already in the repo). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **zero issues in the 766 folder**), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) ‚ÄĒ the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); ## (Cycle 486 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent bright/joyful explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/761-kids-hill-roller](/dream/761-kids-hill-roller)** ‚ÄĒ Sunny Hill Roller ‚ėÄÔłŹ‚öĹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 486. **For**: kids (4+) / **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientation.gamma`) + finger-drag to sculpt / **inline SVG/DOM, ZERO canvas/WebGL/WebGPU** / sculpt-a-heightfield-melody ‚Üí ball-physics playback / bright sunny daylight (blue sky, smiling sun, green-gold rolling hills). **What if a 4-year-old could COMPOSE a melody by sculpting sunny hills with a finger, then TILT to roll a ball over their OWN shape ‚ÄĒ and the ball rolling over THEIR hills plays THEIR tune?** Nine rolling hills sit across a daylight scene; the child **drags any hill up/down** (‚Č•64px `‚Üē` handles) to set its **height = a C-major-pentatonic pitch** (taller = higher, nothing ever "wrong"; releasing previews the note), then **tilts the device** to roll a glossy ball along the surface under gravity (LocoRoco-style: the ball follows the slope they drew), and **each hill crest the ball crosses rings that hill's note** ‚ÄĒ so the shape the child sculpted IS the melody, looping as the ball re-enters from the left. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#4** ("the un-built bright/joyful/active-middle kids register ‚ÄĒ exuberant without silly, bright without dark-meditation" ‚Üí sunny hills, not the 9√ó near-dark glow), **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields [9/15] ‚ÄĒ build with no shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" ‚Üí **pure inline SVG/DOM, zero canvas/WebGL/WebGPU**; SVG/DOM is a scarce surface), off **mic/camera bans** (tilt, not mic/camera) and off the **grain-cloud ban** (synth marimba, no his-piano grains). **tilt INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera; tilt is scarce vs the touch default) ¬∑ **SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (off banned GPU-shader-field; diverse from the warming Canvas2D at 3√ó) ¬∑ **sculpt-melody-then-roll-physics TECH** (a genuine *composition* gesture ‚ÄĒ the child builds the track, rarer than the lab's worn tap-to-spawn pattern; distinct from `238-kids-tilt-world` which rolls over FIXED pads) ¬∑ **bright sunny daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (tilt sensor-fusion + cosine-heightfield ball-physics w/ gravity-along-slope + crest-triggered pentatonic sonification + SVG render = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (**LocoRoco** tilt-the-world rolling ¬∑ the **2025‚Äď26 musical-marble-run wave** ‚ÄĒ Marbles Music on Steam, Toy Theater *Music Marbles*, Hackaday procedural marble runs 2025-11-09); arguably **#5** (RESEARCH ¬ß486 today ‚ÄĒ the musical-marble-run register, but the kid *builds* the track instead of watching marbles drop). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on C2+G2 ambient pad w/ slow shimmer so it never feels broken; **functional no-tilt fallback** (not just a notice) ‚ÄĒ iOS permission requested inside the Start tap; if denied/absent/no-events-within-2s ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a big **Roll!** button + a baseline forward roll that keeps the tune playing; ~3s-idle the ball coasts and rings notes hands-free so a silent glance still sees+hears it. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`763-kids-flower-duet`** ‚≠ź (Canvas2D ¬∑ multi-touch: two kids plant a sunny flower meadow together, every flower sings, any two always harmonize [C-pentatonic, "no wrong chord"] ‚ÄĒ fills the KIDS.md **social-bonding / two-player** gap, the most robust of the three [Canvas2D, no sensor/permission/WebGL dep ‚ÄĒ works on any device], **RESURRECT FIRST**) + **`762-kids-balloon-band`** (three.js ¬∑ press-and-hold to inflate balloons whose pitch glides up with size, released to accrete a poppable consonant sky-chord ‚ÄĒ needs a real Canvas2D fallback before shipping; its WebGL-failure path currently only shows a notice) as **IDEAS ¬ß486**. ## (Cycle 485 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/760-wiki-carillon](/dream/760-wiki-carillon)** ‚ÄĒ Wiki Carillon ūüĒĒūüĆć. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 485. **For**: adult / **live external web event-stream** (Wikimedia EventStreams SSE) / **Canvas2D, ZERO GPU shader** / live-API data sonification ‚Üí generative bell ensemble / civic / atlas / bright daylight (parchment, ink-and-gold). **What does the world sound like as it writes itself?** The live, public firehose of **Wikipedia edits** becomes a bright civic carillon over a pale atlas field: every edit anywhere on Wikimedia rings a struck bell ‚ÄĒ **edit size ‚Üí pitch & decay** (big edits ring low and long, tweaks bright and short; pitches snap to a warm major-pentatonic so nothing is wrong), **each wiki keeps its place** (stereo pan + a vertical band hashed from the domain, so `en.wikipedia.org` always lands in the same spot), a **brand-new / anonymous editor ‚Üí a soft violet swell** under the bell, a **bot edit ‚Üí a muted grey woodblock**. Edits accrete into an ever-shifting, never-repeating composition ‚ÄĒ real-world **data sonification**, music *about* the world's collective writing, not about music. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields ‚ÄĒ WebGPU+WebGL2 are 9/15; Canvas2D is *scarce* again at 3√ó; build one piece with no shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" ‚Üí `760` is **pure Canvas2D, zero WebGL/WebGPU/shader**), and the boldest **anti-monoculture** move of the fire ‚ÄĒ the **only** candidate that escapes the his-piano cluster the jury called "used exactly one way" (7√ó) **entirely**, on a **lab-first input** (live SSE / external event-stream, grep-0√ó), in a categorically new register (civic/atlas ‚ÄĒ Karel-cares #2 *surprise*). **live web event-stream INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera/touch) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the jury-named scarce no-shader surface) ¬∑ **live-API SSE data-sonification TECH** (off banned grain-cloud ‚ÄĒ synth FM bells, no his-piano grains) ¬∑ **bright civic/atlas daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** (first live external SSE / event-stream input AND first live web-API data sonification in the lab ‚ÄĒ weather `502` / seismic `712` / solar-wind `314` exist but never a live edit-stream; grep-0√ó) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (Wikimedia SSE feed w/ transparent synthetic fallback + FM-bell/woodblock/swell synth ensemble + Canvas2D atlas-bloom render + musical throttle/voice-cap) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (**Hatnote *Listen to Wikipedia*** ‚ÄĒ Stephen LaPorte & Mahmoud Hashemi ¬∑ **Brian Eno** generative ambient ¬∑ **KLING KLANG KLONG *Sounds of the Unseen***) ¬∑ **#5** (RESEARCH ¬ß485 today ‚ÄĒ the live data-sonification / never-repeating-stream register). **Bulletproof glance:** `master ‚Č§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§8kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí12/12:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on open-fifth drone bed so silence between edits has a floor; **14-voice cap + ~55ms refractory + ~6 bells/sec throttle (queue cap 8, drop-oldest)** so a busy firehose stays musical not noise; **transparent offline fallback** ‚ÄĒ if the SSE errors / doesn't connect within ~3s / `EventSource` is unavailable, a Poisson-ish **synthetic edit generator** drives the piece (honest status badge: emerald `live: en.wikipedia + 40 wikis` vs amber `demo stream (offline)`), so it **always rings + blooms**; AudioContext created+resumed inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (EventSource close + rAF + audio nodes + listeners + timers). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (SSE read directly client-side; nothing sent or stored ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (Web Audio + Canvas2D + native `EventSource` only). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `‚úď Compiled successfully in 34.3s` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, nothing in the `760` folder), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`); **proven environmental THIS cycle** ‚ÄĒ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `‚úď Compiled successfully in 80s` then failed identically at the identical path; Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/network/Canvas in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/eye: whether `stream.wikimedia.org` connects from Karel's review device (the synthetic fallback guarantees a sounding, blooming glance either way, honestly badged), and whether the single FM-bell timbre family reads as a true carillon. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`758-sky-almanac`** ‚≠ź (SVG sun-arc orrery ¬∑ the local clock + computed sun/moon position conduct a long-form, non-looping arrangement of whole PHRASES of Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano ‚ÄĒ daylight palette, zero-interaction autoplay, the best unattended glance + highest ambition floor of the three; refs Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* / Finer *Longplayer*; **RESURRECT FIRST**) + **`759-phrase-loom`** (SVG ¬∑ drag a luminous phrase-timeline to re-weave whole phrases of his recording via a Markov transition model ‚ÄĒ the literal "remix his phrasing, not his grains" answer; refs Eno / Burroughs-Bowie cut-up) as **IDEAS ¬ß485**. ## (Cycle 484 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent bright/joyful explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/755-kids-bounce-house](/dream/755-kids-bounce-house)** ‚ÄĒ Bounce House ūü§ł. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 484. **For**: kids (4+) / **touch** (tap-sky-to-drop, drag-to-pluck) / **Canvas2D, ZERO GPU shader** / real **Verlet mass-spring cloth membrane** + tuned membrane-drum synthesis / bright sunny bounce-house daylight, joyful/active. **What if a 4-year-old could bounce bright balls on a giant stretchy TRAMPOLINE that SINGS ‚ÄĒ the sheet's wobble and each landing turning into warm tuned drum-and-bell notes?** A sunny sky scene: a big candy-purple trampoline stretched across the lower screen, drawn as a **real deforming 24√ó10 Verlet mass-spring cloth** (structural + shear springs, Jakobsen constraint relaxation, pinned rim). The child **taps the sky** to drop a fat glossy primary-colored ball ‚ÄĒ it falls, deforms the sheet for real, and **bounces**; each landing plays a tuned membrane-drum hit (center = low & round, edges = brighter), loudness from impact velocity, pitch quantized to C-major-pentatonic so nothing's ever "wrong." **Dragging the sheet** plucks a wobble that travels outward. Multiple balls pile up ‚Üí a gentle emergent polyrhythm of warm hits; the cloth's averaged displacement modulates an always-on open-fifth pad. The deforming soft-body's motion *is* the score, not a faked wobble. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields ‚ÄĒ WebGPU+WebGL2 are 9/15; Canvas2D is *scarce* again at 3√ó; build one piece with no shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" ‚Üí 755 is **pure Canvas2D, zero WebGL/WebGPU/shader**), **#4** ("the un-built bright/joyful/active-middle kids register ‚ÄĒ exuberant without silly, bright without dark-meditation" ‚Üí sunny bounce-house, not the 9√ó near-dark glow), and off **#1/#3/mic-cam bans** (no grain-cloud, no GPU shader, touch not mic/camera). **touch INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera; touch is scarce again at ~2√ó) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the jury-named scarce no-shader surface) ¬∑ **Verlet cloth membrane + membrane-percussion-synthesis TECH** (the lab's FIRST structured mass-spring cloth ‚ÄĒ blobs exist at `286`/`451` but never a structured sheet; and the FIRST *sonified membrane*; deliberately OFF the saturated drop‚Üícollision‚Üínote register of `184`/`451`/`553`/`619`/`350`) ¬∑ **bright joyful daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 3‚Äď4/5**: **#1** (first structured Verlet cloth membrane + first membrane sonification in the lab ‚ÄĒ grep-verified trampoline/bounce-membrane 0√ó) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (multi-touch input + Verlet mass-spring cloth solver w/ ball‚ÜĒcloth collision + tuned membrane-drum/bell synth + Canvas2D render) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (**Thomas Jakobsen** "Advanced Character Physics" GDC 2001 ¬∑ **Xavier Provot** 1995 mass-spring cloth ¬∑ **JellyCar Worlds** / **Toolkit for Verlet Motion 2026** soft-body lineage ¬∑ membrane percussion synthesis) ¬∑ **#5** (RESEARCH ¬ß484 today ‚ÄĒ the live soft-body/Verlet-physics 2026 creative-coding wave). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master ‚Č§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass 7500 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on open-fifth pad that brightens with sheet activity; **3s-idle ghost auto-demo** drops a ball every ~1.5s + soft ping so a glancing reviewer sees+hears it bouncing and singing hands-free; canvas visuals run before audio (gesture-gated AudioContext, iOS); try/catch around audio + the step loop (never throws into rAF); full teardown (rAF + audio nodes + resize listener). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (Web Audio + Canvas2D only). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `‚úď Compiled` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, nothing in the 755 folder), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`); **proven environmental THIS cycle** ‚ÄĒ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.0min` then failed identically at the identical path; Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU/touch in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/eye: whether a deliberate all-balls pile-up briefly over-stretches the cloth before the springs recover (self-corrects within a frame, never a fail state), and whether the membrane-drum timbre reads as warm-and-tuned; the ghost auto-demo guarantees a sounding, bouncing glance regardless. ## (Cycle 482 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 speech‚Üímusic mappings, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/752-kids-word-band](/dream/752-kids-word-band)** ‚ÄĒ Word Band ūüĆąūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 482. **For**: kids (4+) / **live speech recognition** (Web Speech API) / **SVG/DOM, ZERO GPU shader** / phonetic word‚Üípentatonic-xylophone riff + look-ahead groove / bright rainbow daylight, joyful. **What if a 4-year-old could SAY a word and HEAR its sounds turn into music ‚ÄĒ say "banana" and the rainbow xylophone bounces out ba-na-na as a happy climbing riff?** The child taps START, then speaks; the **Web Speech API** recognizes each word, maps its letters to an 8-bar **C-major-pentatonic rainbow xylophone** (vowels spread across the scale, consonants fill the gaps ‚ÄĒ a stable, deterministic riff, nothing ever "wrong"), plays it immediately, and tumbles the spoken letters in as big bouncing colored type. Each word lays a short looping ostinato that joins a gentle **Chris-Wilson look-ahead groove** (25ms/120ms, ‚Č§4 simultaneous word-loops, oldest drops) so you build a little band. The lab's **first KIDS speech-recognition piece** (real `SpeechRecognition` exists only in adult `570`/`189`; voice-for-kids has always meant pitch/RMS `88`/`158`/`179`, never the *recognized word itself*) and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#5** ("build the un-built in-browser-ASR finding ‚ÄĒ a 4yo says a word and hears it become a sound"), **#4** ("the un-built bright/joyful/active-middle kids register"), **#2** ("the lab is thin on SVG/DOM ‚ÄĒ build one piece with NO GPU shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" ‚Üí 752 is **pure SVG/DOM, zero canvas/WebGL/WebGPU**), **#1** (off the banned grain-cloud ‚ÄĒ word‚Üíriff). **live-speech INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera/touch) ¬∑ **SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (the jury-named scarce no-shader surface; off banned GPU-shader-field) ¬∑ **phonetic word‚Üíxylophone-riff TECH** (off banned grain-cloud) ¬∑ **bright rainbow daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5** (#2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [Web-Speech recognition + word‚Üíletter‚Üíbar phonetic map + look-ahead groove scheduler + SVG/DOM render] + #5 [RESEARCH ¬ß411 in-browser ASR, 6 days old, in-window; reinforced by ¬ß482 today ‚ÄĒ Web Speech spec milestone 2026-05-21 + iOS-Safari 14.5+ support] + qualified-#1 [first kids speech piece; first word‚Üíxylophone mapping]). Refs: **Incredibox** (additive band-building) ¬∑ **Toca Band / Sago Mini** (bigger-bar-lower-note, pentatonic-only safety) ¬∑ **Web Speech API** ¬∑ **Chris Wilson** look-ahead scheduler. **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; warm marimba timbre; always-on C2/G2 pad; **graceful fallback** ‚ÄĒ speech unsupported/denied (Firefox, incognito) ‚Üí a big 26-letter tap keyboard (each tinted its bar color) + PLAY runs the identical riff + `text-rose-300` "Tap the letters to play!" notice; **3s auto-demo** cycles seeded happy words hands-free (resumes after 5s silence); AudioContext inside the START gesture (iOS); full teardown (recognition + scheduler timer + nodes + AudioContext). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.2min` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`); **proven environmental THIS cycle** ‚ÄĒ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `‚úď Compiled` then failed identically at the identical path; Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no speech/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/eye: iOS-Safari `webkitSpeechRecognition` latency (0.5‚Äď2s typical, could feel laggy), `onend` auto-restart race, and whether spelling-driven riffs read as *musical* per-word (deterministic + pentatonic so never wrong); the tap-keyboard + auto-demo guarantee a sounding glance with zero mic. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-mapping fire; banked **`751-kids-say-a-zoo`** ‚≠ź (semantic: spoken word ‚Üí bouncing Canvas2D creature that sings, accreting chord-garden ‚ÄĒ most pure-4yo delight, RESURRECT FIRST) + **`753-kids-spell-parade`** (rhythmic/stateful: word letters ‚Üí accumulating Canvas2D marching-band groove) as **IDEAS ¬ß482**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/752-kids-word-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 480 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent explorers)

- **[/dream/747-kids-inkblot-bloom](/dream/747-kids-inkblot-bloom)** ‚ÄĒ Inkblot Bloom ūü¶čūüĖčÔłŹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 480. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic hum/blow** (analysis-only) / **WebGPU** Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion (Canvas2D-CPU fallback) / kaleidoscopic ink-bloom / contemplative, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old could hum and watch living, mirror-symmetric inkblots bloom and unfold like a butterfly ‚ÄĒ and hear each fold sing?** A near-dark calm screen: the child **hums or blows** into the mic; soft ink blooms outward from the centre and unfolds in **kaleidoscopic mirror symmetry** (a living Rorschach butterfly/flower) ‚ÄĒ the ink is a **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** field run as a **WGSL compute shader** on a 256¬≤ ping-pong buffer (the lab's first *kaleidoscopic-symmetry* RD), folded with mirror symmetry to a full-screen quad. As the reacting fronts spread and split they ring soft consonant bells (each hum seeds a fresh drop of ink; pitch follows the bloom's radius + the hum's pitch). No beat, no loop, no "wrong" note ‚ÄĒ C-major-pentatonic snap. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #1** ("give a kid the *scarce* renderer ‚ÄĒ ban the Canvas2D monoculture": WebGPU is primary, Canvas2D only as fallback) + **#2** ("texture/transformation, NOT a loop-groove, vary the register ‚ÄĒ not silly"). **mic INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; serves KIDS.md vocalization) ¬∑ **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (scarce ‚ÄĒ off the raw-WebGL2-4√ó-audit-ban AND banned Canvas2D-primary [fallback only]) ¬∑ **kaleidoscopic Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion TECH** (NOT a step-sequencer groove) ¬∑ **contemplative ink-on-light/Rorschach VIBE** (off banned silly). **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5** (`#2 + #3`, arguably `#1`): **#2** ‚Č•4 subsystems (analysis-only mic [RMS breath + zero-crossing pitch] + WGSL Gray-Scott compute + kaleidoscope-fold render + RD-driven additive-bell sonification) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (**Bileam Tschepe (elekktronaut)** feedback/inkblot TouchDesigner lineage ¬∑ **Entagma "Easy Houdini: Inkblots ‚ÄĒ Steal from TouchDesigner" (May 2026)** ¬∑ **Gray-Scott** / Pearson 1993 / Turing 1952) ¬∑ arguably **#1** (first mirror/kaleidoscope-symmetric RD, and first mic-driven RD, in the lab ‚ÄĒ RD exists at `9` but never symmetric/voice-driven). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master ‚Č§0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 7kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; mic **analysis-only** (never wired to destination, never recorded/sent); always-on C2/G2/C3 drone; **ghost-hum auto-demo** keeps the ink blooming + singing hands-free on mic-deny/idle (zero permission); **WebGPU ‚Üí Canvas2D-CPU fallback runs the identical Gray-Scott model** (96¬≤ grid, same kaleidoscope fold) so it blooms+sings end-to-end with no GPU; AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (rAF / mic tracks / WebGPU device+buffers / AudioContext). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (no network at all ‚ÄĒ fully on-device; rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (WebGPU via `navigator.gpu`, usage bits hardcoded ‚ÄĒ no `@webgpu/types`). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `‚úď Compiled successfully in 39.3s` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental THIS cycle** ‚ÄĒ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `‚úď Compiled` then failed identically at the identical path; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (read the page.tsx: no module-top-level browser-API access) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 480). **NOT browser/device-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/eye: whether WGSL compiles first-run on a real iPad (Canvas2D fallback is the safety net), whether the RD regime reads as a *butterfly*, whether breath onsets seed cleanly; the ghost-hum + Canvas2D fallbacks guarantee a sounding, blooming glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`748-kids-aurora-silk`** ‚≠ź (tilt ‚Üí three.js mass-spring CLOTH aurora veil ‚ÄĒ the iOS-bulletproof first-cloth sibling, RESURRECT FIRST) + **`749-kids-shadow-garden`** ‚≠ź (camera body-silhouette ‚Üí WebGPU instanced flower-growth ‚ÄĒ the gentle-giant sibling) as **IDEAS ¬ß480**. ## Cycle 478 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, ONE concept [cycle-2 of 738] via 3 musical models

- **[/dream/743-kids-song-family](/dream/743-kids-song-family)** ‚ÄĒ Song Family ūüĆüūüéĻ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 478. **For**: kids (3+) / **mic voice/hum** (analysis-only) / **raw WebGL2** GLSL companions (Canvas2D fallback) / accreting **chord-harmony** memory voiced by CataRT grains of **Karel's real Welcome Home piano** / tender companion, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old's hummed songs hatched a growing FAMILY of glowing companions who remembered the child's melodies and sang them back in stacked HARMONY ‚ÄĒ and their voices were made from grains of Karel's OWN real recorded piano?** The **cycle-2 of `738-kids-song-sprout`** (the lab's first long-form/stateful kids piece, which was *monophonic*): this builds the harmonic/multi-voice dimension 738 explicitly banked for cycle-2 ‚ÄĒ the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-18 #3** ("reward DEPTH, RETURN and extend the ceiling, stop banking and walking away") AND simultaneously **#5** ("use Karel's real music ‚ÄĒ it's in 1 of the last 15; a kids one could use his piano grains"). Hum a phrase ‚Üí a glowing friend hatches & remembers it; hum more ‚Üí a whole family (cap 4) appears, each visibly growing (bigger/brighter/warmer) as it hears more; go quiet ‚Üí the family sings the remembered melodies back as a **chord choir** (each companion on a different consonant chord tone, the stack deepening unison‚Üíoctave‚Üí5th‚Üí3rd+9th with maturity), so a single line blooms into warm 3‚Äď4-part harmony and minute-5 differs from minute-1. Nothing's ever wrong ‚ÄĒ D-Dorian snap. **mic-voice INPUT** (off banned touch-primary) ¬∑ **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the scarcest non-banned renderer ‚ÄĒ off banned Canvas2D-primary [fallback only], off WebGPU-4√ó-now-audit-banned, off three.js-3√ó-would-ban; iOS-bulletproof) ¬∑ **accreting chord-harmony memory + CataRT grains of his real piano TECH** (free/rubato chord-choir, emphatically NOT a step-sequencer loop-groove) ¬∑ **tender/wonder companion VIBE** (off banned silly). **Ambition honest 4‚Äď5/5** (`#1+#2+#3+#4+#5`): **#1** first multi-voice/harmonic memory in the lab (738 + all 700+ priors are monophonic) AND first kids piece voiced by concatenative grains of his real recording in a *harmony* context (721 used his grains as a single breath-bloom) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•5 subsystems (mic autocorrelation pitch/phrase capture + phrase-memory & growth store + harmony scheduler + CataRT grain corpus from his piano w/ offline-synth fallback + raw-WebGL2 GLSL renderer) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (arXiv `2506.18143` *AI Harmonizer* [four-part harmony from one voice] ¬∑ Diemo Schwarz *CataRT* ¬∑ Brian Eno *Reflection*) ¬∑ **#4** cycle-2 of 738 (cycle-3 = round‚áĄchord‚áĄphase toggle [merge 742/744], more voices, seasons) ¬∑ **#5** RESEARCH ¬ß478 same-day. **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master ‚Č§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass 7.5k ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; mic **analysis-only** (never to destination); always-on warm drone; **ghost auto-demo** (a virtual child hums, hatching & growing the family hands-free, zero permission) on mic-deny/idle; his-piano loader (`fetch /api/audio/<id>`, 4s abort) ‚Üí on ANY failure/offline a gentle offline-rendered synth voice so it ALWAYS sounds; AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS); Canvas2D glow-dot fallback for no-WebGL2; full teardown (rAF/tracks/audio nodes/GL resources/listeners). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (only READS the existing public `/api/audio/<id>` GET; no secret, no DB write, no side effect ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental THIS cycle** ‚ÄĒ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) fails identically at the identical path; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (grep-verified: no module-top-level browser-API access) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 478). **NOT browser/device-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/eye: whether autocorrelation tracks a small child's hum, whether the chord-harmony reads as *a family answering*, whether the real-piano grain voice resynthesizes cleanly (the synth fallback is the likely-reviewer path), growth/cadence tuning, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + synth fallback + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless. ## ‚≠ź Earlier (Cycle 477 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, ONE cross-device concept via 3 network substrates)

- **[/dream/741-piano-room-pulse](/dream/741-piano-room-pulse)** ‚ÄĒ Piano Room Pulse ūüéĻūüĒó. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 477. **For**: adult / **MIDI + computer-keyboard** (on-screen strip fallback) / **three.js** breathing pulse-ring (Canvas2D fallback) / **Supabase Realtime cross-device + NTP shared-clock ensemble-lock** / intimate connected duet. **What if you typed the same 4-letter room code on two phones, played Karel's piano together ‚ÄĒ and a shared NTP-style clock gently locked BOTH of you onto ONE drifting pulse so a real ensemble LOCK emerges across the room despite ~100ms of network latency?** The directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-18 #4** ("make ONE multi-user piece *actually* cross-device ‚ÄĒ retire the asterisk") AND the deepest answer to **#3** ("reward DEPTH, build the ceiling, stop banking and walking away"): the lab's one prior cross-device piece (`729-piano-portal-jam`) joined via a clunky manual SDP copy-paste; this joins by **typing a room code** (Supabase Realtime, frictionless) and adds the capability 729 never had ‚ÄĒ a **shared clock + ensemble lock**, the actual hard problem of networked music. Only tiny note-events travel (`{note,vel,who,beat,t}`) ‚ÄĒ never audio; both devices render through the same FM e-piano (you warm amber/rose panned-left, partner cool cyan/violet panned-right). The clock: ping/pong `offset = t1 ‚ąí (t0 + rtt/2)`, RTT-weighted slew, an emergent `beatPhase(now)` both derive identically from a shared epoch+BPM (68) ‚ÄĒ then each note is gently quantized to the nearest shared sub-beat (~11ms humanize) so two pianos *interlock* instead of smearing. **MIDI/keyboard INPUT** (a real pianist's keyboard ‚ÄĒ off banned touch-primary; on-screen strip only the fallback) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (scarce, off banned Canvas2D-primary + off WebGPU-3√ó) ¬∑ **Supabase-Realtime relay + NTP shared-clock TECH** (a clock-sync *substrate*, NOT the banned step-sequencer loop-groove) ¬∑ **intimate-duet VIBE** (off banned silly). **Ambition honest 3‚Äď4/5** (`#1+#2+#3+#4+#5`): **#1** first Supabase-Realtime/WebSocket transport AND first networked shared-clock in the lab ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•5 subsystems (NTP clock-sync + Realtime relay [note/ping/pong/presence] + multi-input + shared-grid-scheduled FM e-piano + three.js pulse-ring) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (**Ableton Link** ¬∑ NTP-over-WebSocket ¬∑ Chrome Music Lab **Shared Piano** ¬∑ JackTrip/Chris Chafe **SoundWIRE** ¬∑ George Lewis *Voyager*) ¬∑ **#4** multi-cycle (cycle-2 = Karel's real piano grains [JURY #5], >2 players, jitter buffering) ¬∑ **#5** RESEARCH ¬ß477 same-day. **Bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7.5k ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on breathing D-Dorian pulse bed; **ghost partner** (*Voyager*) auto-plays cool-panned phrases locked to the same grid after ~2.5s idle, hands-free, zero permission, steps aside when a real partner joins; lazy/env-guarded Supabase client ‚Üí any failure (missing env/offline/subscribe error) falls to solo + a calm `text-amber-300/95` notice; **no DB write** (Broadcast is ephemeral pub/sub ‚ÄĒ side-effect-free) ¬∑ **no API route ‚Üí no guard** (browser connects directly; the only key is the `NEXT_PUBLIC_*` anon key, client-public by design ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean) ¬∑ **no new npm dep** (`three` + `@supabase/supabase-js` already deps); AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS); Canvas2D pulse-ring fallback for no-WebGL; full teardown (rAF/listeners/MIDI/three.js dispose/AudioContext close/channel unsubscribe). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** ‚ÄĒ authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental** ‚ÄĒ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) fails identically at the identical path; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (only numeric constants + pure `new THREE.Color()` at module top; all browser-API/Supabase access inside handlers/effects) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 477). **NOT browser/device-verified** (no two phones in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by play: whether the offset/RTT lock holds across two real networks, how "locked" the quantized duet feels by ear, MIDI on a real keyboard, iOS audio unlock; the ghost + Canvas2D + solo fallbacks guarantee a sounding, locked-feeling glance regardless. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-substrate fire; banked **`739-piano-room-relay`** ‚≠ź (Supabase Realtime Broadcast direct ‚ÄĒ the reliability/frictionless sibling) + **`740-piano-room-portal`** ‚≠ź (WebRTC P2P auto-signaled over Supabase ‚ÄĒ the low-latency cycle-2 of 729) as **IDEAS ¬ß477**. ## ‚≠ź Earlier (Cycle 476 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, ONE memory concept via 3 scarce-renderer approaches)

- **[/dream/738-kids-song-sprout](/dream/738-kids-song-sprout)** ‚ÄĒ Song Sprout ūüĆĪ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 476. **For**: kids (3+) / **mic voice/hum** (analysis-only) / **three.js** glowing `Points` creature (Canvas2D fallback) / accreting compositional memory + grows-up / tender-companionship, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old had a single glowing creature that LISTENS, REMEMBERS the little songs they hum, and slowly GROWS UP ‚ÄĒ singing their own melodies back, recombined into something new?** The lab's **FIRST long-form / stateful KIDS piece** ‚ÄĒ every other kids prototype is instant cause‚Üíeffect that *resets*; this one has **memory** and **evolves over minutes** (the sprout at minute 1 ‚ÄĒ a tiny baby-blue spark, thin voice ‚ÄĒ is genuinely different at minute 5 ‚ÄĒ a big warm-gold being with a fuller vibrato'd voice singing developed versions of what it was taught). The child hums short phrases; the creature leans toward the sound, brightens, and REMEMBERS the contours; on the child's silence it SINGS BACK a reply **recombined** from remembered fragments (transpose / reorder / reverse / contour-invert / rhythm-warp + a resolving tail as it matures ‚ÄĒ an answer, never a literal echo). As memories accumulate a saturating growth curve (`1‚ąíe^(‚ąínotes/26)`) drives everything: particles 600‚Üí2600, body scale up, colour baby-blue‚Üíviolet‚Üígold, voice gains an octave + FM warmth + vibrato + longer release, drone fills out, replies come more often ‚ÄĒ with a legible life-stage label ("a tiny spark" ‚Üí "a grown song-being"). The structural answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #3** ("reward DEPTH, build the accreting-memory ceiling, stop banking and walking away") ‚ÄĒ the adult-only long-form/evolving capability (689/704/734) brought DOWN to a kid as a *relationship*, not a toy. **mic voice/hum INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; camera-free vs the camera-heavy recent kids 727/731/724) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (scarce, 1√ó in window; off banned Canvas2D-primary + off WebGPU which is 3√ó) ¬∑ **accreting compositional-memory + call-and-response recombination TECH** (emphatically NOT a shared-clock loop/groove) ¬∑ **tender/companionship/wonder VIBE** (off banned silly-comedy). **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5** (`#2 + #4`, arguably `#1/#5`): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic autocorrelation pitch/phrase capture + memory store & saturating-growth engine + `composeReply` recombination + growth-aware FM voice synth + three.js growing-creature renderer = 5) ¬∑ **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle-1 = core memory+growth+reply; cycle-2 = richer life-stages/seasons, harmonic memory, a second sprout) ¬∑ arguably **#1** (first kids piece with *compositional* memory + a maturation arc ‚ÄĒ prior kids memory [298-kids-echo-friend] is literal call-response, not recombination+growth) ¬∑ **#5** RESEARCH ¬ß476 same-day (long-form-evolving generative frontier is adult-only ‚Üí bring it to a kid). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master ‚Č§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass 7.5k ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; mic **analysis-only** (never routed to destination); always-on warm drone; **ghost auto-demo** (a virtual child hums scale-shaped phrases, so the sprout listens/grows/sings hands-free on load with zero permission) on mic-deny/no-mic/idle; D-Dorian snap so it's never out of tune; AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS); Canvas2D fallback (`fallback.ts`) for no-WebGL; full teardown (rAF/listener/three.js dispose/AudioContext close). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (mic read in-browser only; no secret, no side effect ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency** (three.js is a project dep). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** ‚ÄĒ the authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker spawn (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental** ‚ÄĒ pristine `origin/main` (the exact commit live on Vercel) fails identically; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (verified: only numeric constants + pure `new THREE.Color()` at module top, all browser-API access inside handlers/effects) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 476). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/eye: whether the autocorrelation pitch tracks a small child's hum, whether the recombined replies read as *the sprout developing*, growth/reply-cadence tuning, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; banked **`736-kids-echo-grove`** ‚≠ź (mic ‚Üí three.js accreting grove that re-sings older trees) + **`737-kids-memory-reef`** (mic ‚Üí raw WebGL2 GLSL reef that grows coral from the voice ‚ÄĒ the iOS-bulletproof sibling) as **IDEAS ¬ß476**. - **[/dream/727-kids-color-hunt](/dream/727-kids-color-hunt)** ‚ÄĒ Color Hunt ūüé®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 472. **For**: kids (4+) / **camera-as-color-sampler** (analysis-only) / **WebGPU compute-shader** particle bloom (Canvas2D fallback) / cross-modal color‚Üíharmony / wonder, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old could point the tablet at the colors in their room and PAINT MUSIC with what they see ‚ÄĒ red things sing warm and low, sky-blue shimmers bright and high?** Each frame averages the center-region RGB of the rear camera ‚Üí HSV; **hue** selects a register-climbing consonant pentatonic chord (warm-low ‚Üí bright-high), **saturation** sets particle energy, **brightness** sets loudness + bloom openness ‚ÄĒ a slow evolving texture that re-voices on color-shift, never a beat/loop. A 12,288-particle **WebGPU WGSL compute+render bloom** takes on the room's color (first-class Canvas2D fallback with identical physics). 727 *deepens that loved lineage* (Canvas2D bells ‚Üí WebGPU chord bloom; playful ‚Üí wonder). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `gain(0.3)‚Üílowpass(7.5k)‚ÜíDynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1)‚Üídestination`; always-on ambient bed; ghost hue-wheel auto-demo on camera-deny/idle (zero permissions); camera analysis-only (96√ó72 offscreen center average ‚ÄĒ nothing recorded/sent); getUserMedia inside the Start tap (iOS); full teardown. **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (camera read in-browser only; no secret, no side effect ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency**. ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** ‚ÄĒ the authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker spawn (`EMFILE`); **proven environmental** ‚ÄĒ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) fails identically; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (all browser-API access inside handlers/effects) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 472). ## ‚≠ź Earlier (Cycle 470 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent explorers each on a SCARCE renderer)

- **[/dream/721-kids-piano-garden](/dream/721-kids-piano-garden)** ‚ÄĒ Papa's Piano Garden ūüĆĪ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 470. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic-breath/hum** (analysis-only) / **WebGPU compute-shader** particle field (Canvas2D fallback) / concatenative grains of Karel's REAL piano / tender-luminous, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old could grow a glowing garden of light by humming ‚ÄĒ and every petal is made from Karel's OWN recorded "Welcome Home" piano?** A near-dark field of luminous motes; breath ENERGY (RMS off an `AnalyserNode`) scatters more, brighter seeds + widens the bloom radius; voice PITCH (a cheap zero-crossing estimate) lifts blooms bright-and-high or settles them dark-and-low. Each bloom SOUNDS as **Hann-windowed concatenative grains of Karel's real recording**, selected by CataRT-style `selectNearest` over a (time √ó brightness) descriptor space ‚ÄĒ never a beat, never a loop, just a breathing texture. The literal fusion of **JURY 2026-06-18 #1** ("ban the 9√ó Canvas2D monoculture ‚ÄĒ port the WebGPU-compute stack *to a kids piece*; a kid deserves the scarce renderer too") **and #5** ("use Karel's real music ‚ÄĒ it's in only 1 of the last 15, all adult"). **mic-breath INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; ghost-breath auto-demo on mic-deny/idle; `grain bus ‚Üí master ‚Üí lowpass(7.5k) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; always-on drone; the proven 720 loader copied verbatim with an offline-tone fallback so the corpus is never empty; AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown. **Only network is the public `/api/audio/:id` GET (read-only) ‚Üí no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency** at all. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`, EXIT 0, **508/508** static pages, `/dream/721-kids-piano-garden` static ‚óč 6.97 kB). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified: WGSL compute on a real iPad [Canvas2D fallback is the likely-reviewer path], whether grains read as *blooming from his piano* by ear, the ZCR pitch proxy, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + Canvas2D + offline-tone fallbacks guarantee a sounding glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (each on a scarce renderer); banked **`722-kids-star-scoop`** ‚≠ź (MediaPipe hands ‚Üí three.js 3D starfield scoop, awe) + **`723-kids-aurora-sail`** (device-tilt ‚Üí WebGL2 GLSL aurora, dreamy) as **IDEAS ¬ß470**. ## ‚≠ź Newest (Cycle 462 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent laugh-first explorers)

- **[/dream/705-kids-silly-voice](/dream/705-kids-silly-voice)** ‚ÄĒ Silly Voice Monster ūüé§. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 462. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic** (record + RMS, NOT pitch) / Canvas2D googly monster / pure comedy, zero scale. **What if a kid talks into the phone and a googly monster repeats it back in the silliest possible voice?** Press the giant ūüé§ to record ~1.8s of your own voice (`MediaRecorder`, auto-stops so kids never get stuck), then five big color-coded icon buttons replay it transformed: ūüźŅÔłŹ **chipmunk** (playbackRate 1.85) ¬∑ ūüĎĻ **monster** (0.62) ¬∑ ūüĒĀ **backwards** (reversed Float32 buffer) ¬∑ ūü§Ė **robot** (~30Hz square ring-mod via gain modulation) ¬∑ ūüĆä **wobble** (6.5Hz LFO on a DelayNode). The monster's **mouth lip-syncs** to a real-time RMS envelope tapped off the master `AnalyserNode`; eyes googly-wiggle on every press; instant chipmunk auto-preview right after recording gives immediate payoff. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #5 "MAKE A KID LAUGH"** + **#1** (comedy, never a harmonic event ‚ÄĒ the kids side's banned register): a pure pitch-free **voice-CHANGER**, a genuinely fresh kids register (179/244 sing *back in-key*; ambient pad loops so it's never silent; AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start gesture (iOS); mic-denied ‚Üí friendly `text-rose-300` line + **5 pre-baked synth silly sounds** on the same big buttons so the toy still plays; no-canvas `text-rose-300` notice; full teardown (recorder/tracks/oscillators/rAF/AudioContext). **No network, no CDN, no camera, no API route ‚Üí no guard** (rules #6/#8 clean) ‚ÄĒ works instantly for any reviewer with a mic. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`, EXIT 0, 500/500 static pages). **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear: whether the transforms read as laugh-out-loud silly on a real device, lip-sync timing, and iOS mic unlock; the pre-baked fallback guarantees a sounding glance even with no mic). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`706-kids-tilt-bonk`** (tilt‚Üíbouncy-room bonkers, velocity-pitched SFX ‚ÄĒ the bulletproof no-permission sibling, ‚Čą already-banked 703-boing-zoo) + **`707-kids-mega-mouth`** ‚≠ź (MediaPipe face-puppet that eats falling snacks & burps ‚ÄĒ the most ambitious, most CDN-fragile) as **IDEAS ¬ß462**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/705-kids-silly-voice/README.md`

## ‚≠ź Earlier (Cycle 459 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, one live-data concept via 3 renderer/metaphor approaches)

- **[/dream/699-world-forge](/dream/699-world-forge)** ‚ÄĒ World Forge ūüĆć‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 459. **For**: adult / **live external data** (the global GitHub public-events firehose) / three.js rotating globe / planetary-awe ambient. **What if you could hear and see the whole planet making things right now ‚ÄĒ every code push, star, and merge on Earth as a spark of light and a grain of sound, blooming at its place on a slowly turning globe?** Extends **JURY 2026-06-17 #4** ("683's WebSocket engine could sonify a *non-market* live stream ‚ÄĒ transit, seismic, language-usage ‚ÄĒ for free") into a fresh, keyless, free stream: the lab had sonified the market (683), wiki (437), sky (618), seismic (613/233) but **never the live worldwide act of *making***. **The instrument:** the browser polls `https://api.github.com/events` ‚ÄĒ an unauthenticated, keyless, CORS-open read-only GET (no api route, no guard, no secret) ‚ÄĒ at most once per ~78s (60 req/hr limit), then **meters** each batch of recent events (PushEvent / WatchEvent=star / PullRequest / Issue / Fork / Create) out gently across the window. Each event is one grain: its **type** picks a timbre (push = soft mallet/bell, star = bright shimmer, PR = warm swell, issue = muted tom, fork/create = low bloom), a stable **repo-hash** picks a pitch in a drifting **D-Dorian** mode (same repo ‚Üí same note), and a rolling 12s **rate window** swells a generative drone's density/brightness + the planet's glow. A three.js auto-rotating dark Earth (procedural graticule + scattered land-ish dots, **no external textures**) blooms an additive light at each event's deterministic pseudo geo-location (hashed from repo+actor ‚ÄĒ texture, not GIS), panned by **longitude** via `StereoPannerNode`. **live-external-data INPUT** (off jury-banned touch-primary [5√ó]) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (renderer-coolest of the 3 candidates: 2√ó in rolling-10; off banned WebGL2 [4√ó] + banned audio-first-SVG [5√ó], off just-used WebGPU [683] + Canvas2D-warming [3√ó‚Üíwould-be-4√ó]) ¬∑ **live-data sonification ‚Üí generative ambient drone + per-event voices TECH** (a living texture, emphatically NOT a harmonic-event/voice-leading cadence [banned 8√ó]) ¬∑ **planetary-awe VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6√ó]). **Ambition honest 2/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (live-feed + synthetic-fallback engine + rolling-aggregate state + generative drone/event synth + three.js globe = 4) + **#3** named refs (**Hatnote "Listen to Wikipedia"** ‚ÄĒ LaPorte & Hashemi, the canonical live collaborative-creation firehose sonification; **github.audio**; **Brian Foo** *Data-Driven DJ*; **Refik Anadol** planetary data-as-light ‚ÄĒ all in README); **#1 NOT claimed** (live-data sonification exists in the lab at 683/437/618 ‚ÄĒ honest). **Research-first chain (RESEARCH ¬ß459, same-day, path a):** the dive selected the GitHub firehose as the unbuilt free stream + confirmed the Hatnote/Foo lineage + verified the keyless-CORS feasibility that makes the fire free + unattended-safe. **Bulletproof glance (critical for unattended 06:30 review):** a **synthetic event generator** (weighted realistic distribution ‚ÄĒ pushes common, stars frequent, PRs/issues/forks rarer) starts the instant you press Begin with **zero network**, so the planet sparks and the drone breathes immediately; it upgrades to **live** on the first successful poll (emerald) and falls back to synthetic on **any** error ‚ÄĒ 403/rate-limit/CORS/offline ‚ÄĒ with a `text-amber-300/95` notice; **no WebGL/three.js ‚Üí a Canvas2D starfield-with-blooms fallback** so the glance is never blank. **Ear-safe:** `event voices + drone ‚Üí masterGain ‚Č§0.34 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; iOS AudioContext created/resumed inside the Begin gesture. Full unmount teardown (feed stop, `renderer.dispose()`, audio close). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (pure client keyless public GET; no secret, no side effect ‚ÄĒ rules #6/#8 clean). No new npm deps (`three` already a dep, dynamic-imported). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: whether WebGL renders the globe + blooms on Karel's device, whether GitHub's CORS behaves as documented at runtime, whether type‚Üítimbre/repo‚Üípitch reads as "the planet making things" on real speakers, and iOS audio unlock; the synthetic-first feed + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a live, sounding glance regardless). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE live-firehose concept: banked **`701-living-coral`** ‚≠ź (the world's creation **accreting** onto a luminous DLA reef, *fuller at minute 5 than minute 1* ‚ÄĒ long-form memory made visible; WebGPU/WGSL + Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ the directest "reach for the ceiling," echoes 689) + **`700-commit-rain`** (the **Ikeda** austere take ‚ÄĒ events as falling data-rain grains + monospace labels; Canvas2D) as **IDEAS ¬ß459**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/699-world-forge/README.md`

## (Cycle 458 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent silly/groove/off-glass explorers)

- **[/dream/696-kids-mouth-band](/dream/696-kids-mouth-band)** ‚ÄĒ Mouth Band ūüé§ūü•Ā. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 458. **For**: kids (4+) / mic vocal-percussion (analysis-only) / Canvas2D goofy creature / silly-comedy groove. **What if a 4-year-old could build a silly drum beat just by making MOUTH NOISES ‚ÄĒ boom, tss, pop, brrr ‚ÄĒ and a goofy creature caught each one, looped it, and bopped to it?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #5** ("MAKE A KID LAUGH ‚ÄĒ the silly/funny pole is now 0√ó, the kids side has gone uniformly solemn") and **#1** ("groove, not a cadence ‚ÄĒ the harmonic-event/voice-leading technique is the new pentatonic, banned on the kids side for a week"). **The instrument:** the mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` (analysis only ‚ÄĒ never recorded/stored/sent); a per-frame **RMS energy-onset gate** (rise over recent average + noise floor + ~110ms refractory) catches each mouth-noise, then a **spectral-centroid + low/mid/high band-fraction** heuristic classifies it into 4 color-coded silly drum voices ‚ÄĒ **KICK/"boom"** (red), **SNARE/"pop"** (yellow, the safe catch-all), **HIHAT/"tss"** (cyan), **BRRR/raspberry** (purple). Each onset fires its punchy synth immediately (sub-35ms target) **and** quantizes into a 16-step loop replayed by a Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler at 100 BPM ‚ÄĒ so a few mouth noises become a repeating beat. A big cartoon mouth-creature opens wide, bugs its eyes, squashes/bounces and flashes the voice color on every hit; a bottom step-strip shows the loop with a moving playhead. **mic / vocal-percussion INPUT** (off the jury-banned touch-primary [5√ó]; serves KIDS.md's explicit *vocalization* goal) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (jury noted Canvas2D's ban "worked cleanly," 4√ó‚Üí2√ó, now a cold/safe renderer; off banned WebGL2 [4√ó] + banned audio-first-SVG [5√ó]) ¬∑ **real-time vocal-percussion onset+spectral-classification ‚Üí looping groove TECH** (a real groove, emphatically NOT a harmonic event / voice-leading [banned 8√ó, 6√ó on kids]) ¬∑ **silly/comedy/bright-primary VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6√ó]; the *subject is a joke and a beat*, not a cadence). **Ambition honest 2/5** (`#2 + #3`, with a qualified #1): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic onset+centroid classifier + look-ahead loop/groove scheduler + comedy drum synth + Canvas2D creature = 4) + **#3** named refs (**Incredibox**; **Hazan & Stowell**, *Delayed Decision-making in Real-time Beatbox Percussion Classification*, JNMR 2010; the **AVP dataset**, Mehrabi et al., Audio Mostly 2019 ‚ÄĒ all in README); **#1 qualified** (first real-time vocal-percussion *classification into drum voices* in the lab ‚ÄĒ "spectral centroid" exists only in visualizers [246/285/19], not as a beatbox classifier). **Research-first chain (RESEARCH ¬ß458, same-day, path a):** the dive surfaced Incredibox + the beatbox-onset-classification literature ‚Üí the recipe *is* this prototype's classifier. **Kid-safe chain:** `voices ‚Üí masterGain(0.28) ‚Üí lowpass(7.5kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(-10, 20:1, fast attack ‚ÄĒ brick-wall limiter) ‚Üí destination`; always-on soft ambient bed so it never feels broken; the analyser is *not* wired to output (no echo of the child's voice). **Robustness (bulletproof 06:30 glance):** **mic denied/unavailable ‚Üí a ghost auto-beatboxes a silly groove** into the loop on its own (still funny + grooving) with a `text-rose-300` notice; mic-on-but-idle >2.5s ‚Üí an auto-demo lick; so a sensorless/silent glance is always alive and sounding. iOS AudioContext + getUserMedia both requested inside the START gesture (AGC/noise-suppression disabled to keep onsets crisp). Full unmount teardown (rAF cancel, scheduler timer cleared, mic tracks stopped, AudioContext closed). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; no network call, no secret, no side effect). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 43s, ‚úď Generating static pages (495/495)** [494 from cycle 457 + 696 = 495, confirming non-winners 697/698 absent], `/dream/696-kids-mouth-band 4.65 kB / 111 kB` prerendered static ‚óč). **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear: whether the 4-bucket classifier reliably tells a child's "boom" from "brrr" and "pop" from "tss" on real device mics [mitigated: wide thresholds + mid-burst SNARE default so misclassification still sounds musical, never "wrong"], onset-gate sensitivity per device mic gain, and iOS unlock; the ghost auto-beatbox + ambient bed guarantee a live, sounding glance regardless). **Honest limit:** a heuristic spectral classifier on untrained 4-year-old mouth noises *will* misfire at the KICK/BRRR and SNARE/HIHAT boundaries ‚ÄĒ by design nothing reads as a failure (every hit is a drum, the beat keeps grooving). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three off-glass silly/groove machines, different embodied input √ó renderer √ó comedy mechanic): banked **`698-kids-dance-mirror`** ‚≠ź (dance in front of the webcam ‚Üí a DOM/CSS character mirrors & exaggerates you + **freeze-dance comedy**; camera analysis-only ‚ÄĒ the directest "get off the glass," revives the jury-named abandoned 652 dance register, freshest DOM/CSS renderer) + **`697-kids-shake-circus`** (shake the tablet ‚Üí a three.js jelly clown squashes/boings + confetti POP; Pixar squash-&-stretch) as **IDEAS ¬ß458**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/696-kids-mouth-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 457 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, one multi-user groove-room concept via 3 interaction models)

- **[/dream/694-pulse-ring](/dream/694-pulse-ring)** ‚ÄĒ Pulse Ring ‚ŹĪÔłŹūü•Ā. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 457. **For**: adult (any) / **multi-user** (shared rotating ring, open a 2nd tab) / Canvas2D / hypnotic dance-floor groove. **What if several people shared one spinning clock ‚ÄĒ each dropping rhythmic hits onto a common ring at their own subdivision ‚ÄĒ so a groove emerges that no single player authored?** The lab's return to the single most-starved register the **JURY 2026-06-17** named ‚ÄĒ **MULTI-USER (0√ó across the entire last-15 window, "the genuinely unbuilt register")** ‚ÄĒ and a direct answer to its plea for **groove/rhythm/play over another tension-resolution cadence** (the banned new monoculture). **The piece:** a glowing playhead hand sweeps a circular ring once per ~2s bar; each participant is a colored percussion voice (low tom / woodblock / high bell / rim / shaker) and **taps beads** onto the ring at angular positions ‚ÄĒ as the hand crosses a bead, that voice fires. Each player picks their own **subdivision (8 / 12 / 16)**, so independent patterns overlaid on the *same* rotating clock produce **emergent polyrhythm + phasing** (a 12-against-8 cross-rhythm, a 16-note shaker shimmer drifting against a 3-feel bell line). An optional low-A drone adds body ‚ÄĒ but the subject is rhythm, not harmony. **multi-participant/shared-ring INPUT** (breaks the standing solo monoculture 0√ó‚Üí1; off jury-banned touch-primary) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the jury noted Canvas2D's ban "worked cleanly," 4√ó‚Üí2√ó, now the cold/safe renderer; off banned WebGL2 [4√ó] + banned audio-first-SVG [5√ó]) ¬∑ **shared-clock groove / emergent-polyrhythm TECH** (a real groove, emphatically NOT a harmonic event / voice-leading [banned 8√ó]) ¬∑ **hypnotic dance-floor VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6√ó]). **Architecture (the 2026 collaborative-web-music principle, RESEARCH ¬ß457):** *networked control, not networked audio* ‚ÄĒ only lightweight events (presence hello/present/bye, a shared beat-zero **epoch** in `performance.now` space, conflict-free last-write-wins bead add/remove keyed by `(voice,slot,subdivision)`, full-state-on-join) cross `BroadcastChannel("resonance-pulse-ring-694")`; every client **synthesizes its own audio locally** with a ~25ms look-ahead scheduler phase-locked to the shared epoch, so all tabs hear the same combined ensemble. **Ambition 2/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (BroadcastChannel control-sync + shared-epoch look-ahead scheduler + multi-voice Web-Audio percussion engine + Canvas2D ring renderer = 4) + **#3** named refs (Steve Reich *Clapping Music*/*Drumming* phasing; West-African *gankogui*/clave timeline ‚ÄĒ the default ghost bell uses the classic 12/8 timeline; The Hub lineage ‚ÄĒ all in README); **#1 NOT claimed** (BroadcastChannel/multi-user already exists in 319/334/341 ‚ÄĒ honest). **Robustness (bulletproof 06:30 glance):** open alone ‚Üí after ~3s two **ghost players** join with complementary subdivisions (a 12/8 bell timeline + 8-feel pulse + 16-note shaker) so a lone visitor hears a living polyrhythm; presence badge flips amber "playing solo ¬∑ ūü§Ė ghost players" ‚Üí emerald "ūüĎ• N players on the ring" the instant a real peer is heard (ghosts retire); **~2.5s idle auto-demo** evolves beads on a loop; no `BroadcastChannel` ‚Üí fully solo-with-ghosts, never throws. **Ear-safe:** `gain (‚Č§0.4) ‚Üí lowpass(~9kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(-18dB,4:1) ‚Üí destination`. iOS AudioContext created inside the Start gesture; one rAF loop mutating refs (React never re-renders per frame); full unmount teardown (rAF cancel, "bye" broadcast, channel close, AudioContext close, timers cleared). **No network call, no API route ‚Üí no guard needed** (same-origin BroadcastChannel only; no secret, no side effect). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 35.5s, 494/494 static pages**, `/dream/694-pulse-ring 4.95 kB / 108 kB` prerendered static ‚óč). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/multi-tab in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the cross-subdivision polyrhythm reads as a felt groove on real speakers, the two-tab presence flip + shared-epoch alignment, iOS unlock; the ghost players + breathing-ring auto-demo guarantee a live, sounding glance). **Honest limit:** `BroadcastChannel` is same-origin/same-browser (two tabs/windows) ‚ÄĒ true cross-device jamming would swap in WebRTC/WebSocket carrying the same control events. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE multi-user groove-room concept: banked **`693-ensemble-floor`** ‚≠ź (5-lane √ó 16-step collaborative drum-machine "band room"; Tenori-on ‚ÄĒ the most legible/crowd-pleasing) + **`695-trade-fours`** (rotating-spotlight "trading fours" relay; captured riffs accumulate into a shared arrangement; loop-station, love-aligned to `172`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) as **IDEAS ¬ß457**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/694-pulse-ring/README.md`

## (Cycle 456 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent harmonic-event explorers, one off-glass)

- **[/dream/690-kids-weather-hands](/dream/690-kids-weather-hands)** ‚ÄĒ Weather in Your Hands ‚ėÄÔłŹ‚õąÔłŹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 456. **For**: kids (4+) / off-glass embodied (tilt + motion + mic energy) / audio-first / weather vibe. **What if a 4-year-old could change the *feeling* of music with their whole body ‚ÄĒ no touching the screen ‚ÄĒ and hear sunshine turn to storm and back?** The lab's directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-16 #2** ("get off the glass ‚ÄĒ 13 of 15 render to a screen; the 2 that aren't are the best things here") *and* **#1** ("a real harmonic event, not the pentatonic crutch") at once. **The piece:** hold the tablet like a tray, eyes off the glass; three input subsystems ‚ÄĒ `DeviceOrientation` tilt + `DeviceMotion` acceleration + mic RMS ‚ÄĒ fuse into ONE "energy" axis (calm=0 ‚Üí wild=1). That axis drives a continuous **major‚ÜĒminor mode-morph** in Web Audio: over a fixed root (A2) + perfect-fifth drone, the **third literally bends** (M3 +4 ‚Üí m3 +3, an *audible moving pitch*) and the **sixth crossfades** (M6 +9 ‚Üí m6 +8), a bright Lydian #11 sparkle fading out as a tense ‚ô≠7 + filtered rain/wind fade in. Calm = a sunny major world; sway/shake/hum = the harmony darkens into storm; settle = it glides back to sun. The whole screen is one breathing sun‚ÜĒcloud glow (no buttons, no reading). **off-glass/embodied INPUT** (the scarcest ‚ÄĒ only 680/669 recently) ¬∑ **audio-first OUTPUT** (dodges jury-banned Canvas2D [4√ó]) ¬∑ **movement-energy ‚Üí mode-morph TECH** (a real harmonic event, emphatically NOT pentatonic scale-snap ‚ÄĒ no note quantization anywhere) ¬∑ **weather/dynamic VIBE** (dodges banned warm-cozy-kids [4√ó]). **Ambition 2‚Äď3/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (tilt + motion + mic energy fusion ‚Üí Web Audio mode-morph ‚Üí breathing canvas sky) + **#3** named refs (embodied music-cognition / Reggio Emilia "understanding through movement"; Brian Eno generative-ambient weather ‚ÄĒ both in README); #5 claimed only loosely (the embodied-perception literature is foundational, not <30-day). **Graceful degrade (never silent/dead):** no motion sensor ‚Üí mic energy alone; no mic ‚Üí gentle autonomous weather drift; before audio unlock ‚Üí the glow still animates; **~2.5s idle auto-demo** auto-cycles sun‚Üícloud‚Üísun so a sensorless 06:30 glance shows the sky breathing and morphing on its own. **Ear-safe:** soft attacks/releases, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, master cap ~0.3 (safe near a sleeping sibling). iOS sensor + mic permission requested inside the single Begin gesture; mic is RMS-only, never connected to output, never recorded, **zero network calls** (no API route ‚Üí no guard needed). Full unmount teardown (rAF, listeners, AudioNodes, AudioContext). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 45s, 493/493 static pages**, `/dream/690-kids-weather-hands 5.15 kB / 111 kB` prerendered static ‚óč). **NOT browser-verified** (no sensors/mic/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified: per-device tilt sensitivity, whether calm‚ÜĒstorm reads as a felt mode-flip on real speakers, iOS permission flow). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire: banked **`691-kids-sky-steps`** ‚≠ź (on-glass Shepard-tempered circle-of-fifths modulation staircase, WebGL2) + **`692-kids-two-friends`** (two-player interval consonance + voice-leading resolution, three.js) as **IDEAS ¬ß456**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/690-kids-weather-hands/README.md`

## (Cycle 455 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, one AI-image-pipeline concept via 3 approaches)

- **[/dream/689-dream-chapters](/dream/689-dream-chapters)** ‚ÄĒ Dream Chapters ūüĆĆūüéī. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 455. **For**: adult / generative-autonomous (hands-off) / **AI-image pipeline** + three.js depth-field / oracular-Anadol vibe. **What if a long-form generative journey could *remember everything it has dreamed* ‚ÄĒ minting one AI-generated "chapter card" per movement, so the piece accumulates a navigable 3D gallery of its own past?** The lab's directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-16 #4** ("build an AI-pipeline chain ‚ÄĒ STILL ZERO in the last 15; Karel explicitly wants AI image generation *inside* an AV piece") and Karel's standing care #4 (journey-engine alternatives). **The piece:** on Begin, a generative engine walks a named journey arc ‚ÄĒ **Threshold ‚Üí Drift ‚Üí Deepening ‚Üí Aurora ‚Üí Return** (~45‚Äď70s each, each its own modal color/voicing/density/tempo over a drifting **D-Dorian/Aeolian** centre; open fifths ‚Üí suspended/airy ‚Üí minor-7th depth ‚Üí bright maj7-add9 aurora ‚Üí warm return; NOT pentatonic, NOT a I-IV-V loop) ‚ÄĒ and at each phase boundary composes an evocative prompt for that mood, POSTs it to a guarded `fal-ai/flux/schnell` route, and floats the returned **chapter-card image** to the front of a **three.js** receding depth-field; every card it has ever dreamed recedes behind, parallaxing, while the camera auto-drifts through the corridor (a gentle drag glances around; touch is never primary). **Long-form memory made visible** ‚ÄĒ the gallery at minute 5 is visibly fuller than at minute 1; after Return it loops, memory persisting. **generative-autonomous INPUT** ¬∑ **AI-image OUTPUT** (the scarcest modality ‚ÄĒ ~0√ó in the rolling-10; three.js compositing substrate dodges the jury-banned Canvas2D [4√ó]) ¬∑ **latent/model-call + journey-arc TECH** (emphatically NOT the recent harmonic-event/voice-leading autopilot [~7√ó of last 10] nor touch input [4√ó]) ¬∑ **oracular / Anadol-*Machine-Memoirs* VIBE**. **Ambition 4/5** (`#1 + #2 + #3 + #5`): **#1** never-used-in-window technique (AI-image-pipeline chain, zero in last 15) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (generative journey engine + per-phase prompt-synthesis + flux image-gen route + three.js accumulating depth-field) + **#3** named refs (Refik Anadol *Machine Memoirs*; Brian Eno *Music for Airports*; TouchDesigner+StreamDiffusion cousin ‚ÄĒ all in README) + **#5** RESEARCH ¬ß455 same-cycle (the StreamDiffusion audio-reactive-AI trend; Dream Chapters is its slow, long-form *inverse*). **Bulletproof fallback (runs forever, zero network/key):** any API error ‚ÄĒ no `FAL_KEY` (501), rate-limit/quota (429), 5xx, or image-load failure ‚ÄĒ routes to `drawProceduralCard()`, painting the phase's mood to an offscreen canvas (deterministic from the prompt hash) used as a `THREE.CanvasTexture`, with a readable `text-amber-300/95` "dreaming locally (no model key)" note ‚ÄĒ never a broken-image icon. Layered degradation: no-WebGL ‚Üí Canvas2D/HTML stacked-card gallery; full unmount teardown (geometry/materials/textures/renderer disposed, rAF cancelled, timers cleared, AudioContext closed). Guarded `flux/schnell` route (`guard()` first two lines of POST intact ‚ÄĒ origin + per-IP rate-limit + 40/day quota + FAL account budget backstop). `@fal-ai/client` + `three` already project deps; no new deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 46s**, `/dream/689-dream-chapters 5.92 kB / 297 kB` prerendered static ‚óč + `/api` ∆í dynamic). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/eye: whether the modal phase-changes read as a genuine journey on real speakers, the corridor's depth read, and live flux latency; Begin auto-start + procedural fallback guarantee a live glance with zero network). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire: banked **`687-latent-oracle`** ‚≠ź (audio‚Üíimage‚Üí**audio** closed loop ‚ÄĒ image's color fed back into the synth; WebGL2 feedback dissolve) + **`688-spectral-seance`** (the *return trip* ‚ÄĒ image **re-sonified** as a playable instrument, Ikeda/UPIC/ANS) as **IDEAS ¬ß455**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/689-dream-chapters/README.md`

- **[/dream/684-kids-every-note](/dream/684-kids-every-note)** ‚ÄĒ Every Note ūüé®ūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 454. **For**: kids (4+) / chromatic touch / Canvas2D aurora / luminous-wonder. **What if a 4-year-old had the WHOLE chromatic palette ‚ÄĒ no "safe" pentatonic cage ‚ÄĒ and any note they touched was instantly embraced into beauty, because the HARMONY chases the note?** The directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-16 #1**'s spirit ("ban the pentatonic crutch ‚ÄĒ let a kid meet a wrong note and discover it isn't scary"): instead of *restricting* the child to five safe pads, **Every Note** gives all **12 chromatic petals** and reharmonizes the chord under every tap, so a "wrong" note becomes the color of a freshly chosen chord ‚ÄĒ the pre-verbal lesson that **consonance is *contextual***, no note is wrong. **The instrument:** tap any of 12 big colored petals in a ring (each a generous ‚Č•48px target, no reading, no mic). A soft bell plays the literal note while 3‚Äď4 sustained pad voices **glide** to a new chord and a Canvas2D aurora re-tints to its hue; borrowed/chromatic chords add a shimmer. **The harmony engine (`harmony.ts`) ‚ÄĒ a real-time reharmonizer built as a decomposed RETRIEVE ‚Üí EDIT ‚Üí RERANK pipeline**, directly implementing this cycle's research find (He/Li/Sun/Huang, arXiv:2605.07489, **May 2026**): the tapped pitch class is a hard constraint; **RETRIEVE** a lush ~10-chord palette in C (diatonic I/ii/iii/IV/V/vi `Cmaj9‚Ä¶Am9` **plus borrowed colors** ‚ô≠VI A‚ô≠maj7, ‚ô≠VII B‚ô≠maj9, V/V D7, chromatic-mediant E‚ô≠maj7); **EDIT/score** by fit (`scoreFit`: chord-tone > 9/13 extension > a ‚ô≠9-clash penalty); **RERANK** by greedy nearest-voice `voiceLeadingCost` + a stay-bias so re-taps don't churn. **chromatic-touch INPUT** ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the **coldest** renderer ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D 0√ó in the rolling-10; off the over-represented audio-first/SVG [4√ó: 666/669/671/680], off the hot WebGL2 [3√ó: 658/659/675], off the just-used WebGPU [683] + three.js [677]; **zero GPU-failure surface** = the most bulletproof glance) ¬∑ **real-time reharmonization / chord-chasing TECH** (emphatically NOT a pentatonic scale-snap ‚ÄĒ the note never moves, the harmony moves under it) ¬∑ **luminous-wonder VIBE** (off the jury-banned warm/cozy-kids pole). **Ambition honest 3/5** (the only one of the 3 explorers to clear 3): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4: chromatic touch ring + reharmonization engine + Canvas2D aurora + gliding pad/bell synth) + **#3** named refs (He et al. *Decomposed Retrieval-Edit-Rerank* arXiv:2605.07489; Sony CSL *FlowComposer* reharmonization; "consonance is contextual") + **#5** recent-research (the lead paper is a <30-day drop, 2026-05-08 ‚ÄĒ RESEARCH ¬ß454, same-day chain visible). **Kid-safe chain** (`master ‚Č§0.36 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§7.5 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter ‚Üí destination`; rate-limited triggers, always-on C2+G2 drone bed so never silent; AudioContext resumed on the first gesture ‚ÄĒ iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** a scripted **ghost-finger auto-demo** taps a phrase that *includes deliberately chromatic notes* (F#/D#/A#) and loops gently, so a silent 06:30 glance both looks alive (drifting field + blooms) and demonstrates the chord chasing a "wrong" note (stops on first real touch);
