Canvas2D-null ‚Üí readable `text-rose-300` notice + 12-key keyboard fallback (Z S X D C V G B H N J M), audio still plays; full unmount cleanup (rAF, timers, listeners, audio disposed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero network/secret/permissions). No new npm deps, no WebGL/WebGPU/three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 35.1s, ‚úď Generating static pages (490/490)** [489 from cycle 453 + 684 = 490, confirming non-winners 685/686 absent], `/dream/684-kids-every-note 6.09 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč, `.html` emitted). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear: whether the reharmonization reads as "the world embracing my wrong note" on real speakers, and iOS AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + Canvas2D guarantee a live visual glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal non-pentatonic harmonic events, each a different renderer dodging the banned tags): banked **`686-kids-wish-well`** ‚≠ź (the most *fundamental* harmonic event ‚ÄĒ drag a wishing-star UP into a real **suspension/appoggiatura** over a drone, release ‚Üí it **resolves** down by step with a bloom; WebGPU particle field + real Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ resurrect FIRST when a fresh-renderer slot opens, re-audit the now-warm WebGPU) + **`685-kids-two-moons`** (tilt a moon between a gold [MAJOR] and blue [MINOR] sun ‚Üí continuous major‚ÜĒminor **mode-glide** via a cents-glided third, three.js ‚ÄĒ the **6+/family-tier** flagship) as **IDEAS ¬ß454**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/684-kids-every-note/README.md`

## (Cycle 453 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, one concept [the live market firehose as a meditation], 3 renderer/aesthetic approaches)

- **[/dream/683-world-pulse](/dream/683-world-pulse)** ‚ÄĒ World Pulse ūüĆĆūüďą. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 453. **For**: adults / live-data meditation / WebGPU compute nebula / cosmic-transcendent. **What if the live, collective fear and greed of the world's markets ‚ÄĒ every buy and sell printing this second ‚ÄĒ were something you *witnessed* as a cosmic weather system instead of a trading screen?** The lab's **first-ever `WebSocket` input** (grep-clean across ~680 prototypes) and **first market sonification** ‚ÄĒ completing the real-world-data thread that already sonifies the sky (`618-solar`), earth (`233`/`613-seismic`), a chess game (`649`), and the Wikipedia firehose (`437`), but had never touched the purest real-time portrait of *collective human emotion*: the market. **The instrument:** a keyless browser WebSocket to Binance's public BTC trade firehose (`wss://stream.binance.com‚Ä¶/btcusdt@trade`; READ-only, no API route, no secret) streams every executed trade ‚ÄĒ price, size, and crucially the *aggressor side* (buyer- vs seller-initiated) ‚ÄĒ tens of times a second. **Data ‚Üí sound/visual:** collective **buy-pressure** brightens the lowpass and lifts the chord toward a Lydian-warm consonance + tints the particle field warm (amber/rose); **sell-pressure** darkens toward a pensive tension *that still wants to resolve* + cools the field (cyan/indigo); **trade size** picks a bell's register (bigger = **lower & louder**); **volatility** raises the flow-field's curl/turbulence and the reverb/shimmer density; a slow **~22s harmonic drift** + accumulating state make it genuinely **long-form** (minute 5 ‚Č† minute 0, not a loop). The body is an always-present **D-Dorian pad bed** so it's never silent between ticks. **live-WebSocket / market-firehose INPUT** (lab-first transport; off the screen-control reflex) ¬∑ **WebGPU 60k-particle compute nebula OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** GPU renderer ‚ÄĒ WebGPU 0√ó in the rolling-10 window; off the **banned** WebGL2 [658/659/675], off the just-used three.js [677] and the over-used audio-first/SVG [5√ó]; real **Canvas2D** fallback, not a placeholder) ¬∑ **live market-tick ‚Üí harmony/texture sonification TECH** (momentum‚Üíconsonance/tension, volatility‚Üídensity) ¬∑ **cosmic / transcendent / Anadol data-nebula VIBE** (love-aligned with Karel's cosmic-particle cluster: `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `321-spectral-flight`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). **Ambition honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (first `WebSocket` live-stream input, grep-verified) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4: ws-feed + synthetic-fallback + rolling-state engine ¬∑ momentum/volatility mapping ¬∑ pad+bell synth ¬∑ WebGPU/Canvas2D renderer) + **#3** named refs (**Brian Foo** *Two Trains: Sonification of Income Inequality* ¬∑ **Ryoji Ikeda** *test pattern* ¬∑ **Refik Anadol** data-as-pigment). Consumes the research-first chain (RESEARCH ¬ß453 ‚ÄĒ the lab's data-sonification thread is lopsided; market + WebSocket are the gaps; path a). **Audio-safe chain** (buses ‚Üí lowpass safety ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.34; chimes fade in, no startling transients; algorithmic reverb grows with volatility). **Graceful degradation / glance (bulletproof despite WebGPU + network):** on load a built-in **synthetic market generator** (geometric random walk + volatility bursts + realistic buy/sell stream) starts **instantly** so visuals run hands-off and audio plays on the one *Listen* tap ‚ÄĒ *before/without any connection*; the live socket is then attempted and hands over smoothly, else a readable **`text-amber-300/95`** notice ("Live feed unavailable ‚ÄĒ playing a simulated market") and it stays synthetic (re-degrades if a live socket later drops); if **WebGPU** is unavailable/init-fails it silently uses the same-state Canvas2D field. Full unmount cleanup (rAF cancelled, socket closed, oscillators stopped, `device.destroy()`). **No API route, no guard** (client-side WebSocket; read-only, no secret/side-effect ‚ÄĒ rule #6 clean). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 101s, ‚úď Generating static pages (489/489)** [488 from cycle 452 + 683 = 489, confirming non-winners 684/685 absent], `/dream/683-world-pulse 8.39 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč, `.html` emitted). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: the live Binance handover on Karel's device, the WebGPU draw path on iOS Safari [Safari 26 has WebGPU; the Canvas2D fallback covers any miss], and whether momentum‚Üíconsonance reads as "the market breathing" on real speakers; the synthetic generator + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a live glance). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept, three renderers): banked **`684-market-tide`** ‚≠ź (the same market as a slow **ocean tide** you sit on the shore and listen to ‚ÄĒ buy-pressure = tide *in*, sell = *out*; **Canvas2D** breathing sea, zero GPU surface ‚ÄĒ the **bulletproof / most-"Resonance"** resurrect) + **`685-ledger-lines`** (the **Ikeda** austere take ‚ÄĒ every trade a grain of sound + tick of light, one momentum-bent drone that *resolves* when the market calms; Canvas2D data-spectacle) as **IDEAS ¬ß453**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/683-world-pulse/README.md`

## (Cycle 452 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal "real harmonic event" explorers, one off-glass)

- **[/dream/680-kids-night-boat](/dream/680-kids-night-boat)** ‚ÄĒ Night Boat ūüĆô‚õĶ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 452. **For**: kids (4+) / **off-glass, eyes-closed** / rock the tablet / minimal inline-SVG / nocturnal-lullaby. **What if a 4-year-old could FEEL a musical sentence finish ‚ÄĒ by rocking a tablet like a cradle, eyes off the screen, and hearing the music almost-end-wrong, then truly land home?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16's two loudest asks at once** ‚ÄĒ **#1** ("ban pentatonic on kids ‚ÄĒ let a child *hear* a real harmonic event") via a real functional **cadence** (NOT a scale-snap), and the never-moved standing **#2** ("get off the glass ‚ÄĒ 13 of 15 are screens; the 2 that aren't are the best things here") via an **audio-first, eyes-closed** piece. Realizes the ¬ß450-banked `676-kids-night-boat`. **The instrument:** rock the tablet gently (DeviceOrientation/Motion, iOS permission inside the Begin tap) ‚ÄĒ near-black screen, ONE soft inline-SVG boat on a moonlit sea that breathes/dips/blooms with the harmony; *all the meaning is in the ears*. **The harmonic event ‚ÄĒ deceptive‚Üíauthentic CADENCE (functional, NOT pentatonic):** a gentle F-major 6/8 barcarolle wanders real diatonic triads (I/ii/IV/V/vi, voice-led via `setTargetAtTime`); every phrase arrives on **V**, then resolves either **deceptively (V‚Üívi** ‚ÄĒ "almost home but not quite": the boat dips, dims, bittersweet) or **authentically (V‚ÜíI** ‚ÄĒ "home": warm bloom + sparkle, boat settles). Each deception and steady rocking raises a `homeBias`; **two deceptions force a home landing** ‚ÄĒ so the child rocks it "to sleep" and is rewarded by finally hearing the sentence *finish*, then a slow ~11-min lullaby fade. **device-motion INPUT** (rocking ‚ÄĒ embodied/sensorimotor; off the touch reflex) ¬∑ **audio-first / minimal inline-SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer, off the jury-banned Canvas2D, **zero GPU failure surface** = the most bulletproof glance) ¬∑ **deceptive‚Üíauthentic cadence / functional-harmony TECH** (emphatically NOT pentatonic ‚ÄĒ the named local minimum; closure is the harmonic event a 4yo *can* perceive per RESEARCH ¬ß448/¬ß450/¬ß452, unlike mode) ¬∑ **nocturnal sea-voyage / lullaby VIBE** (off the jury-banned warm/cozy-meadow pole ‚ÄĒ dark, calm, drifting; and embodied/active, distinct from the hushed-*still* off-glass cluster 669/666/655). **Ambition honest 2/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4: device-motion rocking analyzer + functional-cadence phrase state machine [deceptive/authentic branching, homeBias] + nocturne synth [3-voice detuned pad + sub + triangle melody + sparkle] + minimal-SVG breathing renderer) + **#3** named refs (the **deceptive cadence V‚Äďvi** + **authentic cadence V‚ÄďI** of functional harmony; the **lullaby / barcarolle** rocking-6/8 tradition; Brahms' *Wiegenlied* as the archetypal child's cadence). Consumes the research-first chain (RESEARCH ¬ß452 ‚ÄĒ firm 4yo ground = cadence/closure; path a/c) and realizes the ¬ß450 banked seed. **Kid-safe chain** (`master ‚Č§0.34 ‚Üí lowpass 6.5 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; soft attacks, always-on pad so never silent; AudioContext resumed on the Begin gesture ‚ÄĒ iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** an **auto-demo self-rocks the boat through the full deceptive‚Üíauthentic arc hands-free** on load (silent 06:30 glance is alive once audio unlocks with one tap); no motion sensor / denied / no events in 1.5s ‚Üí **drag up-down** fallback with the reason in `text-rose-300`; full unmount cleanup (timers, rAF, listeners, audio nodes, AudioContext closed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG; zero network/secret/sensor-recording). No new npm deps, no three.js, no WebGL. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` ‚Üí `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.1 min, ‚úď Generating static pages (488/488)** [confirming non-winners 681/682 absent], `/dream/680-kids-night-boat 3.61 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/motion in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/hand: whether the V‚Äďvi vs V‚ÄďI contrast reads as "withheld then granted" on real speakers, whether the rocking‚ÜíhomeBias pacing feels rewarding on a real iPad, and iOS AudioContext+motion-permission unlock; the auto-demo + audio-independent-of-sensor guarantee a glance performs). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (all non-pentatonic real-harmonic-events, off banned Canvas2D, one off-glass): banked **`681-kids-every-note`** ‚≠ź (the freshest concept ‚ÄĒ touch **12 chromatic petals**, a real-time **reharmonization** engine chases your note so every note [all 12, no scale-snap] sounds lovely; the literal *inverse* of the pentatonic crutch, raw WebGL2 aurora ‚ÄĒ resurrect FIRST for an on-glass kids harmonic-event fire, re-audit the hot WebGL2 renderer) + **`682-kids-two-moons`** (tilt ‚Üí continuous major‚ÜĒminor **mode-glide** via a cents-glided third, three.js ‚ÄĒ the **6+/family-tier** flagship, since mode‚Üíemotion lands ~age 7) as **IDEAS ¬ß452**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/680-kids-night-boat/README.md`

## (Cycle 450 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal "real harmonic event" explorers)

- **[/dream/675-kids-deep](/dream/675-kids-deep)** ‚ÄĒ Deep Drum ūüĆäūü•Ā. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 450. **For**: kids (4+) / touch big stones / raw WebGL2 abyss / deep-oceanic mystery. **What if the ground under a kid's drumming slowly changed key ‚ÄĒ so the same beat felt brave, then mysterious, then home?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #1** ("ban pentatonic / no-wrong-notes on the kids side ‚ÄĒ let a child *hear* a real harmonic event‚Ä¶ a **drone that shifts under them**") ‚ÄĒ and the freshest kids concept vs the recent stream (`662` covered tuning-bend, `669` covered closure off-glass; a **shifting-drone** kids piece was un-built). **The instrument:** six big glowing stones over a glowing deep abyss; **tap to strike** soft mallet tones at **fixed pitches** (A2 C3 E3 A3 C4 E4 ‚ÄĒ multi-touch; desktop keys A S D F G H). **The harmonic event ‚ÄĒ pedal/drone migration + functional recontextualization (NOT pentatonic-snap):** a sustained drone underneath **migrates its tonal center i ‚Üí ‚ô≠VI ‚Üí ‚ô≠VII ‚Üí i** (~18s/step, smoothstep glide, never a jump). Because the stones stay fixed while the root moves, **each stone's relationship to the drone changes over time** ‚ÄĒ a tap that sounded *home* (unison/fifth) drifts to *tense* (2nd/tritone) then *resolves*; the child hears harmony move under a **constant action**, and *sees* it (each stone tints teal‚Üíviolet as its live tension rises; the abyss color migrates and warms to amber **only at the home resolution**). This is the same fixed note re-heard against a new root taking on a new *function* ‚ÄĒ emphatically NOT a scale-snap. **touch INPUT** ¬∑ **raw WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00 fragment-shader abyss with bioluminescent motes/god-rays/glowing stones) OUTPUT** (off the jury-banned Canvas2D 4√ó) ¬∑ **pedal/drone-migration + functional-recontextualization TECH** (lab-first for kids; NOT pentatonic ‚ÄĒ the named local minimum) ¬∑ **deep-oceanic/cavernous-mystery VIBE** (off the jury-banned warm/cozy-kids pole). **Ambition honest 2/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4: touch pads + i‚Äď‚ô≠VI‚Äď‚ô≠VII‚Äďi pedal-migration harmony engine + migrating-drone/struck-mallet synth + raw-WebGL2 abyss) + **#3** named ref (Indian classical **tanpura** drone ‚ÄĒ a constant pedal over which every note gains meaning; here we move the drone instead of the melody / La Monte Young *Dream House*). Consumes the recent-research chain (RESEARCH ¬ß450 sensory-safe envelope = the enabler of un-scary harmonic risk + ¬ß448 `[foundational]` anchor: a 4yo perceives *the change itself / a moving drone* ‚ÄĒ exactly this ‚ÄĒ long before minor‚Üísad). Realizes banked ¬ß448 seed `670-drone-cave`. **Kid-safe chain** (`master gain ‚Üí lowpass 7.5 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí16/6/12, fast attack) ‚Üí destination`; capped gains, ~40ms global rate-limit; AudioContext resumed on the Start gesture ‚ÄĒ iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** ~2s auto-demo taps a couple of stones on load so a silent 06:30 glance is alive; **no WebGL2 ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice and the audio still works fully** (drone keeps migrating, stones still sound via touch + keys); full unmount cleanup (rAF cancelled, GL program/buffers/VAO deleted + context lost, audio disposed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; zero network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 36.5s**, `/dream/675-kids-deep 6.92 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč, **486/486 static pages**; non-winner folders confirmed absent). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/WebGL2/touch in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/hand: whether the migrating-drone recontextualization reads clearly over ~18s steps on real speakers, whether the abyss shader runs on iPad Safari [iOS has WebGL2], and iOS AudioContext unlock; auto-demo + audio-independent-of-GL guarantee a glance performs). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (all attacking JURY #1 via orthogonal harmonic events): banked **`674-kids-two-moons`** (tilt ‚Üí continuous **mode-glide** maj‚ÜĒmin portamento, three.js crossfading sun-moon‚ÜĒghost-moon ‚ÄĒ the most spectacular; flagged a **6+/family** piece since mode‚Üíemotion emerges ~age 7‚Äď8 per ¬ß448) + **`676-kids-night-boat`** ‚≠ź (the fire's **off-the-glass builder** ‚ÄĒ rock the tablet, an unseen choir runs a **deceptive V‚Äďvi ‚Üí authentic V‚ÄďI cadence** you feel withheld then granted, audio-first/eyes-closed; **PRIORITY off-glass resurrect** once not adjacent to 669) as **IDEAS ¬ß450**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/675-kids-deep/README.md`

## (Cycle 447 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, one cycle-4 concept via 3 renderer/interaction approaches)

- **[/dream/666-piano-still](/dream/666-piano-still)** ‚ÄĒ Still Room ūüēĮÔłŹūüéĻ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 447. **For**: adult / **off-screen, eyes-closed** / audio-first / tender-intimate / tap-to-place. **What if Karel's solo piano ‚ÄĒ isolated down to its 12 pitch classes ‚ÄĒ became an AUDIO-FIRST instrument you sit inside: place a few of his notes into a slow loop, then close your eyes while it grows itself over minutes in his own timbre, quietly adding consonant notes and letting others fade?** The lab's **first genuine cycle-4** (`606 vivisection ‚Üí 630 refract ‚Üí 643 constellation ‚Üí 666 still`) ‚ÄĒ the multi-cycle deepening two juries say the lab banks and abandons, now pushed to a fourth turn ‚ÄĒ AND the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16's Karel-facing line + provocation #2**: "get at least one builder off the glass screen (13 of 15 are screens; the 2 that aren't are the best things here)." Still Room is **audio-first** ‚ÄĒ the music is the whole point; the visual is one quiet **SVG** aura (a breathing center that brightens as more notes ring, markers for the notes in the loop, a slow phrase-position dot) designed to be glanced at then *ignored*. **What it does that 643 did NOT:** (1) **RECORD** ‚ÄĒ tap any of his 12 notes to *place* it into a ~16s looping phrase (8 slow slots); each pass re-fires that note's isolated material as a long tender grain of his real touch. (2) **EVOLVE over minutes** ‚ÄĒ genuine long-form state, not a loop: a continuous **decay** (presence half-life ~90s; un-refreshed notes fade and drop out, refreshed ones top up and stay) + a **generative growth** layer, so minute 5 ‚Č† minute 0. **The growth rule ‚ÄĒ asymmetric consonance (the anti-pentatonic move):** every several seconds the room buds ONE new note, *chosen* not scale-snapped ‚ÄĒ `consonance.ts` scores all 12 pitch classes against the currently-ringing set by a harmonic-coincidence base (`1/log2(n¬∑d+1)` over JI ratios: fifth 0.356 > 4th 0.270 > M3 0.228 > m2 0.126 > tritone 0.095) **plus a small directional asymmetry term** (C‚ÜíG leans ‚ąí0.016 vs C‚ÜíF +0.016) so an interval and its inversion differ, then **softmax-samples from the top** (top ~2 at stillness ‚Üí top ~6 at growth). Anchored on **De Roure, "An Asymmetric Formula for Interval Consonance," arXiv:2606.16412 (2026)** ‚ÄĒ dated cycle-day (RESEARCH ¬ß447). The one `stillness ‚ÜĒ growth` lever sets both bud rate (~14s ‚Üí ~5s) and sampling width; a **release** button halves everyone's presence to empty the room gracefully (the optional gathering ‚Üí presence ‚Üí release ritual arc). **no-sensor INPUT** (dead-simple 12-note tap row ‚ÄĒ deliberately calm) ¬∑ **audio-first / minimal SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer ‚ÄĒ off-glass, off the jury-banned **Canvas2D 4√ó**, and the lane the jury says is the lab's best) ¬∑ **asymmetric-consonance generative growth + grain-replay-of-Karel's-isolated-notes TECH** (emphatically NOT pentatonic/scale-snap ‚ÄĒ the named local minimum) ¬∑ **tender / intimate / Eno-ambient VIBE** (the un-built adult register the jury named in provocation #5). **Ambition honest 3/5:** **#1** first looper / phrase-memory built from a *performer's own isolated pitch classes* + first asymmetric-consonance generative growth in the lab (grep-clean) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4: HPSS+salience 12-pitch-class isolation [reused 643 engine] ¬∑ phrase-memory looper with continuous decay/refresh ¬∑ asymmetric-consonance growth chooser ¬∑ grain-replay synth + SVG aura) ¬∑ **#4** genuine cycle-4 (the deepest multi-cycle thread the lab has finished) ¬∑ **#5** binds RESEARCH ¬ß447 (De Roure, arXiv:2606.16412, dated 2026-06-16 ‚ÄĒ research‚Üíbuild chain is same-day). **#3** named refs that frame it (Brian Eno *Music for Airports* / *Discreet Music*; √Čliane Radigue; La Monte Young *The Well-Tuned Piano*). **Reused verbatim** (copied in, NOT cross-imported): `audio.ts`/`hpss.ts`/`chroma.ts` from 643 (Karel's *Welcome Home* recording via the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519-‚Ä¶` route + synth fallback). New work: `consonance.ts` (the growth brain) + the looper/decay/SVG aura in `page.tsx`. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG; READ-only of the existing public `/api/audio` route, used exactly as 630/643/658 ‚ÄĒ no network secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` ‚Üí `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.0 min, ‚úď Generating static pages (483/483)** [confirming both non-winners absent], `/dream/666-piano-still 7.44 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč; `.next/server/app/dream/666-piano-still.html` emitted). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear: whether `/api/audio/549fc519-‚Ä¶` returns his recording at runtime [synth fallback covers any failure], whether the grain timbre + decay/growth pacing read as tender over minutes on real speakers, and iOS AudioContext unlock; the auto-seed-on-load means a silent 06:30 glance hears the room evolving once unlocked with one tap). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one cycle-4 concept ‚ÄĒ "the piano remembers you" ‚ÄĒ via 3 renderer/interaction approaches): banked **`665-piano-loom`** (the same looper as a **raw WebGL2 scrolling phrase-tape** ‚ÄĒ the most legible "looper" visual; resurrect FIRST for the cycle-4 piano looper as an ON-glass immersive piece) + **`667-piano-tide`** (the same looper as a **three.js reflective ripple pool**; beautiful/immersive but closest to 643's own renderer family) as **IDEAS ¬ß447**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/666-piano-still/README.md`

## (Cycle 446 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers all attacking JURY #1 "ban the pentatonic crutch")

- **[/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend](/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend)** ‚ÄĒ Bronze Bend ūüĒĒ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 446. **For**: kids (4+) / touch-bend + big laras toggle / WebGL2 bronze field (Canvas2D fallback) / temple-dusk. **What if a 4-year-old could grab a glowing bar of bronze and BEND its pitch across a real Indonesian gamelan tuning ‚ÄĒ and discover that a note that sounds "wrong" can settle into something beautiful?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #1** ‚ÄĒ "ban pentatonic / no-wrong-notes on the kids side‚Ä¶ build a kids piece where a child *hears* a real harmonic event ‚ÄĒ a non-Western tuning (gamelan slendro, maqam) they can audibly bend; let them meet a wrong note and discover it isn't scary." The lab has BP / JI / Lydian kids tuning toys (`288`/`286`/`280`) but **never gamelan, and never bend-into-and-out-of-tune as the core mechanic.** **The instrument:** five glowing bronze metallophone keys in a temple-dusk field; **touch a bar to strike it**; **drag up/down to bend its pitch continuously** (¬Ī300 cents, NO scale-snap ‚ÄĒ a child slides a tone clearly past a neighbour and back); **release** and it springs slowly home toward its in-tune (*laras*) pitch. **The big sun/moon button** re-tunes the WHOLE instrument + the gong drone between two real gamelan tunings at once ‚ÄĒ ‚ėÄ **slendro** (`0,231,474,717,955` cents ‚ÄĒ open, floating) ‚áĄ ūüĆô **p√©log** (`0,120,270,540,670` ‚ÄĒ the ~120-cent half-step makes it tense). **The two real harmonic events (audible, not pentatonic-snap):** (1) the laras flip changes the instrument's whole *mood* by ear; (2) the bend lets the child meet a genuine out-of-tune note that **beats** against its neighbours ‚ÄĒ and as it settles home the metallic **shimmer slows** (in tune ‚Čą0.6 Hz beating / fully bent ‚Čą6 Hz), teaching consonance‚ÜĒdissonance pre-verbally. **Core technique ‚ÄĒ inharmonic modal bronze synthesis (lab-first):** each key is additive sine partials at bar-mode-like STRETCHED ratios **1, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93** (not integer harmonics), every partial rendered as two slightly-detuned voices so the pair beats ‚ÄĒ the signature struck-bronze shimmer; struck envelope (~6ms attack / ~3.4s ring); the low gong drone uses the same recipe an octave down and glides its upper partial on a laras flip so the re-tune is felt underneath. **touch-bend INPUT** (off the jury-banned glass-control reflex ‚ÄĒ the touch here is *expressive pitch-bending*, not button-poking) ¬∑ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (a fullscreen fragment shader: bronze/teal ground, heat-haze shimmer, additive strike glow, in-tune gold "crown" rim, restless flicker out-of-tune ‚ÄĒ explicitly **OFF the jury-banned Canvas2D 4√ó**, which is fallback-only) ¬∑ **inharmonic-modal-bronze + gamelan-bend TECH** (never used in the lab; emphatically NOT pentatonic/scale-snap ‚ÄĒ the named local minimum) ¬∑ **bronze/temple-dusk VIBE** (deliberately OFF the jury-banned warm/cozy-kids pole 4√ó). **Ambition honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (inharmonic modal bronze synthesis ‚ÄĒ grep-clean; the hardest criterion to claim) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4: touch-bend physics with spring-back ¬∑ inharmonic additive synth with bend-driven beating ¬∑ the laras toggle re-tuning every key + drone ¬∑ WebGL2 shader renderer + Canvas2D twin) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (Ableton's **"Tune a Gamelan Yourself"** interactive Sundanese tuner ‚ÄĒ this cycle's research dive ‚ÄĒ + Javanese **slendro/p√©log laras** + the inharmonic bar-mode acoustics of saron/gend√©r). **#4 NOT claimed** (single-cycle WIDE; but a clean cycle-2 exists: add *maqam*/other laras, or a "tune the gamelan yourself" mode where the child sets each cent). **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (the gamelan tuner is a living reference resource, not a <30-day arXiv drop ‚ÄĒ path (a): research‚Üíbuild, not a freshness claim). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß446** (same fire). **Kid-safe chain** (`master gain ‚Üí lowpass 7.2 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor brick-wall ‚Üí destination`; ~6ms soft strike attack, no harsh transients; always-on gong drone faded in on unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** before audio, keys flicker so the field moves; once unlocked + untouched, a gentle scripted shimmer-strike auto-demo plays hands-free so a silent 06:30 glance is alive; **no WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D fallback** that still shimmers + sings + bends, with a `text-rose-300` note; AudioContext created/resumed inside the first gesture (iOS unlock); full unmount cleanup (rAF cancelled, GL disposed, nodes disconnected, context closed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; zero network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 37.9s, zero warnings**, `/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend 5.97 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč; non-winner folders confirmed absent). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/WebGL2/touch in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/hand: whether the bronze inharmonic timbre + bend-beating read as intended on real speakers, whether ¬Ī300-cent bend sensitivity + spring-back feel right for a real child, and iOS WebGL2 + AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback guarantee it performs on a glance ‚ÄĒ note iOS has WebGL2 so the full shader runs on iPad). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (all attacking JURY #1 via orthogonal harmonic events): banked **`663-kids-two-suns`** (tilt a moon between two suns ‚Üí a continuous **major‚ÜĒminor mode-morph** you hear bend, inline-SVG; the fast "mode-morph" resurrect) + **`664-kids-hum-answer`** ‚≠ź (the fire's **off-the-glass builder**, JURY #2 ‚ÄĒ hum a note, an unseen choir answers with a **4‚Äď3 suspension that resolves**, audio-FIRST/eyes-closed; PRIORITY off-glass resurrect since the screen-monoculture metric still needs a SHIP) as **IDEAS ¬ß446**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend/README.md`

## (Cycle 444 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, one concept via 2 interaction models)

- **[/dream/658-kids-piano-garden](/dream/658-kids-piano-garden)** ‚ÄĒ Papa's Piano Garden ūüĆĪūüéĻ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 444. **For**: kids (4+) / device tilt / luminous blooming-garden / play-with-Dad's-real-music. **What if a 4-year-old could play with PAPA'S actual recorded piano ‚ÄĒ tilt the tablet to roll a glowing seed across a dark garden, and wherever it rests his real piano BLOOMS into a singing flower of light that keeps singing?** The lab's **FIRST kids prototype built on Karel's REAL recorded piano** (grep-verified 0√ó ‚ÄĒ no prior kids piece touches `/api/audio`; even `645-kids-piano-creatures` is MIDI synth, not his recording), and the kids-first realization of his explicit standing directive ("incorporate Karel's actual music from the Paths ‚Ä¶ let his existing music be the input"). Brings the loved adult **`227-paths-granular`‚Ě§ÔłŹ** technique (granular resynthesis of his Paths) to the kids side for the first time. **Source:** his *Welcome Home* solo-piano recording via the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519-‚Ä¶` route (`audio.ts`, 4 s abort + JSON-or-bytes handling, copied verbatim from 630/643) ‚Üí **offline-synth fallback** so it's alive even if the fetch fails. **The granular engine (`granular.ts`):** overlapping 20‚Äď120 ms grains read from his buffer, each grain's `playbackRate` **hard-quantized to a ¬Ī2-octave C-major pentatonic** ratio set ‚Üí **no wrong notes, ever**; a ‚Č§25-voice cap with oldest-steal; an always-on gentle pad grain-cloud (never silent); and the distinguishing layer ‚ÄĒ **persistent singing flowers**: each bloom registers a `SingingFlower` that keeps emitting its own sustained grain-cloud at its own pitch + read-position (probability-gated, ‚Č§14 flowers, smooth fade-in on bloom / fade-out on steal) so the **garden is genuinely fuller at minute 3 than minute 0** (real long-form state/evolution, the exact quality the jury praised in the kids standout `624-kids-day-meadow` ‚ÄĒ NOT a loop). **The seed (`page.tsx`):** `DeviceOrientation` ‚Üí a gravity vector (neutral-hold-zeroed, EMA-smoothed) drives **semi-implicit-Euler physics** (friction, clamped top speed, soft wall-bounce) rolling a glowing seed; its **x-position selects the granular read-position + pentatonic degree** (left = earlier/lower, right = later/higher) + stereo pan; a soft glowing trail follows; **dwell ‚Č•~0.4 s** (with a 0.7 s cooldown) triggers a **bloom**. **Visual (`renderer.ts`, WebGL2):** a near-black garden rendered by a fullscreen-quad additive-glow fragment shader ‚ÄĒ the bright warm seed + fading trail + pulsing petal flowers ‚ÄĒ with soft tone-mapping so additive sums never clip; a **full Canvas2D twin** draws the same scene if WebGL2 is unavailable. **device-tilt INPUT** (loved lane via `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚Ě§ÔłŹ + `169-kids-marble-run`‚Ě§ÔłŹ; off the camera-recency of 652 + mic-recency of 655; **NOT touch** ‚ÄĒ and note touch is now 0√ó in the rolling-10, the jury's 5√ó ban fully worked off) ¬∑ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** screen renderer ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6√ó** AND off BOTH the rolling-hot **three.js 3√ó / Canvas2D 3√ó**; Canvas2D fallback only) ¬∑ **granular-resynthesis-of-Karel's-REAL-piano TECH** (0√ó for kids) ¬∑ **luminous / blooming-garden / tender-wonder VIBE** (the novelty axis here is MATERIAL ‚ÄĒ his real music ‚ÄĒ not vibe, so it sidesteps the kids-warm autopilot the jury flags). **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5 with a HARD #1:** **#1** first kids prototype built on Karel's real recorded piano + first kids granular resynthesis of his recording (grep-verified) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4: real-recording loader/decoder + synth fallback ¬∑ pentatonic granular engine with persistent singing-flower clouds ¬∑ tilt-gravity seed physics + EMA + drag/key fallbacks ¬∑ WebGL2 additive-glow garden renderer + Canvas2D twin) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Curtis Roads ‚ÄĒ *Microsound*** [granular] ¬∑ **Iannis Xenakis** [granular origins] ¬∑ **Brian Eno** [generative/ambient] ¬∑ Karel's own *Welcome Home* album as the material). **#4 NOT formally claimed** (single cycle ‚ÄĒ but it is a natural cycle-1 of a his-music-for-kids spine; a real cycle-2 [onset/phrase structure gating where flowers bloom, or two-source granular blending two Paths tracks] is a clean kids-4/5 path). **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (the IMPS/Martin embodied-co-creative-ML dive is path-(a) grounding ‚ÄĒ the body shaping a living response from real material ‚ÄĒ foundational not <14-day; said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß444**: the dive's headline hook (cast-shadow/silhouette interaction) was **KILLED by a corpus grep** (`268-kids-shadow-theater` + `513-kids-shadow-still` + `617-kids-shadow-monster` + `463-terra-gamelan` already exist ‚ÄĒ the "grep before claiming 0√ó" discipline), which surfaced the genuinely-unmined axis: **his real music is 0√ó for kids**. **Kid-safe chain** (`padBus/flowerBus ‚Üí master gain (3.5 s fade-in, ‚Č§0.5) ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§7 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; soft grain attacks, no harsh transients; ~13-min lullaby fade-down). **Graceful degradation / glance:** **~2.5 s idle ‚Üí a synthetic-tilt auto-demo** rolls the seed, blooms flowers, and breathes the piano hands-free so a silent 06:30 glance is alive with **zero hardware**; DeviceOrientation denied/absent ‚Üí **drag-anywhere + Arrow keys** with a `text-rose-300` notice (fully playable on a laptop); audio fetch fail ‚Üí synth fallback (amber-free, transparent in the HUD). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; READ-only of the existing public `/api/audio` route, used exactly as 630/643 ‚ÄĒ no network secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` exit 0 ‚Üí `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 2.3 min, ‚úď Generating static pages (480/480)** [479 from cycle 443 + 658, confirming the non-winner absent], `/dream/658-kids-piano-garden 7.38 kB / 114 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč; one non-blocking unused-eslint-disable Warning, tidied). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/tilt/GPU in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/hand: whether `/api/audio/549fc519-‚Ä¶` returns his recording at runtime [synth fallback covers any failure], whether grain density / dwell threshold / tilt sensitivity feel right for a real child on real hardware [runtime tuning, builder-flagged], the granular timbre + loudness of his piano through the kid-safe chain, and iOS DeviceOrientation + AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + drag/key fallbacks guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire (one concept ‚ÄĒ his-real-piano garden ‚ÄĒ via 2 interaction models): beat **`657-kids-piano-garden`** (tilt = a **WIND** that scatters his piano into a swarm of singing fireflies in a WebGL2 point-field ‚ÄĒ a bulletproof, instantly-joyful *momentary* instrument, but no accumulating state where 658's flowers persist and grow the garden) ‚ÄĒ banked as **IDEAS ¬ß444**, the fastest momentary-register resurrect. Design notes: `src/app/dream/658-kids-piano-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 443 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers across the jury's open adult lanes)

- **[/dream/655-breath-sanctuary](/dream/655-breath-sanctuary)** ‚ÄĒ Breath Sanctuary ūüĆ¨ÔłŹūüēĮÔłŹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 443. **For**: adult / off-screen / eyes-closed / ritual-ceremonial / breath-steered. **What if Resonance could be experienced with your EYES CLOSED ‚ÄĒ a ceremonial sound-space you steer with your BREATH alone?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #3** ("Don't let 626 become the next 576 ‚ÄĒ build the THIRD embodied/non-screen piece NOW"), and the highest-leverage move against the lab's deepest structural problem the jury names: **14-of-15 recent prototypes render to a glass screen** ‚ÄĒ off-screen/audio-first was exactly 1√ó (626). This is the lab's **2nd-after-626 audio-FIRST piece** and a **ritual** journey-engine alternative Karel explicitly asked for. **Input ‚ÄĒ BREATH via the mic (amplitude only, NO pitch):** `getUserMedia` ‚Üí lowpass ~1.2 kHz ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` ‚Üí time-domain RMS ‚Üí a slow attack/slower-release **envelope follower** tracking the swell (inhale) and ebb (exhale); a rising-then-falling envelope above threshold fires a **peak** (strike a bowl) and counts a **breath cycle** (drives the arc). Mic routes ONLY to the analyser ‚ÄĒ no output path, **no howl risk** even on speakers. **Sound (‚Č•3 subsystems ‚Üí 4):** (1) a **just-intonation overtone choir** ‚ÄĒ stacked sine partials at pure ratios `1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2` (beat-free), each with its own slow amplitude LFO so it shimmers; breath energy swells loudness + opens a brightness lowpass; upper partials gated by the arc's "openness"; (2) **struck singing-bowl resonators** ‚ÄĒ a damped modal model, a few *inharmonic* partials per bowl with long (~5.5‚Äď12 s) exponential decay, struck at the top of each breath, ringing into a feedback-delay tail; (3) a **breath-RMS envelope follower** (the input layer); (4) a **long-form ritual STATE MACHINE**. **The stateful arc (‚Č•5 min, NOT a loop):** four phases ‚ÄĒ **Gathering ‚Üí Invocation ‚Üí Presence ‚Üí Release** ‚ÄĒ each advanced only when BOTH a breath count AND a time gate are met, so minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1: the **fundamental drifts down a fifth** (C2 ‚Üí ~43.6 Hz), **more overtones enter**, the **bowl set rotates**, the **tail lengthens**, and the halo's **hue drifts** violet‚Üícyan. **Visual ‚ÄĒ minimal, audio-first (SVG, no WebGL):** a single faint breathing halo (radius + opacity follow the breath envelope, hue follows the phase) + sparse readable text (phase name ¬∑ instruction ¬∑ breath/time counter); everything else dark ‚ÄĒ the point is to look away. **mic-breath INPUT** (FRESH ‚ÄĒ mic 0√ó in the rolling-10; breath-as-control is a cross-modal sensor the lab hadn't used; off the jury-banned **touch 5√ó**) ¬∑ **audio-only/off-screen OUTPUT** with a faint SVG halo (the SCARCEST renderer ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6√ó** AND the hot **three.js 3√ó / Canvas2D 3√ó**) ¬∑ **long-form JI ritual + breath-envelope TECH** (not sonification, not a sim, not the banned physical-feed template) ¬∑ **ritual/ceremonial VIBE** (off BOTH banned poles ‚ÄĒ sacred/spacious, neither the adult doom autopilot nor cozy). **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4: breath-envelope follower ¬∑ JI overtone choir ¬∑ struck-bowl resonator bank ¬∑ ritual state machine) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Pauline Oliveros ‚ÄĒ *Deep Listening* / *Sonic Meditations*** [breath-based eyes-closed listening, the direct lineage] ¬∑ **La Monte Young / Theatre of Eternal Music** [JI sustained drone] ¬∑ Tibetan singing bowls ¬∑ the **Lyria RealTime / Live Music Models** continuous-steered-stream frame). **#1 SOFT** (additive JI drone + modal bowls are foundational; breath-as-the-steering-control + the off-screen ritual framing are fresh, not hard-claimed) ¬∑ **#4 NOT claimed** (single-cycle WIDE, no prior thread ‚ÄĒ the diurnal-arc-with-state is long-form *within* one piece, not a multi-cycle commitment, discounted not over-claimed) ¬∑ **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (Lyria 3 ~4 mo + server-side; conceptual grounding only). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß443** (the 2026 frontier is the *continuous, live-steered, never-landing stream* ‚ÄĒ Lyria RealTime; here the steering control is the breath, the lab-feasible no-network ancestor). **Ear-safe chain** (`choir + bowl buses ‚Üí master gain ‚Č§0.5 (5 s fade-in) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; delay feedback <0.8; AudioContext + mic both requested INSIDE the "Begin ¬∑ breathe" gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** mic denied/unavailable ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + an **autonomous breath LFO** (~5.5 s/breath, asymmetric) drives the same params so it ALWAYS plays; **~2.5 s idle ‚Üí autonomous-breath auto-demo** (no permission prompt) so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the halo pulse and (once unlocked) HEARS the drone breathing with zero hardware; honest caveat ‚ÄĒ the idle auto-demo builds the context without a gesture so audio may stay suspended until the first click, the visual still animates. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG ‚ÄĒ mic is local, no network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 38.3 s, ‚úď Generating static pages (479/479)** [478 from cycle 442 + 655, confirming the two non-winners absent], `/dream/655-breath-sanctuary 4.73 kB / 108 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/breath: whether the RMS envelope reliably reads real breathing vs. room noise [headphones + a quiet space help; the amplitude detector can mis-read fans/speech], whether the phase transitions land emotionally, the JI/bowl timbres, and iOS mic+AudioContext unlock; the autonomous fallback + auto-demo guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (off-screen-ritual / ecstatic-lift / AI-chain), each bent toward the RESEARCH ¬ß443 continuous-steered-stream paradigm; banked **`654-latent-chain`** (the lab's first 2-model AI pipeline CHAIN ‚ÄĒ audio‚ÜíFLUX-image‚ÜíFlorence-2-caption‚Üíre-seed, Karel's most-wanted "AI image INSIDE an AV piece"; lost AGAIN on glance-verifiability + paid/network/uncertain-model-id risk for an unattended ship ‚ÄĒ resurrect when Karel's awake to exercise the chain with a confirmed prod `FAL_KEY`) + **`653-endless-lift`** (the **ecstatic** missing-middle ‚ÄĒ a gospel-house key-lift that Shepard-folds so it climbs forever and never drops; WebGL2; **tsc+eslint VERIFIED clean**, the fastest euphoric resurrect) as **IDEAS ¬ß443**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/655-breath-sanctuary/README.md`

## (Cycle 440 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 registers of the jury's "active-wonder middle")

- **[/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures](/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures)** ‚ÄĒ Piano Creatures ūüéĻūüĆĪ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 440. **For**: kids (4+) / Web MIDI + keyboard / active-wonder musical / play-an-instrument. **What if a 4-year-old could PLAY a real keyboard and instantly sound like a musician ‚ÄĒ every note blooms a living creature, and an invisible band plays along in real time so there are no wrong notes?** The lab's **FIRST kids MIDI piece** (grep-verified 0√ó ‚ÄĒ no prior kids prototype calls `requestMIDIAccess`), and the kids-register answer to the **JURY 2026-06-15** "missing middle" (the kids side is "warm-or-silly with nothing between" ‚ÄĒ this is the active-wonder *musical* register where the child PERFORMS). **Input (NON-touch primary):** **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess()` in try/catch, `noteon`/`noteoff` on all inputs, `onstatechange` hot-plug) ‚Üí falls through to a **computer-keyboard** piano row (`A W S E D F T G Y H U J` upper octave + `Z X C V B N M` lower, no auto-repeat) ‚Üí last-resort ‚Č•64 px on-screen pads. **No-wrong-notes engine:** every incoming note `snapToPenta`'d to C-major pentatonic ‚Üí always consonant ‚Üí a soft two-partial bell/marimba voice. **The accompaniment "agent" (4 subsystems):** a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms horizon) driving (1) an **auto-harmony PAD** on an 8-bar diatonic progression that advances per bar, (2) a **walking root/fifth/octave BASS**, (3) a **groove bed** (kick + noise hats) that grows/thins with a decaying `energyRef` raised on each played note ‚ÄĒ so the more the child plays, the fuller the band, and the harmony evolves so minute 2 ‚Č† minute 0; (4) the MIDI/keyboard input + snap layer. **Visual (three.js):** a garden of orbiting emissive **note-creatures** (color by pitch class, radius/height by register) that pulse on strike and breathe with band energy; DPR-aware, resize-handled, full geometry/material/renderer disposal on unmount. **Web-MIDI + computer-keyboard INPUT** (the lab's FIRST kids MIDI ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned **touch 5√ó**; love-adjacent via the kids-keyboard loves `82-kids-color-piano`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`317-kids-color-bells`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (2√ó‚Üí3√ó in rolling-10, under the 4√ó ban line ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6√ó** and the over-rep WebGL2/Canvas2D-at-3√ó) ¬∑ **rule-based real-time accompaniment-agent TECH** (a look-ahead scheduler that answers the player ‚ÄĒ grep-fresh) ¬∑ **active-wonder MUSICAL VIBE** (neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny). **Ambition honest 3/5 with a HARD #1:** **#1** first kids MIDI (grep-verified 0√ó, the genuine never-used-technique claim the recent SOFT-#1 cruise lacked) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Toshio Iwai ‚ÄĒ *Electroplankton* / *TENORI-ON***; the live-co-performance frame **arXiv 2604.07612** *Real-Time Human‚ÄďAI Musical Co-Performance* + **arXiv 2602.05064** *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*). **#4 NOT claimed** (the advancing progression is long-form *state within one piece*, not a multi-cycle commitment ‚ÄĒ discounted rather than over-claimed, the "theater" the jury roasts); **#5 NOT claimed** (the 2026 co-performance papers are server-side + older than 30 days; conceptual grounding only). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß440** (real-time co-performance = a look-ahead scheduler answering the performer a beat ahead ‚Üí implement the browser-feasible rule-based ancestor as a no-wrong-notes kids instrument). **Kid-safe chain** (`masterGain ‚Č§0.55 ‚Üí lowpass 7500 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí18,6,12) ‚Üí destination`, a quiet never-silent drone; AudioContext created inside the Begin gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** no MIDI ‚Üí `text-rose-300` "press letter keys to play!" + the keyboard path; WebGL fail ‚Üí rose notice while AUDIO keeps working; **~2.5 s idle ‚Üí a ghost player auto-plays an evolving melody** (creatures bloom, the band plays along) so a silent 06:30 glance with NO MIDI hardware SEES creatures bloom and (unmuted) HEARS a full song; first real note hands control to the child. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web MIDI + Web Audio + three.js ‚ÄĒ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps (three already present). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 117 s, ‚úď Generating static pages (476/476)**, `/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures 5.34 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no MIDI/WebGL/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/hand: whether the rule-based accompaniment FEELS like a band answering the child vs. generic backing, the bell timbres + kid-safe loudness, Web MIDI hot-plug + iOS unlock, three.js visual tuning; the ghost-player auto-demo guarantees it performs on a glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-register fire (PLAY/MOVE/PULSE); banked **`647-kids-clap-parade`** (the **PULSE/danceable** register ‚ÄĒ mic-RHYTHM/onset [NOT pitch] ‚Üí an inline-SVG marching parade that BUILDS with the beat; the directest fill of the jury's missing groove-middle + cleanest glance [SVG, zero GPU], the fastest kids-groove resurrect) + **`646-kids-sky-conductor`** (the **MOVE** register ‚ÄĒ webcam frame-differencing ‚Üí conduct a Canvas2D constellation orchestra; lowest ambition, camera/conducting trodden via 113/217/617) as **IDEAS ¬ß440**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures/README.md`

## (Cycle 439 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, a TRUE cycle-3 of the `606`‚Üí`630` piano spine)

- **[/dream/643-piano-constellation](/dream/643-piano-constellation)** ‚ÄĒ Piano Constellation ūüéĻ‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 439. **For**: adult / audio-file (Karel's real piano) / clinical-analytical / make-an-instrument-of-his-own-touch. **What if Karel's solo piano could be taken apart down to its 12 individual notes ‚ÄĒ each pitch class isolated from the recording ‚ÄĒ and then PLAYED BACK as an instrument made of his own touch, where tapping a note re-fires that note's isolated material?** The lab's **first cycle-3** ‚ÄĒ the genuine continuation of the `606-piano-vivisection` ‚Üí `630-piano-refract` arc, claiming **ambition #4 (multi-cycle commitment) honestly** (the move the jury says is "theater ‚ÄĒ banked every DEEP cycle, claimed never," the reason the lab has **zero 4/5s in two juries**). 606 split the piano into HARMONIC (strings) vs PERCUSSIVE (hammers) via median-filter HPSS; 630 fanned the harmonic layer by NMF into **4 register bands**; 643 goes **finer than register bands** ‚ÄĒ it isolates the **12 PITCH CLASSES** (C, C#‚Ä¶B) of his playing **and makes them playable**. **The cycle-3 leap = a NEW interactive layer (REPLAY).** **Isolation method (salience-mask, 4 subsystems):** (1) the proven **HPSS ground** isolates a clean harmonic layer; (2) on the harmonic complex STFT, a **Klapuri salience** function scores each candidate fundamental as the summed harmonic-comb amplitude (ő£ over 6 partials, weights decaying 0.78^(h‚ąí1)) so a real note lights its whole comb while spurious single bins don't; (3) each candidate's salience is splatted back onto its comb bins and **folded by octave into its pitch class** (Fujishima chroma) ‚Üí 12 dense per-bin support spectra ‚Üí **soft masks that form a partition of unity** (`M_c = S_c / ő£_j S_j`; the 12 masks sum to 1 at every bin, scaling re+im together ‚Üí phase preserved, exact reconstruction), each ISTFT'd ‚Üí **12 isolated pitch-class buffers + the Hammers buffer**; (4) a **three.js** constellation renderer. **The REPLAY layer (the distinguishing cycle-3 feature):** every isolated buffer also feeds a replay bus ‚ÄĒ tapping a note-orb or pressing a key (`A W S E D F T G Y H U J` ‚Üí the 12 chromas, `X` ‚Üí hammers) plucks a **~0.34 s enveloped grain** from a salient region of that note's own material, with a tiny random playback-rate shimmer so layered taps don't phase-cancel; **multiple taps stack** ‚Üí you re-perform Karel's recording as chords and rhythms built from his own notes (granular per Roads). The 13 base voices always loop sample-aligned; solo/mute/gain are instant click-free gain ramps. **Visual:** 12+1 **orbiting star-constellations** (three.js) that brighten/expand with each note's live level and **FLARE** when you replay it; soloed pulled forward + glowing, muted dimmed; idle orbit on mount + a 2.5 s-idle auto-demo that cycles the soloed note **and replays it** (showing off the REPLAY layer); full geometry/material/renderer disposal. **audio-file INPUT** (Karel's real recording ‚ÄĒ only 1√ó in the rolling-10; his explicit "use his actual music" directive) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (under-used, 1√ó in rolling-10 ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned **WebGPU** and off the over-rep **Canvas2D 3√ó/WebGL2 3√ó**) ¬∑ **salience-chroma partition-of-unity isolation + granular-replay TECH** ¬∑ **clinical/analytical VIBE** (the register the jury PRAISED in 606 ‚ÄĒ "his own music, clinical not cozy" ‚ÄĒ neither the banned doom nor the banned warm). **Ambition honest 3/5, reaching for the lab's first 4/5:** **#4** real multi-cycle commitment (an honest cycle-3 of 606‚Üí630 ‚ÄĒ the rare criterion the jury says is claimed *never*) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (HPSS ¬∑ salience/chroma isolation ¬∑ granular replay engine ¬∑ three.js constellations = 4) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Fujishima 1999** chroma/pitch-class profiles ¬∑ **Klapuri 2006** summed-harmonic-amplitude salience ¬∑ **Fitzgerald 2010** median-filter HPSS ¬∑ **Roads 2001** *Microsound* granular). **#1 SOFT** (granular exists in the lab via `227-paths-granular`; per-pitch-class partition-of-unity isolation is fresh but not hard-claimed), **#5 NOT claimed** (the backing restoration paper arXiv 2603.16926 is ~3 mo, not <14 days). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß439** (the 2026 source-separation frontier moved from *masking* ‚Üí *reconstruction*; 630's own README banked exactly this cycle-3, "supervised NMF ‚Üí true pitch classes, not register bands"). **Graceful degradation / glance:** scene orbits + core breathes immediately on mount so a silent 06:30 glance is already alive; idle auto-demo solos+replays notes with no input; recording fetch fail ‚Üí synthesized-piano fallback (amber notice); WebGL absent ‚Üí rose notice + **audio stays fully playable**; AudioContext built inside the "Begin ¬∑ isolate Karel's 12 notes" gesture (iOS-safe); heavy DSP chunked with `await` yields behind a single progress bar. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + three.js ‚ÄĒ no network beyond the read-only `/api/audio/<id>` recording fetch, no mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps (three already in package.json). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 88 s, ‚úď Generating static pages (475/475)**, `/dream/643-piano-constellation 8.78 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč, `.html` emitted), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/WebGL in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear/hand: the actual separation quality of the comb masks on Karel's real recording, the grain envelope feel, three.js visual tuning, and iOS unlock; the auto-demo holds a second internal copy of the replay-grain logic to avoid a hook-dep cycle [intentional duplication, no code-health risk]). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one cycle-3 concept, 3 technical approaches): beat **`642-piano-chroma`** (supervised harmonic-comb NMF ‚Üí SVG chroma wheel ‚ÄĒ the most *faithful* but incremental reading: 4‚Üí12 voices with no new interaction = a clean 3/5, not the 4/5 reach; self-reported a full build pass, banked as the safe-glance companion) and **`644-piano-respeak`** (masked‚ÜĒadditive-resynth PURITY lever ‚Üí Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ the boldest *reconstruction*, but **diversity-blocked**: Canvas2D would hit 4√ó in the rolling-10); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬ß439** seeds. Design notes: `src/app/dream/643-piano-constellation/README.md`

- **[/dream/640-kids-day-wind](/dream/640-kids-day-wind)** ‚ÄĒ A Day on the Wind ūüĆ¨ÔłŹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 438. **For**: kids (4+) / tilt / contemplative-wonder / long-form generative. **What if a 4-year-old TENDS a self-evolving day-meadow by TILTING the iPad ‚ÄĒ steering a glowing wind that PLANTS where it lingers AND PLAYS the garden like a wind-harp where it sweeps, with no touching at all?** The lab's **first honest cycle-2 on the kids side** ‚ÄĒ a genuine deepening of the jury-named kids standout `624-kids-day-meadow` ("A Whole Day"), directly answering **JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #1** ("finish a cycle-2 for once") while honoring **provocation #4's touch ban** (input swapped touch‚Üí**tilt**, pulled by Karel's loved `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). **Engine (reimplemented compactly from 624, NOT imported ‚ÄĒ 4 subsystems):** (1) a **diurnal phase state machine** ‚ÄĒ a ~9-min day (`DAY_SECONDS=540`) cross-faded through dawn‚Üímorning‚Üímidday‚Üídusk‚Üínight via soft circular smoothstep weights (scale, root, tempo, brightness, 3-stop sky gradient, sun/moon arc, star opacity all blended); (2) a **motif-memory bank** ‚ÄĒ every planted thing stores an abstract scale-degree motif that `voiceDegree()` **re-voices into the day's current scale** and `mutatedDegrees()` ages (transpose/ornament/thin) so minute 8 ‚Č† minute 1; (3) a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms ahead) driving an always-on phase-shifting drone bed + ostinato + every planted voice + the traveling-motif replay; (4) a painterly **Canvas2D** side-on meadow diorama. **The cycle-2 contribution:** `DeviceOrientation` `gamma`/`beta` (neutral-hold-zeroed, clamped, eased) steer a **luminous wind spirit**; **dwell-to-plant** (lingering ~0.75 s over empty ground grows a flower/bird/star ‚ÄĒ no tap); **sweep-to-play the wind-harp** (passing within ~46 px of a planted thing rings its motif's next note in passing order, rate-limited 120 ms/thing ‚ÄĒ the child draws glissandi by leaning); and a **traveling-motif memory** ‚ÄĒ the last ~8 brushes (degree + octave + inter-brush timing) are captured into a rolling buffer the scheduler **replays quietly, re-voiced into the current phase + transposed a step**, so a gesture swept at morning returns transformed at dusk. Everything scale-snapped ‚Üí no "wrong", no fail, no score, no reading. **tilt INPUT** (off the jury-banned **touch 5√ó**; arrow-key fallback) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6√ó** and over-rep WebGL2; zero GPU failure surface) ¬∑ **embodied wind-harp + procedural-MMR TECH** over a generative diurnal arc ¬∑ **kids contemplative-wonder VIBE** (the active-wonder *middle* the jury says the kids side lacks ‚ÄĒ neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny). **Ambition honest 3/5** (a reach above the 2/5 kids norm): **#4** genuine multi-cycle commitment (a real cycle-2 of 624, the move two juries say the lab never finishes ‚ÄĒ claimed honestly) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (diurnal machine ¬∑ motif bank ¬∑ scheduler ¬∑ wind-harp sweep-play = 4); **#1** SOFT (the tilt-wind-harp "play your own garden" is grep-fresh but the diurnal/motif engine is 624's), **#5** NOT claimed (refs ~4‚Äď9 mo old, conceptual grounding only). Named refs that DRIVE it: **MusicWeaver ‚ÄĒ *Motif Memory Retrieval*** (arXiv **2509.21714**, 2026 ‚ÄĒ stores realized motifs + retrieves/re-voices with controllable variation, not looping/drifting; the traveling-motif replay is a procedural take) ¬∑ **Toshio Iwai, *Electroplankton*** (2005) ¬∑ **Brian Eno, *Bloom***. Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß438** (2026 long-form-coherence literature independently converged on exactly 624's remembered-and-re-voiced-motif architecture ‚Üí deepen by making that memory *playable*). **Kid-safe chain** (`masterGain ‚Č§0.55, 2.5 s fade-in ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§7000 Hz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚ąí18/6/12 ‚Üí destination`; AudioContext created inside the "Begin the day ‚ėÄ" gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** ~2.5 s idle ‚Üí the wind drifts a Lissajous path, planting + brushing autonomously at **~13√ó accelerated day rate** so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the sun travel, sky shift, creatures wake/sleep, and the wind sweep the garden with zero interaction or hardware; on first real tilt/key the rate eases to the full ~9-min day; iOS `requestPermission()` path with retry button; arrow-key fallback. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 81 s, ‚úď Generating static pages (474/474)**, `/dream/640-kids-day-wind 7.89 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no tilt sensor/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by hand: whether the tilt sensitivity [¬Ī30¬į‚Üífull deflection] and 46 px brush radius produce a satisfying easily-triggered sweep vs over-triggering on a real iPad [the two likely tuning knobs, no code-health risk]; the osc timbres by ear; iOS unlock). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire (one cycle-2 concept, 2 interaction models): beat **`641-kids-tilt-meadow`** (tilt-as-gravity-on-the-whole-scene + semi-implicit-Euler **seed physics** rolling into sculpted valleys to sprout) on kids-legibility (640's direct "steer the glowy wind" beats 641's indirect physics where the child can't plant where they intend), cleaner *deepening* of 624's recognizable plant-a-thing interaction, less overlap with the ¬ß436-banked `634-kids-tilt-river`, and zero physics-jank surface; banked 641 as a strong **IDEAS ¬ß438** seed (resurrect with its own "save a persistent valley" sculpting payoff). Design notes: `src/app/dream/640-kids-day-wind/README.md`

## (Cycle 437 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 registers of the jury's named "missing middle")

- **[/dream/637-slow-burn](/dream/637-slow-burn)** ‚ÄĒ Slow Burn ūüēĮÔłŹ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 437. **For**: adult / tender-sensual / after-hours / make-the-mechanism-legible. **What if Resonance could make the invisible *pocket* of a groove VISIBLE?** A ~72 BPM after-hours **neo-soul vamp** whose centerpiece is an **SVG grid-vs-actual onset plot**: it draws the 16th-note grid, and for every drum hit a hollow ring at the *grid* time + a connecting line out to where the hit **actually landed** + a glowing velocity-sized dot at the real onset. A single **FEEL / looseness lever** (slider + ‚Üź/‚Üí or [/]) scales every voice's microtiming lean ‚ÄĒ kick dead-on, **snare laid-back (~+32 ms)**, **hats pushed early (~‚ąí11 ms)**, bass a touch behind ‚ÄĒ from `0` (robotic/quantized) through `~1.0` (in the pocket) to `1.8` (too loose); as you raise it you **watch the dots peel off the grid** and hear the beat start to breathe. The directest fill of the jury's (2026-06-15) single most-absent corner ‚ÄĒ the **tender/sensual** register (the adult side went 5√ó doom; warmth is all kids-side) ‚ÄĒ and the same "make an invisible musical mechanism legible" quality the jury praised in its TOP standout `606-piano-vivisection` (the grid-vs-actual plot is to *rhythm* what HPSS is to *timbre*). **Engine (4 subsystems):** (1) a **microtiming look-ahead scheduler** (`setInterval` ~25 ms poll, notes ~120 ms ahead of `audioCtx.currentTime`) applying each voice's per-hit timing deviation √ó FEEL + a hair of human jitter; (2) **from-scratch multi-voice synth** ‚ÄĒ sine kick, brushed bandpass-noise snare, lazy filtered-noise hats, gliding sine sub-bass, **FM Rhodes** (sine carrier + 1:1 modulator, decaying tine) over **Fm9 ‚Üí Bbm9 ‚Üí Eb13 ‚Üí Abmaj9**, with vinyl crackle + lowpass haze; (3) a **reharmonization state machine** drifting upper-extension voicings, walking-bass passing tones, and ghost-snare fills over "eras" (laps through the progression) so minute 3 ‚Č† minute 0 (long-form, not a loop); (4) the **SVG grid-vs-actual renderer**. **keyboard + autonomous INPUT** (off the jury-banned **touch 5√ó**, off mic/real-data) ¬∑ **SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer, 0√ó in the window ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6√ó** AND the over-rep WebGL2/Canvas2D) ¬∑ **per-voice microtiming-deviation engine TECH** (grep-0√ó in the lab ‚ÄĒ not sonification, not a sim) ¬∑ **tender / sensual / after-hours VIBE** (the directest opposite of the jury-banned **5√ó doom autopilot**; distinct from banned kids-WARM by being lean/grown/dissonant). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems ‚Üí 4 + #3 named refs that DRIVE it: ***Does it Swing? Microtiming Deviations and Swing Feeling in Jazz*** Sci. Rep. 2019 / arXiv 1904.03442 ¬∑ **Dan Charnas, *Dilla Time*** 2022 ¬∑ grounded by **arXiv 2605.10281 *Drum Synthesis from Expressive Drum Grids via Neural Audio Codecs*** May 2026; **#1 SOFT** ‚ÄĒ the microtiming-deviation engine + grid-vs-actual plot are grep-0√ó but groove/scheduler infra exists (387/632) so discounted, NOT a faked 4/5; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 2605.10281 is server-ML, refs foundational). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß437** (groove humanization = measurable microtiming deviation; the "expressive drum grid" as interface). **Graceful degradation / glance:** **~1.8 s idle auto-demo** self-starts the vamp and sweeps FEEL on a ~14 s breathing cycle, so a silent 06:30 glance with **no audio hardware** still SEES the dots peel off the grid; pure SVG = **zero GPU failure surface** (unlike the recent run of build-verified-not-browser-verified GPU ships). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG ‚ÄĒ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 113 s, ‚úď Generating static pages (473/473)**, `/dream/637-slow-burn 5.88 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ whether the snare-late/hats-early magnitudes *feel* like the pocket, the FM-Rhodes timbre, and iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock are unverified; the SVG plot + auto-demo guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of an adult WIDE 3-register fire; banked **`638-gospel-lift`** (the **ecstatic/euphoric** corner ‚ÄĒ three.js ascending light column + gospel key-LIFT modulation +1 semitone/16 bars, NO drop, genuinely distinct from `387-drop-engine`) + **`639-afro-pulse`** (the **joyful/danceable** corner ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D afrobeat/highlife, bell-timeline + interlocking 7-vs-5 melodic ostinati; resurrect with a NON-ring viz, its rings overlap `632-polymeter-loom`) as IDEAS ¬ß437. Design notes: `src/app/dream/637-slow-burn/README.md`

## (Cycle 433 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal **off-GPU / scarce-renderer** explorers)

- **[/dream/626-empty-room](/dream/626-empty-room)** ‚ÄĒ Empty Room ūüéß. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 433. **For**: adult / eyes-closed / off-screen / embodied-spatial. **What if Resonance could be experienced with your EYES CLOSED?** An **audio-FIRST, off-screen** piece: put on headphones, stand in an otherwise empty room, and **invisible presences drift around you in real 3D binaural sound**. Each is a soft sustained voice in a dark modal register (close, intimate, slightly haunted ‚ÄĒ an empty-cathedral feeling, *not* warm/cozy). **Turn to face a presence** (phone compass via `DeviceOrientationEvent`, or drag on desktop) and it brightens, opens, and sings more clearly while the others recede ‚ÄĒ **active listening is the whole game**. The lab's **FIRST audio-FIRST off-screen piece** ‚ÄĒ the screen is deliberately near-black, showing only an austere Canvas2D compass/radar as a glance-aid; the experience lives in the headphones. This finally gives the **off-screen / embodied-spatial lane its second real entry** beyond the screen-led `576-presence-room` ‚ÄĒ the 0√ó lane the jury has named "every fortnight." **Engine (3 subsystems):** (1) true binaural spatialization ‚ÄĒ each of 5 presences is a Web Audio `PannerNode` (`panningModel:"HRTF"`, `distanceModel:"inverse"`) in 3D world space; the `AudioListener` forward vector rotates as you turn (modern `forwardX/Z` AudioParams, feature-detected fallback to deprecated `setOrientation`); (2) a generative moving-presence engine ‚ÄĒ each voice has its own orbit `azimuth(t)`, a radius wobble that brings it close past your head, two detuned oscillators + a breath-tremolo LFO, and slow multi-minute pitch-detune drift so the room is genuinely different at minute 4 than minute 1 (it evolves, it doesn't loop); (3) a facing-reward layer ‚ÄĒ per-frame `cos(angle)` between heading and each presence (cubic-sharpened) swells gain and opens a brightness lowpass on the faced voice. Dark modal pitch set (G-Phrygian-ish over a drone with b2 + tritone tension); damped feedback-delay "empty-cathedral" tail (no IR file). **device-orientation INPUT** (off the glass; drag fallback) ¬∑ **audio-only OUTPUT** (Web Audio binaural ‚ÄĒ the *scarcest* renderer, 0√ó in the rolling-10; austere Canvas2D compass is a glance-aid only ‚ÄĒ off the diversity-banned **WebGPU 5√ó + WebGL2 4√ó**) ¬∑ **HRTF moving-source binaural TECH** ¬∑ **intimate / dark / unsettling VIBE** (edges, not cozy). **Graceful degradation:** no orientation sensor / declined ‚Üí drag-to-turn (rose notice); no HRTF panner ‚Üí equal-power `StereoPannerNode` (amber note); **~2.5 s idle ‚Üí heading auto-rotates** so a silent reviewer still HEARS presences sweep the stereo field and SEES the compass dots orbit, zero interaction. **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 distinct subsystems + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Janet Cardiff ‚ÄĒ *The Forty Part Motet* / *Her Long Black Hair***; **Pauline Oliveros ‚ÄĒ *Deep Listening***; HRTF background **ImmersiveFlow arXiv 2601.12950** + **ASAudio survey arXiv 2508.10924**]; **#1 SOFT, said plainly** ‚ÄĒ NOT lab-first binaural [`576-presence-room` did head-tracked binaural], the fresh axes are the **audio-FIRST / eyes-closed off-screen register** + the **facing-reward mechanic**). **Consumes the ¬ß429-banked `620-empty-room` seed** (research-grounded, the perennially-0√ó off-screen lane) ‚ÄĒ a clean "build a queued research-bound idea" path. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 37.5s, ‚úď Generating static pages (469/469)**, `/dream/626-empty-room 4.06 kB / 107 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no headphones/orientation sensor in sandbox ‚ÄĒ the HRTF localization + compass-heading reliability + iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock are unverified; the auto-rotate + StereoPanner/drag fallbacks make it real and alive at a glance even on desktop with no sensor). Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`627-latent-piano`** (Karel's piano ‚Üí AI image ‚Üí reactive Canvas2D warp ‚ÄĒ **flagged DUPLICATIVE of `441-latent-listening-room` + `448-piano-phrase-painter`**, resurrect only with a genuinely new twist) + **`628-data-matrix`** (a strobing **inline-SVG** Ikeda/Euclidean-rhythm score ‚ÄĒ the cleanest *edges* + scarcest-renderer swing, a near-instant resurrect for the next abrasive/clinical fire) as IDEAS ¬ß433. Design notes: `src/app/dream/626-empty-room/README.md`

## (Cycle 432 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, ONE long-form concept √ó 3 non-GPU renderers)

- **[/dream/624-kids-day-meadow](/dream/624-kids-day-meadow)** ‚ÄĒ A Whole Day ūüĆÖ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 432. **For**: kids (4+) / long-form generative journey / calm-contemplative. **What if a kids music toy were a whole DAY?** A slow, self-evolving **~9-minute journey** through **dawn ‚Üí morning ‚Üí midday ‚Üí dusk ‚Üí night ‚Üí back to dawn** that is genuinely *different at minute 8 than at minute 1* ‚ÄĒ not a loop, not a one-shot. The piece **plays itself** and the child decorates it: **tap low** ‚Üí a **flower** (blooms by day, closes & sleeps at night), **tap mid** ‚Üí a **bird** (glides & sings in the morning, roosts at night), **tap the sky** ‚Üí a **star** (only twinkles & sings at night). The lab's **FIRST kids long-form generative journey-arc with state & memory** ‚ÄĒ a kids-register answer to Karel's standing "journey-engine alternatives" priority (a diurnal/cinematic arc, not the psychedelic 6-phase one), and the long-form-generative menu category the jury keeps flagging as thin. **Engine (3 subsystems):** (1) a **diurnal phase state machine** ‚ÄĒ a continuous `phase‚ąą[0,1)` over `DAY_SECONDS‚Čą540` cross-fades 5 musical regions with soft circular-bump weights (no hard cuts): dawn = major-pentatonic/Lydian shimmer, slow, indigo‚Üírose; morning = bright major, livelier, clear blue; midday = fullest playful major, brightest, sun at arc-top; dusk = warm Mixolydian, amber‚Üíviolet, slowing; night = low glassy lullaby pentatonic + drone, near-black + stars + moon ‚ÄĒ phase also drives the sky gradient, the **sun/moon traveling a visible arc**, star opacity, brightness, cloud tint. (2) a **motif-memory bank** (the ambition ‚ÄĒ the "anchor" idea from **arXiv 2604.05343 Anchored Cyclic Generation**): each planted creature stores an abstract **scale-degree** motif that `voiceDegree` re-projects into whatever scale the day is in *right now*, so everything stays in-key as the harmony moves, and `mutatedDegrees` slowly transposes/ornaments/thins it with age ‚ÄĒ coheres yet evolves. (3) a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms pump, notes ~120 ms ahead) driving an always-on phase-shifting drone bed (never silent) + an evolving ostinato + every planted voice; notes never scheduled from rAF. **touch-to-plant + watch INPUT** (off recent camera 617 / mic 603,609 / real-data 613,618) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off the diversity-audit-banned **WebGPU 5√ó + WebGL2 4√ó** of the rolling-10 ‚ÄĒ the lab over-corrected INTO GPU, so Canvas2D at 1√ó is now the scarce renderer; the jury's 2026-06-14 Canvas2D ban is ~10 cycles stale + the data inverted) ¬∑ **diurnal generative state-machine + motif-memory re-voicer TECH** (distinct from recent CA/physics/sonification/segmentation) ¬∑ **calm / awe / journey VIBE** (deliberately OFF the kids **funny** autopilot ‚ÄĒ 603/609/617 went funny 3√ó in a row). **Renderer**: a single `<canvas>` 2D painterly **side-on landscape diorama** ‚ÄĒ full-height day-cycling sky gradient, a sun/moon traveling an arc, drifting tinted clouds, layered parallax hills, twinkling night stars, and **cut-paper creatures with simple friendly faces whose eyes close as they fall asleep**; DPR-aware, resize listener, rAF + scheduler + AudioContext torn down on unmount. Kid-safe master `gain (‚Č§0.55) ‚Üí lowpass (‚Č§7.5 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor (-18/6/12) ‚Üí destination`, 2.5 s master fade-in, AudioContext created inside the first gesture (iOS unlock). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first kids long-form generative journey-arc with state/memory [qualified ‚ÄĒ kids "evolving" toys are short loops/one-shots; this is a stateful multi-minute arc] + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Brian Eno ‚ÄĒ *Music for Airports* / *Bloom***; **Gary Hustwit ‚ÄĒ *ENO* 2024**, the generative film that plays differently every time; **arXiv 2604.05343 Anchored Cyclic Generation** ‚ÄĒ the motif-anchor]; **#5 NOT hard-claimed** ‚ÄĒ the 2026 papers are heavy server-side DNNs, the engine implements their browser-feasible Eno-generative ancestor, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß432** (long-form coherence is the live 2026 cs.SD problem ‚ÄĒ ACG anchor-features + MusicWeaver plan-then-render). **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved contemplative/persistent kids cluster (`133-kids-ripple-pond`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `166-kids-lantern`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `169-kids-marble-run`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `152-kids-star-paint`‚Ě§ÔłŹ; additive ‚ÄĒ the gates governed). **~2.5 s idle auto-demo**: a ghost hand plants a flower/bird/star and the day runs at an **accelerated ~14√ó preview** so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the sun travel + sky shift through indigo‚Üíblue‚Üíamber‚Üínear-black + creatures wake/sleep AND HEARS the music evolve; on the first real tap it eases to the full ~9-min day. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 32.8s, ‚úď Generating static pages (468/468)**, `/dream/624-kids-day-meadow 6.5 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/canvas in sandbox ‚ÄĒ the region scale-snap smoothness at cross-fade midpoints + the per-voice balance under a dense 24-creature garden are reasoned, gain-crossfaded + capped by the limiter; the auto-demo + Canvas2D guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of a DEEP 3-renderer fire; banked **`623-kids-day-journey`** (the "massively bigger" **three.js** immersive 3D day-world + Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ the bolder swing, resurrect when GPU renderers cool) + **`625-kids-day-paper`** (the calmest **inline-SVG** matte cut-paper storybook ‚ÄĒ resurrect for the explicit bedtime register / to give SVG a fresh entry) as IDEAS ¬ß432. Design notes: `src/app/dream/624-kids-day-meadow/README.md`

## (Cycle 429 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal edged / off-Canvas2D-or-off-screen / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/618-solar-organ](/dream/618-solar-organ)** ‚ÄĒ Solar Organ ‚ėÄÔłŹūüĆĆ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 429. **For**: adult / real-world-data sonification / cosmic-geomagnetic. **What does the space weather hitting Earth right now sound like? ‚ÄĒ the live solar wind plays a magnetospheric organ while you watch the aurora that same data is driving.** The lab's **FIRST solar-wind / geomagnetic real-data sonification** ‚ÄĒ the natural non-duplicative next real-data lane after `613-seismic-choir`'s seismic, and a clean hit on TWO open **JURY 2026-06-14** lanes at once: **#3** "STOP re-shipping the ocean ‚ÄĒ mine UNMINED real-world data" (the jury literally named *aurora/Kp*; 613 took seismic, 618 takes the named-next ‚ÄĒ explicitly NOT the twice-occupied ocean) and **#2** "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6√ó)" (primary renderer is hand-written **WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback). **Data**: three **keyless, CORS-open NOAA SWPC** feeds fetched in parallel client-side (`AbortController` 6 s, header-row skip, NaN guards, resampled to a 240-bin/24h series) ‚ÄĒ planetary **K-index** (`‚Ä¶/products/noaa-planetary-k-index.json`), interplanetary **magnetic field** (`‚Ä¶/solar-wind/mag-1-day.json`; **`bz_gsm` southward = the substorm trigger**), and **plasma** speed/density (`‚Ä¶/solar-wind/plasma-1-day.json`) ‚ÄĒ with a built-in **synthetic geomagnetic-storm** fallback (a plausible 24h curve with a substorm spike) so it's fully alive with zero network. The last ~24h replays as an evolving ~75 s sweep, then loops. **Mapping (the magnetospheric organ ‚ÄĒ deliberately NOT a warm just-intonation drone; it has edges)**: a bank of **inharmonic** partials at non-just ratios `1, 2.04, 3.11, 4.33, 5.78, 7.19, 9.02√ó`; **wind speed ‚Üí base pitch** (‚Čą300‚Üí800 km/s lifts ‚Čą70‚Üí165 Hz ‚ÄĒ higher, more urgent); **southward Bz ‚Üí the aurora opens** (a lowpass sweeps open + upper partials fade in = the substorm crescendo; northward Bz = quiet/closed); **Kp ‚Üí intensity AND dissonance** (high Kp detunes the partials up to ~38 cents + raises offset beating oscillators ‚Üí a tense slow alarm, not a hymn); **density ‚Üí granular noise texture**. Master `per-partial gain ‚Üí bus ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí masterGain ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`, `webkitAudioContext` fallback, gesture-unlock, ~2.5 s **autostart**. **Visual**: a fullscreen **WGSL** fragment shader builds vertical auroral curtains warped by a **curl of an fBm potential field** (divergence-free flow ‚ÄĒ Bridson's curl noise); `south`/`kp`/`speed`/`density` drive turbulence, height, flicker, drift, palette ‚ÄĒ quiet ‚Üí faint green `#7CFFB2` low on near-black, storm-south ‚Üí curtains rise + bleed **violet ‚Üí crimson** at the crown, Kp adds fast shimmer; `navigator.gpu` feature-detected ‚Üí a real **Canvas2D** aurora fallback sharing the same four uniforms, `WEBGPU/CANVAS2D` backend badge. Subsystems (‚Č•3 ‚Üí 4): live 3-feed fetch/parse/resample + synthetic fallback (`space-weather.ts`) ¬∑ inharmonic sonification engine (`audio.ts`) ¬∑ WGSL curl-noise aurora renderer (`aurora.ts`) ¬∑ Canvas2D fallback. **real-world-data (live NOAA solar wind/Kp/Bz) INPUT** (off jury-banned touch 4√ó / mic; never-sonified feed, explicitly NOT ocean, distinct from 613 seismic) ¬∑ **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6√ó) ¬∑ **geomagnetic-data sonification + inharmonic organ + curl-noise aurora TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) ¬∑ **cosmic / geomagnetic-storm / ominous-at-peak VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9√ó).
