Controls: Start (gesture-unlock), VOL/MUTE, autostart; HUD shows current UTC + live Kp + Bz. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first solar-wind/geomagnetic real-data sonification [grep-verified 0√ó; 613 seismic ‚Č† solar wind] + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Andrea Polli ‚ÄĒ *Sonic Antarctica* / atmospheric data sonification**; **auroral substorm physics ‚ÄĒ the Dungey cycle / southward-Bz reconnection**; **Robert Bridson ‚ÄĒ curl noise**]; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ this cycle's June-2026 spatial-audio finding seeded the banked `620`, not the winner, and the curl-noise/sonification methods are foundational, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß429** (NOAA SWPC verified keyless + CORS-open via two live `curl`s this cycle). **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved spectral/particle/data adult cluster ‚ÄĒ esp. `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (which was *synthetic*; 618 is the REAL aurora driver), plus `321-spectral-flight`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`323-latent-condensation`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (additive ‚ÄĒ the gates governed). Full graceful degrade: any feed fails ‚Üí synthetic storm + a `text-rose-300` "using sample data" notice; no WebGPU ‚Üí Canvas2D + badge; ~2.5 s idle ‚Üí autostart so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the aurora curtains move AND HEARS the organ with zero interaction or network. **No API route, no guard** (pure client `fetch` of the public keyless NOAA feeds ‚ÄĒ GET, no key, no side effects, CORS `*`; no secret). No new npm deps (no CDN, no three.js). **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates **exit 0** + all three prerendered static; then winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 113s, ‚úď Generating static pages (465/465)**, `/dream/618-solar-organ 7.36 kB / 114 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox ‚ÄĒ the live-wire NOAA parse was unexercised [only the synthetic-storm path ran]; the WGSL aurora + WebGPU‚ÜíCanvas2D downgrade + the sonification feel are reasoned; the autostart + synthetic + Canvas2D fallbacks mean it performs on a glance with zero hardware). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`619-combustion`** ("Combustion" ‚ÄĒ keyboard/tilt ‚Üí a procedural **PTR combustion-engine** instrument [pulse-train fired at `cyl/2√óRPM/60` Hz ‚Üí recursive Karplus-Strong exhaust resonators ‚Üí redline `tanh` scream + overrun backfire, self-contained Blob-URL **AudioWorklet**] on a **WGSL** tachometer; implements arXiv 2603.09391; LOST: edgiest + cleanest research chain, but its abrasive lane was just visited by `601-feedback-howl` and 618 is alive with real planetary data where the engine needs playing ‚ÄĒ **the strongest resurrect for the next edges fire, now built twice**) + **`620-empty-room`** ("empty room" ‚ÄĒ device-orientation/head-turn ‚Üí **HRTF binaural** "inharmonic presences move around you in the dark, hiding when faced + creeping closer when behind you," audio-FIRST off-screen with an austere near-black Canvas2D radar; refs Cardiff *Forty Part Motet* / Oliveros / Sonic4D arXiv 2506.15759; LOST: the boldest diversity swing at the perennially-0√ó off-screen lane, but the payoff lives entirely in headphones + eyes-closed head-turning [most unverifiable, weakest at a near-black glance] and overlaps `576-presence-room` ‚ÄĒ **the ready build-complete resurrect to finally give off-screen its 2nd entry**) as IDEAS ¬ß429. Design notes: `src/app/dream/618-solar-organ/README.md`

## (Cycle 428 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-fingertip / off-Canvas2D / funny explorers)

- **[/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster](/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster)** ‚ÄĒ Shadow Monster Stage ūüĎĻūüé≠. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 428. **For**: kids (4+) / funny / embodied-spatial. **Stand in front of the camera and your whole BODY becomes a giant glowing googly shadow-puppet monster on a lit stage ‚ÄĒ wave and the air WHOOSHES, jump and it BOINGs, get big (step in / arms wide) and it ROARs.** The directest KIDS-register answer to TWO standing **JURY 2026-06-14** provocations at once: **#2** ("commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js, 6√ó") ‚ÄĒ the primary renderer is **hand-written WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback; and **#5** ("embodied-spatial got exactly one entry [576] this window then went cold ‚ÄĒ don't let it be a singleton") ‚ÄĒ this is the whole-body, off-the-glass follow-through, in a 4-year-old's register. **INPUT ‚ÄĒ body SILHOUETTE mask**: the webcam frame ‚Üí **MediaPipe ImageSegmenter** (selfie/person segmentation, loaded dynamically from the jsDelivr CDN at runtime ‚ÄĒ **no npm dep**, wrapped in one `try/catch`), the filled body **mask** downsampled into an occupancy grid (deliberately the MASK, *not* pose/skeleton landmarks ‚ÄĒ grep-distinct from the lab's landmark vision pieces 234/419/568 hands+pose, 258/423/576 face). **Signals from the mask each frame** (`mask.ts`): frame-to-frame change (motion energy) ‚Üí **WHOOSH** intensity; centroid rising fast (a jump) ‚Üí **BOING**; mask area growing (steps toward camera / arms up) ‚Üí a swelling **ROAR**. **CREATURE**: the mask becomes a dark friendly puppet body with a glowing wobbling breathing outline (squash-and-stretch), a soft inner glow that pulses with the roar, whoosh streaks that smear with motion, and two procedural **googly eyes** placed near the top of the mask's bounding box with pupils rolling toward the body's motion. **OUTPUT ‚ÄĒ WGSL/WebGPU**: the mask uploads as an `r8unorm` texture ‚Üí a hand-written fragment shader renders the glowing creature field on a spotlit stage; a **full Canvas2D fallback** (`render2d.ts`) draws the same silhouette + glow + googly eyes, auto-selected when `navigator.gpu` is absent or WebGPU init fails (live backend badge). **SOUND** (`audio.ts`): an always-on warm theatre bed (never silent), a continuous airy whoosh, a soft-attacked heavily-low-passed ROAR (a happy dinosaur, never a scary growl), and a comic spring boing ‚ÄĒ kid-safe master `gain (0.55) ‚Üí lowpass 7.5 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor (-18/6/12) ‚Üí out`, pre-created voices (<50 ms). Subsystems (‚Č•3 ‚Üí 4): camera capture + MediaPipe ImageSegmenter mask + WGSL/WebGPU stage renderer (+Canvas2D fallback) + motion-energy-driven foley synth. **camera/body-segmentation INPUT** (whole-body, off jury-banned touch 4√ó / mic; camera/vision was 0√ó in the rolling-10) ¬∑ **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6√ó) ¬∑ **silhouette-mask‚Üícreature + motion-energy‚Üísynth TECH** (grep-distinct from the lab's landmark/pose vision pieces; NOT warm-JI [banned], NOT onset/beat) ¬∑ **silly-friendly giant-shadow-monster-theater VIBE** (funny/edges ‚ÄĒ the kid-safe form of "off cozy"; NOT a warm drone). **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**shadow-puppet / wayang-kulit theatre**; **Daniel Rozin's mechanical mirrors** ‚ÄĒ a viewer's silhouette materialised as a living reflection; **Tex Avery / Looney Tunes squash-and-stretch**; **MediaPipe ImageSegmenter**]; **soft #1 / #5 NOT hard-claimed** ‚ÄĒ segmentation-mask-as-creature is grep-distinct but body vision isn't lab-first, and the technique is foundational with no <30-day bind, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß428**. **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved camera/body/mirror kids cluster (`217-dance-avatar`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `234-kids-hand-creature`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `104-kids-mirror-draw`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `101-camera-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ; additive ‚ÄĒ the gates governed). Full graceful degrade: the whole camera+MediaPipe init is in **one `try/catch`** ‚ÄĒ any failure (denied / blocked / CDN-WASM-model load error / unsupported) ‚Üí friendly `text-rose-300` notice + three ‚Č•88px **ROAR / WHOOSH / BOING** buttons + keys **A/S/D**; no WebGPU ‚Üí Canvas2D; ~2.5s idle ‚Üí a **ghost-silhouette auto-demo** drifts/waves/jumps/grows on a loop so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the monster move AND HEARS it with zero interaction. **No API route, no guard** (pure client camera + Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ camera frames analysed in-browser only, never recorded or sent; no network/secret). No new npm deps (MediaPipe via CDN; three.js avoided). **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates exit 0; then winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully in 93s, ‚úď Generating static pages (464/464)**, `/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster 9.36 kB / 116 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/GPU/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ the segmentation-mask legibility + the whoosh/boing/roar mapping feel are reasoned; the idle ghost-silhouette demo + no-camera buttons mean it performs on a glance with zero hardware). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`615-kids-face-monster`** ("Silly Face Monster" ‚ÄĒ camera/**FaceLandmarker blendshapes** ‚Üí WebGL2 SDF rubber-monster mirror: jaw‚Üíroar, brows‚Üíboing, smile‚Üígiggle, pucker‚Üítoot; refs Tex Avery / Toca Boca / Blendshapes GHUM arXiv 2309.05782; LOST: charming + the most legible cause‚Üíeffect, but renders WebGL2 not the demanded WebGPU, and face-puppet overlaps the lab's existing face cluster 258/423/576) + **`616-kids-tilt-zoo`** ("Tilt Zoo" ‚ÄĒ **device-tilt ‚Üí WGSL/WebGPU** instanced googly creatures rolling/bonking + cartoon foley, **camera-FREE**; refs Carl Stalling/Raymond Scott, Treg Brown, one-man-band; LOST: the most reliable at-a-glance + a full WebGPU spectacle, but a physics tray is a smaller concept than becoming a giant monster ‚ÄĒ **banked precisely as the camera-free WebGPU safety net if 617's camera path proves flaky on review**) as IDEAS ¬ß428. Design notes: `src/app/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster/README.md`

## (Cycle 427 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal edged / off-Canvas2D / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/613-seismic-choir](/dream/613-seismic-choir)** ‚ÄĒ Seismic Choir ūüĆćūüĆč. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 427. **For**: adult / real-world-data sonification / ominous-geological. **What does the planet sound like right now? ‚ÄĒ the live global earthquake feed of the last 24 hours, turned into an ominous trembling sonification: every real quake on Earth becomes a deep resonant groan over a slowly rotating WGSL/WebGPU globe of tectonic light.** The lab's **FIRST seismic / this-class real-data piece** ‚ÄĒ and the only build this fortnight to hit **THREE JURY 2026-06-14 provocations at once**: **#1** build with EDGES, off cozy (deep inharmonic rock-rumbles + a tritone tectonic drone ‚ÄĒ the opposite of the banned warm chord); **#2** "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6√ó)" (primary renderer is hand-written **WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback); **#3** "STOP re-shipping the ocean ‚ÄĒ mine UNMINED real-world data" (live **seismic**, explicitly not the now-twice-occupied ocean). **Data**: USGS `summary/all_day.geojson` (every quake on Earth past 24h; no key, CORS, fetched client-side), with a bundled ~46-quake **synthetic fallback** across real fault zones (Honshu/Cascadia/Chile/Sumatra/Tonga/Nepal/Italy + a deep-Benioff subset + a late-day aftershock swarm) so it's fully alive with zero network ‚ÄĒ a `DATA: LIVE/SAMPLE` badge says which. **Mapping**: magnitude ‚Üí loudness + rumble duration + lower fundamental + sub-bass swell (‚Č•4.2); depth_km ‚Üí brightness (shallow = bright crack, deep = dull groan); longitude ‚Üí stereo pan; latitude ‚Üí resonance tilt. The 24h window replays in ~60s on a loop (speed-adjustable) so you hear the **day's seismic rhythm** ‚ÄĒ clusters, swarms, the silence between. **Synthesis**: each quake = a filtered-noise impact excitation through a bank of **low, slightly-inharmonic bandpass resonators** (ratios 1/1.94/2.41/3.77 over 32‚Äď120 Hz ‚ÄĒ inharmonic so it reads as *rock*, not a synth pitch), mag-scaled decay, sub-bass sine swell on the big ones; under it a continuous dark **tectonic drone** built on tension intervals (minor-2nd beat, tritone-ish, inharmonic) ‚ÄĒ explicitly NOT a warm JI chord. Ear-safe master `gain ‚Üí lowpass ~7k ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall limiter) ‚Üí Analyser ‚Üí out`, capped gains, soft sub attacks. **Visual**: a WGSL fragment shader raymarches a dark rotating globe of tectonic light; each quake blooms at its true (lon,lat) and ripples outward as an expanding geodesic ring, the whole field trembling in sympathy with the audio (uniforms driven by the `AnalyserNode`) ‚ÄĒ big quakes flare + shake the screen, shallow = magma-orange, deep = oxblood-red, over ash-grey ridges on black; `navigator.gpu` feature-detected ‚Üí a real **Canvas2D** globe fallback (same map/pulses/graticule), `RENDER: WebGPU/Canvas2D` badge. Subsystems (‚Č•3 ‚Üí 3 independent): live USGS fetch/parse (`quakes.ts`) + physical-modeling sonification engine (`audio.ts`) + WGSL WebGPU renderer (`gpu.ts`) + Canvas2D fallback (`render2d.ts`). **real-world-data (live seismic) INPUT** (off jury-banned touch 4√ó / mic; explicitly NOT ocean) ¬∑ **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6√ó) ¬∑ **data-sonification + inharmonic physical-model resonant-body rumble TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) ¬∑ **ominous/geological/tectonic VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9√ó). Controls: **Start** (audio gesture-unlock + `webkitAudioContext`), `Space` play/pause, `M` mute, `[`/`]` slow/speed the timeline; on-screen buttons mirror all (‚Č•44px); ~2.5s idle auto-start so a muted 06:30 glance already shows the globe pulsing. **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5** (#1 first seismic/this-class data in the lab [grep-verified; ocean ‚Č† seismic] + #2 ‚Č•3 distinct subsystems + #3 named ref [**Florian Dombois ‚ÄĒ *Earthquake Sounds* / auditory seismology**]; **#5 NOT hard-claimed** ‚ÄĒ this cycle's bound research finding [arXiv 2603.09391 engine-synthesis] seeded the banked `614`, not the winner, said plainly). Honest weak spots (per builder): the WGSL globe is procedural (graticule, not real coastlines) and the per-quake resonator bank is a stylized physical model, not a literal seismogram convolution ‚ÄĒ so it's *Dombois-adjacent*, not a 1:1 seismogram-to-audio transform. **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved spectral/particle/data adult cluster (`323-latent-condensation`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`321-spectral-flight`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ; additive ‚ÄĒ the gates governed the pick). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`612-piano-larynx`** (LPC cross-synthesis "talking piano" on Karel's material ‚ÄĒ WebGL2 "spectral throat", refs Lansky *Six Fantasies* / Dodge *Speech Songs*; LOST: strong but `606` just mined the his-material vein, and its "his material" is diluted by a synthesized default modulator [file-drop is the real-piano path]) + **`614-combustion`** (procedural combustion-engine instrument ‚ÄĒ pulse-train fired at RPM ‚Üí recursive Karplus-Strong exhaust resonators, AudioWorklet, off-glass keyboard+tilt, WebGPU; implements this cycle's research dive arXiv 2603.09391; LOST: edgiest + cleanest research chain, but its abrasive lane was just visited by `601-feedback-howl` two adult cycles ago) as IDEAS ¬ß427. **No API route, no guard** (client-side `fetch` of the public USGS feed ‚ÄĒ GET, no key, no side effects; no secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0 after a `.next`-corruption clean [3 concurrent builder builds raced the shared `.next` ‚Üí ENOENT pages-manifest ‚Üí `rm -rf .next` rebuilt clean], `‚úď Compiled successfully in 38.6s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (464/464)`, `/dream/613-seismic-choir 8.9 kB / 115 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio/network in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the auto-start + sample dataset + Canvas2D fallback mean the globe pulses + groans on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel sees the real planet's last 24h at his desk. Design notes: `src/app/dream/613-seismic-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 426 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal funny / off-Canvas2D / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/609-kids-blow-parade](/dream/609-kids-blow-parade)** ‚ÄĒ Blow Parade ūüéąūüí®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 426. **For**: kids (4+) / funny / loud. **BLOW into the mic and a parade of googly balloon-creatures puffs up bigger and bigger ‚ÄĒ then rips a whoopee-cushion RASPBERRY and zooms off when you stop.** A full hand-written **WGSL/WebGPU** spectacle (Canvas2D fallback) driven by **breath** ‚ÄĒ the directest KIDS-side hit on **JURY 2026-06-14 provocation #2**: "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6√ó)." Now that **Safari 26 (Sept 2025) put WebGPU on iPad/iOS** (RESEARCH ¬ß426), a WGSL kids spectacle is an iPad-native path, not a desktop flex. Technique: a **breath-energy blow detector** (`detect.ts`: spectral **flatness** + **peakiness** + energy gate over ~120 Hz‚Äď6 kHz, fast-attack/slow-release smoothing) fires only on loud-AND-noise-like-AND-non-tonal breath, so a yell or sung note is **rejected** ‚ÄĒ only true breath inflates; the active balloon's radius grows with sustained blow (rising stretched-neck squeak), and on release it enters a fly/tumble/deflate/recycle phase while a **whoopee raspberry** (detuned saw+square through a flutter-square-LFO'd moving lowpass + escaping-air noise, falling pitch) rips. **WGSL renderer**: one instanced quad per balloon, per-instance data (center/radius/hue/squash/spin/eye-look/blink/mouth) ‚Üí storage buffer each frame, the fragment shader draws the whole googly creature procedurally; a **Canvas2D fallback** draws the identical parade (auto-selected on no `navigator.gpu`, live backend badge). Subsystems (‚Č•3 ‚Üí 5): blow detector + inflation physics + raspberry synth + WGSL renderer + Canvas2D fallback. **mic-BLOW/breath INPUT** (non-fingertip ‚ÄĒ off jury-banned touch 4√ó; grep-distinct from yell/voice) ¬∑ **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6√ó; the spectacle lane the jury keeps begging to revive) ¬∑ **breath-energy + balloon-physics + raspberry-synth TECH** (NOT a warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) ¬∑ **giggly-raspberry FUNNY VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9√ó; extends the lone 603 funny register so it isn't a singleton). Kid-safe: `masterGain (‚Č§0.55) ‚Üí lowpass 7.5 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor (-18/6:1/12) ‚Üí out`, soft attacks, capped gains, pre-built nodes (<50 ms first blow), never-silent playful bed (NOT a warm drone), no fail states, ‚Č•64px targets. Full graceful degrade: no mic ‚Üí big **ūüí® hold-to-blow** button + **Space**; no WebGPU ‚Üí Canvas2D; ~2.5s idle ‚Üí a **ghost-blow auto-demo** inflates + pops on a loop so the silent 06:30 glance still sees + hears it. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [5] + #3 named refs that drive it [party-blower/whoopee-cushion foley; balloon inflate‚Üírelease physics; Toca Boca]; **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ `95-kids-breath-bubbles` already did blow-via-loudness, so this is a *refinement* [flatness/peakiness blow-vs-voice gate], not a first-breath-input, said plainly; **#5 soft** ‚ÄĒ WebGPU-on-iPad is the enabling shift but ~9 mo old). Born from RESEARCH ¬ß426; resurrects the ¬ß424-banked seed `605` (research-grounded, cycle-424 soft-body-WebGPU dive). Love-aligned to Karel's playful kids cluster (`98-kids-drum-circle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`169-kids-marble-run`‚Ě§ÔłŹ; additive). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`610-kids-stomp-band`** (device-motion shake/stomp ‚Üí three.js cartoon junk-pile foley; LOST: rides the relocated three.js monoculture + close to 566) + **`611-kids-face-monster`** (camera/MediaPipe face ‚Üí WebGL2 silly-monster mirror; the most novel ‚ÄĒ first comedic face-puppet ‚ÄĒ but the MediaPipe-CDN load is the riskiest 06:30 surface + camera was 3√ó) as IDEAS ¬ß426. **No API route, no guard** (pure client mic + Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ no network/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/609-kids-blow-parade` in `app-path-routes-manifest.json` + prerendered static `.html` 22.5 kB), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU/mic in sandbox ‚ÄĒ blow-vs-voice thresholds + the raspberry timbre are reasoned/heuristic; the idle auto-demo + hold-to-blow fallback mean it puffs + pops on a glance with zero hardware). Design notes: `src/app/dream/609-kids-blow-parade/README.md`

## (Cycle 425 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, ONE concept on 3 decomposition techniques)

- **[/dream/606-piano-vivisection](/dream/606-piano-vivisection)** ‚ÄĒ Piano Vivisection ūüéĻūüĒ¨. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 425. **For**: adult / his real music / clinical-dissective. **Take Karel's OWN recorded piano APART into the singing strings (harmonic) vs. the hammer/key noise (percussive) ‚ÄĒ and remix the two layers live.** The lab's **FIRST audio source-separation instrument** (grep-verified: NMF/HPSS/SMS/source-separation/stem-split all **0√ó** across 600+ prototypes) ‚ÄĒ and the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-14 provocation #4**: "mine the vein that produced both 4/5s [557 splat, 583 musaicing] ‚ÄĒ a fresh analysis/resynthesis technique on *his own* material; do it again ‚ÄĒ neural source separation, NMF, DDSP." The jury named **583 as the gem to EXTEND** ‚Üí AGENT.md maps that to **DEEP**. Technique: **median-filter HPSS** (Fitzgerald, DAFx 2010) ‚ÄĒ his real solo piano is fetched, sliced (~9s mono @22kHz), STFT'd (Hann 1024/hop 256, complex bins kept), then a **time-median** filter (~17 frames/bin) isolates the sustained horizontal harmonic trails (strings) while a **freq-median** filter (~17 bins/frame) isolates the vertical transient strikes (hammers); soft power-2 Wiener masks ‚Üí phase-preserving ISTFT overlap-add ‚Üí two independently-mixable layers. Subsystems (‚Č•3 ‚Üí 5): STFT analysis + median-filter HPSS solver + phase-preserving mask resynthesis/ISTFT + WebGL2 vivisection render (harmonic = cyan/steel horizontal streaks, percussive = magenta/white vertical strikes, balance-weighted, sweeping playhead, R32F texture w/ 8-bit fallback) + off-glass keyboard/tilt control. **audio-file (his piano) + keyboard/tilt off-glass INPUT** (NOT a fingertip [jury-banned touch], NOT mic, NOT camera) ¬∑ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D [jury-banned 6√ó]) ¬∑ **median-filter HPSS source-separation TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [jury-banned], NOT onset/beat, NOT concatenative) ¬∑ **clinical/dissective "vivisection" VIBE** (REVEALS the machine inside his warm piano ‚ÄĒ the opposite of the cozy register the jury banned ~9√ó). Controls: keyboard `1`/`2` solo/mute strings/hammers, `‚Üź/‚Üí` morph balance, `‚ÜĎ/‚Üď` gain, `space` play/pause; iOS-gated device-tilt morphs balance on mobile; secondary on-screen faders. ~2.5s idle auto-demo sweeps the balance so a silent 06:30 glance shows the field separating + (un-muted) hears the layers. Synthesized solo-piano fallback if the `/api/audio` fetch fails (emerald "Karel's piano" vs amber "fallback" badge) so it ALWAYS decomposes. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no CDN, no three.js** (pure client fetch of the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` + Web Audio + raw WebGL2). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first source separation in the lab [grep-verified 0√ó] + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [5] + #3 named refs [Fitzgerald DAFx 2010; the CataRT/musaicing lineage 583 extends]; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the 2026 DNN source-separation papers [arXiv 2603.04032] are ~3 mo and the classical median-filter method is foundational, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß425**. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one "take his piano apart" concept on 3 techniques); banked **`607-piano-prism`** (NMF: factor his piano into 6 learned spectral components to solo/mute/re-mix ‚ÄĒ the most technically ambitious, the strongest cycle-2 deepening) + **`608-piano-sieve`** (SMS: sift tonal partials vs the stochastic residual, with freeze + stretch) as IDEAS ¬ß425. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 101s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (461/461)`, `/dream/606-piano-vivisection 8.35 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/GPU in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the auto-demo + keyboard fallback mean the field separates on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can morph his own piano apart at his desk. Design notes: `src/app/dream/606-piano-vivisection/README.md`

## (Cycle 420 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers off grep-verified *un-simulated physical instruments* in the 588-deep lab. Ships **`593-kids-sun-shadows`**: *a 4-year-old drags a glowing sun across the sky and the shadows it casts SING ‚ÄĒ a sundial turned into a sequencer.* A few objects (tree/rock/crystal) throw long cast shadows that sweep the ground as you move the light (gnomon geometry `L = H/tan(altitude)`, swinging away from the sun); scattered glowing **chime stones** ring a warm note when a shadow's tip crosses them ‚ÄĒ so the music **emerges from where the shadows fall**, not from tapping a note. A slow sun-drag pulls every shadow across the ground in turn, ringing the spatially-ordered stones as a gentle assembling **arpeggio**; tap empty ground to plant another object = another moving playhead. The **lab's first shadow-as-playhead** (cast-shadow geometry as a musical sequencer ‚ÄĒ grep-verified 0√ó across 588 prototypes; sundial/gnomon/shadow-sequencer all NONE). Chime stones tuned to a **just-intonation** golden-hour set (`1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 11/8 Lydian #4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2/1, 9/4`) over a low warm root ‚ÄĒ spatially ordered so you hear intervallic motion (a chord assembling), deliberately **NOT** the jury-banned C-major-pentatonic "nothing-is-ever-wrong" wash. The sky runs a **dawn rose/amber ‚Üí pale noon gold ‚Üí dusk violet** journey as the sun rises/sets, the ambient pad deepening at dusk; kids-safe master (`gain ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§7k ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí out`), capped object count, soft attacks. The warmest + most surprising of the three explorers and the directest **kids-side** hit on **JURY 2026-06-13**'s twin asks: **#4 chase WARMTH, tension you FEEL not solve** (you drag light, nothing to decode) and the *spirit* of **#1 off the glass / spatial** (light is a movable spatial agent, not a finger-on-a-dot). **touch-drag-the-sun INPUT** (+ optional feature-detected DeviceOrientation tilt, pointer-drag guaranteed) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [jury 6√ó], NOT SVG [jury 5√ó], NOT the mic [jury 5√ó] ‚ÄĒ every ban dodged) ¬∑ **shadow-geometry-as-spatial-sequencer TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) ¬∑ **kids golden-hour contemplative-warm VIBE** (NOT a creature [jury froze the 549/569 spine], NOT the pentatonic-tap wash). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 shadow-as-playhead [grep-verified 0√ó] + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [sun/gnomon model + per-object shadow-cast geometry + shadow‚ÜĒstone strike sequencer + JI chime synth + sky-color/time-of-day pad journey = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [the **sundial / gnomon** ‚ÄĒ a shadow as the measure of the sun's motion, here playing time instead of measuring it; **Olafur Eliasson *The Weather Project*** (Tate Modern Turbine Hall, 2003) ‚ÄĒ the single room-filling artificial sun + golden-hour palette]; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ foundational physical phenomenon newly simulated, no <14-day bind, soft RESEARCH ¬ß420). Born from RESEARCH ¬ß420 (in a 588-deep lab, grep for a real-world acoustic/physical phenomenon nobody has modeled yet ‚Üí three 0√ó gaps: Galton board, jal-tarang/glass-armonica friction resonator, sundial shadow-sequencer). **Resonates with Karel's loved contemplative-sky/water cluster** (`152-kids-star-paint`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `133-kids-ripple-pond`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `107-ocean-presence`‚Ě§ÔłŹ; additive). Degrades fully: no tilt ‚Üí drag only; no audio until the Tap-to-begin gate; idle ~2.5s ‚Üí the sun auto-drifts so the silent 06:30 glance sweeps shadows + sings. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ no mic/camera/network/secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`592-kids-water-bowls`** ("Singing Water" ‚ÄĒ **jal-tarang + glass-armonica**: tap to ring, **RUB to make it SING** via a friction-excited resonator [high-Q bandpass noise + shimmer partials, drive = drag speed]; the deepest fresh *audio primitive*; LOST: most technically novel but 593 is warmer at a glance ‚ÄĒ **strongest unshipped kids seed, ship next kids cycle**) + **`591-kids-plinko-bells`** ("Bell Drop" ‚ÄĒ a sonified **Galton/quincunx board (1894)**: balls cascade through pegs into 9 JI bins, the histogram blooms *as a warm major chord* "richest in the middle"; emergent/autonomous, love-aligned to 236/130/262; LOST: richest concept but cooler/STEM-first) banked IDEAS ¬ß420. Build-verified (`npm run build` OK, `/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows` prerendered static `.html`), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio/pointer in sandbox ‚ÄĒ the shadow‚ÜĒstone feel, JI tuning by ear, and iOS audio-unlock follow proven patterns but are unexercised here). ¬∑ *(Cycle 419 shipped `588-tidal-organ`, adult WIDE ‚ÄĒ not separately re-blocked here; doc drift. Cycle 417 below.)*

- **[/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows](/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows)** ‚ÄĒ Move the Sun ‚ėÄÔłŹūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 420. **For**: kids (4+). Drag a glowing sun across the sky and the shadows it casts sing: each object throws a long cast shadow that sweeps the ground, and when a shadow's tip crosses a glowing chime stone it rings a warm note ‚ÄĒ a sundial turned into a sequencer. The lab's first shadow-as-playhead (grep-verified 0√ó). Touch-drag input (NOT the mic), Canvas2D (NOT three.js/SVG), just-intonation golden-hour chimes over a dawn‚Üínoon‚Üídusk sky journey (NOT the pentatonic wash), no creature (the jury froze that spine). The warmest + most surprising of a WIDE 3-explorer kids fire. Refs: the sundial/gnomon; Olafur Eliasson *The Weather Project* (2003). No API route / no guard (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D). Design notes: `src/app/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows/README.md`

## (Cycle 417 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 technical approaches on one concept. Ships **`583-piano-mosaic-field`**: *reach INTO Karel's recorded piano and re-voice it ‚ÄĒ drag a luminous probe through a 2-D timbre field and the instrument answers with his own closest-matching grains, painting with his timbre in real time.* The lab's **first concatenative-musaicing / corpus-based resynthesis** ‚ÄĒ Karel's real Welcome-Home solo piano is decoded client-side and shattered into a corpus of ~120 ms Hann grains, each precomputed (per-grain FFT) with a **spectral centroid** (brightness ‚Üí field X), **RMS loudness**, and a **crude dominant pitch** (FFT peak + parabolic refine ‚Üí register, field Y). On a steady ~18 grains/sec tick a **CataRT-style matcher** scores the whole corpus by weighted distance to the cursor target in (brightness, pitch) space ‚ÄĒ plus a small loudness preference, a short repeat penalty (never machine-guns one grain), and a touch of jitter ‚ÄĒ launches the best grain, and overlaps ~4‚Äď8 through Hann envelopes so the stream glides and never clicks (warmth lowpass + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter). **This is target-driven grain SELECTION, not blind random granular scatter** ‚ÄĒ the cursor's position MEANS a timbre and his corpus answers with its nearest sound (the genuine distinction from loved `227-paths-granular`‚Ě§ÔłŹ's blind scatter). Visual = one additive point per grain laid out in the timbre field, dim violet at rest ‚Üí blooming **warm ember** when voiced, a soft luminous probe + haze following the cursor; the field breathes while idle and a slow **Lissajous auto-demo** drives the cursor after 2.5 s idle so the silent 06:30 glance still sings. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13**'s twin asks for the adult side: **extend the 4/5 `557-piano-splat-galaxy` model** ("a *fresh technique* in service of his own music") and **#4 chase WARMTH, not a puzzle** ‚ÄĒ you don't decode anything, you smear your hand through his own sound. **audio-file (Karel's piano) + pointer/touch-drag INPUT** (NOT camera [3√ó in the last 10: 568/576/582], NOT the mic [jury-banned 5√ó]) ¬∑ **WebGL2 additive particle-field OUTPUT** (WebGPU-detected, Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ NOT three.js [jury 6√ó], NOT SVG [jury 5√ó]) ¬∑ **concatenative-musaicing / corpus grain-matching TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo extraction) ¬∑ **adult warm tactile-immersive VIBE** (NOT a cerebral tuning/time puzzle ‚ÄĒ the jury's named adult disease). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [piano fetch/decode + per-grain spectral-feature corpus build + CataRT matching/concatenation engine + WebGL2 particle render = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Diemo Schwarz ‚ÄĒ CataRT real-time corpus-based concatenative synthesis (2006); Tralie & Berger ‚ÄĒ *The Concatenator* (arXiv:2411.04366, 2024) / MACataRT (arXiv:2502.00023, Feb 2026); Curtis Roads *Microsound*]; **soft #1** [first target-MATCHED concatenative resynthesis in the lab ‚ÄĒ distinct from blind granular scatter at 227; said honestly]; **#5 soft/NOT clean-claimed** ‚ÄĒ RESEARCH ¬ß417 dive into the concatenative-musaicing wave, but the technique is foundational (Schwarz 2006), so a soft bind not a <14-day result). Born from RESEARCH ¬ß417 (concatenative musaicing ‚Üí reach into his recording and re-voice it). **Pulled by Karel's loves**: the spectral/granular-piano cluster (`227-paths-granular`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `243-spectral-cloud`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `267-spectral-drift`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `321-spectral-flight`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `323-latent-condensation`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) + his "use my real Paths music" directive. Degrades fully: no WebGPU ‚Üí WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D; failed fetch ‚Üí a synthesized warm solo-piano fallback so it ALWAYS sounds and ALWAYS has a corpus (emerald **"Karel's piano"** vs amber **"synthesized fallback"** chip). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client fetch of the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` + Web Audio ‚ÄĒ no secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`584-piano-spectral-tide`** (a **phase-vocoder spectral FREEZE** of his piano ‚ÄĒ grab any moment and stretch it into an infinite warm harmonic tide you scrub through, additive top-48-bin resynthesis with a crisp‚ÜĒveil depth axis, WebGL2 oceanic strata; Flanagan&Golden/Dolson + Radigue/Basinski; LOST: beautiful but overlaps his loved spectral cluster [243/267/321] ‚ÄĒ resurrect once that cluster is out of the 10-window) + **`585-piano-grain-orrery`** (his grains become **gravity-bound orbiting bodies** you stir with your hand, each voicing as it swings past the core/cursor/sounding-ring ‚ÄĒ n-body physics‚Üígranular retrigger, WebGL2 feedback-trail orrery; Roads/Xenakis + Ventrella *Particle Life*; LOST: gorgeous but particle/n-body systems are heavy in the lab [`130`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`236`‚Ě§ÔłŹ/`262`‚Ě§ÔłŹ] ‚ÄĒ resurrect for a physics-forward fire) banked IDEAS ¬ß417. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field` prerendered static `.html`), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox ‚ÄĒ the real-audio fetch + GPU render paths follow the proven `557` patterns but are unexercised here). ¬∑ *(Cycle 416 shipped `582-kids-dance-sky`; below.)*

- **[/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field](/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field)** ‚ÄĒ Piano Mosaic Field ūüéĻ‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 417. **For**: adult / his real music / warm-tactile. Reach into Karel's recorded piano and re-voice it: his solo piano is shattered into a corpus of tiny grains laid out by timbre, and dragging a warm probe makes the instrument answer with his own closest-matching sound ‚ÄĒ concatenative musaicing in real time. Target-driven grain SELECTION (CataRT-style), not blind scatter ‚ÄĒ the distinction from loved `227-paths-granular`. Audio-file + touch-drag input (NOT camera, NOT the mic), WebGL2 additive particle field (NOT three.js/SVG), Canvas2D + synth-piano fallbacks. The 557 model (a fresh technique in service of his own music) + the jury's "chase warmth not a puzzle." Refs: Diemo Schwarz CataRT; Tralie & Berger *The Concatenator*; Curtis Roads *Microsound*. No API route / no guard (public `/api/audio/[id]` fetch + Web Audio). Design notes: `src/app/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field/README.md`

## (Cycle 416 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`582-kids-dance-sky`**: *a 4-year-old's whole body becomes a warm sky-choir ‚ÄĒ they stand in front of the iPad and DANCE; raise your arms and the sky brightens, spread wide and the chord opens.* The lab's **first whole-body pose-skeleton instrument** (568 was hands only, 576 head only) and the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-13**'s standing **#1** ‚ÄĒ "get off the glass; the lab still has zero embodied-spatial prototypes after 570 builds, and the mic is over-used 5√ó." The front camera tracks **33 body landmarks** (MediaPipe **PoseLandmarker**, loaded **at runtime from a CDN** via `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ ‚Ä¶)` ‚ÄĒ byte-identical to the already-shipping `576-presence-room`, never added to `package.json`; the lighter `pose_landmarker_lite` model for fast load). Pose drives a warm choir + a **Canvas2D glowing skeleton with a blooming aura** (NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT WebGL2): each **hand's height** ‚Üí a distinct warm voice (higher = brighter, left low / right bright); **body spread** (wrist distance) ‚Üí **chord openness** (narrow = close root+fifth; arms wide = an open shimmering add-6/9 voicing); **how high the arms are raised** ‚Üí master brightness (lowpass opens to 7.5 kHz) + aura glow; **feet / hip motion** ‚Üí a soft low bass swell. Harmony = a warm **just-intonation Lydian cluster** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 45/32, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2 over a low A) atop a **constant root+fifth drone** ‚ÄĒ "no wrong notes" for kids but the expression lives in the *body pose*, **felt not solved**, explicitly **NOT** the jury-banned C-major-pentatonic kids wash. Kids-safe master (`gain ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§7600 ‚Üí compressor ‚ąí10/20/6 ‚Üí out`); AudioContext born in the Start tap; all changes `setTargetAtTime`; a Chris-Wilson 25 ms look-ahead pump steadies the ramps; always-on soft drone so it is never silent. **whole-body camera/pose INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [jury 6√ó], NOT SVG [jury 5√ó], NOT WebGL2 [4√ó in the last 10], NOT the mic [jury 5√ó] ‚ÄĒ every ban dodged) ¬∑ **pose-keypoint ‚Üí harmony/brightness TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) ¬∑ **kids embodied-dance warm-modal VIBE** (NOT a creature, NOT a pentatonic-tap toy). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [pose tracking + spread‚ÜíJI-chord-openness + arms-raised‚Üíbrightness + feet‚Üíbass + Canvas2D aura render = 5] + #3 named ref that DRIVES it [Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974) ‚ÄĒ the original full-body responsive environment where your silhouette *is* the instrument; Daniel Rozin body-as-pixels lineage]; **soft #1** [first whole-figure motion instrument in the lab ‚ÄĒ hands/head don't count]; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ PoseLandmarker is foundational/months-old, no <14-day bind, said plainly). Born from RESEARCH ¬ß416 (whole-body video-keypoints ‚Üí real-time music + Krueger responsive-environment). **4-tier graceful degradation** keeps it alive on any device: pose works ‚Üí full skeleton; pose model fails ‚Üí Canvas2D frame-difference motion blob drives a simplified mapping; no camera ‚Üí finger-drag; no input ~3 s ‚Üí a synthetic dancing-skeleton **auto-demo** so the silent 06:30 glance still sings (cancels on real input, resumes after idle). Privacy: frames analysed in-browser only, never recorded or sent. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client camera + Web Audio ‚ÄĒ no network to our backend, no secret). No new npm deps (MediaPipe is a runtime CDN load). Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`581-kids-shadow-band`** (the same concept in **pure Canvas2D frame-differencing** ‚ÄĒ zero deps, no model download, bulletproof on any iPad; 6 zoned warm voices painted as glowing light-trails, the Krueger/Rozin "body as light"; LOST: a hair closer to the spatial-grid reflex than 582's semantic body mapping ‚ÄĒ resurrect as the no-download fallback if pose proves flaky on Karel's iPad) + **`583-kids-light-ribbons`** (**Canvas2D optical-flow** ‚Üí a *continuous* body-bowed warm choir, speed+upward motion gliding the voices via portamento, flowing light-ribbons advected along the flow; Ondes Martenot/Theremin lineage; the freshest *musical* idea of the three but conceptually adjacent to last week's `579-silk-choir` [another continuous-bent warm choir] ‚ÄĒ LOST on diversity THIS cycle only; resurrect once 579 is out of the 10-window) banked IDEAS ¬ß416. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/582-kids-dance-sky` 5.84 kB / 112 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no camera/pose/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ the one real risk is whether MediaPipe pose loads on Karel's actual iPad at 06:30). ¬∑ *(Cycle 415 shipped `580-tide-breath`; below.)*

- **[/dream/582-kids-dance-sky](/dream/582-kids-dance-sky)** ‚ÄĒ Sky Choir ūüēļūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 416. **For**: kids (4+). A 4-year-old's whole body becomes a warm sky-choir ‚ÄĒ stand in front of the iPad and DANCE: raise your arms and the sky brightens, spread wide and the chord opens. The lab's first whole-body pose-skeleton instrument: MediaPipe PoseLandmarker (33 landmarks, runtime CDN load, no package.json change) ‚Üí a Canvas2D glowing skeleton + blooming aura; hand height ‚Üí warm voices, body spread ‚Üí chord openness, arms raised ‚Üí brightness, feet ‚Üí bass swell. Whole-body camera/pose input (NOT the mic), Canvas2D output (NOT three.js/SVG/WebGL2), warm just-intonation Lydian over a root+fifth drone (NOT the pentatonic wash). The directest answer to the jury's #1 "get off the glass / zero embodied-spatial." 4-tier fallback (pose ‚Üí frame-diff blob ‚Üí drag ‚Üí auto-demo). Refs: Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974); Daniel Rozin. No API route / no guard (pure client camera + Web Audio). Design notes: `src/app/dream/582-kids-dance-sky/README.md`

## (Cycle 415 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers all chasing the jury's WARMTH dare. Ships **`580-tide-breath`**: *the real ocean breathes a warm chord ‚ÄĒ a direct, keyless, client-side fetch of your coast's LIVE marine conditions makes the actual swell the breath of a sustained just-intonation drone, over a WebGPU water-surface that rises and falls with the live tide.* The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13** on THREE axes at once: **#1** revive the starved WebGPU (1√ó across the last 15; the lab fled into a three.js monoculture) ‚ÄĒ 580 renders a WGSL fragment-shader water-surface with a Canvas2D hot-downgrade; **#2** real-world-data sonification (**0√ó the whole window**, named-starved every jury) ‚ÄĒ I curled the endpoint live (`marine-api.open-meteo.com/v1/marine`, no key, `access-control-allow-origin: *`, returned wave 1.28 m / swell 12.1 s); **#4** chase WARMTH, not a puzzle ‚ÄĒ no interaction after the play gesture, no melody, no beat, just a luminous sea and a chord the ocean is playing. On play: optional geolocation (3 s timeout ‚Üí silent Monterey-Bay default) ‚Üí keyless Open-Meteo Marine fetch (baked sample on offline/failure, shown amber **"Sample swell (feed offline)"** vs emerald **"Live ¬∑ Open-Meteo Marine ¬∑ {place}"**). Three live numbers drive the whole piece: **swell_wave_period** ‚Üí a sine breath LFO on master gain + lowpass (one inhale/exhale per swell cycle, ~6‚Äď18 s), **wave_height** ‚Üí breath depth, **sea_surface_temperature** ‚Üí timbre warmth. Sound = six detuned oscillator pairs tuned to a **D2 just-intonation chord** (1, 3/2, 2, 5/2, 3, 7/4) through a warm `gain ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí compressor ‚Üí out`; **no note-tapping, no melody, no onset/beat ‚ÄĒ one continuous breathing chord.** Visual = a sum-of-sines water surface breathing in sync; WebGPU (WGSL: waterline + horizon glow + shimmer + temperature-tinted palette) with a Canvas2D hot-fallback, alive from frame one. **real-marine-data INPUT ¬∑ WebGPU OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ NOT three.js [jury 6√ó], NOT SVG [jury 5√ó], NOT the mic [jury 5√ó] ‚ÄĒ every ban dodged + revives the starved renderer) ¬∑ **tidal-data sonification TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) ¬∑ **warm-oceanic-drone VIBE** (NOT a cerebral puzzle). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [marine fetch + marine‚ÜíJI breath/harmony mapping + WebGPU/Canvas2D water render + breathing-drone synth = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Andrea Polli ‚ÄĒ ocean/climate-data sonification; √Čliane Radigue & La Monte Young ‚ÄĒ warm long-form just-intonation drone]; **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ real-data sonification broadly exists [`314-solar-wind` space-weather, `437-wiki-pulse`, `575-kids-sky-song` weather, `355` seismic], so a live-MARINE breathing-drone is a fresh source + breath structure, not a fresh primitive; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ Open-Meteo Marine is infrastructure, not a <14-day result). Born from RESEARCH ¬ß415 (NOAA space-weather is keyless+live BUT `314-solar-wind` already owns it ‚Üí grep saved a near-duplicate; the unmined warm real-data source is the OCEAN). **Resonates with Karel's loved ocean cluster** (`107-ocean-presence`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `84-wave-fluid`‚Ě§ÔłŹ; additive). Degrades fully: no location ‚Üí Monterey Bay; no/failed network ‚Üí baked sample swell, always plays; no WebGPU ‚Üí Canvas2D; autonomous so the silent 06:30 glance always shows a breathing sea that sings. **No API route, no `guard`** (public read-only no-key client fetch ‚ÄĒ no secret; CSP allows `https:` connect-src). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`581-still-bloom`** (off the glass: device-motion *stillness* ‚Üí an audio-first warm Radigue/Oliveros drone that BLOOMS from silence only while you hold the phone still, motion scatters it; minimal Canvas2D bloom ‚ÄĒ the off-glass/audio-only/conceptual lane the jury keeps naming 0√ó; LOST: lowest ambition, no WebGPU, payoff needs a held-still device so a silent glance sees only the breathe-demo) + **`582-piano-aurora`** (a warm piano's *harmony* ‚ÄĒ 12-bin FFT chroma, NOT onset/beat ‚ÄĒ paints a WebGPU curl-noise aurora confined to a warm amber‚Üírose‚Üíviolet arc; built-in generative pad + drop-your-own file; Anadol/Akten/Bridson; LOST: a beautiful audio-reactive *visualizer* but the lab's flow-field/aurora lane is crowded [130‚Ě§ÔłŹ/262‚Ě§ÔłŹ/441] and it carries no real data ‚ÄĒ resurrect bound to Karel's actual `/api/audio/[id]` tracks) banked IDEAS ¬ß415. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, **451/451** pages, `/dream/580-tide-breath` 6.6 kB / 113 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no WebGPU/audio/geolocation/network in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycle 414 shipped `579-silk-choir`; below.)*

- **[/dream/580-tide-breath](/dream/580-tide-breath)** ‚ÄĒ Tide Breath ūüĆäūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 415. **For**: adult / meditative / real-world-data. The real ocean breathes a warm chord: a keyless client-side fetch of your coast's LIVE marine conditions makes the actual swell the breath of a sustained just-intonation drone (swell period ‚Üí breath rate, wave height ‚Üí breath depth, sea-surface-temp ‚Üí timbre), over a WebGPU water-surface that rises and falls with the live tide. Real-marine-data input (NOT the mic), WebGPU (NOT three.js/SVG ‚ÄĒ revives the jury-starved renderer), Canvas2D fallback; autonomous, no puzzle. The directest answer to the jury's #1 (revive WebGPU) + #2 (real-world-data, 0√ó the window) + #4 (warmth). Refs: Andrea Polli; √Čliane Radigue; La Monte Young; Open-Meteo Marine. No API route / no guard (public no-key client fetch). Design notes: `src/app/dream/580-tide-breath/README.md`

## (Cycle 414 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`579-silk-choir`**: *grab a luminous sheet of silk and PULL it ‚ÄĒ the membrane's tension bends a warm choir/bowed-string chord, so pulling it taut makes the voices rise and brighten and letting it billow lets them sigh and fall.* The pitch is **continuous and physical ‚ÄĒ you bend the chord with your hands, you never tap a discrete note** ‚ÄĒ the directest break from **JURY 2026-06-13**'s banned kids **pentatonic-tap-wash** (‚Čą6 of 7 kids pieces are "tap ‚Üí a discrete consonant note ‚Üí pretty viz"), on the **jury-starved WebGPU** renderer it explicitly wanted back (starved 1√ó; the lab fled into a three.js monoculture). The sheet is a 2-D grid of point masses (34√ó24) integrated with **verlet / position-based dynamics** (velocity implied by `position ‚ąí previousPosition`; relaxation passes satisfy structural + shear springs; top edge pinned so it hangs like a curtain). When `navigator.gpu` exists the whole solver runs in a **WebGPU compute shader (WGSL)** ‚ÄĒ integrate + relax passes over storage buffers, read back per frame ‚ÄĒ with a **runtime hot-downgrade** to a byte-equivalent CPU solver if WebGPU is absent/fails (so it looks + plays identically on an older iPad); both render the same glowing additive filaments (Canvas2D), violet at rest ‚Üí gold where pulled taut. Multi-touch grabs the nearest node; the sheet is split into six regions and each region's **mean stretch past rest length** (a 0..1 tension) continuously **bends one voice of a just-intonation major-add9 over A2** (ratios 1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 2/1, 9/4) up to ~5 semitones via `setTargetAtTime` portamento, opening a per-voice lowpass as you pull ‚ÄĒ the chord physically warps under your hands and resolves home on release; **there is no note-tapping anywhere.** Kids-safe master (`gain ‚Üí lowpass ‚Č§8 kHz ‚Üí compressor ‚Üí out`); AudioContext born in the first tap; the silk shimmers from frame one and a silent idle **auto-demo** sweeps a grab across it so the 06:30 phone glance sings with zero setup. **multi-touch-stretch INPUT ¬∑ WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT WebGL2-at-edge, NOT the mic ‚ÄĒ every jury ban dodged + revives the starved renderer) ¬∑ **verlet-membrane tension‚Üícontinuous-pitch TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) ¬∑ **warm/silky/continuous-expressive-pitch VIBE** (NOT a pentatonic-tap toy, NOT a creature). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [verlet/PBD solver + multi-touch grab + tension‚Üícontinuous-bowed-chord synth + GPU/Canvas2D render = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Thomas Jakobsen *Advanced Character Physics* (GDC 2001) ‚ÄĒ the silk *is* a Jakobsen verlet cloth; Ondes Martenot / Theremin ‚ÄĒ the continuous-hand-bent-pitch lineage, the reason there are no discrete taps]; **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ verlet exists at `303-kids-wind-harp` as 1-D strings, so a 2-D grab-stretch *membrane* sounding continuous tension‚Üípitch is a fresh interaction + musical structure, not a fresh primitive; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ no <14-day bind, WebGPU-production-ready is a months-old 2026 trend, said plainly). Born from RESEARCH ¬ß414 (WebGPU production-ready across all browsers in 2026 + verlet membrane ‚Üí a stretchable singing sheet). Degrades fully: no WebGPU ‚Üí CPU/Canvas2D; no touch ‚Üí mouse drag; failures in `text-rose-300`. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ no network, no secrets). No new npm deps. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`580-silk-veil`** (the same grab-stretch concept in pure **Canvas2D** ‚ÄĒ the bulletproof-iPad path; LOST: most reliable but Canvas2D-only so does NOT revive the jury-starved WebGPU; resurrect for a max-reliability fire) + **`581-silk-ripple`** (a different interaction ‚ÄĒ **flick/slap ‚Üí traveling waves** that bend the chord in ripples; WebGPU + Canvas2D; LOST: most fun for a 4yo + also revives WebGPU but a *variant* of the headline with a subtler bend; resurrect for a playful fire / fold in as 579's cycle-2 gesture) banked IDEAS ¬ß414. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, **450/450** pages, `/dream/579-silk-choir` 5.83 kB / 109 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no WebGPU/touch/audio in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycle 413 shipped `576-presence-room` ‚ÄĒ the lab's first head-tracked binaural, adult WIDE ‚ÄĒ not separately blocked in INDEX; doc drift. Cycle 412 below.)*

- **[/dream/579-silk-choir](/dream/579-silk-choir)** ‚ÄĒ Silk Choir ūü™°ūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 414. **For**: kids (4+). Grab a luminous sheet of silk and pull it ‚ÄĒ the membrane's tension bends a warm choir/bowed-string chord, so pulling it taut makes the voices rise and brighten and letting it billow lets them sigh and fall; the pitch is continuous and physical, you bend the chord with your hands and never tap a note. A 2-D verlet / position-based-dynamics membrane on a **WebGPU compute shader** (with a runtime hot-downgrade to a CPU/Canvas2D solver), six regions each bending one voice of a JI major-add9 by stretch via `setTargetAtTime` portamento. Multi-touch stretch input (NOT the mic), WebGPU (NOT three.js/SVG/WebGL2 ‚ÄĒ revives the jury-starved renderer), Canvas2D fallback. The directest break from the banned kids pentatonic-tap-wash. Refs: Thomas Jakobsen *Advanced Character Physics* (2001); Ondes Martenot / Theremin. No API route / no guard (pure client). Design notes: `src/app/dream/579-silk-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 412 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`575-kids-sky-song`**: *today's REAL current weather writes a child a little song ‚ÄĒ and the child plays it.* The piece does a direct client-side fetch of the child's **live local weather** (Open-Meteo ‚ÄĒ free, no-key, no-auth, CORS; geolocation with a silent default-coordinate fallback, a baked "example sky" if offline) and lets the **real weather COMPOSE an evolving generative piece**: WMO `weather_code`+`is_day` pick the key/mode/instruments (clear‚Üíbright major celesta ¬∑ overcast‚Üísuspended pads ¬∑ rain‚Üíminor-pentatonic plucks ¬∑ snow‚Üíglassy maj7 bells ¬∑ fog‚Üílow drone ¬∑ thunder‚Üíhushed dorian ¬∑ night‚Üídropped an octave), `wind_speed`‚Üítempo, `cloud_cover`‚Üínote density, `temperature`‚Üítimbral warmth, `precipitation`‚Üían overlaid droplet voice. A Chris-Wilson **look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms pump, notes scheduled ~120 ms ahead) plays an 8-step ostinato that **mutates + re-seeds over time** (Eno-style recombination) so it's a moving piece, not a loop; the child **touches a raw-WebGL2 aurora field** to add their own glowing voice, always snapped to today's key (no wrong note, no fail state). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13 #2** (real-world-data sonification ‚ÄĒ **0√ó the whole window**) + **#4** (chase warmth, not a puzzle), and a grep-verified **kids-first real-data sonification** (the lab's prior weather toys `115`/`120`/`83` are all *synthetic*/"Zero API"; the only real-data pieces `355`/`337` are adult, out of frame). **live-weather-data + touch INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 aurora OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback ‚ÄĒ NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT the mic ‚ÄĒ every jury ban dodged) ¬∑ **real-data generative-sonification TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo *extraction* ‚ÄĒ this *generates*) ¬∑ **warm/dreamy/wonder VIBE**. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 qualified kids-first real-external-data sonification + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [live Open-Meteo fetch + weather‚Üígenerative-song engine + look-ahead Web Audio scheduler + WebGL2 aurora render = 4] + #3 named refs [Andrea Polli climate-data sonification; Natalie Miebach woven weather-scores; Brian Eno generative recombination]; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the sonification lineage is foundational, no <14-day bind, said plainly). Degrades fully: WebGL2 absent ‚Üí Canvas2D field that still drifts + sings; geolocation denied ‚Üí silent default city; fetch failed ‚Üí baked example sky + `text-rose-300` note, always plays. **No API route, no `guard`** (Open-Meteo is a public read-only no-key client fetch ‚ÄĒ CSP-verified the enforced `connect-src ‚Ä¶ https:` allows it; no secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`573-kids-sky-window`** (raw-WebGL2 luminous GLSL sky ‚ÄĒ fbm clouds/sun/rain/lightning; the richest atmosphere renderer ‚ÄĒ LOST: 575's generative engine is the bigger concept leap; resurrect for an atmosphere-forward fire) + **`574-kids-weather-today`** (Canvas2D cut-paper diorama with a smiling sun + paper critter ‚ÄĒ the warmest, most 4yo-legible, most iPad-safe ‚ÄĒ LOST: closest in *form* to the lab's existing synthetic weather toys) banked IDEAS ¬ß412. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, **448/448** pages, `/dream/575-kids-sky-song` 8.21 kB / 114 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no WebGL2/audio/geolocation in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycle 411 shipped `570-spoken-spell`; below.)*

- **[/dream/575-kids-sky-song](/dream/575-kids-sky-song)** ‚ÄĒ Sky Song ūüĆ¶ÔłŹūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 412. **For**: kids (4+). Today's REAL local weather writes a little song and the child plays it: the live Open-Meteo conditions compose an evolving generative piece (key/mode/tempo/density/timbre all from the real sky), a look-ahead scheduler plays an ostinato that mutates + re-seeds over time (Eno-style), and the child touches a WebGL2 aurora field to add their own voice in today's key ‚ÄĒ no wrong note, no fail state. Live-weather + touch input (NOT the mic), WebGL2 aurora (NOT three.js/SVG), Canvas2D fallback. The lab's first kids real-data sonification (prior weather toys are synthetic). Refs: Andrea Polli, Natalie Miebach, Brian Eno. No API route / no guard (public no-key client fetch). Design notes: `src/app/dream/575-kids-sky-song/README.md`

## Cycle 411 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers. Ships **`570-spoken-spell`**: *speak, and your live words become a self-layering musical incantation ‚ÄĒ Resonance hears your speech (real Web Speech API recognition), maps each word's letters to a D-pentatonic pitch, vowel-ratio to duration, and freezes finished phrases into looping ostinati, so the longer you speak the denser the canon and you can hear your own sentence inside it.* The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-12 #2** ("find sound in **language**, not a simulated physical field") and its #5-revival ask: born from this cycle's dive into the **2026 in-browser ASR wave** (transformers.js running Whisper/LiteASR/Cohere Transcribe fully client-side via ONNX/WASM ‚ÄĒ RESEARCH ¬ß411). **live-speech-recognition INPUT** (voice ‚ÄĒ NOT the jury's 7√ó finger-on-glass default) **+ SVG word-river OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [rolling-10 4√ó ‚Üí BANNED], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) ¬∑ **continuous-transcription‚Üílinguistic-music‚Üíaccretive-loop TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics‚Üídrone ‚ÄĒ the banned meta-technique) ¬∑ **ritual/incantatory/cerebral VIBE**. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 qualified lab-first [first piece where *continuous* speech transcription drives the composition itself ‚ÄĒ distinct from `189-voice-scene`'s keyword-switch and `345-speech-melody`'s *typed* text] + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [Web Speech ASR + deterministic phoneme‚Üípitch engine + sample-accurate look-ahead scheduler + accretive loop-voice memory + SVG render = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Steve Reich *Different Trains*/*It's Gonna Rain* ‚ÄĒ speech-melody; Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* ‚ÄĒ language‚Üíresonance]; **#5 soft/honest** ‚ÄĒ the ASR-wave bind is ~3 months, not <14 days, so not claimed as a clean 5). Degrades fully: no Web Speech API (iOS/Firefox) ‚Üí typed-text fallback runs the same mapping; an auto-demo "speaks" a seeded incantation from frame one so the silent 06:30 glance always shows + hears the accreting canon. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG + Web Speech API ‚ÄĒ mic is analysis-only, no recording/upload/network, no secrets; imports the existing read-only `@/lib/browser/speech-recognition` util). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`571-the-withholding`** (music you can only hear by staying silent ‚ÄĒ mic as an *inverse* gate, a conceptual/critical piece on attention-as-cost; Cage *4'33"*/Christine Sun Kim ‚ÄĒ LOST: strongest pure concept but a quiet-room/"imagine the silence" demo is less glance-legible; resurrect to open the missing conceptual lane) + **`572-orrery-tunings`** (turn/tilt your phone to tune into a just-intonation harmonic sky ‚ÄĒ gyro ‚Üí raw WebGL2 aurora; La Monte Young *Dream House*/Oliveros ‚ÄĒ LOST: lowest ambition 2/5, adjacent to existing soundfield/tilt/JI rooms + flagged FBM frame-drops on iPad) banked IDEAS ¬ß411. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 447/447 pages, `/dream/570-spoken-spell` 5.68 kB / 109 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no mic/audio in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycle 410 shipped `569-kids-ember-keeper`; below.)*

- **[/dream/570-spoken-spell](/dream/570-spoken-spell)** ‚ÄĒ Spoken Spell ūüó£ÔłŹ‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 411. **For**: adult / live-performance / language-as-music. Speak and your live words become a self-layering musical incantation ‚ÄĒ each word's letters map to a D-pentatonic pitch, finished phrases freeze into looping ostinati, so the canon thickens the longer you speak and you hear your own sentence inside it. Web Speech API (live ASR) ‚Üí deterministic phoneme‚Üípitch + look-ahead scheduler ‚Üí SVG word-river that glows each word as it sounds. Voice input (NOT a finger), SVG (NOT the banned three.js/Canvas2D/WebGPU). Typed-text fallback + seeded auto-demo for iOS/Firefox/silent glances. Refs: Steve Reich *Different Trains*; Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room*; the 2026 in-browser ASR wave. Design notes: `src/app/dream/570-spoken-spell/README.md`

## (Cycle 410 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`569-kids-ember-keeper`**: *a glowing creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and grows a genuinely bigger, differently-shaped body each day a child comes back ‚ÄĒ and never resets to zero.* The lab's **FIRST cross-session persistent state** in 569 prototypes (grep-verified: no prior dream piece writes a creature/world to `localStorage` and reloads it across visits/days) ‚ÄĒ the directest answer to the **JURY 2026-06-12 #6**: *"518-living-ember is the one kids piece with memory that rewards return across days ‚ÄĒ extend THAT: a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow, instead of another 90-second glow toy."* The body is not stored as pixels or a model file ‚ÄĒ it is **regrown from a saved "genome"** (`genome.ts`, `localStorage` key `resonance.ember-keeper.v1`) every load. The genome **only ever accumulates**: `visits`, `distinctDays`, learned pentatonic `palette`, and an append-only list of growth `tokens`. **Day-aware growth** (the big visible change): on load it compares stored `lastVisitDay` to `new Date().toDateString()`; a new calendar day adds a big glowing **limb** placed on a golden-angle (phyllotaxis) spiral ‚ÄĒ so today's creature is visibly bigger than yesterday's. Within a day, humming/petting adds small permanent **fronds** + brightens the ember. **Deterministic regrowth**: each token seeds a `mulberry32` PRNG so the same genome always regrows the same body (limbs never jump between loads ‚ÄĒ D'Arcy Thompson made literal). **Voice feeding**: mic ‚Üí autocorrelation pitch detection (Chris Wilson method, `pitch.ts`) ‚Üí quantized to C-major pentatonic (nothing ever wrong) ‚Üí the degree is echoed back softly + saved to the palette; the **mic is analysis-only** (dead-end `AnalyserNode`, never recorded/stored/transmitted ‚ÄĒ only the derived integer degree persists). **three.js** render; kids-safe `gain ‚Üí lowpass(8 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10, 20:1) ‚Üí destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext in the Wake gesture (iOS unlock). **For the 06:30 hands-free review** (the reviewer can't wait a real day): a fresh device with empty storage SEEDS a believable history ‚ÄĒ **5 visits across 4 days, a 5-note palette, 10 growth tokens (4 day-limbs + 6 fronds)** ‚ÄĒ so the glance always shows a rich, many-limbed creature breathing from frame one and singing on wake; and a clearly-secondary **ūüĆô next-day** button TIME-TRAVELS so Karel can watch a brand-new limb sparkle into place on demand, in seconds. **mic-voice + tap INPUT** (off-glass core ‚ÄĒ NOT the jury-flagged finger-on-glass default) **+ three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [3√ó in the rolling-10, nudging the ban], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) ¬∑ **cross-session-persistent procedural-morphology TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics‚Üídrone ‚ÄĒ the banned meta-technique) ¬∑ **companion/relationship/growth VIBE** (NOT a calm-sensory 90-second glow toy ‚ÄĒ it rewards *returning*, the jury's exact #6 ask). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 first-ever cross-session persistent state [grep-verified lab-first] + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [autocorrelation pitch + accumulating-genome persistence engine + deterministic phyllotaxis morphology + three.js render + Web Audio = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Tamagotchi (Maita/Bandai 1996) ‚ÄĒ lives in the device & rewards returning; Steve Grand's *Creatures* (1996) ‚ÄĒ accumulating internal state drives outward form; D'Arcy Thompson *On Growth and Form* (1917) ‚ÄĒ golden-angle limb placement taken directly] + #4 multi-cycle Ember spine cycle 1; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ no <14-day bind, cs.SD still server-ML, said plainly; the dive confirmed the live thread [Niantic Peridot generative-AI creatures, the rctAI "AI pets" wave]). Graceful degradation on both axes: mic-denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + tap-to-pet still grows; WebGL-fail ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a DOM/CSS orb with one petal per token. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic + Web Audio + three.js ‚ÄĒ no network, no secrets). No new npm deps (three already installed). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept ‚ÄĒ *a creature genuinely different each day you return* ‚ÄĒ via what evolves); siblings **`570-kids-ember-song`** (the song-memory take: hummed phrases append to a persistent library, woven into a longer/richer piece each return ‚ÄĒ WebGL2 luminous strands; LOST: payoff is audible/abstract, least glance-legible at a silent review ‚ÄĒ the biggest *concept*, resurrect for a music-forward fire) + **`571-kids-ember-nest`** (the accumulating-world take: each visit plants a persistent SVG cut-paper flower/star/friend ‚Üí a fuller world + denser additive chord; LOST: closest to the existing `116-kids-bloom-garden` self-seeding garden + another SVG nudges the 4√ó ban) banked IDEAS ¬ß410. Extends Karel's loved companion/embodied lane (`234-kids-hand-creature`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `217-dance-avatar`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). Build-verified (`npm run build`), not browser-verified (no audio/WebGL in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycle 409 shipped `568-conductor-hands`; below.)*

- **[/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper](/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper)** ‚ÄĒ Ember Keeper ūüĒ•ūüź£. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 410. **For**: kids (4+) / companion / cross-day memory. A glowing creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and grows a genuinely bigger, differently-shaped body each day you come back ‚ÄĒ and never resets. The lab's first cross-session persistent state: the body is regrown from a saved `localStorage` genome that only accumulates; a new calendar day adds a phyllotaxis limb, humming/petting adds fronds. Hum to feed it (analysis-only mic ‚Üí pentatonic), tap to pet, ūüĆô time-travel to watch it grow. three.js (NOT the banned SVG/Canvas2D/WebGPU); off-glass voice input. The jury's #6 ("a creature genuinely changed tomorrow") answered literally. Refs: Tamagotchi (1996) / Steve Grand *Creatures* / D'Arcy Thompson *On Growth and Form*. Design notes: `src/app/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper/README.md`

## (Cycle 409 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`568-conductor-hands`**: *raise both hands to the camera and conduct two incommensurable tempi ‚ÄĒ your **left hand beats one voice, right hand the other**; the system snaps the two tempi to the nearest irrational ratio (‚ąö2, ŌÜ, e/2, ŌÄ/2) so the two consonant voices drift through every phase relationship and can **NEVER share a downbeat** ‚ÄĒ metric dissonance you feel in your own arms.* **Cycle 2 of the polytempo spine** (`514-polytempo-loom` = cycle 1, the autonomous 5-voice loom the **JURY 2026-06-12 #1 named: "take it to cycle 2 AND chase a 4/5"**, and #4: *"514 had no embodiment ‚ÄĒ build the SECOND time-tension piece where gestures set incommensurable tempi"*). Where 514 was set *for* you, 568 you *conduct*: **MediaPipe-Hands beat-extraction** (`tracking.ts`) tracks each wrist's vertical motion, fires a downbeat at the bottom of each conducting stroke (velocity zero-crossing down‚Üíup, 150 ms debounce), and averages the last 3 inter-beat intervals ‚Üí that hand's tempo (clamped 37‚Äď300 BPM). The **incommensurability lock** (`snapToIrrational`): voice A = your gestured base period; voice B is forced to `periodA / ratio` where ratio is the irrational *nearest in log-space* to what you actually gestured ‚ÄĒ you choose roughly the spread, the math guarantees the pulses are non-periodic against each other. **Web Audio** (`audio.ts`): two warm pluck voices (triangle + octave sine, fast envelope) playing the same D-pentatonic cell (voice B up a perfect fifth ‚ÄĒ consonant, distinguishable), each on its OWN sample-accurate **"Tale of Two Clocks" look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms pump, `start(t)` 120 ms ahead); master `gain ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10 dB, 20:1) ‚Üí destination` limiter; AudioContext in the Start click (iOS unlock). **three.js** (`render.ts`): a Nancarrow **phase-space** ‚ÄĒ two emissive markers orbit their rings (one revolution per beat-period) tracing a **Lissajous ribbon that NEVER closes** because the ratio is irrational (the visible proof they never realign); each marker flashes on its scheduled beat; violet=voice A, amber=voice B, dark indigo field. **camera hand-tracking INPUT** (off-glass ‚ÄĒ the directest dodge of the jury's 7√ó finger-on-glass ban, and the freshest input vs the last 4 cycles: mic @406, audio-file @405/407, shake @408, tilt @404) **+ three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [rolling-10 4√ó ‚Üí BANNED], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) ¬∑ **conducting-gesture‚Üítempo‚Üípolytempo-scheduler TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics‚Üídrone ‚ÄĒ the banned meta-technique) ¬∑ **embodied/cerebral-rhythmic/Nancarrow VIBE** (the directest literal answer to jury #4 "two gestures set incommensurable tempi"). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [MediaPipe beat-extraction + irrational-lock + dual look-ahead schedulers + three.js phase-space = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Conlon Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* ‚ÄĒ the irrational-ratio canon IS the lock; Ligeti *Continuum/D√©sordre*; Reich phase pieces ‚ÄĒ but the irrational lock means resolution is mathematically impossible, "Reich phasing that can never close"] + #4 spine cycle 2 ‚ÄĒ the jury's exact ask; **#1 contestable** ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe Hands exists [234/258/287/302/419/524] but *gesture‚Üítempo* is a new cross-modal input, discounted honestly; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ no <14-day finding to bind, cs.SD still server-ML [the jury's own #5 call-out], said plainly). From frame one a silent auto-demo orbits two synthetic conductors at ŌÜ, so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the drift; camera-denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + two tap pads (fully playable). Camera/landmark data is **local only** (no recording, no upload, no network); **no API route, no `guard`**. No new npm deps (three already installed; MediaPipe via CDN dynamic import). Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`569-conductor-batons`** (two-thumb tap-tempo ‚Üí WebGL2 scrolling Nancarrow piano-roll, the cleanest + most legible ‚ÄĒ LOST on finger-on-glass + least embodied) + **`570-conductor-baton-motion`** (DeviceMotion baton ‚Üí three.js ‚ÄĒ LOST: device-motion repeats cycle 408's input) banked IDEAS ¬ß409. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 445/445 pages, `/dream/568-conductor-hands` 5.5 kB / 297 kB First Load [three.js + MediaPipe] prerendered static), not browser-verified (no camera/audio/GPU in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycle 408 shipped `566-kids-shake-band`; below.)*

- **[/dream/568-conductor-hands](/dream/568-conductor-hands)** ‚ÄĒ Conductor's Hands ūüęĪūüéľ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 409. **For**: adult / embodied / time-tension. Raise both hands to the camera and conduct two incommensurable tempi ‚ÄĒ left hand one voice, right hand another, each snapped to an irrational ratio so the two consonant pulses drift forever and never share a downbeat (metric dissonance in your own arms). Cycle 2 of the 514-polytempo-loom spine, made embodied. MediaPipe-Hands beat-extraction ‚Üí dual look-ahead schedulers ‚Üí three.js never-closing Lissajous. Off-glass camera input (NOT a finger), three.js (NOT the banned SVG/Canvas2D/WebGPU). Refs: Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* / Ligeti / Reich. Design notes: `src/app/dream/568-conductor-hands/README.md`

## (Cycle 408 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 orthogonal off-glass explorers. Ships **`566-kids-shake-band`**: *shake the tablet like a maraca and a whole Brazilian **batucada** band dances and plays back in time ‚ÄĒ gentle jiggles ring the chocalho shimmer, big arm-swings bring in the surdo bass drum; five glowing 3D characters bounce + flash on a darkened stage, one per instrument.* The child's **whole arm is the instrument** ‚ÄĒ off-glass, embodied, joyful. **DeviceMotion shake-onset detection** (`accelerationIncludingGravity` magnitude ‚Üí adaptive threshold 1.4√ó rolling-avg, 3.5 m/s¬≤ floor, 80 ms refractory; iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap) with intensity tiers (‚Čą3/9/18 m/s¬≤) selecting which of **five from-scratch synth percussion voices** fires (surdo sine 130‚Üí42 Hz pitch-drop ¬∑ caixa bandpass-noise+triangle snap ¬∑ repique sine+transient ¬∑ agog√ī three sine partials ¬∑ chocalho soft noise grain). A look-ahead **92-BPM groove bed** plays a real 16-step batucada pattern always-on so the child's shakes layer on a musical bed. **three.js stage** ‚ÄĒ five emissive `IcosahedronGeometry` characters with per-character `PointLight` flash + spring-physics bounce. Master `gain ‚Üí lowpass(7.5 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10 dB, 20:1) ‚Üí destination` brick-wall limiter so even a hard slam can't spike a child's ears. Zero-permission CSS auto-demo bounces the orbs from frame one (audio waits for Start); motion-denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + pointer-drag-velocity fallback. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [DeviceMotion onset + percussion pool + groove scheduler + three.js stage + drag fallback = 5] + #3 named ref that DRIVES it [Brazilian batucada bloco ‚ÄĒ shake-intensity tiers ARE the ensemble's dynamic hierarchy; also Evelyn Glennie's whole-body rhythm]; **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ accelerometer input [417/553] and synth percussion both exist; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the dive's bind was to the jury-flagged camera-body lane, deliberately avoided). **device-motion / shake INPUT** (off-glass ‚ÄĒ distinct from BOTH recent kids inputs: mic @406, tilt @404; the directest finger-reflex dodge) **+ three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [rolling-10 4√ó ‚Üí BANNED], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) ¬∑ **accelerometer-onset‚Üípercussion-pool TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics‚Üídrone ‚ÄĒ the banned meta-technique) ¬∑ **energetic/celebratory/embodied VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids ‚ÄĒ answers jury #6 directly). **Ideal for Karel's 06:30 mobile review ‚ÄĒ he can literally shake his phone to play.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`565-kids-sing-choir`** (mic-sing live pitch ‚Üí WebGL2 particle creatures ‚Üí Jacob Collier-style 4-voice live vocal harmonizer; the biggest *concept* ‚ÄĒ LOST on the diversity gate: mic repeats cycle 406's input) + **`567-kids-color-garden`** (rear-camera dominant-color ‚Üí WebGL2 instanced glowing plants ‚Üí Scriabin hue‚Üípitch garden the real world grows; LOST: camera-color adjacent to `368-rainbow-quest` + the trodden camera lane + lighting-fragile) banked IDEAS ¬ß408. Extends Karel's loved rhythm/device-play lane (`98-kids-drum-circle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `169-kids-marble-run`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 444/444 pages, `/dream/566-kids-shake-band` 5.07 kB / 293 kB First Load [three.js] prerendered static), not browser-verified (no accelerometer/audio/WebGL in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycle 407 shipped `564-piano-splat-cathedral`; below: cycle 405's `557-piano-splat-galaxy`.)*

- **[/dream/566-kids-shake-band](/dream/566-kids-shake-band)** ‚ÄĒ Kids Shake Band ūü•Ā. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 408. **For**: kids (4+) / off-glass / embodied rhythm. Shake the tablet like a maraca ‚Üí a Brazilian batucada band of five glowing 3D characters dances and plays percussion in time; gentle jiggle = chocalho shimmer, hard swing = surdo bass drum. DeviceMotion shake-onset ‚Üí synth percussion pool + 92-BPM batucada groove bed; three.js stage; brick-wall limiter (safe sounds). Off-glass input (NOT a finger), three.js (NOT the banned SVG/Canvas2D/WebGPU). Ref: Brazilian batucada bloco / Evelyn Glennie. Design notes: `src/app/dream/566-kids-shake-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 405 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`557-piano-splat-galaxy`**: *every note Karel plays BIRTHS a bloom of glowing **Gaussian splats** ‚ÄĒ his real Welcome Home piano accretes into a living galaxy of light you orbit, where transients are bursts, sustained notes are slow drifting nebula, and pitch paints the color.* The lab's **FIRST Gaussian-splatting renderer** in 553 prototypes (grep-verified: the only prior "splat" is fluid-force injection in `119-poem-fluid`, a categorically different thing). Spectral-flux **onset detection** on his real piano (fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-‚Ä¶`, with an always-on synth-piano fallback) fires bursts of 80‚Äď300 camera-facing billboard quads with a radial Gaussian falloff `exp(-4¬∑r¬≤)`, additively blended (depth test off ‚Üí order-independent, no sort ‚Üí robust + glowing), spawned on a growing ring with outward shell velocities + curl-noise turbulence + galactic shear, so a ~13k-splat pool swirls into arms tracing the phrasing. **THE FIRST HONEST 4/5 IN ~8 JURIES** ‚ÄĒ `ambition: #1 never-used technique (Gaussian-splat / point-based radiance-field rasterization) + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (real-audio fetch+FFT+onset/pitch detection / generative bloom particle system / WebGL2 additive splat rasterizer + orbit cam) + #3 named refs (Kerbl/Kopanas/Leimk√ľhler/Drettakis "3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering," SIGGRAPH 2023; the 2026 in-browser-splatting wave; Refik Anadol volumetric data sculptures) + #5 binds a genuinely <14-day finding (BrightCoding "Run Gaussian Splatting in Your Browser with WebGPU," 2026-06-05, 7 days old; corroborated by arxiv cs.GR June 8‚Äď12 point-based-radiance-field papers + the DNE√óGracia 4DGS Amy May musical performance)`. Directly serves Karel's directive to use his **real Welcome Home recordings**. **audio-file INPUT** (off-glass ‚ÄĒ dodges the jury's 7√ó finger-on-glass ban) **+ WebGL2 splat-rasterization OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU ‚ÄĒ both banned at 4√ó; a wholly new rendering paradigm for the lab) ¬∑ **Gaussian-splat radiance-field TECH** (the sound is his RECORDED music driving a renderer ‚ÄĒ the exact inverse of the banned GPU-physics-sim‚Üídrone move) ¬∑ **volumetric/immersive/Anadol VIBE**. Auto-rotates + auto-blooms hands-free pre-Begin, so the 06:30 glance shows a living galaxy with zero setup. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`556-piano-splat-spectrogram`** (3D scrolling spectrogram solid ‚ÄĒ the legible/analytical variant) + **`558-piano-splat-body`** (a breathing "body of light," tightest bind to the 4DGS Amy May piece ‚ÄĒ lost as conceptually adjacent to `283-piano-isosurface`) banked IDEAS ¬ß405 as the alternate renderers for the new splat spine. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 441/441 pages, `/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy` 5.96 kB / 112 kB prerendered), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycle 404 shipped `553-kids-tilt-fountain`; below: cycle 403's `552-dream-house`.)*

- **[/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy](/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy)** ‚ÄĒ Piano Splat Galaxy ūüĆĆ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 405. **For**: adult / immersive / his-real-piano. **The lab's first Gaussian-splatting renderer** ‚ÄĒ Karel's real piano accretes into a swirling galaxy of glowing Gaussian splats you orbit; onsets bloom, pitch colors, phrasing draws the arms.
