References: Kerbl et al. "3D Gaussian Splatting" (SIGGRAPH 2023); the 2026 in-browser-splatting wave; Refik Anadol. The first honest 4/5 in ~8 juries (#1+#2+#3+#5). ## (Cycle 403 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`552-dream-house`**: *the xenharmonic lattice comes ALIVE ‚ÄĒ a self-composing La Monte Young "Dream House" that slowly walks the just-intonation / Bohlen‚ÄďPierce Tonnetz on its own, sustains a pure-ratio drone, drifts forever via the comma pump so it never returns home, and is audibly a different piece at minute 12 than minute 1.* **Cycle 2 of the Xenharmonic Drone spine** (`538-xenharmonic-lattice` = cycle 1, the static tap-a-Tonnetz piece the **JURY 2026-06-12 named: "make it a spine and it's the first 4"**). Where 538 was something you *tap*, 552 is a room you *leave running*: an autonomous walker steps the lattice every 4‚Äď8 s biased to unvisited nodes (the **syntonic comma 81/80** guarantees loops never reclose ‚Üí permanent drift), sustaining the nearest 2‚Äď6 nodes as a slow-crossfading **pure-ratio drone** (sine + odd partials + shimmer LFO, multi-second `setTargetAtTime` attacks). The headline is a genuine **long-form (~14-min) arc**: an 8-phase cycle smoothstep-interpolates **density** (2‚ÜĒ6 voices), a **drifting master lowpass** (700‚ÜĒ4800 Hz), a **¬Ī0.4-octave register breath**, and a **4-stop tuning migration** (5-JI‚ÜíBohlen‚ÄďPierce‚Üí19-EDO‚Üíback). **SVG Tonnetz** with a glowing comet-trail + accumulating visited-ghost dots makes the pilgrimage visible; HUD shows elapsed/phase. **none/autonomous INPUT** (the purest dodge of the jury's 7√ó finger-on-glass ban, and its #3 "leave-it-running / off-the-glass" dare) **+ SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU ‚ÄĒ both banned at 4√ó; NOT three.js which 545 just shipped) ¬∑ **JI-lattice-walk‚Üípure-ratio-drone TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics sim ‚ÄĒ the banned meta-technique) ¬∑ **La-Monte-Young / hypnotic-cerebral VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids). Zero permission, runs itself ‚ÄĒ the strongest 06:30 glance-safety of any recent piece; tap = optional "exhale." **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [walker + crossfading drone synth + long-form arc engine + SVG render = 4] + #3 named refs [La Monte Young & Zazeela *Dream House* / √Čliane Radigue / Euler Tonnetz / Bohlen‚ÄďPierce / Partch / syntonic comma] + #4 spine cycle 2 ‚ÄĒ the jury's exact ask; **#1 contestable** [first deliberate long-form >5min stateful piece, but 514/526 arguably already long-form ‚ÄĒ discounts honestly]; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ arxiv cs.SD June 5‚Äď12 had zero JI/microtonal papers, still server-ML; LIMITER arXiv 2507.08675 is July-2025, used as a *named ref* not a <14-day bind). Winner of a DEEP 3-steering fire; siblings **`550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage`** (voice-steered: autocorrelation pitch ‚Üí nearest-node pull ‚ÄĒ lost: detector flagged basic + less glance-robust) + **`551-tilt-pilgrimage`** (tilt-steered: iOS deviceorientation ‚Üí fifths/thirds drift bias + desktop tilt-pad ‚ÄĒ lost: needs permission + a real device) banked IDEAS ¬ß403 as the cycle-3 grab-the-wheel layers. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 439/439 pages, `.next/.../552-dream-house/page.js` prerendered), not browser-verified (no audio device in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycles 402 & 401 shipped `549-kids-song-friend` and `545-motion-loom` ‚ÄĒ see entries below.)* ¬∑ Earlier header (Cycle 400 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`541-kids-liquid-light`**: *a 4-year-old finger-paints a dark pool of living liquid light, and the liquid SINGS as it swirls.* A **WebGPU stable-fluids** (Jos Stam, SIGGRAPH 1999) solver built as a **kids sensory instrument** ‚ÄĒ drag injects swirling dye into a real GPU fluid sim (192¬≤ `rgba16float` grid, 28-iter Jacobi pressure solve, divergence-free projection), and swirl-speed‚Üílowpass brightness + vertical-position‚Üí**C-pentatonic** register (C3‚ÄďC5) make it sing, nothing ever wrong. **touch/drag INPUT + WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (0√ó in the kids rolling-10 ‚Üí the diversifying renderer; a Canvas2D curl-noise "lite fluid" fallback is baked in for WebGPU-absent iPads) ¬∑ **luminous / sensory / calm VIBE** ‚ÄĒ distinct from the recent joyful-awe (537) / prosocial (505) / aurora (500) / feeling-map (493) kids cluster. Extends Karel's loved fluid/particle/glow lane (`84-wave-fluid`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `236-particle-life-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). Always-on C2+G2 pad; kids-safe `gain ‚Üí lowpass(‚Č§8k) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí6 dB, 20:1) ‚Üí destination`; ghost-finger auto-demo swirls + sings from frame one. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems + #3 Stam 1999 / Dobryakov WebGL-Fluid lineage + #4 "Liquid Light" spine cycle 1; #1 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ GPU fluid exists; #5 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ cs.SD is server-ML). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; siblings **`542-kids-liquid-light-gl`** (WebGL2 ping-pong stable-fluids w/ vorticity confinement ‚ÄĒ lost: WebGL2 over-represented) + **`543-kids-liquid-light-flow`** (Canvas2D ~6500-particle advection ‚ÄĒ lost: redundant with the winner's own fallback) banked IDEAS ¬ß400. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 436/436 pages, `/dream/541-kids-liquid-light` 7.13 kB / 110 kB), not browser-verified (no WebGPU/audio in sandbox). ¬∑ *(Cycles 399 & 398 shipped `538-xenharmonic-lattice` and `537-kids-sky-murmuration` ‚ÄĒ see entries below.)* ¬∑ Earlier header (Cycle 397 ‚ÄĒ **adult** build ¬∑ WIDE, 3 divergent explorers. Ships **`532-vocoder-veil`**: *you sing or speak, and your words come out played by Karel's REAL Welcome Home piano ‚ÄĒ your voice as the shape, his recorded piano as the voice.* The lab's **FIRST channel vocoder** (grep-verified: `vocoder` 0√ó in built prototypes), a classic 16-band Homer-Dudley analysis/synthesis filterbank ‚ÄĒ the live mic (modulator) drives the per-band gains of Karel's actual piano recording (carrier, fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-‚Ä¶`), so the piano "talks" in your formants. **Directly serves Karel's standing directive to use his real Welcome Home recordings.** **mic-voice INPUT + WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer at 1√ó‚Üí2√ó) ¬∑ uncanny-intimate, responsive ‚ÄĒ dodges the rolling-10 banned "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE (the piano *responds* in real time) AND the 4√ó renderer trap (Canvas2D/WebGPU/SVG all 3√ó; ships on WebGL2). A no-permission vowel auto-demo (ah‚Üíee‚Üíoh‚Üíoo‚Üímm) makes the piano sing + the 16-rung ladder animate from frame one; degrades to a synth carrier if the fetch fails and a Canvas2D ladder if no WebGL2. The three WIDE explorers spanned WebGL2/three.js/audio-first, none pushing a 3√ó renderer to 4√ó. 2 siblings banked IDEAS ¬ß397: **`533-hollow`** (three.js comb-filter / phase-cancellation tension ‚ÄĒ "tension is *absence*", the jury-named untouched primitive; Lucier/Amacher) + **`534-third-ear`** (combination/difference *Tartini* tones ‚ÄĒ a melody that exists only inside your ear; audio-first; clean lab-first; Tartini/Amacher). ¬∑ *Previous (Cycle 396 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`529-kids-doodle-choir`**: *a 4-year-old draws a simple doodle; a real in-browser neural net (TensorFlow.js + DoodleNet) recognizes WHAT they drew; the drawing comes alive ‚ÄĒ animates and SINGS its own warm motif ‚ÄĒ and joins a growing choir of singing creatures.* The lab's **FIRST TensorFlow.js / ML-recognition piece** (grep-verified: 0√ó `@tensorflow`/`tfjs` across ~360 prototypes ‚ÄĒ the single cleanest unused *major* technique left), on Karel's **loved draw/paint lane** (100/104/152/153‚Ě§ÔłŹ), in a JOYFUL register that dodges the now-4√ó "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE AND the WebGPU 4√ó renderer trap. **finger-drawing INPUT + Canvas2D OUTPUT** ¬∑ TF.js DoodleNet (QuickDraw 345-class CNN) ‚Üí 8 storybook archetypes, each with its own animation + a C-pentatonic motif so nothing sounds wrong. A scripted ghost-finger **auto-demo bypasses the classifier** (draws + sings on load even if the model never loads); a no-ML **geometric heuristic fallback** keeps it playable offline. 2 DEEP siblings banked IDEAS ¬ß396: **`530-kids-sketch-garden`** (no-ML geometric stroke classifier ‚Üí WebGL2 glowing particle creatures ‚ÄĒ bulletproof offline; fold its glow into 529) + **`531-kids-drawing-band`** (same DoodleNet, but each doodle joins a tempo-locked 96-BPM groove ‚ÄĒ tied on ambition, lost on the saturated kids loop/band lane). ¬∑ *Previous (Cycle 395, adult WIDE):* Ships **`526-jazz-room`**: *a living, self-playing late-night jazz trio ‚ÄĒ walking upright bass, Bill Evans rootless piano comping, brushed drums ‚ÄĒ that performs a full arc (head ‚Üí piano solo ‚Üí bass solo ‚Üí trade-fours ‚Üí head-out) over an F Jazz Blues, with you free to "sit in."* The lab's **FIRST jazz piece** (grep-verified: zero jazz/swing/bebop/walking-bass folders in 350 prototypes) and an alternate dramatic arc to Resonance's psychedelic 6-phase journey engine ‚ÄĒ directly serving Karel's explicit **priority #4** (journey-engine alternatives: "jazz responsive"). **autonomous-arc INPUT + Canvas2D OUTPUT** ¬∑ swinging-warm-noir ‚ÄĒ dodges BOTH rolling-10 banned VIBE poles (solitary-never-resolves 4√ó AND tension-resolved-through-action 4√ó: a jazz arc simply *plays*, neither an empty drone nor a tension-puzzle). The three WIDE explorers spanned Canvas2D/SVG/WebGL2, deliberately NONE on the already-3√ó WebGPU. The trio plays itself from the first frame, so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a swinging, glowing scene. 2 siblings banked IDEAS ¬ß395: **`527-cipher-score`** (SVG type-text‚Üíliving-score, Messiaen letter-cipher) + **`528-market-veil`** (WebGL2 live-crypto‚Üíambient-drone ‚ÄĒ lost on a `502-atmosphere-veil` overlap + Binance US geo-block).))

- **[/dream/552-dream-house](/dream/552-dream-house)** ‚ÄĒ Dream House ūüõēūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 403. **For**: adult / leave-it-running / xenharmonic, hypnotic.

  **The xenharmonic lattice comes alive ‚ÄĒ a self-composing La Monte Young "Dream House" that walks the just-intonation Tonnetz on its own and is a different piece at minute 12 than minute 1.** Cycle 2 of the **Xenharmonic Drone** spine (extends `538-xenharmonic-lattice`; the JURY 2026-06-12 named 538: *"make it a spine and it's the first 4"*). An **autonomous walker** steps the 2-D lattice (u=fifths 3/2, v=thirds 5/4) every 4‚Äď8 s, biased to unvisited nodes; the **syntonic comma (81/80 ‚Čą 21.5¬Ę)** means loops never reclose, so the pitch drifts forever ("never returns home"). Sound = the walker's node + its 2‚Äď5 nearest neighbors held as a **sustained pure-ratio chord** at EXACT rational ratios (sine + 3rd/5th odd partials + a ~0.07 Hz detune shimmer LFO), all attacks/releases via `setTargetAtTime` (3‚Äď4 s) so chords never hard-start. **The long-form arc** (the headline): an 8-phase ~14-min cycle (gathering‚Üíascending‚Üíflowering‚Üítritave‚Üíradiance‚Üídissolving‚Üíreceding‚Üístillness) smoothstep-interpolates density (2‚ÜĒ6 voices), a drifting master lowpass (700‚ÜĒ4800 Hz), a ¬Ī0.4-octave register breath, and a 4-stop tuning migration (5-JI‚ÜíBohlen‚ÄďPierce‚Üí19-EDO‚Üíback) ‚ÄĒ so the harmonic world itself changes. **SVG Tonnetz** render: nodes glow via `feGaussianBlur`, a **comet-trail** polyline + accumulating dim visited-ghost dots make the journey visible; viewBox pans to follow the walker; rAF mutates SVG attributes directly (no per-frame React churn); HUD shows tuning, root ratio, voice count, **elapsed clock + phase word**. Optional **tap = "exhale"** (fade current chord, bloom a fresh region); doing nothing is the default. Master `gain ‚Üí drifting lowpass ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(20:1, ‚ąí10 dBFS) ‚Üí destination`; per-voice gain `0.55/voiceCount`, 8-voice hard cap; AudioContext in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG ‚ÄĒ no mic, camera, network, secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela, *Dream House*** (sustained just-intonation drone installation, 1993‚Äďpresent, MELA Foundation NYC) ‚ÄĒ primary; **√Čliane Radigue** (long-form drone); **Euler's *Tonnetz*** (1739); the **syntonic comma / comma pump**; **Bohlen‚ÄďPierce** (Bohlen 1972 / Pierce 1984); **Harry Partch**, *Genesis of a Music* (1949); LIMITER (arXiv 2507.08675, 2025) as a recent gamified-JI-interface reference. Born from RESEARCH ¬ß403 (the honest read ‚ÄĒ arxiv cs.SD June 5‚Äď12 2026 has zero JI/microtonal/pitch papers, still server-ML, so #5 is unclaimable; the jury named 538 to spine-ify and dared the "leave-it-running / off-the-glass" lane). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (walker + crossfading drone synth + long-form arc engine + SVG render = 4) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** multi-cycle (Xenharmonic Drone spine cycle 2 ‚ÄĒ the jury's exact ask). (**#1 contestable** ‚ÄĒ first deliberate long-form >5min stateful piece, but 514/526 arguably already long-form, so it discounts to 3/5 honestly. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ cs.SD is server-ML; LIMITER is July-2025; said plainly. No clean #1 in any steering approach ‚ÄĒ Web MIDI is in 12 files, tilt/voice well-used.) **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15) = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT 4√ó ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT 4√ó ¬∑ GPU-physics-sim‚Üídrone TECH 4√ó ¬∑ finger-on-glass INPUT 7√ó ¬∑ calm-sensory-kids VIBE 4√ó] ¬∑ picked(552) = [**none/autonomous INPUT** (off-glass ‚ÄĒ the purest dodge of the 7√ó finger reflex + the jury's #3 dare; "none" only 3√ó in window) ¬∑ **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU; NOT three.js which 545 just shipped) ¬∑ **JI-lattice-walk‚Üípure-ratio-drone TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics sim) ¬∑ **La-Monte-Young/hypnotic-cerebral VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every jury ban; takes the jury's #3 "leave it running, off the glass" dare head-on. **Love signal:** none directly applicable (cerebral drone lane); the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a DEEP 3-steering fire** (one living-Dream-House concept via three off-glass steering attacks): siblings `550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage` (voice-steered ‚ÄĒ autocorrelation pitch ‚Üí nearest-node pull; the most musical, lost: detector flagged basic + less glance-robust) + `551-tilt-pilgrimage` (tilt-steered ‚ÄĒ iOS deviceorientation ‚Üí fifths/thirds bias + desktop tilt-pad; the most physical, lost: needs permission + a real device) banked IDEAS ¬ß403 as the cycle-3 grab-the-wheel layers. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only the winner ‚ÄĒ exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 29.5s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (439/439)`, `.next/server/app/dream/552-dream-house/page.js` prerendered), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio device in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: whether minute 12 *perceptually* differs from minute 1 over a real 14-min listen (the arc is structurally sound; HUD phase-word is the short-glance crutch); long-run gain/limiter interaction over 20+ min (mathematically capped, not stress-tested); iOS AudioContext suspend on screen-lock (`ctx.resume()` tap-to-resume not yet wired ‚ÄĒ the builder's flagged risk); extreme octave-folded frequencies at far lattice positions (clamped, perceptual balance unauditioned). Because it's fully autonomous with zero permission, the 06:30 glance reliably shows a drifting, glowing, singing pilgrimage with no setup.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/552-dream-house/README.md`

- **[/dream/541-kids-liquid-light](/dream/541-kids-liquid-light)** ‚ÄĒ Liquid Light ūüíß‚ú®. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 400. **For**: kids (4+) / iPad / sensory, calm.

  **A 4-year-old finger-paints a dark pool of living liquid light ‚ÄĒ and the liquid SINGS as it swirls.** Drag a finger and you inject swirling colored dye into a *real fluid simulation*; the speed and direction of the swirl drive a warm, ever-evolving pentatonic wash. No goal, no words, no wrong move ‚ÄĒ infinite calm sensory play. The primary renderer is a real-time **stable-fluids (Jos Stam, SIGGRAPH 1999)** solver running entirely on the GPU via **WebGPU compute shaders (WGSL)**: a velocity field + colored dye field on a 192√ó192 `rgba16float` grid, stepped each frame through add-forces (finger impulse + Gaussian dye injection) ‚Üí semi-Lagrangian advect velocity ‚Üí divergence ‚Üí **28-iter Jacobi pressure solve** (ping-pong) ‚Üí subtract-gradient (divergence-free projection) ‚Üí advect dye, then a full-screen-triangle render pipeline tone-maps the dye to luminous glow on dark. **Sonification:** swirl-speed ‚Üí lowpass brightness + simultaneous voice count; vertical position ‚Üí **C-major pentatonic** register (C3‚ÄďC5, nothing ever wrong); additive triangle/sine wash with `setTargetAtTime` glides; always-on C2+G2 breathing pad (never silent); kids-safe master `gain ‚Üí lowpass(‚Č§8 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí6 dB, 20:1 brick-wall) ‚Üí destination`; AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock; `window.AudioContext || webkitAudioContext`). **Always-on auto-demo:** a hands-free "ghost finger" wanders a Lissajous path injecting dye + sound from frame one (cancels on first pointer-down, resumes after ~4 s idle) so the 06:30 glance always shows swirling, singing light. **Graceful degradation:** `navigator.gpu` missing / adapter-device-context failure ‚Üí a Canvas2D curl-noise **"lite fluid"** (a few thousand additively-blended dye particles over a fading dark trail) + a `text-rose-300` "Playing in lite mode ‚ú®" notice ‚ÄĒ still swirls, still sings (this is the safety net for iPads where Safari WebGPU is recent/uneven). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas ‚ÄĒ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps.**

  References: **Jos Stam, "Stable Fluids," SIGGRAPH 1999** (the advection + Jacobi pressure-projection method implemented here); lineage note to **Pavel Dobryakov's WebGL-Fluid-Simulation** (the luminous dye-on-dark interaction, reimplemented on raw WebGPU compute). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß400** (the dive's honest read ‚ÄĒ cs.SD this week is server-side ML so #5 is unclaimable, and a grep audit confirmed tension/time/tuning + the easy kids #1s are spent at 540 prototypes; the actionable pivot is "the biggest love-aligned sensory lane on the scarcest kids renderer"). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (WebGPU stable-fluids solver + Canvas2D fallback fluid + swirl‚Üípentatonic sonification engine + ghost-finger auto-demo = 4) + **#3** named ref (Stam 1999 / Dobryakov) + **#4** multi-cycle ("Liquid Light" spine cycle 1 ‚ÄĒ cycle 2: two-finger dye-mixing duet + a longer-form settling pool). (**#1 NOT cleanly claimed** ‚ÄĒ GPU fluid already exists in the lab; the fresh element is *a WebGPU-compute fluid as a kids sensory instrument* ‚ÄĒ a context/audience, not a 0√ó primitive ‚ÄĒ honest. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ cs.SD is server-ML; said plainly.) **Diversity** `banned/over-rep (kids rolling-10)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT trending toward 4√ó (505/493/489)] ¬∑ picked=[**touch/drag INPUT** (the core kids verb) ¬∑ **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (0√ó in the kids window ‚Üí the diversifying renderer; Canvas2D fallback only when WebGPU absent) ¬∑ **GPU stable-fluids ‚Üí swirl-driven-pentatonic TECH** (not a roughness/DSP-primitive farm) ¬∑ **luminous/sensory/calm VIBE** ‚ÄĒ distinct from the recent joyful-awe/prosocial/aurora/feeling-map cluster]` ‚ÄĒ no over-represented tag in the picked set. **Love signal:** directly extends Karel's loved fluid/particle/glow lane (`84-wave-fluid`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `236-particle-life-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ); additive ‚ÄĒ the kids/ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a kids DEEP 3-renderer fire** (one "singing liquid light" concept on three renderers): siblings `542-kids-liquid-light-gl` (WebGL2 ping-pong stable-fluids with vorticity confinement + cheap bloom ‚ÄĒ complete + clean, lost on the diversity audit: WebGL2 at 2√ó in the kids window) + `543-kids-liquid-light-flow` (Canvas2D 56√ó56 velocity grid + ~6500 additive particles + curl-noise ambient ‚ÄĒ best legibility/compatibility, lost as essentially the winner's own fallback) banked IDEAS ¬ß400. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only the winner ‚ÄĒ exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 36.6s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (436/436)`, `/dream/541-kids-liquid-light 7.13 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static; one real ESLint fix on build: a local named `module` ‚Üí `shaderModule` per `@next/next/no-assign-module-variable`), **NOT browser-verified** (no WebGPU/audio device in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: whether the WGSL compute/render bind-group layout compiles + runs on a real WebGPU adapter (binding validation is strict; the Canvas2D fallback covers WebGPU-absent AND any first-run WGSL hiccup); iOS Safari WebGPU presence/stability on Karel's iPad (fallback covers absent); audio balance (pad vs wash) + limiter feel behind the ‚ąí6 dB brick-wall; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; ghost-finger pacing on a real device. The ghost-finger auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows swirling, singing light.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/541-kids-liquid-light/README.md`

- **[/dream/532-vocoder-veil](/dream/532-vocoder-veil)** ‚ÄĒ Vocoder Veil ūüéôÔłŹūüéĻ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 397. **For**: adult / live, intimate, voice-through-piano.

  **You sing or speak, and your words come out played by Karel's real Welcome Home piano ‚ÄĒ your voice as the shape, his recorded piano as the voice.** The lab's **first channel vocoder** (grep-verified: `vocoder` 0√ó in built prototypes ‚ÄĒ only an INDEX mention). A classic Homer-Dudley **16-band analysis/synthesis filterbank**: the live mic (modulator) is split into 16 log-spaced bandpass bands (120 Hz‚Äď7 kHz); each band's energy is followed (squared via a `WaveShaperNode` x¬≤ ‚Üí smoothed by a ~20 Hz lowpass) and that audio-rate envelope is connected straight into the `.gain` AudioParam of the matching band on the **carrier ‚ÄĒ Karel's actual piano**, fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (the confirmed WH track id used by 283/165) and looped. Highpassed noise is injected into the carrier so sibilants read. The piano *talks in your formants.* **Serves Karel's standing directive to use his real Welcome Home recordings** (carried open for many cycles). A **WebGL2 band-ladder** (16 glowing rungs) animates from the envelopes. **No-permission auto-demo:** a built-in vowel-cycle modulator (saw + peaking formant filters, ah‚Üíee‚Üíoh‚Üíoo‚Üímm) makes the piano sing vowels + the ladder animate from frame one. **Three-layer degradation:** mic denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` note + auto-demo continues; piano fetch fails ‚Üí `text-amber-300` note + a 6-voice synth carrier (still fully works); no WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D ladder. Master `gain ‚Üí lowpass(7.5 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí6 dB, 16:1) ‚Üí destination`; `setTargetAtTime` params; AudioContext in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (only network is the read-only same-origin `/api/audio/[id]` GET + the mic ‚ÄĒ no writes, no secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Homer Dudley** ‚ÄĒ the Bell Labs *Vocoder* (1939), the original channel vocoder ¬∑ **Wendy Carlos & Robert Moog** ‚ÄĒ vocoder on *A Clockwork Orange* (1972) ¬∑ **Imogen Heap** ‚ÄĒ "Hide and Seek" (2005), the intimate-vocoder model. Born from RESEARCH ¬ß397 (the dive's honest cs.SD meta-finding ‚ÄĒ this week's real-time music ML is server-side MAX/MSP + Python inference, so #5 is unclaimable ‚ÄĒ pivoted to the ambition manual's named-but-untouched, client-feasible DSP lane). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (channel vocoder ‚ÄĒ grep-verified lab-first, 0√ó built) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic analysis filterbank + Karel's-piano carrier bank + audio-rate envelope-follower modulation + WebGL2 ladder + vowel auto-demo = 5) + **#3** named refs above. (#4 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ single-cycle, opens a "his-real-music / cross-synthesis" spine. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ cs.SD this week is server-ML; said plainly.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 ‚Č•4√ó) = ["solitary-never-resolves" VIBE (520/518/514/513/502)] ¬∑ also-avoid (would‚Üí4√ó) = [Canvas2D/WebGPU/SVG OUTPUT, all 3√ó] ¬∑ picked=[**mic-voice INPUT** (fresh; not the touch/draw/tilt comfort reach) ¬∑ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer, 1√ó‚Üí2√ó; the three explorers spanned WebGL2/three.js/audio-first, none pushing a 3√ó renderer to 4√ó) ¬∑ **channel-vocoder TECH** (lab-first) ¬∑ **uncanny-intimate / responsive-playful VIBE** (NOT the banned solitary drone ‚ÄĒ the piano *responds* to your voice in real time)]` ‚ÄĒ dodges the banned VIBE AND the 4√ó renderer trap. **Love signal:** aligned via Karel's repeated "use my real recordings" directive + paths interest; additive ‚ÄĒ the ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer adult fire** (three orthogonal directions on three renderers): siblings **`533-hollow`** (three.js comb-filter / phase-cancellation tension ‚ÄĒ "tension is *absence*", the jury-named untouched primitive; a drone carved by two stacked feedforward combs, notches swept through a 2-D field, a cylindrical shell hollowing at analytic notch positions; Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* / Amacher; ambition 3/5 with a *scoped* #1) + **`534-third-ear`** (combination/difference *Tartini* tones ‚ÄĒ two sines whose difference traces a pentatonic melody that exists only inside the listener's ear; audio-first / minimal Canvas2D, with an honest phantom-only/reinforced A/B toggle; Tartini 1714 / Amacher; clean lab-first, ambition 2/5) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬ß397. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only the winner ‚ÄĒ exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 67s`, `/dream/532-vocoder-veil` prerendered static 6.48 kB / 109 kB; one TS fix on build: `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic for the `WaveShaperNode.curve`), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/mic/WebGL2/network in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: **envelope-follower scaling** (the x¬≤-smoothed band envelopes may sit ~0‚Äď0.1 and not drive the carrier gains to unity ‚ÄĒ the vocoder could read too quiet on a real voice without a scale factor; the hand-tuned vowel auto-demo likely masks this; the single most important live check); the `/api/audio/[id]` `decodeAudioData` + CORS behind the CDN (any exception drops to the synth carrier, still playable); mic permission + iOS AudioContext-in-gesture + `webkitAudioContext`; WebGL2 on old Android WebView (Canvas2D ladder covers it). The vowel auto-demo + synth carrier + Canvas2D fallbacks are the safety nets so absent mic/piano/WebGL2 never blocks the 06:30 glance.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/532-vocoder-veil/README.md`

- **[/dream/529-kids-doodle-choir](/dream/529-kids-doodle-choir)** ‚ÄĒ Doodle Choir ‚úŹÔłŹūüé∂. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 396. **For**: kids / iPad / draw-and-sing.

  **A 4-year-old draws a simple doodle with their finger; a real in-browser neural net recognizes WHAT they drew; the drawing comes alive ‚ÄĒ animates and SINGS its own warm little motif ‚ÄĒ and stays on the page as part of a growing, gently-looping choir of singing creatures.** "Quick, Draw! that sings." The lab's **first use of TensorFlow.js / any ML recognition** in ~360 prototypes (grep-verified: zero `@tensorflow`/`tfjs`) ‚ÄĒ the single cleanest unused *major* technique left, and an explicit counts-as-#1 in the ambition manual. TF.js loads via **CDN dynamic import** (`@tensorflow/tfjs@4/+esm`, `webpackIgnore` so Next never bundles it ‚ÄĒ the `493`/MediaPipe pattern, no npm dep); the drawing is rasterized to 28√ó28 grayscale and run through **DoodleNet** (yining1023 ‚ÄĒ a CNN trained on Google's Quick, Draw! 345-category dataset, ported to TF.js), and the top-1 class maps to one of **8 storybook archetypes** ‚ÄĒ sun (rises & pulses), fish (wiggles), bird (flutters), plant (sways), cloud (drifts), star (twinkles), critter (bounces), home (breathes) ‚ÄĒ each with a distinct warm motif in **C major / C pentatonic** so no two creatures ever clash. Each keeps its faint original stroke and loops its motif into the choir. A scripted **ghost-finger auto-demo** traces sun‚Üífish‚Üíbird‚Üíplant‚Üístar‚Üícritter‚Üícloud‚Üíhome on load, **bypassing the async classifier** (it assigns the archetype directly), so a hands-free 06:30 glance ALWAYS shows animated, singing creatures even if the model never loads. **Two-layer graceful degradation:** TF.js/model fail ‚Üí a hand-coded **geometric heuristic** (bounding box / ink density / aspect) keeps it fully playable with a `text-rose-300` "‚óą shape matching" badge; Canvas2D absent ‚Üí a notice. Master `gain ‚Üí lowpass(‚Č§7.8 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí6 dB, 20:1)`; `setTargetAtTime` envelopes; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; only network is the public TF.js CDN + DoodleNet model ‚ÄĒ no mic, camera, secrets, writes). No new npm deps.

  References: **Google *Quick, Draw!*** (Jongejan, Ha, et al., 2016) ‚ÄĒ the dataset/game this classifier descends from ¬∑ **DoodleNet** (yining1023) ‚ÄĒ the TF.js port of a QuickDraw-trained CNN. Born from RESEARCH ¬ß396 (the dive's honest cs.SD meta-finding ‚ÄĒ this week's audio ML is server-side diffusion only, so #5 is unclaimable ‚ÄĒ pivoted to the ambition manual's named-but-untouched **TF.js realtime-inference** lane, with DoodleNet supplying the model). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (TensorFlow.js realtime ML inference ‚ÄĒ grep-verified lab-first, 0√ó in ~360 prototypes) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (TF.js/DoodleNet classifier + heuristic fallback + Web-Audio choir + Canvas2D storybook + ghost-finger auto-demo = 4) + **#3** named refs above. (#4 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ single-cycle, opens a "drawing-comes-alive / browser-ML" spine. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ DoodleNet is foundational ml5-era, not a <14-day finding; said plainly.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 ‚Č•4√ó) = [WebGPU OUTPUT would‚Üí4√ó (520/518/502) ¬∑ "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE 4√ó (520/518/514/513/502)] ¬∑ picked=[**finger-drawing INPUT** (touch ~2√ó, not banned; the core kids verb + Karel's loved lane) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (2√ó‚Üí3√ó, not banned; not WebGPU, not the 3√ó SVG) ¬∑ **TF.js semantic sketch-recognition TECH** (lab-first; adds *meaning*, not a roughness/DSP-primitive farm) ¬∑ **joyful drawings-come-alive-and-sing VIBE** (NEITHER banned pole ‚ÄĒ pure accumulative delight, the deliberate JOYFUL swing like the loved 524)]` ‚ÄĒ dodges the banned never-resolves VIBE AND the WebGPU trap. **Love signal:** strongly aligned ‚ÄĒ Karel loves the draw/paint lane (`100-kids-paint-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `104-kids-mirror-draw`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `152-kids-star-paint`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `153-paint-compose`‚Ě§ÔłŹ); 529 is "your drawing comes alive" + the lab's first ML; additive ‚ÄĒ the ambition/diversity/kids gates governed. **Winner of a DEEP 3-approach kids fire** (one concept ‚ÄĒ draw‚Üírecognized‚Üícomes-alive-and-sings ‚ÄĒ via three classifier√órenderer√óform attacks): siblings **`530-kids-sketch-garden`** (no-ML geometric stroke classifier ‚Üí WebGL2 additive-glow particle creatures; Patatap / $1-Recognizer; ambition 2/5 ‚ÄĒ forgoes the TF.js #1; the bulletproof-offline approach, fold its glow into 529) + **`531-kids-drawing-band`** (same DoodleNet, but each doodle joins a tempo-locked 96-BPM groove on one shared lookahead scheduler; ambition 3/5 ‚ÄĒ **tied** with the winner, lost on the saturated kids loop/band lane) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬ß396. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only the winner ‚ÄĒ exit 0, `/dream/529-kids-doodle-choir` prerendered static; `webpackIgnore` confirmed on the TF.js CDN import, no `use*`-named helpers, `'use client'` present), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: the DoodleNet model URL is community-documented / best-effort (if it 404s the piece runs in heuristic "‚óą shape matching" mode ‚ÄĒ still playable; the auto-demo is unaffected); the 345-label list is from community docs not the model binary; whether a 4yo's rough 28√ó28 doodle classifies well enough that recognition feels *magic* vs *random* (all-pentatonic motifs mean a misread still sounds good, but the "it knew it was a bird!" delight is unverified); iOS AudioContext-in-gesture + `webkitAudioContext` on iOS <15; TF.js CDN reachability under the env network policy. The ghost-finger auto-demo + heuristic fallback are the safety nets so absent model/CDN never blocks the 06:30 glance.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/529-kids-doodle-choir/README.md`

- **[/dream/526-jazz-room](/dream/526-jazz-room)** ‚ÄĒ Jazz Room ūüé∑. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 395. **For**: adult / warm, swinging, live.

  **A living, self-playing late-night jazz trio ‚ÄĒ walking upright bass, Bill Evans rootless piano comping, and brushed drums ‚ÄĒ that performs a complete jazz arc over an F Jazz Blues, with you free to "sit in."** The lab's **first jazz piece** and an alternate dramatic arc to Resonance's psychedelic 6-phase journey engine (Karel **priority #4**: journey-engine alternatives ‚ÄĒ "jazz responsive" is named in the directive). A real **generative jazz-theory engine** (`jazz.ts`, 391 lines): F Jazz Blues 12-bar changes (F7‚ÄďB‚ô≠7‚Äď‚Ä¶‚ÄďD7‚ÄďGm7‚ÄďC7), **Bill Evans Type A/B rootless voicings** (3-7-9 / 7-9-3 shells) with distance-minimizing voice-leading, a four-beat **walking bass** (root‚Üí5th‚Üí3rd‚Üíchromatic-approach-on-beat-4), **2:1 swing**. A **lookahead scheduler** (25 ms interval, 120 ms horizon off `audioCtx.currentTime`) drives plucked-string bass, an FM Rhodes-ish comping voice, and brushed drums (filtered-noise brushes + sine-sweep kick + ride). An autonomous **arc state-machine** ‚ÄĒ head ‚Üí piano solo ‚Üí bass solo ‚Üí trade-fours ‚Üí head-out (~5‚Äď7 min), tempo/density shifting per phase so minute 3 ‚Č† minute 1. A **Canvas2D** smoky-club scene (deep brown-black, warm amber spotlight, three glowing bass/piano/drum presences that pulse + radiate rings on note onsets, drifting smoke, chord + phase HUD) plays from the first frame; optional **sit-in** keyboard (9 F-blues keys) adds a melody voice. AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock); `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (‚ąí6 dB / 20:1). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Bill Evans' rootless left-hand voicings** (the "Type A / Type B" 3-note shell voicings, documented by Mark Levine in *The Jazz Piano Book*) ‚ÄĒ the backbone of the piano comping ¬∑ **Jamey Aebersold play-along tradition** ‚ÄĒ the autonomous rhythm section you solo over. **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (generative jazz combo / rootless-voicing + walking-bass engine ‚ÄĒ grep-verified lab-first across 350 prototypes) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (jazz-theory engine + multi-voice synth + arc state-machine + Canvas2D viz = 4) + **#3** named refs above. (#4 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ single-cycle; seeds a "Genre Journey-Arc" spine. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ no <14-day bindable finding; frontier is server-ML + WebGPU, said plainly.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 ‚Č•4√ó) = [WebGPU OUTPUT would‚Üí4√ó (520/518/502) ¬∑ solitary-never-resolves VIBE 4√ó (520/518/514/513) ¬∑ tension-resolved-through-action VIBE 4√ó (508/505/500/496)] ¬∑ picked=[**autonomous-arc + optional-touch INPUT** ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (2√ó ‚ÄĒ not banned; the trio of explorers covered Canvas2D/SVG/WebGL2, none on the 3√ó WebGPU) ¬∑ **generative-jazz-voice-leading TECH** (lab-first) ¬∑ **swinging-warm-noir autonomous-genre-performance VIBE** (NEITHER banned pole) ¬∑ **ONE living trio you drop into CONCEPT**]` ‚ÄĒ dodges both banned VIBE poles AND the WebGPU trap. (Honest note: the JURY 2026-06-11 *text* banned Canvas2D when it was 6√ó in its window; it has since fallen to 2√ó in the governing rolling-10 ‚ÄĒ one jazz piece after that drought is diversification, not the renderer-migration the jury decried.) **Love signal:** no jazz/genre loves exist; `106-beat-cut`‚Ě§ÔłŹ + `172-loop-station`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (groove/rhythm) softly back an autonomous groove performance; additive ‚ÄĒ the diversity + ambition gates + Karel's #4 governed. **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer adult fire** (three orthogonal autonomous genre/narrative arcs on three renderers): siblings **`527-cipher-score`** (SVG type-text‚Üía-living-performed-score via a Messiaen-style letter‚Üípitch+duration cipher; the most delightful + the starved keyboard-text input, lost on ambition 2/5) + **`528-market-veil`** (WebGL2 live-crypto-markets‚Üían-evolving-ambient-drone; lost because its live-data sustained-drone concept *and `-veil` name* overlap `502-atmosphere-veil`, and Binance geo-blocks US ‚Üí would run SIMULATED for Karel) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬ß395. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 77s`, `/dream/526-jazz-room` prerendered static **7.19 kB / 110 kB First Load**, route in `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; one harmless `beatDur`-unused ESLint warning removed), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/Canvas in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: the FM Rhodes timbre + exact swing *feel* at 132 BPM (never heard ‚ÄĒ may need a `modGain`/swing micro-tune); the `chooseSmoothVoicing` metric uses note-index not true SATB voice assignment (voice-leading is approximately, not strictly, smooth); whether the 5-phase arc reads as a *performance* vs a loop on a phone glance; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock + a `ctx2d.scale()`-on-resize compounding the builder flagged. All-synthesis/no-network means it ALWAYS plays on load ‚ÄĒ the safety net for the 06:30 glance.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/526-jazz-room/README.md`

## (Cycle 394 ‚ÄĒ **kids** build ¬∑ DEEP, 3 renderers / one concept. Ships **`524-kids-hand-firebird`**: *hold up your hand and it becomes a glowing firebird of light ‚ÄĒ ~2000 GPU particles gather around your fingers, bloom wide and SING when you open your hand, and gather into a quiet ember when you close it.* The lab's **first MediaPipe Hands** (21-landmark hand-tracking; Pose existed at `493`, Hands never did) driving a **raw WebGL2** additive particle creature. **hand-tracking INPUT + WebGL2 OUTPUT** ¬∑ joyful embodied cause-effect (open=bloom=sing, close=ember) ‚ÄĒ deliberately swings OFF the never-resolves contemplative VIBE that hit 4√ó in the rolling-10, and off the last two kids cycles' hushed single-presences (513/518). WebGL2 is the scarcest screen renderer in the rolling-10 (1√ó), so this is the one pick that doesn't push an already-3√ó renderer to 4√ó; extends Karel's loved particle lane (`130`/`236`/`262`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). Scripted **virtual hand** auto-demo blooms + sings **on load** with no camera, and a Canvas2D glow fallback covers no-WebGL2/no-camera, so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a singing creature. 2 siblings banked IDEAS ¬ß394: **`523-kids-hand-puppet`** (Canvas2D shadow-dog ‚ÄĒ best literal-4yo legibility) + **`525-kids-hand-choir`** (SVG 5-fingertip choir ‚ÄĒ open=chord, close=unison-hug; cleverest concept, perf-flagged).)

- **[/dream/524-kids-hand-firebird](/dream/524-kids-hand-firebird)** ‚ÄĒ Hand Firebird ūüĒ•ūüēä. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 394. **For**: kids 4+ / joyful, embodied.

  **Hold up your hand and it becomes a glowing firebird of light ‚ÄĒ a creature of ~2000 additively-blended GPU particles that gathers around your fingers, blooms wide and SINGS when you open your hand, and gathers into a quiet ember when you close it.** The lab's **first MediaPipe Hands** (21-landmark hand-tracking ‚ÄĒ the lab used MediaPipe *Pose* once at `493-kids-feeling-forest`, but **never the Hands model**; grep-clean before this). A **raw WebGL2** particle system (2000 points, additive blending, comet trails via a fade-feedback pass) is attracted to the live hand landmarks: **openness** (avg fingertip distance from palm, normalized by hand span) ‚Üí bloom width + sung-voice trigger + brightness; **wrist height** ‚Üí pitch (up = higher, quantized to C-major **pentatonic** so nothing is wrong); **finger spread** ‚Üí scatter width + harmonics; **movement speed** ‚Üí sparkle/trail intensity. Warm pentatonic Web-Audio voice + an always-on detuned-sine ambient pad (never silent); master through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (‚ąí6 dB / 20:1) + ‚Č§8 kHz lowpass (kids-safe), all `setTargetAtTime` envelopes. A **scripted virtual hand** (fist‚Üíopen-bloom‚Üíclose‚Üíflutter, ~8 s loop) drives the firebird + voice **on load before any camera permission** and resumes after 3.5 s of no hand ‚ÄĒ so a 06:30 hands-free phone glance always shows a glowing, singing creature with zero interaction and zero camera. Camera denied / MediaPipe-CDN-fails / no WebGL2 ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D glow fallback that still sings + the auto-demo continues. AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; camera is local hand-landmark analysis only ‚ÄĒ never recorded/uploaded; no network beyond the MediaPipe model CDN, no secrets). **No new npm deps** ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe via CDN dynamic ESM import (the `493`/`444` pattern), raw WebGL2, no three.js.

  References: **Zhang, Bazarevsky, Vakunov, Tkachenka, Sung, Chang, Grundmann** ‚ÄĒ "MediaPipe Hands: On-device Real-time Hand Tracking" (arXiv 2006.10214; the 21-keypoint in-browser hand pipeline) ¬∑ the **luminous particle-creature lineage** ‚ÄĒ thatgamecompany *Journey* (cloth-light beings, 2012) + Memo Akten's particle-field works. **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (**MediaPipe Hands / HandLandmarker** ‚ÄĒ grep-verified lab-first; Pose exists at 493, Hands does not) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (hand-landmark tracking + WebGL2 GPU particle field + gesture‚Üípentatonic synth + virtual-hand auto-demo = 4) + **#3** named refs above. (#4 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ single-cycle; seeds a "Hand-as-creature / embodied" spine. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ cs.SD this week is server-ML only, said plainly.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 ‚Č•4√ó) = [one-solitary-presence / never-resolves contemplative VIBE (520/518/514/513)] ¬∑ picked=[**hand-tracking INPUT** (lab-first, non-touch/non-tilt) ¬∑ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (scarcest screen renderer in the rolling-10 at 1√ó ‚ÄĒ the only pick that doesn't inflate an already-3√ó Canvas2D/SVG to 4√ó) ¬∑ **hand-landmark‚ÜíGPU-particle TECH** (lab-first) ¬∑ **JOYFUL embodied / immediate-cause-effect VIBE** (NOT the banned never-resolves tag; a 4yo wants agency, and 513/518 were both hushed single-presences) ¬∑ **ONE creature that is YOURS / playful-agency CONCEPT**]` ‚ÄĒ dodges the banned VIBE. (Honest tension: the JURY 2026-06-11 *text* listed WebGL2-shader as banned, but that was when WebGL2 was 4√ó in its window; it has since fallen to 1√ó ‚ÄĒ one particle piece after that drought is diversification, not the renderer-migration the jury decried, and it's the loved-particle lane.) **Love signal:** **`130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ + `236-particle-life-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ + `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ** (loved GPU/particle fields) pull the firebird aesthetic directly; `234-kids-hand-creature`‚Ě§ÔłŹ + `104-kids-mirror-draw`‚Ě§ÔłŹ + `101-camera-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ back the embodied camera/hand lane; additive ‚ÄĒ the diversity + ambition gates + Karel's "massively bigger" steer governed. **Winner of a DEEP 3-renderer kids fire** (one concept "your hand becomes a singing creature", three renderers): siblings **`523-kids-hand-puppet`** (Canvas2D warm shadow-puppet DOG, thumb=jaw ‚ÄĒ the most legibly-a-creature for a literal 4yo; lost because Canvas2D was already 3√ó ‚Üí would be 4√ó, and it's the least "massively bigger" render) + **`525-kids-hand-choir`** (SVG five glowing fingertip-singers ‚ÄĒ spread = 5-part pentatonic chord, close = unison hug; the cleverest concept; lost because SVG was already 3√ó and the builder self-flagged a 60fps-via-React-state perf edge) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬ß394. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 108s`, `/dream/524-kids-hand-firebird` prerendered static **6.09 kB / 109 kB First Load**; the winner builder self-reported its folder tsc+eslint-clean with WebGL2 nulls guarded ‚ÄĒ no fix iteration needed), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/WebGL2/audio in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: the MediaPipe-Hands CDN import + WebGL2 particle pipeline have **never run on a real device** (model-load timing / `mediapipeTasks` export shape / a WebGL2 program-attribute mismatch are the likely first-run issues ‚ÄĒ the Canvas2D glow fallback + virtual-hand auto-demo fully cover camera/MediaPipe/WebGL2-absent; note **iOS Safari mid-2026 has no WebGPU but DOES have WebGL2**, so the full firebird should run on iPad); whether the openness/spread heuristics (tuned for an adult hand) read on a small child's hand; whether the sung voice reads as "the creature is singing" behind the limiter on phone speakers; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture + camera-permission UX on a child's tablet. The Canvas2D fallback + on-load virtual-hand auto-demo are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a glowing, singing creature.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/524-kids-hand-firebird/README.md`

- **[/dream/520-singing-dune](/dream/520-singing-dune)** ‚ÄĒ Singing Dune ‚õį. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 393. **For**: adult / meditative, long-form, physical.

  **One living dune of sand, under its own gravity. You tip the world; it avalanches and finds a new angle of repose ‚ÄĒ forever, never the same. Its motion is the sound.** The lab's **first actual continuum simulation**: a **WebGPU compute MLS-MPM** (Moving Least Squares Material Point Method) granular solid ‚ÄĒ 6k particles on a 128¬≤ grid, 5 compute passes/substep (clearGrid ‚Üí P2G ‚Üí gridUpdate ‚Üí G2P ‚Üí render), **APIC** affine-momentum transfer + a simplified **Drucker-Prager** plasticity (friction angle ~30¬į) so the sand *piles and avalanches* instead of splashing like water. Gravity comes from **device-orientation tilt** (gamma‚Üígravity-x, beta‚Üígravity-y; pointer-drag + arrow-key fallbacks on desktop ‚ÄĒ the mental model is "tip the world," never tap/paint). The dune's aggregate physics drives a **booming-dune granular drone** ‚ÄĒ the acoustic physics of singing dunes (frequency scales with grain shear, not dune size): kinetic energy ‚Üí drone density + filter cutoff; mean shear rate ‚Üí a low fundamental (72‚Üí108 Hz, JI stack 1:1/5:4/3:2/9:5/2:1) that bends up during an avalanche and sinks back at repose; avalanche impulses ‚Üí soft filtered grain bursts. **No harmonic progression, no goal, no win, no resolve button** ‚ÄĒ the drama is entirely in the sand's motion. `navigator.gpu` absent (incl. iOS Safari mid-2026) ‚Üí a **CPU MLS-MPM** fallback (2k particles, 64¬≤ grid, mpm88-style quadratic B-spline weights + APIC C-matrix, Canvas2D point render in umber‚Üíamber‚Üígold) that runs **on load** with no interaction, so a hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows a settling, sounding dune. AudioContext built in the **wake the dune** gesture (iOS unlock); `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (‚ąí6 dB / 20:1). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU; no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps (`@webgpu/types` is existing dev-only typing).

  References: **Hu, Fang, Ge, Qu, Stomakhin, Jiang** ‚ÄĒ "A Moving Least Squares Material Point Method with Displacement Discontinuity and Fracture" (SIGGRAPH 2018; the canonical MLS-MPM: APIC C-matrix, quadratic B-splines, Drucker-Prager) ¬∑ **Jiang/Schroeder/Teran/Stomakhin/Selle** ‚ÄĒ taichi `mpm88`/`mpm99` reference code (the compact MPM demos that distill the method) ¬∑ **Andreotti et al.** ‚ÄĒ "The song of dunes as a wave-trapped acoustic resonance" (PNAS 2008; the booming-dune acoustic physics). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (**MLS-MPM granular continuum** ‚ÄĒ the lab's first actual continuum/material-point simulation; honest caveat: "MLS-MPM" *appears* in `84-wave-fluid`'s README as a deferred-upgrade note but was **never implemented** there ‚ÄĒ 84 shipped a height-field; the substance is genuinely lab-first, and 520 is the long-deferred follow-through) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (MLS-MPM physics {P2G/grid/G2P/plasticity} + booming-dune granular synth driven by sim stats + device-orientation gravity input/render = 3‚Äď4) + **#3** named refs above. (#4 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ single-cycle; seeds a "Physical Matter / Granular" spine. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ cs.SD this week is server-ML only, said plainly.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-11:** **refuses resolution** ‚ÄĒ a state to inhabit, no solve button (provocation #2, the `490`/`513`/`514`/`518` un-resolving lineage); **extends the WebGPU pieces** (`486`/`502`) instead of migrating renderers again (provocation #3); is about **one presence** ‚ÄĒ one dune, never two negotiating parties (provocation #5). **Diversity** `banned=[Canvas2D + WebGL2-shader OUTPUT ¬∑ Plomp‚ÄďLevelt-roughness TECH ¬∑ touch INPUT ¬∑ resolve-through-action VIBE ¬∑ two-parties CONCEPT] ¬∑ picked=[**device-orientation/tilt INPUT** (fresh, non-touch ‚ÄĒ gravity, not tap/paint) ¬∑ **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (jury-blessed "extend these"; CPU Canvas2D is only the iOS fallback, not the chosen renderer) ¬∑ **MLS-MPM granular-continuum TECH** (lab-first, NOT roughness) ¬∑ **warm-desert-meditative / NEVER-resolves VIBE** ¬∑ **ONE-presence CONCEPT**]` ‚ÄĒ no banned tag. **Love signal:** **`84-wave-fluid`‚Ě§ÔłŹ** directly (its README deferred MLS-MPM as "a second-cycle upgrade" ‚ÄĒ 520 finally builds it) + `130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `236-particle-life-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (loved GPU/particle-field pieces); additive ‚ÄĒ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer adult fire** (three orthogonal "one presence" directions): siblings **`521-overpass`** (live ISS overhead-pass ‚Üí a lone JI voice rising/peaking/setting on a three.js star-dome; real-world-data + synthetic fallback ‚ÄĒ the cleanest resurrect) + `522-chladni-voice` (hum‚ÜíChladni standing-wave 60k-grain point cloud ‚ÄĒ lost because grep at curation found it overlaps existing `19`/`165-cymatics`, a concept-repeat the WIDE fan-out caught) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬ß393. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 43s`, `/dream/520-singing-dune` prerendered static **9.6 kB / 116 kB First Load**; one trivial TS-only fix ‚ÄĒ a `canvas` non-null alias for the nested closure), **NOT browser-verified** (no WebGPU/audio/device-orientation in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: the WebGPU pipelines have **never run on a real device** (shader-compile/bind-group errors are the likely first-run issue; the CPU MLS-MPM fallback fully covers WebGPU-absent/failed incl. iOS); P2G has racy concurrent f32 writes (no f32 atomics ‚Üí possible mass undercount in dense cells); the Drucker-Prager projection is approximate (no true SVD) so the angle of repose may drift from ~30¬į; whether the shear-driven drone *audibly* reads as "booming" behind the limiter; iOS DeviceOrientation permission firing from the wake gesture. The CPU fallback + on-load auto-settle are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a settling, sounding dune.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/520-singing-dune/README.md`

- **[/dream/518-kids-living-ember](/dream/518-kids-living-ember)** ‚ÄĒ Living Ember ūüĒ•. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 392. **For**: kids 4+ / warm, contemplative companion.

  **A single small warm ember that is simply here with you ‚ÄĒ no win, no fail, no resolve; hum to it and over many minutes it slowly becomes something new, carrying a trace of everything you gave it.** A real **WebGPU compute Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** field (512¬≤, ping-pong `r32float` storage textures, 3 WGSL steps/render frame, **core-only** features ‚ÄĒ `texture_2d<f32>` reads + `texture_storage_2d<r32float,write>` writes, no extensions) renders a warm ember (deep crimson ‚Üí amber ‚Üí gold ‚Üí soft white core) breathing on its own forever. Humming (mic RMS envelope, ANY voice ‚ÄĒ no pitch matching) raises the feed rate + deposits **permanent V-seeds** that bloom warm Turing fingers; memory is **monotonic** (`cumulativeHum` never decremented). Two banks of 4 **incommensurate LFOs** (irrational-ratio frequencies ŌÄ/e/‚ąö2/ŌÜ over a 300 s base period) drift the f/k rates through the Gray-Scott zoo so **minute 5 ‚Č† second 30** and it never loops back. A warm C3 pentatonic / just-intonation lullaby pad (C2 sub so it's never silent) mirrors the SAME drift on the CPU (audio params updated ~4√ó/s, **no GPU readback**); soft bell on each hum; **no cadence, no arrival, no resolve button.** `navigator.gpu` absent (incl. iOS Safari mid-2026) ‚Üí a warm CSS `radial-gradient` breathing ember driven by the same drift; no/denied mic ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a **mic-independent auto-demo** envelope. AudioContext built in the **wake it** gesture (iOS unlock); `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + ‚Č§8 kHz lowpass (kids-safe). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU; mic local-analysis only, never recorded/uploaded; no network, no secrets). No new npm deps (`@webgpu/types` is existing dev-only typings).

  References: **teamLab** ‚ÄĒ *Sketch Aquarium / Future Park* (a single creature you bring to life and keep company in a living world; the canonical kids-installation grammar ‚ÄĒ needs no explanation, rewards presence not solving ‚ÄĒ the dive's actionable read) ¬∑ **Brian Eno** ‚ÄĒ *Ambient 1: Music for Airports* (1978; long-form, non-repeating, no cadence, no arrival) ¬∑ **Pearson, J.E. (1993)** "Complex Patterns in a Simple System," *Science* 261 (Gray-Scott Turing patterns). Spiritual successor to **`490-disintegration`** ‚ÄĒ same "no solve button" courage, made warm. **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (voice/mic analysis + long-form memory/evolution engine + WebGPU-compute RD renderer + evolving lullaby synth = 4) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** multi-cycle (Companion/Presence spine, cycle 1). (#1 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ WebGPU/RD/long-form all exist in the lab individually; the fresh element is *a warm single-presence kids companion that never resolves*, a concept not a primitive ‚ÄĒ honest. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ cs.SD this week is server-ML only, said plainly.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-11:** **refuses resolution** ‚ÄĒ a presence to inhabit, no solve button (provocation #2, the `490`/`513`/`514` un-resolving lineage); **extends the WebGPU pieces** (`486`/`502`) instead of migrating renderers again (provocation #3, and dodges banned Canvas2D/WebGL2 AND the now-3√ó-and-climbing SVG); is about **one presence** ‚ÄĒ one creature, never two negotiating parties (provocation #5). **Diversity** `banned=[Canvas2D + WebGL2-shader OUTPUT ¬∑ Plomp‚ÄďLevelt-roughness TECH ¬∑ touch INPUT ¬∑ resolve-through-action VIBE ¬∑ two-parties CONCEPT] ¬∑ picked=[**voice/hum-mic INPUT** (fresh, non-touch) ¬∑ **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (2√ó under-represented + jury-blessed; dodges Canvas2D/WebGL2 + 3√ó SVG) ¬∑ **long-form evolving single-presence-with-memory TECH** (NOT roughness) ¬∑ **warm-companion / inhabit-a-presence / NEVER-resolves VIBE** ¬∑ **ONE-presence CONCEPT**]` ‚ÄĒ no banned tag; **diversity (SVG would be 4√ó) was the deciding lens** vs. the SVG sibling. **Love signal:** `262-aurora-particle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (warm glow palette) + `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `98-kids-drum-circle`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (embodied kids play); additive ‚ÄĒ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a DEEP 3-renderer kids fire** (one companion concept, three renderers): siblings **`517-kids-glow-friend`** (three.js soft metaball/halo creature with orbiting petal particles for remembered hums ‚ÄĒ the most legibly-a-friend for a 4yo and safest on iOS; lost only on the jury's "extend WebGPU" steer) + `519-kids-quiet-bloom` (SVG differential-growth / space-colonization organism that never prunes ‚ÄĒ lovely, but SVG is already 3√ó so picking it would make it the new 4√ó monoculture) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬ß392. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 95s`, `/dream/518-kids-living-ember` prerendered static **7.68 kB / 114 kB First Load**; two trivial TS-only fixes in the new WebGPU file ‚ÄĒ `writeTexture` typed-array generic cast + a `gpuCtx` null-narrowing alias ‚ÄĒ plus one typography bump), **NOT browser-verified** (no WebGPU/audio/mic in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: whether the WGSL pipelines compile + run on a real WebGPU device (`r32float` storage support / binding layouts may need a first-run tweak ‚ÄĒ CSS ember covers WebGPU-absent/failed, and **iOS Safari mid-2026 has no WebGPU so iPad shows the CSS ember**); the ~5‚Äď10 s RD warmup before Turing patterns appear; whether the slow drift *audibly* reads as evolution behind the ‚ąí6 dB limiter on phone speakers; whether a 4-year-old perceives the minute-to-minute morphology change (the math delivers it; a cycle-2 visual-milestone note); iOS AudioContext-in-gesture. The CSS-ember fallback + mic-independent auto-demo are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a breathing, evolving ember with sound.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/518-kids-living-ember/README.md`

- **[/dream/514-polytempo-loom](/dream/514-polytempo-loom)** ‚ÄĒ Polytempo Loom ‚ßó. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 391. **For**: adult / contemplative, structural.

  **Five voices on one pitch set, each running at a different irrational tempo ratio ‚ÄĒ they drift across one another forever and never land a shared downbeat; the only tension is metric.** All five play the same D-pentatonic melodic cell (across 2 octaves ‚Üí **zero harmonic tension**) on a soft bell/pluck synth, each scheduled by its own "Tale of Two Clocks" lookahead loop (25 ms interval, 120 ms ahead, sample-accurate off `AudioContext.currentTime`) at a fixed period set by ratios **1, ‚ąö2, ŌÜ, e/2, ŌÄ/2** ‚ÄĒ mutually irrational, so no two voices ever simultaneously return to beat 1. **No resolution, no solve button:** the optional "stir the loom" spread slider widens/narrows the mutual-drift *velocity* but preserves irrationality at every setting, so it never aligns. The visual is **inline SVG only** (no Canvas2D, no WebGL): a Nancarrow piano-roll loom ‚ÄĒ five colored lanes whose note-onset marks scroll at one px/sec rate, so faster voices show denser marks and the lanes drift into transient **moir√© near-alignments** that always disperse; a dashed "NOW" playhead, per-lane ratio tags + live BPM, marks dimming into the past, a brief glow on each fire. The loom animates from page-load via a silent simulated schedule, so a no-audio 06:30 phone glance sees the drift alive before any gesture; audio starts on **Begin** (AudioContext built in the gesture, iOS unlock). `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter; audio-fail ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, loom keeps drifting. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG ‚ÄĒ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Conlon Nancarrow** ‚ÄĒ *Studies for Player Piano*, esp. **Study No. 40 "Transcendental"** (a canon at the ratio **e:ŌÄ**) and his **‚ąö2 canons**, where the layers share no common period so a structural downbeat can never align; this is the interactive, eternal-loop counterpart to Nancarrow's fixed convergence-point pieces. Also **Amanous** (arXiv 2603.16890, Feb 2026 ‚ÄĒ Nancarrow + Xenakis + L-systems on a Disklavier; the dive's recent anchor) and **Callender, "Performing the Irrational"** (MTO 20.1). **Ambition 2/5**: **#1** never-used technique (irrational-ratio polytempo / metric-dissonance lattice ‚ÄĒ grep-verified lab-first; `nancarrow`/`polytempo`/`metric dissonance`/`polymeter` all 0√ó) + **#3** named references above. (#2 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ 1 audio source + 1 SVG renderer = 2 subsystems, honest. #4 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ single cycle; could seed a "Metric Dissonance / Time" spine. #5 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ no <14-day finding to bind; the metric-dissonance literature is mature, not freshly-published, said plainly.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-11:** puts tension in a **never-touched primitive ‚ÄĒ TIME** (provocation #1, explicitly NOT the banned 4√ó Plomp‚ÄďLevelt roughness engine ‚ÄĒ "tension you COUNT, not tension you hear beating"); **refuses resolution** ‚ÄĒ a state to inhabit, no solve button (provocation #2, the `490`/`513` un-resolving lineage continued); ships on **SVG**, the explicit anti-Canvas2D renderer (provocation #3); is about **one presence** ‚ÄĒ one drifting mechanism, never two negotiating parties (provocation #5). **Diversity** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (6√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-shader OUTPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ Plomp‚ÄďLevelt-roughness TECH (4√ó) ¬∑ touch INPUT (6√ó) ¬∑ resolve-through-action VIBE (~9√ó) ¬∑ two-parties CONCEPT] ¬∑ picked=[generative/none INPUT (no touch) ¬∑ SVG OUTPUT (dodges Canvas2D + WebGL2) ¬∑ irrational-polytempo / metric-dissonance TECH (lab-first, NOT roughness) ¬∑ hypnotic-eternal-NON-RESOLVING VIBE ¬∑ ONE-presence CONCEPT]` ‚ÄĒ no banned tag. **Love signal:** `267-spectral-drift`‚Ě§ÔłŹ + `236-particle-life-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (loved evolving-texture pieces) softly back the long-form-drift register; additive ‚ÄĒ the gates governed. **Winner of a DEEP‚ÄĒno, WIDE 3-explorer adult fire** (theme: one presence, never resolves, not on Canvas2D): siblings **`516-slow-presence`** (WebGPU Gray-Scott long-form one-presence field ‚ÄĒ the `490` successor, the lab's best #4+#5 5/5 candidate) + `515-two-tempos-one-body` (audio/haptic-only cross-modal polytempo) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬ß391. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 36.0s`, `/dream/514-polytempo-loom` prerendered **static 4.4 kB**), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: whether the five irrational tempi *audibly* read as distinct drifting streams vs. mush behind the 1.6 s bell decay; whether the cross-lane moir√© near-alignments are perceptible as the visual payoff (may want a denser mark window); a few-ms drift between the setTimeout visual flash and the AudioContext-scheduled note under load; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture. The silent-on-load SVG drift is the safety net so the 06:30 glance always sees the loom alive.

- **[/dream/513-kids-shadow-still](/dream/513-kids-shadow-still)** ‚ÄĒ Shadow Still ūüĆĎ. `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 390. **For**: kids 4+ / calm, contemplative.

  **Move in front of the camera to wake a sound; go *still* and the two copies of it line up and cancel into a hollow hush.** A continuous A2 (110 Hz) shimmer plays from Start, run through a feed-forward **comb filter** (the tone summed with a sub-millisecond `DelayNode` copy of itself, plus mild feedback). The child's **body-motion energy** ‚ÄĒ read by simple per-pixel **frame-difference** on an *offscreen* 64√ó48 canvas (NOT MediaPipe, NOT a visible canvas; the visible renderer is SVG only) ‚ÄĒ drives the comb's delay time: **moving** pushes the delay toward 10 ms (sparse notches, full flanging swoosh, the silhouette and its echo-shadow split apart) and **stillness** slides it to **1/(2¬∑f‚āÄ) ‚Čą 4.5 ms**, the exact anti-phase null for 110 Hz, so the comb teeth bite the fundamental and the tone **hollows toward near-silence** as a serif "hush‚Ä¶" fades in. The tension is **spectral** (notches / absence), explicitly **not** the over-used Plomp‚ÄďLevelt/Sethares beating-roughness, and it **resolves toward absence**, never a warm consonant bloom ‚ÄĒ a calm state to inhabit. The whole piece is **inline SVG**: a soft kid-silhouette + a blurred translucent **echo-shadow** that separates on motion and merges at stillness, a live **comb-teeth spectrum strip** (`|1 + g¬∑e^(‚ąíj2ŌÄfŌĄ)|` over 0‚Äď8 kHz) whose bars drop into deep notches as it hushes, an ambient glow that dims with stillness, and a motion meter. **No win, no score, no "wrong"** ‚ÄĒ just the space between moving and still. Always-on **auto-demo** (sinusoidal motion-energy, ~4.8 s) runs on load before camera permission resolves and resumes after 3.5 s idle, so a no-camera 06:30 phone glance still hears+sees the full move‚Üíhush arc; camera denied/absent ‚Üí readable `text-rose-300` notice + the demo keeps running. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + ‚Č§8 kHz lowpass (kids-safe); AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG; camera is local frame-diff only ‚ÄĒ never recorded or uploaded; no network, no secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Alvin Lucier** ‚ÄĒ *I Am Sitting in a Room* (1969) and the standing-wave/interference works, where physical space acts as a filter that dissolves a sound; this piece inverts that logic so *stillness* collapses the tone to a hush. **Pauline Oliveros** ‚ÄĒ *Deep Listening*, stillness and the space between sounds as a musical state to inhabit (not absence). **Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974)** / **Golan Levin** ‚ÄĒ frame-difference as the classic, ML-free webcam-as-controller. **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (comb-filter / phase-cancellation tension ‚ÄĒ grep-verified lab-first; phasing is `302`, xenharmonic is `276`, polyrhythm is `426`+12 ‚ÄĒ comb-notch was 0√ó) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (offscreen frame-diff motion detector + comb-filter synth + live SVG comb-spectrum + shadow/echo renderer + auto-demo = 4) + **#3** named refs above. (#4 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ single cycle; could seed an "Interference/Stillness" spine. #5 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ no <14-day finding to bind; this week's cs.SD/NIME had nothing client-implementable on interference, said plainly.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-11:** picks a **never-touched provocation-#1 primitive** (comb-notch, not the banned 4√ó roughness engine); **refuses the warm bloom** ‚ÄĒ resolves to *absence*, a state to inhabit (provocation #2, the lone-standout `490`'s missing successor); takes the **calm / anti-screen-frenzy** lane and inverts every loud tap-toy so *stillness makes silence* (provocation #3); is about **one presence** ‚ÄĒ a child and their own shadow, never two negotiating parties (provocation #5). **Diversity** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (6√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-shader OUTPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ Plomp‚ÄďLevelt-roughness TECH (4√ó) ¬∑ touch INPUT (6√ó) ¬∑ resolve-through-action VIBE (~9√ó) ¬∑ two-parties CONCEPT] ¬∑ picked=[camera-frame-diff-motion INPUT (fresh, non-touch) ¬∑ SVG OUTPUT (jury's fresh renderer; dodges Canvas2D + WebGL2) ¬∑ comb-filter/phase-cancellation TECH (lab-first, NOT roughness) ¬∑ stillness-hushes-to-absence VIBE (NOT warm-resolve) ¬∑ one-presence CONCEPT]` ‚ÄĒ no banned tag. **Love signal:** `101-camera-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ + `104-kids-mirror-draw`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (camera-as-embodied-kids-input) + `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (embodied calm play); additive ‚ÄĒ the gates governed. **Winner of a DEEP 3-approach kids fire** (one "vanish into your shadow" concept, three inputs): siblings `511-kids-ghost-bell` (tilt slides a ghost-twin over a bell; richest visuals but its overlap‚Üícancel mapping reinforces the fundamental at delay‚Üí0 ‚ÄĒ needs a mid-delay-null fix) + `512-kids-echo-shadow` (hum and your own voice combs against itself; the most magical premise but headphone-only / feedback-howl) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬ß390. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully`, `/dream/513-kids-shadow-still` prerendered static **4.34 kB**, warning-clean), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/audio in this sandbox) ‚ÄĒ unverified surface: whether the frame-diff threshold reads real camera contrast (first-guess; lower the divisor if it never exits demo on motion); whether the hush is *perceptibly* deep behind the ‚ąí6 dB limiter + 0.65 feedback floor (a comb null is partial ‚ÄĒ may want a wet-mix duck at stillness); the double-smoothing may feel sluggish though it suits a calm piece; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture; camera-permission UX on a child's tablet. The permission-free auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 glance always shows the full move‚Üíhush arc.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/513-kids-shadow-still/README.md`
