Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 explorers).

  Subsystems (‚Č•3): (1) **face tracking** (`face.ts`) ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe FaceLandmarker dynamically imported from jsDelivr CDN (no npm dep); one face/frame ‚Üí heavily EMA-smoothed (őĪ‚Čą0.15) head pose: planar position from eye centroid, depth from inter-ocular scale, yaw from eye asymmetry, pitch from eye-to-nose span. (2) **spatial audio** (`audio.ts`) ‚ÄĒ 6 soft drone voices at JI ratios (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 15/8, 2/1) over a warm A2 (110 Hz) root, each = sine + triangle sub + detuned partial ‚Üí its own **HRTF `PannerNode`** on a ring; every frame the pose drives `audioCtx.listener` position + forward orientation (modern `positionX/forwardX.setTargetAtTime`, `setPosition`/`setOrientation` fallback); multi-second swells; master `gain ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor (limiter) ‚Üí destination`. (3) **visuals** (`render.ts`) ‚ÄĒ hand-written GLSL ES 3.00 fullscreen-triangle fragment shader (NOT three.js): warm amber/rose/violet volumetric haze tracking where you look + one glowing orb per voice that brightens with its bloom. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (camera frames analysed in-browser only ‚ÄĒ never recorded/sent). Fallbacks for the 06:30 phone glance: camera denied / FaceLandmarker fails / no webcam ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + **pointer-drag "look around"** + a **silent Lissajous auto-demo** that orbits the field within seconds (cancels on real input, resumes after ~5s idle); WebGL2 absent ‚Üí audio-only; audio blocked ‚Üí visuals-only.

  References: **Maryanne Amacher** (perceived sound changes as you move your head ‚ÄĒ the body is part of the instrument); **La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela** *Dream House* (a sustained-JI environment you physically move through); **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening* (attention/presence over performance). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß413** (webcam head-tracking ‚Üí Web Audio binaural listener ‚ÄĒ open-source Spatial-Head-Tracking-Audio + webcam-auralization research, an actively-developing 2026 browser technique). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** first head-pose‚Üí`AudioListener` (head-tracked binaural) in the lab ‚ÄĒ the lab's many HRTF pieces (`7-spatial`/`29`/`148`/`394`/`400`) all moved the listener by dragging a dot or singing, never by the visitor's own body, so this is a genuine interaction-first + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (above) + **#3** named refs; **#5 soft/qualified** (the webcam-auralization dive is genuinely 2026-current and motivates the build, but HRTF + landmark‚ÜíEuler math is foundational ‚ÄĒ held as a soft bind, not hard-claimed). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-13)=[three.js OUTPUT 6√ó ¬∑ SVG OUTPUT 5√ó ¬∑ mic/voice INPUT 5√ó ¬∑ onset/beat/tempo TECH 6√ó ¬∑ pentatonic-wash + adult-cerebral-puzzle VIBE] ¬∑ picked=[**camera/head-pose INPUT** (off-glass, not mic, not a finger) ¬∑ **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not three.js/SVG) ¬∑ **head-pose‚ÜíAudioListener HRTF-binaural TECH** (not onset extraction) ¬∑ **warm meditative Dream-House VIBE** (feel, not solve)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every ban. Winner of the adult WIDE fire; banked `577-still-bloom` (device-motion stillness ‚Üí audio-first Radigue drone) + `578-magnetosphere` (live NOAA space-weather ‚Üí WebGPU geomagnetic choir) as IDEAS ¬ß413. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 34.1s`, `/dream/576-presence-room 6.48 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/GPU/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the silent auto-demo + pointer-drag mean the field always moves on a glance with zero permission.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/576-presence-room/README.md`

### [587-kids-button-garden](/dream/587-kids-button-garden) ¬∑ kids (4+) / game-controller / off-the-glass ¬∑ cycle 418 ¬∑ demoable
  **A 4-year-old's first instrument is a GAME CONTROLLER, not a screen ‚ÄĒ mash the big buttons and a garden of warm light blooms and sings.** The lab's **first game-controller (Gamepad API) instrument** and its **first haptic-rumble output** ‚ÄĒ the directest answer yet to the standing jury #1 ("get off the glass / off the touchscreen / mic over-used"). The child grips a physical pad in two hands and watches the wall bloom; no analog-stick coordination, no reading, just the most toddler-native gesture there is ‚ÄĒ button-mashing ‚ÄĒ turned into music. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one "a controller becomes a 4-year-old's instrument" concept on three interaction models).

  Subsystems (‚Č•3 ‚Üí 5): (1) **Gamepad input** (`page.tsx`) ‚ÄĒ `navigator.getGamepads()` polled inside the rAF loop with `gamepadconnected`/`disconnected` listeners; **edge-triggered** button presses (rising-edge detect ‚Üí each press fires once, holds sustain cleanly); W3C "standard gamepad" mapping (face 0‚Äď3, d-pad 12‚Äď15, triggers 6‚Äď7, left-stick axes 0‚Äď1) with deadzone. (2) **warm just-intonation synth** (Web Audio only) ‚ÄĒ the four face buttons are voices at ratios **1/1, 5/4, 3/2, 15/8** (root / major third / fifth / major seventh) over a low root+fifth sine drone + band-passed "wind" noise; each voice = triangle + gently-detuned sine, soft attack + ~1.6 s release; **deliberately NOT the C-major-pentatonic "nothing-is-wrong" wash**. The **d-pad shifts the SEASON** ‚ÄĒ spring‚Üísummer‚Üíautumn‚Üíwinter transposes the root (F3/G3/D3/C3) AND swaps the palette, so the whole world changes mood. Kid-safe master chain `gain ‚Üí lowpass(8 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall limiter 20:1, ‚ąí10 dBFS) ‚Üí destination`; `AudioContext` built in the first gesture (iOS unlock) + `webkitAudioContext` fallback. (3) **Canvas2D render only** ‚ÄĒ additive (`lighter`) glowing flowers (radial halo + six rotating petal lobes + white core) bloom and breathe over a dark season sky with motion-blur trails; the whole field parallax-sways with the left stick. No three.js/WebGL/WebGPU/SVG. (4) **triggers** swell the wind/pad drone; (5) **dual-rumble haptics** ‚ÄĒ `vibrationActuator.playEffect("dual-rumble", ‚Ä¶)` thumps on each bloom + a quickening heartbeat as more flowers live, feature-detected + try/catch-wrapped (absent on Safari/many pads ‚Üí the piece works fully without it). **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (no network I/O). Fallbacks for the 06:30 phone glance: no pad ‚Üí friendly **amber** prompt + **A/S/D/F (or J/K/L/;) keyboard** voices + **arrow-key seasons** + big **on-screen tappable** buttons; **idle auto-demo** blooms flowers + drifts seasons on its own after ~2 s (and on first load) so a muted glance shows a living, singing garden ‚ÄĒ any real input takes over instantly.

  References: **Toshio Iwai** ‚ÄĒ *Electroplankton* (Nintendo DS, 2005) / *TENORI-ON* (Yamaha, 2007), the playful "anyone can make beautiful music with a controller" lineage; **the May 2026 Steam Controller (2nd gen)** haptic-song demos (a game controller that plays whole songs through its rumble) ‚ÄĒ the direct inspiration for routing blooms into sympathetic haptics. Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß418** (a controller is a 2026 music-and-haptics instrument + the browser Gamepad API gives it to us free + grep-verified `gamepad` = 0 hits in the lab ‚Üí a genuine never-used INPUT and never-used haptic OUTPUT). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** first game-controller input AND first haptic-rumble output in the lab (grep-verified) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (5, above) + **#3** named refs (Iwai / Steam Controller); **#5 soft** (the Steam Controller news is ~5‚Äď6 weeks, just past the strict 30-day line, and the Gamepad/haptic primitive is foundational ‚ÄĒ held soft, not hard-claimed). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-13 + rolling-10 saturation)=[three.js OUTPUT ¬∑ SVG OUTPUT ¬∑ mic/voice INPUT ¬∑ onset/beat/tempo TECH ¬∑ pentatonic-wash VIBE ¬∑ growing-creature SPINE ¬∑ camera INPUT (3√ó last 10) ¬∑ WebGL2 OUTPUT (3√ó last 10)] ¬∑ picked=[**game-controller/Gamepad INPUT** (lab-first, off-glass ‚ÄĒ not camera/mic/touch) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off three.js/SVG/WebGL2/WebGPU) ¬∑ **controller‚Üíwarm-JI-synth + dual-rumble-haptic TECH** (not onset/beat/tempo, not data-sonification 2√ó) ¬∑ **kids playful-warm tactile VIBE** (not a creature, not a puzzle, not the pentatonic wash)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag. Winner of the kids DEEP fire; banked `586-kids-light-painter` (two-stick continuous chord-bend "light painter") + `588-kids-glow-drive` (steer-a-comet / wake-singing-stars spatial field) as IDEAS ¬ß418. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 110s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (454/454)`, `/dream/587-kids-button-garden 4.67 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no physical gamepad/audio/iOS in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the idle auto-demo + keyboard + on-screen-button fallbacks mean the garden always blooms and sings on a glance with zero hardware.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/587-kids-button-garden/README.md`

### [588-tidal-organ](/dream/588-tidal-organ) ¬∑ adults / live-ocean-data / oceanic-warm ¬∑ cycle 419 ¬∑ demoable
  **A warm breathing instrument tuned by the LIVE state of a real ocean right now.** Pick (or geolocate) a coastline and the piece fetches the real current marine swell (Open-Meteo Marine API, no key, CORS-direct) and lets it *play* a slow just-intonation **sea-organ** drone over a luminous WebGPU ocean-energy field (Canvas2D fallback): wave-period = the breath of the whole texture, wave-height = how many stacked JI voices + brightness, swell-period = root pitch, swell-direction = stereo pan. The directest hit on the 2026-06-13 jury's loudest, repeatedly-named, every-jury-starved adult ask ‚ÄĒ **real-world-data sonification, "music *about* something other than music," tension in the data not a synth knob** ‚ÄĒ and it's warm, not a puzzle. Refs: Zadar Sea Organ / Annea Lockwood / "Pulse of an Ocean" buoy lineage / arXiv 2602.14560 (ENSO‚Üígamelan, Feb 2026). ~3s auto-start on a drifting demo-swell so a silent 06:30 glance still breathes. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (banked `589-still-bloom` device-motion-stillness‚ÜíRadigue-drone WebGPU reaction-diffusion + `590-star-atlas` aim-the-phone-at-the-real-sky Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* ‚ÄĒ IDEAS ¬ß419).

### [594-disintegration-loop](/dream/594-disintegration-loop) ¬∑ adults / long-form-generative / elegiac ¬∑ cycle 421 ¬∑ demoable
  **A recording that crumbles as it plays.** A warm just-intonation lullaby fragment is rendered once into a "tape" (a single mutable `Float32Array`), then **re-recorded onto itself pass after pass** through a wear chain ‚ÄĒ a downward-creeping one-pole lowpass (highs flake first, ~9 kHz ‚Üí ~420 Hz floor), accumulating **oxide dropouts** (a persistent `dropoutMap` that only ever deepens, punching permanent holes), wow/flutter resampling jitter, and `tanh` tape saturation ‚ÄĒ so the erosion is **genuine compounding state, never reset and never an LFO**. The music at minute 5 is materially hollower than at minute 0; it decays into a ghost. The **only** interaction is one vertical lever: top = *hold on* (slows the decay, mixes a whisper of the pristine seed back in ‚ÄĒ buys time, never undoes), bottom = *let go* (accelerates the crumble) ‚ÄĒ a moral choice about letting a recording disappear, **tension you feel, not a puzzle you solve.** The Canvas2D waveform strip is driven by the *actual* degradation state (live peak envelope + dropout map + lowpass cutoff): bars wear down, holes punch through, warm amber desaturates to ash, a violet playhead sweeps each pass. The lab's **first piece built on audible decay/disintegration as accumulating state** ‚ÄĒ distinct from its many spectral (`243`/`267`/`321`) and granular (`227`) treatments, which visualize or scatter sound but never temporally self-degrade. A genuinely different **register** from the four warm reactive screen-toys before it (576/580/583/588): long-form, witnessed, about memory and loss. Refs: **William Basinski ‚ÄĒ *The Disintegration Loops* (2002)** + **Music Thing Modular "Degenerator"** self-overwriting looper (Synthtopia, 2026-05-28). ~2.5s idle auto-start so a silent 06:30 glance shows the tape visibly crumbling and (un-muted) hear it hollow. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire ‚ÄĒ one concept attacked by 3 techniques; banked `595-disintegration-spectral` (frequency-domain erosion) + `596-disintegration-dust` (granular WebGPU crumble) as IDEAS ¬ß421.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/594-disintegration-loop/README.md`

### [597-kids-water-bowls](/dream/597-kids-water-bowls) ¬∑ kids / friction-resonator-synthesis / serene-watery ¬∑ cycle 422 ¬∑ demoable
  **Six glowing water bowls a 4-year-old can play with no reading ‚ÄĒ TAP to ring them like bells, RUB a finger round the rim to make them SING.** The heart is the lab's **first friction-excited resonator / modal-synthesis primitive** (grep-verified 0√ó across 594 prior prototypes): each bowl is one resonator excited two ways. **Rub = a sustained glass-armonica friction tone** ‚ÄĒ looping pink-ish noise through a **high-Q bandpass** (Q 14‚Üí26) tuned to the bowl's pitch + 3 quiet inharmonic shimmer sines, where **drag speed** (smoothed px/ms) drives amplitude + brightness (bandpass opens upward) + Q in real time, so rub faster ‚Üí louder/brighter/more focused, stop ‚Üí it decays over ~0.6s. **Tap = a struck inharmonic bell** (additive sines at 1, 2.01, 3.0, 4.2√ó, ~4ms attack, higher partials decay faster). Tuning is deliberately **not** pentatonic: just-intonation Lydian-ish `1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 11/8, 3/2, 5/3` over ~F3 (the 11/8 raised-4th = a watery floating color). Higher water = lower pitch (real physics, drawn so it teaches itself). Canvas2D glowing vessels with bold per-bowl colors, tap ripples + brightness bloom, rub standing-wave caustic shimmer, finger-glow trail, ambient water bed (never silent). Engineered for kids: ‚Č•64px well-spaced bowls, pre-created nodes for <50ms response, multi-touch (two bowls sing at once), no fail states, kid-safe master chain (lowpass 7200 + compressor ‚ąí18/6/12, gains capped), and a clever **audio-rate smoothing loop decoupled from the visual rAF** so the rub stays smooth even if the canvas hitches. ~2.5s idle auto-rub demo so a silent 06:30 glance sees + hears a bowl singing. Refs: Indian **Jal Tarang** (struck water bowls) + Benjamin Franklin's **glass armonica** (1761, rubbed glass). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire ‚ÄĒ one instrument, 3 synthesis cores; banked `598-kids-water-bowls` (modal additive) + `599-kids-water-bowls` (bowed-waveguide AudioWorklet) as IDEAS ¬ß422. Resurrects the ¬ß420-banked seed `592`.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/597-kids-water-bowls/README.md`

### [601-feedback-howl](/dream/601-feedback-howl) ¬∑ adults / no-input-feedback-synthesis ¬∑ cycle 423 ¬∑ demoable
  **An instrument that is nothing but its own scream.** No oscillator, no sample, no microphone ‚ÄĒ the sound IS a Web Audio graph fed back into itself, self-oscillating on the edge of runaway, and you sculpt the howl OFF the glass: keyboard and (on a phone) device-tilt bend, choke, and spike it without ever touching the screen. The lab's **first no-input self-oscillating feedback synthesis** (grep-verified: many oscillator/sampler/granular synths, but nothing whose sound is its own feedback loop), and the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-14's demand to swing OUT of the cozy attractor (warm-JI bed ~7√ó/15, warm-serene VIBE ~9√ó/15, Canvas2D 6√ó/15) and build something with **edges** ‚ÄĒ abrasive, on-the-brink, felt-tension-not-a-puzzle ‚ÄĒ that renders **off Canvas2D** and takes input from **something other than a fingertip**. Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal abrasive explorers).

  Signal path (no external source): a single ring ‚ÄĒ `feedbackGain ‚Üí delay ‚Üí bandpass ‚Üí peaking ‚Üí waveShaper(soft saturation) ‚Üí dcBlock(highpass) ‚Üí feedbackGain` ‚ÄĒ kicked into self-oscillation by one short decaying noise seed at start, loop gain sitting just below 1.0 so it howls without running away. A post-shaper tap ‚Üí `masterGain ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(brick-wall limiter) ‚Üí AnalyserNode ‚Üí destination`. **Safety (non-negotiable for feedback):** hard loop-gain cap `LOOP_GAIN_MAX = 0.985` (never true runaway), master brick-wall limiter (‚ąí8 dB, knee 0, ratio 20, 2 ms attack), a ~90 Hz DC-blocking highpass (kills the sub-pile-up that wrecks feedback loops), an instant **PANIC** that ramps loop gain + master to 0, sane start volume (~0.16 auto-demo / ~0.32 play) + always-visible mute ‚ÄĒ abrasive, never literally painful or speaker-destroying.

  Subsystems (‚Č•3 ‚Üí 4): (1) **feedback DSP network** (`audio.ts`) ‚ÄĒ the self-oscillating ring + every safety clamp + `applyParams`/`applyStab`/`applyPanic`/`readAnalyser`, all param changes glided via `setTargetAtTime`. (2) **keyboard control mapping** (`page.tsx`) ‚ÄĒ ‚ÜĎ/‚Üď loop gain (tension toward the edge), ‚Üź/‚Üí delay time (pitch of the howl), `[`/`]` cutoff, `-`/`=` resonance Q, `1`‚Ä¶`9` jump cutoff across the band, space = a "stab" gain-spike screech, `P`/Escape = PANIC. (3) **tilt control mapping** ‚ÄĒ `deviceorientation` (iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` inside the start gesture) ‚Üí forward/back bends cutoff, left/right bends delay/pitch; falls back silently to keyboard-only. (4) **WGSL reactive spectrum render** (`gpu.ts`) ‚ÄĒ a violent full-screen frequency lattice that smears and whites out at resonant peaks, driven by the live `AnalyserNode`, with a real Canvas2D fallback (writhing lattice + tearing scanlines + waveform ghost). **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU; nothing recorded or sent). Fallbacks, each with a visible `text-rose-300` notice: tilt denied/unavailable ‚Üí keyboard-only; WebGPU absent ‚Üí Canvas2D; audio gated ‚Üí the Start button is the gesture; ~2.5 s idle **auto-demo** self-starts a safe low-level feedback so a muted 06:30 glance already shows a living, writhing field, and the demo "wander" resumes after ~5 s idle.

  References: **Toshimaru Nakamura** ‚ÄĒ *no-input mixing board* (an instrument that is nothing but its own feedback); **David Tudor** ‚ÄĒ live-electronic feedback works (*Rainforest* / *Pulsers* lineage). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß423** (the abrasive register is 0√ó in the lab; GPU-compute AV spectacle is a current 2026 technique ‚ÄĒ nibi/ShaderVine; and a grep caught that the obvious edgy ideas were already shipped ‚ÄĒ `387-drop-engine` EDM build-drop, `422-shatter-piano` granular destruction ‚ÄĒ so this swung to a genuinely un-built synthesis paradigm instead). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** first no-input self-oscillating feedback synthesis in the lab (grep-verified) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4, above) + **#3** named refs (Nakamura / Tudor). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-14)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT 6√ó ¬∑ touch INPUT 4√ó ¬∑ warm-JI-drone/chord bed ~7√ó ¬∑ warm/serene/cozy VIBE ~9√ó ¬∑ third real-ocean-data] ¬∑ picked=[**keyboard + device-tilt INPUT** (off-glass, not a fingertip, not mic) ¬∑ **WebGPU OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D; Canvas2D only as fallback) ¬∑ **no-input feedback self-oscillation TECH** (not warm-JI, not onset/beat) ¬∑ **abrasive / on-the-brink VIBE** (felt tension, the opposite of cozy)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag. Winner of the adult WIDE fire; banked `600-data-scream` (voice ‚Üí WebGPU Ikeda test-pattern data-strobe) + `602-motion-thrash` (camera optical-flow ‚Üí violent industrial noise + WebGPU strobe) as IDEAS ¬ß423. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 44s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (459/459)`, `/dream/601-feedback-howl 6.66 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio/tilt in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the auto-demo + keyboard + Canvas2D/keyboard-only fallbacks mean the field writhes on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can ride the brink himself at his desk.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/601-feedback-howl/README.md`

### [603-kids-yell-blob](/dream/603-kids-yell-blob) ¬∑ kids / comic-vocal-resynthesis / silly-monster ¬∑ cycle 424 ¬∑ demoable
  **The lab's FIRST funny prototype ‚ÄĒ a giant wobbly googly blob you YELL at, and it squashes, inflates, and HONKS your own voice back like a kazoo.** After 600+ pieces not one was comedic (every kids toy warm/gentle/awe ‚ÄĒ the exact cozy autopilot JURY 2026-06-14 banned). The kid-safe translation of the jury's demand for "edges" (fast/loud/abrasive/**funny**/unsettling) is the one register a 4-year-old can take loud: **silly.** Roar/sing/shout into the mic ‚Üí a 40-point spring-mass **soft-body blob** (raw WebGL2, hand-written GLSL ES 3.00, big googly eyes) inflates, jiggles, and overshoots with squash-and-stretch (loudness raises the rest-radius + `popBlob` kicks the rim so it bounces back, a per-axis squash spring flattens-then-stretches on a loud onset), tinted cyan (high voice) ‚Üí pink (low voice) by spectral centroid ‚ÄĒ and the kid's voice is **honked back, exaggerated**: detuned saw+square ‚Üí **ring modulator** ‚Üí **WaveShaper** (cartoon clip) ‚Üí **swept bandpass**, pitched/bent by their voice with a drooping "HONK‚Ä¶ honk‚Ä¶" envelope (rate-limited so it's comedic, not a buzz), plus a quiet distorted live-voice echo. It's a real **instrument** (the kid's yell IS transformed into the sound ‚ÄĒ the paradigm that won `601-feedback-howl`), not a reactive visualizer. Kid-safe master chain `gain ‚Üí lowpass 7kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall, ‚ąí10/0/20, 3ms/250ms) ‚Üí destination`, pre-created nodes for <50ms response, no painful transients. Graceful: mic denied ‚Üí visible `text-rose-300` notice + **hold-the-screen / mash-any-key fake-yell** (still bounces + honks); WebGL2 absent ‚Üí notice. ~2.5s idle **auto-demo** yells at itself so a silent 06:30 glance shows it alive; real input preempts instantly, demo resumes after ~5s quiet. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no CDN, no three.js** (pure client Web Audio + raw WebGL2; nothing recorded or sent). References: **Disney squash-and-stretch** (Preston Blair, *Cartoon Animation*); **holtsetio (Niklas Niehus) WebGPU `softbodies` / Softbody Tetris (2026-03-13)** for the gooey soft-body feel; classic cartoon foley (**Carl Stalling / Treg Brown** honks). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß424** (soft-body squish is a current 2026 WebGPU technique; the lab is 0√ó comedic ‚ÄĒ "funny" is the kid-native form of the jury's "edges"). **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic RMS+centroid analysis ¬∑ spring-mass soft-body ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 render ¬∑ comic ring-mod/waveshaper honk DSP = 4) + **#3** named refs (Blair / holtsetio / Stalling-Brown). #1 NOT claimed (grep: Verlet [303] / ball-pit physics [460] / "jelly" toys [125/286] pre-exist ‚ÄĒ squish isn't a clean lab-first; the genuine novelty is the comedic REGISTER, a diversity win not an ambition criterion); #5 NOT claimed (Softbody Tetris ~3 mo). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-14)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT 6√ó ¬∑ touch INPUT 4√ó ¬∑ warm-JI-drone/chord bed ~7√ó ¬∑ warm/serene/cozy VIBE ~9√ó ¬∑ camera over-mined ¬∑ gamepad just-used ¬∑ third-ocean-data] ¬∑ picked=[**mic-voice INPUT** (off-glass, not a fingertip, not camera/gamepad) ¬∑ **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D) ¬∑ **comic-vocal-resynthesis + soft-body-squish TECH** (not warm-JI, not onset/beat) ¬∑ **silly-monster VIBE** (loud + funny, the opposite of cozy)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag, and the directest fill of the lab's 0√ó-comedic gap. Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal silly explorers); banked `604-kids-stomp-band` (shake ‚Üí three.js cartoon-foley junk pile) + `605-kids-blow-parade` (blow ‚Üí WebGPU balloon raspberry parade) as IDEAS ¬ß424. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 45s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (460/460)`, `/dream/603-kids-yell-blob 5.7 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no real mic/audio/GPU in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the auto-demo + tap/keyboard fake-yell mean it wobbles + honks on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can yell at it himself.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/603-kids-yell-blob/README.md`

### [619-kids-plinko-bells](/dream/619-kids-plinko-bells) ¬∑ kids / Galton-quincunx-stochastic-physics / emergent-STEM-wonder ¬∑ cycle 430 ¬∑ demoable
  **"Marble Bells" ‚ÄĒ a 4-year-old drops a glowing marble into a peg field and watches *chance itself* play a chord.** Tap anywhere up top to release a little cluster of marbles; they cascade through a triangular **Galton / quincunx** peg lattice (~12 rows), bouncing left or right at every row with a slight center-pull plus real collision jitter (so the binomial ‚Üí normal distribution emerges and no two runs look alike), and land in one of **9 just-intonation bins**. Each landing rings that bin's warm **struck bell** (additive sines at ~1, 2.0, 3.0, 4.2√ó, ~4ms attack, higher partials decaying faster). Because more marbles end up in the middle (the bell curve), the **center bins fill fastest** ‚ÄĒ and the bins are tuned symmetrically so the center IS the root/fifth/octave: the emergent chord is rooted and warm, richest at the middle, gentle color at the edges. The histogram bars ARE the live distribution; counts slowly bleed off so it can play forever. Nine JI bins over F3 ‚Čą 174.6 Hz (`1/2, 2/3, 3/4, 5/6, 1/1, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1`), each a bold saturated hue ‚ÄĒ color is the language, nothing is ever "wrong." The lab's **first Galton-board / quincunx stochastic-physics instrument** (grep-verified 0√ó across 618 prior prototypes), and the directest break from the kids **silly-googly-creature 3-peat** (603/609/617): a mesmerizing STEM-wonder register ‚ÄĒ chance, made audible ‚ÄĒ not a creature, not mic, not cozy. Renders on **WebGL2** (raw GLSL ES 3.00, instanced glowing marbles/pegs/bins ‚ÄĒ the deliberately *under*-used renderer, off both the over-corrected WebGPU and jury-flagged Canvas2D), with a full **Canvas2D fallback** + a live backend badge. Kid-safe master chain (`gain ‚Üí lowpass 7.5kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚ąí16/6/12 ‚Üí destination`, gains capped, bells micro-rate-limited), gesture-gated AudioContext, always-on root+fifth+octave pad so it's never silent. ~2.2s idle **auto-rain** so a silent 06:30 glance is already cascading + singing; real taps preempt instantly. Refs: **Sir Francis Galton's quincunx / "bean machine" (1894)** (central-limit-theorem, binomial‚Üínormal); **Wintergatan's Marble Machine** (marbles-as-instrument); **Insook Choi, "Interactive Sonification Exploring Emergent Behavior" (2018)**. Love-aligned to Karel's emergent-music cluster (`236-particle-life-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`‚Ě§ÔłŹ). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers); banked `620-kids-music-mill` (rotating music-box peg sequencer, self-playing) + `621-kids-duet-bloom` (two-finger cooperative consonance, the social lane) as IDEAS ¬ß430. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 40s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (467/467)`, `/dream/619-kids-plinko-bells 5.36 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/pointer in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the auto-rain + Canvas2D fallback mean it cascades and chimes on a glance with zero hardware.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/619-kids-plinko-bells/README.md`

### [622-wolfram-rhythm](/dream/622-wolfram-rhythm) ¬∑ adults / 1D-elementary-CA-Wolfram-rule / austere-mechanical ¬∑ cycle 431 ¬∑ demoable
  **"Wolfram Rhythm" ‚ÄĒ a single integer composes the music.** A 1D **elementary cellular automaton** unfolds row by row on a musical clock: each cell's next state comes from its left/self/right neighbourhood via an 8-bit **rule number** (0‚Äď255), and every newly-born row's live cells fire short, edged percussion panned by column over a whole-tone set. The **rule number IS the composition** ‚ÄĒ `30` chaotic/noisy, `90` a self-similar Sierpinski fractal, `110` complex/Turing-complete (gliders collide), `184` traffic, etc. ‚ÄĒ change it (the one lever: a ¬Īstepper, a 0‚Äď255 slider, and six labeled presets) and the entire character transforms. The lab's **first 1D elementary-CA / Wolfram-rule instrument** (grep-verified 0√ó ‚ÄĒ the existing CA pieces are 2D: `25`/`180` Conway Life, `264` Lenia, `360`/`377` sandpile), and a deliberate swing OFF the adult **edges/real-data autopilot** (601 howl ¬∑ 606 vivisection ¬∑ 613 seismic ¬∑ 618 solar) into an austere, rule-driven register ‚ÄĒ edged (Rule 30 is literally chaos) but neither loud-abrasive nor cozy.

  Subsystems (‚Č•3 ‚Üí 4): (1) **1D-CA rule engine** (`engine.ts`) ‚ÄĒ toroidal `stepRow`, centered/soup seeds, the 256-rule lookup, `PRESETS`. (2) **long-form watchdog** (`StagnationDetector`) ‚ÄĒ detects dead / frozen / short-cycle states and `perturb`s (flips cells) or re-seeds so the piece keeps evolving for minutes rather than locking up. (3) **CA‚Üípercussion synth** (`audio.ts`) ‚ÄĒ metal-FM / band-passed-noise-click / snappy-pluck voices, column‚Üíwhole-tone pitch + column‚Üípan, 24-voice steal-oldest cap, master ‚Üí brick-wall limiter (no warm drone anywhere). (4) **WebGL2 render** ‚ÄĒ the iconic scrolling Wolfram diagram via a texture-uploaded grid + fragment shader (newest row flashes at a bright playhead line, old rows fade as they scroll), with a real **Canvas2D fallback** + visible notice. Idle visual auto-start on mount (audio gated behind **Begin** per autoplay), so a silent glance is already a self-drawing diagram. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; nothing recorded or sent).

  References: **Stephen Wolfram, _A New Kind of Science_ (2002)** (elementary CA, rules 30/90/110); **Matthew Cook** (Rule-110 Turing-completeness, 2004); **Iannis Xenakis** (cellular automata in composition ‚ÄĒ the severe/architectural register). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (3 CA paradigms ‚ÄĒ 2D Conway Life, 1D Wolfram, continuous Lenia); the **only duplication-clean** candidate (`620-life-engine` duplicated `25`/`180`, `622-quickening` duplicated `264`), banked both as cautionary IDEAS ¬ß431. **Ambition honest 3/5**: #1 first 1D-elementary-CA/Wolfram instrument (grep-0√ó) + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (4) + #3 named refs (Wolfram / Cook / Xenakis); #5 not claimed (foundational). **Diversity** `banned=[WGSL-WebGPU 5√ó over-corrected ¬∑ edges/real-data adult autopilot ¬∑ JURY-14 Canvas2D/touch/warm-JI/cozy/ocean] ¬∑ picked=[rule-number-stepper + sparse-perturb INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ 1D-elementary-CA TECH ¬∑ austere-mechanical VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 73s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (467/467)`, `/dream/622-wolfram-rhythm 6.15 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the on-mount auto-running diagram + Canvas2D fallback mean it draws on a glance with zero hardware; unverified by ear: that rules 30/90/110 are audibly distinct and the metallic voices read as edged-not-harsh.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/622-wolfram-rhythm/README.md`

### [630-piano-refract](/dream/630-piano-refract) ¬∑ adults / NMF-spectral-factorization / dissective-prismatic ¬∑ cycle 434 ¬∑ demoable
  **"Piano Refract" ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST genuine cycle-2 deepening: Karel's own solo piano refracted like light through a prism into five voices you solo, mute & re-mix.** This is the deepening of the loved standout `606-piano-vivisection` the jury begged for by hand ("606 is the model ‚ÄĒ it just needed a cycle 2 to actually reach 4/5") two juries running. Stage 1 keeps 606's bulletproof median-filter **HPSS** split (strings vs. hammers) as the legible *ground*; stage 2 is the new refraction ‚ÄĒ the harmonic (strings) layer is re-analyzed and fanned by **NMF** (non-negative matrix factorization, the lab's first ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó across 600+ prototypes) into **four pitched register voices** (Low / Low-mid / High-mid / High). Five independently-mixable looping voices in total (Hammers + the 4 registers): solo isolates one, mute drops it, faders re-balance ‚ÄĒ all **instant & click-free** (every buffer plays continuously, sample-aligned; only gain nodes ramp). The technique register the jury praised in 606 ("clinical not cozy, his own music") ‚ÄĒ analytical and prismatic, neither doom nor warm.

  **The legibility fix (what makes this a real cycle-2, not a restart):** plain unsupervised NMF returns abstract components that are unstable run-to-run and impossible to name ‚ÄĒ the exact weakness that lost the *original* ¬ß425-banked `607-piano-prism` seed to 606. This build **warm-starts** the NMF basis `W`: each of the four columns is seeded as a Gaussian-in-log-frequency bump centered at **~150 / 350 / 800 / 1800 Hz** (with a positive floor so updates still adapt to Karel's real partials), biasing every component to settle into a **stable, musically-meaningful register regardless of the run**. The seeded-basis idea is Smaragdis & Brown (2003) applied for *legibility* rather than transcription.

  Subsystems (‚Č•3 ‚Üí 6): (1) **audio loader** (`audio.ts`, copied verbatim from 606) ‚ÄĒ fetches Karel's real solo-piano recording via the read-only `/api/audio/<id>` route, synthesized piano fallback. (2) **median-filter HPSS** (`hpss.ts`, from 606) ‚ÄĒ STFT/ISTFT, per-bin/per-frame medians, soft Wiener masks (phase kept). (3) **register-seeded KL-NMF** (`nmf.ts`) ‚ÄĒ warm-started multiplicative updates (~70 iters), chunked with `await` yields + progress bar. (4) **per-component Wiener resynthesis** ‚ÄĒ `Mk = Vk/ő£Vj` applied to the original complex harmonic STFT ‚Üí ISTFT ‚Üí four register PCM buffers. (5) **5-voice mixer** ‚ÄĒ `BufferSource ‚Üí GainNode ‚Üí AnalyserNode ‚Üí master ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`, sample-aligned, instant solo/mute/gain. (6) **WebGL2 "prism" render** (`gl.ts`) ‚ÄĒ an incoming white beam splits into five colored bands (steel hammers + violet‚Üírose‚Üíamber‚Üíemerald registers), each driven by its live level, soloed glows / muted dims, with a real **Canvas2D fallback** + backend badge; idle animation on mount + ~2.5s auto-demo cycles the solo so a silent 06:30 glance is already alive. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (READ-only of the existing audio route; nothing recorded or sent).

  Off-glass controls: keyboard `1`‚Äď`5` solo / `0` reset / `m` mute selected / `‚Üź‚Üí` select / `‚ÜĎ‚Üď` gain / space play-pause; device-tilt "spectral spotlight" (iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` inside the Begin gesture, silent keyboard fallback + `text-rose-300` notice if denied). References: **Lee & Seung, _Nature_ 1999** (NMF + multiplicative updates); **Smaragdis & Brown, WASPAA/ISMIR 2003** (NMF on music spectrograms; seeded basis); **Fitzgerald, DAFx 2010** (the HPSS ground). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß434** (NMF source-separation is a live 2026 front ‚ÄĒ Deep Non-Negative Autoencoders, arXiv 2510.08816; piano is "particularly amenable, beautiful key-hammer extraction" ‚ÄĒ Collins, eContact). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one concept, 2 legibility approaches): beat `629-piano-prism` (random-init NMF + post-hoc centroid pitch-SORT) on **reliability + legibility** ‚ÄĒ the warm start is deterministic where the sort still rode the random-init lottery; banked 629 as IDEAS ¬ß434. **Ambition honest 4/5** ‚ÄĒ the lab's first honest #4 in two juries: **#1** first NMF in the lab (grep-0√ó) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (6) + **#3** named refs (Lee&Seung / Smaragdis&Brown / Fitzgerald) + **#4** genuine multi-cycle commitment (cycle 2 of the 606 decomposition spine, claimed honestly for the first time). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√ó ¬∑ WebGPU OUTPUT 6√ó ¬∑ adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5√ó ¬∑ 4th real-data sonification on 588/613/618 template] ¬∑ picked=[**his-piano-file + keyboard/tilt INPUT** (off-glass, not touch) ¬∑ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not WebGPU; Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **NMF spectral-factorization TECH** (grep-0√ó, not real-data) ¬∑ **dissective/prismatic VIBE** (analytical, neither doom nor cozy ‚ÄĒ the "his own material, clinical" register the jury praised in 606)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 37.3s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (470/470)`, `/dream/630-piano-refract 10.1 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the idle prism animation + auto-demo + Canvas2D/keyboard fallbacks mean it reads as alive on a glance with zero hardware; unverified by ear: that the warm-started registers separate cleanly on Karel's actual recording and that solo/mute is as click-free as designed.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/630-piano-refract/README.md`

### `632-polymeter-loom` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 435, 2026-06-15)
[/dream/632-polymeter-loom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/632-polymeter-loom) ‚ÄĒ **"Polymeter Loom": interlocking Euclidean rhythms woven into a hypnotic groove you watch being woven.** Five pitched-percussion voices (kick ¬∑ bass ¬∑ marimba ¬∑ bell ¬∑ shaker) each play a **Euclidean rhythm** E(k,n) ‚ÄĒ k onsets spread maximally-evenly over n steps via the **Bjorklund** algorithm ‚ÄĒ on *different* step-counts (16/8/16/16/12), so the combined groove is **polymetric** and only realigns after the LCM of all step-counts (a long, evolving loop). The marimba+bell share a pattern but one runs **1.2% faster** ‚ÄĒ **Steve Reich phasing** ‚ÄĒ sliding out of unison and slowly back, so minute 2 sounds unlike minute 0 (long-form state without a loop). A **three.js loom** renders each voice as a concentric bead ring; beads flash (emissive + scale pop) on each onset, and the phasing rings visibly counter-rotate ‚ÄĒ the weave tightening and loosening. Off-glass controls: **Weave/Pause**, keys `1`‚Äď`5` toggle voices, `q/a w/s e/d r/f t/g` nudge each voice's onset count k, `space` toggles phasing, tempo slider 70‚Äď150 BPM. Idle auto-demo (loom rotates/breathes + rings drift before any audio); AudioContext created/resumed inside the first gesture (iOS unlock); graceful `text-rose-300` fallbacks for missing WebGL/AudioContext. References: **Steve Reich** (*Music for 18 Musicians*, *Clapping Music* ‚ÄĒ phasing); **Godfried Toussaint**, *The Euclidean Algorithm Generates Traditional Musical Rhythms* (2005). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß435** (groove = microtiming/interlocking-meter science; JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #2 "build the missing middle ‚ÄĒ danceable/groove"). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 missing-middle registers): beat `631-drop-engine` (euphoric EDM build-and-drop + lab-first sidechain pump) and `633-slow-burn` (tender neo-soul microtiming) on honest ambition (two canonical refs that drive it) + output diversity (three.js, 0√ó in last 10) + cleanest vibe-threading (groove that dodges BOTH banned poles ‚ÄĒ doom AND cozy/warm); both losers banked as strong **IDEAS ¬ß435** seeds. **Ambition honest 3/5** ‚ÄĒ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (Euclidean generator + phasing clock/lookahead scheduler + multi-voice FM/pluck synth + three.js loom = 4) + **#3** named refs (Reich + Toussaint). #1 not claimed (euclidean/polymeter/Reich all referenced earlier in the corpus ‚ÄĒ only `sidechain`, which was 631's, was grep-0√ó). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√ó ¬∑ WebGPU OUTPUT 6√ó ¬∑ adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5√ó ¬∑ 4th real-data sonification on 588/613/618 template] + rolling-10 over-rep=[WebGL2 OUTPUT 4√ó] ¬∑ picked=[**keyboard + voice-toggle INPUT** (off-glass, not touch) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (0√ó in last 10 ‚ÄĒ off banned WebGPU AND over-rep WebGL2) ¬∑ **Euclidean-polymeter + Reich-phasing TECH** ¬∑ **hypnotic/groove VIBE** (danceable, neither doom nor cozy)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, 471/471 static pages, `/dream/632-polymeter-loom` prerendered static ‚óč, in `app-path-routes-manifest.json`, `.html` emitted), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the idle loom rotation + bead pulse + WebGL/audio fallbacks mean it reads as alive on a glance with zero hardware; unverified by ear: that the Reich phasing pair audibly drifts and the polymetric weave grooves on-device.

### `636-kids-star-pilot` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ kids ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 436, 2026-06-15)
[/dream/636-kids-star-pilot](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/636-kids-star-pilot) ‚ÄĒ **"Star Pilot": a 4-year-old flies a glowing comet with a game controller through a field of musical star-gates ‚ÄĒ and the gates they pass keep echoing back, so a melody builds itself.** Push the **left stick** (or **arrow keys / WASD** ‚ÄĒ automatic fallback, live `gamepadconnected` switch) to fly a momentum-driven ship through six **just-intonation-tuned star-gates** that bloom and ring soft additive bell-tones; face buttons (or **space / 1‚Äď4**) drop sparkly mallet+shimmer percussion. The heart is a **lookahead-scheduled loop-memory sequencer**: the last ~8 gates you visited are remembered and echo back on a slow pulse, so the music *accumulates and evolves* ‚ÄĒ minute 2 sounds unlike minute 0 (genuine state, not a loop). **No score, no fail state, no reading** ‚ÄĒ the ship softly bounces off the edges, it can't crash. Idle ~5s and a gentle auto-flight resumes so the scene is never silent and a glance always shows it alive. Renders on **Canvas2D** (a glowing additive-trail starfield ‚ÄĒ the deliberately under-used renderer, 0√ó in the last 10, off both the jury-banned WebGPU and the over-rep WebGL2). Kid-safe master chain (`gain ‚Üí lowpass 7.5kHz ‚Üí fast-attack DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`, gains capped, triggers rate-limited), Start-gesture AudioContext unlock, `text-violet-300` "connect a controller or use arrow keys" hint / `text-rose-300` canvas-fail notice. References: **Toshio Iwai, _Electroplankton_ (Nintendo DS, 2005)** + **Tetsuya Mizuguchi, _Rez_ / _Child of Eden_** (flying-through-a-synaesthetic-music-space). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß436** (kid-native NON-touch inputs are under-used ‚ÄĒ the kids side keeps reaching for mic + camera-optical-flow; gamepad is 0√ó recently + jury-blessed via 587; and the active-wonder *middle* register is what the kids side lacks per JURY 2026-06-15). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal NON-touch explorers, honoring JURY provocation #4's touch ban): beat `634-kids-tilt-river` (tilt ‚Üí flow-field light river, three.js) and `635-kids-sing-kite` (voice-pitch ‚Üí kite altitude, Canvas2D) on diversity (gamepad is the rarest lab input) + genuine evolving state (loop-memory) + cleanest build; both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬ß436** seeds. **Ambition honest 2/5** (the kids norm): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (gamepad-poll + keyboard fallback ¬∑ flight physics + gate collision ¬∑ bell/percussion + loop-memory sequencer w/ lookahead clock ¬∑ Canvas2D starfield = 4) + **#3** named refs (Iwai / Mizuguchi). #1 not claimed (gamepad used by 587; sequencer not lab-first). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT ¬∑ WebGPU OUTPUT ¬∑ adult "edges" reflex ¬∑ 4th real-data] + rolling-10=[WebGL2 OUTPUT 4√ó] ¬∑ picked=[**gamepad+keyboard INPUT** (off-glass; rarest in lab) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (0√ó in last 10) ¬∑ **gamepad-flight + loop-memory-sequencer TECH** ¬∑ **playful arcade-wonder VIBE** (the missing middle ‚ÄĒ neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 33.9s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (472/472)`, `/dream/636-kids-star-pilot 4.54 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified** (no real gamepad/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the auto-demo + keyboard fallback mean it flies + sings on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can fly it with arrow keys; unverified by ear/hand: that the JI gates read as a melody and the loop-memory echo audibly evolves on-device.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/636-kids-star-pilot/README.md`

### `649-chess-duet` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 441, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/649-chess-duet](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/649-chess-duet) ‚ÄĒ **"Chess Duet": a famous chess game played as a slow, inevitable TWO-VOICE counterpoint ‚ÄĒ White and Black are two instruments, and you hear the whole drama (quiet opening ‚Üí escalating sacrifices ‚Üí the sudden-quiet ‚Üí the inevitable mate) as a piece that composes itself move by move.** The lab's FIRST piece that sonifies a *structured real-world game* as music ‚ÄĒ not a physical sensor feed, not an FFT of a sound: the combinatorial structure of a played game **is** the score (the directest hit on JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #5, "music about something other than music ‚ÄĒ a live chess game as a duet"). Bundled game: **Anderssen vs Kieseritzky, "The Immortal Game," London 1851** (45 plies, ending `23. Be7#`), parsed by a from-scratch SAN parser (no npm dep, no network). Two alternating voices read as call-and-response counterpoint ‚ÄĒ **White** = warm triangle+sine ("left hand", upper staff), **Black** = a darker FM/reedy saw ("right hand", lower staff); file a‚Äďh ‚Üí scale degree in **D harmonic minor** (dramatic mode), rank 1‚Äď8 ‚Üí register, piece type ‚Üí articulation (pawn short ¬∑ queen long & rich ¬∑ knight grace-note leap ¬∑ bishop gliding ¬∑ rook firm). Game *events* drive the drama: a **capture** = a dissonant clash that resolves; a **check** = a held low tension pedal tone; **castling** = a settled perfect-fifth cadence; the final **checkmate** = a darkly resolving held chord; a running **material-balance** signal biases the timbre brighter/darker so the arc is *felt*. Renders on **inline SVG** (the scarcest renderer ‚ÄĒ last SVG was 637; off the jury-banned WebGPU, off the rolling-hot three.js [3√ó], off the over-rep WebGL2): an 8√ó8 board lights each move's from/to squares (captures glow red, mate glows indigo) beside an unfolding two-staff score with a tracking playhead, plus the legible SAN of the current move. Ear-safe master chain (`gain 0.42 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`); AudioContext created inside the Play gesture (iOS); **auto-starts the game ~2.5s after load** so a silent 06:30 glance is fully alive (board lighting up move by move + the duet playing, zero interaction/hardware). Tempo slider 1.0‚Äď3.5 s/move. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (pure client SVG + Web Audio ‚ÄĒ no network/mic/camera/secret). References: **Anderssen vs Kieseritzky, "The Immortal Game," 1851** (the bundled game); the informal lineage of chess-as-music / game-sonification, reframed here as strict two-voice counterpoint over a real master game with *events* (not just squares) driving the harmony. Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß441** (a corpus check killed two "0√ó" jury claims ‚ÄĒ MIDI-OUT already exists in `291-harmonograph`, WebRTC in `508-accord-call` ‚ÄĒ steering ambition toward the genuinely-0√ó lanes: structured-data-as-counterpoint and AI-pipeline chains; browser generative-composition is a live 2026 front ‚ÄĒ Loopstate/Riffer/KOSMOS sequencers, GEDMAS/GESMI algorithmic-EDM lineage, SMDIM arXiv 2603.00576 Feb-2026). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers mapping 3 jury-named open lanes): beat `648-latent-chain` (the lab's first 2-model AI pipeline chain, audio‚Üíimage‚Üíwords‚Üíimage ‚ÄĒ bolder #1 but budget-gated + invisible/unverifiable at a silent glance) and `650-endless-lift` (an ecstatic Shepard-fold gospel key-lift ‚ÄĒ the bulletproof ecstatic-register fill); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬ß441** seeds. **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** first structured-game / counterpoint sonification in the lab (a genuinely new "machine," not the banned 588/613/618 physical-feed template) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (from-scratch SAN parser + board model ¬∑ two-voice contrapuntal mapper + Web Audio scheduler ¬∑ event-driven harmony/drama state ¬∑ SVG board+score renderer = 4) + **#3** the named game. #4 not claimed (single cycle); #5 not hard-claimed (SMDIM ~3.5mo, server-side ‚ÄĒ grounding only). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√ó ¬∑ WebGPU OUTPUT 6√ó ¬∑ adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5√ó ¬∑ 4th real-data sonification on 588/613/618 template] + renderer-watch=[three.js hot 3√ó (632/643/645)] ¬∑ picked=[**structured-game-data INPUT** (off touch, off recent mic/audio-file/physical-feed) ¬∑ **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer ‚ÄĒ off banned WebGPU AND off hot three.js AND off over-rep WebGL2) ¬∑ **game-structure‚Üítwo-voice-counterpoint sonification TECH** (a new "machine," not the banned physical-feed template) ¬∑ **cinematic / narrative-tension VIBE** (off BOTH banned poles ‚ÄĒ dramatic, not the ominous-austere autopilot, not cozy)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every binding banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 91s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (477/477)` [476 from cycle 440 + 649 = 477, confirming 648/650 absent], `/dream/649-chess-duet 6.93 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ but uniquely low-risk: pure SVG + Web Audio with zero GPU/network/key/sensor surface, the 45 plies were verified against the historical game, and the 2.5s auto-start means the board + duet are alive on a glance with zero hardware; unverified: whether the D-harmonic-minor counterpoint + event-drama actually *feel* like the game's arc by ear (the one tuning surface).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/649-chess-duet/README.md`

### `652-kids-dance-band` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ kids ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 442, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/652-kids-dance-band](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/652-kids-dance-band) ‚ÄĒ **"Dance Band": a 4-year-old makes a whole band play by DANCING in front of the camera ‚ÄĒ move more and more layers stack and the lights erupt; stand still and it eases back to a gentle pad.** The directest hit on JURY 2026-06-15's standing #1 kids critique ("warm-or-silly with nothing between ‚ÄĒ build the danceable/groovy register with *body* that nobody is building"). The webcam frame is drawn mirrored into a tiny `32√ó24` offscreen canvas; each rAF reads that grid, takes the **per-cell absolute frame-difference** from the previous frame (noise floor zeroed), and sums to a **global motion-energy** `0..1` plus a diff-weighted **spatial centroid** ‚ÄĒ **no ML model, no skeleton, pure pixels** (the ISMM "movement *energy* not pose" insight, RESEARCH ¬ß442). Energy passes an asymmetric low-pass (fast attack / slow release) and selects one of **5 groove tiers with hysteresis** (separate UP/DOWN thresholds so layers don't chatter): pad ‚Üí +kick ‚Üí +bass+hats ‚Üí +snare backbeat ‚Üí FULL-PARTY syncopated melody. A **112 BPM, 16-step Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (`setInterval(25ms)` pump, ~120ms ahead of `audioCtx.currentTime`, **never** rAF) clocks every layer change and hit to the step grid, so intensity changes feel musical not twitchy; everything is **A-minor-pentatonic** so all movement is in-key (no wrong). The horizontal centroid pans the melody; energy raises filter/gain and brightness. **Output:** a Canvas2D glowing particle/energy field that erupts from the motion centroid (spark count/speed/hue scale with energy ‚ÄĒ violet calm ‚Üí gold full-party), a coarse motion-heat overlay where the body moved, and a ring that flashes on every downbeat. **Privacy:** camera is `getUserMedia` on-device only, **no frames stored or sent** (zero network), with a reassuring note. Audio starts before the camera so the band is **never silent/broken**; soft attack envelopes + 1.2s master fade-in, no harsh transients. **Graceful degrade:** camera denied/unavailable ‚Üí `text-rose-300` message + large (‚Č•64px) ūüĆô-calm / **DANCE!** / ūüĒ•-more fallback buttons and Arrow Up/Down, all driving the same energy signal so it fully demos with audio+visuals. References: **Golan Levin & Zachary Lieberman** ‚ÄĒ *Messa di Voce* / *Manual Input Sessions* (body as continuous reactive AV input); **IRCAM ISMM** research on sonifying movement *qualities* (energy/fluidity/impulsivity) + children's-spontaneous-movement sonification (RESEARCH ¬ß442). Born from RESEARCH ¬ß442 (movement-energy ‚Üí groove; the visible research‚Üíbuild chain). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal NON-touch explorers in the missing-middle register, honoring the jury touch ban): beat `651-kids-choir-leader` (mic voice-pitch ‚Üí in-key choir, tender ‚ÄĒ the realization of banked seed `635-kids-sing-kite`, love-aligned `158-kids-hum-paint`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) and `653-kids-bounce-band` (tilt ‚Üí collision-quantized beat, bouncy); both banked as built-and-proven **IDEAS ¬ß442** seeds. **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5** (the kids norm): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (camera frame-diff motion-energy + centroid ¬∑ 5-tier hysteresis mapper ¬∑ clocked layered look-ahead groove engine ¬∑ Canvas2D particle/heat field = 4) + **#3** named refs (Levin/Lieberman ¬∑ ISMM). #1 contestable (optical-flow exists in the corpus; whole-body-motion-energy‚Üílayered-groove is application-level, discounted). **Love-aligned** with `234-kids-hand-creature`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (camera/body) + the embodied kids cluster. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√ó ¬∑ WebGPU OUTPUT 6√ó ¬∑ adult "edges" reflex ¬∑ 4th real-data template] ¬∑ picked=[**webcam whole-body-motion-energy INPUT** (off-glass, NOT touch; camera absent from last 10) ¬∑ **Canvas2D particle-field OUTPUT** (NOT WebGPU) ¬∑ **frame-diff motion-energy ‚Üí hysteresis-tiered layered groove TECH** ¬∑ **ecstatic/danceable VIBE** (the jury's exact missing middle ‚ÄĒ NOT warm-glow, NOT silly-foley)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 47s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (478/478)`, `/dream/652-kids-dance-band 4.54 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč, `.html` emitted, `package-lock.json` restored so nothing outside the dream zone is committed), **NOT browser-verified** (no real camera/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the always-on soft groove + the DANCE! fallback button mean it plays + erupts on a glance with zero hardware (Karel can drive it with the on-screen buttons / arrow keys even with no camera); unverified by body: that the motion-energy thresholds + `6√ó` normalization feel right for a real child in a real room (lighting/distance will shift them ‚ÄĒ needs live calibration), and that the layered groove actually grooves on-device.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/652-kids-dance-band/README.md`

### `659-pulse-cathedral` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 445, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/659-pulse-cathedral](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/659-pulse-cathedral) ‚ÄĒ **"Pulse Cathedral": the lab's FIRST shipped ecstatic/euphoric adult piece ‚ÄĒ a euphoric EDM build-and-drop journey arc whose energy NEVER lands (riser ‚Üí impact ‚Üí DROP ‚Üí climb ‚Üí riser), with a sidechain pump that is both audible AND visible, and a Shepard-folded bass so the key reads as forever-rising.** The directest hit on JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #2 ("build the missing middle ‚ÄĒ ecstatic/danceable/groovy; the lab banks every ecstatic candidate [650/653-endless-lift] and never ships it"), and a journey-engine alternative Karel explicitly asked for (care #4: EDM build-and-drop as an alternate arc ‚ÄĒ still 0√ó). Audio: a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (`setInterval(25ms)`, ~120ms ahead of `audioCtx.currentTime`, **never** rAF) clocks a layered Web-Audio bed ‚ÄĒ four-on-the-floor kick (sine pitch-drop + click), an offbeat rolling bass that is **sidechain-ducked by the kick** (a "pump bus" gain ramped down on each kick and released ‚ÄĒ the audible French-house pump), a detuned **supersaw** chord stack + pad, a bandpassed plucky arp, a filtered **noise riser** that sweeps a lowpass up through the BUILD, and a tasteful **impact** at the DROP ‚ÄĒ all in a bright Lydian-leaning mode. A **BUILD(8 bars)‚ÜíDROP‚ÜíSUSTAIN(4 bars)‚ÜíBUILD arc state machine** (`arc.ts`) raises density/cutoff/intensity through the build and **Shepard-folds the bass octave** each cycle so the energy reads as a forever-climb (the "never-landing causal stream" from RESEARCH ¬ß445's LiveBand, made literal). **Output:** a raw **WebGL2** fragment-shader **cathedral nave** ‚ÄĒ brightness pulses with the kick and the **sidechain duck is *visible*** as a brightness dip-and-bloom, light-shafts/sparks erupt at the DROP, color sweeps violet (BUILD) ‚Üí gold/white (DROP); animates before audio unlocks, with a **Canvas2D fallback** if WebGL2 is missing. Controls: **Start** (creates/resumes AudioContext in-gesture ‚ÄĒ iOS unlock + ~0.8s master fade-in), **SPACE / DROP** forces the next drop early, **‚ÜĎ/‚Üď ENERGY** adds/removes layers, **TEMPO** 120‚Äď130 BPM; ~2.5s idle ‚Üí the arc runs itself (autonomous BUILD‚ÜíDROP‚ÜíSUSTAIN) so a silent glance is alive. Ear-safe master `gain ‚Č§0.45 ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no network/key/mic/camera** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2). References: the **EDM build-and-drop form** (riser ‚Üí impact ‚Üí drop); **sidechain "pumping" compression** (French-house / Eric Prydz lineage), modeled here as scheduled gain automation; **Roger Shepard**, *"Circularity in Judgments of Relative Pitch"* (1964) ‚ÄĒ the endless-climb illusion, folded into the bass; and the real-time *continuous causal music stream* research it echoes (Google DeepMind **Lyria RealTime** / **"LiveBand," arXiv 2606.03803, June 2026**) ‚ÄĒ cited as honest conceptual lineage, NOT implemented with ML. Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß445** (the reactive-accompaniment headline was killed by a corpus grep [251/256 already own that lane]; its surviving value ‚ÄĒ LiveBand's never-landing causal stream ‚ÄĒ bent the flagship into a euphoric arc that climbs forever). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers across genuinely-open adult registers): beat `660-glasswork` (a tender 3am music-box, inline-SVG, Eno/Budd/Satie ‚ÄĒ the lab's intimacy gap; lower-leverage register + lower ambition) and `661-murmur-engine` (a boids murmuration AS the music, Canvas2D, Reynolds/Vicsek ‚ÄĒ but Canvas2D is HOT 3√ó‚Üí4√ó and flocking is not lab-first, so no #1); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬ß445** seeds. **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (look-ahead scheduler ¬∑ sidechain-pumped layered bed ¬∑ build-drop arc state machine ¬∑ WebGL2 nave + Canvas2D fallback = 4) + **#3** named refs (EDM build-drop form ¬∑ Prydz sidechain-pumping ¬∑ Shepard 1964 ¬∑ LiveBand/Lyria frame). **#1 SOFT** (Shepard foundational [40/132/187]; the audible+visible sidechain pump is plausibly lab-first but not hard-claimed); **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (LiveBand within-window but server-side ML ‚ÄĒ lineage only). The real value is the **0√ó-shipped ecstatic register fill** + a Karel-care-#4 journey-engine alternative. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√ó ¬∑ WebGPU OUTPUT 6√ó ¬∑ adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5√ó ¬∑ 4th real-data sonification on the 588/613/618 physical-feed template] + renderer-watch=[three.js HOT 3√ó ¬∑ Canvas2D HOT 3√ó] ¬∑ picked=[**keyboard + autonomous INPUT** (off banned touch; off recent mic/camera) ¬∑ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST screen renderer ‚ÄĒ off banned WebGPU AND off BOTH hot three.js & Canvas2D; Canvas2D fallback only) ¬∑ **EDM build-drop-arc + sidechain-pump + Shepard-fold TECH** ¬∑ **ecstatic/euphoric VIBE** (the jury's exact 0√ó-shipped missing middle ‚ÄĒ dodges BOTH banned poles: NOT doom, NOT cozy)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every binding banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 77s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (481/481)` [480 from cycle 444 + 659 = 481, confirming 660/661 absent], `/dream/659-pulse-cathedral 7.65 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no real audio/GPU in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the ~2.5s idle auto-demo runs the BUILD‚ÜíDROP‚ÜíSUSTAIN arc and the WebGL2 nave animates before audio unlocks (Canvas2D fallback), so a silent 06:30 glance shows the cathedral pulsing + dropping with zero hardware; unverified: whether the pump *feels* like a pump, the drop *hits*, and the Shepard-fold reads as a forever-climb on real speakers (mix tuned by reasoning, not heard); the autonomous-demo visual kick is an approximation so its beat may drift slightly from the shader pulse.

### `669-kids-hum-answer` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ kids ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 448, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/669-kids-hum-answer](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/669-kids-hum-answer) ‚ÄĒ **"Hum & Answer": a child hums one note, closes their eyes, and an unseen friend answers ‚ÄĒ not by resolving sweetly, but by LEANING on a tense note and then SIGHING down to rest, so the child discovers tension‚Üírelease with no screen at all.** The lab's **FIRST off-the-glass KIDS piece** ‚ÄĒ the directest hit on the jury's (2026-06-16) loudest, most-repeated, still-unaddressed directive ("get at least one builder off the glass; 13 of 15 render to a glass screen; the 2 that aren't are the best things here" + the Karel-facing line) ‚ÄĒ and it shipped the ‚≠ź PRIORITY off-glass banked seed (`664-kids-hum-answer`, ¬ß446) while pushing it past the banked single 4‚Äď3 into a full chain. **Off-the-glass / audio-first:** near-black screen, ONE soft CSS radial glow that breathes with post-limiter amplitude and shifts hue (violet/blue while a suspension is TENSE ‚Üí warm amber as it RESOLVES); the whole experience is meant to work eyes-closed, the glow is there only for a glancing eye. **Input:** mic (`getUserMedia({audio})`); real-time monophonic pitch detection by **autocorrelation (Chris-Wilson approach)** ‚ÄĒ RMS gate + clarity gate + parabolic-interpolation refine, ~75‚Äď1000 Hz, **octave-collapsed** into a child-voice band (~G3‚ÄďG4) to defend against octave errors; a short stability window means it answers a *deliberate* hum, not a passing slide. **The harmonic event (NOT pentatonic / NOT scale-snap):** the detected hum becomes a tonic and an unseen synthesized choir walks a genuine **suspension CHAIN** of three textbook common-practice figures that all resolve **DOWN by step** ‚ÄĒ **4‚Äď3** (P4 sighing to the M3), then **7‚Äď6** (m7 leaning to the M6), then **2‚Äď1** (M2 settling to the unison) ‚ÄĒ each tension held ~1.1 s, a ~0.3 s downward portamento "sigh," then ~0.9 s of rest, over a tonic drone an octave below. The child meets a tense note and hears it resolve: the denial of closure, then closure. **Synthesis (NO samples, NO AI voice):** formant-bandpassed sawtooth "ah" voices (three parallel bandpass resonators ~800/1150/2900 Hz). Safe master chain `gain (0.34) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`, capped per-voice gain 0.16, soft envelopes, no harsh transients. **Privacy:** no API route, no network ‚ÄĒ the mic stream is connected only to an analyser, never routed to output, never recorded or sent (stated on screen). **Idle / no-mic auto-demo:** mic denied/silent ‚Üí a self-playing loop fires a synthesized "child" note that triggers the suspension-chain answer every several seconds with a `text-rose-300` notice, so a silent 06:30 glance still hears tension‚Üíresolution with zero hardware; full cleanup of MediaStream tracks / AudioContext / rAF / timers on unmount. References: the **4‚Äď3 / 7‚Äď6 / 2‚Äď1 suspension figures** of common-practice voice leading; **tonal closure and its denial as perceived emotional cues in children** (developmental music-cognition literature, RESEARCH ¬ß448 ‚ÄĒ children read closure/its-denial before they can label major/minor, making tension‚Üírelease the most age-robust harmonic event here); **Bobby McFerrin's "Circlesong"** call-and-response model. Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß448** (which harmonic event a 4yo can actually perceive: *change* + *closure* before *mode*) ‚Üí the dive's finding + the jury's off-glass directive jointly selected this from a kids **WIDE** fire of three orthogonal harmonic-event explorers: beat **`668-kids-two-suns`** (continuous major‚ÜĒminor third-glide, tilt ‚Üí three.js, cosmic-dramatic ‚ÄĒ strongest renderer-diversity, but the mode-flip premise is developmentally shaky for a 4yo and 669 was the only off-glass sibling) and **`670-kids-drone-cave`** (shifting tanpura drone under fixed bells, gamepad ‚Üí WebGL2, mysterious ‚ÄĒ fresh moving-pedal mechanism, but WebGL2 is over-represented 4√ó and gamepad-fly overlaps 636); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬ß448** seeds. **Ambition honest 2/5** (the kids norm): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (autocorrelation pitch-detect w/ gates+octave-collapse ¬∑ suspension-chain voice-leading engine ¬∑ formant "ah" synth + tonic drone ¬∑ amplitude/tension-driven glow + demo fallback = 4) + **#3** named refs (the suspension figures ¬∑ McFerrin ¬∑ developmental tonal-closure literature). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ honest: the mic‚Üíharmonized-answer core has lab precedent (`280-kids-echo-canyon`); the fresh layer is the suspension *chain* pedagogy (tension‚Üírelease walked across several figures), which is why this lost the ¬ß446 tie-break to 662 but wins now on the binding off-glass directive. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-16)=[pentatonic/scale-snap "no-wrong-notes" TECH 6√ó ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT 4√ó ¬∑ look-ahead-scheduler-generative-bed as the only idea 7√ó ¬∑ warm/cozy kids VIBE 4√ó ¬∑ glass-screen as the primary deliverable (13/15)] ¬∑ picked=[**mic/voice INPUT** (love-aligned `158-kids-hum-paint`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) ¬∑ **audio-first / OFF-GLASS OUTPUT** (the rarest+best-rated output in the lab; the kids side's first ever) ¬∑ **autocorrelation pitch-detect ‚Üí suspension-chain voice-leading TECH** (genuine dissonance‚Üíresolution, explicitly NOT pentatonic, NOT a scheduler-bed) ¬∑ **hushed/sacred, tender-curious VIBE** (NOT warm-cozy, NOT silly)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag, and the only sibling that breaks the glass-screen monoculture. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 37.0s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (484/484)`, `.next/server/app/dream/669-kids-hum-answer.html` emitted ‚ÄĒ prerendered static ‚óč; losers `668`/`670` confirmed absent), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no audio/mic in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the no-mic demo loop means the suspension‚Üíresolution plays on a glance with zero hardware; unverified: pitch-detection accuracy on a real child's breathy voice, and the felt musicality/timing of the leans and sighs (the one tuning surface, on a real device).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/669-kids-hum-answer/README.md`

### `671-glasswork` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 449, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/671-glasswork](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/671-glasswork) ‚ÄĒ **"Glasswork": a tender, intimate, 3am generative music-box whose harmony *breathes* through REAL four-part voice-leading ‚ÄĒ on every chord change each voice glides (audible portamento) to its NEAREST chord tone, so you both SEE the threads cross and HEAR the pad slide rather than jump.** The directest hit on JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #5 ("declare the missing middle solved and freeze groove/EDM for a week ‚ÄĒ the un-built adult register is now **tender / intimate** (the banked `660-glasswork`) ‚ÄĒ go there") ‚ÄĒ the explicit, named adult ask for this window, and the realization of the long-banked tender seed. **Audio (all Web Audio, no samples, no deps):** key is **D Dorian** (the natural-6 gives the wistful-not-sad colour, deliberately NOT C-major-pentatonic) with a rare Lydian-#11 tint; harmony is a **tension/resolution-weighted random walk** over a small diatonic palette (Dm7 ¬∑ G ¬∑ C ¬∑ Am7 ¬∑ Em ¬∑ F ¬∑ IVadd9 ¬∑ a rare tint) with hand-tuned transition weights giving a homeward gravity, a new chord every ~6‚Äď10 s, never a fixed loop (`compose.ts`). The technique anchor: an **exhaustive 4-voice nearest-tone assignment** (`voiceleading.ts`) that minimizes total semitone motion with doubling/unison penalties so the chord stays open, then each pad voice **portamentos ~0.4‚Äď0.8 s** to its target ‚ÄĒ the glide is the point. A separate **never-repeating weighted melody** arches over each phrase (sine register-arch + woven rests, `compose.ts`). Synth (`synth.ts`): FM music-box bell (melody) ¬∑ 4 portamento glass-pad voices ¬∑ soft sub following the root ¬∑ ConvolverNode reverb (synthetic generated impulse) ¬∑ filtered feedback-delay shimmer ¬∑ master ends in a **`DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter** (‚ąí6 dB / ratio 12 / master 0.34) so it can never clip or blast. **Output: inline SVG** (the scarcest renderer ‚ÄĒ last SVG was `649`; off the jury-banned **Canvas2D**, off the hot three.js/WebGL2): a dark constellation of soft `<radialGradient>`+`<feGaussianBlur>` nodes (one per pad voice, y = pitch) that bloom on each onset, **faint threads tracing the voice-leading** (a fading `<line>` from each voice's old tone to its new one ‚ÄĒ you watch the harmony move), and brief brighter sparks for melody bells; React re-render throttled to ~24 fps with all per-frame state in refs. **Interaction is gentle and optional** ‚ÄĒ pointer height = brighter register + more shimmer, pointer-right = busier (shorter chords/faster melody); a tap "drops a stone" pulling harmony toward rest on the next change; ~1.5 s idle eases back to autonomous. **It plays itself** ‚ÄĒ Begin and the pad swells in, the melody enters, chords change on their own, so a silent 06:30 glance sees blooming nodes + crossing threads and hears the piece with zero interaction or hardware. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no network/mic/camera/GPU/secret** (pure client Web Audio + inline SVG ‚ÄĒ the lowest failure surface in the lab; AudioContext created inside the Begin gesture for iOS, full teardown on unmount). References: **Brian Eno** (*Music for Airports*, *Reflection* ‚ÄĒ generative ambient) ¬∑ **Harold Budd** (*The Pearl*) ¬∑ **Erik Satie** (*Gymnop√©dies* ‚ÄĒ intimate melancholy); technique anchor: classical four-part **voice-leading**. Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß449** (generative-ambient that obeys voice-leading rules ‚ÄĒ minimize each voice's motion, omit minor-9ths ‚ÄĒ is a live browser lineage [Alex Bainter / generative.fm], anchored in Eno's *Music for Airports*; tagged `[older, foundational]` honestly ‚ÄĒ the build is jury-directive + IDEAS-seed driven, path (c)). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers across under-built adult registers, each a different input √ó output √ó technique √ó vibe, none touching a banned tag): beat **`672-cinema-swell`** (a cinematic orchestral-swell instrument ‚ÄĒ hold chords ‚Üí film-score string divisi blooms with crescendo swells + a tension arc, MIDI/keyboard ‚Üí three.js, Zimmer/Richter/J√≥hannsson; Karel care #4 journey-engine alt) and **`673-kepler-chimes`** (the music of the spheres ‚ÄĒ planets whose orbital periods snap to small-integer mean-motion resonance become an audible consonant polyrhythm that locks from phasing, tilt ‚Üí raw WebGL2, Kepler/Matt-Russo-System-Sounds); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬ß449** seeds. **Ambition honest 2/5** (the lab norm): **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (harmonic random-walk ¬∑ exhaustive nearest-tone voice-leading engine ¬∑ weighted never-repeating melody + scheduler ¬∑ 4-voice glass synth w/ reverb + feedback-delay shimmer ¬∑ inline-SVG renderer = 5) + **#3** named refs (Eno/Budd/Satie + voice-leading). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ generative-ambient voice-leading is worked territory; the value is the explicitly-named **tender register fill** + the scarcest renderer + the lowest-risk glance candidate. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-16, rolling-15)=[pentatonic/scale-snap "no-wrong-notes" TECH 6√ó ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT 4√ó ¬∑ look-ahead-scheduler-generative-bed as the only idea 7√ó ¬∑ warm/cozy kids VIBE 4√ó ¬∑ glass-screen as the sole deliverable] ¬∑ picked=[**pointer (gentle/optional) INPUT** ¬∑ **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer ‚ÄĒ off banned Canvas2D AND off hot three.js/WebGL2) ¬∑ **tension-weighted harmonic walk + exhaustive nearest-tone voice-leading TECH** (explicitly NOT pentatonic, NOT a scheduler-bed-as-only-idea ‚ÄĒ it has 5 distinct ideas) ¬∑ **intimate / wistful / melancholy VIBE** (the jury's named open adult register; NOT warm-cozy, NOT ecstatic/groove ‚ÄĒ which the jury froze this week)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every binding banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 117s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (485/485)`, `.next/server/app/dream/671-glasswork.html` emitted ‚ÄĒ prerendered static ‚óč, `/dream/671-glasswork 5.43 kB / 108 kB First Load`; losers `672`/`673` confirmed absent), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ but uniquely low-risk (pure SVG + Web Audio, zero GPU/sensor/network/key surface) and the piece is fully autonomous on Begin so a silent 06:30 glance is alive with zero hardware; unverified: the felt glide timing, the chord-walk weights, melody rest rates, and reverb/shimmer balance (reasoned defaults ‚ÄĒ the one tuning surface, on a real device).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/671-glasswork/README.md`

### `677-presence-field` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ DEEP-winner (cycle 451, 2026-06-17)
[/dream/677-presence-field](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/677-presence-field) ‚ÄĒ **"Presence Field": step back from the screen and your whole body, tracked as a luminous skeleton, conducts a SPATIAL ensemble ‚ÄĒ each limb is a sustained voice placed in 3D around you, so spreading and raising your arms sweeps the music through the room.** The directest hit on the lab's single biggest untouched first, named across THREE consecutive juries (JURY 2026-06-16 #2 + standing: "depth-camera / room-presence / projection installation ‚ÄĒ zero embodied-spatial builds still") ‚ÄĒ the first ADULT installation/room-presence piece, and Karel's care #3 (live-performance) + #5 (installation mode). **The core idea ‚ÄĒ spatialization IS the instrument:** one Web-Audio `AudioListener` at the origin, and **seven sustained voices (head, both wrists, both elbows, torso, hips) each routed through its OWN `PannerNode` with `panningModel="HRTF"`** placed at the live 3D position of its tracked joint (screen-x ‚Üí left/right, height ‚Üí register + y, implied depth ‚Üí z). Moving the body audibly moves the voices around the listener ‚ÄĒ that sweep is the payload (the realization of RESEARCH ¬ß451's spatialization‚Üípresence finding and "Sounding Bodies" pose‚Üíspatial-sound). **Harmony (NOT pentatonic ‚ÄĒ banned this cycle):** a slow drifting D-Dorian chord cycle (Dm7‚ÜíG7‚ÜíAm7‚ÜíFmaj7‚ÜíDm7, ~9‚Äď13s, 2.2s glides), adult/meditative, not a no-wrong-notes pad and not a groove look-ahead scheduler; ear-safe master gain (‚Č§0.32) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination, dry + convolution-reverb wet send, ~0.7s fade-in; stillness eases to a soft enveloping drone (`settle()`). **Input:** webcam **full-body pose** via **MediaPipe Pose** (Tasks-Vision `PoseLandmarker`), loaded from the jsDelivr **CDN at runtime** via an indirect `new Function('return import(...)')` so the bundler never resolves it (no npm dep, build never depends on it). **Output: three.js** (the scarcest renderer ‚ÄĒ 0√ó in the last 10 ships; off the jury-banned Canvas2D, off the hotter WebGL2) ‚ÄĒ a dark foggy room with a faint grid floor, glowing additive joint spheres + skeleton bone-lines, and a hued glowing marker at each voice's live spatial position; slow auto-rotate for installation feel; animates BEFORE audio unlocks. **Privacy:** camera is on-device only, analysed in-browser, never stored or sent (stated on screen); no API route, no guard needed (no network/server/secret ‚ÄĒ the only network is the public MediaPipe model/wasm CDN). **Graceful degrade (the 06:30-glance path is MediaPipe-independent):** an **idle preview** runs a *synthetic* drifting body through the three.js room + spatial ensemble before Start is even pressed, and any failure (camera denied, MediaPipe/CDN/WASM load error, WebGL loss, no pose, or ~2.5s idle) shows a `text-rose-300` notice and runs that same self-playing virtual body sweeping the full ensemble ‚ÄĒ so a silent glance hears + sees the spatial room with zero hardware and zero CDN dependency. Full teardown on unmount (MediaStream tracks stopped, landmarker closed, three.js renderer/geometries/materials disposed, AudioContext closed, rAF cancelled, resize listener removed). References: **arXiv:2601.22082** (Jan 2026 ‚ÄĒ spatialization + situated audio raise the felt *sense of presence*) ¬∑ **"Sounding Bodies," arXiv:2311.06285** (3D spatial sound from body pose) ¬∑ **Myron Krueger, *Videoplace* (1974)** (the body as the interface, no wearables) ¬∑ **Refik Anadol** room-scale presence. Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß451** (the embodied-spatial room is the lab's biggest untouched first; the research front says the payload is the *spatialization itself*, not the viz) and realizes the long-banked **`442-body-orchestra`** seed. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ body-presence ‚Üí spatial-audio ‚ÄĒ via three body-sensing approaches): beat **`678-presence-flow`** (the BULLETPROOF no-dependency twin ‚ÄĒ webcam frame-differencing ‚Üí the same HRTF ensemble, raw WebGL2; banked ‚≠ź as the safest spatial-presence resurrect) and **`679-presence-veil`** (the ENVELOPMENT take ‚ÄĒ selfie-segmentation silhouette MASS widens the per-voice azimuth fan from a frontal arc to a surround RING as you approach, raw WebGL2 veil; banked); both **IDEAS ¬ß451**. **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (MediaPipe-Pose body tracking ¬∑ 7-voice HRTF spatial-panner ensemble + drifting D-Dorian harmony ¬∑ three.js luminous-room renderer + synthetic-body auto-demo = 4) + **#3** named refs (arXiv:2601.22082 ¬∑ "Sounding Bodies" ¬∑ Krueger ¬∑ Anadol). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe pose/hands/segmentation is used across the KIDS side (217/287/295/419/444/582/617); the genuinely-open frontier is the *register* (an ADULT installation/room-presence piece with spatialization-as-instrument = 0√ó builds), not the sensor. **#5 NOT hard-claimed** ‚ÄĒ the spatialization-presence paper is Jan 2026 (~5 months, not a <30-day drop). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-16)=[pentatonic/scale-snap TECH ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT ¬∑ look-ahead-scheduler-generative-bed as the only idea ¬∑ warm/cozy kids VIBE ¬∑ glass-screen as the primary/default-reflex deliverable] ¬∑ picked=[**full-body-pose / room-presence INPUT** (embodied, off the glass-control reflex ‚ÄĒ you play it from across the room with your body, not a finger on the screen) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (scarcest renderer, 0√ó in last 10; NOT Canvas2D) ¬∑ **HRTF spatialization-as-instrument + drifting modal voice-leading TECH** (explicitly NOT pentatonic, NOT a scheduler-groove-bed) ¬∑ **adult meditative / installation / awe VIBE** (NOT warm-cozy kids, NOT the frozen ecstatic/groove, NOT doom)]` ‚ÄĒ clean on every banned tag; addresses the *embodied-spatial / get-off-the-couch* reading of the off-glass ask (vs the audio-first reading 669/666/655 already serve). **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 48s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (487/487)` [486 from cycle 450 + 677 = 487, confirming 678/679 absent], `/dream/677-presence-field 6.36 kB / 298 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óč, `.next/server/app/dream/677-presence-field.html` emitted), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/audio/GPU in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the idle-preview + auto-demo guarantee a live glance with zero hardware; unverified by body/ear: whether MediaPipe Pose loads + tracks well on Karel's phone, whether the joint‚ÜíHRTF placement reads as voices genuinely moving *around* you (HRTF front/back/elevation cues are weaker on speakers than headphones), and the felt latency/smoothing of the skeleton on a real device.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/677-presence-field/README.md`
