### `702-kids-monster-band` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ kids ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 460, 2026-06-17)
[/dream/702-kids-monster-band](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/702-kids-monster-band) ‚ÄĒ **"Monster Band": two little kids on two phones build ONE goofy 16-step monster groove neither could make alone.** The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-17 on **three** provocations at once: **#3 "ship a multi-user / two-player piece ‚ÄĒ still 0√ó across the entire window"** (the genuinely unbuilt register; *breaks the standing solo monoculture* ‚ÄĒ every one of the last 15 was one person alone), **#1 "groove, not a cadence"** (a beat built by tapping, emphatically NOT the harmonic-event/voice-leading template banned on the kids side), and **#5 "make a kid laugh"** (googly monsters that squash and BOING). Two browser tabs/phones open the same URL ‚Üí join the same room over same-origin **`BroadcastChannel`** (no network, no server, **no api route, no guard, no secret**) ‚Üí both phase-lock to **one shared 16-step ~96 BPM loop** via a broadcast beat-zero **epoch** (first player claims epoch 0; joiners adopt it; ties resolve last-write-wins toward the earliest). Each kid taps four giant ‚Č•96px buttons ‚ÄĒ **ūü•Ā BOOM** (low sine thump) ¬∑ **ūüďĮ HONK** (triangle+FM down-glide) ¬∑ **ūüęß POP** (band-passed noise blip) ¬∑ **ūüĆÄ BOING** (rubbery saw up-glide) ‚ÄĒ that drop sounds onto the nearest of the 16 steps and **loop forever**; the two kids' patterns overlay into one emergent groove. **Each monster squashes and bounces on EVERY hit ‚ÄĒ including the friend's hits** (instant `hit` messages + last-write-wins per-player 16-step pattern beads), so each kid *sees* the other playing in real time. **Input:** multi-user (same-origin BroadcastChannel) + big-button tap ‚ÄĒ the social co-play is the mechanic (off the jury-banned touch-as-primary reflex). **Output: three.js via @react-three/fiber** ‚ÄĒ bouncy googly 3D monsters with per-hit squash-and-stretch envelopes (off the banned WebGL2 + audio-first-SVG; three.js 1√ó‚Üí2√ó in the rolling-10, well under the 4√ó ban line). **Technique:** Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler (~25ms tick / ~120ms look-ahead) scheduling audio LOCALLY against the shared epoch (only the epoch + patterns cross the channel ‚ÄĒ audio is never streamed, which is what keeps the loops phase-locked); presence via hello/welcome/bye + a ~1.6s silence timeout; the two monsters detuned ¬Ī6% so they sound like siblings. **A real tapped GROOVE, emphatically NOT a harmonic event/cadence.** **Solo glance covered:** if no second player is present a friendly ūüĎĽ ghost-friend monster auto-plays a complementary pattern, and a ~2.5s idle auto-demo seeds a starter beat ‚ÄĒ so it sounds and bounces from the first second on one device; the ghost steps aside the instant a real friend joins and returns if they leave. Kids-safe by construction: ‚Č•96px targets, <100ms response, master gain ~0.3 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` (nothing harsh), iOS AudioContext unlock in the Start gesture, full teardown (close BroadcastChannel, cancel rAF, close AudioContext, clear timers). References: **Toca Band** (Toca Boca ‚ÄĒ the no-reading tap-a-character-to-add-a-part toy this is modelled on) ¬∑ **Yamaha Tenori-on** (the lit 16-step grid sequencer) ¬∑ **The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers** (1970s‚Äď80s networked ensembles ‚ÄĒ *send control data, not audio*; "an ensemble nobody could play alone"). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß460** (the multi-user register is the jury's 0√ó ask; The Hub's control-signal architecture ported to a kid-legible Toca-Band interface). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 divergent silly/groove explorers on different embodied inputs): beat **`703-kids-boing-zoo`** ‚≠ź (tilt ‚Üí jelly-animal physics bonks ‚Üí emergent slapstick rhythm; Canvas2D, zero deps/GPU/permission ‚ÄĒ the most bulletproof + funniest, banked ‚≠ź as the safest silly-kids resurrect) and **`704-kids-funny-face-party`** (front-camera motion ‚Üí googly creature + a FREEZE-dance game; Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ the directest off-glass/embodied take with a fresh freeze-dance mechanic, banked); both **IDEAS ¬ß460**. **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (BroadcastChannel presence + last-write-wins beads sync ¬∑ shared-epoch look-ahead scheduler ¬∑ local Web Audio FM/noise monster synth ¬∑ three.js/r3f bouncy-monster viz = 4) + **#3** named refs (Toca Band ¬∑ Tenori-on ¬∑ The Hub/League of Automatic Music Composers). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ BroadcastChannel multi-user already exists in the lab (319/334/341); this is a fresh *framing/recency* win (multi-user is 0√ó in the whole window) + breaks the solo monoculture, not a technique-first. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-17)=[harmonic-event/voice-leading/tension-resolution TECH (esp. kids) ¬∑ audio-first+minimal-SVG/glow OUTPUT ¬∑ touch/on-glass-primary INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ hushed/tender VIBE ¬∑ standing single-user/solo] ¬∑ picked=[**multi-user / BroadcastChannel INPUT** (two players are the input; secondary tap; *breaks the solo ban*) ¬∑ **three.js/r3f OUTPUT** (off WebGL2 + audio-first-SVG) ¬∑ **shared-clock 16-step tapped-groove TECH** (NOT a harmonic event) ¬∑ **silly/friendly monster-band VIBE** (off hushed/tender ‚ÄĒ laugh-first)]` ‚ÄĒ clears EVERY ban and actively *breaks the standing solo monoculture*. **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates exit 0; then authoritative winner-only `npm run build` **EXIT 0, `Generating static pages (497/497)`** [+1 route = the winner], `/dream/702-kids-monster-band` present), **NOT browser/two-device-verified** (no second device/audio/GPU in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the ghost-friend + idle auto-demo guarantee a live sounding glance on one device; unverified by hand: true two-device sync convergence under contention (epoch-adoption + presence-timeout logic is in place and degrades to the ghost), and whether the monster voices + squash read as "a band two kids built together" on a real phone.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/702-kids-monster-band/README.md`

### `704-spectral-seance` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ DEEP-winner (cycle 461, 2026-06-17)
[/dream/704-spectral-seance](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/704-spectral-seance) ‚ÄĒ **"Spectral S√©ance": a generative sound dreams an austere data-image ‚ÄĒ and then the image *becomes the next instrument you hear*, re-sonified column-by-column as a spectrogram while a cyan scan-line sweeps it in lock-step. You literally see AND hear the picture being played.** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #4** ("extend the two ceiling builds [689, 666] instead of starting a sixth tonal-tension toy") ‚ÄĒ the lab's first true **closed audio‚Üíimage‚ÜíAUDIO loop**, where ceiling-build `689-dream-chapters` only went one-way (audio‚Üíimage). **The closed loop, four subsystems:** (1) a generative **inharmonic spectral bed** ‚ÄĒ 8 partials at NON-integer ratios (1, 2.07, 3.31, 4.62‚Ä¶) so it stays a *texture* and never collapses into a chord/cadence (the harmonic-event/voice-leading template the jury banned this cycle); (2) an **AnalyserNode spectral descriptor** (low/mid/high band split, centroid brightness, flatness/roughness, density) ‚Üí a **controlled-vocabulary prompt** (bright+sparse ‚Üí "high thin filaments of white light on black, austere data grid"; dark+rough ‚Üí "dense low charcoal static"); (3) the dreamed image ‚ÄĒ **guarded `fal-ai/flux/schnell`** when a key exists, else a **deterministic descriptor-seeded procedural data-image** (domain-warped interference/line-field + grid); (4) **the return trip** ‚ÄĒ the image is downsampled to a 128√ó48 offscreen buffer and read as a **spectrogram/score**: each column = a moment, each row = a log-spaced frequency bin (~80Hz‚Äď6kHz, top = high pitch), and a bank of **48 oscillators** has its per-row gains driven directly by per-column pixel brightness as the scan-line sweeps (~75ms/column, ~9.6s per 128-column pass); the re-sonified spectrum then feeds the *next* descriptor, closing the loop. **Input:** autonomous/generative + AI-image (NO mic, NO touch-as-primary ‚ÄĒ it runs itself; a single "Begin" gesture unlocks audio for iOS, ~2.5s idle auto-start). **Output: raw WebGL2** ‚ÄĒ the dreamed image + sweeping cyan scan-line + Ikeda grid/vignette rendered as a textured quad in a fragment shader (Canvas2D used ONLY for the tiny offscreen pixel-sampler, never for output). **Technique:** image-as-spectrogram cross-modal re-sonification ‚ÄĒ a genuinely never-used mechanic in the lab (689/441 were one-way audio‚Üíimage; this is the literal *return trip*). **Vibe:** Ryoji Ikeda austere data-spectacle (black ground, white/cyan, precise) ‚ÄĒ deliberately far from the jury-banned hushed/tender pole. **Bulletproof keyless glance:** any non-200 / network error / CORS-taint silently falls through to the procedural data-image, re-sonified through the *identical* column-by-column path ‚ÄĒ so with no `FAL_KEY` (how the public preview usually runs) it still dreams an image AND plays it back as sound; the status line shows "dreaming (procedural)" in `text-emerald-300/95` so it reads as fine-without-a-key. WebGL2 absence shows a graceful notice and still runs audio. Ear-safe: 48 osc summed with tiny per-osc gains ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí master hard-capped at 0.34, smooth gain ramps (no zipper clicks); full teardown on unmount (stop all oscillators, close audioCtx, clear timers, cancel rAF). References: **Ryoji Ikeda** (data-spectacle) ¬∑ **Iannis Xenakis *UPIC*** (1977, draw-the-sound) ¬∑ **the *ANS synthesizer*** (1958, image-as-spectrogram) ¬∑ the spectrogram‚ÜĒwaveform synthesis lineage. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *the music dreams a picture and the dream changes the music* ‚ÄĒ via 2 approaches to **how the image returns to audio**): beat **`703-latent-oracle`** ‚≠ź (the SOFT-closure twin ‚ÄĒ the loop closes via *dominant color*‚Üísynth [hue‚Üícutoff, brightness‚Üíshimmer, saturation‚Üídissonance], WebGL2 ping-pong feedback smear, Anadol/Memo Akten *Learning to See*; the long-banked 687 seed, fully built ‚ÄĒ banked ‚≠ź **IDEAS ¬ß461** as the resurrect for a key-awake night, since its color-drift narrows keyless). **Ambition honest 4/5**: **#1** never-used technique (image-as-spectrogram literal re-sonification ‚ÄĒ the closed *return trip*; 689/441 were one-way) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (inharmonic generative bed + FFT descriptor‚Üíprompt + guarded-flux/procedural image gen + 48-osc re-sonifier = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (Ikeda ¬∑ Xenakis UPIC ¬∑ ANS) ¬∑ **#5** recent research (RESEARCH ¬ß461 dive + the ¬ß455-banked seed it consumes). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-17)=[harmonic-event/voice-leading/tension-resolution TECH ¬∑ audio-first+minimal-SVG/glow OUTPUT ¬∑ touch/on-glass-primary INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ hushed/tender VIBE ¬∑ standing single-user/solo] ¬∑ picked=[**autonomous/generative + AI-image INPUT** (it dreams itself; off the touch reflex) ¬∑ **WebGL2 raster OUTPUT** ¬∑ **image-as-spectrogram cross-modal re-sonification TECH** (emphatically NOT a harmonic event) ¬∑ **Ikeda austere data-spectacle VIBE** (off hushed/tender)]`. *Note on the two flagged tensions:* (a) **WebGL2** ‚ÄĒ the jury banned it on its rolling-**15** (4√ó: 658/659/662/675), but the diversity-audit's hard gate is the rolling-**10**, where WebGL2 is **cold** (last use 675, 9 ships back; 0√ó in the last 10) ‚ÄĒ so reviving it is legitimately diverse by the binding mechanic; flagged honestly. (b) **solo** ‚ÄĒ this is single-user, but the standing solo monoculture was *just broken* by 694 (cycle 457) + 702 (cycle 460), and JURY #4 (extend the inherently-contemplative ceiling builds) explicitly trumps for an adult cycle. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` **EXIT 0**, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 34.7s`, `‚úď Generating static pages (499/499)`, `/dream/704-spectral-seance 6.9 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered **static ‚óč** + its `/api` route), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no audio/GPU in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ the ~2.5s auto-start + procedural fallback guarantee a live, sounding glance with zero key/hardware; unverified on a real device: whether the 48-osc spectrogram playback reads as "the picture is the instrument," whether the inharmonic bed stays pleasant over minutes, and the felt latency of scan-line‚ÜĒaudio lock.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/704-spectral-seance/README.md`

### `710-presence-bloom` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ DEEP-winner (cycle 463, 2026-06-18)
[/dream/710-presence-bloom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/710-presence-bloom) ‚ÄĒ **"Presence Bloom": the genuine cycle-2 of `677-presence-field`. Where 677 placed STATIC point-voices at your joints, here a deliberate wrist gesture (reach ‚Üí dwell ~0.65s ‚Üí outward flick) LEAVES BEHIND a persistent HRTF voice fixed in 3D that keeps singing ‚ÄĒ so over minutes you build a spatial chord-architecture around your own ears, rendered as a 60k-particle WebGPU storm where each voice is an attractor.** Two new capabilities over 677: **(1) accretion / long-form memory** ‚ÄĒ voices persist and accrete (cap ~24, oldest fades), each taking the next pitch in a slowly drifting **D-Dorian** modal field (Dm9‚ÜíGmaj9‚ÜíEm11‚ÜíDadd9 region, homeward gravity on D/A), so the set is an evolving spatial chord and the field is genuinely *different at minute 5 than minute 1* (the 689/701-coral accreting-memory ceiling the jury asked the lab to extend); **(2) distance + room reverberation as a felt axis** ‚ÄĒ each voice's `PannerNode` (HRTF, inverse distance) has a reverb send into a shared `ConvolverNode` that GROWS with distance, so near voices are present+dry, far voices quiet+wet (the literal realization of RESEARCH ¬ß463's **arXiv:2505.18020** distance-cues+reverb finding). **The core idea ‚ÄĒ spatialization IS the instrument:** one Web-Audio `AudioListener` at the origin (your ears); harmony is the *material*, the *subject* is building luminous spatial architecture (emphatically NOT a harmonic-event/cadence ‚ÄĒ the jury's banned template). **Input:** webcam **full-body pose** via **MediaPipe Tasks-Vision `PoseLandmarker`** loaded from CDN at runtime via `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ ‚Ä¶)` (bundler never resolves it; no npm dep; build never depends on it). **Output: WebGPU compute** (`render.ts ‚Üí makeRenderer`) ‚ÄĒ tens of thousands of GPU particles advected by a WGSL compute shader, each persistent voice an **attractor** particles gather/orbit/bloom around (nearer = brighter/larger), additive instanced point-sprite render; **with a first-class Canvas2D fallback** (~3600 particles, the SAME accreting-attractor behavior, additive trails + glow haloes) that is the EXPECTED path on most devices, so a WGSL failure *degrades* rather than breaks. **Vibe:** luminous architectural **AWE**, Anadol-scale ‚ÄĒ deliberately pushed away from 677's meditative-hush (the jury-banned tender/hushed pole, the explicit risk of a 677 cycle-2). **Privacy/safety:** camera analysed on-device only, never stored/sent; no API route, no guard needed (no server/secret; only network is the public MediaPipe CDN). Ear-safe: per-voice `GainNode` ‚Üí HRTF `PannerNode` ‚Üí (dry + distance-scaled reverb send) ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.32 (scaled down as voice count grows) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination; soft attacks, ~0.7s fade-in, AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start gesture (iOS). **Graceful degrade (the 06:30-glance path is MediaPipe/GPU-independent):** visuals animate on mount (idle preview) before audio unlocks, and any failure (camera denied, MediaPipe/CDN load error, no pose, ~2.5s idle, or no WebGPU) runs a **synthetic ghost body** that drifts and places voices on its own ‚ÄĒ building the architecture hands-free ‚ÄĒ and falls to the Canvas2D particle field if WebGPU is absent, all with visible `text-rose-300` error notices; full teardown on unmount (cancel rAF, destroy GPU buffers, close AudioContext, stop camera tracks, remove listeners). References: **Refik Anadol** (*Latent City* / *Machine Hallucinations* ‚ÄĒ GPU particle data-architecture awe) ¬∑ **arXiv:2505.18020** ("Effects of auditory distance cues and reverberation on spatial perception" ‚ÄĒ distance+reverb as the spatial signal, the cycle-2 deepening) ¬∑ **arXiv:2407.13083** ("Modeling and Driving Human Body Soundfields through Acoustic Primitives" ‚ÄĒ body movement shapes spatial sound). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß463** (the embodied-spatial cycle-2's real upgrade is persistence + distance/reverb, not more joints). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *body leaves behind persistent accreting HRTF voices ‚Üí a resonant architecture* ‚ÄĒ via 3 renderers): beat **`708-presence-cathedral`** (the most literal 677 cycle-2 ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe-Pose + three.js cathedral of emissive light-pillars; banked **IDEAS ¬ß463**, lost on renderer over-use [three.js ‚Üí 4√ó] + CDN risk without a GPU-fallback safety net) and **`709-presence-tide`** ‚≠ź (the BULLETPROOF zero-dependency twin ‚ÄĒ webcam frame-diff [no ML/CDN/network] + Canvas2D top-down room-map; banked ‚≠ź **IDEAS ¬ß463** as the safest spatial-presence resurrect, realizing the long-banked 678-presence-flow lane). **Ambition honest 3‚Äď4/5**: **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (MediaPipe-Pose + gesture detector ¬∑ persistent-accreting HRTF spatial-voice engine w/ distance attenuation + distance-scaled reverb ¬∑ drifting D-Dorian field w/ accretion + chord-drift ¬∑ WebGPU WGSL particle storm + Canvas2D fallback = 4‚Äď5) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (Anadol ¬∑ arXiv:2505.18020 ¬∑ arXiv:2407.13083) ¬∑ **#4** genuine **cycle-2 of 677-presence-field** (the persistence + distance-reverb capability 677 lacked) ¬∑ **#5** RESEARCH ¬ß463 same-day. **#1 NOT hard-claimed** ‚ÄĒ HRTF-spatialization-as-instrument + MediaPipe Pose both exist at 677; the fresh capability is *accretion + distance/reverb* (a cycle-2 deepening), not a lab-first technique. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-17)=[harmonic-event/voice-leading TECH ¬∑ audio-first+SVG/glow OUTPUT ¬∑ touch/on-glass-primary INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ hushed/tender VIBE ¬∑ standing solo] ¬∑ picked=[**full-body-pose / embodied-spatial INPUT** (off the touch reflex ‚ÄĒ played from across the room) ¬∑ **WebGPU OUTPUT** (scarcest non-banned renderer, 1√ó in window; off banned WebGL2, off warming three.js [677/689/699=3√ó], off hot Canvas2D) ¬∑ **persistent-accreting HRTF-spatialization + distance/reverb TECH** (NOT a harmonic event) ¬∑ **luminous architectural AWE / Anadol VIBE** (NOT hushed/tender)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every banned tag; WebGPU is the renderer-diverse choice. **Build-verified** (all-3-present `npm run build` exit 0 / 503 pages; then authoritative winner-only `npm run build` **EXIT 0**, `‚úď Generating static pages (501/501)`, `/dream/710-presence-bloom 9.41 kB / 116 kB First Load` prerendered **static ‚óč**), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/camera/audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ idle preview + ghost-body auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a live, sounding glance with zero hardware/CDN; unverified on a real device: the WGSL compute path on real hardware (degrades to Canvas2D, not breaks), whether placed voices read as moving *around* you (HRTF cues weaker on speakers than headphones), the dwell-then-flick thresholds, MediaPipe load on Karel's phone, iOS audio unlock.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/710-presence-bloom/README.md`

### `711-kids-beat-buddies` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ kids ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 464, 2026-06-18)
[/dream/711-kids-beat-buddies](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/711-kids-beat-buddies) ‚ÄĒ **"Beat Buddies": the lab's FIRST two-player / multi-user kids piece. Two little kids sit on opposite sides of ONE tablet and build a silly band together ‚ÄĒ every pad they tap snaps onto ONE shared looping groove, so the result is always a beat, never noise.** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #3** ("ship a multi-user / two-player piece ‚ÄĒ still 0√ó across the entire window, the genuinely unbuilt register") at the same time as **#1** ("groove/rhythm, not a cadence") and **#5** ("MAKE A KID LAUGH") ‚ÄĒ and it was the only one of this cycle's three explorers to hit the multi-user gap. **Interaction:** the screen splits into two stacked player zones; the **top zone is rotated 180¬į** (`rotate-180`) so the kid across the table reads it right-way-up ‚ÄĒ Player A warm/orange (top), Player B cool/teal (bottom). Each kid has **four big silly-sound pads** (`clamp(64px,18vh,150px)`, emoji glyphs, no reading): drum, boing, honk, slide-whistle. **The core mechanic ‚ÄĒ shared-clock loop-stacking (Incredibox/Sprunki):** a single Web-Audio **look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms `setInterval`, scheduling ~104 BPM 16th-notes ~120 ms ahead) runs ONE clock for BOTH players; a tap doesn't fire raw ‚ÄĒ it registers a *looping layer* with a fixed 16th-note pattern, quantized onto the next step, so adding pads builds a thickening shared groove and tapping again removes the layer. A soft synth kick + shaker always keep the pulse, so there's a beat to lock onto from the first tap. **The togetherness payload:** when BOTH players are active at once the two googly conductor blobs **high-five** with a confetti burst + spark line ‚ÄĒ pure co-play, no winning, no competition (the entrainment science of RESEARCH ¬ß464's **arXiv:2504.03958**: quantize both kids to one clock so locking-in is engineered, not demanded). **Input:** two-player same-device touch (each zone its own pad-state ‚ÄĒ emphatically NOT the jury-banned lone-finger-on-glass reflex; the second person IS the novelty). **Output: Canvas2D** ‚ÄĒ two squash-stretch googly conductor creatures that bop on every beat, grow brighter/bigger as layers stack, flash on each scheduled hit (splashes synced to `ctx.currentTime`), plus confetti. **Technique:** shared-clock quantized loop-stacking groove (a never-before-built mechanic in the lab ‚ÄĒ the lab's first *multi-user* anything on the kids side). **Vibe:** silly co-op band/dance-floor ‚ÄĒ groove + laughter, deliberately NOT a harmonic-event/tension-resolution machine (the jury's banned kids template). **Bulletproof glance (the most robust of the three explorers):** pure tap + synthesis, **no sensors, no camera, no permissions, no network, no CDN, no samples** ‚ÄĒ works instantly for any reviewer on any device, even solo (one person tapping both halves); a ~2.5 s-idle **auto-demo** gently toggles pads itself so a passing glance sees+hears the groove build and thin on its own. Ear-safe: all voices through `gain(0.28) ‚Üí lowpass(7500Hz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; full teardown on unmount (cancel rAF, stop scheduler interval, close/disconnect AudioContext). If AudioContext can't start, a `text-rose-300` notice asks for one more tap. References: **Incredibox / Sprunki** (stackable looping beat layers locked to a shared clock ‚ÄĒ the dominant 2026-live kids beat-making form, RESEARCH ¬ß464) ¬∑ **Toshio Iwai's Tenori-on** (shared lit grid-instrument played by touch). Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß464** (Incredibox-2026 mechanic + ensemble-entrainment science ‚Üí a two-player shared-clock groove). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 divergent groove+laugh explorers on 3 inputs): beat **`712-kids-roll-a-beat`** (tilt-physics slapstick ‚Üí bonks quantized onto a groove, velocity‚Üícomedic-pitch; banked **IDEAS ¬ß464**, lost on tilt-physics over-use [286/451/603/703]) and **`713-kids-dance-drum`** ‚≠ź (off-glass webcam-motion freeze-dance groove + spring-physics mirror creature; banked ‚≠ź **IDEAS ¬ß464** as the directest "get off the glass" / revives the abandoned dance register). **Ambition honest 4/5**: **#1** never-used technique (first multi-user / two-player piece in the lab; shared-clock loop-*stacking* quantizer driving two co-located players on a split+rotated screen) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (shared look-ahead groove scheduler + 6 synth voices ¬∑ split/rotated two-player tap UI w/ per-zone state ¬∑ Canvas2D reactive creatures/splashes/confetti ¬∑ idle auto-demo driver = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs (Incredibox/Sprunki ¬∑ Tenori-on) ¬∑ **#4** multi-cycle (a reusable two-player co-op kids line ‚ÄĒ clean teardown + idle-demo; deepen with two-marble co-op, more pads, streak meter). **#5 NOT claimed** (a play piece about shared groove, not grounded in a specific algorithm-paper ‚ÄĒ though the design *choice* is motivated by ¬ß464's entrainment finding). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-17)=[harmonic-event/voice-leading/tension-resolution TECH ¬∑ audio-first+minimal-SVG/glow OUTPUT ¬∑ touch/on-glass-primary INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ hushed/tender VIBE ¬∑ standing single-user/solo] ¬∑ picked=[**two-player same-device INPUT** (the breaks-the-solo-monoculture move ‚ÄĒ the second person is the point; off the lone-finger reflex) ¬∑ **Canvas2D OUTPUT** ¬∑ **shared-clock quantized loop-stacking groove TECH** (emphatically NOT a harmonic event) ¬∑ **silly co-op band VIBE** (NOT hushed/tender)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every banned tag, and is the rare build that *breaks the standing solo monoculture* (every one of the prior 15 was one person alone). Love-signal: backed by Karel's loves of `98-kids-drum-circle` (rhythm), `217-dance-avatar`, `234-kids-hand-creature`, `169-kids-marble-run`, `83-kids-tilt-rain`. **Build-verified** (two losers `rm -rf`'d, then authoritative winner-only `npm run build` **EXIT 0**, `‚úď Compiled successfully in 46s`, `/dream/711-kids-beat-buddies 4.8 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered **static ‚óč**), **NOT browser-verified by ear/touch** (no audio in sandbox) ‚ÄĒ pure-tap + auto-demo guarantee a live, sounding glance with zero hardware; unverified on a real device: whether two 4-year-olds *feel* the shared lock, the rotated-split ergonomics on a real tablet, and whether the quantize-on-tap latency reads as responsive to a kid.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/711-kids-beat-buddies/README.md`

---

[/dream/712-seismic-room](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/712-seismic-room) ‚ÄĒ **"Tremor": the world's earthquakes, live ‚ÄĒ the moment each one is detected by the global seismic network, it becomes a struck resonant tone and an expanding ripple on a Canvas2D world map; you sit inside the seismic present of the whole planet and hear it tick.** The lab's FIRST real-world EXTERNAL-live-data instrument (683 sonified market data; this is the planet itself) and the literal realization of JURY 2026-06-17 provocation #4 ("sonify a non-market live stream ‚ÄĒ seismic ‚ÄĒ for free"). **Input:** the free, no-auth **EMSC / SeismicPortal real-time WebSocket** (`wss://www.seismicportal.eu/standing_order/websocket`, GeoJSON FDSN events). **Always sounds even with no network:** a Gutenberg‚ÄďRichter **Poisson synthetic-swarm** fallback (small quakes vastly outnumber large), so a glance is always live and moving; a badge flips emerald on live connect, amber-calm on fallback, and a toggle forces sim/live. **Sonification (all Web Audio, no samples, no deps):** magnitude‚Üífundamental (140‚Üí38 Hz, bigger=lower) + loudness + decay; depth‚Üítimbre (shallow=bright triangle + a band-passed noise "crack"; deep=pure low sine, no crack); longitude‚Üí`StereoPanner`; a procedural `ConvolverNode` reverb + a low detuned room-tone drone; master ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter so a magnitude-7 can never blast. **Visual:** Canvas2D equirectangular world map (faint 30¬į graticule + dotted equator/meridian, no raster assets), each event an expanding ring + bright core colored by depth (shallow=amber, mid=violet, deep=blue) with a lingering glow for large quakes, plus a monospace event log. **Named refs:** Florian Dombois ‚ÄĒ *Auditory Seismology* ¬∑ EMSC real-time feed ¬∑ Ryoji Ikeda data aesthetics. Adult ¬∑ WIDE-fire winner (cycle 465; banked 713-shadow-duet ‚≠ź first-WebMIDI + 714-physarum-choir ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß465). Status: **demoable** (build-verified, not browser-verified ‚ÄĒ live-feed schema + by-ear seismic reading untested in sandbox; the synthetic swarm covers any no-network glance).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/712-seismic-room/README.md`

---

[/dream/713-kids-rubber-face](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/713-kids-rubber-face) ‚ÄĒ **"Rubber Face Sing-Along": a 4-year-old grabs a giant googly face and SCULPTS a silly voice with their fingers ‚ÄĒ no microphone, the voice is shaped entirely by how the face is squished.** The lab's first **gestural-deformation ‚Üí formant ("vowel") synthesis** (grep-confirmed: every prior vowel/formant kids piece ‚ÄĒ `393`, `413` ‚ÄĒ drove the synth from a real microphone; this one is sculpted by touch). **Mapping:** pull the **nose** up/down ‚Üí fundamental pitch slides like a slide-whistle (~120‚Äď500 Hz, loosely snapped to a friendly set so there's never a harsh note); stretch the **mouth** wide vs. tall ‚Üí morph three parallel bandpass formants between vowels **ooo‚ÜĒaaa‚ÜĒeee**; squish the **cheeks** inward ‚Üí a wah lowpass-cutoff wobble; pull the **ears/eyes** ‚Üí vibrato depth + goofy warble; **release ‚Üí the feature springs back (boing)** and the voice glides to a whisper. **Input:** single/multi-finger touch-deformation (NOT a mic, NOT a button-grid, NOT two-player ‚ÄĒ deliberately breaks the kids side's just-formed two-player-groove streak `702`/`711`). **Output:** Canvas2D rubbery googly face (spring-loaded handles, rosy cheeks, big tongue, eyes that track the nose). **Audio:** sawtooth glottal source + vibrato LFO ‚Üí 3-formant bandpass bank ‚Üí wah lowpass ‚Üí the kids-safe chain `masterGain(0.3) ‚Üí lowpass(7500) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`, always-on soft ambient pad, AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS), `text-rose-300` retry-tap fallback, full teardown (rAF/osc/AudioContext). **Bulletproof glance:** a ~2.5s-idle **ghost-finger auto-demo** pulls the face around and sings on its own with zero permission/camera/CDN ‚ÄĒ yields instantly to a real touch. **Named refs:** Klatt formant synthesis / source-filter vocal model ¬∑ Mr. Potato Head & stretchy-face toys ¬∑ Sesame Street puppet mouths. Born from **RESEARCH ¬ß466** (density grep ‚Üí deformation‚Üísynthesis is the lab's open laugh-mechanic). Kids 4+ ¬∑ WIDE-fire winner (cycle 466; banked **`715-kids-stomp-zoo`** ‚≠ź off-glass webcam-stomp parade + **`714-kids-feed-monster`** drag-feed groove ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß466). **Ambition 2/5** (#1 never-used technique [deformation‚Üíformant] + #3 named refs). Status: **demoable** (build-verified `npm run build` exit 0 / 504 pages; NOT browser-verified ‚ÄĒ the cartoon-vowel timbre + sub-50ms touch latency + multitouch need a real iPad; the idle auto-demo + friendly pitch-snap cover any silent/harsh glance).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/713-kids-rubber-face/README.md`

---

[/dream/718-duet-paths](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/718-duet-paths) ‚ÄĒ **"Duet with the Paths": play a phrase (MIDI / keyboard / on-screen keys) and a machine improviser ANSWERS IN THE GAPS ‚ÄĒ trading fours with grains pulled from Karel's OWN recorded *Welcome Home* piano (concatenative/corpus-based, MACataRT/CataRT), not an echo.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 467. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / live-performance-fit / jazz-responsive alternate journey-arc. The lab's first **call-and-response duet partner whose voice is Karel's actual recording**: on Begin it fetches his solo-piano buffer via the read-only `/api/audio/<id>`, slices it into a CataRT-style grain corpus (each grain tagged by autocorrelation pitch + RMS + zero-crossing brightness), and when your phrase closes (~750 ms silence after ‚Č•2 notes) it derives an *answering* line (complementary register ¬∑ inverted contour ¬∑ density-matched ¬∑ resolving in D Dorian) and realizes each note from the **closest-pitch grain of his recording**, pitch-nudged via `playbackRate` ‚ÄĒ so the reply is built from *his* piano sound. Turn-taking ducking (play over it ‚Üí it yields), idle auto-demo (call-and-response loops on load with zero hardware), Canvas2D piano-roll "river" (your notes warm amber/rose, the shadow's grains cool cyan/violet, flowing past a now-line). **Offline synth fallback** (OfflineAudioContext piano corpus) keeps it fully alive keyless/offline with amber provenance; emerald "Karel's piano ūüéĻ" when his buffer loads. Three inputs: Web MIDI (hot-plug, device badge), computer keyboard (`asdfghjkl` + `wetyuo` + `z/x` octave), on-screen ‚Č•44px keys. Pure client Web Audio + Web MIDI + Canvas ‚ÄĒ no API route, no new deps. Realizes Karel's MORNING ask ("Shadow Duet ‚Ä¶ jazz call-and-response wired to your Paths piano") + the banked ‚≠ź seed's own "strongest next step." **Source:** RESEARCH ¬ß467 (MACataRT arXiv:2502.00023, Feb 2025 ¬∑ Diemo Schwarz CataRT ¬∑ IRCAM Somax2 / Pachet Continuator lineage).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/718-duet-paths/README.md`

---

[/dream/719-kids-stomp-zoo](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/719-kids-stomp-zoo) ‚ÄĒ **"Stomp Zoo": a 4-year-old JUMPS and STAMPS in front of the camera and a whole parade of googly creatures launches into the air in a ripple, each stomp dropping a big comical tuba BONK.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 468 (kids, WIDE fire). **For**: kids 4+ / **off-glass whole-body** input / Canvas2D parade / silly marching-groove. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #2** ("the next off-glass swing should be embodied, not another glow-screen") *and* **#5** ("MAKE A KID LAUGH ‚ÄĒ the kids side has gone uniformly solemn") at once. **Input (off-glass):** front webcam ‚Üí tiny 64√ó48 offscreen **frame-difference**, motion energy measured ONLY in the lower ~45% band (feet/legs) ‚Üí sharp **rise** above an adaptive baseline w/ ~180 ms refractory = a STOMP onset (one stomp = one bonk). **Output (Canvas2D):** six saturated googly creatures do a squash-then-launch gravity arc, **staggered into a Mexican-wave ripple** across the parade (rewards repeated stomping ‚ÄĒ the deepening over the original seed), with dust puffs, screen-shake, warm bonk-flash; a ~20 s **freeze-dance** giggle beat (bed drops, creatures freeze with ‚ĚĄ, then kicks back in). **Audio:** a friendly tuba-honk BONK (filtered sawtooth + sine sub) walks a low marching **bassline** `[55,49,62,44,58]` Hz ‚ÄĒ rhythm/GROOVE, emphatically **not** a cadence/voice-leading (the jury-banned kids template) ‚ÄĒ over an always-on gentle oom-pah + shaker bed. **Bulletproof glance:** a **ghost auto-stomper** fires the parade on a groovy rhythm whenever the camera is unavailable/denied OR there's no stomp for ~2.5 s, so a silent 06:30 glance is alive; `text-rose-300` notice on camera-denied. Kid-safe `master(‚Č§0.3) ‚Üí lowpass(7000) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; AudioContext + camera both unlocked in one Start gesture (iOS); full teardown stops the camera tracks. **On-device only ‚ÄĒ nothing recorded or sent; no API route, no guard, no new deps.** Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three *embodied non-glass inputs*: SEE/SHAKE/BLOW); banked **`720-kids-shake-pop`** ‚≠ź (device-SHAKE ‚Üí fizzy-bottle build-and-erupt; possibly a lab-first shake input) + **`721-kids-blow-balloon`** (mic-breath ‚Üí balloon hum + raspberry) as **IDEAS ¬ß468**. **Named refs:** *BodyBeats* (whole-body musical interfaces for children via Laban's Theory of Effort) ¬∑ VTech Toy Fair 2026 "your movement is the controller." **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [frame-diff motion engine + stomp-onset detector + tuba-bonk synth + Canvas2D parade physics] + #5 recent research [RESEARCH ¬ß466 VTech 2026, consumed via the banked seed]). **Source:** RESEARCH ¬ß466‚Üí¬ß468 chain. **Build-verified** (losers removed, authoritative winner-only `npm run build` EXIT 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully, 506/506 static, `/dream/719-kids-stomp-zoo 4.19 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered **static ‚óč**); **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: whether the lower-band frame-diff reliably catches a real toddler's stomp without false-firing on hand-waving, the stomp‚Üíbonk latency on a real device, and whether the parade reads as laugh-out-loud; the ghost auto-stomper guarantees a sounding, moving glance with zero hardware).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/719-kids-stomp-zoo/README.md`

### `720-paths-grainfield` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ DEEP-winner (cycle 469, 2026-06-18)
Fly *inside* Karel's real recorded Welcome Home piano: the whole performance is shattered into a **WebGPU compute particle field** (one GPU particle per ~90ms grain, laid out by sonic character ‚ÄĒ x = time-through-the-piece, y = brightness, + curl-noise drift), and dragging a cursor through the cloud **re-sounds the nearest grains concatenatively**, Hann-windowed and stereo-panned (CataRT-style descriptor-space navigation). His real recording re-granulated ‚ÄĒ never a fresh oscillator. Degrades first-class to a Canvas2D field; ghost auto-drift on idle; master chain `gain 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 6.8k ‚Üí comp ‚ąí10/20:1`. **Extends the ceiling builds `710-presence-bloom` (WebGPU compute) + `718-duet-paths` (his-piano grains).** INPUT: his real piano + pointer navigation ¬∑ OUTPUT: WebGPU compute particles (Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE: corpus-based concatenative granular resynthesis ¬∑ VIBE: cosmic/immersive-meditative. Named refs: Diemo Schwarz **CataRT**, *Audio Latent Space Cartography*. Design notes: `src/app/dream/720-paths-grainfield/README.md`

### `724-presence-drift` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ DEEP-winner (cycle 471, 2026-06-18)
**"Presence Drift": leave singing voices hanging in the air around your own ears ‚ÄĒ and each one is a slow READ-HEAD walking through Karel's REAL *Welcome Home* recording, so the spatial chord you build never holds still: it continuously re-voices itself over minutes, genuinely different at minute five than at minute one.** **For**: adult / installation ¬∑ **webcam full-body pose** (MediaPipe Tasks-Vision, CDN; reach‚Üídwell‚Üíflick gesture + body energy; synthetic **ghost-body** fallback) ¬∑ **WebGPU compute particle storm** (tens of thousands of WGSL points; first-class **Canvas2D** fallback) ¬∑ **HRTF-binaural** spatial concatenative grains around one `AudioListener` ¬∑ cosmic/meditative, long-form/stateful. **This is the lab's first true cycle-2 of `710-presence-bloom`** (the jury's only new ceiling build), fused with the concatenative-grain piano of `718-duet-paths`/`720-paths-grainfield`. **The single change vs 710:** a placed voice is no longer a synth oscillator in a D-Dorian field ‚ÄĒ **each voice owns its own slow read-head** drifting through his real recording (~100ms Hann grains, 50% overlap), every head at a slightly different rate and wrap so the chord never re-aligns; voices accrete (cap ~24, oldest fades); overall body energy gently steers global drift speed (still = heads crawl, moving = advance faster); each voice is also a particle-storm attractor whose bloom warms violet‚Üíamber as its head drifts through the performance. The directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-18 #3** ("stop banking ceilings and walking away ‚ÄĒ push 710 to a cycle-2, reward DEPTH over breadth") **+ #5** ("use his real music ‚ÄĒ it's in only 1 of the last 15") **+ #1** (the scarce WebGPU stack, not banned Canvas2D). **Named refs:** Diemo Schwarz *CataRT* / corpus-based concatenative synthesis ¬∑ HRTF/binaural `PannerNode` spatialization ¬∑ Refik Anadol (GPU particle data-architecture). **Ambition honest 4/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [MediaPipe pose + WebGPU compute + HRTF spatial audio + concatenative real-recording grains] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #4 cycle-2 multi-cycle commitment ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß471 same-day cite [*Synaptic Sanctum Neuroscape* 2026 ‚ÄĒ CataRT grains + per-source binaural HOA locked to head-tracking]). **Degrades first-class at every layer:** visuals animate on mount; ghost-body places + drifts voices hands-free if no camera/pose; Canvas2D field if no WebGPU; offline-rendered piano buffer fills the corpus if the recording can't be fetched (amber notice). Reads only the public `/api/audio/:id` GET ‚Üí **no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean). **Build-verified** (losers removed, authoritative winner-only `npm run build` EXIT 0, ‚úď Compiled successfully, **509/509** static, `/dream/724-presence-drift` static ‚óč 10.6 kB / 117 kB First Load). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/camera/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: WGSL compute + MediaPipe pose on real hardware, whether the drifting read-heads read as *his performance re-voicing itself* on headphones, the reach‚Üídwell‚Üíflick gesture latency, HRTF imaging; ghost-body + Canvas2D + offline-buffer fallbacks guarantee a sounding, moving glance). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (three body‚Üígrain models); banked **`722-presence-paths`** ‚≠ź (descriptor-space reach ‚ÄĒ hand height‚Üíbrightness, openness‚Üítime) + **`723-presence-tide`** (whole-body conductor, no placement ‚ÄĒ stillness‚Üídistant/wet grains, vigour‚Üínear/dry) as **IDEAS ¬ß471**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/724-presence-drift/README.md`

### `729-piano-portal-jam` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ DEEP-winner (cycle 473, 2026-06-18)
**"Piano Portal Jam": open a PORTAL to Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano and send it to a friend's phone with one shareable link ‚ÄĒ then the two of you actually play it together, peer-to-peer, across the room or across the world.** **The lab's first GENUINE cross-device multi-user piece** ‚ÄĒ every prior "multiplayer" (319/334/341/694/702/711) was same-browser `BroadcastChannel` fakery; this is real **WebRTC `RTCDataChannel`** between two devices. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #4** ("make one multi-user piece *actually* cross-device ‚ÄĒ one real two-phones-across-the-room jam retires the asterisk; all three multiplayer builds are same-browser") **+ #5** (built on his real recording). **The elegant twist:** both peers already hold his recording sliced into the same grain corpus, so **no audio is streamed** ‚ÄĒ only tiny note-events `{p,x,y,t}` cross the channel, and each peer re-sounds the other's grain *locally* from the identical corpus (near-zero bandwidth, no codec latency ‚ÄĒ the inverse of the AES/JackTrip PCM-streaming approach). **Signaling is zero-server, no API route, no backend:** non-trickle ICE (await `icegatheringstatechange==='complete'`) ‚Üí one complete SDP ‚Üí gzip via native `CompressionStream` ‚Üí base64url token inside a link `‚Ä¶#o=<token>`; the guest opens the link, auto-builds the answer, returns a short code the host pastes. INPUT: touch/drag note-trigger **+ a remote PEER over WebRTC** ¬∑ OUTPUT: **three.js `Points`** two-constellation starfield (warm amber/rose = you, cool cyan/violet = them; Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE: **WebRTC P2P data channel + concatenative grains** of his real recording (event-only transport) ¬∑ VIBE: adult, cosmic, "two constellations meeting". **Named refs:** **JackTrip WebRTC** + AES *"Web-Based Networked Music Performances via WebRTC"* (RTCDataChannel + Web Audio). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 first real cross-device WebRTC P2P ‚ÄĒ all prior multiplayer is BroadcastChannel ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [WebRTC signaling + P2P data-channel sync + concatenative grain engine + three.js renderer] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 his real piano). **Solo + ghost:** after ~2.5s idle a simulated remote player drifts a path through his recording in the remote color, so a single 06:30 phone is always a sounding, moving duet with zero setup; the portal link is the stretch that makes it REAL with a 2nd device. Master chain `gain 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 6.8k ‚Üí comp ‚ąí10/20:1`; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (peer connection + data channel + audio graph + three.js dispose). Reads only public `/api/audio/:id` GET ‚Üí **no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean). **Compile + lint verified** (`‚úď Compiled successfully in 95s`, ESLint clean on the folder), **static-generation BLOCKED by the container fd ceiling (EMFILE) ‚ÄĒ an infra quirk, NOT the code: pristine `main` fails identically** (proven this cycle); Vercel builds this same app normally. **NOT browser-verified** ‚ÄĒ and crucially the **cross-device link is correct-by-construction but NOT link-tested** (no 2nd device / live STUN in the sandbox); public STUN handles most NATs, symmetric NATs would need TURN (out of scope). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one cross-device-jam concept, three signaling √ó renderer attacks); banked **`728-piano-relay-jam`** ‚≠ź (zero-server **copy-paste** SDP handshake + raw **WebGL2** field ‚ÄĒ scarcer renderer, purest zero-dep handshake) + **`730-piano-room-jam`** ‚≠ź (friendly **4-letter room code** via a guarded serverless SDP relay + **WebGPU** compute field ‚ÄĒ best UX & scarcest renderer, but needs Vercel KV/Upstash to survive cross-lambda; resurrect when a backing store is approved) as **IDEAS ¬ß473**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/729-piano-portal-jam/README.md`

### `731-kids-star-reach` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ kids (4+) ¬∑ DEEP-winner (cycle 474, 2026-06-19)
**"Star Reach": a 4-year-old lifts their BARE HANDS into the air ‚ÄĒ no screen to touch ‚ÄĒ and scoops handfuls of glowing stars out of a deep night sky, each one ringing a soft bell.** **For**: kids 4+ / **off-glass embodied** input / **raw-WebGL2** field / awe-wonder. Front camera ‚Üí **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (CDN, analysis-only, 2 hands, frames discarded immediately ‚ÄĒ never recorded/sent); openness from mean fingertip-spread √∑ hand-size (robust to how close the child stands), with hysteresis so each gesture rings once cleanly. **Close a fist ‚Üí nearest stars gather to the palm + a soft just-tuned pentatonic bell cluster; open wide ‚Üí they spill outward in a rising glissando arc; raise hands high ‚Üí brighter/higher tones, low ‚Üí warm/low.** No beat, no loop, no "wrong" note ‚ÄĒ pure cause-and-effect + luminous texture. **Output:** hand-written **WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00)** ‚ÄĒ *not three.js, not Canvas2D-primary* ‚ÄĒ a full-screen night-sky gradient + drifting nebula + ~2,600 `gl_PointSize` glow sprites with additive `SRC_ALPHA,ONE` blending, depth-faded and parallaxing; CPU-side gather/spill/spring-home physics so behaviour is identical across render paths. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #1** ("give a kid the scarce renderer too ‚ÄĒ ban the Canvas2D monoculture") + **#3** ("stop banking ceilings and walking away" ‚ÄĒ this *resurrects the twice-banked ‚≠ź `726-kids-star-scoop` seed* instead of spinning a new toy) + **#2** ("texture/cause-effect, not a groove; vary the register away from silly"). **Renderer choice (the curate axis):** raw WebGL2 is the **scarcest renderer in the rolling window AND the most iOS-bulletproof** for Karel's 06:30 phone glance ‚ÄĒ WebGPU is warming to its own monoculture (721/724/727) and three.js was just used last cycle (729); iOS has WebGL2 reliably and there's zero CDN renderer dep beyond the shared MediaPipe. **Kids-safe** `voices ‚Üí masterGain(0.26) ‚Üí lowpass(‚Č§7200) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; soft attacks, long decays, no loud transients; always-on open-fifth drone bed so the sky is never silent. **Degrades first-class:** camera denied / MediaPipe fails ‚Üí two **ghost hands** keep scooping + singing (resume after ~3.5s of no hand), `text-rose-300` notice; WebGL2 unavailable ‚Üí inline **Canvas2D** fallback with the identical gather/spill glow physics + bells, a badge showing the live path (`WebGL2 ‚óą` / `Canvas2D ‚óá`); alive within ~2s of START. iOS: AudioContext + `getUserMedia` both inside the first tap (‚Č•64px Start button); full teardown stops camera tracks, deletes WebGL programs/buffers/VAOs + loses context, closes AudioContext, cancels rAF, disconnects ResizeObserver. **On-device only ‚ÄĒ nothing recorded or sent; no API route, no guard (rules #6/#8 clean); no new npm deps** (three is unused here; MediaPipe via runtime CDN script). **Named refs:** **MediaPipe Hands** ¬∑ ***Journey*** (thatgamecompany ‚ÄĒ wordless awe, every gesture beautiful) ¬∑ **Inigo Quilez** (additive point-glow / GLSL field lineage). **Ambition honest 2‚Äď3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [MediaPipe hand-tracking + raw-WebGL2 GLSL point-glow field + spatial pentatonic bell-cluster engine] + #3 named refs; MediaPipe Hands already in lab `524` so technique-#1 doesn't count). **Source:** RESEARCH ¬ß470 ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß472 (`726-kids-star-scoop` ‚≠ź) ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß474 chain. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (three.js / WebGL2 / WebGPU); banked **`730-kids-star-scoop`** ‚≠ź (three.js sibling ‚ÄĒ warmest glow) + **`732-kids-star-cradle`** ‚≠ź (WebGPU compute, 12k particles ‚ÄĒ the bolder swing once WebGPU cools) as **IDEAS ¬ß474**. **Compile + lint verified** (TypeScript + ESLint pass, **zero issues in the 731 folder** ‚ÄĒ all warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/*` files), **static-generation BLOCKED by the container fd ceiling (EMFILE) ‚ÄĒ an infra quirk, NOT the code: pristine `main` fails identically** (proven this cycle); Vercel builds this same app normally and will deploy 731. **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/WebGL/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: whether MediaPipe reliably reads a real toddler's fist/open across hand-sizes & lighting, the scoop‚Üíbell latency on a real iPad, and whether the spilled-star glissando reads as wonder; the ghost-hands + Canvas2D fallbacks guarantee a sounding, moving glance with zero hardware).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/731-kids-star-reach/README.md`

### `734-paths-tape-erosion` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ DEEP-winner (cycle 475, 2026-06-19)
[/dream/734-paths-tape-erosion](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/734-paths-tape-erosion) ‚ÄĒ **"Tape Erosion": Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano plays as a slow 7-minute arc that disintegrates and re-forms ‚ÄĒ the spectrum thins and smears, motifs vanish and ghost back, never an exact repeat ‚ÄĒ rendered as a decaying magnetic-tape spectrogram.** A **long-form, STATEFUL** piece (the lab's thin category): minute 6 is materially different from minute 1, not a loop. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #3** ("reward DEPTH ‚ÄĒ stop banking ceilings and walking away") by extending the loved **paths-granular thread** (`227-paths-granular`‚Ě§ÔłŹ) with its missing long-form dimension instead of a new toy, **+ #5** (use his real music ‚ÄĒ 1 of last 15) **+ #1** (ban Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ raw WebGL2, the scarce/iPad-bulletproof renderer). **Audio:** his recording is read via the public `/api/audio/:id` GET, sliced into 80‚Äď140ms Hann grains scrubbed by a slowly-advancing read-head (~0.4√ó over ~2‚Äď4 min); a **5-movement state machine** ‚ÄĒ *Intact ‚Üí Eroding ‚Üí Sparse ‚Üí Ghost ‚Üí Reforming* (~7 min, 12s smoothstep crossfades) ‚ÄĒ modulates rate-drift, LP cutoff (tape-head roll-off), dropout probability (tape damage), reverb wash, grain density and gain; a sub-bass C2 drone keeps it never-silent. **Visual:** raw **WebGL2** (not three.js, not Canvas2D-primary) ‚ÄĒ two ping-pong **R32F float FBOs** accumulate a spectral field; a feedback fragment shader applies Gaussian smear + exponential decay + horizontal advection + magnetic noise and deposits each new FFT column on the right edge; a display shader applies an **Ikeda-style colormap** (black‚Üíindigo‚Üíteal‚Üíwarm-white) with scanline flicker + vignette. The erosion params are driven by the same movement state as the audio, so sound and image decay as one. INPUT: **audio-file (his real piano, NO camera)** ¬∑ OUTPUT: **raw WebGL2 ping-pong FBO** (scarce, iPad-bulletproof; Canvas2D scrolling-spectrogram fallback) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE: **spectral-feedback erosion + long-form stateful decay/reform** ¬∑ VIBE: adult, elegiac, Ikeda-spectral. **Named refs:** **William Basinski *The Disintegration Loops*** (tape decaying as it plays ‚ÄĒ listening consumes the recording) ¬∑ **Brian Eno *Music for Airports* / *Reflection*** (long-form non-repeating systems) ¬∑ **Ryoji Ikeda** (spectral-feedback / data-as-light lineage). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 long-form >7-min STATEFUL register, new ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [recording loader + granular erosion DSP + WebGL2 FBO feedback + 5-movement state machine] ¬∑ #3 three named refs ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß475 long-form-generative finding, today). **Degrades first-class:** no audio fetch ‚Üí offline fallback synth (~12s arpeggio) + `text-amber-300/95` notice; no WebGL2 / no `EXT_color_buffer_float` ‚Üí Canvas2D scrolling spectrogram with comparable colormap; never blank-screen, alive from the first frame. Reads only public `/api/audio/:id` GET ‚Üí **no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm deps**. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one disintegration concept; WebGPU / WebGL2 / three.js attacks); banked **`733-paths-disintegrate`** ‚≠ź (WebGPU compute, 40k particles ‚ÄĒ the bolder swing once WebGPU's review-device support is verified) + **`735-paths-revenant`** ‚≠ź (three.js 60k-`Points` volumetric Anadol-ghost ‚ÄĒ the warmest look) as **IDEAS ¬ß475**. **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (`‚úď Compiled successfully`, zero errors in the 734 folder ‚ÄĒ fixed 3 TS-5.7 null-safety nits during validation), **static-generation BLOCKED by the container fd ceiling (EMFILE) ‚ÄĒ an infra quirk, NOT the code: pristine `main` (512 pages) fails identically** (proven this cycle); Vercel builds this same app normally and will deploy 734. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/WebGL in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: whether the feedback field reads as *tape decay* and whether the 7-min arc holds; Canvas2D + fallback-synth guarantee a sounding, moving glance). Design notes: `src/app/dream/734-paths-tape-erosion/README.md`

### `744-magnetic-walk` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 479, 2026-06-19)
[/dream/744-magnetic-walk](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/744-magnetic-walk) ‚ÄĒ **"Magnetic Walk": the invisible field around you, made audible ‚ÄĒ the phone's compass heading + tilt turn your orientation in the Earth's geomagnetic frame into a slowly-morphing just-intoned drone and a WebGL2 aurora that stays locked to magnetic north as you turn your body.** **For**: adults / installation / **mobile-native** / ambient-meditative / live-performance-fit. The lab's **first use of the device compass/magnetometer** ‚ÄĒ every prior orientation piece (the kids-tilt cluster, `308-orbit-choir`, `394-soundfield-room`) read only raw `beta`/`gamma` tilt; this reads true magnetic north (`webkitCompassHeading` on iOS, `(360-alpha)%360` elsewhere), so the *world* feels fixed while *you* turn. **Input:** one `deviceorientation` listener; on iOS, `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` is called inside the Start tap (same gesture that unlocks audio). **Mapping:** heading walks a **12-station "compass of keys"** (just-intoned roots + chord colors), continuously crossfading between the two nearest stations so N/E/S/W give genuinely different drone colors; tilt (beta) ‚Üí octave + lowpass; roll (gamma) ‚Üí pan + shimmer detune; smoothed turn-rate ‚Üí upper-voice level + brightness + visual energy. **Audio:** four detuned saw/sine voices + triangle shimmer ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí a **runtime-synthesized convolution reverb** (decaying-noise impulse, no file), all glided with `setTargetAtTime` ‚ÄĒ a continuous slowly-morphing field, **no beat/loop, no samples, no granular/concatenative synthesis, no recorded piano** (the directest break of this cycle's banned 8√ó his-piano-grain monoculture). **Visual:** a **WebGL2** (GLSL ES 3.00) full-screen-triangle aurora rotated by `-heading` so it stays locked to magnetic north; hue follows heading, band structure follows tilt, brightness follows turn-rate, with a faint north spoke + ring on a dark tone-mapped field. INPUT: **device compass heading + tilt** (lab-first) ¬∑ OUTPUT: **WebGL2 aurora** (Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ TECHNIQUE: **cross-modal geomagnetic sonification ‚Üí generative just-intoned drone** ¬∑ VIBE: ambient / psychogeographic / meditative. **Named refs:** **Christina Kubisch *Electrical Walks*** (induction headphones that make a city's EM fields audible as you walk ‚ÄĒ this is its geomagnetic pocket cousin) ¬∑ **Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening***. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#1 first compass/magnetometer input + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [orientation sensor-fusion + generative drone synth w/ runtime convolution reverb + WebGL2 north-locked aurora shader]). **Source:** RESEARCH ¬ß479 (today ‚ÄĒ the vision-conditioned spatial-audio wave; the hook: bind a real-world spatial signal to sound in-browser from a *sensor*, zero model download). **Degrades first-class:** no sensor / permission denied / desktop / no live events within ~1.8s ‚Üí **ghost mode** auto-drifts heading ~6¬į/s with gentle tilt so a silent 06:30 glance is sounding + moving with zero interaction (`text-rose-300` notice; seamless handoff the moment real data arrives); no WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D fallback with the same north-locked concentric-aurora idea; alive within ~2s of Start. **No external audio, no API route, no `guard`, no new npm deps** (rules #6/#8 clean; package.json/package-lock untouched). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (compass-sensor / neural-room / ISS-telemetry ‚ÄĒ three never-used techniques); banked **`745-room-listener`** ‚≠ź (the lab's FIRST in-browser neural net ‚ÄĒ TFJS + COCO-SSD turns each camera-detected object into a voice; ambition 3/5, triple-love-aligned) + **`746-orbit-bell`** (live ISS telemetry ‚Üí cosmic globe drone + terminator-crossing bells) as **IDEAS ¬ß479**. **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (zero issues in the 744 folder ‚ÄĒ all ESLint output is pre-existing `src/lib/**`), **static-generation BLOCKED by the container fd ceiling (EMFILE) ‚ÄĒ an infra quirk, NOT the code: pristine `main` fails identically at the same path** (proven this cycle); Vercel builds this same app normally and will deploy 744. **NOT browser-verified** (no device/WebGL/audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: real iOS `webkitCompassHeading` + permission flow, GLSL aurora compile, drone timbre/click-freeness, and whether the ghost‚Üílive-sensor handoff feels seamless; the ghost auto-drift + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a sounding, moving glance with zero hardware).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/744-magnetic-walk/README.md`

### `748-duet-follower` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 481, 2026-06-19)
[/dream/748-duet-follower](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/748-duet-follower) ‚ÄĒ **"Duet Follower": Karel's real *Welcome Home* recording becomes an accompanist that LISTENS to you ‚ÄĒ you keep the pulse (spacebar / A‚ÄďL keyboard row / tap the stage) and the system estimates your tempo from inter-onset intervals and drives the playbackRate of his actual performance to follow your groove toward the next musical moment. You conduct his recording's pace; it's a duet where his performance is the accompanist that adapts to you.** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("his music can be used WITHOUT shattering it into grains ‚ÄĒ **play it and score-follow it**; the concatenative grain-cloud is now 7/15, the new pentatonic") and **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields entirely for a cycle ‚ÄĒ build one piece with NO shader, prove the idea carries the piece, not the renderer"). **The lab's first use of his recording as a *followed score/performance*** ‚ÄĒ across 740+ prototypes his piano was only ever *visualized* or *scattered into a CataRT grain cloud*; here it is a continuous, time-stretched performance that re-times itself to YOUR pulse. **Input:** keyboard / tap pulse (spacebar, A‚ÄďL / Q‚ÄďT rows, click/touch) ‚ÄĒ **no mic, no camera** (both over-represented 4√ó and jury-flagged). **Technique:** onset ‚Üí tempo estimate (short median of recent inter-onset intervals, clamped 30‚Äď240 bpm) ‚Üí his recording is analyzed once into a coarse ~50ms RMS envelope whose rising edges become musical **landmarks**; on each tap the engine sets `playbackRate = gap-to-next-landmark / beatPeriod` (smoothed 35/65, clamped 0.4‚Äď2.2√ó) so his performance *arrives at that moment one of your beats from now*. **Continuous whole-performance playback** (one looping `AudioBufferSource` whose rate is re-timed) ‚ÄĒ emphatically **NOT** a descriptor-space grain cloud. **Output:** pure **SVG/DOM** ‚ÄĒ a moving piano-roll ribbon (envelope mirrored about a fixed center playhead), amber landmark markers, a pulsing playhead; **no WebGL, no WebGPU, no shader, no Canvas2D** (the cycle's whole point: prove the idea without a renderer). VIBE: warm chamber-concert duet (radial amber wash) ‚ÄĒ explicitly **not** the near-dark luminous-glow contemplative vibe the jury banned at 9√ó. **Named refs:** **Matchmaker** (real-time piano score following, arXiv 2510.10087, Oct 2025) ¬∑ **Christopher Raphael *Music Plus One*** (statistical automatic accompaniment) ¬∑ **Roger Dannenberg / Barry Vercoe** (foundational synthetic-performer accompaniment) ¬∑ **Arshia Cont *Antescofo*** (anticipatory score follower) ‚ÄĒ this is the deliberately *inverted* cousin: the human is the soloist-conductor, his recording is the follower. **Ambition honest 3‚Äď4/5** (#1 score-following / interactive-accompaniment is lab-first ‚ÄĒ his recording used as a followed performance, never done ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [tap/keyboard onset input + tempo estimator + envelope/landmark analyzer + continuous follower engine + SVG ribbon] ¬∑ #3 four named refs ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß481, today ‚ÄĒ soft/qualified bind to the Matchmaker / Structure-Aware-Accompaniment 2024‚Äď2026 lane, NOT a <14-day claim). **Source:** RESEARCH ¬ß481 ‚Üí this WIDE fire. **Degrades first-class:** no recording fetch ‚Üí offline-rendered piano phrase is followed instead (`text-amber-300/95` notice); alive within ~2s; full teardown (rAF cancel, engine dispose, AudioContext close). Reads only the public `/api/audio/:id` GET ‚Üí **no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm deps**. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal NON-grain, NON-shader uses of his real recording: score-follow / speech-arrange / sky-conduct); banked **`749-spoken-libretto`** (speech-ASR ‚Üí real-recording PHRASE selection onto a typographic SVG staff; Reich *Different Trains* / Lucier) + **`750-sky-almanac`** ‚≠ź (locally-computed sun position + moon phase ‚Üí long-form STATEFUL arrangement of his real-recording phrases on an SVG sun-arc dial; Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* / Finer *Longplayer* ‚ÄĒ the daylight vibe + long-form-stateful both thin categories) as **IDEAS ¬ß481**. **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (`‚úď Compiled successfully`, **zero issues in the 748 folder** ‚ÄĒ all ESLint warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`), **static-generation BLOCKED by the container fd ceiling (EMFILE) ‚ÄĒ proven environmental THIS cycle: pristine `main` with 748 moved aside compiles + fails at the identical `next-font-manifest.json` open** (not the code); Vercel builds this same app normally and will deploy 748. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: whether the envelope-landmark following reads as *his performance following your pulse* on his real recording's dynamics, the tap‚Üíre-time latency, and whether `playbackRate` pitch-shift stays musical; the offline-fallback phrase has clean well-spaced onsets and guarantees a sounding, following glance). Design notes: `src/app/dream/748-duet-follower/README.md`

### `754-conducted-table` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ adult ¬∑ DEEP-winner (cycle 483, 2026-06-19)
[/dream/754-conducted-table](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/754-conducted-table) ‚ÄĒ **"The Conducted Table": Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano becomes a long-form ENSEMBLE you direct from a top-down score table ‚ÄĒ mute and revive a semicircle of seats, shape tempo and dynamics, and let friends fill the empty chairs from their own phones.** A deliberate **cycle-2 of `729-piano-portal-jam`** (the lab's first cross-device WebRTC duet): it keeps 729's zero-server note-event networking but **replaces 729's grain engine** (the technique JURY 2026-06-19 banned at 7/15) with a **non-grain phrase-remix** of his recording ‚ÄĒ the directest read of JURY #3 ("protect the depth habit; return to a ceiling nobody extended ‚ÄĒ take 729 to 3+ players / a conducted room") fused with JURY #1 ("use his music a way that isn't a grain cloud"). **Input:** tap seats in/out + tempo/dynamics sliders + remote peers ‚ÄĒ **no mic, no camera** (both jury-flagged 4√ó). **His music as PHRASES, not grains:** `segmentPhrases()` finds musical phrases by onset/silence RMS detection (~20ms windows; phrase start = energy rises after a quiet gap; end = quiet >~250ms; kept 0.6‚Äď3s, brightness-sorted); each seat plays ONE whole phrase via `AudioBufferSourceNode` with a per-seat `playbackRate` register shift + short envelope ‚ÄĒ emphatically not 90ms descriptor-space grains. **Long-form, stateful (5+ min, not a loop):** a Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler keeps the pulse steady while a memory arc migrates the harmonic center (slow sines + drift, retuning the open-fifth drone), breathes density over ~90s cycles, and drifts each seat's phrase-bank center + subdivision ‚ÄĒ minute 5 ‚Č† minute 0; the conductor biases, never resets. **Output:** **Canvas2D** ‚ÄĒ a warm amber/gold top-down parchment table, 6 seats in a semicircle facing the conductor, traveling conductor‚Üíseat cue arcs + seat blooms, IN/OUT/LIVE visual states ‚ÄĒ *not* a GPU shader field (JURY #2: "build one piece with no shader; Canvas2D is scarce again at 3√ó ‚ÄĒ use it"). VIBE: bright warm concert hall ‚ÄĒ explicitly not the near-dark luminous-glow contemplative vibe banned at 9√ó. **Networking (extends 729 ‚ÄĒ star/conductor-hub):** zero server, no API route, no signaling deps; the conductor is the host hub, "Invite a player" gzips an offer SDP ‚Üí base64url into a shareable `#o=` link, the guest auto-answers, the host pastes the answer code; 3+ players = one peer connection per seat; only `{seat, phrase, vel, t}` events travel (both peers hold the identical recording ‚Üí near-zero bandwidth, render locally). Networking is purely additive ‚ÄĒ solo is the full experience. **Named refs:** **`729-piano-portal-jam`** (cycle-1) ¬∑ **The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers** (historic networked ensembles ‚ÄĒ small messages, not audio) ¬∑ **JackTrip** ¬∑ AES **"Web-Based Networked Music Performances via WebRTC"** ¬∑ **"A Design Space for Live Music Agents"** (arXiv 2602.05064, Feb 4 2026 ‚ÄĒ the ghost seats are agents the conductor steers, not micromanages). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first *conducted/multi-seat* extension of the cross-device ceiling + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [phrase-corpus loader/segmenter + look-ahead conductor scheduler w/ memory arc + Canvas2D score-table renderer + star WebRTC topology] + #3 named refs; #5 soft ‚ÄĒ RESEARCH ¬ß483, today). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-19 #3 (depth) + #1 (non-grain his-music) ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß483 ‚Üí this DEEP fire. **Degrades first-class:** no recording fetch ‚Üí ~16s offline detuned-arpeggio fallback (with rests so segmentation still finds phrases) + a high-contrast `text-rose-700` notice; WebRTC/CompressionStream unsupported ‚Üí invite UI hidden, solo only; ghost ensemble (all 6 seats ON) is alive + sounding the moment you press Begin; full teardown stops all sources + drones, cancels rAF + the lookahead interval, closes all peer connections + the AudioContext. iOS: AudioContext created/resumed inside the Begin tap. Reads only the public `/api/audio/:id` GET ‚Üí **no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm deps**. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one Conducted-Room concept; three.js / Canvas2D / SVG-DOM attacks); banked **`753-conducted-orbit`** ‚≠ź (three.js concert-in-the-round, baton-on-a-3D-stage gesture ‚ÄĒ the most physically expressive conducting model) + **`755-conducted-stage`** (SVG/DOM dashboard whose long-form **timeline ribbon** makes the 5.5-min arc legible at a glance ‚ÄĒ the best at *showing* the arc) as **IDEAS ¬ß483**. **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (`‚úď Compiled successfully in 97s`, **zero issues in the 754 folder** ‚ÄĒ all ESLint warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`), **static-generation BLOCKED by the container fd ceiling (EMFILE at `next-font-manifest.json`) ‚ÄĒ proven environmental THIS cycle: pristine `main` with 754 moved aside compiles + fails identically** (not the code); Vercel builds this app normally and will deploy 754. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: whether onset/silence segmentation yields *musical* phrases vs. ragged fragments on his real dynamics, whether the conducted arc holds attention over minutes, and the real cross-device handshake on two phones; the ghost ensemble + fallback buffer guarantee a sounding, moving glance solo).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/754-conducted-table/README.md`

### `773-kids-parade-caller` ‚ÄĒ `demoable` ¬∑ kids (4+) ¬∑ WIDE-winner (cycle 490, 2026-06-20)
[/dream/773-kids-parade-caller](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/773-kids-parade-caller) ‚ÄĒ **"Parade Caller": a 4-year-old SAYS words out loud and they march in as a parade of percussion ‚ÄĒ each word's SYLLABLE RHYTHM (not its pitch) becomes a looping drum/clap pattern, so "el-e-phant" is a 3-hit gallop, "cat" is one big BOOM, and words accrete into a parade band you build by talking.** The lab's **first use of speech as RHYTHM** ‚ÄĒ every prior ASR piece (`752-kids-word-band`, `570-spoken-spell`) maps a recognized word to *pitch* (letters/phonemes ‚Üí pentatonic notes); this maps it to *percussion*, the konnakol premise (spoken syllables ARE the beat) made playable by a toddler. The deliberate answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #4** ("the un-built kids register is the active/joyful MIDDLE ‚ÄĒ bright daylight, bold primary color, fast legible cause-and-effect, neither solemn-glow nor slapstick") and **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D is scarce again at 3√ó"). **Input:** speech / browser ASR (`webkitSpeechRecognition`/`SpeechRecognition`, continuous + interim) ‚ÄĒ **no mic-hum analysis, no camera** (both jury-flagged). **Technique:** `syllables.ts` estimates syllable count from spelling (vowel-groups, silent-`e`, `-le` ending, clamp 1‚Äď6) + a stress index ‚Üí `makeWordLoop` places the syllables evenly on a 16-step bar, accents the downbeat + stressed syllable, adds a marching hi-hat; loops accrete on one shared Web-Audio clock (~112 BPM, cap 5, oldest drops). Voice + bright primary color by syllable count (1=red kick, 2=amber clap, 3=green tom, 4=blue cowbell, 5=purple woodblock, 6=pink shaker); pitch demoted to a single warm C2 bass-marimba on the downbeat ‚ÄĒ the soul is the BEAT, not a pentatonic melody-wash (the perennial kids crutch). All percussion synthesized live (no audio files, no npm deps). **Output:** **Canvas2D** ‚ÄĒ sunny daytime sky, a scrolling marching road, bouncing primary-colored character discs (one per active word) pulsing on their hits with the word in big readable type, a sweeping red playhead. VIBE: bright exuberant carnival parade ‚ÄĒ explicitly **not** the near-dark luminous-glow contemplative vibe banned at 9√ó, and not silly-googly slapstick. **Named refs:** **Konnakol** (South Indian Carnatic vocal percussion ‚ÄĒ spoken syllables *are* the rhythm; taught to children from ~age 3 at the SaPa academy, "Indian beatboxing") ¬∑ **Steve Reich** speech-melody (*Different Trains*, *It's Gonna Rain* ‚ÄĒ recorded-speech rhythm drives the music). **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [browser ASR + syllable-rhythm analysis + accreting percussion step-sequencer on a shared clock + Canvas2D parade render = 4] + #3 named reference [Konnakol / Reich]; ASR-as-rhythm is a soft #1 ‚ÄĒ the primitive exists in-lab but never used for rhythm; #5 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ konnakol is foundational). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-19 #4 + the grep that ASR-in-lab is pitch-only ‚Üí RESEARCH ¬ß490 (konnakol = spoken syllables ARE percussion) ‚Üí this kids **WIDE** fire. **Degrades first-class:** no `SpeechRecognition` / mic denied ‚Üí an always-present **picture-word menu** (8 big tap buttons) drives the same loop pipeline (`text-rose-300` notice, never a dead end); **auto-demo** cycles built-in words through the same pipeline after ~3s of silence so a silent glance both sees and HEARS the parade (real input cancels it; ~5s silence restarts). Pure client Web Audio + Web Speech + Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ **no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean), **no new npm deps**. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal bright/active/non-shader directions: speech-rhythm / physics-marble / step-sequencer); banked **`774-kids-marble-symphony`** ‚≠ź (SVG/DOM Wintergatan-style physics marble machine ‚ÄĒ the scarcest renderer + love-aligned to the loved `169-kids-marble-run`) + **`775-kids-stamp-band`** (Canvas2D Toshio-Iwai *SimTunes*/*Electroplankton* step-sequencer with looping compositional memory) as **IDEAS ¬ß490**. **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (build reaches `Collecting page data`, **zero issues in the 773 folder** ‚ÄĒ all ESLint warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `tsc --noEmit` clean project-wide), **static-generation BLOCKED by the container fd ceiling (EMFILE at `next-font-manifest.json`) ‚ÄĒ proven environmental THIS cycle: pristine `main` with 773 moved aside fails identically at the same open** (standing infra limit, not the code); Vercel builds this app normally and will deploy 773. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old's pronunciation reliably recognizes, whether the syllable heuristic feels musical across everyday words, and the parade's small-screen crowding at 5 loops; the auto-demo + picture-menu guarantee a sounding, marching glance with zero mic).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/773-kids-parade-caller/README.md`

[/dream/781-kids-paint-conductor](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/781-kids-paint-conductor) ‚ÄĒ **"Paint Your Music": a 4-year-old finger-paints freehand on a bright cream canvas and a glowing playhead sweeps left‚Üíright forever, turning the picture they drew into the song they hear.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 492 (kids, DEEP fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 UPIC explorers). **For**: kids (4+) / **touch-draw** input / **Canvas2D** / bright daylight playful. **The literal realization of Iannis Xenakis's UPIC (1977, CEMAMu ‚ÄĒ "with UPIC, music becomes a game for children: they draw, they hear") for a 4yo** ‚ÄĒ and the lab's first true drawing-as-continuous-score (existing paint pieces 100/104/158/160/152 are per-stroke loops, splat-triggers, or draw-from-voice; none has a single global time-axis playhead that reads ALL strokes' y as pitch). **Mapping:** **x = time** (when in the 8s loop a point sounds), **y = pitch** (top=high, bottom=low, snapped to C-major-pentatonic across C3‚ÄďA5 so nothing can ever sound wrong), **stroke color = timbre** (five distinct friendly voices: sine bell, triangle flute, filtered-saw horn, FM music-box, soft pluck), **thickness = loudness**. A drawn curve becomes a melodic line; stacked strokes become chords. **Long-form stateful** (the thin kids-depth category JURY-valued): strokes accumulate and the composition grows richer over minutes ‚ÄĒ no reset-per-tap. Seeded with a gentle pre-drawn arc that plays from load, so a hands-off 06:30 glance is alive and sounding. ‚Č•64px emoji color swatches, sparkle-burst clear, kids-safe chain (`gain 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí comp ‚ąí10/20:1`), always-on soft pad, iOS-gesture-gated AudioContext, full teardown, graceful `text-rose-600` audio-unavailable notice on the light bg. **Off every JURY-2026-06-19 ban** (no grain-resynthesis ¬∑ no GPU-shader-field ¬∑ no mic-hum ¬∑ no dark-glow) and hits #4 (bright/joyful/active middle) + #3 (long-form stateful). No mic/camera, no data, no API route (no guard needed). Banked siblings: `782-kids-sun-clock-song` ‚≠ź (radial cyclic UPIC), `783-kids-melody-rider` (a character rides the drawn line) ‚ÄĒ IDEAS ¬ß492.

---

[/dream/778-markov-mirror](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/778-markov-mirror) ‚ÄĒ **"Markov Mirror": teach a small keyboard your melodic style, then watch the model itself ‚ÄĒ a glowing transition graph ‚ÄĒ improvise back in your style.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 493 (adult, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: adult / **on-screen-keyboard + computer-keys** input / **SVG/DOM** output / luminous-instructional violet-emerald. **A minimal *visible* live music agent.** You play (tap keys or `a s d f g h j k l`); the app builds a **live variable-order Markov chain** of YOUR note transitions (order-1 pairs + order-2 triples, counts accumulate, phrase context resets on a >900ms pause). "Improvise" (Space) then **walks the chain forever in your style** (prefers order-2 evidence, weighted by your counts, humanized timing, soft bass root every 4 steps), voiced by a warm triangle+sine ADSR piano ‚Üí algorithmic-reverb bus ‚Üí `gain 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 6.8k ‚Üí compressor`. **The graph is not decoration ‚ÄĒ it IS the model, rendered live in SVG:** notes on a ring, directed B√©zier edges whose thickness/brightness scale with use (well-worn transitions go emerald), the struck node haloed, the traversed edge glowing as the melody walks its own learned web. Teach / Improvise / Forget. **Why this renderer:** SVG/DOM is the scarcest surface in the rolling window (JURY 2026-06-20 #1's explicitly-named starved surface ‚ÄĒ 1√ó) and the *right* one here: the model is a graph, so show it as a graph, no canvas/WebGL. **Directly implements the "visible-model" axis of *A Design Space for Live Music Agents* (arXiv 2602.05064, Feb 2026)** ‚ÄĒ the lab's many accompanist pieces (718/748/770) all hide their brain; this one shows it and lets you reshape it. **Named refs:** David Cope *Experiments in Musical Intelligence* (EMI/Emmy) ¬∑ Hiller & Isaacson *Illiac Suite* (1957, first Markov-generated composition) ¬∑ the Feb-2026 live-agents design-space paper. **Ambition 3‚Äď4/5** (#1 first shipped live variable-order-Markov visible-agent / symbolic style-modeling register ¬∑ #2 five subsystems [tap+key input ¬∑ live-learning variable-order Markov ¬∑ walk scheduler ¬∑ polyphonic synth ¬∑ live SVG graph] ¬∑ #3 three named refs ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß493 same-day). **Off every banned tag** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT his-recording, NOT a GPU shader). Zero deps, zero API route (no guard needed), iOS-gesture-gated AudioContext, full teardown. **Compile + ESLint + `tsc --noEmit` all clean** (zero issues in the 778 folder; `‚úď Compiled successfully`), **static-gen BLOCKED by the container fd ceiling (EMFILE) ‚ÄĒ infra quirk, NOT the code: pristine `main` with 778 stashed fails identically** (proven this cycle); Vercel builds normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear: whether the improviser audibly reflects your habits and whether the live graph reads as "watching the melody walk its own web"; setTimeout scheduling may drift under load). Resurrects the ¬ß491 ‚≠ź resurrect-first seed. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`785-aurora-weather-organ`** (WebGL2 + live NOAA space-weather sonification) + **`786-body-organ`** ‚≠ź (MediaPipe full-body pose ‚Üí organ chord) as IDEAS ¬ß493. Design notes: `src/app/dream/778-markov-mirror/README.md`
