[/dream/841-kids-hum-stack](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/841-kids-hum-stack) ‚ÄĒ **"Hum & Stack": a 4-year-old hums any note and builds a chord UPWARD from their own voice ‚ÄĒ tapping warm/bright/spicy creatures that sing intervals relative to the pitch they're singing, where "spicy" is a creature's playful mood, not a wrong note.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 512 (kids, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 harmonic-agency explorers). **For**: kids (4+) / **mic-voice** input (button-root fallback) / **Canvas2D** creatures / bright friendly. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21 #4** ("kill the pentatonic-never-wrong reflex; build a kids piece where harmony can be *shaped* and a wrong choice is interesting rather than impossible") ‚ÄĒ there is **no pre-approved scale at all**: harmony is constructed on whatever the child sings. **Pitch detection:** a hand-written monophonic detector (`detectPitch` ‚ÄĒ McLeod Pitch Method / NSDF autocorrelation with parabolic peak refinement, RMS-gated, 70‚Äď1100 Hz, **no library**) tracks the live fundamental; a glowing **root creature** follows it. **Harmony engine:** WARM ‚ô• (3/4/8 semitones) ¬∑ BRIGHT ‚ėÖ (7/12/19) ¬∑ SPICY ‚ú¶ (10/2/6) flavor buttons stack creatures that sing *relative to the live pitch* and continuously retune to it; tapping a flavor cycles its intervals; the tower caps at 5 voices; "‚Üď let go" releases the top. **Consonance vs dissonance = MOOD not gate:** spicy stacks use sawtooth + a +7-cent beating partner + shimmer LFO and the creature visibly wobbles/sparkles; consonant stacks (triangle) glow steady. **Named refs:** the **overtone series / just-intonation interval stacking** (harmony built upward from a fundamental ‚ÄĒ here the child's live voice) ¬∑ the **Toca Band** "tap a character, it sings in relation to the others" model, reimagined so the bottom of the band is the child's real-time pitch. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [NSDF/MPM pitch detector + live-retuning interval-stack harmony engine + Canvas2D creature renderer + ambient bed] ¬∑ #3 named refs; soft #1 ‚ÄĒ pitch-tracked *harmony-on-your-own-voice* for kids is new though pitch-detection exists in `833`/`88`; soft #5 ‚ÄĒ RESEARCH ¬ß512 reframed consonance/dissonance as legible & playable). **Kids-safe chain:** everything through a 2.6 kHz low-pass + soft envelopes + modest gain, capped voices, always-on breathing ambient bed (never silent), mic‚ÜíAnalyserNode only (no feedback), AudioContext + mic both requested on the start gesture. **Degrades first-class:** mic denied/unavailable ‚Üí visible `text-rose-300` notice + a row of bold colored root-pad buttons drive the identical stacking pipeline (fully demoable on desktop, no mic). **diversity:** INPUT mic/voice (dodges the touch-input over-rep JURY flagged 5√ó), no pentatonic crutch (JURY 6√ó). No mic-routing to output, no data, no API route (no `guard` needed), zero new npm deps. **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (zero issues in the 841 folder ‚ÄĒ fixed one TS5.7 `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic at the `getFloatTimeDomainData` call; all build warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`), **static-gen BLOCKED by the container fd ceiling (EMFILE at `next-font-manifest.json`) ‚ÄĒ proven environmental this cycle: pristine `main` with 841 moved aside + `.next` cleared fails identically**; Vercel builds normally and will deploy 841. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear: whether a 4-year-old's hum reliably tracks via NSDF on a phone mic, whether spicy reads as "fun" vs "off," small-screen crowding at 5 voices; the no-mic root-pad fallback guarantees a sounding, stacking glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`839-kids-chord-garden`** ‚≠ź (touch ¬∑ a kids **Tonnetz** lattice ‚ÄĒ planted triad = closed glowing triangle, far-apart notes sprout a wiggly creature; **top resurrect-first**) + **`840-kids-harmony-sea`** (tilt ¬∑ sail a boat across a circle-of-fifths √ó chord-color plane, choppy water = spicy) as IDEAS ¬ß512. Design notes: `src/app/dream/841-kids-hum-stack/README.md`

[/dream/842-air-veil](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/842-air-veil) ‚ÄĒ **"Air Veil": hear the air six world cities are breathing right now ‚ÄĒ and the dirtier the air, the more it audibly FOULS the harmony.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 513 (adult, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: adult / **live external-API data** input (Open-Meteo Air Quality ‚ÄĒ free, no key, CORS-`*`) / **Canvas2D** equirectangular world-map output / ecological-critical vibe. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21 #3** ("two cold categories have zero entries this window ‚ÄĒ real-world-data sonification; music *about* something other than music"). Grep-verified **lab-first: 0√ó air-quality** ‚ÄĒ the lab sonifies weather (`580`), tides, and solar wind (`314`/`471`/`618`), but has **never** sonified the air a place is breathing. **The inversion that makes it new:** instead of mapping data to *more notes*, pollution maps to **harmonic fouling** ‚ÄĒ clean air (low US-AQI) voices a city with pure consonant just-intonation partials (1f¬∑2f¬∑3f); rising particulates progressively add **inharmonic partials + amplitude-beating (detuned-pair) roughness + detune**, so you literally *hear a city's air get dirty*. Six cities (NYC, London, Delhi, Tokyo, S√£o Paulo, Mexico City) each = a glowing AQI dot on the map with a drifting **particle-wind veil** whose density/grey = its PM2.5; the worst-AQI city opens the master lowpass + thickens a sub-drone so you can hear which city is choking. Refetches every 60s, ramps to new values click-free (`setTargetAtTime`). **Robust offline:** fetch/CORS failure ‚Üí visible `text-rose-300` "simulated air" notice + the identical pipeline runs on plausible seeded, random-walking US-AQI values (US-EPA PM2.5‚ÜíAQI breakpoints fill any missing `us_aqi`); canvas animates on load before audio; gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown. **Named refs:** **Andrea Polli & Chad Eby ‚ÄĒ *Particle Falls*** (live PM2.5 ‚Üí a projected waterfall of light) ¬∑ ***Mutual Air*** (a wind-chime ringing to a live PM sensor) ¬∑ **Ximena Alarc√≥n ‚ÄĒ *Huellas de Aire*** (Pure-Data PM2.5 patches, MAMM Medell√≠n). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 **first air-quality / un-owned external-data feed in the lab** [grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [live AQ fetch+parse + inharmonic/roughness synthesis engine + particle-wind sim + Canvas2D world-map render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs above). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH ¬ß513 (air-quality sonification field scan ‚ÄĒ Particle Falls / Mutual Air / Sonic Kayaks; Open-Meteo ships a free no-key CORS air-quality API) ‚Üí JURY 2026-06-21 #3 (real-world-data is a cold category, zero this window) ‚Üí this adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21 + audit)=[his-recording-as-source ¬∑ machine-listens/answering-agent ¬∑ pentatonic-never-wrong ¬∑ UPIC pitch-painter ¬∑ adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬∑ `picked (winner 842)=[external-API-data INPUT (cold category, NOT his-recording) ¬∑ Canvas2D world-map OUTPUT ¬∑ air-quality‚Üíinharmonic-roughness TECH (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ ecological/critical VIBE (not the banned ambient-default ‚ÄĒ it's data-driven & event-aware)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (the data fetch is a client-side GET to a public no-key endpoint, no Resonance backend touched); **zero new npm deps** (Canvas2D + Web Audio only). **WIDE fan-out ‚ÄĒ 2 explored, banked to IDEAS ¬ß513:** **`843-gravity-sequencer`** ‚≠ź (compose a polyrhythm by arranging GRAVITY ‚ÄĒ a velocity-Verlet symplectic orbital integrator where perihelions trigger tuned percussive strikes; *Otomata*/Kepler refs; the ¬ß507 ‚≠ź banked `825` rebuilt clean & lint-fixed ‚ÄĒ **top adult resurrect-first**) + **`844-overtone-mirror`** (sing one note and climb its just-intonation overtone tower with your voice ‚ÄĒ hand-written NSDF/MPM pitch detection lights/rings overtones 2‚Äď16; *Stimmung*/La-Monte-Young/McLeod refs). Both built complete + self-reported ESLint/tsc clean, folders removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winners not committed). ‚ö†ÔłŹ **Compile + ESLint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully` ‚Üí Linting/type-checking passed ‚Üí **failed only at "Collecting page data" on the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`**; zero warnings in the 842 folder, all build warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **infra-blocked static-gen, NOT a code defect** (fd ceiling is cgroup-locked at 4096, unraisable as root; fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally and will deploy 842). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in sandbox ‚ÄĒ unverified by ear: whether the inharmonic-fouling reads as "the air getting dirty" vs. just detuned, and how live the feed feels at a 60s refetch; the always-animating canvas + simulated-air fallback guarantee a sounding, drifting glance regardless). Design notes: `src/app/dream/842-air-veil/README.md`

[/dream/897-kids-balance-band](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/897-kids-balance-band) ‚ÄĒ **"Balance Band": a 4-year-old's musical seesaw where a wrong (dissonant) note tips the beam and STAYS tipped ‚ÄĒ a sour buzzing chord that does NOT auto-resolve ‚ÄĒ and the child earns the calm back by physically balancing the music.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 534 (kids, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 template-breaker explorers). **For**: kids (4+) / **touch** input / **Canvas2D** seesaw / warm-playful. **The third answer to JURY 2026-06-23 #4** ("widen the crack ‚ÄĒ let the wrong choice persist and matter, no auto-resolve; build the third one and the no-wrong-notes template is broken for good," after `868-monster-keys` and `849-star-bowl`). **The mechanic ‚ÄĒ torque ‚ÜĒ harmony:** the beam is a **2D rigid lever** in Canvas2D; tapping hangs singing creature-weights at discrete slots; each contributes `torque = mass √ó leverage` summed to a target angle clamped ¬Ī28¬į and eased per-frame for a physical settle. A **spicy** creature (tritone F‚ôĮ / minor-2nd D‚ô≠) is literally *heavier* (mass 1.7 vs 1.0) ‚ÄĒ its side tips down and **stays tipped**, its voice gains a +14¬Ę beating partner + a faint saw shimmer, and it renders as a wobbly spiky star; there is **no auto-correct**. The child resolves it by hanging a friendly consonant creature on the high arm ‚Üí torque levels, the sour/shimmer voices glide to silence via `setTargetAtTime` (a warm consonant BLOOM), and the halo warms rose‚Üígreen. Always-on C2+G2 open-fifth drone (never silent); ~2 s idle self-demo auto-hangs creatures so a hands-free glance moves + sounds within ~1 s. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 NEVER-used technique: **2D rigid-lever torque balance mapped to interval consonance** ‚ÄĒ grep-verified no prior seesaw/torque-physics piece ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [touch hit-testing + 2D torque sim + consonance/dissonance harmony engine + Canvas2D render = 4] ¬∑ #5 README cites the dated RESEARCH ¬ß534 findings **PMC11336827** [4‚Äď6 yo consonance categorization is still forming] + **PMC12605063, Oct 2025** [consonant=pleasant/dissonant=unpleasant affective valence] ‚ÄĒ the in-README dated citation, 2nd straight cycle landing the criterion that was 0-for-15). **Kids-safe chain:** every voice ‚Üí `master(0.26) ‚Üí lowpass(6 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚ąí10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; soft ‚Č•40 ms attacks; even dissonance is gentle/beating, never harsh; gesture-gated AudioContext; no Analyser routed to output. **Degrades:** no Web Audio ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, visuals stay alive & playable; never throws. Full teardown (rAF cancel + stop all oscillators + `audioCtx.close()` + remove resize listener). No API route ‚Üí no `guard`; zero new npm deps (Canvas2D + Web Audio only; NOT WebGL2/three.js/SVG). **diversity:** `banned=[raw-WebGL2 (the 6√ó JURY wall), three.js (approaching cap), no-wrong-notes-safe-scale-kids, data‚Üíroughness]` ¬∑ `picked=[touch, Canvas2D (JURY-reopened, scarce 2√ó), 2D-torque-physics, kids-warm]`. **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `‚úď Compiled successfully` + lint/type passed; the only 897 lint output is a harmless `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` *warning* on the unmount cleanup ‚ÄĒ capturing voices at unmount is intended; warnings never fail Vercel); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `spawn EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container ‚ÄĒ the seesaw *feel*, whether a 4-yo reads "tipping = sour" and "balance = sweet," and small-screen crowding are unverified; the auto-demo guarantees a moving, sounding glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`898-kids-echo-keeper`** ‚≠ź (mic ¬∑ SVG ¬∑ a clash sticks looping in a knot until sung free ‚ÄĒ owns the SVG lane, top resurrect-first) + **`899-kids-candle-choir`** (touch ¬∑ WebGPU+Canvas2D-fallback ¬∑ a clash blows out a candle relit only by a consonant neighbor) as IDEAS ¬ß534. Design notes: `src/app/dream/897-kids-balance-band/README.md`

[/dream/918-kids-starlight-friend](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/918-kids-starlight-friend) ‚ÄĒ **"Starlight Friend": two 4-year-olds, each on their own iPad, share ONE magical night sky ‚ÄĒ shake your device to fling a shooting star and it lights up + chimes in your FRIEND's sky too, so you build a constellation song together.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 542 (kids, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: kids (4+) / **device-shake + WebRTC multi-user** input / **three.js** GPU starfield / calm-joyful indigo‚Üíviolet social. **The lab's FIRST multi-user / WebRTC piece** (729/754 were adult cross-device but this is the first *kids* one, and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-24 #2** ‚ÄĒ "multi-user/WebRTC shared listening room, STILL 0√ó after being named in every single jury"). The compositional logic is **latency-tolerant social co-play, NOT pitch theory** ‚ÄĒ there is no tempo clock; stars twinkle and chime *whenever* they arrive on each device, and the reward is "we made this together." One warm C-major pentatonic so nothing two children fling can ever clash. **Input:** device **shake** (`devicemotion`, accel magnitude >18 w/ 360ms refractory) flings a warm gold/rose shooting star into the child's half of the sky; a full-screen **tap-pad fallback** drives the identical fling‚Üíbloom‚Üíchime‚Üísend pipeline (touch is deliberately the fallback, not the instrument ‚ÄĒ dodges the JURY touch-as-primary ban). iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` + AudioContext both gated inside the one Start tap. **Output:** **three.js** ‚ÄĒ a shader indigo‚Üíviolet backdrop (slow breathing shimmer), a 900-point GPU twinkle field, additive shooting-star + persistent placed-star pools (`powerPreference:'low-power'`, capped pixel ratio). NOT Canvas2D/SVG. **Technique:** **serverless peer-to-peer co-play** ‚ÄĒ an `RTCPeerConnection` data channel (`ordered:false, maxRetransmits:0` ‚ÄĒ drops fine, co-play is loose) carries tiny `{x,y,hue,t,vx,vy}` star-events; **both peers synthesize the chime + render the star locally** (The Hub model ‚ÄĒ the event IS the whole message, near-zero bandwidth, no shared scheduler). **Handshake has NO signaling server:** host `createOffer()` ‚Üí wait ICE ‚Üí **gzip the SDP via `CompressionStream('gzip')` ‚Üí base64url** into a `#join=` share-link; guest auto-answers and shows a gzipped answer code; host pastes it back. WebRTC/gzip unsupported ‚Üí invite UI hidden, solo is the full experience. **Robustness for the 06:30 hands-free glance:** a **ghost friend** auto-joins solo within ~800ms, flinging its OWN cooler cyan/violet stars w/ a softer chime, so one unattended phone reads as **two-player co-play, alive + sounding within ~1s** ‚ÄĒ and it bows out the instant a real channel opens (networking is purely additive). VIBE: calm-joyful twinkling night sky, warm "my" stars vs cool "friend" stars. **Named refs:** **The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers** (historic networked ensembles ‚ÄĒ tiny messages travel, each node renders locally) ¬∑ **Kirschner & Tomasello (2010), "Joint music making promotes prosocial behavior in 4-year-old children"** ¬∑ **"Actions and feelings in sync: synchrony and empathy in children's dyadic musical interactions" (PMC12063534, 2025)** ‚ÄĒ dyadic child music-making promotes empathy, and loose synchrony still works, so latency tolerance is the feature. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [WebRTC star-event networking + shake/shooting-star sim + chime/pad synth + three.js starfield + ghost-friend demo] ¬∑ #3 three named refs ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle commitment [cycle-1 shared sky + ghost; cycle-2 3+ players / shared evolving constellation memory; cycle-3 polish] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß542 citation ‚ÄĒ **8 straight cycles** 535‚Äď542). #1 NOT claimed (WebRTC exists in-lab adult ‚ÄĒ not a clean lab-first technique; it IS the first multi-user *kids* piece). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH ¬ß542 (NMP chases tight tempo; dyadic-child synchrony‚Üíempathy is robust to loose sync) ‚Üí JURY 2026-06-24 #2 (multi-user 0√ó) ‚Üí this kids **WIDE** fire. **Kids-safe chain:** `master gain 0.24 ‚Üí lowpass ~6.5kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(-10/20:1) ‚Üí destination`; ‚Č•50ms soft chime attacks (sine + quiet triangle a fifth up), 60ms-fade noise whoosh, always-on C2+G2 breathing ambient pad (never silent); ‚Č•64‚Äď72px tap targets; no reading required; no "wrong" notes. **Degrades first-class:** no motion/denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + tap-pad; no WebGL ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, audio + ghost still run; no audio ‚Üí notice, visuals alive; no WebRTC/gzip ‚Üí solo+ghost. Full teardown (rAF cancel; remove resize/devicemotion/pointerdown; stop ghost timer; close RTCPeerConnection+channel; dispose all three.js geo/mat/tex + `renderer.dispose()`; stop all oscillators + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (zero server, zero AI, zero cost surface ‚ÄĒ all client-side); **zero new npm deps**. **diversity:** `banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-data‚Üístructure-w/-consonant-crutch]` ¬∑ `picked=[device-shake + WebRTC-multiuser (non-touch, lab-first-for-kids), three.js GPU starfield, latency-tolerant networked-coplay, calm-night-sky/prosocial]`. **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 98s`** ‚Üí Linting/type-check passed ‚Üí reached "Collecting page data"; grep-confirmed **zero** "918"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error" ‚ÄĒ all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear/device-verified** (no audio/WebGL/motion-sensor/second-peer in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: chime timbre, shake threshold feel on a physical iPad, iOS motion-permission prompt, mobile-GPU render, and a live two-device connect + ghost bow-out [serverless gzip-SDP works great same-LAN/hotspot = the two-iPads-side-by-side case; symmetric-NAT cross-network pairs may not connect, but that path is purely additive]; the always-on pad + ghost-friend auto-co-play guarantee a sounding, two-player-looking glance regardless). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`920-kids-sing-a-sprout`** ‚≠ź **RESURRECT-FIRST** (mic-voice ¬∑ three.js ¬∑ long-form-STATEFUL phyllotaxis garden that grows over minutes + sings the melody back ‚ÄĒ the thin jury-valued depth lane, most bulletproof unattended) + **`919-kids-rain-bowl`** (tilt ¬∑ WebGPU compute 30k-droplet gravity pour w/ atomic impact‚Üíchime + lush three.js fallback ‚ÄĒ the JURY-#1 GPU answer) as IDEAS ¬ß542. Design notes: `src/app/dream/918-kids-starlight-friend/README.md`

[/dream/922-breath-aeolian](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/922-breath-aeolian) ‚ÄĒ **"Breath Aeolian": breathe into a living cloud of air and hear the air sing back ‚ÄĒ your breath injects wind into a GPU fluid, and the vortices it stirs whistle aeolian tones whose pitch is set by airflow physics, not by any scale.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 543 (adult, DEEP fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 technical approaches to one concept). **For**: adult / **MIC-breath** input (synthetic-breath fallback) / **WebGL2 GPU stable-fluids** output / elemental breath-warm (amber core ‚Üí violet edges on charcoal). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #1 ("swing back to GPU ‚ÄĒ ban Canvas2D/SVG") AND #3 ("make music from something that is NOT pitch theory ‚ÄĒ rhythm/timbre/texture").** The compositional logic is **airflow ‚Üí sound**, with pitch deliberately dumb: each reed whistles at the **Aeolian-tone / Strouhal frequency `f = St¬∑U/d`** (St=0.2), so a faster swirl past a thinner reed simply sings higher ‚ÄĒ no chords, no scale, no snap. **The lab-first technique:** live fluid-*simulation* aeroacoustics ‚ÄĒ sound generated by an actual GPU Navier‚ÄďStokes (Jos Stam stable-fluids) vorticity field via the spirit of the **Ffowcs Williams‚ÄďHawkings analogy** (the Strouhal primitive was only ever *seeded* ‚ÄĒ unbuilt `386-aeolian-atlas`, a Canvas2D static-wind piece ‚ÄĒ never coupled to a live solver). **Input:** `getUserMedia` ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` RMS ‚Üí ~150ms-smoothed **breath energy** drives a Gaussian upward gust at bottom-center (louder breath = stronger wind). **Mic-routing safety:** mic connects to the AnalyserNode ONLY, never to `destination` (no feedback howl). **Output/technique:** raw WebGL2 2D stable-fluids on ping-pong float render targets (256¬≤ RGBA32F; feature-detects `EXT_color_buffer_float`, degrades to 128¬≤/half-float) ‚ÄĒ per frame advect velocity ‚Üí inject breath gust + reed deflection ‚Üí vorticity confinement ‚Üí 24-iter Jacobi pressure projection ‚Üí advect/dissipate dye ‚Üí curl for the visual; rendered as glowing amber‚Üíviolet vapor. **Aeroacoustic coupling:** a tiny per-reed GPU probe (5√ó5px `readPixels`, NOT a whole-grid readback) samples local |velocity| + |curl|; each of 7 reeds voices a high-Q bandpass-noise whistle + quiet sine partial at `f=St¬∑U/d`, amplitude from shedding strength (`setTargetAtTime` ~80ms, click-free), vorticity-driven FM/AM warble; a broadband breath-noise bed tracks total field kinetic energy. Master: gain 0.3 ‚Üí 7kHz lowpass ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination. **Always-alive:** a synthetic-breath LFO (slow inhale/exhale) drives the gust from load so the cloud breathes + the reeds sing within ~1s with no mic; real breath crossfades it out when granted. **Ambition honest 3‚Äď4/5** (#1 NEVER-used technique [live-fluid-solver aeroacoustics, grep-checked lab-first] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [GPU stable-fluids + mic breath analysis + per-reed aeroacoustic synth + WebGL2 render] ¬∑ #3 named refs [FW-H analogy + Aeolian/Strouhal + Jos Stam GDC 2003 + arXiv:2601.15982] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß543 citation ‚ÄĒ **9 straight cycles** 535‚Äď543). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH ¬ß543 (aeroacoustics: sound from airflow, not a scale) ‚Üí JURY 2026-06-24 #1+#3 ‚Üí this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-data‚Üístructure-w/-consonant-crutch]` ¬∑ `picked=[mic-breath INPUT (non-touch), WebGL2-GPU-fluid OUTPUT, aeroacoustic/vortex-shedding TECHNIQUE (not pitch theory), elemental/breath-warm adult VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Degrades first-class:** no WebGL2 ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice (real experience is GPU); no Web Audio ‚Üí notice, visuals animate; no mic / denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + synthetic-breath keeps it sounding. Full teardown (rAF cancel; stop mic tracks; delete GL resources; stop oscillators/noise; `audioCtx.close()`; remove resize listener). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (all client-side, zero network, zero cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (WebGL2 + Web Audio only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 43s`** ‚Üí lint/type passed ‚Üí grep-confirmed zero "922"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear/mic-verified** (no audio/GPU/mic in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: the `U‚ÜíHz` + amplitude scaling [first-guess calibration, flagged in README], whether shedding reads as "wind singing" vs "filtered noise", shader runtime on real GPU, the half-float RT fallback path; the synthetic-breath fallback guarantees a sounding, flowing glance). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire; banked **`923-aeolian-globe`** ‚≠ź **RESURRECT-FIRST** (drag/tilt ¬∑ three.js 36k-particle wind on a sphere ‚ÄĒ the arXiv:2601.15982 homage; needs a real integrated surface-flow solver to fully earn "live simulation") + **`921-aeolian-loom`** (pointer-stir ¬∑ the same real GPU solver as a "stir the air" desktop instrument) as IDEAS ¬ß543. Design notes: `src/app/dream/922-breath-aeolian/README.md`

[/dream/924-kids-sing-a-sprout](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/924-kids-sing-a-sprout) ‚ÄĒ **"Sing a Sprout": a 4-year-old HUMS or sings, and a glowing garden grows from their voice over minutes ‚ÄĒ every note plants a sprout on a sunflower-spiral, and the garden softly sings their earlier song back.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 544 (kids, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: kids (4+) / **mic-voice** input (synthetic humming-child fallback) / **three.js** GPU phyllotaxis garden / calm luminous bedtime. **The lab's FIRST long-form, STATEFUL kids piece** ‚ÄĒ the thin jury-valued depth lane (888's register) in the kids register, and the standing **resurrect-first ‚≠ź** banked from ¬ß542. The compositional logic is **the child's own voice accumulating into a remembered garden, NOT pitch theory** ‚ÄĒ each sung note snaps to a 3-octave C-pentatonic ladder (no "wrong" notes), plants a glowing sprout at the next **Vogel phyllotaxis** position (golden angle 137.5¬į, so the garden fills outward like a sunflower head), and chimes immediately (cause-effect for the kid). **The long-form / memory engine (genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1):** a rolling **memory bank** of the child's sung notes is a *stigmergic trace* ‚ÄĒ it (a) **biases** where later sprouts land in pitch (new notes pull 30% toward the garden's accumulated average "scent") and (b) every ~14s the garden **re-sings a 4-note earlier phrase back** as soft bells AND plants memory-echo sprouts, so the garden grows from its own memory; sprouts bloom cool‚Üíwarm over ~3 min and the camera slowly drifts outward as the garden fills, so a glance at minute 5 reads materially different (sprout count, spiral extent, warmth, distance). **Input:** `getUserMedia` ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` RMS-gated **autocorrelation** pitch detector (clamped 120‚Äď900 Hz), loudness‚Üísprout size/brightness. **Mic-routing safety:** mic ‚Üí AnalyserNode ONLY, never to `destination` (no feedback). **Output:** **three.js** instanced glowing discs + bright cores (additive blend, HSL cool-violet‚Üíwarm-amber by note + age), soft ground glow, fog, breathing. NOT Canvas2D/SVG. **Always-alive:** no mic / denied ‚Üí a synthetic **"humming child"** sings a slow rising-falling pentatonic melody that plants its first sprout at **~0.35s** and keeps growing the garden on its own; `text-rose-300` notice on mic failure. VIBE: calm luminous night garden, bedtime. **Named refs:** **H. Vogel's phyllotaxis model (1979, golden angle 137.5¬į)** ¬∑ **Brian Eno** generative / long-form ambient ¬∑ the **children's-movement sonification** work (Frontiers, **PMC5104747**). **Ambition honest 4/5** (#2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [mic pitch detection + long-form stateful garden/memory engine + memory-echo bell synth w/ dumb drone + three.js instanced render] ¬∑ #3 three named refs ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle commitment [cycle-1 ships the growth+memory spine; cycle-2 longer-arc macro-form / seasons; cycle-3 polish] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß544 citation ‚ÄĒ **10 straight cycles** 535‚Äď544). #1 NOT claimed (mic-pitch + phyllotaxis + granular both have lab priors; the fresh axis is *the long-form stigmergic-memory garden*, not over-claimed as a clean #1). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH ¬ß544 (MusicSwarm 2026 ‚ÄĒ long-form coherence from a *stigmergic* swarm where agents leave traces in a shared field; plant-growth sonification) ‚Üí the child's voice IS the stigmergic trace ‚Üí this kids **WIDE** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-data‚Üístructure-w/-consonant-crutch (JURY 2026-06-24)]` ¬∑ `picked=[mic-voice INPUT (non-touch, 2 priors/10 ‚ÄĒ under cap), three.js GPU OUTPUT (the scarce GPU surface the jury wants), long-form stateful phyllotaxis-growth + stigmergic-memory TECHNIQUE (melody sung back, NOT a pitch/interval engine), calm-garden/bedtime VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Kids-safe chain:** every voice ‚Üí `master gain 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(-18/12:1) ‚Üí destination`; soft ‚Č•20ms bell attacks, always-on C2+G2+C3 breathing drone (never silent); ‚Č•64px primary tap target; no reading required; no "wrong" notes. **Degrades first-class:** no Web Audio ‚Üí never throws; **zero new npm deps** (three.js + Web Audio only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 112s`** ‚Üí lint/type passed ‚Üí grep-confirmed zero "924"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"; [/dream/927-depth-room](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/927-depth-room) ‚ÄĒ **"Depth Room": your webcam becomes a depth camera, and distance is the instrument ‚ÄĒ a browser ML model reads how far every pixel is, so leaning in blooms a close granular foreground and pulling back thins to a low drone; music lives in proximity, space, and motion, never in pitch.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 545 (adult, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: adult / immersive contemplative / **camera (webcam)** input / **WebGL2 fragment-shader** output / a softly-lit room. **The lab's FIRST depth-camera piece** ‚ÄĒ the single concept JURY has named in *every* verdict ("depth-camera STILL 0√ó"), always deferred for "needs a Kinect/RealSense." This dissolves that excuse: **real-time monocular depth estimation in the browser** turns an ordinary laptop cam into a per-pixel distance field with no special hardware. The compositional logic is **distance/space, NOT pitch theory** (JURY 2026-06-24 #3). **Input/technique:** `getUserMedia` ‚Üí frames drawn to a 256√ó192 offscreen canvas ‚Üí **Depth Anything V2** (`onnx-community/depth-anything-v2-small`) run on **WebGPU via Transformers.js**, loaded **at runtime from a jsDelivr CDN** (`@huggingface/transformers@3.0.0`) so **zero npm deps are added**; inference throttled to ~6fps, wrapped in try/catch. The depth map is averaged to a **16√ó12 grid** ‚Üí features: **near-zone energy** (how much of you is CLOSE), **histogram spread**, **centroid x/y** of the nearest region, **motion-in-depth** (frame-to-frame change). **Output (audio):** a bank of **HRTF-`PannerNode`-spatialized** granular/additive voices ‚ÄĒ NEAR energy blooms bright foreground pentatonic-shimmer + opens lowpass; FAR thins to a low **drone bed** (root A1 + fifth E2); centroid-x pans L‚ÜĒR; spread opens the shimmer stack; motion adds grain density + tremolo. **Pitch is held deliberately dumb** ‚ÄĒ one fixed A-minor-pentatonic + drone, nothing can clash. Master gain ‚Č§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí compressor. **Output (visual):** a fullscreen **WebGL2 fragment shader** (`scene.ts`) samples the depth grid as an `R32F` texture ‚ÄĒ near pixels glow warm amber/rose and bloom around your nearest region, far recede to cool indigo; quiet iso-depth contour bands + drifting volumetric haze react to near-zone energy; image mirrored so it reads like a room you stand in. NOT three.js/Canvas2D/SVG. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 NEVER-used technique [monocular depth estimation ‚ÄĒ grep-confirmed lab-first; depth-camera 0√ó every jury] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [camera capture + browser ML depth model + WebGL2 depth-shader + HRTF spatial granular synth] ¬∑ #3 named ref [**Depth Anything V2**, Yang et al., **NeurIPS 2024**; Transformers.js-WebGPU `webgpu-realtime-depth-estimation` demo] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬ß545 citation ‚ÄĒ **11 straight cycles** 535‚Äď545). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH ¬ß545 (a webcam is now a depth camera ‚ÄĒ monocular depth runs in-browser on WebGPU *now*) ‚Üí JURY's standing #2 (depth-camera 0√ó) + #3 (music from space not pitch) ‚Üí this adult **WIDE** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[mic INPUT (5√ó/10), three.js OUTPUT (5√ó/10), Canvas2D, SVG (JURY 2026-06-24)]` ¬∑ `picked=[camera INPUT (1 prior/10 ‚ÄĒ under cap), WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT (the scarce GPU surface, not three.js), monocular-depth‚Üíspatial-granular TECHNIQUE (space, not pitch theory), immersive contemplative adult VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Degrades first-class (always sounds + shows):** no camera/denied ‚Üí animated **synthetic procedural depth field** (slow breathing radial blob) drives the same audio+shader; no WebGPU / model-load fail ‚Üí same synthetic field; no WebGL2 ‚Üí minimal Canvas2D depth-grid view; a hands-off auto-start kicks a silent synthetic visual within **~0.45s**; audio only after the **"Enter the room"** tap (gesture-gated AudioContext). **Privacy:** camera processed entirely on-device, **live ‚ÄĒ never recorded or uploaded** (stated in UI in emerald). Full teardown (camera tracks stopped; AudioContext faded+closed; rAF cancel; GL program/shaders/texture/buffer/VAO disposed). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (all client-side, zero server, zero cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Transformers.js is a runtime CDN import, not a package dep). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 81s`** ‚Üí lint/type passed; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/camera/GPU-verified** (no camera/WebGPU/audio in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether Transformers.js's `depth` output shape matches across versions [wrapped in try/catch ‚Üí synthetic fallback on any mismatch], real-GPU inference framerate, whether "lean in = bloom" reads as embodied; the synthetic-depth fallback guarantees a sounding, depth-shaded glance regardless). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`928-tilt-orrery`** ‚≠ź **RESURRECT-FIRST** (device-tilt ¬∑ a real **WebGPU compute** WGSL N-body sim of ~1,400 orbiting bodies ‚Üí perihelion/collision-triggered granular percussion, timbre from radius/speed, pan from angular position, pitch a fixed drone; CPU N-body fallback ‚Üí Canvas2D; pointer/slider + auto-tilt demo ‚ÄĒ the orrery / GPU-N-body lineage) + **`929-cathedral-rhythm`** (MIDI/keyboard/pads ¬∑ a Bjorklund **Euclidean-rhythm + Reich-phasing** lookahead sequencer, several lanes of one fixed pitch through a procedural ~4.2s convolution-reverb cathedral, rendered as a **WebGL2 raymarched SDF nave** lit only by per-lane onset-flashes ‚ÄĒ *Piano Phase* 1967 / Toussaint 2005) as IDEAS ¬ß545. Design notes: `src/app/dream/927-depth-room/README.md`

[/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy) ‚ÄĒ **"Maqam Calligraphy": a living Arabic _taqsim_ improvises itself in EXACT microtonal cents and writes itself as a luminous ink-and-gold calligraphic line ‚ÄĒ so you can SEE the quarter-tones sit between the piano's 12-TET cracks.** `demoable` ¬∑ Cycle 555 (adult, DEEP fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 Canvas2D approaches). **For**: adult / contemplative / **autonomous + light touch-steer** input / **Canvas2D** output / warm ink-and-gold illuminated-manuscript ritual. **The lab's FIRST non-Western melodic-modal lane** ‚ÄĒ Arabic **maqam**, distinct from the lab's prior microtonal work (538/414/404 are JI/Bohlen-Pierce _tuning-lattices_; this is the maqam _modal/ornament/improvisation_ tradition). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #2** (make music from real PITCH/melody again) from a non-vertical direction: a single ornamented MELODIC line, no chords, no voice-leading engine. **Engine (`maqam.ts` + `sayr.ts` + `audio.ts`):** every pitch is an exact cents offset from a D tonic (`freq = 293.66*2^(cents/1200)`), quarter-tones (~150c, ~350c) **first-class, never snapped to 12-TET**. Eight **ajnas** (Rast `0/200/350/500`, Bayati `0/150/300/500`, Hijaz `0/100/400/500`, Nahawand `0/200/300/500`, Kurd `0/100/300/500`, Saba `0/150/300/400`, Ajam `0/200/400/500`, Sikah trichord `0/150/350`) compose five **maqamat** (lower jins on the tonic + upper jins on the **ghammaz** pivot). A **sayr state machine** drives a ~5.5-min **long-form, stateful** journey (qarar-low -> ascent -> ghammaz -> modulation/peak -> descent -> qarar-home), modulating to a related maqam via an adjacency map at the peak ‚ÄĒ genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1. A **free-meter** phrase generator (no fixed bar) targets characteristic/rest tones with stepwise approach, breaths between phrases, and ornaments: **portamento** slides through the microtonal space (`setTargetAtTime`), grace notes, trills, and "leaning" on the neutral half-flats. **Synth (NO granular ‚ÄĒ jury-banned):** a plucked **oud/qanun**-like voice (triangle+saw -> fast-decay lowpass pluck + sympathetic partial) over a sustained **tanbura** drone (tonic + fifth, slow beating); master `gain <=0.26 -> lowpass -> DynamicsCompressor -> destination`. **Visual (Canvas2D ‚ÄĒ the only non-banned renderer this window):** an illuminated-manuscript field where the melody draws an **ink-and-gold brushstroke** (y = exact cents, stroke weight = emphasis, portamento = curved sweeps, grace/trill = flourishes) against a dim dashed **12-TET ghost grid** + gold **active-jins guide-lines** labeled `qarar`/`ghammaz`/`<n>c` ‚ÄĒ the literal "quarter-tones between the cracks"; modulation washes a new tint, the tanbura glows at the tonic/fifth baselines. **UX:** pick a starting maqam -> "Begin taqsim" (gesture-gates AudioContext); plays hands-free; light steering nudges the next modulation or heads home; ~0.9s auto-demo runs a silent visual if no Begin; `text-rose-300` audio-fail notice; full teardown. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [first maqam / exact-cents non-Western modal + first sayr-driven long-form self-modulating taqsim; grep-0x] - #2 >=4 subsystems [ajnas-cents engine + sayr modulation FSM + free-meter ornament generator + oud/tanbura microtonal synth + Canvas2D calligraphic render] - #3 named refs [Arab maqam tradition; the **sayr** concept; **AMICOR 2026** (_Language Resources and Evaluation_); **1932 Cairo Congress of Arab Music**] - #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß555** ‚ÄĒ 20 straight cycles 535‚Äď555). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship; multi-cycle deepening seeded). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH ¬ß555 (AMICOR 2026 names the gap ‚ÄĒ no maqam-native microtone synthesis, practice drifts to Western 12-TET) -> this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js (JURY 7x), mic-as-primary (JURY 4x), granular (JURY 4x), "pitch-held-dumb" stance (JURY ~10x), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit 5x/10), raw-WebGL2-OUTPUT (audit 5x/10), voice-leading/chordal-harmony-engine (lab-hardening 550/551/941/942/947)]` - `picked=[autonomous+touch-steer INPUT (non-mic), Canvas2D OUTPUT (only non-banned renderer, 0x/10), exact-cents maqam-sayr modulation TECH (melodic/modal ‚ÄĒ NOT voice-leading), warm ink-and-gold non-Western ritual VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route -> no `guard`** (all client-side, zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`Compiled successfully in 44s`** -> lint/type passed -> grep-confirmed zero "952"/"maqam"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in container). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`951-maqam-road`** (RESURRECT-FIRST: same engine, the sayr-as-a-road-through-a-dusk-landscape lens, Canvas2D, IDEAS ¬ß555). Design notes: `src/app/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy/README.md`

[/dream/960-cristal-friction](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/960-cristal-friction) ‚ÄĒ **"Cristal Friction": bow a row of glowing glass/metal rods with your cursor ‚ÄĒ the singing comes from a REAL elasto-plastic stick-slip friction physical model (Helmholtz motion), not a sampled or additive emulation.** `demoable` (build-checked + Node-DSP-tested; not GPU/ear-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 559 (adult, WIDE fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 3 orthogonal NON-harmony explorers). **For**: adult / **pointer-rub** input (cursor velocity = bow speed, vertical press = bow force) / raw-**WebGL2** glowing-rods shader (Canvas2D fallback) / warm-glass candle-lit ritual. **The lab's first friction EXCITER model** ‚ÄĒ prior "bowed/glass" pieces (355-kids-glass-armonica, 202-membrane-drum, 468-kids-bottle-flute) emulated the *resonator* with additive/FM; here a per-sample **elasto-plastic / LuGre bristle friction law** (stiction near zero relative velocity ‚Üí Stribeck drop into slip) runs in an **AudioWorkletProcessor**, feeding friction force back into a **Chamberlin modal resonator bank**'s contact velocity to *self-sustain* the bowed oscillation. Silent at rest; locks to the rod pitch under a steady bow; breaks into whistling **wolf-tones** when bowed fast/light (a feature). Six rods just-tuned to a pentatonic+octave drone on ~D3 so any combination is consonant ‚ÄĒ the **friction TIMBRE and the embodied bowing gesture are the idea, not a harmony engine** (deliberately breaking the 7-of-10 harmony monoculture the JURY 2026-06-25 monoculture-warning pointed at). Worklet loaded as a Blob URL (no public/ file); oscillator fallback if AudioWorklet absent. **Named refs:** McIntyre, Schumacher & Woodhouse, *On the oscillations of musical instruments* (1983); the elasto-plastic bowed-string friction model (2025‚Äď26 physical-modeling revival, Frontiers in Signal Processing 2025); the **Cristal Baschet** + Franklin's **glass armonica** (1761). **RESEARCH ¬ß559** chain (today's friction-synthesis dive ‚Üí today's build). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 first friction stick-slip exciter ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 ¬ß559). Honest note: the model self-oscillates to a roughly constant limit-cycle amplitude (as a real Helmholtz-regime string does), so the loudness/brightness *envelope* is a deliberate gestural shaping layer on top of the physics; build-checked + the worklet was Node-tested for stability/self-oscillation/boundedness, but the WebGL2 shader and final sound were not rendered/heard in-container.

---

[/dream/997-resonant-halls](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/997-resonant-halls) ‚ÄĒ **"Resonant Halls": walk in FIRST PERSON through a cathedral of five harmonic rooms ‚ÄĒ each room a key on the circle of fifths with its OWN acoustics ‚ÄĒ and stepping through a doorway is a key modulation you hear in the reverb itself.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean; not GPU/ear-verified) ¬∑ Cycle 577 (adult, **DEEP** fire ‚ÄĒ winner of 2 approaches: this first-person 3D vs. `996-dream-rooms` the WebGPU-compute floor-plan twin). **For**: adult / immersive contemplative / **pointer-look + WASD walk** input (co-equal; pointer-drag looks, keys walk; plus a hands-free "Take the tour" auto-walk) / hand-rolled **raymarched WebGL2 3D** output / luminous cathedral with volumetric doorway light. **The DEEP extension of the lab's spatial thread** ‚ÄĒ 977-echo-room-gpu (the only 5/5; walk among HRTF recordings of past selves) ‚Üí 992-dream-house (cycle 575; La Monte Young drone field, position blooms partials but acoustics fixed) ‚Üí **this**: now the room itself encodes a *key* and **the acoustics themselves are a navigable field** ‚ÄĒ the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-27 #2** ("extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument ‚ÄĒ make it a *room*: multiple harmonic zones you physically walk between") and **#3** ("force a real GPU-compute OR 3D path" ‚ÄĒ taken via the **3D path**, first-person raymarching, not a flat 2D plot). **Engine.** Five rooms keyed **C ‚Üí G ‚Üí D ‚Üí A ‚Üí E**, each a just perfect fifth (√ó3/2) above the last, octave-folded into the warm felt-in-the-body low band (~65‚Äď110 Hz; master lowpass 6 kHz, never shrill). Each room sustains a continuous **just-intoned chord** (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 2/1, 3/1) ‚ÄĒ a drone instrument, never triggered notes, no wrong notes. **Per-room acoustics (the headline):** each room owns a **procedurally-synthesized impulse response** ‚Üí its own `ConvolverNode` ‚ÄĒ a dense exponential-decay noise tail (1.1 s bright chapel ‚Üí 4.6 s dark apse), a sparse size-scaled early-reflection stamp panned across the field, and a one-pole darkening pass, all from a deterministic per-room LCG (stable, hand-verifiable). So a small chapel rings short/present, a tall nave rings long/distant. **Proximity ‚Üí mix:** `computeRoomWeights(cameraZ)` = normalized Gaussian wells per room centre, ramping each room's wet/dry sends with `setTargetAtTime` (no clicks); overlapping wells cross-fade doorways. **Doorway = pivot-chord modulation (the audible reward):** each key's **3/2 fifth equals the next key's 1/1 root**, so during a crossing both rooms sound and that shared partial is a **held common tone** (classic pivot) while the departing key's other tones fade and the arriving key's bloom ‚ÄĒ the change lands continuous, not a jump-cut, and you hear it dissolve from one room's reverb into the next; `computeCrossing(cameraZ)` drives the "‚Üí modulating C ‚Üí G" HUD. **Render:** hand-rolled 3D, **NO three.js** ‚ÄĒ a single full-screen fragment shader **raymarches an SDF corridor of box-rooms** (positive-inside SDF boxes unioned with overlapping z half-extents so shared walls open into doorways; interior sphere-tracing finds walls; clerestory light + volumetric doorway glow + cathedral ribs + colored distance haze in each room's accent), with a **hand-built first-person camera** (the lookAt approach from 995-kids-moon-trampoline: position + yaw/pitch ‚Üí forward ‚Üí `right = normalize(cross(fwd,up))`, `up = cross(right,fwd)` ‚Üí ray origin/dir uniforms). Accent **hue = fifthsIndex/12** so kindred keys are kindred colors ‚ÄĒ luminous cathedral, deliberately **NOT** the engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment vibe the jury banned. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [JI drone synth + per-room procedural convolution acoustics + raymarched SDF 3D render + hand-rolled first-person camera nav = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela *Dream House* (MELA); architectural-acoustics auralization / convolution-reverb-from-IR; the circle of fifths as literal floor-plan] ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle commitment [extends the 977‚Üí992 spatial thread; cycle-1 ships the walkable-rooms + per-room-acoustics spine; deepen next: doorways that interact, an operator/Tauri view, more rooms] ¬∑ #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬ß577** citation). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ both raymarching (176/206-sdf-cave, 909, 915) and `ConvolverNode` (many priors) exist in the lab; the fresh axis is *per-room acoustics that change as you walk between keyed rooms*, not over-claimed as a clean novel technique. **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH ¬ß577 (the 2026 frontier of *precomputed/reciprocal sound-propagation fields* ‚ÄĒ acoustics-as-a-navigable-field; arXiv:2602.06937 Reciprocal Latent Fields, 2510.20602 Resounding Acoustic Fields) ‚Üí JURY 2026-06-27 #2/#3 ‚Üí this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input, Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-ONLY (force GPU-compute or 3D), the "explainable-inverse-of-an-opaque-neural-frontier" conceptual move, engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment adult vibe (JURY 2026-06-27)]` ¬∑ `picked=[pointer-look+WASD-walk INPUT (pointer co-equal, not keyboard-only), raymarched 3D WebGL2 OUTPUT (the sanctioned 3D escape, not a flat 2D plot), per-room-convolution-acoustics + pivot-chord-spatial-modulation TECHNIQUE (pure spatial presence, NOT a music-theory explainer), luminous-cathedral VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (all client-side, zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2 only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`‚úď Compiled successfully in 45s`** ‚Üí lint/type passed ‚Üí no "997"/"resonant-halls" warning, no "Failed to compile"/"Type error"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other dream pages); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the SDF raymarch reads as a convincing navigable cathedral, the real-GPU framerate, and the *perceptual* strength of the held-pivot-tone-vs-retune balance across a doorway; reasoned-and-typed, worth a live click-through). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`996-dream-rooms`** ‚≠ź **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the WebGPU-**compute** twin ‚ÄĒ same walk-the-harmonic-chambers concept as a top-down floor-plan, but the resonating body is a real 12k-particle compute shader [WebGPU-compute ‚Üí WebGL2-instanced ‚Üí Canvas2D fallback]; the directest answer to JURY #3's GPU-compute scarcity; builder returned lint 0/0 + tsc clean, IDEAS ¬ß577). Design notes: `src/app/dream/997-resonant-halls/README.md`

### [1020-kids-breath-flute](/dream/1020-kids-breath-flute) ¬∑ kids (4+) / mic-breath / warm-aurora ¬∑ cycle 586 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-06-28) ¬∑ demoable
Blow or hum into the tablet and a glowing air-column *sings* a real flute, synthesized from physics ‚ÄĒ a genuine **jet-drive digital-waveguide** (Cook/Smith STK Flute), breath-RMS as bore pressure, tap big glowing holes (G-Mixolydian) to pick pitch. First wind/physical-modeling instrument in the lab; ships with a passing tuning selfTest (7/7 notes within ¬Ī60¬Ę at 44.1/48k). AudioWorklet + ScriptProcessor fallback; WebGL2 air-column + Canvas2D fallback; tap-puff + 2s-idle auto-demo.

### [1029-echo-halls-sphere](/dream/1029-echo-halls-sphere) ¬∑ adult / pointer-look + gyro + WASD / WebGPU-compute + WebGL2 first-person ¬∑ cycle 589 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-06-28) ¬∑ demoable
Walk through a **sphere** of six HRTF harmonic rooms ‚ÄĒ some above you, some below, some behind ‚ÄĒ and **find a chord by ear**: you are the Web Audio `AudioListener`, your orientation rewrites the binaural pan every frame, so closing your eyes and turning toward a chord works. **Cycle 2 of the Echo Halls thread** (extends the lab's only-5/5 `1019-echo-halls-tonnetz` ‚ÄĒ JURY 2026-06-28 #2). The C-major neighbourhood (I¬∑vi¬∑IV¬∑ii¬∑V¬∑iii) drones octave-folded into a warm low band; the faced room blooms via a softmax `facingWeights` cross-fade. **The resonating body is a real WebGPU compute particle field** (WGSL curl-noise advection + `atomic<u32>` kinetic-energy reduction + non-blocking `mapAsync` readback) whose measured energy drives the active room's shimmer gain ‚ÄĒ *in every tier* (WebGPU-compute ‚Üí CPU-sim-in-WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D), so the sim genuinely sings rather than decorates. Keeps WebGPU compute alive (#3) while making spatial *orientation* the primary mechanic ‚ÄĒ varying the human‚ÜĒsound relationship away from the flagged "the sim IS the body" groove (#1). Hand-rolled first-person WebGL2 (no three.js, zero new deps); pointer-look + WASD + DeviceOrientation; 2s-idle auto-tour sweeps between a low (ii) and a high (IV) room so a hands-free reviewer hears the elevation. **Verified:** `geometry.test.ts` **89 assertions pass** (6 distinct chords; all room dirs unit vectors; full-sphere spread ‚ÄĒ ‚Č•1 above y>0.4, ‚Č•1 below y<-0.4, ‚Č•1 behind z>0.3, none closer than 0.35 rad; facingWeights sum‚Üí1 & peak at faced room; all chords diatonic to C-major; freqs in 60‚Äď240 Hz). Named refs: Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet*; "Spatial Orchestra" (arXiv:2510.23848); full-sphere localization (arXiv:2606.24367, 2026); Sonic4D viewpoint-adaptive binaural (arXiv:2506.15759, 2026); WebGPU baseline 2026. **Ambition 4/5** (#2 ‚Č•4 subsystems [per-room HRTF + WebGPU-compute body + facing-weight harmony state + first-person render] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle [cycle 2 of the Echo Halls thread] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß589). #1 not over-claimed (HRTF + raymarch-adjacent render have priors; the fresh axis is *full-sphere find-by-ear with a compute body*). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (all client-side, zero AI/network); **zero new npm deps**. Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; 1029 folder grep-clean); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio device in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether above-vs-below localizes by ear [HRTF-dependent], real-GPU framerate, the perceptual find-by-ear premise; the 89-assertion geometry test + cross-tier audio coupling cover the math). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire; banked **`echo-halls-flock`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (100k WGSL compute swarm whose density/energy readback honestly drives the audio; 8156-assertion test) + **`echo-halls-gyro`** (gyro-as-listener, dwell-lock-to-play-a-progression, eyes-closed; 50-assertion test) as IDEAS ¬ß589. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1029-echo-halls-sphere/README.md`

### [1033-kids-hum-blossom](/dream/1033-kids-hum-blossom) ¬∑ kids / **mic voice-PITCH** (autocorrelation/YIN-lite) / Canvas2D organic bloom ¬∑ cycle 590 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-06-28) ¬∑ demoable
**Hum a note and a flower blooms *in tune with you*.** A 4-year-old hums into the mic; we detect the sung **pitch** in real time and a glowing flower grows from a bud ‚ÄĒ petals sprout by golden-angle phyllotaxis while a tone is sustained, petal/glow color tracks pitch (warm red/orange low ‚Üí violet/white high) ‚ÄĒ and a soft **3-voice "ah" choir answers**, snapping the child's hum to the nearest tone of a slowly-cycling **I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV** in C major (real functional harmony, *not* a pentatonic "no-wrong-notes" snap). **The lab's first voice-*pitch* input** ‚ÄĒ every prior mic piece used voice as *energy* (RMS/onset/breath: 1020, 922, FFT bands); this tracks the actual fundamental and folds it into harmony, directly answering JURY 2026-06-28 #3 ("break the pointer reflex ‚ÄĒ deepen a lonely fresh input"). Pitch math lives in a **pure, framework-free `pitch.ts`** (`detectPitchHz`: RMS silence gate ‚Üí normalized autocorrelation over ~70‚Äď1200 Hz ‚Üí first-strong-peak-after-dip to kill octave errors ‚Üí clarity gate ‚Üí parabolic sub-Hz interpolation), **verified by `pitch.test.ts`** (pure TS + `console.assert`, no framework import, no top-level auto-run): detects 196/220/440/880 Hz within ~3% and returns -1 on silence ‚ÄĒ **ran live this cycle: ALL PASSED**. **MIC SAFETY:** source ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` only, never to `destination` (no feedback howl); nothing recorded/sent. Always-on soft ambient pad + master limiter + click-free portamento = safe kids sound; graceful no-mic auto-demo (slow synthetic hum still blooms + sings, `text-rose-300` notice). **Implements this cycle's research dive** (RESEARCH ¬ß590: 2026 commodity-ization of fully-client-side browser pitch detection for kids/education) ‚ÄĒ the dive‚Üíbuild chain is visible. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used-here technique [real-time voice-pitch‚Üíharmony, grep-0√ó on kids lane] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [mic + autocorrelation pitch detection + functional-harmony choir engine + organic render] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß590). Love-bias: pulled by Karel's love of `158-kids-hum-paint` (hum-based kids). **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (all client-side, zero network/AI); zero new npm deps. Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (winner folder grep-clean: 0 tsc errors, 0 eslint errors/warnings; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT audio/mic-verified on a real device** (no mic in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: real-voice detection robustness on a child's timbre, latency feel; the passing `pitch.test.ts` covers the detector math on synthetic sines). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1034-kids-rain-chimes`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (tilt ‚Üí WebGPU-compute droplet rain whose band-crossing readback rings a real I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV; committed `sim.test.ts`) + **`1032-kids-shadow-choir`** (camera luminance-silhouette ‚Üí centroid-Y picks chord, coverage stacks choir voices) as IDEAS S590. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1033-kids-hum-blossom/README.md`

### [1047-tracer-drift](/dream/1047-tracer-drift) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **mic-breath energy** (analysis-only, non-pointer) / WebGL2 **ping-pong feedback buffer** ¬∑ cycle 596 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: LSD ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (drifting)`
**The long weightless plateau of an acid drift ‚ÄĒ surfaces breathing, motion smearing into lagging color trails ‚ÄĒ drug-free.** The lab's **FIRST ping-pong feedback-trail accumulator** (grep-0√ó; the named-but-unbuilt `feedbackBuffer.ts` shared infra). Two RGBA16F FBOs (8-bit fallback) ping-pong each frame: the previous frame is re-sampled with a slight zoom + rotation + fBm warp, multiplied by a gentle decay (0.80‚Äď0.978 ‚ÄĒ never a hard buffer-flash), nudged in hue (chromatic lag so trails drift in color as they fade), then fresh content composites over it ‚ÄĒ a slow breathing fBm surface, two slightly-detuned dot lattices (moir√©), and faint animated visual-snow grain. A present pass tone-maps gently (luminous, lifted-black dusk, not a void). **No raymarching, no reaction-diffusion** (both lane-banned this cycle). Input is **mic breath-energy, analysis-only** (`AnalyserNode`, never to `destination` ‚ÄĒ no howl): low-band energy ‚Üí trail length (decay/zoom) + warp; loudness ‚Üí saturation. Graceful no-mic fallback (self-driven LFO swell + `text-rose-300` notice) so it drifts + sounds on a 06:30 phone glance with zero permissions. Audio bed: detuned sine/triangle drone with per-voice slow detune LFOs + a shared ~67 s pitch-bend portamento ("melt") + a slowly-swept filtered-noise wash ‚ÄĒ weightless, nothing rhythmic. ~4-min looping arc with a deliberately **wide plateau** (0.40‚Äď0.78) ‚ÄĒ the *temporal* shape (drift, not peak) the peak-centric psych lane (1038/1041/1042/1043) lacked. **Pastel-drift palette** (lilac/peach/mint/rose/cyan) ‚ÄĒ not neon, not dark-void. **Named refs:** Memo Akten (feedback/optical-flow); LSD tracer/positive-afterimage/visual-snow phenomenology; Carhart-Harris entropic-brain / REBUS. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [ping-pong feedback buffer, grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [feedback accumulator + drone+noise audio + moir√©/snow layers + arc] ¬∑ #3 named reference; + RESEARCH ¬ß596). Full GL teardown (textures/FBOs/programs/VAO/VBO + lose-context) + click-free audio fade + RAF cancel. **No API route ‚Üí no guard**; zero new npm deps. **Safety:** not a flicker piece ‚ÄĒ slow luminance drift only, feedback decay gentle, no 3‚Äď30 Hz full-screen flashing. Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (zero issues from the 1047 folder; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: real trail-length/decay feel, audio balance, breath‚Üítrail coupling; shader/audio textbook by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1048-threshold`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (hypnagogia dream-logic scene-teleport engine ‚ÄĒ five thresholded-noise scenes cross-dissolved + teleport-cut, anti-strobe spacing floor) + **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** (psilocybin warm-organic two-level domain-warp + blooming kaleidoscope) as IDEAS ¬ß596. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1047-tracer-drift/README.md`

### [1044-hyperbolic-bloom](/dream/1044-hyperbolic-bloom) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **analysis-only mic** (FFT, non-pointer) + self-sufficient drone / WebGL2 **Poincar√©-disk {7,3} hyperbolic tiling** fragment shader ¬∑ cycle 597 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT-hyperbolic ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Drug-free descent into the DMT "hyperbolic hyperspace" ‚ÄĒ space stops being flat and becomes negatively curved: jeweled heptagons stream out toward the rim forever and never run out.** The lab's **FIRST hyperbolic-geometry build** (grep-0√ó on `hyperbolic`/`Poincar√©`/`{7,3}` across 596 cycles). Per pixel: screen ‚Üí a complex point `z` in the **Poincar√© unit disk**; an inverse **M√∂bius transform** drags `z` backward along a hyperbolic **geodesic** (the endless "fall" outward, `z'=(z‚ąíb)/(1‚ąíconj(b)z)` with `b` drifting along the arc) + a slow whole-field rotation; then `z` is **folded into one {7,3} fundamental cell** by ~6‚Äď22 depth-driven iterations alternating a **7-fold dihedral mirror** with a **circle inversion** in a circle orthogonal to the disk (`z‚Üíc+(z‚ąíc)r¬≤/|z‚ąíc|¬≤`, orthogonality `|c|¬≤‚ąír¬≤=1`). Fold-count + cell coordinate drive a **jeweled cosine palette** with **thin-film iridescence**, per-channel **chromatic aberration**, **dark grout** along domain edges, a breathing fBm domain-warp ("melting surfaces") + a traveling-wave phase, filmic tone-map. **Honest approximation (documented in README + in-app notes):** a fixed inverting circle per sector with the correct orthogonality relation ‚ÄĒ reads convincingly as negatively-curved {7,3}, not the proven exact Schwarz-triangle group. **Journey:** a single non-looping ~5-min `progress` clock ramps recursion depth / geodesic fall-speed / warp / saturation / chroma / glow through onset ‚Üí come-up ‚Üí **breakthrough peak (~35‚Äď60%)** ‚Üí plateau ‚Üí soft-landing return (never abrupt). **Always audio-visual:** a self-sufficient generative **drone** (detuned osc stack + sub-bass + opening low-pass + limiter, master 0.15, click-free fades, full teardown) plays with **zero permissions** and self-FFTs to drive the visuals; an **optional analysis-only mic** (`attachMic` ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` ONLY, **never** to `destination` ‚ÄĒ no howl) maps bass‚Üífall-speed, mids‚Üíwarp, highs‚Üíiridescence, loudness‚Üísaturation. Graceful degrade: no WebGL2 ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + the drone still plays the full arc; no mic ‚Üí drone drives everything silently with a small note. Full GL teardown (deleteProgram + WEBGL_lose_context) + pause/resume. **Named refs:** QRI *The Hyperbolic Geometry of the DMT Experience* (G√≥mez-Emilsson ‚ÄĒ world-sheets folding into negatively-curved hyperspace, saddles, sheets); Bressloff‚ÄďCowan cortical form-constants; M.C. Escher *Circle Limit I‚ÄďIV*. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [hyperbolic tiling, grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [hyperbolic geometry engine + M√∂bius/fold fragment renderer + arc envelope + self-FFT drone synth = 4] ¬∑ #3 named references; + RESEARCH ¬ß597). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-primary (JURY 7√ó), cosmic-ambient-pole (lane 3√ó, rebalancing)] ¬∑ picked=[analysis-only-mic+drone INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2 hyperbolic-tiling OUTPUT, M√∂bius-geodesic + {7,3}-fold TECHNIQUE (lab-first), neon-jeweled intense VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ rebalances the lane's pole to intense (was cosmic-ambient 3 vs intense 2) and the *look/technique* is wholly distinct from the prior DMT pieces (1038 2D log-polar warp / 1042 4D raymarch). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing ‚ÄĒ slow luminance/saturation drift + smooth motion only, no full-screen flash; Pause instantly freezes + silences. **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; `next lint` on the 1044 folder = **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: whether the fold *subjectively* reads as hyperbolic on a real GPU, framerate at 6‚Äď22 fold iters/pixel, the audio‚Üícurvature coupling feel; the M√∂bius/fold math + drone are textbook by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (psilocybin warm-organic ‚ÄĒ fills the lane's empty warm pole) + **`1049-salvia-membrane`** (the uncanny salvia "becoming-an-object" 2D-membrane state, grep-0√ó) as IDEAS ¬ß597. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1044-hyperbolic-bloom/README.md`

### [1050-mycelial-grow](/dream/1050-mycelial-grow) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **analysis-only mic-breath** (RMS, non-pointer) + autonomous / Canvas2D **space-colonization growing network** ¬∑ cycle 598 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-06-29) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: psilocybin ¬∑ pole: intense-warm (organic)`
**The psych lane's FIRST warm piece and FIRST psilocybin state ‚ÄĒ gold mycelium that actually GROWS out of the loam-dark, branching filaments colonizing the field forever (minute 5 ‚Č† minute 1), each fork ringing a soft tone.** Real **Space Colonization Algorithm** (Runions/Lane/Prusinkiewicz 2007; Jason Webb's JS port) in a pure framework-free `growth.ts`: a cloud of attractors pulls a network of growth nodes ‚ÄĒ each attractor influences only its nearest node within an *attraction radius*, each influenced node steps `segmentLength` along the averaged (jittered) direction to its attractors and spawns a child, attractors within the *kill radius* are consumed, and **branching emerges naturally** when a node is pulled in divergent directions (reported as a *fork* event). **Long-form / evolving (the point):** fresh attractor clouds **reseed in slow ~5.5 s waves** into new regions so the network keeps colonizing NEW territory; a per-frame field fade dims the oldest filaments and a `maxNodes` ring-buffer recycles the oldest non-root slots, so it accumulates and runs **indefinitely** ‚ÄĒ genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1 (a category the lab is thin on). **Look:** dark loam (`#0a0705`), filaments drawn with additive (`"lighter"`) compositing ‚ÄĒ growing **tips glow brightest**, older/inner branches thicken with depth and dim toward rust/ochre/brown; **warm-organic palette only** (brown‚Üírust‚Üíamber‚Üíochre‚Üígold), no blue/violet/neon ‚ÄĒ the gap the lane completely lacked. **Audio (Web Audio):** a warm sustained **drone bed** (root 55 Hz + just fifth 82.5 Hz + soft partials through a ~20 s LFO lowpass); each **branch/fork** triggers a soft bell from a **fixed A-minor-pentatonic** set (no wrong notes), panned by x, pitched by depth (tips higher, old/deep lower), with **voice-steal (cap 7)** so dense growth shimmers instead of clipping; master `gain ‚Č§0.26 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`. **Mic (analysis-only):** `getUserMedia ‚Üí MediaStreamSource ‚Üí AnalyserNode` ONLY (**never to `destination`** ‚ÄĒ no howl; nothing recorded/uploaded) ‚Üí breath RMS drives **growth rate** (note density) + tip brightness; no-mic ‚Üí autonomous calm growth + `text-rose-300` self-drive notice. Gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (RAF cancel, mic tracks stopped, master gain faded + context closed). **Honest prior (NOT lab-first):** `322-kids-voice-garden` already used space colonization ‚ÄĒ the fresh axis here is the adult-psychedelic, autonomously long-form, breath-driven, fork-sonified register (growth *is* the instrument, not a garden you tend). **Named refs:** Runions/Lane/Prusinkiewicz *Modeling Trees with a Space Colonization Algorithm* (2007); Jason Webb (Medium); Paul Stamets *Mycelium Running*. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [growth engine + branch-triggered synth + drone bed + mic-reactivity = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß598; #1 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ 322 prior). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-primary (JURY 7√ó), fragment-shader/kaleidoscope OUTPUT (lab's heaviest groove, 26 files ‚ÄĒ incl. the de-selected sibling 1048), cosmic-ambient-pole] ¬∑ picked=[analysis-only mic-breath INPUT (non-pointer), Canvas2D growing-network OUTPUT (scarce), space-colonization growth + long-form evolution TECHNIQUE, warm-organic intense VIBE (lane-first)]`. **Verified:** `growth.test.ts` (plain `console.assert`, guarded ‚ÄĒ not auto-run at import) passes ‚ÄĒ network grows past roots, real branching to depth ‚Č•2, attractors consumed by kill radius, node cap respected under heavy reseeding, low-breath ‚Üí fewer events. **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; `next lint` on the 1050 folder = **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no display/mic/audio device in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: drone-vs-bells loudness balance, visual density/fade pacing, breath‚Üígrowth-rate feel, and a documented harmless recycle edge case where an overwritten slot may briefly mis-parent a segment [draw loop guards nulls/negative parents ‚Üí cannot crash; age-fade hides it within a frame or two]; the growth math is test-covered). Winner of an adult psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`1048-mycelial-bloom`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (the de-selected sibling ‚ÄĒ psilocybin warm-organic two-level fBm domain-warp + blooming kaleidoscope *fragment shader*; IQ "warp the warp" + Kl√ľver + Nature Comms 2025; built complete + tsc/eslint-clean, removed unbuilt) as IDEAS ¬ß598. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1050-mycelial-grow/README.md`

### [1051-hand-hyperspace](/dream/1051-hand-hyperspace) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **webcam hand-tracking** (MediaPipe Tasks-Vision via CDN; pointer-drag fallback) / Canvas2D **stereographically-projected 4D polytope** edge-geometry ¬∑ cycle 599 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT-hyperdimensional ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Reach into hyperspace and rotate a four-dimensional jewel with your bare hands ‚ÄĒ and play the chord those rotations make.** The lab's **FIRST hand-tracking input** and **FIRST you-PLAY-it psychedelic instrument** ‚ÄĒ the direct antidote to the JURY-flagged "seven full-screen shaders-you-watch in a row" monoculture (its #1 provocation: make one you can PLAY, not a lean-back screensaver). A 4D polytope (**tesseract / 8-cell** or **24-cell**, built from first principles) is rotated through **all six independent rotation planes** (XY XZ XW YZ YW ZW), **stereographically projected 4D‚Üí3D‚Üí2D** (pole at w=+2.2, then a 3D perspective), and drawn as glowing chromatic edges on Canvas2D with additive (`lighter`) bloom + a trailing fade + depth-cued line weight ‚ÄĒ **edge geometry, explicitly NOT a full-screen fragment shader** (the banned output). **Hands as the instrument:** MediaPipe **HandLandmarker** loaded at runtime via CDN dynamic `import()` (`webpackIgnore` + `@ts-expect-error` on the URL module; **zero npm deps added**) in VIDEO mode ‚Üí left-hand height drives the **XW** spin, right-hand sweep drives **YW**, the **spread between the two hands** drives **ZW** and zooms toward "breakthrough" (brightness/saturation up), a **pinch holds** the geometry still. **Audio = the gesture:** six oscillators in **just intonation** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8 over A2=110 Hz), each plane's smoothed spin sets one partial's loudness + a motion detune-shimmer, through a brightness-driven lowpass + a code-generated **convolver reverb** tail ‚ÄĒ so a hand movement is literally a shifting neon chord. **Always alive:** graceful degradation ‚ÄĒ CDN-fail / camera-blocked / no-hands all fall back to **pointer drag + wheel-zoom** (synthetic hand-state) with a color-coded `text-rose-300`/violet status line; zero input ‚Üí slow auto-drift keeps it turning + sounding (never a dead screen). Gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (RAF cancel, AudioContext close, landmarker close, mic/camera tracks stopped). **Named refs:** the **Pardesco 4D Polytope Viewer** (4d.pardesco.com ‚ÄĒ interactive stereographic projection + true 4D rotation revealing hidden symmetries, here turned from watch-only into a hand-played instrument); the DMT "hyperdimensional / more axes than physical reality allows / more-real-than-real" phenomenology (PSYCHEDELIC.md Cluster 1). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [webcam hand-tracking input ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó in lane; you-play-it 4D instrument] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [CDN hand-tracking + 4D-polytope/stereographic-projection renderer + just-intonation synth + reverb = 4] ¬∑ #3 named references ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß599 [Jan-2026 IJFMR browser hand-gesture-instrument paper + Pardesco viewer]). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT, auto-playing-screensaver relationship] ¬∑ picked=[webcam hand-tracking INPUT (lab-first, active), Canvas2D 4D-edge-geometry OUTPUT, six-plane 4D rotation + stereographic projection TECHNIQUE, DMT-intense VIBE played-not-watched]` ‚ÄĒ clears all three banned tags; it is an *instrument*, not a field. **Love-signal aligned:** `217-dance-avatar`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `101-camera-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ (body/camera input). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing ‚ÄĒ smooth motion + slow luminance/saturation drift only, no full-screen flash. **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + type-check **PASS** (subagent `next lint` + `tsc --noEmit` on the 1051 folder = 0 warnings/0 errors; full-build phase log confirms ‚úďCompiled ‚Üí lint ‚Üí typecheck all passed with only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT camera/GPU/ear-verified** (no webcam/display/audio device in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: real MediaPipe handedness-label stability [README notes a swap-prone edge], the subjective "4D" read on a real GPU, audio chord balance, hand‚Üírotation coupling feel; the 4D math + just-intonation synth are textbook by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1052-piano-bloom`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (touch-conducted WebGPU-compute Gray-Scott bloom over Karel's real Welcome Home piano ‚ÄĒ discharges JURY #2 real-piano-carrier + #4 WebGPU-compute-as-body) + **`1053-skin-membrane`** (multi-touch mass-spring membrane + inharmonic drum-modal synth, salvia 2D-surface-melt) as IDEAS ¬ß599. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1051-hand-hyperspace/README.md`

### [1052-piano-bloom](/dream/1052-piano-bloom) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **touch (paint + drag reader-probes) + real piano via file-drop** / **WebGPU-compute Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** (Canvas2D/CPU fallback) ¬∑ cycle 600 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-06-29) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: psilocybin ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (warm)`
**Play your own piano into a living reaction-diffusion field: touch grows warm gold blooms, and "reader" probes you drag over the field granulate and re-voice your recording back at you.** The psych lane's **FIRST WebGPU-compute build** (the JURY flagged compute "down to 2√ó, both the dead Echo Halls pieces" ‚ÄĒ #4: bring it back as the resonating body) and **FIRST real-piano carrier** (#2: "use Karel's Path piano ‚ÄĒ *zero* of the psych builds did it") ‚ÄĒ and an **instrument you PLAY**, not a screensaver (#1). The resonating body is a real **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** sim (Pearson 1993; `U'=Du‚ąá¬≤U‚ąíUV¬≤+f(1‚ąíU)`, `V'=Dv‚ąá¬≤V+UV¬≤‚ąí(f+k)V`, 8-neighbour Laplacian stencil, double-buffered, toroidal wrap) in `rd.ts` behind one `RDField` interface with **two real backends**: a **WebGPU compute** path (WGSL `@workgroup_size(8,8)` step, ping-pong storage buffers, async `mapAsync` readback to a CPU mirror for probe-sampling + Canvas2D render, 256¬≤ grid) and a **CPU/typed-array fallback** (160¬≤ grid ‚Üí `ImageData`) so it never blanks ‚ÄĒ feature-detected via `navigator.gpu` ‚Üí adapter ‚Üí device. **You play it (two gestures):** touching the field **injects reagent (paints V)** so blooms grow under your finger; you place/drag up to **four reader probes** ‚ÄĒ interaction model borrowed from **Reactive Audio "Growth" (2026)**, where modulation readers on an evolving RD field translate local values into modulation ‚ÄĒ each reader samples local **V ‚Üí grain scrub position**, **V-gradient ‚Üí grain pitch + density**, **bloom intensity ‚Üí grain gain**, **x ‚Üí pan**, driving a windowed-`BufferSource` **granular** head over your loaded recording (`granular.ts`). Dense blooms = thick grain clouds; calm field = sparse grains. **So touch ‚Üí field ‚Üí audio is bidirectional and felt.** **Audio tiers (degrade gracefully):** file-drop / picker ‚Üí `decodeAudioData` ‚Üí granulate the real thing (this is how Karel loads his *Welcome Home* tracks at review); **zero file ‚Üí a warm felt-piano bed** (detuned sine/triangle partials, soft attack, long release, low pad) whose filter/detune/amp the readers still modulate, so it makes sound + visuals on a phone glance with no input and **no microphone** (output only ‚ÄĒ no howl path). **Warm psilocybin palette only** (deep ember floor ‚Üí rust ‚Üí burnt-orange ‚Üí amber ‚Üí ochre ‚Üí moss ‚Üí luminous gold; never cold) ‚ÄĒ extends the warm pole 1050 opened, away from the lane's neon/void/pastel.
