Full teardown (RAF cancel, GPU buffers `.destroy()`, `AudioContext.close()`, click-free gain ramps). **Named refs:** Pearson "Complex Patterns in a Simple System" (Science 1993) / Gray-Scott; **Reactive Audio *Growth*** (2026, reader-on-a-living-field modulation); I√Īigo Qu√≠lez / standard RD double-buffer Laplacian implementations. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [WebGPU-compute RD body + granular re-voicer + felt-synth fallback + touch/reader instrument layer = 4] ¬∑ #3 named reference [Reactive Audio *Growth*; Pearson] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß600 [the *Growth* reader-on-RD-field finding + the 2026-02 Gray-Scott-on-WebGPU wave]; #1 NOT over-claimed ‚ÄĒ WebGPU compute has lab-wide priors [1019/1029/130], the fresh axis is *psych-lane-first compute body + reader-granulated real piano*). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT, auto-playing-screensaver relationship] ¬∑ picked=[touch paint+reader-probe INPUT + real-piano file-drop (played, active), WebGPU-compute RD-simulation OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch), reaction-diffusion-as-resonating-body + reader-granulation TECHNIQUE, warm psilocybin cosmic-ambient VIBE played-not-watched]` ‚ÄĒ clears all three JURY bans. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing ‚ÄĒ slow RD evolution + warm luminance only, no full-screen flash. **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí compile + ESLint + type-check **PASS** (`next lint` on the 1052 folder = **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/display/audio device in container ‚ÄĒ the CPU path is what ran here; unverified: the WGSL compute path on a real GPU end-to-end, grain-vs-felt loudness balance, the touch‚Üíbloom‚Üígrain coupling feel; the RD math is verified correct on both backends by inspection, granular/synth are textbook). Winner of an adult psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept ‚ÄĒ "play your piano into a WebGPU-compute resonating body" ‚ÄĒ via two techniques); banked **`1054-piano-flock`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT-FIRST (the de-selected sibling ‚ÄĒ a 120k-particle WebGPU-compute boids flock you *conduct*, flock-shape‚Üígranulation, love-aligned with the loved particle cluster 130/236/262/321) as IDEAS ¬ß600. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1052-piano-bloom/README.md`

### [1053-ripple-loom](/dream/1053-ripple-loom) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **touch-strike** (tap/drag, played) / **WebGPU-compute damped-wave field** warped through the shared log-polar engine (Canvas2D/CPU fallback) ¬∑ cycle 601 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-06-29) ¬∑ `state: meditative ripple-void ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`
**Strike a still pond of light and play the expanding ripples ‚ÄĒ warped through your own visual cortex's log-polar map into breathing tunnels, spirals and honeycombs, each ring ringing a consonant bell.** This fire's headline is actually the **`_shared/psych/` infrastructure extraction** the JURY called ~7 fires overdue (#3): two new tested engines ‚ÄĒ **`_shared/psych/logpolar.ts`** (the load-bearing form-constant / log-polar warp: `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` GLSL string + JS twins `screenToCortex`/`cortexToScreen`/`formConstant`/`honeycomb`/`FORM_PHI`, round-trip-exact, verified by `logpolar.test.ts`) and **`_shared/psych/safeFlicker.ts`** (the photosensitive-safe flicker gate: OFF by default, hard-clamped ‚Č§3 Hz, soft-sine floor never a hard strobe, instant `kill()`, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`) ‚ÄĒ so the lane finally **composes** the warp instead of re-deriving it a fourth time (it was re-derived in 1038/1042/1044). 1053 is the first consumer AND brings **WebGPU compute back as the resonating body** (JURY #4 ‚ÄĒ compute had collapsed to 2√ó, both dead Echo-Halls pieces). **The instrument:** a real 2D damped wave-equation `u_next=(2¬∑u_curr‚ąíu_prev)+c¬≤‚ąá¬≤u_curr` then √ódamping, on a **WebGPU compute** path (WGSL: ping-ponged `prev`/`curr`/`next` storage buffers, a `splat` compute pass injecting gaussian impulses on each strike, a `render` compute pass warping screen pixels through the log-polar map + form constant ‚Üí storage texture ‚Üí blit) with a **mandatory Canvas2D fallback** (the identical model on a smaller CPU grid in `wave.ts`, using the JS twins ‚ÄĒ auto-selected when `navigator.gpu` is absent/fails, `text-amber-300/95` notice) so it's a fully playable instrument on any device. **Played, not watched:** the field rests dark (faint indigo glow + quiet sub-drone); **tap to strike one ripple, drag to draw a line of strikes**; Form selector (tunnels/spirals/honeycomb), Decay (ring sustain), Strike strength, Bells (2‚Äď7 listener probes on a golden-angle spiral), and an opt-in Shimmer (the safe-flicker path) + instant Kill. **Audio (Web Audio):** each probe samples local wave energy; a ripple cresting under it rings a short **inharmonic additive bell** in a just-intonation pentatonic set through a generated convolver reverb; a soft sub-octave drone underneath (idle ‚Čą near silence). A tiny CPU "mirror" wave drives the probes in both paths, avoiding a per-frame GPU readback stall. **Named refs:** Bressloff‚ÄďCowan‚ÄďGolubitsky‚ÄďThomas‚ÄďWiener (2001) retina‚ÜíV1 complex-log map (the engine in `logpolar.ts`); Heinrich Kl√ľver's four form constants (the selectable Form modes). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [WebGPU-compute wave body + log-polar warp render + JI bell/drone audio + touch-strike instrument = 4] ¬∑ #3 named references ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß601 [WebGPU compute production-ready across browsers incl. Safari 26; the compose-the-infra finding]; #1 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ log-polar is lab-prior [1038/1042/1044], the fresh axis is *consolidation into shared tested infra* + the compose payoff + a played wave-strike relationship). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT, auto-playing-screensaver relationship] ¬∑ picked=[touch-strike INPUT (played, active), WebGPU-compute wave-field OUTPUT (not a WebGL2 fragment shader you watch ‚ÄĒ brings compute back), wave-equation-as-resonating-body √ó log-polar-form-constant-warp TECHNIQUE, cosmic-ambient meditative VIBE played-not-watched]` ‚ÄĒ clears all three JURY bans and rebalances the pole to cosmic-ambient. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing by default ‚ÄĒ slow luminance drift only; the only flicker path is the ‚Č§3 Hz opt-in safe-flicker engine with instant kill. **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **compile + ESLint + type-check PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; `next lint` on the `1053-ripple-loom` folder **and** `_shared/psych` = **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/display/audio device in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: the WGSL step/splat/render pipeline + bind-group ping-pong on a real GPU, bell/drone voicing, decay/strength/phase-drift feel; the Canvas2D fallback + CPU wave model are the safer demo path; the log-polar warp math IS test-covered in `logpolar.test.ts`). Winner of an adult psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept ‚ÄĒ "play a form-constant field into being" ‚ÄĒ via two substrates); banked **`1054-cortex-paint`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT (the de-selected sibling ‚ÄĒ paint plane-wave stripes directly in cortical space, WebGL2 stroke-driven field, optional Welcome Home file-carrier; built complete + tsc/eslint-clean, removed unbuilt) as IDEAS ¬ß601. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1053-ripple-loom/README.md`

### [1056-key-bloom](/dream/1056-key-bloom) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **keyboard** (A‚ÄďL just-intonation scale + Z/X octave; Web MIDI + on-screen/touch keys) / Canvas2D **log-polar form-constant kaleidoscope bloom** composed from the shared `_shared/psych/` engines ¬∑ cycle 602 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: psilocybin ¬∑ pole: intense-warm`
**Play a keyboard as a psychedelic organ ‚ÄĒ each key sounds a warm just-intonation tone AND blooms a chrysanthemum of form-constant geometry, and chords stack into a living mandala you compose in real time.** The second consumer of the new `_shared/psych/` infra (after 1053) ‚ÄĒ it **composes** `logpolar.ts` rather than re-deriving it: each note's petals are laid out in **cortical space** and warped to screen with `cortexToScreen`, the radius modulated by `formConstant(u,v,phi,freq,phase)` / `honeycomb(...)`, so the blooms genuinely **are** the Bressloff‚ÄďCowan / Kl√ľver form constants (concentric-ring tunnels, radial spokes, spirals, honeycomb) ‚ÄĒ not arbitrary flowers (`bloom.ts`). Mappings: pitch‚Üí`freq` (denser rings up the scale), note index‚Üí`phi`/form-constant choice + palette offset, time-since-onset‚Üí`phase` drift **and** an N-fold kaleidoscope fold count that blooms `2‚Üí~12‚Üísettles ~6` (the "chrysanthemum opening", √† la I√Īigo Qu√≠lez domain-folding), velocity‚Üísize+brightness. **Played, not watched** ‚ÄĒ directly answers JURY 2026-06-29 #1 ("ban the lean-back screensaver ‚ÄĒ make one you can PLAY"): idle = quiet warm dark; the geometry only exists where you play. **Three input paths into one note model:** computer keyboard `A S D F G H J K L` = nine 5-limit JI scale degrees (movable root, Z/X octave), an on-screen clickable keyboard (fully playable by touch on a phone ‚ÄĒ the lowest-friction 06:30 demo path, no permission/hardware), and **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess()`, note-on/off ‚Üí velocity drives bloom size; emerald "MIDI connected" note only when a device is present). **Audio (`audio.ts`, output only ‚ÄĒ no mic):** polyphonic JI organ, each voice an additive partial stack (1¬∑2¬∑3) + a 2-op FM shimmer, soft attack / long release, pitch-panned, 12-voice cap with oldest-steal, a root+fifth drone bed tying chords together, through an OfflineAudioContext-synthesized warm convolution reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` glue limiter. **Warm-organic palette** (deep ember floor ‚Üí rust ‚Üí amber ‚Üí ochre ‚Üí moss ‚Üí luminous gold; never cold/black) ‚ÄĒ extends the scarce warm pole 1050/1052 opened. Shimmer = the sole luminance-pulse path, routed through `safeFlicker` (opt-in OFF by default, ‚Č§3 Hz soft sine, instant Kill, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`). Full teardown (cancel rAF, dispose audio, null MIDI handlers, remove key listeners). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [keyboard+MIDI+on-screen input + polyphonic JI organ + log-polar kaleidoscope renderer + convolution reverb = 4] ¬∑ #3 named references [Bressloff‚ÄďCowan 2001; Kl√ľver form constants; I√Īigo Qu√≠lez kaleidoscope/domain-fold; psilocybin open-eye fractal phenomenology] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß602 [the 2026 "Modality Fusion" active-control turn + composing the new shared infra]; #1 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ MIDI/keyboard have lab priors [718/902/979], the fresh axes are the *played-organ relationship*, the *warm psilocybin palette*, and *composing the shared engine*). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input (4√ó), full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT (6√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[keyboard/MIDI INPUT (active, played, non-mic ‚ÄĒ dodges the mic groove the jury hammered), Canvas2D kaleidoscope OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch), log-polar-form-constant-bloom TECHNIQUE composed from shared infra, warm psilocybin intense-warm VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears both banned tags. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing by default; the only flicker path is the ‚Č§3 Hz opt-in safe-flicker engine with instant kill. **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **compile + ESLint + type-check PASS** (`next lint` on the `1056-key-bloom` folder = **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code ‚ÄĒ Vercel deploys normally; the 1056 builder also reported a clean full `npm run build` listing the route at 6.38 kB). **NOT ear/MIDI-verified** (no audio/MIDI device in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: organ voicing + grain/reverb balance, the note‚Üíbloom coupling feel, real MIDI note-on/off on hardware, 60fps under very heavy chords on low-end devices; the log-polar bloom math is correct by inspection + composes the test-covered `logpolar.ts`). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-instrument fire ("play the form constants with your body" ‚ÄĒ breath/tilt/keys); banked **`1054-breath-temple`** ‚≠ź RESURRECT (breathe a form-constant cathedral into being ‚ÄĒ the most literal answer to JURY #1's "breath-as-control, not breath-as-ambient"; Canvas2D, cosmic-ambient) + **`1055-tilt-tunnel`** (tilt-steered DMT log-polar hyperspace flight, WebGL2) as IDEAS ¬ß602. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1056-key-bloom/README.md`

### [1057-face-bloom](/dream/1057-face-bloom) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **webcam face-tracking ‚ÄĒ facial *expression* (52 MediaPipe blendshapes + head pose), active control** / Canvas2D **log-polar form-constant kaleidoscope** composed from the shared `_shared/psych/` engines ¬∑ cycle 603 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: psilocybin ¬∑ pole: intense-warm`
**Your FACE is the psychedelic instrument ‚ÄĒ open your jaw to bloom the chrysanthemum, raise your brows to heat and densify it, turn your head to tour tunnels‚Üíspokes‚Üíspirals‚Üíhoneycombs; idle/neutral = quiet warm dark.** The lab's **FIRST face / facial-expression input** (hand-tracking exists at 1051; face never ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó), and the **3rd consumer of the new `_shared/psych/` infra** (after 1053/1056) ‚ÄĒ it **composes** `logpolar.ts` rather than re-deriving it: kaleidoscope petals are laid out in **cortical `(u=log r, v=őł)`** space and warped to screen via `cortexToScreen`, modulated by `formConstant(u,v,phi,freq,phase)` / `honeycomb(...)`, then folded N-fold with mirrored wedges into a true kaleidoscope (`render.ts`) ‚ÄĒ so the blooms genuinely **are** the Bressloff‚ÄďCowan / Kl√ľver form constants, not arbitrary flowers. **The fresh control surface (RESEARCH ¬ß603):** MediaPipe **Face Landmarker** emits **52 ARKit-style blendshape coefficients** ‚ąą[0,1] + a 4√ó4 head-pose matrix every frame ‚ÄĒ a *semantic expression* channel, not raw geometry. `mapping.ts` distills them through ONE shared `deriveDrive()` feeding BOTH renderer and organ (a smile *sounds* like it *looks*): `jawOpen`‚Üífold-count bloom 2‚Üí~12 + master swell + lowpass open ¬∑ `browInnerUp`‚Üíform-constant `freq` density + warmth/saturation ¬∑ eye-aspect (inverted blink)‚Üíentropy/detail ¬∑ `mouthSmile`‚Üígold push + shimmer voice ¬∑ head yaw/roll‚Üíspiral handedness + inward `phase` drift + form-constant tour. **Played, not watched** ‚ÄĒ directly answers JURY 2026-06-29 #1 ("ban the lean-back screensaver ‚ÄĒ make one you can PLAY"); idle collapses every parameter toward a near-still resting field, it comes alive only as you express. **Output is Canvas2D** (additive `lighter` glowing petals + warm trailing fade), *deliberately not a WebGL fragment shader* (the banned output form). **Audio (`audio.ts`, output only ‚ÄĒ no mic):** a just-intonation stacked-fifths organ (1¬∑3/2¬∑9/8¬∑5/4¬∑15/8¬∑3 over ~D2) of detuned sine/triangle voices + a soft sub pad + a smile-gated shimmer voice ‚Üí synthesized `OfflineAudioContext` convolution reverb ‚Üí high-shelf ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; gesture-gated start, full teardown on unmount. **Warm-organic palette** (deep ember ‚Üí rust ‚Üí amber ‚Üí gold; never cold) ‚ÄĒ extends the scarce warm pole (1050/1052/1056). **Graceful fallback:** no camera / permission denied / CDN fail ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + sliders (`jawOpen`/`brow`/`entropy`/`yaw`) that play the same instrument ‚ÄĒ never a dead screen. MediaPipe loaded from jsDelivr CDN at runtime (zero new npm deps), mirroring 1051's working dynamic-import pattern. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [face/blendshape input, grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [FaceLandmarker + log-polar kaleidoscope renderer + JI organ + convolution reverb + safeFlicker = 5] ¬∑ #3 named refs [MediaPipe Face Landmarker blendshapes; Bressloff‚ÄďCowan 2001; Kl√ľver form constants; psilocybin open-eye phenomenology] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß603 [the live-blendshape expression-control finding ‚Üí this build, dated this cycle]). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input (5√ó: 1041/1042/1044/1047/1050), full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT (5√ó: 1041/1042/1043/1044/1047)] ¬∑ picked=[face/expression-blendshape INPUT (lab-first, active, NON-mic), Canvas2D log-polar kaleidoscope OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch), facial-expression‚Üíform-constant TECHNIQUE composed from shared infra, warm psilocybin intense-warm VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears both banned tags. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing by default; the only flicker path is the held-squint opt-in routed through `safeFlicker` (‚Č§3 Hz soft sine, instant kill, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`), with a photosensitivity note shown when the toggle is exposed. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; reads no Resonance prod API; zero cost/network surface). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **‚úď Compiled successfully (2.1min) ‚Üí Linting and checking validity of types PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **ZERO from the 1057 folder**) ‚Üí static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code ‚ÄĒ Vercel deploys normally, lab is live at 1056); belt-and-suspenders `next lint --dir 1057-face-bloom` = **‚úĒ 0/0**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors referencing 1057. **NOT camera/ear-verified** (no webcam/audio in container ‚ÄĒ unverified: the blendshape‚Üíparameter gains + smoothing [expressive vs twitchy], organ/reverb balance, the squint-shimmer threshold [may fire on normal blinks], and the head-pose Euler sign/range from MediaPipe's column-major matrix; the log-polar bloom math composes the test-covered `logpolar.ts` and is correct by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-instrument fire ("active-control surfaces the lab hasn't used"); banked **`1058-tilt-temple`** ‚≠ź (phone-tilt-steered cosmic-ambient log-polar void tunnel + Shepard-tone endless descent; Canvas2D) + **`1059-piano-flock`** (conduct a WebGPU-compute boids flock whose shape granulates Karel's real Welcome Home piano ‚ÄĒ brings back the jury-wanted WebGPU compute) as IDEAS ¬ß603. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1057-face-bloom/README.md`

### [1200-gait-loom](/dream/1200-gait-loom) ¬∑ adult / altered-states ¬∑ **camera body-skeleton / gait ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe Pose, 33 landmarks (active, embodied, locomotion-based)** / Canvas2D radial gait-loom (rotating step-clock, footfall bursts, woven limb-threads, faint skeleton) ¬∑ cycle 670 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-05) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: rhythmic-trance / movement-entrainment ¬∑ pole: embodied-kinetic`
**Your GAIT is the sequencer's transport ‚ÄĒ step (or step-in-place) and your cadence locks a BPM; each footfall and limb-swing fires a granular percussion hit quantized to that gait clock, weaving a loom that accretes as you move and unravels to silence when you stop.** The lab's answer to the 2026-07-05 jury's un-cashed provocation #4 ("go structural ‚ÄĒ the body's actual geometry, joints, limbs, presence in a room, as the instrument; **gait‚Üítempo is still 0√ó**"). MediaPipe **PoseLandmarker** (`pose_landmarker_lite`, VIDEO mode, CDN runtime dynamic-import ‚ÄĒ zero new npm deps, mirroring the proven 1185/677 pattern) yields 33 landmarks/frame; a per-foot **lift‚Üíplant state machine** (`gait.ts`, ankle-height normalized by torso length = scale-invariant) detects footfalls, and the inter-footfall interval is median+EMA-smoothed into a **BPM** (clamped ~60‚Äď160). Wrist **velocity peaks** fire limb-swings between beats; strong knee-lifts add mid accents. **VOICE = granular synthesis** (`grains.ts`, Curtis Roads *Microsound* 2001): at load it synthesizes two source buffers with **no external assets** (a filtered-noise burst + a decaying resonator ping); every hit granulates them ‚ÄĒ footfalls read the low resonator (rate‚Čą0.5) as kick-like thuds, wrists spray bright noise grains (rate‚Čą2‚Äď2.5) ‚ÄĒ Hann-windowed, pitched/panned per limb, hard grain cap, behind a compressor + short feedback delay. A 16-step ring spins at the gait BPM via **look-ahead scheduling** against `audioContext.currentTime`; incoming hits **quantize into the ring** and each cycle replays the deposited grains (the *loom weaves*); slot lives + master gain decay when you stop (the *unravel*). **Deliberately NOT a just-intonation choir/pad/drone** (the jury's banned voice, 6√ó in the window) and **NOT bright-daylight** ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D radial gait-clock in **chromatic chiaroscuro** (ember/amber footfalls + teal/emerald limb-threads on deep graphite), sweeping playhead locked to the BPM, woven quadratic threads between limb events, faint mirrored skeleton, centre readout of live BPM/cadence/lock. **Ambition 2/5** (honestly: #1 **NOT** claimed ‚ÄĒ PoseLandmarker is lab-common [677/582/710/803/811/869‚Ä¶], only 0√ó in the recent-15 window; #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems [Pose inference + gait state-machine + granular sequencer + Canvas2D loom = 4]; #3 named refs [Curtis Roads *Microsound* 2001; Myron Krueger *Videoplace* 1974‚Äď75; the "Sonified Body" skeletal-movement‚ÜíOSC practice]). **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight palette ¬∑ Canvas2D-bright output ¬∑ JI-choir/drone voice ¬∑ passive/no-gesture input] ¬∑ picked=[body-skeleton/gait INPUT (active, 0√ó in window) ¬∑ Canvas2D radial loom on graphite chiaroscuro OUTPUT (not bright) ¬∑ granular VOICE (not JI) ¬∑ ember+teal chromatic VIBE]` ‚ÄĒ clears all four. The freshest angle vs the ~10 existing body pieces: **gait‚Üítempo** (0√ó even *within* embodiment) + a **rhythmic-transport form** unlike 803-body-chimes (modal) / 811-body-ribbons (UPIC) / 869-spatial-grove (spatial walk). **Graceful fallback (always sound + visuals):** camera denied / model down / no WebGL ‚Üí reason in `text-rose-300` + **limb pads** (L/R foot thuds, L/R wrist sprays) + a **tap-tempo** button + **spacebar** step, all driving the *same* gait clock + granular engine. **SAFETY:** rhythmic visual bursts but no full-field flash >3 Hz; luminance drift slow; no strobe. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client, no prod API, zero network/cost surface). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only gate ‚Üí `next lint --dir 1200-gait-loom` **‚úĒ 0 warnings/0 errors** + `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**; full `npm run build` static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** fd ceiling (4096 hard cap; infra not code ‚ÄĒ Vercel deploys normally). **NOT camera/ear-verified** (headless container ‚ÄĒ the gait thresholds, grain balance, and tempo-lock feel want Karel's webcam + speakers; fallback guarantees it's never blank/silent). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-voice structural-embodiment fire; banked **`1198-limbline`** ‚≠ź (per-limb **Karplus-Strong** plucked-string body ‚ÄĒ each bone a waveguide, joint velocity plucks, limb extension‚Üípitch; glowing filaments with travelling pulses) + **`1199-resonant-room`** (body joints excite a 128√ó128 **FDTD wave-membrane** ‚Üí inharmonic Bessel-mode plate bank; dropped at curate as closest to shipped 803-body-chimes) as IDEAS ¬ß670. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1200-gait-loom/README.md`

### [1226-loom](/dream/1226-loom) ¬∑ adult ¬∑ **pointer-pluck + keyboard (active, gestural)** / three.js **3D deforming ring** (teal‚Üímagenta jewel, gold scan-cursor + pluck-flares) ¬∑ cycle 679 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-06) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: playable-physical-instrument ¬∑ pole: warm/tactile`
**Pluck a glowing ring and hear its shape ‚ÄĒ the vibrating surface IS the waveform you're listening to.** The lab's cleanest cash of **scanned synthesis** (Verplank, Mathews & Shaw, "Scanned Synthesis," ICMC 2000) and the literal implementation of this fire's research dive (¬ß679 #1: the differentiable-string frontier where *the moving physical object and its sound are one state*). A closed ring of **N=128 masses** is simulated as a 1D **circular mass-spring string** (`ring.ts` ‚ÄĒ discrete-Laplacian neighbour springs + weak centering + damping, semi-implicit/symplectic Euler at the SLOW **haptic** rate, so the wave visibly sloshes around the loop over seconds, not at audio rate). The instantaneous array of 128 displacements **is a single-cycle wavetable**: an `AudioWorkletProcessor` (`worklet-src.ts`, Blob-URL `addModule` ‚ÄĒ the repo's 475-style idiom) holds that live table and gives each voice a phase accumulator scanning the loop at the note's pitch (interpolated lookup), and the main thread pushes the live shape every frame ‚ÄĒ so **the timbre morphs continuously as the ring wobbles**. A **pluck** (pointer press/drag on the ring, or `a s d f g h j k` / on-screen buttons in **D Dorian**) injects a gaussian bump of displacement+velocity and triggers a voice ‚ÄĒ one gesture changes both what you see and what you hear. Rendered in **three.js 3D** (`renderer.ts`): a glowing **teal‚Üímagenta** LineLoop + additive halo Points sharing one live geometry, a **gold scan-cursor** orbiting the read position, gold pluck-flares, gentle auto-rotation over a jewel CSS gradient. **Deliberately NOT** the jury-banned combos: not bright-daylight (deep jewel), not Canvas2D-bright (three.js 3D), not a JI choir/drone (a *scanned-wavetable* voice ‚ÄĒ grep-fresh vs the recently-shipped modal/Karplus‚ÄďStrong[1220]/granular[1225]), not passive input (you pluck it), not a 2D full-screen field (a 3D object), not chromatic-chiaroscuro. **Never blank/silent:** breathing standing-wave on mount + idle **auto-pluck** after Begin, so it plays itself for the cold 06:30 glance. **Graceful fallback:** no WebGL ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice; no `AudioWorklet` ‚Üí a silent-degrading **16-harmonic-DFT additive** oscillator-bank resynth of the live shape. **Ambition 3/5** (**#2** four subsystems: mass-spring sim + scanned-wavetable worklet [+ additive fallback] + three.js ring/cursor/flare renderer + pluck/keyboard input; **#3** named ref Verplank/Mathews/Shaw ICMC 2000 + Max Mathews; **#5** ¬ß679 dive #1 "object-is-waveform," dated today. #1 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ scan-adjacent 474 exists; the fresh axis is a real 1D-mass-spring scanned voice, not a lab-first technique). **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight PALETTE ¬∑ Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT ¬∑ 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE ¬∑ modal/Karplus‚ÄďStrong/granular VOICE(recent) ¬∑ passive INPUT ¬∑ chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE] ¬∑ picked=[active pointer-pluck+keyboard INPUT ¬∑ three.js-3D deforming-ring OUTPUT ¬∑ scanned-synthesis-wavetable VOICE ¬∑ teal‚Üímagenta jewel PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears all bans. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ pluck flares fade smoothly, ring luminance drifts well under 3 Hz. Audio gesture-gated (Begin resumes the ctx); per-voice envelope (in-worklet) ‚Üí master GainNode (ramp from 0) ‚Üí **DynamicsCompressor** limiter; 12-voice cap + voice-steal; full teardown (cancel rAF, disconnect/close audio, dispose three geometries/materials/renderer, revoke Blob URLs). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; `three` is an existing project dep, zero new npm deps; no prod-API/cost/network surface). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled + full ESLint + type-check PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **ZERO from the 1226 folder**), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1226-loom/page.js` **compiled ‚úď (34 KB)**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** 4096-fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code ‚ÄĒ Vercel deploys normally); belt-and-suspenders `npx eslint src/app/dream/1226-loom/` = **exit 0**, build-log grep for `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` = none. **NOT ear-verified** (headless, no speakers ‚ÄĒ the scan-morph timbre + pluck feel + worklet-vs-additive path want Karel's browser; breathing + idle auto-pluck guarantee it's never blank/silent). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-fresh-voice fire; banked **`1227-operators`** (Chowning/DX FM operator-galaxy you sculpt in 3D) + **`1228-reed`** (McIntyre‚ÄďSchumacher‚ÄďWoodhouse nonlinear self-oscillating wind waveguide, breathe to overblow) as IDEAS ¬ß679. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1226-loom/README.md`

### [1225-tideglass](/dream/1225-tideglass) ¬∑ adult / altered-states ¬∑ **camera full-body pose ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe PoseLandmarker, hands + torso (active, embodied, spatial)** / three.js **3D point-cloud grain-field in depth** (teal‚Üíviolet nebular, amber grain-sparks, two hand-attractors) ¬∑ cycle 678 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-06) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: embodied-spatial ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient‚Üíkinetic`
**Your two hands are grain-heads moving through a cloud of sound ‚ÄĒ reach wide to scatter it, lift a hand to raise its pitch, and your body's place in the room pans it in true stereo space.** The lab's **first true stereo-spatialized granular cloud driven by body position** ‚ÄĒ the one genuinely un-built axis in the well-mined body-as-instrument lane (803/869/1068/1200 all precede it), and the direct cash of JURY 2026-07-05 provocation #4's specific "**depth-camera spatial audio** still 0√ó". MediaPipe **PoseLandmarker** (`pose_landmarker_lite`, VIDEO mode, jsDelivr CDN runtime dynamic-import via `webpackIgnore` ‚ÄĒ zero new npm deps, mirroring the proven 1185/677 pattern, GPU‚ÜíCPU delegate retry) tracks the two **wrists** + **torso** (shoulders/hips) into a compact `PoseFrame`. Two granular grain-heads (`audio.ts`, Curtis Roads *Microsound* 2001): every grain is a short (~60‚Äď140 ms) Hann/triangular-windowed slice of an **in-engine synthesized FM wavetable** (no external asset), pitch-shifted click-free. **Mappings:** hand **height** ‚Üí grain playback-rate (~0.47√ó‚Äď2.14√ó) + per-head lowpass cutoff (raise a hand ‚Üí higher & brighter); **reach between the hands** ‚Üí grain density / stereo spread (wide = dense wide scatter, together = focused low-density point-source); **torso horizontal centre** ‚Üí whole-cloud panorama, **lean** ‚Üí a slow global filter sweep. Each head is hard-panned to its side through an equal-power **StereoPanner** ‚ÄĒ **spatial audio is the distinguishing voice** (grep-first as a body-driven grain cloud; 1200-gait-loom used granular but as a rhythmic Canvas2D *sequencer*, no spatialization, no 3D field, no continuous scrub). Every grain that fires lights an **amber spark** in a three.js **point-cloud grain-field receding in depth** (teal near ‚Üí violet far); the two hands are **bright amber attractors** moving through it. **Deliberately NOT** the jury-banned combos: not bright-daylight (deep nebular), not Canvas2D-bright (three.js 3D), not a JI choir/drone (granular), not passive input (the whole body is the instrument), not a flat 2D full-screen field (3D depth cloud). **Graceful fallback (always sound + visuals):** camera denied / model down / no WebGL ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + **two draggable hand-pucks** (mouse/touch) driving the identical engine, with a gentle **auto-drift** so both hands wander and the cloud plays itself for the cold 06:30 glance ‚ÄĒ never a dead screen. **Ambition 2/5** (honestly: **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ PoseLandmarker is lab-common [677/803/869/1068/1200‚Ä¶], only the *spatial-granular voice* is fresh, not the input; **#2 ‚Č•3 subsystems** [Pose inference + hand/torso kinematics + granular engine + StereoPanner spatializer + three.js point-cloud renderer + fallback = six]; **#3 named refs** [BlazePose ‚ÄĒ Bazarevsky, Grishchenko et al., Google 2020; Curtis Roads *Microsound*, MIT Press 2001]). **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight PALETTE ¬∑ Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT ¬∑ JI-choir/drone VOICE ¬∑ passive INPUT ¬∑ 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT ¬∑ modal/Karplus‚ÄďStrong VOICE(recent)] ¬∑ picked=[active full-body camera-pose INPUT ¬∑ three.js-3D point-cloud OUTPUT ¬∑ granular+true-stereo-spatialization VOICE ¬∑ teal‚Üíviolet nebular + amber PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears all bans. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ grain sparks are local point brightenings with smooth per-frame decay (√ó0.9), hand-attractor glow is low-passed, no full-field flash; luminance change well under 3 Hz. Audio gesture-gated (AudioContext created inside the Start click); master gain **ramps from 0** ‚Üí per-head filter‚ÜíStereoPanner‚Üígain ‚Üí **DynamicsCompressor limiter**; **hard grain-voice cap 64** (real density stays in single digits), each grain frees itself `onended`, scheduler resyncs rather than burst-catching-up after tab throttling. Full teardown (cancel rAF, stop+disconnect all audio, ramp master down + close AudioContext, close landmarker, stop MediaStream tracks). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; reads no Resonance prod API; zero cost/network surface). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` ‚Üí **Compiled successfully + full ESLint + type-check PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **ZERO from the 1225 folder**); static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** 4096 fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code ‚ÄĒ cannot `ulimit -n` up here; Vercel deploys normally); belt-and-suspenders `npx eslint src/app/dream/1225-tideglass/` = **exit 0**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors referencing 1225. **NOT camera/ear-verified** (headless container ‚ÄĒ unverified: the pose‚Üígrain mapping feel, grain/reverb balance, the stereo image, live getUserMedia + CDN model fetch + GPU delegate; the fallback pucks + auto-drift exercise the identical downstream engine and are the reliable demo route). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach body-as-instrument fire; the concept-lane honesty note (Pose is not 0√ó; 2 of 3 builders re-derived banked 1198/1199 + shipped 803) is in STATE ¬ß678. Banked **`1223-marrow`** (per-limb Karplus‚ÄďStrong string body ‚Čą banked 1198-limbline) + **`1224-augur`** (joint-flexion ‚Üí inharmonic modal bells ‚Čą shipped 803-body-chimes / banked 1199) as IDEAS ¬ß678. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1225-tideglass/README.md`

### [1392-phase-loom](/dream/1392-phase-loom) ¬∑ adult / altered-states ¬∑ **Web MIDI + on-screen keyboard (active, played)** / three.js **3D orbiting phase-rings** (violet‚Üíemerald‚Üíamber, conjunction filaments + slow core swell) ¬∑ cycle 725 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-10) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: hypnotic-minimalist ¬∑ pole: hypnotic`
**Hold notes and each becomes a loop at its OWN period ‚ÄĒ the loops drift Reich-style in and out of phase, weaving evolving polymetric music with NO drum grid.** The lab's cash of the 2026-07-09 jury's provocation **#2** ‚ÄĒ "don't let the look-ahead groove machine become the new bell; if you want TIME, find it somewhere other than a drum grid (polymetric phasing, a swung loop)." Every note you activate (MIDI note-on, one of 10 on-screen pads, or `A S D F G H J K L ;`) spawns a short **just-intonation pentatonic cell** (3‚Äď6 steps, ratios 1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3 over two octaves transposed to that root). **Each loop has its own period** ‚ÄĒ cell **length** varies (3‚Äď6 ‚Üí immediate polymeter) and each pitch gets a tiny **¬Ī~2.7% tempo drift** ‚ÄĒ so no two loops ever share a grid; over ~10‚Äď60 s any pair slides from unison through the full cycle of offsets and back (Steve Reich *Piano Phase* / Terry Riley *In C*, cited honestly). A 25 ms look-ahead is used **purely for Web Audio timing accuracy** (each voice carries its own `nextTime`/`stepDur`, scheduled independently) ‚ÄĒ a clock, **not** a 120-BPM 4/4 step-sequencer, so it cleanly dodges the banned look-ahead-drum-groove. An underlying JI pad comes from the shared `_shared/psych/droneBank.ts`. **Visual (three.js ‚ÄĒ the fresh substrate):** each active loop is a tilted orbital **ring** with a glowing mote circling once per loop period; rings at different periods orbit at different rates, so you literally SEE the phasing ‚ÄĒ when two motes reach the same angle (a conjunction = loops in phase) a **filament lights** between them and the central **core swells**, fading as they drift apart. The swell tracks the very slow beat frequency (luminance change far below 3 Hz ‚ÄĒ no strobe). **Input:** Web MIDI requested on Begin; a `‚óŹ MIDI` (emerald) / `‚óč on-screen keys` (amber) badge shows the live path; the on-screen pads + keyboard drive the identical `toggleSlot` path when no device is present ‚ÄĒ both work. **Never blank/silent:** Begin seeds two contrasting loops so the phasing is instantly audible + visible; "Nudge a loop" re-phases; "Clear" stops all. **Ambition 3/5:** **#2** four subsystems (phasing-loop engine + JI voice pool + shared droneBank pad + three.js orbit-ring renderer + MIDI/keyboard input) ¬∑ **#3** named refs Reich *Piano Phase* (1967)/*Music for 18* (1976), Riley *In C* (1964) ¬∑ provocation-#2 cash. **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ phasing/minimalism is well-established; the fresh axis is the *framing+substrate*: MIDI-played autonomous per-note loops finding TIME via phasing instead of the step-sequencer grid, on a three.js surface that makes the interference beat visible. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ look-ahead-drum-groove ¬∑ granular-freeze-of-real-recording ¬∑ pointer-SOLE-input] ¬∑ avoid=[SVG-primary ¬∑ mic] ¬∑ picked=[Web-MIDI+keyboard INPUT ¬∑ three.js-3D-orbit-ring OUTPUT ¬∑ polymetric-phasing TECHNIQUE ¬∑ violet‚Üíemerald‚Üíamber hypnotic PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every 2026-07-09 ban, dodges at-line SVG + over-repped mic. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ conjunction bloom is a slow sub-3-Hz core swell; `prefers-reduced-motion` drops auto-rotation + gentles the swell. Audio gesture-gated (ctx on Begin), master ramps from 0, three.js geometries/materials disposed + RAF cancelled + `ctx.close()` on unmount. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; `three` is an existing dep, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` ‚Üí **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1392-phase-loom/page.js` compiled ‚úď; folder tsc/ESLint clean (the standing container `EMFILE` at prerender is the 4096-fd ceiling, infra not code ‚ÄĒ Vercel prerenders `"use client"` fine). **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless, no MIDI device/speakers ‚ÄĒ the phasing audibility, conjunction legibility, and live MIDI path want Karel's browser; the on-screen path is the reliable demo route). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-fresh-substrate fire; **`1388-cortex-diffuse` was DISQUALIFIED at curation** as a near-duplicate of `1348-prism-cortex` (both WebGPU-compute Gray-Scott RD through the cortical form-constant warp, played); banked **‚≠ź `1390-jhana-shells`** (tilt ‚Üí CSS-3D light-shell tunnel-to-light, cosmic-ambient) + the 1388 fallback-polish idea as IDEAS ¬ß725. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1392-phase-loom/README.md`

### [1430-echo-void](/dream/1430-echo-void) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **touch-ping + steer (tap/space to emit, drag/arrows to turn ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT keyboard-piano)** / **WebGL2 `gl.POINTS` point-cloud** (Canvas2D sonar-sweep fallback) ¬∑ cycle 733 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: echolocation / NDE-cathedral-void ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient-dark`
**You can't see the space ‚ÄĒ you PING it, and it answers.** The screen is near-black; tap (or press space) and an expanding spherical wavefront races outward at a fixed speed-of-sound. Wherever it crosses a hidden surface (pillar ring, flagstone floor, barrel vault, curved apse, iron monoliths ‚ÄĒ a ~37-surface cathedral seeded deterministically by `mulberry32(0x1430ec0)`), that cluster of points flares as glowing WebGL2 `gl.POINTS` **and** returns an audible echo ‚ÄĒ HRTF-panned (`PannerNode({panningModel:"HRTF"})`) to the surface's true 3-D bearing, delayed by `2¬∑dist/SPEED` so near walls answer first and the far apse last: **TIME emerges from the geometry, not a scheduler.** Drag / arrows steer your heading, re-orienting the listener so the echoes re-pan; over ~30 s of pinging the unseen room reveals itself to ear and eye. The lab's **first active-echolocation interaction model** (`echolocat|sonar` grep-0√ó) ‚ÄĒ the fresh *interaction*, not another sim. **PITCH is strictly inharmonic** (each material a struck bell/plate: base + stretched non-integer partials √ó2.76/√ó5.40/√ó8.93, distance‚Üíbrightness) ‚ÄĒ deliberately allowed to sound eerie/unresolved, cashing the 2026-07-10 jury's ban on the JI always-consonant scale-index. **Named refs (README):** biosonar (bat/dolphin echolocation); Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* (a space revealed by its acoustic response); James Turrell (perceiving space with no object). **Ambition 3/5:** #1 never-used technique (echolocation/active-emission) + #2 ‚Č•5 subsystems (seeded-3D-geometry + wavefront-sim + HRTF-echo engine + point-cloud renderer + ping/steer input) + #3 named refs. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D/SVG-primary ¬∑ JI-always-consonant ¬∑ Reich-phasing ¬∑ mic-sole ¬∑ home-row-kbd-sole] ¬∑ picked=[touch-ping+steer INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2-points OUTPUT ¬∑ echolocation-wavefront TECH ¬∑ cosmic-dark NDE PALETTE]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **Never blank/silent:** low drone bed + void reverb from Begin; cold-start idle auto-ping every 4‚Äď6 s (drifting heading) until the user first pings; live emerald `WebGL2` / amber `Canvas` tier badge; `prefersReducedMotion` slows+softens the wavefront. Audio gesture-gated, master ramps from ~0 over 2 s, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, voice cap ~14/ping (‚Č•90 ms spacing), full `close()` teardown. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no server, no secret, no network). **Validation:** plain `npm run build` passed TypeScript + ESLint + compile with **ZERO errors in the dream folder** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), dying only at "Collecting page data" on the standing container **EMFILE** 4096-fd ceiling (infra, not code; absent on Vercel); authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` ‚Üí **EXIT 0** with `"/dream/1430-echo-void"` in `routes-manifest.json` + `page.js` (36 kB) emitted; `eslint src/app/dream/1430-echo-void --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers): HRTF direction, 1/dist balance, drone/reverb mix, `gl_PointSize`/glow-floor want Karel's browser+headphones ‚ÄĒ README documents the knobs; the drone-from-Begin + idle auto-ping + point flares guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1434-orbit-compass`** (aim-the-phone celestial soundfield, device-orientation + three.js) + **`1438-mortal-tape`** (a recording that erodes each play ‚ÄĒ destructive playback, WebGL2 ribbon, uses Karel's real piano) as IDEAS ¬ß733. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1430-echo-void/README.md`

### [1462-box-temple](/dream/1462-box-temple) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **pointer-drag steer + fold-depth (wheel/pinch/hold ‚ÄĒ first-person flythrough, NOT mic/keyboard-piano)** / **WebGL2 raymarched Mandelbox** (readable notice fallback; audio survives no-GL) ¬∑ cycle 738 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: fractal-breakthrough / impossible-architecture ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ‚ÜĒ intense`
**Fall forward through an endless folded-architecture fractal ‚ÄĒ a machine-elf temple of infinite corridors ‚ÄĒ and the geometry's own folding structure resonates as sound, so travelling through it plays it.** The lab's **first 3D escape-time fractal** (`mandelbulb`/`mandelbox`/escape-time grep-**0√ó** across every README+INDEX before this) and its **first raymarched-fractal instrument**. A single WebGL2 fragment shader **sphere-traces a Mandelbox distance estimator** (Tom Lowe "Tglad", FractalForums 2010): each iteration box-folds (`v = clamp(v,-1,1)¬∑2 - v`) + sphere-folds toward a fixed radius, then `v = scale¬∑v + c` with a **negative scale (‚ąí1.6‚Ä¶‚ąí2.35, 10‚Äď14 iters)** for the rigid temple look; DE-gradient normals, step-count AO, grazing-distance corridor glow, IQ cosine palette (indigo stone ‚Üí amber inner light). The camera **drifts forward through the structure on load** (a live flythrough ‚ÄĒ never blank), slows near walls so it glides through corridors, collision-pushes out along the field gradient, and steers back toward the lattice if it drifts toward the void; pointer drag steers heading, wheel/pinch/**Fold deeper** raises fold scale+iterations so the corridors multiply. **The sonification (genuinely PLAYED ‚ÄĒ movement IS the instrument):** the SAME fold runs on the CPU at the camera each frame (`mandelbox.ts`); every iteration that folds lights one of 8 high-Q **band-pass "corridor" resonators** pitched **continuously** by that iteration's radius (log-continuous `[0.08,8]‚Üí[95,1500] Hz`, **never scale-snapped** ‚ÄĒ inharmonic/alien by construction, deliberately off the jury-banned ~10√ó JI/pentatonic "always-consonant scale-index" crutch); DE at the camera (**wall proximity**) crossfades reverb wet‚ÜĒdry + band-pass Q (present-and-dry near a wall vs distant-and-reverberant in an open chamber, via the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` void reverb); **fold depth ‚Üí drive** (more folds ‚Üí more voices + an opening inharmonic drone bed, fractal-derived ratios `[1,1.34,1.78,2.29,2.97]`); fold-boundary crossings fire sparse resonant **pings**. **Named refs (README):** Tom Lowe *Mandelbox* (2010), I√Īigo Qu√≠lez (distance-estimated fractal raymarching), the impossible-architecture / DMT-temple phenomenology. **Ambition 3/5:** **#1** first 3D escape-time fractal + first raymarched-fractal instrument + first continuous-non-scale-pitch-from-fractal-field (grep-0√ó; raymarching itself is lab-common [15√ó], the fresh axis is the escape-time *fractal* as a *played* instrument ‚ÄĒ declared honestly) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•5 subsystems (Mandelbox DE raymarcher + CPU fold sampler + collision/heading nav + continuous fold‚Üípitch mapper + resonant-voice/reverb/drone engine) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary ¬∑ SVG-primary ¬∑ JI/pentatonic scale-index ¬∑ dissonance-as-theme ¬∑ three.js ¬∑ DOM/CSS-3D ¬∑ Reich-phasing ¬∑ mic-sole ¬∑ kbd-sole ¬∑ camera(729/737 just used)] ¬∑ picked=[first-person fractal-flythrough INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 raymarched-Mandelbox OUTPUT ¬∑ escape-time-fractal-sonification TECHNIQUE ¬∑ continuous inharmonic pitch ¬∑ impossible-architecture PALETTE ¬∑ pole intense (off recent cosmic-ambient run)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all motion is slow luminance drift well under 3 Hz; `prefersReducedMotion` slows the flythrough + damps brightness swings. Audio gesture-gated ("Enter the temple" creates the ctx), master ramps from silence, peaks ‚Č§0.2 ‚Üí **DynamicsCompressor** limiter, ‚Č§9 voices, full teardown (stop nodes, cancel rAF, `ctx.close()`, dispose GL). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no server/secret/network; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ WebGL2 + Web Audio only). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` ‚Üí **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1462-box-temple/page.js` emitted (**30.8 kB**) + `"/dream/1462-box-temple"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1462-box-temple --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `text-white/30|40|50` grep = empty; `"use client"` line 1; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic (only a comment). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers): the corridor-resonance mix, wall-proximity reverb crossfade, and flythrough feel want Karel's browser ‚ÄĒ README documents the knobs; the auto-flythrough-on-load + idle heading drift guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach "THE FRACTAL PALACE" fire; banked **‚≠ź `1460-bulb-organ`** (the organic-breakthrough sibling ‚ÄĒ a raymarched power-8 **Mandelbulb** you orbit-and-dive, orbit-trap ‚Üí continuous additive voice; TOP ship-next to pair the two faces of the fractal) as IDEAS ¬ß738. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1462-box-temple/README.md`

### [1520-click-cathedral](/dream/1520-click-cathedral) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **self-generated clicks (Space/tap primary + optional mic tongue-click onset; ‚Üź/‚Üí or pointer only AIM ‚ÄĒ NOT pointer-drag-sole, NOT tilt)** / **audio-only / binaural (minimal secondary "belief-map" chrome)** ¬∑ cycle 750 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: drug-free echolocation / sensory-substitution boundless-space ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (active, not void)`
**Can you SEE a vast space you cannot see ‚ÄĒ by clicking into the dark and listening to it answer?** A drug-free human-**echolocation** instrument on the **audio-only surface** (the one the standing 2026-07-11 jury named as *both* starving at 1√ó *and* a prior highlight ‚ÄĒ 1476). The screen is near-black; press **Space** (or tap, or a real mouth/tongue-click via the mic) to emit a short broadband click into an invisible, `mulberry32`-seeded procedural cathedral (~surfaces at azimuth/distance/elevation/material; 3 presets ‚ÄĒ small chamber / long corridor / vast vault). Each surface answers with a **binaural HRTF-panned echo** ‚ÄĒ delayed by `dist/343 m¬∑s‚ĀĽ¬Ļ`, timbre-colored by material (soft wall = dull short lowpass; far stone = bright long bandpass), with a `ConvolverNode` tail sizing the room (1.1 s ‚Üí 4.6 s). **The core loop embodies real, recent neuroscience:** Garcia-Lazaro et al., *"Neural and behavioral correlates of evidence accumulation in human click-based echolocation,"* **eNeuro, April 2026** (Smith-Kettlewell + Cardiff) ‚ÄĒ expert echolocators build their spatial map by **"summation," accuracy rising ~linearly with each self-generated click.** So here every surface carries a **belief** that rises linearly per aimed click ‚Üí its echo gets louder+brighter and its point blooms on a faint violet belief-map, and an "image forming: N%" readout tracks the mean: a vague space **resolves only through repeated clicking** ‚ÄĒ the eNeuro result made playable. It's **active and building, not a dissolving void** (jury #2 ‚ÄĒ rest the breathing-field/void). **Named refs (README):** Garcia-Lazaro et al. eNeuro 2026, Daniel Kish (human flash-sonar), Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5:** **#2** four subsystems (procedural room-geometry + binaural HRTF echo renderer + click-summation/evidence-accumulation belief model + own getUserMedia‚Üíhighpass‚ÜíAnalyserNode mic-onset detector) + **#3** named refs above. **#1 NOT claimed** (convolution reverb/binaural are lab-common at 1500+ deep ‚ÄĒ the novelty is the *active click-summation echolocation on the audio-only surface*, not a virgin technique); **#5 NOT claimed** (eNeuro anchor ~3mo, not <14-day ‚ÄĒ logged straight; strict <14-day psychedelic-AV hunt came up short again). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph(5√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2/GPU-render-primary(~10/15) ¬∑ pointer-drag-SOLE ¬∑ cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field(1506‚Üí1516) ¬∑ Reich+consonant-JI ¬∑ device-tilt(rested)] ¬∑ picked=[self-generated-CLICKS INPUT (Space/tap + optional mic-onset; ‚Üź/‚Üí aim only ‚ÄĒ not pointer-sole, not tilt) ¬∑ AUDIO-ONLY/binaural OUTPUT (jury's starving+highlight surface, 1√ó) ¬∑ HRTF-echolocation + click-summation TECHNIQUE ¬∑ near-black/faint-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole cosmic-ambient-ACTIVE (builds a space, doesn't melt)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** dark and calm ‚ÄĒ no strobe, luminance changes ‚Č§3 Hz; `prefersReducedMotion` drops drift+rings; mic-permission errors shown in `text-destructive` with Space always working. Audio gesture-gated ("Enter the dark" creates the ctx), master ramps 0‚Üí‚Č§0.2 through a **DynamicsCompressor** limiter, ‚Č§14-voice pool recycled on `onended`, faint ambient bed so it's never dead-silent, full teardown (close ctx, stop mic tracks, cancel rAF) on unmount. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no server/secret/network; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ Web Audio + minimal Canvas2D only). **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1520-click-cathedral --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors; authoritative winner-only build green (see STATE ¬ß750). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless, no headphones/speakers): the binaural spatial percept, per-material timbre contrast, and mic tongue-click onset thresholds want Karel's browser + headphones ‚ÄĒ README documents the knobs; the Space path is the guaranteed demo route. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire on the three under-used off-GPU surfaces; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1518-tesseract-organ`** (keyboard ‚Üí pure DOM/CSS-3D playable 4D-hypercube instrument, lowest render-risk) + **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1522-fluid-conductor`** (tilt ‚Üí WebGPU-compute Jos Stam stable-fluids, verify GPU stability first) as IDEAS ¬ß750. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1520-click-cathedral/README.md`

### [1530-hyperbolic-organ](/dream/1530-hyperbolic-organ) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **keyboard-played (`WASD`/arrows translate + `Q/E` spin ‚ÄĒ NOT pointer, NOT mic)** / **pure SVG vector tiles (no canvas/WebGL/three.js)** ¬∑ cycle 752 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT-hyperbolic / Kl√ľver-lattice ¬∑ pole: intense/kinetic (geometric, rests the void)`
**Play a negatively-curved universe ‚ÄĒ an Escher Circle-Limit {8,3} tiling in the Poincar√© disk that you translate and spin with the keys, each hyperbolic move ringing one just-intonation interval and shifting the drone.** The lab's cleanest answer to the standing 2026-07-12 jury's provocation #1 (three.js is the new mouse-drag, 5/15; GPU-render-primary ~10/15 ‚ÄĒ *"next cycle's primary surface must NOT be a hand-authored GPU render"*): the tiling is real `<path>` elements created with `document.createElementNS`, updated **imperatively** every frame (never via React state) ‚ÄĒ **pure SVG vector tiles, the freshest off-GPU-render surface in the lab** (neither three.js, WebGL2, nor canvas). One central regular octagon (`cosh R = cot(ŌÄ/p)¬∑cot(ŌÄ/q)` ‚Üí `r = tanh(R/2)`) is grown breadth-first by a **Fuchsian reflection group** ‚ÄĒ each geodesic edge an arc of a circle orthogonal to the boundary, reflection across it a circle inversion ‚ÄĒ capped at `MAX_TILES=130` and pruned near the rim. The "camera" is a M√∂bius isometry `V ‚ąą SU(1,1)`; each frame composes `V` with a small translation+rotation from a decaying key-velocity and re-normalises onto SU(1,1), pushing every tile vertex through `V` and drawing each curved edge as a 5-sample geodesic polyline. **See = hear:** each movement key walks a **just-intonation pitch lattice** (running ratio √ó= that key's interval ‚ÄĒ 3:2, 4:3, 5:4, 6:5, 9:8, 5:3 ‚ÄĒ folded into one octave), retuning a quiet drone bed and striking one inharmonic FM bell ‚ÄĒ so **moving through hyperbolic space IS moving through a lattice of pure ratios** (Tonnetz made literal). **Played, not watched:** keyboard is the only instrument (`W/A/S/D`/arrows translate, `Q/E` spin); before you act the disk drifts on a silent idle auto-pan, and Play unlocks the drone + keys (never blank/silent). **Named refs (README):** M.C. Escher *Circle Limit III* (1959), the Poincar√© disk model, H.S.M. Coxeter, Fuchsian/M√∂bius groups, Kl√ľver form-constants; the honest lineage note that `1044-hyperbolic-bloom` renders the SAME tiling but as a *watched WebGL2 fragment shader driven by mic FFT* ‚ÄĒ this is its **SVG, keyboard-played, instrument** inversion. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (SVG Poincar√©-tiling renderer + M√∂bius/SU(1,1) play engine + JI interval/pitch-lattice + drone+FM-bell audio = 4) + **#3** named refs above. **#1 NOT claimed** (hyperbolic tiling lab-present ‚ÄĒ 1044/1042-hyperspace-bloom/1294-indra-descent; the fresh axis is the SVG-surface keyboard-played-instrument inversion, not a virgin technique); **#5 NOT claimed** (¬ß752 dive found nothing <14-day; logged straight). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primary(5√ó) ¬∑ GPU-render-primary(~10/15) ¬∑ cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field(1506‚Üí1516) ¬∑ pointer/touch-drag-SOLE(4√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[keyboard INPUT (not pointer-sole/mic/camera) ¬∑ pure-SVG vector-tile OUTPUT (freshest off-GPU-render surface) ¬∑ played-hyperbolic-M√∂bius-tiling TECHNIQUE ¬∑ jeweled-iridescent-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole intense/kinetic geometric]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live 2026-07-12 ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ luminance is slow drift + a soft per-note swell that decays, far under 3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the drift, input accel, and pulse. Audio gesture-gated ("Play" creates the ctx), master **0.18** through a **DynamicsCompressor**, 12-voice bell cap (oldest culled), full teardown (bells+drone stopped, `ctx.close()`, rAF cancelled, listeners + paths removed). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no server/secret/network; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ SVG + Web Audio only). **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1530-hyperbolic-organ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; plain `npm run build` compiled+linted+typechecked with **ZERO 1530 errors/warnings** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**`), dying only at "Collecting page data" on the standing **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` ‚Üí **EXIT 0**, `page.js` (22 kB) + `"/dream/1530-hyperbolic-organ"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless): the JI-lattice weld tightness, curvature legibility at extreme zoom (edges are 5-sample polylines not exact arcs), loudness balance, and perf under DOM churn on a weak device want Karel's browser ‚ÄĒ README documents the levers (`MAX_TILES`/`EDGE_SAMPLES`); the idle auto-pan + drone-from-Play guarantee it's never blank/silent, and deterministic SVG renders identically anywhere (phone-safe at 06:30). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire on three distinct off-GPU-render surfaces; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1532-hand-aurora`** (camera/MediaPipe hands ‚Üí Canvas2D ecstatic entity-conjuring aurora, love-adjacent to 234) + **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1534-attractor-tide`** (tilt ‚Üí WebGPU-compute 1M-point de Jong/Clifford attractor + standalone-shippable Canvas2D fallback, love-adjacent to 130) as IDEAS ¬ß752. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1530-hyperbolic-organ/README.md`

### [1524-droste-descent](/dream/1524-droste-descent) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **pointer-joystick + keyboard (drag/`WASD`/arrows dive-climb-twist + `Space` surge ‚ÄĒ NOT pointer-sole, NOT mic/camera)** / **pure DOM + CSS-3D nested frames (no canvas/WebGL/three.js)** ¬∑ cycle 751 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: infinite-regress / Droste-tunnel ¬∑ pole: ecstatic-plunge (kinetic, rests the void)`
**Hold infinite regress in your hands and steer it ‚ÄĒ plunge, climb, and twist through an endlessly self-nesting Droste tunnel where every level you fall through is felt as one octave of a falling Shepard tone.** The lab's first **discrete Droste / mise-en-abyme instrument** (`droste`/`mise-en-abyme` grep-**0√ó** across the full lab ‚ÄĒ distinct from the 12√ó continuous fractal-zoom shaders and 17√ó kaleidoscopes), built entirely from **13 real nested `<div>` frames under a single CSS `perspective`** (the jury's starving 1√ó off-GPU surface ‚ÄĒ the browser compositor, deliberately NOT a hand-authored GPU render, after three.js hit 5/15 and GPU-render-primary ~10/15). A continuous `travel` value places each frame at level `((k‚ąítravel) mod N)` in Z; frames that pass the camera wrap to the far plane and fade in, so a finite stack reads as an **endless** self-nesting tunnel (the treadmill trick); per-level `rotateZ` gestures the de Smit/Lenstra Droste spiral. **See = hear:** descent velocity (levels/sec) drives the shared `_shared/psych/shepard.ts` Shepard‚ÄďRisset engine's glide rate (octaves/sec), with two engines (`dir ‚ąí1` fall / `+1` climb) crossfaded by velocity sign for bidirectional glide, so pitch falls exactly as fast as the eye descends; each integer level crossing rings a just-intonation bell marking the octave. **Played, not watched:** pointer joystick (vertical = dive/climb, horizontal = twist) + `W/S/A/D`/arrows + `Space` surge, with inertia; release ‚Üí a slow idle auto-drift (kinetic at rest, never blank/silent). A JI `startDroneBank` bed opens with intensity; `createVoidReverb` supplies the cavern. **Named refs (README):** M.C. Escher *Print Gallery* (1956), the Droste effect (1904), de Smit & Lenstra *The Mathematical Structure of Escher's Print Gallery* (2003), Shepard (1964) / Risset endless glissando, Kl√ľver's tunnel/funnel form-constant. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** **#1-soft** (discrete-Droste-recursion concept grep-0√ó; declared honestly ‚ÄĒ DOM/CSS-3D + Shepard are each individually used, the fresh axis is discrete mise-en-abyme recursion as a PLAYED instrument welded 1:1 to the Shepard octave) + **#2** ‚Č•5 subsystems (recursive DOM/CSS-3D renderer + played descent/twist drive + dual Shepard engines + droneBank pad + JI bell voice) + **#3** named refs above + **#5-soft** (¬ß751 Ganzflicker/form-constant dive ‚ÄĒ conceptual trigger, NOT <14-day, logged). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph(5√ó) ¬∑ GPU-render-primary(~10/15) ¬∑ log-polar-breathing-field(1506‚Üí1516) ¬∑ pointer-drag-SOLE(4√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[DOM/CSS-3D nested-frames OUTPUT (starving 1√ó) ¬∑ pointer+keyboard+surge INPUT ¬∑ discrete-Droste-recursion TECHNIQUE (0√ó) ¬∑ Shepard-welded-1:1 AUDIO ¬∑ ecstatic-plunge PALETTE ¬∑ PLAYED]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live 2026-07-12 ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ only smooth transform motion + slow hue drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows drift + caps descent rate. Audio gesture-gated ("Begin the descent" creates the ctx), master ramps 0‚Üí‚Č§0.18 through a **DynamicsCompressor** limiter, capped/oldest-stolen bell polyphony, full teardown on unmount. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure client; no server/secret/network; zero new npm deps ‚ÄĒ DOM/CSS + Web Audio only). **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites; `eslint ‚Ä¶ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` ‚Üí build OK, `page.js` (31.5 kB) + `"/dream/1524-droste-descent"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless): frame-count legibility, twist-vs-spin threshold, and the Shepard descent mix want Karel's browser ‚ÄĒ README documents the knobs; the idle auto-drift + depth HUD guarantee it's never blank, and 13 deterministic DOM frames render identically anywhere (phone-safe). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach "INFINITE REGRESS" fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1526-cell-recursion`** (dive INTO a honeycomb eye-cell, its inner copy of the whole lattice becomes your world ‚ÄĒ SierpiŇĄski/Menger DOM carpet; the most distinctive interaction, resurrect after verifying the level-4 ~7k-cell tree in-browser) + **‚≠ź `1528-mirror-well`** (receding-selves mirror corridor) as IDEAS ¬ß751. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1524-droste-descent/README.md`

### [1536-codec-melt](/dream/1536-codec-melt) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **keyboard-played (`A‚ÄďK` piano row; hammer to melt ‚ÄĒ NOT pointer, NOT mic/camera)** / **Canvas2D + WebCodecs (`VideoEncoder`/`VideoDecoder`, VP8) ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST-EVER WebCodecs piece** ¬∑ cycle 753 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-12) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: LSD-tracer / datamosh-melt ¬∑ pole: intense/kinetic (a played melt that heals ‚ÄĒ rests the void)`
**Play the melt of a dying video codec.** A drifting Canvas2D field of violet blobs is fed frame-by-frame into a **real hardware `VideoEncoder`** (VP8) pinned at a deliberately *starved* 55 kbps, decoded straight back with `VideoDecoder`, and upscaled nearest-neighbour so the codec's own compression artifacts ‚ÄĒ blooming DCT macroblocks, colour-banded slabs ‚ÄĒ **are the render substrate itself.** Datamosh as an instrument. This is the **lab's first-ever use of the WebCodecs API** ‚ÄĒ the genuine grep-0√ó never-used technique (`VideoEncoder`/`VideoDecoder`/`EncodedVideoChunk` appear in **0** other files across the 1500-deep lab; the criterion five juries named as the wall to the first 5/5, honestly cleared at last). Every key is at once a **synth voice** and a **burst of visual motion** ‚ÄĒ a bright high-contrast comet flung across the source scene; because motion is exactly what a starved codec cannot encode, that comet detonates the macroblocks around it, and the picture heals as the note decays. **The key engineering insight** (documented in README): WebCodecs has no per-`encode` bitrate parameter and the only runtime bitrate change, `encoder.configure()`, forces a keyframe = an instant full-frame *heal* that fights the melt ‚ÄĒ so instead the encoder is **pinned at fixed 55 kbps** and melt depth drives injected **motion** (bigger/faster/brighter comets the low bitrate's P-frames can't track), achieving "starve toward the floor" without the keyframe-heal side effect; keyframes are requested only to heal when calm (melt < 0.08) or a 5 s safety cap. This is the **most render-robust of three codec-manipulation approaches** built in the DEEP fire (no reconfigure churn, standard WebCodecs usage, small 384√ó216 source so 16px macroblocks read as big chunky slabs). **See = hear weld:** attack/hammering ‚Üí melt depth ‚Üí comet size+speed+brightness (how hard the codec blooms) *and* synth filter cutoff + release + drone drive (louder/brighter voice); pitch ‚Üí comet launch angle (golden-angle) + iridescent-violet hue (where the codec smears + what colour). **Audio:** gesture-gated `AudioContext`; detuned saw+tri voices ‚Üí lowpass ADSR + shared `droneBank` just-intonation bed; master `GainNode` **0.18** ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination; polyphony ‚Č§14 (oldest stolen), gains ramped (no clicks). **Never blank/silent:** idle ~2.5 s ‚Üí seeded sequencer walks a slow phrase (melts + sings on its own at Karel's 06:30 glance); real keys take over instantly. **Fallback (WebCodecs absent / config unsupported / mid-stream throw):** hand-rolled Canvas2D **feedback datamosh** ‚ÄĒ the same tracer ping-pong (prev frame zoom+rotate+hue-nudge+decay) with raw source composited over ‚ÄĒ still plays, melts, sounds, under a `text-destructive` note. **Named refs (README):** Takeshi Murata *Monster Movie* (2005, canonical datamosh); Rosa Menkman *The Glitch Moment(um)*; Nino Filiu *SuperMosh* (real-time datamosh via WebCodecs ‚ÄĒ direct technical lineage); Sven K√∂nig *aPpRoPiRaTe!*; LSD positive-afterimage "tracer" phenomenology. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5 (the lab's genuine crack at the #1 wall):** **#1** WebCodecs = **grep-0√ó never-used-in-the-lab technique** (verified across the full lab; MIDI is 36√ó, hand-tracking 20√ó ‚ÄĒ both falsely flagged 0√ó by prior juries; WebCodecs actually survives the grep) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (played-input engine + Canvas2D source-scene renderer + WebCodecs encode/decode datamosh pipeline + Web Audio synth+drone = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above. **#5 NOT claimed** (¬ß753 dive is a technique-novelty finding, not a <14-day paper ‚ÄĒ WebCodecs/SuperMosh predate the window; logged straight, consistent with ¬ß750/¬ß751/¬ß752). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primary(5√ó) ¬∑ GPU-render-primary(~10/15) ¬∑ cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field(1506‚Üí1516) ¬∑ pointer/touch-drag-SOLE(4√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[keyboard INPUT (not pointer-sole, not warm mic/camera) ¬∑ Canvas2D + WebCodecs OUTPUT (a genuinely new 0√ó render substrate ‚ÄĒ NOT a hand-authored GPU render, NOT three.js/WebGL2/SVG) ¬∑ codec-datamosh TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ iridescent-violet LSD-tracer PALETTE ¬∑ pole intense/kinetic (a played melt that heals ‚ÄĒ rests the void, not a watched breathing-field)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live 2026-07-12 hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ melt is a smoothly-eased scalar (ŌĄ‚Čą0.85 s) modulating comet motion + trail persistence, never a per-frame full-screen luminance flip; all transitions ease well beyond 150 ms, nothing in the 3‚Äď30 Hz danger band; `prefersReducedMotion()` caps comet speed/melt, slows idle tempo, lengthens the heal. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D + WebCodecs; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1536-codec-melt --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = **0** errors in 1536; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, absent on Vercel). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no browser: WebCodecs `VideoEncoder`/`VideoDecoder` globals are absent under `chrome-headless-shell`, so only the software fallback path can run here; the real codec path, the felt melt-controllability, macroblock legibility, and loudness balance want Karel's Chrome ‚ÄĒ the idle demo + deterministic scene guarantee it's never blank/silent). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept ‚ÄĒ *datamosh as a played psychedelic instrument* ‚ÄĒ via three codec mechanics); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1538-mosh-bloom`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ the authentic Murata keyframe-drop P-frame smear you hold, `Space` = "I-frame bloom" clarity-snap; de-selected only on its non-standard re-fed-delta amplifier reading "more as melt than block-drag mosh on some engines" per its own knock ‚ÄĒ verify true P-frame-drag in real Chromium first) + **‚≠ź `1540-ghost-delay`** (WebCodecs decode-delay ring buffer ‚Üí additive codec-ghost tracer-trails, pitch‚Üídepth+audio-delay, intensity‚Üíbitrate-crush; Bill Viola time-delay lineage; de-selected on leaning into the drift/tracer register the jury asked to REST this cycle + per-intensity encoder-reconfigure churn 1536 avoids) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß753. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1536-codec-melt/README.md`

### [1548-ink-bloom](/dream/1548-ink-bloom) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **mic-breath-played (voice/breath RMS drives drops+boil; pointer-stir secondary ‚ÄĒ NOT keyboard, NOT camera, NOT pointer-sole)** / **CSS Houdini Paint Worklet (`paintWorklet`/`registerProperty`) ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST-EVER Houdini piece, Canvas2D fallback identical** ¬∑ cycle 755 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: hypnagogic ink-drift / suminagashi ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ‚ÜĒ intense`
**Breathe onto a black pool and watch drops of ink bloom into interlocking suminagashi rings you can hear ‚ÄĒ painted natively by the browser's compositor.** The lab's **first-ever use of the CSS Houdini Paint API** ‚ÄĒ the genuine grep-0√ó never-used render substrate (`paintWorklet`/`registerPaint`/`registerProperty` appear in **0** other files across the 1500-deep lab; the #1 "never-used technique" criterion, honestly cleared ‚ÄĒ and uniquely, it renders on the **CSS compositor, NOT a hand-authored GPU render**, so it cleanly dodges the standing three.js/WebGL2 GPU-render-primary ban). Ink is dropped onto a still pool and ‚ÄĒ as in real **suminagashi** (Japanese floating-ink marbling) ‚ÄĒ every new drop pushes all earlier rings radially outward by the exact non-overlap transform `C + (P‚ąíC)¬∑‚ąö(1 + d¬≤/|P‚ąíC|¬≤)` (a point at distance `r` moves to `‚ąö(r¬≤+d¬≤)`), so the field settles into nested, interlocking concentric contours. **The key engineering insight** (documented in README): a Paint Worklet receives only scalar custom properties and has no per-pixel access (`PaintRenderingContext2D` is a vector-only Canvas2D subset ‚ÄĒ no `getImageData`), so the whole ink field is **reconstructed deterministically inside the worklet from eight scalars** (`--t/--energy/--drops/--boil/--hue/--px/--py/--stir`) via a per-index `mulberry32` ‚ÄĒ an elegant answer to Houdini's scalar-only bridge. The marbling is ONE pure `drawInk(ctx,w,h,state)` `.toString()`-embedded into a Blob-URL worklet (`CSS.paintWorklet.addModule`) AND called directly by a `<canvas>` fallback ‚Üí literally-identical pixels; feature-detected, header labels which path is live ("CSS Houdini Paint" vs "Canvas 2D fallback"), so the novel path genuinely runs in Chromium while the piece renders everywhere (Firefox/Safari/headless). **See = hear weld (tightest of the three DEEP explorers):** each drop you *see* is the exact frame a bell/ink-drop plink fires ‚ÄĒ one discrete event; breath loudness ‚Üí drop rate + a "boil" agitating contours into gold-flecked filigree + warmth (calm = slow cosmic drift, loud = boiling intensity). **Audio:** gesture-gated `AudioContext`; a sustaining 3-detuned-osc cosmic drone through a 0.06 Hz-LFO lowpass + drop-synced plinks; master **0.18** ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination; ‚Č§14 voices; full teardown on Stop/unmount. **Never blank/silent:** if the mic is denied/absent a seeded self-demo envelope keeps ink blooming and droning. **Named refs (README):** suminagashi floating-ink marbling; CSS Houdini Paint API / George Francis (georgedoescode) generative paint-worklets; Memo Akten (breath/energy as continuous controller). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#1** Houdini Paint = **grep-0√ó never-used-in-the-lab technique** (verified across the full lab) ¬∑ **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (Paint Worklet render engine + `registerProperty` audio‚Üítyped-CSS-prop bridge + Web Audio mic analysis + suminagashi field generator = 4) ¬∑ **#3** named refs above. **#4** abstained at ship (declared multi-cycle in README ‚ÄĒ cycle-2 folds in 1550's curl-noise/rake + 1552's thin-film hue + Karel's real Path piano as the drop schedule); **#5 NOT claimed** (¬ß755 dive is a technique-novelty finding, not a <14-day paper; logged straight, fifth cycle running). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primary ¬∑ GPU-render-primary(~10/15) ¬∑ cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field ¬∑ pointer/touch-drag-SOLE ¬∑ Canvas2D-as-headline(4√ó warm)] ¬∑ picked=[HOUDINI-PAINT-WORKLET OUTPUT (grep-0√ó, CSS-compositor NOT GPU ‚ÄĒ Canvas2D is only the fallback) ¬∑ mic-breath+pointer-stir INPUT (embodied, not sole/not banned, not the broken 3√ó keyboard rut, not camera-just-did) ¬∑ suminagashi ink-marbling TECHNIQUE ¬∑ iridescent-ink‚Üíjeweled PALETTE ¬∑ pole cosmic-ambient‚ÜĒintense (fresh named tradition ‚ÄĒ NOT the warm liquid-light-blob look, NOT the rested breathing-field/void)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live 2026-07-12 hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ boil modulates contour *amplitude* not frequency, drone LFO 0.06 Hz, hue drifts on a ~30 s cycle (all luminance change ‚Č§3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` halves the virtual clock + lowers drop rate. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Houdini/Canvas2D; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1548-ink-bloom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 winner errors (stale `.next/types` for the removed siblings cleared via `rm -rf .next`); authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` (33.8 kB) + `"/dream/1548-ink-bloom"` in `routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` dies only at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, absent on Vercel). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no browser/mic/speakers): the felt drop‚Üíplink tightness, ring legibility, and whether the Houdini compositor path is smooth full-bleed want Karel's Chrome; the idle self-demo + deterministic reconstruction guarantee it's never blank/silent and render identically anywhere. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach "Houdini-Paint marbling" fire (one concept ‚ÄĒ *ink-in-water marbling on the CSS compositor* ‚ÄĒ via three vector marbling algorithms); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1550-comb-marble`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ ebru gel-git/taraklńĪ comb + divergence-free curl-noise flow + pointer-rake; richest technique, de-selected only on a looser aggregate see=hear weld) + **‚≠ź `1552-veil-marble`** (thin-film/oil-on-water iridescent veils; de-selected on least marbling-authentic + leaning into the warm liquid-light-blob register) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß755. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1548-ink-bloom/README.md`

### [1590-body-mirror](/dream/1590-body-mirror) ¬∑ adult / embodied ¬∑ **camera body-tracking (MediaPipe HandLandmarker, 2 hands ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT keyboard, NOT pointer)** / **raw WebGL2 fragment shader (warm copper‚Üíamber‚Üíteal, off-violet) + spatial Web Audio (`StereoPannerNode` + HRTF `PannerNode`)** ¬∑ cycle 762 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: presence-as-interface / body-instrument ¬∑ pole: warm/embodied`
**Your whole body ‚ÄĒ not your voice ‚ÄĒ is the instrument, and the room hears where your hands are.** The lab's answer to the 2026-07-13 jury's #1 (and most-emphatic) provocation ‚ÄĒ *"get a body in the room"* (only 1 camera + 1 tilt + **0** body/pose pieces in the last 15; and camera pieces `217-dance-avatar`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `234-kids-hand-creature`‚Ě§ÔłŹ / `101-camera-song`‚Ě§ÔłŹ are all loved). A webcam feeds **MediaPipe Tasks-Vision `HandLandmarker`** (loaded at runtime from CDN via a `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic `import()`, the proven pattern from committed `1297-hand-loom` ‚ÄĒ nothing added to `package.json`); each hand's palm-centre drives a **continuous spatial voice** ‚ÄĒ X‚Üístereo pan (real `StereoPannerNode`), height‚Üípitch ‚ÄĒ while **raising both hands swells a warm chord pad** (a filament of light binds them) and a **pinch** (thumb-tip‚ÜĒindex-tip) plucks a bright note **placed in 3-D space** through a real HRTF `PannerNode`. Rendered as a single full-screen **raw WebGL2** fragment shader (no Canvas2D): a breathing warm wash, up to 64 additive fading glow-trails following each hand, hand-cores that flash on pinch. **The four wired subsystems** (ambition #2, exceeded): camera capture + MediaPipe landmark model + spatial Web Audio + WebGL2 render ‚ÄĒ each driving the next. **Named ref (ambition #3, README):** Myron Krueger's *Videoplace* (1975) ‚ÄĒ *presence itself is the interface, you don't pick up a controller, you ARE the controller* ‚ÄĒ fused with **Daniel Rozin's mechanical mirrors** (the reactive "mirror" here is a field of warm light instead of wood/metal). **See=hear weld:** where a hand is = where the sound pans + where the light glows; a pinch you *see* is the note you *hear*, placed at that hand. **Audio:** gesture-gated `AudioContext`; per-hand triangle+sub voices + stacked-saw pad + transient plucks ‚Üí master ‚Č§0.26 (1.4 s fade-in) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination; full teardown of audio nodes + camera stream + landmarker on unmount. **Never blank/silent:** on load a **synthetic demo body** already moves two glowing hands driving the same audio+visuals, so the whole idea is visible/audible **with no webcam at all** ‚ÄĒ real hands take over the instant the camera is enabled. **Graceful degradation:** camera-denied / MediaPipe-or-WASM-fail / no-WebGL2 each show an on-brand `text-destructive` notice while the demo body keeps the piece alive; `prefers-reduced-motion` shortens/decays trails. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4, integrated) + **#3** Videoplace/Rozin named refs.
