(**#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ MediaPipe hand/pose has prior lab use: `677-presence-field`, `862-kids-solfege-signs`, `258-kids-mirror-pets`, `1297-hand-loom` ‚ÄĒ so body-tracking is a *diversity* win, not a grep-0√ó novelty; **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 11th cycle the strict <14-day hunt is dry, logged straight.) **Honest blemish:** the pitch scale is minor-pentatonic (the exact map the jury flagged on `1542`) ‚ÄĒ but here it's one axis of a spatial instrument (pan/height/pinch/HRTF/swell), not the whole concept. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬∑ voice‚ÜíJI-tone‚Üíform-constant ENGINE ¬∑ iridescent-violet+Kl√ľver ART-PALETTE]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[camera-body-tracking INPUT (empty lane, loved) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (not Canvas2D) ¬∑ landmark‚Üíspatial-audio-panning TECHNIQUE ¬∑ warm copper/amber/teal off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole warm/embodied]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all motion is smoothly-eased position tracking + slow trail decay, nothing in the flicker band; reduced-motion honored. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2 + MediaPipe CDN; no server/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1590-body-mirror` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 winner errors; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `"/dream/1590-body-mirror"` in `routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, absent on Vercel). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no camera/speakers; MediaPipe's `HandLandmarker` needs a real webcam + WebGL/WASM): the felt hand‚Üípan tightness, pinch-pluck placement, and swell balance want Karel's Chrome; the synthetic demo body guarantees it's never blank/silent and the whole mapping is demonstrable with no camera. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-builder fire (3 divergent directions, each answering a different jury provocation); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1594-reading-light`** (TOP ship-next ‚ÄĒ the banked reading-light REBUILT clean this cycle; its score-follower wants Karel's real Path piano = the 5/5 weld, held for his "go") + **‚≠ź `1592-sky-traffic`** (the monotheme-break ‚ÄĒ live OpenSky aircraft sonified on an SVG radar scope, Ikeda ref, synthetic-sky fallback) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß762. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1590-body-mirror/README.md`

### [1596-lectio-verse](/dream/1596-lectio-verse) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic-adjacent (scripture / lectio) ¬∑ **audio-file (drop/pick a recording ‚ÄĒ primary; keyboard step/pause secondary; NOT mic, NOT voice)** / **typographic DOM via CSS Custom Highlight API (8 `read0‚Ä¶read7` buckets, zero per-glyph DOM; `<span data-read>` fallback + live badge) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D, NO WebGL** ¬∑ cycle 763 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: self-reading illuminated scripture / lectio divina ¬∑ pole: contemplative`
**Drop in a piano recording and the scripture reads itself ‚ÄĒ one word illuminated per struck note.** The lab's answer to the fresh 2026-07-13 jury's **#3 (and most-emphatic) provocation** ‚ÄĒ *"stop banking the 5/5 and ship it."* The banked reading-light codex, finally shipped, with its cross-modal **score-follower** as the headline: a tall vertical column of seeded asemic pseudo-scripture painted near-invisible on a near-black page; a bright **reading light** (hot candlelight head ‚Üí dim amber afterglow) illuminates **one word at a time**, and a just-intonation FM "reader" synth speaks each word as it lands. **The weld:** load a real recording (Load-audio button or drag-drop) ‚Üí it plays through `MediaElementSource ‚Üí AnalyserNode` and a **spectral-flux onset detector** (adaptive threshold mean+k¬∑std over ~0.7 s + local-peak + refractory) fires on each note attack; **every onset advances the reading light one word** ‚ÄĒ a run of fast notes rushes a line, a held chord lets a word glow, the built-in synth ducks so the loaded piano leads. So the performance *literally reads the text aloud*, note by note ‚ÄĒ Karel drops his real Path piano in and the light follows his phrasing. **Never blank/silent:** with no file the seeded codex auto-reads on an internal pulse over a sustaining JI under-bed drone (gesture-gated). **Named refs (README):** CSS Custom Highlight API (MDN); spectral-flux onset detection (Bello et al. 2005); **Online Time Warping (Dixon 2005) + Matchmaker (arXiv:2510.10087)** ‚ÄĒ the real-time audio-to-score-alignment lineage this follower relates to (this cycle's widened-net research anchor); illuminated manuscript / *lectio divina*; asemic writing (Michaux). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (Custom-Highlight reading-light renderer + seeded morpheme generator + JI FM synth + audio-file onset score-follower = 4, integrated) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** explicit multi-cycle (cycle-2 of the 1588-glossolalia banked plan; cycle-3 = Karel's real Path recording + the sibling followers). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ Custom Highlight API was cashed in 1588 (¬ß761); the novelty here is the **cross-modal audio-file score-follow weld**, not the API (honest ‚ÄĒ the jury blessed shipping it anyway). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 12th straight dry even on the widened net (OLTW/Matchmaker are 2005/2025, not <14-day). **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬∑ voice‚ÜíJI-tone‚Üíform-constant ENGINE ¬∑ iridescent-violet+Kl√ľver ART-PALETTE]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[audio-file INPUT (fresh modality ‚ÄĒ the jury's own named path, dodges the voice ban) ¬∑ typographic-DOM Custom-Highlight OUTPUT (dodges Canvas2D) ¬∑ onset score-follower ENGINE (audio‚Üíonset‚Üíreading-position, NOT the banned voice‚ÜíJI‚Üíform-constant spine) ¬∑ illuminated-codex verse-column PALETTE (a text codex, NOT a Kl√ľver mandala) ¬∑ pole contemplative]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the reading light is a smoothly-eased per-word illumination, advance rate capped, luminance change ‚Č§3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the pulse + caps advance. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Custom Highlight DOM; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1596-lectio-verse --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` (38.6 kB) + `"/dream/1596-lectio-verse"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, absent on Vercel); no `1594`/`1598` leaked into the build (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no browser/speakers/audio-file): the felt onset‚Üíword tightness, whether one-word-per-note reads as "the piano reading the text," and legibility at a 06:30 phone glance want Karel's Chrome; the seeded auto-read + under-bed drone guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-builder fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *the reading-light codex that score-follows real audio* ‚ÄĒ via three score-follow mechanisms); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1598-cantor-light`** (TOP ship-next / winner's cycle-3 ‚ÄĒ the OLTW **tempo-tracker**: a lightweight online-time-warp follower that tracks accelerando/ritardando with a live BPM readout, the most faithful to this cycle's Matchmaker/OLTW research anchor; de-selected only because discrete one-word-per-note is more legible + surprising + robust unattended than continuous tempo-tracking against a generative score) + **‚≠ź `1594-reading-light`** (the RMS-envelope follower ‚ÄĒ loudness‚Üídescent-speed, the robust baseline / a selectable "dynamics" follower mode; de-selected as the coarsest coupling ‚ÄĒ dynamics, not phrasing) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß763. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1596-lectio-verse/README.md`

### [1648-mitosis](/dream/1648-mitosis) ¬∑ adult / **artificial-life ‚ÄĒ a self-organizing colony, off the violet AND off the cosmic-gravity/embodied runs (NOT psychedelic, NOT gravity, NOT body, NOT voice)** ¬∑ **autonomous long-form generative + keyboard-morph (Space/R/‚ÜĎ‚Üď/1-2-3 ‚ÄĒ NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic/voice)** / **three.js points cloud + UnrealBloom postprocessing (luminous violet‚Üímagenta‚Üíwarm-white protoplasm) + self-playing granular JI drone** ¬∑ cycle 771 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: artificial-life / self-organizing cell-colony ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (alive, microscopic)`
**A colony of digital cells organizes itself into a living membrane, divides, and the whole self-organization plays itself as a granular choir.** The lab's first-ever **Particle Lenia** (Alexander Mordvintsev, 2023 ‚ÄĒ the energy-gradient *particle* variant of Bert Chan's Lenia continuous cellular automata; kin to arXiv **2601.16096** *Neural Particle Automata*, Jan-2026, this cycle's ¬ß771 research anchor). ~340 particles each descend a scalar energy field `E = R(repulsion) ‚ąí G(growth)` (canonical `mu_k=4, sigma_k=1, w_k=0.022, mu_g=0.6, sigma_g=0.15, c_rep=1, dt=0.1`, central-finite-difference gradient, 2 substeps/frame) ‚ÄĒ a Gaussian blob collapses then blooms into the canonical hollow-ring cell; nudging the growth centre `mu_g` up buds it into several cells (**mitosis**), down into one big vacuole. **The four wired subsystems** (ambition #2, exceeded): CPU Particle-Lenia sim (`lenia.ts`) ‚Üí three.js additive points render ‚Üí **UnrealBloom** `EffectComposer` glow ‚Üí Web Audio granular drone ‚ÄĒ each driving the next. **See=hear weld:** the field's smoothed statistics ARE the score ‚ÄĒ **cluster count ‚Üí number of active drone voices** (a split audibly blooms a new voice), field/kinetic energy ‚Üí grain density + lowpass brightness (energy spikes during reorganization, settles as the cell stabilizes), mean cell radius ‚Üí root pitch (bigger = lower, glided), membrane sharpness ‚Üí high-partial shimmer; JI bed at `1 : 3/2 : 2 : 3 : 5/2` under a look-ahead grain scheduler ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí convolution reverb. **Long-form generative (categorical-menu lane, thin):** it plays itself and is genuinely *different at minute 5 than second 5* ‚ÄĒ organize ‚Üí membrane ‚Üí divide ‚Üí merge, an emergent (not scripted) arc, distinct from last cycle's authored cinematic 1638-reel. **Interaction (dodges the cycle's banned touch/pointer input):** autonomous + keyboard ‚ÄĒ Space pause/resume, R rebirth, ‚ÜĎ/‚Üď morph `mu_g`, 1/2/3 regime jumps (single cell ¬∑ dividing colony ¬∑ hollow vacuole). **Named refs (ambition #3, README):** Mordvintsev's Particle Lenia ¬∑ Bert Chan's Lenia ¬∑ Neural Particle Automata (2601.16096). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** **#1** never-used technique (**Particle Lenia ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó**; grid Lenia is 7√ó but the particle formulation, "Mordvintsev", "SmoothLife" are all 0√ó ‚ÄĒ the first clean #1 in many cycles) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (4, integrated) + **#3** named refs + **#5-soft** ¬ß771 NPA/Particle-Lenia dive (conceptual trigger; NOT <14-day ‚ÄĒ NPA is Jan-2026, logged straight). **diversity:** `banned=[touch/pointer INPUT (4√ó in last 9: 1608/1616/1622/1628) ¬∑ mic/voice INPUT (JURY 2026-07-13) ¬∑ gravity/orbital TECHNIQUE (rest the 1600/1608/1622 3√ó run)]`; `picked=[autonomous long-form + keyboard-morph INPUT ¬∑ three.js+UnrealBloom OUTPUT ¬∑ Particle-Lenia self-organization TECHNIQUE ¬∑ alive/microscopic bioluminescent PALETTE (off the violet form-constant) ¬∑ pole cosmic-ambient]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ all motion is smooth particle advection + slow luminance drift, nothing in the flicker band. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + three.js; no server/network/secret; three@0.182 already a dep ‚ÄĒ zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1648-mitosis` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` (whole project) = clean; **full `npm run build` with a reduced route set incl. this route = EXIT 0** (`/dream/1648-mitosis` static-generated, 10.6 kB / 298 kB First Load), and the authoritative all-725-route `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `page.js` (42.3 kB) emitted + `"/dream/1648-mitosis"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain full-route `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~725-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, 4096-fd container cap, absent on Vercel; same as cycles 756/762/763). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no GPU/display/speakers; three.js UnrealBloom + Web Audio need a real browser): the felt aliveness of the bloom, the exact mitosis legibility, and whether the voices-bloom-on-split reads clearly want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic sim + auto-play guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-builder fire (ONE Particle-Lenia concept via 3 approaches); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1650-protobiont`** (voice-per-particle ‚ÄĒ the tightest possible see=hear weld: every cell is its own pooled-oscillator voice on a stacked-fifths scale, TOP ship-next) + **‚≠ź `1646-cell-choir`** (raw-WebGL2 5-sector additive choir, the render-robust no-three.js variant) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß771. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1648-mitosis/README.md`

### [1656-the-toll](/dream/1656-the-toll) ¬∑ adult / **conceptual-critical ‚ÄĒ a piece you can only hear while you pay the toll of attention (NOT psychedelic, NOT a pretty-visualizer; comments on the attention economy)** ¬∑ **sustained-attention HOLD (spacebar / press-and-hold the field) + deterministic ghost-hand auto-demo ‚ÄĒ NOT mic/voice, NOT touch/pointer-drag, NOT keyboard-steer, NOT camera** / **austere typographic DOM (one large state line + hairline violet meter + mono "what you let go" receipt on a dark field) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D, NO three.js/WebGL, NO GPU render** ¬∑ cycle 772 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: attention-as-cost long-form generative critique ¬∑ pole: conceptual/critical (off-violet, off-GPU)`
**A long-form generative piece that only advances while you hold ‚ÄĒ release, and it dissolves; almost no one holds long enough to hear the end.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (Karel's-real-piano ¬∑ living-earth-data ¬∑ conceptual-critical) and the first real entry in the 2026-07-13 jury's **emptiest named menu lane** ‚ÄĒ conceptual/critical, "a recording you can't hear without doing something costly." **The pick FLIPPED during curation:** a whole-lab prior-art grep showed the other two explorers were near-duplicates of already-shipped pieces ‚ÄĒ `1652-path-codex` (real-piano onset ‚Üí illuminated SVG manuscript) rebuilds the shipped `1596-lectio-verse` reading-light score-follower, and `1654-terraphone` (live-USGS seismic organ) rebuilds `1193-tremor-core` + `233-earth-pulse` ‚ÄĒ the "same soul, new substrate" trap the jury warns against; `1656` was the only genuinely-distinct soul, so it shipped. **How it works:** holding a single sustained gesture (spacebar, or press-and-hold anywhere on the field) is "the toll" ‚ÄĒ a small, boring, real cost of continuous attention. An attention meter integrates held-time (off `AudioContext.currentTime` deltas, never wall clock) at 1s/s; **releasing erodes it at 0.6s/s** (you slide backward, you don't hard-reset) while a fast "veil" gain snaps the *sound* to silence ‚ÄĒ two timescales that make the cost legible. **The music (long-form, real memory):** six named movements (a single held tone ‚Üí the motif enters ‚Üí answered a 5th up ‚Üí an inverted countermelody ‚Üí the climb ‚Üí **tonic home at ~250s**), one just-intonation motif returning transformed across them, voices cross-fading in via smoothstep weights ‚Üí genuinely **different at minute-5 than second-5** (the thin "long-form generative with state+memory" categorical lane). Reaching 250s prints a resolution line **most visitors will never see because they let go**; every release prints a receipt-style "what you let go" line ("you held 47s ‚ÄĒ the third movement was 20s away"), accumulating like a till roll. **The visual IS the medium ‚ÄĒ austere typography:** one large hero line that *is* the current state (its opacity/tracking/weight ARE the attention meter made typographic ‚ÄĒ loose and faint when neglected, tight and present when paid for), a hairline violet meter, the mono receipt on a dark field. No canvas, no WebGL, no particles ‚ÄĒ restraint is the point. **Self-demonstrating unattended (the 06:30 fit):** after a 3s no-input grace a deterministic `GHOST_SCRIPT` (hold 18s / release 4s / hold 30s‚Ä¶) drives the toll so the piece audibly climbs, decays on each scripted release, and prints receipts with zero input; the instant a real gesture arrives the ghost yields **permanently** (badge: "you have the toll" vs "ghost is holding ‚ÄĒ press space to take over"). Master chain: every note ‚Üí veil ‚Üí master `GainNode` (0.14) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination, all ramps (no clicks on hold/release); full teardown (RAF cancel + listeners removed + engine disposed + `ctx.close()`) on unmount; spacebar `preventDefault` so it never scrolls. **Deterministic:** seeded `mulberry32` for micro-detune only; **no** `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date` (verified). **Named refs:** John Cage *4‚Ä≤33‚Ä≥* ¬∑ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* ¬∑ Jenny Odell *How to Do Nothing*; research-chained to this cycle's ¬ß772 dive (audio-to-score alignment arxiv 2605.20014 seeded the sibling brief; the conceptual lane came from the jury's #5). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (attention-hold state machine + long-form generative score with a returning/transformed motif + fast-veil/slow-erosion decay engine + typographic-DOM render = 4, coupled each frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** long-form stateful with real memory (motif transformed to a tonic homecoming; minute-5 ‚Č† second-5). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ conceptual/attention pieces have faint prior lab presence (1190-quietude); the fresh weld is attention-as-toll with erosion + an unreachable resolution. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 14th straight <14-day dry. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT ¬∑ touch/pointer-INPUT(4√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-render ¬∑ three.js/WebGL GPU-render OUTPUT(7√ó) ¬∑ voice‚ÜíJI‚Üíform-constant ENGINE ¬∑ cosmic-gravity ENGINE ¬∑ iridescent-violet+Kl√ľver PALETTE]`; `picked=[sustained-attention-HOLD INPUT (binary attention-cost, NOT touch/pointer-drag, NOT keyboard-steer) ¬∑ typographic-DOM OUTPUT (off-GPU) ¬∑ attention-state long-form ENGINE ¬∑ ink-monochrome off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole conceptual/critical]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND breaks the recent 7√ó GPU-render run. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ only gentle 500ms opacity/tracking transitions, nothing in the flicker band. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + DOM; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1656-the-toll --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` (28.4 kB) + `"/dream/1656-the-toll"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~725-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, 4096-fd container cap, absent on Vercel; same as cycles 756/762/767/768/771); no `1652`/`1654` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the motif transformation reads as a genuine arc, whether erode-on-release feels legible rather than punitive, and whether the austere anti-spectacle surface holds attention at a 06:30 glance want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost hand guarantees it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1652-path-codex`** (Karel's real Path piano score-followed into a self-illuminating SVG medieval codex ‚ÄĒ a fresh render surface but overlaps the shipped 1596-lectio-verse reading-light; resurrect only from a distinct angle) + **‚≠ź `1654-terraphone`** (live-USGS awe-pole seismic organ, deterministic replay-sim headless ‚ÄĒ resolves the ledger-organ brand tension but overlaps the shipped 1193-tremor-core / 233-earth-pulse; the data-lane ship needs a feed the lab hasn't sonified) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß772. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1656-the-toll/README.md`

### [1670-species-loom](/dream/1670-species-loom) ¬∑ adult / **music-theory engine ‚ÄĒ the species-LAWFUL cycle-2 of 1660-fugue-loom (fold the verified fux-machine rule engine in; "the rule is the star" ‚ÄĒ NOT a pretty-visualizer, NOT JI-drone bed, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic)** ¬∑ **keyboard-PLAYED subject (home row = D-dorian, top row = accidentals) + deterministic ghost auto-demo ‚ÄĒ real agency, NOT zero-input/watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic/voice** / **self-writing SVG two/three-stave manuscript with red struck-through veto noteheads ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D, NO WebGL/three.js, off-GPU** ¬∑ cycle 775 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: verified species-counterpoint machine that shows its rules ¬∑ pole: lawful/composerly/played`
**You play a subject, and a machine grows it into voices whose every note is chosen to obey real species-counterpoint rules ‚ÄĒ the illegal moves flashing red and vetoed on the score in front of you.** The **species-lawful cycle-2** of `1660-fugue-loom` (a convincing but not academically-lawful self-playing fugue), cashing the fresh 2026-07-14 jury's **#3 provocation verbatim** ‚ÄĒ *"fold the banked verified `fux-machine` rule engine in to make the voice-leading genuinely species-lawful; stop banking the cycle-2, ship the follow-through (criterion #4 is the weakest-honored floor criterion)"* ‚ÄĒ WHILE staying inside the jury's two louder notes: species counterpoint is rule-*governed dissonance treatment* (real second-species passing tones, the anti-wash ‚Üí #1's "real dissonance"), and the subject is **PLAYED**, not zero-input (‚Üí #2's "demand real agency, no watch-only relapse"). **How the rule engine works (`engine.ts`):** the played subject becomes a cantus firmus; a **backtracking legal-set constraint search** grows two voices note-by-note ‚ÄĒ at each bar it enumerates in-scale candidates, keeps only those passing every rule, scores survivors (favouring contrary + stepwise motion + fuller imperfect consonances), tries them in seeded order, and **backtracks** when a bar has no legal continuation. Rules: **consonance on downbeats** (perfect 1/5/8 + imperfect 3/6 only; 2nds, 4th-against-bass, tritone, 7ths rejected) ¬∑ **no parallel or hidden perfects** (parallels between every voice pair; hidden/direct perfects policed on the outer pair ‚ÄĒ the standard 3-voice relaxation) ¬∑ **melody** mostly stepwise, consonant leaps ‚Č§ octave, no aug/dim leaps, no two big leaps in a row ¬∑ **second species (2:1)** in the lower voice with weak-beat dissonance licensed *only* as a passing tone (tagged `pt`) ¬∑ a fixed **clausula vera / authentic cadence** (leading-tone C#‚ÜíD into the final D octave). **The see=hear weld ‚ÄĒ vetoes you can watch:** a rejected parallel/hidden-perfect candidate is drawn on the self-writing SVG manuscript as a **red, struck-through ghost notehead** (`‚ą•5`, `‚ą•8`, `‚Üí5`) exactly as the playhead reaches that bar; vertical intervals are labelled (`M6`, `P5`, `m3`, `pt`‚Ä¶) as each note sounds. **Independent verification (not decorative):** a *separate* `verify()` pass re-scans every vertical (downbeats + parallel/hidden checks + every second-species weak beat) and counts violations ‚ÄĒ the live badge `verticals checked: N ¬∑ violations: 0` is that real second check, headless-verified 0 across a dozen subjects incl. accidental-laden ones at the fixed seed. **Play it:** home row `a s d f g h j k l` = D4‚ÜíE5 D-dorian, top row adds the C# leading tone; play 4‚Äď10 notes ‚Üí **Compose fugue** (or **Ghost subject**), Play/Stop/Clear; on load a deterministic **ghost** composes+performs the default after a ~3 s no-input grace (badge *ghost is composing* ‚Üí *you have the subject*), yielding the instant a mapped key is pressed. **Deterministic:** every stochastic choice from a seeded **mulberry32** (constant seed) ‚ÄĒ no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date` (verified); the visual manuscript clock is **decoupled from the audio clock** (rAF-driven) so it never freezes even if autoplay gates the sound. Three panned per-voice organ-ish synth lines ‚Üí master gain ‚Č§ 0.13 ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`, smoothed ramps, full teardown on unmount. **Named refs (README):** J.J. Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* (1725) ¬∑ G. Mazzola et al. "Three-voice first-species counterpoint" arXiv 2606.01102 (2026) ¬∑ FuxCP (constraint-programming counterpoint) ¬∑ "Formulating First Species Counterpoint With Integer Programming"; research-chained to this cycle's ¬ß775 dive (Strasheela real-time constraint counterpoint + IP first-species ‚Üí the legal-set-search-with-visible-veto fold). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#4** declared cycle-2 of 1660 (the jury's named weakest-honored criterion, cashed ‚ÄĒ cycle-3 = fold this verified engine into 1660's full fugal architecture, previewed by the banked 1674) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (verified voice-leading constraint search + independent verifier + played-subject/ghost state machine + polyphonic synth + self-writing SVG manuscript = 5) + **#3** named refs above. **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the counterpoint *engine* now exists in the lab as of 1660 (¬ß773); the fresh weld is the *verified, rule-visible, played* fold, not a never-used technique. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ **18th straight** <14-day dry (Mazzola 2606.01102 is June 2026 ~6 wks ‚ÄĒ the tightest chain in cycles but not <14d; standing widen-or-retire note holds). **diversity:** `banned=[JI-consonant-drone BED(13√ó) ¬∑ orbital-gravity ENGINE ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only INPUT(4√ó) ¬∑ cosmic palette ¬∑ WebGL/three.js OUTPUT(on-watch 5√ó) ¬∑ touch/pointer INPUT(on-watch 6√ó)]`; `picked=[keyboard-PLAYED subject INPUT (real agency ‚ÄĒ NOT watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic, NOT cosmic) ¬∑ SVG self-writing-manuscript OUTPUT (off-GPU, off the on-watch three.js creep) ¬∑ verified-species-counterpoint ENGINE (rule-governed real DISSONANCE treatment ‚ÄĒ NOT the JI-drone BED, NOT gravity) ¬∑ ink-on-parchment off-violet PALETTE ¬∑ pole lawful/composerly/played]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND cashes jury #3 while staying inside #1+#2. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the red veto flash is a small, local, slow notehead element; luminance change well under the flicker band; `prefers-reduced-motion` respected. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG/DOM; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand, violet the sole chrome accent; parchment/red live only inside the SVG art); `eslint src/app/dream/1670-species-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **Compiled (warnings only, all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`/older prototypes)**, `page.js` emitted + `"/dream/1670-species-loom"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~730-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling ‚ÄĒ infra, 4096-fd container cap, absent on Vercel; same as cycles 756/762/767‚Äď774); no `1672`/`1674` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the played-subject ‚Üí lawful-voices development reads as musically satisfying (vs merely correct) by ear, and whether the red-veto + interval labels read legibly at a 06:30 glance, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + decoupled visual clock guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical play‚Üícompose‚Üíverify‚Üírender path. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *a species-lawful counterpoint machine with real agency* ‚ÄĒ via played-subject fugue / live-CF duet / real-piano-seeded fugue); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1674-path-fugue`** (the fuller *fugal* version ‚ÄĒ real-piano subject extraction via onset+f0, tonal answer at the fifth + frozen-subject memory, 0 violations/400 subjects; the winner's **cycle-3** [fold this engine into fugal form] + cashes the OTHER half of jury #3 [seed from Karel's real music]; TOP ship-next) + **‚≠ź `1672-fux-duet`** (max-agency live **played** counterpoint tutor ‚ÄĒ you play a cantus firmus, the solver answers lawfully note-by-note with the legal-candidate set shown + illegal ones vetoed red; the direct answer to jury #2, a "played instrument" night; 2-voice duet w/ neighbour-tone-not-passing-tone dissonance) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß775. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1670-species-loom/README.md`

### [1682-cadence-forge](/dream/1682-cadence-forge) ¬∑ adult / **music-theory engine ‚ÄĒ a PLAYED equal-tempered functional-harmony instrument that modulates and BITES (cashes JURY 2026-07-14 #1's last literal example "an equal-tempered one that actually modulates and bites"; NOT a JI-drone bed, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic)** ¬∑ **keyboard-PLAYED roman numerals (home row I ii iii IV V vi vii¬į; Shift = applied secondary dominants; L=vii¬į7; M/Space = pivot-chord modulation; N = deceptive cadence) + deterministic ghost auto-demo ‚ÄĒ real agency, NOT zero-input/watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic** / **Canvas2D tension ribbon + live TIV component breakdown ‚ÄĒ NO three.js/WebGL, off-GPU** ¬∑ cycle 777 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: functional-harmony tension engine that shows its math ¬∑ pole: composerly/played, real ET tension (not JI wash)`
**Play scale-degree roman numerals and hear real functional harmony pull and resolve ‚ÄĒ while a numerically-grounded tonal-tension curve rises on the dominants and drops home on the tonic.** The lab's first **functional-harmony tension engine** and the DEEP-winner cash of the fresh 2026-07-14 jury's **#1 note** ‚ÄĒ "break the just-intonation consonance reflex; 13 of 15 pieces resolve to a pretty JI wash; force an **equal-tempered one that actually modulates and bites**" (the last uncashed of jury #1's four named examples; 774-bytemill cashed *noise/glitch*, 775-species-loom *real dissonance treatment*, 776-tabla-loom *percussion/beat-driven*). Finally ships the banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź`1678-tension-cell` (¬ß776 TOP ship-next) concept. **How it works:** home row `A S D F G H J` = the seven diatonic triads (I ii iii IV V vi vii¬į) in the current key; each is realized by a real **4-voice SATB voice-leading search** (common tones held, upper voices minimized, chord coverage preferred ‚ÄĒ not stacked root triads); `Shift`+key fires an **applied/secondary dominant** (V7/x, real tritone), `K`=V7, `L`=vii¬į7 (fully-diminished), `M`/Space **modulates** via pivot chord to a related key (updating the on-screen key), `N` = **deceptive cadence** (V7‚Üívi). **The tension math is real, not hand-waved:** every chord's tension is the published **TIV weighted scalar** (Navarro-C√°ceres & Bernardes, *Entropy* 2020) ‚ÄĒ dissonance √ó0.402 + hierarchical-tension √ó0.246 + tonal-distance √ó0.202 + voice-leading-motion √ó0.193, /1.043 ‚ÄĒ drawn as a scrolling Canvas2D ribbon with ‚Ė≤peak/‚ĖĹdip labels PLUS a live per-component breakdown panel, so you see exactly which of the four terms is biting. Audio is pure Web Audio 12-TET (saw+sine per voice, ADSR) ‚Üí master gain 0.12 ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`. **Deterministic ghost self-demo:** a frame-counter clock (no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date`/wall-clock in executable code ‚ÄĒ verified) self-plays `I‚Äďvi‚ÄďIV‚ÄďV7/V‚ÄďV7‚ÄďI` then modulates and drops a deceptive cadence, decoupled from the audio clock so the ribbon animates even before/without audio; graceful `text-destructive` notice if AudioContext is missing. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** **#1** first functional-harmony tension engine (grep-0√ó for functional-harmony/roman-numeral/Lerdahl across the lab) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (functional-harmony realizer + SATB voice-leader + TIV tension model + Canvas2D ribbon/breakdown render = 4) + **#3** named refs (Fred Lerdahl *Tonal Pitch Space* 2001 ¬∑ the TIV tonal-tension model *Entropy* 2020 ¬∑ Mapping Tonal Harmony Pro). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ 19th straight <14-day dry (freshest on-concept find = Mapping THP 5.1 at ~6 wks; TIV foundational-2020; foundational-technique exception invoked). **diversity:** `banned=[JI-consonant-drone BED(jury #1) ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only(jury #2) ¬∑ orbital-gravity ¬∑ cosmic-space palette ¬∑ (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT]`; `picked=[keyboard-PLAYED numerals INPUT (real agency, NOT watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic, NOT cosmic) ¬∑ equal-tempered FUNCTIONAL-HARMONY tension ENGINE (secondary dominants/tritones/modulation ‚ÄĒ the literal anti-JI, NOT a drone bed) ¬∑ Canvas2D tension-ribbon OUTPUT (NOT three.js) ¬∑ violet-tension PALETTE (NOT cosmic)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban AND cashes jury #1 inside #2. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the ribbon is a slow scrolling curve, luminance well under the flicker band. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand, violet the sole chrome accent); `eslint src/app/dream/1682-cadence-forge --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `rm -rf .next && npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (this cycle even the page-data step passed ‚ÄĒ no EMFILE), `page.js` emitted + `"/dream/1682-cadence-forge"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; no `1684`/`1686` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the applied-dominant/deceptive-cadence bite reads as musically satisfying by ear, and whether the TIV ribbon + breakdown read legibly at a 06:30 glance, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + decoupled visual clock guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical play‚Üívoice‚Üítension‚Üírender path. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (ONE concept ‚ÄĒ *played ET functional harmony that modulates and bites* ‚ÄĒ via play-the-numeral / sculpt-the-roughness / play-the-bassline); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1684-roughness-organ`** (the lab's first psychoacoustic sensory-dissonance engine ‚ÄĒ Plomp-Levelt/Sethares roughness computed on real partials, the universal-hump viz with a live dot per partial pair; highest surprise, but sculpts a chord's bite without modulating keys ‚Üí TOP ship-next for the perceptual lane) + **‚≠ź `1686-figured-bass`** (a played real-time reharmonizer/continuo ‚ÄĒ you play a bass line, the machine harmonizes each beat with functional chords biased by a heat knob, modulating by fifths; cashes both halves but the machine makes the interesting choice ‚Üí a "play a line" night) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß777. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1682-cadence-forge/README.md`

### [1726-drum-trance](/dream/1726-drum-trance) ¬∑ adult / **shamanic theta auditory-driving ‚ÄĒ a drum-trance field where the STEADINESS of your ~4 Hz beat is the reward (direct build of the ¬ß784 research dive: Aparicio-Terr√©s *Sci.Rep.* 16:10204, 2026-03-26, "neural tracking at theta predicts drumming-induced ASC"); breaks JURY 2026-07-14 #1 (rhythm/grit, NOT a JI-drone bed) + #2 (real agency, NOT watch-only)** ¬∑ **MULTI-TOUCH/pointer frame-drum pads (+ Space/F/J/K, + deterministic 4.2 Hz ghost drummer) ‚ÄĒ you PLAY the beat, real agency, NOT keyboard-melody, NOT zero-input/watch-only** / **Canvas2D Kl√ľver form-constant field (imports `_shared/psych/logpolar`) ‚ÄĒ NO WebGL/three.js, breaks the 4√ó raw-GPU streak (1700/1708/1714/1722)** ¬∑ cycle 784 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: shamanic theta-entrainment trance ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Tap the drums steadily near four beats a second and the psychedelic geometry locks in ‚ÄĒ hold a wobbly beat and it scatters back to grey; the visual IS a biofeedback readout of how well you're entraining.** The lab's first **closed theta-entrainment reward loop**, and the direct implementation of this cycle's fresh 2026 research: Aparicio-Terr√©s et al., *Scientific Reports* 16:10204 (2026-03-26) found that the strength of the brain's *phase-lock* (neural tracking) to a steady ~4 beats/sec (theta-band) drum pulse ‚ÄĒ not merely the presence of a 4 Hz beat ‚ÄĒ predicts the depth of the drumming-induced altered state. So the piece rewards **steadiness**, not noise. **5 subsystems:** (1) **multi-touch/pointer frame-drum pads** ‚ÄĒ 4 large tappable zones (center skin + rims), playable by tap/multi-touch/click, plus Space/F/J/K for laptop review ‚ÄĒ the user physically plays the rhythm (real agency, jury #2); (2) **modal membrane-drum synthesis** (`audio.ts`) ‚ÄĒ each hit = a noise burst through a bandpass into 2‚Äď3 **detuned inharmonic modal resonators** at Bessel-like ratios (1 : 1.59 : 2.14) with fixed per-partial cent detune ‚ÄĒ short, punchy, deliberately NOT a consonant sustained chord (breaks jury #1's JI-drone ban; distinct pitch/timbre per pad); (3) **theta-steadiness tracker** ‚ÄĒ measures inter-onset intervals, computes closeness to ~4 bps AND low-variance steadiness, maintains a smoothed entrainment scalar E‚ąą[0,1] that RISES on steady locked beating and DECAYS on erratic/stopped hits; (4) **Kl√ľver form-constant field** (`field.ts`, Canvas2D) ‚ÄĒ a full-screen tunnel‚Üíspiral‚Üíhoneycomb form-constant field built on the shared `formConstant`/`honeycomb` log-polar helpers whose intensity/contrast/coherence scale with E (erratic = dim grey scattered tunnel; deep lock = brilliant honeycomb + peripheral white-out boundary-dissolution), pulsing on each hit; (5) **entrainment-reward loop** ‚ÄĒ a mono readout of tempo/lock%/form closes the loop, and rising E escalates the form-constant complexity ‚ÄĒ trance depth as an *earned* reward. **Deterministic + headless self-demo:** a 4.2 Hz **ghost drummer** auto-plays from mount (integer frame counter; excitation noise from a fixed-seed mulberry32; `ctx.currentTime` only for audio scheduling ‚ÄĒ no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date`/`performance.now` in the state/audio/animation path, verified), driving lock toward ~90% (bright honeycomb) so the piece is never blank/silent on the headless 06:30 box; it yields the moment the user taps and resumes after ~3.5 s of silence. **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ beat flashes are gentle local luminance pulses (the ~4 Hz beat is audio-only; the full screen never flashes at 4 Hz); `prefersReducedMotion()` honored. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (touch-drum input + modal-percussion synth + theta-steadiness tracker + Canvas2D form-constant render + entrainment-reward loop = 5) + **#3** named refs (Aparicio-Terr√©s *Sci.Rep.* 2026 4-bps theta ¬∑ Neher 1961 "auditory driving" ¬∑ Maxfield 1990 rhythmic-drumming EEG ¬∑ Harner *Way of the Shaman* ¬∑ Kl√ľver form constants) + research-cited to the ¬ß784 theta-tracking dive (path (a): today's research ‚Üí tonight's build). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ percussion/drum synthesis + form-constants are owned; the fresh axis is the *combination* (the lab's first closed drum‚Üítheta-steadiness‚Üíform-constant reward loop). **#5 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ 26th straight** <14-day dry (Nature paper 2026-03-26 ‚Čą 3.5 mo). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4√ó) ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only(jury#2) ¬∑ JI-consonant-drone BED(jury#1) ¬∑ orbital-gravity ¬∑ cosmic-STARFIELD palette ¬∑ (on-watch) raw-WebGL2/three.js OUTPUT(4√ó) + instrument-DSP + harmony-engine TECHNIQUE]`; `picked=[multi-touch drum INPUT (real agency, non-keyboard, non-watch-only) ¬∑ modal-percussion + theta-entrainment TECHNIQUE (NOT instrument-DSP-melodic, NOT harmony-engine, NOT JI drone) ¬∑ Canvas2D form-constant OUTPUT (NOT raw-WebGL2/three.js ‚ÄĒ breaks the 4√ó GPU streak) ¬∑ firelit-ember PALETTE (NOT cosmic-starfield)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban on all four axes AND directly executes jury #1 (rhythm/grit) + #2 (agency). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (on-brand ‚ÄĒ violet the sole chrome accent; ember colors live only inside canvas draw strings); `eslint src/app/dream/1726-drum-trance --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/*`/older-proto warnings) but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing 4096-fd **EMFILE** (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative winner-only `rm -rf .next && npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted + `"/dream/1726-drum-trance"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; no `1728`/`1730` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear/eye/mic-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/touch): whether the drum‚Üíform-constant lock reads as genuinely *entraining* (vs a generic beat-reactive field) and whether the ~4 Hz steadiness reward feels earned wants Karel's Chrome + a real touchscreen; the deterministic ghost drummer guarantees it's never blank/silent and exercises the identical hit‚Üíentrainment‚Üífield‚Üíaudio path. NB the frame counter as tempo clock makes real-user Hz slightly display-refresh-dependent (noted in README). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-piece rhythm/grit/dissonance fire (the anti-JI-drone night); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1728-fracture`** (audio-file-drop bitcrush/granular-grit datamosh ‚ÄĒ `bitcrush 0√ó in lab`, the purest "put grit in the EAR" answer; ship next to keep the ear un-calcified) + **‚≠ź `1730-groove-lock`** (mic clap‚Üítempo-lock generative dub-techno groove with modulating tritone/b9 ET stabs ‚ÄĒ the textbook "ET that modulates and bites") ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß784. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1726-drum-trance/README.md`

### [1732-fracture](/dream/1732-fracture) ¬∑ adult / **drop any track and hear it FRACTURE into gritty dissonant lo-fi ruin while the image datamoshes into DMT hyper-detail ‚ÄĒ bit-crush QUANTIZATION as the headline instrument; direct build of the ¬ß785 research dive (ArtifactNet arXiv 2604.16254, 2026-04-20: every 2024‚Äď26 AI-music generator runs on Residual-Vector-Quantization ‚ÄĒ bitcrush is its audible-artifact ancestor); breaks JURY 2026-07-14 #1 (grit/dissonance, NOT a JI-drone bed) + #2 (real drop-and-shape agency, NOT watch-only)** ¬∑ **AUDIO-FILE-DROP (drag/drop + `<input type=file>` ‚Üí `decodeAudioData` ‚Üí looping source; + a built-in deterministic DISSONANT carrier at m2/tritone/M7 so it self-demos headless) ‚ÄĒ resurrects audio-file input from 0√ó in the last-10, non-keyboard/mic/touch/camera/tilt** / **Canvas2D feedback-displacement datamosh (`ScriptProcessorNode` bit-depth quantize to 2-bit + sample-rate hold = `bitcrush` 0√ó in the lab; bass‚Üíslice displacement, mid‚Üíflow dir, high‚Üíchromatic split; 2√ó2 mirror kaleidoscope + nested half-scale mirror), Ikeda data-monochrome + one hot accent ‚ÄĒ NO WebGL/three.js (respects the 4√ó raw-GPU ban 1700/1708/1714/1722)** ¬∑ cycle 785 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT-hyperdetail-fracture ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Drop any track ‚ÄĒ or let the built-in dissonant carrier play ‚ÄĒ and watch/hear it fracture: the audio bit-crushed to as few as 2 bits with sample-rate decimation (a grit slider dials both from shimmer to ruin) while a pure-Canvas2D feedback-displacement datamosh tears the image into mirror-tiled machine-elf hyper-detail.** The lab's **first-ever `bitcrush`** (amplitude quantization greps 0√ó across the 1700-deep lab) ‚ÄĒ and the conceptual anchor is fresh: bitcrush is the audible-artifact *ancestor* of the Residual-Vector-Quantization (codebook quantization) every 2024‚Äď26 AI music generator (Suno/Udio/Stable Audio/MusicGen/Riffusion) is built on (ArtifactNet, arXiv 2604.16254, 2026-04-20). The **grit engine** is a self-contained `ScriptProcessorNode` (buffer 2048): each sample rounded to N bits (down to 2) + held for up to ~24 input samples, wired analyser‚Üí`DynamicsCompressor`‚Üílow master (0.12 carrier / 0.2 file)‚Üídestination. **See = hear:** the datamosh feedback buffer taps the *post-crush* signal ‚ÄĒ bass drives horizontal slice-displacement magnitude, mid the flow direction, high the chromatic split/detail; a 2√ó2 mirror kaleidoscope + a nested half-scale mirror give "machine-elf" density; luminance-clamped (no strobe). **Never blank/silent:** a deterministic dissonant carrier (detuned beating saws + sub + band-passed noise on minor-2nds/tritones/major-7ths, pattern from an integer frame counter + `Math.sin`) auto-plays so the headless 06:30 box hears+sees it; drop your own file to fracture it (decode fail ‚Üí `text-destructive`, carrier keeps playing). **Named refs (README):** Rosa Menkman *Glitch Studies Manifesto* (2011) ¬∑ Ryoji Ikeda *data.matrix* / *test pattern* ¬∑ datamosh I-frame displacement ¬∑ DMT hyper-detail "machine-elf" phenomenology ¬∑ ArtifactNet arXiv 2604.16254 (2026, RVQ codebook quantization). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2‚Äď3/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (audio-file input + FFT band reader + bitcrush/SR-reduce re-synth + Canvas2D feedback-displacement datamosh + dissonant carrier = 5) + **#3** named refs above; research-cited to the ¬ß785 RVQ-quantization dive (path (a) ‚ÄĒ today's research ‚Üí tonight's build; also (c) cashes the ¬ß784 ‚≠ź‚≠ź bank). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ glitch/datamosh is *visually* owned (10√ó/3√ó in INDEX); the fresh axis is the **`bitcrush`-0√ó audio** + the closed FFT‚Üídisplacement weld. **#5 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ 27th straight** <14-day dry (ArtifactNet ~3mo). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED(3√ó,watch) ¬∑ zero-input/watch-only(jury#2) ¬∑ JI-consonant-drone BED(jury#1) ¬∑ orbital-gravity(jury) ¬∑ cosmic-STARFIELD(jury) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2/three.js OUTPUT(4√ó HARD ban) ¬∑ instrument-DSP-synth(3√ó)+harmony-engine(3√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[audio-file-drop INPUT (resurrected 0√ó) ¬∑ bitcrush-quantization TECHNIQUE (audio-DESTRUCTION not synthesis/harmony/JI-drone; 0√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D datamosh OUTPUT (respects the 4√ó GPU ban) ¬∑ Ikeda data-monochrome PALETTE (NOT starfield) ¬∑ grit/dissonance + drop-and-shape agency (answers jury #1 + #2)]` ‚ÄĒ clears every hard ban on all four axes. **SAFETY:** no strobe (luminance-clamped slice/feedback motion, no full-frame flips in the 3‚Äď30 Hz band); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows motion + reduces flashing; audio gesture-gated (ctx resumes on first tap), master through a compressor + low gain. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1732-fracture --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors in 1732; determinism grep = 0 in code. **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers): whether the crush‚Üídatamosh weld reads as genuinely *fracturing* (vs a generic FFT visualizer) and the grit-slider taste want Karel's Chrome + a real dropped track; the deterministic dissonant carrier + frame-counter visuals guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical decode‚Üícrush‚Üíanalyse‚Üírender path. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach "FRACTURE" fire (one concept ‚ÄĒ *drop a track, fracture it into grit + datamosh* ‚ÄĒ via three grit engines: bitcrush / granular-cloud / foldback-ringmod); banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1734-fracture-grain`** (TOP resurrect ‚ÄĒ a real look-ahead GRANULAR CLOUD, grit sweeps faithful‚Üídissonant grain-storm, + Canvas2D block-drag macroblock mosh; granular is love-supported ‚Ě§`227-paths-granular`; de-selected only because 1732 directly implements *this cycle's* dated RVQ hook) + **‚≠ź `1736-fracture-fold`** (foldback wavefolding + ring-mod inharmonic sidebands = the purest *spectral* bite, + Canvas2D chromatic-aberration scanline tear; de-selected on 2 tsc errors at curation + glitch-visual owned) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß785. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1732-fracture/README.md`

### [1740-breath-nebula](/dream/1740-breath-nebula) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **mic-breath (low-band RMS envelope ‚Üí breath-phase; mic ‚Üí AnalyserNode only; deterministic ~0.1 Hz ghost breath when no mic) ‚ÄĒ NOT touch/pointer, NOT keyboard-played, NOT camera** / **WebGPU compute + render (a persistent ~150k‚Äď500k-particle storage buffer advected by a WGSL curl-noise compute shader, instanced additive render pass) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D (jury-banned 7√ó), NO three.js/raw-WebGL2 ‚ÄĒ the near-0√ó substrate the jury demanded** ¬∑ cycle 786 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: cosmic-ambient nebula-tide ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`
**Breathe toward the mic and a living cosmic nebula breathes with you ‚ÄĒ inhale blooms a cloud of hundreds of thousands of GPU points outward into warm-white light, exhale collapses it back into cold violet filaments.** The lab's answer to the fresh 2026-07-15 jury's three structural provocations at once: **#3 "break the Canvas2D monoculture ‚ÄĒ force a WebGPU-compute piece (still near-0√ó)"** (this is a genuine WGSL `compute` shader stepping a persistent GPU storage buffer, only ~2√ó across 1700+ prototypes), **#2 "return to the PRIMARY DIRECTION on the OTHER pole"** (cosmic-ambient, re-injected), and **#1 "leave the instrument/theory workshop"** (this is neither). **The technique:** each particle (`pos+age`, `vel+seed`) is advected every frame through a 3-D **curl-noise** flow field ‚ÄĒ the analytic curl of a value-noise vector potential, so the flow is near-divergence-free and makes filaments/sheets, not sinks ‚ÄĒ plus a **signed breath radial force** (outward on the rising in-breath, a cold inward collapse on the falling out-breath), a slow nebular swirl, damping, Euler integration, and seeded respawn on an emitter shell; a second pipeline reads the *same* buffer and expands each point into a camera-facing additive quad, coloured deep-indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üíwarm-white by local speed, camera auto-orbiting on a deterministic clock. **The breath:** smoothed mic low-band RMS drives the tide; with no mic a deterministic ~0.1 Hz sine keeps it breathing, alive and audible unattended. **The sound (deliberately NOT a static JI drone):** an inharmonic detuned-pair pad with per-partial detune LFOs (beating + shimmer), a filtered-noise wind rising on the in-breath, sparse Risset-ish bells on the out-breath ‚Üí compressor ‚Üí 0.15. **Named refs (README):** Robert Borghesi's *ASTRODITHER* (WebGPU + TSL audio-reactive, 2026-07-01 ‚ÄĒ the freshest anchor, a field "all signal until the music pushes it around"); the KAYAC WebGPU curl-noise 1M-particle compute demo; Refik Anadol's data-cloud aesthetic. Graceful degrade: no-WebGPU ‚Üí readable notice + audio keeps running + a DOM radial-glow pulsing with breath; mic-denied ‚Üí `text-destructive` note + ghost breath. Deterministic (integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32 only; no `Math.random`/`Date`/`performance.now` in the update path), no strobe (slow luminance drift only, `prefers-reduced-motion` softens orbit + bloom). Two more altered-states pieces explored this fire (WIDE) and banked to IDEAS ¬ß786: **‚≠ź‚≠ź 1742-drift-lattice** (three.js-shader hypnagogic phosphene lattice that deepens as your room goes quiet ‚ÄĒ fills the empty DREAM pole) + **‚≠ź 1744-void-bath** (audio-only HRTF-spatialized NDE drone-void, device-tilt).

### [1746-threshold-lattice](/dream/1746-threshold-lattice) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **the DREAM/hypnagogic pole the 2026-07-15 jury named EMPTY ‚ÄĒ cashes the ‚≠ź‚≠ź-banked ¬ß786 seed, the direct build of the ¬ß787 research dive (MIT Media Lab *Dormio*/Targeted-Dream-Incubation + Windt "Intrusions of a drowsy mind", Frontiers 2015: the hypnagogic threshold is an addressable interface ‚ÄĒ this INVERTS it, making the ROOM the sensor)** ¬∑ **mic AMBIENT ROOM-RMS, INVERSE mapping (reward stillness ‚ÄĒ the quieter/stiller your space, the deeper you sink; mic ‚Üí AnalyserNode only; deterministic autonomous ghost descent when no mic) ‚ÄĒ NOT touch/pointer, NOT keyboard-played, NOT breath-pitch** / **three.js fragment `ShaderMaterial` (honeycomb Kl√ľver form-constant lattice under an inverse log-polar retina‚ÜíV1 warp, reuses `_shared/psych/logpolar` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL`+`honeycomb`; peripheral fragmentary-image spirals; myoclonic-jerk spring-back shear) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D (jury-banned 6‚Äď7√ó), NO raw-WebGL2 (¬ß785 4√ó ban) ‚ÄĒ off both the banned substrates** ¬∑ cycle 787 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: hypnagogic sleep-onset descent ¬∑ pole: dream`
**Keep your room quiet and still and you sink, over ~12‚Äď15 s, through a honeycomb phosphene lattice toward the threshold of dream imagery ‚ÄĒ any sound throws you back up.** The lab's first real occupant of the DREAM/hypnagogic pole the fresh 2026-07-15 jury named empty (~0), and the direct cash of its provocation #2 ("cosmic-ambient and DREAM states are thin-to-empty ‚ÄĒ cash a banked altered-states piece"): this is the ¬ß786-banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1742-drift-lattice` concept, resurrected off the banned Canvas2D onto a three.js `ShaderMaterial`, and it **solves the seed's known weakness** (the "quiet‚Üídeeper" link used to take ~15 s to read). **The interface is the room.** Ambient-mic RMS is mapped *inversely* and split into two channels: a **fast `uStill`** channel (sub-second) drives a center-sink glow + an always-visible live stillness meter so the cause‚Üíeffect reads in <5 s, and a **slow `depth`** reward with an asymmetric envelope (~13 s rise when quiet, ~0.4 s fall on any sound) drives the lattice density, warp, tint and vignette ‚ÄĒ the actual "how deep am I" state. **The technique:** a honeycomb (Kl√ľver's lattice form-constant) drawn in cortical space and sampled through the inverse log-polar (retina‚ÜíV1) warp, so it streams inward as you sink; peripheral spirals hint at the fragmentary half-images of hypnagogia near the threshold; a golden-angle **myoclonic-jerk (sleep-start) state machine** fires a gentle damped spring-back shear + a soft thud at a depth-modulated cadence (deeper ‚Üí a little more often). **The sound (calm dream pole, not the anti-JI grit mandate):** a seeded warm pad + dark noise wash that darkens/softens as depth rises, sparse frame-scheduled bells, low startle thuds ‚Üí compressor ‚Üí 0.12. Deterministic (integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32; no `Math.random`/`Date`/`performance.now` in any state/audio/visual path), no strobe (slow luminance drift, tint clamped ‚Č§0.7, `prefers-reduced-motion` softens the jerk), graceful degrade (WebGL-off ‚Üí notice + audio persists; mic-denied ‚Üí `text-destructive` + autonomous ghost descent). **Named refs (README):** Kl√ľver form constants (1926) ¬∑ Andreas Mavromatis *Hypnagogia* (1987) ¬∑ sleep-start/hypnic-jerk myoclonus lit ¬∑ MIT Media Lab *Dormio*/TDI (inverted). Two more hypnagogic-descent substrates explored this fire (DEEP) and banked to IDEAS ¬ß787: **‚≠ź‚≠ź 1748-threshold-drift** (WebGPU-compute phosphene sparks that coalesce into N1 fragmentary imagery then dissolve ‚ÄĒ ship-next to keep the forced-compute lane warm on a second algorithm) + **‚≠ź 1750-threshold-descent** (three.js raymarched Kl√ľver tunnel-to-light / NDE descent; one trivial tsc fix).

### [1752-dissolve](/dream/1752-dissolve) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **the AUDIO-ONLY / embedded lane the 2026-07-15 jury named "empty for months" ‚ÄĒ the lab's FIRST audio-only piece across ~744 prototypes; the direct build of the ¬ß788 research dive (2026 browser spatial-audio maturity ‚ÄĒ Google Resonance Audio / Omnitone HRTF + ambisonic, "Web Audio API: Immersive Soundscapes for WebXR 2026") INVERTED: the whole field optimizes precise placement, so this UN-places sound until the listener's spatial self dissolves** ¬∑ **listen (eyes-closed headphones) + OPTIONAL DeviceOrientation head-steer (yaw), gracefully skipped if unavailable ‚ÄĒ NOT touch/pointer (jury-banned 5√ó), NOT keyboard-played, NOT mic** / **AUDIO-ONLY (HRTF binaural spatialization + progressive interaural decorrelation + granular smear + ConvolverNode diffuse-field reverb) ‚ÄĒ NO Canvas2D (jury-banned 7√ó), NO GPU render at all; the visual is DELIBERATELY near-absent (one sub-0.3 Hz violet glow + one instruction line + one depth hairline) ‚ÄĒ the screen-bias test** ¬∑ cycle 788 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: dissociative ego-dissolution (k-hole descent+return) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient / dissociative`
**Put on headphones, close your eyes, and a single point of tone in front of you comes loose, orbits, decorrelates between your ears and diffuses into an enveloping field until front, back, self and not-self blur (the k-hole peak) ‚ÄĒ then slowly re-coheres. Sound does all the work; the screen is nearly black on purpose.** The lab's answer to the fresh 2026-07-15 jury's provocation #3 ‚ÄĒ which named TWO escapes from the Canvas2D monoculture (WebGPU-compute *or* **"audio-only / embedded / haptic ‚ÄĒ the menu has named it empty for months"**): this fills the single most-absent lane in the lab. It also completes the ¬ß786-banked ‚≠ź`1744-void-bath` audio-only-spatial direction, and is the only ¬ß788 candidate that makes the today's-research‚Üítoday's-build chain visible. **The technique:** a single normalized `depth` 0‚Üí1‚Üí0 envelope over 150 s (descend ~75 s, return ~75 s) drives **five simultaneous dissolution mechanisms** ‚ÄĒ (1) four HRTF `PannerNode` voices clustered tight at the front point, then lerped onto wide **Lissajous orbits** at different radii/speeds so the scene envelops; (2) **progressive interaural decorrelation** (each voice crossfades onto twin independent 5‚Äď25 ms delay lines that destroy interaural correlation, so the source stops having a place); (3) seeded **granular smear** re-jittering the per-ear delays; (4) a code-synthesised **`ConvolverNode` diffuse-field reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`) whose direct-to-reverb ratio collapses toward a pure wet field at the peak; (5) an **inharmonic carrier bed** whose detune fans WIDE at the peak so the k-hole is a beating, unplaced smear ‚ÄĒ never a pretty JI drone. Master chain: everything ‚Üí reverb ‚Üí `GainNode` (‚Č§0.18) ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí destination; AudioContext gesture-gated on Begin-descent, fully torn down on End+unmount. Optional device-orientation head-steer rotates listener yaw (silently skipped where unavailable). Deterministic (fixed-seed mulberry32 smear), no strobe (glow is a sub-0.3 Hz luminance drift, held under `prefers-reduced-motion`), graceful degrade (audio-engine failure ‚Üí `text-destructive`). **Named refs (README):** Google Resonance Audio / Omnitone ambisonic + binaural HRTF ¬∑ "Web Audio API: Immersive Soundscapes for WebXR 2026" ¬∑ ketamine/NDE ego-dissolution phenomenology. Two more altered-states pieces explored this fire (WIDE) and banked to IDEAS ¬ß788: **‚≠ź‚≠ź 1756-boundless** (WebGPU-compute 2-D wave-equation standing-wave meditative field, MIDI-played ‚ÄĒ ship-next, keeps the forced-compute lane warm on a new algorithm) + **‚≠ź 1754-godlight** (three.js volumetric raymarch NDE tunnel-to-light, tilt-gaze).

### [1770-dmt-hyperbolic](/dream/1770-dmt-hyperbolic) ¬∑ psychedelic / **the INTENSE pole, re-injected hard after the 7√ó cosmic-ambient/void monoculture of 1740‚Üí1766 (the ¬ß791 note itself flagged the forming void mini-monoculture): the DMT breakthrough's NEGATIVELY-CURVED geometry ‚ÄĒ Escher's Circle Limit alive and breathing, drifting toward its infinite boundary, driven by sound. Direct build of the ¬ß792 research dive (QRI/G√≥mez Emilsson "The Hyperbolic Geometry of DMT Experiences", 2016 ‚ÄĒ breakthrough space is hyperbolic: saddle sheets, exponentially blooming tilings)** ¬∑ **AUDIO-CARRIER input (deterministic self-playing generative carrier ‚ÄĒ a seeded inharmonic pentatonic piano-like arpeggio over a detuned drone, always alive/audible incl. headless; optional file-drop of your own track ducks the ghost) ‚ÄĒ NOT mic-breath (3√ó recent), NOT tilt (3√ó recent), NOT stillness (2√ó recent), NOT touch/keyboard (jury-banned)** / **WebGL2 full-viewport fragment shader (three.js ShaderMaterial on a fullscreen triangle) ‚ÄĒ off Canvas2D (jury-banned 7√ó), off raw-WebGL2-as-sole (¬ß785), off WebGPU-compute (dodging the 3√ó back-to-back 1740/1758/1766 run): every pixel is a complex point in the Poincar√© disk folded into the fundamental triangle of an EXACT (2,7,q) reflection group (two mirror lines + one geodesic mirror circle derived by law of sines), a M√∂bius disk-automorphism drifts it toward the boundary (exponential area growth = "more axes than physical reality allows"), saddle-fold "bedsheet" warp, IQ iridescent thin-film palette + edge chromatic aberration + inversion-count tile rings. FFT‚Üíneural-gain map: bass‚Üídrift/fold, mids‚Üícurvature+{7,q} density (q drifts 3‚ÜĒ4), highs‚Üíaberration, loud‚Üísaturation/gain. Journey arc onset‚Üícome-up‚Üíbreakthrough‚Üíreturn. Graceful WebGL2-absent degrade to a live audio-reactive CSS glow; safety: NO alpha-flicker, palette cycle ~0.09 Hz, prefers-reduced-motion honored** ¬∑ cycle 792 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT-breakthrough ¬∑ pole: intense`

### [1778-gradient-lotus](/dream/1778-gradient-lotus) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **self-playing generative bed + pointer-parallax/click-pulse + optional audio-file drop (NOT mic, NOT keyboard-played, NOT touch-drag-sole, NOT camera/tilt)** / **PURE CSS-COMPOSITOR RENDER ‚ÄĒ stacked animated `repeating-conic-gradient` / `radial-gradient` `<div>`s fused with `mix-blend-mode` (screen/overlay/soft-light), feathered by `mask-image`, kaleidoscope-mirrored via `scaleX(-1)`, driven by CSS custom properties from a Web-Audio FFT ‚ÄĒ there is NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL/WebGPU, NO three.js anywhere on the page (grep-confirmed the compositor is a never-used PRIMARY render substrate across the 1500-deep lab; off the jury-banned Canvas2D AND off the over-served GPU-shader monoculture)** ¬∑ cycle 793 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: warm psilocybin/LSD mandala ¬∑ pole: warm-organic (NOT cosmic-ambient/void/dream ‚ÄĒ the fresh psychedelic pole ¬ß793 established)`

A warm, breathing, audio-reactive psilocybin/LSD **mandala rendered with no canvas and no WebGL at all** ‚ÄĒ the whole visual is produced by the part of the browser that composites and paints boxes. Eight absolutely-positioned `<div>`s stack inside one breathing/parallax "stage": a warm `radial-gradient` base wash (the `conic-gradient`-unsupported degradation floor) ‚Üí three `repeating-conic-gradient` petal fields whose repeat-period IS the petal count, counter-rotating on `--rot`/`--rot2`/`--rot3` at near-but-unequal speeds so they **beat out genuine moir√©/kaleidoscope interference** ‚Üí a `scaleX(-1)` mirror of field A for bilateral symmetry ‚Üí a slow full-ramp `conic-gradient` iridescence under `mix-blend-mode: soft-light` nudged by `hue-rotate(--hue)` (held inside a warm ¬Ī35¬į arc so it never leaves the palette) ‚Üí a central `radial-gradient` bloom whose radius+intensity ride `--bloom` (peak lightness pinned at 80%, never pure white = the flash-safety clamp) ‚Üí an aperture vignette. **The engineering thesis** (documented in README): a SINGLE `requestAnimationFrame` loop never touches the DOM tree ‚ÄĒ it only calls `el.style.setProperty('--x', ‚Ä¶)` on the root, and plain custom properties cascade to every layer and re-paint on the compositor for free (no `registerProperty` needed; the deepening idea is to register them as typed `<angle>`/`<number>` so the compositor interpolates on its own thread). **Audio ‚Üí CSS weld:** a self-playing warm lydian pad (detuned triangle/saw partials under a slow lowpass LFO + the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` reverb) with a generative A-pentatonic bell voice sounds from the first **Begin**; an `AnalyserNode` on the master bus reduces the FFT to six smoothed log-spaced perceptual bands written straight into `--band0..5`, and overall energy drives `--open` (petal intricacy + breathing scale + saturation), `--bloom`, and `--hue`/`--sat` ‚ÄĒ louder/brighter audio **opens** the lotus (finer petals, bigger bloom, deeper saturation), quiet lets it **close and dim**. Rotation is continuous and audio-independent so it is never a dead screen; drop your own track (`decodeAudioData` ‚Üí looping source through the same analyser) to drive it instead. Self-runs fully untouched (synthetic idle bands before audio). **Ambition (2/5, honest):** #1 never-used render substrate (CSS compositor as PRIMARY render ‚ÄĒ grep-0√ó; the sharpest possible dodge off both the jury-banned Canvas2D and the over-served GPU-shader/WebGPU output pile) + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (Web-Audio synth+reverb + FFT band-reducer + CSS-custom-property compositor engine). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ rotation ~60 s/rev, breathing ~0.13 Hz, no luminance change near the photosensitive band, peak layer brightness clamped below white, `prefers-reduced-motion` slows every rotation to ~16% and damps the breathing depth. **2 more explored this cycle** (WIDE fan, banked in IDEAS.md): `1776-spore-gaze` (camera hand-DWELL blooms a psilocybin fractal ‚ÄĒ the literal build of the ¬ß793 gaze-fixation research, the highest-ambition 4/5 seed, ship-next) and `1780-dejong-swarm` (260k-point **de Jong strange attractor**, grep-0√ó, with LSD tracer-trails via WebGL2 transform-feedback + a float-texture feedback accumulator).

### [1784-second-sight](/dream/1784-second-sight) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **live CAMERA (front-facing, opt-in; deterministic proto-face self-demo scene when denied/headless ‚ÄĒ NOT touch/pointer-drag (jury-banned 5√ó), NOT keyboard (on-watch 5√ó), NOT mic (warm 3√ó), NOT tilt (3√ó))** / **three.js GPU ping-pong feedback CONDITIONED BY A REAL tfjs "seer" ‚ÄĒ off the jury-banned Canvas2D (7√ó) AND off raw-WebGL2-as-sole (¬ß785); directly cashes jury 2026-07-15 provocation #3 (force GPU/three.js)** ¬∑ cycle 794 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: predictive-processing reducing-valve / apophenia-over-reality ¬∑ pole: hallucination (intense-organic ‚ÄĒ the world dissolving into eyes/faces, NOT geometric-flat)`

**The Hallucination Machine, engineered middle path: a real neural net actually SEES your live world, and that machine perception decides WHERE the hallucinated creatures grow.** The lab owns apophenia-*from-noise* (1396) but had **never** turned the live camera into the substrate the priors over-write, nor run **real tfjs generative conditioning** (the only prior tfjs uses are kids classifiers ‚ÄĒ generative-conditioning is grep-0√ó). Direct build of the ¬ß794 research dive: Suzuki, Roseboom, Schwartzman & Seth's **"Hallucination Machine"** (*Sci. Reports* 2017 ‚ÄĒ DeepDream over VR reproduces the psychedelic visual's object/eye/face apparitions) now formalized by **"Beyond the reducing valve: computational neurophenomenology via deep neural networks"** (*Frontiers in Psychology* 2026), under the REBUS / predictive-processing frame (Carhart-Harris & Friston; Huxley's reducing valve). **The three subsystems:** (1) a **tfjs "seer"** ‚ÄĒ dynamic-imported TensorFlow.js on the WebGL backend runs a fixed-seed 3√ó3 conv stack + ReLU + 2 pools each throttled frame, fused with **center-surround contrast, Sobel edges, and warm-skin chroma** into a 64√ó64 RGBA **salience texture** (a shader-only luminance-gradient salience is the live fallback if tfjs fails/slow ‚ÄĒ a HUD line reports which path is active); (2) a **three.js ping-pong feedback** render ‚ÄĒ `FRAG_GROWTH` advects + decays (<1) the prior frame and **emits procedural eye / paisley form-constant motifs gated by the seer's salience map** (blooms land on faces/contours/warm skin, not raw contrast), reusing `_shared/psych/logpolar` for the Kl√ľver warp; `FRAG_DISPLAY` mixes veridical-vs-hallucination by the **dose** (the reducing valve, 0‚Üí1 over ~55 s), adds chromatic aberration + cheap bloom + Reinhard tone-map; (3) a **Web-Audio bed** sharing the ONE dose + ONE salience field ‚ÄĒ calm near-sine room-tone ‚Üí detuned inharmonic shimmer as the dose opens a lowpass, salience-density drives spectral brightness, and a region "waking up" strikes a wake-tone. **Determinism/headless:** integer-frame dose ramp + mulberry32; no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`performance.now` in the render/audio path; a deterministic drifting proto-face + warm-blob self-demo scene animates the whole pipeline with **no camera** so it self-demos in review and headless; audio survives even if WebGL is unavailable. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 never-used technique (real tfjs generative-conditioning-of-a-GPU-hallucination-pass, grep-0√ó) + #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (camera + tfjs seer + three.js GPU feedback + audio bed) + #3 named reference (Suzuki/Seth 2017 ¬∑ Frontiers 2026) + #5-amended recent-research (the ¬ß794 dive, today's research ‚Üí tonight's build). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ feedback decay <1, brightness tone-mapped below white, only a ‚Č§0.05 Hz luminance drift, `prefers-reduced-motion` softens motion/trails. **Honest limitation:** no pretrained face/body-segmentation package is a dependency (and adding deps is forbidden), so the conv stack is **fixed-seed and untrained** ‚ÄĒ the seer follows bottom-up early-vision salience (contrast/edges/warm chroma), not true semantic faces/bodies; the "creatures" are procedural motifs steered by that salience, a real machine-perception LEVER + overlay, not end-to-end learned imagery. **2 more explored this cycle** (DEEP race, banked in IDEAS.md): `1780-reducing-valve` (**real tfjs DeepDream gradient-ascent** ‚ÄĒ the literal machine, but renders on the jury-banned Canvas2D; resurrect off-Canvas2D) and `1782-eye-bloom` (pure-GPU WebGL2 feedback-shader apophenia, no ML ‚ÄĒ the guaranteed-spectacular baseline).

### [1806-city-breath](/dream/1806-city-breath) ¬∑ adult / **real-world data (transit/mobility)** ¬∑ **live external bike-share feed (Citybikes/GBFS, CORS-open, no-auth) as the DRIVER ‚ÄĒ NOT mic (jury-banned 7√ó), NOT camera, NOT touch-as-sole, NOT keyboard-played; a deterministic seeded synthetic city (mulberry32 0x1806) self-demos with ZERO network** / **SVG-DOM station map (built once, attributes mutated ‚ÄĒ NOT Canvas, NOT WebGPU-compute (jury-banned 4√ó), NOT three.js/WebGL2-fragment (jury-banned 4√ó))** ¬∑ cycle 798 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: real-world-data sonification ¬∑ subject: a living city ¬∑ explicitly NOT altered-states (serves jury 2026-07-16 #1 hard-ban on the 15/15 altered-states monoculture)`

**Hear a whole city breathing ‚ÄĒ its live bike-share system emptying and filling in real time as a warm generative instrument.** The jury's 2026-07-16 verdict hard-banned the altered-states theme for one cycle (15/15 were consciousness pieces) and named **real-world data sonification (weather/transit/finance/satellite = 0√ó in 15 cycles)** and **breaking the mic monoculture (7√ó) with an external-API driver** as the explicit provocations. This is the head-on cash: a piece **about a city**, not the inside of a head, driven by an external transit feed, no mic. **Data:** the **Citybikes** aggregator (CORS-open, no-auth) wrapping the **GBFS** open-mobility standard ‚ÄĒ `api.citybik.es/v2/networks/citi-bike-nyc` returns `stations[]` with `free_bikes`/`empty_slots`/lat/lon, fetched client-side (no API route), polled ~25s. Successive snapshots are **diffed**: a station whose `free_bikes` dropped = a bike undocked (someone rode off); a rise = a bike returned. **If any fetch fails (offline sandbox / CORS), a fully deterministic synthetic city** ‚ÄĒ 120 seeded stations + a seeded tidal "day" simulator that borrows/returns bikes on a 2.2s interval ‚ÄĒ runs from mount with **zero network**, so the 06:30 review always shows a breathing city; the live feed swaps in cleanly on success (status line: LIVE network-name vs SIMULATED). **Audio (Web Audio):** the whole city is an **aggregate drone** whose pitch + lowpass brightness track system fullness on a slow tidal LFO (thins at morning rush, warms in the evening); each **undock fires a warm Karplus-Strong plucked string** tuned pentatonic by longitude, panned by latitude; each **return** a softer resonant tone an octave down; busy minutes are ranked by delta magnitude and **rate-limited to 7 audible events/poll** so it never becomes a wall of plucks. `DynamicsCompressor` ‚Üí master gain 0.16. **Visual (SVG-DOM, grep-distinct-from-Canvas):** stations plotted lat/long into a responsive `viewBox`; each a `<circle>` sized by capacity, filled on the **violet ramp** (empty = dim, full = bright), with a **pre-allocated pool of 64 ripple `<circle>`s** reused for undock/return blooms (attributes mutated, tree never rebuilt); a single rAF loop drives pulses, readout shows docked / fullness% / in-motion / events-min. **Ambition (honest 2‚Äď3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (live mobility ingestion + snapshot-diff event model + Karplus pluck synth + fullness drone + SVG map = 5) + #3 named reference (GBFS via Citybikes; the near-empty urban-mobility-sonification space my ¬ß798 dive confirmed returns ~nothing) + this cycle's research‚Üíbuild chain. **Honest positioning:** data-sonification is NOT new to the lab (earthquakes alone = 11 prototypes; ISS/NOAA/weather/Wikipedia all used) ‚ÄĒ but it is 0√ó across the last 15 *cycles* and GBFS-transit is 0√ó *ever*; this is the rested-lane return the jury demanded, not a "lab-first." **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ pulses bloom softly, peak brightness below white (violet ‚Č§78% L), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows ripple decay + drone LFO; a failed feed degrades to the sim, an audio-start failure shows a `text-destructive` notice. **2 more explored this cycle** (WIDE fan, banked/eliminated ‚ÄĒ see IDEAS ¬ß798): ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1804-bourse` (live crypto trade-tape ‚Üí Ikeda Canvas2D data-viz + FM bell tones ‚ÄĒ the finance lane, 0√ó ever; ship-ready TOP resurrect) and `1808-dawn-line` (**eliminated ‚ÄĒ near-duplicate of the existing `1244-dayline`** terminator-sweep piece).

### [1904-current-eden](/dream/1904-current-eden) ¬∑ adult ¬∑ **conduct a living ecology like a river ‚ÄĒ cycle 2 of the flow-eden II multi-cycle DEEP commitment (¬ß811), directly cashing jury 2026-07-17 criterion #4 (extend/multi-cycle, 0/15 ‚ÄĒ "nobody extends anything"). Drag currents of wind through a multi-kernel Flow-Lenia field to herd 3 dye-tagged species into ENCOUNTERS; every cross-species collision is a chord you caused. DEAD without a human by construction: no birth term adds mass, so with no conducting overlap collapses to ~0 and the piece thins to a lone drone** ¬∑ **POINTER/DRAG to paint a decaying current field (mouse + touch) ‚ÄĒ NOT mic (jury-banned 7√ó), NOT keyboard-played, NOT camera** / **WebGL2 RGBA16F ping-pong multi-kernel Flow-Lenia (mass-conserving reintegration-tracking advection; per-species ring kernels at radii 3/5/7; 32¬≤ RGBA32F readback every 4th frame for masses / encounter energy / MSPD-lite 2-scale variance) ‚ÄĒ NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned 7√ó), NOT WebGPU** ¬∑ cycle 812 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: conducted artificial-life ecology ¬∑ harmony: modal-that-modulates (Phrygian/Lydian/Dorian, biting Hijaz on strong collisions) ‚ÄĒ NOT pentatonic (jury-banned) ¬∑ palette: warm daylight textile (madder/saffron/indigo on linen) ‚ÄĒ NOT violet-on-black (jury-banned)`
**Drag to pull wind through a field of evolving organisms and force three species to meet ‚ÄĒ each collision modulates the harmony. A real GPU Flow-Lenia: three dye-tagged species each convolve their OWN ring kernel so they read as distinct organisms, and mass is conserved structurally (reintegration-tracking overlap weights form a partition of unity ‚ÄĒ no growth term invents mass), so an unconducted field genuinely dissipates and the audio thins to a lone drone. You paint a decaying velocity/current texture (~2.5 s half-life) that is added to the CA transport flow (`F_s = k¬∑‚ąág_s ‚ąí p¬∑‚ąáM + c¬∑current`); a deterministic autopilot only grazes the species into weak occasional encounters, while a real drag's current is ~40√ó stronger ‚ÄĒ the music is yours. Encounter energy (cross-species dye overlap) drives a modal drone that pivots mode + shifts tonal centre and rings FM bells, with a Hijaz double-harmonic on strong collisions; single-species dominance eases home and thins the texture. Warm madder/saffron/indigo dye combs along the current on a light linen ground ‚ÄĒ the boldest break yet from the lab's violet monoculture. Cycle 2 of the flow-eden II DEEP commitment; the runner-up 1906-tide-eden (persistent painted banks/channels landscaping a global tide; cool tidepool palette; a Flatten-landscape "dead proof" button) is banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź in IDEAS ¬ß812 and its three best ideas folded into this piece's README as cycle-3 deepenings. Safety: no strobe ‚ÄĒ all motion is slow advective drift well under 3 Hz, peak brightness clamped below white, `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. Named refs: Chan *Lenia* ¬∑ Plantec et al. *Flow-Lenia* (arXiv:2212.07906 + 2506.08569) ¬∑ *Leniabreeder* (arXiv:2406.04235). NOT eye/ear-verified in a browser this cycle (headless) ‚ÄĒ tuning constants reasoned, not stopwatch-tuned.**

### [1910-ten-fingers](/dream/1910-ten-fingers) ¬∑ adult ¬∑ **a chord instrument that speaks REAL functional harmony ‚ÄĒ cashes jury 2026-07-17 head-on: #1 (ban the pentatonic ‚Üí force functional harmony that modulates and bites), #2 (break the violet monoculture ‚Üí cold Ikeda graphite), #3 (build something DEAD without a human ‚Üí total silence until a finger lands). The 06:30-reviewability paradox resolved: the touch piece is BOTH the most human-required AND the most reliably phone-demoable ‚ÄĒ no camera permission, no CDN model, no lighting/standing-back** ¬∑ **MULTITOUCH (Pointer Events, up to 10 fingers, phone-native; mouse = one finger) ‚ÄĒ NOT mic (jury-banned 7√ó), NOT camera, NOT self-playing (jury-banned ~11√ó): no autopilot path exists in the code** / **SVG-DOM (real `<rect>`/`<line>`/`<polyline>`/`<circle>`/`<text>` elements, attributes mutated per-frame in one rAF loop ‚ÄĒ grows the minority substrate the jury named; NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned 4√ó), NOT WebGL/WebGPU, NOT three.js)** ¬∑ cycle 813 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: playable functional-harmony instrument ¬∑ harmony: real diatonic functions + secondary dominants + modulation + voice-leading (NOT pentatonic ‚ÄĒ jury-banned) ¬∑ palette: cold graphite Ikeda monochrome (NOT violet-on-black ‚ÄĒ jury-banned)`

**A glass chord instrument you play with up to ten fingers that speaks real tonal harmony ‚ÄĒ press a cell to voice a diatonic function, hold several to conduct a progression, drag to glissando between chords, and it stays a silent, still, cold lattice until a real finger touches it.** The jury's 2026-07-17 verdict named three new invisible monocultures the theme-audit never catches ‚ÄĒ **one color** (violet-on-near-black ~12/15), **one scale** (everything de-risks to a pentatonic 6/15), and **one interaction model** (~11/15 play themselves with no human) ‚ÄĒ and asked, in three separate provocations, to change the color, the harmony, and make it need a human.
