This piece is the single most on-target answer to all three at once. **The tonal engine** (`harmony.ts`): a `Key = {tonicPc, mode}` drives a 4-column √ó 3-row matrix of 12 chords laid out by FUNCTION ‚ÄĒ Tonic / Predominant / Dominant / Applied columns ‚ÄĒ with the full diatonic set (I ii iii IV V V7 vi vii¬į ii7 in major; i ii¬į III iv V7 VI vii¬į ii√ł7 in minor, harmonic-minor V) **plus three real secondary dominants** (V/V, V/vi, V/IV) for chromatic bite, and a two-cell **modulation strip** that pivots the whole grid up a fifth (‚Üí dominant) or to the relative minor/major ‚ÄĒ so the labels and pitches transpose live. **Voice-leading is the core:** each new chord is voiced by `voiceLead()`, which snaps each of 4 voices to the *nearest* chord tone of the target, so held‚Üínew transitions glide and common tones are held rather than leaping ‚ÄĒ and the audio simply `setTargetAtTime`-glides voice *i* from its old pitch to its new one (the portamento "bite"). A `<polyline>` "ribbon" over a C3/C4/C5 staff renders those 4 voices as a morphing line you can watch voice-lead. **Audio** (`audio.ts`, Web Audio, equal temperament ‚ÄĒ the point here is FUNCTION, not just intonation): each press spawns a 4-voice triangle+sine group through highpass‚Üílowpass‚Üícompressor + a soft feedback delay; silent until a gesture resumes the context; every held voice releases on pointer-up. **Interaction** (Pointer Events with pointer-capture, `touch-action: none`): one finger or ten, drag across cells to glissando with voice-leading, press a mod cell to change key ‚ÄĒ and **with no pointer down there is total silence and a still, labeled graphite grid; there is deliberately no self-playing path.** **Palette:** cold graphite/charcoal ground, near-white ink, a single hairline, active cells invert to near-white ‚ÄĒ Ikeda's cold precise data-grid, one of the two color worlds (with 1810's monochrome) the jury explicitly named as unbuilt escapes from violet. **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ‚Č•3 subsystems (functional-harmony engine + voice-leading solver + multitouch pointer model + Web-Audio poly-voice glide synth + SVG-DOM render/animation) + #3 named reference (Ryoji Ikeda *data.matrix* for the cold grid; Toshio Iwai *Electroplankton*/*Tenori-on* for touch-as-instrument) + #5 same-day ¬ß813 research dive (MediaPipe/touch input maturity as the lever to break the self-playing monoculture). #1 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ touch + SVG + functional harmony each exist somewhere in the lab; the win is the *combination* aimed precisely at the jury's three live bans, not a lab-first technique. **Safety:** no strobe, no flicker ‚ÄĒ the only motion is a gentle ribbon glide and 110ms cell fades. **2 more explored this cycle** (WIDE fan, banked in IDEAS ¬ß813): ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1908-glasswind` (MediaPipe hands play a just-intonation harmonic-series air-column as Chladni sumi-ink standing waves on warm paper in a WebGL2 shader ‚ÄĒ the freshest *visual*, ship-next) and ‚≠ź `1912-limbs` (full-body MediaPipe pose ‚Üí an inharmonic spectral cluster as a luminous three.js line-skeleton, high-chroma cyan/amber). **NOT eye/ear-verified in a browser this cycle** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/touch/speakers): whether the voice-leading glides read as musical, whether the chord voicings are well-balanced, and whether ten-finger play stays coherent all want Karel's phone.

### [1916-slime-cantor](/dream/1916-slime-cantor) ¬∑ adult ¬∑ **a living slime-mold (Physarum) transport network you COMPOSE with by dropping food-nodes with your fingers ‚ÄĒ and the emergent network's TOPOLOGY is the harmony. DEEP-mode winner (cycle 814): ONE massively-bigger concept attacked via 3 substrates, shipped the strongest. Physarum is one of the most-loved creative-coding techniques yet was grep-0√ó in this ~769-proto lab, and almost always built as autonomous wallpaper ‚ÄĒ this inverts it: the network's connectivity IS the music and the human is the composer. Cashes the diversity audit on every axis (WebGPU-compute 0√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ the cleanest substrate dodge; NOT WebGL2 which is banned 6√ó/10; NOT Flow-Lenia which is at 3√ó and would trip a 4th; NOT pentatonic/violet/autonomous/mic). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 1928-slime-consort (three.js topology-events-as-modulation) + ‚≠ź 1922-slime-loom (WebGL2 JI-from-geometry).** ¬∑ **INPUT = MULTITOUCH food-node placement (Pointer Events, up to 10 fingers, `touch-action:none`, pointer-capture; mouse = one finger) ‚ÄĒ human-load-bearing: with no nodes there is only a formless static wash, no harmonic structure; the music requires your placement. NOT mic (jury 7√ó), NOT camera, NOT pointer-paint (near-banned 4√ó), NOT autonomous (jury ~11√ó)** / **OUTPUT = WebGPU COMPUTE (WGSL): ~260k agents / 1024¬≤ field (60k/512¬≤ reduced-motion) in a storage buffer ‚ÄĒ `move` (sense 3 offsets ‚Üí rotate ‚Üí step ‚Üí atomic deposit, the Jones model), `diffuse` (3√ó3 blur + decay + stationary food chemoattractant, ping-ponged), `edges` (samples freshest trail along each node-pair segment into an 8√ó8 readback), fullscreen `render`; device-lost handled; full Canvas2D Physarum fallback feeding the IDENTICAL harmony pipeline so it's never blank. WebGPU-compute is 0√ó/10 in the diversity window and repeatedly flagged "STILL 0√ó" across ~20 juries ‚ÄĒ this finally lands a real WebGPU-compute winner. NOT WebGL2 (banned 6√ó/10), NOT Canvas2D-primary (jury 4√ó)** ¬∑ cycle 814 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-18) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: a Physarum transport network sonified by its own topology ¬∑ harmony: graph-Laplacian eigenvalue "connectome harmonics" ‚ÄĒ the network's natural modes, freq ‚ąĚ ‚ąöőĽ, continuous & NON-pentatonic (jury-banned), morphs as the slime rewires ¬∑ palette: dark-field bio microscopy ‚ÄĒ amber/chartreuse veins & coral food-seeds on a deep SATURATED teal agar (NON-violet, NON-near-black) ¬∑ needs-a-human: harmony gated on finger placement (formless wash otherwise)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ ref Physarum polycephalum ¬∑ Jeff Jones 2010 (deposit/sense/rotate agent model) ¬∑ Tero et al. *Science* 2010 (near-optimal transport / Tokyo-rail) ¬∑ Sage Jenson (mxsage) *Physarum* ¬∑ spectral graph theory / Atasoy connectome harmonics ¬∑ ShaderVine (2026-04-12, ¬ß814 dive)

**Drop food with your fingers and hear the shape of a living network.** DEEP-mode winner of a 3-approach fan at ONE concept ‚ÄĒ a **Physarum slime-mold transport network whose emergent topology is the harmony**. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** **#1** never-used-in-lab technique (agent-based **Physarum**, grep-0√ó across ~769 protos) + **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (WGSL-compute agent sim + human food-placement + GPU edge-sampling + CPU graph-Laplacian eigen-harmony + additive render) + **#3** named refs (Jones/Tero/Jenson/Atasoy/ShaderVine) + **#5** same-day ¬ß814 dive. **The harmony brain** (`graph.ts`): the placed food-nodes + slime-detected edges form a small weighted graph; every ~200‚Äď300 ms its **graph Laplacian L = D ‚ąí W** is diagonalized by cyclic **Jacobi eigen-iteration** (n‚Č§8), and the eigenvalues become oscillator frequencies via **freq ‚ąĚ ‚ąöőĽ** (the direct analogue of a drum head's modes ‚ÄĒ spectral graph theory / "connectome harmonics") mapped *continuously* to log-pitch ‚ÄĒ no scale quantization anywhere, so the chord morphs as the slime rewires; new edges ring soft bells, broken edges damp. **The sim** (`gpu.ts`): a genuine WGSL-compute Physarum ‚ÄĒ agents sense/rotate/step/atomic-deposit onto a trail that ping-pong diffuses & decays, food nodes inject chemoattractant so veins route between them (Tero's optimal transport). **Needs a human by construction:** with no connected nodes there's no graph ‚Üí no harmonic structure, only a quiet formless wash (`audio.ts`, master ‚Č§0.18 via DynamicsCompressor, 1 s fade-in, silent until first gesture). **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2 OUTPUT(6√ó/10) ¬∑ Flow-Lenia(3√ó‚Üíno 4th) ¬∑ pentatonic(jury 6√ó) ¬∑ violet(jury ~12√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D-primary(jury 4√ó) ¬∑ autonomous(jury ~11√ó) ¬∑ mic(jury 7√ó)]`; `picked=[WebGPU-compute(0√ó/10) ¬∑ multitouch food-placement ¬∑ Physarum+graph-spectral harmony ¬∑ dark-field teal/amber bio palette]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ slow luminance drift, peak below white, reduced-motion drops 260k‚Üí60k agents. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` = 0; `eslint --max-warnings 0` on the folder = 0; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = EXIT 0, route in both manifests, `page.js` 51.5 kB. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/display/speakers): the builder honestly flagged it *could not execute a WebGPU frame*, so WGSL bind-group/ping-pong parity is the one first-run risk (`EDGE_THRESHOLD=0.22` + food/decay knobs if veins read as always/never connected) ‚ÄĒ mitigated by the Canvas2D fallback feeding the same harmony pipeline; whether 260k-agent perf holds on a phone and whether the eigen-drone reads as musical want Karel's browser. Two more explored this fire ‚ÄĒ **‚≠ź‚≠ź 1928-slime-consort** (three.js filament graph; union-find components ‚Üí MERGE = a real modulation, SPLIT = a suspension; the most legible musical story, ship-next) + **‚≠ź 1922-slime-loom** (WebGL2 JI-from-geometry intervals; most iOS-robust but WebGL2 banned 6√ó/10 this cycle) ‚ÄĒ banked in IDEAS ¬ß814 (built demoable, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1916-slime-cantor/README.md`

### [1966-alpha-reset](/dream/1966-alpha-reset) ¬∑ adult / psychedelic ¬∑ **audio-file-drop + deterministic generative carrier (audio-as-carrier ‚ÄĒ NOT mic, NOT touch/pointer, NOT the recent tilt/camera/MIDI; explicitly NOT a memory piece)** / **three.js full-screen fragment `ShaderMaterial` over the shared log-polar / form-constant engine (`_shared/psych/logpolar.ts` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL`) ‚ÄĒ three.js was 1√ó in the last 10 (coldest GPU family), NOT Canvas2D, NOT raw-WebGL2** ¬∑ cycle 828 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-19) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: cross-modal auditory-reset of Kl√ľver form-constants ¬∑ pole: intense`
**Sound resets your visual cortex: each note in the music snaps a drifting, incoherent hallucinatory form-constant field into momentary crystalline coherence, then it dissolves back into visual snow.** WIDE-mode winner of a 3-explorer fire (cycle 828, 1 of 3 divergent altered-states directions). Returns the lab to its PRIMARY psychedelic direction (INTENSE pole) after a memory-instrument/data drift, and breaks the fresh **compositional-MEMORY monoculture** (5 of the last 10 ships ‚ÄĒ 1930/32/34/38/60 ‚ÄĒ were "your past gestures shape the present"; this is deliberately NOT one). **The mechanism (grep-0√ó as a weld):** a full-screen three.js `ShaderMaterial` renders four Kl√ľver form constants ‚ÄĒ **tunnels, spokes, spirals + a honeycomb lattice** ‚ÄĒ in cortical `(log r, őł)` space via the shared **Bressloff‚ÄďCowan log-polar engine** (`LOGPOLAR_GLSL`). Each layer carries its own **phase offset** (`uOff` vec4) that, left alone, **drifts at a slightly different rate** ‚Üí the layers fall out of registration, the average washes to flat gray, and the mandala smears into desaturated **visual snow** (incoherence). A **spectral-flux onset detector** (adaptive threshold = running mean + k¬∑std over ~0.7 s, rising-edge peak, 120 ms refractory) fires on each note attack and **RESETS the phase offsets toward their common centroid** ‚Üí the geometry momentarily LOCKS into a crisp iridescent mandala, then the incoherent drift pulls it apart again. Rhythmic/dense music keeps it coherent; sparse/quiet lets it dissolve. **Grounded in a REAL cross-modal finding** (evoked, not claimed medically): a brief sound phase-resets the ~10 Hz alpha rhythm of visual cortex (Romei et al. 2012) and the audiovisual binding window scales with individual alpha (Cecere et al. 2015). **INPUT:** drag-drop / file-picker any track (`decodeAudioData` ‚Üí looping source ‚Üí gain + Analyser fan-out) OR a built-in **deterministic seeded (`mulberry32`) pentatonic-arpeggio-over-drone carrier** scheduled off `ctx.currentTime`, whose attacks drive the onset detector so the coherence-snap is visible with **zero input, headless**. FFT bands ‚Üí neural-gain map: bass‚Üílog-polar warp depth + zoom, mids‚Üíform-constant freq, highs‚Üíkaleidoscope fold count + honeycomb detail, loudness‚Üísaturation/iridescence (IQ cosine palette + chromatic aberration). **The four wired subsystems** (ambition #2, exceeded ‚ÄĒ 5): audio-file decode/loop + spectral-flux onset detector + phase-reset/coherence controller + log-polar three.js shader + generative carrier. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (5) + **#3** named refs (Bressloff‚ÄďCowan ¬∑ Romei et al. 2012 "Sounds reset rhythms of visual cortex" ¬∑ Cecere et al. 2015 Current Biology). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ log-polar geometry + FFT‚Üíshader both exist in the lab; the fresh move is the cross-modal *phase-reset weld*, grep-0√ó as a mechanism but built on existing primitives. **#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the on-mechanism refs are foundational (2012/2015), not <14-day; honest, consistent with the saturation streak. **diversity:** `banned=[compositional-MEMORY technique (5√ó) ¬∑ touch/pointer (historically 6√ó, keep drained ‚ÄĒ 0√ó last 10)]`; `picked=[audio-file/generative-carrier INPUT (audio-as-carrier) ¬∑ three.js log-polar SHADER output (three.js coldest GPU family, 1√ó) ¬∑ auditory-phase-reset-of-form-constants TECHNIQUE (grep-0√ó weld, NOT a memory piece) ¬∑ neon-iridescent DMT PALETTE ¬∑ INTENSE psychedelic pole]` ‚ÄĒ clears the memory ban and re-centres the primary direction. **SAFETY (photosensitive):** the coherence-SNAP is a **spatial** pattern reorganization, NOT a brightness flash ‚ÄĒ onsets modulate only the phase offsets; the global `uGain` brightness envelope is **JS-slew-limited to ~0.25 s** so it cannot modulate in the 3‚Äď30 Hz band; visual snow is low-amplitude per-pixel grain (not synchronized full-screen flicker); `prefers-reduced-motion` reduces fold count, drift, and onset strength. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + three.js; audio-file decode is local, no network/secret; three@0.182 already a dep ‚ÄĒ zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `next lint --dir 1966-alpha-reset --max-warnings 0` = **0**; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (this cycle completed the full route legend ‚ÄĒ no EMFILE), `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted + `"/dream/1966-alpha-reset"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; losers 1968/1970 confirmed absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/audio-file; runtime GLSL compile can't be exercised without a GL context): whether the onset‚Üícoherence-snap reads as "the music crystallising the geometry," whether the drift-apart is legible vs merely noisy, and whether a dropped track drives it musically want Karel's Chrome; the shader was read line-by-line for GLSL-ES-1.00 legality and the deterministic carrier guarantees it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **‚≠ź‚≠ź `1968-clear-light`** (jhńĀna cosmic-ambient "dissolve into clear light" ‚ÄĒ the meditation-gap filler, resurrect on a WebGPU-compute cycle) + **‚≠ź `1970-tracer-loom`** (LSD ping-pong feedback tracers, played JI FM) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß828. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1966-alpha-reset/README.md`

### [1972-morphosong](/dream/1972-morphosong) ¬∑ psychedelic / WebGPU-compute reaction-diffusion ¬∑ **hum a living Turing-pattern organism into being: your pitch breeds a different morphology (maze‚ÜĒhoneycomb‚ÜĒcoral‚ÜĒspots), warped into psychedelic form-constants, and the field's own spatial statistics re-voice the drone ‚ÄĒ what swells on screen swells in your ears** ¬∑ **INPUT = mic HUM (autocorrelation pitch + RMS, dead-end analyser ‚ÄĒ non-touch, fresh) / seeded carrier** ¬∑ **OUTPUT = WebGPU-COMPUTE (jury's most-wanted 1√ó substrate ‚ÄĒ NOT WebGL2/three.js/Canvas2D-primary): WGSL 3-stage pipeline (Gray‚ÄďScott update ping-pong / stats-reduction readback / log-polar cortical render), Canvas2D reaction-diffusion fallback** ¬∑ cycle 829 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-19) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: psilocybin morphing-fractal bloom ¬∑ pole: intense`
WIDE-mode winner of a 3-explorer fire (1 of 3 non-touch √ó non-WebGL2 altered-states directions). **Mechanism:** a real **Gray‚ÄďScott reaction-diffusion** morphogenesis field runs in a WGSL **compute** shader (ping-pong storage buffers of [U,V], 5-point Laplacian); sung **pitch** steers feed/kill so different pitches breed different Turing morphologies (stripes/maze ‚ÜĒ honeycomb/holes ‚ÜĒ coral/worms ‚ÜĒ spots/mitosis) and **RMS** drives growth/bloom. A render pass warps V through the **log-polar cortical map** (Bressloff‚ÄďCowan) so the pattern reads as psychedelic form-constants, not a flat petri dish (warm psilocybin amber‚Üímagenta‚Üíviolet iridescence). **The see‚Čąhear weld:** each frame a GPU **stats reduction** reads the field's spatial statistics (mean V, variance, gradient) back and those set the amplitudes of an **inharmonic partial bank** ‚ÄĒ the organism's morphology literally re-voices the drone (the whole field, not a scalar ‚Üí pitch ‚ÄĒ the compositional model the jury said "hasn't moved in a month"). **Headless-safe:** the render loop runs from mount driven by a deterministic seeded carrier (pitch/energy = pure functions of an integer frame counter), and degrades to an animated **Canvas2D** RD field if `navigator.gpu` is absent, keeping the audio coupling alive ‚ÄĒ never blank/silent. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5:** **#2** ‚Č•3 subsystems (mic pitch/RMS + WGSL-compute Gray‚ÄďScott + GPU stats-reduction + log-polar render + inharmonic re-voicing = 5) + **#3** named refs (Turing *The Chemical Basis of Morphogenesis* 1952 ¬∑ Gray‚ÄďScott ¬∑ Bressloff‚ÄďCowan). **#1/#5 NOT claimed** ‚ÄĒ the fresh axis is the *combination* (hum-bred RD morphology in cortical space, field-statistics re-voicing), grep-0√ó as a weld built on existing primitives. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch(6√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-primary(7√ó) ¬∑ autonomous-self-playing(6√ó) ¬∑ Flow-Lenia/continuous-CA(3√ó) ¬∑ three.js/camera/tilt(recent) ¬∑ compositional-MEMORY(5/10)]`; `picked=[mic-HUM INPUT ¬∑ WebGPU-COMPUTE output(1√ó, jury's ask) ¬∑ hum-bred-Gray‚ÄďScott-in-cortical-space + field-statistics-re-voicing TECHNIQUE(grep-0√ó weld; Gray‚ÄďScott is discrete-species RD, NOT continuous-CA/Lenia) ¬∑ warm-psilocybin PALETTE ¬∑ INTENSE pole]` ‚ÄĒ clears every ban on every axis. **Love-signal:** inside Karel's loved generative-audio-reactive-form cluster (`1450-supershape-bloom`‚Ě§ `1396-apophenia-field`‚Ě§ `243-spectral-cloud`‚Ě§ `267-spectral-drift`‚Ě§). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ RD morphs are inherently slow, only <3 Hz luminance drift, `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the clock + thins detail. **No API route ‚Üí no guard** (pure `"use client"` WebGPU + Web Audio; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `next lint --dir 1972-morphosong --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 in 1972; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` + client-reference-manifest emitted + route in BOTH manifests; losers 1974/1976 absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/mic/display/speakers): the live WGSL compute path is unrun here (WGSL written to spec + layouts hand-checked; Canvas2D fallback IS the low-risk headless path); whether the hum‚Üímorphology‚Üíre-voice loop reads as *one organism you sing into* wants Karel's Chrome + a mic. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź `1974-threshold-loom` (Canvas2D keyboard-cadence hypnagogic ganzfeld ‚ÄĒ cosmic-ambient pole rebalance) + ‚≠ź `1976-k-hole` (SVG gamepad ketamine AV-desync) ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß829. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1972-morphosong/README.md`
### [1984-stretched-choir](/dream/1984-stretched-choir) ¬∑ adult / xenharmonic ¬∑ **a playable STRETCHED-SPECTRUM instrument: every voice's partials are pulled progressively sharp (partial n at f0¬∑n^ő≤, ő≤=log2(stretch)) ‚ÄĒ the Railsback piano-tuning stretch generalised ‚ÄĒ and the playing scale is derived from the SAME stretch, so per Sethares (matched timbre‚ÜĒscale minimises dissonance) chords lock into an eerie glassy consonance that is detuned from equal temperament yet in tune with its own timbre. Drag the pseudo-octave stretch (1.98‚Üí2.12) while holding a chord and consonance MELTS and RE-FORMS live (numerically validated: matched triad Sethares roughness 0.339 vs mismatched 0.410 at stretch 2.10). WIDE-winner (cycle 831): 3 divergent explorers, shipped the one that puts the invention IN THE HARMONY ‚ÄĒ the jury's central ¬ß831 ask ("a harmonic model that isn't the JI drone"). Directly answers jury provocation #2 (force a non-JI harmonic model); NOT the banned [1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2] partial stack. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 1982-droplet-cairn (audio-first/haptic impact music, cashes today's SIGGRAPH 2026 finding) + ‚≠ź 1980-tritave-loom (Bohlen‚ÄďPierce editable weave, SVG-DOM).** ¬∑ **INPUT = Web MIDI (`requestMIDIAccess`, live keyboard ‚ÄĒ Karel's live-performance lane) with on-screen + computer-keyboard (a w s e d f t g y h u j k) fallback; feature-detected, degrades silently ‚ÄĒ NOT mic/tilt/camera/touch** / **OUTPUT = CSS COMPOSITOR: every sounding partial is a real radial-gradient DOM `<div>` with `mix-blend-mode: screen`, opacity-pulsed at its true acoustic beat rate via rAF ‚ÄĒ the shimmer IS the browser compositor blending translucent layers; NO canvas, NO WebGL, NO WebGPU (banned 5√ó), NO SVG-primary, NO Canvas2D-primary (4√ó). CSS-compositor was 1√ó/10 ‚ÄĒ the cleanest substrate dodge.** ¬∑ cycle 831 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-19) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `theme: stretched/inharmonic spectral choir ‚ÄĒ consonance redefined by timbre (Sethares matched timbre‚ÜĒscale); a live stretch slider melts & re-forms it ¬∑ harmony: stretched-partial additive (ő≤=log2(stretch)) over a stretched 12-EDO of the pseudo-octave ‚ÄĒ NON-JI, NON-octave, NON-pentatonic ¬∑ palette: bone/ash/warm-white luminous voices on charcoal (NON-violet, NON-cosmic) ¬∑ needs-a-human: fully playable, no autonomous wallpaper` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs William Sethares *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* (1998) ¬∑ the Railsback curve (piano octave stretch) ¬∑ Wendy Carlos non-octave tunings (alpha/beta/gamma)

### [2086-bell-vault](/dream/2086-bell-vault) ¬∑ instrument / physical-modeling ¬∑ **a cathedral of struck & bowed metal you PLAY ‚ÄĒ every strike is a real dispersive resonant BODY voiced by banded-waveguide / modal physical-modeling synthesis, never a canned bell sample. WIDE-winner (cycle 848), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. The cleanest cash of the jury 2026-07-20 #3 provocation ‚ÄĒ "ban the Chladni glass-plate bell `1, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93` as the default strike; any struck event must use a DIFFERENT engine (Karplus‚ÄďStrong / waveguide physical modeling)": here the invention IS the sound (each mode's ring is the resonator's OWN decay `ŌĄ = Q/ŌÄf`, so higher modes damp faster exactly like real metal), the lab's standing weak spot (jury praised `1984-stretched-choir` as "the antidote: the invention IS the pitch material" ‚ÄĒ this applies that to STRUCK sound). Dead-center Karel's actual product (a playable expressive instrument for a pianist). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2090-solar-veil (real-time NOAA space-weather ‚Üí aurora you can hear, Karplus strikes, ship-next) + ‚≠ź 2088-gyroid-drift (WebGPU-compute volumetric gyroid drift).** ¬∑ **INPUT = keyboard (`A S D F G H J K L ; '` ‚Üí two-octave bronze minor-pentatonic; Shift = BOW that body ‚ÄĒ continuous filtered-noise into the same bank so it sings) + device-tilt strum (`deviceorientation.gamma` sweeps/arpeggiates the row, tilt-speed = velocity); an on-screen note row mirrors it for pointer ‚ÄĒ but the expressive inputs are keys + tilt. NOT pointer-drag (jury-banned 5√ó), NOT mic (near-over-used 4√ó).** ¬∑ **OUTPUT = Canvas2D** (jury-CELEBRATED back-on after the GPU-ban self-correction; **NOT SVG-DOM**, jury-banned 4√ó) ‚ÄĒ a modal-spectrum visualizer that draws the ACTUAL live per-mode energy: each partial a decaying bar, height = that mode's energy, X = frequency (log axis), so you SEE the dispersion + decay you hear (bars read the same `ŌĄ` the ears do). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = modal / banded-waveguide synthesis** ‚ÄĒ a bank of high-Q `BiquadFilter` bandpass resonators (one per vibrational mode) excited by a raised-cosine noise burst through a per-body dispersion allpass + seeded jitter; strike AND bow share the bank. Per-material INHARMONIC partial sets, all hand-derived, **NONE the banned Chladni set**: bronze bar `1¬∑3.98¬∑10.68¬∑17.9`, singing bowl `1¬∑2.66¬∑4.97¬∑7.36¬∑10.2` (+ ~7¬Ę beating twin fundamental), bronze plate `1¬∑2.31¬∑3.79¬∑5.44¬∑7.18¬∑9.10`. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ after ~8 s idle a seeded (mulberry32 `0x2086`) phrase plays itself so the screen/speakers are never dead; a real key/tilt takes over instantly. ¬∑ cycle 848 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-21) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: n/a (instrument, not altered-states) ¬∑ pole: n/a ¬∑ harmony: bronze minor-pentatonic over inharmonic modal partials ‚ÄĒ struck+bowed, engine is banded-waveguide/modal (explicitly NOT the Chladni bell) ¬∑ palette: warm bronze / patina on near-black (art-layer only; chrome stays semantic-token) ¬∑ needs-a-human: keys/tilt + speakers (autopilot self-demos)` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs **Georg Essl & Perry R. Cook, "Banded Waveguides: Towards Physical Modeling of Bar Percussion Instruments" (ICMC 1999)** + Perry Cook's STK modal models. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: physical-modeling voice engine + playing surface [keys/tilt/material] + Canvas2D modal-spectrum viz + convolver-reverb room bed = 4) ¬∑ #3 (Essl‚ÄďCook banded waveguides / STK) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß848 dive, same date ‚ÄĒ the DATALAND+banded-waveguide anchor). #1 NOT cleanly claimed ‚ÄĒ "banded waveguide" is *named* in one prior README (`1676-tabla-loom`) so by the letter it doesn't count, though this is the first *playable modal instrument* built around it. **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2086-bell-vault(win) ¬∑ 2090-solar-veil(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, three.js space-weather aurora) ¬∑ 2088-gyroid-drift(banked ‚≠ź, WebGPU volumetric). **NOT ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no speakers): the physical-modeling timbre, gain-staging (tuned analytically, compressor-limited so it can't run away), and the bow swell are reasoned + compile/lint-verified only; whether the three materials read as distinct and musical wants Karel's speakers. Two more explored & banked (IDEAS ¬ß848).

### [2080-exo-vantage](/dream/2080-exo-vantage) ¬∑ psychedelic / out-of-body ¬∑ **leave your body ‚ÄĒ a drug-free OUT-OF-BODY EXPERIENCE induced by decoupling what you SEE from what your inner ear (the phone's motion sensor) reports. Tilt your phone; as the visual-vestibular mismatch accumulates the camera detaches from inside a luminous point-cloud body-schema and floats up-and-behind, so you literally watch "your own" body from outside and above; hold still and you sink back in. DEEP-winner (cycle 847), 1 of 3 approaches to ONE concept (the OBE/DPDR dissociation spectrum). Cashes the jury's #1 (psychedelic, fresh state + fresh technique) with a state the lab has NEVER induced ‚ÄĒ dissociation's *uncanny/hyper-specific* pole, the opposite of the cosmic-dissolution it usually reaches for. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2084-echo-self (Canvas2D delayed-doppelg√§nger depersonalization, ship-next) + ‚≠ź 2082-unreal-veil (WebGL2 derealization veil).** ¬∑ **INPUT = DeviceOrientationEvent** (beta/gamma/alpha ‚Üí tilt; first reading calibrates a resting baseline so any comfortable hold becomes "level"; iOS `requestPermission()` on Begin, denial ‚Üí arrow-keys + on-brand `text-destructive` note; **NO pointer (jury-banned 5√ó), NO mic (near-over-used 4√ó)** ‚ÄĒ device-motion is the honest vestibular analog); **a seeded auto-drift ghost** wanders tilt + pumps/relaxes the mismatch so the whole detachment self-demos with zero sensor. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = three.js** (jury-CELEBRATED back-on after the GPU-ban self-correction; **NOT SVG-DOM**, jury-banned 4√ó) ‚ÄĒ a glowing point-cloud humanoid *presence* in a spare floor-and-fog room; the camera eases first-person‚Üíthird-person on the detachment scalar; WebGL-unavailable ‚Üí on-brand notice. ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = visual-vestibular decoupling ‚Üí camera self-displacement** (the felt split induced by lagging/detaching the view from the real tilt ‚ÄĒ Cento 2026's integration-failure mechanism made a camera move; distinct from the *illusion-made-audible* cluster the jury banned ‚ÄĒ this is an embodied induction, not a classic illusion sonified). ¬∑ **AUDIO = derealization signature** ‚ÄĒ two drone-bank beds: a DRY present voice and a DETACHED "recording of itself" (detuned ‚ąí28¬Ę, cotton-wool lowpass, slap-delay, mono-collapsed); equal-power crossfade dry‚Üídetached as you leave the body, so your own sound-world becomes something happening to someone else; master ‚Č§0.28; NO struck Chladni bell (jury-banned); AudioContext closed + listeners removed on unmount. ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ the seeded ghost makes the detachment visible + audible with no sensor; a real tilt/key takes over instantly. ¬∑ cycle 847 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-20) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: out-of-body / depersonalization ¬∑ pole: intense/dissociative ¬∑ harmony: none ‚ÄĒ drones/tones only, NO struck events ¬∑ palette: DRAINED / derealized bone-grey ‚Üí sickly amber (NOT cosmic teal-magenta, NOT violet) ¬∑ needs-a-human: tilt (ghost self-demos) ¬∑ nearest-neighbor: 1944-vestibular-dissolve does gravity-MELT; this does self-DISPLACEMENT` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs Cento, Gammeri et al. *J. Vestibular Research* 2026 (doi:10.1177/09574271251412707) ¬∑ Lenggenhager/Metzinger/Blanke "Video ergo sum" *Science* 2007 ¬∑ Blanke & Metzinger 2009. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: orientation/mismatch engine + three.js OBE-camera scene + dry/detached crossfade audio + SafeFlicker) ¬∑ #3 (Cento 2026 + Video-ergo-sum) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß847 dive, same date). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 2080-exo-vantage(win) ¬∑ 2084-echo-self(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, Canvas2D depersonalization) ¬∑ 2082-unreal-veil(banked ‚≠ź, WebGL2 derealization). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no GPU/motion-sensor/speakers): the three.js OBE render, the camera-detachment cadence, and the dry‚ÜĒdetached audio balance are reasoned + compile/lint-verified only; whether the float-out reads as "leaving your body" vs a drifting orbit, and whether the detached voice reads as "a recording of me," want Karel's phone (tilt) + speakers. Two more explored & banked (IDEAS ¬ß847).

### [2074-oneirogen](/dream/2074-oneirogen) ¬∑ psychedelic / hypnagogia ¬∑ **watch perception hand the wheel from the world to the dream ‚ÄĒ ONE dial (őĪ) morphs the whole audio-visual field from *reacting to what is actually there* into an *internally-generated hypnagogic replay* that no longer answers to any input. WIDE-winner (cycle 846), 1 of 3 divergent altered-states explorers; the cleanest today's-research‚Üítoday's-build chain (implements the oneirogen hypothesis, eLife 105968, VoR 2026-04-21) and the biggest concept of the fire ‚ÄĒ it makes the MECHANISM of hallucination a dial you turn, not just a trippy visual. Cashes the jury's #1 (top) provocation: re-center on the cosmic-ambient/altered-states pole (only 1 of 12 prior new pieces touched it; ~6 cycles overdue), with a FRESH state + FRESH technique, NOT the worn log-polar engine. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2070-nde-descent (NDE tunnel-to-light, ship-next) + ‚≠ź 2072-k-hole (ketamine long-form fall).** ¬∑ **INPUT = audio-file (drop any track / built-in pad; fully client-side decodeAudioData, no network ‚ÄĒ under-used 1√ó; lets Karel drop his own Path piano) ‚ÄĒ NOT pointer (jury-banned 5√ó), NOT mic (near-over-used 4√ó)** / **OUTPUT = Canvas 2D (curl-flow phosphene field, additive indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üílilac glows ‚ÄĒ jury-CELEBRATED back-on after the GPU-ban self-correction; NOT SVG-DOM (jury-banned 4√ó), NOT WebGL/three.js)** ¬∑ cycle 846 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: hypnagogia / oneiric drift ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ¬∑ harmony: none ‚ÄĒ soft drifting tonal pads, NO struck events (trivially clears the jury-banned Chladni bell) ¬∑ palette: cosmic indigo‚Üíviolet‚Üílilac phosphenes on near-black` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs the oneirogen hypothesis (eLife reviewed preprint 105968, VoR 2026-04-21) ¬∑ the Wake‚ÄďSleep algorithm's őĪ interpolation ¬∑ hypnagogic closed-eye-phosphene phenomenology

**A single dial that morphs your audio-visual field from tracking the world to dreaming its own replay.** WIDE-mode winner of a 3-explorer altered-states fire (cycle 846). **The őĪ mechanic:** at **őĪ=0 (wake)** an `AnalyserNode` FFT of the live sound (a dropped track or the built-in pad) splits into bass/mid/high bands that swell a *sensory* scalar potential; drifting curl-noise phosphene streams follow its curl and brighten with the sound ‚ÄĒ the field visibly TRACKS the audio. At **őĪ=1 (sleep)** the field DETACHES: it advects along an *autonomous* potential whose phases drift on their own sub-Hz clocks, and its swell is fed not by the live analyser but by a **256-slot memory ring** that recorded the world's energy while awake and now loops it back as a remembered motif ‚ÄĒ forms emerge from the field's own state, not the input. Between them is a smooth crossfade ‚ÄĒ the felt handoff ‚ÄĒ and őĪ changes both what you SEE (sensory flow ‚Üí autonomous replay) and what you HEAR (the live "world" bus fades out while a generative **replay pad**, a detuned voicing nudged by the same memory, fades in). An optional "let it drift under" toggle auto-ramps őĪ (~140 s round trip) to play hands-free; a live őĪ% readout labels the zone wake ¬∑ hypnagogia ¬∑ sleep. **Grounded in this cycle's research** (evoked, not claimed medically): the oneirogen hypothesis models classical-psychedelic and dream imagery as exactly this Wake‚ÄďSleep őĪ interpolation from bottom-up sensory inference to top-down internally-generated replay. **Audio** (`page.tsx`, Web Audio): starts silent; Begin resumes the context inside the click handler and lights a soft evolving 4-voice ambient pad so there is always sound; a dropped file (`File.arrayBuffer()`‚Üí`decodeAudioData`, local) ducks the pad and becomes the world the wake-field tracks; no struck/percussive/bell events anywhere. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 2/5:** **#5** implements a RESEARCH.md finding added this same cycle (oneirogen, VoR 2026-04-21) + **#3** named reference (the oneirogen hypothesis / Wake‚ÄďSleep őĪ) ‚ÄĒ with **#2** also arguable (live-FFT analyser + őĪ-interpolation/memory-ring state + Canvas2D curl-flow + generative replay-pad synth = 4 subsystems). #1 NOT claimed ‚ÄĒ the őĪ sensory‚ÜĒgenerative morph is a grep-0√ó *weld*, but curl-flow and FFT each exist somewhere in the lab; the win is the combination aimed at the jury's #1 pole gap and the size of the concept. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch input (5√ó) ¬∑ SVG-DOM output (4√ó) ¬∑ perceptual-illusion-made-audible technique (4√ó) ¬∑ Chladni bell 1/2.76/5.40/8.93]`; `picked=[audio-file input (1√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D output (celebrated back-on) ¬∑ őĪ-interpolated sensory‚ÜĒgenerative morph + memory-ring replay (NOT illusion-made-audible, NOT log-polar) ¬∑ none-harmony drifting pads ¬∑ cosmic-ambient hypnagogic pole]` ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban and re-centres the primary psychedelic direction. **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; audio decode is local; zero new npm deps). **SAFETY (photosensitive):** no strobe ‚ÄĒ global luminance breath ~0.14 Hz, per-stream phosphenes fade gently over their lifetimes, a dissolving trail buffer (never a full-field clear/flash), all field phases + audio LFOs sub-Hz. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; folder builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0 + `eslint` 0; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (0 errors/warnings), `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted + `"/dream/2074-oneirogen"` in BOTH manifests; losers 2070/2072 absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/audio-file): the FFT band-mapping, the wake‚ÜĒsleep crossfade balance, and whether the "replay looks + sounds different from live" contrast reads want Karel's browser; it degrades gracefully (built-in pad ‚Üí always sound; field runs with no file / no audio device). Banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß846): **‚≠ź‚≠ź 2070-nde-descent** (device-motion WebGL2 volumetric-raymarch NDE tunnel-to-light ‚ÄĒ the most transporting, ship-next) + **‚≠ź 2072-k-hole** (autonomous three.js ketamine long-form fall that dilates over minutes). Design notes: `src/app/dream/2074-oneirogen/README.md`

### [2130-entity-parliament](/dream/2130-entity-parliament) ¬∑ psychedelic / DMT entity-encounter ¬∑ **a DMT-style entity encounter you PLAY ‚ÄĒ a ring of ~11 benevolent guide-beings that OPEN their jeweled mandala-eyes and turn their gaze toward YOU as you hold Bohlen‚ÄďPierce chords; hold more voices and the structure BUILDS (a tritave drone swells, a central mandala assembles, a PRESENCE arrives). WIDE-winner (cycle 854), 1 of 3 INTENSE/played explorers. The direct answer to the 2026-07-21 jury's two top provocations: #1 "make the next altered-states piece PLAYED, not watched, multi-parameter" and #2 "kill the dissolution monotheme ‚ÄĒ build the ENTITY / presence-arrives pole." Tightest research‚Üíbuild chain of the fire: the entity phenomenology (encounters in ~45.5% of DMT experiences, benevolent, ~32.4% guide-type, core report = being *attended to*) IS the interaction model. Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2134-presence-in-the-dark (audio-only HRTF presence, ship-next on headphones) + ‚≠ź 2132-jubilation-lattice (voice‚Üíthree.js Sethares crystal bloom).** ¬∑ **INPUT = computer keyboard (home+top row = a contiguous run of Bohlen‚ÄďPierce steps, always-on polyphonic) + Web MIDI (graceful bonus, continuous velocity); pointer = attention-locus only (where the beings look) ‚ÄĒ genuinely multi-parameter: key-COUNT‚Üíring awakening + presence swell, chord SHAPE (distinct BP pitch-classes)‚Üímandala N-fold symmetry, chord SPAN‚Üímandala radius, velocity‚Üíeye openness/pupil/brightness. NOT one master knob (breaks the jury-banned single-scalar-morph). NOT autonomous (breaks the jury-banned no-live-input play model).** ¬∑ **OUTPUT = Canvas2D (jury-celebrated back-on / healthy; explicitly NOT WebGL2-fullscreen-fragment-shader (jury-banned 4√ó), NOT three.js (GPU 8/15 being cooled), NOT SVG-DOM).** ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = agent-based collective ‚ÄĒ boid-like gaze-convergence steering (each being eases its gaze toward the shared attention point, convergence tightens as presence rises) + procedural Kl√ľver-form-constant mandala-eyes (tunnel/spiral/cobweb/lattice) with dilating pupils that offset toward you + a shared central mandala whose symmetry = your chord.** ¬∑ **AUDIO = additive odd-harmonic (clarinet-like) `PeriodicWave` voices on the Bohlen‚ÄďPierce scale (13-ED of the tritave 3:1, step 3^(1/13); NOT pentatonic, NOT a JI stack ‚ÄĒ retires the harmonic regression two juries flagged + jury-banned again 2026-07-21), one being singing per held note, a presence drone bus that swells with polyphony, compressor/limiter; nodes cleaned on unmount.** ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ a seeded (mulberry32, not Math.random) autopilot gently sounds a few beings after ~4s of silence and yields instantly on first keypress, so the page is never dead. ¬∑ cycle 854 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-21) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: DMT entity-encounter ¬∑ pole: intense / ecstatic (presence ARRIVES, not dissolution) ¬∑ harmony: Bohlen‚ÄďPierce (non-octave, odd-harmonic) ¬∑ palette: jeweled violet‚Üígold on dark ¬∑ needs-a-human: keyboard/MIDI (autopilot self-demos) ¬∑ nearest-neighbor: 1770-dmt-hyperbolic renders DMT GEOMETRY (watched); this is a played entity ENCOUNTER` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs Michael, Luke & Robinson *Scientific Reports* 2022 (s41598-022-11999-8) ¬∑ inhaled-DMT phenomenology PMC9130218 ¬∑ Kl√ľver form-constants ¬∑ McKenna "self-transforming machine elves" ¬∑ a 2026 falsifiable-entity-test framework. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: BP synth engine + agent-based steering sim + Kl√ľver mandala renderer + presence-drone bus + MIDI) ¬∑ #3 (named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß854 dive, same date ‚ÄĒ the entity phenomenology). #1 NOT claimed (agent-steering + form-constants each exist somewhere in the ~1000-piece lab; the win is the combination + the size of the concept). **diversity:** `banned` = jury-2026-07-21 [autonomous/no-live-input play model (~5√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-fullscreen-fragment-shader output (4√ó) ¬∑ single-scalar phenomenology-morph technique (~7√ó) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient DISSOLUTION content (4-straight) ¬∑ pentatonic/just-pentatonic harmony] + last-10 audit [WebGL2-raymarch, cosmic-violet-void]; `picked` = [keyboard/MIDI PLAYED input ¬∑ Canvas2D output ¬∑ agent-based gaze-convergence technique ¬∑ Bohlen‚ÄďPierce harmony ¬∑ INTENSE entity-encounter (presence arrives) vibe] ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2130-entity-parliament(win) ¬∑ 2134-presence-in-the-dark(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, audio-only HRTF) ¬∑ 2132-jubilation-lattice(banked ‚≠ź, three.js voice-bloom). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ the only pulse is an opt-in, off-by-default `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` glow (‚Č§3 Hz, prefers-reduced-motion honored); awakening is slow luminance drift. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; both losers self-reported `tsc`+`eslint` clean then `rm -rf`'d (never committed); authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (only warning is the pre-existing unrelated `1085-lightning-organ/hands.ts` critical-dependency expression), `/dream/2130-entity-parliament` in the route tree, `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/speakers/keyboard/MIDI): the Canvas2D render, the gaze-convergence cadence, the BP timbre + drone balance, and whether the beings read as "attending to you" vs. a spinning mandala are reasoned + compile/lint-verified only; degrades gracefully (autopilot self-demos with no input, keyboard works without MIDI). Design notes: `src/app/dream/2130-entity-parliament/README.md`

### [2142-breath-loom](/dream/2142-breath-loom) ¬∑ psychedelic / pranayama-ascension ¬∑ **an altered-states instrument with NO buttons and NO screen to watch ‚ÄĒ you play it entirely with your BREATH, and the sound is a biofeedback loop that rewards slow, coherent breathing by resolving from harsh inharmonic shimmer toward luminous consonance. WIDE-winner (cycle 856), 1 of 3 divergent embodied/audio-first explorers. The direct answer to the 2026-07-21 jury's #3 provocation: "name and stop the GPU-shader ping-pong ‚ÄĒ HOLD audio-only / embodied" (`2064-room-cairn` was the single instance + best-received shape of that window). Also cashes cycle 855's open question (deliberately work the audio-only/embodied lane) while being MORE phone-reviewable than the queued HRTF pieces ‚ÄĒ breath needs no headphones. Freshest INPUT in the ~1000-piece lab: breath-as-sole-input (prior "breath" pieces are kids pitch-flutes, never an adult altered-states biofeedback instrument). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2148-ganzfeld-well (eyes-closed HRTF hunt-by-ear void) + ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2154-bloom-cascade (Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion proliferation-as-JOY).** ¬∑ **INPUT = microphone BREATH-ENVELOPE** (the mic splits into a ~500 Hz lowpass analyser whose time-domain RMS is the breath envelope + a ~2.6 kHz highpass analyser for hiss; a slope + hysteresis state machine classifies inhale / hold / exhale / rest, adaptive floor/ceiling followers normalize per-room; NOT pitch, NOT blowing a flute ‚ÄĒ the SOLE input, one "Begin (needs mic)" gesture; **NOT pointer (jury-banned 5√ó), NOT autonomous/self-playing (jury-banned ~5√ó)** ‚ÄĒ breath is the honest embodied signal). ¬∑ **OUTPUT = audio-FIRST + haptic + dim Canvas2D** (guarded `navigator.vibrate()` pulses on phase transitions; a deliberately dim aurora ribbon, reduced-motion aware; **NOT a WebGL2 fullscreen fragment-shader (jury-banned 4√ó, GPU 8/15 being cooled), NOT three.js** ‚ÄĒ the screen is secondary, the piece lives in the ears + body). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = real Sethares stretched-partial bank** ‚ÄĒ two drone voices, each 7 partials at `f¬∑n^log2(A)`, A=2.10, every partial a detuned pair for audible beating; the migration targets are derived from an actual computed Plomp‚ÄďLevelt dissonance curve (consonance minimum sits at the *stretched* octave r=2.10 [diss 0.12] vs the harsh harmonic octave r=2.0 [0.33]) ‚ÄĒ **NOT pentatonic, NOT a JI stack, NOT Bohlen‚ÄďPierce** (BP now 3√ó in 2052/2130/2136 ‚ÄĒ jury re-banned pentatonic/JI; the lab's non-lattice harmony the jury said to reach for instead). ¬∑ **BIOFEEDBACK = the 2026 CHI Signal‚ÜíBiofeedback loop rendered as harmony** ‚ÄĒ coherence = slowness √ó regularity of breath periods, eased ~4 s, drives the consonance parameter: slower/steadier breathing migrates the interval 1.98‚Üí2.10 and calms the beat-detune 18¬Ę‚Üí1.5¬Ę toward the computed minimum. Inhale charges/fills, hold locks the shimmer, exhale releases a descending resonance ‚ÄĒ **ascension, not dissolution** (jury-banned dissolution monotheme, 4-straight). ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ "Demo without mic" drives the identical pipeline from a simulated slow breath cycle; mic denial auto-falls-back with a `text-destructive` note, so the page is always reviewable on a phone at 06:30. AudioContext created/resumed inside the click; full teardown of rAF/oscillators/stream/context on unmount. ¬∑ cycle 856 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-21) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: pranayama / holotropic breathwork ascension ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (non-dissolution ‚ÄĒ breath as BUILDING presence) ¬∑ input: mic breath-envelope (self-demo without mic) ¬∑ output: audio-first + haptic + dim Canvas2D ¬∑ technique: Sethares stretched-partial biofeedback ¬∑ harmony: Sethares stretched partials (A=2.10; NOT pentatonic/JI/BP) ¬∑ needs-a-human: breath (self-demos without mic) ¬∑ nearest-neighbor: 2064-room-cairn is the other audio-first/embodied piece (mic spectral-flux room impacts); this is breath-envelope biofeedback` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs the 2026 CHI paper "Enabling Adaptive Cardio-Respiratory Biofeedback Training on Ubiquitous Hand-Worn Devices" (two-loop model: Action-Cognition + Signal-Biofeedback) ¬∑ Sethares, *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* (1993, stretched-partial dissonance curves) ¬∑ Plomp‚ÄďLevelt (1965) roughness. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: breath-detection state machine + Sethares stretched-partial synth + coherence-biofeedback loop + haptic + dim-canvas viz) ¬∑ #3 (2026 CHI + Sethares/Plomp‚ÄďLevelt named refs) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß856 dive, same date ‚ÄĒ the 2026 CHI biofeedback paper). #1 NOT claimed as a lab-first technique (mic + Sethares each exist somewhere in ~1000 pieces; the win is breath-envelope-as-SOLE-input for an adult altered-states biofeedback instrument, unseen in the lab, + the size/freshness of the concept). **diversity:** `banned` = jury-2026-07-21 [autonomous/no-live-input (~5√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-fullscreen-fragment-shader (4√ó) ¬∑ single-scalar phenomenology-morph (~7√ó) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient DISSOLUTION content (4-straight) ¬∑ pentatonic/just-pentatonic/Bohlen‚ÄďPierce harmony]; `picked` = [mic breath-envelope PLAYED input ¬∑ audio-first + haptic + dim-Canvas2D output ¬∑ Sethares stretched-partial biofeedback technique ¬∑ non-lattice Sethares harmony ¬∑ cosmic-ambient ASCENSION (building, non-dissolution) vibe] ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2142-breath-loom(win) ¬∑ 2148-ganzfeld-well(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, audio-only HRTF Ganzfeld) ¬∑ 2154-bloom-cascade(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, Canvas2D Gray-Scott proliferation). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **SAFETY:** no strobe/flicker ‚ÄĒ the aurora is slow luminance drift, reduced-motion honored; audio-first with no full-field brightness flashing. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; both losers self-reported `tsc`+`eslint` clean then `rm -rf`'d (never committed); authoritative winner-only build ‚ÄĒ full TypeScript + ESLint ran clean (my file 0√ó in warnings/errors) and `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `/dream/2142-breath-loom` in the route tree + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted. The whole-repo default `npm run build` dies only at "Collecting page data" with `EMFILE: too many open files` ‚ÄĒ a hard 4096-fd sandbox cap across 800+ routes (can't be raised even as root), NOT a code defect and impossible on Vercel's higher-fd builder; same environment constraint prior cycles shipped under. **NOT ear/body-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no mic/speakers/haptics): breath detection is reasoned from mic RMS + hiss-ratio + adaptive normalization + dwell-hysteresis (the sim-breath fallback exercises the identical pipeline), and whether the coherence‚Üíconsonance resolution reads as "my breath is calming the sound" wants Karel's phone + real breathing. Design notes: `src/app/dream/2142-breath-loom/README.md`

### [2166-silent-lattice](/dream/2166-silent-lattice) ¬∑ psychedelic / ketamine k-hole ¬∑ **the dissociative "k-hole" rendered NOT as the self fading to void, but as a SWITCH you PLAY ‚ÄĒ a calm familiar isometric grid (your sensory-connected world) fragments region-by-region while a previously-invisible impossible Escher/Penrose machine (an alien architecture) IGNITES and assembles in its place, all in crisp real SVG-DOM vector line-work. DEEP-winner (cycle 857), 1 of 3 substrate approaches to one concept. The direct answer to the 2026-07-21 jury's #2 ("kill the dissolution monotheme ‚ÄĒ build the INTENSE pole; it named the k-hole's alien *architecture* as un-built") + #1 (PLAYED, multi-parameter) + #3 (stop the GPU-shader ping-pong ‚ÄĒ REVIVE the never-default SVG-DOM lane). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2160-khole-switch (three.js 3D machine, resurrect three.js-rested) + ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2172-dormant-engine (WebGPU-compute ~120k-neuron field + complete Canvas2D fallback, resurrect on a GPU-verifiable cycle that also cashes jury #4).** ¬∑ **INPUT = pointer / multi-touch PLAYED, 4 independent dimensions** ‚ÄĒ contact COUNT ‚Üí switch pressure (drives the slew-limited *dissociation-depth* follower `D`), contact X ‚Üí region / stereo pan, contact Y ‚Üí Sethares stretched-scale pitch, drag SPEED ‚Üí ignition sparks + metallic tick. NOT one master scalar (breaks the jury-banned single-scalar-morph), NOT autonomous (breaks the jury-banned no-live-input model). ¬∑ **OUTPUT = SVG-DOM** ‚ÄĒ every stroke a real `<line>`/`<path>`/`<circle>` element, bounded ~138-node pool created once + mutated per frame via refs (never create/destroy in the loop); the jury-celebrated recovering minority substrate (banned‚Üí2√ó, jury said REVIVE). Explicitly NOT WebGL2-fullscreen-fragment-shader (jury-banned 4√ó, GPU 8/15), NOT Canvas2D (last-10 audit ‚Č•4√ó), NOT three.js (GPU groove being cooled). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = the active‚ÜĒsilent SWITCH + played decoupling** ‚ÄĒ two co-located line-architectures cross-fade as `D` crosses ~0.4: the familiar iso-grid strokes fade in a left‚Üíright spatial sweep (`switchAt` staggered by x = motif fragmentation) while the impossible struts/Penrose-tribar beams ignite on the same sweep (reorganization, never a fade-to-void); past the switch the pointer‚Üístructure coupling DECOUPLES ‚ÄĒ the response marker slides from your true touch toward a warped alien-lattice node and a dashed link is drawn between them ("reality far off in the distance," the paper's signature made visible). ¬∑ **AUDIO = dual-bank Sethares stretched partials** ‚ÄĒ each voice an additive stack with partial n at `f‚āÄ¬∑n^log2(A)`; two banks crossfade with `D`: A=2.02 (warm, near-harmonic = the familiar world) ‚Üí A=2.30 (strongly stretched, metallic "machine"); the played scale itself stretches with `D`; a slow two-note drone bed underneath. NOT pentatonic, NOT a JI stack, NOT Bohlen‚ÄďPierce (the lab's non-lattice harmony the jury said to reach for instead). ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ after ~4s idle a seeded (mulberry32, not Math.random) autopilot eases in a two-finger gesture that drives `D` past the switch, ignites the machine, and releases, looping gently; yields the instant you touch. AudioContext created/resumed inside the "Begin" gesture; full rAF/AudioContext teardown on unmount. ¬∑ cycle 857 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-21) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: ketamine / dissociative k-hole ¬∑ pole: intense (non-dissolution ‚ÄĒ structure re-assembles) ¬∑ input: pointer/multi-touch PLAYED (4-param; self-demos via autopilot) ¬∑ output: SVG-DOM (real vector elements) ¬∑ technique: active‚ÜĒsilent switch + played decoupling ¬∑ harmony: Sethares stretched partials (A=2.02‚Üí2.30; NOT pentatonic/JI/BP) ¬∑ needs-a-human: pointer/touch (autopilot self-demos) ¬∑ nearest-neighbor: 2130-entity-parliament is the other INTENSE non-dissolution PLAYED piece (a presence ARRIVES); this is the dissociative WORLD reorganizing into an alien machine` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs Bera, Looger, Proekt & Cichon, "Cortical Mechanisms Contributing to Ketamine-Induced Dissociation," *The Neuroscientist* (online 2025-12-26 / print 2026-02-01) ¬∑ Sethares, *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* (1993) ¬∑ M.C. Escher / Penrose impossible architecture. **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 3/5:** #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: played 4-param input state-machine + SVG impossible-geometry engine + switch/decouple controller + dual-bank Sethares synth) ¬∑ #3 (three named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß857 dive, same date ‚ÄĒ the Bera et al. 2026 switch mechanism, which the piece implements as the played `D` flipping active‚ÜĒdormant). #1 NOT claimed (SVG-DOM + Sethares + pointer each exist in the ~1000-piece lab; the win is the dissociation-as-switch mechanic + played decoupling + the size of the concept). #4 OPENED not cashed (README marks it cycle-1 of a multi-cycle concept, 5 stated deepenings). **diversity:** `banned` = [Canvas2D ‚Č•4√ó (2086/2094/2130/2136)] + jury-2026-07-21 [autonomous/no-live-input (~5√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-fullscreen-fragment-shader (4√ó) ¬∑ single-scalar phenomenology-morph (~7√ó) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient DISSOLUTION content (4-straight) ¬∑ pentatonic/just-pentatonic/Bohlen‚ÄďPierce harmony]; `picked` = [multi-touch PLAYED 4-param input ¬∑ SVG-DOM output ¬∑ active‚ÜĒsilent switch + decoupling technique ¬∑ Sethares stretched-partial harmony ¬∑ INTENSE k-hole alien-architecture (structure re-assembles) vibe] ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 2166-silent-lattice(win, SVG-DOM) ¬∑ 2160-khole-switch(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, three.js 3D machine) ¬∑ 2172-dormant-engine(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, WebGPU-compute + Canvas2D fallback). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG-DOM; zero new npm deps). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ `D` slew-limited, all luminance slow drift, the one pulsing glow routed through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` (‚Č§3 Hz cap, here 0.6 Hz, prefers-reduced-motion honored); sparks are one-shot fades. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; both losers self-reported `tsc`+`eslint` clean then `rm -rf`'d (never committed); authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `/dream/2166-silent-lattice` in the route tree + `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted (whole-repo `npm run build` dies only at "Collecting page data" on the hard 4096-fd sandbox cap across 800+ routes ‚ÄĒ NOT a code defect, impossible on Vercel's higher-fd builder). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless ‚ÄĒ no display/touch/speakers): the SVG render, whether the impossible-tribar reads as genuinely impossible (builder flags it as an approximate paint-order interlock; exact per-corner masking = cycle-2), whether the switch reads as "my world reorganized into an alien machine" vs. a busy diagram, and the Sethares timbre-swap balance are reasoned + compile/lint-verified only; degrades gracefully (seeded autopilot self-demos the switch with no input; no-Web-Audio ‚Üí `text-destructive` notice). Design notes: `src/app/dream/2166-silent-lattice/README.md`

### [2178-oneirogen-tide](/dream/2178-oneirogen-tide) ¬∑ psychedelic / hypnagogia ¬∑ **the PLAYED cycle-2 of `2074-oneirogen` ‚ÄĒ cycle-1 let you WATCH a single dial őĪ hand the wheel from waking world ‚Üí internally-generated dream; Tide makes it an interaction model: you PLANT a seed of attention while awake and the dream preferentially replays and recombines exactly that seed, and you drive the wake‚Üísleep handoff with your own bodily ENGAGEMENT instead of a slider. DEEP-winner (cycle 858), 1 of 3 incubation-model approaches to one concept. The first real CASH of ambition criterion #4 (multi-cycle commitment) in the window ‚ÄĒ 853‚Äď857 were all single-fire, and every STATE entry flagged "a real multi-cycle cycle-2 is the loudest standing gap"; the 2026-07-21 jury named `2074-oneirogen` its #1 extend target ("a whole interaction model, not a screensaver ‚ÄĒ extend it"). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2184-incubation-pads (the SONIC reading ‚ÄĒ play a Dorian motif, the dream hums it back; resurrect on a headphones/audio-forward cycle) + ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2190-oneirogen-fixation (the TEMPORAL "bookmark the world" reading; resurrect with Karel's real Path piano as the world).** ¬∑ **INPUT = single-pointer drag (plant a seed) + ENGAGEMENT-drives-őĪ** ‚ÄĒ moving/interacting keeps engagement high and pulls őĪ toward wake; going STILL lets engagement decay and őĪ drift to sleep (attention holds you awake; letting go lets the dream take over ‚ÄĒ the real hypnagogic mechanic). Genuinely multi-parameter and PLAYED, NOT a single autonomous 0‚Üípeak‚Üí0 knob (breaks the jury-banned single-scalar-morph), NOT autonomous/no-live-input (jury-banned ~5√ó), NOT multi-touch (dodges the 854/855/857 multi-touch groove); a manual őĪ slider remains only as an accessibility override. ¬∑ **OUTPUT = Canvas2D additive phosphene field** (the faithful extend of cycle-1's substrate; explicitly NOT WebGL2-fullscreen-fragment-shader (jury-banned 4√ó, GPU cooled), NOT three.js/WebGPU, NOT SVG-DOM (just shipped 2166 ‚ÄĒ rested)). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = Wake-Sleep őĪ handoff DRIVEN by engagement + targeted-dream-incubation seed reactivation** ‚ÄĒ the seed's (x,y)+live spectral signature are written to a tagged, higher-weight run of the 256-slot memory ring; as őĪ rises the autonomous replay preferentially reactivates it (a sub-Hz reactivation clock blooms the field brighter from the seed's location, the tagged slots recur louder in the looped motif, the seed nudges the replay-pad detune ‚ÄĒ recombined with the ambient memory, not verbatim); newest of ‚Č§2 seeds weighted strongest. ¬∑ **AUDIO = free-detuned ambient pad** (4 detuned sine/triangle voices through a lowpass with sub-Hz LFOs) on `liveBus` (world, gain 1‚Üí0 with őĪ) crossfading to a generative `replayBus` (dream, gain 0‚Üí1); optional client-side dropped file via `decodeAudioData` (no network) ducks the pad. NON-lattice ‚ÄĒ NOT pentatonic, NOT a JI stack, NOT Bohlen‚ÄďPierce (all jury-flagged). ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ after Begin a seeded (mulberry32 `0x2178`, not Math.random) autopilot holds engagement high ~3s, auto-plants a seed, then releases so a hands-free 06:30 phone-glance viewer sees the full wake‚Üíincubate‚Üídream arc within ~15s; yields permanently on first real pointer input. AudioContext created/resumed inside the Begin gesture. ¬∑ cycle 858 ¬∑ DEEP-winner (2026-07-21) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: hypnagogia / sleep-onset incubation ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (handoff/replay ‚ÄĒ NOT dissolution) ¬∑ input: single-pointer drag + engagement-drives-őĪ (self-demos via autopilot) ¬∑ output: Canvas2D additive phosphene field ¬∑ technique: engagement-driven Wake-Sleep őĪ + targeted-dream-incubation seed reactivation from a tagged memory ring ¬∑ harmony: free-detuned ambient pad (NOT pentatonic/JI/BP) ¬∑ needs-a-human: single-pointer (autopilot self-demos) ¬∑ nearest-neighbor: extends 2074-oneirogen (which WATCHED the őĪ handoff); this is the PLAYED cycle-2 where you incubate what the dream replays` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs the oneirogen hypothesis (eLife reviewed preprint 105968, VoR 2026-04-21) ¬∑ "Targeted dream incubation at sleep onset can influence later dream content" (*Frontiers in Sleep* 2026-06-24, 10.3389/frsle.2026.1812535) ¬∑ MIT Media Lab Dormio (Horowitz, Maes). **Ambition ‚ÄĒ honest 4/5:** #4 (multi-cycle commitment CASHED ‚ÄĒ a real shipped cycle-2 of a named-standout line, README states 3 cycle-3 deepenings: competing seeds, a 2nd incubator over WebRTC, Karel's real Path piano as the world) ¬∑ #2 (‚Č•3 subsystems: file/pad audio + FFT band analyser + curl-noise phosphene field + tagged memory-ring + engagement‚ÜíőĪ follower + replay pad) ¬∑ #3 (three named refs above) ¬∑ #5 (¬ß858 dive, same date ‚ÄĒ the Frontiers Sleep 2026-06-24 TDI finding, which the seed mechanic implements). #1 NOT claimed (Canvas2D + curl-flow + pointer each exist in the ~1000-piece lab; the win is the played incubation interaction model + the multi-cycle cash). **diversity:** `banned` = jury-2026-07-21 [autonomous/no-live-input (~5√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-fullscreen-fragment-shader (4√ó) ¬∑ single-scalar phenomenology-morph (~7√ó) ¬∑ cosmic-ambient DISSOLUTION content (4-straight) ¬∑ pentatonic/just-pentatonic/Bohlen‚ÄďPierce harmony] + recent grooves [multi-touch 3√ó (854/855/857), SVG-DOM just shipped (857)]; `picked` = [single-pointer + engagement-őĪ input ¬∑ Canvas2D output ¬∑ engagement-driven őĪ + incubation-seed reactivation technique ¬∑ free-detuned ambient harmony ¬∑ cosmic-ambient HYPNAGOGIA/handoff (non-dissolution) vibe] ‚ÄĒ clears every live ban. **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 2178-oneirogen-tide(win, spatial-seed) ¬∑ 2184-incubation-pads(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, sonic-motif) ¬∑ 2190-oneirogen-fixation(banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź, temporal-bookmark). **No API route ‚Üí no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **SAFETY:** no strobe ‚ÄĒ őĪ + all luminance slew-limited ‚Č™3 Hz, the global luminance breath routed through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` (‚Č§3 Hz cap, soft sine floor, prefers-reduced-motion honored), the trail buffer dissolves (low-alpha fill) rather than clearing to hard black. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; ### [2196-cortex-weave](/dream/2196-cortex-weave) ¬∑ psychedelic / entoptic form-constant geometry ¬∑ **the four Kl√ľver form constants (tunnels, spokes/funnels, spirals, honeycomb lattices) as a VECTOR INSTRUMENT you PLAY from the keyboard ‚ÄĒ one cortical (log-polar) grid warped to SVG phosphene dots that morphs across all four constants as you sweep a single played parameter, and PROLIFERATES into an ecstatic overgrowth as you hold keys. WIDE-winner (cycle 859), 1 of 3 deliberately ZERO-GPU approaches. The direct cash of the 2026-07-21 jury's #3 ("name and stop the GPU-shader ping-pong ‚ÄĒ hold the non-GPU lanes"): the whole fan was three non-GPU ships (SVG-DOM winner + CSS-compositor + audio-only), and this is the lab's FIRST non-GPU form-constant piece (all 4 priors ‚ÄĒ 1038/1348/1862 ‚ÄĒ are WebGL/WebGPU shaders you WATCH) AND the first played-morph across all four constants, on the jury's un-built INTENSE geometric-proliferation-as-JOY pole (#2 "structure BUILDS"). Reuses the existing `_shared/psych/logpolar.ts` engine (not reinvented). Banked ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2202-plenum-rise (CSS-compositor Shepard‚ÄďRisset ARRIVAL plenum ‚ÄĒ the ~1√ó-only substrate; resurrect on a cosmic-ambient-rested cycle) + ‚≠ź‚≠ź 2208-deep-field (audio-only/HRTF turn-to-find presences; the audio-only queue is now 5-deep ‚ÄĒ ship ONE on a headphones cycle).** ¬∑ **INPUT = keyboard PLAYED, 3 independent axes** ‚ÄĒ `A ‚Ä¶ ;` set the form parameter **F** (which constant, continuous) + strike a modal voice; `‚ÜĎ/‚Üď` set spatial **freq**; holding keys raises a slew-limited growth follower **G**. NOT one master scalar (breaks the jury-banned single-scalar-morph), NOT autonomous/no-live-input (jury-banned ~5√ó), NOT mic (over-used), NOT multi-touch (would hit 4√ó in the last 10), NOT single-pointer (just shipped 858). ¬∑ **OUTPUT = SVG-DOM** ‚ÄĒ a bounded ‚Č§192-`<circle>` phosphene pool (two interleaved 8√ó12 cortical layers) built once + re-styled per frame; `mix-blend-mode: screen` so overlapping dots ADD into an over-bright lattice. The jury-celebrated recovering minority substrate; explicitly NOT WebGL2-fullscreen-shader (jury-banned 4√ó), NOT Canvas2D (warm ‚ÄĒ 2130/2136/2178, rested), NOT three.js/WebGPU (GPU cooled). ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE = retinocortical log-polar map + V1 Turing pattern (Bressloff‚ÄďCowan)** ‚ÄĒ each node placed via the shared `cortexToScreen` inverse warp (`r=exp(u)`); `F` interpolates `FORM_PHI` tunnel‚Üíspoke‚Üíspiral then blends in `honeycomb` (one grid ‚Üí all four constants); `G` lowers the lighting threshold + fades in a second double-`freq` harmonic layer ‚Üí proliferation (structure BUILDS, nothing dissolves); slow inward `phase` drift = tunnel motion. ¬∑ **AUDIO = modal / banded-waveguide voice bank** ‚ÄĒ bandpass-resonator voices at inharmonic non-JI ratios (1, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93, brightening with F) over **Dorian** fundamentals (G3 root), ‚Č§0.16 master + DynamicsCompressor, G-driven shimmer bus. NOT pentatonic, NOT a JI stack, NOT Bohlen‚ÄďPierce (all jury-flagged; Dorian modal is the rested non-lattice reach). ¬∑ **SELF-DEMO** ‚ÄĒ idle >5s ‚Üí a seeded (mulberry32 `0x2196`, not Math.random/Date.now) autopilot triangle-sweeps F across all four constants + breathes G + strikes voices, so a hands-free 06:30 phone-glance viewer sees the whole four-constant tour; yields to any real key/pad and sustained holds keep the player in control indefinitely. AudioContext created inside the Play gesture. ¬∑ cycle 859 ¬∑ WIDE-winner (2026-07-22) ¬∑ demoable ¬∑ `state: flicker/entoptic form-constant geometry ¬∑ pole: intense (geometric proliferation-as-JOY ‚ÄĒ structure builds, non-dissolution) ¬∑ input: keyboard PLAYED 3-axis F/freq/G (self-demos via autopilot) ¬∑ output: SVG-DOM ‚Č§192-circle additive phosphene lattice ¬∑ technique: retinocortical log-polar warp + F-morph across all four Kl√ľver constants + G-driven proliferation ¬∑ harmony: modal / banded-waveguide, Dorian fundamentals + inharmonic partials (NOT pentatonic/JI/BP) ¬∑ needs-a-human: keyboard (autopilot self-demos) ¬∑ nearest-neighbor: 1038-form-constant / 1348-prism-cortex / 1862-strobe-atlas are the prior form-constant pieces ‚ÄĒ but all are GPU shaders you WATCH; this is the first non-GPU (SVG-DOM) render and the first played-morph across all four` ¬∑ notes: `README.md` ¬∑ refs Kl√ľver, *Mescal and Mechanisms of Hallucinations* (1926) ¬∑ Bressloff, Cowan, Golubitsky, Thomas & Wiener, "Geometric visual hallucinations, Euclidean symmetry and the functional architecture of striate cortex" (*Phil. Trans. R. Soc.
